Genesis1:1 Aretak xchapletaj u banic ronojel ri c'olic, ri Dios xuban ri caj ulew." 
Genesis1:2 Man c'o ta u beya'l ri uwächulew, man c'o ta jas c'olic; xuwi jun choalaj plo ch'ukutal rumal k'ekumalil, are c'u ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cäwacat puwi' ri ja'." 
Genesis1:3 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “¡Chc'ol ri sakilal!” Xc'oji' c'u ri sakil. 
Genesis1:4 Xril c'u ri Dios chi utz ri sakilal, xutas ri sakilal che ri k'ekumalil," 
Genesis1:5 xucoj “pa k'ij” che u bi' ri sakilal, xucoj c'u “chak'ab” che u bi' ri k'ekumalil. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri nabe k'ij." 
Genesis1:6 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chubana' quieb ri ja', rech cäc'oji' jun c'olbal jamalic chquixo'l ri quieb ja'.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:7 Ri Dios xuban quieb che ri ja': niq'uiaj xcanaj cho ri ulew, niq'uiaj chic xcanaj cho ri caj," 
Genesis1:8 xucoj “caj” che u bi' ri qui xo'l. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri ucab k'ij. 
Genesis1:9 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chumulij rib ri ja' ri c'o chuxe' ri caj xa pa jun c'olbal, rech cäc'utun ri chaki'j.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:10 Ri Dios xucoj “ulew” che u bi' ri chaki'j ri xc'utunic, are c'u ri ja' ri xumulij rib xucoj “plo” che u bi'. Aretak xril ri Dios chi utz xelic," 
Genesis1:11 xubij: “Ri ulew chebuq'uiyisaj ronojel qui wäch k'ayes xukuje' ichaj ri quequiya' ija', cheq'uiy ronojel qui wäch che' ri quequiya' wächinic.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:12 Xeq'uiy c'ut ronojel qui wäch k'ayes cho ri ulew ri quequiya' qui wäch, xukuje' xeq'uiy ronojel qui wäch che' ri quequiya' wächinic. Xril c'u ri Dios chi utz xelic." 
Genesis1:13 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri urox k'ij. 
Genesis1:14 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chec'ol chäj chupam ri räxalaj caj, quitunuj ri uwächulew quitasa' c'ut ri k'ij che ri chak'ab chebajwataj c'ut xukuje' che qui c'utic tak ri k'ij, ri junab xukuje' ri q'uiakal tak k'ij.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:15  
Genesis1:16 Ri Dios xebuban ri quieb sakilal: ri nim rech cätunun pa k'ij xukuje' ri ch'utin rech cätunun chak'ab. Xukuje' xebuban ri ch'imil. 
Genesis1:17 Ri Dios xebucoj tak ri sakilal chupam ri räxalaj caj rech cutunuj ri ulew. 
Genesis1:18 Che ri pa k'ij xukuje' che ri chak'ab, che u tasic ri sakilal che ri k'ekumalil, xril c'u ri Dios chi utz xelic." 
Genesis1:19 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri ucaj k'ij. 
Genesis1:20 Xubij chi ri Dios: “Chebupok'isaj ri ja' ronojel qui wäch awaj, xukuje' chec'ol chicop ri c'o qui xic' ri querapap chicaj puwi' ri ulew.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:21 Ri Dios xebuban nimak jilijak tak awaj pa ri plo, ronojel qui wäch awaj xepok' pa ri ja' rech quec'oji' chupam, xukuje' xebuban ronojel qui wäch chicop ri c'o qui xic'. Aretak xril ri Dios chi utz," 
Genesis1:22 xebutewichi'j ri awaj ri xebubano, cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Chixalanok chixq'uiyirok, chinojisaj ri plo; xukuje' chepok' chicop ri c'o qui xic' cho ri uwächulew.”" 
Genesis1:23 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri uro' k'ij. 
Genesis1:24 Xubij chi ri Dios: “Chebupok'isaj ri ulew ronojel qui wäch awaj: aj uwo ja xukuje' juyubal tak awaj, xukuje' ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew.” Je c'u xbantajic." 
Genesis1:25 Ri Dios xebuban conojel we awaj ri', xril c'ut chi ronojel utz xcanajic." 
Genesis1:26 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Kabana' ri winak jacha' ri uj, cäc'oji' c'u na u takanic paquiwi' ri cär, ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic', ri awaj aj uwo ja, xukuje' paquiwi' ri caquijurula' tak quib cho ri ulew.”" 
Genesis1:27 Xuwinakirisaj c'ut ri Dios ri winak jas ri u ca'yebal, xuwinakirisaj jas ri u ca'yebal ri Dios; achi xukuje' ixok xebuwinakirisaj," 
Genesis1:28 xebutewichi'j: “Chec'ol q'ui iwalc'ual; chinojisaj ri uwächulew, chixtakan puwi'; xukuje' chixtakan paquiwi' ri cär, xukuje' paquiwi' ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic', xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri awaj ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew.”" 
Genesis1:29 Xukuje' xubij chi na chque: “Chiwilampe', quebenjach pa i k'ab ronojel qui wäch k'ayes ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew ri quequiya' ija', xukuje' conojel ri che' ri quequiya' qui wächinic. Ronojel wa' cajwataj che tzukbal iwib." 
Genesis1:30 Quinya' ri räx k'ayes che tzukbal quib conojel ri awaj ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub, conojel awaj ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew, xukuje' ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic'.” Je c'u xbantajic," 
Genesis1:31 xril c'u ri Dios chi ronojel ri u banom sibalaj utz xelic. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri uwak k'ij. 
Genesis2:1 Xtz'akat c'u u banic ri caj ulew, xukuje' conojel ri jastak ri e c'o pa ri caj xukuje' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Genesis2:2 Aretak xurik ri uwuk k'ij ri Dios u q'uisom chic u banic ri xuchaplej u banic, xtani' c'ut." 
Genesis2:3 Xutewichi'j c'ut ri uwuk k'ij, xuk'alajisaj c'ut chi tastalicalaj k'ij, rumal rech chi pa we k'ij ri' xtani' che u banic ronojel ri chac ri xebubano'." 
Genesis2:4 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri u banic ri caj xukuje' ri ulew. Aretak ri Ajawaxel Dios xuban ri caj ulew," 
Genesis2:5 maja' c'u c'o jun k'ayes cho ri uwächulew mawi c'o jun ichaj q'uiyinak rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel Dios maja' cukasaj jäb puwi' ri ulew, mawi c'o jachin caticow ri ulew." 
Genesis2:6 Cäq'uiy c'u ulok ja' pa ri ulew, ri cuja'j ronojel ri ulew." 
Genesis2:7 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel are xucoj ri puc'uc' ulew che u nuq'uic ri achi, xuxlab c'u pa u tza'm xuya' c'u u c'aslemal. Jeri' ri achi xuchaplej c'aslemal." 
Genesis2:8 Ri Ajawaxel xusuc'umaj jun ticonijibal chupam ri ulew Eden ri c'o pa elebal k'ij, chila' xuya' wi ri achi ri xbantaj rumal." 
Genesis2:9 Ri Dios xebuq'uiyisaj chila' ronojel qui wäch je'licalaj tak che' ri quequiya' utzalaj tak wächinic utz qui tijic. Pa u niq'uiajil c'ut ri ticonijibal xucoj wi ri juwi' che' re ri c'aslemal, xukuje' ri juwi' che' ri cuya' retamaxic ri utz xukuje' ri man utz taj." 
Genesis2:10 Pa Eden cäq'uiy wi jun nima' ri cuja'j ri ticonijibal chila' c'ut cujach wi rib we nima' ri' pa quiejeb. 
Genesis2:11 Ri nabe nima', Pison u bi', ri cäk'ax pa ronojel ri ulew Habil, jawije' c'o wi k'an puak." 
Genesis2:12 Ri k'an puak ri c'o pa ri ulew ri' sibalaj pakal rajil, xukuje' c'o c'oc'alaj k'ol chila'; xukuje' abaj re onis." 
Genesis2:13 Ri ucab nima', Jihon u bi', ri cäk'ax pa ronojel ri ulew Cus." 
Genesis2:14 Are c'u ri urox are' ri nima' Tigris, ri cäk'ax pa elebal k'ij che ri Asiriy. Ri ucaj are' ri nima' Euprats." 
Genesis2:15 Aretak ri Ajawaxel Dios xucoj ri achi chupam ri ticonijibal Eden rech cutajij xukuje' cuchajij," 
Genesis2:16 xuya' we takanic ri' che: “Cuya' catij awe ri qui wäch conojel ri che' ri e c'o pa ri ticonijibal, Matij c'u awech ri u wäch ri che' ri cuya' retamaxic ri utz xukuje' ri man utz taj." 
Genesis2:17 Matij awe ri u wäch ri che' ri', we catijo kastzij catcäm na.”" 
Genesis2:18 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel Dios: “Man utz taj chi ri achi xak u tuquiel cäc'ojic. Quinban jun to'l rech ri takal che.” 
Genesis2:19 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel Dios ulew xucoj che qui banic conojel ri awaj xukuje' conojel tak ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', xebuc'am c'u ulok chuwäch ri achi rech quebucoj qui bi'. Ri achi xucoj qui bi' conojel ri awaj aj uwo ja, conojel ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' xukuje' conojel ri juyubal tak awaj, are c'u bi'aj wa' xcanaj chque. Man c'o ta c'u ne jun chque ri utz ta xel che to'l rech ri xtaki' ta che." 
Genesis2:20  
Genesis2:21 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xuwartasaj ri Adan aretak c'u kajinak che waram ri Dios xresaj jun chque ri u c'alc'a'x, xuban c'u can u banic ri u ti'jal." 
Genesis2:22 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xucoj we c'alc'a'x ri' che u banic jun ixok, xujach c'u pa u k'ab ri Adan." 
Genesis2:23 Aretak ri Adan xril ri ixok, ruc' quicotemal xubij: “¡Are kas u tz'akatil ri nu ti'jal wa' xukuje' u tz'akatil ri nu bakil! ‘Ixok’ cuchi'x na, che c'u ri achi xresaj wi ri Dios.”" 
Genesis2:24 Rumal c'u ri' ri achi quebuya' can ri u tat u nan rech cätuni' ruc' ri rixokil, ri e quieb quebux na xa jun winak." 
Genesis2:25 Ri achi jacha' ri ixok e ch'anach'oj, man c'o ta c'u jun chque ri quieb xuna' ta q'uixbal chi jewa' qui banom wa'." 
Genesis3:1 Ri cumätz are c'o na u no'j chquiwäch conojel ri juyubal tak awaj ri e u banom ri Ajawaxel Dios, xuc'ot c'u u chi' ri ixok: “¿La u bim ri Dios chiwe chi man quitij taj ri qui wäch ri che' ri e c'o pa ri ticonijibal?”" 
Genesis3:2 Ri ixok xubij che: “Cuya' cäkatij kech ri u wäch apachique che'," 
Genesis3:3 are c'u ri u wäch ri che' ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri ticonijibal. Xubij ri Dios chke chi man cäkatij taj, mawi cakachap ri u wäch we che' ri', we c'u cäkabano cujcäm na.”" 
Genesis3:4 Are c'u ri cumätz xubij che ri ixok: “Man kastzij taj. Man quixcäm taj. 
Genesis3:5 Ri Dios kas reta'm chi aretak quitij iwe ri u wäch we che' ri', cäc'oji' i no'j che retamaxic ri utz xukuje' ri man utz taj, je c'u ri' quixux jacha' ri Dios.”" 
Genesis3:6 Xril c'u ri ixok chi sibalaj je'lic ri u wäch ri che', xpe u rayinic che u tijic rech cäc'oji' retamanic. Xuchup c'u jun chque ri e u wäch ri che', xutij c'ut xuya' c'u rech ri rachajil, xukuje' c'u ri are' xutijo." 
Genesis3:7 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xejaktaj ri qui bak'wäch, qui cabichal c'ut xquil quib chi e ch'analic. Xequit'is u xak tak higo che ch'ukubal quib." 
Genesis3:8 Pa ri u benabal k'ij, ri achi rachil ri ixok xquito' chi ri Ajawaxel Dios cätajin cäwacat pa ri ticonijibal, pa ri jok'otaj aretak cajuch'ich' ri quiakik' re ri xk'ekal, xquic'u' quib chuwäch ri Dios xo'l tak ri che' ri e c'o pa ri ticonijibal." 
Genesis3:9 Are' c'u ri Dios ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ri achi, xubij che: “¿Jawije' at c'o wi?”" 
Genesis3:10 Ri achi xubij: “Xinto chi cäwacat la pa ri ticonijibal xinxe'j c'u wib, rumal rech chi in ch'analic, rumal ri' xinc'u' wib chwäch la.”" 
Genesis3:11 Ri Dios xuc'ot u chi' ri achi, xubij che: “¿Jachin xbin chawe chi at ch'analic? ¿La xa xatij awe ri u wäch ri che' ri xinbij chawe chi man catij taj?”" 
Genesis3:12 Ri achi xubij che ri Dios: “Ri ixok ri xya' la chwe che wachil are xyo'w ri u wäch ri che' chwe, xintij c'ut.”" 
Genesis3:13 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xuc'ot chi u chi' ri ixok, xubij che: “¿Jas ri a banom?” Ri ixok xubij che ri Dios: “Xinusub ri cumätz, rumal ri' xintij ri u wäch ri che'.”" 
Genesis3:14 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xubij che ri cumätz: “Rumal wa' ri a banom at c'okotajinak chquixo'l conojel ri niq'uiaj awaj. Camic cachaplej bic u jururexic awib cho ri ulew, ulew catij na pa ronojel ri a c'aslemal." 
Genesis3:15 Quinban na chi ri at xukuje' ri ixok, quic'ulelaj na iwib, junam xukuje' ri awija'lil ruc' ri rija'lil. Ri rija'lil cuwach' na ri a jolom, are c'u ri at cacatz na ri u xe' rakan.”" 
Genesis3:16 Xubij c'u ri Dios che ri ixok: “Quinbano chi cänimataj ri a k'oxomal aretak cäc'oji' ri awal, ruc' k'oxom cawil qui wäch ri e awal. Pune' cärik ri k'oxomal, lok' ri' ri awachajil chawäch, cätakan c'u na ri awachajil pawi'.”" 
Genesis3:17 Xubij c'u che ri achi: “Rumal rech xanimaj u tzij ri awixokil, xatij c'u u wäch ri che' ri xinbij chawe chi man catij taj, camic ri ulew cäcanaj chuxe' c'okonic u mac awech; ruc' c'axalaj chac cäban na chi cuq'uiyisaj ri catijo pa ronojel ri a c'aslemal." 
Genesis3:18 Ri ulew quebuya' na q'uix chawe xukuje' quiäkwok' quebatij na juyubal tak k'ayes. 
Genesis3:19 Cach'äc na ri a wa ruc' ri u c'atanal ri a palaj, c'ä cattzelej na pa ri ulew ri xatesax wi', at c'u ya' ulew catux chi c'u na ulew.”" 
Genesis3:20 Ri achi xucoj Eva che u bi' ri rixokil, are c'ut qui nan conojel ri e c'aslic." 
Genesis3:21 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xebuban atz'iak re qui tz'umal tak awaj, che ratz'iak rech quebucoj ri achi xukuje' ri rixokil." 
Genesis3:22 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Camic ri achi uxinak jacha' jun chke, xretamaj jachique ri utz xukuje' ri man utz taj. Muc'am ne apan ri u wäch ri che' re c'aslemal, cutij ta c'ut, cäc'asi ta c'u ri' chbe k'ij sak.”" 
Genesis3:23 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xresaj bic ri achi pa ri ticonijibal ri c'o pa Eden, xutak che u tiquic u wäch ri ulew ri esam wi'." 
Genesis3:24 Aretak resam chi bic ri achi, xebucoj jujun aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic', pa elebal k'ij che ri ticonijibal xukuje' jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri sibalaj cäjuluwic ri cäsutin pa ronojel c'olbal, rech mawi jun cäkeb chuxcut ri che' re c'aslemal." 
Genesis4:1 Ri Adan, ri Eva xcuc'aj quib, xc'oji' c'u ri Cain ri qui nabeal, xubij ri Eva: “Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm jun wal ala.”" 
Genesis4:2 Xalax chi c'u ri Abel u chak' ri Cain. Ri Abel xebutic chij, are c'u ri Cain xutic u wäch ri ulew." 
Genesis4:3 Xoc'ow ri k'ijol c'o c'u jun k'ij aretak ri Cain xuc'am bic jubik' qui wächinic ri u tico'n, xuya' che tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis4:4 Xukuje' ri Abel xebuc'am bic jujun chque ri nabe tak cal ri e u chij ri e chomak xebuya' che tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Ri Ajawaxel nim xril wi ri Abel, xukuje' ri u sipanic," 
Genesis4:5 man je ta c'u xuban ri Dios che rilic ri Cain, xukuje' ri u sipanic. Sibalaj xpe royowal ri Cain, xk'alajin che ri u palaj." 
Genesis4:6 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Cain: “¿Jasche sibalaj xpe awoyowal, xk'alajin c'u che ri a palaj?" 
Genesis4:7 We ta utz ri cäbano, catcuin ta ri' cawalijisaj ri a palaj; we c'u man utz ri cabano, ri mac xak at reyem jampa' cätkaj pa u k'ab. Catcuin c'u ne che ch'äcanic puwi'.”" 
Genesis4:8 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak ri Cain xusiq'uij bic ri Abel, xebe pa jun wacatem; aretak c'u e c'o chi pa ri juyub, ri Cain xuch'ay ri Abel, xucämisaj c'ut." 
Genesis4:9 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ot u chi' ri Cain, xubij che: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri Abel ri a chak'?” Ri Cain xubij: “Man weta'm taj. ¿La in ta puch chajil rech ri nu chak'?”" 
Genesis4:10 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Cain: “¿Jas ri xaban che ri a chak'? Ri u quiq'uel ri a chak' ri xatix cho ri ulew, curak u chi' cuta' chwe chi quinc'äjisaj a wäch." 
Genesis4:11 Rumal ri' xat canaj pa ri c'okotajic, catel bic pa ri ulew ri xubik' ri u quiq'uel ri awachalal ri xa cämisaj." 
Genesis4:12 Pune' cajosk'ij, ri ulew, man cuya' ta chic ri u wächinic chawe jas ri nabe. Xak catxulic catpaki' cho ri uwächulew mawi jubik' catcuinic catuxlanic.”" 
Genesis4:13 Ri Cain xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Ri in man quincuin taj quinch'ij jun c'äjisabal wächaj ri sibalaj nim. 
Genesis4:14 Camic quinesaj la bic cho we ulew ri', quinbinicat c'u na ri' cho ri uwächulew naj che ri c'o wi la, mawi c'u jubik' ri' quincuinic quinuxlanic. Je c'u ri' apachin ta ne ri quinrikowic quinucämisaj na.”" 
Genesis4:15 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Cain: “Apachin ri catcämisanic wukub mul cäc'äjisax na u wäch.” Ri Ajawaxel xucoj retal ri Cain, rech apachin ri cärikowic man cäcämisax ta rumal." 
Genesis4:16 Xel c'u bic ri Cain chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xec'ol pa Nod, ri ulew ri c'o pa elebal k'ij che ri Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Ri Cain xruc'aj rib ruc' ri rixokil. Xcanaj c'u yawab winak. Xralaj c'ut ri Enoc. Ri Cain xuyac jun tinimit ri xucoj Enoc che u bi' jas ri u bi' ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis4:18 Ri Irad are' ri u tat ri Enoc, ri Mehujael are' ri u tat ri Irad, ri Metusael are' ri u tat ri Mehujael, ri Lamec are' ri u tat ri Metusael." 
Genesis4:19 Ri Lamec xec'oji' quieb rixokil: Ri jun are' Ada u bi', ri jun chic Zil u bi'." 
Genesis4:20 Ri Ada xralaj ri Jabal, ri e ralc'ual ri Jabal ri xepok' wi ri xec'oji' pa tak cäbal, ri xequitic tak wacax." 
Genesis4:21 Ri Jabal c'o jun rachalal Jubal u bi', are' c'u qui tat conojel ri xquik'ojomaj arp xukuje' su'." 
Genesis4:22 Are c'u ri Zil xc'oji' jun ral Tubal-cain u bi', are ch'ayal ch'ich', quebuban jastak re k'an ch'ich' xukuje' re räx ch'ich'. Ri Tubal-cain xc'oji' jun rana'b Naama u bi'." 
Genesis4:23 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij ri Lamec xubij chque ri e quieb rixokil: “Ada, Zil, ix wixokil, kas chitampe' ri quinbij chiwe: nu cämisam jun achi xa rumal chi xinusoco; nu cämisam jun ala xa rumal chi xinuch'ayo;" 
Genesis4:24 we wukub (7) mul cäc'äjisax u wäch ri cäcämisan ri Cain, oxc'al wuklajuj (77) mul cäc'äjisax u wäch ri quincämisanic.”" 
Genesis4:25 Ri Adan xruc'aj chi rib ruc' ri rixokil, ri Eva xc'oji' chi jun ral ala, ri xucoj Set che u bi', xubij: “Ri Dios u yo'm chi jun wal ala che u q'uexwäch ri Abel ri xcämisax rumal ri Cain.”" 
Genesis4:26 Xukuje' ri Set xc'oji' jun u c'ojol ri xucoj Enos che u bi'. Kas c'u chi' xchapletaj u nataxic ulok ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel. 
Genesis5:1 E are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Adan. Aretak ri Dios xebuban ri winak, xuwinakirisaj jas ri u ca'yebal ri Dios;" 
Genesis5:2 chi achi, chi ixok xebuwinakirisaj xuya' ri u tewichibal paquiwi'. Pa ri k'ij ri xewinakirisaxic, ri Dios xubij: “Winak caquibinaj na.”" 
Genesis5:3 Ri Adan jun sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (130) u junab aretak xalax ri u c'ojol ri sibalaj junam cäca'y ruc', ri xucoj Set che u bi'." 
Genesis5:4 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient (800) junab ri Adan. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:5 belejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (930) junab xc'asi' ri Adan. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:6 Ri Set jun sient ruc' job (105) u junab aretak xalax ri Enos ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:7 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' wukub (807) junab ri Set. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:8 belejeb sient ruc' cablajuj (912) junab xc'asi' ri Set. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:9 Jumuch' lajuj (90) u junab ri Enos aretak xalax ri Cainan ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:10 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' olajuj (815) junab ri Enos. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:11 belejeb sient ruc' job (905) junab xc'asi' ri Enos. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:12 Oxc'al lajuj (70) u junab ri Cainan aretak xalax ri Mahalaleel ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:13 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' cawinak (840) junab ri Cainan. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:14 belejeb sient ruc' lajuj (910) junab xc'asi' ri Cainan. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:15 Oxc'al job (65) u junab ri Mahalaleel aretak xalax ri Jared ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:16 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (830) junab ri Mahalaleel. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:17 wajxakib sient ruc' jumuch' olajuj (895) junab xc'asi' ri Mahalaleel. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:18 Jun sient ruc' oxc'al quieb (162) u junab ri Jared aretak xalax ri Enoc ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:19 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient (800) junab ri Jared. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:20 belejeb sient ruc' oxc'al quieb (962) junab xc'asi' ri Jared. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:21 Oxc'al job (65) u junab ri Enoc aretak xalax ri Matusalen ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:22 Ri Enoc xniman che ri Dios pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal. Xc'asi' chi c'u na oxib sient (300) junab. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:23 oxib sient ruc' oxc'al job (365) junab xc'asi' ri Enoc. 
Genesis5:24 Ri Enoc xak xsachic, xc'am bic rumal ri Dios rumal rech chi xniman che ri Dios pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal." 
Genesis5:25 Jun sient ruc' jumuch' wukub (187) u junab ri Matusalen aretak xalax ri Lamec ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis5:26 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wukub sient ruc' jumuch' quieb (782) junab ri Matusalen. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:27 belejeb sient ruc' oxc'al belejeb (969) junab xc'asi' ri Matusalen. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:28 Jun sient jumuch' quieb (182) u junab ri Lamec aretak xalax jun u c'ojol," 
Genesis5:29 ri xucoj Noe che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Ri Ajawaxel xuc'okoj ri ulew, sibalaj c'u c'ax cäkarik che u josk'ixic; cujuto' c'u na we ac'al ri' rech cujuxlanic.”" 
Genesis5:30 Chwi' ri ralc'ualaxic ri Noe, xc'asi' chi na job sient ruc' jumuch' olajuj (595) junab ri Lamec. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l;" 
Genesis5:31 wukub sient ruc' oxc'al wuklajuj (777) junab xc'asi' ri Lamec. Je u junab wa' xcämic. 
Genesis5:32 Job sient (500) chic u junab ri Noe aretak xebalax ri Sem, Cam, Japet ri e u c'ojol." 
Genesis5:32 Job sient (500) chic u junab ri Noe aretak xebalax ri Sem, Cam, Japet ri e u c'ojol." 
Genesis6:1 Aretak ri achijab xquichaplej u nojisaxic ri uwächulew, xec'oji' c'u qui mia'l," 
Genesis6:2 ri e ralc'ual ri Dios xquilo chi ri alitomab ri' sibalaj e je'lic. Xequicha' quixokil chquixo'l, xec'uli' c'u cuc' jachin ri xcaj wi." 
Genesis6:3 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel: “Man quinya' ta be chque ri winak chi sibalaj naj cäc'asi'c, rumal rech chi ri are' xak ti'j. Xa jun sient ruc' juwinak (120) junab cäc'asi'c.”" 
Genesis6:4 Ri nimak tak achijab xec'utun cho ri uwächulew aretak ri e ralc'ual ri Dios xcuc'aj quib cuc' tak ri e qui mia'l ri achijab rech quec'oji' calc'ual cuc', chumatam chi c'ut. E are tak wa' ri xebux nimak tak qui k'ij pa tak ri ojer tak k'ijol." 
Genesis6:5 Ri Ajawaxel xrilo chi sibalaj nim ri quetzelal ri winak cho ri uwächulew, xukuje' chi amak'el are cuchomaj u banic ri etzelal," 
Genesis6:6 c'ax c'u xuna' pa ri ranima' chi xuban ri winak. Ruc' sibalaj c'axc'ol, xubij:" 
Genesis6:7 “Quinq'uis tzij paquiwi' ri winak cho ri uwächulew ri e nu winakirisam, xukuje' conojel ri awaj aj uwo tak ja, ri awaj ri cäquijururej tak quib, xukuje' ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'. ¡C'ax pa wanima' chi xebenbano!”" 
Genesis6:8 Ri Ajawaxel utz c'u xril wi ri Noe. 
Genesis6:9 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri Noe. Ri Noe are' ri jun achi ri utz, ri amak'el nimaninak che ri Dios. Chquixo'l conojel ri winak pa tak ri k'ij ri' xuwi ri are' xniman che ri Dios." 
Genesis6:10 Ri Noe xec'oji' oxib u c'ojol, e are wa': Sem, Cam, Japet." 
Genesis6:11 Nojinak c'u ri uwächulew che etzelal chuwäch ri Dios xukuje' che tokinic. 
Genesis6:12 Conojel ri winak e uxinak nimak tak ajmaquib. Aretak xril ri Dios chi sibalaj nojinak ronojel ri uwächulew che ri etzelal," 
Genesis6:13 xubij che ri Noe: “Xchomataj wumal chi quinsach qui wäch conojel ri winak. E are' c'ut ajchak'maquib chi e c'o q'ui ri tokinic cho ri uwächulew, rumal ri' xinchomaj u sachic qui wäch ri winak xukuje' ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Genesis6:14 Chabana' ba' jun jucub re q'uisis, cäban alaj tak ja chupam, chacojo' k'ol chupam xukuje' chrij rech man coc ta ri ja' chupam." 
Genesis6:15 Je u nimal jucub wa' cäbano: jun sient ruc' oxc'al job (165) bara' u rabic, juwinak wukub (27) bara' u wäch, waklajuj (16) bara' cärak'anibej." 
Genesis6:16 Oxwik cäban che, cäban jun u wenta'n re niq'uiaj bara' man copan che ri u wi', xa jun u chi' cäban pa jun u xcut." 
Genesis6:17 Quinkasaj na jun k'ekal jäb puwi' ri uwächulew, che u sachic qui wäch conojel ri e c'asc'oj cho ronojel ri uwächulew. Quecäm na conojel ri winak xukuje' conojel ri chicop ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Genesis6:18 Awuc' c'u at quinjekeba' wi ri nu c'ulwächinic, queboc na ri e a c'ojol pa ri jucub, ri awixokil, ri e awalib xukuje' ri at." 
Genesis6:19 Xukuje' quebacoj pa ri jucub jun ama' jun ati't chque ronojel qui wäch awaj ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, rech quec'asi' can awuc' pa ri jucub." 
Genesis6:20 Queboc na awuc' pa ri jucub pa tak c'ulaj ronojel qui wäch awaj: chicop ri c'o qui xic', awaj aj uwo tak ja, xukuje' awaj ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew, rech quec'asi'c." 
Genesis6:21 Chamulij ronojel qui wäch ri cätijic, chac'olo' c'ut rech c'o quitij ix, xukuje' c'o cäquitij ri awajib.”" 
Genesis6:22 Ri Noe xuban ronojel ri xtak chubanic rumal ri Dios. 
Genesis7:1 Chwi' chi c'ut ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Noe: “Chquixo'l conojel ri winak re we k'ijol ri', xuwi ri at a banom ri nu rayibal. Rumal ri' chatoc chupam ri jucub quebawachilaj ri e awachalal." 
Genesis7:2 Chebamajij wukub ama'ib xukuje' wukub ati'tab che ronojel awaj ch'ajch'oj, xa c'u jun ama' xukuje' xa jun ati't chque ri e tz'il." 
Genesis7:3 Xukuje' quebacojo pa ri jucub wukutak c'ulaj chque ronojel qui wäch chicop ri c'o qui xic', rech man cäsach ta qui wäch we awaj ri' cho ri uwächulew." 
Genesis7:4 Xa c'u pa wukub k'ij quinkasaj jun k'ekal jäb re cawinak (40) k'ij, cawinak (40) ak'ab. ¡Quinsach na qui wäch conojel ri e c'aslic, ri e nu banom!”" 
Genesis7:5 Xuban c'u ri Noe ronojel ri xtak che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Genesis7:6 Wakib sient (600) u junab ri Noe aretak xnojisax ri uwächulew rumal ri ja' re ri k'ekal jäb. 
Genesis7:7 Ri Noe rachil ri rixokil, ri e u c'ojol xukuje' ri quixokil, xeboc pa ri jucub chuto'ic quib chuwäch ri k'ekal jäb." 
Genesis7:8 Xukuje' ri awaj ri e ch'ajch'oj xukuje' ri e tz'il, ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' xukuje' ri awaj ri cäquijururej quib," 
Genesis7:9 pa tak c'ulaj xeboc pa ri jucub ruc' ri Noe, jun ama' jun ati't jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Genesis7:10 Chuwuk k'ij ri k'ekal jäb xuchaplej u ch'ukic ri ulew. 
Genesis7:11 Pa ri uwuklajuj (17) rajilabal ri ucab ic'. Ri Noe c'o chic wakib sient (600) u junab. Kas pa ri k'ij ri', xetorotaj ulok ri plo pa ri ulew, xukuje' xetortaj ulok ri ja' pa ri caj." 
Genesis7:12 Cawinak (40) k'ij, cawinak (40) ak'ab xuban ri k'ekal jäb puwi' ri uwächulew." 
Genesis7:13 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' xoc ri Noe pa ri jucub e rachil ri Sem, Cam, Japet ri e u c'ojol, ri rixokil xukuje' ri e oxib ralib." 
Genesis7:14 Ronojel qui wäch juyubal tak awaj xeboc cuc' pa ri jucub, xukuje' ronojel qui wäch tak awaj ri e aj uwo ja ronojel qui wäch awaj ri cäquijururej quib xukuje' ronojel qui wäch chicop ri c'o qui xic'." 
Genesis7:15 Ronojel qui wäch awaj xeboc ruc' ri Noe pa ri jucub, pa tak c'ulaj." 
Genesis7:16 Jun ama' jun ati't chque ronojel qui wäch awaj, jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Dios che ri Noe, xtz'apix c'u ri u chi' ri jucub rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis7:17 Cawinak (40) k'ij xuban ri k'ekal jäb. Aretak xq'uiy ri ja', ri ja' xuyac ri jucub puwi' ri ulew, xuchaplej c'u liowem." 
Genesis7:18 Sibalaj c'u xq'uiy na ri ja' xutakej pakalem, are c'u ri jucub xutakej c'u liowem." 
Genesis7:19 Sibalaj c'u naj xpaki' na ri ja' chi xebuch'uk na ri juyub ri sibalaj naj e elinak puwi' ri uwächulew; 
Genesis7:20 xpaki' chi c'u na wajxakib (8) bara' ri ja' paquiwi' tak ri juyub. 
Genesis7:21 Je u sachic qui wäch wa' conojel ri winak cho ri uwächulew, ronojel qui wäch chicop ri c'o qui xic', ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja, xukuje' ri awaj ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew." 
Genesis7:22 Xecäm conojel ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, ri c'o qui c'aslemal, ri quebuxlabic." 
Genesis7:23 Xuwi ri Noe xukuje' ri xeboc ruc' pa ri jucub, xec'asi' canok; ri niq'uiaj chic xsach qui wäch: ri winak, ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja, ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' xukuje' ri awaj ri cäquijururej quib puwi' ri ulew;" 
Genesis7:24 jun sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (150) k'ij xchemi ri ja' cho ri uwächulew. 
Genesis8:1 Xnataj ri Noe che ri Dios xukuje' xenataj conojel ri awaj che ri e c'o ruc' ri Noe pa ri jucub. Xutak ulok jun quiakik' puwi' ri uwächulew, nojim xbutzajic ri ja';" 
Genesis8:2 xetz'apitaj ri jul pa ri ulew ri quel wi ulok ri nimalaj plo, xukuje' ri quebel wi ulok ri ja' cho ri caj. Xtani' c'u ri jäb," 
Genesis8:3 nojim xbutzajic ri ja'. Chuq'uisbal ri jun sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (150) k'ij, ri ja' xbutzajic," 
Genesis8:4 pa ri uwuklajuj (17) rajilabal ri uwuk ic', xcanaj c'u can ri jucub puwi' ri juyub Ararat." 
Genesis8:5 Xutakej c'u u tzajic ri ja', pa ri nabe k'ij re ri ulajuj ic', quek'alajin chic ri nimak tak juyub." 
Genesis8:6 Aretak oc'owinak chic cawinak (40) k'ij, ri Noe xujak ri u wenta'n ri jucub ri u banom," 
Genesis8:7 xutzokopij c'u bic jun joj; are c'u ri joj cärapapic cäbe jeri' cäbe jela', reyem chi cächaki'jar ri uwächulew." 
Genesis8:8 Aretak u tzokopim chic ri joj, xutzokopij chic jun palomax che rilic we chaki'j chic ri uwächulew;" 
Genesis8:9 ri palomax man xurik taj jawije' xtaq'ui' wi xtzelej chi c'u jumul pa ri jucub, c'ä ch'ukutal c'u ri uwächulew rumal ri ja'. Ri Noe xresaj ulok ri u k'ab xuchap ri palomax, xucoj bic ruc' pa ri jucub." 
Genesis8:10 Xreyej chi na wukub k'ij ri Noe, xutzokopij chi c'u jumul ri palomax." 
Genesis8:11 Xa jubik' man coc ri ak'ab aretak xtzelej ri palomax pa ri jucub, ruc'am jun alaj u k'ab aseitun ruc' ri u tza'm. Jeri' ri Noe xretamaj chi cätajin cäbe u chaki'jaric ri ulew." 
Genesis8:12 Xreyej chi na wukub k'ij c'ä te' ri' xutak, chi bic jumul ri palomax; man xtzelej ta chi c'ut ri palomax." 
Genesis8:13 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri nabe ic', aretak c'o chic wakib sient ruc' jun (601) u junab ri Noe, xchaki'jar ri uwächulew. Ri Noe xresaj ri u wi' ri jucub, xrilo chi chaki'j chic ri ulew." 
Genesis8:14 Pa ri juwinak wukub (27) rajilabal ri ucab ic', sibalaj chaki'j chic ri ulew." 
Genesis8:15 Xubij ri Dios che ri Noe: 
Genesis8:16 “Chixel ulok pa ri jucub ri at, ri awixokil, ri e a c'ojol, ri e awalib." 
Genesis8:17 Xukuje' chebawesaj bic ri awaj ri e c'o awuc': ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja, xukuje' ri awaj ri cäquijururej tak quib puwi' ri ulew, cheboj pa ronojel c'olbal, chepok'ok c'ut cheq'uiyir cho ronojel ri uwächulew.”" 
Genesis8:18 Xel c'u ulok ri Noe pa ri jucub rachil ri rixokil, ri e u c'ojol xukuje' ri e ralib." 
Genesis8:19 Xukuje' xebel ulok conojel ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja, xukuje' ri e juyubal tak awaj, ri awaj ri cäquijururej quib, xukuje' ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'." 
Genesis8:20 Xuban c'ut ri Noe jun porobal ri che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Xebuc'am awaj xukuje' chicop ri c'o qui xic' ri e ch'ajch'oj jujun che jujun qui wäch, xebuporoj che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis8:21 Aretak xopan ri c'oc'alaj ruxlab ri tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xubij: “Mawi jumul quinc'okoj ta chic ri ulew u mac rech ri winak, kas c'u pa ri rac'alal ulok ri winak xuwi cuchomaj ri man utz taj. Xukuje' mawi jumul quinsach chic qui wäch conojel ri awaj, jas ri nu banom.”" 
Genesis8:22 “Joropa' k'ij ri cäjeki' ri uwächulew, kas amak'el c'o wi ticonijic xukuje' wächinic; cuban na k'ak', cuban na tew, cuban na k'alaj, cuban na sak'ij, cuban na pa k'ij, cuban na chak'ab.”" 
Genesis9:1 Ri Dios xutewichi'j ri Noe xukuje' ri e u c'ojol cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Chec'ol q'ui iwalc'ual, chinojisaj ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:2 Conojel ri awaj re ri uwächulew quebirbob na che xe'n ib chiwäch. Conojel awaj ri e c'o pa ri quiakik', pa ri plo, e c'o chuxe' ri i takanic." 
Genesis9:3 Cuya' quitij iwe apachique awaj, xukuje' apachique ichaj ri quiwaj, quinjach c'u pa i k'ab." 
Genesis9:4 C'o c'u jun jasach ri man cuya' taj quitijo: ri ti'j rachil ri u quiq'uel, chupam c'ut ri quic' c'o wi ri c'aslemal." 
Genesis9:5 In quinch'ojij na chque ri winak chquijujunal, xukuje' chque ri awaj chquijujunal, ri i quiq'uel chijujunal. Quinch'ojij na chque ri winak chquijujunal ri u c'aslemal ri rajil u tz'akat.”" 
Genesis9:6 “We c'o jun cucämisaj jun winak, jun winak chic cacämisan na ri are', ri winak c'ut xwinak'irisaxic che ri u banic ri u ca'yebal ri Dios." 
Genesis9:7 Are c'u ri ix, ¡chec'ol q'ui iwalc'ual chinojisaj ri uwächulew cumal!”" 
Genesis9:8 Xubij chi c'u ri Dios che ri Noe, xukuje' chque ri u c'ojol:" 
Genesis9:9 “Chiwilampe', quinjekeba' ri nu c'ulwächinic iwuc' xukuje' cuc' tak ri e iwija'lil." 
Genesis9:10 Xukuje' cuc' conojel ri awaj ri e c'o iwuc' ri xebel ulok pa ri jucub: ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja, ri juyubal tak awaj, xukuje' cuc' conojel awaj re ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:11 Ri nu c'ulwächinic iwuc' ix man cäq'uextaj ta na: man quinsach ta chquiwäch ri winak, xukuje' ri awaj ruc' jun k'ekal jäb. Mawi jumul cuban ta chic jun k'ekal jäb ri cusach ta chi u wäch ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:12 Are wa' ri retal ri nu c'ulwächinic ri xa jumul quinban iwuc', xukuje' cuc' conojel awaj:" 
Genesis9:13 Nu cojom ri nu räxquiak'ab pa ri sutz', cajwataj c'u na jacha' che retal ri c'ulwächinic ri quinban ruc' ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:14 Aretak quintak ulok sutz', puwi' ri ulew, cäc'utun ri nu räxquiak'ab pa ri sutz'." 
Genesis9:15 Cänataj c'u ri c'ulwächinic ri nu banom iwuc' xukuje' cuc' conojel ri awaj, man cäpe ta chi c'u na jun k'ekal jäb che u sachic i wäch." 
Genesis9:16 Aretak ri räxquiak'ab c'o pa tak ri sutz', ri in quinwil na cänataj c'u ri c'ulwächinic ri xa jumul nu banom ruc' ronojel winak, xukuje' ruc' ronojel awaj ri c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:17 Are wa' ri retal ri c'ulwächinic ri nu jekebam, ruc' ronojel winak xukuje' awaj waral cho ri uwächulew.” Jewa' ri tzijobenic xuban ri ruc' ri Noe." 
Genesis9:18 Ri Sem, ri Cam, xukuje' ri Japet, e are wa' ri u c'ojol ri Noe ri xebel ulok pa ri jucub. Ri u tat ri Canaan are' ri Cam." 
Genesis9:19 E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Noe, cumal c'ut ri e rija'lil xpok'colij chi jumul ri uwächulew." 
Genesis9:20 Ri Noe xux ajticonijel, are' ri nabe ri xticow uva." 
Genesis9:21 C'o jun k'ij ri Noe xutij ri u wa'l uva, xk'abar c'ut. Xtzakic, xch'ani c'ut pa u niq'uiajil ri u lic'om rachoch." 
Genesis9:22 Aretak ri Cam, ri u tat ri Canaan, xrilo chi ch'anal ri Noe ri u tat, xel bic, xbe che u bixic chque ri quieb rachalal." 
Genesis9:23 Are c'u ri Sem xukuje' ri Japet xquic'am jun atz'iak xquiq'uiak chquij ri kas qui teleb che u ch'ukic ri qui tat. Rech man cäquil taj chi ch'analic, xa chquij xebinic xebec, chquiwäch c'u xeca'y wi." 
Genesis9:24 Aretak xoc'ow ri u k'abaric, ri Noe xretamaj c'ut ri xban che rumal ri Cam ri ch'i'p u c'ojol," 
Genesis9:25 ri Noe xubij che: “¡Chc'okox na ri Canaan! ¡Cux na lok'om pataninel ri man nim ta u k'ij chque ri e rachalal!” 
Genesis9:26 Xubij chi c'ut: “Chi ri Ajawaxel ri nu Dios chtewichi'n ri Sem, are' c'u ri Canaan chux u lok'om pataninel." 
Genesis9:27 Chnimarisax u k'ij ri Japet rumal ri Dios; chjekel pa tak ri rachoch ri Sem, chcoj c'ut ri Canaan che u lok'om pataninel.”" 
Genesis9:28 Ri Noe xc'asi' na oxib sient ruc' cawinak lajuj junab (350) aretak oc'owinak chic ri k'ekal jäb," 
Genesis9:29 belejeb sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (950) u junab ri Noe aretak xcämic. 
Genesis10:1 E are wa' ri e qui ija'lil ri Sem, ri Cam, xukuje' ri Japet, ri e u c'ojol ri Noe, ri xebalaxic aretak oc'owinak chic ri k'ekal jäb." 
Genesis10:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Japet are ri Gomer, ri Magog, ri Maday, ri Jaban, ri Tubal, ri Mesec, xukuje' ri Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 Ri e u c'ojol ri Gomer are ri Askenaz, ri Ripat, xukuje' ri Togarm." 
Genesis10:4 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jaban are' ri Elis, ri Tarsis, ri Quitim, xukuje' ri Rodanim." 
Genesis10:5 E are' tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Japet ri xenojisan tak ri tak'aj, chquijujunal tak ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri ija'lil chupam tak ri kas culew xukuje' ruc' tak ri kas qui ch'abal." 
Genesis10:6 Ri e u c'ojol ri Cam are' ri Cus, ri Mizraim, ri Pot, ri Canaan." 
Genesis10:7 Ri e u c'ojol ri Cus are' ri Seba, ri Habil, ri Sabta, ri Raam, ri Sabtec. Ri e u c'ojol ri Raam are' ri Seba, ri Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Ri Nimrod are' ri u tat ri Cus, ri nabe achi ri xnimar u k'ij cho ri uwächulew." 
Genesis10:9 Ri Nimrod are nimalaj tzucunel rumal ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel. Chi' esam wi ri tzij ri cäbixic: “Junam ruc' ri Nimrod ri xux nimalaj tzucunel rumal ri u rayibal ri Ajawaxel.” 
Genesis10:10 Ri e tinimit tak ri xtakan wi ri Nimrod are ri Babel, ri Erec, ri Acad, ri Calne, ri e c'o pa Sinar." 
Genesis10:11 Che we ulew ri' xel wi ri Asur, ri xebuyac tak ri tinimit aj Ninibe, ri Rehobot-Ir, ri Cal," 
Genesis10:12 xukuje' ri tinimit Resen, ri nim, ri c'o chuxo'l ri Ninibe ruc' ri Cal." 
Genesis10:13 Che ri Mizraim xepe wi ri aj ludeyib, ri aj anameyib, ri aj lehabitab, ri aj naptuhitab," 
Genesis10:14 ri aj patruseab, ri aj casluhitab xukuje' ri aj captoritab, ri xepok'isan ri aj pilisteyib." 
Genesis10:15 Ri u nabeal ri Canaan are ri Sidon; Het u bi' ri chak'axel. 
Genesis10:16 Xukuje' are' qui mam ri aj jebuseyib, ri amoreyib, ri aj jerjeseyib," 
Genesis10:17 ri aj hebeyib, ri aj araseyib, ri aj sineyib," 
Genesis10:18 ri aj arbadeyib, ri aj zemareyib, ri aj hamateyib. Xquijabuj c'u quib conojel tak ri achalaxic aj Canaan." 
Genesis10:19 Ri culew ri aj Canaan xopan c'ä chuchi' ri ulew re Jerar, cächapletaj ulok pa Sidon copan c'ä pa Gaz; chuwäch tak ri tinimit Sodom, Gomor, Adma, Zeboim, xopan c'ä pa Las." 
Genesis10:20 E are wa' ri e rija'lil ri Cam. Chquijujunal tak ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri achalaxic chupam tak ri kas culew xukuje' ruc' tak ri kas qui ch'ababal. 
Genesis10:21 Ri Sem, ri nabeal chuwäch ri Japet, xukuje' xc'ojolanic. Conojel ri e ralc'ual ri Heber e rija'lil ri Sem." 
Genesis10:22 Ri e u c'ojol ri Sem, are ri Elam, ri Asur, ri Arpaxad, ri Lud, xukuje' ri Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aram, are ri Uz, ri Ul, ri Jeter, xukuje' ri Mas." 
Genesis10:24 Ri u tat ri Sala are' ri Arpaxad, ri u tat ri Heber are' ri Sala." 
Genesis10:25 Ri Heber xec'oji' quieb u c'ojol: Peleg u bi' jun chque, pa tak c'u ri k'ij ri' xquitasala' quib ri winak cho ri uwächulew; ri rachalal ri Peleg, Joctan u bi'." 
Genesis10:26 Ri e u c'ojol ri Joctan, are ri Almodad, ri Selep, ri Hazar-mabet, ri Jera," 
Genesis10:27 ri Adoram, ri Uzal, ri Dicla," 
Genesis10:28 ri Obal, ri Abimael, ri Seba," 
Genesis10:29 ri Opir, ri Habil, xukuje' ri Jobab. Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri Joctan," 
Genesis10:29 ri Opir, ri Habil, xukuje' ri Jobab. Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri Joctan," 
Genesis10:30 xejeki' c'u pa tak ri ulew ri culic' rib che ri rulewal ri Mesa xebetakal c'ä pa Separ, ri are ri c'ache'laj ulew ri c'o pa elebal k'ij." 
Genesis10:31 E are tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Sem, chquijujunal tak ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri achalaxic chupam ri kas culew xukuje' ruc' tak ri kas qui ch'abal." 
Genesis10:32 E are wa' ri e calaxic ri e u c'ojol ri Noe, ri xquitasala' quib pa tak alaxic, xec'oji' c'u pa tak ri culew, e are c'u xepok'isan conojel ri nimak tak tinimit cho ri uwächulew aretak oc'owinak chic ri k'ekal jäb." 
Genesis11:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' conojel ri winak xa jun qui ch'abal c'olic. 
Genesis11:2 Aretak c'u xebel bic pa elebal k'ij, xquirik jun lianic ri c'o pa Sinar. Chila' c'ut xejeki' wi." 
Genesis11:3 Xurika' jun k'ij xquitzijobela' quib, xquibij: “Chekabana' xan quekaporoj pa k'ak'.” Xequiban c'u porom xan ri xequicoj che qui q'uexwäch abaj, k'ek k'ol c'ut xquicoj che u q'uexwäch xok'ol." 
Genesis11:4 Xquibij c'ut: “Tisaj kayaca' jun ka tinimit xukuje' jun nimalaj tz'ak ri quel ri u wi' c'ä chicaj. Rech cänimar ka k'ij, man cäkatuquij ta c'u kib cho ronojel ri uwächulew.”" 
Genesis11:5 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel che rilic ri tinimit xukuje' ri nimalaj tz'ak ri cätajin cäquiyac ri winak. 
Genesis11:6 Ri Ajawaxel xuchomaj: “Rumal chi xa e jun tinimit xukuje' xa jun qui ch'abal c'olic, rumal ri' qui chaplem u banic we chac ri'; man c'o ta c'u jun cho ri uwächulew ri cäcuin ta che qui k'atixic rech quetani' che u banic ri nimalaj tz'ak." 
Genesis11:7 Chujkaj bic kaya' jalajoj tak qui ch'abal chquijujunal, rech man cäquich'ob ta chic jas ri cäquibij chquibil tak quib.”" 
Genesis11:8 Jewa' xuban ri Ajawaxel che qui jabuxic ri winak ri e c'o cho ronojel ri uwächulew, xquitanaba' c'u u yaquic ri tinimit." 
Genesis11:9 Chila' xuya' wi ri Ajawaxel ri jalajoj tak qui ch'abal conojel ri winak re ri uwächulew, chila' c'u xejabux wi bic pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Rumal ri' xcoj Babel che u bi' ri tinimit." 
Genesis11:10 E are' tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Sem. Quieb junab oc'owinak chic ri k'ekal jäb, aretak ri Sem c'o chic jun sient u junab xil u wäch ri Arpaxad ri u c'ojol." 
Genesis11:11 Xc'asi' chi na job sient (500) junab ri Sem. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:12 Ri Arpaxad juwinak olajuj (35) u junab aretak xalax ri Sala ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:13 Xc'asi' chi na quiejeb sient ruc' oxib (403) junab ri Arpaxad. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:14 Ri Sala juwinak lajuj (30) u junab aretak xalax ri Heber ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:15 Xc'asi' chi na quiejeb sient ruc' oxib (403) junab ri Sala. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:16 Ri Heber juwinak cajlajuj (34) u junab aretak xalax ri Peleg ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:17 Xc'asi' chi na quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab ri Heber. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:18 Ri Peleg juwinak lajuj (30) u junab aretak xalax ri Reu ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:19 Xc'asi' chi na quieb sient ruc' belejeb (209) junab ri Peleg. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:20 Ri Reu juwinak cablajuj (32) u junab aretak xalax ri Serug ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:21 Xc'asi' chi na quieb sient ruc' wukub (207) junab ri Reu. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:22 Ri Serug juwinak lajuj (30) u junab aretak xalax ri Nacor ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:23 Xc'asi' chi na quieb sient (200) junab ri Serug. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:24 Ri Nacor juwinak belejeb (29) u junab aretak xalax ri Tare ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis11:25 Xc'asi' chi na jun sient ruc' belejlajuj (119) junab ri Nacor. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol, xukuje' niq'uiaj u mia'l." 
Genesis11:26 Ri Tare c'o chic oxc'al lajuj (70) u junab aretak xebalax ri oxib u c'ojol, ri Abram, ri Nacor, ri Aran." 
Genesis11:27 E are' tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri u c'ojol ri Tare are ri Abram, ri Nacor, xukuje' ri Aran. Ri u c'ojol ri Aran are ri Lot," 
Genesis11:28 xcäm pa Ur ri culew ri aj caldeyib. Are c'u xcäm nabe chuwäch ri Tare ri u tat. Chila' xcäm wi jawije' ri xalax wi. 
Genesis11:29 Ri Abram xc'uli' ruc' ri Saraiy, ri Nacor xc'uli' ruc' ri Milca u mia'l ri Aran, rana'b ri Isca." 
Genesis11:30 Ri Saraiy man cuya' taj quec'oji' ral man c'u alanel taj. 
Genesis11:31 Ri Tare xel bic pa Ur ri culew ri aj caldeyib xbe pa Canaan, xuc'am bic ri Abram ri u c'ojol, ri Lot ri ri' u mam, xukuje' ri Saraiy ri ralib. Aretak c'u xebopan pa ri u tinimit ri Aran, xejeki' c'u chila'." 
Genesis11:32 Ri Tare xcäm pa Aran aretak c'o chic quieb sient ruc' job (205) u junab. 
Genesis12:1 Pa jun k'ij ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Abram: “Chaya' can ri awulew, ri e awachalaxic, xukuje' ri rachoch ri a tat, rech catbe pa ri ulew ri quinc'ut na chawäch." 
Genesis12:2 Quinban na jun nim tinimit ri nim u k'ij chque ri e awija'lil; catintewichi'j na xukuje' quinnimarisaj na a k'ij, catux c'u na jun tewichibal chque niq'uiaj chic." 
Genesis12:3 Quebentewichi'j na ri catquitewichi'j, quebenc'okoj na ri catquic'okoj; conojel ri winak cho ri uwächulew cäquirik na tewichibal rumal awech.”" 
Genesis12:4 Xel c'u bic ri Abram pa Aran jas ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel. Oxc'al olajuj (75) u junab aretak xel bic chila' xbe pa Canaan. 
Genesis12:5 Xuc'am bic ri Saraiy ri rixokil, xukuje' ri Lot ri u c'ojol ri u chak', xequic'am bic conojel ri jastak quech xukuje' conojel ri winak ri xequilok' pa Aran. Aretak xebopan pa Canaan," 
Genesis12:6 ri Abram xoc'ow pa ronojel ri ulew ri' c'ä xopan na pa Siquem, jawije' c'o wi ri tastalicalaj bakit pa Mor. E c'o c'u ri aj cananeyib pa ri ulew ri'." 
Genesis12:7 Chila' xuc'ut wi rib ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri Abram, xubij che: “We ulew ri' quinya' na chque ri e awija'lil.” Ri Abram xuban jun porobal chila' ri xuk'ijilaj wi ri Ajawaxel, rumal rech chi chila' xuc'ut wi rib chuwäch." 
Genesis12:8 Xbextax c'ut pa ri c'achelajalaj ulew ri c'o pa elebal k'ij che ri tinimit Betel, chila' c'u xuwoc wi ri u lic'om rachoch. Ri Betel xcanaj pa ri u kajebal k'ij che ri u lic'om rachoch, are c'u ri tinimit Hai xcanaj pa elebal k'ij. Ri Abram xuban chi jun porobal chila' ri xutz'onoj wi tok'ob pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis12:9 C'äte ri' nojim nojim xutakej ri u be, xbe pa ri rulewal Negueb." 
Genesis12:10 Xpe c'u jun nimalaj wi'jal pa ronojel ri c'olbal ri', ri Abram xec'ol quieb oxib k'ij pa Ejipt, man c'o ta chi c'u catij pa ri c'olbal ri jekel wi." 
Genesis12:11 Aretak opanem cuban pa Ejipt, ri Abram xubij che ri Saraiy ri rixokil: “Chatampe', quinbij chawe, in weta'm chi at jun je'lalaj ixok," 
Genesis12:12 aretak c'u catquil ri aj ejiptib, cäquibij na chi at wixokil. Ri in quinquicämisaj, are c'u ri at catquic'asba' canok rech quec'oji' na can awuc'." 
Genesis12:13 Rumal c'u ri' quintz'onoj jun tok'ob chawe, chabij chi at wana'b, rech utz nu wäch quintzelejic, rech quinc'asi' rumal awech.”" 
Genesis12:14 Aretak xopan ri Abram pa Ejipt, ri aj ejiptib xquil ri Saraiy chi sibalaj je'lic," 
Genesis12:15 xukuje' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o ruc' ri paraon ri ajawinel pa Ejipt xquil ri Saraiy, xequibij c'u che chi sibalaj je'lic we ixok ri'. Xquic'am c'u bic pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel." 
Genesis12:16 Sibalaj utz xuban ri ajawinel che ri Abram rumal rech ri Saraiy. Xebusipaj u chij, u wacax, u bur, u camey, xukuje' xebusipaj u lok'om tak pataninelab, achijab xukuje' ixokib." 
Genesis12:17 U mac c'u rech ri Saraiy, ri Ajawaxel xuc'äjisaj u wäch ri ajawinel, xukuje' conojel ri e c'o pa ri rachoch cuc' nimak tak yabil." 
Genesis12:18 Rumal ri' ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Abram, xubij che: “¿Jasche je a banom wa' chwe? ¿Jasche man xak'alajisaj ta chnuwäch chi awixokil we ixok ri'?" 
Genesis12:19 At xabij chi awana'b, ri in xincuin ta ri' xic'am ta che wixokil. ¡C'o we awixokil ri', chac'ama' bic, jät!”" 
Genesis12:20 Xuya' c'u takanic ri ajawinel chque ri winak ri e c'o ruc' chi cäquesaj bic ri Abram pa Ejipt rachil ri rixokil, xukuje' ronojel ri jastak rech." 
Genesis13:1 Xel c'u bic ri Abram pa Ejipt rachil ri rixokil, xukuje' ronojel ri c'o cuc', xtzelej pa ri chaki'j uwo sak pa Negueb. Teren ri Lot chquij ri u c'ojol ri u chak'." 
Genesis13:2 Sibalaj k'inom ri Abram, c'o u rajil re k'an puak re sak puak, xukuje' e c'o q'ui rawaj." 
Genesis13:3 Xel chi bic pa Negueb, nojimal xutakej ri u be, c'ä xopan pa ri tinimit Betel; xel chi c'u bic chila' xbe pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri xc'oji' wi can nabe, chuxo'l ri tinimit Betel xukuje' ri Hai." 
Genesis13:4 Are c'olbal wa' ri xuyac wi can jun porobal nabe, chila' c'ut xutz'onoj wi tok'ob pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis13:5 Ri Lot xukuje' sibalaj k'inom junam ruc' ri Abram, e c'o q'ui u chij, u wacax, xukuje' e q'ui winak ri e teren chrij;" 
Genesis13:6 man cubana' ta chi c'ut ri k'ayes ri c'o pa ri ulew ri' chque ri q'uialaj chij. Jeri' man cuya' ta chic chi xa ta pa jun c'olbal quec'oji' ta chi wi," 
Genesis13:7 quech'ojin c'u ri rajyuk'ab ri Abram cuc' ri rajyuk'ab ri Lot. Pa ri k'ijol ri' c'ä e jekel c'u ne ri aj cananeyib xukuje' ri aj perezeyib pa ri ulew ri'. 
Genesis13:8 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij ri Abram xubij che ri Lot: “Ri at xukuje' ri in kachalaxic kib, rumal ri' man utz taj cäc'oji' ch'o'j chkaxo'l, mawi chquixo'l ri awajyuk'ab cuc' ri e wech." 
Genesis13:9 Chawilampe', c'o ronojel ri ulew chawäch, chacha' jachique ri cawaj. Chabana' jun tok'ob, chatasa' awib chwij. We catbe pa ri iquiak'ab in quinbe pa ri mox k'ab, we c'u catbe pa ri mox k'ab in quinbe na pa ri iquiak'ab.”" 
Genesis13:10 Ri Lot xca'y apan che ronojel ri u beya' ri nima' Jordan xril c'ut chi, c'ä pa ri alaj tinimit Zoar, ri beya' e c'o q'ui ja' chupam jacha' jun ticonijibal cotz'i'j. Xa co'l man cajunamataj ruc' ri Ejipt. (Wa' je u banic nabe c'ä mäjok chesachisax qui wäch ri tinimit ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor rumal ri Ajawaxel.)" 
Genesis13:11 Are c'u ri Lot are xucha' ronojel ri u beya' ri nima' Jordan, xbe c'u ri Lot pa elebal k'ij che ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi. Jewa' xc'ulmatajic, aretak ri Abram xukuje' ri Lot xquitas quib." 
Genesis13:12 Ri Abram xc'oji' can pa Canaan, are c'u ri Lot xec'ol chquixo'l tak ri tinimit ri e c'o xo'l tak ri juyub, chunakaj ri tinimit Sodom," 
Genesis13:13 jawije' ri e c'o wi ri winak ri sibalaj e banal tak etzelal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. 
Genesis13:14 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Abram aretak u tasom chi rib ri Lot: “Kas pa ri c'olbal ri at c'o wi, kas chatca'y apan pa ri iquiak'ab, xukuje' pa ri mox k'ab chatca'y pa elebal k'ij, xukuje' pa ri u kajebal k'ij;" 
Genesis13:15 ronojel ri ulew ri cawilo quinya' na chawe, amak'el c'ut awech xukuje' quech ri e awija'lil." 
Genesis13:16 In quinban na chi ri e are' quebux na e jacha' ri u puc'uq'uil ri ulew. Je c'u ri' jacha' chi man ya'tal taj quebajilax ri e u bak'wäch ri puc'uc', mawi xukuje' ya'talic chi quebajilax ri e u k'ab tak awachalaxic." 
Genesis13:17 ¡Chatwalijok, chasolij ri u rabic we ulew ri' xukuje' ri u wäch, quinya' c'u na chawe!”" 
Genesis13:18 Je c'u ri', ri Abram xuwalijisaj bic ri u lic'om rachoch, xejekel pa ri c'ache'laj aj räx che' ri rech jun achi Mamre u bi', chunakaj ri tinimit Hebron. Chila' xuyac wi jun porobal che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis14:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri Amrapel are' ajawinel re Sinar, ri Arioc are' ajawinel re Elasar, ri Quedorlaomer are' ajawinel re Elam, ri Tidal are' ajawinel re Goim." 
Genesis14:2 E are' tak wa' ri' xquimajij u banic ch'o'j chrij ri Ber, rajawinel ri Sodom, ri Birs rajawinel ri Gomor, ri Sinab rajawinel ri Adma, ri Semeber rajawinel ri Zeboim, xukuje' chrij ri rajawinel ri Bela, ri tinimit ri cäbix Zoar che." 
Genesis14:3 We job q'uisbal tak ajawinelab ri' xequimulij c'ut ri cajch'ojab xo'l ri juyub Sidim, jawije' c'o wi ri Cäminak Cho camic." 
Genesis14:4 Cablajuj (12) junab c'ut e c'olinak chuxe' ri u takanic ri Quedorlaomer, c'ä chu uroxlajuj (13) junab ri job ajawinel xquichomaj quesaxic quib pa u k'ab ri Quedorlaomer." 
Genesis14:5 Che ri junab ri xtakenic, ri Quedorlaomer xukuje' ri niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic ri junam qui wäch ruc' xquimulij quib pa Astarot Karnaim, chila' xequich'äc wi ri aj repaitab; xequich'äc chi c'ut ri aj zuzitab pa Ham, ri aj emitab xequich'äc pa Sab-quiriataim," 
Genesis14:6 are c'u ri aj horib, xequich'äc puwi' ri juyub Seir, xecokataj c'ä xebopan pa ri ulew re Paran ri c'o chunakaj ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Genesis14:7 Aretak xtzelej ri Quedorlaomer xukuje' ri e rachil, xebopan pa En-mispat, ri cäbix Cades che. Xequisach qui wäch conojel ri winak ri xequirik pa tak ri be pa ri culew ri aj amalesib, xukuje' je xquiban chque ri aj amoreyib ri e jekel pa ri ulew re Hazezon-tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Xebel c'u ulok ri ajawinelab re Sodom, Gomor, Adma, Zeboim, Bela, xebe pa ri beya' re Sidim. Chila' we job ajawinelab ri' xech'ojin ruc' ri Quedorlaomer, ri Tidal, ri Amrapel, ri Arioc, e are' ri quiejeb ajawinelab re Elam, Goim, Sinar, xukuje' Elasar." 
Genesis14:9  
Genesis14:10 Pa ronojel c'u ri ulew Sidim e c'o tak jul e nojinak che k'ek k'ol ri cäq'uiy chila', aretak ri job ajawinelab re Sodom, Gomor xcaj xebanimaj chuwäch ri ch'o'j, xetzak pa tak ri jul ri'. Ri e niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic xebanimajic xequito' quib c'ä puwi' tak ri juyub." 
Genesis14:11 Ri xech'äcow ri ch'o'j xequic'am bic jastak ri pakal cajil ri e c'o pa Sodom, Gomor, xukuje' ronojel ri cätijic, xebel c'u bic chila'." 
Genesis14:12 Pa Sodom c'ut jekel wi ri Lot ri u c'ojol ri u chak' ri Abram, xquiyut bic xukuje' xquic'am bic conojel ri jastak rech." 
Genesis14:13 C'o c'u jun achi ri xcuinic xuto' rib ri man xcämisax taj, are wa' ri xbec xuya' u bixic che ri Abram ronojel ri xbantajic. Ri Abram are ri aj hebrey, ri jekel pa ri c'ache'laj aj räx che' ri rech ri Mamre ri aj amorey. Ri Mamre rachalal ri Escol xukuje' ri Aner, ri e are' e utz ruc' ri Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Aretak ri Abram xretamaj chi ri Lot ri u c'ojol ri u chak' yutum bic, xebumulij bic ri pataninel tak rech ri cu'l u c'u'x chquij, ri ilom qui wäch pa ri rachoch, e oxib sient ruc' wajxaklajuj (318) achijab chi conojel, xebe c'u che cokataxic ajawinelab c'ä xebopan pa ri tinimit Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Ri Abram e rachil ri pataninel tak rech, chak'ab xekaj paquiwi' ri ajawinelab man c'o ta xquinabej, xquitakej c'u cokataxic c'ä xebe opan na pa Hob ri c'o ajsic che ri tinimit Damasc," 
Genesis14:16 ronojel c'u ri qui c'amom bic xmaj can chque. Jewa' xuban ri Abram che resaxic can ri Lot, xukuje' ri jastak rech. Xukuje' xeresaj can ri ixokib cachil ri niq'uiaj winak chic." 
Genesis14:17 Aretak xtzelej ulok ri Abram, aretak xch'äcataj can ri Quedorlaomer rumal, xukuje' ri e niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic ri e rachil ri Quedorlaomer, ri ajawinel aj Sodom xel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri Abram pa ri beya' Sab ri are' u Beya' ri Ajawinel." 
Genesis14:18 Xukuje' ri Melquisedec ajawinel aj Salem u cojol tabal tok'ob ri Dios aj chicaj, xuc'am ulok caxlanwa xukuje' u wa'l uva." 
Genesis14:19 Xutewichi'j ri Abram, xubij: “Chatutewichi'j ri Dios aj chicaj, ri xbanow ri caj ulew;" 
Genesis14:20 chyo'k ba' u k'ij ri Dios aj chicaj, ri xatuto' che qui ch'äquic ri a c'ulel.” Ri Abram xuya' che ri Melquisedec ri lajujil re ronojel ri u tok'im ulok." 
Genesis14:21 Are c'u ri ajawinel re Sodom xubij che ri Abram: “Are chebaya' ri winak chwe, chebawechbej c'u at ri jastak ri a majom ulok.”" 
Genesis14:22 Ri Abram xubij che ri ajawinel re Sodom: “Xinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na in chokinak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chi ri Dios aj chicaj ri xbanow ri caj ulew," 
Genesis14:23 chi man quinc'am ta jun jasach ri ech la, mawi jun bätz' o jun ximibal xajäb, rech mäbij la chi lal xbanow k'inom chwe." 
Genesis14:24 Man c'o ta jas quinwaj quinc'amo, xuwi ri xquitij ri achijab ri pataninel tak wech. Are c'u ri achijab ri xebe wuc', ri Aner, ri Escol, ri Mamre, ri e are' caquic'am na ri quech.”" 
Genesis15:1 E bantajinak chi we jastak ri', ri Ajawaxel xuch'abej ri Abram pa jun ichic', xubij che: “Abram, maxe'j awib, in ri' ri in to'l awech. Ri tojbal awech sibalaj nim na.”" 
Genesis15:2 Ri Abram xutzelej u bixic che: “Ajawaxel ri c'o takanic la puwi' ronojel, ¿jas cupatanij chwe chi cäya' la tojbal wech, eta'm ya' la chi man c'o ta nu c'ojol? Ri quechben na ronojel ri jastak wech are' ri Eliezer ri aj Damasc jun chque ri pataninel wech, rumal rech chi man c'o ta nu c'ojol yo'm la.”" 
Genesis15:3  
Genesis15:4 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “Ri quechben na ri jastak awech are ri kas a c'ojol, man are ta jun ri man a winakil taj.”" 
Genesis15:5 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'am bic ri Abram cho ja, xubij che: “Chatca'y chicaj, chebawajilaj ri ch'imil we catcuinic. Jewa' ri qui q'uial ri e awija'lil.”" 
Genesis15:6 Ri Abram xcojon che ri Ajawaxel, rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xuc'amowaj jacha' suc'." 
Genesis15:7 Xubij c'u che: “In ri' ri Ajawaxel, in xatinwesaj ulok pa Ur ri culew ri aj caldeyib, che u ya'ic we ulew ri' chawe che awechbal." 
Genesis15:8 Ajawaxel xukuje' Dios, ¿jas ri quinbano rech kas quinwetamaj chi kas quinwechbej na we ulew ri'?” xcha' ri Abram." 
Genesis15:9 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Chac'ama' ulok jun alaj ati't wacax, jun ati't q'uisic', jun ama' chij, ox ox qui junab, xukuje' chac'ama' ulok jun tucumux rachil jun alaj palomax.”" 
Genesis15:10 Ri Abram xebuc'ama' ulok conojel tak we awaj ri' xebel u ya' chuwäch ri Dios, xebuperejij xuya' ri jun pa niq'uiaj chuwäch ri jun chic man c'u xebuperejij taj ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic'." 
Genesis15:11 Quekaj c'u ri c'uch paquiwi' tak ri awaj ri e cämisam, are c'u ri Abram quebuxibij." 
Genesis15:12 Aretak xoc ri ak'ab, ri Abram xkaj che jun nimalaj waram. Xsutix rij rumal jun nimalaj k'eku'm, sibalaj xuxe'j rib." 
Genesis15:13 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che: “Rajawaxic cawetamaj chi ri e awija'lil quequirika' na c'ax pa jun ulew chic, queboc na che lok'om tak pataninelab, quiejeb sient (400) junab cäban na c'ax chque." 
Genesis15:14 Quinc'äjisaj c'u na u wäch ri nim tinimit ri quecojow na che lok'om tak pataninelab, c'ä matam quebel na ulok ri e awija'lil, e nimak tak k'inomab chi c'ut aretak quebel ulok." 
Genesis15:15 Ri at catcäm na pa utzil aretak sibalaj at nim winak chic, catmuk c'u na cuc' ri e a mam." 
Genesis15:16 Oc'owinak chi quiejeb sient (400) junab quetzelej na ulok ri e awija'lil pa we c'olbal ri', maja' c'u caquitz'akatisaj u banic ri quetzelal ri aj amoreyib.”" 
Genesis15:17 Aretak chak'ab chic, ronojel c'ut k'ekumarinak chic, xc'utun jun jorno ri cäbukuwic, xukuje' jun k'ak' cänicowic ri coc'ow chquixo'l ri awaj ri banom catakperaj chque." 
Genesis15:18 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel xuban jun c'ulwächinic ruc' ri Abram: “We ulew ri' quinya' na chque ri e awija'lil cächapletaj ulok chuchi' ri nima' re Ejipt copan c'ä chuchi' ri nimalaj nima' Euprats. 
Genesis15:19 Ri u bixic, ri culew ri aj seneyib, ri aj senezeyib, ri aj cadmonib," 
Genesis15:20 ri aj hititib, ri aj perezeyib, ri aj repaitab," 
Genesis15:21 ri aj amoreyib, ri aj cananeyib, ri aj jerjeseyib, xukuje' ri aj jebuseyib.”" 
Genesis16:1 Ri Saraiy man cäcuin taj quebuya' ta ral che ri Abram ri rachajil; c'o c'u jun lok'om pataninel ixok rech ri Saraiy aj Ejipt, ri Agar u bi'." 
Genesis16:2 Xubij c'u ri Saraiy che ri Abram: “Ri Ajawaxel man u yo'm ta chwe chi quec'oji' ta wal, chabana' jun tok'ob, chac'ama' ri Agar che awixokil ri lok'om pataninel wech, craj ne quec'oji' na wal rumal ri are.” Ri Abram xunimaj ri xbix che rumal ri Saraiy." 
Genesis16:3 Are c'u ri Saraiy xuc'am ri Agar, ri aj Ejipt, xuya' c'u che jacha' che rixokil ri Abram, aretak lajuj junab chic e jekel pa Canaan." 
Genesis16:4 Ri Abram xuc'am ri Agar, xcanaj c'u yawab winak ri Agar. Aretak ri Agar xuna' rib chi yawab winak chic, xretzelaj u wäch ri Saraiy." 
Genesis16:5 Ri Saraiy xubij che ri Abram: “¡U mac awech chi quetzelax nu wäch rumal ri Agar. In xinyo'w che awixokil; camic c'ut aretak reta'm chic chi cäc'oji' na jun ral, man nim ta chic quinrilo. Chubij ba' ri Ajawaxel jachin ri ajchak'mac, we in o at!”" 
Genesis16:6 Ri Abram xubij che ri Saraiy: “Chawilampe', pa k'ab c'o wi ri Agar, ri a lok'om pataninel, chabana' che jas ri cawaj.” Xuchaplej c'u u banic c'ax ri Saraiy che ri Agar, rumal c'u ri' xanimaj bic ri Agar." 
Genesis16:7 Xriktaj c'u ri Agar rumal jun tako'n re ri Ajawaxel pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, chunakaj ri bulbux ri c'o pa ri be ri cäbe pa Xur," 
Genesis16:8 xuc'ot c'u u chi': “Agar, u lok'om pataninel ri Saraiy, ¿Jawije' a petic wi, jawije' c'u catbe wi?” Ri Agar xubij: “Cätajin quinanimaj chuwäch ri nu chuchu' ri Saraiy.”" 
Genesis16:9 Ri tako'n re ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Agar: “Chattzelej cho rachoch ri a chuchu' ri Saraiy, chanimaj pa ronojel ri catutak wi.”" 
Genesis16:10 Xubij chi c'u na ri tako'n che ri Agar: “Quinbano chi queq'uiyir na ri e awija'lil, ri man c'o ta jun cäcuinta che cajilaxic." 
Genesis16:11 At yawab winak chic, cäc'oji' c'u na jun awal ala, Ismael cäcoj na che u bi', ri awok'ej xtataj rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis16:12 Ri awal cux na jun c'analaj achi; cutij na u chuk'ab chquij conojel xukuje' conojel cäquitij na qui chuk'ab ruc'; co c'u cutiq'uiba' ri rachoch pune' cäc'ulelax cumal ri rachalal.” 
Genesis16:13 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Agar ch'awinak ruc' ri Ajawaxel, xubinaj rumal “Ri Dios ri quinuca'yej”, xuchomaj: “In rilom c'u ri Dios c'ä in c'asal c'ut.”" 
Genesis16:14 Xukuje' rumal ri' ri c'ua' xbinaxic: “U C'ua' Ri C'aslic Quinuca'yej”. We c'ua' ri' c'o chuxo'l ri Cades ruc' ri Bered. 
Genesis16:15 Ri Agar xralaj jun u c'ojol ri Abram, ri Abram xucoj Ismael che u bi'." 
Genesis16:16 Jumuch' ruc' wakib (86) u junab ri Abram aretak xalax ri Ismael. 
Genesis17:1 Aretak c'o chi jumuch' ruc' belejlajuj (99) u junab ri Abram, xuc'ut rib ri Ajawaxel chuwäch, xubij che: “In ri' ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem; chatbin pa jun suc'alaj c'aslemal chnuwäch." 
Genesis17:2 Ri in quinban na jun c'ulwächinic awuc': quinban na chi sibalaj queq'uiyir c'u na ri e awija'lil.” 
Genesis17:3 Ri Abram xumej rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew. U takem c'u u bixic ri Dios che: 
Genesis17:4 “Are c'u c'ulwächinic wa' ri quinban awuc': At catux na qui tat ri nimak tak tinimit ri man quebajilataj taj," 
Genesis17:5 man cäbix ta chic Abram chawe. Kas camic Abraham catuchix na, quinban chawe chi catux qui tat ri nimak tak tinimit ri man quebajilataj taj." 
Genesis17:6 Quinbano chi sibalaj queq'uiyir ri e awija'lil; quebel na ajawinelab chquixo'l xukuje' nimak tak tinimit. 
Genesis17:7 Ri c'ulwächinic ri quinban awuc', ri xukuje' quinban cuc' conojel ri e awija'lil ri quepe na, chi ri in quinux na a Dios amak'el xukuje' qui Dios ri e are'." 
Genesis17:8 Chawe at, xukuje' chque ri e are' quinya' wi na ronojel ri ulew Canaan ri at c'o wi camic, quinya' na che quechbal re chbe k'ij sak; are c'ut ri in quinux na i Dios.”" 
Genesis17:9 Ri Dios xubij chi na che ri Abraham: “Are c'u ri at chatz'akatisaj ri nu c'ulwächinic; ri at xukuje' conojel ri e awija'lil. 
Genesis17:10 Are c'ulwächinic wa' quinban iwuc', ri rajawaxic xukuje' caquitz'akatisaj conojel ri awija'lil: conojel ri achijab chixo'l rajawaxic quekopix na ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi che quetal." 
Genesis17:11 Rumal ri' rajawaxic quekopix na ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi, are c'u cajwataj wa' che retal ri c'ulwächinic ri c'o chkaxo'l iwuc'." 
Genesis17:12 Camic cächapletaj bic, conojel ri alabom rajawaxic quekopix na ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi che quetal aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij alaxinak, xak junam cäban che ri ala ri quil u wäch cho ja ruc' ri pataninel ri lok'om ruc' puak che apachique ta ne winak ri man i winakil taj." 
Genesis17:13 Rajawaxic quekopix na u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi che quetal ri alabom alaxinak chupam ri awachoch, xukuje' ri a lok'om ruc' ri a rajil. Jeri' ri nu c'ulwächinic cac'utataj pa ri i ti'jal jacha' jun c'ulwächinic re ronojel ri c'aslemal." 
Genesis17:14 Are c'u ri man kopin ta ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achi wi che retal, rajawaxic resaxic chixo'l, rumal rech chi man nim ta rilom wi ri nu c'ulwächinic.”" 
Genesis17:15 Xukuje' xubij ri Dios che ri Abraham: “Ri awixokil Saraiy, man je ta chi u bi' wa' quebixok. Kas camic cächapletaj bic, Sara cuchi'x na." 
Genesis17:16 Quintewichi'j na, quinya' na jun a c'ojol rumal are'. Kastzij, quintewichi'j na. Ri are' cux na qui nan e q'uia nimak tak tinimit, ri e rija'lil quebux na ajawinelab quech tak tinimit.”" 
Genesis17:17 Xumej rib ri Abraham c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew, xtze'n c'ut. Cätajin cuchomaj: “¿La cuya' ta lo chi jun achi ri jun sient chic u junab cäcuinic cux ta tataxel? ¿La cuya' ta lo chi ri Sara quec'ol ta jun ral chujumuch' lajuj (90) u junab?”" 
Genesis17:18 Xubij c'u ri Abraham che ri Dios: “¡C'o ta banom wi chi ri Ismael cäc'asi na rumal ri tewichibal la!” 
Genesis17:19 Ri Dios xubij che ri Abraham: “Ri nu bim chi ri awixokil Sara cäralaj na jun a c'ojol, ri cäcoj na Isaac che u bi'. Ruc' ri are' quinjiquiba' wi na ri nu c'ulwächinic quincanajisaj c'u na amak'el cuc' tak ri e rija'lil." 
Genesis17:20 Nu tom ri a ch'awem puwi' ri Ismael, quintewichi'j c'u ri are'; quinbano chi quec'oji' e q'ui u c'ojol xukuje' chi queq'uiyir ri e u k'ab tak rachalaxic. Ri Ismael queralc'ualaj na cablajuj (12) c'amal tak be ri nimak qui k'ij. Quinbano chi ri are' cupok'isaj na jun nim tinimit, sibalaj nim." 
Genesis17:21 Are' c'u ri nu c'ulwächinic quinjekeba' na ruc' ri Isaac, ri a c'ojol ri cuya' na ri Sara chawe junab, pa tak we k'ijol ri'.”" 
Genesis17:22 Aretak xtzijobetaj ri Abraham rumal ri Dios xel bic chi'. 
Genesis17:23 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Abraham xukopij ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi ri Ismael, ri u c'ojol, che retal. Xebuc'am ri pataninel tak rech ri xebalax pa ri rachoch, xukuje' ri xelok' ruc' puak, conojel ri achijab ri e c'o pa rachoch xekopix ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi che quetal, jas ri xtak wi rumal ri Dios." 
Genesis17:24 Ri Abraham xa jun junab man cätz'akat jun sient (99) u junab, are c'u ri Ismael ri u c'ojol oxlajuj (13) u junab, aretak xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi." 
Genesis17:25  
Genesis17:26 Ri Abraham xukuje' ri Ismael ri u c'ojol, pa ri k'ij ri', xekopix ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal che quetal." 
Genesis17:27 Junam cuc' conojel ri achijab ri e c'o pa ri rachoch, ri e pataninel tak re ri xebalax pa ri rachoch xukuje' ri xelok' ruc' puak chque apachique winak ri man e qui winakil taj." 
Genesis18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Abraham pa ri c'ache'laj que räx che' ri rech ri Mamre, t'uyul ri Abraham chuchi' ri u lic'om ja pa tiq'uil k'ij." 
Genesis18:2 Ri Abraham xebuwalijisaj ri e u bak'wäch xtaki' c'u u wäch chque oxib achijab ri e tac'atoj ulok chuwäch. Aretak xerilo, aninak xwalij che qui c'ulaxic, xumej rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew." 
Genesis18:3 Xubij c'ut: “Ajawaxel, quinta' tok'ob che la, bana' la tok'ob mabe la chanim." 
Genesis18:4 We utz che la quintz'onoj jubik' ja' rech quech'aj ri akan alak, chuxlan na alak jubik' chuxe' ri u mu'jal ri che'." 
Genesis18:5 Oc'owinak ya' alak chuwäch ri jekel wi pataninel ech la ri', quinya' wa alak rech cac'oji' ri chuk'ab alak c'ä majok chtakej ri be alak.” “Je', utz ba ri',” xecha' ri e are'." 
Genesis18:6 Ri Abraham xoc bic pa ja, xubij c'u che ri Sara: “¡Aninak, jac'ama' cawinak quiejeb (44) libra c'äj ri sibalaj coc', chabanaxtaj quieb oxib caxlanwa!”" 
Genesis18:7 Ri Abraham aninak xbe che u c'amic jun awaj, xucha' jun alaj ama' wacax ri chom chic, xuya' che jun pataninel re xuban c'u che ri riquil." 
Genesis18:8 Man xuwi ta ri ti'j xuya' ri Abraham chque, xane' xuya' leche chque xukuje' quexu, xoc il che quilixic aretak cätajin quewa' chuxe' ri che'." 
Genesis18:9 Aretak xquelej ri solinelab, xquic'ot u chi' ri Abraham: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri Sara ri awixokil?” “C'o pa ri lic'om rachoch,” xcha' ri Abraham." 
Genesis18:10 Jun chque xubij: “Che ri jun junab chic quinpe che a solixic, pa ri k'ij c'ut ri' ri awixokil c'ochic jun ral ala.” U tatbem c'u ulok ri Sara ri cäquitzijoj, man c'o ta cunabej ri Abraham chi c'o ulok ri Sara chrij ri u chi' ri lic'om rachoch." 
Genesis18:11 Ri Abraham xukuje' ri Sara e nimak tak winak chic, ri Sara man c'o ta chic ri u yab chi ic'." 
Genesis18:12 Rumal ri' xtze'n ri Sara, je xuchomaj wa': “¿La quinquicot ta chi c'u na chi cäc'oji' jun wal, nim winak chi c'ut ri wachajil xukuje' ri in?”" 
Genesis18:13 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Abraham: “¿Jasche cätze'n ri Sara? ¿La ma ta cucojo chi cäc'oji' na jun ral pune' ta ne nim winak chic? 
Genesis18:14 ¿La c'o ta c'u lo jun jasach ri ma ta cäcuin ri Ajawaxel che u banic? Che ri jun junab chic junab ak'anok quinpe na che a solixic, pa ri k'ij ri' ri Sara c'o chic jun ral ala.”" 
Genesis18:15 Aretak ri Sara xuta' ri xbixic, xuxe'j rib, are ta xraj xresaj ta rib chupam. Rumal ri' xubij: “Ri in man cätajin ta quintze'nic.” Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “Weta'm chi xattze'nic.”" 
Genesis18:16 Ri achijab xewalijic xquitakej ri qui be xebe pa ri tinimit Sodom. Xebachilax bic jubik' rumal ri Abraham che qui jachic bic. 
Genesis18:17 Ri Ajawaxel xubij: “Rajawaxic quinbij na che ri Abraham ri quinbano," 
Genesis18:18 cux c'u na qui tat jun cowilaj nim tinimit ri nim u k'ij. Nu bim c'u che chi rumal are' quebentewichi'j na conojel tak ri nimak tinimit ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew. 
Genesis18:19 Nu cha'om rech quebutak ri e u c'ojol xukuje' ri e rija'lil che qui nimaxic ri e nu tijonic, rech cäquiban ronojel ri utz, ri suc', quinban c'u na in ronojel ri nu bim.”" 
Genesis18:20 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Abraham: “Ri winak aj Sodom, aj Gomor nu tom qui tzijol chi sibalaj e itzel tak winak, xukuje' chi sibalaj e nimak tak ajmaquib," 
Genesis18:21 camic c'ut quinbe chila' che rilic we kastzij chi sibalaj nim ri quetzelal jas ri bim chwe. Kas c'u quinwetamaj na.” 
Genesis18:22 Quieb chque ri solinelab xquitakej ri qui be xebe pa Sodom, are c'u ri Abraham xcanaj na can chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis18:23 Xnakajin chi c'u na jubik' che, xuc'ot c'u u chi'. “¿La cäsach la qui wäch ri winak ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac junam cuc' ri c'o qui mac?" 
Genesis18:24 We ne e c'o cawinak lajuj (50) winak ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac pa ri tinimit. Pune' c'u jewa' ¿la cäsach la u wäch ri tinimit junam cuc' ri cawinak lajuj (50) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac, a ma ta quel c'u'x la chque rumal quech ri cawinak lajuj (50)?" 
Genesis18:25 ¡Mäban la ri' chi junam cäcämisaj la ri c'o u mac ruc' ri man c'o ta jubik' u mac, je ta ne ri e quieb e macuninak! ¡Mäban la we c'ax ri'! Lal ri lal nimalaj k'atal tzij puwi' ronojel ri uwächulew, ¿la ma ta c'u cäban na la ri suc'alaj k'atoj tzij?”" 
Genesis18:26 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Abraham: “We quebenrik cawinak lajuj (50) winak ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac pa ri tinimit Sodom, rumal quech wa' quinsach qui mac conojel ri e c'o pa Sodom xukuje' pa Gomor.”" 
Genesis18:27 Ri Abraham xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Sachala' nu mac chi je ch'abexic la wa' quinbano, ri lal lal Dios, are c'u ri in xa in winak;" 
Genesis18:28 we c'u ne craj na job (5) che ri cawinak lajuj (50) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac. ¿La xa c'u cumal we job ri' ri craj na cäsach la u wäch ronojel ri tinimit?” Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “We quebenrik cawinak job (45) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac, man quinsach ta u wäch.”" 
Genesis18:29 “¿We c'u ne xa e cawinak (40) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac?” xcha' chi na ri Abraham. “Rumal quech we cawinak (40) ri' man quinsach ta u wäch,” xcha' ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis18:30 Ri Abraham xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Dios, xubij: “Quintz'onoj jun tok'ob che la, mäpe c'u oyowal la chwe, quintakej u tz'onoxic tok'ob che la; we c'u ne xa e juwinak lajuj (30) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac querik la.” Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “We quebenrik juwinak lajuj (30), quinsach u mac ri tinimit.”" 
Genesis18:31 Ri Abraham xutakej u tz'onoxic tok'ob che ri Dios xubij: “Wajaw Dios, sibalaj in chajil anima' chi je ch'abexic la wa' quinbano, ¿jas cäc'ulmatajic we ne xa e juwinak (20) ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac querik la?” Ri Ajawaxel xubij chi che ri Abraham: “Rumal quech we juwinak (20) ri', man quinsach ta u wäch ri tinimit.”" 
Genesis18:32 Ri Abraham xutakej chi na u tzijobexic ri Dios, xubij che: “Bana' la jun tok'ob, mäpe oyowal la chwe, xuwi chi c'u we jumul ri' quinch'aw uc' la, man quinya' ta chi c'u latz' che la: ¿jas cäban la we ne xa e lajuj (10) querik la ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac?” Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Cumal quech we lajuj (10) ri', man quinsach ta u wäch ri tinimit.”" 
Genesis18:33 Aretak ri Ajawaxel xutanaba' u tzijobexic ri Abraham, xbec xel bic chila'; are c'u ri Abraham xtzelej pa ri u lic'om rachoch." 
Genesis19:1 Xa jubik' man coc ak'ab aretak ri quieb tako'nib aj caj xebopan pa Sodom. Ri Lot t'uyul chuchi' ri tinimit, jawije' cäquimulij wi quib ri winak. Aretak xerilo, xwalijic xebuc'ulaj, xxuquic xumej rib" 
Genesis19:2 xubij chque: “Tatayib, bana' alak tok'ob, quinbochi'n chech alak chi cäcanaj can alak pa wachoch che we chak'ab camic. Chila' cach'aj wi ri akan alak, ak'ab chwek cätakej chi ri be alak.” Ri e are' xquibij: “Jayi', sibalaj maltiox cakoc'owisaj na ri ak'ab pa ri be.”" 
Genesis19:3 Are c'u ri Lot sibalaj xucoj na chuk'ab chque, chuq'uisbalil, ri e are' xquinimaj xebe ruc' cho rachoch. Aretak xebopanic, ri Lot xusuc'umaj jun utzalaj wa'im chque re benak k'ij, xuban caxlanwa man c'o ta ch'am ruc', ri tako'nib aj caj xewa'ic." 
Genesis19:4 Maja' c'u quek'oyic aretak conojel ri achijab aj Sodom, xquisutij rij ri rachoch ri Lot, chi alabom chi ri'jab," 
Genesis19:5 xquichaplej u rakic qui chi' che ri Lot, xquibij: “¿Jawije' e c'o wi ri achijab ri xeboc pa ri awachoch pa we chak'ab ri'? ¡Chebawesaj ulok! ¡Cäkaj cujk'oyi cuc'!”" 
Genesis19:6 Xel c'u ulok ri Lot che qui ch'abexic, aretak xel ulok utz u tz'apixic ri uchi'ja xuban canok," 
Genesis19:7 xubij chque ri achijab: “Nu winak, chibana' tok'ob miban jun etzelal." 
Genesis19:8 E c'o quieb nu mia'l ri e k'apojib; quebenwesaj ulok chiwäch rech quiban chque jachique ri quiwaj, c'o c'u jas miban chque we achijab ri', e solil c'u wech.”" 
Genesis19:9 Ri achijab aj Sodom xquibij che ri Lot: “¡Chatel chi'! Man cäpe ta na jun winak jas ri at ri man ka winakil taj cheltakan ta pakawi'. ¡Camic nim ri c'ax ri cäkaban chawe chuwäch ri cäkaban ta chque we achijab ri'!” Xquichaplej u banic c'ax che ri Lot, xekeb ruc' ri uchi'ja are ta xcaj xquitarij ta apan jela'." 
Genesis19:10 Are c'u ri e u solinelab ri Lot xquiyuk ulok ri qui k'ab xquijic' ri Lot xquicoj bic pa ri ja; xquitz'apij ri uchi'ja," 
Genesis19:11 xquiban c'ut chi xemoyir ri achijab ri e c'o chrij ri uchi'ja. Chi alabom chi ri'jab conojel xecanaj moyab, xecos c'u che u tzucuxic ri uchi'ja." 
Genesis19:12 Ri tako'nib aj caj xquibij che ri Lot: “¿La c'o chi niq'uiaj awachalaxic waral? Chebac'ama' ri a c'ojol, ri a mia'l, ri e a ji', conojel ri awachalaxic ri e c'o pa we tinimit ri', chebawesaj bic, naj chebac'ama' wi bic." 
Genesis19:13 Cäkasach c'u u wäch we c'olbal ri'. Sibalaj q'ui chi c'u ri tzujunic banom chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chquij ri winak re we tinimit ri', rumal ri' xujutak ulok che u sachic u wäch.”" 
Genesis19:14 Xbe ri Lot che qui siq'uixic ri e u ji' ri e towinak ri u mia'l che c'ulanem, xubij chque: “¡Chixwalijok, chixel bic waral, cäsach c'u u wäch we tinimit ri' rumal ri Ajawaxel!” E are c'u ri e u ji' man xeboc ta il che ri xubij ri Lot chque." 
Genesis19:15 Xa c'u jubik' man cäsakaric, ri tako'nib aj caj xquibij che ri Lot: “We man cawaj catcämic aretak cäkasach u wäch we tinimit ri', aninak chatwalijok, chac'ama' c'u bic ri awixokil, xukuje' ri quieb a mia'l.”" 
Genesis19:16 Xbeytaj c'u ri Lot, ri quieb tako'nib aj caj xquiyukej bic che ri u k'ab, rumal rech chi xel u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel che. Xukuje' xquic'am bic ri rixokil, ri quieb u mia'l, naj xequic'am wi bic che ri tinimit rech queto'tajic." 
Genesis19:17 Aretak e c'o chrij ri tinimit, jun chque ri tako'nib xubij: “¡Chatxiq'uinok, chato' awib! Matca'y chawij, mawi jubik' mak'il awib pa ri beya'. Chatpakal cho tak ri juyub, we cawaj catc'asi'c.”" 
Genesis19:18 Xubij c'u ri Lot chque: “¡Jayi' wajawib bana' alak tok'ob! 
Genesis19:19 Ri alak sibalaj q'ui tok'ob banom alak chwe, sibalaj uxinak alak utz wuc' ruc' ri u colic ri nu c'aslemal, man quincuin ta chic quinbe ta cho tak ri juyub, we ne in c'o pa ri be aretak cäpe ri c'ax puwi' ri tinimit, quincäm c'u ri'." 
Genesis19:20 Nakaj che ri in c'o wi c'o jun tinimit ch'utin, ri cuya' quinanimaj wi. ¡Chya' alak chwe chi quinbe chila' che u to'tajisaxic ri nu c'aslemal, kastzij c'ut are jun tinimit ri sibalaj ch'utin!”" 
Genesis19:21 Jun c'ut chque ri tako'nib aj caj xubij: “Xinta' ri xabij, quinban c'ut jas ri a tz'onon chwe. Man quinsach ta u wäch ri tinimit ri xabij chi catopan wi:" 
Genesis19:22 ¡Jät chanim chila'! Man c'o ta c'u jas quinban na we man catopan na pa we c'olbal ri'.” Rumal ri' xcoj Zoar che u bi' we tinimit ri'. 
Genesis19:23 Sakarinak chic xopan ri Lot pa ri tinimit Zoar," 
Genesis19:24 ri Ajawaxel xujabij k'ak' xukuje' asupre jacha' ri jäb puwi' ri Sodom, xukuje' ri Gomor," 
Genesis19:25 xusach qui wäch ri tinimit junam cuc' conojel ri winak ri e c'o chila', xuq'uis c'u tzij puwi' ronojel ri tico'n ri c'o pa ri beya' ri'." 
Genesis19:26 Are c'u ri rixokil ri Lot ri teren ulok, xca'y can chrij, chila' xcanaj wi canok xux u wächbal winak re atz'am." 
Genesis19:27 Ri Abraham ak'ab xbe chucab k'ij pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri xtzijon wi ruc' ri Ajawaxel; 
Genesis19:28 xca'y apan che ri Sodom, ri Gomor, xukuje' pa ronojel ri ulew, xrilo chi cäbukuw sib pa ronojel ri c'olbal jacha' ri u sibal jun jorno re wa." 
Genesis19:29 Jewa' xuban ri Dios che u sachic u wäch ri tinimit tak ri e c'o xo'l tak ri juyub, jawije' xc'oji' wi ri Lot, xnataj c'u ri Abraham che ri Dios. Rumal ri' xresaj ulok ri Lot pa ri c'olbal ri xsach u wäch." 
Genesis19:30 Xuxe'j c'u rib ri Lot chi cäcanaj pa Zoar, xbe c'ut cuc' ri quieb u mia'l pa ri ulew ri c'o wi c'ache'laj, coxichal c'ut xejeki' chupam jun pec." 
Genesis19:31 Xurika' jun k'ij ri u mia'l ri Lot ri nabeal xubij che ri u chak': “Ri ka tat nim winak chic, man c'o ta c'u jun ala pa ronojel we c'olbal ri' ri cäc'uli' ta kuc', jas ri cäquiban ri winak;" 
Genesis19:32 kaya' u wa'l uva che ri ka tat, chujwar c'u ruc' rech cäc'oji' u c'ojol kuc'.”" 
Genesis19:33 Kas pa ri chak'ab ri' xquiya' u wa'l uva che ri qui tat, xwar c'u ri nabeal ruc'; are c'u ri u tat man xunabej taj aretak xk'oyi' ruc' mawi aretak xwalijic." 
Genesis19:34 Chucab k'ij chic, ri nabeal xubij che ri u chak': “Chatampe', in chak'ab iwir xinwar ruc' ri ka tat, kaya' chi ba' u wa'l uva che ri ka tat rech catwar chi at ruc'; rech uj quieb cäc'oji' u c'ojol kuc'.”" 
Genesis19:35 Xquiya' chi u wa'l uva che ri qui tat, xwar chi c'u ri chak'axel ruc', man xunabej ta c'u ri Lot aretak xk'oyi' ruc' mawi aretak xwalijic." 
Genesis19:36 Ri quieb u mia'l ri Lot xecanaj yawab tak winak rumal ri qui tat. 
Genesis19:37 Xc'oji' c'u jun ral ri nabeal, xucoj Moab che u bi' are wa' ri qui tat ri aj moabib camic." 
Genesis19:38 Ri chak'axel xukuje' xc'oji' jun ral, xucoj Ben-ami che u bi' are wa' ri qui tat ri aj amonib camic." 
Genesis20:1 Ri Abraham xel bic pa ri c'olbal ri c'o wi xbe pa ri rulewal ri Negueb, xcanaj pa ri tinimit Jerar ri c'o chuxo'l ri Cades ruc' ri Xur." 
Genesis20:2 Aretak c'o ri Abraham chila', man cubij taj chi ri Sara are rixokil, cubij chi rana'b. Ri Abimelec ri ajawinel pa Jerar, xtakan che u c'amic ri Sara rech cuban rixokil che;" 
Genesis20:3 xch'abex c'u ri Abimelec pa u waram rumal ri Dios pa ri ak'ab ri', xubij ri Dios che: “Catecämok, rumal rech chi c'ulanic ri ixok ri a c'amom.”" 
Genesis20:4 Man rekle'n ta c'ut, rumal ri' xubij ri Abimelec che: “Wajaw, ¿la cachomaj ta la u cämisaxic ri winak ri man c'o ta etzelal u banom?" 
Genesis20:5 Kas c'u are ri Abraham xbin chwe chi rana'b we ixok ri', xukuje' we ixok ri xubij chwe chi u xibal we achi ri', ronojel ri xinbano xinban ruc' u ch'ajch'ojil wanima', quinch'obo chi man c'o ta etzelal nu banom.”" 
Genesis20:6 Ri Dios xubij che pa ri u waram: “Kas weta'm chi ruc' ch'ajch'ojalaj awanima' xabano. Rumal ri' man xinya' ta pa k'ab chi caweklej, rech man catmacun ta chnuwäch." 
Genesis20:7 Chatzelej ba' ri rixokil we achi ri', ri are' k'axal c'u tzij cutz'onoj c'u tok'ob pawi' rech catc'asi' na, we c'u man catzelej che, ri at xukuje' ri e c'o pa ri awachoch quixcäm na.”" 
Genesis20:8 Ak'ab xwalij ri Abimelec chucab k'ij xebumulij conojel ri pataninel tak rech, xubij c'u chque ronojel ri xrichic'aj. Aretak xquito', sibalaj xquixe'j quib." 
Genesis20:9 Ri Abimelec xtakan che u siq'uixic ri Abraham, xubij che: “¡Chawilampe' ri a banom chke! ¿Jas c'ax nu banom chawe chi a c'amom ulok jun nimalaj mac panuwi' xukuje' ri e nu winak? We jastak ri' man queban taj." 
Genesis20:10 ¿Jas cätajin cachomaj aretak je xaban wa' chwe?” xcha' ri Abimelec che ri Abraham. Ri Abimelec jewa' xuban che u ch'abexic ri Abraham," 
Genesis20:11 ri Abraham xubij che: “Ri in xinchomaj chi ri winak waral man nim ta cäquil wi ri Dios, chi quinquicämisaj na che u majic ri wixokil." 
Genesis20:12 Kas c'u tzij chi wana'b we ixok ri', u mia'l ri nu tat ruc' chi c'u jun ixok, rumal ri' xuya' xinc'uli' ruc'." 
Genesis20:13 Aretak ri Dios xuya' ri takanic chwe chi quinel bic cho rachoch ri nu tat, xintz'onoj jun tok'ob che ri wixokil, chi pa tak ri c'olbal ri cujopan wi, chubij chi in u xibal.”" 
Genesis20:14 Ri Abimelec xutzelej ri Sara che ri Abraham. Xebusipaj u chij, u wacax, lok'om tak pataninelab rech achijab, xukuje' ixokib," 
Genesis20:15 xubij c'u che ri Abraham: “Chawilampe', c'o ronojel ri wulew chawäch. Chacha' ri c'olbal ri sibalaj utz cawilo, rech catjeki' chupam.”" 
Genesis20:16 Xubij c'u ri Abimelec che ri Sara: “Ronojel ri nu yo'm che ri a xibal rajil jun mil sak puak, are c'u tojbal awech wa' chquiwäch conojel ri e c'o awuc'. Man c'o ta c'u jun catyok'owic.”" 
Genesis20:17 Ri Abraham xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Dios puwi' ri Abimelec, jeri' ri Dios xutzelej ri rutzil u wäch ri Abimelec xukuje' ri rixokil. Xukuje' xebucunaj ri ixokib ri pataninel tak rech rech quec'oji' cal," 
Genesis20:18 u mac c'u rech ri Sara, ri Ajawaxel u banom chi man c'o ta jun chque ri ixokib ri e c'o pa ri rachoch ri Abimelec quec'oji' ta ral." 
Genesis21:1 Jas ri u bim ulok ri Ajawaxel, kas je xuban che ri Sara," 
Genesis21:2 ri are' xcanaj yawab winak, xralaj c'u jun u c'ojol ri Abraham aretak sibalaj nim winak chic. Xalax ri ac'al kas pa ri k'ij ri u bim ri Dios." 
Genesis21:3 Ri Abraham xucoj Isaac che u bi' ri u c'ojol ri xalax rumal ri Sara," 
Genesis21:4 wajxakib k'ij chic ilom u wäch ri Isaac aretak xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi' che retal rumal ri Abraham, jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios che." 
Genesis21:5 Jun sient u junab ri Abraham aretak xalax ri Isaac. 
Genesis21:6 Xubij ri Sara pa ranima': “Ri Dios xuya' quicotemal chwe, conojel c'u ri cäquetamaj chi c'olinak jun wal, quequicot na wuc'." 
Genesis21:7 ¿Jachin ta xbin che ri Abraham chi quebenwalaj na ralc'ual? Xinwalaj c'u jun u c'ojol pune' sibalaj in nim winak chic.” 
Genesis21:8 Aretak nim chic ri Isaac, xesax puwi' ri tu'. Aretak c'u xesax puwi' ri tu' ri Abraham xuban jun nimalaj nimak'ij." 
Genesis21:9 Xril c'u ri Sara chi ri u c'ojol ri Abraham ri ralam ri Agar ri aj ejipt, cutze'j u wäch ri Isaac." 
Genesis21:10 Xbe ri Sara xubij che ri Abraham: “¡Chel bic we lok'om pataninel ri' rachil ri ral! Man cuya' ta c'ut cäban quieb che ri rechbal ri wal Isaac cäya' ta c'u niq'uiaj che ri ral ri lok'om pataninel.” 
Genesis21:11 Sibalaj c'ax xuna' ri Abraham aretak xuto chi quesax bic ri u c'ojol. 
Genesis21:12 Ri Dios xubij che ri Abraham: “Matoc il che ri ala mawi che ri a lok'om pataninel. Chabana' ronojel ri cubij ri Sara chawe, rumal c'ut ri Isaac queq'uiyir na ri e awija'lil."
