Genesis21:13 Are c'u ri ral ri lok'om pataninel quinbano chi cupok'isaj na jun nim tinimit, rumal rech chi a c'ojol.”" 
Genesis21:14 Sibalaj ak'ab chucab k'ij, ri Abraham xuya' bic wa che ri Agar xukuje' jun c'olbal ja' re tz'um nojinak che ja'; xuya' bic cho rachak, xujach c'u bic ri Ismael pa u k'ab. Quiwil iwib xcha' bic chque. Xbe ri Agar, pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Beerseb, man reta'm ta c'ut jawije' cäbe wi." 
Genesis21:15 Aretak xq'uis ri ja' ri c'o pa ri tz'um, xuya' can ri ac'al chuxe' jun patzäpic k'ayes" 
Genesis21:16 xbec, naj xet'uyul wi apanok, man craj taj cärilo aretak cäcäm ri ral. Aretak xt'uyic xuchaplej ok'ej ri ac'al." 
Genesis21:17 Ri Dios xuto chi cok' ri ala, kas c'u pa ri caj ri tako'n aj caj xusiq'uij ulok ri Agar, xubij c'u che: “¿Jas xac'ulmaj Agar? Maxe'j awib, ri Dios xuta' ri rok'ej ri ac'al chila' jawije' ri c'o wi." 
Genesis21:18 Jät, jatzucuj ri ac'al, matzokopij ri u k'ab, quinban c'u na chi cupok'isaj na jun nim tinimit ri nim u k'ij.”" 
Genesis21:19 Ri Dios xubano chi ri Agar xril jun c'ua' nojinak che ja' ri c'o apanok. Xbec, xunojisaj ri tz'um che ja', xuya' c'ut re ri Ismael." 
Genesis21:20 Ri Dios xuto' ri ala, ri ala xq'uiyic xc'oji' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xux c'u jun utzalaj q'uiakal ch'ab." 
Genesis21:21 Xc'oji' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Paran, ri Ismael xc'ulubax rumal ri u nan ruc' jun ali aj Ejipt." 
Genesis21:22 Pa tak c'u ri k'ij ri' ri Abimelec xbe che u ch'abexic ri Abraham. Xachilax bic rumal ri Picol, qui nimal ri rajch'ojab. Ri Abimelec xubij che ri Abraham: “Cäkilo chi ri Dios catuto' che ronojel ri cäbano." 
Genesis21:23 Rumal ri' chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Dios, kas pa we c'olbal ri', chi man c'o ta lawaloyil cäban na chke mawi chwe in mawi chque ri walc'ual mawi chque ri e awija'lil. Chabanaa' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chi cäban na ri utzil chwe jacha' ri nu banom chawe, chi junam cäban na chque ri winak ri e re we ulew ri' jawije' ri at jekel wi camic.”" 
Genesis21:24 “Quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na,” xutzelej u bixic ri Abraham." 
Genesis21:25 C'o c'u jun c'ua' ri xuch'a' ri Abraham che ri Abimelec, ri majom can che cumal ri pataninel tak rech ri Abimelec." 
Genesis21:26 Ri Abimelec xubij che: “Man yo'm ta u bixic wa' chwe, man nu tom ta in. Mawi jubik' weta'm jachin xbanow wa'.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ri Abraham xebuc'am chij, wacax, xebuya' che ri Abimelec. Pa ri k'ij ri' e quieb xquiban jun c'ulwächinic." 
Genesis21:28 Ri Abraham xebutas wukub chij chquixo'l ri u chij," 
Genesis21:29 rumal c'u ri' ri Abimelec xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jasche e a tasom we wukub chij ri'?” 
Genesis21:30 Ri Abraham xutzelej u bixic: “We wukub chij ri' quebenya' che la, che u c'utic chwäch la chi in xinc'otow we c'ua' ri'.”" 
Genesis21:31 Rumal ri' xcoj Beerseb che u bi' we c'olbal ri', chila' c'ut xcan wi jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na qui cabichal." 
Genesis21:32 Bantajinak chi c'u ri c'ulwächinic, ri Abimelec xukuje' ri Picol, xetzelej pa ri culew ri aj pilisteyib." 
Genesis21:33 Chila' pa Beerseb ri Abraham xutic juwi' che, jun tamarin, xuya' c'u u k'ij ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, ri junalic Dios." 
Genesis21:34 Naj xbeytaj ri Abraham chupam ri culew ri aj pilisteyib. 
Genesis22:1 Oc'owinak chi jun k'ijol, ri Dios xuc'ambejej ri u cojonic ri Abraham. Xucoj ri u bi' che u siq'uixic, ri are' xutzelej u bixic, “In c'o waral.”" 
Genesis22:2 Ri Dios xubij che: “Chac'ama' ri Isaac, ri a c'ojol ri xa jun ri sibalaj lok' chawäch, jät pa ri ulew Mor. Aretak catopan chila', chachi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic puwi' jun chque ri juyub ri quinc'ut na chawäch.”" 
Genesis22:3 Chucab k'ij sibalaj ak'ab xwalij ri Abraham, xucoj reka'bal ri u bur; xuc'al ri si' ri cucojo che ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, xbe pa ri c'olbal ri xbix che rumal ri Dios, junam xebe ruc' ri Isaac ri u c'ojol. Xachilax bic cumal quieb pataninel tak rech." 
Genesis22:4 Churox k'ij ri Abraham xril apan ri c'olbal chi naj. 
Genesis22:5 Xubij chque ri e quieb pataninel tak rech: “Chixcanaj can waral ruc' ri bur. Ri ala xukuje' ri in cäkatakej na ri ka be, cujpaki na puwi' ri juyub cakak'ijilaj c'u na ri Dios chila', cujtzelej c'u na ulok.”" 
Genesis22:6 Ri Abraham xuc'am ri si' ri cucoj che u poroxic ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, xuya' puwi' u teleb ri u c'ojol; are' c'u ri are xruc'aj bic ri cuchilo xukuje' ri k'ak' junam xebec." 
Genesis22:7 E bininak chi jubik' ri Isaac xubij che ri Abraham: “¡Tat!” “¿Jas ri cawaj nu c'ojol?” xcha' ri Abraham che. Ri Isaac xubij che: “Kuc'am ri si', kuc'am ri k'ak', ¿jawije' c'u c'o wi ri alaj ama' chij che ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic?”" 
Genesis22:8 “Ri Dios cäyo'w na ri chij ri cajwataj che ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, nu c'ojol,” xcha' ri u tat. Xquitakej c'u binem junam." 
Genesis22:9 Aretak xebopan pa ri c'olbal ri u bim ri Dios, ri Abraham xuban ri porobal, xuban u banic ri si' puwi' ri porobal, xuyut ri u c'ojol xuya' puwi' ri si' ri c'o puwi' ri porobal;" 
Genesis22:10 chupam c'ut ri jok'otaj aretak xuc'am ri cuchilo che u cämisaxic ri u c'ojol," 
Genesis22:11 ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ulok kas pa ri caj: “¡Abraham! ¡Abraham!” “In c'o waral,” xcha' ri are'." 
Genesis22:12 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij: “Maban jun c'ax che ri ala, xinwetamaj c'ut chi caxe'j awib chuwäch ri Dios, man xak'il ta c'u awib che u ya'ic ri a c'ojol chwe, ri xa jun.”" 
Genesis22:13 Ri Abraham xtaki' apan u wäch xril jun chij ri ralital ri ruc'a' pa jun patzäpic k'ayes; xuc'ama' ri chij, xujach che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che u q'uexwäch ri u c'ojol." 
Genesis22:14 Ri Abraham xucoj u bi' we c'olbal ri', ri u bi' ri xucojo are' wa': “Ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri cajwatajic.” Rumal ri' c'ä cäbixic: “Pa ri juyub, ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri rajawaxic.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij chi ulok ri Abraham pa ri caj chucamul," 
Genesis22:16 xubij c'u che: “Ri Ajawaxel jewa' u bim: ‘Rumal chi xaban ri xinbij chawe, man xak'il ta c'u u ya'ic ri a c'ojol chwe, pune' ta ne xa jun, quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri nu bi'. Sibalaj c'u catintewichi'j na." 
Genesis22:17 Quinbano chi sibalaj quepok' ri e awija'lil jacha' ri ch'imil cho ri caj, xukuje' e jacha' ri sanyeb ri c'o chuchi' ri plo. Amak'el c'ut quech'äcan na paquiwi' ri e qui c'ulel," 
Genesis22:18 conojel c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit cho ri uwächulew caquirik na tewichibal rumal quech. Rumal rech chi at nimaninak chwe.’ ” 
Genesis22:19 Xtzelej ri Abraham pa ri c'olbal jawije' e canajinak wi can ri e quieb pataninel tak rech, xetzelej c'u pa Beerseb cho rachoch ri Abraham." 
Genesis22:20 Oc'owinak chi jun k'ijol, xya' u bixic che ri Abraham chi ri Milca e rilom chquiwäch u c'ojol ri Nacor ri u chak'." 
Genesis22:21 Ri nabeal are ri Uz, ri chak'axel are ri Buz xukuje' ri Kemuel; ri u c'ojol ri Kemuel are ri Aram." 
Genesis22:22 Xebalax chi c'u na ri Quesed, ri Haz, ri Pildas, ri Jidlap, ri Betuel." 
Genesis22:23 Ri u mi'al ri Betuel are ri Rebec. E are wa' ri e wajxakib u c'ojol ri Nacor u chak' ri Abraham, ri xeralaj ri Milca." 
Genesis22:24 Xukuje' xec'oji' u c'ojol ri Nacor ruc' ri Reum ri man kas ta rixokil. E are wa': ri Teb, ri Gaham, ri Tahas, ri Maac." 
Genesis23:1 Ri Sara xc'asi' jun sient ruc' juwinak wukub (127) junab," 
Genesis23:2 xcäm pa Quiriat-arba, are wa' ri tinimit Hebron ri c'o pa Canaan. Ri Abraham xrok'ej ri u cämical ri Sara, xuchajij u bisoxic." 
Genesis23:3 Xelextax c'u bic jawije' c'o wi ri Sara ri cäminak, xbe che u bixic chque ri aj hititib ri e aj chila':" 
Genesis23:4 “Pune' man in ta i winakil chixo'l, chic'ayij jun mukubal chwe ri quinmuk wi ri wixokil ri xcämic.”" 
Genesis23:5 Ri aj hititib xquitzelej u bixic che ri Abraham: 
Genesis23:6 “¡Tat, bana' la tok'ob, chujtatabej la! Ri lal chkaxo'l lal jun cha'talic rumal ri Dios. Muku' ri ixokil la chquipam ri e ka mukubal ri sibalaj je'lic, man c'o ta c'u jun chke ri ma ta chuya' ri u mukubal che wa'.”" 
Genesis23:7 Xwalij c'u ri Abraham, xumej rib chquiwäch ri aj hititib," 
Genesis23:8 xubij c'u chque: “We kas tzij quiwaj quinmuk ri wixokil waral, chibana' tok'ob chixch'aw panuwi' ruc' ri Epron u c'ojol ri Zohar," 
Genesis23:9 chi chuc'ayij ri pec chwe ri c'o pa Macpel ri c'o chuchi' ri rulew. Quintoj ri kas rajil ri pec, je c'u ri' quinux na ajchak'e jun mukubal pa we c'olbal ri'.”" 
Genesis23:10 C'o c'u ri Epron ri aj hitit chila', xubij c'u che ri Abraham chquiwäch conojel ri u winakil xukuje' chquiwäch conojel ri queboc bic pa ri tinimit." 
Genesis23:11 “¡Jayi', nu tat! ¡Bana' la tok'ob! In xa quinsipaj ri ulew che la, xukuje' ri pec ri c'o pa ri ulew. Chquiwäch ri nu winakil quink'alajisaj chi xa quinsipaj che la. Muku' ri ixokil la chila',” xcha' ri Epron che ri Abraham." 
Genesis23:12 Ri Abraham xumej chi rib jumul chquiwäch ri e aj chila'," 
Genesis23:13 xutzelej c'u u bixic che ri Epron chquiwäch conojel: “¡Bana' la tok'ob, chintatabej la! Quinbochi'm che la chi c'ama' la ri rajil ri ulew, quinmuk c'u na ri wixokil chila'.”" 
Genesis23:14 Ri Epron xubij che ri Abraham: 
Genesis23:15 “Kaschintatabej la, nu tat: ri rajil ri ulew quiejeb sient (400) sak puak. ¿La nim ta c'u wa' we puak ri' chwäch la xukuje' chnuwäch in? Jemuku' ri ixokil la,” xcha' che." 
Genesis23:16 Ri Abraham xutoj ri rajil ri ulew ri xubij ri Epron, chquiwäch ri aj hititib xrajilaj ri puak pa u k'ab ri Epron." 
Genesis23:17 Rumal ri' ri rulew ri Epron ri c'o pa elebal k'ij che ri Mamre, rachilam ri pec ri c'o pa ri ulew xukuje' conojel tak ri che'," 
Genesis23:18 xek'ax pa u k'ab ri Abraham, xquil c'u conojel ri aj hititib, xukuje' conojel ri queboc bic, ri quebel ulok pa ri tinimit." 
Genesis23:19 Xumuk c'u ri Abraham ri Sara, ri rixokil pa ri pec ri c'o pa ri ulew re Macpel, pa elebal k'ij che ri Mamre, ri xukuje' cäbix Hebron che, we c'olbal ri' c'o pa Canaan." 
Genesis23:20 Jewa' xuban ri Abraham che rechbexic ri ulew rachilam ri pec ri c'o pa ri ulew, ri xquic'ayij ri aj hititib che mukubal." 
Genesis24:1 Sibalaj c'u ne nim winak chic ri Abraham, ri Ajawaxel u tewichi'm c'u pa ronojel." 
Genesis24:2 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij xusiq'uij jun chque ri pataninel rech ri sibalaj nim winak chic, ri c'o u takanic puwi' ronojel ri jastak rech ri Abraham, xubij che: “Chaya' ri a k'ab chuxe' ri wa'," 
Genesis24:3 chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, ri Dios ri ajchak'e ri caj ulew, chi mac'uluba' ri nu c'ojol Isaac ruc' jun ali ri quel waral pa Canaan jawije' ri in c'o wi," 
Genesis24:4 xane' catbe na pa ri wulew, cacha' na ulok jun rixokil ri nu c'ojol chquixo'l ri wachalaxic.”" 
Genesis24:5 Ri pataninel xubij che ri Abraham: “E c'u ne we man craj ri ali cäpe wuc', ¿jas quinbano? ¿La quinc'am ta c'u bic ri c'ojol la pa ri ulew ri xel wi la ulok?”" 
Genesis24:6 Ri Abraham xubij: “¡Chabana' tok'ob, mac'am bic ri nu c'ojol jela'!" 
Genesis24:7 Ri Ajawaxel ri ajchak'e ri caj, ri xinesan ulok cho rachoch ri nu tat pa ri qui culew ri wachalaxic, ri xukuje' xubij chi cuya' we ulew ri' chque ri e wija'lil, cutak na ulok ri u tako'n aj caj rech cänabej bic chawäch, cäc'am c'u ulok jun rixokil ri nu c'ojol." 
Genesis24:8 We c'u man craj ri ali cäpe awuc', catel chuxe' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ri a bim, ¡machomaj c'u u c'amic bic ri nu c'ojol jela'!”" 
Genesis24:9 C'ä te' c'u ri' ri pataninel rech xuya' ri u k'ab chuxe' ri ra' ri Abraham ri rajaw, xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xcha' c'u che chi cubano jas ri bim che rumal ri Abraham." 
Genesis24:10 Xuchaplej c'u qui cha'ic utzalaj tak sipanic chquixo'l ri jastak rech ri Abraham, xebuc'am bic lajuj camey, xbe pa ri u tinimit ri Nacor ri c'o pa Mesopotam." 
Genesis24:11 Xa jubik' man coc ak'ab. Aretak xopan ri pataninel chrij ri tinimit, are jok'otaj wa' ri quebel ulok ri alitomab che u c'amic qui ja'. Ri pataninel xeruxlanisaj ri camey chunakaj jun c'ua' ri c'o wi ja'." 
Genesis24:12 Xuchaplej c'u u banic ch'awem ruc' ri Dios, xubij: “Ajawaxel u Dios ri wajaw Abraham, bana' la chi utz quinel camic, c'utu' ri utzil la ruc' ri wajaw Abraham." 
Genesis24:13 Quinc'oji' na waral chuchi' ri c'ua', quebenweyej na ri alitomab aj waral ri quepe che u c'amic qui ja'." 
Genesis24:14 Ya' ba la chi ri ali ri quinbij wi na ‘Chabana' tok'ob, chakasaj ri a k'ebal rech quinuq'uianic’, cutzelej ta c'u u bixic chwe: ‘Chuq'uian la, quinya' c'u na qui joron ri camey xukuje'’, are ta ba' ri cha'om la che ri Isaac. Jeri' man c'o ta queblan c'uxaj wuc' chi tok'obisam la u wäch ri wajaw.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ri pataninel cätajin cäch'aw ruc' ri Dios aretak xrilo chi petinak ri Rebec ri u mia'l ri Betuel, u yo'm ri u k'ebal puwi' u teleb. Ri Betuel ral ri Milca ruc' ri Nacor ri u chak' ri Abraham." 
Genesis24:16 Ri ali sibalaj je'l cäca'yic xukuje' k'apoj man ekle'n ta rumal jun achi. Xkaj c'u bic chuchi' ri c'ua', xunojisaj ri u k'ebal, tzelejem c'u cubano" 
Genesis24:17 aretak xbe ri pataninel che u rikic, xubij che: “Chabana' tok'ob chäsipaj jukub nu joron ri c'o pa ri a k'ebal.”" 
Genesis24:18 “Chuq'uian la, tat,” xutzelej u bixic ri ali. Xukasaj ri u k'ebal, xuchap ruc' ri quieb u k'ab, xuya' u joron ri pataninel." 
Genesis24:19 Aretak xtijtaj ri u joron ri pataninel, ri Rebec xubij che: “Xukuje' quinwesaj joron chque ri camey la rech caquitij joropa' ri cäcaj.”" 
Genesis24:20 Xuk'ij can ri joron ri c'o pa ri u k'ebal pa ri qui jucub ri awaj, aninak xbe che resaxic ri joron pa ri c'ua', xquitij c'u qui joron conojel ri camey." 
Genesis24:21 Are c'u ri pataninel xak xca'y che man c'o ta jas xubij are c'u craj kas cäretamaj chi ri Ajawaxel u banom chi utz elinak che ri u binem. 
Genesis24:22 Aretak xtijtaj qui joron ri camey, ri pataninel xresaj ulok jun mulk'ab re k'an puak ri cäpajan niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz, xucoj che ri u tza'm. Xukuje' xuya' quieb wikbal k'abaj che ri ali re k'an puak ri quepajan cajcaj onz chquijujunal," 
Genesis24:23 xubij c'u che: “Chabana' tok'ob chabij chwe, ¿jachin at u mia'l, a cuya' cujewar can cho rachoch ri a tat chak'ab camic, ri in xukuje' ri achijab ri e wachil?”" 
Genesis24:24 Ri ali xubij che: “In u mia'l ri Betuel ri ral ri Milca ruc' ri Nacor. 
Genesis24:25 Cho kachoch c'o c'olbal ri cawar wi la chak'ab camic, c'o qui soc ri camey xukuje' c'o qui k'ayes.”" 
Genesis24:26 Ri pataninel xxuquic, xuk'ijilaj c'u ri Ajawaxel," 
Genesis24:27 je xubij wa': “¡Tewichital ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri wajaw Abraham, uxinak c'u jic xukuje' utz ranima' ruc' ri wajaw, u c'amom c'u nu be pa ri be ri copan cho cachoch ri e rachalaxic.!”" 
Genesis24:28 Aninak xbe ri Rebec cho rachoch ri u nan, che u bixic ronojel ri xuc'ulmaj." 
Genesis24:29 C'o jun u xibal ri ali, Laban u bi', aninak xbe che u tzucuxic ri achi chuchi' ri c'ua'," 
Genesis24:30 xril c'u ri mulk'ab xukuje' ri e wikbal k'abaj ri e u cojom chic ri rana'b chque ri e u k'ab, xutatabej c'ut aretak xutzijoj ri xubij ri achi che. Ri Laban xopan ruc' ri pataninel re ri Abraham, ri c'ä c'o cuc' ri camey chunakaj ri c'ua'," 
Genesis24:31 xubij c'u che: “Saj la lal tewichital rumal ri Ajawaxel. ¿Jas ta che cäcanaj la waral? Nu jamom chi c'u ri u pa ja xukuje' nu jamom jun c'olbal chque ri camey.” 
Genesis24:32 Xbe c'u ri pataninel cho ja. Ri Laban xukasaj ri queka'n ri camey, xebutzuku'; xuc'ama' ulok ja' che ch'ajbal rakan ri pataninel xukuje' ri e rachil." 
Genesis24:33 Aretak cojtajinak chic ri qui wa' chquiwäch, ri pataninel xubij: “Man quinchap ta na ri wa' we man nabe quinbij ri nu takquil ri in petinak wi,” xcha' che. “Ch'aw la,” xcha' ri Laban." 
Genesis24:34 Ri pataninel xubij: “Ri in, in pataninel rech ri Abraham." 
Genesis24:35 Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj u tewichi'm ri wajaw Abraham, u yo'm u k'inomal: e u yo'm u chij, u wacax, xukuje' u rajil re sak puak re k'an puak, e c'o pataninel tak rech achijab xukuje' ixokib, e c'o u camey, e c'o u bur." 
Genesis24:36 Are c'u ri Sara ri rixokil ri wajaw xril u wäch jun ral ala aretak sibalaj nim winak chic, ri wajaw Abraham u yo'm ronojel ri jastak re che ri u c'ojol." 
Genesis24:37 Ri wajaw xinutakchi'j chi quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xubij c'u chwe: ‘Mac'uluba' ri nu c'ojol ruc' jun ali ri quel waral pa ri ulew Canaan ri in jekel wi." 
Genesis24:38 Jät cho rachoch ri nu tat, chatzucuj ulok jun rixokil ri nu c'ojol chquixo'l ri wachalaxic.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ri in xinbij che: ‘Wajaw Abraham, ¿e c'u we ne man craj ri ali cäpe wuc'?’" 
Genesis24:40 Ri Abraham xubij chwe: ‘Ri in, in binenak pa ri u be ri Ajawaxel, ri are' cutak na ulok ri u tako'n aj caj awuc' che u c'amic a be rech utz quel ri a binem. Cäc'am c'u jun rixokil ri nu c'ojol chquixo'l ri ixokib que ri wachalaxic, ri u bixic rachalaxic ri nu tat." 
Genesis24:41 Catbe cuc' ri wachalaxic xuwi c'u we man cäquiya' ri ali, catel chuxe' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ri a bim chwe.’" 
Genesis24:42 Jewa' ri wopanic chuchi' ri c'ua', pa ri nu ch'awem ruc' Dios ri xinbano, xinbij che ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri wajaw Abraham: ‘We kastzij chi cäban la chi utz quel ri nu binem," 
Genesis24:43 quintz'onoj tok'ob che la camic ri in c'o chuchi' ri c'ua', je chc'ulmataj wa': chi ri ali ri cäpe che u c'amic u joron, ri quinbij che: —Chabana' tok'ob, chasipaj jukub nu joron ri c'o pa ri a k'ebal;" 
Genesis24:44 cubij ta c'u ri ali chwe: —Utz ri' tat, tija' la ri joron, xukuje' quinwesaj qui joron ri camey; are ta wa' ri ali, Ajawaxel ri cha'om la che rixokil ri u c'ojol ri wajaw Abraham.’" 
Genesis24:45 Maja' c'u quintanaba' ch'awem ruc' ri Dios aretak xinwilo chi petinak ri Rebec u yo'm ri u k'ebal puwi' u teleb xkaj bic chuchi' ri c'ua' che u c'amic u joron, xinbij c'u che: ‘Chabana' tok'ob chasipaj jukub nu joron.’" 
Genesis24:46 Ri are' chanim xukasaj ri u k'ebal, xubij chwe: ‘Tija' ri joron la, xukuje' quinya' que ri camey la.’ Ri are' xuya' nu joron xukuje' xuya' que ri nu camey." 
Genesis24:47 Xinc'ot u chi', xinta' che: ‘¿Jachin at u mia'l?’ Ri are' xubij chwe: ‘In u mia'l ri Betuel u c'ojol ri Nacor ruc' ri Milca.’ Xincoj c'u jun mulk'ab che ri u tza'm xukuje' quieb wikbal k'abaj chque ri u k'ab." 
Genesis24:48 Xinxuqui' c'ut xink'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel; xinya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri wajaw Abraham, rumal chi u c'amom nu be pa suc'alaj be che u c'amic ri u mia'l ri rachalaxic ri wajaw Abraham che rixokil ri u c'ojol." 
Genesis24:49 Bij ba' alak chwe camic we caj alak caban alak utzil ruc' ri wajaw Abraham we man cuban quieb c'u'x alak, we c'u man je chech alak, bij alak chwe, rech quinwetamaj jas quinbano.”" 
Genesis24:50 Ri Laban xukuje' ri Betuel xquibij che ri pataninel “Ronojel wa' petinak ruc' ri Ajawaxel, man cuya' taj cäkabij che la chi je o jayi'." 
Genesis24:51 Chilampe' la, c'o ri Rebec chwäch la, c'ama' la bic che rixokil ri u c'ojol ri ajaw la ri Abraham jas ri craj ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Genesis24:52 Aretak ri u pataninel ri Abraham xebuta' we tzij ri', xxuqui' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel xumej rib." 
Genesis24:53 C'ä te' c'u ri' xeresaj ulok q'ui jastak re sak puak xukuje' re k'an puak, xukuje' atz'iak, xebuya' che ri Rebec. Xukuje' xebuya' sipanic che ri u xibal xukuje' che ri u nan." 
Genesis24:54 C'äte ri' ri pataninel xukuje' ri e rachil xewa'ic, xquitij cuq'uia', xewar c'u chila'. Chucab k'ij aretak xewalijic, ri pataninel xubij: “Ya' alak chwe chi quintzelej cho rachoch ri wajaw.”" 
Genesis24:55 Are c'u ri u xibal xukuje' ri u nan ri Rebec xquibij che: “Cäcanaj na canok lajuj k'ij ri ali kuc', c'ä te' c'u ri' cäbe uc' la.”" 
Genesis24:56 Ri pataninel xubij chque: “Sibalaj mink'il alak ri Dios u banom chi utz elinak ri nu binem, rumal ri', ya' alak be chwe chi quintzelej cho rachoch ri wajaw.”" 
Genesis24:57 Ri e are' xquibij: “Cäkasiq'uij na ri ali, cäkata' na che jas cubij.”" 
Genesis24:58 Xquisiq'uij ri Rebec, xquibij che: “¿La cawaj catbe ruc' we tata' ri'?” “Je,” xcha' ri are'." 
Genesis24:59 Xquitzokopij c'u bic ri Rebec xukuje' ri ixok ri chajininak amak'el, xukuje' ri pataninel rech ri Abraham xukuje' tak ri e rachil." 
Genesis24:60 Je u tewichi'xic ri Rebec wa' xquinban bic: “Kanab, chatoc ta na che qui nan tinimit winak ri e u wi' tak a mam chech'äcan ta na paquiwi' ri e qui c'ulel.”" 
Genesis24:61 Ri Rebec xukuje' tak ri e pataninelab rech xequiejen bic chquij ri camey, xquiterenej bic ri u pataninel ri Abraham, jewa' xuban ri pataninel che u c'amic ri Rebec xel c'u bic chila'." 
Genesis24:62 Tzelejinak chi c'u ulok ri Isaac chuchi' ri c'ua' ri binam “Ri C'aslic ri Quinuca'yej,” ri jekel chupam ri rulewal ri Negueb." 
Genesis24:63 Elinak c'u bic ri Isaac che jun wacatem pa ri roquibal ri ak'ab. Xeril c'u apanok jujun camey ri cätajin quenakajin ulok. 
Genesis24:64 Xukuje' ri Rebec xca'y ulok, aretak xril ri Isaac aninak xkaj chrij ri camey," 
Genesis24:65 xubij che ri pataninel: “¿Jachin we achi ri' ri petinak pa ri juyub che ka suq'uil?” “Are' ri wajaw,” xcha' ri pataninel. Ri Rebec xuc'am ri ch'ukubal rib xuch'uk ri u palaj." 
Genesis24:66 Ri pataninel xutzijoj che ri Isaac ronojel ri xuc'ulmaj. 
Genesis24:67 Ri Isaac xroquisaj bic ri Rebec chupam ri rachoch ri Sara ri u nan, xc'uli' c'u ruc'. Ri Isaac sibalaj xulok'ok'ej ri Rebec, jeri' xcu'bi' u c'u'x man xubisoj ta chic ri u cämical ri u nan." 
Genesis25:1 Xc'oji' chic jun rixokil ri Abraham, Setura u bi'." 
Genesis25:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Abraham ruc' ri ixok ri', e are wa': ri Zimram, ri Jocsan, ri Medan, ri Madian, ri Isbac, ri Sua." 
Genesis25:3 Ri Jocsan are qui tat ri Seba, ri Dedan. Ri e u c'ojol ri Dedan e are' ri aj asurib, ri aj letuseyib, ri aj leumeyib." 
Genesis25:4 Ri e u c'ojol ri Madian e are ri Epa, ri Eper, ri Hanoc, ri Abid, ri Eld. Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Setura." 
Genesis25:5 Ri Isaac are xechben ronojel ri u k'inomal ri Abraham. 
Genesis25:6 Ri Abraham xuwi sipanic xebuya' chque ri e u c'ojol cuc' ri niq'uiaj rixokil chic, aretak c'ä c'aslic naj xebutak wi bic che ri Isaac ri u c'ojol, xebutak bic pa tak ri ulew ri c'o pa elebal k'ij." 
Genesis25:7 Ri Abraham xc'asi' jun sient ruc' oxc'al olajuj (175) junab chi ronojel," 
Genesis25:8 xcäm c'u ri Abraham aretak sibalaj nim winak chic. Xurika' c'u rib cuc' ri e u mam. 
Genesis25:9 Xmuk pa Macpel cumal ri quieb u c'ojol, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Ismael, pa ri ulew ri c'o pa elebal k'ij che ri Mamre pa rulew ri Epron (ri Zohar are' ri u tat ri Epron, ri aj hitit). Chila' xmuk wi ri Abraham chuxcut ri Sara ri rixokil." 
Genesis25:10 We ulew ri' are wa' ri u lok'om can ri Abraham chque ri aj hititib. Chila' xmuk wi ri Abraham chuxcut ri Sara ri rixokil. 
Genesis25:11 Chwi' ri u cämical ri Abraham, ri Dios xutewichi'j ri Isaac ri xcanaj can che jekelem chunakaj ri c'ua' ri u binam: “Ri C'aslic Quinuca'yej.”" 
Genesis25:12 E are wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Ismael ri u c'ojol ri Abraham ruc' ri Agar, ri aj ejipt ri lok'om pataninel rech ri Sara." 
Genesis25:13 Are wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Ismael ri xil qui wäch: ri nabeal are ri Nebaiot; xebalax chi c'u ri Sedar, ri Adbeel, ri Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 ri Misma, ri Dum, ri Masa," 
Genesis25:15 ri Hadar, ri Tema, ri Jetur, ri Napis, xukuje' ri Sedem." 
Genesis25:16 Are wa' ri qui bi' ri cablajuj (12) u c'ojol ri Ismael, jas ri qui bi' are xcoj chrij tak ri culew xukuje' ri kajebal ri xejeki' wi. Chquijujunal xeboc che c'amal tak qui be ri qui winakil." 
Genesis25:17 Jun sient ruc' juwinak wuklajuj (137) u junab ri Ismael aretak xcämic, xurika' rib cuc' ri e u mam." 
Genesis25:18 Ri e rija'lil xejeki' pa ri ulew ri c'o chuxo'l ri Habil ruc' ri Xur, ri cäcanaj chuwäch ri Ejipt aretak jun petinak pa Asiriy. Are ulew wa' xya' chque pune' man cäcaj ri cachalal." 
Genesis25:19 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri Isaac ri u c'ojol ri Abraham. 
Genesis25:20 Ri Isaac cawinak (40) u junab aretak xc'uli' ruc' ri Rebec u mia'l ri Betuel, rana'b ri Laban, ri e aj aramib ri e jekel pa Padan-aram." 
Genesis25:21 Ri Rebec man quec'oji' ta ral, rumal ri' ri Isaac xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel puwi'. Ri Ajawaxel xuta' ri u ch'awem ri Isaac. Xcanaj c'u yawab winak ri Rebec." 
Genesis25:22 Rumal c'u ri ch'o'j ri cäquiban ri yo'xab chupam ri Rebec, jewa' xuchomaj: “We je c'ätaken wa' ¿jas ta ri u patan quintakej c'aslem?” Xbe c'u che u ch'obic we jasach ri ruc' ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis25:23 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Quieb nimak tak tinimit e c'o chapam; quieb tinimit cätajin quech'ojinic c'ä maja' c'u quebalaxic. Ri jun c'o na u chuk'ab chuwäch ri jun chic, ri nabeal cäc'oji' na chuxe' ri u takanic ri chak'axel.”" 
Genesis25:24 Xurika' c'u ri k'ij aretak ri Rebec xril qui wäch ri ral, e yo'x c'ut ri ral xec'ojic." 
Genesis25:25 Ri xil u wäch nabe quiäk ri rismal xukuje' sibalaj pim, xquicoj c'u Esau che u bi'." 
Genesis25:26 Xil chi u wäch ri u chak' ri u chapom ulok ri Esau ruc' jun u k'ab xe' rakan rumal ri' xcoj Jacob che u bi'. Oxc'al (60) u junab ri Isaac aretak ri Rebec xeril qui wäch ri ral. 
Genesis25:27 Xeq'uiy c'u ri quieb ac'alab. Ri Esau are jun achi ajchac pa ri juyub, xukuje' jun utzalaj tzucunel; are c'u ri Jacob man c'o ta quel wi bic, utz cärilo chi cäcanaj cho ja ruc' ri u nan." 
Genesis25:28 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Isaac cutij re ri quebuchapa' ulok ri Esau pa tak ri juyub, rumal ri' sibalaj lok' chuwäch; are c'u ri Rebec are sibalaj lok' ri Jacob chuwäch." 
Genesis25:29 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij aretak ri Jacob cätajin coc c'ä che u tzaquic ri riquil, sibalaj c'u cosinak ri Esau aretak xtzelej ulok pa ri juyub," 
Genesis25:30 xubij che ri Jacob: “Chabana' jun tok'ob chaya' jubik' we ri quiäk joc'o'm ri cätajin cachak'ajisaj, quincäm c'u che numic.” (Rumal ri' xcoj Edom che u bi' ri Esau.)" 
Genesis25:31 “Chaya' ba' chwe nabe ri takanic ri c'o awuc' chi at ri nabeal c'ojol,” xutzelej u bixic Jacob." 
Genesis25:32 Ri Esau xubij che ri Jacob: “Jas ri cawilo cätajin quincäm che numic, jeri' chi ri takanic ri e c'o wuc' chi in ri c'ojol nabeal man c'o ta caquipatanij chwe.”" 
Genesis25:33 Ri Jacob xucoj u chuk'ab che u bixic che chi kas chubana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chanim. Ri Esau xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, jeri' ri xujach pa u k'ab ri Jacob ri takanic ri c'o ruc' chi are' ri c'ojol nabeal." 
Genesis25:34 Ri Jacob xuya' u caxlanwa ri Esau xukuje' xuya' re ri riquil. Aretak xrelej ri Esau xwalij bic, xbec. Man xuya' ta jubik' u k'ij ri takanic ri c'o ruc' chi are' ri c'ojol nabeal." 
Genesis26:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xpe jun nimalaj wi'jal pa ronojel ri c'olbal ri c'o wi ri Isaac, oc'owinak chi ri' ri wi'jal ri xuban can pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Abraham. Rumal ri' xbe ri Isaac pa Jerar ri c'o wi ri Abimelec cajawinel ri aj pilisteyib." 
Genesis26:2 Xuc'ut rib ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri Isaac chila', xubij che: “Matbe pa Ejipt. Chatc'ol pa ri c'olbal ri quinbij chawe," 
Genesis26:3 chatc'ol quieb oxib k'ij pa we c'olbal ri'. Quinc'oji' c'u awuc', catintewichi'j na, chawe c'u at xukuje' chque ri e awija'lil quinya' wi na conojel tak we ulew ri'. Je quintz'akatisaj ri chi'nic ri xinban che ri a tat Abraham." 
Genesis26:4 Quinbana' na chi ri e awija'lil quebux na sibalaj e q'ui e jacha' ri ch'imil ri e c'o cho ri caj, quinya' c'u na ronojel we ulew ri' chque. Quebentewichi'j c'u na conojel ri nimak tak tinimit rech ri uwächulew cumal ri e awija'lil." 
Genesis26:5 Rumal rech chi ri Abraham xniman chwe xebutz'akatisaj c'ut ri e nu takanic, ri e nu takomal, ri e nu pixab xukuje' tak ri e nu tijonic.”" 
Genesis26:6 Xcanaj c'u ri Isaac pa Jerar. 
Genesis26:7 Aretak ri winak ri aj chila' xquita' che jachin ri ixok ri rachil, ri Isaac xubij chque chi rana'b. Xuxe'j rib che u bixic chque chi are rixokil, sibalaj c'u je'lic ri Rebec, xuchomaj c'ut chi rumal rech ri Rebec cäcämisax cumal ri achijab aj chila'." 
Genesis26:8 Quieb oxib k'ij chic c'o chila'. C'o jun k'ij ri Abimelec ri cajawinel ri aj pilisteyib, cäca'y pa jun wenta'n, xril apanok chi ri Isaac quetz'en ruc' ri Rebec ri rixokil." 
Genesis26:9 Xutak u siq'uixic, xubij che: “¿La pa kastzij awixokil ba' we ixok ri'? ¿Jas c'u che xabij chi awana'b?” xcha' ri Abimelec che ri Isaac. “Xinchomaj chi quincämisaxic u mac rech ri are',” xutzelej u bixic ri Isaac." 
Genesis26:10 Ri Abimelec xubij che: “¿Jasche je a banom wa' chke? Man c'ax taj we ta c'o jun chque ri aj waral xwar ta ruc' ri awixokil, xaban ta c'u ri' chke chi xujmacunic.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ri Abimelec xuya' takanic chque conojel ri winak, xubij: “We c'o jachin cuban c'ax che we achi ri' o che ri rixokil, cac'okox na che cämical.”" 
Genesis26:12 Pa ri junab ri' xticonij ri Isaac chila', sibalaj c'u nim ri u wächinic ri tico'n xuyaco, xtewichi'x rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Genesis26:13 Sibalaj xk'inomaric, xeq'uiyir ri jastak rech." 
Genesis26:14 Xeq'uiyir ri u chij, ri u wacax, xukuje' xeq'uiyir ri pataninel tak rech, rumal ri' xquiäk rayix cumal ri aj pilisteyib." 
Genesis26:15 Aretak c'ä c'asal ri Abraham (ri u tat ri Isaac), ri pataninel tak rech ri Abraham xequic'ot tak c'ua'; e qui nojisam c'ut ri aj pilisteyib che ulew." 
Genesis26:16 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak ri Abimelec xubij che ri Isaac: “Chatel bic waral, sibalaj c'u at uxinak na k'inom chkawäch.”" 
Genesis26:17 Xel bic ri Isaac chila' xubana' ri u c'olbal pa ri beya' re Jerar, xjeki' c'u chila'." 
Genesis26:18 Xebuc'ot chi jumul ri c'ua' ri xec'otic aretak c'asal ri u tat, ri e mukum cumal ri aj pilisteyib aretak cäminak chic, xebucoj chic ri qui bi' jas ri cojom can rumal ri u tat." 
Genesis26:19 Pa jun k'ij, ri pataninel tak rech ri Isaac cätajin cäquic'ot jun c'ua' pa ri beya', xquirik c'u jun bulbux." 
Genesis26:20 Are c'u ri aj Jerar ri e yuk'ul tak chij, xech'ojin cuc' ri rajyuk'ab ri Isaac, cäquibij chi ri ja' ri' quech ri are'. Rumal ri' ri Isaac xucoj “Ch'ojibal” che u bi' ri c'ua' ri', xech'ojin c'u ruc' ri Isaac." 
Genesis26:21 Xquic'ot chi jun c'ua' ri pataninel tak rech ri Isaac ri xukuje' xech'ojin puwi', ri Isaac xucoj “C'ulelanic” che u bi' ri c'ua' ri'." 
Genesis26:22 Ri Isaac xbe naj che ri c'olbal ri', xuc'ot chi c'u jun c'ua'. Man xech'ojin ta chi c'u puwi', xucoj “Torotajic” che u bi', xubij: “Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm chke chi cuya' cujk'inomar waral.”" 
Genesis26:23 Xel chi bic ri Isaac chila', xk'ax pa Beerseb." 
Genesis26:24 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Isaac pa ri ak'ab ri', xubij c'u che: “In ri' ri u Dios ri a tat Abraham. Maxe'j awib, in in c'o awuc'. Rumal rech ri Abraham ri pataninel wech catintewichi'j, sibalaj c'u quebenpokisaj na ri e awija'lil.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ri Isaac xuban jun porobal chila' xuya' c'ut u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Xjeki' c'u pa ri c'olbal ri', ri e pataninel tak rech xquic'ot jun c'ua'." 
Genesis26:26 Xurika' jun k'ij, ri Abimelec xel bic pa Jerar xbe che u tzijobexic ri Isaac. Xachilax bic rumal ri Ahuzat ri rachil xukuje' ri Picol qui nimal ri rajch'ojab." 
Genesis26:27 Ri Isaac xubij chque: “Ri alak man quinaj ta ya' alak in esam c'u ya' alak ulok chupam ri ulew alak, ¿jas c'u che cäpe alak che wilic?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Kilom chi c'o ri Ajawaxel awuc', rumal ri' xkachomaj chi cakaban jun c'ulwächinic awuc'. Ri c'ulwächinic are wa':" 
Genesis26:29 Chi mawi cäban jun etzelal chke, man c'o ta c'u c'ax ka banom uj chawe. Xuwi c'u utzil ka banom chawe, xatkajach ulok ruc' quicotemal, cätajin c'u cattewichi'x rumal ri Ajawaxel camic.”" 
Genesis26:30 Ri Isaac xuban jun nimalaj nimak'ij chque, ri e are' xewa'ic xukuje' xebuq'uianic." 
Genesis26:31 Ak'ab xewalij chucab k'ij, xcan ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chquibil tak quib. Quiwil iwib xcha' bic ri Isaac chque ri e are' xquich'abej can ri Isaac ruc' quicotemal, xebec." 
Genesis26:32 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri pataninel tak rech ri Isaac, xequibij che chi xquirik ja' pa ri c'ua' ri cätajin cäquic'oto." 
Genesis26:33 Ri Isaac xucoj Seba che u bi' ri c'ua' ri'. Rumal ri' c'ä cabinax Beerseb che we tinimit ri'. 
Genesis26:34 Aretak c'o chi cawinak (40) u junab ri Esau, xc'uli' ruc' ri Judit u mia'l ri Beeri aj hitit. Xukuje' xc'uli' ruc' ri Basemat, ri u mia'l chi jun aj hitit ri cäbinax Elon che." 
Genesis26:35 We quieb ixokib ri' xquic'ayirisaj ri u c'aslemal ri Isaac xukuje' ri Rebec. 
Genesis27:1 Ri Isaac sibalaj nim winak chic xukuje' man cäca'y ta chic. Xurika' c'u jun k'ij xusiq'uij ri Esau, ri u c'ojol ri nabeal, xubij c'u che: “¡Nu c'ojol!” “Ch'aw la tat,” xutzelej u bixic ri Esau." 
Genesis27:2 “Cawilo chi sibalaj in nim winak chic, we ne xak chwek cäbij quincämic,” xcha' ri Isaac." 
Genesis27:3 “Quinwaj chi catbe pa juyub chac'ama' bic ri a q'uiakbal ch'ab xukuje' tak ri e a ch'ab, jachapa' ulok jun awaj chwe." 
Genesis27:4 Chasuc'umaj jun qui'laj nu riquil jas ri cäkaj chnuwäch, cäc'am c'u ulok rech quintijo. Quinwaj catintewichi'j canok xa c'u quieb oxib k'ij chic in c'aslic.”" 
Genesis27:5 Cätajin c'u cutatabej ri Rebec ri xubij ri Isaac che ri Esau. Rumal ri' aretak xbe ri Esau pa juyub che u chapic ulok jun awaj che ri u tat," 
Genesis27:6 ri Rebec xubij che ri Jacob ri chak'axel: “Chatampe', xinta ri xubij ri a tat che ri awachalal Esau, jewa' xubij che:" 
Genesis27:7 ‘Jachapa' ulok jun awaj chwe, chasuc'umaj jun qui'laj nu riquil, rech quintijo; quinya' c'u can ri tewichibal chawe chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xa c'u quieb oxib k'ij chic in c'aslic.’" 
Genesis27:8 Rumal ri' wal, chabana' ba' ri quinbij chawe:" 
Genesis27:9 Jät jawije' e c'o wi ri kawaj, jebac'ama' ulok quieb alaj tak q'uisic' ri e utz chic; quinban c'u na jun qui'laj u riquil ri a tat jas ri cäkaj chuwäch." 
Genesis27:10 At catc'amow bic ri riquil che ri a tat rech cutijo, rech catutewichi'j canok, c'ä majok chi cämok.”" 
Genesis27:11 Ri Jacob xubij che ri u nan: “Ri wachalal sibalaj pim ri rismal, man in je ta c'u in." 
Genesis27:12 E c'u we ne quinumalama' ri nu tat, cuch'ob c'u ri' chi in ri Jacob, cubij ri' chi xa cätajin quinsubu, quinuc'okoj c'u ri' che u q'uexwäch ri quinutewichi'j.”" 
Genesis27:13 Xubij c'u ri u nan che: “Chkaj ta ba' we c'okonic ri' panuwi' in. Jät ba', chabana' ri quinbij chawe, jebac'ama' ulok ri alaj tak q'uisic'.”" 
Genesis27:14 Ri Jacob xbe che qui c'amic ulok ri alaj tak q'uisic', xebuya' che ri u nan. Xusuc'umaj c'u jun qui'laj riquil, jas ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Isaac," 
Genesis27:15 xresaj ulok jun je'lalaj atz'iak ri c'olotalic ri rech ri Esau ri u nabeal, xucoj chrij ri Jacob ri u chak'axel." 
Genesis27:16 Xebucoj ri qui tz'umal ri alaj tak q'uisic' chquij tak ri u k'ab ri Jacob, xukuje' chrij u wi' jawije' ri man c'o ta wi rismal," 
Genesis27:17 ri Rebec xuya' ri riquil pa u k'ab ri Jacob xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri xubano. 
Genesis27:18 Xoc c'ut ri Jacob jawije' c'o wi ri u tat, xubij c'u che: “¡Tat!” “In c'o waral. ¿At jachin chque ri nu c'ojol?” xcha' ri Isaac." 
Genesis27:19 “In Esau ri nabeal c'ojol la,” xutzelej u bixic ri Jacob. “Xbantaj ri riquil ri xbij la chwe. Bana' la tok'ob walij la, tija' la jubik' ri awaj ri nu cämisam; ya' c'u la ri tewichibal la panuwi'.”" 
Genesis27:20 Ri Isaac xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jas xaban che u rikic ri awaj chanim nu c'ojol?” “Ri Ajawaxel ri Dios la are xinto'w che u rikic,” xutzelej u bixic ri Jacob." 
Genesis27:21 Xubij c'u ri Isaac che: “Chatkeb ulok chaya' c'u chwe chi catinmalalej, rech quinwetamaj we kastzij chi at ri Esau o man at taj.”" 
Genesis27:22 Xkeb ri Jacob chuwäch ri u tat rech cämalamax rumal. Xubij ri Isaac che ri Jacob: “Ri a ch'abal are u ch'abal ri Jacob, are c'u ri a k'ab, are ri u k'ab ri Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Jeri' ri Isaac man xuch'ob taj chi are ri Jacob, sibalaj c'u pim ri rismal junam ruc' ri rech ri Esau ri rachalal. Aretak c'u xaco'l man cutewichi'j," 
Genesis27:24 xuc'ot chi u chi' jumul: “¿La kas pa at ri nu c'ojol Esau?” “Je', in ri' ri Esau,” xcha' ri Jacob." 
Genesis27:25 Xubij c'u ri u tat che: “Chaya' ba' ri nu wa, nu c'ojol, rech quintij we ri awaj ri xachapa' ulok, c'ä te' c'u ri' catintewichi'j.” Ri Jacob xukebesaj ri wa' chuwäch ri u tat, xukuje' xuc'am ulok u wa'l uva, xwa' ri Isaac xukuje' xuq'uianic." 
Genesis27:26 C'äte c'u ri' xubij che: “Chatkeb ulok, nu c'ojol, quinwaj catintz'umaj.”" 
Genesis27:27 Aretak xkeb ri Jacob rech catz'umaxic ri Isaac xusik ri ruxlab ri ratz'iak. Xutewichi'j c'u cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Kastzij we uxlab ri' ruxlab ri nu c'ojol. Junam ruc' ri ruxlab jun juyub ri tewichi'm rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Genesis27:28 Chuya' ri Dios chawe ri jäb re ri caj, ri utzalaj tak u wächinic ri telechi'm trico xukuje' telechi'm u wa'l uva." 
Genesis27:29 Tinimit winak chatpatanin na; chi ri nimak tak tinimit chiquixucu' quib chawäch. Chattakan paquiwi' ri kas e awachalal; ¡cäquimej quib chawäch! Ri catquic'okoj na, quec'okotaj na, ri catquitewichi'j, quetewichitaj na.”" 
Genesis27:30 Xq'uis u tewichi'xic ri Jacob rumal ri Isaac, c'ä te' jubik' elinak ulok ri Jacob chuwäch ri u tat aretak xtzelej ulok ri Esau pa ri juyub ruc'am ulok ri awaj." 
Genesis27:31 Ri are' xukuje' xuban jun qui'laj riquil, xuya' pa tijic che ri u tat, xubij che: “Tat, walij la tija' la ri awaj ri xincämisaj, chintewichi'j c'u la.”" 
Genesis27:32 Are c'u ri Isaac xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jachin ri' ri at?” “In Esau, ri nabeal c'ojol la.” Xutzelej u bixic." 
Genesis27:33 Ri Isaac sibalaj xmayquenic, ruc' c'ut ch'abal cabirbitic, xubij: “¿Jachin c'u ri' ri xbe pa tzucunic, xuc'am ulok jun qui'laj riquil chwe? Xintij c'u ronojel c'ä maja' catulic, xintewichi'j, tewichital chi c'u camic.”" 
Genesis27:34 Aretak xtataj rumal ri Esau ri xubij ri u tat, sibalaj xok'ic, xurak u chi', xubij: “¡Tat, chintewichi'j ba' la ri in xukuje'!”" 
Genesis27:35 Ri Isaac xubij che: “Ulinak ri a chak', xinusub c'ut, xuc'am c'u bic ri tewichibal ri awech at.”" 
Genesis27:36 “Jacha' ba' xcoj Jacob che u bi',” xcha' ri Esau. “U camul chi wa' in u subum. Ri nabe mul xumaj ri takanic ri c'o wuc' chi in nabeal, ri tewichibal ri ya'tal chwe. ¿La ma ta c'u c'olom la can jun tewichibal chic chwe in?”" 
Genesis27:37 Are c'u ri Isaac xutzelej u bixic che: “Chawilampe', in nu yo'm takanic chi ri Jacob catakan pawi'; conojel ri e rachalaxic e nu jachom pa u k'ab rech quebux u pataninelab nu telechi'm u trico xukuje' nu telechi'm u wa'l u uva. ¿Jas ta chic ri quincuin ta chi che u banic camic chawe nu c'ojol?”" 
Genesis27:38 Ri Esau xucoj u chuk'ab che u bixic che ri u tat, xubij: “Tat, ¿la xa c'u jun tewichibal cäcuin la che u ya'ic? ¡Chintewichi'j ba' la in xukuje'!” Xok' chi jumul, ruc' rakojchi'aj." 
Genesis27:39 Xubij c'u ri Isaac che: “Naj catejekel wi na chque ri wächinelalaj tak ulew xukuje' che ri jäb ri cäpe chicaj. 
Genesis27:40 Cato' na awib ruc' ri a ch'ich' re ch'o'j catoc na che pataninel re ri a chak'; aretak c'u cäc'oji' a chuk'ab, cawesaj na awib chuxe' ri u takanic.”" 
Genesis27:41 Kas chi' c'ut ri Esau xretzelaj u wäch ri Jacob, rumal ri tewichibal ri xya' che rumal ri u tat, xubij: “Xak pa quieb oxib k'ij, cäcäm ri nu tat, aretak c'u cäminak chic, quincämisaj ri Jacob ri nu chak'.”" 
Genesis27:42 Aretak xretamaj ri Rebec ri u chomanic ri Esau, xusiq'uij ri Jacob, xubij che: “Wal, ri awachalal Esau cubij chi catucämisaj che resaxic ri royowal chawij." 
Genesis27:43 Rumal ri', wal, chabana' ba' ri quinbij chawe; mabey awib jät cho rachoch ri nu xibal Laban, ri c'o pa Aran." 
Genesis27:44 Chatcanaj ruc' c'ä coc'ow na ri royowal ri awachalal chawij 
Genesis27:45 xukuje' c'ä cäsach na pa u jolom ri a banom che. Quintak c'u na a siq'uixic rech cattzelej ulok. ¡Man quinwaj taj chi xa pa jun k'ij quinsach qui wäch ri quieb wal!” 
Genesis27:46 Ri Rebec xutzijobej ri Isaac, xubij che: “Ri in sibalaj in k'itajinak chi che ri c'aslemal, u mac quech ri alitomab aj hititib ri xec'uli' ruc' ri Esau. We ri Jacob cäc'uli' ruc' jun chque ri aj hititib ri e c'o waral pa Canaan, are utz na we quincämic.”" 
Genesis28:1 Ri Isaac xusiq'uij ri Jacob, xutewichi'j, xuya' we takanic ri' che, xubij: “Matc'uli' ruc' jun ali aj waral." 
Genesis28:2 Jät pa Padan-aram cho rachoch ri a man Betuel, chatec'ulan chila' ruc' jun chque ri u mia'l ri Laban ri u xibal ri a nan." 
Genesis28:3 Ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cattewichi'n na, chebuya' ta ba' na e q'ui ri e awija'lil rech chawe quebel wi tinimit tak winak." 
Genesis28:4 Chuya' c'ut chawe xukuje' chque ri e awija'lil, ri tewichibal ri xuchi'j che ri Abraham rech cäcanaj we ulew ri' pa k'ab, ri uj c'o wi camic ri kokxanim wi kib, are' c'u xchi'n che ri Abraham.”" 
Genesis28:5 Jewa' ri u takic bic ri Jacob rumal ri Isaac pa Padan-aram. Xopan c'u ri Jacob cho rachoch ri Laban, u c'ojol ri Betuel aj aramib. Ri Laban are u xibal ri Rebec ri u nan ri Jacob xukuje' ri Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Xril ri Esau aretak ri Isaac xutewichi'j ri Jacob, xutak bic c'ä pa Padan-aram rech cäc'uli' chila'. Xukuje' kas xuto aretak xutewichi'j xubij che chi mäc'uli' ruc' jun ali aj Canaan," 
Genesis28:7 chi xbe c'u ri Jacob pa Padan-aram jas ri xbix che cumal ri u nan u tat. 
Genesis28:8 Jeri' xretamaj ri Esau chi ri u tat man utz ta queril wi ri alitomab aj cananeyib; 
Genesis28:9 rumal ri' ri Esau xbe che u ta'ic ri Mahalat, ri u mia'l ri Ismael (ri Abraham are' ri u tat ri Ismael). Xc'uli' c'u ruc' ri Mahalat ri rana'b ri Nebaiot. Xc'uli' ruc', pune' ta ne e c'o chi niq'uiaj rixokil aj cananeyib." 
Genesis28:10 Xel bic ri Jacob pa Beerseb, xumajij c'u ri be ri cäbe pa Aran." 
Genesis28:11 Xopan pa jun c'olbal chila' c'u xcanaj wi che roc'owisaxic ri ak'ab, kajinak chi c'u ri k'ij. Xuc'am jun chque ri abaj ri c'o chila' xucoj che u ch'äcat, xkaj c'u che waram." 
Genesis28:12 Xuban jun ichic' chila', xril jun k'a'm ri tac'al cho ri ulew ri copan c'ä chicaj, ri quepaki' wi xukuje' quexuli' wi ri u tako'nib aj caj ri Dios." 
Genesis28:13 Xukuje' cärilo chi tac'al ri Ajawaxel pa u xc'ut, xubij c'u che: “In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri a mam Abraham xukuje' ri a tat Isaac. Chawe at xukuje' chque ri e awija'lil quinya' wi na ri ulew ri at k'oyol wi." 
Genesis28:14 Ri e are' quebux na jacha' ri u puc'uq'uil ri ulew, caquilic' na quib pa ri iquiak'ab xukuje' pa ri mox k'ab, pa ri elebal k'ij pa ri kajebal k'ij, conojel c'ut ri achalaxic re ri uwächulew quetewichitaj na rumal awech xukuje' cumal tak ri e awija'lil." 
Genesis28:15 In c'o awuc'; catinchajij na apawije' ta ne ri catbe wi, kas c'u catintzelej na ulok pa we ulew ri'. Man catinwonoba' ta canok we ta ma ta quinban na awuc' jas ri nu bim chawe.”" 
Genesis28:16 Aretak xc'astaj ri Jacob che ri u waram, xpe pa u jolom, xubij: “Kas ba' c'o ri Ajawaxel waral, man c'u weta'm ta in.”" 
Genesis28:17 Sibalaj xuxe'j rib, xuchomaj c'ut: “Nim u banic we c'olbal ri'. ¡Waral c'o wi ri rachoch Dios, are u chi' ri caj wa'!”" 
Genesis28:18 Chucab k'ij ri Jacob sibalaj ak'ab xwalijic, xuc'am ri abaj ri xucoj che u ch'acat, xutac'aba' jacha' jun akan, xutas c'ut xuk'ij aseit puwi'." 
Genesis28:19 Pa ri c'olbal ri' ojer xc'oji' wi can jun tinimit “Luz” u bi', ri Jacob xuq'uex u bi', xucoj “Betel” che u bi'." 
Genesis28:20 Ri Jacob chila' xuban wi we chi'nic ri': “We quinrachilaj ri Dios xukuje' we qui nu chajij chupam we nu binem ri' ri cätajin quinbano, we cuya' ri quintijo xukuje' ri quinwatz'iakibej," 
Genesis28:21 we c'u utz nu wäch xukuje' man c'o ta quinc'ulmaj quintzelej ulok cho rachoch ri nu tat, ri Ajawaxel cux na nu Dios." 
Genesis28:22 We abaj ri' ri nu cojom jacha' che jun akan, cux na rachoch Dios; quinya' c'u na amak'el che la, nu Dios, ri lajujil che ronojel ri cäya' la chwe.”" 
Genesis29:1 Ri Jacob xutakej ri u be, xbe c'u pa ri culew ri aj elebal k'ij." 
Genesis29:2 Xurika' jun c'ua' pa ri juyub, chunakaj ri c'ua' e c'o oxmulaj chij ri cätajin quebuxlanic, chila' c'u cäquitij wi qui joron ri awaj. Cojom jun nimalaj abaj che ch'ukubal u wi' ri c'ua'," 
Genesis29:3 aretak c'u conojel ri tzobaj caquimulij quib chila', ri ajyuk'ab cäquesaj ri abaj ri ch'ukubem u wi' ri c'ua', cäquiya' c'u qui joron ri qui chij, cäquich'uk chi c'u can u wi' ri c'ua'." 
Genesis29:4 Ri Jacob xuc'ot qui chi' ri ajyuk'ab: “¿Jawije' quixel wi nu winak?” “Uj aj Aran,” xecha'." 
Genesis29:5 Ri Jacob xubij chque: “¿La quich'ob u wäch ri Laban u c'ojol ri Nacor?” xcha' chi chque. “Je', cäkach'ob u wäch,” xecha'." 
Genesis29:6 “¿La utz u wäch?” xcha' chi na ri Jacob chque. Ri ajyuk'ab xquibij che: “Je', utz u wäch ri Laban, chawilampe' ri u mia'l ri Raquel petinak e ruc'am ri u chij ri u tat,” xecha' ri ajyuk'ab." 
Genesis29:7 Ri Jacob xubij chque: “C'ä c'o na ri k'ij, man ya'tal taj chi quebitz'apij ri chij chanim. ¿Jasche man quiya' qui joron, quebiyuk'uj ta chi c'u na jubik'?”" 
Genesis29:8 Ri ajyuk'ab xquibij che ri Jacob: “Man cuya' taj Je cäkaban wa'. Cäkeyej na chi cäquimulij quib conojel ri ajyuk'ab rech cäquesaj ri abaj ri tz'apibem u wi' ri c'ua' rech cujcuinic cäkaya' qui joron ri chij.” 
Genesis29:9 Cätajin c'u cätzijon ri Jacob cuc' ri ajyuk'ab aretak xopan ri Raquel, e ruc'am ri u chij ri u tat, are c'u cajyuk' ri chij." 
Genesis29:10 Aretak ri Jacob xril ri Raquel e ruc'am ri u chij ri Laban ri u xibal ri u nan, aninak xbe che resaxic ri abaj ri tz'apibem u wi' ri c'ua', xuya' qui joron ri chij;" 
Genesis29:11 xuya' rutzil u wäch xutz'umaj ri u palaj ri Raquel, xok' ri Jacob." 
Genesis29:12 Aretak ri Jacob xutzijoj che ri Raquel chi ri are' are ral ri Rebec, ri rana'b ri Laban, aninak xbe ri Raquel xubij che ri u tat." 
Genesis29:13 Aretak ri Laban xuta' u tzijol chi ri Jacob, ral ri rana'b, aninak xbe che u c'ulaxic, xulak'apuj, xuya' rutzil u wäch, xutz'umaj ri u palaj, xuc'am bic cho rachoch. Aretak e c'o chi pa ja, ri Jacob xutzijoj che ri Laban ronojel ri u c'ulmam," 
Genesis29:14 xubij c'u ri Laban che: “Kas ba' tzij chi xa jun ka quiq'uel awuc'.” Jun ic' chic c'o ri Jacob ruc' ri Laban," 
Genesis29:15 ri Laban xubij che ri Jacob: “Man rumal ta rech chi at wachalal, xak ta catchacun wuc' chi jeri'. Chabij chwe joropa' ri cawaj catintojo.”" 
Genesis29:16 E c'o c'u quieb u mia'l ri Laban: Lea u bi' ri nabeal, Raquel u bi' ri chak'axel." 
Genesis29:17 Ri Lea sibalaj e tur ri e u bak'wäch; are c'u ri Raquel sibalaj cabitowic. 
Genesis29:18 Benak chi c'u ranima' ri Jacob ruc' ri Raquel, rumal ri' xubij che ri Laban: “Quinchacun na wukub junab uc' la che u ch'äquic ri Raquel ri chak'axel mia'l la.”" 
Genesis29:19 Ri Laban xubij: “Utz ba', chawe quinya' wi chuwäch ri quinya' che jun winak ri man weta'm ta u wäch. Chatcanaj ba' can wuc'.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jeri' ri Jacob xchacun wukub junab che u ch'äquic ri Raquel, man xuna' ta c'ut xeboc'ow ri junab rumal rech chi sibalaj benak ranima' ruc' ri Raquel." 
Genesis29:21 Aretak xtz'akat ri wukub junab, ri Jacob xubij che ri Laban: “Ya' la ri wixokil rech quinc'uli' ruc', xtz'akat ya' ri junab ri xink'at che u ch'äquic.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ri Laban xebusiq'uij conojel ri u c'ulja rech quec'oji' ruc' pa ri nimak'ij rech ri c'ulanem. 
Genesis29:23 Ri Laban are c'u xuc'ama' ri Lea chak'ab, xujach che ri Jacob, xwar c'u ri Jacob ruc'." 
Genesis29:24 Ri Laban xusipaj jun ali che ri Lea Zilp u bi' che u lok'om pataninel. 
Genesis29:25 Ak'ab chucab k'ij ri Jacob xrilo chi ruc' ri Lea xwar wi, xuch'a' che ri Laban: “¿Jas ri banom la chwe? ¿La ma ta xinchacun uc' la che u ch'äquic ri Raquel? ¿Jas c'u che xinsub la?”" 
Genesis29:26 Ri Laban xubij che: “Man uj nak'atal taj chi are ta cäc'uli' nabe ri chak'axel chuwäch ri nabeal. 
Genesis29:27 Chatz'akatisaj ba' ri wukub k'ij re ri a c'ulanem ruc' ri Lea, c'ä te' c'u ri' cäkaya' chic ri Raquel chawe we caya' a tzij chi catchacun chi na wukub junab wuc' che u ch'äquic.”" 
Genesis29:28 Ri Jacob xuya' u tzij che ri xbix che; aretak c'u xtz'akat ri wukub k'ij re ri c'ulanem ruc' ri Lea, ri Laban xujach ri Raquel pa u k'ab rech coc che rixokil." 
Genesis29:29 Ri Laban xusipaj jun ali che ri Raquel Bil u bi', che u lok'om pataninel." 
Genesis29:30 Xc'uli' c'u ri Jacob ruc' ri Raquel, are c'u lok' xril na ri Raquel chuwäch ri Lea, xchacun chi c'u na wukub junab ruc' ri Laban." 
Genesis29:31 Aretak ri Ajawaxel xrilo chi ri Jacob cäretzelaj u wäch ri Lea, ri Dios xubano chi ri Lea quec'oji' ral, are c'u ri Raquel xuban che chi man quec'oji' ta ral." 
Genesis29:32 Xcanaj c'u yawab winak ri Lea, xc'oji' jun ral ala ri xucoj Ruben che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Rilom ri Ajawaxel ri nu bis. Quinulok'ok'ej c'u na ri wachajil camic.”" 
Genesis29:33 Ri Lea xc'oji' chi jun ral ala, xucoj Simeon che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Ri Ajawaxel xrilo chi quetzelax nu wäch, rumal ri' xuya' chi jun wal ala.”" 
Genesis29:34 Xc'oji' chi c'u jun ral ala ri xucoj Levi che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Camic cäjeki' na ri wachajil wuc', e walam chi c'u oxib u c'ojol.”" 
Genesis29:35 Xc'oji' chic jun ral ala ri Lea, xucoj Juda che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Camic quinya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.” Man e c'o ta chi c'u ral xec'ojic." 
Genesis30:1 Aretak ri Raquel xrilo chi man c'o ta ral quec'oji' ruc' ri Jacob, xoyowar chrij ri Lea, xubij c'u che ri rachajil: “Chebaya' wal, we c'u man quebaya', quincäm na.”" 
Genesis30:2 Ri Jacob xyactaj royowal chrij ri Raquel, xubij c'u che: “¿La xa pu in Dios? Ri man u y'om ta chawe chi quec'oji' awal.”" 
Genesis30:3 Are c'u ri are' xubij che: “Ampe', chac'ama' ri nu lok'om pataninel Bil chawuc'aj awib ruc'; aretak c'u chec'oji' ral, junam ri' ri kas in taj quec'oji' wal. Jeri' cuya' quec'oji' wal.”" 
Genesis30:4 Jewa' xban ri Raquel che u ya'ic ri Bil ri u lok'om pataninel che ri Jacob rech cux man kas ta rixokil. Ri Jacob xuban rixokil che ri Bil," 
Genesis30:5 xralaj c'u jun u c'ojol ri Jacob. 
Genesis30:6 Xubij c'u ri Raquel: “We alaj ala ri' Dan quebinax na che, rumal rech chi ri Dios xinutatabej che ri nu ch'awem ri xinban chuwäch xuban c'ut ri suq'uilal chwe aretak xuya' jun wal ala.”" 
Genesis30:7 Xralaj chi c'ut ri Bil jun u c'ojol ri Jacob," 
Genesis30:8 ri Raquel xubij: “We ac'al ri' Neptali ri u bi' cäc'ojic, rumal rech chi sibalaj nu tijom nu chuk'ab ruc' ri wachalal, cätajin c'u quinch'äcanic.”" 
Genesis30:9 Aretak ri Lea xrilo chi man quec'oji' ta chi ral, xuc'am ri u lok'om pataninel, xuya' che ri Jacob rech cux man kas ta rixokil." 
Genesis30:10 Aretak c'u ri Zilp xralaj jun u c'ojol ri Jacob," 
Genesis30:11 ri Lea xubij: “¡Sibalaj utz xintaklebej. Rumal ri' Gad ri u bi' ri ac'al quecojok!” 
Genesis30:12 Ri Zilp xralaj chi jun u c'ojol ri Jacob. 
Genesis30:13 Xubij c'u ri Lea: “¡Utz uwo nu k'ij! ¡Ri ixokib cäquibij na chi sibalaj in tewichitalic! Rumal ri' Aser ri u bi' ri ac'al quecojok.” 
Genesis30:14 Aretak cätajin ri k'atoj rech ri trico, xel bic ri Ruben, xbe pa juyub. Chila' c'u xeburika' wi ri e u wäch juwi' mandragor ri, xebuc'am ulok che ri Lea ri u nan. Aretak xril ri Raquel, xubij che ri Lea: “Chabana' jun tok'ob, chebaya' we ri mandragor ri xebuc'am ulok ri awal.”" 
Genesis30:15 Ri Lea xubij che ri Raquel: “¿La cachomaj chi man nim ta ri c'ax a banom chwe chi a majom ri wachajil? Are c'u ri camic are cawaj xukuje' quebamaj chwe ri e u mandragor ri wal.” “Che ba' qui q'uexwäch ri u mandragor ri awal, chak'ab camic cäwar ri Jacob awuc',” xcha' ri Raquel che ri Lea." 
Genesis30:16 Pa ri roquibal ri ak'ab aretak xtzelej ulok ri Jacob pa juyub, ri Lea xel ulok che u c'ulaxic, xubij che: “Camic catwar can wuc', e nu yo'm c'u ri u wäch ri u mandragor ri wal che kajebal awech.” Ri Jacob xwar can ruc' ri Lea pa ri ak'ab ri'," 
Genesis30:17 xralaj c'ut ri uro' u c'ojol ri Jacob, xtataj c'ut ri u ch'awem rumal ri Dios." 
Genesis30:18 Ri Lea xubij: “We ac'al ri' Isacar ri u bi' cäc'ojic, rumal rech chi in u tojom ri Dios rumal ri u ya'ic ri nu lok'om pataninel che ri wachajil.”" 
Genesis30:19 Xralaj chi c'u na ri Lea ri uwak u c'ojol ri Jacob," 
Genesis30:20 xubij c'u ri Lea: “Ri Dios u yo'm jun utzalaj sipanic chwe. Camic sibalaj nim quinril wi ri wachajil, wilom chi c'u qui wäch wakib u c'ojol. Rumal ri' Zabulon ri u bi' ri ac'al quecojok.”" 
Genesis30:21 Chuq'uisbal, ri Lea xralaj jun ral ali ri xucoj Din che u bi'." 
Genesis30:22 Xnataj c'u ri Raquel che ri Dios; xuta' ri u ch'awem xuban che chi quec'oji' ral. 
Genesis30:23 Aretak xc'oji' ri u nabeal ri Raquel, xubij: “Ri Dios xinresaj pa ri q'uixbal ri in c'o wi chi man e c'o ta wal." 
Genesis30:24 C'o ta banom wi chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' ta chi jun wal ala.” Rumal ri' xucoj Jose che u bi' ri ac'al. 
Genesis30:25 Aretak ri Raquel rilom chic u wäch ri Jose, ri Jacob xubij che ri Laban: “Chintzokopij la bic, quinwaj chi quintzelej cho wachoch." 
Genesis30:26 Cheya' la bic ri walc'ual chwe xukuje' tak ri e wixokil, rumal c'u quech wa' in chacuninak uc' la chintzokopij la bic. Kas c'u eta'm la jas ri u q'uisic wib nu banom che ri chac la.”" 
Genesis30:27 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Laban che: “Chabana' tok'ob, chatcanaj canok wuc'. In cuininak che retamaxic rumal ch'obonic chi ri Ajawaxel in u tewichi'm rumal awech." 
Genesis30:28 Chabij chwe joropa' ri cawaj cach'äco, quintoj c'u chawe.”" 
Genesis30:29 Xubij c'u ri Jacob che ri Laban: “Eta'm ya' la jas ri patanixic la nu banom, xukuje' jas qui chajixic ri awaj la nu banom;" 
Genesis30:30 aretak xinulic, man e q'ui ta ri chij la e c'olic, camic c'ut sibalaj e pok'irinak chic. Aretak xinulic, chi' xchapletaj tewichi'xic la rumal ri Ajawaxel; ¿jampa' c'u quinchaplej chac in che quilixic ri wixokil xukuje' ri walc'ual?”" 
Genesis30:31 Ri Laban xubij che ri Jacob: “Chabij ba' chwe, ¿joropa' ri tojbal awech cawaj?” Ri Jacob xubij che ri Laban: “Man quinwaj taj chi quintoj la. Quebenchajij c'u ri chij la we utz cata' la ri quinbij:" 
Genesis30:32 Ya' ba' la chwe camic quineoc'ow na, chquixo'l ri chij la, quebentas c'u conojel ri alaj tak chij ri k'ek quij, xukuje' ri alaj tak q'uisic' ri much'umul quij ri tz'ilitz'oj quij. E are c'u wa' ri tojbal wech ri quinwaj." 
Genesis30:33 Aretak c'u cäpe la chwek cäbij che rilic ri nu ch'äcom cäk'alajin ri' we c'o weläk'am. We quebelerika' la q'uisic' ri man much'umul ta quij, ri man e tz'ilitz'oj taj o alaj ama'ib tak chij ri man e k'ekab taj, xa e weläk'am ri' che la.”" 
Genesis30:34 Ri Laban xubij: “Utz ba', utz quinta' ri a chomanic.”" 
Genesis30:35 Are c'u ri Laban, pa ri k'ij ri' xebutas conojel ri ama' tak chij ri much'umul quij ri e tz'ilitz'oj, xukuje' conojel ri ati'tab tak q'uisic' ri e k'ekk'oj o ri c'o sak chupam ri quij, xukuje' conojel ri chij ri k'ekab, xebujach pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol rech quequilij." 
Genesis30:36 Ri Laban xebuc'am bic we chij ri' chuwäch ri Jacob naj xebuya' wi' xubinibej oxib k'ij be. Xcanaj c'u can ri Jacob che qui chajixic ri niq'uiaj u chij chic ri Laban," 
Genesis30:37 xebut'oy räx tak qui k'ab sak lemob, almendr xukuje' e che' lemob xebuch'ol ch'akatak tak quij rech quek'alajin ri ch'akatak tak sak ri quecanajic." 
Genesis30:38 Xebuya' ri u k'ab tak che' ri ch'olom quij chquiwäch tak ri tzobaj pa ri c'olbal ri cäquitij wi qui joron, chila' c'u quebetz'en wi ri ama'ib cuc' ri ati'tab, rumal c'u rech chi chquiwäch ri e u k'ab tak che' cäquiban wi, rumal ri' ri ati'tab tak q'uisic', e juch'ujak, much'umul quij, tz'ilitz'oj quij ri cal ri quec'ojic." 
Genesis30:39  
Genesis30:40 Are c'u ri Jacob quebuk'ato quebuya' c'u cho qui rawäch ri e rawaj ri Laban ri e juch'ujak xukuje' ri e k'ekab. Jewa' xuban ri Jacob che qui pok'isaxic ri u chij ri are', xebutas c'u chquixo'l ri u chij ri Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Amak'el aretak quebetz'en ri awaj ri e chomak na, ri Jacob quebuya' ri u k'ab tak che' chquiwäch jawije' ri cäquitij wi qui joron, rech cäbe qui wäch chque tak ri che' ri ch'olom ch'akatak quij aretak quebetz'enic;" 
Genesis30:42 aretak c'u quepe ri awaj ri tukarib, man quebuya' ta ri u k'ab tak che' chquiwäch. Rumal ri' ri tukar tak awaj are quecanaj che ri Laban, are c'u ri e chomak tak awaj e are wa' ri querechbej ri Jacob." 
Genesis30:43 Jewa' xuban ri Jacob sibalaj c'u xk'inomaric, xeq'uiyir c'u ri u chij, xukuje' xeq'uiyir ri u lok'om tak pataninelab achijab, ixokib, xeq'uiyir ri u camey xukuje' tak ri u bur." 
Genesis31:1 Xretamaj c'u ri Jacob ri cäquitzijoj ri u c'ojol ri Laban, cäquibij: “Ri Jacob u c'amom ronojel ri rech ri ka tat, ruc' c'u wa' uxinak k'inom.”" 
Genesis31:2 Xukuje' xril ri Jacob chi cuban chi royowal ri Laban che, man je ta chic cärilo jas ri nabe." 
Genesis31:3 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Jacob: “Chattzelej pa ri culew ri a mam, jawije' e c'o wi ri awachalaxic, catinwachilaj c'u na.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ri Jacob xtakan che u siq'uixic ri Raquel xukuje' ri Lea, rech quebopan ruc' pa ri juyub jawije' ri cätajin cäyuk'un wi," 
Genesis31:5 xubij chque: “Quinwilo chi ri i tat man je ta chi cuban chwe jas ri nabe; are c'u ri u Dios ri nu tat, c'o wuc' amak'el." 
Genesis31:6 Kas iwilom ya' ix chi nu banom jun utzalaj chac che u patanixic ri i tat," 
Genesis31:7 amak'el c'ut man cutz'akatisaj ta ri tojbal wech, man in u tzokopim ta c'u ri Dios pa u k'ab rech cuban jun c'ax chwe;" 
Genesis31:8 xane' we cubij chwe: ‘Ri tojbal awech e are ri awaj ri e tz'ilitz'oj,’ conojel c'u ri ati'tab e tz'ilitz'oj ri cal quecalaj; we cubij chwe: ‘Ri tojbal awech are ri awaj ri juch'ujak quij,’ conojel c'u ri ati'tab e juch'ujak ri cal quecalaj." 
Genesis31:9 Jewa' xuban ri Dios che quesaxic ri rawaj ri i tat xebuya' c'u chwe. 
Genesis31:10 C'o jumul aretak cätajin quebetz'en ri awaj, xinwil pa nu waram chi ri ama'ib tak q'uisic' ri quebetz'en cuc' ri ati'tab, e juch'ujak, much'umul quij, xukuje' e tz'ilitz'oj." 
Genesis31:11 Pa ri achic' ri' ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej: ‘Jacob,’ xcha' chwe. Xinbij c'u che: ‘In c'olic ri'.’" 
Genesis31:12 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij chwe: ‘Kas chawila', cawil c'ut na chi conojel ri ama'ib ri quebetz'en cuc' ri ati'tab, e juch'ujak, much'umul quij xukuje' e tz'ilitz'oj. Wilom c'u ronojel ri u banom ri Laban chawe." 
Genesis31:13 In ri' ri Dios ri xinc'ut wib chawäch pa Betel, ri xak'ij wi aseit puwi' ri abaj, chila' c'u xaban wi jun chi'nic chwe. ¡Jo' ba'! Chatwalijok. Chaya' can we c'olbal ri', chattzelejok jawije' ri xatalax wi.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ri Raquel xukuje' ri Lea xquibij che ri Jacob: “Ri uj man c'o ta chi jas cäkechbej cho rachoch ri ka tat. 
Genesis31:15 Cuban c'u rib chi man reta'm ta chi ka wäch. ¡Xujuc'ayij c'u ne che c'ulanem chawe, xutij c'u ri käjil!" 
Genesis31:16 Kastzij, ronojel ri k'inomal ri resam ri Dios che ri ka tat, kech uj wa' xukuje' quech ri kal. Chabana' ba' ronojel ri u bim ri Dios chawe.”" 
Genesis31:17 Ri Jacob xusuc'umaj rib che ri u tzelejic pa Canaan, jawije' c'o wi ri Isaac ri u tat. Xebupakba' ri u c'ojol xukuje' tak ri rixokil chquij ri camey, xebumulij bic conojel ri jastak rech, xuchaplej qui binisaxic conojel ri rawaj ri xtojbex rech ri u chac pa Padan-aram." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Benak c'u can ri Laban che u socaxic quij ri u chij ri e c'o naj, ri Raquel xereläk'aj bic ri e u c'u'x u k'inomal, ri u tat ri e c'o pa ri rachoch." 
Genesis31:20 Jewa' xuban ri Jacob che u subic ri Laban ri aj aramey, man xubij ta che chi quel bic." 
Genesis31:21 Xanimaj bic xebuc'am bic conojel ri jastak rech. Xuk'axextaj ri nima' Euprats, xukuje' xutakej ri be chusuq'uil tak ri juyub re Galaad." 
Genesis31:22 C'ä churox k'ij xretamaj ri Laban chi animajinak bic ri Jacob. 
Genesis31:23 Ri Laban xerachilaj bic ri rachalaxic, xbe che u rikic ri Jacob, c'ä chuwukub k'ij xurika' cho tak ri juyub re Galaad." 
Genesis31:24 Ri Dios xuch'abej ri Laban ri aj aramey pa ri q'uisbal ak'ab re ri uwuk k'ij, xubij che: “Chata' ri quinbij, c'ax match'aw che ri Jacob,” xcha' che." 
Genesis31:25 Ri Laban xurika' ri Jacob cho tak ri juyub re Galaad, chila' c'u kajinak wi. Xukuje' chila' xekaj wi ri Laban e rachil ri rachalaxic," 
Genesis31:26 xuch'a' c'u che ri Jacob: “¿Jas ri a banom? ¿Jasche in a subum? ¡Xebatokij ulok ri nu mia'l je ta ne ri xa xebach'äc pa jun ch'o'j! 
Genesis31:27 ¿Jasche xinasubu xatanimaj c'u ulok chic'uyal, man xabij ta na chwe? We ta xinwetamaj, xinban ta jun nimak'ij ri', xincoj ta tum, xukuje' arp che a jachic ulok." 
Genesis31:28 Man xaweyej taj chi xebentz'umaj ta ulok ri e nu mia'l xukuje' ri u wi' tak nu mam. ¡Man utz ta ri a no'j! 
Genesis31:29 Quincuinic quinban apachique c'ax chiwe iwonojel, xinuch'abej c'u ri u Dios ri a tat chak'ab pa nu waram, xubij chwe: ‘Chata' ri quinbij chawe, c'ax match'aw che ri Jacob.’" 
Genesis31:30 We c'u sibalaj carayij ri a tzelejic cho rachoch ri a tat, rumal ri' catbec, ¿jas c'u che xebaweläk'aj ulok ri e u c'u'x nu k'inomal?”" 
Genesis31:31 Ri Jacob xubij che ri Laban: “Xa xinxe'j wib. Xinchomaj chi craj ne que tokij can la ri mia'l la chwe. 
Genesis31:32 Jachin c'u ruc' ri queriktaj wi ri e u c'u'x k'inomal la, ¡chcämisaxok! C'o ba' chquiwäch ri kachalaxic: c'utu' la chquiwäch we c'o jun jas ech la nu c'amom ulok, c'ama' la bic.” Man c'u reta'm ta ri Jacob chi are ri Raquel xebeläk'an ulok ri e u c'u'x u k'inomal." 
Genesis31:33 Ri Laban xoc pa ri u lic'om rachoch ri Jacob, xoc pa ri rech ri Lea, xukuje' pa ri quech ri quieb ixokib ri lok'om pataninelab, man xeburik ta c'u ri u c'u'x u k'inomal. Aretak xel ulok pa ri u lic'om rachoch ri Lea, xoc pa ri rech ri Raquel." 
Genesis31:34 Ri Raquel aninak xebuc'am ri e u c'u'x k'inomal, xebuc'ol pa jun chque ri qui xalma ri camey, xt'uyi c'u paquiwi'. Ri Laban xebutzucuj pa ronojel ri lic'om rachoch, man xeburik ta c'ut." 
Genesis31:35 Ri Raquel xubij che ri u tat: “Tat, mape oyowal la we man quinwalij chwäch la, xa cätajin cäkaj ri nu yab camic.” Sibalaj c'u xebutzucuj ri Laban ri u c'u'x u k'inomal, man xcuin ta c'u che qui rikic." 
Genesis31:36 Xyactaj royowal ri Jacob, xuc'ulelaj ri Laban, xubij che: “¿Jas ri man utz taj nu banom? ¿Jas ri in macuninak wi chi sibalaj lal k'ak'arinak ulok che wokataxic?" 
Genesis31:37 E tulcupim c'u la conojel ri jastak wech, ¿la e c'o c'u jastak ech la e rikom la wuc'? ¡Ya' la chquiwäch ri wachalaxic xukuje' chquiwäch ri achalaxic la, e are' quebin na jachin ri ajchak'mac!" 
Genesis31:38 Pa ri juwinak (20) junab ri xinchacun uc' la, mawi jumul xetzakan ri chij la xukuje' ri q'uisic' la; mawi c'o jun chij xintij chque ri chij la;" 
Genesis31:39 mawi jumul xinc'am ta ulok che la jun q'uisic' ri cämisam ta cumal awaj; in c'u xintojow ri xetzakic; we pa k'ij o chak'ab queläk'ax jun awaj, xtok'ij la ri rajil chwe, xintoj c'ut." 
Genesis31:40 Pa k'ij quincäm che k'ak', chak'ab quincäm che tew, man coc ta chi c'u ne ri nu waram." 
Genesis31:41 Juwinak (20) junab in c'olinak pa ri achoch la, ri quil la, are wa' ri nu ch'äcom: cajlajuj (14) junab xinchacun uc' la che qui ch'äquic ri quieb mia'l la; wakib junab xinchacun che quilixic ri awaj la; amak'el c'ut caq'uex la ri tojbal wech." 
Genesis31:42 We ta c'u ma ta c'o ri u Dios ri Abraham wuc', ri Dios ri xuk'ijilaj ri nu tat Isaac, xak ta e nu k'alum ri' ri quieb nu k'ab xinesaj la ulok. Rilom c'u ri Dios ri nu bis, xukuje' rilom chi utz elinak ri nu chac, rumal ri' xyaj la rumal ri Dios chak'ab iwir.”" 
Genesis31:43 Xubij ri Laban che ri Jacob: “We alitomab ri' e nu mia'l; ri e witak nu mam; we chij ri' e nu chij; ¡ronojel ri cawilo wech in! ¿Jas ta c'u lo ri quincuinic quinban chque ri nu mia'l o ri cal ri e teren chquij? 
Genesis31:44 Rumal ri', tasaj ri at xukuje' ri in; ka bana' jun c'ulwächinic awuc', cux c'u na jun k'alajisanic chakaxo'l awuc' ka cabichal." 
Genesis31:45 Ri Jacob xuc'am jun abaj, xutac'aba' pa ri ulew jacha' jun akan.”" 
Genesis31:46 Xubij chque ri rachalaxic: “¡Chimulij abaj!” Conojel xquimulij abaj che u banic jumulaj, xquitij c'u qui wa' chuxcut ri jumulaj abaj." 
Genesis31:47 Ri u bi' ri c'olbal ri xucoj ri Laban pa ri u ch'abal: “Jegar Sahadut,” are c'u ri u bi' ri xucoj ri Jacob pa ri u ch'abal: “Galaad.”" 
Genesis31:48 Xubij c'u ri Laban: “Camic we jumulaj abaj ri' are jun k'alajisanel chkaxo'l.” Rumal ri' xcoj Galaad che u bi' ri c'olbal ri'," 
Genesis31:49 xukuje' xcoj Mizpa che u bi', rumal rech chi xubij ri Laban: “Are ta ba' chcanaj ri Ajawaxel chkaxo'l che kilic, aretak man cäkil ta chi kib." 
Genesis31:50 We cäban c'ax chque ri nu mia'l o we catc'uli' chi cuc' niq'uiaj ixokib pune' e c'o ri nu mia'l awuc', pune' man c'o jun cujilowic, ri Dios kas are' cujilowic.”" 
Genesis31:51 Ri Laban xutakej u bixic che ri Jacob: “Chawila' waral c'o wi we jumulaj abaj ri', xukuje' ri jun akan ri nu cojom chkaxo'l uj quieb." 
Genesis31:52 Quicabichal quebux k'alajisanelab chi mawi ri at mawi ri in cojoc'ow ta puwi' we etal ri' che u banic c'ax chikabil tak kib. 
Genesis31:53 Ri u Dios ri a mam Abraham, ri u Dios ri nu mam Nacor, chuk'ata' tzij pakawi'.” Are c'u ri Jacob xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Dios ri xuk'ijilaj ri Isaac ri u tat." 
Genesis31:54 Ri Jacob xebuporoj tabal tok'ob pa ri juyub ri', xebusiq'uij ri rachalaxic che wa'im. Conojel xewa'ic xcoc'owisaj ri ak'ab pa ri juyub." 
Genesis31:55 Ak'ab xwalij ri Laban chucab k'ij, xebutz'umaj ri ri'takumam xukuje' tak ri u mia'l, xebutewichi'j c'u na, xtzelej c'u pa ri rulew." 
Genesis32:1 Ri Jacob xutakej ri u be, xquic'ut c'u quib jujun tako'nib aj caj rech ri Dios xebel ulok che u c'ulaxic." 
Genesis32:2 Aretak xeril ri Jacob, xubij: “E rajch'ojab ri Dios wa'.” Rumal ri' xucoj Mahanaim che u bi' ri c'olbal ri'." 
Genesis32:3 Ri Jacob xebutak bic jujun tako'n rech quebe pa Seir, ri ulew re Edom, che u ya'ic u bixic che ri ropanem ruc' ri Esau, ri rachalal." 
Genesis32:4 Je qui takquil wa' xuya' bic: “Chibij che ri wachalal Esau: ‘Ri chak' la Jacob cujach rib pa k'ab la, xutak ulok u bixic che la: chi conojel tak we k'ij ri' in c'olinak ruc' ri Laban," 
Genesis32:5 e c'o nu wacax, nu chij, nu bur, e c'o nu lok'om pataninelab achijab, nu lok'om tak pataninelab ixokib. Are wa' ri quintak u bixic che ri wajaw, cu'l c'u nu c'u'x chi utz na nu c'ulaxic cubano.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Aretak xetzelej ulok ri tako'n, xelquiya' u bixic che ri Jacob xquibij che: “Xujopan ruc' ri achalal la Esau, petinak c'u che c'ulaxic la achilatal cumal quiejeb sient (400) achijab.”" 
Genesis32:7 Aretak xuta' ri Jacob ri xbix che, sibalaj xuxe'j rib, sibalaj xoc il. Xuban cak'at chque ri winak ri e rachil, xukuje' je xuban chque ri chij, ri wacax, ri camey," 
Genesis32:8 xuchomaj c'ut: “We ri Esau quebucämisaj ri juk'at ri e nabe, ri juk'at chic que to'taj canok.”" 
Genesis32:9 Ri Jacob xuchaplej c'u u banic ch'awem ruc' ri Dios, xubij: “Ajawaxel, u Dios ri nu mam Abraham xukuje' u Dios ri nu tat Isaac, xbij ya' la chwe chi quintzelej pa ri wulew xukuje' cuc' ri wachalaxic, xbij c'u la chi cäban la utzil wuc':" 
Genesis32:10 Man takal ta chwe ri utzil ri banom la chwe, amak'el c'ut banom la ri bim la. In xink'ax chupam we nima' Jordan ri', man c'o ta jas wuc'am xak xuwi ri nu ch'ämiy, camic c'ut e wuc'am chi cak'at winak xukuje' cak'at awaj." 
Genesis32:11 ¡Bana' ba' la tok'ob, chinto' la pa u k'ab ri wachalal Esau! Quinxe'j wib we ne petinak che u banic c'ax chwe, we ne quebucämisaj ri wixokil xukuje' ri alaj tak alabom." 
Genesis32:12 Kas c'u chi sakil bim la chi cäban na la utzil wuc', xukuje' chi ri e wija'lil sibalaj quepok' na je jas ri u q'uial ri sanyeb ri c'o chuchi' ri plo ri man quebajilataj taj.”" 
Genesis32:13 Ri Jacob xwar chila' pa ri ak'ab ri', xebucha' jujun awaj chquixo'l ri rawaj che u sipaxic che ri Esau ri rachalal:" 
Genesis32:14 Quieb sient (200) ati'tab tak q'uisic', juwinak (20) ama'ib tak q'uisic', quieb sient (200) ati'tab tak chij, juwinak (20) ama'ib tak chij," 
Genesis32:15 juwinak lajuj (30) ati'tab tak camey ri c'o alaj tak cal, cawinak (40) ati'tab tak wacax, lajuj (10) ama'ib tak wacax, juwinak (20) ati'tab tak bur, lajuj (10) ama'ib tak bur." 
Genesis32:16 Pa tak k'at xebujach ri awaj pa qui k'ab ri pataninel tak rech, xubij c'u chque: “Chixnabejok, chebiya' tak qui xo'l ri cak'at awaj.”" 
Genesis32:17 Ri nabe ri xutak bic, xya' takanic che: “Aretak catuc'ulaj ri wachalal Esau, cuc'ot c'u a chi', ‘¿Jachin ri awajaw?’ ‘¿Jawije' catbe wi?’ ‘¿Jachin ajchak'e tak we awaj ri' ri e awuc'am?’" 
Genesis32:18 Chabij che: ‘Are jun sipanic ri takom ulok che la wajaw Esau rumal ri Jacob ri cumach' rib chwäch la. Teren c'u ulok ri are' chkij.’ ” 
Genesis32:19 Xukuje' ri ucab, ri urox, xukuje' conojel c'ut ri e c'amowinak bic ri awaj, xubij chque: “Aretak quic'ulaj ri Esau, junam chibij che." 
Genesis32:20 Chibij che xukuje': ‘Ri Jacob ri cumach' rib chwäch la, teren ulok chkij.’ ” Ri u chomanic ri Jacob are wa': “Quel na ri royowal ri wachalal cumal ri sipanic ri e nu nabejesam, craj ne utz nu c'ulaxic cuban na aretak quinwil u wäch.”" 
Genesis32:21 Je c'u ri' ri e sipanic xenabejic, ri are' xcanaj can che roc'owisaxic ri ak'ab chupam ri xwarwi." 
Genesis32:22 Chak'ab xwalij ri Jacob, xebuc'am ri quieb rixokil, xukuje' quieb rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab, xukuje' ri julajuj (11) u c'ojol, xebuk'axej pa ri u k'axebal ri c'o pa ri nima' Jaboc," 
Genesis32:23 xukuje' xebuk'axej conojel ri jastak rech. 
Genesis32:24 Aretak xak u tuquiel chi canok ri Jacob, xutij u chuk'ab jun achi ruc' c'ä xpe na ri u sakaric;" 
Genesis32:25 aretak xril ri achi chi man cäcuin ta che u ch'äquic ri Jacob, xucojcobisaj ri bak che ri u wiki'b ri ra', xslabetaj c'u ri bak ri' che ri Jacob aretak cätajin cutij u chuk'ab ruc' ri achi." 
Genesis32:26 Xubij ri achi che: “Chinatzokopij petinak chi c'u ri u sakaric. We man quintewichi'j la, man quintzokopin ta che la,” xutzelej u bixic ri Jacob." 
Genesis32:27 Ri achi xuc'ot u chi' xubij che: “¿Jas ri a bi'?” “Jacob ri nu bi',” xcha' ri are'." 
Genesis32:28 Ri achi xubij che: “Man cäbix ta chic Jacob chawe. Israel catuchix chic, a tijom c'u a chuk'ab ruc' ri Dios xukuje' cuc' ri winak, xatch'äcan c'ut.”" 
Genesis32:29 “Bij ba la chwe camic jas ri bi' la,” xcha' ri Jacob. “¿Jasche cac'ot nu chi' che ri nu bi'?” xcha' ri achi. Xtewichi'x c'u can rumal ri achi kas chila'." 
Genesis32:30 Ri Jacob xucoj Penuel che u bi' ri c'olbal ri', xubij: “Wilom ri u palaj ri Dios, man c'u in cäminak taj.”" 
Genesis32:31 Ri Jacob cätajin quel bic pa Penuel aretak xel ulok ri k'ij, rumal c'u rech ri cojcobic ri xuriko xak cäjech'naj chic ri cäbinic." 
Genesis32:32 Rumal ri' ri e rija'lil israelib camic, man cäquitij ta ri iboch' ri c'o che ri u wiki'b ri ca' ri awaj, chi' c'ut xcojcobisax wi ri Jacob." 
Genesis33:1 Aretak xril ri Jacob chi petinak ri Esau achilatal cumal quiejeb sient (400) achijab, xujach qui wäch ri ac'alab niq'uiaj xebuya' che ri Lea, ri Raquel xukuje' chque ri quieb rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab." 
Genesis33:2 Are xebunabejisaj ri quieb rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab cachil ri cal, xteri' chi c'u ri Lea e rachil ri ral, are c'u xcanaj can ri Raquel chuq'uisbalil rachil ri Jose." 
Genesis33:3 Xunabejisaj c'u rib chquiwäch, xumej c'u rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew wukub mul, c'ä xopan na chunakaj ri rachalal." 
Genesis33:4 Xxiq'uin c'u ri Esau che u c'ulaxic ri Jacob; xulak'apuj chrij u wi', xutz'umaj ri u palaj, e quieb xebok'ic." 
Genesis33:5 Ri Esau xebuca'yej ri ixokib xukuje' ri ac'alab, xubij che ri Jacob: “¿E c'u wa' e jachin tak?” “E are' tak ri alc'ualaxelab ri e u y'om ri Dios che we pataninel awech,” xcha' ri Jacob." 
Genesis33:6 E are' c'u ri rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab e cachil c'u ri cal xenakajinic xquimej quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew. 
Genesis33:7 Chanim xkebextax ri Lea e rachil ri ral, junam u mejic quib xquibano, chuq'uisbalil chi c'ut xekebic ri Jose xukuje' ri Raquel, xukuje' xquimejela' quib." 
Genesis33:8 Ri Esau xubij: “¿Jas ri cachomaj u banic cuc' tak ri awaj ri e nu c'ulam?” “Che u kasexic a wäch,” xcha' ri Jacob." 
Genesis33:9 “Man quebec'am taj, nu chak'; ri in c'o nu k'inomal. Checanaj ri awawaj awuc',” xcha' ri Esau." 
Genesis33:10 Ri Jacob xucoj u chuk'ab che u bochi'xic ri Esau xubij che: “Jayi'. Chabana' tok'ob. We oc'owinak ri awoyowal chwij, chac'ama' we sipanic ri', ri rilic ri a wäch wumal je ta ne ri rilic u wäch ri kas Dios, sibalaj utz c'u nu c'ulaxic a banom." 
Genesis33:11 Catinbochi'j chi cäc'am ri sipanic ri quinya' chawe, in u k'inomarisam c'u ri Dios, man c'o ta ri cajwataj ta chwe.” Sibalaj xbochi'n na ri Jacob, rumal ri' ri Esau xuc'am na ri sipanic," 
Genesis33:12 xubij c'u che ri Jacob: “Jo' ba', chujel bic waral. In quinnabej na chawäch.”" 
Genesis33:13 Ri Jacob xubij che ri Esau: “Lok'alaj wachalal, at aweta'm chi ri ac'alab maja' e co, xukuje' e c'o chij xukuje' wacax ri c'o alaj tak cal; we sibalaj cäya' cosic chque, craj ne quecäm conojel ri chij xa pa jun k'ij." 
Genesis33:14 Utz na chi at ri catnabej chuwäch we pataninel awech ri'; in nojimal quinbec jas ri qui binibal ri awaj ri e nabe chnuwäch, xukuje' ri qui binibal ri ac'alab, c'ä cujopan na awuc' pa Seir.”" 
Genesis33:15 “Ja'e,” xcha' ri Esau, “quebenya' ba' can jujun achijab chawe ri e petinak wuc'.” “¡Jayi', chabana' tok'ob! ¿Jas ta che caya' latz' chawe?” xcha' ri Jacob." 
Genesis33:16 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Esau xutakej ri u be xtzelej pa Seir. 
Genesis33:17 Are c'u ri Jacob are xutakej ri be ri cäbe pa Sucot, chila' xuban wi jun rachoch ri cäc'oji' wi, xukuje' xuban jujun qui cäbal ri rawaj, rumal ri' xcoj Sucot che u bi' ri c'olbal ri'." 
Genesis33:18 Utz c'u u wäch ri Jacob, man c'o ta u c'ulmam aretak xtzelej ulok pa Padan-aram xopan chi pa Canaan, xc'oji' c'u chuwäch ri tinimit Siquem." 
Genesis33:19 Xulok' jun ulew pa qui k'ab ri u c'ojol ri Hamor, ri Siquem are' ri u tat ri Hamor, jun sient sak puak xulok'bej re, chila' c'u xucoj wi ri u jekelibal." 
Genesis33:20 Xuyac c'u jun porobal ri u bi' xucojo “El-Elohe-Israel.” 
Genesis34:1 Ri Din, ri u mia'l ri Jacob ri xralaj ri Lea, xbe che qui solixic ri alitomab ri e aj Siquem," 
Genesis34:2 xilitaj c'u rumal ri Siquem u c'ojol ri Hamor ri aj hebey ri c'amal be pa ri c'olbal ri', ruc' c'u chuk'ab xk'oyi' ruc', xresaj c'u u q'uixbal." 
Genesis34:3 Sibalaj c'u xbe ranima' ruc', are ta c'u xraj xajawax ta rumal." 
Genesis34:4 Xtzijom c'ut ri Siquem ruc' ri Hamor, ri u tat, xubij che: “Jeta' la we ali ri'. Are' quinwaj quinc'uli' ruc'.”" 
Genesis34:5 Xretamaj c'u ri Jacob chi ri Siquem xresaj u q'uixbal ri Din ri u mia'l, e benak c'u ri u c'ojol che qui yuk'uxic ri cawaj pa ri juyub, man c'o ta jas xubij, c'ä xetzelej na ulok ri e u c'ojol." 
Genesis34:6 Are' c'ut ri Hamor, u tat ri Siquem, xbe che rilic ri Jacob rech quetzijon na ruc'." 
Genesis34:7 Aretak xetzelej ulok ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob pa ri juyub, xquetamaj c'ut ri xc'ulmatajic, sibalaj xpe coyowal rumal chi bantajinak jun nimalaj c'ax chque ri aj israelib chi ri Siquem xk'oyi' ruc' ri u mia'l ri Jacob. ¡Jun jasach wa' ri ma ta mawi jubik' xbantajic!" 
Genesis34:8 Xtzijon c'u ri Hamor cuc' ri u c'ojol ri Jacob xubij chque: “Ri nu c'ojol Siquem, sibalaj benak ranima' ruc' ri iwanab. Chibana' tok'ob, chiya' che chi c'ulana ruc'," 
Genesis34:9 chixoc che kachalaxic; jeri' ri uj cujc'uli' na cuc' ri i mia'l xukuje' ri ix quixc'uli' na cuc' ri ka mia'l uj. 
Genesis34:10 Chixcanaj kuc'. C'o we ulew ri' chiwäch, chixcanaj waral, chibana' i c'ay, chilok'o' iwulew.”" 
Genesis34:11 Ri Siquem xubij che ri u tat ri Din xukuje' chque ri e u xibal: “Quixinbochi'j chi chinimaj ri cäkabij chiwe. Xa ta ne joropa' ri quita' chwe quinya' chiwe. 
Genesis34:12 Pune' ta ne jun tojbal ri coc'ow na chuwäch ri nak'atisabal xukuje' q'ui tak sipanic, ri in quinya' na chiwe; chiya' c'u c'olbal chi chc'ulan ri ali wuc'.”" 
Genesis34:13 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Siquem resam u q'uixbal ri Din, ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob xquitzelej u bixic che xukuje' che ri Hamor ri u tat ruc' subunic," 
Genesis34:14 xquibij chque: “Man cuya' taj cäkaya' ri kanab che jun achi ri man kopim taj ri u wi' ri tz'umal ri achi wi che retal, q'uixbal wa' chke uj." 
Genesis34:15 Cäkaya' c'u ri kanab chiwe we quibano jas ri cäkabij chiwe: we quikopij ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi, conojel ri achijab ri e c'o chixo'l." 
Genesis34:16 We je quiban wa' cuya' quixc'uli' cuc' ri e ka mia'l, xukuje' ri uj cujc'uli' na cuc' ri e i mia'l; cujc'oji' na iwuc', cujux na xa jun tinimit." 
Genesis34:17 We c'u man quiya' i tzij che u banic ri cäkabij chiwe chi quebikopij ri u wi' ri i tz'umal ri ix achijab wi, cujel na bic waral, cäkac'am bic ri kanab.”" 
Genesis34:18 Ri Hamor xukuje' ri Siquem ri u c'ojol, xquiya' qui tzij che u banic ri xbix chque cumal ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob." 
Genesis34:19 Man xubey ta rib ri ala, xukopij ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi, sibalaj c'u benak ranima' ruc' ri u mia'l ri Jacob. Ri Siquem are c'u nim u k'ij chquixo'l conojel ri e c'o pa rachoch ri u tat." 
Genesis34:20 Xbe ri Siquem rachil ri u tat chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit, jawije' queban wi tak ri chomanic, chila' c'ut xquibij wi chque ri winak:" 
Genesis34:21 “We achijab ri' e utz kuc', quec'oji' na kuc' xukuje' quechacun na pa we c'olbal ri', c'o sibalaj ulew chque; ri uj cuya' cujc'uli' cuc' ri e qui mia'l, xukuje' ri e are' cuya' quec'uli' cuc' ri e ka mia'l." 
Genesis34:22 Ri e are' cäcaj quec'oji' kuc', xuwi we cäkaj cäkabano jas ri qui bim chke: chi conojel ri achijab cäkopix ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab che que, jas ri qui nak'atisam wi quib we winak ri'." 
Genesis34:23 Ronojel ri jastak quech xukuje' conojel ri cawaj, e kech. Xuwi kabana' jas ri qui bim chke, quec'oji' c'u na kuc'.”" 
Genesis34:24 Conojel ri achijab ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit ri e c'o chi qui junab che u banic ch'o'j xquiya' qui tzij che ri xubij ri Hamor rachilam ri Siquem, xekopix ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal." 
Genesis34:25 Are c'u ri Simeon, ri Levi e u c'ojol ri Jacob e u xibal ri Din, churox k'ij xeboc pa ri tinimit aretak ri achijab c'ä c'o qui k'oxom che ri xkopix wi ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal, xequicämisaj c'ut conojel ruc' ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j cuc'am, man xecuin taj ri aj Siquem xquito' ta quib." 
Genesis34:26 Xquicoj ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j che u cämisaxic ri Hamor xukuje' ri Siquem ri u c'ojol, xquesaj bic ri Din pa rachoch ri Siquem, xquic'am bic, xebec." 
Genesis34:27 Xepe ri niq'uiaj u c'ojol chic ri Jacob, xequitac'alela' ri cäminakib, xequeläk'aj bic ri jastak quech ri winak che u tojic u q'uexel ri c'ax ri xban che ri canab." 
Genesis34:28 Xequic'am bic chij, wacax, bur, ronojel ri c'o pa ri tinimit, xukuje' ronojel ri c'o pa ri juyub;" 
Genesis34:29 xeboc che reläk'axic bic ronojel ri c'o pa tak ja, xequic'am bic ac'alab, ixokib." 
Genesis34:30 Xubij c'u ri Jacob che ri Simeon xukuje' ri Levi: “Ri ix in i yo'm pa jun latz'. Ri winak aj waral, ri aj cananeyib, ri aj perezeyib, cäquetzelaj na nu wäch. Cäquimulij na quib chwij, cäquiq'uis na tzij panuwi', man e q'ui ta c'u ne ri achijab ri e c'o wuc', quinquicämisaj na junam cuc' conojel ri e c'o pa wachoch.”" 
Genesis34:31 Xquitzelej c'u u bixic: “¿La are ta c'u takalic chi ri Siquem je cuban che ri kanab jas ri cäban che jun nim ch'utin?” 
Genesis35:1 Ri Dios xubij che ri Jacob: “Chatwalijok, chatpakal pa Betel, chatc'ol chila'. Chabana' jun porobal chila' che u k'ijlaxic ri Dios ri xuc'ut rib chawäch aretak xatanimaj chuwäch ri awachalal Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ri Jacob xubij chque ri e c'o pa rachoch xukuje' conojel ri e teren chrij: “Chebiwesaj bic ri jule' tak diosib ri e iwuc'am, chixatinok, chijala' ri iwatz'iak." 
Genesis35:3 Chixwalijok, chujpakal pa Betel; chila' quinbana' wi na jun porobal che u k'ijlaxic ri Dios ri xinuto' aretak in in ch'ibatajinak, c'olinak c'u wuc' pa apachique c'olbal ri in c'olinak wi.”" 
Genesis35:4 Conojel ri e c'o pa rachoch ri Jacob xequijach ri jule' tak diosib che ri Jacob ri e cuc'am, xukuje' ri u wi' tak xiquinaj ri e qui cojom che ri qui xiquin, ri Jacob xebumuk chuxe' jun räx che' ri c'o chunakaj ri tinimit Siquem." 
Genesis35:5 Aretak xebel bic chila', ri Dios xubano chi sibalaj xquixe'j quib tak ri tinimit ri e c'o apan chquinakaj, rumal ri' man c'o ta jun c'ax xquiban chque ri e ralc'ual ri Jacob." 
Genesis35:6 Ri Jacob xukuje' conojel ri winak ri e benak ruc' xebopan pa Luz, we tinimit ri' xukuje' cäbix Betel che u bi', ri c'o pa ri ulew re Canaan." 
Genesis35:7 Xuban jun porobal chila', xucoj “El-Betel” che u bi' we c'olbal ri', chila' c'ut xuc'ut wi rib ri Dios chuwäch aretak xanimaj chuwäch ri Esau." 
Genesis35:8 Xukuje' chila' xcäm wi ri Debora ri ixok ri xq'uiyisan ri Rebec, xmuk c'u can chuxe' jun bakit chunakaj ri Betel, ri Jacob xucoj ri u bi' we c'olbal ri' “Ri räx che' re ri ok'ej.”" 
Genesis35:9 Aretak ri Jacob tzelejem ulok re pa Padan-aram, ri Dios xuc'ut chi rib jumul chuwäch, xutewichi'j c'ut" 
Genesis35:10 je u tewichi'xic wa' xubano: “Ri at Jacob ri a bi', man je ta chi c'u cäbix wa' chawe; kas camic ri a bi' are Israel.” Aretak q'uextajinak chic ri u bi' rumal ri Dios," 
Genesis35:11 ri Dios xubij che: “In ri' ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem; chec'ol q'ui awalc'ual xukuje' ri e awija'lil Chawe quel wi na jun nim tinimit xukuje' q'ui tak tinimit, quebel na ajawinel chquixo'l tak ri e awija'lil." 
Genesis35:12 Ri ulew ri xinjach pa u k'ab ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' quinjach chi na pa qui k'ab ri e awija'lil aretak at cäminak chic.”" 
Genesis35:13 Aretak xel bic ri Dios chila' jawije' ri xutzijobej wi ri Jacob," 
Genesis35:14 ri Jacob xuc'am jun abaj xutac'aba' jacha' jun akan pa ri c'olbal jawije' xtzijobex wi rumal ri Dios, xutas c'ut, xuk'ij u wa'l uva xukuje' aseit puwi' ri abaj,"
