Genesis35:15 xucoj “Betel” che u bi' we c'olbal ri'. 
Genesis35:16 Xebel chi c'u bic pa Betel, c'ä naj c'u na jubik' e c'o wi che ri Eprat aretak xalan ri Raquel; sibalaj c'ax xuriko aretak xril u wäch ri ral." 
Genesis35:17 Pa ri jok'otaj ri sibalaj c'ax na ri iyom xubij che: “Maxe'j awib, awilom chi u wäch jun ala.”" 
Genesis35:18 Cämem c'u cubano, aretak cätajin quel ranima' xucoj can “Benon” che u bi' ri ac'al, are c'u ri u tat ri ac'al xucoj “Benjamin” che u bi'." 
Genesis35:19 Je cämical wa' xurik ri Raquel, xmuk c'u can chuchi' ri be ri cäbe pa Eprat, ri cäbix Belen che camic." 
Genesis35:20 Ri Jacob xutac'aba' jun abaj puwi' ri c'olbal ri xmuk wi, are abaj wa' ri cäc'utuw ri xmuk wi ri Raquel." 
Genesis35:21 Ri Israel xutakej ri u be, xejekel c'u c'ä jela' che ri tac'atic ja re Edar." 
Genesis35:22 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak c'o ri Israel pa we c'olbal ri', xpe ri Ruben xk'oyi' ruc' ri Bil jun chi ixok ri man kas ta rixokil ri u tat. Aretak xretamaj ri u tat, sibalaj xpe royowal. Ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob e cablajuj (12)." 
Genesis35:23 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Lea are' ri Ruben, ri u nabeal; ri Simeon, ri Levi, ri Juda, ri Isacar xukuje' ri Zabulon." 
Genesis35:24 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Raquel are' ri Jose xukuje' ri Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Bil ri u lok'om pataninelab ri Raquel are' ri Dan, xukuje' ri Neptali;" 
Genesis35:26 ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Zilp, ri u lok'om pataninel ri Lea, are' ri Gad, xukuje' ri Aser. E are' tak u c'ojol ri Jacob wa', ri xil qui wäch pa Padan-aram." 
Genesis35:27 Ri Jacob xbe che u ch'abexic ri u tat pa Mamre, ri tinimit ri xukuje' cäbix Arba che o Hebron. Chila' c'u xc'oji' wi ri Abraham xukuje' ri Isaac." 
Genesis35:28 Jun sient ruc' jumuch' (180) u junab ri Isaac aretak xcämic. 
Genesis35:29 Sibalaj nim winak chic aretak xcämic, xmuk c'u cuc' ri e u mam cumal ri quieb u c'ojol, ri Esau xukuje' ri Jacob." 
Genesis36:1 E are wa' ri e rija'lil ri Esau ri cäbix Edom che. 
Genesis36:2 Ri Esau xc'uli' cuc' alitomab aj cananeyib: ri Ada u mia'l ri Elon ri aj hititib; ri Aholibam u mia'l ri Ana ri' u mam ri Zibeon ri aj hebey; 
Genesis36:3 xukuje' xc'uli' ruc' ri Basemat u mia'l ri Ismael, rana'b ri Nebaiot." 
Genesis36:4 Ri alc'ualaxel ri xuya' ri Ada che ri Esau are' ri Elipaz; ri Basemat xralaj ri Reuel; 
Genesis36:5 ri Aholibam xralaj ri Jeus, ri Jaalam, ri Core. E are wa' ri u c'ojol ri Esau ri xebalaxic aretak xc'oji' pa ri ulew re Canaan." 
Genesis36:6 Ri Esau xebuca'm bic ri rixokil, ri e u c'ojol, ri e u mia'l, conojel ri winak ri e jekel ruc', ri rawaj, xukuje' ronojel ri xuch'äc pa Canaan; xbe chi pa jun c'olbal che u tasic rib chrij ri Jacob ri u chak'," 
Genesis36:7 ri Jacob, ri Esau sibalaj c'u q'ui ri jastak quech ri c'olic, man cuya' ta c'ut quec'oji' junam; man cubana' ta ri k'ayes ri c'o chila' che qui tzukic ri cawaj." 
Genesis36:8 Ri Esau ri cäbix Edom che, xejekel pa ri c'ache'laj ulew re Seir." 
Genesis36:9 E are wa' ri e rija'lil ri Esau e qui mam ri aj Edom ri xec'oji' pa ri c'ache'laj ulew re Seir. 
Genesis36:10 E are wa' ri qui bi' ri u c'ojol ri Esau: ri Elipaz, ral ri Ada ruc' ri Esau; ri Reuel, ral ri Basemat ruc' ri Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Ri e u c'ojol ri Elipaz e are wa': ri Teman, ri Omar, ri Zep, ri C'atam, xukuje' ri Senaz." 
Genesis36:12 Ri Elipaz xc'oji' jun ixok ruc', ri man kas ta rixokil, Timna u bi', ri are' xralaj jun u c'ojol ri xcoj Amalec che u bi'. E are tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Ada jun chque ri rixokil ri Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Ri Nahat, ri Zera, ri Sam, ri Miz, e are wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Reuel ri e rija'lil ri Basemat ri jun chic chque ri e rixokil ri Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Ri Aholibam are jun rixokil chic ri Esau, ri ral ri xec'ojic e are' ri Jeus, ri Jaalam, ri Core. Ri Aholibam ri are u mia'l ri Ana, ri' u mam ri Zibeon." 
Genesis36:15 Ri e c'amal tak be chque ri e rija'lil ri Esau, e are wa': Ri e c'amal tak be chque ri e rija'lil ri Elipaz u nabeal ri Esau, e are ri Teman, ri Omar, ri Zep, ri Senaz," 
Genesis36:16 ri Core, ri C'atam, ri Amalec. E are wa' ri e c'amal tak be ri xebel chquixo'l ri e rija'lil ri Elipaz pa ri ulew re Edom, conojel tak wa' e rija'lil ri Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Chque ri e u c'ojol ri Reuel, u c'ojol ri Esau, ri e c'amal tak be e are tak wa' ri Nahat, ri Zera, ri Sam, xukuje' ri Miz. E are' wa' ri e c'amal tak be ri e rija'l ri Reuel, chupam ri ulew re Edom, e rija'lil c'ut ri Basemat rixokil ri Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Ri c'amal tak be chque ri ral ri Aholibam rixokil ri Esau ri u mia'l ri Ana, e are ri Jeus, ri Jaalam, ri Core." 
Genesis36:19 Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Esau ri cäbix Edom che, e c'amal tak be c'ut." 
Genesis36:20 E are wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Seir ri aj horey ri xec'oji' pa we c'olbal ri'; ri Lotan, ri Sobal, ri Zibeon, ri Ana," 
Genesis36:21 ri Dison, ri Ezer, ri Disan. E are wa' ri c'amal tak qui be ri aj horib ri e rija'lil ri Seir pa ri ulew re Edom." 
Genesis36:22 Ri e u c'ojol ri Lotan are ri Hori, ri Hemam. Ri Timna are rana'b ri Lotan." 
Genesis36:23 Ri e u c'ojol ri Sobal are ri Alban, ri Manahat, ri Ebal, ri Sep, ri Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Ri e u c'ojol ri Zibeon are ri Aja, ri Ana. We Ana ri' are wa' ri xerikow ri bulbux tak ja' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aretak cätajin quebuyuk'uj ri u bur ri u tat." 
Genesis36:25 Ri Ana xalax jun u c'ojol Dison u bi'; xukuje' jun u mia'l Aholibam u bi'. 
Genesis36:26 Ri e u c'ojol ri Dison are ri Hemdan, ri Esban, ri Itran, ri Queran." 
Genesis36:27 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ezer are ri Bilan, ri Zaaban, ri Acan." 
Genesis36:28 Ri e u c'ojol ri Disan are ri Uz xukuje' ri Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Ri c'amal tak be chque ri aj horib are ri Lotan, ri Sobal, ri Zibeon, ri Ana," 
Genesis36:30 ri Dison, ri Ezer, ri Disan. E are wa' ri c'amal tak be ri xetakan paquiwi' ri aj horib pa tak achalaxic pa ri ulew re Seir." 
Genesis36:31 E are wa' ri ajawinelab ri xebajawin pa Edom, aretak majok chajawin jun ajawinel paquiwi' ri aj israelib:" 
Genesis36:32 Ri Bela, u c'ojol ri Beor, are ajawinel re Edom, Dinab u bi' ri u tinimit." 
Genesis36:33 Aretak xcäm ri Bela are' xajawin can ri Jobab pa ri u c'olbal ri u c'ojol ri Zera, ri aj tinimit Bosra." 
Genesis36:33 Aretak xcäm ri Bela are' xajawin can ri Jobab pa ri u c'olbal ri u c'ojol ri Zera, ri aj tinimit Bosra." 
Genesis36:34 Aretak xcäm ri Jobab, are' xajawin can ri Husam pa ri u c'olbal ri aj rulewal ri Teman." 
Genesis36:34 Aretak xcäm ri Jobab, are' xajawin can ri Husam pa ri u c'olbal ri aj rulewal ri Teman." 
Genesis36:35 Aretak xcäm ri Husam, are' xajawin can ri Hadad pa ri u c'olbal ri aj Abit u c'ojol ri Bedad. Xebuch'äc ri aj Madian pa ri ulew re Moab." 
Genesis36:36 Aretak xcäm ri Hadad, are' xajawin can ri Samla pa ri u c'olbal ri aj Masrec." 
Genesis36:37 Aretak xcäm ri Samla, are' xajawin ri Saul pa ri u c'olbal ri aj Rehobot. Ri tinimit ri c'o chunakaj ri nima'." 
Genesis36:38 Aretak xcäm ri Saul, are' xajawin can ri Baal-hanan pa ri u c'olbal ri u c'ojol ri Acbor." 
Genesis36:39 Aretak xcäm ri Baal-hanan, are' xajawin can ri Hadad pa ri u c'olbal ri aj nimalaj tinimit Pau. Mehetabel u bi' ri rixokil ri Adad u mia'l ri Matred, ri' u mam ri Mezaab." 
Genesis36:40 Are qui bi' tak wa' ri e nimak qui k'ij aj Esau, pa qui cholajil tak alaxic, c'olbal xukuje' tak bi'aj: Timna, Alba, Jetet," 
Genesis36:41 Aholibam, Ela, Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 Senaz, Teman, Mibzar," 
Genesis36:43 Magdiel, xukuje' ri Iram. Ri Esau ri xukuje' cäbix Edom che, jas ri qui cholajil tak ri c'olbal jawije' ri e jekel tak wi e quech c'ut." 
Genesis37:1 Xc'oji' c'u ri Jacob pa ri ulew re Canaan, jawije' xc'oji' wi quieb oxib junab ri u tat." 
Genesis37:2 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri rija'lil ri Jacob. Ri Jose aretak wuklajuj (17) chic u junab, are jun cuc' ri rachalal che qui yuk'uxic ri chij, ri e ral ri Bil xukuje' ri e ral ri Zilp, xukuje' ri man e kas ta rixokil ri u tat. Ri Jose cubij che ri u tat ri etzelal ri cäquiban ri rachalal." 
Genesis37:3 Ri Israel are' sibalaj u lok' na ri Jose chquiwäch ri e niq'uiaj u c'ojol chic, rumal rech chi nim winak chic ri Jacob aretak xalax ri Jose. Rumal ri' xuban jun je'lalaj ratz'iak." 
Genesis37:4 Aretak xquil ri rachalal chi are sibalaj lok' ri Jose rumal ri Jacob chquiwäch ri e are', xquetzelaj u wäch, mawi c'u ne caquiya' chic rutzil u wäch." 
Genesis37:5 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij ri Jose xuban jun richic', xutzijoj c'u chque ri rachalal, xa c'u sibalaj xquetzelaj chi na u wäch." 
Genesis37:6 Xubij c'u chque: “Chitatabej, quintzijoj na chiwe ri ichic' ri xinbano." 
Genesis37:7 Xinwichic'aj chi konojel uj c'o pa jun juyub cätajin quekaxim trico pa tak yataj; xwalij c'u ri nu yataj in, xtaq'ui'c, are c'u ri i yataj ix xquisutij rij ri nu yataj xquimejela' quib chuwäch.”" 
Genesis37:8 Xquibij c'u ri rachalal che: “¿Ri cawaj cabij chi catoc na che kajawinel, cattakan c'u na pakawi'?” Xa c'u sibalaj xquetzelaj chi na u wäch rumal ri richic', xukuje' rumal ri u bixic ri xubij chque." 
Genesis37:9 Xuban chi c'u jun ichic' ri Jose ri xukuje' xutzijoj chque ri rachalal. Xubij chque: “¿La iweta'm, xinban chi jun ichic', ri xinwil wi chi ri k'ij, ri ic' xukuje' julajuj (11) ch'imil caquimejela' quib chnuwäch?”" 
Genesis37:10 Aretak ri Jose xutzijoj ri ichic' che ri Jacob xukuje' chque ri rachalal, xyaj c'u rumal ri u tat xubij che: “¿Jas ri cawaj cabij chke rumal ri ichic' ri xabano? ¿La xa ta c'u lo cäkamej na kib chawäch, ri in, ri a nan, xukuje' tak ri e awachalal?”" 
Genesis37:11 Ri rachalal sibalaj cätitat cäquina' chrij, are c'u ri u tat, sibalaj cuchomaj wa'." 
Genesis37:12 C'o jun k'ij ri e rachalal ri Jose xebe pa Siquem, caquitzucuj c'u echa' chque ri e u chij ri qui tat." 
Genesis37:13 Are c'u ri Israel cubij che ri Jose: “Ampe', ri e awachalal e c'o pa Siquem cätajin quequilij ri chij. Quinwaj chi catbe che quilic.” “Ruc' ronojel wanima' quinbec,” xcha' ri Jose." 
Genesis37:14 Ri Israel xubij che: “Jät ba', jawila' jas qui banom ri awachalal xukuje' ri chij, cattzelej c'u ulok chanim che u bixic chwe.” Pa ri ulew Hebron c'o wi ri Israel, aretak xutak bic ri Jose pa Siquem," 
Genesis37:15 xsach c'u ri Jose pa tak ri juyub. Xurik c'u jun achi, xc'ot u chi' rumal ri achi xubij che: “¿Jas cätajin catzucuj?”" 
Genesis37:16 “Are cätajin quebentzucuj ri wachalal,” xcha' ri Jose. “Bana' la jun utzil chwe, ¿la man eta'm la jawije' chi' cätajin queyuk'un wi?”" 
Genesis37:17 “Xebel bic waral,” xcha' ri achi. “Xinta' jubik' cäquibij chi quebe pa Dotan.” Xbe ri Jose che qui tzucuxic ri rachalal, xeburika' c'ut pa Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Ri e are' xquilo chi petinak chi naj. C'ä majok chnakajinic, xquichomaj apanok jas cäquiban che u cämisaxic." 
Genesis37:19 Xquibila' chquibil tak quib: “¡Chiwilampe', xpe ri banal tak ichic'!" 
Genesis37:20 Tisaj, kacämisaj; cäkaq'uiak c'u bic pa jun c'ua', cäkabij c'u na chi jun juyubal awaj xtijowic. Cäkil c'u na jas quel wi na ri richic'.”" 
Genesis37:21 Aretak xretamaj ri Ruben, xucoj u chuk'ab che resaxic pa qui k'ab ri rachalal xubij chque: “Mäkacämisaj." 
Genesis37:22 Mitix ri u quiq'uel. Chiya' chupam we c'ua' ri' ri c'o pa we chaki'j uwo sak, mitzak c'u i k'ab puwi'.” Ri Ruben je xubij wa' chque rech cäto'taj ri Jose pa qui k'ab, cuchomaj c'u u takic bic cho rachoch ri u tat." 
Genesis37:23 Xak c'u xopan ri Jose cuc' ri rachalal xquesaj ri je'lalaj ratz'iak ri u cojom," 
Genesis37:24 xquichapo, xquiya' c'u chupam ri c'ua' ri tolonic xukuje' chaki'j." 
Genesis37:25 Xquichaplej c'u u tijic qui wa. Xequil c'u apan juk'at aj ismaelib ri e elinak ulok pa Galaad, ri cuc'am ulok c'oc'alaj tak cunabal chquij ri qui camey, balsamo xukuje' mir rech quequic'ayij pa Ejipt." 
Genesis37:26 Are c'u ri Juda, xubij chque ri rachalal: “¿Jas cäkach'äco we cäkacämisaj ri ka chak', cäkac'u' ta c'u ri u cämical?" 
Genesis37:27 Are utz na xa cäkac'ayij bic chque ri aj ismaelib che u q'uexwäch ri xa cäkacämisaj, kachalal c'ut xa jun ka quiq'uel ruc'.” Xkaj c'u pa qui jolom ri rachalal ri xubij chque." 
Genesis37:28 Aretak c'u xeboc'ow ri ajc'ayib ri e petinak pa Madian, ri rachalal xquesaj ulok ri Jose pa ri chaki'j c'ua', xquic'ayij bic chque, ri ajc'ayib aj ismaelib chi juwinak (20) sak puak. Xc'am c'u bic ri Jose pa Ejipt cumal ri aj ismaelib." 
Genesis37:29 Xbe c'u ri Ruben xtzelej che rilic ri Jose pa ri chaki'j c'ua', man c'o ta chi c'u jachin xurik chupam, xujis ri ratz'iak rumal ri u bis." 
Genesis37:30 Chanim xtzelej ri Ruben cuc' ri rachalal, xubij c'u chque: “Ri ka chak' man c'o ta chic. ¿Jas quinban camic?”" 
Genesis37:31 Ri e are' xquic'am c'ut ri rij ratz'iak ri Jose, xquibil ruc' ri u quiq'uel jun alaj q'uisic' ri xquipilo." 
Genesis37:32 Xquitak bic che ri Jacob ri qui tat, xquibij bic: “Xkarik we atz'iak ri'. Chila' la we are rij ratz'iak ri c'ojol la o man are taj.”" 
Genesis37:33 Aretak xch'ob taj u wäch rumal ri Jacob, xubij: “¡Are wa' ri rij ratz'iak ri nu c'ojol! Jun juyubal awaj xbanow ch'akatak che xutij c'ut.”" 
Genesis37:34 Ri Jacob xujis ri ratz'iak chrij rumal ri u bis, xucoj atz'iak re bis, q'ui k'ij xrok'ej u wäch ri u cämical ri u c'ojol." 
Genesis37:35 Xquimulij c'u quib ri u c'ojol xukuje' ri u mia'l che u cu'bisaxic u c'u'x, man c'u xraj taj xcu'bisax u c'u'x; xa ne xutakej rok'exic u wäch ri u c'ojol, cubij c'ut: “Quintakej u bisoxic, c'ä quincäm na.”" 
Genesis37:36 Are c'u ri aj madianib, xquic'ayij ri Jose pa Ejipt che ri Potipar rach k'atal tzij ri paraon ajawinel re Ejipt, c'amal qui be ri rajch'ojab." 
Genesis38:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri', ri Juda xutas rib chquij ri rachalal, xk'ax c'u pa rachoch jun achi Ira u bi' ri aj Adulam." 
Genesis38:2 Chila' c'o wi aretak xretamaj u wäch ri u mia'l jun aj cananey, Sua u bi', xc'uli' c'u ruc'." 
Genesis38:3 Aretak xcuc'aj quib, ri ali xcanaj yawab winak xc'oji' c'u jun ral ala, ri xucoj Er che u bi'." 
Genesis38:4 Xux chi c'u yawab winak xc'oji' chi c'u jun ral ala, ri xucoj Onan che u bi'." 
Genesis38:5 Xc'oji' chi c'u na jun ral ala ri xucoj Sel che u bi', ri xil u wäch aretak c'o ri Juda pa Quezib." 
Genesis38:6 Ri Juda xuc'ulba' ri u c'ojol ri nabeal ri Er u bi' ruc' jun ali Tamar u bi'. 
Genesis38:7 Man xkaj ta c'u ri itzel u c'aslemal ri Er chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rumal ri' xucämisaj." 
Genesis38:8 Xpe ri Juda, xubij che ri Onan: “Chatc'ulan ruc' ri malca'n ri rixokil can ri awachalal, jeri' cäban ri rajawaxic u banic rech cäc'oji' ralc'ual ri awachalal awumal.”" 
Genesis38:9 Reta'm c'u ri Onan chi man e rech taj ri ac'alab ri quec'ojic, xane' e rech ri rachalal ri cäminak. Rumal ri' amak'el aretak cäwar ruc' ri rixokil ri rachalal, man xuya' ta c'olbal chi cux yawab winak rech man quec'oji' ta ralc'ual ri rachalal rumal are'." 
Genesis38:10 Ri xuban ri Onan man xkaj ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rumal ri' xucämisaj." 
Genesis38:11 Ri Juda xubij che ri Tamar ri ralib: “Chatk'ax na cho rachoch ri a tat, chaweyej na cätz'akat u junab ri Sel ri nu c'ojol.” Xubij c'u ri Juda pa ranima': “we ne xukuje' ri are' cäcämic jas ri xquic'ulmaj ri quieb rachalal.” Xbe c'u ri Tamar xk'ax cho rachoch ri u tat." 
Genesis38:12 Oc'owinak chi quieb oxib junab, xcäm ri rixokil ri Juda ri u mia'l ri Sua. Aretak c'ut oc'owinak chic ri u bis ri Juda, xbe pa ri tinimit Timnat jawije' cäsocax wi quij ri u chij, xachilax bic ri Juda rumal ri Ira ri aj Adulam ri sibalaj canima' quib ruc'." 
Genesis38:13 Aretak c'u xoc pa u jolom ri Tamar chi ri ralib tata' xbe pa Timnat che u socaxic quij ri u chij," 
Genesis38:14 ri Tamar xresaj ri atz'iak re malcanil, xuch'uk c'u rib ruc' jun ch'ukubal rech man c'o ta jun cäch'obow u wäch, xt'uyi apan tza'm ja che ri tinimit Enaim ri coc'ow wi ri be ri cäbe pa Timnat. Xuch'obo chi tz'akatinak chic ri u junab ri Sel, man c'u yo'm ta che rachajil rumal ri' je xuban wa'." 
Genesis38:15 Aretak xril ri Juda, xuchomaj chi are' jun ixok quech nim ch'utin, u ch'ukum c'u ri u palaj." 
Genesis38:16 Xkeb ruc' che u ch'abexic chuchi' ri be, man xuchomaj taj chi are ralib, xubij che: “¿La caya' chwe chi quink'oyi' awuc'?” Ri Tamar xubij che: “¿Jas caya' chwe chi quink'oyi' awuc'?”" 
Genesis38:17 “Quintak na ulok jun alaj a q'uisic' ri quinwesaj ulok chquixo'l ri nu chij,” xcha' ri Juda. “Utz ba ri',” xcha' ri ixok. “Chaya' ba' can jun retal a tzij c'ä catak na ulok ri alaj q'uisic' ri a bim.”" 
Genesis38:18 “¿Jas ri cawaj quinya' can chawe?” xcha' ri Juda. Ri Tamar xubij: “Chaya' can ri a mulk'ab rachil ri u c'amal, xukuje' ri a ch'ämiy ri awuc'am.” Ri Juda xebuya' can che xk'oyi' c'u ruc', xcanaj c'u can yawab winak rumal." 
Genesis38:19 Xbe c'u ri Tamar cho rachoch xeresaj ri atz'iak ri u cojom, xucoj chi jumul ri atz'iak re malcanil." 
Genesis38:20 Ri Juda xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri achi aj Adulam chi cuc'am bic ri alaj q'uisic' che ri ixok che u toric ri retal u tzij; are c'u ri aj Adulam, man xurika' ta chic ri ixok." 
Genesis38:21 Xutatabela' c'u chque ri achijab ri e aj chila': “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri ixok ri quech nim ch'utin re Enaim ri cät'uyi chuchi' ri be?” “Mawi jumul c'olinak jun ixok quech nim ch'utin waral,” xuchixic." 
Genesis38:22 Xtzelej jawije' c'o wi ri Juda, xubij che: “Man xinrik ta ri ixok, xukuje' ri winak aj chila' xquibij chwe chi mawi jumul c'olinak jun ixok quech nim ch'utin chila'.”" 
Genesis38:23 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Juda: “Chubana' ba' rech chque ri jastak, mubij ne chi xa cujsubunic; kas c'u xawilo chi xintak bic ri alaj q'uisic', man c'u xarika' taj.”" 
Genesis38:24 Oc'owinak chi oxib ic' aretak xya' u bixic che ri Juda, xbix che: “Ri awalib Tamar u nimon rib cuc' tak achijab, k'alaj chi yawab winak chic.” Ri Juda ruc' royowal xubij: “¡Chiwesaj bic, chiporoj pa k'ak'!”" 
Genesis38:25 Aretak cätajin quesax bic, xutak u bixic che ri ralib tata': “Ri ajchak'e we jastak ri' are' ri xbanow chwe chi in canajinak yawab winak. Chiwila' ix jachin ajchak'e we jastak ri', we mulk'ab rachil ri u c'amal, xukuje' we ch'ämiy ri'.”" 
Genesis38:26 Aretak ri Juda xuch'ob qui wäch ri jastak, xubij: “Ri are' utz ri u banom, are c'u ri in in lawalo, rumal rech chi man nu yo'm ta c'u che chi cäc'uli' ruc' ri nu c'ojol Sel.” Mawi c'u jumul xk'oyi' ta chi ruc'." 
Genesis38:27 Xurika' ri k'ij aretak ri Tamar xril u wäch ri ral, e yo'xab xec'ojic." 
Genesis38:28 Aretak cätajin quebalaxic, jun chque xresaj ulok jun u k'ab. Ri iyom xuxim jun quiäk bätz' che ri u k'ab, xubij c'ut: “Are wa' ri xel ulok nabe,” xcha' ri iyom." 
Genesis38:29 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri ac'al xujic ri u k'ab, are c'u xil u wäch ri rachalal nabe. Rumal ri' ri iyom xucoj Pares che u bi', xubij: “¡Xatcuin ba' che u paquic ri a be!”" 
Genesis38:30 Xil chi c'u u wäch ri jun ri c'o quiäk bätz' che ri u k'ab, xucoj Zar che u bi'." 
Genesis39:1 Aretak xc'am bic ri Jose pa Ejipt, jun achi aj Ejipt Potipar u bi' xlok'ow chque ri aj ismaelib ri xec'amow bic chila'. Ri Potipar are jun rach k'atal tzij ri paraon, ri ajawinel pa Ejipt, c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab." 
Genesis39:2 C'o c'ut ri Ajawaxel ruc' ri Jose, rumal ri' ronojel ri cubano, utz quel chuwäch aretak xc'oji' pa rachoch ri aj Ejipt." 
Genesis39:3 Ri Potipar xuch'obo chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ruc' ri Jose are cäbanowic chi ronojel ri cubano, utz quelic." 
Genesis39:4 Are c'u xbanow wa' chi ri Potipar sibalaj utz xril wi ri Jose, xucoj c'u che takanel puwi' ronojel ri rachoch xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri jastak rech." 
Genesis39:5 Kas pa ri k'ij aretak ri Potipar xujach ri takanic pa u k'ab ri Jose puwi' ri rachoch xukuje' ronojel ri jastak rech, ri Ajawaxel xutewichi'j ri Potipar, pa ri rachoch jacha' xukuje' pa ri rulew." 
Genesis39:6 Aretak ronojel chic c'o pa u k'ab ri Jose, ri Potipar man c'o ta jas coc chi wi il, xa ne xuwi ri wa'im. Sibalaj c'u je'l cäca'y ri Jose, sibalaj rayibal u wäch," 
Genesis39:7 xurika' c'u jun k'ij aretak ri rixokil ri Potipar xbe ranima' ruc' ri Jose, xubij che: “Chatwar wuc'.”" 
Genesis39:8 Man xraj taj ri Jose, xutzelej c'u u bixic che: “Chilampe la, ri wajaw u jachom ronojel ri jastak rech pa nu k'ab, man c'o ta chi jas coc wi il pa ri rachoch." 
Genesis39:9 Chupam we ja ri' man c'o ta jun ri c'o ta na u takanic chnuwäch; ri wajaw man c'o ta ri ma ta u jachom pa nu k'ab xane' xak xuwi ri lal, lal c'ut ri rixokil; je c'u ri' ¿jas ta che quinban jun jasach ri sibalaj lawalo, quinmacun ta c'u chuwäch ri Dios?”" 
Genesis39:10 Pune' ri ixok sibalaj xucoj u chuk'ab che ri Jose ronojel k'ij rech cak'oyi' ta ruc' cac'oji' ta c'u pa u xcut, ri are' man xuc'ulaj ta u wäch u tzij." 
Genesis39:11 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak xoc ri Jose pa ja che u banic ri u patan, man c'o ta c'u apan jun winak," 
Genesis39:12 xpe ri ixok xuchap ri Jose che ri ratz'iak, xubij c'u che: “Chatk'oyol wuc'.” Xutokij rib ri Jose, xanimajic xuya' can ri ratz'iak pa u k'ab ri ixok." 
Genesis39:13 Aretak xril ri ixok chi xanimaj ri Jose, chi xuya' can ri ratz'iak pa u k'ab," 
Genesis39:14 xurak u chi', xebusiq'uij ri quepatanin pa ri ja, xubij c'u chque: “Chiwilampe', ri wachajil xucoj ulok jun aj hebrey waral ri xa cäretz'bej ka wäch. Xoc pa ri nu warbal, are ta xraj xk'oyi' ta wuc', co c'ut xinrak nu chi';" 
Genesis39:15 aretak c'u xinuto chi xinrak nu chi' ruc' ronojel ri nu chuk'ab caxiq'uinic xel bic xuya' c'u ne can ri ratz'iak waral.” 
Genesis39:16 Xuc'olo c'ut ri ratz'iak ri Jose c'ä xopan na ri rajaw cho ja. 
Genesis39:17 Junam c'u u bixic xubij che: “Ri lok'om pataninel aj hebrey ri xacoj ulok pa kachoch, xoc pa ri nu warbal are ta xraj xresaj nu q'uixbal." 
Genesis39:18 Aretak xuto chi xinrakakej nu chi', xanimajic xuya' can ri ratz'iak pa nu k'ab." 
Genesis39:19 Jewa' xuban ri a lok'om pataninel awech chwe.” Ri rajaw ri Jose sibalaj xoyowaric aretak xuta' ri cätajin cäbix che rumal ri rixokil. 
Genesis39:20 Xuchap c'u ri Jose, xtakanic chi chcoj pa che' jawije' e c'o wi jujun ri e cojom pa che' rumal ri ajawinel. Pune' c'u c'o ri Jose pa che'," 
Genesis39:21 ri Ajawaxel xutakej c'olem ruc' ri Jose xuc'ut c'u ri rutzil chuwäch, xuban c'ut chi utz xil rumal ri takanel pa ri che'." 
Genesis39:22 Ri xebuya' c'u can conojel ri ajpache' pa u k'ab, ri Jose are' cäyo'w ri takanic che ronojel ri cäban chila'." 
Genesis39:23 Ri takanel paquiwi' ri e c'o pa che' man c'o ta jas cusolij che ri jachom pa u k'ab ri Jose, rumal rech chi c'o ri Ajawaxel ruc' cuban c'ut chi ronojel utz quel chuwäch." 
Genesis40:1 Quieb oxib k'ij chic c'o ri Jose pa che', aretak ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xukuje' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa xemacun chuwäch ri ajawinel re Ejipt." 
Genesis40:2 Ri paraon, ri ajawinel, xyactaj c'u royowal chquij we quieb takanelab ri' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xukuje' qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa," 
Genesis40:3 xtakan che qui cojic pa che' ri c'o cho rachoch ri c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab, jawije' c'o wi ri che' kas are' c'u c'olbal wa' ri tz'apital wi ri Jose pa che'." 
Genesis40:4 Ri c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab, xebujach we quieb achijab ri' ri nimak qui banic pa u k'ab ri Jose, naj c'ut xec'oji' pa che'." 
Genesis40:5 Jun chak'ab ri quieb ajpache' ri k'axal u wa'l uva xukuje' ri banal caxlanwa, chquijujunal xquiban jun quichic', chquijujunal c'ut ri ichic' jalan ri caquibij chquijujunal." 
Genesis40:6 Ak'ab aretak xopan ri Jose che quilic, xeburika' chi sibalaj quebisonic;" 
Genesis40:7 xuc'ot qui chi', xubij chque: “¿Jasche quixbisonic, k'alaj che ri i palaj?”" 
Genesis40:8 Ri achijab ri' xquibij che ri Jose: “Ka banom jujun kichic', man c'o ta c'u jun cäcuinic cubij ta chke jas quel cubij ri xkichic'aj.” Ri Jose xubij chque: “¿La ma ta puch are' ri Dios cayo'w ri k'alajisanic?” xcha' ri Jose chque. “Chibij ba' chwe ri xinwichic'aj.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xutzijoj ri richic' che ri Jose cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Pa ri nu waram xinwil juwi' uva. 
Genesis40:10 Ri e c'o oxib u k'ab, xetuxic xquiya' qui cotz'ijal, ri e qui cotz'ijal xebux jutak tzayaj chak' tak qui wäch." 
Genesis40:11 Ri in wuc'am ri u lak ri ajawinel pa nu k'ab. Quebenc'am c'ut ri uva quebenpitz' chupam ri lak. Xinya' c'u ri lak pa u k'ab ri ajawinel.” 
Genesis40:12 Xubij ri Jose che: “Ri xawichic'aj je cubij wa': ri oxib u k'ab ri uva quel cubij oxib k'ij," 
Genesis40:13 quel cubij wa' chi pa oxib k'ij, catresaj bic ri ajawinel pa che', catcoj chi na jumul pa ri chac, caya' chi c'u na jumul ri u lak ri ajawinel pa u k'ab jas ri a banom can nabe." 
Genesis40:14 Aretak c'u chc'ulmataj wa', chinnataj chawe, chabana' c'u jun tok'ob chatch'aw panuwi' ruc' ri paraon rech quinresaj chupam we c'olbal ri'. ¡Chel a c'u'x chwe!" 
Genesis40:15 Ri in xa in eläk'am ulok pa ri culew ri aj hebreyib, xukuje' man c'o ta c'u jun etzelal nu banom waral ri rumal ta rech in cojom pa che'.”" 
Genesis40:16 Aretak ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa xuto chi utz u k'alajisaxic ri richic' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak u wa'l uva xuban ri Jose, ri are' xutzijoj ri richic' che, xubij che: “Ri in xinwichic'aj chi e wiquiram oxib chicäch sak caxlanwa." 
Genesis40:17 Ri chicäch ri c'o paquiwi' ri quieb e c'o ronojel qui wäch caxlanwa chquipam, ri quekaj chuwäch ri ajawinel, e are tak c'ut ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' quepe che qui tijic ri caxlanwa ri e c'o pa ri chicäch ri wiquiram.”" 
Genesis40:18 Ri Jose xubij che: “Are wa' ri cubij ri awichic': ri oxib chicäch quel cubij oxib k'ij," 
Genesis40:19 quel cubij wa' chi pa oxib k'ij catresaj bic ri ajawinel pa che', catuxequeba' c'u chuwäch jun che', quepe c'u ri c'uch cäquitij ri a ti'jal.”" 
Genesis40:20 Churox k'ij c'ut xtz'akat u junab ri ajawinel, xuban jun nimalaj nimak'ij, xerula'j ri nimak qui k'ij, chquiwäch c'ut ri e rula', ri ajawinel xtakan che quesaxic ulok pa ri che' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak u wa'l uva xukuje' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa." 
Genesis40:21 Ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xucoj chi jumul pa ri u chac, xuya' chi jumul ri lak pa u k'ab ri ajawinel jas ri u banom can nabe;" 
Genesis40:22 are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa xtakan che u jitz'axic, kas je xelic jas ri xubij ri Jose." 
Genesis40:23 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva man xnataj ta chic ri Jose che. 
Genesis41:1 Quieb junab chic oc'owinak. C'o jun k'ij xrichic'aj ri paraon ri ajawinel chi tac'al chuchi' ri nima' Nil. 
Genesis41:2 Chupam c'ut ri nima' quebel ulok wukub chomak je'lalaj tak ati'tab tak wacax, xquichaplej c'u qui tijic ri k'ayes ri c'o chila'." 
Genesis41:3 Chquij c'u wa', wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri c'ax quepetic xukuje' e c'alc'a'x, xebel ulok pa ri nima' xquiya' quib chuchi' ri nima', chquinakaj ri jule' chic." 
Genesis41:4 We ati'tab tak wacax ri' ri c'ax quepetic xukuje' e c'alc'a'x xequitij bic ri wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri sibalaj e je'lic xukuje' quek'onk'otic. Xc'astaj c'ut ri paraon. 
Genesis41:5 Xwar chi c'u jumul, xuban chi jun ichic': xrilo chi wukub u jolom trico sibalaj e chomak xukuje' sibalaj e je'lic ri xeq'uiy ulok chrij xa jun rakan trico." 
Genesis41:6 Xeq'uiy chi c'u ulok wukub u jolom trico chic chquixe' ri e chomak, ri sibalaj e matz' xukuje' e c'atinak," 
Genesis41:7 ri wukub u jolom trico ri' ri sibalaj e matz' xequitij bic ri wukub u jolom trico ri sibalaj e chomak xukuje' e je'lic. Xc'astaj ri ajawinel, xuch'ob c'ut chi xa ichic' ri cätajin cubano." 
Genesis41:8 Chucab c'u k'ij aretak sakarinak chic sibalaj oquinak il, xuya' c'u takanic chi chepet conojel ch'obonelab xukuje' ri ajno'jab aj ejiptib. Ri paraon xutzijoj chque ri xerichic'aj, man c'o ta c'u jun chque xcuin ta che qui ch'obic ri quelcaquibij." 
Genesis41:9 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xubij che ri ajawinel: “Camic cänataj chwe chi xinmacun can nabe," 
Genesis41:10 aretak xyactaj oyowal la chwij xukuje' chrij ri qui nimal ri suc'umal tak caxlanwa, xtak c'u la ka cojic pa ri che' ri c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab." 
Genesis41:11 Pa jun chak'ab, ri qui nimal ri e banal tak wa' xuban jun richic' xukuje' ri in xiban chi jun chquijujunal ri ichic' jalan ri caquibij." 
Genesis41:12 Chupam ri c'olbal ri' c'o jun ala aj hebrey kuc', ri u lok'om pataninel ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab. Xekatzijoj ri ka wichic' che xuch'ob c'ut jas ri quelcaquibij, xubij chke jas quelcaquibij." 
Genesis41:13 ¡Kas c'u je xelic jas ri xubij chke! Ri in xintzelej chi jumul pa ri nu chac, ri jun chic xjitz'ax cho jun che'.”" 
Genesis41:14 Are c'u ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Jose, xesaxtax c'u ulok pa ri che'. Ri Jose xukopij ri u wi', xuq'uex ri ratz'iak xoc c'u chuwäch ri ajawinel." 
Genesis41:15 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Nu banom jun ichic', man c'o ta c'u jun cäcuin ta che u ch'obic ri quel cubij; oquinak c'u pa nu jolom chi aretak catzijox jun ichic' chawe catcuin che u ch'obic ri quelcubij.”" 
Genesis41:16 Ri Jose xubij che ri ajawinel: “Man quincuin ta in che u ch'obic, xa ne are' ri Dios cäyo'w na u k'alajisaxic che la jun k'alajisanic che utzil che la.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Xinwichic'aj chi in tac'al chuchi' ri nima' Nil," 
Genesis41:18 pa ri nu wichic' xinwilo chi xebel ulok pa ri nima', wukub e chomak je'lalaj tak wacax, caquitij k'ayes xo'l tak ri aj." 
Genesis41:19 Xebel chi c'u ulok wukub ati'tab tak wacax pa ri nima' ri sibalaj c'ax quepetic ri sibalaj e c'alc'a'x. ¡Mawi c'u jumul e wilom qui wäch ati'tab tak wacax pa ronojel Ejipt ri sibalaj ta c'ax quepetic! 
Genesis41:20 We ati'tab tak wacax ri' ri e c'alc'a'x xukuje' c'ax quepetic xequitij bic ri nabe wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri e chomak na. 
Genesis41:21 Aretak e qui tijom chic, man c'o ta jun cuchomaj chi xequitijo xak c'u je xecanajic jas ri qui banic nabe. Xinc'astajic." 
Genesis41:22 Xinban chi c'u na jun ichic', wukub u jolom trico ri chomak xukuje' e je'lic ri xeq'uiy ulok chrij xa jun rakan trico." 
Genesis41:23 Xeq'uiy chi c'u ulok wukub u jolom trico chquixe' ri e chomak, ri sibalaj e matz' xukuje' e c'atinak rumal ri quiakik' ri cäpe pa elebal k'ij." 
Genesis41:24 We wukub u jolom trico ri' ri sibalaj e matz', xequitij bic ri wukub u jolom trico ri e chomak xukuje' e je'lic. Xintzijoj wa' chque ri ajk'ijab, man c'o ta c'u jun chque ri xcuin ta che u bixic chwe ri quel cubij.”" 
Genesis41:25 Ri Jose xubij che ri ajawinel: “Ri quieb ichic' ri banom la, xa e jun. Ri Dios u c'utum chwäch la jas ri cubana' na." 
Genesis41:26 Ri wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri e je'lic e wukub junab, junam xukuje' ri e wukub u jolom trico ri e je'lic. Xak junam caquibij we quieb ichic' ri'." 
Genesis41:27 Ri wukub c'alc'a'x ati'tab tak wacax ri c'ax quepetic ri xebel ulok chquij ri niq'uiaj, xukuje' e wukub junab, junam xukuje' ri e wukub u jolom trico ri e matz' ri e c'atinak rumal ri quiakik' re ri elebal k'ij. Wa' e wukub junab wi'jal." 
Genesis41:28 Je jacha' ri nu bim che la: Ri Dios u yo'm u bixic che la ri cubana' na. 
Genesis41:29 Quepe na wukub junab ri sibalaj quewächin na ri tico'n pa ronojel ri Ejipt," 
Genesis41:30 c'äte c'u quepe chi na wukub junab nimalaj wi'jal. Man c'o ta chi c'u jun cänataj ta chi ri nimalaj wächinic ri xc'oji' can pa Ejipt, rumal rech chi ri wi'jal cubana' na c'ax che ri ulew." 
Genesis41:31 Sibalaj nim na ri q'uetetem chi man c'o ta etal xcanaj ta can che ri telechinic ri xc'oji' can nabe. 
Genesis41:32 We camul xban la ri ichic', are cubij wa' chi ri Dios kas cuban ri u chomam, cuban c'u chanim." 
Genesis41:33 Rumal ri' rajawaxic chi cätzucuj la jun achi ri c'o utzalaj u chomanic, utzalaj u no'j, ri chtakan pa ri ulew." 
Genesis41:34 Bana' ba la ri quinbij che la: chebetzucuj la k'atal tak tzij rech quebe pa ronojel ri ulew che u molic ronojel ri u ro'il ri u wächinic ri ulew re Ejipt pa ri wukub junab ri sibalaj cäwächin ri ulew pa Ejipt. 
Genesis41:35 Chquimulij ronojel ri trico ri caquiya' pa ri utzalaj tak junab ri quepetic; chebelquiya' pa tak c'olbal ri quec'oji' chuxe' ri takanic la, chequic'olo c'u pa tak ri tinimit che tzukbal que ri winak." 
Genesis41:36 We trico ri' ri cäc'olic, cajwataj na che tzukbal que ri winak, rech man quecäm ta che wi'jal pa ri wukub junab q'uetetem ri cäpe na puwi' ri Ejipt.”" 
Genesis41:37 Ri ajawinel utz xuta' we chomanic ri' ri xubij ri Jose xukuje' utz xquita' conojel ri rach k'atal tak tzij. 
Genesis41:38 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel chque: “¿Jawije' ta cäkarik wi jun achi ri junam ta ruc' wa', ri c'o ri ruxlabal ri Dios ruc'?”" 
Genesis41:39 Xubij c'u che ri Jose: “Man c'o ta jun ri nim ta na retamanic xukuje' c'o ta na u no'j chawäch at, are c'u ri Dios ri c'o awuc' u c'utum ronojel wa' chawäch." 
Genesis41:40 Quinjach ri nimalaj wachoch pa k'ab, conojel c'u ri aj Ejipt cäquinimaj na ri a takanic. Xuwi ri in ri nim na nu k'ij chawäch, rumal rech chi in ri ajawinel." 
Genesis41:41 Chawilampe', at nu cojom camic che ucab ajawinel puwi' ronojel ri Ejipt.” Aretak xbitaj wa'," 
Genesis41:42 ri ajawinel xresaj ri mulk'ab ri c'o che ri u k'ab ri c'o wi ri u t'ikbal re takanic, xucoj che ri u k'ab ri Jose. Xtakanic chi chcoj ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak re lino chrij, xucoj jun chachal re k'an puak chukul." 
Genesis41:43 Xupak' ba c'u chupam ri carwaj ri amak'el c'äte ri chrij ri rech, xuya' c'u takanic chi chrakchi'aj chuwäch: “¡Chixel pa ri be!” Jewa' ri u canajic ri Jose che takanel puwi' ronojel ri ulew re ri Ejipt." 
Genesis41:44 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel che: “pune' ta in ri paraon, man c'o ta c'u jun pa ronojel ri Ejipt cuslabaj ta ri u wi' u k'ab we man caya' che.”" 
Genesis41:45 Ri ajawinel xucoj Zapnat-paney che u bi' ri Jose, bi'aj wa' aj Ejipt, xuc'ulba' c'u ruc' ri Asenat, u mia'l ri Potiper cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri tinimit On. Jewa' ri u canajic ri Jose che takanel puwi' ri Ejipt." 
Genesis41:46 Juwinak lajuj (30) u junab ri Jose aretak xetamax u wäch rumal ri paraon ajawinel pa Ejipt. Xel c'u bic ri Jose chuwäch ri ajawinel, xbe che u solixic ronojel ri ulew re ri Ejipt." 
Genesis41:47 Sibalaj c'u xwächin ri ulew pa ri wukub junab telechinic. 
Genesis41:48 Are c'u ri Jose xuyac ronojel ri trico ri xwalij chupam ri ulew pa ri wukub junab ri' xuc'ol chquipam tak ri tinimit, xuya' c'u chquipam jujun tak tinimit ri trico ri xmulix chquipam tak ri ulew ri e c'o chquinakaj." 
Genesis41:49 Ri trico ri xumulij ri Jose je ta ne u banic jacha' ri sanyeb rech ri plo. Man xpajtaj ta chic, rumal ri' xutanaba' u pajic, man xcuin ta chi che rajilaxic ri u pajbalil." 
Genesis41:50 Xebalax c'u quieb u c'ojol ri Jose rumal ri rixokil ri Asenat u bi', aretak maja' cächapletaj ri nabe junab wi'jal." 
Genesis41:51 Ri nabe u c'ojol xucoj Manases che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Ri Dios u banom chi man cänataj ta chic chwe ri c'ax ri nu rikom xukuje' conojel ri e wachalaxic.”" 
Genesis41:52 Ri ucab u c'ojol xucoj Eprain che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Ri Dios u banom chi quec'oji' nu c'ojol pa ri ulew ri xinrik wi c'ax.”" 
Genesis41:53 Xeboc'ow ri wukub junab telechinic pa Ejipt," 
Genesis41:54 xchapletaj c'u ri wukub junab q'uetetem jas ri u yo'm u bixic ri Jose. Xc'oji' wi'jal pa conojel tak ri ulew, xak xuwi pa Ejipt c'o wi trico;" 
Genesis41:55 aretak ri aj Ejipt xequina' ri numic, xewalijic xebe che u tz'onoxic qui trico che ri ajawinel. Xubij c'u ri ajawinel chque conojel ri aj Ejipt: “Jix ruc' ri Jose, chinimaj ronojel ri cubij chiwe.”" 
Genesis41:56 Aretak xnimataj ri wi'jal pa ronojel Ejipt, ri Jose xebujak conojel ri ja ri c'olotal wi ri trico che u c'ayixic chque ri aj ejiptib. Xa c'u cätajin canimataj ri wi'jal." 
Genesis41:57 Conojel ri winak re niq'uiaj ulew chic xebopan pa Ejipt che u lok'ic qui trico ruc' ri Jose. Man c'o ta c'u jun ulew ri c'o ta wi cätijic. 
Genesis42:1 Aretak xretamaj ri Jacob chi c'o trico pa Ejipt, xubij chque ri u c'ojol: “¿Jas cätajin quibano, jasche xak quica'yela' iwib?" 
Genesis42:2 Bim chwe chi c'o trico pa Ejipt. Jix ba' chila', jilok'o ulok ka trico che ka wa' rech cuya' cäkatakej c'aslemal.”" 
Genesis42:3 E lajuj c'ut rachalal ri Jose xebe che u lok'ic trico pa Ejipt; 
Genesis42:4 ri Jacob man xraj taj chi xbe ta ri Benjamin ri u chak' ri Jose, xuchomaj chi we ne c'o jas cuc'ulmaj pa ri be." 
Genesis42:5 Ri e u c'ojol tak ri Jacob xquiya' bic quib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj winak chic ri xebe che u lok'ic qui trico pa Ejipt. C'o c'u nimalaj wi'jal pa ronojel ri ulew re Canaan. 
Genesis42:6 Ri Jose are' ri takanel puwi' ri ulew, xukuje' are cäc'ayin ri trico chque conojel ri winak ri quepe pa ronojel c'olbal. Aretak xebopan ri rachalal chuwäch, xexuquic xquimej quib chuwäch." 
Genesis42:7 Ri Jose chanim xuch'ob qui wäch ri rachalal. Xuban c'u rib chi je ta ne ri ma ta reta'm qui wäch. Xuc'ot c'u qui chi' ruc' c'anal: “Ri ix, ¿jawije' quixpe wi?” “Pa Canaan uj petinak wi che u lok'ic trico,” xecha' ri e are'." 
Genesis42:8 Ri Jose xuch'ob qui wäch ri rachalal, ri e are' c'ut man xquich'ob ta u wäch ri Jose." 
Genesis42:9 Xnataj c'u che ri Jose ri xrichic'aj chquij ri rachalal, xubij chque: “Ix nic'onelab. Xak xuwi ix petinak che rilic jawije' ri cuya' quixoc wi chupam ri ulew.”" 
Genesis42:10 “¡Jayi', tat!,” xecha' ri e are'. “Uj ri uj pataninel ech la uj petinak che u lok'ic trico." 
Genesis42:11 Konojel uj xa jun ka tat. Uj utzalaj tak achijab. Mawi jumul uj uxinak ta nic'onelab.” 
Genesis42:12 “Man kastzij taj,” xcha' ri Jose chque. “Ix ix petinak che rilic jawije' cuya' quixoc wi chupam ri ulew.”" 
Genesis42:13 Ri e are' c'ut xquitzelej u bixic: “Ri e pataninel tak ech la uj cablajuj (12) kachalal kib, xa jun ka tat, uj jekel c'u pa Canaan. Ri ka chak' ri ch'i'p canajinak ruc' ri ka tat, are' c'u ri jun chic man c'o ta chi kuc'.”" 
Genesis42:14 Are' c'u ri Jose xubij chi jumul chque: “¡Je' jas ri xinbij chiwe! Ri ix xa ix nic'onelab. 
Genesis42:15 Ruc' wa' caketamabej rech, we kastzij ri quibij: quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri ajawinel quinbij chiwe chi man quixel ta bic waral we man cäpe na ri i chak' ri quibij." 
Genesis42:16 Oj jun chiwe, juc'ama' ulok ri i chak' ri quibij. Ri niq'uiaj chic quetz'api canok pa che'. Cäkil c'u na we kastzij ri i bim, we c'u man kastzij, xa ix nic'onelab ri'. Quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri paraon.”" 
Genesis42:17 Ri Jose oxib k'ij xebutz'apij na pa che'. 
Genesis42:18 Churox k'ij c'ut xubij ri Jose chque: “Ri in quina' wib chuwäch ri Dios. Chibana' wa' man c'o ta c'u quic'ulmaj na. 
Genesis42:19 We kas ix utzalaj tak achijab, canaj ba' can jun chiwe pa che'; ri niq'uiaj cheboj, quic'ama' bic trico chque ri e c'o can cho ja." 
Genesis42:20 Jic'ama' ulok ri i chak' chnuwäch, rech cäkilo we kastzij ri i bim. We man kastzij, quixcämic.” Ri e are' xquinimaj." 
Genesis42:21 Xquibila' c'u tak chquibil tak quib: “Kastzij xkacoj ri lawaloyil che ri kachalal, man xel ta ka c'u'x che aretak xujubochi'j chi chkatok'obisaj u wäch, pune' xkilo chi sibalaj xubik'o. Rumal ri' camic petinak we c'axc'ol ri' pakawi'.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ri Ruben xubij chque: “Nataj chiwe ri xinbij chi miban c'ax che ri ka chak': man xinimaj ta c'ut ri xinbij, rumal c'u ri' cätok'ix ri u cämical chke camic.”" 
Genesis42:23 Man c'u queta'm taj chi cätajin cuch'ob ri Jose ri cäquitzijoj. C'o c'u jun k'axal u tzij ri Jose. 
Genesis42:24 Xutas rib ri Jose chque xuchaplej c'u ok'ej. Aretak xtzelej ulok jawije' ri e c'o wi ri e are' xcuin c'ut xebuch'abej xutas ri Simeon, chquiwäch c'ut ri e are' xtakan che u yutic." 
Genesis42:25 Xuya' takanic chi cänojisax ri qui coxtar che trico, xukuje' cätzelex bic ri qui rajil chquijujunal puwi' tak ri qui coxtar. Xukuje' chi cäya' bic qui wa re qui be. Je c'u xbanic jas ri xubij ri Jose." 
Genesis42:26 Xquiq'uiak c'u bic ri qui trico chquij tak ri qui bur, xebec." 
Genesis42:27 Aretak xebopan pa ri c'olbal ri xewar wi, jun chque xujak u wi' ri u coxtar che resaxic jubik' trico ri cuya' che ri u bur, xril c'ut c'o ri u rajil puwi' ri u coxtar." 
Genesis42:28 Xubij c'u chque ri rachalal: “¡Chiwilampe', xtzelex ulok ri nu rajil! ¡C'o puwi' ri nu coxtar!” Conojel sibalaj xquixe'j quib, xquibij: “¿Jas ri u banom ri Dios chke?”" 
Genesis42:29 Aretak xebopan pa Canaan, xquitzijoj che ri qui tat ronojel ri xquic'ulmaj, xquibij c'u che:" 
Genesis42:30 “Ri tata' ri cätakan chila' pa Ejipt, sibalaj c'ax ka ch'abexic xubano, xuk'abaj c'u chaki'j chi xujopan chila' che u nic'oxic ri ulew." 
Genesis42:31 Ri uj xkabij che chi uj utzalaj tak achijab. Mawi c'u jumul uj uxinak ta nic'onelab 
Genesis42:32 chi uj cablajuj (12) kachalal kib. Xa jun ka tat. Jun c'ut man c'o ta chic kuc', ri q'uisbal ka chak' canajinak can ruc' ri ka tat pa Canaan." 
Genesis42:33 Xubij c'u chke: ‘Rech kas quinwilo we kastzij ri i bim chwe chi ix utzalaj tak achijab. Chiya' can jun iwachalal waral. Jix, chic'ama' bic trico chque ri i wachalal." 
Genesis42:34 Chic'ama' c'u ulok ri q'uisbal i chak', rech quinwetamaj we ix utzalaj tak achijab, chi man ix ta nic'onelab quintzokopij c'u bic ri jun iwachalal, cuya' c'ut quixoc pa we ulew ri' che u lok'ic apachique ri quiwaj.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Aretak xquichaplej u quiric u wi' ri qui coxtar, conojel xquirik ri qui rajil puwi' tak ri qui coxtar chquijujunal. Aretak xquilo, sibalaj xquixe'j quib xukuje' ri qui tat xuxe'j rib." 
Genesis42:36 Are c'u ri Jacob xubij chque: “Ri ix cätajin quebiq'uis bic ri e nu c'ojol. Ri Jose sachinak, ri Simeon xukuje'. Are' c'u quiwaj quic'am chi bic ri Benjamin chnuwäch. Ronojel wa' in quinkajben canok.”" 
Genesis42:37 Ri Ruben xubij che ri u tat: “Jacha' la bic ri Benjamin pa nu k'ab, quilentzelej c'u che la. We man quilentzelej che la, cuya' quecämisaj la ri quieb nu c'ojol.”" 
Genesis42:38 Xubij c'u ri Jacob chque: “Man cäbe ta ri nu c'ojol iwuc'. Ri Jose ri rachalal cäminak chic, xuwi chi ri Benjamin canajinak wuc'. We c'u c'o jas cuc'ulmaj pa ri be, ix ri' ri ix ajchak'mac chi xa bis quincämisan bic.”" 
Genesis43:1 Cätajin c'u cänimataj ri wi'jal pa ri ulew," 
Genesis43:2 aretak c'u xquiq'uis u tijic ri trico ri qui c'amom ulok pa Ejipt, ri Jacob xubij chi chque ri u c'ojol: “Jix chi jumul, jilok'o chi ulok jubik' ka trico.”" 
Genesis43:3 Xubij c'u ri Juda che ri Jacob: “Ri tata' ri cätakan chila' kas xkata' ri xubij chke: ‘We man quic'am ulok ri i chak' waral, mixpe che wilic.’" 
Genesis43:4 We caj la chi cäbe ri Benjamin kuc', cujbe che u lok'ic ri trico;" 
Genesis43:5 we c'u man cäya' la bic chke, man cujbe taj. Xubij c'u ri tata' chke: ‘We man quic'am ulok ri i chak' waral, mixpe che wilic.’”" 
Genesis43:6 Xubij c'u ri Jacob chque: “¿Jasche i banom we etzelal ri' chwe? ¿Jasche xibij che ri tata' chi c'ä c'o na jun i chak'?” 
Genesis43:7 Ri e are' xquitzelej u bixic: “Rumal rech chi ri are' sibalaj xuc'ototej ka chi' uj jachinok xukuje' e jachin tak ri e kalaxic. Xubij chke ‘¿La c'asal i tat? ¿La c'o chic jun iwachalal?’ Ri xkaban uj xuwi xkatzelej qui wäch tak ri e u c'otoj tak chi'aj. ¿Jas ta ri xkaban che retamaxic chi cubij na chke: ‘Chic'ama' ulok ri i wachalal’?” 
Genesis43:8 Ri Juda xubij che ri Israel ri u tat: “We caj la chi cujc'asi'c, jacha' la bic ri ala pa nu k'ab in, rech cujbe chi jumul che u lok'ic trico. Jeri' man cujcäm taj mawi ri lal, mawi ri uj, mawi ri kalc'ual." 
Genesis43:9 In quintaq'ui' puwi' ri Benjamin we c'o jas cuc'ulmaj in ri' ri in ajchak'mac. We man quilentzelej che la, in quincanaj ajchak'mac chwäch la chbe k'ij sak." 
Genesis43:10 We ta ma ta uj beytajinak, camul ta chi ri' uj ta tzelejinak ulok.”" 
Genesis43:11 Ri qui tat xubij chque: “We are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic, chibana' ba' ri quinbij chiwe: chic'ama' bic ri utzalaj u wächinic ri ka tico'n pa tak ri i coxtar che jun sipanic che ri tata'; jubik' c'oc'alaj k'ol, jubik' juyubal räx cab, jubik' balsamo, jubik' mir, jubik' nuez, xukuje' jubik' almendr." 
Genesis43:12 Chicamulij u c'amic bic ri rajil ri trico, chijacha' pa u k'ab ri tata' ri xtzalen ulok chiwe; we ne xa xesachic." 
Genesis43:13 ¡Chixwalijok! chic'ama' ba' bic ri i chak', jix chi jumul che rilic we tata' ri'." 
Genesis43:14 Chubana' ba' ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem chi cutok'obisaj i wäch ri tata', rech cutzokopij ulok ri Simeon xukuje' ri Benjamin ri quic'am bic. We c'u quebesax ri nu c'ojol chnuwäch ¡je' ba' chbanok!”" 
Genesis43:15 Ri e u c'ojol tak ri Jacob xquic'am bic ri sipanic, xquicamulij u c'amic bic ri puak, xukuje' xquic'am bic ri Benjamin, xebe c'u pa Ejipt. Aretak xebopan chuwäch ri Jose," 
Genesis43:16 ri Jose xrilo chi cuc'am ri Benjamin, xuya' takanic che ri u tako'n, xubij che: “Chebacojo' we achijab ri' chupam ri wachoch. Chapila' jun ati't wacax, chasuc'umaj jun utzalaj ka wa' re pa k'ij, cäquitij c'u qui wa' wuc' pa k'ij.”" 
Genesis43:17 Ri tako'n xubano jas ri xtakan wi ri Jose, xebucoj ri achijab chupam ri rachoch ri Jose," 
Genesis43:18 sibalaj xquixe'j quib aretak xquilo chi xecoj bic chupam ri rachoch ri Jose, xquibij: “¡Xak chubanic cäban chke! Uj quicojom ulok waral xa u mac ri puak ri xquitzelej bic chke nabe puwi' tak ri ka coxtar. Cäquiban na c'ax chke, cujquicoj na che pataninel quech junam cuc' ri ka bur.”" 
Genesis43:19 Aretak xebopan chuchi' ri ja, xekeb ruc' ri u tako'n ri Jose." 
Genesis43:20 Xquibij c'u che: “¡Tok'obisaj la ka wäch, Tat!, xujpe can nabe che u lok'ic ka trico," 
Genesis43:21 aretak xujopan pa ri c'olbal ri xujwar wi, chkajujunal xekajak u wi' ri ka coxtar, xekarik ri ka rajil puwi' tak ri ka coxtar. Tz'akat ri ka rajil e c'o puwi'. E ka c'amom c'u ulok che quitzelexic," 
Genesis43:22 xukuje' e ka c'amom chi ulok niq'uiaj ka rajil che u lok'ic ri ka trico. Man c'u keta'm taj jachin xyo'w bic ri rajil ri ka trico paquiwi' tak ri ka coxtar.” 
Genesis43:23 Ri u tako'n ri Jose xubij chque: “Mixoc il, mixe'j iwib. Are ri i Dios ix ri xukuje' rech ri i tat xyo'w bic ri i rajil paquiwi' tak ri i coxtar, ri in xinc'am ri puak ri xitojbej re ri i trico.” Ri u tako'n ri Jose xresaj ulok ri Simeon pa ri che', xujach pa qui k'ab ri rachalal;" 
Genesis43:24 xebucoj c'u bic conojel pa ri rachoch ri Jose, xuya' qui ja' che ch'ajbal cäkan, xukuje' xuya' quecha' ri qui bur." 
Genesis43:25 Xquisuc'umaj apan ri sipanic ri cuc'am bic, xqueyej ri Jose ri copan pa k'ij, queta'm chi c'ut chi chila' cäquitij wi qui wa re pa k'ij." 
Genesis43:26 Aretak xopan ri Jose cho ja, xquiya' ri sipanic che ri qui c'amom ulok, xexuquic xquimej quib chuwäch." 
Genesis43:27 Ri Jose xuta' chque jas ri qui banom, xubij chque: “¿Jas u banom ri i tat, ri nim winak ri xibij chwe? ¿La c'ä c'aslic?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ri e are' xquimej quib, xquibij c'u che: “Ri ka tat, pataninel ech la, utz u wäch c'ä c'aslic.”" 
Genesis43:29 Ri Jose xca'y che ri Benjamin ri u chak' ri xa junam qui tat qui nan ruc', xubij c'u chque: “¿La are' q'uisbal i chak' wa' ri xibij chwe? ¡Ri Dios cattewichinic nu c'ojol!” Aretak xbitaj wa'," 
Genesis43:30 sibalaj c'u xk'utut ri ranima' ri Jose aretak xril u wäch ri u chak', xuna' c'ut chi cäpe rok'ej. Aninak xoc chupam ri u warabal, chila' c'u xeok'a wi." 
Genesis43:31 Aretak xoc'ow ri rok'ej, xuch'aj ri u palaj, xoc chi bic jumul cuc' ri rachalal, xubij chque ri e pataninel tak rech: “¡Cuya' quicoj ri wa!”" 
Genesis43:32 Ri Jose xa u tuquiel xwa' pa jun mexa, ri e u c'ojol tak ri Jacob puwi' jun mexa chic, ri aj ejiptib ri quewa' ruc' ri Jose puwi' jun mexa chic, man ya'tal ta c'ut chi quewa' ri aj ejiptib cuc' ri aj hebreyib." 
Genesis43:33 Ri Jose xebucholajij ri rachalal pa ri qui mexa jas ri u cholajil ri qui junab, are xnabej ri nabeal are c'u ri chak'axel xcanaj can che qui q'uisbalil, sibalaj xquimayo xquica'yela' c'u quib." 
Genesis43:34 Ri wa' ri xuya' ri Jose chque pa tijic kas are' ri c'o puwi' ri u mexa, che c'u ri Benjamin c'o na ri u nimal ri u wa' ri xuya' chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj chic. Ri Jose xukuje' ri e rachalal xebuq'uian junam sibalaj c'u xejajatic." 
Genesis44:1 Ri Jose xuya' u takquil ri u tako'n, xubij che: “Chanojisaj ri qui coxtar we achijab ri' che trico, joropa' ri cäquich'ij bic, xukuje' chaya' bic ri qui rajil puwi' tak ri qui coxtar chquijujunal." 
Genesis44:2 Are c'u ri nu kumubal re sak puak, chaya' bic puwi' ri u coxtar ri chak'axel junam ruc' ri rajil ri u trico.” Ri tako'n xuban ronojel ri xubij ri Jose che." 
Genesis44:3 Xuwi xca'y ri k'ij, ri Jose xebujach bic ri rachalal xequic'am bic ri qui bur." 
Genesis44:4 C'ä maja' c'u naj e benak, c'ä te' e c'o apan tza'm ja aretak ri Jose xubij che ri u tako'n: “Jät aninak che qui rikic we achijab ri'. Chabij c'u chque aretak quebarika': ‘¿Jasche xiban jun etzelal che u tojic u q'uexel ri utzil? ¿Jasche xiweläk'aj ulok ri lak re sak puak" 
Genesis44:5 ri cuq'uian wi ri wajaw, ri xukuje' cäch'obon wi? Sibalaj man utz taj ri xibano.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Aretak xeberik rumal ri tako'n, xebubij we junam tak tzij ri' chque," 
Genesis44:7 xquibij c'ut ri rachalal ri Jose che: “¿Jasche je cabij la wa' chke? Mawi jubik' je ta cäkaban wa'. 
Genesis44:8 Xkac'am chi ne na ulok jumul ri puak ri xekarik puwi' tak ri ka coxtar, ¿jas ta c'u che cäkeläk'aj ulok k'an puak o sak puak pa ri rachoch ri ajaw la?" 
Genesis44:9 ¡Chcämok apachique chque we pataninel tak ech la ri' ri cäriktaj wi ri kumubal, xukuje' c'u ne ri uj cujcanaj can che lok'om pataninelab la!”" 
Genesis44:10 Xubij c'ut ri tako'n: “Je' cäbanic jacha' ri quibij, xuwi c'u jachin ruc' cäriktaj wi ri eläk'am ulok, cäcanaj che nu lok'om pataninel. Are c'u ri niq'uiaj man c'o ta qui mac.”" 
Genesis44:11 Chquijujunal c'ut xequikasaxtaj ri qui coxtar cho ri ulew xquijak c'ut. 
Genesis44:12 Ri tako'n xutzucuj pa tak ri coxtar, xuchaplej ruc' ri nabeal. Xuq'uisa' c'ä ruc' ri q'uisbal qui chak'. Xurik c'u ri lak kumubal chupam ri u coxtar ri Benjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Xquijis ri catz'iak chquij rumal ri qui bis. Conojel xequiq'uiak ri queka'n ri qui bur. Xetzelej chi jumul pa ri tinimit. 
Genesis44:14 Aretak xopan ri Juda xukuje' conojel ri rachalal cho rachoch ri Jose, ri Jose c'ä c'o chila'. Xquimej quib, xexuquic. C'ä xequiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew." 
Genesis44:15 Ri Jose xubij chque: “¿Jas ri i banom? ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi jun achi jas ri in reta'm cäch'obonic?” 
Genesis44:16 Ri Juda xubij che ri Jose: “¿Jas ta ba' ri cäkabij chic che la? ¿Jas ta chic ri cäkatobej kib? Uj u rikom ri Dios pa ri ka mac. Uj c'olic ri', chujcojo' la che lok'om tak pataninel la, junam ruc' ri xriktaj wi ri lak.”" 
Genesis44:17 Ri Jose xubij chque: “Man cuya' taj. Xuwi ri xriktaj wi ri lak are wa' ri cäcanaj can che nu lok'om pataninel. Ri niq'uiaj chic cuya' quetzelej ruc' quicotemal cho rachoch ri qui tat man c'o ta cäyo'w latz' chque.” 
Genesis44:18 Ri Juda xoc chuwäch ri Jose, xubij che: “Quinwaj quinbij quieb oxib tzij che la. Bana' la jun tok'ob mäpe oyowal la chwe, ri lal xak junam k'ij la ruc' ri ajawinel." 
Genesis44:19 Ri lal xata' la chke we c'asal ri ka tat xukuje' we c'ä c'o na jun kachalal," 
Genesis44:20 are c'u ri uj xkatzelej u bixic che la chi c'asal ri ka tat ri nim winak chic xukuje' jun ka chak' ri c'ä ac'al na ri xralc'ualaj pa ri u ri'jil. Ri rachalal we ala ri' xcämic xuwi ri are' xc'asi' canok ri xak junam qui nan ruc', rumal ri' sibalaj lok' chuwäch ri ka tat." 
Genesis44:21 Ri lal xbij la chke chi cäkac'am ulok, rech quetamaj la u wäch." 
Genesis44:22 Ri uj xkabij che la chi we ala ri' man cuya' taj cuya' can ri u tat. We c'u cuya' canok cäcäm ri u tat che bis. 
Genesis44:23 Ri lal xbij la chke chi we man cäkac'am ulok we ala ri', man cujc'ulaj ta chi la." 
Genesis44:24 Aretak xujopan cho ja, xkatzijoj che ri nu tat ronojel ri xbij la chke." 
Genesis44:25 Aretak c'u xq'uis ri ka trico, ri ka tat xubij chke chi cujpe chi jumul pa Ejipt che u lok'ic ka trico." 
Genesis44:26 Ri uj xkabij che ri ka tat: ‘Man cuya' taj cujbec we man cäbe ri q'uisbal ka chak' kuc'. Man cujc'ulax ta ri' rumal ri tata' we man benak ri ka chak' kuc'.’ 
Genesis44:27 Ri nu tat xubij chke: ‘Ix iweta'm chi ri wixokil, xa e quieb ral xec'ojic;" 
Genesis44:28 ri jun xsachic, mawi jumul wilom chi u wäch c'ä camic, quinchomaj chi xtijow rumal jun juyubal awaj." 
Genesis44:29 We c'u quiwesaj chi bic we jun ri' chnuwäch, we c'u ne c'o jas cuc'ulmaj canok, ix ri' c'o i mac chi we nim winak ri' cäcäm na rumal bis.’" 
Genesis44:30 Sibalaj c'u ranima' rib ri nu tat ruc' ri ala. We c'u man kachil ri ala aretak cujopanic," 
Genesis44:31 cäcäm ba' ri' ri ka tat we man cäril u wäch ri ala ri', cujux ajchak'mac chi ri ka tat ri nim winak cäcäm na rumal bis." 
Genesis44:32 Xinbij c'u can che chi in quintaq'ui' puwi' ri ala, xukuje' xinbij can che: ‘We man quelentzelej ri ala, quincanaj ajchak'mac chwäch la chbe k'ij sak.’" 
Genesis44:33 Quinta' c'u jun tok'ob che la chi in quincanaj che lok'om pataninel la, che u q'uexwäch ri ala. Tzokopij la bic ri ala rech cabe cuc' ri rachalal." 
Genesis44:34 ¿Jas ta c'u nu palaj quinc'utu' ta wib chuwäch ri nu tat, we ta ma ta wachilam bic ri ala? Man quinwaj taj quinwil ri lawaloyil ri cucoch' ta na ri nu tat.”" 
Genesis45:1 Ri Jose man xcuin ta chic xuk'il ta rib chquiwäch tak ri pataninel tak rech. Xurak c'u u chi: “¡Chixel bic iwonojel waral!” Man c'o ta c'u jun chque ri pataninel tak rech ri Jose xcanaj ta can ruc', aretak xuk'alajisaj rib chquiwäch ri rachalal." 
Genesis45:2 Xutzokopij ok'ej ruc' nimalaj rakojchi'aj chi conojel ri aj ejiptib xquetamaj; xukuje' xopan u bixic c'ä pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel. 
Genesis45:3 Xubij c'u chque ri rachalal: “In ri' ri Jose. ¿La c'ä c'asal ri nu tat?” Ri rachalal sibalaj xquixe'j quib chuwäch. Rumal ri' man xecuin taj c'o jas xquibij che. 
Genesis45:4 Ri Jose xubij chque: “Chibana' tok'ob chixkeb wuc'.” Aretak xekeb ruc', xubij chque: “In ri' ri Jose ri i chak', ri xinic'ayij ulok pa Ejipt;" 
Genesis45:5 chibana' ba' tok'ob, mape iwanima' mawi miyäjala' iwib rumal rech chi xinic'ayij ulok, are' c'u ri Dios xintakow ulok nabe chiwäch ix che qui to'tajisaxic c'aslemal." 
Genesis45:6 Quieb junab chic u banom wi'jal pa ri ulew. C'ä c'o c'u na job junab ri man c'o ta wächinic cuya' ri ulew pune' cäban ticonijic. 
Genesis45:7 Nabe c'ut xinutak ulok ri Dios chiwäch rech cubano chi quecanaj iwija'lil cho ri uwächulew, xukuje' che u colic ri i c'aslemal ruc' mayibalil." 
Genesis45:8 Chich'obo' ba' chi man ix taj ri xban iwe che nu takic ulok waral, xane' are ri Dios; in u cojom c'u che ya'l u no'j ri ajawinel, che takanel puwi' ri rachoch, xukuje' che k'atal tzij puwi' ronojel Ejipt." 
Genesis45:9 Jix aninak che u bixic che ri nu tat: ‘Jewa' cubij ri Jose ri c'ojol la: Ri Dios in u cojom che ajaw puwi' ronojel Ejipt. Saj la che wilic. Mabey ib la. 
Genesis45:10 Queljekel c'u na la chupam ri ulew re Gosen, junam cuc' ri alc'ual la xukuje' ri e i mam la, xukuje' ri awaj la cuc' conojel ri e c'o uc' la. Jeri' quelc'ola la chi nu nakaj." 
Genesis45:11 Waral quintzuk wi na alak ri lal, xukuje' ri e achalaxic la, xukuje' conojel ri e c'o uc' la, rech man c'o ta cajwataj ta chech alak; c'ä e c'o c'u na job junab wija'l.’" 
Genesis45:12 Kas cäril ri Benjamin ri nu chak' xukuje' ri ix, chi kas in ri quintzijon iwuc'." 
Genesis45:13 Chiya' u bixic che ri nu tat ri iwilom xukuje' chi sibalaj nim nu k'ij pa Ejipt. Jix, chic'ama' ulok ri nu tat.”" 
Genesis45:14 Ri Jose xulak'apuj ri Benjamin. E quieb xebok'ic. 
Genesis45:15 Ri Jose xebutz'umaj conojel ri rachalal. Xebulak'apula' chquijujunal, xrok'ej qui wäch. C'ä te' ri' xel ri xe'n ib chque xetzijon ruc'." 
Genesis45:16 Xopan u bixic pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel ri paraon chi xebopan ri rachalal ri Jose, sibalaj xquicot ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o ruc'." 
Genesis45:17 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Chabij chque ri awachalal chi chquic'ama' bic ri trico chquij ri qui bur. Chetzelej c'u pa Canaan," 
Genesis45:18 chquic'ama' c'u ulok ri qui tat chnuwäch xukuje' tak ri e rachalaxic. In quinya' na chque ri utzalaj ulew ri c'o pa Ejipt, cäquitij c'u na ri utz na ri cuq'uiyisaj ri ulew." 
Genesis45:19 Chaya' takanic chque chi waral, pa Ejipt, chequic'ama' bic caret che qui c'amic ulok ri quixokil xukuje' ri ac'alab xukuje' c'u ne ri i tat ix. Chepetok." 
Genesis45:20 Meboc c'u il chque ri jastak quech ri e colic, ronojel c'ut ri c'o pa Ejipt quech.”" 
Genesis45:21 Ri e u c'ojol ri Israel je xquibano jas ri xbix chque. Ri Jose xebusuc'umaj ri caret jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri ajawinel, xukuje' xuya' bic ri qui wa ri cäquitij pa ri be;" 
Genesis45:22 xukuje' xebuya' bic c'ac' tak catz'iak, are c'u ri xuya' che ri Benjamin job c'ac' atz'iak xukuje' oxib sient (300) sak puak." 
Genesis45:23 Ri Jose xebutak bic lajuj bur che ri u tat ri xquekaj bic ri jastak ri e c'o pa Ejipt ri e je'lic, xukuje' lajuj bur chic ri xquekaj bic trico, wa, riquil, ri cutij ri u tat pa ri be." 
Genesis45:24 Aretak ri Jose xebujach bic ri rachalal, xubij bic chque: “Mixch'ojin pa ri be.” Ri e are' xebec." 
Genesis45:25 Xebel c'u bic pa Ejipt, xebopan c'u pa Canaan ri c'o wi ri Jacob ri qui tat." 
Genesis45:26 Aretak ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob xquitzijoj che ri qui tat chi c'ä c'asal ri Jose, chi are' ri cäk'atantzij puwi' ronojel Ejipt, xsach u c'u'x ri Jacob, man xurik ta chic jas cubano o jas cubij." 
Genesis45:27 Ri e are' xquiya' u bixic che ri qui tat ronojel ri xubij ri Jose chque, xukuje' xequic'ut ri caret ri xebutak ulok ri Jose che u c'amic bic, sibalaj c'u xquicotic." 
Genesis45:28 Xubij c'ut, “¡Cuban ri retamaxic chwe chi c'ä c'asal ri nu c'ojol Jose! Quinbe che rilic c'ä mäjok chincämok.”" 
Genesis46:1 Ri Israel xutakej ri u be ruc' ronojel ri c'o ruc'. Aretak xopan pa Beerseb, xucoj tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri u Dios ri Isaac ri u tat." 
Genesis46:2 Pa ri chak'ab ri' ri Dios xuch'abej ri Israel pa jun c'utwächinic, xucoj ri u bi' che u siq'uixic, Jacob, ri are' xutzelej u bixic: “In c'o waral.”" 
Genesis46:3 Ri Dios xubij che ri Jacob: “In ri' ri Dios, ri u Dios ri a tat. Maxe'j awib che ri a benic pa Ejipt, quinban c'u na chi ri e awija'lil quebux na jun nim tinimit ri nim u k'ij." 
Genesis46:4 Ri in quinbe na awuc' pa Ejipt, kas c'u in quebenwesaj na ulok ri e awija'lil chila'. Aretak c'u catcämic cäc'oji' na ri Jose chaxcut.”" 
Genesis46:5 Xel c'u bic ri Jacob pa Beerseb. Ri e u c'ojol ri Israel xquiya' ri qui tat xukuje' tak ri alc'ualaxelab xukuje' tak ri quixokil chquipam tak ri cäret ri xebutak ulok ri ajawinel che qui c'amic bic. 
Genesis46:6 Ri Jacob xukuje' conojel ri e rech xbe pa Ejipt, xequic'am bic ri qui wacax, ri qui chij, xukuje' ronojel ri jastak quech ri c'olic." 
Genesis46:7 Conojel tak ri e u c'ojol, conojel ri e u mia'l, xukuje' ri e ri' u mam chi alabom chi alitomab, conojel xebuc'am bic." 
Genesis46:8 E are tak wa' ri qui bi' ri aj israelib ri xebe pa Ejipt; ri u bixic wa', ri Jacob xukuje' ri e rija'lil: Ri Ruben ri nabeal u c'ojol ri Jacob." 
Genesis46:9 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ruben: ri Hanoc, ri Palu, ri Hezron, ri Carmi." 
Genesis46:10 Ri e u c'ojol ri Simeon: ri Jemuel, ri Jamin, ri Ohad, ri Jaquin, ri Zohar xukuje' ri Saul, ri ral jun ixok aj cananey." 
Genesis46:11 Ri e u c'ojol ri Levi: ri Jerson, ri Coat, ri Merar." 
Genesis46:12 Ri e u c'ojol ri Juda: ri Er, ri Onan, ri Sel, ri Pares, ri Zar; ri Er xukuje' ri Onan xecäm can pa Canaan. Ri e u c'ojol ri Pares e are ri Hezron, ri Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Ri e u c'ojol ri Isacar: ri Tola, ri Pu, ri Job, ri Simron." 
Genesis46:13 Ri e u c'ojol ri Isacar: ri Tola, ri Pu, ri Job, ri Simron." 
Genesis46:14 Ri e u c'ojol ri Zabulon: ri Sered, ri Elon, ri Jaleel." 
Genesis46:15 E are' alc'ualaxelab wa' ri xebuya' ri Lea che ri Jacob aretak e c'o pa Padan-aram, c'o c'u wi na ri' ri Din ri ral ali. Conojel ri e rija'lil e juwinak oxlajuj (33) winak, chi achijab chi ixokib." 
Genesis46:16 Ri e u c'ojol ri Gad: ri Zipion, ri Hagui, ri Ezbon, ri Sun, ri Er, ri Arodi, ri Arel." 
Genesis46:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aser: ri Imna, ri Isu, ri Isuy, ri Beriy, xukuje' ri canab ri Ser u bi'. Ri e u c'ojol ri Beriy: ri Heber xukuje' ri Malquiel." 
Genesis46:18 E are' alc'ualaxelab wa' ri xebuya' ri Zilp che ri Jacob. Ri are' u lok'om pataninel ri Laban ri xusipaj che ri Lea ri u mia'l, e are' tak c'ut ri e rija'lil e waklajuj (16) winak chi conojel." 
Genesis46:19 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob ri xeralaj ri Raquel, e are wa': ri Jose xukuje' ri Benjamin." 
Genesis46:20 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jose ri xeralaj ri Asenat, e are wa': ri Manases, ri Eprain, ri xil qui wäch pa Ejipt. Ri Asenat u mia'l ri Potiper ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa On." 
Genesis46:21 Ri e u c'ojol ri Benjamin: ri Bela, ri Bequer, ri Asbel, ri Jer, ri Naaman, ri Ehi, ri Ros, ri Mupim, ri Hupim xukuje' ri Ard." 
Genesis46:22 E are tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Raquel xukuje' ri Jacob, e cajlajuj (14) winak chi conojel." 
Genesis46:23 Ri u c'ojol ri Dan: ri Husim. 
Genesis46:24 Ri e u c'ojol ri Neptali: ri Jazeel, ri Gun, ri Jezer, ri Silem." 
Genesis46:25 E are' alc'ualaxelab wa' ri xebuya' ri Bil che ri Jacob. Ri are' u lok'om pataninel ri Laban ri xusipaj che ri Raquel ri u mia'l, e are' tak c'ut ri e rija'lil e wukub (7) chi conojel." 
Genesis46:26 Conojel ri e rachalaxic ri Jacob ri xebopan junam ruc' pa Ejipt, e oxc'al wakib (66); man xebajilax ta c'u ri quixokil ri e u c'ojol." 
Genesis46:27 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jose ri xil qui wäch pa Ejipt e quieb. Conojel ri e rachalaxic ri Jacob ri xebopan pa Ejipt e oxc'al lajuj (70). 
Genesis46:28 Ri Jacob xubij che ri Juda chi cänabej che u bixic che ri Jose rech cäpe che u c'ulaxic pa Gosen. Aretak opanem cuban pa Gosen," 
Genesis46:29 ri Jose xtakan che u suc'umaxic ri u carwaj rech cäbe che u c'ulaxic ri u tat. Aretak xril u wäch ri u tat, xulak'apuj, sibalaj xok'ic." 
Genesis46:30 Ri Israel xubij che ri Jose: “¡Chincäm chi ba' wi, xinwetamaj c'ut chi at c'aslic!”" 
Genesis46:31 Ri Jose xubij chque ri rachalal xukuje' chque conojel ri rachalaxic ri u tat: “Quinbe ruc' ri ajawinel, quinya' u bixic che chi ri e wachalal xukuje' ri rachalaxic ri nu tat ri e c'o pa Canaan, e ulinak wuc' che qui canajic waral;" 
Genesis46:32 e qui c'amom c'u ulok ri qui chij, ri qui wacax, xukuje' ri jastak quech, quinbij che chi ri i chac are ri qui yuk'uxic chij xukuje' niq'uiaj awaj chic." 
Genesis46:33 Aretak c'u chixusiq'uij ri ajawinel che u c'otic i chi' jas ri i chac," 
Genesis46:34 quibij che chi ix ticol tak chij xukuje' wacax jacha' ri e i mam. Jeri' quixcuinic quixcanaj canok pa ri ulew Gosen, rumal rech chi man cäya' ta c'olbal chque ri aj ejiptib chi quejeki' cuc' ri ajyuk' tak chij.”" 
Genesis47:1 Xbe c'u ri Jose che u bixic che ri ajawinel. Xubij che chi ri u tat xukuje' conojel ri rachalaxic ri e c'o nabe pa Canaan, e opaninak pa Gosen, e cuc'am ri qui chij, ri qui wacax xukuje' conojel ri jastak quech." 
Genesis47:2 Xebucha' bic job chque ri rachalal, xebucoj chuwäch ri ajawinel rech cäretamaj qui wäch." 
Genesis47:3 Ri ajawinel xuc'ot qui chi' ri rachalal ri Jose, xubij chque: “¿Jas ri chac ri quibano?” Ri e are' xquibij: “Ri uj uj yuk'ul tak chij, uj junam cuc' ri e ka mam." 
Genesis47:4 Uj petinak rech cujelcanaj pa we ulew ri', rumal rech chi c'o nimalaj wi'jal pa Canaan, man c'o ta chic k'ayes chque ri ka chij. Bana' la tok'ob ya' la chke chi cujcanaj che jekelem chupam ri ulew Gosen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Ri a tat xukuje' conojel ri awachalal e ulinak rech quec'oji' awuc'. 
Genesis47:6 Ronojel ri ulew re Ejipt c'o pa a k'ab. Chaya' ri Gosen chque, are c'u utzalaj ulew wa' pa Ejipt, rech quecanaj che jekelem chi'. We c'u cach'obo chi e c'o sac'ajalaj tak achijab chquixo'l, chebacojo' che takanelab paquiwi' ri wawaj.”" 
Genesis47:7 Ri Jose xukuje' xuc'am bic ri Jacob ri u tat rech quetamax u wäch rumal ri ajawinel. Ri Jacob xuya' rutzil u wäch ri ajawinel ruc' nimalaj mejow ib," 
Genesis47:8 ri ajawinel xuc'ot u chi' ri Jacob, xubij che: “¿Joropa' chic ri a junab?”" 
Genesis47:9 Ri Jacob xubij che ri ajawinel: “E c'o chi jun sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (130) junab ri xak xebenjalala' nu c'olbal. Man e q'ui ta wa', c'ax c'u nu rikom pa tak we junab ri', maja' c'u naj quinc'asi'c jacha' ri junab ri xec'asi' ri e nu mam.”" 
Genesis47:10 Ri Jacob xuya' can rutzil u wäch ri ajawinel, xel c'u ulok chuwäch." 
Genesis47:11 Ri Jose xuya' culew chupam ri ulew ri c'o pa Ejipt ri utz na, rech quejeki' chila', je jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri ajawinel. Jeri' ri u tat xukuje' ri e rachalal xec'oji' tak culew chupam ri ulew ri c'o pa Ramses." 
Genesis47:12 Chuwi' chi c'u wa', ri Jose quebutzuk conojel ri e rachalaxic, je jas ri cajwataj chque chquijujunal." 
Genesis47:13 Man cäriktaj ta chi c'u trico pa ronojel ri Ejipt, xukuje' sibalaj c'u nimatajinak ri wi'jal. Ri aj Ejipt xukuje' ri aj Canaan quecäm rumal ri wi'jal." 
Genesis47:14 Ri Jose xumulij ronojel ri qui rajil ri aj ejiptib xukuje' ronojel ri qui rajil ri aj cananeyib ri xquilok'obej qui trico, xuc'ol ronojel ri puak pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel." 
Genesis47:15 Aretak xq'uis ronojel ri puak pa Ejipt xukuje' pa Canaan, conojel ri aj ejiptib xebopan ruc' ri Jose, xquibij che: “¡Ya' la ri cakatijo man suc' taj chi xak cäca'y la cujcäm che numic, xa rumal rech chi man c'o ta chic ka rajil!”" 
Genesis47:16 Ri Jose xubij chque: “We man c'o chic i rajil, chebic'ama' ulok ri iwawaj, quinya' c'u na i trico che qui q'uexwäch.”" 
Genesis47:17 Ri aj ejiptib, xequic'am ulok ri qui quiej, ri qui chij, ri qui wacax, xukuje' ri e qui bur, xequijach pa u k'ab ri Jose. Ri Jose xuya' jun junab qui trico che qui q'uexwäch ri cawaj." 
Genesis47:18 Chucab c'u junab xebopan chi jumul ruc' ri Jose, xequibij che: “Tat, man cuya' taj cäkac'u' chwäch la, chi xq'uis ronojel ri ka rajil, conojel c'u ri kawaj e ech chi la. Man c'o ta chi jas cäkaya' che la, xuwi chic ri kulew xukuje' ri uj." 
Genesis47:19 Chujlok'o' la ri uj xukuje' ri kulew, che u q'uexwäch trico. Cujoc c'u che u lok'om pataninel ri ajawinel quekachacuj ri kulew, cakapatanij ri ajawinel. Chya' la ija' che u tiquic u wäch ri ulew rech man cujcäm taj, metzeletaj ri ulew. ¿Jas ta c'u che xak cäca'y la chke cäsach ka wäch junam ruc' ri kulew?”" 
Genesis47:20 Ri Jose xulok' ronojel ri ulew pa Ejipt. Conojel ri aj ejiptib xquic'ayij ri culew u mac rech ri nimalaj wi'jal. Xk'ax ri culew pa u k'ab ri ajawinel. 
Genesis47:21 Are c'u ri aj ejiptib xebux lok'om tak pataninelab pa ronojel ri Ejipt. 
Genesis47:22 Xuwi c'u ri culew ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob, man xebulok' taj ri Jose, xya' qui trico rumal ri ajawinel; rumal ri' man xquic'ayij taj ri culew, are xquitzukbej quib ri cuya' ri ajawinel chque." 
Genesis47:23 Ri Jose xubij chque conojel ri winak: “Ri ix xixlok'otaj wumal xukuje' ri iwulew, ix rech chic ri ajawinel. Chic'ama' bic ri ija', chitica' u wäch ri ulew," 
Genesis47:24 che ri jo' tak arob trico ri quiyaco rajawaxic quiya' jun arob che ri ajawinel; are c'u ri quiejeb arob chic quicoj che ija' xukuje' che tzukbal iwib, xukuje' che tzukbal que ri iwalc'ual pa tak ri iwachoch,” xcha' ri Jose chque ri winak." 
Genesis47:25 Ri winak xquibij che ri Jose: “Sibalaj utz anima' la chke, uj c'asbam la, chujoc ba' che u lok'om pataninel ri ajawinel.”" 
Genesis47:26 Jeri' ri Jose xucoj wa' che pixab chupam ri rulewal ri Ejipt chi chyok che ri ajawinel ri u ro'il ri qui wächinic tak ri ulew we pixab ri' c'ä are jekelic e are' tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob man c'o ta jas cäquitojo, rumal rech chi ri culew mawi jubik' xebux ta rech ri ajawinel." 
Genesis47:27 Ri aj israelib xecanaj pa Ejipt. Xquiban quech che ri ulew ri c'o pa Gosen, chila' c'u xeq'uiyir wi." 
Genesis47:28 Ri Jacob xc'asi' chi na wuklajuj (17) junab pa Ejipt. Xtz'akat c'u na jun sient ruc' cawinak wukub (147) u junab. 
Genesis47:29 Aretak xuna' ri Jacob chi xa co'l man cäcämic, xutak u siq'uixic ri Jose ri u c'ojol, xubij che: “We kas cawaj cäban tok'ob chwe, chacojo' ri ak'ab chuxe' ri wa' chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chwe chi cäban ri tok'ob ri quintz'onoj chawe. ¡Chabana' tok'ob, minamuk can waral pa Ejipt!" 
Genesis47:30 Aretak quincämic, chinawesaj bic pa Ejipt, chinamuku' pa ri qui mukubal ri e nu mam.” “Jewa' quinban na,” xcha' ri Jose." 
Genesis47:31 “¡Chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chwe!,” xcha' ri u tat. “Quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na,” xcha' ri Jose che. Are' c'u ri Israel xtzali chuwäch ri u jolom ri u ch'at." 
Genesis48:1 Oc'owinak chi quieb oxib k'ij aretak xya' u bixic che ri Jose chi yawab ri u tat. Xbe ri Jose xebuc'am bic ri quieb u c'ojol, ri Manases, ri Eprain." 
Genesis48:2 Aretak xya' u bixic che ri Jacob chi xopan ri Jose che rilic, xucoj u chuk'ab xt'uyi' ak'an pa ri u ch'at." 
Genesis48:3 Xubij c'u che ri Jose: “Ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, xuc'ut rib chnuwäch pa ri tinimit ri Luz u bi' ri c'o pa Canaan, xinutewichi'j c'ut," 
Genesis48:4 cuc' tak we tzij ri': ‘Chawilampe', quinbano chi sibalaj queq'uiyir ri e a c'ojol, ri e awija'l quequipok'isaj na nimak tak tinimit. Chque c'ut, ri e awija'lil quinya' wi na we ulew ri'. Cux c'u na quech chbe k'ij sak.’" 
Genesis48:5 E are' c'u we quieb a c'ojol ri', ri Eprain, ri Manases ri xil qui wäch aretak majok chinul awuc' pa Ejipt, e wech wa', jacha' ri Ruben xukuje' ri Simeon." 
Genesis48:6 Are c'u ri a c'ojol ri quebalax na, e are wa' ri e awech, rumal c'u rech chi e cachalal ri Eprain xukuje' ri Manases, caquic'am na quech ri quechbal." 
Genesis48:7 Aretak in tzelejinak chi ulok pa Padan-aram, xcäm ri Raquel ri a nan pa Canaan, xa co'l, man cujopan pa Eprat; xinmuk c'u can chuchi' ri be re Eprat ri are Belen camic.”" 
Genesis48:8 Ri Israel xca'y chque ri u c'ojol ri Jose, xc'otow chi'aj: “We alabom ri', ¿e jachin tak?”" 
Genesis48:9 “E are nu c'ojol wa' ri e u yo'm ri Dios chwe waral pa Ejipt,” xcha' ri Jose. Xubij c'u ri u tat che: “Chebakebsaj ulok chnuwäch rech quebentewichi'j canok.”" 
Genesis48:10 Man cäca'y ta chi c'u ri Jacob rumal ri u ri'jobic. Rumal ri' ri Jose xebukebisaj ri e u c'ojol chuwäch, xebutz'umaj c'ut xukuje' xebulak'apuj." 
Genesis48:11 Xubij c'u che ri Jose: “Mawi jumul xinchomaj chi quinwil ta chi na a wäch. U yo'm c'u ri Dios chwe chi xinwil na qui wäch ri e a c'ojol.” 
Genesis48:12 Ri Jose xeresaj ri ac'alab xo'l u ch'ec ri u tat, xxuqui' chuwäch, xumej rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew." 
Genesis48:13 Xebuc'am qui cabichal ri Eprain ruc' ri u k'ab u wiquiak'ab, ri Manases ruc' ri u mox, xebukebisaj chuwäch ri u tat. Jeri' ri Eprain xcanaj pa ri u mox ri Jacob, are c'u ri Manases xcanaj pa ri u wiquiak'ab." 
Genesis48:14 Ri Jacob aretak xuyuk ri u k'ab paquiwi', xebujalc'atij ri u k'ab, ri u wiquiak'ab xuya' puwi' ri u jolom ri Eprain ri chak'axel, are c'u ri u mox, xuya' puwi' ri u jolom ri Manases pune' are nabeal." 
Genesis48:15 Je c'u u tewichi'xic ri Jose wa' xubano: “Are' ri Dios ri xquinimaj ri Abraham, xukuje' ri Isaac ri e nu mam; ri Dios ri in chajininak ulok kas pa ri k'ij ri xinalaxic," 
Genesis48:16 ri tako'n aj caj ri quinuto'tajisaj chuwäch apachique c'ax, chtewichi'n we quieb alabom ri'. Xa ta rumal quech cänatax ri nu bi' xukuje' ri u bi' ri nu mam Abraham, ri nu tat Isaac. Chec'oji' ta q'ui calc'ual. Chebux ta tinimit winak cho ri uwächulew.”" 
Genesis48:17 Man utz ta c'u xril ri Jose chi ri u tat, are xuya' ri u wiquiak'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri Eprain xuc'am ri u k'ab ri u tat xresaj puwi' ri u jolom ri Eprain xuya' puwi' ri u jolom ri Manases." 
Genesis48:18 Xubij c'u che: “¡Man je taj ri cäban la, tat! Are nabeal wa'. Puwi' wa' ya' wi la ri iquiak'ab la.”" 
Genesis48:19 Ri u tat man xraj taj, xubij c'u che ri Jose: “¡Weta'm nu c'ojol, weta'm ri quinbano! Xukuje' ri are' cux na jun nim tinimit nim u k'ij. Are c'u ri Eprain ri u chak', are cänimar na u k'ij chuwäch. Ri e rija'lil cäquipok'osaj na nimak tak tinimit.”" 
Genesis48:20 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Jacob xebutewichi'j cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Ri tinimit re Israel cucoj na ri i bi' ix che tak tewichi'nic, cäquibij c'u na: ‘Chubana' ri Dios chawe jas ri xuban che ri Eprain xukuje' che ri Manases.’ ” Ri Jacob ri cäbix Israel che are xuya' u k'ij ri Eprain chuwäch ri Manases." 
Genesis48:21 Xubij c'u che ri Jose: “Chawilampe', ri in xa pa quieb oxib k'ij quincämic, are' c'u ri Dios c'o iwuc' amak'el, cuban c'u na chiwe chi quixutzelej na pa ri culew ri e i mam." 
Genesis48:22 Are nim ri nu yo'm chawe at chuwäch ri nu yo'm chque ri awachalal: quinya' ri Siquem chawe ri wesam chque ri aj amoreyib ruc' tijow tak chuk'ab cuc'.” 
Genesis49:1 Ri Jacob ri nim winak chic xebusiq'uij ri e u c'ojol, xubij chque: “Chixkeb ulok, quinya' c'u can u bixic chiwe jas ri quic'ulmaj na:" 
Genesis49:2 Nu c'ojol, chixkeb ulok che u tatabexic ri quinbij chiwe." 
Genesis49:3 Ruben, at ri nu nabeal, ri nabe u wächinic ri nu chuk'ab, ri nabe chnimarisax u k'ij, xukuje' ri nabe pa ri cuinem." 
Genesis49:4 Man at ta chi c'ut ri at nabe, at junam ruc' jun nimalaj ja' ri man k'atatijel taj: xatz'iloj ri nu ch'at aretak xatwar ruc' jun chque ri man kas ta wixokil." 
Genesis49:5 Ri Simeon, ri Levi, cachalal quib; ri qui ch'ojibal e chaconisan re tokinic." 
Genesis49:6 ¡Mawi jubik' quinwaj quinc'oji' ta pa ri c'olbal ri caquimulij wi tak quib! aretak c'u e oyowarinak xequicämisaj winak, xak che u banic ri cäcaj xequik'ajisaj ri cakan ri ama'ib tak wacax." 
Genesis49:7 ¡C'okotajinak, je, chc'okotaj ri awajalaj royowal! ¡In quebenjabuj na chnimalaj conojel pa ronojel ri tinimit Israel!" 
Genesis49:8 At, Juda, ri awachalal cäquiya' na a k'ij. Quebachap na ri e a c'ulel chquikul, xukuje' ri kas e awachalal cäquimej na quib chawäch." 
Genesis49:9 ¡Juda, nu c'ojol! At junam ruc' jun alaj coj aretak cutanaba' u tijic ri ti'j ri u chapom: cukasaj ri u jolom, cäjupi cho ri ulew, cujaluj rib chi jun nimalaj coj. ¿Jachin ta lo ri cuchajij anima' ri cätzuruwic?" 
Genesis49:10 Man c'o ta jun quesan ri cuinem pa u k'ab ri Juda mawi ri ch'ämiy ri c'o pa u k'ab c'ä cäpe na ri ajchak'e ri ch'ämiy, ri cänimax na cumal conojel tak ri tinimit." 
Genesis49:11 Ri cuyukba' ri alaj u bur chquixe' tak ri juwi' uva, ri cuch'aj ronojel ri ratz'iak ¡ruc' u wa'l uva, cuc' ri qui wa'l tak uva!" 
Genesis49:12 Ri e u bak'wäch e k'ek na chuwäch ri u wa'l uva, ri e u ware e sak na chuwäch ri leche." 
Genesis49:13 Ri Zabulon cäc'oji' chuchi' ri plo, ri quebopan tak wi ri jucub. Ri e u c'ulbatil copan c'ä pa Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 Ri Isacar are jun cowilaj awaj re eka'n ri cuxlan chupam tak ri e u cäbal. 
Genesis49:15 Aretak xrilo chi utz ri ulew xukuje' chi sibalaj utz che uxlanibal, xubus ri uwo rachak che u c'amic bic eka'n man xc'ulelan taj xux lok'om pataninel." 
Genesis49:16 Ri Dan cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri kas u winakil jacha' jun chque ri ramak' ri Israel. 
Genesis49:17 Ri Dan junam ruc' jun itzel cumätz ri c'o chuchi' ri be, ri cusoc u xe' cäkan ri quiej cätzak c'u ri c'o chrij ri quiej." 
Genesis49:18 ¡Oh, Ajawaxel, quinweyej chi quincol la!" 
Genesis49:19 Ri Gad quekaj na banal tak c'ax puwi', cäcuin c'u che cokataxic bic." 
Genesis49:20 Ri Aser, sibalaj c'o cutijo ri wa ri cuyao takal u tijic cumal tak ri ajawinelab." 
Genesis49:21 Ri Neptali junam ruc' jun ati't masat ri tzokopitalic ri e c'o je'licalaj tak ral. 
Genesis49:22 Ri Jose jacha' juwi' tico'n chunakaj ja' ri sibalaj cäwächinic, ri e u k'ab quepaki' puwi' ri nimalaj tapia." 
Genesis49:23 Ri e aj q'uiakal ch'ab cäquiban coyowal che, quequiq'uiak tak ch'ab che, amak'el c'ut caquiya' latz' che." 
Genesis49:24 E c'o c'u cowilaj tak u k'ab ri Jose amak'el co u tanim ri u q'uiakbal ch'ab; ¡maltiox che ri u Dios ri Jacob ri c'o ronojel u cuinem!, ¡maltiox che ri u bi' ri ajyuk', ri to'l rech ri Israel!" 
Genesis49:25 ¡Maltiox che ri u Dios ri a tat ri catuto' na; ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri cattewichi'n na! ¡Cuc' tak tewichibal ri quepe chicaj! ¡Cuc' tak tewichibal re ri nimalaj plo! ¡Cuc' tak tewichibal re tu'bisanic xukuje' alc'ualanic!" 
Genesis49:26 Nim na ri a tewichi'xic rumal ri a tat chuwäch ri tewichibal ri xquiya' ri e nu mam chwe in. C'ä chuq'uisbalil tak ri junalic tak juyub, we tewichibal ri' cäc'oji' na pa u jolom ri Jose, ri cha'tajinak chquixo'l ri rachalal." 
Genesis49:27 Ri Benjamin, junam ruc' jun c'analaj utiw, ak'abil cutij ri awaj ri u cämisam, pa ri benak k'ij c'ut cujach ri queto'tajic.”" 
Genesis49:28 E are wa' ri e cablajuj (12) amak' ri Israel, are c'u wa' ri xubij ri qui tat chque ri u c'ojol aretak xebutewichi'j, chquijujunal." 
Genesis49:29 C'o jun k'ij ri Jacob xuya' we takanic ri' chque ri ralc'ual, xubij: “Xa co'l man quincämic. Aretak quincämic, chinimuku' cuc' ri e nu mam, pa ri mukubal ri c'o pa ri rulew ri Epron ri aj hitit," 
Genesis49:30 chila' pa Canaan pa ri mukubal ri c'o pa Macpel chuwäch ri Mamre, ri xulok' ri Abraham che ri Epron rech cäcanaj che qui mukubal ri rachalaxic." 
Genesis49:31 Chila' xmuk wi ri Abraham xukuje' ri Sara ri rixokil, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Rebec ri rixokil, xukuje' chila' xinmuk wi ri Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Ri ulew xukuje' ri mukubal ri c'o pa ri ulew ri', xlok' chque ri aj hititib.”" 
Genesis49:33 Aretak xto'taj ri Jacob che u ya'ic ri pixbenic chque ri e u c'ojol, xk'oyi' chic jumul xcäm c'ut." 
Genesis50:1 Are c'u ri Jose xulak'apuj ri u cuerp ri u tat, xutz'umaj, xukuje' xrok'ej u wäch." 
Genesis50:2 Ri Jose xebutak ri rajcunab chi cäquicoj c'oc'alaj tak cunabal chrij ri Israel ri u tat; je c'u xquibano. 
Genesis50:3 Cawinak (40) k'ij xebeytaj che u cojic ri c'oc'alaj tak cunabal chrij ri Israel, e are c'u k'ij wa' ri quebeytaj che u banic. Ri aj ejiptib oxc'al lajuj (70) k'ij xcok'ej u wäch ri Israel." 
Genesis50:4 Aretak c'u xetz'akat ri oxc'al lajuj (70) k'ij, ri Jose xtzijon cuc' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel, xubij c'u chque: “We ix utz wuc', chibana' tok'ob chibij che ri ajawinel" 
Genesis50:5 chi aretak cämic cuban ri nu tat, xubij chwe chi quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chuwäch, chi quinmuk na chupam ri u mukubal ri u suc'umam canok c'o c'u pa ri ulew Canaan. Je c'u ri' quintz'onoj jun tok'ob che, chi cuya' quieb oxib k'ij chwe che u mukic ri nu tat, xuwi c'u cämuktaj canok, quintzelej ulok.”" 
Genesis50:6 Ri ajawinel xutak u bixic che ri Jose, xubij: “Jät che u mukic ri a tat, je chabana' jas ri u bim chawe.”" 
Genesis50:7 Xbe c'u ri Jose che u mukic ri u tat, xachilax bic cumal conojel ri nimak qui k'ij ri c'o qui takanic pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel, xukuje' pa ri Ejipt;" 
Genesis50:8 ri kas e rachalaxic ri Jacob, ri e rech ri Jose, xukuje' ri e rachalal. Pa ri Gosen xuwi xecanaj canok ri ac'alab xukuje' ri awaj." 
Genesis50:9 E c'o winak xebe pa tak cäret, xukuje' chquij tak quiej, xcachilaj bic ri Jose; q'ui winak xebe che u mukic ri Jacob." 
Genesis50:10 Aretak xebopan pa Goren-ha-atad ri c'o pa elebal k'ij che ri nima' Jordan, xquiban jun nimalaj ok'ej chila' che u bisoxic ri Jacob. Ri Jose wukub k'ij xrok'ej ri u tat chila'." 
Genesis50:11 Ri aj cananeyib ri e c'o chila', aretak xquil ri mukunajic, xquibij: “Ri aj ejiptib sibalaj nim u k'ij ri mukunajic chquiwäch.” Rumal ri' xcoj Abel-mizraim che u bi' we c'olbal ri'." 
Genesis50:12 Ri e u c'ojol tak ri Jacob je xquibano jas ri xubij ri qui tat chque," 
Genesis50:13 xquic'am bic pa Canaan, xquimuk pa ri mukubal ri c'o pa ri ulew re Macpel ri u lok'om can ri Abraham che ri Epron ri aj hitit che qui mukubal ri rachalaxic. We ulew ri' xukuje' ri mukubal, c'o chunakaj ri Mamre." 
Genesis50:14 Aretak xmuktaj ri Jacob, ri Jose xtzelej pa Ejipt, e rachilam ri rachalal xukuje' conojel ri xebe ruc' che ri mukunajic." 
Genesis50:15 Cäminak chi c'ut ri Jacob, ri e rachalal ri Jose xquichomaj: “Craj ne ri Jose cäretzelaj ka wäch, cuya' c'u na rajil u q'uexelal ri etzelal ri xkaban che.”" 
Genesis50:16 Xquitak c'u u bixic che: “C'ä majok chcäm ri a tat, xujutako" 
Genesis50:17 chi cäkabij chawe: ‘Chi chabana' tok'ob, quintz'onoj chawe chi casach u tza'm ri etzelal xukuje' ri macaj ri xquiban ri awachalal chawe, ri sibalaj c'ax ri xquiban chawe.’ Rumal ri' catkabochi'j chi casach ka mac che ri ketzelal, uj c'u u pataninelab ri u Dios ri a tat.” Aretak ri tako'n cätajin cäquibij we takquil ri' che, ri Jose cok'ic." 
Genesis50:18 Xebopan c'u ri kas e rachalal, xquimej quib chuwäch c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew, xquibij che: “Uj c'o chawäch uj a lok'om tak pataninelab.”" 
Genesis50:19 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Jose chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Man quincuin taj quincoj ta wib che u q'uexwäch ri Dios. 
Genesis50:20 Ri ix xichomaj u banic jun c'ax chwe, ri Dios u q'uexom we c'ax ri' pa utzil che u banic ri cäkil camic: che u to'ic qui c'aslemal tinimit winak." 
Genesis50:21 Mixe'j ba' iwib. Quintakej na u ya'ic ri quitijo, ri ix xukuje' ri iwalc'ual.” Je u cu'bisaxic qui c'u'x wa' xuban ri Jose, xucoj utzalaj tak tzij che qui ch'abexic." 
Genesis50:22 Ri Jose xukuje' ri e rachalaxic ri u tat, xquitakej jekelem pa Ejipt. Jun sient ruc' lajuj (110) junab xc'asi' ri Jose," 
Genesis50:23 xril c'u na qui wäch ri e xiquin e u mam ri Eprain. Xukuje' xril na qui c'amic jacha' e u tz'akatil ri achalaxic ri e ralc'ual ri Maquir ri ri' u mam u c'ojol c'ut ri Manases.
