Genesis50:24 Xpe c'u jun k'ij aretak xubij ri Jose chque ri rachalal: “Xa quieb oxib k'ij chic in c'aslic, cäpe c'u na ri Dios che i to'ic, quixresaj c'u na bic chupam we ulew ri', che i c'amic bic chupam ri ulew ri xuchi'j chque ri Abraham, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob.”" 
Genesis50:25 Xuban c'ut chi ri e u c'ojol ri Israel chi cäquiban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chnuwäch xubij c'u chque: “Ri quinbij chiwe, ri Dios cäpe na che iwesaxic bic waral. Aretak cäc'ulmataj wa', quic'am na bic ri nu bakil iwuc' pa Canaan, miya' can waral.”" 
Genesis50:26 Jun sient ruc' lajuj (110) u junab ri Jose aretak xcäm pa Ejipt; xcoj c'oc'alaj tak cunabal chrij, xya' c'u chupam jun caxa re cäminak." 
Exodus1:1 E are wa' ri qui bi' ri aj israelib ri xebopan junam ruc' ri Jacob pa Ejipt, chquijujunal e cachilam bic ri cachalaxic:" 
Exodus1:2 Ri Ruben, ri Simeon, ri Levi, ri Juda," 
Exodus1:3 ri Isacar, ri Zabulon, ri Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 ri Dan, ri Neptali, ri Gad, ri Aser." 
Exodus1:5 Ri e ri' tak u mam ri Jacob e oxc'al lajuj (70) chi conojel. Are' c'u ri Jose c'o chic pa Ejipt. 
Exodus1:6 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak ri Jose xukuje' ri e rachalal, conojel xecämic;" 
Exodus1:7 are c'u ri aj israelib xepok'ic, sibalaj xeq'uiyiric xec'oji' q'ui calc'ual xc'oji' c'u sibalaj qui chuk'ab. Xnoj ri ulew cumal." 
Exodus1:8 Q'ui junab e oc'owinak chic xoc chi c'u jun c'ac' ajawinel pa Ejipt ri man xretamaj ta u wäch ri Jose, ri xubij che ri u tinimit:" 
Exodus1:9 “Chiwilampe', ri qui tinimit aj israelib sibalaj e q'uiyirinak chic, e are chi c'o na qui chuk'ab chkawäch uj;" 
Exodus1:10 kachomaj ba' jas ri cäkaban chque rech man queq'uiyir taj, rumal rech chi, we ne cäpe ch'o'j, caquicoj c'u quib cuc' ri e ka c'ulel rech quech'ojin kuc' quebel c'u bic chupam we ulew ri'.”" 
Exodus1:11 Rumal ri' ri aj ejiptib xequicoj takanelab paquiwi' rech quequicoj ri aj israelib che qui banic c'axalaj tak chac. Xetak che qui yaquic ri tinimit Piton xukuje' ri Ramses ri xebucoj ri rajawinel re ri Ejipt, ri paraon, che c'olbal ri cätijic." 
Exodus1:12 Pune' c'u sibalaj cäban c'ax chque ri aj israelib xa sibalaj quepok'ic, jeri' chi ri aj ejiptib sibalaj cäquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri aj israelib." 
Exodus1:13 Ri aj ejiptib sibalaj xquicoj c'anal paquiwi' ri aj israelib pa ri qui chac. 
Exodus1:14 Sibalaj c'u xban c'ax che ri qui c'aslemal cuc' c'axalaj tak chac. Xetak che u banic xok'ol che u banic xan, xukuje' che qui banic ronojel u wäch chac pa ri juyub. Pa conojel c'u ri chac ri cäquibano cäcoj c'anal paquiwi'," 
Exodus1:15 xch'aw c'u ne ri ajawinel re Ejipt ruc' ri Sipr xukuje' ri Pu ri iyomab ri queilow ri ixokib aj hebreyib, xubij c'u chque:" 
Exodus1:16 “Aretak quebiwilij ri ixokib aj hebreyib, chinic'oj ri ac'al we ala o ali; we ali chic'asba'; we ala chicämisaj.”" 
Exodus1:17 Are c'u ri iyomab xquixe'j quib chuwäch ri Dios, man xquinimaj taj ri u takanic ri ajawinel re Ejipt, xequic'asba' c'u ri alabom." 
Exodus1:18 Ri ajawinel re Ejipt xtakan che qui siq'uixic, xubij c'u chque: “¿Jasche e i c'asbam ri alabom?”" 
Exodus1:19 Ri iyomab xquibij che ri ajawinel: “Rumal rech chi ri ixokib aj hebreyib man e junam ta cuc' ri ixokib aj ejiptib. Ri aj hebreyib sibalaj c'o qui chuk'ab, e calam chi apanok ri cal aretak cujopan uj che quilixic.”" 
Exodus1:20 Cätajin c'u queq'uiyir ri aj israelib xukuje' sibalaj xc'oji' qui chuk'ab. 
Exodus1:21 Rumal c'u rech chi ri iyomab xquixe'j quib chuwäch ri Dios, ri Dios xutok'obisaj qui wäch xebuq'uiyirisaj ri e xiquin tak qui mam." 
Exodus1:22 Ri ajawinel pa rech wi xuya' takanic chque conojel ri aj ejiptib, xubij chque: “Chebiq'uiaka' bic ri calc'ual ri aj israelib pa ri nima' ri quil qui wäch ri e alabom, are c'u ri alitomab chebic'asba'.”" 
Exodus2:1 C'o jun achi aj levi, ri xc'uli' ruc' jun ixok ri xukuje' aj levi," 
Exodus2:2 we ixok ri' xc'oji' jun ral ala, xril c'u ri ixok chi sibalaj je'lic ri ac'al, rumal ri' xuc'u' oxib ic';" 
Exodus2:3 man xcuin ta chi c'ut xutakej ta u cuyic, xuc'am jun chicäch re aj, xebuch'uk c'u ri julujak ri e c'o che ruc' k'ol rech man coc ta ri ja' chupam, xuk'oyoba' ri ac'al chupam ri chicäch, xuya' can chquixo'l tak ri aj chuchi' ri nima' Nil;" 
Exodus2:4 ri rana'b ri ac'al xc'oji' apan chunakaj, rech cärilo jas ri cäc'ulmatajic." 
Exodus2:5 Xkaj c'u apan ri u mia'l ri ajawinel ri paraon che atinem chuchi' ri nima' Nil; cätajin quewacat apan ri alitomab ri pataninel tak rech chuchi' ri nima' aretak xril apan ri chicäch ri c'o chquixo'l tak ri aj. Xutak bic jun ali, ri pataninel rech xubij che chi cuc'ama' ulok ri chicäch." 
Exodus2:6 Aretak xujak ri chicäch, c'äte xrilo c'o jun ac'al chupam ri cätajin cok'ic, ri u mia'l ri ajawinel xel u c'u'x che, xubij c'ut: “Calc'ual ri aj hebreyib wa'.”" 
Exodus2:7 Ri rana'b ri ac'al xubij che ri u mia'l ri ajawinel: “¿La cawaj quinsiq'uij ulok jun ixok chquixo'l ri aj hebreyib che u q'uiyisaxic we ac'al ri'?” 
Exodus2:8 “Jät ba',” xcha' ri u mia'l ri ajawinel che. Xbe ri ali, are c'u xusiq'uij ulok ri u nan ri ac'al;" 
Exodus2:9 are' c'u ri u mia'l ri ajawinel xubij che: “Chac'ama' bic we ac'al ri' chaq'uiyisaj c'u chwe, quintoj c'u na a chac.” Xc'am c'u bic ri ac'al rumal ri u nan xuq'uiyisaj c'ut." 
Exodus2:10 Aretak xnimar ri ac'al, xuc'am bic xujacha' can pa u k'ab ri u mia'l ri ajawinel, ri u mia'l ri ajawinel xuban ral che, xucoj c'u Moises che u bi', xubij c'ut: “In xinwesaj chupam ri ja'.”" 
Exodus2:11 Aretak achi chic ri Moises, xurika' jun k'ij xel bic che qui solixic ri e u winakil, xril c'ut chi sibalaj c'ax ri chac ri e takom che u banic. Xril jun achi aj ejipt ri cätajin cuch'ay jun aj hebrey u winakil ri Moises." 
Exodus2:12 Xca'y pa ronojel c'olbal, aretak xrilo chi man c'o ta jun winak quilowic, xucämisaj ri achi ri aj ejipt xumuk can pa ri sanyeb." 
Exodus2:13 Xel chi c'u bic ri Moises chucab k'ij, xeril chic quieb achijab aj hebreyib ri quech'ojinic, xuc'ot u chi' ri cätajin cuch'ay ri jun chic: “¿Jasche cach'ay ri kas a winakil?”" 
Exodus2:14 Ri aj hebrey xutzelej u bixic che: “¿Jachin c'u ri xatcojow at jacha' che c'amal be xukuje' che k'atal tzij pakawi'? ¿La xa ta pu lo cachomaj nu cämisaxic, jacha' ri xaban che u cämisaxic ri aj ejipt?” Ri Moises aretak xuta' ri xbix che sibalaj xuxe'j rib, xretamaj c'ut chi tatajinak chic chi xucämisaj jun achi aj ejipt." 
Exodus2:15 Ri ajawinel aretak xretamaj chi ri Moises xucämisaj jun achi aj ejipt, xtakan che u tzucuxic ri Moises rech cucämisaj, xanimaj c'u bic ri Moises chuwäch ri ajawinel, xejekel pa Madian, chila' xt'uyi wi chunakaj jun c'ua'." 
Exodus2:16 C'o c'u jun cojol tabal tok'ob pa Madian Reuel u bi' ri e c'o wukub u mia'l, xebopan c'u we alitomab ri' che resaxic qui ja' che u ya'ic cuq'uia' ri e u chij ri qui tat," 
Exodus2:17 xebopan chic niq'uiaj ajyuk'ab ri xequipakchi'j bic chila'. Aninak xwalij ri Moises che qui to'ic xebuto' xuya' qui ja' ri qui chij ri alitomab. 
Exodus2:18 Aretak xebopan ri alitomab ruc' ri qui tat Reuel xumayo, xuta' chque: “¿Jasche sibalaj chanim xixul camic?”" 
Exodus2:19 Ri alitomab xquibij che ri qui tat: “Xkarik jun achi aj ejipt ri xujuto' pa qui k'ab ri niq'uiaj ajyuk' chic, xresaj ka ja' pa ri c'ua', xuya' qui ja' ri ka chij.”" 
Exodus2:20 Ri Reuel xubij chque ri u mia'l: “¿Jawije' c'o wi we achi ri'? ¿Jasche xiya' can chila'? ¡Jisiq'uij ulok rech cäpe che u tijic u wa kuc'!” 
Exodus2:21 Jeri' ri Moises xunimaj chi cajeki' pa rachoch ri Reuel. Ri Reuel xuya' c'u na jun u mia'l ri Sepor u bi' che rixokil," 
Exodus2:22 ri ixok xc'oji' c'u jun ral ala ri xcoj Jerson che u bi' rumal ri Moises, xubij c'ut: “Xa in okxanel wib chupam rulew jun winak chic.”" 
Exodus2:23 Q'ui junab chic banom wa', aretak xcäm ri ajawinel re Ejipt. Ri aj israelib xquitakej ok'ej xukuje' elem ch'u'j rumal ri c'axalaj chac ri e takom che u banic. Xuta' c'ut ri Dios ri qui juyuwem." 
Exodus2:24 Xoc c'u il che ri qui ch'ach'atem, xnataj ri c'ulwächinic ri u banom ruc' ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' ri Jacob." 
Exodus2:25 Xeril ri Dios, xretamaj c'ut ri cätajin caquic'ulmaj." 
Exodus3:1 Ri Moises cätajin quebuyuk'uj ri u chij ri Jetro ri u ji', ri xukuje' cäbix Reuel che, ri cojol tabal tok'ob re Madian, xurika' c'u jun k'ij xebuc'am bic ri chij pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xopan c'ä pa ri juyub Horeb ri cäbix u juyub ri Dios che." 
Exodus3:2 Chila' c'u xuc'ut wi rib ri tako'n aj chicaj rech ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri Moises pa u niq'uiajil jun k'ak' ri cänicow, chupam juwi' q'uix. Ri Moises kas utz rilic xubano, kas xrilo chi ri q'uix cänicow rumal ri k'ak' man c'u cäja'r taj ri q'uix." 
Exodus3:3 Ri Moises xuchaplej u chomaxic, xubij: ¡Sibalaj mayibal wa'! Quinbe che rilic jasche man cäja'r taj ri q'uix." 
Exodus3:4 Aretak xril ri Ajawaxel chi xkeb ri Moises che rilic ri k'ak', xuch'abej ulok chupam ri k'ak', xubij che: “¡Moises! ¡Moises!” “In c'olic ri',” xcha' ri Moises." 
Exodus3:5 Xubij c'u ri Dios che: “Matkebic ulok. Chebawesaj ri a xajäb, rumal rech chi tastalicalaj c'olbal ri at c'o wi.”" 
Exodus3:6 Xutakej u bixic xubij che: “In ri' ri qui Dios ri e a mam; ri u Dios ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' ri Jacob.” Ri Moises xuch'uk ri u palaj, xuxe'j c'u rib che u ca'yexic ri Dios," 
Exodus3:7 xutakej c'u u bixic ri Ajawaxel: “Kas wilom ri c'ax ri curik ri nu tinimit ri c'o pa Ejipt. Nu tom ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj u mac rech ri c'ax ri cäban chque cumal ri takanelab ri e cojom paquiwi', kas weta'm ri c'ax ri cäquiriko." 
Exodus3:8 Rumal ri' in kajinak ulok che quesaxic pa qui k'ab ri aj ejiptib; quebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt quebenc'am bic pa jun nimalaj ulew ri utz, jawije' ri cabelel wi leche xukuje' u juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'. Are wa' ri ulew ri e c'o wi ri aj cananeyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj amoreyib, ri aj perezeyib, ri aj hebeyib, xukuje' ri aj jebuseyib." 
Exodus3:9 Ri qui rakoj chi'aj ri aj israelib opaninak chnuwäch, xukuje' wilom ri c'ax ri cäban chque cumal ri aj ejiptib." 
Exodus3:10 Chatakej ba' ri a be, catintak na bic ruc' ri ajawinel che resaxic ulok ri nu tinimit Israel ri c'o pa Ejipt.”" 
Exodus3:11 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Dios: “¿Jas nu banic in chi quentac'aba' ta wib chuwäch ri ajawinel che quesaxic ta ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt?” 
Exodus3:12 Xubij ri Dios che ri Moises: “Jät, quinc'oji' c'u awuc', are etal wa' chi kas in catintak bic: aretak awesam chi ulok ri nu tinimit pa Ejipt, iwonojel quinik'ijilaj na pa we juyub ri'.”" 
Exodus3:13 Are c'u ri Moises xubij che ri Dios: “Ri c'ax ri quinwilo we quinopan cuc' ri aj israelib chubixic chque: ‘Ri qui Dios ri e i mam xinutak ulok iwuc',’ we c'u ne cäquita' ri bi' la chwe: ¿Jas c'ut ri quinbij na chque?”" 
Exodus3:14 Ri Dios xubij che ri Moises: “IN RI' RI IN. Jewa' cabij na chque ri aj israelib: ‘Ri IN RI' in u takom ulok iwuc'.’ ” 
Exodus3:15 Xubij chi c'u na ri Dios che ri Moises: “Xukuje' chabij chque ri aj israelib: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri e i mam; ri u Dios ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' ri Jacob in u takom ulok iwuc'.’ Are nu bi' wa' chbe k'ij sak, are nu bi' wa' pa conojel ri k'ij junab." 
Exodus3:16 Jät chebamulij ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel, chabij chque: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri e i mam; ri u Dios ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' ri Jacob, xuc'ut rib chnuwäch xubij c'u chwe chi oquinak il chiwe xukuje' rilom ri c'ax ri cäban chiwe pa Ejipt." 
Exodus3:17 Xukuje' xubij chwe chi quixresaj bic pa ri rikoj tak c'ax ri ix c'o wi pa Ejipt, quixuc'am bic pa ri culew ri aj cananeyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj amoreyib ri aj perezeyib, ri aj hebeyib, ri aj jebuseyib, ulew wa' ri cabelel wi leche xukuje' ri juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'.’" 
Exodus3:18 Ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib, catquinimaj na, quebe c'u awuc' che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel pa Ejipt, cabij c'u na che: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj hebreyib xpe che ka siq'uixic. Rumal ri chujtzokopij la bic rech cujbe pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, oxib k'ij be che u chi'xic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios.’" 
Exodus3:19 Kas c'u weta'm chi ri ajawinel re Ejipt man quixutzokopij taj, we ta ma ta rumal ri u chuk'ab ri nu cuinem." 
Exodus3:20 Rumal ri', quinc'ut na ri nu cuinem quebensoc na ri aj ejiptib ruc' cämical cumal conojel ri mayibal ri quinbana' na pa ri culew; c'äte ri' quixutzokopij na ri ajawinel." 
Exodus3:21 Xukuje', quinban na chi ri aj ejiptib cäquiya' na ri quita' chque rech aretak quixel ulok c'o cäquiya' ulok chiwe." 
Exodus3:22 Ri ixokib chquijujunal caquibij na chque tak ri qui c'ulja xukuje' chque ri cokxanim tak quib cuc' pa ri cachoch, chi chebuya' bic chque jastak re sak puak, re k'an puak xukuje' atz'iak ri quebicoj na chquij ri i c'ojol, ri i mia'l; jeri' quiban can meba' chque ri aj ejiptib.”" 
Exodus4:1 “Ri e are' man quecojon ta na ri' chwe, mawi caquiya' ta na qui xiquin ri',” xcha' ri Moises. “Xane' caquibij na chwe: ‘Ri Ajawaxel man u c'utum ta rib ri' chawäch.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 “¿Jas ri c'o pa ri a k'ab?” xcha' ri Ajawaxel. “Jun ch'ämiy,” xcha' ri Moises." 
Exodus4:3 “Chaq'uiaka' cho ri ulew,” xcha' ri Ajawaxel che. Ri Moises xuq'uiak ri ch'ämiy cho ri ulew, xjalwächitaj pa jun cumätz. Ri Moises xanimaj che u najtajisaxic rib che," 
Exodus4:4 xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab chachapa' che ri u je'.” Ri Moises xuyuk ri u k'ab, aretak xuchapo, ri cumätz xjalwächitaj chi jumul pa jun ch'ämiy." 
Exodus4:5 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Cac'ulmataj c'ut we mayibal ri' rech cäquicojo chi u c'utum rib ri Ajawaxel chawäch, ri qui Dios ri e a mam; u Dios ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' rech ri Jacob.”" 
Exodus4:6 Xutakej u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chanima' ri a k'ab pa ri a tolec'.” Ri Moises xunim ri u k'ab pa ri u tolec', aretak xresaj, xrilo chi ch'acarinak chic che ch'a'c ri sibalaj sak jacha' ri tew." 
Exodus4:7 Xubij c'u ri Dios che: “Chanima' chic jumul ri a k'ab pa ri a tolec'.” Ri Moises je xubano, aretak xresaj chi ulok ri u k'ab, sibalaj utz chic jacha' ronojel ri u cuerp." 
Exodus4:8 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che: “We ruc' ri nabe etal man cäquicoj taj ri cabij chque mawi cäquinimaj ri a tzij, quecojon c'u na ruc' ri ucab etal;" 
Exodus4:9 we c'u man cäquicoj ri cabij chque mawi cäquinimaj ri a tzij cuc' we quieb etal ri', chac'ama' ja' pa ri nima' chatixa' cho ri ulew. Xak c'u xuwi cäkaj ri ja' puwi' ri ulew caq'uex taj na pa quic'.”" 
Exodus4:10 “¡Ay, Ajawaxel!” xcha' ri Moises. “Ri in man quincuin taj quinch'awic, man c'äte ta re iwir wa' mawi c'ä re ta camic ri cätajin catzijon la ruc' we pataninel ech la ri', xane' ojer ulok wa'. Aretak quintzijonic, quinmemetic.”" 
Exodus4:11 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “¿Jachin ta c'u lo yowinak ri u chi' ri winak? ¿Jachin taj, we man in in banowinak ri mem, ri man cuta' taj, ri moy xukuje' ri cäca'yic?" 
Exodus4:12 Jät ba' quinc'oji' c'u na awuc' aretak catch'awic, quinbij c'u na chawe ri cabij na.”" 
Exodus4:13 Ri Moises xucoj u chuk'ab che u bixic, xubij: “Tok'obisaj la nu wäch, Ajawaxel, bana' la tok'ob, taka' la bic jachin jun winak chic.”" 
Exodus4:14 Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj xpe royowal che ri Moises, xubij c'u che: “C'o ya' ri awachalal Aaron ri aj levit. Ri in weta'm chi sibalaj utz cäch'awic. Ri are' cäpe na che a c'ulaxic sibalaj c'u cäquicot na aretak cäril a wäch." 
Exodus4:15 Chattzijon ruc', chak'alajisaj chuwäch ri awachalal ronojel ri rajawaxic ri cubij na, ri in, pa wech wi, quinc'oji' na ruc' xukuje' awuc' at aretak quixch'awic, quinbij na chiwe ri quibano." 
Exodus4:16 Ri at cattzijon ruc' ri Aaron je ta ne ri in ri quinch'awic, are c'u ri Aaron cubij na chque ri winak ri cabij na che." 
Exodus4:17 Chawuc'aj bic we ch'ämiy ri', are wa' cacoj na che qui banic ri mayibal.”" 
Exodus4:18 Ri Moises xbe cho rachoch ri Jetro ri u tat ri rixokil, xubij c'u che: “Rajawaxic quintzelej pa Ejipt, jawije' e c'o wi ri nu winakil. Quinwaj quinwetamaj we c'ä e c'aslic.” “Jät ba', chawila' awib pa ri be,” xcha' ri Jetro che ri Moises." 
Exodus4:19 Aretak c'ä c'o ri Moises pa Madian, ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Chattzelej pa Ejipt, e cäminak chi c'u conojel ri xquirayij a cämisaxic.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ri Moises xuc'am ri rixokil xukuje' ri e u c'ojol, xebuya' chrij jun bur, xtzelej c'u pa Ejipt. Xuc'am bic ri ch'ämiy aj Dios pa u k'ab." 
Exodus4:21 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Aretak catopan pa Ejipt, chacojo' a chuk'ab che qui banic ri mayibal chuwäch ri ajawinel ri nu yo'm a chuk'ab che qui banic. Ri in quinban na che ri ajawinel chi cuban co che ri ranima', rech man quebutzokopij taj ri aj israelib." 
Exodus4:22 Cabij c'u che ri ajawinel: ‘Jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel: Ri Israel are nabeal nu c'ojol. 
Exodus4:23 Nu bim chic chawe chi catzokopij bic ri nu c'ojol, rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic; u mac c'u rech chi man a tzokopim ta bic, ri in quincämisaj na ri nabeal a c'ojol.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Aretak qui takem ri qui be xebopan c'u pa ri c'olbal ri cäcoc'owisaj wi ri ak'ab ri Moises rachil ri rixokil, xukuje' ri u c'ojol, ri Ajawaxel xpe che u c'ulaxic ri Moises xa co'l man xucämisaj." 
Exodus4:25 Xpe c'u ri Sepor xuc'am jun cuchilo, xukopij ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri achi wi ri ral; xunakaxtaj c'ut ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi ri ac'al chque ri rakan ri Moises, xubij che: “Kastzij at jun achajil chwe aj quiq'uel.”" 
Exodus4:26 C'äte ri' ri Ajawaxel xutzokopij bic ri Moises. Are' c'u Sepor xubij chi ri Moises are jun rachajil aj quic' rumal rech ri retal ri cajom ri re kopinic ruc' ch'ich' che ri u tz'umal ri achi wi. 
Exodus4:27 U bim chi c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Aaron: “Jät pa ri chaki'j uwo sak che u c'ulaxic ri Moises.” Xbe c'u ri Aaron che u c'ulaxic ri Moises pa ri juyub ri cäbix u juyub ri Dios che. Chila' xuya' wi rutzil u wäch xutz'umaj ri u palaj. 
Exodus4:28 Ri Moises xebutzijoj che ri Aaron conojel ri jastak ri u bim ri Ajawaxel che chi cubij, xukuje' ri nimak tak mayibal ri takaninak che qui banic." 
Exodus4:29 E quieb c'ut xebe che quimulixic ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib," 
Exodus4:30 ri Aaron xutzijoj chque conojel ri winak ronojel ri u bim ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, xukuje' xebuban ri mayibal chquiwäch ri u bim ri Dios chi quebubano." 
Exodus4:31 Ri winak xcu'bi qui c'u'x aretak xquetamaj chi ri Ajawaxel oquinak il chque, xukuje' rilom ri c'ax ri cätajin cäquiriko, xexuquic, xek'ijilanic." 
Exodus5:1 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa', ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xebe che u bixic che ri ajawinel ri paraon xquibij c'u che: “Jewa' u bim ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel: ‘Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, rech cubana' jun nimak'ij chila' che u ya'ic nu k'ij.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel che ri Moises: “¿Jachin ri' ri Ajawaxel rech quinnimaj ri cubij, quebentzokopij ta c'u bic ri aj israelib? Man weta'm ta u wäch ri Ajawaxel, mawi quebentzokopij ta bic ri aj israelib.”" 
Exodus5:3 Ri Moises ri Aaron, xquibij che ri ajawinel: “Ri qui Dios ri aj hebreyib petinak che ka rikic; rumal ri' cujbe na pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, oxib k'ij be cäkaban na, quekaya' c'u tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios, mebutak c'u ne ulok ch'o'j o yabil pakawi' che ka cämisaxic.”" 
Exodus5:4 Ri ajawinel re Ejipt je xubij wa' chque: “Moises xukuje' ri at Aaron, ¿jasche quiya' latz' chque ri winak che u banic ri qui chac? Chquitakej na u banic ri qui chac.”" 
Exodus5:5 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Aaron: “Camic ri e q'uiyirinak chic ri aj israelib pa Ejipt, ¿la quebek'il ta c'u che u banic ri qui chac?”" 
Exodus5:6 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri ajawinel xuya' takanic chque ri takanelab xukuje' chque ri quesolin ri chac, xubij chque:" 
Exodus5:7 “Miya' chic pajo chque ri aj israelib che qui banic ri xan, jas ri takem ulok u banic; cheboj ri e are' che u molic ri pajo." 
Exodus5:8 Chibij c'u chque chi c'o mäquesaj che ri rajilabal ri xan ri quequijach ronojel k'ij. Mawi jun xan cäquesaj che. Xa c'u e jujun tak sak'orib rumal ri' cäquirak qui chi', cäquibij: ‘¡Jo' che u ya'ic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri ka Dios!’" 
Exodus5:9 Chibana' chque we winak ri' chi sibalaj chquicojo' qui chuk'ab che u banic ri qui chac; chebiya' sibalaj chac chquiwäch, rech man are ta cäbe qui c'u'x cuc' ri banoj tak tzij ri cäbix chque.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ri takanelab xukuje' ri quesolin ri chac, xebe che u bixic chque ri aj israelib, “ri ajawinel u yo'm takanic chi man cäya' ta chic pajo chiwe." 
Exodus5:11 Ix quixbe na che u molic apawije' ta ne ri quirika' wi ulok. Man c'o ta c'u quiwesaj che ri rajilabal ri xan ri bim chiwe chi quijacho.” 
Exodus5:12 Ri aj israelib xquijabuj quib pa ronojel ri Ejipt, che u molic k'ayes rech cäquicoj che u q'uexwäch pajo." 
Exodus5:13 Ronojel k'ij ri e u takanelab ri ajawinel cäquicoj qui chuk'ab chque ri solil tak qui chac ri aj israelib rech xa junam cajilabal ri xan cäquijacho jacha' ri cäquijach nabe aretak cäya' pajo chque," 
Exodus5:14 xukuje' ri takanelab quequich'ay ri quesolin ri qui chac ri aj israelib, quecha' c'u chque: “¿Jasche mawi ri iwir mawi ri camic xitz'akatisaj ri cajilabal ri xan jas ri quiban can nabe?”" 
Exodus5:15 Ri e solil tak qui chac ri aj israelib xequich'a' che ri ajawinel, xquibij che: “¿Jasche cäban la c'ax chque ri pataninelab la?" 
Exodus5:16 Man cäya' ta chi la pajo chke cacoj c'u chuk'ab chke chi quekaban ri xan, xak c'u u wi' chic cujch'ay cumal ri takanelab la. ¡Ri c'o qui mac e are ri winakil la!”" 
Exodus5:17 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel chque: “¡Ri ix man jas ta i banic xane' ix sak'orib! Rumal ri' quitzijola' chixo'l, quibij: ‘Jo' che u ya'ic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.’" 
Exodus5:18 Jix ba' pa ri chac. Pune' ta ne man cäya' i pajo, rajawaxic c'ut junam cajilabal ri xan quijacho,” xcha' ri ajawinel chque." 
Exodus5:19 Ri solil tak qui chac ri aj israelib man cäquirik ta chic jas cäquibano, aretak xbix chque chi man c'o ta cäquesaj che ri cajilabal ri xan ri quequijach ronojel k'ij." 
Exodus5:20 Aretak xebel ulok ri solinelab chuwäch ri ajawinel, xquirik quib ruc' ri Moises rachil ri Aaron ri e eyeninak," 
Exodus5:21 xquibij c'u chque: “Chrila' ri Ajawaxel ri i banom chke, xukuje' chuc'äjisaj i wäch. Ix ri ix ajchak'mac chi ri ajawinel e rachil ri e u takanelab itzel cujquilo. Kas ix ix yowinak ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j pa u k'ab che ka cämisaxic.”" 
Exodus5:22 Xubij c'ut ri Moises che ri Ajawaxel pa ch'awem: “Ajawaxel, ¿jasche cäban la c'ax che we tinimit ri'? ¿Jasche in takom la ulok?" 
Exodus5:23 Kas aretak xinpe che u tzijobexic ri ajawinel pa ri bi' la', u nimatajisam u banic c'ax che ri tinimit la, are c'u ri lal man c'o ta jas banom la che u to'ic.”" 
Exodus6:1 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Cawil c'u na ri quinban che ri ajawinel, xak xuwi c'ut rumal ri chuk'ab cuya' na chiwe chi quixel bic pa ri rulew; c'o chi c'u na jubik', kas are' cäbin na chiwe chi quixel bic.”" 
Exodus6:2 Xtzijon chi jumul ri Dios ruc' ri Moises, xubij che: “IN RI' RI AJAWAXEL." 
Exodus6:3 Xinc'ut wib chuwäch ri Abraham, ri Isaac, ri Jacob, ruc' ri bi'aj: Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, man xink'alajisaj ta c'u ri kas nu bi' chquiwäch: RI AJAWAXEL." 
Exodus6:4 Xinban xukuje' jun c'ulwächinic cuc', xinya' c'u nu tzij chi quinya' ri ulew re Canaan chque, ri ulew ri xcokxanij wi na quib quieb oxib junab." 
Exodus6:5 Camic c'ut chi wetamam chi cätajin cäquirik c'ax ri aj israelib, chi e cojom pa c'axalaj tak chac cumal ri aj ejiptib, xnataj c'ut ri nu c'ulwächinic chwe." 
Exodus6:6 Rumal ri' jät jabij chque ri aj israelib chi ri in, ri Ajawaxel, quebenwesaj na chuxe' ri u takanic ri ajawinel xukuje' pa ri c'axalaj tak chac ri e cojom che qui banic cumal ri aj ejiptib. Quinc'ut na ri nu cuinem, quebentor na bic cumal nimak tak banoj aj suq'uilal." 
Exodus6:7 Quixinc'am na ix jacha' che nu tinimit, are c'u ri in quinux na i Dios. Jeri' quiwetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri cätajin quixresaj chuxe' ri c'axalaj tak chac ri ix takom che qui banic cumal ri aj ejiptib." 
Exodus6:8 Quixinc'am na bic pa ri ulew ri xinbij chi quinya' che ri Abraham, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob, quinya' c'u na chiwe che iwechbal. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus6:9 Ri Moises xuya' u bixic wa' chque ri aj israelib, ri e are' c'ut man xquicoj taj ri xbix chque rumal ri c'axalaj tak chac ri e cojom wi." 
Exodus6:10 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: 
Exodus6:11 “Jät, jabij che ri ajawinel chi chuya' be chque ri aj israelib chi quebel bic pa Ejipt.”" 
Exodus6:12 Ri Moises xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Mawi ne ri aj israelib cäquinimaj ri quinbij chque, ¿la are ta c'u lo quinunimaj ri ajawinel, xak c'u quinmemetic?”" 
Exodus6:13 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutak ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron rech cäquibij chque ri aj israelib xukuje' che ri ajawinel chi yo'm takanic chque ri rajawaxic u tz'akatisaxic che quesaxic bic ri aj israelib pa Ejipt. 
Exodus6:14 E are tak wa' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri alaxic, ri e rech ri qui tat. Ri e u c'ojol ri Ruben (ri u nabeal ri Israel) e are' wa': ri Hanoc, ri Palu, ri Hezron, ri Carmi. E are wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e rech ri Ruben." 
Exodus6:15 Ri e u c'ojol ri Simeon e are wa': ri Jemuel, ri Jamin, ri Ohad, ri Jaquin, ri Zohar xukuje' ri Saul, ri ral jun aj cananey. E are wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e rech ri Simeon." 
Exodus6:16 Ri Levi xc'asi' jun sient ruc' juwinak wuklajuj (137) junab, e are wa' ri qui bi' ri e u c'ojol, cächapletaj ruc' ri nabeal queq'uis ruc' ri ch'i'p, ri Jerson, ri Coat, ri Merar." 
Exodus6:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson pa ri u cholajil ri nimak qui k'ij, e are ri Libni xukuje' ri Simeiy." 
Exodus6:18 Ri Coat xc'asi' jun sient ruc' juwinak oxlajuj (133) junab, ri e u c'ojol e are ri Amram, ri Izar, ri Hebron, ri Uziel." 
Exodus6:19 Ri e u c'ojol ri Merar e are ri Mali xukuje' ri Musi. E are wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e rech ri Levi cächapletaj ruc' ri nabeal queq'uis ruc' ri ch'i'p. 
Exodus6:20 Ri Amram xc'uli' ruc' ri Jocabed rana'b ri u tat, ri Jocabed xralaj ri Aaron xukuje' ri Moises. Ri Amram xc'asi' jun sient ruc' juwinak wuklajuj (137) junab." 
Exodus6:21 Ri e u c'ojol ri Izar are ri Core, ri Nepeg xukuje' ri Zicr." 
Exodus6:22 Ri e u c'ojol ri Uziel are ri Misael, ri Elzapan xukuje' ri Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 Ri Aaron xc'uli' ruc' ri Elisabet u mia'l ri Aminadab, rana'b ri Naason, ri Elisabet xralaj ri Nadab, ri Abiu, ri Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 Ri e u c'ojol ri Core e are ri Asir, ri Elcan xukuje' ri Abiasap. E are wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri e quech ri aj coretib." 
Exodus6:25 Ri Eleazar jun chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, xc'uli' ruc' jun chque ri u mia'l ri Putiel, ri xralaj ri Pinees. E are' tak wa' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri e aj levitib, pa ri qui cholajil ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Exodus6:26 Kas e are' wa' ri Aaron xukuje' ri Moises ri xubij wi ri Ajawaxel chi quequesaj bic pa Ejipt ri aj israelib, quicholajim quib e jacha' juk'at ajch'ojab." 
Exodus6:27 E are' wa' ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron ri xebin che ri paraon ri ajawinel re Ejipt, chi quequesaj bic ri aj israelib pa Ejipt." 
Exodus6:28 Pa tak ri k'ij aretak ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises pa Ejipt," 
Exodus6:29 xubij che: “In ri' ri Ajawaxel. Chabij ronojel ri quinbij chawe che ri paraon ri ajawinel re Ejipt.” 
Exodus6:30 Ri Moises xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Ajawaxel, eta'm ya' la chi xak cämemat quinch'awic, ¿la quinunimaj ta c'u lo ri ajawinel?”" 
Exodus7:1 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chawilampe', quinya' chawe chi caban nu q'uexwäch ruc' ri paraon ri ajawinel, are c'u ri awachalal Aaron are ri cäch'aw che a q'uexwäch ruc' ri ajawinel." 
Exodus7:2 Ri at cabij che ri Aaron ronojel ri catintak che u banic; are c'u ri Aaron ri awachalal cubij che ri ajawinel chi chuya' chque ri aj israelib chi quebel bic pa Ejipt. 
Exodus7:3 Ri in quinban na che ri ajawinel chi co cutac'aba' rib, quebenban c'u na q'ui tak etal xukuje' jastak ri e mayibal pa Ejipt." 
Exodus7:4 Ri ajawinel man cunimaj taj ri quibij na che c'ä quinban na c'ax che ri Ejipt, che resaxic bic ri nu tinimit Israel." 
Exodus7:5 Aretak c'u nu banom chi c'ax che ri Ejipt, xukuje' e wesam chi bic ri aj israelib, ri e aj ejiptib cäquetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus7:6 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xquiban ronojel ri xetak che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Exodus7:7 Ri Moises jumuch' (80) ri u junab, are c'u ri Aaron jumuch' ruc' oxib (83) ri u junab aretak xech'aw ruc' ri ajawinel." 
Exodus7:8 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Aaron: 
Exodus7:9 “We cubij ri ajawinel chiwe chi quiban jun mayibal, cabij na che ri Aaron chi cuc'am ri u ch'ämiy cuq'uiak cho ri ulew chuwäch ri ajawinel, rech cajalwächitaj pa jun cumätz.”" 
Exodus7:10 Ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xebe che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel, je c'u xquibano jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chque: ri Aaron xuq'uiak ri u ch'ämiy cho ri ulew chuwäch ri ajawinel xukuje' chquiwäch ri e rach k'atal tak tzij, xjalwächitaj c'u ri ch'ämiy pa jun cumätz." 
Exodus7:11 Xtakan c'u ri ajawinel che qui siq'uixic ri e u ch'obonelab xukuje' ri rajk'ijab, xquiban c'u que ri mayibal ruc' ri qui tzibal:" 
Exodus7:12 chquijujunal xquiq'uiak ri qui ch'amiy cho ri ulew, chquijujunal c'ut ri ch'amiy xejalwächitaj pa jujun cumätz. Are c'u ri u ch'ämiy ri Aaron xebubik' ri qui ch'ämiy ri ch'obonelab xukuje' ri qui ch'ämiy ri ajk'ijab." 
Exodus7:13 Pune' c'u jewa', ri ajawinel co xutac'aba' rib man xuya' ta u xiquin chque, jacha' ri xubij ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus7:14 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Ri ajawinel co u tac'abam rib, man cuya' ta be chi quebel bic ri aj israelib." 
Exodus7:15 Chwek ak'ab catbe che rilic, aretak cäkaj bic chuchi' ri nima'. Chaweyej chila', chac'ama' bic ri ch'ämiy ri xjalwächitaj pa cumätz." 
Exodus7:16 Chila' cabij wi che: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj hebrey in u takom ulok che u bixic chech la: Chi catzokopij bic ri nu tinimit rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. Man nimam ta c'u la c'ä camic ri nu bim chech la. 
Exodus7:17 Jewa' u bim ri Ajawaxel: Camic quetamaj na la chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel: Aretak quinjabuj ri nu ch'amiy ri c'o pa nu k'ab puwi' ri nima' Nil, ri ja' caq'uex taj na pa quic'." 
Exodus7:18 Ri cär ri e c'o pa ri nima' Nil quecäm na, cächuwir na ri ja' ri aj ejiptib, cämuluw na qui c'u'x che u tijic ri nima' Nil.’”" 
Exodus7:19 Xutakej u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chabij che ri Aaron chi chuc'ama' ri u ch'ämiy, chuyuku' ri u k'ab paquiwi' tak ri nima', ri qui q'uiyibal tak ja', paquiwi' tak ri cho xukuje' ri e c'o wi tak ja' pa Ejipt: puwi' ronojel ri c'o ja' chupam, rech cäjalwächitaj pa quic'. ¡Jeri' xuwi quic' cäriktaj na pa tak ri c'olbal tak ja' we re che' o re abaj!”" 
Exodus7:20 Ri Moises, ri Aaron xquibano jas ri xetak wi rumal ri Ajawaxel. Ri Aaron xuyac ri u ch'ämiy xupuk'ij ri nima' Nil chuwäch ri ajawinel xukuje' chquiwäch ri e rach k'atal tzij, ronojel c'u ri ja' xjalwächitaj pa quic'." 
Exodus7:21 Xecäm conojel ri cär, sibalaj xchuwir ri nima', man cäquicoch' ta chic ri aj ejiptib cäquitij ri ja'. ¡Xa quic' chic cäriktaj pa ronojel ri Ejipt!" 
Exodus7:22 E are' tak c'ut ri ajk'ijab aj ejiptib junam xquiban rumal ri qui nawinic che qui banic tak itzinic, ri ajawinel co xutacaba' rib man xuya' ta u xiquin che ri xubij ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron, je jas u bim ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus7:23 Ri ajawinel xtzelej chupam ri nimalaj rachoch, man xoc ta il che ri mayibal ri xban chuwäch," 
Exodus7:24 conojel ri aj ejiptib xequic'otola' c'ua' chuchi' tak ri nima' Nil che resaxic sakalaj ja', man cuya' ta c'ut cuq'uiax ri nima'." 
Exodus7:25 Wukub k'ij chic u puk'im ri Ajawaxel ri ja' re ri nima'," 
Exodus8:1 ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Jät che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel ri paraon, chabij che: ‘jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel: Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit Israel rech cäbe na che nu k'ijilaxic." 
Exodus8:2 We man cawaj catzokopij bic ri nu tinimit, ri in quinc'äjisaj na u wäch ronojel ri awulew che xtutz'." 
Exodus8:3 Ri nima' Nil quebupok'isaj na xtutz', quepaki' c'u ulok queboc na chupam ri nimalaj awachoch, chupam ri a warbal, puwi' ri a ch'at, pa tak ri cachoch ri e awach k'atal tzij, xukuje' pa tak ri cachoch ri e a winakil, pa tak ri a jorno, pa tak ri jucub ri cäyok' wi ri u k'oril ri a caxlanwa." 
Exodus8:4 Ri xtutz' quepaki' na chawij, chquij ri awinakil, xukuje' chquij ri e awach k'atal tak tzij.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chabij che ri Aaron chi chuc'ama' ri u ch'ämiy chuyaca' paquiwi' tak ri nima', paquiwi' ri qui q'uiyibal tak ja', xukuje' paquiwi' tak ri cho, rech chila' quebel wi ulok xtutz' ri quenojisan ronojel ri ulew Ejipt.”" 
Exodus8:6 Ri Aaron xuyac ri u ch'ämiy paquiwi' tak ri ja' ri e c'o pa Ejipt, xnoj c'u ronojel ri ulew cumal ri xtutz' ri xebel ulok pa tak ri ja'." 
Exodus8:7 Xukuje' c'u ne ri ajk'ijab junam xquiban rumal ri qui nawinic che qui banic tak itzinic, xequic'am ulok xtutz' puwi' ri rulewal ri Ejipt." 
Exodus8:8 Ri ajawinel xtakan che u siq'uixic ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque: “Chi tz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel chi queresaj ri xtutz' chwij xukuje' chquij ri e nu winakil, quebentzokopij c'u bic ri awinakil rech quebe che u ya'ic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus8:9 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Bij ba' la chwe jampa' caj la quintz'onoj tok'ob pawi' la, paquiwi' ri ach tak k'atal tzij la xukuje' paquiwi' ri e winakil la rech quebel ri xtutz' che la xukuje' pa ri nimalaj achoch la, xuwi c'u quecanaj canok chupam ri nima'.”" 
Exodus8:10 “Kas chwek,” xcha' ri ajawinel. Ri Moises xubij che: “Je ba' cäbantajic jas ri bim la, rech quetamaj la chi man c'o ta chi jun ri junam ta ruc' ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios." 
Exodus8:11 Quebel na bic ri xtutz' chupam ri nimalaj achoch la xuwi quecanaj canok chupam ri nima', man cäquiya' ta chi latz' che la, mawi chque tak ri e ach tak k'atal tzij la, mawi chque ri e winakil la.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ri Moises rachil ri Aaron xebel ulok chupam ri nimalaj rachoch ri ajawinel. Ri Moises xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel xubij che chi cheresaj ri xtutz' ri e u takom ulok chrij ri ajawinel. 
Exodus8:13 Ri Ajawaxel xuban ri xubij ri Moises che, xecäm ri xtutz' ri e c'o pa tak ri ja, ri e c'o cho tak ri ja, xukuje' ri e c'o pa ronojel c'olbal." 
Exodus8:14 Ri winak xequimulij ri cäminak tak xtutz' pa tak mulaj, sibalaj c'u xchuwir ronojel ri ulew Ejipt cumal ri xtutz'." 
Exodus8:15 Xuwi c'u xril ri ajawinel chi xel pa ri latz' ri c'o wi, co xutac'aba' rib, man xuya' ta u xiquin che ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, jacha' ri u bim ulok ri Ajawaxel chque." 
Exodus8:16 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chabij che ri Aaron chi chuch'aya' ri ulew ruc' ri u ch'ämiy, rech quepe u's pa ronojel ri ulew Ejipt.”" 
Exodus8:17 Je c'u xquibano. Ri Aaron xuyuk ri u k'ab xuch'ay c'u ri u puc'uq'uil ri ulew ri c'o cho ri ulew, ronojel c'u ri puc'uc' ulew re ri Ejipt xebux pa alaj tak u's ri quequixet', tak ri winak xukuje' tak ri awaj." 
Exodus8:18 Ri ajk'ijab xukuje' xquitij qui k'ij che qui q'uiyisaxic alaj tak u's rumal ri qui nawinic che qui banic tak itzinic, man c'u xecuin taj. Ri alaj tak u's qui takem qui xet'ic tak ri winak xukuje' tak ri awaj." 
Exodus8:19 Xquibij c'u ri ajk'ijab che ri ajawinel: We jasach ri' rumal ri Dios wa'. Are c'u ri ajawinel co xutacaba' rib, man xuya' ta c'u u xiquin chque, jacha' ri u bim ulok ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus8:20 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Ri ajawinel ak'ab cäbe chuchi' ri nima', rumal ri' chatwalij ak'ab, catbe che u bixic che: ‘Jewa' u bim ri Ajawaxel: Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic." 
Exodus8:21 We c'u man catzokopij bic, quebentak na ulok amalo pawi', paquiwi' ri e awach k'atal tak tzij, paquiwi' ri e a winakil, xukuje' paquiwi' tak ri awachoch. Ri cachoch ri aj ejiptib quenoj na chque amalo xukuje' quec'oji' na cho tak ri ulew." 
Exodus8:22 Aretak c'u quepe ri amalo, man queboc ta pa ri ulew Gosen ri jekel wi ri nu tinimit. Mawi c'u jun amalo copan na chila'. Jeri' cawetamaj na chi in, ri Ajawaxel, in c'o chupam we ulew ri'." 
Exodus8:23 Cawil c'u na chi man je ta quinban che ri nu tinimit jacha' ri quinban che ri a tinimit. Chwek c'ut quepe ri amalo.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Je c'u xuban ri Ajawaxel, xpe c'u jumulaj tzätzalaj amalo, ri xquibalij quib chupam ri nimalaj rachoch ri ajawinel, ri cachoch ri e rach k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' puwi' ronojel ri ulew re Ejipt. Ri amalo xquetzelaj ronojel ri ulew re Ejipt." 
Exodus8:25 Ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uix ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xubij chque: “Jix ba', jiya' ri tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri i Dios, man quixel ta c'u bic pa we ulew ri'.”" 
Exodus8:26 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Man ya'tal taj chi je cäkaban wa', u mac rech chi ri aj ejiptib cäquibij chi awas quicämisaxic we awaj ri' ri quekaya' che tabal tok'ob. We cujquil ri aj ejiptib chi quekapil ri awaj ri quequik'ijilaj ri e are', cujquicämisaj ri' che abaj." 
Exodus8:27 Rajawaxic cujbe na pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, oxib k'ij cujbin na c'äte ri' cäkaya' ri tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm chke.”" 
Exodus8:28 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel: “Jix, cuya' quixbe che u ya'ic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, mixbe c'u sibalaj naj. Xukuje' chi tz'onoj tok'ob che ri Dios panuwi'.”" 
Exodus8:29 Xubij ri Moises che ri ajawinel: “Xuwi quinel bic chwäch la, quinta' tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel chi chwek man cäquiban ta chi c'ax ri amalo chech la, chque ri e ach k'atal tak tzij la xukuje' chque ri winakil la, we man cätakej la ka subic mawi qui k'ilic ri aj israelib rech quebe che u ya'ic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus8:30 Xuwi c'u xel bic ri Moises chupam ri nimalaj rachoch ri ajawinel, xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel," 
Exodus8:31 ri Ajawaxel je xubano jas ri tok'ob ri xutz'onoj ri Moises che: ri amalo man xquiban ta chi c'ax che ri ajawinel, chque ri e rach k'atal tzij xukuje' chque ri u winakil." 
Exodus8:32 Are c'u ri ajawinel co xutac'aba' rib, man xraj ta chic xebe ta ri aj israelib." 
Exodus9:1 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Jät che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel ri paraon, chabij che: ‘Jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj hebreyib: —Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic." 
Exodus9:2 We c'u man catzokopij bic xane' catakej u k'atixic," 
Exodus9:3 ri Ajawaxel cutak na ulok jun c'äjisabal wächaj paquiwi' ri awawaj ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub, cäpe na jun nimalaj yabil paquiwi'. Quecäm na ri quiej, ri bur, ri camey, ri wacax xukuje' ri chij." 
Exodus9:4 Man junam ta c'ut cuban na ri Ajawaxel chque ri cawaj ri aj israelib cuc' ri cawaj ri aj ejiptib, rech man c'o ta jun cawaj ri aj israelib cäcämic.’ ”" 
Exodus9:5 Ri Ajawaxel xuch'ic jun k'ijol, xubij: “Chwek quinban ri nu bim.”" 
Exodus9:6 Chucab k'ij xuban ri Ajawaxel ri xubij. Xecäm c'u conojel ri cawaj ri aj ejiptib, are c'u ri cawaj ri aj israelib mawi ta ne jun xcäm chque." 
Exodus9:7 Xtakan c'u ri ajawinel che quilic ri cawaj ri aj israelib, mawi c'u jun awaj xcämic. Co chic xutac'aba' chi rib, man xebutzokopij ta chi bic ri aj israelib." 
Exodus9:8 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron: “Chebic'ama' jutak muk' chaj pa jun jorno, cujopij c'u na ri Moises pa ri quiakik' chuwäch ri ajawinel." 
Exodus9:9 Ri chaj cäjabun na pa ronojel Ejipt, quebuq'uiyisaj ch'a'c chquij ri winak xukuje' chquij ri awaj pa ronojel Ejipt.”" 
Exodus9:10 Ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xquic'am ri chaj pa jun jorno, xeboc chuwäch ri ajawinel. Chila' c'u xujopij wi ri Moises ri chaj pa ri quiakik', xepe c'u ch'a'c chquij ri winak xukuje' chquij ri awaj." 
Exodus9:11 Ri ajk'ijab man xecuin taj xquik'atij u wäch ri Moises, rumal rech chi ri e are' xukuje' conojel ri aj ejiptib e nojinak che ch'a'c." 
Exodus9:12 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi ri ajawinel co xutac'aba' rib man xuya' ta c'u u xiquin che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Aaron, je jacha' ri u bim ulok ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus9:13 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Ak'ab chatwalij chwek catbe c'u che u bixic che ri ajawinel: ‘Jewa' u bim ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj hebrey: —Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic; 
Exodus9:14 che chi c'u we camic quintak ulok ronojel ri c'äjisabal wächaj pawi', paquiwi' ri awach k'atal tak tzij, puwi' ri a tinimit, rech cawetamaj chi man c'o ta chi jun jacha' ri in cho ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Exodus9:15 In in cuininak ta ri' che u c'utic ri nu cuinem chawäch ruc' jun yabil ri cämisanel, ri at xukuje' ri a tinimit sachtajinak ta chi i wäch ri' cho ri uwächulew;" 
Exodus9:16 c'ä at nu c'asbam c'ut rech cäwil ri nu cuinem xukuje' rech quinc'ut wib cho ronojel ri uwächulew. 
Exodus9:17 Pune' c'u jewa', ri at a takem u k'atixic ri nu tinimit man caya' ta c'u che chi cabec." 
Exodus9:18 ¡Je' tak ba wa'! Chwek quinban na chi cäkaj jun nimalaj sakbach, ri mawi jumul je ta kajinak wa' pa Ejipt." 
Exodus9:19 Rumal c'u ri' chaya' takanic chi chec'ol ri awawaj chupam jun utzalaj cäbal xukuje' ronojel ri awech ri c'o pa ri juyub, ronojel c'u winak o awaj ri man c'olotal taj cäcäm na.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 E c'o c'u jujun aj ejiptib ri xquixe'j quib chuwäch ri xubij ri Ajawaxel, xequicoj ri cajchaquib xukuje' ri cawaj pa tak cäbal;" 
Exodus9:21 e c'o c'u jujun ri man xeboc ta il che ri xbix chque, xequiya' can ri cajchaquib xukuje' ri cawaj pa ri juyub man c'o ta qui cäbal." 
Exodus9:22 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chayaca' ri a k'ab chicaj rech cäkaj sakbach puwi' ronojel ri ulew pa Ejipt, paquiwi' ri winak, paquiwi' ri awaj xukuje' puwi' ronojel k'ayes ri c'o pa tak ri juyub pa Ejipt.”" 
Exodus9:23 Ri Moises xuyac' ri u ch'ämiy chicaj, ri Ajawaxel xutak ulok cakulja, xnicow ri k'ak' xakaj cho ri ulew. Xukasaj c'u sakbach puwi' ronojel ri Ejipt," 
Exodus9:24 ri sakbach xukuje' ri k'ak' man xetani ta jubik'. Mawi jumul kajinak ta jun nimalaj sakbach jewa' pa Ejipt. 
Exodus9:25 Ri sakbach xuc'äjij ronojel ri c'o cho ri ulew pa Ejipt: xebucämisaj winak xukuje' awaj, xusach qui wäch conojel ri tico'n pa tak ri juyub, xejak'ajob conojel tak ri che' pa ronojel Ejipt." 
Exodus9:26 Pa ronojel c'u ri ulew Gosen ri e c'o wi ri aj israelib, mawi jun sakbach xkajic." 
Exodus9:27 Ri ajawinel xusiq'uij ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron, xubij chque: “Quinch'obo chi in macuninak. In wa' in ajchak'mac xukuje' ri nu tinimit, man are ta ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus9:28 Sibalaj cakulja xukuje' sakbach ka coch'om chic, rumal ri' man quintakej ta chic i k'ilic. Chitz'onoj ba' tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel pakawi', quixintzokopij c'u bic.”" 
Exodus9:29 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Xak xuwi quinel bic pa ri tinimit, quebenyac' ri nu k'ab chicaj, quintz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel. Cätani' c'u ri cakulja, man cäkaj ta chic ri sakbach, rech quetamaj la chi ri Ajawaxel are ajchak'e ri uwächulew." 
Exodus9:30 Kas c'u ne weta'm chi ri lal mawi ri e ach tak k'atal tzij la c'ä c'o ta ri cäquixe'j ta wi quib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.” 
Exodus9:31 Ri lino xukuje' ri sebad xsach qui wäch, ri sebad petinak chic u jolom, are c'u ri lino c'äte cätajin cäcotz'ijanic." 
Exodus9:32 Are c'u ri trico xukuje' ri senten man xsach ta qui wäch, matam c'ut quewächinic." 
Exodus9:33 Xel c'u ulok ri Moises chuwäch ri ajawinel, aretak xopan tza'm ja, xebuyac' ri u k'ab chicaj xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel. Chanim c'ut xtani' ri jäb xukuje' ri sakbach, mawi xetataj chic ri cakulja." 
Exodus9:34 Xuwi c'u xril ri ajawinel chi xtani' ri jäb, ri sakbach xukuje' ri cakulja xmacun chic. Man xuwi ta c'ut ri are' co xutac'aba' rib xane' xukuje' ri e rach k'atal tak tzij." 
Exodus9:35 Ri ajawinel co xutacaba' rib, man xebutzokopij ta bic ri aj israelib, jas ri u bim ulok ri Ajawaxel nabe rumal ri Moises." 
Exodus10:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Jät, jach'abej ri ajawinel ri paraon, nu banom chi c'u che ri are' xukuje' ri e rach k'atal tak tzij chi co caquitac'aba' quib, rech quebenc'ut ri nimak tak mayibal chquiwäch ri quincuin che qui banic," 
Exodus10:2 rech xukuje' ri at catzijoj chque ri a c'ojol, ri e u wi' tak a mam ri xinban che retz'bexic qui wäch ri aj ejiptib, xukuje' ri nimak tak mayibal ri xinban chquixo'l. Jeri' quiwetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus10:3 Ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xebe che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel, xquibij c'u che: “jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj hebreyib: ‘¿C'ä jampa' ri camach' ta na awib chnuwäch? Chatzokopij bic ri nu tinimit rech cäbe che nu k'ijilaxic;" 
Exodus10:4 we c'u catakej qui k'atixic ri nu tinimit, chwek quebentak ulok sac' puwi' ri awulew," 
Exodus10:5 cäquich'uk u wäch ri ulew, mawi c'u cäk'alajin chic ri ulew. Cäquiq'uis na u tijic ri man xsach ta u wäch rumal ri sakbach, xukuje' quequikul na conojel tak ri che' ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub." 
Exodus10:6 Cäquibalij na quib pa ri nimalaj awachoch xukuje' pa ri cachoch conojel ri awach k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' pa ri cachoch conojel ri e aj ejiptib. ¡Ri cätajin cäc'ulmataj camic mawi jumul xquil ri e a tat mawi tak ri e a mam ri kas pa tak ri qui k'ijol c'ä pa tak ri kech uj!’ ” Xuwi xq'uis u bixic wa' rumal ri Moises, xel ulok pa ri nimalaj rachoch ri ajawinel." 
Exodus10:7 Ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri ajawinel je xquibij wa': “¿C'ä jampa' lo cutanaba' u banic c'ax we achi ri' chke? Chetzokopij la bic we winak ri' rech quebe che u k'ijilaxic ri qui Dios, ri Ajawaxel. ¿La c'ä maja' puch quetamaj la chi sachinak chi u wäch ri Ejipt?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ri ajawinel xusiq'uij chi jumul ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xubij c'u chque: “Jix che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios. Nabe c'ut chabij chwe jachin tak ri quebec.” 
Exodus10:9 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Quebe na junam kuc' ri kalc'ual xukuje' ri e ka ri'jab, ri e ka c'ojol xukuje' tak ri e ka mia'l, quekac'am bic na ri ka chij, ri e ka wacax, jun nimalaj nimak'ij wa' chke chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus10:10 Ri ajawinel xubij chque: “sibalaj k'alaj ri itzel i chomanic. ¿La are pa i c'u'x chi quixrachilaj bic ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' chi quixintzokopij ta bic ri ix xukuje' ri e iwalc'ual?" 
Exodus10:11 Man je ta wa' ri quebanok. Jix xuwi ri ix ri ix achijab ri tz'akat chic i junab che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel, are c'u wa' ri quiwaj.” Xtakan c'u ri ajawinel che quesaxic bic chuwäch." 
Exodus10:12 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: Chayaca' ri a k'ab puwi' ri Ejipt rech quepe ri sac', cäquiq'uis c'u qui kulic conojel ri tico'n xukuje' ronojel ri to'tajinak can rumal ri sakbach." 
Exodus10:13 Ri Moises xuyac ri u ch'ämiy puwi' ri Ejipt, ri Ajawaxel xutak ulok jun quiakik' pa elebal k'ij, ronojel ri jun k'ij ronojel ri jun ak'ab xuban ri quiakik'. Aretak xsakaric ri quiakik' ri cäpe pa elebal k'ij e u c'amom chi ulok ri sac'," 
Exodus10:14 ri xquinojisaj ronojel ri ulew. Mawi jumul e c'olinak, mawi quec'oji' ta chi na, e q'uia sac' jacha' xec'oji' pa ri k'ij ri'," 
Exodus10:15 xquich'uk c'u u wäch ronojel ri ulew, man cäk'alajin ta chic ri ulew ri cätac'alexic, xequitij ronojel ri tico'n, ronojel ri qui wächinic ri che' ri xeto'taj can rumal ri sakbach. Man c'o ta jun räx k'ayes xcanaj can pa jun c'olbal pa ronojel ri Ejipt: mawi cho ri ulew, mawi paquiwi' tak ri che'." 
Exodus10:16 Ri ajawinel aninak xutak u siq'uixic ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij chque: “In macuninak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios xukuje' chiwäch ix," 
Exodus10:17 quinta' tok'ob chiwe chi xuwi' chi we jumul ri' quisach nu mac, chitz'onoj ba' ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios panuwi' xuwi ta ne cäresaj we c'äjisabal wächaj re cämical panuwi'.”" 
Exodus10:18 Xuwi c'u xel ulok ri Moises pa ri nimalaj rachoch ri ajawinel, xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus10:19 Ri Ajawaxel xuq'uex ri u be ri quiakik', xbe c'u ri quiakik' pa ri u kajebal k'ij, xebuc'am c'u bic ri sac' xebuq'uiak pa ri Quiäk Plo. Mawi jun sac' xcanaj can pa ronojel ri Ejipt," 
Exodus10:20 ri Ajawaxel xuban che ri ajawinel chi co xutac'aba' rib, man xraj ta chic xebe ri aj israelib." 
Exodus10:21 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chayaca' ri a k'ab chicaj rech cäpe jun nimalaj k'eku'm puwi' ronojel ri Ejipt, ri sibalaj tzatz na ri cuya' ne canakic.”" 
Exodus10:22 Ri Moises xuyac ri u k'ab chicaj, xpe c'u jun nimalaj k'eku'm puwi' ronojel ri Ejipt" 
Exodus10:23 ri mawi jun xcuin ta che u ca'yexic ri u c'ulja pa oxib k'ij, mawi xslab ta pa ri u c'olbal. Pa conojel c'u ne ri cachoch ri aj israelib c'o sakilal." 
Exodus10:24 Ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Moises, xubij che; “Jix che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel, chebic'ama' bic ri iwalc'ual, chebiya' c'u can ri i chij xukuje' tak ri i wacax.”" 
Exodus10:25 Ri Moises xubij che: “Man je ta wa' cäbanic, xane' xukuje' ri lal quebe ya' na la bic ri awaj ri quebekaya' che tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri quekaporoj che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios." 
Exodus10:26 Xukuje' ri kawaj quebe na kuc'. Mawi jun awaj cäcanaj canok, quekacha' c'u na jujun chquixo'l ri quekaya' che u ya'ic k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel. Cujopan c'u na chila' c'äte ri' caketamaj jachique ri quebajwataj chke che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus10:27 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xubano chi ri ajawinel paraon co xutac'aba' rib. Man xraj taj xebe ri aj israelib. 
Exodus10:28 Xubij chi c'ut ri ajawinel che ri Moises: “Chatel bic waral, kas chawila' awib, matpe chi jumul chnuwäch, apachique c'u k'ij ri catpe chi jumul chnuwäch, catcäm na.”" 
Exodus10:29 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Utz ri bim la. Man quinpe ta chic che ch'abexic la.” 
Exodus11:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Quinya' chi na jun c'äjisabal wächaj puwi' ri ajawinel ri paraon xukuje' paquiwi' ri aj ejiptib. Aretak chbantaj wa', ri ajawinel man xuwi ta cuya' be chiwe chi quixel bic, xane' kas are' quixesan na bic waral." 
Exodus11:2 Chabij ba' chque ri aj israelib, chi achijab chi ixokib, chi chbe qui tz'onoj jastak re sak puak xukuje' re k'an puak, chque tak ri qui c'ulja chi achijab chi ixokib.”" 
Exodus11:3 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi xch'uch'ujir ri canima' ri aj ejiptib cuc' ri aj israelib. Xukuje' c'u ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri ajawinel sibalaj nim chic u k'ij ri Moises chquiwäch, xukuje' chquiwäch conojel ri aj ejiptib." 
Exodus11:4 Ri Moises xubij che ri ajawinel: “Jewa' u bim ri Ajawaxel: ‘Pa niq'uiaj ak'ab quinoc'ow pa ronojel ri Ejipt. 
Exodus11:5 Cäcäm c'u na ri nabeal c'ojolaxel ri c'o pa jujun tak cachoch ri aj ejiptib, are c'u jun ri u nabeal ri ajawinel ri cät'uyi puwi' ri u tem re ajawibal xukuje' ne ri nabeal ral ri ixok pataninel lok'om ri caquienic. Xukuje' quecäm na conojel ri nabe tak cal ri awaj." 
Exodus11:6 Cätataj na jun nimalaj rakoj chi'aj pa ronojel Ejipt, ri mawi jumul c'ulmatajinak mawi jumul cäc'ulmataj ta chi na.’" 
Exodus11:7 Rech quiwetamaj chi ri Ajawaxel man je ta cuban chque ri aj israelib jacha' ri cuban chque ri aj ejiptib, ri mawi ne jun tz'i' cäwawat ta che jun winak o che jun cawaj ri Israel." 
Exodus11:8 C'äte' c'u ri' quebe na ri e awach k'atal tak tzij che wilic, e xucuxuj caquibij na chwe: ‘Jix, at xukuje' conojel ri winak ri queteri bic chawij.’ C'ä mäjok c'u chban wa' man quinel ta na bic.” Sibalaj xoyowar ri Moises, xel bic chuwäch ri ajawinel." 
Exodus11:9 Xubij chi c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Mawi ne camic cunimaj ri ajawinel ri quibij che rech jeri' queq'uiyir ri nu mayibal ri quinban na pa Ejipt.” 
Exodus11:10 Ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xequiban conojel we mayibal ri' chuwäch ri ajawinel, are c'u ri Ajawaxel xucowirisaj ri ranima' ri ajawinel, man xuya' ta chque ri aj israelib chi quebel bic pa Ejipt." 
Exodus12:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises pa Ejipt, rachilam ri Aaron, xubij chque:" 
Exodus12:2 “We ic' ri' are jun ic' ri nim u banic chiwäch, are wa' ri nabe ic' chaplebal re ri junab." 
Exodus12:3 Chibij chque conojel ri aj israelib ri quinbij chiwe: ‘Pa ri lajuj rajilabal we ic' ri' chijujunal chic'ama' jun alaj ama' chij o jun alaj ama' q'uisic', jun che jujun ja winak." 
Exodus12:4 We c'u ne c'o jun ja winak ri xa e quieb oxib pa ri cachoch ri man quecuin ta che u q'uisic ronojel ri awaj, ri ajchak'e ja ruc' ri u c'ulja ri c'o nakaj che, junam cäquitij na, chujacha' chquiwäch joropa' ri e c'olic xukuje' joropa' ri quecuin che u tijic chquijujunal." 
Exodus12:5 Ri awaj rajawaxic chi c'o chic jun u junab, ama' xukuje' man c'o ta u yab, we alaj chij o alaj q'uisic'." 
Exodus12:6 Quichajij c'u na c'ä pa ri ucajlajuj (14) rajilabal we ic' ri', pa we k'ij ri' conojel ri aj israelib chquijujunal cäquipil ri awaj pa ri benabal k'ij." 
Exodus12:7 Cäquic'amaxtaj c'ut ri u quiq'uel ri awaj, cäquibil chque tak ri apal re ri uchi'ja ri cäquitij wi ri awaj." 
Exodus12:8 Pa ri ak'ab ri' cäquitij na ti'j ri cäsa' cho k'ak' rachilam c'ayilaj tak ichaj xukuje' caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'. 
Exodus12:9 C'o jun ch'akap ti'j mitij pa räxal mawi rokowisam. Ronojel ri awaj, ri u jolom, ri e rakan, xukuje' tak ri rixco'l xa quesa' cho k'ak';" 
Exodus12:10 c'o mäquito' can che re ri ucab k'ij. We c'o cäto'taj canok, rajawaxic cäporoxic." 
Exodus12:11 Qui cojom chic ri catz'iak, ri qui xajäb, xukuje' cuc'am chic ri qui ch'ämiy pa qui k'ab, tijoj rib ri awaj cäquibano rumal rech chi are ri Roc'owem ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus12:12 Pa ri ak'ab ri' quinoc'ow na pa ronojel ri Ejipt, quebencämisaj na ri qui nabeal ri aj ejiptib ri e c'o pa tak ri cachoch, xukuje' ri e qui nabeal ri awaj, quinban na ri takal u banic chque conojel ri diosib re Ejipt. In ri Ajawaxel, ri nu yo'm u bixic." 
Exodus12:13 Ri quic' are cäc'utuw tak ri ja ri ix c'o wi. Jeri', aretak chebensoco' ri aj ejiptib ruc' cämical, man c'o ta jun chiwe quecämok quinwil c'u na ri quic' xak c'u quinoc'owic." 
Exodus12:14 Are jun k'ij wa' ri takal u nataxic iwumal, quiban jun nimalaj nimak'ij che roc'owisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Pixab wa' ri cäcanaj chiwe amak'el, ri quecoc'owisaj ri e tat nan xukuje' ri alc'ualaxelab." 
Exodus12:15 Wukub k'ij quitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'; rumal ri' kas pa ri nabe k'ij man cuya' taj cac'oji' ch'am pa tak ri iwachoch. Apachin ta ne ri cutij caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc' pa ronojel ri wukub k'ij, quesax ri u bi' chquixo'l ri aj israelib." 
Exodus12:16 Ri nabe k'ij jacha' xukuje' ri uwuk rajawaxic quebicoj che jun tastalic mulin ib. Pa tak ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta chac cabanic, we man xuwi ri u suc'umaxic ri wa ri cutij ri winak." 
Exodus12:17 Ri nimak'ij que ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc' are jun k'ij ri qui nimak'ijaj na rumal rech chi kas pa ri k'ij ri' xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt chnimalaj iwonojel. Quinimak'ijaj na jacha' jun pixab ri cäjeki' canok ri quecoc'owisaj ri e tat nan xukuje' ri alc'ualaxelab. 
Exodus12:18 Quebitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc' kas pa ri u benabal k'ij rech ri u ucajlajuj (14) rajilabal ri nabe ic', c'ä pa ri u benabal k'ij rech ri juwinak jun (21) rajilabal ri junam ic' ri'." 
Exodus12:19 Wukub k'ij mäc'oji' ch'am pa tak ri iwachoch, apachin ta ne ri cutij caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc' quesax na ri u bi' chquixo'l ri aj israelib, we i winakil, we man winakil taj." 
Exodus12:20 Mitij jun jasach ri yo'm ch'am ruc'. Apawije' ta ne ri ix c'o wi, quitij na ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'.’ ”" 
Exodus12:21 Ri Moises xutak qui siq'uixic conojel ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib, xubij chque: “Jix je i c'ama' ulok jun alaj ama' chij o jun alaj ama' q'uisic', jujun che jujun ja winak, chipila' che roc'owisaxic ri Oc'owem." 
Exodus12:22 Chiya' ri quic' pa jun tzima; chic'ama' c'u joyataj u k'ab k'ayes mesbal quirub pa ri quic', chibila' che ronojel ri apal rech ri uchi'ja ri ix c'o wi. Man c'o ta jun chiwe quel ta bic chupam ri rachoch c'ä cäsakar na." 
Exodus12:23 Aretak ri Ajawaxel coc'ow che qui cämisaxic ri aj ejiptib, cäril na ri quic' ri bilom chuchi' ri ja ri ix c'o wi, xak coc'ow bic chuwäch ri ja ri'. Jeri' ri Ajawaxel man cuya' ta be che ri cämisanel chi coc pa tak ri ja." 
Exodus12:24 Ri ix quinimaj na we takanic ri' xukuje' ri e u wi' tak i mam ri quepe na, jacha' jun pixab wa' re chbe k'ij sak chiwe." 
Exodus12:25 Aretak ix oquinak chic pa ri ulew ri cuya' na ri Ajawaxel chiwe, jas ri bim, quitakej na roc'owisaxic we nimak'ij ri'." 
Exodus12:26 Aretak c'u cäc'ot i chi' cumal ri iwalc'ual: ‘¿Jas quel cubij wa' we nimak'ij ri'?,’" 
Exodus12:27 Are wa' ri quitzelej na u bixic: ‘Cäpil we awaj ri' pa ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Aretak xebucämisaj ri aj ejiptib, xak c'u xoc'ow chuwäch tak ri cachoch ri aj israelib ri e c'o pa Ejipt, je xuban wa' che quito'ic ri kachalaxic ri xec'oji' pa Ejipt.’ ” Ri aj israelib xquimej quib, xek'ijilanic," 
Exodus12:28 xebe c'u che u banic ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron. 
Exodus12:29 Niq'uiaj ak'ab ri Ajawaxel xebucämisaj ri e nabeal tak c'ojolaxelab ri e aj ejiptib, are jun ri u nabeal ri ajawinel ri cät'uyi puwi' ri tem re ajawibal xukuje' ri u nabeal ri c'o pa che', xukuje' ri e qui nabeal tak ri awaj." 
Exodus12:30 Ri ajawinel e rachil, ri e rach k'atal tak tzij xukuje' conojel ri aj ejiptib, xewalij pa ri ak'ab ri' xban c'u jun nimalaj rakoj chi'aj pa Ejipt. Man c'o ta jun ja ri ma ta xc'ulmataj wi jun cämical." 
Exodus12:31 Kas pa ri ak'ab ri' ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque: “Jix, chiya' can ri nu winak, ri ix xukuje' ri aj israelib. Jix che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel jacha' ri i bim." 
Exodus12:32 Chebic'ama' bic ri e i chij, ri e i wacax, jas ri xiwaj, jix c'ut. Chitz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel panuwi'.”" 
Exodus12:33 Ri aj ejiptib xequicowij ri aj israelib rech quebel bic chanim pa ri culew, are c'u pa qui c'u'x chi conojel quecäm na." 
Exodus12:34 Ri aj israelib xquic'am bic ri qui k'or ri c'ä maja cäch'amaric, rachilam ri jucub xquipis pa tak atz'iak, xequiya' bic puwi' tak qui teleb." 
Exodus12:35 Xquinimaj c'u ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises chque, xequitz'onoj bic chque ri aj ejiptib jastak re k'an puak, re sak puak xukuje' atz'iak." 
Exodus12:36 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi ri aj ejiptib xquiya' ruc' qui rayibal ronojel ri xquitz'onoj bic ri aj israelib chque, jewa' xquiban ri aj israelib che resaxic ri jastak quech ri aj ejiptib." 
Exodus12:37 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses xebopan pa Sucot, craj e c'o wakib sient mil (600,000) ri e achijab chic, man xebajilax taj ri ixokib xukuje' ri ac'alab." 
Exodus12:38 Q'ui qui wäch winak xeteri bic chquij, e q'ui ri qui chij xukuje' qui wacax ri xequic'am bic." 
Exodus12:39 Man xbantaj ta c'u u banic bic ri qui wa cumal, rumal rech chi ri aj ejiptib xequesaj ulok chupam ri culew, xequiban caxlanwa ri man e ch'amarisam taj ruc' ri k'or ri xquesaj ulok pa Ejipt, ri man ch'amarisam taj." 
Exodus12:40 Quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab xec'oji' ri aj israelib pa Ejipt," 
Exodus12:41 kas c'u pa ri k'ij aretak xtz'akat ri quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab, conojel ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel xebel ulok pa ri rulew ri Ejipt." 
Exodus12:42 Pa ri chak'ab ri' ri Ajawaxel xerilij che quesaxic ulok pa Ejipt. Are' chak'ab wa' aj Ajawaxel, ri chak'ab ri che u ya'ic u k'ij, ri aj israelib rajawaxic quequilij, chi ija'lil chi ija'lil." 
Exodus12:43 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron: “Are wa' ri pixab che ri Oc'owem: Mawi jun winak ri man i winakil taj ya'talic cutij ta re ri awaj ri cäpilic," 
Exodus12:44 are c'u ri pataninel ri puak lok'obem rech cuya' cutij re ri awaj, we cojom retal re kopinic ruc' ch'ich' che ri u tz'umal ri achi wi." 
Exodus12:45 Ri man i winakil taj ri xa rokxanim rib, o ri ajchac ri tojom ruc' puak, man ya'tal ta che chi cutij re ri awaj," 
Exodus12:46 xa c'u pa jun ja cätij wi. Man c'o ta jun ch'akap ti'j quesax ta bic pa ri ja ri', mawi quek'ajisax tak ri e u bakil." 
Exodus12:47 Are ja wa' cäquiban conojel ri aj israelib. 
Exodus12:48 We c'u ne c'o jun winak ri man i winakil taj ri c'o chixo'l ri craj cäroc'owisaj ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, Rajawaxic nabe cäcoj retal re kopinic ruc' ch'ich' ri e c'o pa ri rachoch, c'äte c'u ri' cuya' cäroc'owisaj ri Oc'owem: cux c'u junam cuc' ri e alam pa Israel. Mawi c'u jun achi ma ta cojom retal re kopinic ruc' ch'ich' ya'tal ta che cutij re ri awaj." 
Exodus12:49 Are pixab wa' ri cäcoj chque ri aj israelib xukuje' chque ri winak ri man i winakil taj ri e c'o chixo'l.” 
Exodus12:50 Ri aj israelib xquiban ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron. 
Exodus12:51 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel xeresaj ulok pa Ejipt ri aj israelib pa tak amak'. 
Exodus13:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Exodus13:2 “Chebijacha' conojel ri nabeal tak alabom chwe, rumal rech chi conojel ri alabom ri qui nabeal ri aj israelib e wech xukuje' conojel ri nabe tak cal ri cawaj.”" 
Exodus13:3 Ri Moises xubij chque ri aj israelib: “Mäsach we k'ij ri' pa i jolom, aretak ruc' nimalaj cuinem xixresaj ulok ri Ajawaxel pa Ejipt ri xixc'oji' wi na jacha' pataninelab lok'om. Mitij caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc'." 
Exodus13:4 Ri ix quixel bic pa we k'ij ri' pa ri ic' re Abib," 
Exodus13:5 chupam c'u we ic' ri' rajawaxic coc'owisax ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, aretak ix u cojom chic ri Ajawaxel pa ri ulew ri cabelel wi ri leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja', are wa' ri culew ri aj cananeyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj amoreyib, ri aj hebeyib, ri aj jebuseyib, ri xuchi'j chque ri e i mam chi cuya' chiwe." 
Exodus13:6 Wukub k'ij quitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc', pa ri uwuk k'ij quiban na nimak'ij che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus13:7 Pa ronojel ri wukub k'ij quetij na caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc', mawi märiktaj ch'am pa jun tinimit aj Israel o caxlanwa ri yo'm ta ch'am ruc'." 
Exodus13:8 Pa we k'ij ri' quibij chque ri e iwalc'ual: ‘Quekaban we jastak ri' che u nataxic ri xuban ri Ajawaxel che kesaxic ulok pa Ejipt. 
Exodus13:9 Je ta ne ri c'o ta jun iwetal che ri i k'ab, o che ri i palaj, rech amak'el cänataj ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel chiwe, are c'u xixesan ulok pa Ejipt ruc' ri nimalaj u cuinem." 
Exodus13:10 Rumal ri' rajawaxic coc'owisax we nimak'ij ri' chujunab pa ri k'ijol ri ch'icom.’ 
Exodus13:11 Aretak c'u ix u cojom chic ri Ajawaxel pa ri culew ri aj cananeyib, aretak u jachom chic ri culew pa i k'ab, jacha' ri xuchi'j chiwe xukuje' chque ri e i mam," 
Exodus13:12 rajawaxic quebijach che ri Ajawaxel conojel ri e i c'ojol ri e nabeal xukuje' conojel ri nabe tak ama'ib ri quecalaj ri e i wawaj e rech c'u ri Ajawaxel. 
Exodus13:13 Are c'u ri quiban che ri nabe ral ri ati't bur, quiya' jun alaj ama' chij o jun alaj ama' q'uisic' che u q'uexwäch ri alaj bur; we c'u man quiya' ri alaj ama' chij, qui k'ip na ri u kul ri alaj bur. Xukuje' rajawaxic quiya' jun sipanic jacha' che u toric ri nabeal cojolaxel." 
Exodus13:14 We c'u chwek cäbij cäc'ot na i chi' cumal ri e iwalc'ual: ‘¿Jas quel cubij wa'?’ Quibij na chque: ‘Ri Ajawaxel xujresaj ulok ruc' nimalaj cuinem pa Ejipt ri xujc'oji' wi na jacha' lok'om pataninelab. 
Exodus13:15 Aretak ri ajawinel co xutac'aba' rib man xraj taj xujutzokopij ulok, ri Ajawaxel xebucämisaj conojel ri nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj ejiptib chquijujunal xukuje' ri nabe tak cal ri cawaj: rumal ri' quekatas che ri Ajawaxel ri nabe ama'ib tak awaj ri quebalaxic xukuje' cäkaya' jun chij che qui q'uexwäch ri nabeal tak ka c'ojol." 
Exodus13:16 Ruc' ri qui banic we jastak ri' je ta ne ri cäcanaj jun etal che ri i k'ab, o che ri i palaj, we nak'atisabal ri' cunataj chiwe chi ri Ajawaxel xujresaj ulok ruc' nimalaj cuinem pa Ejipt.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Aretak c'u ri ajawinel xutzokopij ulok ri tinimit aj israelib, ri Dios man xuc'am ta bic pa ri be ri coc'ow pa ri culew ri aj pilisteyib, ri xa nakaj, xuchomaj c'u ri Dios chi ri aj israelib man cäcaj taj cäquiban ri ch'o'j pune' rajawaxic, are ta c'u utz na ri' chque chi quetzelej pa Ejipt." 
Exodus13:18 Rumal ri' xuban chque chi cäquicotij na ri qui be pa ri chaki'j uwo sak ri cäbe chusuq'uil ri Quiäk Plo. Aretak xebel ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt quek'atatic e jacha' ajch'ojab. 
Exodus13:19 Ri Moises xebuc'am bic ri u bakil ri Jose, u banom c'u can ri Jose chi ri e ralc'ual ri Israel caquich'ij chi je caquibano. U bim c'u can chque: “Kastzij, ri Dios cäpe na che i to'ic; aretak c'u cäc'ulmataj wa', ri ix quiwesaj bic ri nu bakil waral.”" 
Exodus13:20 Ri aj israelib xebel ulok pa Sucot xebekaj pa Etam, ri cächapletaj wi ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Exodus13:21 Ri Ajawaxel xnabej chquiwäch pa k'ij pa jutac'aj sutz' che u c'amic qui be, chak'ab xnabej chquiwäch pa jutac'aj k'ak' che u c'utic ri qui be. Rumal c'u ri' xecuinic xebin chak'ab, xukuje' pa k'ij." 
Exodus13:22 Mawi jubik' xutas ta rib ri jutac'aj sutz' chquiwäch pa k'ij, xukuje' mawi jubik' xutas ta rib ri jutac'aj k'ak' chquiwäch chak'ab." 
Exodus14:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus14:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi chquiq'uexa' ri qui be ri quitakem rech quebekaj chuwäch ri Pi-hahirot, chuxo'l ri Migdol ruc' ri plo, chusuq'uil ri Baal-zepon. Chekaj chila', chuchi' ri plo." 
Exodus14:3 Ri ajawinel cuchomaj na chi ri aj israelib man cäquich'ob taj jawije' ri quebe wi. E sachinak c'u pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. 
Exodus14:4 Quinban na co che ri ranima' ri ajawinel quixuterenej c'ut, quinc'ut c'u ri nu cuinem puwi' ri are xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri rajch'ojab. Cäquetamaj na ri aj ejiptib chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.” Je c'u xquiban ri aj israelib." 
Exodus14:5 Xya' c'u u bixic che ri ajawinel pa Ejipt chi xebanimaj bic ri aj israelib, chanim xuq'uex ri u chomanic ri ajawinel chquij ri aj israelib xukuje' je xquiban ri e rach k'atal tak tzij, xquibij: “¿Jasche xujch'äctajic chi xekatzokopij bic ri aj israelib rech man quechacun ta chic chke?”" 
Exodus14:6 Ri ajawinel xtakan che u suc'umaxic ri u carwaj re ch'o'j, xebumulij bic ri rajch'ojab." 
Exodus14:7 Xebucha' wakib sient (600) utzalaj tak carwaj xukuje' conojel ri carwaj re Ejipt chquijujunal e u c'atal bic cumal jun qui nimal ajch'ojab. 
Exodus14:8 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi co xutac'aba' rib ri ajawinel quebuterenej c'ut ri aj israelib, pune' c'u e elinak ulok wa' ruc' nimalaj cuinem." 
Exodus14:9 Xebel c'u ulok ri aj ejiptib cachil conojel ri cajch'ojab che qui ternexic ri aj israelib, e c'o pa tak carwaj, e quiejeninak chquij tak quiej, xebequirika' chuchi' ri plo, chuxcut ri Pi-hahirot chuwäch ri Baal-zepon jawije' ri e kajinak wi." 
Exodus14:10 Aretak xquil ri aj israelib chi ri ajawinel xukuje' ri aj ejiptib xenakajin ulok chque, sibalaj xquixe'j quib, xquitz'onoj ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus14:11 Xquibij c'u che ri Moises: “¿La xa ta pu ma ta c'o cujmuk wi pa Ejipt chi xujawesaj ulok rech cujelcäm pa we chaki'j uwo sak ri'? ¿Jasche je xaban wa' chke? ¿Jasche xujawesaj ulok pa Ejipt? 
Exodus14:12 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri xkabij chawe pa Ejipt?: ‘Macoj a chuk'ab chke, chekapatanij na ri aj ejiptib. Are utz chke we ta are xekapatanij na ri aj ejiptib chuwäch ri xa cujelcäm pa we chaki'j uwo sak ri'.’ ”" 
Exodus14:13 Ri Moises xubij chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Muban quieb i c'u'x, chiwila' na jas ri cuban ri Ajawaxel camic che i to'ic, mawi c'u jumul quiwil chic qui wäch ri aj ejiptib ri quebiwil camic." 
Exodus14:14 Mixoc il, ri Ajawaxel are cäch'ojin na che i q'uexwäch.”" 
Exodus14:15 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “¿Jasche catz'onoj ri nu to'banic? Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi cäquitakej ri qui be. 
Exodus14:16 Ri at chayaca' ri a ch'ämiy chicaj, chayuku' ri a k'ab chabana' quieb che ri plo rech queboc'ow ri aj israelib chupam pa chaki'jal." 
Exodus14:17 In quinbana' na chi ri aj ejiptib co caquitac'aba' na quib rech quixquiterenej na; quinc'ut c'u ri nu cuinem puwi' ri ajawinel xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri rajch'ojab, paquiwi' ri u carwaj xukuje' paquiwi' ri rajquiejab." 
Exodus14:18 Aretak nu c'utum chic ri nu cuinem puwi' ri ajawinel, paquiwi' ri u carwaj xukuje' paquiwi' ri cajquiejab, ri aj ejiptib cäquetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus14:19 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Dios xukuje' ri jutac'aj sutz' ri nabejinak chquiwäch ri aj israelib, xquiq'uex ri qui c'olbal xek'ax chquij." 
Exodus14:20 Xcanaj c'ut ri jutac'aj sutz' chquixo'l ri aj ejiptib cuc' ri aj israelib; xux c'u k'eku'm ri sutz' chque ri aj ejiptib, are c'u ri chque ri aj israelib are chäj ri cac'utuw ri qui be. Rumal ri' pa ronojel ri jun ak'ab ri' mawi jubik' xenakajin ri aj ejiptib chque ri aj israelib." 
Exodus14:21 Ri Moises xuyuk ri u k'ab puwi' ri plo, xuban c'u ri Ajawaxel chi xupac rib ri plo rumal jun nimalaj quiakik' ri xpe pa elebal k'ij ronojel ri jun ak'ab ri'. Xuban c'u quieb che ri plo xux chaki'j ulew." 
Exodus14:22 Ri aj israelib xeboc'ow pa chaki'j ulew chupam ri plo, chquixo'l quieb tapia re ja', jun pa qui wiquiak'ab, jun pa qui mox k'ab." 
Exodus14:23 Conojel ri rajquiejab ri ajawinel xukuje' ri e u carwaj xeteri bic chquij ri aj israelib c'ä pa u niq'uiajil ri plo; 
Exodus14:24 aretak c'u xpe u sakaric, ri Ajawaxel xebuca'yej ri ajch'ojab aj ejiptib pa ri jutac'aj k'ak' xukuje' pa ri jutac'aj sutz', xebuyojij c'ut;" 
Exodus14:25 xebujok'opij ri e qui carwaj, man quebin ta chic. Ri aj ejiptib xquibij: “Chujanimaj chquiwäch ri aj israelib, are cätajin cäch'ojin ri Ajawaxel che qui to'ic xukuje' che u banic c'ax chke.”" 
Exodus14:26 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab puwi' ri plo, rech cätzelej ri ja' paquiwi' ri aj ejiptib, paquiwi' ri qui carwaj xukuje' ri cajquiejab.”" 
Exodus14:27 Ri Moises xuyuk ri u k'ab puwi' ri plo, aretak xsakaric ri ja' xtzelej chic pa ri nabe u c'olbal. Aretak c'ut ri aj ejiptib xcaj xebanimajic, xek'atitaj rumal ri ja', xejik'isax c'u rumal ri Ajawaxel chupam ri plo." 
Exodus14:28 Aretak xurik rib ri plo, xebumuk can ri carwaj, ri ajquiejab xukuje' conojel ri ajch'ojab ri xeboc chupam ri plo che cokataxic ri aj israelib. Mawi jun rajch'o'j ri ajawinel xc'asi' ta canok." 
Exodus14:29 Are c'u ri aj israelib xeboc'ow pa chaki'j ulew pa ri plo, chquixo'l quieb tapia re ja', jun pa qui wiquiak'ab jun pa qui mox k'ab." 
Exodus14:30 Are k'ij wa' aretak ri Ajawaxel xuq'uis qui to'ic ri aj israelib pa qui k'ab ri aj ejiptib, ri aj israelib xequil ri aj ejiptib ri e cäminak chic, quelew chuchi' ri plo." 
Exodus14:31 Aretak xquil ri aj israelib ri nimalaj u cuinem ri Ajawaxel ri xukasaj paquiwi' ri aj ejiptib, xquixe'j quib chuwäch, xquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij xukuje' chrij ri Moises." 
Exodus15:1 Ri Moises xukuje' ri aj israelib xquibixoj we bix ri' che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel: Quinbixon che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, ri xuban jun mayibalalaj ch'äcanic aretak xebujik'isaj ri quiej pa ri plo cachilam ri ajquiejab." 
Exodus15:2 “Ri nu bix quinya' che ri Ajawaxel, are nu chuk'ab xukuje' nu colotajic. Ri are' are nu Dios, ya'tal u k'ijilaxic wumal; are u Dios ri nu tat, ya'tal u ya'ic u k'ij wumal." 
Exodus15:3 Ri Ajawaxel are jun nimalaj ch'ojinel, Ajawaxel ¡are u bi' wa'!" 
Exodus15:4 Ri Ajawaxel xebujik'isaj pa ri plo ri carwaj xukuje' ri rajch'ojab ri ajawinel; ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri nimak qui k'ij xejik' chupam ri Quiäk Plo. 
Exodus15:5 Xebik'taj rumal ri ja', e je ta ne abaj, xech'uk rumal ri cholaj plo." 
Exodus15:6 Oh, Ajawaxel, ri icak'ab la ri sibalaj nim u chuk'ab, are xsachow qui wäch ri ka c'ulel." 
Exodus15:7 Ruc' ri nimalaj chuk'ab la xebe xak'alej la ri xquiyac quib che c'ulelaxic la; xnicow ri oyowal la, xechajir c'ut jacha' ri pajo." 
Exodus15:8 Co xxut'uj la ri plo, xupac c'u rib; ri qui wäch ri ja' xquimulij quib jacha' jun tapia; ri najalaj u xe' ri plo xcowiric." 
Exodus15:9 Ri c'ulel xubij: ‘Quebenwokataj c'ä quebenrika' na, quinjach ri quintokij chque c'ä quinquicot na. Quinjusij ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j, are c'u ri nu k'ab cäsachow qui wäch.’" 
Exodus15:10 Xxut'uj c'u la ri plo, xebik'taj rumal; xekaj chuxe' ri u choil ri ja' jacha' räxmamaj ch'ich'." 
Exodus15:11 Oh, Ajawaxel, man c'o ta jun dios ri cacuintaj cujunamaj ta rib uc' la. Man c'o ta chi jun ri sibalaj ta tastalic na mawi nim u bantajic jacha' ta ri lal. Quebe ban la mayibalalaj tak jastak xukuje' xibibal. Ya'tal che la chi cak'ijilax la." 
Exodus15:12 Xc'ut ri cuinem la xebubik' ri ulew. 
Exodus15:13 Ruc' ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la cätajin cäc'am la u be we tinimit ri' ri xcol la; ruc' ri cuinem la cac'am la bic pa ri tastalicalaj achoch la. 
Exodus15:14 Ri nimak tak tinimit quebirbob na aretak cäquetamaj, ri aj pilisteyib cäquibak'atij na quib rumal k'oxom," 
Exodus15:15 ri e qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj Edom cäpe na canima', ri e c'amal tak qui be ri e aj Moab quebirbob na rumal xe'n ib, quetuktub na conojel ri aj cananeyib." 
Exodus15:16 Oh, Ajawaxel, chquina' quib, chkaj xe'n ib paquiwi'. Checanaj canok jacha' ri abaj rumal ri u chuk'ab ri k'ab la, c'ä coc'ow na ri tinimit la." 
Exodus15:17 Oh, Ajawaxel, chc'ama' la bic pa ri tastalicalaj juyub la, pa ri c'olbal ri xcha' la che ka jekelibal, pa ri achoch la ri co xtiq'uiba' la ruc' ri k'ab la." 
Exodus15:18 ¡Ri Ajawaxel are' cätakan chbe k'ij sak!” 
Exodus15:19 Aretak ri u carwaj ri ajawinel xukuje' ri rajquiejab xeboc pa ri plo, ri Ajawaxel xubano chi xpe ri ja' paquiwi'; are c'u ri aj israelib xeboc'ow pa ri plo jas pa chaki'j ulew." 
Exodus15:20 Are c'u ri Mariy, ri k'axal tzij, rana'b ri Aaron, xuc'am jun tzojtzoj, conojel ri ixokib xeteri bic chrij quexojowic quetzojtzotic," 
Exodus15:21 ri are' cätajin cubixoj chque: “Chixbixon che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, ri xuban jun mayibalalaj ch'äcanic aretak xebujik'isaj ri quiej pa ri plo cachilam ri ajquiejab.”" 
Exodus15:22 Ri Moises xeresaj bic ri aj israelib chuchi' ri Quiäk Plo, xquitakej ri qui be xebe pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Xur, oxib k'ij c'ut xebin pa ri chaki'j uwo sak man c'o ta ja' xquiriko." 
Exodus15:23 Aretak xebopan pa Mar, man xecuin taj xquitij ri ja' ri c'o chila' rumal ri u c'ayil. Rumal ri' xcoj Mar che u bi' we c'olbal ri'." 
Exodus15:24 Ri winak c'ax xech'aw chrij ri Moises, xquibij: “¿Jawije' ta quekama' wi ka ja'?”" 
Exodus15:25 Ri Moises xuta' ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel, ri are' xuc'ut jun che' chuwäch. Xuq'uiak c'u ri Moises ri che' pa ri ja', xel c'u ri u c'ayil. Chila' c'ut xec'ambejex wi rumal ri Ajawaxel, xuya' c'u jun pixab chque xukuje' jun suc'umabal ri qui c'aslemal." 
Exodus15:26 Xubij chque: “In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, we kas quitatabej ri quinbij chiwe, we quiban ri suq'uil chnuwäch, quinimaj ri nu takomal, quebitz'akatisaj tak ri nu pixab, mawi jun chque ri yabil ri xintak paquiwi' ri aj ejiptib quintak ta piwi' ix, in c'ut ri Ajawaxel, ri quixincunaj.”" 
Exodus15:27 Xebopan c'u pa Elim ri c'o wi cablajuj (12) bulbux ja', xukuje' oxc'al lajuj (70) tut, chila' c'u xekaj wi chuchi' ri ja'." 
Exodus16:1 Xebel bic conojel ri aj israelib pa Elim, xebopan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin ri c'o chuxo'l ri Elim ruc' ri Sinai. Pa ri u niq'uiajiribal ri ucab ic' che ri quelic ulok pa Ejipt." 
Exodus16:2 Chila' c'ut pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xquichaplej wi u bixic c'axalaj tak tzij chrij ri Moises xukuje' chrij ri Aaron. 
Exodus16:3 Je c'u xquibij wa' chque: “¡C'o ta banom wi chi xuban ta ri Ajawaxel chi xujcäm ta pa Ejipt! Chila' xujt'uyi wi chquinakaj ri jujun tak t'uy ti'j, cuj wa' c'ut c'ä cujnoj na, ri ix c'ut xujic'am ulok pa we chaki'j uwo sak ri' che ka cämisaxic konojel rumal wi'jal.”" 
Exodus16:4 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises; “Quinbana' na chi cäjabin ulok qui wa chicaj. Conojel c'u ri winak quebel na bic che u molic ulok ri cäquitij che ri jun k'ij. Quinwaj quinwilo jachin cäniman che ri nu takanic, xukuje' jachin ri man cäniman taj." 
Exodus16:5 Pa ri uwak k'ij aretak caquisuc'umaj ri caquic'am bic cho ja, rajawaxic caquimol bic ri caquitij re quieb k'ij.”" 
Exodus16:6 Ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron xquibij chque ri aj israelib: “Benak k'ij quiwetamaj na chi are ri Ajawaxel xixesan ulok pa Ejipt," 
Exodus16:7 ak'ab quiwil na ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel, u tom c'ut chi c'ax quixch'aw chrij. ¿Jas ta ri ka banic uj chi c'ax quixch'aw chkij?”" 
Exodus16:8 Xubij chi c'u ri Moises chque ri aj israelib: “Ri Ajawaxel benak k'ij cuya' na i ti', ak'ab cuya' na i wa ri tz'ebetalic, u tom c'ut chi c'ax quixch'aw chrij. ¿Jas ta ri ka banic uj? Man chkij ta c'u uj c'ax xixch'aw wi xane' chrij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus16:9 Ri Moises xubij che ri Aaron: “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib chi chekeb chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, u tom c'ut chi c'ax quech'awic.”" 
Exodus16:10 Aretak cätajin cätzijon ri Aaron cuc' ri aj israelib, conojel xeca'y apan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xc'utun c'u ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel chquiwäch pa jun sutz'." 
Exodus16:11 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Exodus16:12 “Nu tom chi c'ax quech'aw ri aj israelib. Chatch'aw cuc' chabij chque: ‘Benak k'ij quitij ti'j, ak'ab quitij wa c'ä quixnoj na. Jeri' quiwetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Pa ri u benabal k'ij ri' xepe sakco'r, ri xquinojisaj u wäch ri ulew re ri kajebal, pa ri u sakaric c'o jun räxk'ab pa tak u xcut ri kajebal." 
Exodus16:14 Aretak xtzaj ri räxk'ab, xcanaj can jun jasach jacha' ri sakbach cho ri ulew pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Exodus16:15 Aretak ri aj israelib xquilo, rumal c'u rech chi man queta'm ta u wäch, xquibij chquibil tak quib: “¿Jas wa'?” Ri Moises xubij chque: “Are wa' ri wa ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel chiwe che tzukbal iwib." 
Exodus16:16 Are wa' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel: ‘Chijujunal chimolo ri cajwataj che, che u tijic, xukuje' chebiwajilaj joropa' ri e c'o pa ri iwachoch, craj ne cacab tzima (2 litro) ri cäquitij jujun winak.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 Je xquiban ri aj israelib. E c'o jujun q'ui xquimolo; jujun man q'ui taj," 
Exodus16:18 jas ri pajbal ri xya' u bixic; man c'o ta c'u xto'taj can ruc' ri sibalaj q'ui xumolo, mawi c'o xeraj na che ri xa jubik' xumolo. Chquijujunal qui mulin ri cajwataj chque che u tijic." 
Exodus16:19 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “C'o jun c'o mutas can che re ri ucab k'ij.” 
Exodus16:20 E c'o c'u jujun ri man xquinimaj taj ri xubij ri Moises, xquitas can jutak bik' che re ri ucab k'ij, are c'u ri xquic'olo xenoj che xjut, sibalaj xchuwiric. Xoyowar c'u ri Moises chquij." 
Exodus16:21 Chquijujunal c'ut pa tak ak'abil cäquimulij ri cäquitij che ri jun k'ij, ri jaswa' ri cäcanaj cho ri ulew cäja'r rumal ri u chuk'ab ri k'ij." 
Exodus16:22 Pa ri uwak k'ij c'ut xquimol cajcaj tzima (2 litro) ri jaswa' chquijujunal, ri nimak qui banic chquixo'l ri aj israelib xequibij che ri Moises," 
Exodus16:23 xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Are wa' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel. Chwek are k'ij re uxlanem, jun uxlanem ri tastalic che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel. Chitzaca' camic ri rajawaxic u tzaquic, ri rajawaxic u rokowisaxic chi rokowisaj, ronojel c'u ri cäto'taj canok chic'olo' che re chwek.”" 
Exodus16:24 Xquic'ol c'u can che ri ucab k'ij ri xto'taj canok jacha' ri u bim ri Moises, man xchuwir ta c'ut mawi xnoj chque xjut." 
Exodus16:25 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Ri i c'olom are chitija' camic, camic c'ut ri k'ij re uxlanem ri tastalic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; pa we k'ij ri' man c'o ta jaswa' quirik cho ri ulew pa ri juyub." 
Exodus16:26 Wakib k'ij cuya' quimol ri jaswa', pa ri uwuk k'ij man c'o ta jas c'olic are c'u k'ij wa' re uxlanem.”" 
Exodus16:27 E c'o c'u jujun ri xebel bic pa ri uwuk k'ij che u molic jubik', man c'o ta c'u xequirika'." 
Exodus16:28 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Ri ix, ¿c'ä jampa' lo quitakej na ri man quinimaxic taj ri e nu takomal xukuje' ri e nu tijonic?" 
Exodus16:29 Choc ba pa i jolom chi ri in, ri Ajawaxel, nu yo'm c'u jun k'ij chiwe re uxlanem, rumal ri' pa ri uwak k'ij quinya' i wa re quieb k'ij. Chijujunal chixcanaj cho tak iwachoch pa ri uwuk k'ij, man quixel ta c'u bic chupam.”" 
Exodus16:30 Xebuxlan c'u ri winak pa ri uwuk k'ij. 
Exodus16:31 Ri aj israelib xquicoj “jaswa'” che u bi' ri cäquimolo. Sak jacha' ri u wäch culanto, qui' jacha' ri wotz'otz' ri yo'm ta juyubal räx cab puwi'." 
Exodus16:32 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Are wa' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel. ‘Chinojisaj jun pajbal re quieb tzima (2 litro) che jaswa', chic'olo' che u c'utic chquiwäch ri e u wi' tak i mam, rech caquetamaj u wäch ri wa ri xintzukbej iwe pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aretak xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron: “Chac'ama' jun t'uy, chaya' jun gomer (quieb litro) jaswa' chupam. Chaya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rech cäc'ol can chque ri e u wi' tak i mam ri quepe na.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ri Aaron je xubano jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, ri Aaron xuya' ri t'uy chuwäch ri caxa ri c'o wi ri c'ulwächinic rech cac'ol chupam." 
Exodus16:35 Ri aj israelib cawinak (40) junab xquitij ri jaswa' c'ä xebopan na pa ri u c'ulbatil ri ulew Canaan. 
Exodus16:36 Lajuj epa xak junam ruc' jun gomer. 
Exodus17:1 Conojel ri aj israelib xebel bic pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin, nojim nojim xquitakej ri qui be, quinimam ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel. Xebekaj pa Repidim, man c'o ta c'u ja' ri xruq'uiaj taj ri tinimit." 
Exodus17:2 Xquich'a' c'u che ri Moises, je xquibij wa' che: “Chaya' ka ja' ri cäkuq'uiaj.” “¿Jasche quiban iwoyowal chwe? ¿Jasche quic'ambejej ri Dios?” xcha' ri Moises."
