Exodus17:3 Quecäm c'u ri winak che chaki'j chi' rumal ri' xquic'ulelaj ri Moises, xquibij che: “¿Jasche xujawesaj ulok pa Ejipt, che ka cämisaxic che chaki'j chi' ri uj, ri kalc'ual xukuje' conojel ri kawaj?”" 
Exodus17:4 Ri Moises xtz'onon che ri Ajawaxel, xubij c'u che: “¿Jas quinban cuc' we winak ri'? Xa co'l man quinquicämisaj che abaj.”" 
Exodus17:5 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chatnabej chquiwäch ri winak, cheteren bic jujun chque ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib chawij. Chac'ama' bic ri ch'ämiy ri xach'ayibej re ri nima', chatakej c'ut ri a be." 
Exodus17:6 Quinc'oji' c'u che aweyexic chila' pa ri juyub Horeb, puwi' ri nimalaj abaj, aretak c'ut cac'ojij ri nimalaj abaj, quel na ulok ja' chupam rech cäquitij ri winak.” Je c'u xuban ri Moises chquiwäch ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib," 
Exodus17:7 ri Moises xucoj Merib che u bi' ri c'olbal ri' rumal rech chi xec'ulelan ri aj israelib che xukuje' xucoj Masa che u bi' rumal rech chi xquic'ambejej ri Dios, aretak xquibij: ¿La c'o pa ri Ajawaxel kuc' o man c'o taj?" 
Exodus17:8 Xewalij c'u ri aj amalesib xepe chquij ri aj israelib pa Repidim che u banic ch'o'j cuc'. 
Exodus17:9 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Josue: “Chebacha' bic jujun achijab, jät jatech'ojin cuc' ri aj amalesib. Are c'u ri in quinetac'al ulok c'ä puwi' ri juyub, quinwuc'aj ri ch'ämiy aj Dios pa nu k'ab.”" 
Exodus17:10 Je c'u xuban ri Josue jas ri xbix che rumal ri Moises, xbe che ch'o'j chquij ri aj amalesib are c'u ri Moises, ri Aaron cachil ri Hur xepaki' c'ä puwi' ri juyub." 
Exodus17:11 Aretak ri Moises cuyac ri u k'ab, quech'äcan ri aj israelib; aretak c'u cukasaj ri u k'ab, are quech'äcan ri aj amalesib." 
Exodus17:12 Quek'itaj c'u ri u k'ab ri Moises, rumal ri' xequic'ama' jun abaj rech cät'uyi puwi'. Are c'u ri Aaron rachil ri Hur cäquitok'ej ri u k'ab ri Moises, jun pa u mox jun pa ri riquiak'ab. Xa jeri' xak jun xec'oji' wi ri u k'ab ri Moises c'ä xkaj na ri k'ij," 
Exodus17:13 ri Josue xebuch'äc ri ajch'ojab aj amalesib, xebucämisaj conojel ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j." 
Exodus17:14 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chatz'ibaj wa' pa jun wuj che natabal, chabij che ri Josue chi quinchup na ri u nataxic ri qui bi' ri aj amalesib.”" 
Exodus17:15 Ri Moises xusuc'umaj jun porobal tabal tok'ob, ri u bi' ri xucojo “Ri Ajawaxel are wetal”," 
Exodus17:16 xubij c'ut: “¡Ri retal ri Ajawaxel pa ri k'abaj! ¡Ri Ajawaxel c'o pa ch'o'j cuc' ri aj amalesib pa ronojel ri qui c'aslemal!” 
Exodus18:1 Ri Jetro, ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa Madian, u ji' ri Moises, xuta' u tzijol ronojel ri u banom ri Dios che u to'ic ri Moises xukuje' ri u banom che ri u tinimit Israel, xretamaj chi ri Ajawaxel xeresaj ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt." 
Exodus18:2 Ri Jetro ri u ji' ri Moises xuc'am ulok ri Sepor ri rixokil ri Moises e rachilam ri quieb ral, ri e u tzelem can ri Moises pa Madian." 
Exodus18:3 Jerson u bi' ri jun, rumal rech chi xubij ri Moises: “Xak wokxanim wib pa jun ulew ri man wech taj,”" 
Exodus18:4 Eliezer u bi' ri jun chic rumal rech chi xubij: “Ri u Dios ri nu tat xpe che nu to'ic, xinuto' chuwäch ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri ajawinel ri paraon.”" 
Exodus18:5 Kajinak c'u ri Moises pa ri chaki'j uwo sak chunakaj ri u juyub ri Dios, chila' c'u xopan wi ri Jetro rachil ri Sepor rixokil ri Moises xukuje' ri quieb u c'ojol." 
Exodus18:6 Xubij c'u che ri Moises: “In ri Jetro ri a ji', in petinak che awilic, xpe ri awixokil wuc' e rachil ri quieb ral.”" 
Exodus18:7 Ri Moises xel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri u ji'. Xumej rib chuwäch, xutz'umaj; aretak quiya'lom chic rutzil qui wäch, xeboc pa ri lic'om rachoch." 
Exodus18:8 Ri Moises xutzijoj che ri u ji' ronojel ri u banom ri Ajawaxel che ri ajawinel xukuje' chque ri aj ejiptib che qui to'ic ri aj israelib xukuje' xutzijoj ronojel ri c'ax ri xquic'ulmaj pa tak ri be xukuje' ri xuban ri Dios che qui to'ic. 
Exodus18:9 Sibalaj c'u xquicot ri Jetro rumal ronojel ri utzil ri xuban ri Dios chque ri aj israelib, aretak xeresaj ulok pa qui k'ab ri aj ejiptib," 
Exodus18:10 xubij c'ut: “Tewichital ri Ajawaxel, ri xixesan ulok pa u k'ab ri ajawinel xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri aj ejiptib; xixresaj pa u k'ab ri banal c'ax" 
Exodus18:11 xukuje' chupam ri c'ax ri xquiban chiwe. Camic weta'm chic chi ri Ajawaxel are c'o na u k'ij chquiwäch conojel ri diosib.” 
Exodus18:12 Ri Jetro xuc'am jun awaj xuporoj che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' niq'uiaj tabal tak tok'ob chic. Xopan c'u ri Aaron e rachilam conojel ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib che wa'im ruc' ri u ji' ri Moises chuwäch ri Dios. 
Exodus18:13 Chucab k'ij xt'uyi' ri Moises che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri c'ax ri queriktaj wi ri aj israelib, xetaq'ui' c'u ronojel ri jun k'ij chuwäch ri Moises." 
Exodus18:14 Aretak c'u xril ri u ji' ri Moises ri cätajin cuban che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri winak, xubij che: “¿Jas ri cätajin caban cuc' we winak ri'? ¿Jasche xuwi ri at catt'uyic conojel c'ut ri winak quetaq'ui' chawäch ronojel ri jun k'ij?”" 
Exodus18:15 Ri Moises xubij che ri u ji': “Rumal rech chi ri winak quepe wuc' che u ta'ic qui no'j che ri Dios. 
Exodus18:16 Aretak c'o jun c'ax chquixo'l quepe wuc', ri in quink'at tzij paquiwi', quink'alajisaj c'ut jachin ri c'o u mac; quinbij c'u chque jas cubij ri u pixab ri Dios xukuje' ri u tijonic.”" 
Exodus18:17 Are c'u ri Jetro ri u ji' xubij che: “Man utz taj ri cabano," 
Exodus18:18 catk'itaj at xukuje' quek'itaj na ri winak ri e c'o awuc'. Ri chac cuq'uis ri a chuk'ab, xak a tuquiel man catcuin taj je catakej u banic wa'." 
Exodus18:19 Kas ba' chatatabej ri no'j ri quinya' chawe, c'o c'u ri Dios awuc'. At rajawaxic catch'aw ruc' ri Dios che qui q'uexwäch ri winak, quebaya' c'u ri c'ax chuwäch." 
Exodus18:20 Chebatijoj c'u ri winak chque tak ri pixab xukuje' ri tijonic, chac'utu' chquiwäch jas cäquiban pa ri qui c'aslemal xukuje' ri patanijic ri cäquibano." 
Exodus18:21 Chebacha' achijab chquixo'l ri winak ri c'o qui no'j, ri cäquina' quib chuwäch ri Dios, ri ch'ajch'oj canima', achijab ri man quequitzucuj taj chäcoj ruc' subunic, chaya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' jujun mil winak, jujun sient, cawinak lajuj, xukuje' lajujitak." 
Exodus18:22 E are' c'u tak wa' ri cäquik'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak amak'el; xuwi cäquic'am na ulok ri c'axalaj tak jastak chawäch at, are c'u ri man c'ax taj cäquik'at na tzij e are' puwi'. Jeri' catquito' na che u c'amic bic ri aweka'n." 
Exodus18:23 We je cabano jas ri xinbij chawe, we c'u xukuje' je cubij ri Dios chawe, man catk'itaj taj; conojel c'u ri winak ruc' quicotemal quetzelej na cho tak cachoch.”" 
Exodus18:24 Xkaj pa u jolom ri Moises ri xubij ri u ji' che, xuban c'u ronojel ri xbix che." 
Exodus18:25 Xebucha' achijab ri c'o qui no'j chquixo'l conojel ri aj israelib, xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' jujun mil winak, jujun tak sient, cawinak lajuj, xukuje' lajujitak winak." 
Exodus18:26 Cäquik'at c'u tzij paquiwi' ri winak amak'el; xuwi c'u ri c'axalaj tak jastak cäquic'am ulok chuwäch ri Moises, are c'u ri man c'ax taj, cäquik'at tzij e are' puwi'." 
Exodus18:27 Ri Moises xujach bic ri u ji', xtzelej c'u ri u ji' ri Moises pa ri rulew." 
Exodus19:1 Ri aj israelib xebopan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai, pa ri urox ic' che ri quelic ulok pa Ejipt." 
Exodus19:2 Pa Repidim quelic wi bic, xebopan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai, chila' c'u xekaj wi' chuwäch ri juyub Sinai." 
Exodus19:3 Xpaki' c'u ri Moises puwi' ri juyub ri xsiq'uix wi ulok rumal ri Dios xubij c'u che ri Moises: “Jewa' chabij chque ri e rija'lil ri Jacob chque ri aj israelib: 
Exodus19:4 ‘Ri ix xiwilo jas ri xinban chque ri aj ejiptib xukuje' ri xinban che i c'amic ulok wuc', je ta ne ri xixpe puwi' ri u xic' jun cot." 
Exodus19:5 Je c'u ri' we quinimaj ri quinbij chiwe, we kas quibano jas ri cubij ri nu c'ulwächinic, quixoc na che nu tinimit ri nim u k'ij chquixo'l conojel tak ri tinimit, wech c'u ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Exodus19:6 Ri ix quixux na ajawib e cojol tabal tok'ob chwe, jun tinimit ri tastal chwe.’ Chabij ronojel wa' chque ri aj israelib.”" 
Exodus19:7 Xuwi xkaj ulok ri Moises, xebusiq'uij ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib xebuk'alajisaj conojel ri tzij chquiwäch ri yo'm ulok u bixic che rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus19:8 E are' c'u ri aj israelib xak junam xquitzelej u bixic: “Ronojel ri u bim ri Ajawaxel, cäkabano.” Ri Moises xuc'am c'u bic che ri Ajawaxel ri xutzelej u bixic ri tinimit," 
Exodus19:9 xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Quinpe na che a tzijobexic pa jun tzatzalaj sutz'; rech cäquitatabej ri aj israelib aretak cätajin quintzijon awuc', jeri' cäquinimaj amak'el ri cabij chque.” Ri Moises xucamulij u bixic che ri Ajawaxel ri xutzelej u bixic ri tinimit," 
Exodus19:10 ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Jät, chebasuc'umaj ri winak camic xukuje' chwek rech quek'ijilan chwe. Rajawaxic cäquich'aj ri catz'iak" 
Exodus19:11 chquisuc'umaj c'u apan quib che ri cäbij, cäbij c'ut quinkaj ulok, in ri Ajawaxel, puwi' ri juyub Sinai chquiwäch conojel ri aj israelib." 
Exodus19:12 Chebacojo' c'ulbat chuxe' ri juyub rech man queboc'ow ta ri winak, chabij chque chi nim chquila' wi ri juyub, mepaki puwi' ri juyub mawi menakajin pa tak u xcut, apachin c'ut ri cänakajin che, cac'okox che cämical." 
Exodus19:13 C'o jun mucoj ri u k'ab che u ch'ayic, rajawaxic c'ut cäcämisax na che abaj o cuc' ch'ab. Pune' ta ne winak o awaj, man cäc'asbax ta canok. Xuwi we cabeytaj ri rok'ebal ri trompet cuya' quepaki' ri winak puwi' ri juyub.”" 
Exodus19:14 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Moises puwi' ri juyub che qui suc'umaxic ri winak, rech cäquiya' k'ijilanic che ri Dios. Ri winak xquich'aj ri catz'iak," 
Exodus19:15 ri Moises xubij chque ri winak: “Chisuc'umaj apan iwib che ri cäbij, minak ixok.”" 
Exodus19:16 Churox k'ij aretak xpe ri u sakaric, xuban cakulja rachilam caypa', jun tzatzalaj sutz' c'ut xc'oji' puwi' ri juyub. Jun cowilaj rok'ibal trompet xbanowic chi xebirbob conojel ri winak ri e c'o pa tak ri cachoch rumal xe'n ib." 
Exodus19:17 Ri Moises xeresaj bic ri winak pa tak ri cachoch che u c'ulaxic ri Dios, xebe e tac'al c'u chuxe' ri juyub." 
Exodus19:18 Ronojel c'u ri juyub Sinai xbukuw sib puwi', rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel kajinak ulok pa u niq'uiajil ri k'ak'. Ri u sibal ri cäpakic junam ruc' ri u sibal jun jorno, ronojel c'u ri juyub sibalaj cäyicopic." 
Exodus19:19 Nojimal c'ut sibalaj co chic cätataj ri cok'ibal ri trompet; cäch'aw ri Moises, are c'u ri Dios ruc' cakulja cuch'abej ulok." 
Exodus19:20 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel puwi' ri juyub Sinai, puwi' ri c'olbal ri sibalaj naj elinak chicaj, xubij c'u che ri Moises chi cäpaki' ruc' pa ri c'olbal ri'. Xpaki' ri Moises," 
Exodus19:21 xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chatkaj bic, chabij chque ri winak chi mäquixalk'atij ri c'ulbat, mawi maquitzucuj rilic nu wäch, e q'ui c'u ne ri metzak chque chi que cämic." 
Exodus19:22 Xukuje' ne ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri ya'tal chque quenakajin chwe, chquijosk'ij quib, minsach ne qui wäch.”" 
Exodus19:23 Ri Moises xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Ri tinimit man cuchajij ta anima' capaki' puwi' we juyub Sinai, lal xbin la chke chi cäkacoj c'ulbat chuxe' ri juyub, ka k'alajisam c'ut chi tastalic.”" 
Exodus19:24 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Jät, chatkaj bic; c'äte c'u catpaki' chi ulok cawachilaj ulok ri Aaron. E are' c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri winak meboc'ow puwi' ri c'ulbat rech quepaki' ta ulok chnuwäch, mebencämisaj ta c'ut.”" 
Exodus19:25 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Moises, xuya' qui bixic we jastak ri' chque ri aj israelib." 
Exodus20:1 Ri Dios xch'awic, xebubij c'ut conojel tak we tzij ri':" 
Exodus20:2 “In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios, ri xatresaj ulok pa Ejipt, ri at cojom wi che pataninel jacha' ta ne ri lok'om." 
Exodus20:3 Mec'oji' jule' tak diosib chic we ta ma ta xak xuwi ri in. 
Exodus20:4 C'o jun a dios maban chawe mawi u wächbal ri c'o ajsic chupam ri caj mawi u wächbal ri c'o iquim chuwäch ri ulew mawi u wächbal ri c'o chupam ri plo chuxe' ri ulew. 
Exodus20:5 Mamej awib chquiwäch mawi mebaya' k'ijilanic chque, rumal rech chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios, Dios achixomanel ri cuc'äjisaj qui wäch ri etzelal ri caquiban ri tataxelab, pa ri qui wi' ri calc'ual, ri qui' tak qui mam xukuje' xiquin tak qui mam ri caquetzelaj nu wäch;" 
Exodus20:6 quebenlok'ok'ej pa jun mil ija'lil ri quinquilok'ok'ej xukuje' quequitz'akatisaj qui banic ri e nu takomal. 
Exodus20:7 Itzel u cojic ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios mabano, ri are' c'ut man cuya' ta c'u can ri winak chi xak ta jeri' chi ma ta cuc'äjisaj u wäch ri itzel u cojic ri u bi' cubano." 
Exodus20:8 Chanataj ri k'ij re uxlanem chawe, che u tasic che ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus20:9 Chatchacun wakib k'ij ronojel c'ut ri rajawaxic u banic a wumal chabana' pa tak we k'ij ri'," 
Exodus20:10 are c'u ri uwuk k'ij re uxlanem ri tasom che ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios. C'o jun chac maban chupam we k'ij ri', mawi ri a c'ojol mawi ri a mia'l, mawi ri a pataninel lok'om, achi o ixok, mawi tak ri e awawaj, mawi ri man a winakil taj ri jekel chupam ri a wachoch." 
Exodus20:11 Rumal rech chi wakib k'ij xucoj ri Ajawaxel che u banic ri caj, ri ulew, ri plo xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chquipam, xoc c'u che uxlanem chupam ri uwuk k'ij. Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xutewichi'j ri k'ij re uxlanem xuk'alajisaj c'ut chi tastalic k'ij." 
Exodus20:12 Nim chawila' wi ri a tat xukuje' ri a nan, rech naj catc'asi' cho ri ulew ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios chawe." 
Exodus20:13 Mat cämisanic. 
Exodus20:14 Mat kaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic. 
Exodus20:15 Mat eläk'anic. 
Exodus20:16 Mebabij banoj tak tzij che u banic c'ax che ri awajil a tz'akat. 
Exodus20:17 Maquiäk rayij ri rachoch ri awajil a tz'akat: maquiäk rayij ri rixokil, mawi ri u pataninel lok'om, achi o ixok, mawi ri u wacax, mawi ri u bur, mawi jun jasach ri rech.”" 
Exodus20:18 Conojel ri aj israelib kas xquinabej ri cakulja, xukuje' ri caypa', ri cok'ibal trompet xukuje' ri juyub ri mukutal pa ri sib; xebirbobic, naj xequiya' wi quib." 
Exodus20:19 Xquibij che ri Moises: “At chujach'abej, cujniman c'u na; mujch'abex c'u rumal ri Dios, mujcäm ne konojel.”" 
Exodus20:20 Ri Moises xubij chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Ri Dios petinak che i c'ambejexic rech amak'el quina' iwib chuwäch rech man quixmacun taj.” 
Exodus20:21 Ri winak naj e canajinak wi canok, chupam c'ut ri jok'otaj ri' xkeb ri Moises ruc' ri k'ekumalaj sutz' ri c'o wi ri Dios." 
Exodus20:22 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Je' chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: ‘Ri ix iwilom chi in ch'awinak ulok kas pa ri caj iwuc'. 
Exodus20:23 Mebiban diosib re sak puak o re k'an puak rech quebik'ijilaj jacha' ri quiban chwe in. 
Exodus20:24 Chibana' jun porobal re ulew chwe, chebichi'j c'ut chwe puwi', ri e iwawaj quech ri e i tzobaj xukuje' tak wacax jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan tak ib. Quinpe' c'u na quixintewichi'j c'u na chquipam ri jujun tak c'olbal ri quinwaj wi chi cänatax ri nu bi'." 
Exodus20:25 We c'u re abaj ri porobal quiban chwe mebicoj tzoc'om abaj, aretak c'u qui tzoc' ri abaj ruc' ch'ich' qui ban che chi man takal ta chi che chi coc ta che porobal." 
Exodus20:26 Xukuje' micoj ak'anibal che i pakalibal puwi' ri porobal ri quiya' wi nu k'ij, rech man quic'ut taj ri u ch'analiquil ri i cuerp.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 “Are tak wa' ri pixab ri quebaya' chque ri aj israelib: 
Exodus21:2 We calok' jun lok'om pataninel a wäch aj hebrey, wakib junab cäpatanij na, pa ri uwuk junab cätzokopitaj bic, man c'o ta cutoj can che ri u tzokopixic bic." 
Exodus21:3 We xak u tuquiel xopanic, xak u tuquiel quel bic; we ruc'am rixokil copanic, cuc'am na bic ri rixokil;" 
Exodus21:4 we xya' rixokil rumal ri rajaw, we c'u xec'oji' ral ri ixok we alabom o alitomab, ri ixok e rachilam ri ral quecanaj can ruc' ri rajaw, ri lok'om pataninel xak u tuquiel quel bic." 
Exodus21:5 We c'u ri lok'om pataninel man craj taj cuya' can ri rajaw, ri rixokil xukuje' ri ralc'ual," 
Exodus21:6 ri rajaw cuc'am bic chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij, cukebisaj chuwäch ri uchi'ja o chuwäch ri apal, cuwor ri u xiquin ruc' jun t'ist'ic ch'ich'. Jeri' kas xa jumul cäcanaj can che lok'om pataninel." 
Exodus21:7 We c'o jachin jun cuc'ayij ri u mia'l che lok'om pataninel, man je ta u tzokopixic cäbanic jacha' ri qui tzokopixic ri pataninelab achijab." 
Exodus21:8 We man craj ri rajaw cuc'am che rixokil rumal rech chi man cäkaj ta ri ali chuwäch, cuya' be we c'o jachin calok'owic; pune' retzelam u wäch man cuya' taj cuc'ayij che jun winak ri man u winakil taj." 
Exodus21:9 We cuc'uluba' ruc' ri u c'ojol, junam chubana' che jacha' ri cäban che jun mialaxel." 
Exodus21:10 We c'u cuc'ama' chi jun rixokil muxuyaj ri cutij ri nabe rixokil, xukuje' ri ratz'iak, mawi ma ta cäwar chi ruc'." 
Exodus21:11 We c'u man c'o ta jun chque we oxib jastak ri' quebuya' che, we ixok ri' man c'o ta cäk'atinic, cuya' quel bic man c'o ta tojbal cuya' canok.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Ri winak ri cuban jun ch'ayanic, we c'u xcäm ri xuch'ayo, cäcämisax ri xbanow ri ch'ayanic." 
Exodus21:13 We c'u man u chomam ta u banic, xane' are' ri Dios xajawinic chi cäcämic, ri in quinc'ut na jun c'olbal ri cuya' cuto' wi rib." 
Exodus21:14 Che c'ut ri coyowar chrij ri rajil u tz'akat cucämisaj c'ut ruc' ronojel u chuk'ab, catzucux u rikic pune' ta cuc'u' rib chunakaj ri porobal, cak'at tzij puwi' chi cäcämisaxic." 
Exodus21:15 Ri cusoc ri u tat o ri u nan, cac'okox na che cämical." 
Exodus21:16 Ri cäreläk'aj bic jun winak, cuc'ayij c'ut, o we cäriktaj ruc', cac'okox na che cämical." 
Exodus21:17 Ri cuc'okoj ri u tat o ri u nan, cac'okox na che cämical." 
Exodus21:18 We c'o quieb achijab quech'ojinic, we c'u ri jun cusoc ri jun chic ruc' abaj o ruc' t'oc, ri cukasaj pa ch'at man cäcäm ta c'ut," 
Exodus21:19 ri xch'ayanic cäk'alajisaxic chi man c'o ta jubik' u mac we ri xsocotajic cäwalijic cuchaplej binem chrij ch'ämiy, cutoj c'u ri u cunaxic xukuje' tak ri k'ij ri man cächacun taj." 
Exodus21:20 We c'o jachin jun cuch'ay ri u lok'om pataninel ruc' che', we achi o ixok, cäcäm c'u pa u k'ab, cäc'äjisax na u wäch." 
Exodus21:21 We c'u cäc'asi na jun k'ij o quieb k'ij, man cäc'äjisax ta u wäch, aj chak' lok'om pataninel c'ut." 
Exodus21:22 We e c'o e quieb achijab quech'ojinic, cäquekle'j c'u apan jun ixok ri yawab winak chic we c'u cuc'ulmaj tzakanic man cäcäm ta c'ut ri ixok, ri ajchak'mac cutoj na ri cutok'ij ri rachajil ri ixok, jas ri cäquik'at ri k'atal tak tzij." 
Exodus21:23 We c'u ri u c'aslemal ri ixok xak quieb cubij puwi', cätokix na c'aslemal che u q'uexwäch c'aslemal," 
Exodus21:24 bak'wächaj che u q'uexwäch bak'wächaj, wareyaj che u q'uexwäch wareyaj, k'abaj che u q'uexwäch k'abaj, akanaj che u q'uexwäch akanaj," 
Exodus21:25 c'atic che u q'uexwäch c'atic, socotajic che u q'uexwäch socotajic, t'oconic che u q'uexwäch t'oconic." 
Exodus21:26 We c'o jachin cuban c'ax che ri u bak'wäch ri lok'om pataninel, we achi o ixok, cäcanaj c'u moy, cutzokopij bic che u q'uexwäch ri c'ax ri xurik ri u bak'wäch." 
Exodus21:27 We c'u xresaj jun u ware, xukuje' cutzokopij bic che u q'uexwäch ri u ware.”" 
Exodus21:28 “We c'o jun wacax cutok' jun achi o jun ixok, we c'u cucämisaj, cäcämisax ri wacax ruc' abaj, mätijow ri u ti'jal, are c'u ri ajchak'e ri wacax man cäc'äjisax ta u wäch." 
Exodus21:29 We c'u ri wacax nak'atal chic cätok'inic, cucämisaj c'u jachin jun, cäcämisax na ri wacax ruc' abaj xukuje' ri ajchak'e we reta'm chi tok'onel wi ulok ri u wacax xa c'u man oquinak ta il che u chajixic." 
Exodus21:30 We c'u cäbix che chi cuya' cutor rib ruc' puak rech man cäcämisax taj, rajawaxic cuya' joropa' ri cätok'ix che, che u q'uexwäch ri u c'aslemal." 
Exodus21:31 Kas c'u are pixab wa' cäc'ojic we cätok' jun ala o jun ali. 
Exodus21:32 We c'u ri wacax cutok' jun lok'om pataninel, achi o ixok, cäcämisax ri wacax ruc' abaj, cätoj c'u ruc' juwinak lajuj (30) rakan sak puak che ri rajaw ri pataninel lok'om, we achi o ixok." 
Exodus21:33 We c'o jachin cutek'eba' can u wi' jun c'ua', o cuc'ot jun c'ua' ri man cuch'uk ta can ri u wi', cätzak ta c'u jun wacax o jun bur chupam," 
Exodus21:34 ri ajchak'e ri c'ua' cutoj ri awaj pa u k'ab ri ajchak'e ri awaj, cärechbej c'u can ri cäminak awaj." 
Exodus21:35 We ri u wacax jachin jun, cutok'o, o cucämisaj ri u wacax jun winak chic, cäc'ayix ri wacax ri c'aslic, cäban quieb che ri puak ri xc'ayibex re xukuje' cäban quieb che ri cäminak wacax." 
Exodus21:36 We c'u etamtalic chi tok'onel wi ulok ri wacax, man c'u oquinak ta il ri ajchak'e che u chajixic, cuya' na jun c'aslic wacax che u q'uexwäch ri wacax ri xcämic, cärechbej c'u can ri cäminak wacax.”" 
Exodus22:1 “We c'o jachin cäreläk'aj jun wacax o jun chij, cupil c'ut o cuc'ayij; job wacax cutojbej rech ri wacax, quiejeb chij cutojbej rech ri chij." 
Exodus22:2 We cäriktaj jun eläk'om cätajin cuban ri eläk' chak'ab, we c'u cäsoquic, cäcäm c'ut, ri u cämical man cächomax taj chi are jun cämisanic." 
Exodus22:3 We c'u ne sak chic aretak xcämisaxic, ri u cämical cächomaxic chi are jun cämisanic. Are c'u ri queläk'ic cutoj na ri rajil ri reläk'am we man c'o ta cuma' wi ri cutojbej rech, cäc'ayix ri are' che u tojic ri rajil ri reläk'am." 
Exodus22:4 We c'u c'ä c'asal ri awaj cäriktaj ruc' ri eläk'om, cucamulij u tojic we wacax, we bur, we chij." 
Exodus22:5 We c'o jun winak quebuyuk'uj ri rawaj pa jun juyub o pa jun ulew ri ticom wi uva, queboc c'u ri rawaj chupam ri u juyub jun winak chic, cutoj u q'uexel ri xquitij ri awaj ruc' ri utzalaj u wächinic ri rulew, o ri uva ri u ticom." 
Exodus22:6 We c'o jun winak cunuc' u k'ak', cuc'am c'u rib ri k'ak' cuporoj ri q'uix cuporoj c'ut ri trico ri mulinic o ri xa co'l man quek'atok o ronojel ne ri tico'n; ri winak ri' cutoj ri xc'at rumal ri k'ak'." 
Exodus22:7 We c'o jun winak cärokxanej u rajil ruc' jun winak chic o jun jasach ri pakal rajil, we c'u quebeläk'ax we jastak ri' pa ri rachoch rumal jun eläk'om, we c'u cäriktaj ri eläk'om cucamulij u tojic ri xreläk'aj;" 
Exodus22:8 we c'u man cäriktaj ri eläk'om, cäc'am bic ri ajchak'e ja chuwäch ri k'atal tzij rech quetamaxic we man u tzakom u k'ab chque ri jastak ri okxanim ruc'." 
Exodus22:9 We c'o jun winak cuban rech che jun wacax, jun bur, o jun chij, o jun atz'iak o apachique jasach ri sachinak, cäpe ta chi c'u jun winak cubij chi rech we jasach ri'; ri xquic'ulmaj we quieb winak ri' cäc'am bic chuwäch ri Dios, jachin c'u ri cäk'alajisaxic chi ajchak'mac, cucamulij u tojic che ri jun chic." 
Exodus22:10 We c'o jachin cärokxanej jun bur, jun wacax, jun chij o apachique awaj ruc' jun winak chic, we c'u ne cäcämic o c'o jas cuc'ulmaj o queläk'ax ruc' ri man c'o ta jun quilowic," 
Exodus22:11 ri winak ri' cuban na jun chi'nic ri kas caban na pa u bi' ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri ajchak'e ri awaj chi man xutzak ta u k'ab che ri okxanim ruc'. Ri ajchak'e ri awaj cuc'am na u k'abal ri xbix che, man c'o ta cutoj na ri jun chic." 
Exodus22:12 We c'u xrilo aretak xeläk'ax bic ri awaj, cutoj na che ri ajchak'e." 
Exodus22:13 We c'u xch'äkatix ri awaj rumal jun juyubal awaj, rech man c'o ta cutojo', rajawaxic cuc'ut ri u ch'äkapil ri cäminak awaj." 
Exodus22:14 We c'o jun winak cukaj ri rawaj jun räch winak, we c'u cäsoctaj ri awaj o cäcämic, we c'u man c'o apan ri ajchak'e, cutoj na che ri ajchak'e;" 
Exodus22:15 we c'u c'o apan ri ajchak'e, man c'o ta cutojo'. We c'u tojom ri kajebal rech ri awaj, xuwi ri kajebal rech cutojo'.”" 
Exodus22:16 “We c'o jachin cusub jun ali k'apoj, cäwar c'u ruc', cutoj ri u k'apojil, rajawaxic c'ut cäc'uli' ruc'." 
Exodus22:17 We c'u man craj ri u tat ri ali cuya' ri u mia'l che ri ala, ri ala kas cutoj wi na ri u k'apojil ri ali ri nak'atisam u ya'ic." 
Exodus22:18 Mic'asba' ri ixok ajitz. 
Exodus22:19 Apachin ri cupal ruc' jun awaj, cäcämisaxic." 
Exodus22:20 Ri quebuya' tabal tak tok'ob chquiwäch jule' diosib chic ri xuwi ya'tal qui ya'ic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cäcämisaxic." 
Exodus22:21 Maban c'ax che ri rokxanim rib awuc', xa c'u xiwokxanij na iwib ix pa Ejipt." 
Exodus22:22 Maban c'ax chque ri malca'nib, mawi chque ri minorib," 
Exodus22:23 we c'u caban c'ax chque, cäquita' c'u ri nu to'banic, quinbe c'u na che qui to'ic" 
Exodus22:24 ruc' c'u nimalaj woyowal quixincämisaj na ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j. Ri e iwixokil quecanaj na che malcanil xukuje' ri i walc'ual quecanaj na can pa minoril. 
Exodus22:25 We caya' puak pa jalomal che ri meba' ri awinakil, je maban che jas ri cuban ri ya'l jolomal, mawi matok'ij ral ri a rajil che." 
Exodus22:26 We ri winak ri' cuya' ri u k'u' chawe che kajebal rech ri u jalomal ri xuban awuc', chatzelej ri u k'u' che aretak cäkaj ri k'ij," 
Exodus22:27 rumal rech chi xuwi u k'u' wa' c'olic ri cuch'ukbej rib cho ri tew. We man catzelej che, ¿jas ri cucojo cäwaric? We c'u cutz'onoj ri nu to'banic, quinbe na che u to'ic, in nak'atal c'ut chi quinban tok'ob." 
Exodus22:28 Mayac royowal ri Dios, mawi mac'okoj ri cätakan puwi' ri a tinimit." 
Exodus22:29 Mabey awib che qui c'amic ulok ri a sipanic re ronojel ri a tico'n xukuje' re ronojel ri a uva. Ri a c'ojol ri nabeal caya' na chwe," 
Exodus22:30 junam caban chque ri nabe tak cal ri a wacax, ri a chij. Cuya' quecanaj na wukub k'ij ruc' qui nan, chupam c'ut ri uwajxak k'ij ri calaxic quebajach na chwe." 
Exodus22:31 Ri ix rajawaxic chi ix tasom tak wik chwe. Mitij ri qui ti'jal ri awaj ri quech'äkatix can cumal ri juyubal tak awaj pa ri c'ache'laj, chebiq'uiaka' chquiwäch ri tz'i'.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Mebaya' tak k'alajisanic ri xa e banoj tak tzij, mawi majunaj a tzij ruc' ri banal etzelal rech catux k'alajisanel che u to'ic u wi' ri man suq'uil taj." 
Exodus23:2 Maban awech ri etzelal ri cäquiban ri tinimit winak. Macoj awib cuc' ri tinimit winak cho ri k'atal tzij, che u banic jun etzelal," 
Exodus23:3 mawi matok'obisaj u wäch ri meba' we c'o u mac. 
Exodus23:4 We cärik ri u wacax o ri u bur ri a c'ulel ri u sachom canok, chac'ama' bic jaya' can che." 
Exodus23:5 Chato' ri cäretzelaj a wäch; we cawilo chi ri u bur ri u banom u c'ulel chawe kajinak chuxe' ri reka'n, xak matca'y can che; chato' che u quiric ri reka'n ri ximatal chrij ri u bur." 
Exodus23:6 Majech'obisaj ri suq'uilal ri ya'tal che ri meba' aretak cak'at tzij puwi'," 
Exodus23:7 chanajtajisaj awib chquique ri tzujunic ri xa e banoj tak tzij, mawi mak'at tzij chi cäcämisax ri winak ri man c'o ta jubik' u mac, man quink'alajisaj ta c'ut chi ma ta c'o u mac ri c'o u mac." 
Exodus23:8 Mac'am u pa k'abaj, ri u pa k'abaj cubano chi ri k'atal tak tzij cäquiban ri man suc' taj cubano chi cäc'äjisax qui wäch ri man c'o ta jubik' qui mac." 
Exodus23:9 Maban c'ax che ri rokxanim rib awuc', xa c'u xiwokxanij na iwib ix pa Ejipt, i no'm chic ri c'ax re ri okxanim ib pa jun ulew chic.”" 
Exodus23:10 “Wakib junab catic u wäch ri awulew, cayac c'u na ri u wäch," 
Exodus23:11 pa ri uwuk junab matic u wäch: chawuxlanisaj, chaya' chque ri mebayib ri e awinakil chi cäquitij ri u wächinic ri awulew, are c'u ri cäto'taj canok chquitija' ri awaj ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub. Xukuje' je chabana' wa' chque ri uva, xukuje' chque ri e a aseitun." 
Exodus23:12 Ronojel ri rajawaxic u banic awumal, chabana' can pa ri wakib k'ij, pa ri uwuk k'ij c'ut rajawaxic catuxlanic, rech cuxlan ri a wacax, ri a bur, rech cuc'ac'arisaj ri u chuk'ab ri lok'om a pataninel xukuje' ri man a winakil taj." 
Exodus23:13 Chibana' ronojel ri nu bim chiwe, mawi c'u jumul mätatajic chi quel ulok pa i chi' ri qui bi' ri jule' tak diosib chic.”" 
Exodus23:14 “Oxib nimak'ij chabana' pa ri jun junab che u ya'ic nu k'ij. 
Exodus23:15 Chawoc'owisaj ri nimak'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc', je chabana' jacha' ri takanic ri nu yo'm chawe, pa we nimak'ij ri' wukub k'ij catij caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'. Cäban we nimak'ij ri' pa ri ic' Abib are c'u ic' wa' ri xatel ulok pa Ejipt. Man c'o ta c'u jun ri cuya' copan che wilic ri ma ta c'o jas ruc'am ulok." 
Exodus23:16 Chabana' xukuje' ri nimak'ij rech ri qui molic ri nabe tak u wächinic ri xatic pa ri ulew, xukuje' ri nimak'ij rech ri u yaquic ri u wäch ri ulew rech ri u q'uisbal ri junab, aretak caq'uis qui mulixic conojel ri qui wäch ri a tico'n." 
Exodus23:17 Conojel ri winak rajawaxic quebopan chuwäch ri Ajawaxel oxmul pa ri jun junab. 
Exodus23:18 Aretak quebaya' ri awaj re tabal tak tok'ob chnuwäch mebachi'j junam cuc' ri qui quiq'uel xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc', caya' matas can ri u xepoyil che ri ucab k'ij." 
Exodus23:19 E are' ri nabe tak u wächinic ri awulew ri e je'l na, chebac'ama' bic pa ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Mebatzac alaj tak q'uisic' chupam ri u tu' ri u nan.”" 
Exodus23:20 “Chawilampe', quintak bic ri nu tako'n aj caj rech cänabej chawäch, rech catuchajij pa ri be, catuc'am bic pa ri c'olbal ri nu suc'umam chawe." 
Exodus23:21 Matnajtin che; chanimaj maban awib chi ma ta mawaj ch'abexic che, are' c'o c'u che nu q'uexwäch, we quixmacunic man qui xucuy taj." 
Exodus23:22 We c'u kastzij catniman che, caban ronojel ri nu takom u banic, quinux qui c'ulel ri qui banom qui c'ulel chawe, quink'atij qui wäch ri quek'atin a wäch." 
Exodus23:23 Ri nu tako'n aj caj canabej na chawäch, catuc'am bic pa ri culew ri aj amoreyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj perezeyib, ri aj cananeyib, ri aj hebeyib, ri aj jebuseyib, ri quebenbok na c'ä chquixe'." 
Exodus23:24 Matakej u banic awech ri caquiban we tinimit ri'. Matxuqui chquiwäch tak ri e qui diosib, mawi mebak'ijilaj; xane' chasacha' qui wäch ri qui diosib xukuje' tak ri tastalic tak abaj." 
Exodus23:25 Chak'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios, cutewichi'j c'u na ri a wa, xukuje' ri awuq'uia'. Ri in quinwesaj ronojel u wäch yabil chawij," 
Exodus23:26 quinbano chi man catcäm ta chanim xane' c'ä cätz'akat na ri k'ijol. Man c'o ta jun ixok ri' pa ri awulew ri cuc'ulmaj ta tzakanic o ma ta alc'ualanel. 
Exodus23:27 Quinbano chi ri nimalaj xe'n ib ri quic'am ulok cänabej chawäch pa nimak tak ri tinimit ri catoc'ow wi, quebanimaj c'u ri a c'ulel chawäch." 
Exodus23:28 Quinbano chi quebanimaj bic ri aj hebeyib, ri aj hititib, xukuje' ri aj cananeyib cumal ri sita'l." 
Exodus23:29 Man quebenwesaj ta bic chawäch pa jun junab rech man cäjuyubar ta ri ulew, mawi quepok' ri juyubal tak awaj ri cäquiban ta c'ax chawe." 
Exodus23:30 Pa jutak bik'al quebenwesaj bic chawäch, c'ä queq'uiyir na ri awalc'ual ri queboc che rechbexic ri ulew." 
Exodus23:31 Ri e a c'ulbat cächapletaj ulok chuchi' ri Quiäk Plo, quetakal c'ä chuchi' ri qui plo ri aj pilisteyib, cächapletaj ulok chuchi' ri chaki'j uwo sak quetakal c'ä chuchi' ri nima' Euprats. In e nu jachom we winak ri' pa a k'ab ri e c'o pa tak we ulew ri' quebaq'uiak c'u na bic chawäch." 
Exodus23:32 Muc'ulaj rib a tzij cuc' mawi cuc' ri e qui diosib," 
Exodus23:33 mawi maya' chque chi quecanaj ta canok chupam ri awulew, rech man catquitakchi'j ta che u banic mac chnuwäch. Mebak'ijilaj ne ri qui diosib, are c'u u sachisaxic a wäch wa.”" 
Exodus24:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chatpakal ulok pa ri c'olbal ri in c'o wi, chawachilaj ulok ri Aaron, ri Nadab, ri Abiu xukuje' oxc'al lajuj (70) nimak tak tatayib re Israel, naj c'u jubik' checanaj wi canok chexucul chila'." 
Exodus24:2 Xuwi ri at ya'tal chawe chi catnakajin chwe; ri niq'uiaj chic menakajin chwe, mawi mepaki ulok ri winak awuc'.”" 
Exodus24:3 Xbe c'u ri Moises xubij che ri tinimit conojel ri tzij ri xubij ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' ri u takom u banic conojel c'ut xa pa jun ch'abal xquitzelebej u bixic: “Quebekanimaj na conojel ri tzij ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chke.”" 
Exodus24:4 Ri Moises xutz'ibaj ronojel ri tzij ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che, sibalaj c'u ak'ab xwalij chucab k'ij, xuyac jun porobal chuxe' ri juyub, xebucoj cablajuj (12) tastalic tak abaj, jun che u q'uexwäch jujun ramak' re Israel." 
Exodus24:5 Xebusiq'uij jujun alabom chquixo'l ri aj israelib, xebutak che qui pilic jujun wacax che qui poroxic che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' che tabal tak tok'ob quech utzirisan ib." 
Exodus24:6 Ri Moises xuc'am pa niq'uiaj che ri quic', xuya' pa jujun nimak tak lak ri niq'uiaj chic xuchicoj puwi' ri porobal." 
Exodus24:7 Xuc'am ri u wujil ri pixab, xusiq'uij chquiwäch ri winak, “xquibij c'u ri winak: Cäkaban na ronojel ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus24:8 Xuc'am ri Moises ri quic' xuchicoj paquiwi' ri winak, xubij: “Are quic' wa' ri cajiquiban ri c'ulwächinic ri u banom ri Ajawaxel iwuc', puwi' ri qui tac'alibal conojel tak we tzij ri'.”" 
Exodus24:9 Xpaki' c'u ri Moises puwi' ri juyub rachilam ri Aaron, ri Nadab, ri Abiu xukuje' ri e oxc'al lajuj (70) nimak tak tatayib re Israel." 
Exodus24:10 Chila' c'ut xquil wi ri u Dios ri Israel: ri tac'al wi je ta ne ri abaj zapir, ri sibalaj cäjuluwic junam u ca'yebal ruc' ri caj aretak man c'o ta sutz' c'o chuwäch." 
Exodus24:11 Man c'u xuban ta c'ax ri Dios chque we aj israelib ri' ri nimak qui k'ij, ri xquil u wäch ri Dios, xewa'ic xukuje' xebuq'uianic." 
Exodus24:12 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: Chatpakal ulok puwi' ri juyub, jawije' ri in c'o wi, chinaweyej chila', quebenjach c'u bic chawe jujun tz'alam tak abaj ri e nu tz'ibam wi ri pixab xukuje' tak ri takomal ri cajwataj che qui tijoxic ri aj israelib." 
Exodus24:13 Xwalij c'u ri Moises xpaki' puwi' ri u juyub ri Dios, rachilam ri Josue ri to'l rech." 
Exodus24:14 Xubij c'u chque ri e nimak tak tatayib: “Chujiweyej can waral, c'ä cujtzelej na ulok. Cäcanaj can ri Aaron rachil ri Hur iwuc', we c'u c'o jun cäriktaj pa jun c'ax chubij che ri Aaron rachilam ri Hur.”" 
Exodus24:15 Xuwi xbitaj wa' rumal ri Moises xpaki' puwi' ri juyub, xmuktaj c'u ri juyub rumal jun sutz'." 
Exodus24:16 Xkaj ri u juluwem ri Dios puwi' ri juyub Sinai, wakib k'ij xch'ukutaj rumal ri sutz'. Chuwuk k'ij c'ut, ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ulok ri Moises pa ri sutz'." 
Exodus24:17 Ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xc'utun chquiwäch ri aj israelib jacha' jun k'ak' ri bik'onel, puwi' ri juyub ri naj elinak chicaj." 
Exodus24:18 Ri Moises xoc pa ri sutz' xpaki' puwi' ri juyub, xbeytaj c'u cawinak (40) k'ij cawinak (40) chak'ab chila'." 
Exodus25:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus25:2 “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib chi chiquimolo jun sipanic chwe. Rajawaxic caquimol chquixo'l ri conojel ri winak ri c'o qui rayinic che u ya'ic ruc' c'u ronojel canima'," 
Exodus25:3 chabij chque chi chquic'ama' ulok: k'an puak, sak puak, k'an ch'ich'," 
Exodus25:4 quem azul, quem morato, quiäk quem, coc'alaj lino, quismal q'uisic'," 
Exodus25:5 qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri k'oom ruc' quiäk, ch'uch'ujalaj tak tz'um, che' re q'uisis," 
Exodus25:6 aseit queya' chquipam tak ri yabal k'ak', c'oc' k'ol ri cayuj ruc' ri aseit re tastajic xukuje' ri cayuj ruc' ri k'ol rech cac'oc'atic," 
Exodus25:7 abaj re tak cornalin xukuje' niq'uiaj abaj chic ri sibalaj e je'l na ri quenac' che ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij xukuje' ri cäya' choc'uxaj ri cucoj ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob. 
Exodus25:8 Chibana' c'u jun k'ijilabal chwe rech quinc'oji' chquixo'l. 
Exodus25:9 Are' c'u we c'olbal ri' ri quinc'oji' wi na, xukuje' conojel ri jastak ri quecoj chupam, rajawaxic junam qui banic cabano jacha' ri quinc'ut na chawäch.”" 
Exodus25:10 “Chabana' jun caxa re q'uisis, ri quetan job k'abaj u rabic, oxib k'abaj u wäch xukuje' oxib k'abaj cärak'anibej." 
Exodus25:11 Chacojo' utzalaj k'an puak chupam xukuje' chrij, chasutij ri u chi' che jun retz'balil re k'an puak," 
Exodus25:12 chabana' quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak, chebacojo' che ri quiejeb rakan, quieb che ri juperaj, quieb che ri juperaj chic." 
Exodus25:13 Chabana' xukuje' quieb balul re q'uisis, chach'uku' quij ruc' k'an puak," 
Exodus25:14 chebajutu' pa tak ri u xiquin ri c'o pa tak u xcut ri caxa, rech cuya' cätelexic," 
Exodus25:15 mebawesaj chic, chebaya' can chupam tak ri u xiquin ri caxa ri e c'o pa tak u xcut," 
Exodus25:16 chaya' c'u chupam ri caxa ri pixab ri quenya' chawe. 
Exodus25:17 Chabana' jun tz'apibal re utzalaj k'an puak, ri quetan job k'abaj u rabic, oxib k'abaj u wäch," 
Exodus25:18 cärachilaj quieb wächbal re k'an puak ri aj cajalaj tobanelab ri c'o qui xic', ri ch'ayom ruc' bajibal pa ri quieb u tza'm." 
Exodus25:19 Ri tz'apibal xukuje' ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic', xa jun cuc'axic quib; ri jun wächbal cäc'oji' che ri jun u tza'm, ri jun chic che ri jun chic u tza'm," 
Exodus25:20 cuc'ulaj rib qui wäch, are c'u ri qui palaj are caquica'yej ri tz'apibal, cäliq'ue ri qui xic' puwi' ri tz'apibal e jacha' jun mu'j." 
Exodus25:21 Chaya' ri tz'apibal puwi' ri caxa, chaya' c'u ri pixab chupam ri caxa ri quenya' chawe." 
Exodus25:22 Chila' quinrik wi wib awuc', kas puwi' ri tz'apibal chquixo'l ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic' ri e c'o puwi' ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, chila' quinya' wi na conojel ri nu takanic chawe ri caya' na chque ri aj israelib.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Chabana' jun mexa re q'uisis, ri quetan quiejeb k'abaj u rabic, quieb k'abaj u wäch, oxib k'abaj cärak'anibej." 
Exodus25:24 Chach'uku' rij ruc' utzalaj k'an puak, chasutij ri u chi' che jun retz'balil re k'an puak." 
Exodus25:25 Oxib u wi' k'abaj u wäch ri u chi' cabano, casutij c'u ri u chi' che jun retz'balil re k'an puak;" 
Exodus25:26 chabana' quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak, chebacojo' che ri quiejeb u tza'm, paquiwi' tak ri rakan," 
Exodus25:27 rech quecanaj kas chuchi' ri mexa, jeri' cuya' quejut ri che' chquipam, che telebal rech." 
Exodus25:28 E re q'uisis ri telebal rech ri mexa cabano, cach'uk c'u quij ruc' k'an puak," 
Exodus25:29 xukuje' chebabana' ri e u platoyil, ri e nimak tak u pac'bal, ri e u xaru', xukuje' tak kumubal ri quejamix wi ri sipanic quech ja'." 
Exodus25:30 Amak'el quebacoj ri caxlanwa puwi' ri mexa chnuwäch ri caxlanwa ri cätas chwe.” 
Exodus25:31 “Xukuje' caban jun tzuc'ulibal re utzalaj k'an puak, ch'ayom ruc' bajibal. Ri u tiq'uilibal, ri rakan, ri e u lakil, ri e u mansanil, ri e u cotz'ijal, xa jun ruc'axic rib," 
Exodus25:32 pa ri quieb u xcut quebel wakib u k'ab, oxib pa ri jun u xcut, oxib pa ri jun u xcut chic." 
Exodus25:33 Chquijujunal ri wakib u k'ab ri quebel che ri rakan ri tzuc'ulibal quebacoj ox ox u lakil ri junam ruc' ri u cotz'ijal ri almendr, querachilaj ri u mansanil, ri u cotz'ijal," 
Exodus25:34 ri rakan xukuje' quebacoj quiejeb u lakil junam ruc' ri u cotz'ijal ri almendr, rachilam ri u mansanil, ri u cotz'ijal." 
Exodus25:35 Chquijujunal ri oxc'ulaj u k'ab ri quebel che ri tzuc'ulibal cacoj jun cotz'i'j paquiwi'. 
Exodus25:36 Ri e u mansanil xukuje' ri e u k'ab xa jun ruc'axic quib ruc' ri tzuc'ulibal, re utzalaj k'an puak cabano, ch'ayom ruc' bajibal." 
Exodus25:37 Chebacojo' wukub yabal k'ak' che, ri cäquiya' sakil chquiwäch aretak quetzijic," 
Exodus25:38 ri chupbal ri cajwataj che ri yabal k'ak' xukuje' ri alaj tak u lak, e re utzalaj k'an puak quebabano." 
Exodus25:39 Oxib arob utzalaj k'an puak cacoj che ri tzuc'ulibal xukuje' conojel ri e u chaconisan," 
Exodus25:40 chatoc il che u banic, je jas ri xec'utun chawäch puwi' ri juyub.”" 
Exodus26:1 “Lajuj tasbal re tumim lino cacoj che ri u banic ri k'ijilabal, quem azul, quem morato, quiäk quem; utzalaj qui t'isic, quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic' cat'is chquiwäch." 
Exodus26:2 Chquijujunal ri tasbal rajawaxic xa junam quetabalil; cajlajuj (14) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui rabic, cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui wäch." 
Exodus26:3 Chebat'isa' ri job tasbal cäquekala quib ri qui chi', xukuje' je caban chi chque ri job," 
Exodus26:4 chebacojo' jujun c'amal re bätz' azul chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' chuchi' ri job tasbal chic. 
Exodus26:5 Che ri nabe job tasbal, che ri ucab job tasbal, rajawaxic caban cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal ri cäquic'ulajij quib." 
Exodus26:6 Chebabana' xukuje' cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re k'an puak, ri cäch'epabex que ri job tasbal cuc' ri job chic, jeri' chi ri u wi' ri k'ijilabal xa jun cutikej wi rib." 
Exodus26:7 Xukuje' chabana' julajuj (11) tasbal re quismal q'uisic', ri cux xa jun lic'om che ri ch'ukubal u wi' ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus26:8 Chquijujunal ri tasbal rajawaxic xa junam quetabalil; waklajuj (16) bara' qui rabic, cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui wäch." 
Exodus26:9 Chebat'isa' ri job tasbal xa jun caban chque, chebat'isa' ri wakib chic xa jun caban chque, chameja' ri uwak tasbal ri cäcanaj chuwäch ri lic'om." 
Exodus26:10 Chabana' cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal che t'ikbal rech xukuje' cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri wakib tasbal chic. 
Exodus26:11 Xukuje' quebaban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'apabal re k'an ch'ich', chebach'apa pa tak ri c'amal, rech conojel ri tasbal xa jun u wäch cacanajic." 
Exodus26:12 Rumal rech chi c'o na u rabic ri tasbal re ri lic'om, ri cäto'taj canok ch'akap cäcanaj pa jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal, ch'akap pa ri jun u xcut chic." 
Exodus26:13 Jeri' ri k'ijilabal kas cäch'ukutaj can cumal ri quieb ch'akatak ri quetzayi can pa ri quieb u xcut, niq'uiaj bara' cäcanaj pa ri jun u xcut, niq'uiaj bara' pa ri jun u xcut chic." 
Exodus26:14 Chabana' chic jun ch'ukubal re qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri tz'ajom ruc' quiäk, xukuje' caban chi jun ch'ukubal u wi' re utzalaj tz'um ri cäbe puwi'." 
Exodus26:15 Chebabana' jujun tak tz'alam re q'uisis che ri k'ijilabal, suc' qui cojic chabana'." 
Exodus26:16 Chquijujunal ri tz'alam rajawaxic job (5) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj qui rabic, oxib (3) k'abaj qui wäch," 
Exodus26:17 caban cacab qui tu' ri jujun tz'alam rech cäquich'apala' tak quib. Jewa' caban chque conojel ri u tz'alamil ri k'ijilabal. 
Exodus26:18 Aretak quebabano, chebabana' juwinak (20) tz'alam che ri mox k'ab." 
Exodus26:19 Chebacojo' cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal re sak puak. Chquijujunal ri tz'alam rajawaxic cacoj cacab qui tac'alibal ri quech'api wi ri qui tu'. 
Exodus26:20 Xukuje' je caban chi che ri jun u xcut chic re ri riquiak'ab, quebaban juwinak (20) u tz'alamil" 
Exodus26:21 cachil ri cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal re sak puak, rech quecanaj cacab qui tac'alibal ri jujun tz'alam." 
Exodus26:22 Che ri rij ri k'ijilabal ri c'o pa ri kajebal k'ij, chebabana' wakib tz'alam," 
Exodus26:23 xukuje' quieb chi tz'alam ri quebacoj chque ri xquina re chrij. 
Exodus26:24 We tz'alam ri' quech'ap chquixe' xukuje' paquiwi'. Je caban chi chque ri quieb tz'alam chic ri quebajwataj pa ri quieb u xquina. 
Exodus26:25 E wajxakib c'u wa' chi tz'alam cachil waklajuj qui tac'alibal ri cäquic'ulajij, cäbe quieb tac'alibal re sak puak chquixe' jujun tz'alam." 
Exodus26:26 Chebabana' job balul re q'uisis ri catok'obex que ri tz'alam che ri jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal," 
Exodus26:27 job balul chic ri cätok'obex que ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut chic, xukuje' job chic ri cätok'obex que ri tz'alam chrij ri k'ijilabal ri cäca'y pa ri u kajebal k'ij." 
Exodus26:28 Ri balul ri cäcanaj pa qui niq'uiajil quebutok'ej conojel ri tz'alam pa qui niq'uiajil, pa jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal c'ä pa ri jun u xcut chic." 
Exodus26:29 Cach'uk quij ri tz'alam ruc' k'an puak, quebaban qui xiquin re k'an puak, ri quejut wi ri balul xukuje' cach'uk quij ri balul ruc' k'an puak." 
Exodus26:30 Cawoc ri k'ijilabal, jas ri u bantajic ri xc'utun chawäch puwi' ri juyub." 
Exodus26:31 Chabana' jun ch'ukubal re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino; chebat'isa' quieb wächbal chuwäch, ri aj cajalaj tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic'." 
Exodus26:32 Cuc' jujun ch'epebal re k'an puak, caxequeba' chque quiejeb akan re q'uisis, ri ch'ukum quij ruc' k'an puak quec'oji' c'u paquiwi' quiejeb qui tac'alibal re sak puak." 
Exodus26:33 Caxequeba' ri ch'ukubal cuc' ch'epebal re k'an puak, chila' c'ut, chrij ri ch'ukubal caya' wi ri caxa ri c'olbal re ri c'ulwächinic. We ch'ukubal ri' cajwataj na chiwe che tasbal u xo'l ri c'olbal tastalic ruc' ri c'olbal ri sibalaj tastalic." 
Exodus26:34 Cacoj c'u ri tz'apibal puwi' ri caxa rech ri c'ulwächinic chupam ri c'olbal ri sibalaj tastalic. 
Exodus26:35 Chaya' ri mexa chuwäch ri ch'ukubal pa ri k'ijilabal, pa ri riquiak'ab ri relebal k'ij are c'u ri tzuc'ulibal chaya' pa ri u mox k'ab ri relebal k'ij cuc'lawichij rib ruc' ri mexa." 
Exodus26:36 Chabana' jun oquibal ri cacoj chuchi' ri lic'om, jun tasbal re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino, utzalaj u t'isic cabano." 
Exodus26:37 Chebabana' akan re q'uisis che ri tasbal, ri cach'uk quij ruc' k'an puak xukuje' quebaban qui ch'epebal re k'an puak, quebaban job qui tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich'.”" 
Exodus27:1 “Chabana' jun porobal cajtzalaj, re che' re q'uisis cabano ri quetan cacab bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj ri jujun u xcut, jun bara' ruc' niq'uiaj cärak'anibej." 
Exodus27:2 Chabana' quiejeb ruc'a' pa ri quiejeb u xquina, ri xa jun cuc'axic quib ruc' ri porobal, cach'uk rij ri porobal ruc' k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus27:3 Conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj che ri porobal rajawaxic e re k'an ch'ich': ri c'olbal tak chaj, ri e jocobal tak chaj, ri e u lak, ri ch'ipibal tak ti'j xukuje' ri c'olbal tak rachak k'ak'." 
Exodus27:4 Chabana' jun quemom k'an ch'ich', chebacojo' quiejeb u xiquin re k'an ch'ich' che ri quiejeb u tza'm." 
Exodus27:5 C'äte' c'u ri' cacojo ri quemom k'an ch'ich' chuxe' ri u chi' ri porobal chcanaj c'u pa u niq'uiajil ri rak'anibal ri porobal. 
Exodus27:6 Chebabana' balul re q'uisis che telebal ri porobal, cach'uk c'u quij ruc' k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus27:7 Ri telebal rajawaxic quejut pa tak ri u xiquin, cäcanaj c'u pa ri quieb u xcut ri porobal, rech cuya' cätelexic." 
Exodus27:8 Ri porobal ri cabano re che', wocowic u banic, junam ruc' ri xc'utun chawäch pa ri juyub.”" 
Exodus27:9 “Chasuc'umaj jun uwo ja che ri k'ijilabal. Che ri jun u xcut pa ri u mox k'ab ri uwo ja rajawaxic quecoj tasbal re tumim lino che, cärababax u cojic jun tasbal re cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj u rabic." 
Exodus27:10 Ri juwinak (20) rakanil xukuje' ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal e re k'an ch'ich', ri e u ch'epebal xukuje' ri e u xiquin e re sak puak." 
Exodus27:11 Junam caban che ri jun u xcut chic pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij, carababex jun tasbal re cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj u rabic, quebacoj juwinak (20) rakan querachilaj ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich'; ri e u ch'epebal xukuje' tak ri e u xiquin e re sak puak." 
Exodus27:12 Che ri u xcut ri uwo ja ri cäca'y pa u kajebal k'ij, carababa' jun tasbal re juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj, querachilaj lajuj akan cuc' lajuj tac'alibal." 
Exodus27:13 Pa ri xcutaj che ri elebal k'ij carababa' jun tasbal re juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj. 
Exodus27:14 Pa ri jun u xcut ri oquibal cacoj wukub (7) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj tasbal, ruc' oxib akan xukuje' oxib tac'alibal." 
Exodus27:15 Pa ri jun u xcut chic ri oquibal xukuje' cacoj wukub (7) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj tasbal, ruc' oxib akan xukuje' oxib tac'alibal." 
Exodus27:16 Che ri kas oquibal pa ri uwo ja, cacoj jun tasbal re lajuj (10) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj u rabic, re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino, u chac utzalaj t'isomanel, quebacoj quiejeb akan ruc' quiejeb tac'alibal." 
Exodus27:17 Conojel ri akan ri e sutininak rij ri uwo ja, quebaban qui ch'epebal e re sak puak, xukuje' xiquinaj re sak puak xukuje' tak tac'alibal e re k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus27:18 Ri uwo ja cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj quetan ri u rabic, juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj quetan ri u wäch pa ri quieb u xcut, quieb bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj cärak'anibej. Ri Tasbal e re tumim lino are c'u ri qui tac'alibal e re k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus27:19 Conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj pa ri Rachoch Dios, e re k'an ch'ich' quebanic, xukuje' tak ri e u ch'ic.”" 
Exodus27:20 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi cäquic'am ulok aseit re aseitun ri c'äte u pitz'ic, rech man quechup taj ri yabal k'ak' rech quenicow amak'el." 
Exodus27:21 Ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol e are' quesuc'uman ri yabal k'ak' rech quenicow jun ak'ab chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chrij ri ch'ukubal ri c'o chunakaj ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic. Jun pixab wa' ri cäcanaj chque ri aj israelib xukuje' chque ri e quija'lil.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Chasiq'uij ri Aaron ri awachalal e rachilam ri e u c'ojol ri Nadab, ri Abiu, ri Eleazar, xukuje' ri Itamar, chebawesaj ulok chquixo'l ri aj israelib, rech queboc che cojol tabal tok'ob chnuwäch." 
Exodus28:2 Chebabana' ratz'iak ri awachalal Aaron ri c'o na qui banic, che u ya'ic u k'ij xukuje' rech je'l quilitajic." 
Exodus28:3 Chebatzijobej ri c'o qui no'j, ri e nu nojisam che no'jinic, rech cäquiban ri ratz'iak ri Aaron, coc c'u che cojol tabal tok'ob chnuwäch." 
Exodus28:4 Ri atz'iak ri quequibano e are tak wa': ri cäya' cho c'uxaj, ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, ri kas atz'iak, ri u pam atz'iak ri tz'otom, ri pisbal jolomaj re lino, xukuje' ri pas. Chequibana' ba' atz'iak ri pakal cajil che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol, rech quepatanij che cojol tabal tok'ob chnuwäch." 
Exodus28:5 Ri quebanow ri atz'iak, chquicojo' k'an puak, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino." 
Exodus28:6 Ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij rajawaxic re k'an puak, re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino, utzalaj u t'isic cäbanic" 
Exodus28:7 cäcoj quieb ximibal puwi' tak ri u teleb ri cäquirik wi quib ri qui tza'm. 
Exodus28:8 Ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij rachil rib, ruc' xukuje' re k'an puak, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, xukuje' tumim lino." 
Exodus28:9 Chebac'ama' quieb abaj cornalin, chatzoc'o ri qui bi' ri e ralc'ual ri Israel chquiwäch," 
Exodus28:10 wakib bi'aj chuwäch ri jun abaj, wakib bi'aj chic chuwäch ri jun abaj chic; jas ri u cholajil ri calaxic." 
Exodus28:11 Ri qui tzoq'uic ri bi'aj chquiwäch ri abaj, jun tzoc'ol abaj cäbanowic, je cäban che jacha' ri u tzoq'uic jun t'ikbal. Chebacojo' ri quieb abaj chupam k'an puak," 
Exodus28:12 chebacojo' puwi' ri ximibal re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri cäbe puwi' ri u teleb, we quieb abaj ri' are quenatan ri aj israelib, ri Aaron cäruc'aj bic ri qui bi' che ri ximibal puwi' ri u teleb chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che qui nataxic." 
Exodus28:13 Chupam k'an puak quebach'ep wi ri abaj; 
Exodus28:14 chabana' jun alaj pach'um k'an puak ri c'o quieb ximibal che, re utzalaj k'an puak, chacojo' che retz'balil ri k'an puak ri e ch'apom wi ri abaj." 
Exodus28:15 Ri cäya' cho c'uxaj rachilam ri e chaconisan re k'atan tzij, junam u banic cabano jacha' ri u banic ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, utzalaj u t'isic cäbanic. K'an puak cabanbej rech, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino," 
Exodus28:16 pim cajtzalaj u xcut, quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj quetan ri jujun u xcut." 
Exodus28:17 Chebacojo' cajcholaj je'lalaj tak abaj chuwäch. Ri nabe cholaj rajawaxic cäbe jun rubi, jun crisolit xukuje' jun esmerald;" 
Exodus28:18 ri ucab cholaj cäbe jun granat, jun zapir, jun jad;" 
Exodus28:19 ri urox cholaj jun jasint, jun agat xukuje' jun amatist;" 
Exodus28:20 ri ucaj cholaj jun topas, jun cornalin xukuje' jun jasp. Ri abaj rajawaxic quecoj pa k'an puak," 
Exodus28:21 e cablajuj (12) we abaj ri' chi conojel, cablajuj (12) c'ut ri qui bi' ri e u c'ojol ri Israel. Cätzoc' ri qui bi' ri e u c'ojol ri Israel chquijujunal chuwäch ri jujun abaj, jacha' ri u tzoq'uic jun t'ikbal." 
Exodus28:22 Chabana' jujun alaj tak pach'um re utzalaj k'an puak ri cäcoj che ri cäya' cho c'uxaj, e tumim e jacha' ximibal." 
Exodus28:23 Xukuje' chebabana' quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak, chebacojo' che ri quieb u tza'm ri cäya' cho c'uxaj;" 
Exodus28:24 chebacojo' ri quieb alaj tak pach'um re k'an puak che ri quieb xiquinaj ri e c'o puwi' ri quieb u tza'm ri cäya' cho c'uxaj. 
Exodus28:25 Ri quieb u tza'm chic ri alaj pach'um k'an puak chebawoc'owisaj puwi' ri u teleb, quebach'ep che ri ximibal u wi' u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri c'o chuwäch." 
Exodus28:26 Chebabana' chi quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak, chebacojo' che ri quieb u tza'm ri cäya' cho c'uxaj ri c'o iquim puwi' ri u chi' ri c'o chupam, ri nac'al che ri jalan atz'iak." 
Exodus28:27 Chebabana' chic quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak, chebacojo' che ri ximibal u wi' u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri cäbe chuwäch, chuxe' ri u t'isel, ajsic jubik' che ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij." 
Exodus28:28 Xa jeri' cäquirik quib ri xiquinaj re ri cäya' cho c'uxaj ruc' ri xiquinaj re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ruc' jun ximibal azul, rech cäcanaj ri cäya' cho c'uxaj ajsic che ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, man cätastaj ta c'u che." 
Exodus28:29 Xa jeri' ri Aaron aretak coc pa ri k'ijilabal, u cojom ri cäya' cho c'uxaj rachilam ri e chaconisan re k'atan tzij, xukuje' ri qui bi' ri e ralc'ual ri Israel cho u c'u'x chuwäch ri Ajawaxel rech quenataj che amak'el." 
Exodus28:30 Chacojo' ri Urim xukuje' ri Tumim, chuwäch ri cäya' cho c'uxaj e are c'u chaconisan wa' ri quebajwataj che k'atan tzij, rech queruc'aj bic ri Aaron cho u c'u'x aretak coc chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Amak'el c'ut quebuc'am bic ri Aaron we chaconisan tak ri' cho u c'u'x ri quebajwataj che ri k'atan tzij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus28:31 Azul atz'iak cacoj che u banic ri k'ubal ri cäcoj chuxe' ri jalan atz'iak. 
Exodus28:32 Catek' ri u kul pa u niq'uiajil ri coc wi ri jolomaj. Cabol ri u chi' ri xatek'o jacha' ri cäban che jun atz'iak re tz'um rech man cäjixjob taj. 
Exodus28:33 Chacojo' retz'balil ri u chi' ri kas atz'iak cuc' crabaj re quem azul, quem morato' xukuje' quiäk quem, ri yujtal u xo'l cuc' tzilintzilin re kan puak je caban wa' che cacoj che ronojel ri u chi';" 
Exodus28:34 cäbe jun tzilintzilin re k'an puak cäbextax c'u jun crabaj, jun chi tzilintzilin jun chi crabaj, je retz'balil wa' ronojel ri u chi' ri kas atz'iak." 
Exodus28:35 Cucoj c'u bic ri Aaron ri kas atz'iak aretak cuban ri u chac re cojol tabal tok'ob, rech cätataj ri u tzinilajem ri tzilintzilin aretak coc pa ri k'ijilabal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel o aretak quel ulok, we man je cuban wa' cäcämic." 
Exodus28:36 Chabana' jun liq'uilic utzalaj k'an puak, je ta ne ri caban jun t'ikbal che, quebatzoc' we tzij ri' chuwäch: Tastal che patanixic ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus28:37 Chacojo' ri liq'uilic k'an puak chuwäch ri pisbal jolomaj, chaxima' che jun ximibal azul rech co cäcanajic." 
Exodus28:38 Cäc'oji' c'u chujolom ri Aaron amak'el, ri Aaron are queka'n ri sachinakil ri caquiban ri aj israelib pa ta ri tastalic tak jastak, xukuje' aretak quequijach tak ri qui sipanic, ri liq'uilic k'an puak cubano chi ri Ajawaxel quebuc'amowaj tak ri sipanic." 
Exodus28:39 Re lino ri u pam atz'iak cabano tz'otom u wäch, xukuje' ri pisbal jolomaj re lino cabano. Ri pas rajawaxic utzalaj u t'isic cäbanic." 
Exodus28:40 Chabana' qui pam atz'iak chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, qui pas, xukuje' pisbal jolomaj che u ya'ic qui k'ij xukuje' rech je'l quebilitajic." 
Exodus28:41 Chebacojo' we atz'iak ri' chrij ri Aaron xukuje' chquij ri e u c'ojol, cak'ij c'u aseit puwi' ri qui jolom che u ya'ic takanic pa qui k'ab xukuje' che qui tewichi'xic rech quecanaj che cojol tabal tok'ob chnuwäch." 
Exodus28:42 Xukuje' chebabana' qui säcaw re lino che u ch'ukic quib, ri cäpe xe' qui pam copan c'ä chukul tak cakan." 
Exodus28:43 Cucoj c'u ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol aretak queboc pa ri k'ijilabal, o aretak quekeb chunakaj ri porobal che ri patanijic pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, rech man c'o ta mac cäriktaj chquij ri quecäm ta rumal. Pixab wa' ri cäcanaj che ri are' xukuje' chque ri e u rija'lil.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Che qui tasic e jacha' che nu cojol tabal tak tok'ob, are wa' ri rajawaxic caban chque: chacha' jun alaj ama' wacax xukuje' quieb ama'ib tak chij ri man c'o ta qui yab;" 
Exodus29:2 chebabana' caxlanwa xukuje' caxlanwa re coc'alaj c'äj ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc' yok'om aseit ruc', xukuje' wotz'otz' ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc' ri e chicom che aseit," 
Exodus29:3 chebaya' pa jun alaj chicäch, chebac'ama' bic pa ri k'ijilabal junam ruc' ri alaj ama' wacax xukuje' ri quieb ama'ib tak chij;" 
Exodus29:4 chac'ama' c'u bic ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, cabij chque chi quebatinic;" 
Exodus29:5 chebac'ama' ri atz'iak que ri cojol tabal tok'ob, chacojo' ri u pam atz'iak chrij ri Aaron, ri kas atz'iak, ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij xukuje' ri cäya' cho c'uxaj. Utz u ximic ri pas chabana' ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij;" 
Exodus29:6 chacojo' ri pisbal jolomaj, cacoj c'u ri liq'uilic k'an puak chuwäch ri pisbal jolomaj ri cäc'utuwic chi cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Exodus29:7 Chatasa' c'ut ri Aaron jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob, chac'ama' ri aseit re tastajic, chak'ija' pa u jolom." 
Exodus29:8 Chabij chque ri e u c'ojol chi quekeb awuc', chebacojo' ri u pam tak atz'iak chquij." 
Exodus29:9 Utz u cojic ri u pas ri Aaron cabano xukuje' ri qui pas ri e u c'ojol, utz caban che u cojic ri pisbal jolomaj chqui jolom. Je caban wa' che u ya'ic ri takanic pa qui k'ab, xukuje' ri qui chac re cojol tabal tok'ob cäcanaj c'u can che jun pixab re chbe k'ij sak." 
Exodus29:10 Chac'ama' c'u bic ri alaj ama' wacax chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, rech ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol cäquiya' ri qui k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj," 
Exodus29:11 chatok'o ri u kul chila' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Exodus29:12 Chac'ama' jubik' che ri u quiq'uel ri alaj ama' wacax ruc' ri u wi' a k'ab, chabila' chque ri ruc'a' ri porobal, ri quic' ri cäto'tajic chajamij pa rakan ri porobal." 
Exodus29:13 Chque ri ixco'l, ri seseb, ri quieb u quinak' chawesaj ronojel ri xepo ri c'o chque, chaporoj puwi' ri porobal;" 
Exodus29:14 are c'u ri u ti'jal, ri alaj ama' wacax, ri u tz'umal, ri u mes, chaporoj chrij ri kajebal, tojbal c'u macaj wa'." 
Exodus29:15 Chac'ama' jun chque ri quieb ama'ib tak chij, are c'u ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol chquiya' ri qui k'ab puwi' ri u jolom." 
Exodus29:16 Chatok'o ri u kul, chachicoj ri u quiq'uel puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal;" 
Exodus29:17 chatasila', chebach'aja' ri rixco'l xukuje' ri rakan, chebaya' ruc' ri ch'akatak xukuje' ri u jolom." 
Exodus29:18 Chachi'j c'u ri ama' chij puwi' ri porobal, jacha' tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, jacha' sipanic porom ri cäc'oc'atic." 
Exodus29:19 Chac'ama' chi c'u ri jun ama' chij chic, are' c'u ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol, chequiya' ri qui k'ab puwi' ri u jolom." 
Exodus29:20 Chatok'o ri u kul ri ama' chij, chac'ama' jubik' che ri u quiq'uel chabila' chuxe' u xiquin ri Aaron, xukuje' chuxe' qui xiquin ri e u c'ojol re ri quiquiak'ab, puwi' ri nim u wi' qui k'ab re ri quiquiak'ab xukuje' puwi' ri nim u wi' cakan re ri qui wiquiak'ab. Are c'u ri quic' ri cäto'tajic chachicoj puwi' ri porobal xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal." 
Exodus29:21 Chac'ama' jubik' che ri quic' xukuje' che ri aseit ri cäk'ij pa u jolom ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri c'o puwi' ri porobal, chachicoj chrij ri Aaron xukuje' chrij ri ratz'iak, chquij ri e u c'ojol xukuje' chquij ri catz'iak. Ruc' ri u banic wa' ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol, quetastajic xukuje' ri catz'iak." 
Exodus29:22 Chac'ama' chi c'ut ri xepo ri c'o che ri u je' ri ama' chij xukuje' ri c'o che ri ixco'l xukuje' ri c'o che ri seseb, chebac'ama' c'u xukuje' ri quieb u quinak' xukuje' ri xepo ri e ch'ukuwinak, xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o che ri ra' re riquiak'ab, jun c'u ama' chij wa' ri quetasow ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Exodus29:23 Che ri caxlanwa ri man yo'm ta ch'am ruc' ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chac'ama' jun caxlanwa quetequic, jun caxlanwa ri yok'om aseit ruc', xukuje' jun wotz'otz';" 
Exodus29:24 ronojel wa' quebaya' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol, chabana' c'ut ri banoj rech ri tac'abam ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus29:25 Chebac'ama' c'ut pa qui k'ab, chaporoj puwi' ri porobal cärachilaj ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Sipanic wa' ri porom che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus29:26 Che ri u tasic ri Aaron, chac'ama' xukuje' ri uwo u c'u'x ri ama' chij chibana' c'ut ri banoj re ri roc'owisaxic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Chawe c'u at ya'tal wi wa'." 
Exodus29:27 Chatasa' ri uwo c'uxaj ri oc'owisam ri yo'm che sipanic ri nim u banic jas ri nak'atisabal xukuje' ri ra' ri ama' chij, ri cächi'x che cuchuj, u tz'akatil c'ut ri chij re ri tastajic ri cätas can che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol." 
Exodus29:28 Rech c'ut ri Aaron wa' xukuje' ri e u c'ojol. Jun pixab wa' re chbe k'ij sak chque ri aj israelib: we sipanic ri' are jun cuchuj ri cäquiya' ri aj israelib jacha' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib ruc' ri Ajawaxel. 
Exodus29:29 Ri tastalicalaj tak ratz'iak ri Aaron cäquechbej can ri e u wi' tak u mam aretak quetas che cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' aretak cäya' takanic pa qui k'ab che cojol tabal tok'ob. 
Exodus29:30 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri rija'lil ri Aaron ri cacanaj chupam ri u c'olbal ri coc c'u chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib rech capatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal, quebucoj na we atz'iak ri' wukub k'ij." 
Exodus29:31 Cuc'am c'u na ri chij re ri tasow ib cutzac c'ut ri u ti'jal pa jun tastalic c'olbal. 
Exodus29:32 Ri Aaron e rachilam ri e rachalaxic cäquitij ri u ti'jal ri ama' chij xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch, chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Exodus29:33 Cäquitij c'u quech we jastak ri' ri xbanbex ri cuyubal qui mac, aretak xetastajic, xquic'am c'u takanic e jacha' e cojol tak tabal tok'ob. C'o c'u jun apachique winak mutij rech we jastak ri', e tastajinak c'ut." 
Exodus29:34 We c'o cäto'taj can che ri ti'j, ri caxlanwa che ri ucab k'ij ri xbanbex ri tastajic, cäporox pa k'ak' ri to'tajinak canok, c'o c'u mätijowic, tastal c'ut." 
Exodus29:35 Chabana' ronojel wa' ruc' ri Aaron xukuje' cuc' ri e u c'ojol, je jas ronojel ri xinbij chawe. Wukub k'ij chabeytajisax ri u ya'ic ri takanic pa qui k'ab," 
Exodus29:36 chachi'j ronojel k'ij jun alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob che qui rikic ri sachbal tak macaj; cajosk'ij ri porobal aretak cachi'j jun tabal tok'ob re sachbal macaj, chajamij aseit puwi' ri porobal che u tastajic." 
Exodus29:37 Wukub k'ij chabeytajisaj qui ya'ic tabal tak tok'ob re sachbal mac puwi' ri porobal, jewa' caban che u jachic che ri Dios, cux c'u na jun porobal ri sibalaj tastalic: ronojel jasach ri cäkeb ruc' ri porobal cätastajic.”" 
Exodus29:38 “K'ij chi k'ij mel a k'ij rajawaxic quebachi'j quieb alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab puwi' ri porobal. 
Exodus29:39 Jun chque caya' ak'abil, ri jun chic benak k'ijil." 
Exodus29:40 Ruc' ri nabe alaj ama' chij, cachi'j quiejeb libra ruc' quiejeb onz coc'alaj c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit re aseitun ruc', xukuje' jun litro u wal uva ri cajamixic." 
Exodus29:41 Je caban che ri jun alaj ama' chij chic benak k'ij xukuje' ri sipanic re c'äj, re u wal uva, sipanic wa' ri cäporoxic ri cäc'oc'at chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus29:42 We sipanic tak ri' ri queporox che u ya'ic nu k'ij e are' tak wa' ri cätakex qui poroxic cumal ri tataxelab xukuje' cumal ri alc'ualaxelab amak'el chnuwäch, chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chila' c'ut ri quinrik wi na wib awuc' che a tzijobexic." 
Exodus29:43 Chila' quinrik wi na wib cuc' ri aj israelib, catastaj ri c'olbal rumal ri nu c'olem." 
Exodus29:44 Quintas na ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xukuje' ri porobal, xukuje' quitas na ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol e jacha' che e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e wech." 
Exodus29:45 Quinjeki' chquixo'l ri aj israelib, quinoc c'u che qui Dios." 
Exodus29:46 Jeri' cäquich'ob na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios, ri xebesan ulok pa Ejipt, rech quinc'oji' chquixo'l. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Chabana' xukuje' jun porobal re q'uisis ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol. 
Exodus30:2 Cajtzalaj c'ut caban che, niq'uiaj bara' u rabic, niq'uiaj bara' u wäch, jun bara' cärak'anibej, ri e ruc'a' rajawaxic cäcuc'aj quib che ri porobal." 
Exodus30:3 Chacojo' utzalaj k'an puak chrij, ri quiejeb u xcut xukuje' tak ri ruc'a', chasutij rij che jun retz'balil re k'an puak." 
Exodus30:4 Chebacojo' jujun tak u xiquin re k'an puak chuxe' ri retz'balil, quieb che ri jun u xcut quieb che ri jun u xcut chic, ri quejut wi ri balul che u telexic bic." 
Exodus30:5 Re q'uisis ri balul ri quebabano, cacoj k'an puak chquij." 
Exodus30:6 Chaya' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol chuwäch ri ch'ukubal ri c'o chunakaj ri caxa ri c'o wi ri c'ulwächinic, chuwäch ri tz'apibal ri cäch'ukuwic, ri quinrik wi na wib awuc'." 
Exodus30:7 Ri Aaron cuporoj na c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi' we porobal ri' ronojel ak'abil, aretak quebusuc'umaj ri yabal k'ak'," 
Exodus30:8 xukuje' aretak quebe tzij ri yabal k'ak' benak tak k'ij, cuporoj ri c'oc' k'ol. Nak'atisabal wa' ri cätakex u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel amak'el." 
Exodus30:9 Maporoj jun c'oc' k'ol chic puwi' we porobal ri', mawi tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, mawi sipanic re c'äj, mawi jubik' majamij u wa'l uva puwi'." 
Exodus30:10 We porobal ri' xa jumul jachom che ri Ajawaxel, ri Aaron xa jumul pa ri jun junab cuya' ri quic' re ri tabal tok'ob re sachbal mac paquiwi' ri ruc'a' ri porobal. Xa jumul pa ri jun junab, cäya' ri tabal tok'ob re sachbal mac puwi' we porobal ri'.”" 
Exodus30:11 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus30:12 “Aretak quebawajilaj ri aj israelib, chquijujunal rajawaxic cäquiya' ri torobal quech che ri Ajawaxel che torobal rech ri qui c'aslemal, rech aretak e ajilam chic man c'o ta jun yabil re cämical cäpe paquiwi'." 
Exodus30:13 Ronojel ri tz'ibam u bi' cuya' na che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel pa niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz sak puak, ri pa niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz je jas ri pajbal ri cäcoj chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus30:14 Conojel ri eboquinak pa ajilabal ri oc'owinak chi jutak juwinak (20) qui junab, rajawaxic cäquiya' we torobal ri chech ri Ajawaxel," 
Exodus30:15 chquijujunal aretak cäquiya' ri torobal quech che ri Ajawaxel che u toric ri qui c'aslemal, mawi ri k'inom cuya' u wi' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz sak puak, mawi ri meba' ma ta cutz'akatisaj ri pa niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz sak puak." 
Exodus30:16 Camulij ri puak ri cäquiya' ri aj israelib che u toric ri qui c'aslemal, cajach pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib rech cajwataj chila'. Are c'u cäbanow wa' chi quenataj ri aj israelib che ri Ajawaxel, chi xquiya' ri torobal rech ri qui c'aslemal.”" 
Exodus30:17 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus30:18 “Chabana' jun tzima re k'an ch'ich', xukuje' ri u tiq'uilibal re k'an ch'ich' cabano, cajwataj c'u wa' che ch'ajbal ib; chaya' chuxo'l ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' ri porobal canojisaj c'u che ja'." 
Exodus30:19 Chila' c'ut cäquesaj wi qui ja' ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol che u ch'ajic qui k'ab xukuje' cakan," 
Exodus30:20 quequich'aj c'ut ri cakan qui k'ab aretak queboc pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib xukuje' aretak quenakajin che ri porobal che u jachic ri sipanic ri cäporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, we je caquiban wa' man quecäm taj." 
Exodus30:21 Rech man quecäm taj, rajawaxic cäquich'aj ri qui k'ab xukuje' ri cakan. Jun pixab wa' ri man cäq'uextaj taj re chbe k'ij sak che ri Aaron, xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil.”" 
Exodus30:22 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus30:23 “Chacha' ri c'oc' k'ol ri sibalaj c'oc' na: chacha' oxlajuj (13) libra utzalaj mir, wakib libra ruc' wajxakib onz cane'l, wakib libra ruc' wajxakib onz c'oc'alaj aj;" 
Exodus30:24 oxlajuj (13) libra ri c'oc'alaj u ra'b ri casia, pajom pa ri pajbal ri c'o pa ri u Lic'om Rachoch Dios, oxib litro ruc' niq'uiaj aseit re aseitun." 
Exodus30:25 Chacojo' ronojel wa' che u banic ri aseit ri cäcoj che qui tasic ri jastak, junam u suc'umaxic cabano jas ri cuban jun banal c'oc'alaj cunabal. Are aseit wa' ri cäcoj che qui tewichi'xic ri jastak," 
Exodus30:26 cäjamij c'u puwi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xukuje' puwi' ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic," 
Exodus30:27 ri mexa rachilam conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj che, ri tzuc'ulibal rachilam conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj che, xukuje' puwi' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol," 
Exodus30:28 ri porobal que tak ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic querachilaj conojel ri e u chaconisan, xukuje' ri tzima rachilam ri u tiq'uilibal." 
Exodus30:29 Je chabana' wa' che qui tasic quebux c'u na jastak ri sibalaj e tastalic apachique jasach ri quenakowic, cacanaj tastalic." 
Exodus30:30 Xukuje' chajamij we aseit ri' puwi' ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui wi' ri e u c'ojol, che qui tasic e jacha' che nu cojol tabal tok'ob," 
Exodus30:31 chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: ‘Chbe k'ij sak, are waseit wa' ri tastalic re tastajic." 
Exodus30:32 Mijamij puwi' apachique winak, mawi misuc'umaj chi jun aseit ri junam ta ruc' wa'. Jun tastalicalaj aseit wa' chibana' c'u che chi jun jasach tastalic." 
Exodus30:33 We c'o jachin cusuc'umaj jun aseit ri junam ruc' wa' o cujamij puwi' apachique winak, quesax ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Junam qui pajbalil we c'oc'al ri' chac'ama': k'ol, c'oc'alaj ixq'uiak, xukuje' galbano, ri cäc'oc'atic," 
Exodus30:35 chebacojo' we jastak ri' che u suc'umaxic jun utzalaj c'oc' k'ol ri tastalic, utz u yujaxic cabano jacha' ri cuban jun banal c'oc'al." 
Exodus30:36 Sibalaj coc' u que'xic niq'uiaj chabana', chaya' chuwäch ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib o ri xinrik wi na wib awuc'. We c'oc' k'ol ri' are wa' ri sibalaj tastal na," 
Exodus30:37 misuc'umaj chi jun c'oc' k'ol ri junam ta u banic ruc' ri a suc'umam ri xak ta ix quixcojowic. Rech c'u ri Ajawaxel wa', chawe c'u at are jun jasach ri sibalaj tastalic." 
Exodus30:38 Apachin ta ne ri cusuc'umaj jun c'oc' k'ol chic ri junam ta ruc' wa', ri xak ta are' cäcojowic, quesax ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil.”" 
Exodus31:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus31:2 “Chawilampe', nu cha'om ri Bezaleel, chquixo'l ri aj judeyib, u c'ojol ri Uri, ri' u mam c'ut ri Hur," 
Exodus31:3 nu nojisam c'u che ri ruxlabal ri Dios xukuje' che no'jinic, nawinic, etamanic, che qui banic jastak," 
Exodus31:4 che qui banic wikbal, che qui chacuxic k'an puak, sak puak, k'an ch'ich'," 
Exodus31:5 che qui tzoq'uic je'lalaj tak abaj, che qui josic che', che qui banic apachique je'lalaj tak chac." 
Exodus31:6 Nu cojom c'u ri Aholiab che to'l rech, ri u c'ojol ri Ahisamac, ri aj Dan. Conojel ri ajno'jab nu yo'm u wi' ri qui no'jibal rech quecuin che u banic ronojel ri at nu takom che u banic:" 
Exodus31:7 Ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, ri caxa re c'ulwächinic, ri ch'ukubal wi'aj ri cäbe puwi' ri caxa, xukuje' conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios." 
Exodus31:8 Ri mexa xukuje' ri e u chaconisan, ri tzuc'ulibal ri re utzalaj k'an puak xukuje' ri e u chaconisan, ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol," 
Exodus31:9 ri porobal ri caporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic que querachilaj ri e u chaconisan, ri tzima carachilaj ri u tiq'uilibal," 
Exodus31:10 ri quemom atz'iak, are wa' ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri quebucoj ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol aretak cäquiban ri qui chac re cojol tabal tok'ob," 
Exodus31:11 ri aseit ri cacoj che qui tewichi'xic ri jastak xukuje' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol ri cajwataj pa ri k'ijilabal. Cäquiban c'u na ronojel ri at nu takom che u banic.” 
Exodus31:12 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus31:13 “Kas at chattzijon cuc' ri aj israelib, chabij wa' chque: Ri ix, nim chebiwila' wi ri e nu k'ij re uxlanem, jun etal c'u wa' ri jekebam chnuxo'l iwuc' in che tak ri k'ij junab, rech quetamatajic chi in, ri Ajawaxel ri xixincha'o'." 
Exodus31:14 Ri k'ij re uxlanem jun tastalicalaj k'ij wa' chiwe, nim chiwila' wi, jachin c'u ri man nim ta cäril wi we k'ij ri', cäcämisaxic. Apachin ta ne ri cuban jun patanijic pa we k'ij ri', quesax ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Exodus31:15 Wakib k'ij cuya' cäban chac, are c'u ri uwuk k'ij, k'ij wa' re uxlanem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Apachin c'u ri cächacun pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, cäcämisaxic." 
Exodus31:16 Nim ba' chquila' wi ri aj israelib ri u chajixic ri k'ij re uxlanem, jacha' jun pixab ri junalic pa conojel ri k'ij junab." 
Exodus31:17 Jun etal c'u wa' ri cajeki' chquixo'l, ri aj israelib xukuje' wuc' in.” Pa wakib k'ij c'ut xuban ri Ajawaxel ri caj xukuje' ri ulew, pa ri uwuk k'ij xutanaba' u banic chac, xutakej c'u uxlanem." 
Exodus31:18 Aretak ri Ajawaxel xutanaba' u tzijobexic ri Moises puwi' ri juyub Sinai, xebujach quieb tz'alam abaj che ri tz'ibatal wi ri pixab rumal ri kas u wi' u k'ab ri Dios." 
Exodus32:1 Xquil c'u ri aj israelib chi, xbeytaj ri Moises che ri u kajic ulok puwi' ri juyub, xquimulij quib chrij ri Aaron, xquibij che: “Chatwalijok, chebabana' ka diosib ri cäc'amow ka be, ri Moises ri xujesan ulok pa Ejipt, man keta'm taj jas ri xuc'ulmaj.”" 
Exodus32:2 Ri Aaron xubij chque: “Chebiwesaj ba ri e u wi' tak xiquinaj re k'an puak ri e c'o che tak ri qui xiquin ri e iwixokil, ri e i c'ojol, ri e i mia'l, chebic'ama' ulok chwe waral.”" 
Exodus32:3 Conojel c'ut xquesaj ri u wi' tak qui xiquin re k'an puak ri e qui cojom che tak ri qui xiquin, xequijach pa u k'ab ri Aaron," 
Exodus32:4 xuc'am c'u chque, xuja'risaj ri k'an puak pa k'ak', xuban jun alaj ama' wacax, conojel c'ut je xquibij wa': “¡Israel, are a dios wa' ri xatesan ulok pa Ejipt!”" 
Exodus32:5 Aretak ri Aaron xril wa', xuwoc jun porobal chuwäch ri alaj ama' wacax, xuchap u rakic u chi', xubij: “Chwek cäkaban jun nimak'ij che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ak'ab xewalij chucab k'ij, xequiya' tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic, xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob che utzirisan ib. C'äte c'u ri xt'uyi c'u ri tinimit che wa'im, xuq'uianic, aretak xnojic xwalij che etz'enem." 
Exodus32:7 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Jät, chatkaj bic, ri awinakil ri xebawesaj ulok pa Ejipt, e kajinak pa mac." 
Exodus32:8 Chanim c'ut xquitas quib che ri be ri xebentak che u ternexic. Xquija'risaj k'an puak, xquiban jun alaj ama' wacax, cätajin cäquik'ijilaj, xukuje' cätajin cäquiya' tabal tok'ob chuwäch, cäquibij c'ut: ‘Israel, are a dios wa' ri xatesan ulok pa Ejipt.’”" 
Exodus32:9 Xubij chi ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “E wilom we winak ri', kas c'u wilom chi sibalaj co caquitac'aba' quib." 
Exodus32:10 ¡Camic chinaya' can pa jamaril nicowirinak c'u ri woyowal quinsachisaj na qui wäch! Ri in quinban na chawe jun nimalaj tinimit.” 
Exodus32:11 Ri Moises xuta' tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios, xubij: “Ajawaxel, ¿jas ta che cäk'ak'ar ri oyowal la puwi' ri tinimit la ri xesaj la ulok pa Ejipt ruc' ri nimalaj cuinem la?" 
Exodus32:12 ¿Jas ta che cäya' la be chi cäquibij ri aj ejiptib: ‘Ri Dios xeresaj bic waral ruc' ri itzel u chomanic che qui cämisaxic pa tak ri c'ache'laj, che u sachisaxic qui wäch cho ri uwächulew?’ Chk'ila' ba' la ri nimalaj oyowal la, chel c'u'x la mäc'äjisaj la u wäch ri tinimit la." 
Exodus32:13 Chenataj ri e pataninel tak ech la che la, ri Abraham, ri Isaac, xukuje' ri Israel, xcha' la chque ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri bi' la: ‘Quinbano chi ri e u wi' tak i mam sibalaj queq'uiyiric jacha' ri ch'imil ri e c'o pa ri caj, ronojel c'u we ulew ri' ri nu chi'm chiwe, quinya' che quechbal re chbe k'ij sak.’”" 
Exodus32:14 Xuk'il c'u rib ri Ajawaxel che ri c'ax ri u chomam u banic puwi' ri u tinimit. 
Exodus32:15 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Moises puwi' ri juyub, u c'amom ulok ri quieb tz'alam tak abaj ri e tz'ibatal wi ri pixab, tz'ibatal c'u ri caperaj qui wäch." 
Exodus32:16 Kas c'u are' ri Dios xbanow ri quieb tz'alam tak abaj, xukuje' kas are' ri Dios xtz'iban ri c'o chquiwäch ri abaj." 
Exodus32:17 Ri Josue aretak xuta' ri qui rakoj chi'aj ri winak, xubij che ri Moises: “Rakoj tak chi'aj re ch'o'j cätataj chquixo'l ri aj israelib.”" 
Exodus32:18 Ri Moises xubij che: “Man rakoj chi'aj taj re ch'o'j mawi rakoj chi'aj re bis, e jule' tak rakoj chi'aj chic ri quinto.”" 
Exodus32:19 Aretak c'u xopan ri Moises cuc' ri aj israelib, xril ri alaj ama' wacax ri qui banom, xukuje' ri xojowem ri cätajin cäquibano, xk'ak'ar ri royowal, xebuq'uiak ri tz'alam tak abaj ri e ruc'am ulok, xebuc'äjij chuxe' ri juyub;" 
Exodus32:20 xuc'am c'u ri alaj ama' wacax ri qui banom, xuq'uiak pa ri k'ak' xjaric, xtakan che u joq'uic c'ä xc'äjir na, we c'äjil ri' xujopij puwi' ri ja'; xebutak c'u ri aj israelib che ruq'uiaxic ri ja'." 
Exodus32:21 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron: “¿Jas ri xuban we tinimit ri' chawe chi xebatakchi'j che u banic jun nimalaj mac?” 
Exodus32:22 Ri Aaron xubij che ri Moises: “Matoyowar wuc', wajaw. Aweta'm chi we winak ri' are cäkaj ri u banic ri etzelal chquiwäch." 
Exodus32:23 Xquibij c'u chwe: ‘Chabana' jun ka dios ri cäc'amow ka be, man keta'm ta c'ut jas xuc'ulmaj we Moises ri' ri xujesan ulok pa Ejipt.’" 
Exodus32:24 Xinbij c'u chque: ‘Jachin ri c'o k'an puak ruc', chuc'ama' ulok.’ Xelquiya' c'u ri k'an puak chwe, ri in xinya' pa ri k'ak', ¡xel c'u we alaj ama' wacax ri'!”" 
Exodus32:25 Xril c'u ri Moises chi ri aj israelib xak e tzokopitalic qui yo'm quib pa yok'ic cumal ri qui c'ulel, man e k'ilom ta c'ut rumal ri Aaron," 
Exodus32:26 xtaq'ui' ri Moises chuchi' ri roquibal ri kajebal, xurak u chi', xubij c'ut: “Jachin tak ri qui yo'm qui tzij che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel, chepet wuc'.” Conojel c'u ri aj levitib, xquimulij quib ruc' ri Moises." 
Exodus32:27 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel: ‘Chijujunal chic'ama' ri i kok'ebal, jix pa ri kajebal, chixoc pa tak ri ja, chijujunal chebicämisaj ri iwanima' iwib cuc', ri e iwachalal, o e i c'ulja.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Ri aj levitib je xquibano jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises chque, craj c'u ne e oxib mil achijab xecäm pa ri k'ij ri' chquixo'l ri aj israelib." 
Exodus32:29 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Camic, quic'am ix tz'akatalaj takanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rumal rech chi chijujunal xuc'ulelaj ri u c'ojol jujun chic ri e rachalal. Rumal c'u rech wa' ix u tewichi'm ri Ajawaxel camic.”" 
Exodus32:30 Chucab k'ij, xubij ri Moises chque ri aj israelib: “Ri ix, i banom jun nimalaj mac. Camic quinpaki' chi na jawije' c'o wi ri Ajawaxel, che rilic we quincuinic chi quixucuyu'.”" 
Exodus32:31 Xopan c'u ri Moises jawije' c'o wi ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Kastzij, ri winak qui banom jun nimalaj mac, xquiban jun qui dios re k'an puak." 
Exodus32:32 Quintz'onoj tok'ob che la chi cäsach la qui mac, we c'u man caj la cäsach la qui mac, chesaj la ri nu bi' chupam ri wuj ri tz'ibam la.”" 
Exodus32:33 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Xuwi ri cämacun chnuwäch, are wa' quinwesaj ri u bi' chupam ri nu wuj." 
Exodus32:34 Jät ba', chebac'ama' bic we winak ri' pa ri c'olbal ri nu bim chawe. Cäc'am c'u na a be rumal ri nu tako'n aj caj. Aretak c'u copan ri k'ij re ri c'äjisan wächaj, quinc'äjisaj na qui wäch rumal ri qui mac.”" 
Exodus32:35 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' jun c'axalaj yabil paquiwi' ri winak, rumal rech chi xquik'ijilaj ri alaj ama' wacax re k'an puak ri xuban ri Aaron." 
Exodus33:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Jät, chatel bic waral, chebac'ama' bic ri winak ri xebawesaj ulok pa Ejipt. Jix pa ri ulew ri xinbij chi quinya' che ri Abraham, ri Isaac, ri Jacob, xukuje' chque ri qui' tak qui mam." 
Exodus33:2 Quintak na bic ri nu tako'n aj caj rech cuc'am a be, quebenwesaj c'u na bic ri aj cananeyib, ri aj amoreyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj perezeyib, ri aj hebeyib, ri aj jebuseyib." 
Exodus33:3 Jix pa ri ulew jawije' ri cabelel wi leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'. Man quinbe ta c'u chixo'l, mäc'ulmataj ne chi quinsach i wäch pa ri be, ri ix c'ut ix winak ri sibalaj ix tac.”" 
Exodus33:4 Aretak ri aj israelib xquita' we xibibalalaj tak tzij ri', sibalaj xebisonic, man c'o ta chi jun xucoj ri wikbal rib," 
Exodus33:5 u bim chi c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chabij chque ri aj israelib: ‘Ix, ix winak ri sibalaj ix tac. Pune' ta xa jubik' quinc'oji' chixo'l, quinq'uis u sachisaxic i wäch ri'. Chebiwesaj ba' conojel ri wikbal tak iwib kas camic, quinwil c'u na jas ri quinban na chiwe.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Je c'u ri' kas aretak e c'o pa ri juyub Horeb, ri aj israelib xquik'il tak quib che qui cojic ri wikbal tak quib." 
Exodus33:7 Ri Moises xuc'am ri lic'om ja, naj xuya' u wi che ri c'olbal ri c'o wi nabe, xucoj c'u Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, che u bi'. Aretak c'u c'o jun craj cuta' u no'j che ri Ajawaxel, cäbe c'ä pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios ri naj c'o wi che ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi ri aj israelib." 
Exodus33:8 Aretak cäbe ri Moises pa ri Lic'om, conojel ri winak quewalijic quetaq'ui' apan chuchi' ri qui cäbal ri lic'om, queca'y apan che ri Moises c'ä coc na chupam ri Lic'om."
