Exodus33:9 Xuwi c'u coc ri Moises chupam, ri jutac'aj sutz' cäkaj ulok chicaj cuya' rib chuchi' ri Lic'om cätzijon c'u ri Ajawaxel ruc' ri Moises." 
Exodus33:10 Aretak cäquil ri winak chi cäc'oji' ri jutac'aj sutz' chuchi' ri Lic'om, chquijujunal quexuqui' chuchi' ri kas qui cäbal ri lic'om, quek'ijilanic." 
Exodus33:11 Ri Dios cätzijon ruc' ri Moises chwinakil, jacha' ri cuban apachique winak ri cätzijon ruc' ri rachil cätzelej c'u ri Moises pa ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi ri aj israelib. Are c'u ri Josue ri u c'ojol ri Nun, ri c'o che to'l rech ri Moises, mawi jubik' quel pa ri Lic'om." 
Exodus33:12 Ri Moises xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Chilampe' la, ri lal catz'onoj la chwe chi quinc'am qui be we winak ri', man c'u bim ta la chwe jachin ri cätak la bic wuc'. Bim la chi sibalaj cu'l c'u'x la chwij, xukuje' chi in lok' chwäch la." 
Exodus33:13 We c'u kastzij chi in lok' chwäch la, quintz'onoj tok'ob che la chi cac'ut la ri be la chnuwäch, rech cäcu'bi nu c'u'x chij la chi amak'el in lok' chwäch la. Mäsach ba' pa jolom la chi e ech la we winak ri'." 
Exodus33:14 Kas In catinwachilaj na, catinwuxlanisaj c'u na,” xcha' ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus33:15 Are c'u ri Moises xutzelej u bixic che: “We man kas lal cujachilaj ta la bic, mujesaj la bic waral." 
Exodus33:16 We c'u ri lal, man cujachilaj ta la bic, ¿jas ta c'u ri cäban che retamaxic chi ri tinimit la xukuje' ri in uj lok' chwäch la? Xuwi c'u we lal c'o kuc', ri tinimit la xukuje' ri in, cujk'alajinic chi man uj ta junam cuc' conojel ri niq'uiaj tinimit chic ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew.”" 
Exodus33:17 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Ri a bim chwe, xukuje' quinbana' wa', rumal rech chi nu jiquibam nu c'u'x chawij, at lok' chnuwäch, a ch'äcom c'ut ri nu tok'ob,” xujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus33:18 “¡Ya' la chwe chi quiwil ri juluwem la!” xcha' ri Moises. 
Exodus33:19 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Ajawaxel: “Quinban c'ut chi coc'ow ronojel ri wutzil chawäch, chawäch c'ut at quinya' wi na u k'alajisaxic ri nu bi'. Quel na nu c'u'x che apachin ri quinwaj wi, quintok'obisaj u wäch apachin ri quinwaj wi." 
Exodus33:20 Quink'alajisaj c'u chawäch chi man catcuin taj cawil ri nu palaj, rumal rech chi man c'o ta jun winak ri cäcuin ta che rilic ri nu palaj, cutakej ta c'u c'aslem.”" 
Exodus33:21 Xukuje' xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chawilampe', waral chinunakaj, c'o jun c'olbal. Chattac'al puwi' we cowilaj abaj ri'." 
Exodus33:22 Aretak coc'ow ri nu juluwem catincoj chupam ri pec ri c'o xo'l ri cowilaj abaj, catinch'uk c'u na ruc' ri nu k'ab c'ä quinoc'ow na." 
Exodus33:23 Quinwesaj c'ut ri nu k'ab rech cawil ri wij, are c'u ri nu palaj man ya'tal taj chi cawilo.”" 
Exodus34:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chebaramij quieb tz'alam tak abaj junam cuc' ri quieb ri xecoj can nabe, rech quebentz'ibaj ri tzij chquiwäch, ri xetz'ibax chquiwäch ri nabe tz'alam tak abaj, ri xebapaxij." 
Exodus34:2 Chasuc'umaj awib chwek ak'ab, rech catpaki' puwi' ri juyub Sinai, quinaweyej c'u pa ri c'olbal ri naj elinak chicaj." 
Exodus34:3 Mawi jun winak cäpaki' ta awuc', mawi c'o jun militaj u wäch pa ronojel ri juyub; mawi chij, mawi wacax meyuk'ux cho ri juyub.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ri Moises xuramij quieb tz'alam tak abaj junam cuc' ri quieb nabe. Ak'ab c'ut chucab k'ij xebuc'am bic ri quieb tz'alam tak abaj, xpaki' puwi' ri juyub Sinai, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus34:5 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel pa jun sutz', xc'oji' c'u chila' ruc' ri Moises, xubij c'ut ri kas u bi'." 
Exodus34:6 Xoc'ow chuwäch ri Moises, je xubij wa' co u bixic ri kas u bi' xubij: “¡Ri Ajawaxel! ¡Ri Ajawaxel! ¡Dios junalic, xukuje' tok'obisal wächaj, coch'onel xukuje' nim pa lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' kastzij!" 
Exodus34:7 Ri cäcanaj jic pa ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x paquiwi' q'ui mil tak ija'lil, xukuje' cusach mac che ri banoj etzelal, ri c'ulelanic xukuje' ri macaj; mawi c'u jubik' ma ta cuc'äjisaj u wäch ri ajchak'mac, xane' cuc'äjisaj qui wäch ri quetzelal ri tataxelab paquiwi' ri alc'ualxelab, paquiwi' ri e i tak mam, paquiwi' ri e xiquin tak mam, xukuje' paquiwi' ri e calc'ual ri e xiquin tak mam.”" 
Exodus34:8 Chanim xumej rib ri Moises, xuk'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel xubij:" 
Exodus34:9 “¡Ajawaxel! ¡Ajawaxel! We kastzij chi in lok' chwäch la, chujachilaj la bic. We winak ri' kastzij sibalaj e tac, xa ba' sacha' la ri ka mac, ri ketzelal, chujc'ama' che tinimit la.”" 
Exodus34:10 Ri Ajawaxel xubij: “Chixtatabenok: In quinban camic jun c'ulwächinic ruc' ronojel ri a tinimit. Quebenban na mayibal tak jastak ri mawi jumul e banom pa jun nim tinimit chic ri c'o cho ri uwächulew, conojel c'u ri winak ri e c'o chquinakaj cäquil na ri cäcuin ri Ajawaxel che u banic, e mayibal tak c'ut ri quebenbana' na iwuc'." 
Exodus34:11 Chebitz'akatisaj ba' qui banic ri ix nu takom wi camic, are c'u ri in quebenwesaj bic chiwäch ri aj amoreyib, ri aj cananeyib, ri aj hititib, ri aj perezeyib, ri aj hebeyib, ri aj jebuseyib." 
Exodus34:12 Miban jun c'ulwächinic cuc' ri winak ri e jekel chupam ri ulew ri quixoc wi na, rech mequiban chiwe chi quixkaj chupam ri qui c'amibal." 
Exodus34:13 Xane' chebiyojij ri qui porobal, chebic'äjij conojel tak ri abaj ri quequik'ijilaj xukuje' tak cuta'm ri e tastalic." 
Exodus34:14 Mik'ijilaj jule' tak dios chic, rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel achixomanel. Dios achixomanel ri u bi'." 
Exodus34:15 Miban jun c'ulwächinic cuc' ri winak ri e jekel chupam we ulew ri', mäc'ulmataj ne chi aretak cäquimej quib che qui k'ijilaxic ri e qui diosib, aretak quequiya' tabal tok'ob chquiwäch, quixcula'j ta c'ut, quitij ta c'u iwech we tabal tak tok'ob ri'," 
Exodus34:16 o quequic'ulba' ta ne ri qui mia'l cuc' tak ri i c'ojol, aretak c'ut quequik'ijilaj tak ri e qui diosib, quequitakchi'j ta c'u ne tak ri e i c'ojol che u mejic quib chquiwäch che qui k'ijilaxic." 
Exodus34:17 Mawi jumul mebiban ix i diosib re tzacom ch'ich'.” 
Exodus34:18 “Chiwoc'owisaj ri nimak'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc', je roc'owisaxic quibano jacha' ri takanic ri nu yo'm chiwe, wukub k'ij quitij caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'. Ri u k'ijol are ri ic' Abib, chupam c'ut we ic' ri' xixel ulok pa Ejipt." 
Exodus34:19 Ronojel alc'ualaxel ala ri nabeal, wech in, xukuje' ri nabe tak cal ri e i wacax, ri e i chij, ri e i q'uisic', we ama' ri cäcalaj e wech in." 
Exodus34:20 Are c'u ri quiban che ri nabe ral ri ati't bur we ama' ri cäralaj, rajawaxic quiya' jun alaj chij o jun alaj q'uisic' che u q'uexwäch ri alaj bur; we c'u man quiya', qui k'ajisaj na ri rij u wi' ri alaj bur. Xukuje' rajawaxic quiya' jun sipanic che qui q'uexwäch ri e nabeal tak i c'ojol chquijujunal. C'o c'u jun mape che wilic we man c'o jas cuc'am ulok." 
Exodus34:21 Wakib k'ij chixchacunok, pa ri uwuk k'ij chixuxlanok, pune' pa u k'ijol ticonijic o pa u k'ijol k'atoj." 
Exodus34:22 Chiwoc'owisaj ri nimak'ij quech ri wukutak k'ij, ri quech ri nabe tak qui wächinic ri trico, xukuje' ri nimak'ij aretak cäq'uis u yaquic tak ri qui wäch ri tico'n q'uisbal re ri junab." 
Exodus34:23 Conojel ri e iwachijab rajawaxic pa jun junab cutac'aba' na rib oxmul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel. 
Exodus34:24 Ri in c'ut quebenwesaj na bic ri niq'uiaj nimak tak tinimit chic chiwäch, quinnimarisaj na u wäch ri iwulew. Jeri' man c'o ta jun cuchajij ta anima' che u majic ri iwulew aretak quixbe che u tac'abaxic iwib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios oxmul pa ri jun junab." 
Exodus34:25 Aretak quebiya' ri awaj che tabal tok'ob, merachilaj quic' xukuje' caxlanwa ri cäya' ch'am ruc', mawi quic'ol ta can ri cäto'taj canok che ri cäpil che ri Oc'owem che ri ucab k'ij." 
Exodus34:26 Rajawaxic quebic'am bic ri nabe utzalaj tak qui wächinic ri e iwulew pa ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Mebitzac ri alaj tak q'uisic' chupam ri u leche ri qui nan.” 
Exodus34:27 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chebatz'ibaj tak we tzij ri', are c'u wa' ri qui tac'alibal tak ri c'ulwächinic ri quiban awuc' xukuje' cuc' ri aj israelib.”" 
Exodus34:28 Ri Moises xcanaj can cawinak (40) k'ij, cawinak (40) ak'ab ruc' ri Ajawaxel, man xwa' taj mawi xuq'uianic. Xebutz'ibaj c'u ri tzij re ri pixab chquiwäch tz'alam tak abaj, are wa' ri e lajuj takomal." 
Exodus34:29 Aretak xto'taj ri Moises, xkaj ulok chuxe' ri juyub Sinai e ruc'am ulok ri quieb tz'alam tak abaj ri e tz'ibatal wi ri pixab, man c'o ta c'u cunabej chi ri u palaj cäjuluwic rumal rech chi xtzijon ruc' ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus34:30 Aretak ri Aaron xukuje' conojel ri aj israelib xquil ri u palaj ri Moises chi cäjuluwic, xquixe'j quib, man xekeb ta ruc'." 
Exodus34:31 Xesiq'uix c'u rumal ri Moises, ri Aaron e rachil conojel ri c'amal tak qui be ri aj israelib aretak xebopan ruc' ri Moises, ri Moises xtzijon cuc'." 
Exodus34:32 Chumatam chi jubik' xekeb conojel ri aj israelib, xebuya' c'u conojel ri takanic chque ri e u yo'm ulok ri Ajawaxel che puwi' ri juyub Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Aretak c'u xto'taj che tzij cuc', xuch'uk ri u palaj." 
Exodus34:34 Aretak ri Moises coc chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che u tzijobexic, cresaj ri ch'ukubal chupalaj c'ä quel na ulok. Cuk'alajisaj c'u chquiwäch ri aj israelib ri takanic ri yo'm ulok che rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus34:35 Aretak cäquil ri aj israelib chi cäjuluw ri u palaj ri Moises, ri Moises cucoj chi jumul ri ch'ukubal chupalaj, c'äte cresaj aretak coc chi jumul che u tzijobexic ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus35:1 Ri Moises xebumulij conojel ri aj israelib xubij chque: “Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm takanic chwe chi jewa' cäbanic: 
Exodus35:2 Wakib k'ij cuya' cäban chac, are c'u ri uwuk k'ij are jun tastalicalaj k'ij wa' chiwe re tz'akatalaj uxlanem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Apachin c'u ri cächacun pa we k'ij ri', cäcämisaxic." 
Exodus35:3 Apachique ta ne c'olbal ri ix c'o wi', micoj i k'ak' pa ri k'ij re uxlanem.”" 
Exodus35:4 Ri Moises xtzijon cuc' conojel ri aj israelib, xubij chque: “Are wa' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel:" 
Exodus35:5 Chic'ama' ulok sipanic che ri Ajawaxel. Conojel c'u ri cäcaj cäquic'am ulok ri qui sipanic che ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel canima', chquic'ama' ulok k'an puak, sak puak, k'an ch'ich'," 
Exodus35:6 quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, coc'alaj lino, quismal q'uisic'," 
Exodus35:7 qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij, ri e tz'ajom ruc' quiäk, utzalaj tak tz'um, che' re q'uisis," 
Exodus35:8 aseit ri cäya' pa tak ri yabal k'ak', c'oc'al tak ri caya' ruc' ri aseit ri cajwataj che ri tastajic xukuje' ri caya' ruc' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol," 
Exodus35:9 abaj re tak cornalin xukuje' niq'uiaj abaj chic ri e je'lic ri quenac' che ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, xukuje' ri cäcoj cho c'uxaj ri cucoj ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob.”" 
Exodus35:10 “Conojel ri quena'w che apachique chac chepetok, chelquibana' ronojel ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chi quebanic:" 
Exodus35:11 ri k'ijilabal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, ri ch'ukubal u wi' ri lic'om, ri ch'apabal tak rech, ri u tz'alamil, ri e u balulil, ri e rakan xukuje' ri e u tac'alibal," 
Exodus35:12 ri caxa rachilam ri e u bululil xukuje' ri ch'ukubal wi'aj, ri tasbal, ri ch'ukubal ri cäch'ukuwic," 
Exodus35:13 ri mexa rachilam ri e u balulil xukuje' ronojel ri e u chaconisan, ri caxlanwa ri cäya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel," 
Exodus35:14 ri tzuc'ulibal ri cuya' sakil e rachilam ri e u chaconisan xukuje' tak ri yabal k'ak'," 
Exodus35:15 ri porobal rech ri c'oc' k'ol e rachilam ri e u balulil, ri aseit ri cäcoj che qui tasic ri jastak, ri c'oc'alaj k'ol, ri tasbal re ri u chi' ri k'ijilabal," 
Exodus35:16 ri porobal ri queporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic, rachilam ri e quemom k'an ch'ich', ri e u balulil xukuje' ri e u chaconisan, ri tzima rachilam ri u tiq'uilibal," 
Exodus35:17 ri tasbal ri querababax chrij ri uwo ja rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, e rachil tak ri rakan xukuje' tak ri e u tac'alibal, ri tasbal ri cäcoj chuchi' ri oquibal cho ri uwo ja," 
Exodus35:18 ri e u ch'ic ri k'ijilabal xukuje' tak ri e rech ri uwo ja xukuje' ri tanibal tak rech," 
Exodus35:19 ri quemom atz'iak ri cucoj ri cojol tabal tok'ob che ri k'ijilanic chupam ri k'ijilabal, ri e tastalicalaj tak ratz'iak ri Aaron cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri atz'iak ri cäquicoj ri e u c'ojol che ri qui chac che u cojic ri tabal tok'ob.”" 
Exodus35:20 Aretak ri aj israelib xquiq'uis u ta'ic ri xbix chque rumal ri Moises, conojel xebe cho tak cachoch," 
Exodus35:21 conojel c'ut ri xsalabetaj ri canima', ruc' qui rayibal ri man xa ta e cawäch xquic'am ulok jun sipanic che ri Ajawaxel, rech cäban ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib xukuje' ronojel ri cajwatajic, je jacha' ri cajwataj che ri atz'iak ri nim u banic." 
Exodus35:22 Chi achijab, chi ixokib, xequic'am ulok ruc' ronojel canima', ronojel u wäch wikbal ri cäquiwikbej quib, mulk'ab, u wi' tak xiquinaj, ronojel qui wäch jastak re k'an puak. Chquijujunal xquic'am ulok ri qui sipanic re k'an puak ri qui bim chi cäquiya' che ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus35:23 Ri e c'o tak quem azul cuc', quem morato', quiäk quem, coc'alaj lino, quismal q'uisic', qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri quiäkarisam o utzalaj tak tz'um, xequic'am ulok." 
Exodus35:24 Ri xquic'am ulok sipanic re sak puak o re k'an ch'ich', xq'uic'am ulok chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; e are c'ut ri c'o che' re q'uisis cuc' xequic'am ulok che qui banic ri jastak ri quebajwatajic." 
Exodus35:25 Ri ixokib ri quecuinic quequemenic, xequic'am ulok ri qui quem re azul, quem re morato', re quiäk quem, re coc'alaj lino;" 
Exodus35:26 are c'u ri ixokib ri quecuin che tak wikbal, xpe pa canima' xequibatz'ij quismal q'uisic'." 
Exodus35:27 Ri c'amal tak be o ri c'o quekle'n, xequic'am ulok abaj cornalin xukuje' niq'uiaj tak abaj chic ri e je'lic, rech quenac' che ri jalan atz'iak xukuje' che ri cäcoj cho c'uxaj ri cucoj ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob," 
Exodus35:28 c'oc'al xukuje' aseit ri cuya' sakil xukuje' ri cäya' ruc' ri aseit ri cäcoj che tastajic xukuje' che ri c'oc'alaj k'ol. 
Exodus35:29 Conojel ri aj israelib chi achijab chi ixokib, ri xpe pa canima' chi quetobanic rech cäbantaj ri xtakanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, conojel xequic'am ulok ri qui sipanic ruc' ronojel canima' che ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus35:30 Ri Moises xubij chque ri aj israelib: “Chiwilampe', ri Ajawaxel xresaj ri Bezaleel chquixo'l ri ramak' ri Juda ri u c'ojol ri Uri, ri ri' u mam c'ut ri Hur," 
Exodus35:31 u nojisam c'u che ri ruxlabal ri Dios, che no'j, che ch'obonic, che etamanic, che nawinic xukuje' che qui banic jastak" 
Exodus35:32 che qui banic wikbal xukuje' jastak re k'an puak, re sak puak, re k'an ch'ich'," 
Exodus35:33 che qui tzoq'uic xukuje' che qui naq'uic je'lalaj tak abaj, che qui josic che' xukuje' che qui banic je'lalaj tak wikbal." 
Exodus35:34 Xukuje' nu yo'm u no'j che tijonic. Ri are' rachilam ri Aholiab ri u c'ojol ri Ahisamac, ri aj Dan," 
Exodus35:35 e nu yo'm quetamabal che u banic apachique chac ri mayibal tak qui banic, che qui t'isic tak quem azul, quem morato', quiäk tak quem, coc'alaj lino, che u quemic apachique quem ri c'o tak quetz'balil.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Jeri', ri Bezaleel rachilam ri Aholiab xukuje' conojel ri quena'w che apachique chac, ri yo'm qui no'j, quetamabal rumal ri Ajawaxel che qui banic conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj che ri k'ijilanic chupam ri k'ijilabal, xquitz'akatisaj ri xtakan ri Ajawaxel che u banic.”" 
Exodus36:2 Ri Moises xusiq'uij ri Bezaleel, ri Aholiab xukuje' conojel ri quecuin che apachique chac, ri yo'm we etamanic ri' chque rumal ri Ajawaxel, qui chi'm c'u quib pa quech wi che ri to'banic chupam we chac ri'." 
Exodus36:3 Ri Moises xebujach ri sipanic pa qui k'ab ri e qui c'amom ulok ri aj israelib, rech cäquichaplej u banic ri cajwataj che ri k'ijilanic chupam ri k'ijilabal. Ronojel k'ij c'ut cäquic'am ulok sipanic ri aj israelib ruc' ronojel canima'." 
Exodus36:4 Ri ajchaquib ri cäquiban ronojel u wäch chac ri cätajin quequiban ri jastak ri quebajwataj che u banic ri k'ijilabal, xquitanaba' na can u banic ri qui chac xebec" 
Exodus36:5 xequibij che ri Moises: “Ri winak cätajin cäquic'am ulok u wi' ri jastak ri quebajwataj che u banic ri chac ri takaninak ri Ajawaxel che u banic.” 
Exodus36:6 Xtakan c'u ri Moises che u bixic chque conojel ri winak pa ri kajebal, chi mawi jun achi mawi jun ixok cutakej chi qui banic chac jacha' che sipanic che u banic ri k'ijilabal. Jewa' xban che qui k'ilic ri winak rech man cäquitakej ta chi qui c'amic ulok sipanic," 
Exodus36:7 man xuwi ta c'u c'o ronojel ri cajwataj che u banic ri chac, xane' xoc'ow qui wi' ri jastak." 
Exodus36:8 Jachin tak c'ut ri quena'w na che apachique chac chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj ajchaquib chic, e are xewocow ri k'ijilabal. Lajuj tasbal re tumim lino xquicoj che, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, ri xequitz'ot quieb wächbal chquiwäch, ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic'." 
Exodus36:9 Chquijujunal ri tasbal xa junam quetabalil, cajlajuj (14) bara' ruc' niq'uiaj qui rabic, cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui wäch." 
Exodus36:10 Xequit'is ri job tasbal xa jun xquiban che, xrekala' rib ri qui chi', je c'u xquiban chque ri job tasbal chic." 
Exodus36:11 Xequiban jujun c'amal re bätz' azul chuchi' ri nabe tasbal re ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' chuchi' ri q'uisbal tasbal re ri ucab job tasbal chic. 
Exodus36:12 Cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal xquiban chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' je xquiban chic che ri ucab job tasbal chic, xquic'ulajij c'u quib ri c'amal." 
Exodus36:13 Xukuje' xequiban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re k'an puak che u ch'epic ri job tasbal ruc' ri job tasbal chic, xa jeri' cäcanaj xa jun k'ijilabal." 
Exodus36:14 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xebuban julajuj (11) tasbal que quismal q'uisic', che u banic jun lic'om ri cäch'ukuw u wi ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus36:15 Conojel ri tasbal xa junam quetabalil waklajuj (16) bara' qui rabic chquijujunal, cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui wäch." 
Exodus36:16 Xebut'is job tasbal, xa jun xuban chque, xebut'is ri wakib chic xukuje' xa jun xuban chque." 
Exodus36:17 Xebuban cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal che t'ikbal rech, xukuje' xebuban chi cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri q'uisbal tasbal re ri job chic." 
Exodus36:18 Xukuje' xebuban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re kan ch'ich' che u nuq'uic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. 
Exodus36:19 Ri Bezaleel xuban jun ch'ukubal u wi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri tz'ajom ruc' quiäk, xukuje' xuban chi jun ch'ukubal chic re utzalaj tak tz'um ri cäbe kas puwi'." 
Exodus36:20 Xebuban chi c'u ri tz'alam re q'uisis ri quebajwataj che ri k'ijilabal, suc' qui tac'abaxic xebucojo." 
Exodus36:21 Chquijujunal ri tz'alam quebetan jotak (5) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj qui rabic, oxib k'abaj qui wäch," 
Exodus36:22 xebuban cacab qui tu' ri jun tz'alam rech cäch'epetaj che ri jun tz'alam chic. Conojel ri tz'alam re ri k'ijilabal je qui banic wa' xebubano. 
Exodus36:23 Xebuban juwinak (20) tz'alam che ri u mox," 
Exodus36:24 xebucoj c'u cawinak (40) tac'alibal re sak puak chquixe'. Cacab tac'alibal chquixe' jujun ri quech'epi wi ri cacab qui tu'. 
Exodus36:25 Xukuje' che ri jun u xcut chic ri k'ijilabal o ri re riquiak'ab, xebuban juwinak (20) tz'alam" 
Exodus36:26 cachilam ri cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal, rech cäcanaj cacab qui tac'alibal ri jujun tz'alam." 
Exodus36:27 Xebuban chi wakib tz'alam ri quecoj chrij ri k'ijilabal ri c'o che ri u kajebal k'ij," 
Exodus36:28 xukuje' quieb tz'alam chic ri quecanaj chrij pa tak u xquina ri k'ijilabal. 
Exodus36:29 We tz'alam ri' cäquic'ulajij quib, cäquitik la quib ajsic c'ä copan ruc' ri nabe xiquinaj. Jewa' xuban chque ri quieb tz'alam re ri quieb u xquina," 
Exodus36:30 xetz'akat wajxakib tz'alam chi conojel cachilam ri waklajuj (16) qui tac'alibal re sak puak, cacab tac'alibal cäcoj chquixe' ri jujun tz'alam." 
Exodus36:31 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xebuban job balul re q'uisis ri quetok'en ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal," 
Exodus36:32 xebuban chi job balul ri quetok'en ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut chic ri k'ijilabal, xukuje' job balul chic ri quetok'en ri tz'alam re chrij ri c'o che ri u kajebal k'ij." 
Exodus36:33 Ri balul re ri u niq'uiajil, xroc'owisaj pa ri jun u xcut xukuje' pa ri jun u xcut chic, pa qui niq'uiajil ri tz'alam." 
Exodus36:34 Xucoj k'an puak chquij ri tz'alam, xebuban qui xiquina re k'an puak ri quejut wi ri balul ri cojom k'an puak chquij." 
Exodus36:35 Xuban xukuje' ri tasbal, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xucoj che u banic, xebutz'ot quieb wächbal chuwäch, ri cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic'." 
Exodus36:36 Xebucoj jujun ch'epebal re k'an puak che, xuxequeba' chquij quiejeb akan re q'uisis ri cojom k'an puak chquij, e tiquibam paquiwi' quiejeb tac'alibal re sak puak." 
Exodus36:37 Che ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xuban jun tasbal re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumin lino, utzalaj u t'isic xubano." 
Exodus36:38 Xukuje' xebuban job akan e rachil tak ri xequebal xukuje' job qui tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich', xucoj k'an puak paquiwi' tak ri akan xukuje' tak ri e qui xiquin." 
Exodus37:1 Ri Bezaleel xoc chi che u banic ri caxa, che' re q'uisis xucoj che, jun bara' ruc' jun k'abaj quetan ri u rabic, oxib k'abaj u wäch, xukuje' oxib k'abaj rak'anibal." 
Exodus37:2 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak chrij xukuje' chupam, xucoj jun retz'balil re k'an puak chuchi'." 
Exodus37:3 Xukuje' xebuban quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak ri xebucoj che ri quiejeb rakan, quieb che ri juperaj quieb che ri juperaj chic." 
Exodus37:4 Xukuje' xebuban quieb balul re q'uisis, ri xucoj k'an puak chquij," 
Exodus37:5 xebujut chupam tak ri e u xiquinaj ri c'o pa tak u xcut ri caxa, che u telexic bic." 
Exodus37:6 Xukuje' xuban jun tz'apibal re utzalaj k'an puak ri quetan job k'abaj u rabic, oxib k'abaj u wäch," 
Exodus37:7 xebuban quieb wächbal re k'an puak ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic' ruc' bajibal, puwi' ri quieb u tza'm ri tz'apibal." 
Exodus37:8 Ri tz'apibal xukuje' ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic', xa jun xcuc'aj wi quib; ri jun c'o che ri jun u tza'm, ri jun chic c'o chi che ri jun chi u tza'm," 
Exodus37:9 xuc'ulaj rib qui wäch, benak c'u ri qui palaj che u ca'yexic ri tz'apibal, qui lic'om ri qui xic' puwi' jacha' muj che to'bal ib." 
Exodus37:10 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xuban jun mexa re q'uisis ri quetan jun bara' u rabic, niq'uiaj bara' u wäch, oxib k'abaj rak'anibal." 
Exodus37:11 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak chrij xukuje' xucoj jun retz'balil re k'an puak chuchi'; 
Exodus37:12 xuban jun retz'balil ri u chi' ri oxib u wi' k'abaj u wäch, xukuje' xucoj jun retz'balil chic re k'an puak che ri u chi'." 
Exodus37:13 Xebuban quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak ri xebucoj che ri quiejeb u xquina jawije' c'o wi ri quiejeb rakan," 
Exodus37:14 ri xiquinaj xecanaj chuchi', rech quejut ri balul chupam, jeri' cuya' cätelex bic ri mexa." 
Exodus37:15 Re q'uisis ri balul rech ri mexa xebubano, xucoj k'an puak chquij." 
Exodus37:16 Xukuje' e re utzalaj k'an puak ri e u chaconisan ri rajawaxic ri quec'oji' puwi' ri mexa xebuban ri queya' puwi' ri e u platoyil, ri e u paq'uebal, ri e u xaru', xukuje' ri e u lakil che ri u wa'l uva ri cäya' che sipanic." 
Exodus37:17 Ri Bezaleel xoc chi che u banic ri tzuc'ulibal, re utzalaj k'an puak xubano, bajibal xuch'ayibej rech. Ri u tiq'uilibal, ri rakan, ri e u lakil, ri e u mansanil, ri e u cotz'ijal, xa jun cuc'axic quib;" 
Exodus37:18 e c'o wakib u k'ab ri xebel pa tak u xcut, oxib che ri jun u xcut oxib che ri jun u xcut chic." 
Exodus37:19 Chquijujunal ri wakib u k'ab ri quebel pa tak u xcut, e c'o ox ox qui lakil jacha' ri almendr, e c'o u cotz'ijal xukuje' u mansanil," 
Exodus37:20 ri rakan xukuje' e c'o quiejeb u lakil junam ruc' ri almendr, e c'o u cotz'ijal xukuje' u mansanil." 
Exodus37:21 Chquijujunal ri ox ox u k'ab ri tzuc'ulibal ri quebel pa tak u xcut, e c'o jujun qui cotz'ijal chquixe'." 
Exodus37:22 Ri e u cotz'ijal xukuje' tak ri e u k'ab ri tzuc'ulibal, xa jun ruc'axic quib, e re k'an puak ri ch'ayom ruc' bajibal." 
Exodus37:23 Xukuje' ri wukub yabal k'ak' e re utzalaj k'an puak xebubano, ri e u chapbal xukuje' ri e alaj tak u platoyil." 
Exodus37:24 Oxib arob utzalaj k'an puak xajwataj che u banic ri tzuc'ulibal xukuje' ri e u chaconisan. 
Exodus37:25 Ri Bezaleel xuban ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol, che' re q'uisis xucoj che. Cajtzalaj, ruc' niq'uiaj bara' u rabic, niq'uiaj bara' u wäch, jun bara' rak'anibal. Ri e ruc'a' xa jun cuc'axic quib ruc' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol." 
Exodus37:26 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut xukuje' che tak ri ruc'a', xuban jun retz'balil chuchi' re k'an puak." 
Exodus37:27 Xebucoj jujun xiquinaj re k'an puak chuxe' ri retz'balil, quieb che ri quieb u tza'm che ri jun u xcut, quieb chic che ri quieb u tza'm chic che ri jun u xcut chic, chupam c'ut quejut wi ri telebal re rech cuya' cätelex bic ri porobal." 
Exodus37:28 Re q'uisis ri e u balul ri porobal xebubano, xucoj k'an puak chquij." 
Exodus37:29 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xusuc'umaj ri tastalicalaj aseit ri cäcoj che tasic, xukuje' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol, jacha' ri u banic ri cäquiban ri e banal tak c'oc'al." 
Exodus38:1 Q'uisis xucoj ri Bezaleel che u banic ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic. Quiejeb u xcut xubano, quieb bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj quetan ri jujun u xcut, jun bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ri rak'anibal." 
Exodus38:2 Che ri quiejeb u xquina xebuban quiejeb ruc'a', ri cuc'am quib ruc' ri porobal, xucoj k'an ch'ich' chquij." 
Exodus38:3 Conojel ri e u chaconisan ri porobal e re k'an ch'ich' xebubano ri c'olbal tak chaj, ri e paq'uebal, ri e nimak tak lak, ri tz'imaj ti'j xukuje' ri e c'olbal tak rachak k'ak'." 
Exodus38:4 Xukuje' xuban jun quemom k'an ch'ich' ri xucoj chuxe' ri u chi' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, ri xopan pa u niq'uiajil ri rak'anibal." 
Exodus38:5 Xukuje' xebuban quiejeb xiquinaj chque ri quiejeb u xquina ri quemom k'an ch'ich' ri quejut wi ri e u balulil. 
Exodus38:6 Xebuban c'u u ri e u balulil ri porobal re che' re q'uisis xebubano, k'an ch'ich' xuchubej quij," 
Exodus38:7 xebujut c'ut chquipam tak ri xiquinaj ri e c'o pa ri quieb u xcut ri porobal, rech cuya' cätelex bic. Ri porobal wocowic u banic xubano re che'." 
Exodus38:8 Ri Bezaleel are xebucoj ri qui ilbal quib ri ixokib ri cajwataj chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u banic ri tzima re k'an ch'ich', xuban xukuje' ri u tiq'uilibal re k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus38:9 Ri Bezaleel xuban ri uwo ja. Ri jun u xcut ri uwo ja pa ri u mox, xruc'aj cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' tasbal re tumim lino." 
Exodus38:10 Xerachilaj ri juwinak (20) rakan xukuje' ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal ri e re k'an ch'ich', ri e u ch'epebal xukuje' tak ri xiquinaj e re sak puak." 
Exodus38:11 Ri jun u xcut chic ri uwo ja pa ri riquiak'ab xruc'aj jun tasbal re cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' u rabic, xerachilaj ri juwinak (20) akan xukuje' ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal, ri e re k'an ch'ich', ri e u ch'epebal xukuje' tak ri xiquinaj e re sak puak." 
Exodus38:12 Pa ri u xcut pa ri u kajebal k'ij, xruc'aj jun tasbal re juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' niq'uiaj, xerachilaj lajuj akan xukuje' lajuj tac'alibal. Ri ch'epebal chque tak ri akan xukuje' tak ri xiquinaj e re sak puak." 
Exodus38:13 Ri jun u xcut chic ri uwo ja pa ri elebal k'ij xukuje' xruc'aj jun tasbal juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' niq'uiaj. 
Exodus38:14 Che ri jun u xcut ri oquibal, xecoj wajxakib (8) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj tasbal, rachil oxib akan xukuje' oxib tac'alibal;" 
Exodus38:15 che c'u ri jun xcutaj chic, xecoj wajxakib (8) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj tasbal, rachil oxib akan xukuje' oxib tac'alibal." 
Exodus38:16 Conojel ri tasbal ri xsutibex rij ri uwo ja, e re tumim lino." 
Exodus38:17 Ri qui tac'alibal ri akan e re k'an ch'ich', are c'u ri e qui ch'epebal xukuje' ri qui xiquin ri c'o chque e re sak puak, xcoj sak puak paquiwi' ri akan. Conojel ri akan re ri uwo ja c'o jujun qui xiquin re sak puak." 
Exodus38:18 Ri tasbal ri xcoj chuchi' ri oquibal cho ri uwo ja, utzalaj u tz'otic xbanic, chuwäch quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, xukuje' tumim lino. Julajuj (11) bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj u rabic, quieb bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj rak'anibal, junam cuc' ri tasbal re ri uwo ja." 
Exodus38:19 E c'o quiejeb rakan xukuje' quiejeb qui tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich'; ri e u ch'apabal xukuje' tak ri e u xiquin, e re sak puak, xcoj sak puak paquiwi' ri akan." 
Exodus38:20 Conojel ri e u ch'ic ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri re ri uwo ja, ri sutininak rij, conojel e re k'an ch'ich'." 
Exodus38:21 Rumal ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises che ri Itamar, ri u c'ojol ri Aaron ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri aj levitib xcajilaj ri u q'uial ri ch'ich' ri xecoj che u banic ri k'ijilabal re ri c'ulwächinic." 
Exodus38:22 Ri u tat ri Bezaleel are' ri Uri, ri u mam ri Bezaleel are' ri Hur ri aj Juda, xuban ronojel ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises chi cäbanic." 
Exodus38:23 Xto' rumal ri Aholiab (ri u tat ri Aholiab are' ri Ahisamac ri aj Dan), ri ch'ayal ch'ich', ajquem xukuje' tz'otonel chuwäch quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' coc'alaj lino." 
Exodus38:24 Ronojel ri k'an puak ri xcoj che u banic ri xajwataj che ri k'ijilabal, are xcoj ri k'an puak ri xya' che sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, juwinak jun (21) quintal ruc' jun arob pajom pa ri pajbal ri cäcoj pa ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus38:25 Ri sak puak ri xmulixic aretak xebajilax ri aj israelib, oxc'al oxlajuj (73) quintal chi ronojel. Pajom pa ri pajbal ri cäcoj pa ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus38:26 Conojel ri winak ri tz'ibam qui bi' ri tz'akatinak chic jutak winak (20) qui junab, e wakib sient oxib mil job sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (603,550) chquijujunal wa' xquiya' pa niq'uiaj che ri niq'uiaj onz sak puak qui cuchuj, pajom pa ri pajbal ri cäcoj chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus38:27 Oxc'al cablajuj (72) quintal ruc' quieb arob sak puak xecoj che qui banic ri tac'alibal che ri k'ijilabal, xukuje' ri e u tac'alibal ri ch'ukubal. Ronojel we sak puak ri' xcoj che qui banic jun sient tac'alibal, oxib arob xcoj chque ri jujun tac'alibal." 
Exodus38:28 Ri sak puak ri xquiya' conojel ri aj israelib, are xucoj ri Bezaleel che qui banic tak ri ch'epebal chquiwäch tak ri akan xukuje' ri xuch'ukubej qui wi' xukuje' tak ri xiquinaj ri xunac' chque." 
Exodus38:29 Ri k'an ch'ich' ri xya' che sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cawinak julajuj (51) quintal xurik rib ruc' quieb arob." 
Exodus38:30 Ruc' we k'an ch'ich' ri' xeban tak ri e u tac'alibal ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, ri porobal re k'an ch'ich' xukuje' ri quemom k'an ch'ich', xukuje' conojel ri e u chaconisan ri porobal," 
Exodus38:31 jacha' xukuje' ri tac'alibal, xukuje' tak ri e u ch'ic ri uwo ja re ri k'ijilabal, xukuje' ri e u tac'alibal ri oquibal re ri uwo ja." 
Exodus39:1 Quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xcoj che qui banic ri atz'iak re ri patanijic pa ri k'ijilabal. Xukuje' je xcoj che u banic ri ratz'iak ri Aaron ri nim u banic, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:2 K'an puak, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, tumim lino xcoj che u banic ri atz'iak nim u k'ij." 
Exodus39:3 Xequiban liq'uilak tak k'an puak ruc' bajibal, xequikopij c'ut xquiban bätz' chque rech quetz'ot xo'l tak ri quem azul, ri quem morato', ri quiäk quem xukuje' ri pa ri lino." 
Exodus39:4 Xecoj quieb ximibal puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri cäquirik wi quib ri quieb qui tza'm. 
Exodus39:5 Ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, xa junam qui banic banom: re k'an puak, re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:6 Ri abaj re tak cornalin xecoj, chupam k'an puak, xetzoc' ri qui bi' ri e u c'ojol ri Israel chuwäch, jacha' jun t'ikbal." 
Exodus39:7 Ri Bezaleel xebucoj paquiwi' ri ximibal ri c'o puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, che qui nataxic ri e u c'ojol ri Israel, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:8 Ri cäya' cho c'uxaj xukuje' coc'alaj u t'isic xbanic jacha' ri atz'iak i nim u k'ij: re k'an puak, re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino." 
Exodus39:9 Pim, cajtzalaj, jun k'abaj quetan ri jujun tak u xcut." 
Exodus39:10 Xenac' cajcholaj je'lalaj tak abaj chuwäch: pa ri nabe cholaj xbe jun rubi, jun crisolit, jun esmerald;" 
Exodus39:11 pa ri ucab xbe jun granat, jun zapir, jun jad;" 
Exodus39:12 pa ri urox cholaj xbe jun jasint, jun agat, jun amatist;" 
Exodus39:13 are c'u pa ri ucaj cholaj xbe jun topas, jun cornalin, jun jasp. Conojel tak ri abaj xecoj chupam k'an puak" 
Exodus39:14 e cablajuj c'ut ri abaj, che qui q'uexwäch ri cablajuj qui bi' ri e u c'ojol ri Israel; tzoc'om c'ut ri qui bi' ri cablajuj amak' paquiwi' ri abaj je jas ri cäban che ri t'ikbal." 
Exodus39:15 Puwi' ri caya' cho c'uxaj xecoj jujun alaj tak pach'um k'an puak re utzalaj k'an puak. 
Exodus39:16 Xeban quieb retz'balil re k'an puak xukuje' quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak ri xecoj chque ri quieb u chi' ajsic ri caya' cho c'uxaj," 
Exodus39:17 e are c'u ri alaj tak pach'um k'an puak xecanaj paquiwi' ri quieb xiquinaj ri e c'o che ri caya' cho c'uxaj. 
Exodus39:18 Xech'ap ri qui tza'm ri quieb alaj tak pach'um k'an puak chupam ri quieb ch'epebal, utz qui ch'epic xquiban chquiwäch ri ximibal ri c'o puwi' tak u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij." 
Exodus39:19 Xukuje' xeban chi quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak ri xecoj che ri quieb u tza'm ri caya' cho c'uxaj iquim, che ri quieb u chi' ri cäcanaj chupam chunakaj ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij." 
Exodus39:20 Xeban quieb xiquinaj chic re k'an puak ri xenac' chuwäch ri ximibal ri c'o puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, chuxe' c'u xecanaj wi, chunakaj ri u t'isel, ajsic jubik' che ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij." 
Exodus39:21 Xexim tak ri xiquinaj re ri caya' cho c'uxaj ruc' ri xiquinaj re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ruc' jun ximibal azul, rech cäcanaj ri caya' cho c'uxaj puwi' ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, mätastaj c'u che, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:22 Ronojel ri atz'iak ri cacanaj chupam ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, quem azul xbanbex rech." 
Exodus39:23 Xbus ri u chi' ri u kul ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil, jacha' ri cäban che jun atz'iak re tz'um, rech man cäjixjob taj." 
Exodus39:24 Xecoj crabaj re quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem xukuje' tumim lino che retz'balil ri u chi' ri atz'iak." 
Exodus39:25 Xukuje' xeban tak tzlintzlin re utzalaj k'an puak, xexol cuc' tak ri crabaj, xecoj tak chquixo'l che ronojel ri u chi'." 
Exodus39:26 Jun tzlintzlin rachilam jun crabaj, jun chi tzlintzlin rachilam jun chi crabaj jewa' xban che ronojel ri u chi' ri atz'iak rech ri patanijic, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:27 Ri u pam atz'iak ri re lino ri cucoj ri Aaron xukuje' ri caquicoj ri e u c'ojol, xeban rumal jun ajquem." 
Exodus39:28 Xukuje' ri pisbal jolomaj, rachilam ri retz'balil xukuje' tak ri säcaw ri e re tumim lino;" 
Exodus39:29 ri pas re tumim lino, quem azul, quem morato', quiäk quem, utzalaj u tz'otic xbanic jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:30 Xukuje' xeban liq'uilak re utzalaj k'an puak ri cätasowic jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob, xetzoc' tak we tzij ri' chuwäch, jacha' ri cäban che ri t'ikbal: “Tastal che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel”." 
Exodus39:31 Xcoj jun ximibal re azul che u ximic ri liq'uilic k'an puak chuwäch ri pisbal jolomaj, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus39:32 Xtz'akat c'u u banic ri k'ijilabal, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' ri Dios. Ri aj israelib je u banic ronojel xquibano jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises," 
Exodus39:33 xquijach c'u ri k'ijilabal pa u k'ab ri Moises, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj pa ri k'ijilabal: conojel ri ch'epebal, ri tz'alam tak, ri balul tak, ri akan tak xukuje' tak ri tac'alibal," 
Exodus39:34 ri ch'ukubal re quiäk tak qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij, re utzalaj tak tz'um, xukuje' ri ch'ukubal ri cäch'ukuw ri caxa," 
Exodus39:35 ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic ri e u balul, ri tz'apibal." 
Exodus39:36 Ri mexa e rachilam ri e u chaconisan, ri caxlanwa ri cäya' chuwäch ri Dios," 
Exodus39:37 ri tzuc'ulibal re utzalaj k'an puak rachilam tak ri e u yabal k'ak', xukuje' tak ri e u chaconisan; ri aseit ri cuya' sakil," 
Exodus39:38 ri porobal re k'an puak, ri aseit ri cäcoj che qui tasic ri jastak, ri c'oc'alaj k'ol, ri tasbal ri cäcoj chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Exodus39:39 ri porobal re k'an ch'ich' rachilam ri quemom k'an ch'ich', ri e u balul xukuje' conojel ri e u chaconisan, ri tzima rachilam ri u tiq'uilibal," 
Exodus39:40 ri tasbal ri cärababax chuwäch ri uwo ja, ri e rakanil xukuje' tak ri qui tac'alibal, ri tasbal ri cäcoj chuchi' ri oquibal pa ri uwo ja, ri e tanibal xukuje' tak ri ch'ic re ri uwo ja, conojel ri chaconisan che ri quepatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Exodus39:41 ri quemom tak atz'iak ri quebajwataj che ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal, ri atz'iak ri nim u banic ri quebucoj ri Aaron ri cojoj tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri atz'iak ri quequicoj ri e u c'ojol pa ri qui chac re cojoj tabal tok'ob." 
Exodus39:42 Ri aj israelib je u banic ronojel ri chac xquibano, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises," 
Exodus39:43 aretak xril ri Moises chi je u banic wa' qui banom, xebutewichi'j." 
Exodus40:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Exodus40:2 “Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri nabe ic', are k'ij wa' cawoc ri k'ijilabal, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' Dios." 
Exodus40:3 Chacojo' ri caxa ri c'o wi ri c'ulwächinic chupam, cach'uk c'u ruc' ri ch'ukubal." 
Exodus40:4 Xukuje' caya' ri mexa chupam xukuje' ri tzuc'ulibal, utz u suc'umaxic ri mexa cabano, catiq'uiba' c'u ri tzuc'ulibal puwi' e rachilam ri e u yabal k'ak'." 
Exodus40:5 Chacojo' ri porobal re k'an puak ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol chuwäch ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, chaxequeba' ri tasbal re ri oquibal chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus40:6 Chacojo' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic chuchi' ri k'ijilabal, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Exodus40:7 Chacojo' ri tzima chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chunakaj ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, caya' ja' chupam." 
Exodus40:8 Chatanij ri tasbal chrij ri uwo ja, chacojo' ri tasbal chuchi' ri oquibal re ri uwo ja." 
Exodus40:9 Chac'ama' ri aseit ri cäcoj che qui tasic ri jastak, chak'ija' puwi' ri k'ijilabal xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri jastak ri e c'o chupam. Je c'u chabana' wa' che u tasic querachilaj conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj chupam, cux c'u na jun tastalic c'olbal." 
Exodus40:10 Xukuje' chak'ija' ri aseit re ri tastajic puwi' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, xukuje' paquiwi' conojel tak ri e u chaconisan. Je u tasic wa' cabano, cux c'u na jun tastalic porobal." 
Exodus40:11 Chak'ija' aseit puwi' ri tzima xukuje' puwi' ri u tiq'uilibal, je caban wa' che u tasic." 
Exodus40:12 Chebac'ama' bic ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol chunakaj ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chabij chque chi chebatinok," 
Exodus40:13 quebucojo c'u ri Aaron ri atz'iak ri nim u banic, chak'ija' c'ut ri aseit puwi' che u tasic rech cäcanaj che cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Exodus40:14 Quebasiq'uij chi c'u ri e u c'ojol, chebacojo' ri u pam atz'iak chquij," 
Exodus40:15 chak'ija' c'u aseit paquiwi' jacha' ri xaban che ri Aaron, rech quecanaj che nu cojol tabal tok'ob. Ruc' we u k'ijic we aseit ri paquiwi' cäjekebax na ri u cojic ri junalic u cojic tabal tok'ob re chbe k'ij sak.”" 
Exodus40:16 Je c'u u banic ronojel xuban ri Moises, jacha' ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus40:17 Je c'u ri', aretak xchapletaj ri ucab junab re ri quelic ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt, pa ri nabe k'ij re ri nabe ic', xwoc ri k'ijilabal." 
Exodus40:18 Ri Moises xuwoc ri k'ijilabal, xebucoj ri e u tac'alibal, ri tz'alam, ri balul, xebutac'aba' tak ri akan," 
Exodus40:19 xulic' ri lic'om puwi' ri k'ijilabal, xukuje' xucoj ri q'uisbal ch'ukubal u wi', jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:20 Xebuc'am ri Moises ri tz'alam tak abaj ri e tz'ibatal wi ri pixab, xebuc'ol chupam ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic; xebujut ri u balul ri caxa pa tak u xcut xucoj c'u ri tz'apibal puwi'," 
Exodus40:21 xuc'am c'u bic, xuya' pa ri k'ijilabal; xulic' ri ch'ukubal xch'ukutaj c'u ri caxa, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:22 Xucojoxtaj ri mexa chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xuya' pa ri riquiak'ab ri k'ijilabal, chrij c'ut ri ch'ukubal." 
Exodus40:23 Xebusuc'umaj c'u ri caxlanwa puwi' ri mexa chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:24 Xukuje' xuya' ri tzuc'ulibal chupam ri k'ijilabal chuwäch ri mexa pa u mox k'ab ri k'ijilabal," 
Exodus40:25 xebutzij tak ri u yabal k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:26 Xuya' c'u ri porobal re k'an puak chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chuwäch ri ch'ukubal," 
Exodus40:27 xuporoj c'u c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi', jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:28 Xucoj chi c'u ri Moises ri tasbal chuchi' ri k'ijilabal; 
Exodus40:29 xucojoxtaj ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic chuchi' ri k'ijilabal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xebuporoj c'u awaj xukuje' c'äj puwi' che sipanic, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Exodus40:30 Xuya' ri tzima chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chunakaj ri porobal, xunojisaj che ja' che ch'ajbal ib." 
Exodus40:31 Chila' c'u cresaj wi u ja' ri Moises, xukuje' ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol che ri ch'ajbal qui k'ab xukuje' cakan." 
Exodus40:32 Cäquich'aj ri qui k'ab, ri cakan, aretak queboc pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xukuje' aretak quenakajin che ri porobal, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Exodus40:33 Chuq'uisbalil, ri Moises xucolomaj ri uwo ja chrij ri k'ijilabal xukuje' chrij ri porobal, xuxequeba' c'ut ri tasbal chuchi' ri oquibal re ri uwo ja. Aretak ri Moises xuq'uis u woquic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Exodus40:34 ri sutz' xuch'uk ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xnoj ronojel ri k'ijilabal rumal ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus40:35 Ri Moises man cäcuin taj coc ta chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, rumal rech chi xmuktaj rumal ri sutz', xnoj c'u ri k'ijilabal rumal ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel." 
Exodus40:36 Aretak cäwalij ri sutz' puwi' ri k'ijilabal, ri aj israelib quequitur tak ri qui cäbal ri lic'om, cäquitakej binem," 
Exodus40:37 we c'u man cäwalij ta ri sutz', ri e are' xukuje' man cäquiyac ta quib, xane' c'ä cäwalij na ri sutz'." 
Exodus40:38 Pa ronojel c'ut ri qui binem ri aj israelib, chquiwäch c'u conojel ri e are', ri u sutz' ri Ajawaxel, cäc'oji' puwi' ri k'ijilabal, ronojel ri jun k'ij, ronojel c'u ri jun chak'ab cac'oji' jun k'ak' puwi'." 
Leviticus1:1 Ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ulok ri Moises kas pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xubij c'u wa' che:" 
Leviticus1:2 “Chattzijon cuc' ri aj israelib chabij c'u chque chi aretak jun chiwe quebuc'am ulok awaj chwe che sipanic, rajawaxic cäresaj ulok chquixo'l ri u wacax xukuje' chquixo'l ri u chij." 
Leviticus1:3 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic cäresaj ulok chquixo'l ri u wacax, rajawaxic are jun ama' wacax ri man c'o ta u yab. Rech cac'amar ri cuyao, rajawaxic cuchi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Leviticus1:4 quebuya' c'u ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj. Cac'amar c'u na ri awaj ri cuyao, rech queburik ri cuyubal tak u mac." 
Leviticus1:5 Cutok' c'u u kul ri ama' wacax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; are c'u ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, cäquichi'j ri quic', cäquichicoj puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal ri c'o chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus1:6 Ri cäjachow ri awaj che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic cuch'ol ri u tz'umal, cuperejij c'ut," 
Leviticus1:7 e are' tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob quecojow ri k'ak' puwi' ri porobal, quequinuc' ri si'," 
Leviticus1:8 ri queya' wi ri ch'akatak u ti'jal ri awaj ri xeperejex che ri awaj xukuje' ri jolomaj xukuje' ri qui xepoyil ri ixco'l. 
Leviticus1:9 Ri cäjachow ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ixco'l, xukuje' ri e ra' ri awaj ruc' ja'; ronojel c'ut cuporoj ri cojol tabal tok'ob puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic ri caporoxic ri cäc'oc'atic, ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus1:10 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, caresaj chquixo'l ri e u chij o u q'uisic; rajawaxic are jun ama' ri man c'o ta u yab." 
Leviticus1:11 Rajawaxic cutok' u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel pa u xcut ri porobal ri cäca'y pa u mox elebal k'ij; are c'u ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron cäquichicoj ri u quiq'uel puwi' xukuje' pa tak uxcut ri porobal. 
Leviticus1:12 Caperejextax c'ut ri awaj, are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob quebuya' ri jutak peraj puwi' ri si' ri cänicow puwi' ri porobal cärachilaj ri jolomaj xukuje' ri qui xepoyil ri ixco'l." 
Leviticus1:13 Are' c'ut ri cäjachow ri tabal tok'ob pa cachajirisaxic quebuch'aj ri ixco'l xukuje' ri e ra' ri awaj ruc' ja', ronojel c'ut cuchi'j ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cuporoj ronojel puwi' ri porobal; jacha' sipanic ri caporoxic ri cäc'oc'atic ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus1:14 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel are jun chicop ri e c'o u xic', rajawaxic are jun palomax o jun alaj tucumux." 
Leviticus1:15 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic' puwi' ri porobal: cut'okopij na ri u jolom cuporoj c'u na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic' puwi' ri porobal aretak yitz'tajinak chi ri u quiq'uel pa jun u xcut ri porobal. 
Leviticus1:16 Cäresaj ri riximibal xukuje' ri c'o chupam, quebumulij pa u xcut ri porobal ri cäca'y pa elebal k'ij, pa ri c'olbal ri cäya' wi ri chaj:" 
Leviticus1:17 Cujak'ij c'u na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic', quebuc'am c'u che ri quieb u xic', man cuban ta c'u quieb che chuq'uisbalil cuporoj na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic' puwi' ri si' ri c'o puwi' ri porobal jacha' tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, jacha' sipanic ri canicowisaxic ri cäc'oc'at che ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus2:1 “Aretak c'o jachin cuc'am ulok jun sipanic re c'äj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rajawaxic re coc'alaj c'äj ri u sipanic, cuya' aseit puwi' xukuje' c'oc'alaj k'ol;" 
Leviticus2:2 cuc'am na bic chquiwäch ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, jun c'ut chque cuc'am na jumuk' che ri coc'alaj c'äj, rachilam ri aseit, cärachilaj ronojel ri c'oc'alaj k'ol, cuporoj c'u na puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic canicowisaxic re natabal, ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus2:3 Are c'u ri jubik' ri cäto'taj can che ri sipanic, ri are jubik' ri sibalaj tastalic chquixo'l ri sipanic ri quec'atisax che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, cacanaj che ri Aaron xukuje' chque tak ri e rija'lil." 
Leviticus2:4 Aretak caya' jun sipanic re c'äj ri chak'ajisam pa jorno, chebaya' caxlanwa re utzalaj c'äj yok'om aseit ruc', man cäya' ta c'u ch'am cuc', o watz'otz' ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc' chicom aseit puwi'." 
Leviticus2:5 We re c'äj ri a sipanic ri chak'ajisam pa xot, utzalaj c'äj cacoj na che u banic cayok' aseit ruc' xukuje' man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'," 
Leviticus2:6 cäban ch'akatak che, cachicoj aseit puwi'; sipanic wa' re c'äj." 
Leviticus2:7 We ri a sipanic re c'äj, ri chak'ajisam pa t'uy, rajawaxic cacoj utzalaj c'äj che u banic cärachilaj c'u aseit." 
Leviticus2:8 Aretak c'u a suc'umam chic we sipanic ri' e rachilam tak we jastak ri', rajawaxic cac'am bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel cajach c'u pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus2:9 Chila' ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na jubik' che ri sipanic cunicowisaj puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic ri canicowisaxic re natanic, re c'oc'al ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus2:10 Are c'u ri cacanaj can che ri sipanic, ri are' jubik' ri sibalaj tastalic chquixo'l ri sipanic ri quenicowisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, cäcanaj che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil." 
Leviticus2:11 Miya' ch'am ruc' jun chque ri sipanic re c'äj ri quiya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Man c'o ta c'u jun u wäch ch'am mawi juyubal räx cab ri canicowisax taj jacha' che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus2:12 Cuya' quic'am ulok ri ch'am ri juyubal räx cab che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che sipanic che ri nabe tak wächinic, man c'u quebichi'j ta puwi' ri porobal jacha' che c'oc'al ri cac'oc'atic." 
Leviticus2:13 Chque c'u conojel tak ri e a sipanic quech c'äj rajawaxic quebatzayij, maya' c'olbal chi pa ri a sipanic que c'äj ma ta c'o ri atz'am ruc' rech ri u c'ulwächinic ri Ajawaxel. Pa conojel tak ri a sipanic rajawaxic cachi'j ri atz'am." 
Leviticus2:14 We caya' jun sipanic che ri Ajawaxel quech c'äj quech ri nabe tak u wächinic ri awulew, rajawaxic e u jolom tak trico ri e chaki'j chic q'uilim puwi' ri k'ak' ri xukuje' e c'ac' u jolom tak trico k'ichom ri awesam che ri nabe tak u wächinic ri awulew." 
Leviticus2:15 Rajawaxic caya' aseit xukuje' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi' ri a sipanic, sipanic c'u wa' re c'äj." 
Leviticus2:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunicowisaj na jubik' k'ichom trico xukuje' jubik' aseit, carachilaj ronojel ri c'oc'alaj k'ol, cux c'u na jun sipanic re natanic porom che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus3:1 “We c'o jachin jun cuc'am chquixo'l ri rawaj jun ati't wacax o jun ama' wacax che u chi'xic jun tabal tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel re utzirisan ib, ri awaj ri cächi'xic ma ta c'o jun u yab." 
Leviticus3:2 Ri cäjachow ri sipanic quebuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj, cutok' c'u ri u kul chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, e are' quechicon ri quic' puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal." 
Leviticus3:3 Ri cäjachow ri awaj che u chi'xic jun tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, rajawaxic cuya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' jun tabal tok'ob ri porom, ri xepo ri quech'ukuw ri ti'j chupam ri awaj," 
Leviticus3:4 ri quieb u quinak', ri xepo ri e c'o chquij, ri xepo ri e c'o paquiwi' ri uwo rachak, xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb, ri junam cäresaj cuc' ri quieb u quinak'." 
Leviticus3:5 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquiban na chi canicow ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal, junam ruc' ri awaj ri queporox puwi' ri si' ri cätajin canicowic, jacha' sipanic ri nicowisam ri c'oc' ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus3:6 We c'o jachin jun cuchi'j che ri Ajawaxel jun awaj ri cäresaj chuxo'l ri u tzobaj jacha' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, rajawaxic cuchi'j jun ama' o jun ati't ri man c'o ta jun u yab." 
Leviticus3:7 We cuchi'j jun alaj ama' chij, aretak cuya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel" 
Leviticus3:8 Cuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom, cutok' c'u ri u kul chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. E are' tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquichicoj na ri u quiq'uel ri awaj puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal." 
Leviticus3:9 Ri cächi'n ri awaj che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, rajawaxic cuya' che ri Ajawaxel, jacha' sipanic ri nicowisam, ri xepo, ri u je' tz'akat cäkopix c'ä che ri q'uisbal uwo rachak iquim, ri xepo ri quech'ukuw ri ti'j chupam ri awaj," 
Leviticus3:10 ri quieb u quinak' ri xepo ri e c'o chquij ri e c'o cho ri uwo rachak xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb ri junam cäresaj cuc' ri quieb u quinak'. 
Leviticus3:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunicowisaj ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal, jacha' che sipanic re wa ja' che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus3:12 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j are' jun q'uisic', cuchi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel" 
Leviticus3:13 cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom, cuk'at c'ut ri u kul chuwäch ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. E are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob quechicon na ri quic' puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut ri porobal." 
Leviticus3:14 Ri cachi'n ri awaj cuya' cuc'amo xukuje' cuyao, jacha' sipanic nicowisam che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, ronojel ri xepo ri e ch'ukuwinak ri ti'j chupam," 
Leviticus3:15 ri quieb u quinak', ronojel ri xepo ri e ch'ukuwinak quij ri e c'o cho ri uwo rachak, xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb, ri junam queresaj cuc' ri quieb u quinak'." 
Leviticus3:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuporoj ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal, jacha' sipanic re wa ja' canicowisaxic, ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab. Ronojel ri xepo cäya' che ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus3:17 Pixab wa' ri kas xa jumul cäjeki'c canok quebel cuc' ri tataxelab cäk'ax cuc' ri alc'ualaxelab, apawije' ta ne ri ix jekel wi: c'o jubik' xepo mitijo mawi quic'.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus4:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi, aretak c'o jachin jun camacun chrij jun chque ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel ri man ruc' ta ri u rayibal cuban ta c'u jun jasach ri man ya'tal ta u banic, are wa' ri cäban na:" 
Leviticus4:3 We ri camacunic are' ri quinimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, cuban c'ut chi cakaj na ri macaj puwi' ri tinimit, rajawaxic cuchi'j na che ri Ajawaxel jun alaj ama' wacax ri man c'o ta u yab jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj." 
Leviticus4:4 Cuc'am na bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chila' cuya' wi ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri alaj ama' wacax, cutok' c'ut ri u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus4:5 Chwi chi c'u wa' kas are c'ut cuc'am na jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj ama' wacax cuc'am c'u u bic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib; 
Leviticus4:6 chila' curub wi ri u wi' u k'ab chupam ri quic' wukub mul c'ut cuchicoj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chusuq'uil ri ch'ukubal u pam ri k'ijilabal. 
Leviticus4:7 Cubil xukuje' jubik' quic' chque tak ri e ruc'a' ri porobal ri caporox wi ri c'oc'alaj k'ol ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, ronojel c'u ri quic' ri cäto'tajic cujamij pa rakan ri porobal re tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus4:8 Cäresaj ronojel ri u xepoyil ri alaj ama' wacax ri yo'm che sachbal mac, ronojel ri xepo ri c'o chquij ri ixco'l xukuje' ri c'o chquij ri ti'j chupam," 
Leviticus4:9 ri quieb u quinak', ri xepo ri c'o chquij, xukuje' ri c'o chquij ri uwo rachak; ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb ri quesax junam ruc' ri quieb u quinak'," 
Leviticus4:10 je cäban che jas ri resaxic ri quesax che ri wacax re ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunicowisaj na puwi' ri porobal quech ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic." 
Leviticus4:11 Are c'u ri u tz'umal ri alaj ama' wacax, ronojel ri u ti'jal, cärachilaj ri u jolom, ri e ra', ri rixco'l xukuje' ri u mes," 
Leviticus4:12 ronojel ri alaj ama' wacax, cäresaj bic cuya' pa jun c'olbal ch'ajch'oj chrij ri tinimit, jawije' ri cuya' quejamix wi ri chaj, chila' c'ut puwi' ri jumulaj chaj, canuc' wi ri si' cat'ik c'u k'ak' che." 
Leviticus4:13 We c'u conojel ri aj israelib caquiban jun etzelal ri man xquirayij ta u banic, man c'o ta c'u jun chque cänabenic chi ri qui banoj quebuc'ulelaj ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel e uxinak c'u ajchak'maquib rumal wa'," 
Leviticus4:14 aretak c'u quetamax ri mac ri qui banom, rajawaxic conojel junam cäquiya' jun alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj. Caquic'am na u bic chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus4:15 Ri cäquiya' wi ri qui k'ab ri nimak tak tatayib ri e re ri tinimit puwi' ri u jolom ri alaj ama' wacax, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, kas chila' c'ut cäquitok' wi na ri u kul." 
Leviticus4:16 Ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na bic jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj ama' wacax pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Leviticus4:17 curub na ri u wi' u k'ab pa ri quic' cuchicoj wukub mul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chusuq'uil ri ch'ukubal." 
Leviticus4:18 Cubil na jubik' ri quic' chquij tak ri ruc'a' ri porobal ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Ronojel c'u ri quic' ri cäto'tajic, cujamij pa rakan ri porobal ri queporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus4:19 Xukuje' quesax na che ri alaj ama' wacax ronojel ri u xepoyil, caporox c'u na puwi' ri porobal;" 
Leviticus4:20 ri u bixic chi je cäban che we alaj ama' wacax ri' junam jas ri cuban che ri alaj ama' wacax ri capil u mac rech ri macaj, jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal qui mac we winak ri', casach taj c'u na ri macaj ri qui banom." 
Leviticus4:21 Cäresaj bic ri alaj ama' wacax chrij ri kajebal, cuporoj c'u na, jacha' ri caban che ri nabe alaj ama' wacax are c'ut ri tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri u mac ri tinimit." 
Leviticus4:22 We cämacun jun c'amal be cuban c'u jun jasach ri quebuc'ulelaj ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel, cux na ajchak'mac pune' man xuban ruc' ri u rayibal." 
Leviticus4:23 Aretak c'u cuch'obo chi macuninak cuc'am na bic jacha' che sipanic jun ama' q'uisic' ri man c'o ta jun u yab. 
Leviticus4:24 Cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ama' q'uisic', cutok' ri u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri quepil wi ri awaj ri queporoxic, tabal c'u tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj." 
Leviticus4:25 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na ruc' ri u wi u k'ab jubik' u quiq'uel ri awaj ri pilom u mac rech ri macaj, cubil na chquij ri e ruc'a' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, aretak cäbantaj wa' ri quic' ri cäto'taj canok cujamij pa rakan ri porobal," 
Leviticus4:26 cuporoj c'u ronojel ri xepo puwi' ri porobal, jacha' ri cäban che ri u xepoyil ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib. Jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal u mac ri c'amal be, cäsachtaj c'u na ri macaj ri banom." 
Leviticus4:27 We jun winak ri man nim ta u k'ij cämacunic man ruc' ta ri u rayibal, cux c'u ajchak'mac chi xuban jun jasach ri quebuc'ulelaj tak ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel," 
Leviticus4:28 aretak c'u cuch'obo chi macuninak cuc'am na bic jun ati't q'uisic' ri man c'o ta jun u yab, jacha' sipanic u mac rech ri macaj ri bantajinak." 
Leviticus4:29 Cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj ri xuchi'j u mac rech ri macaj, cutok' c'u na u kul pa ri c'olbal que ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic." 
Leviticus4:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab jubik' quic' cubil c'u chquij ri e ruc'a' ri porobal tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, ronojel c'u ri quic' ri cäto'tajic cujamij na pa rakan ri porobal." 
Leviticus4:31 Xukuje' rajawaxic quesax ronojel ri u xepoyil, jacha' ri cäban che resaxic che ri awaj ri cächi'xic jacha' che ri utzirisan ib caporox c'u puwi' ri porobal jacha' c'oc'alaj uxlab che ri Ajawaxel. Jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal mac u mac rech ri u mac we winak ri', casachtaj c'u na ri' ri macaj ri banom." 
Leviticus4:32 We ri winak ri' cuc'am ulok jun ati't chij che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, rajawaxic cuc'am ulok jun ati't chij ri man c'o ta jun u yab." 
Leviticus4:33 Cuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ati't chij, cutok' c'u ri u kul jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri quepil wi ri awaj ri quebeporoxok." 
Leviticus4:34 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab, cuc'am jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri awaj ri yo'm che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj cubil chquij ri e ruc'a' ri porobal ri queporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic ronojel c'u ri quic' ri cäto'tajic, cujamij pa rakan ri porobal." 
Leviticus4:35 Cäresaj c'u ronojel ri u xepoyil, jas ri cäban che resaxic ri u xepoyil ri alaj ama' chij ri cächi'xic jacha' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, cuporoj c'u ri xepo puwi' ri porobal, junam ruc' ri sipanic ri porom che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Xa jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal mac u mac rech ri macaj ri xuban ri winak ri', cäsachtaj c'u na ri u mac.”" 
Leviticus5:1 “We c'o jun winak cäsiq'uix che u k'alajisaxic ri xrilo o xuto, man cuya' ta c'u u bixic, cuban jun macaj rajawaxic c'ut are' queka'n na ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus5:2 We c'o jun winak cuchap jun jasach tz'il, jacha' jun cäminak awaj tz'il, we aj juyubal, we aj uwo ja, we ri cujuruj rib ri tz'il, cacanaj xukuje' tz'il, cux c'u ajchak'mac, pune' man c'o ta xunabej." 
Leviticus5:3 We c'o jun cuchap u tz'ilol jun winak, apachique jasach ri catz'ilobisax rumal man xuch'ob ta c'ut, we c'u c'äte cuch'obo cux ajchak'mac." 
Leviticus5:4 We c'o jachin jun quel ulok pa u chi' ruc' aninakil jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, cacha' che u banic ri utz o ri man utz taj (chque we chi'nic ri' ri kas cäban na ri quebixic ri man cächomax ta na), man c'u cunabej taj pa ri jok'otaj ri' we c'u c'äte' cunabej na cux na aj chak'maquil che jun we jastak ri'." 
Leviticus5:5 Jachin ri quetamatajic chi macuninak pa jun chque we jastak ri', rajawaxic cuk'alajisaj ri macaj ri u banom;" 
Leviticus5:6 cujach na jun ati't awaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri cresaj ulok chquixo'l ri u chij che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj ri bantajinak; cuya' cuc'am ulok jun ati't chij jun ati't q'uisic' rumal c'ut we tabal tok'ob ri', ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik ri sachbal u mac we winak ri'." 
Leviticus5:7 We c'u man cäcuin che u lok'ic jun alaj ama' chij, rajawaxic cuc'am na ulok chuwäch ri Ajawaxel quieb palomax o quieb tucumux u mac rech ri macaj ri bantajinak, jun chque che tabal tok'ob re sachbal mac ri jun chic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic." 
Leviticus5:8 Quebuc'am ulok chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, are c'u nabe cuya' ri cachi'x che sachbal mac, cubak'atij ri u kul, man cuto'kopij ta c'u ri u jolom." 
Leviticus5:9 Cuchicoj c'u na jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri tabal tok'ob re sachbal mac pa jun u xcut ri porobal, are c'u ri cäto'taj can che ri quic', cuyitz' pa rakan ri porobal; tabal tok'ob wa' re sachbal mac." 
Leviticus5:10 Are c'u ri ucab cuya' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic je jas ri nak'atisabal; xa jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik ri sachbal mac che ri mac ri u banom we winak ri', cäcuyutaj c'u ri u mac." 
Leviticus5:11 We c'u ne man cäcuinic che qui lok'ic quieb palomax, mawi quieb tucumux, cuc'am na ulok che u sipanic, quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj utzalaj c'äj che sachbal u mac. Man cuya' ta aseit ruc' mawi cuya' c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi', rumal rech chi are jun sipanic u mac rech ri macaj." 
Leviticus5:12 Rajawaxic cuc'am ulok chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri cuc'am jumuk' jacha' che natabal, cuporoj c'u puwi' ri porobal, junam cuc' ri sipanic ri cäporox che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, jun sipanic c'u wa' rumal rech ri macaj." 
Leviticus5:13 Rech curik ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cuyubal mac, che apachique mac ri u banom we winak ri' cäcuyutaj c'ut ri u mac. Jacha' c'ut ri caban chque tak ri sipanic que c'äj ri cäto'taj canok, cäcanaj che ri cojol tabal tok'ob.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus5:15 “Ri winak ri camacunic ri man ruc' taj ri u rayibal cux c'u ajchak'mac re ri quit'orixic ri tastalic tak jastak rech ri Ajawaxel, rajawaxic cäresaj chquixo'l ri u tzobaj jun ama' chij ri man c'o ta jun u yab, jacha' tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, cuc'am c'u bic che ri Ajawaxel. Ri rajil ri ama' chij rajawaxic u chomaxic joropa' sak puak cäreklej je jacha' ri pajbal ri c'o chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Leviticus5:16 Ri winak ri' cutoj na ri u t'orim chque ri tastalic tak jastak cuya' chi na jun u ro'il, ri cujach pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Rumal c'u ri chij ri cäpil che cuyubal mac, ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik ri sachbal mac che ri u mac we winak ri', cäcuyutaj c'u ri u mac." 
Leviticus5:17 We c'o jun winak cämacunic, cuc'ulelaj c'u ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel, pune' man xuch'obo aretak xubano, cäcanaj ajchak'mac, cuch'ob c'ut chi macuninak." 
Leviticus5:18 Rumal ri' rajawaxic cäresaj na ulok jun ama' chij chquixo'l ri u chij ri man c'o ta u yab, at c'u catk'atow jas ri kas rajil, cuc'am c'u na bic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macunic, rech cärik ri sachbal u mac we winak ri' ri man ruc' ta ri u rayibal xubano, cäsachtaj c'ut ri u mac." 
Leviticus5:19 Jun tabal tok'ob wa' u mac rech ri macunic, we winak ri' uxinak ajchak'mac chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus6:2 “Aretak c'o jachin camacunic cux c'u ajchak'mac re t'orinic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel rumal ri u subic ri rach aj k'uch pa jun ch'äcoj o puak ri jachom pa u k'ab o rumal eläk'anic o u cojic chuk'ab che ri rach winak," 
Leviticus6:3 o man cuk'alajisaj taj chi u rikom jun jasach ri tzakom canok; o rumal u bixic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na re subunic (apachique we jastak ri' ri cämacun wi jun.) 
Leviticus6:4 Cux ajchak'mac che we mac ri'. Cutzelej na ri reläk'am o ri xak u tokim, o ri u tzakom wi u k'ab, o ri jasach ri u rikom," 
Leviticus6:5 o apachique jasach ri xak u bim wi chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Tz'akat cutzelej na ronojel che ri ajchak'e, cuya' chi c'u na jun u ro'il u wi' aretak cuya' ri tabal tok'ob re cuyubal ri u mac." 
Leviticus6:6 Ri u tabal tok'ob ri cuya' che ri Ajawaxel are jun ama' chij ri man c'o ta jun u yab, at c'u catk'atow ri rajil, ri cäresaj chquixo'l ri u chij, cujach c'u pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob jacha' tabal tok'ob u mac ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus6:7 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal u mac we winak ri' pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel chque jun chque we jastak ri' ri macuninak wi, cäcuyutaj c'ut ri u mac.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus6:9 “Chebaya' we pixab ri' che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol, che ri caban che ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic: ri awaj ri pilom caya' can puwi' ri k'ak' ri c'o puwi' ri porobal ronojel ri jun ak'ab, rech cujarisaj ri k'ak'." 
Leviticus6:10 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuch'uk ri u cuerp quebucoj atz'iak, xukuje' cucoj säcaw re lino, cujoc c'u ri u chajil ri awaj ri xnicowisax puwi' ri porobal, cuya' pa u xcut ri porobal." 
Leviticus6:11 Cuq'uex c'u na ri ratz'iak, cresaj c'u na bic ri chaj cuya' chrij ri tinimit pa jun c'olbal ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus6:12 Ri k'ak' ri cänicow puwi' ri porobal, mawi ta jubik' chchupic. Ri cojol tabal tok'ob quebuya' na si' puwi' ri porobal ronojel ak'abil, cusuc'umaj c'u ri awaj puwi' ri k'ak' ri queporoxok, quebuporoj c'u xukuje' ri u xepoyil ri awaj re tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib." 
Leviticus6:13 Ri k'ak' re ri porobal rajawaxic chi amak'el cänicowic. Mawi ta ne jubik' cächupic.” 
Leviticus6:14 “Are wa' ri pixab che qui ya'ic ri sipanic quech c'äj: ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquichi'j chuwäch ri porobal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus6:15 Jun chque cuc'am jumuk' che ri c'äj re ri sipanic xukuje' ri re ri raseitil, junam ruc' ronojel ri c'oc'alaj k'ol ri c'o puwi' ri sipanic, cuporoj puwi' ri porobal che sipanic re natabal ri cäc'oc'atic ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus6:16 Are c'u ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic cutij na ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol; man ruc' ta ch'am pa ri c'olbal ri tastalic chuwäch ri uwo ja rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. 
Leviticus6:17 Maquitzac ruc' ch'am, e nu yo'm wa' chque jacha' ri qui tz'akatil ri sipanic ri queya' chwe ri queporoxic, jun jasach c'u wa' ri sibalaj tastalic, e jacha' ri tabal tak tok'ob qui mac ri macaj xukuje' u mac ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus6:18 Conojel ri e ralc'ual ri Aaron ri alabom cuya' cäquitij que ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic ri queporoxic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Je chban wa' pa tak ri k'ij junab ri quepe na apachique jasach ri cächapowic cätastaj canok.” 
Leviticus6:19 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus6:20 “Are wa' ri sipanic ri rajawaxic cuya' ri Aaron xukuje' ri e rija'lil, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel aretak quetas che cojol tabal tok'ob: quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj utzalaj c'äj, pa niq'uiaj caquiya' ak'abil, ri pa niq'uiaj chic aretak cäbe ri k'ij, man c'o ta jun k'ij ri ma ta cäya'ic." 
Leviticus6:21 Cäyok' aseit ruc' cätzac pa xarten, cäban ch'akatak che, cäya' che sipanic ri cäc'oc'atic ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus6:22 Je u suc'umaxic wa' ri sipanic cuban ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob ri ralaxic ri Aaron ri cätas che u q'uexwäch. Rech ri Ajawaxel wa' amak'el, rajawaxic kas cäq'uis u poroxic." 
Leviticus6:23 Ronojel sipanic ri quequiya' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob kas cäq'uis u poroxic, c'o jun metijowic.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus6:25 “Chebaya' che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol ri pixab tak che qui banic ri tabal tak tok'ob qui mac quech ri macaj: Ri awaj ri cachi'x u mac ri macaj rajawaxic cätok' u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri quepil wi ri awaj ri quebeporoxok, jun jasach c'u wa' ri sibalaj tastalic." 
Leviticus6:26 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cachi'n ri tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj cuya' cutij re che, rajawaxic c'ut cutij pa jun c'olbal ri tastalic, chuwäch ri uwo ja rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus6:27 Apachique jasach ri cänakow ri u ti'jal ri awaj cätastajic, we cächicon ri quic' chrij ri atz'iak, rajawaxic cäch'aj na pa jun c'olbal ri tastalic." 
Leviticus6:28 Ri t'uy ri cätzac wi ri ti'j ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic rajawaxic cäpaxixic, we c'u xtzac pa jun t'uy re k'an ch'ich', utzalaj u jukic cäbanic." 
Leviticus6:29 We tabal tok'ob ri' are jun jasach wa' ri tastalic. Xuwi ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ya'talic cäquitij que che. 
Leviticus6:30 Man ya'tal ta c'u u tijic jun awaj ri chi'm u mac ri macaj ri c'amom bic ri u quiq'uel chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, che u rikic ri sachbal macaj chupam ri k'ijilabal. We tabal tok'ob ri' rajawaxic u poroxic chupam ri k'ak'.”" 
Leviticus7:1 “Ri tabal tak tok'ob ri queya'ic u mac rech ri chak'maquil, e jun jasach wa' ri sibalaj e tastalic. E are tak pixab wa' chque:" 
Leviticus7:2 Ri awaj ri chi'm u mac ri macunic rajawaxic cätok' u kul pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri quepil wi ri awaj ri quechi'xic rech queporoxic are c'u ri u quiq'uel rajawaxic cachicox puwi' xukuje' chrij ri porobal. 
Leviticus7:3 Cächi'x ronojel ri u xepoyil ri awaj: ri c'o che ri u je' xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chquij tak ri ti'j chupam," 
Leviticus7:4 ri quieb u quinak', ri xepo ri c'o chquij, xukuje' ri c'o chquij ri uwo rachak; ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb ri junam quesax cuc' ri quieb u quinak'." 
Leviticus7:5 Ronojel wa' cuporoj ri cojol tabal tok'ob puwi' ri porobal, jacha' sipanic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Jun tabal tok'ob wa' u mac ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus7:6 Conojel ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuya' cäquitij que, cäquitij c'u na pa jun c'olbal ri tastalic, jun jasach wa' ri sibalaj tastalic." 
Leviticus7:7 Ri tabal tok'ob ri u mac rech ri chak'maquil xak junam ruc' ri tabal tok'ob ri u mac rech ri macunic, e are tak c'ut ri pixab xak e junam chque qui cabichal: ri chi'm cux na rech ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäpatanij che u rikic ri sachbal macaj." 
Leviticus7:8 Junam xukuje', ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri capilow ri awaj ri cächajirisaxic re jachin jun, ri u tz'umal ri awaj cäcanaj can che ri are'." 
Leviticus7:9 Xukuje' ronojel sipanic ri cächak'ajisax chupam ri jorno, xukuje' ronojel ri cachak'ajisax pa t'uy o pa xarten, cäcanaj che ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäjachow ri sipanic." 
Leviticus7:10 Je c'ut ronojel sipanic rech c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc' o chaki'j, cäcanaj chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, junam cäban che u jachic chquiwäch.”" 
Leviticus7:11 “Are tak wa' ri pixab che qui ya'ic ri tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel: 
Leviticus7:12 We ri tabal tok'ob rech u ya'ic maltioxinic, caxlanwa cächi'x na man cäya' ta ch'am ruc' yok'om aseit ruc', watz'otz'arisam man cäya' ta ch'am ruc' ri chicom aseit puwi', xukuje' caxlanwa re utzalaj c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc';" 
Leviticus7:13 junam c'ut ruc' ri tabal tok'ob re maltioxinic xukuje' re utzirisan ib, queya' caxlanwa ri man cäya' ch'am cuc'." 
Leviticus7:14 Cätas c'u na jun u tz'akatil che jujun u wäch sipanic ri tasom che ri Ajawaxel cäyataj c'u che ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cajamin ri u quiq'uel ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib. 
Leviticus7:15 Ri u ti'jal ri awaj ri cächi'x che u ya'ic maltioxinic xukuje' re utzirisan ib, rajawaxic cätij pa ri k'ij aretak cajach ri awaj, man c'o ta jun ch'akap cätas can che re ri ucab k'ij." 
Leviticus7:16 We c'u ne cächi'x ri awaj che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic, o jun sipanic ri caq'uiy pa anima'aj, rajawaxic u tijic kas pa ri k'ij aretak cäpil ri cächi'xic, ri cäto'taj canok cuya' cätij chucab k'ij;" 
Leviticus7:17 we c'u cäcanaj can niq'uiaj che, ri u ti'jal ri awaj pa ri urox k'ij, rajawaxic cäporox ronojel." 
Leviticus7:18 We c'o jun cätijow ri u ti'jal ri awaj re utzirisan ib che ri urox k'ij, man cäc'amar ta we tabal tok'ob ri' rumal ri Ajawaxel; man c'o ta cupatanij che ri xyo'wic ri cätijowic we ti'j ri' cäbe ri mac chrij." 
Leviticus7:19 Ri ti'j ri cuchap apachique jasach ri tz'il, man cätij taj, xa cäporox pa k'ak'. Conojel ri e ch'ajch'oj cuya' cäquitij que ri ti'j." 
Leviticus7:20 Ri winak ri tz'ilobinak ri cutij ri ti'j re ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, ri jachom che ri Ajawaxel, we winak ri' quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Leviticus7:21 Ri winak ri cuchap apachique jasach ri tz'il we u tz'ilol winak, o u tz'ilol awaj o apachique tz'il ri cuya' muluwibal c'u'x, cutij c'u re ri ti'j re ri tabal tok'ob re ri utzirisan ib ri jachom che ri Ajawaxel, we winak ri' quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus7:23 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: c'o xepo re ama' wacax mitijo, mawi re ama' chij, o re ati't q'uisic'." 
Leviticus7:24 Ri u xepoyil ri cäminak awaj o ri cach'akatix cumal juyubal tak awaj, quiwilo jawije' quicoj wi, mitijo." 
Leviticus7:25 Apachin c'ut ri cätijow ri u xepoyil ri awaj ri cäporox che sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri cätijowic quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Leviticus7:26 Apawije' ta ne ri ix jekel wi, c'o jubik' qui quiq'uel ri chicop ri c'o u xic' mitijo, mawi qui quiq'uel tak awaj." 
Leviticus7:27 Ri winak ri cutij u quiq'uel apachique awaj, quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus7:29 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib: chi jachin ri cuya' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, rajawaxic cuc'am bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus7:30 Cuc' ri kas e u k'ab cuc'am ulok chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri sipanic ri cäporoxic: ri xepo ri c'o che ri uwo c'uxaj; ri kas uwo c'uxaj che u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jas ri nak'atal u banic che u jachic. 
Leviticus7:31 Ri xepo cäporox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob puwi' ri porobal, are c'u ri uwo c'uxaj cäcanaj che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil." 
Leviticus7:32 Ri ca' ri awaj ri re ri quiquiak'ab ri queya' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib queya' che ri cojol tabal tok'ob jacha' che cuchuj. 
Leviticus7:33 Ri ra' ri awaj re ri riquiak'ab, rech ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cächi'n ri u xepoyil xukuje' ri u quiq'uel ri awaj re ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib," 
Leviticus7:34 chque c'ut ri qui tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib ri aj israelib, ri caquiban chwe nu c'amom ri uwo c'uxaj jacha' sipanic ri nim u k'ij xukuje' ri ra' ri awaj ri tasom, e nu yo'm c'u che ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Aaron, xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil are wa' ri cäya' chque amak'el ri quesax chque ri qui sipanic ri aj israelib." 
Leviticus7:35 Are wa' ri cärechbej ri Aaron xukuje' ri cäquechbej ri e rija'lil, ri quesax chque tak ri sipanic ri queporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cachapletaj bic pa ri k'ij aretak quetas che cojol tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel," 
Leviticus7:36 ri Ajawaxel xtakanic chi ri aj israelib caquiya' chque, kas pa ri k'ij aretak xebutaso, pixab wa' ri caquitz'akatisaj ri ri tataxelab xukuje' ri e qui c'ojol." 
Leviticus7:37 Are pixab wa' che qui ya'ic ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic, ri sipanic tak re c'äj, ri tabal tak tok'ob u mac rech ri mac, ri tabal tak tok'ob u mac rech ri chak'maquil, ri sipanic tak re tastajic ri tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib;" 
Leviticus7:38 are wa' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises puwi' ri juyub Sinai, aretak xubij chque ri aj israelib pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aj Sinai chi cäquiya' sipanic che.”" 
Leviticus8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus8:2 “Chac'ama' ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' chebac'ama' ri atz'iak ri cäquicoj ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri aseit re ri tastajic, ri alaj ama' wacax re cuyubal mac, ri quieb ama'ib tak chij, ri alaj chicäch ri e c'o caxlanwa chupam ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc'," 
Leviticus8:3 chebamulij ri aj israelib chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.” 
Leviticus8:4 Je c'u xuban ri Moises jacha' ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel, xebumulij c'u ri aj israelib chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus8:5 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Are takanic wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel chi cäbanic.” 
Leviticus8:6 Xuban c'u ri Moises chi ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol xekebic, xebuch'aj c'u ruc' ja'." 
Leviticus8:7 Ri Moises xucoj ri u pam atz'iak chrij ri Aaron, xuxim ri u pam ruc' ri pas; xucoj ri kas atz'iak ri cäbe chupam ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij, xucoj c'u ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij chrij utzalaj u ximic xuban ruc' ri ximibal rech." 
Leviticus8:8 Xucoj c'ut ri cacoj cho c'uxaj chrij, chupam c'ut ri cacoj cho c'uxaj xucoj wi ri Urim, xukuje' ri Tumim." 
Leviticus8:9 Xucoj c'ut ri pisbal jolomaj che ri u jolom, chuwäch wa' xucoj wi ri pejpic k'an puak, ri catasowic jacha' cojol tabal tok'ob, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Leviticus8:10 Xuc'am c'ut ri Moises ri aseit re ri tastajic, xuk'ij puwi' ri k'ijilabal xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri jastak ri e c'o chupam, je qui tasic wa' xubano." 
Leviticus8:11 Wukub mul xuchicoj we aseit ri' puwi' ri porobal, xujamij c'u puwi' ri porobal xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri u chaconisan, xukuje' puwi' ri nimalaj tzima c'olbal ja' rachilam ri u tiq'uilibal, che qui tasic." 
Leviticus8:12 Ri Moises xuk'ij c'ut puwi' ri Aaron ri aseit re tastajic che u tasic jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob. 
Leviticus8:13 Xubij chi c'u chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron chi quekebic, xebucoj ri u pam atz'iak chquij, xuxim ri qui pam cuc' tak pas, xusuc'umaj ri pisbal qui jolom, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Leviticus8:14 Xtakan c'u ri Moises che u c'amic ulok ri alaj ama' wacax ri cäpil che josk'ibal macaj, ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol xquiya' ri qui k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri alaj ama' wacax." 
Leviticus8:15 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri alaj ama' wacax, xuc'am ri quic' cuc' ri e u wi' tak u k'ab xubil chquij ri ruc'a' ri porobal, che u josk'ixic ri porobal; ri quic' ri xto'tajic xujamij pa rakan ri porobal, jewa' xuban che u tastajic ri porobal, che qui rikic ri cuyubal tak mac chila'." 
Leviticus8:16 Ri Moises xuc'am ronojel ri xepo ri c'o chquij ri ti'j chupam, ri u xepoyil ri u seseb, xukuje' ri quieb u quinak' rachilam ri qui xepoyil, xuporoj c'u ronojel puwi' ri porobal." 
Leviticus8:17 Are c'u ri u tz'akatil ri alaj ama' wacax, ri u tz'umal, ri u ti'jal, ri u mes, xuporoj chrij ri kajebal, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Leviticus8:18 Ri Moises xubano chi chnakajix ri ama' chij ri cächi'x che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic are' c'u ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol, xquiya' ri qui k'ab pa u jolom ri ama' chij." 
Leviticus8:19 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri ama' chij, xujamij ri quic' puwi' xukuje' pa tak uxcut ri porobal," 
Leviticus8:20 xutasij ri ama' chij pa ch'akatak, xuporoj ri u jolom, ri u ti'jal ri tasim, xukuje' ri u xepoyil;" 
Leviticus8:21 xebuch'aj ri ti'j chupam xukuje' tak ri e ra', ri chij xuporoj c'u ronojel puwi' ri porobal; jacha' ri cachajirisaxic, jacha' che sipanic re c'oc'al ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che." 
Leviticus8:22 Ri Moises xubano chi cac'am chi ulok ri jun chi ama' chij ri rech ri nak'atisabal che ri tasanic, ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol xquiya' ri qui k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ama' chij." 
Leviticus8:23 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri ama' chij, xuc'am jubik' che ri quic', xubil xe' u xiquin ri Aaron re ri u riquiak'ab, xukuje' puwi' ri nim u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, xukuje' puwi' ri nim u wi' rakan re ri riquiak'ab." 
Leviticus8:24 Ri Moises xebusiq'uij ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, xukuje' xubil ri quic' xe' tak qui xiquin re ri quiquiak'ab, puwi' ri nim u wi' qui k'ab re ri quiquiak'ab, xukuje' puwi' ri nim u wi' cakan re ri quiquiak'ab; xujamij c'u na ri quic' ri xto'tajic puwi' xukuje' chrij ri porobal."
