Leviticus8:25 Ri Moises xuc'am c'u ri xepo, ri je'aj, ronojel ri xepo ri quech'ukuw ri pamaj, ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb, ri quieb quinak' rachil ri qui xepoyil, xukuje' ri a'aj aj iquiak'ab." 
Leviticus8:26 Chupam ri chicäch ri c'olbal ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc' ri caya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri Moises xuc'am jun caxlanwa ri man yo'm ta ch'am ruc', xukuje' jun caxlanwa chic ri yok'om aseit ruc', xukuje' jun wotz'otz', xebuya' cuc' ri xepo, xukuje' ri a'aj aj iquiak'ab;" 
Leviticus8:27 conojel we jastak ri' xebuya' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol, rech cäquiban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jas ri nak'atisabal che ri jachanic." 
Leviticus8:28 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises we jastak ri' pa qui k'ab, xuporoj puwi' ri porobal, junam ruc' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, jacha' sipanic re tastajic ri cäc'oc'atic sipanic wa' ri cäporoxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus8:29 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises ri uwo c'uxaj, xuban c'u ri' ri nak'atal u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; we u tz'akatil we ama' chij ri' are wa' ri xya'taj che ri Moises, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che." 
Leviticus8:30 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises jubik' aseit re ri tastajic xukuje' che ri quic' ri c'o puwi' ri porobal, xuchicoj c'u puwi' ri Aaron paquiwi' ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' paquiwi' ri catz'iak conojel ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Jewa' xuban che u tasic ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol xukuje' ronojel ri catz'iak ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus8:31 Xubij chi c'u na ri Moises che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol: “Chitzaca' ri ti'j chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, kas chila' c'ut chi tija' wi cärachilaj ri caxlanwa ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch ri quech ri tastajic, jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chwe aretak xubij: ‘Ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol e are' quetijow we ti'j ri'.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Ri wa, ri ti'j, ri cäto'tajic, quiporoj conojel pa ri k'ak'." 
Leviticus8:33 Minajtajisaj c'u iwib wukub k'ij che ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, are c'u k'ijol wa' ri cäbeytaj che ri i tastajic." 
Leviticus8:34 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm takanic chi ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri u cuyutajic ri macaj ri bantajinak iwumal je chbanok jacha' ri bantajinak camic. 
Leviticus8:35 Quixcanaj ba' can wukub k'ij, chi pa k'ij, chi chak'ab chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Nim chiwila' wi ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel rech man quixcäm taj; je c'u takanic wa' yo'm chwe.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol, xquiban ronojel ri u takom u banic ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Moises." 
Leviticus9:1 Pa ri uwajxak k'ij, ri Moises xusiq'uij ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel;" 
Leviticus9:2 xubij c'u che ri Aaron: “Chac'ama' jun alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob re cuyubal mac, xukuje' jun ama' chij ri man c'o ta u yab che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic chebaya' c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus9:3 Chabij chque ri aj israelib: chi chquic'ama' ulok jun alaj ama' q'uisic' che tabal tok'ob re cuyubal mac, jun alaj ama' wacax xukuje' jun alaj ama' chij re jujun qui junab ri man c'o ta qui yab ri queya' che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic," 
Leviticus9:4 xukuje' jun ama' wacax, xukuje' jun ama' chij ri quepil chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, xukuje' chquic'ama' ulok jun sipanic re c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc'; culuc'utu' c'u na rib ri Ajawaxel chiwäch camic.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Ri aj israelib xequic'am ulok c'ä chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ri xtakan wi ri Moises, conojel c'u ri aj israelib xekebic, xetaq'ui' c'u na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus9:6 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Are wa' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel. Chibana', cuc'ut c'u na rib ri Ajawaxel chiwäch ruc' nimalaj juluwem.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron: “Chatkeb ruc' ri porobal, chaya' ri tabal tok'ob re ri cuyubal a mac xukuje' ri awaj re tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic rech quecuyutaj ri a mac xukuje' ri qui mac ri aj israelib. Xukuje' chaya' ri qui sipanic ri aj israelib che cuyubal qui mac, jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Xkeb c'u ri Aaron ruc' ri porobal, xutok' u kul ri alaj ama' wacax ri cuchi'j qui mac quech ri e u mac." 
Leviticus9:9 Ri e u c'ojol xquiya' ri quic' che ri Aaron, ri Aaron xurub ri u wi' u k'ab pa ri quic' xubil chquij ri uc'a' re ri porobal, are c'u ri quic' ri xtotajic, xujamij pa rakan ri porobal." 
Leviticus9:10 Xuporoj c'u ri xepo rachilam quieb quinak', xukuje' ri u xepoyil ri u seseb ri awaj ri xpil u mac rech ri macaj, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Leviticus9:11 Are c'u ri ti'j xukuje' ri tz'um, xuporoj pa k'ak' chrij ri tinimit." 
Leviticus9:12 Ri Aaron xutok' u kul ri awaj ri cäya' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, e are' c'ut ri e u c'ojol xquic'am bic ri quic' ri xujamij ri Aaron puwi' xukuje' pa tak uxcut ri porobal." 
Leviticus9:13 Xquic'am c'u bic ri u jolom ri awaj che, rachil ri u ti'jal ri cächi'x che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri Aaron xuporoj ri ti'j puwi' ri porobal." 
Leviticus9:14 Xebuch'aj c'u ri ti'j chupam xukuje' tak ri ra', xebuporoj c'u puwi' ri porobal." 
Leviticus9:15 Ri Aaron xuchi'j xukuje' ri qui sipanic ri aj israelib. Xuc'am ri alaj ama' q'uisic' ri are tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri u mac ri tinimit, xutok' c'ut ri u kul, xuchi'j c'ut qui mac ri macaj, jacha' ri xuban che ri nabe sipanic." 
Leviticus9:16 Aretak xujach ri awaj ri cachi'x che ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic je xuban che jas ri jekebam u banic. 
Leviticus9:17 Xujach c'ut ri sipanic quech c'äj, ri xuc'am jumuk' che, ri xuporoj puwi' ri porobal, e c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tak tok'ob ri que chajirisax ak'abibal." 
Leviticus9:18 Ri Aaron xukuje' xutok' u kul ri ama' wacax, xukuje' ri chij ri xquichi'j ri aj israelib che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, ri e u c'ojol xquic'am bic ri quic' che, xujamij c'u ri Aaron puwi' xukuje' pa tak uxcut ri porobal;" 
Leviticus9:19 xukuje' xquijach ri e u xepoyil ri ama' wacax che, xukuje' ri e rech ri ama' chij, ri e qui je', ri xepo ri e c'o chquij ri ti'j chupam, ri e quinak' xukuje' ri seseb ri c'o wi xepo," 
Leviticus9:20 xequiya' c'ut ri xepoyil cuc' tak ri e uwo c'uxaj. Xebuporoj c'ut ri Aaron puwi' ri porobal. 
Leviticus9:21 E are' tak cuc' ri e uwo c'uxaj, cachil ri a'aj aj iquiak'ab, xuwi xuban ri xban che qui jachic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm che ri Moises." 
Leviticus9:22 Ri Aaron xebuyac ri u k'ab paquiwi' ri aj israelib, xebutewichi'j; aretak jachtajinak chic ri tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajisaxic, xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib xbec xuya' can ri porobal." 
Leviticus9:23 Xoc c'u ri Moises rachil ri Aaron chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, aretak c'u xebel ulok xequitewichi'j ri aj israelib xuc'ut c'u rib ri Ajawaxel ruc' nimalaj juluwem chquiwäch conojel ri tinimit." 
Leviticus9:24 Xel ulok k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xuporoj ri awaj ri poroxic rij, xukuje' tak ri xepo ri c'o puwi' ri porobal. Aretak xquil conojel ri aj israelib xquirak qui chi' ruc' quicotemal, xquimej quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew." 
Leviticus10:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron are' ri Nadab xukuje' ri Abiu, chquijujunal xquic'am ri qui bukibal, xequiya' k'ak' xukuje' c'oc'alaj k'ol chquipam, xquichi'j c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jun k'ak' ri jun chi wi ri man are ta ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chque." 
Leviticus10:2 Xel c'u ulok k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri xebupororej, xecäm c'ut chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus10:3 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron: “Are wa' ri xraj ri Ajawaxel xubij: ‘Chque ri quenakajin chwe quinc'ut wi na ri nu tastajic, chquiwäch conojel ri aj israelib quinc'ut na ri nu juluwem.’ ” Man c'o ta c'u jas xubij ri Aaron." 
Leviticus10:4 Ri Moises xebusiq'uij ri Misael xukuje' ri Elzapan, (e u c'ojol ri Uziel, rican ri Aaron), xubij chque: “Tisaj, chebiwesaj bic we iwachalal ri' chupam ri k'ijilabal, jebiya' can chrij ri kajebal.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Xekeb c'ut, xequitelej bic e qui cojom ri rij catz'iak, xequiya' can chrij ri kajebal jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Moises." 
Leviticus10:6 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron, e rachil ri e u c'ojol ri Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar: ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron: “Miquiyiba' ri i wi', mawi mebijis ri iwatz'iak che u c'utic ri i bis, mixecäm c'u ne, mäkaj ri royowal ri Ajawaxel paquiwi' ri aj israelib. Ri cuya' caquibisoj are ri cachalal ri cachalaxic quib, conojel ri aj israelib, chi ri Ajawaxel xuban na we c'atic ri'." 
Leviticus10:7 Naj mixbe wi che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, rech man quixcäm taj; ri ix tastajinak rumal ri raseit ri Ajawaxel.” Je c'ut jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises je xquibano." 
Leviticus10:8 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon chic ruc' ri Aaron, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus10:9 “Aretak ri at o ri e a c'ojol quixoc pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, mitij u wa'l uva, mawi uq'uia' ri quek'abarisanic, rech man quixcäm taj; jun pixab wa' ri cacanaj can chque ri tataxelab xukuje' chque ri c'ojolaxelab" 
Leviticus10:10 rech quixcuinic quiwil ri u jalbem rib ri tastalic ruc' ri man tastalic taj, ri tz'il xukuje' ri ch'ajch'oj," 
Leviticus10:11 rech quixcuinic quebitijoj ri aj israelib chque conojel ri pixab ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel chiwe rumal ri Moises.” 
Leviticus10:12 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Aaron, xukuje' che ri Eleazar, ri Itamar, ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Aaron ri e canajinak canok: “Chebic'ama' ri sipanic quech c'äj ri e canajinak can chque ri sipanic ri xeporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, mebiya' ch'am cuc', chebitija' chunakaj ri porobal, sibalaj c'u tastalic wa'." 
Leviticus10:13 Chitija' pa jun tastalic c'olbal, are c'u wa' ri i taklebem ri at xukuje' ri e a c'ojol chque ri sipanic ri queporox che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, are c'u takanic wa' yo'm chwe." 
Leviticus10:14 Ri uwo c'uxaj are sipanic wa' ri nim u k'ij, ri ra' ri awaj ri qui yo'm ri aj israelib che sipanic, rajawaxic quebitij pa jun c'olbal ch'ajch'oj ri at, xukuje' ri e a c'ojol ri e a mia'l; e are wa' ri ya'tal chiwe chque ri qui tz'akatil ri tabal tak tok'ob ri cäquiya' ri aj israelib che utzirisan ib." 
Leviticus10:15 Ri ra' ri awaj ri cäya' che sipanic, xukuje' ri uwo c'uxaj ri cäya' che sipanic ri nim u k'ij, quec'am na bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; queya' chuwäch jacha' sipanic ri nim qui k'ij, querachilaj ri xepo ri queporoxic; are c'u awech wa' amak'el cuc' ri awalc'ual, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Xuta' c'u ri Moises chque jas xquiban che ri alaj ama' q'uisic' ri cäpil u mac ri macaj, xbix c'u che chi xporotajic; xoyowar chrij ri Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar, ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Aaron ri e canajinak canok, xubij chque:" 
Leviticus10:17 “¿Jasche man xitij ri tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj pa ri c'olbal ri tastajinak? Jun jasach c'u wa' ri sibalaj tastalic, u yo'm c'u ri Ajawaxel chiwe rech ix quixekan ri qui mac ri aj israelib, quirik c'u ri sachbal qui mac rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus10:18 We man xc'am ta c'u bic ri quic' pa ri rachoch Dios, ri ix rajawaxic xitij ta ri tabal tok'ob pa ri c'olbal ri tastalic, jacha' ri takanic ri nu yo'm." 
Leviticus10:19 Ri Aaron, xubij che ri Moises: Chawilampe', camic ri e are' qui jachom ri tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel u mac rech ri macaj xukuje' ri qui tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic; are c'u ri in xebenc'ulmaj we jastak ri', we ta c'u xintij ri tabal tok'ob camic ri u mac rech ri macaj, ¿la cäc'amar ta c'u lo ri' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Aretak xuta' ri Moises ri xubij ri Aaron, man c'o ta chi jas xubij." 
Leviticus11:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Leviticus11:2 “Chibij chque ri aj israelib chi, e are' tak wa' ri awaj ri ya'talic quequitijo, chquixo'l conojel ri awaj ri e c'o cho ri ulew. Cuya' quequitij ri awaj" 
Leviticus11:3 ri quieb u banom quixq'uiak, xukuje' quecoq'uisanic," 
Leviticus11:4 man cuya' ta c'ut quebitij we awaj ri' pune' ta quecoq'uisanic o quieb ta u banom ri quixq'uiak: ri camey, rumal rech chi cäcoq'uisanic man u banom ta c'u quieb ri rixq'uiak, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:5 Ri u tzi' ja', rumal rech chi cäcoq'uisanic, man u banom ta c'u quieb ri rixq'uiak, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:6 Ri imul pune' cäcoq'uisanic, man u banom ta c'u quieb ri rixq'uiak, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:7 Ri ak, pune' u banom quieb ri rixq'uiak, man c'u cäcoq'uisan taj, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:8 Man quitij ta ri qui ti'jal we awaj ri', mawi michap ri cäminak u ti'jal. E tz'ilalaj tak awaj wa'." 
Leviticus11:9 Chquixo'l ri awaj ri e c'o pa ri ja' we re plo o e re nima', xuwi cuya' quebitij ri c'o alaj tak qui xic' xukuje' ri c'o u solotil ri quij." 
Leviticus11:10 Conojel c'u ri man c'o ta alaj tak qui xic', mawi c'o ta u solotil ri quij, e awaj wa' ri etzelam qui wäch pune' e re plo o e re nima', xak e junam ri ch'utik tak awaj cuc' ri e nimak." 
Leviticus11:11 Mebitij ri qui ti'jal, are' e awaj wa' ri etzelam qui wäch, xukuje' quiwetzelaj na qui wäch ri cäminak qui ti'jal." 
Leviticus11:12 Conojel ri awaj ri e c'o pa tak ri ja' ri man c'o ta alaj tak qui xic' xukuje' ri man c'o ta u solotil ri quij, etzelam qui wäch." 
Leviticus11:13 Man quetijow ta tak wa' we aj xic'ab tak chicop ri', xane' e awaj wa' ri e etzelam qui wäch: ri cot, ri xulbak, ri cot re plo," 
Leviticus11:14 ri milano, xukuje' ronojel qui wäch alcon," 
Leviticus11:15 ronojel qui wäch joj; 
Leviticus11:16 ri abestrus, ri xoch', ri xic aj plo, ronojel qui wäch xic," 
Leviticus11:17 ri tucur, ri joj aj plo, ri ibis," 
Leviticus11:18 ri sisne, ri pelican, ri c'uch," 
Leviticus11:19 ri siguenya, ronojel qui wäch garz, ri abubiy, ri sotz'." 
Leviticus11:20 Ronojel chicop ri cärapapic xukuje' cawac'aq'uic, etzelam qui wäch wa'." 
Leviticus11:21 Cuya' c'ut quebitij wa', pune' querapinic xukuje' quewac'aq'uic, xukuje' e qui rikom tak quib ri ca' cuc' ri cakan ri caquich'opinabej cho ri ulew." 
Leviticus11:22 Ri cuya' quebitij chquixo'l e are wa' ronojel qui wäch sac', nimak tak sac', xi'r xukuje' ri quech'opinic." 
Leviticus11:23 Ronojel c'u qui wäch chicop ri querapinic xukuje' cäwac'lajic, etzelam qui wäch wa'." 
Leviticus11:24 Cumal we jastak ri' quixcanaj tz'il: apachin ri cächapowic ri cäminak qui ti'jal we awaj ri' cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab. 
Leviticus11:25 Apachin ri cäwalijisan jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri', quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, cäcanaj c'u na tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus11:26 Ronojel awaj ri c'o rixq'uiak, ri man u banom ta quieb mawi cäcoq'uisanic, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe; apachin ri canakowic xukuje' cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus11:27 Apachique awaj ri c'o quiejeb rakan ri cäbin paquiwi' ri quiejeb rakan, tz'ilalaj awaj wa' chiwe, xukuje' apachin ri canakowic aretak cäminak chic, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus11:28 Apachin ri cäwalijisan jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri', quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab, e tz'il c'u tak wa' we awaj ri' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:29 Chquixo'l ri awaj ri caquijururej quib cho ri ulew e are tak wa' ri e tz'il chiwe: ri sakbin, ri ch'o, xukuje' ronojel qui wäch ri caquijuruj quib:" 
Leviticus11:30 jacha' ri oo'n, ri ayin re plo xukuje' ri ayin re chaki'j ulew, ri xpa'ch, xukuje' tak ri xcu'tz." 
Leviticus11:31 E are wa' ri e tz'il chiwe chquixo'l conojel ri chicop xukuje' apachin ri quenakowic aretak e cäminak chic, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus11:32 Xukuje' cäcanaj tz'il apachique jasach ri cukajbej jun chque we awaj ri' aretak cäminak chic. We jun jasach re che', we jun atz'iak, o jun jasach re tz'um, o c'ul o apachique chacubal, rajawaxic cänim na pa ja', cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab; c'äte ri' cäcanaj ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus11:33 We jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri' cätzak pa jun bo'j, cäcanaj tz'il xukuje' ri c'o chupam, cäpaxix na we bo'j ri'." 
Leviticus11:34 Ronojel ri tijic rij, ri cäkaj wi ri ja' ri cäch'ajbex re we bo'j ri', xukuje' ronojel ri ruq'uiaxic rij ri c'o chupam ri bo'j, cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus11:35 Apachique jasach ri cukajbej jun chque we awaj ri' aretak cäminak chic, cäcanaj tz'il; we jun nim jorno, o jun alaj jorno: rajawaxic cäwulixic; e tz'il c'u wa' chiwe." 
Leviticus11:36 Are c'u, ri u q'uiyibal ja' o c'ua' ri cäc'am wi ja', kas ch'ajch'oj wi; are c'u ri cächapow ri cäminak awaj, cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus11:37 We cäcäm jun chque we awaj ri', cäkaj c'u ri u ch'akapil puwi' jun ija' ri tiquic rij; kas ch'ajch'oj wi, ri ija'." 
Leviticus11:38 We c'u mubam chic ri ija' cäkaj c'u jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri puwi', we ija' ri' cux tz'il." 
Leviticus11:39 We c'u ne cäcäm jun chque ri iwawaj ri tijic rij iwumal, ri canakow we cäminak awaj ri' cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab;" 
Leviticus11:40 ri cutij re ri u ti'jal ri cäminak awaj, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab; ri quebesan bic we cäminak tak awaj ri' rajawaxic quebe qui ch'aj ri catz'iak, quecanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus11:41 Mitij jun chicop ri cujururej rib cho ri ulew; awaj wa' ri etzelam u wäch. 
Leviticus11:42 Conojel chicop ri cäquijururej quib cho ri ulew, mitij jun chque, we cubinibej ri qui pam, o cubinibej ri quiejeb rakan, o cubinibej sibalaj q'ui rakan, e awaj wa' ri etzelam qui wäch." 
Leviticus11:43 Mitz'iloj iwib ruc' jun chque we chicop ri' ri cäquijururej quib.” 
Leviticus11:44 “In c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri ix rajawaxic chi kas quitas iwib, chixux c'u tastalic, in c'u in tastalic, man quinban ta etzelal. Mitz'iloj ba iwib ruc' apachique chicop ri cujururej rib cho ri ulew." 
Leviticus11:45 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt rech quinux i Dios: rumal ri' rajawaxic quixux tastalic, ri in man quinban ta etzelal, in c'u tastalic in.”" 
Leviticus11:46 E are pixab wa' chquij ri awaj, xukuje' ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', xukuje' conojel ri c'o qui c'aslemal ri queslab pa tak ri ja', xukuje' chque conojel ri awaj ri caquijururej quib cho ri ulew," 
Leviticus11:47 rech cäc'utun ri u jalbem rib ri tz'il ruc' ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' chquixo'l ri awaj ri takal qui tijic cuc' ri awaj ri man takal ta qui tijic. 
Leviticus12:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus12:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak jun ixok cäcanaj yawab winak, caralaj c'u jun ral ala, cäcanaj tz'il wukub k'ij; jacha' ri cubano aretak cäyabin chi ic'." 
Leviticus12:3 Ri ac'al ala cakopix na ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri achi wi aretak cätz'akat wajxakib (8) u k'ij. 
Leviticus12:4 Ri u nan ri ac'al cäbeytaj na juwinak oxlajuj (33) k'ij ri u josk'itajic che ri u quiq'uel; man c'o ta jun jasach ri tastalic cuya' cuchapo mawi coc ta chupam ri k'ijilabal, c'ä cätz'akat na ri u josk'itajic." 
Leviticus12:5 We ali ri cäralaj, cajlajuj (14) k'ij cäcanaj tz'il, jacha' ri cubano aretak cäyabin chi ic', oxc'al wakib (66) k'ij cäbeytaj na ri u josk'itajic che ri u quiq'uel." 
Leviticus12:6 Aretak quebetz'akat ri k'ij re ri u josk'itajic che ri ralanic jun ala o jun ali, ri u nan ri ac'al cuc'am ulok chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib jun alaj ama' chij re jun u junab che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, xukuje' jun tucumux o jun palomax cujach pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob, u mac rech ri macaj." 
Leviticus12:7 Are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob quebuchi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che u tz'onoxic ri sachbal u mac ri ixok, ruc' wa' cäjosk'itaj ri ixok che ri u quiq'uel.” E are tak pixab wa' che ri ixok aretak cäralaj jun ala o jun ali." 
Leviticus12:8 We c'u ri u nan ri ac'al man cuban ta ri u rajil che u lok'ic ulok jun alaj ama' chij, cuya' quebuc'am na ulok quieb palomax o quieb tucumux jun che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, ri jun chic jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri mac; ri cojol tabal tok'ob cutz'onoj ri sachbal u mac ri ixok, cäjosk'itaj c'ut." 
Leviticus13:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xukuje' ri Aaron, xubij chque:" 
Leviticus13:2 “Aretak jun winak c'o sipoj chrij ri u tz'umal, o pok', o sakrek', o ch'a'c ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri chuwilaj ch'a'c, rajawaxic cäc'am ulok chuwäch ri Aaron ri cojol tabal tok'ob o chuwäch jun chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e rija'lil ri Aaron." 
Leviticus13:3 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj ri ch'a'c ri c'o chrij ri u tz'umal, we sakarinak ri rismal ri c'o pa ri ch'a'c, we mecmobinak ri ch'a'c pa ri u tz'umal, jic chi chuwilaj ch'a'c wa'. Aretak nic'otajinak chic we winak ri' rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cuk'alajisaj chi c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij." 
Leviticus13:4 We c'o sakrek' chrij ri u tz'umal, man mecmobinak ta c'u chuxe' ri u tz'umal mawi sakarinak ri rismal, ri cojol tabal tok'ob wukub k'ij cutz'apij na ri ch'aquirinak pa jun ja." 
Leviticus13:5 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij cunic'oj na ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we xak je wi u banom ri ch'a'c, man u jabum ta rib chrij ri u tz'umal, cätz'apix chi na wukub k'ij rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus13:6 Aretak cätz'akat ri wukub k'ij cänic'ox chi jumul rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u cätajin cäsach ri ch'a'c, man c'u u jabum ta rib chrij ri u tz'umal ri winak, Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij xak pok' wa' ri xq'uiy che ri u tz'umal. Ri yawab quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, cäcanaj c'u ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:7 We c'u cujabuj rib ri pok' chrij ri u tz'umal aretak nic'om chic ri yawab, xukuje' k'alajisam chic rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob chi man c'o ta u yab; rajawaxic cäbe chi na jumul ruc' ri cojol tabal tok'ob, rech cänic'ox rumal." 
Leviticus13:8 We c'u aretak cänic'otaj ri yawab rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, caril c'ut chi u jabum rib ri pok' chrij ri u tz'umal, cuk'alajisaj na chi tz'il; yawab c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij." 
Leviticus13:9 Aretak jun winak c'o u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij, rajawaxic cäc'am bic chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus13:10 Cänic'ox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, we c'u sak ri sipoj ri c'o che ri u tz'umal u banom c'ut chi ri rismal cätajin cäsakaric, we c'u quilitaj ri quiäkalaj ti'j pa ri sipoj," 
Leviticus13:11 chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri u ruxubem ri u tz'umal. Ri cojol tabal tok'ob rajawaxic cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il we winak ri', man rajawaxic ta chic cutz'apij, tz'ilotajinak chic." 
Leviticus13:12 We c'u cänimataj ri chuwilaj ch'a'c ruc' aninakil, chi quebuch'uk ri rakan xukuje' ri u jolom ri yawab c'ä jawije' ri cacuin wi ri cojol tabal tok'ob che rilic," 
Leviticus13:13 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj na; we c'u ch'ukutajinak ronojel ri u cuerp rumal ri ch'a'c ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta u yab, sakarinak c'u ri ch'a'c canajinak ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:14 Apachique c'u k'ij, ri cäc'utun ri quiäk ti'j, cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus13:15 Cunic'oj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri quiäk ti'j, cuk'alajisaj chi c'o u yab ri winak. Ri quiäk ti'j u tz'ilol chuwilaj ch'a'c wa'." 
Leviticus13:16 We c'u ne cuq'uex rib ri quiäk ti'j, cäsakar chi jumul, ri yawab rajawaxic cuc'utu chi na rib chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob" 
Leviticus13:17 rech cunic'oj, we c'u carilo chi ri ch'a'c sakarinak chi jumul, cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta u yab we winak ri', canajinak c'u ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:18 Aretak c'o jachin jun c'o jun chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij ri u tz'umal cäcunataj c'ut," 
Leviticus13:19 cäcanaj c'u can jun sak sipoj pa ri u c'olbal, o jun quiäk sakrek', rajawaxic cuc'utu' rib chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus13:20 We ri cojol tabal tok'ob; carilo chi ri u rikom wi ri c'axc'obic mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, sakarinak c'u ri rismal, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il we winak ri', u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri c'o che." 
Leviticus13:21 We carilo chi ri xc'oji' wi ri chuwilaj ch'a'c man c'o ta rismal ri sakarinak chupam, mawi mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, xane' xa benak rutziric, wukub k'ij cutz'apij na we winak ri' pa jun ja." 
Leviticus13:22 We c'u cätajin cujabuj rib ri yabil chrij ri u tz'umal, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi c'o u yab we winak ri', u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri c'o chrij." 
Leviticus13:23 We c'u ri xc'oji' wi ri chuwilaj ch'a'c man u jabum ta rib, xak u yuquil ri ch'a'c wa', ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta u yab we winak ri'." 
Leviticus13:24 Aretak c'o jun c'atic chrij ri u tz'umal jun winak, we c'u c'o jun sakrek', o sak chuwäch ri quiäk ti'j," 
Leviticus13:25 cunic'oj na ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u sakarinak ri rismal pa ri c'atic, mecmobinak c'u pa ri u tz'umal, chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri xq'uiy ulok pa ri c'atic; ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c c'ut ri c'o chrij." 
Leviticus13:26 We c'u aretak cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri c'atic, carilo chi man c'o ta jun sak rismal pa ri c'atic mawi mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, xane' benak rutziric wukub k'ij cutz'apij na pa jun ja," 
Leviticus13:27 aretak catz'akat ri wukub k'ij cänic'ox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u u jabum rib ri yabil chrij ri u tz'umal, cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il we winak ri', u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri c'o chrij." 
Leviticus13:28 We c'u ri c'atic man cujabuj ta rib chrij ri u tz'umal, xane' benak rutziric, xa u sipoj ri c'atic wa' ri xcanajic, xa jeri', ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi ch'ajch'oj ri yawab, xa c'u u yuquil ri c'atic." 
Leviticus13:29 We jun achi o jun ixok c'o jun ch'a'c che ri u jolom o che ri u cacate'," 
Leviticus13:30 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj ri ch'a'c, we ri ch'a'c mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, k'anarinak c'u ri rismal xukuje' xak cäwalalic, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il we winak ri', c'o quiäkchi'n che, ri u bixic ch'a'c re jolomaj xukuje' re cacate'." 
Leviticus13:31 We c'u aretak cänic'ox ri ch'a'c ri quiäkchi'n rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, carilo chi we man mecmobinak ta pa ri u tz'umal, mawi c'o k'ek rismal, cutz'apij na wukub k'ij we winak ri' chupam jun ja." 
Leviticus13:32 Aretak catz'akat wukub k'ij cänic'ox ri ch'a'c rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u man u jabum rib ri quiäkchi'n mawi mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, mawi k'anarinak ri rismal." 
Leviticus13:33 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cubij che ri winak ri yawab chi cäsocax ri u wi', man cäsocax ta c'u ri c'o wi ri quiäkchi'n ch'a'c cutz'apij chi na wukub k'ij pa jun ja." 
Leviticus13:34 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj chi na ri ch'a'c jumul, we c'u man u jubum rib ri quiäkchi'n mawi mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi ch'ajch'oj we ri winak ri', quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, cäcanaj c'u ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:35 We c'u ri quiäkchi'n cujabuj rib chrij ri u tz'umal, aretak k'alajisam chic, chi ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:36 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj chi jumul ri winak ri yawab, we c'u u jabum rib ri quiäkchi'n chrij ri u tz'umal, man rajawaxic ta chic cutzucuj ri wi'aj ri k'ank'oj, tz'il wa'." 
Leviticus13:37 We c'u caril ri cojol tabal tok'ob chi ri quiäkchi'n man u jabum ta rib, q'uiyinak c'u ulok ri k'ek ismal chupam, cunatajinak chic ri quiäkchi'n, ri winak ch'ajch'oj. Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj na chi ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:38 We jun achi we jun ixok e c'o sakrek' chrij ri u tz'umal," 
Leviticus13:39 ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cunic'oj ri u tz'umal, we carilo chi c'o etal saksoj we sak macalic pa ri sakrek'; xak apachique sipoj wa' ri q'uiyinak chrij ri u tz'umal; ch'ajch'oj we winak ri'." 
Leviticus13:40 We jun winak cätzak ri u wi', cäcanaj c'u ch'a'n, ch'ajch'oj wa'." 
Leviticus13:41 We ri u wi' ri c'o chuwäch cäk'ulk'ubic cach'anar c'u chuwäch, xukuje' ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus13:42 We c'u cäc'utun jun ch'a'c ri sak quiäk cäca'yic pa tak ri c'olbal ri e ch'anach'oj, we chrij u wi' we chuwäch, xa cätajin caq'uiy ulok chuwilaj ch'a'c chila'." 
Leviticus13:43 Cunic'oj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob, we c'u ri sipoj re ri ch'a'c ri c'o pa tak ri ch'ajch'oj sak quiäk cäca'yic, je jas ri rilic ri chuwilaj ch'a'c che ri u tz'umal ri cuerp." 
Leviticus13:44 We winak ri' yawab che chuwilaj chac', ch'acarinak ri u jolom. Jun winak wa' ri tz'il, je u k'alajisaxic cuban na ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus13:45 Ri winak ri ch'aquirinak che chuwilaj ch'a'c, jisjobinak tak atz'iak cucojo xukuje' man cuch'uk ta ri u jolom, ch'ukutal jubik' ri u palaj curak u chi', cubij: ‘¡In tz'il! ¡In tz'il!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Joropa' k'ij cäc'oji' ri chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij, cachomaxic chi tz'il, cutuquela'j rib chrij ri tinimit." 
Leviticus13:47 Aretak cac'utun jun tz'aj che jun atz'iak, we re rismal chij o re lino," 
Leviticus13:48 o che jun quem, re lino o re rismal chij, o che jun tz'um, o che apachique jasach re tz'um" 
Leviticus13:49 we ri tz'aj ri c'o chque we jastak ri' räxroj o quiäkcoj, ri tz'aj ri' chuwilaj ch'a'c wa', takal u c'utic chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus13:50 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj na ri tz'aj, cutz'apij c'u na wukub k'ij ri jasach ri tz'ajtajinak." 
Leviticus13:51 Aretak catz'akat wukub k'ij cunic'oj ri tz'aj; we u jabum rib chrij ri atz'iak, chrij ri rakan quem o u wa' quem, o che ri tz'um o jun jasach re tz'um, ri tz'aj chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' e are tak c'ut ri jastak e tz'il wa'." 
Leviticus13:52 Je c'u ri' apachique jasach ri c'o we tz'aj ri' che chuwilaj ch'a'c wa', rajawaxic u poroxic ronojel, chuwilaj ch'a'c wa'." 
Leviticus13:53 We c'u cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cäriktaj c'ut chi man u jabum ta rib, ri tz'aj," 
Leviticus13:54 cuya' takanic chi cäch'aj ri tz'aj cätz'apix chi na wukub k'ij ri jasach ri' pa jun ja. 
Leviticus13:55 Aretak ch'ajtajinak chic ri tz'aj cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob. We c'u cärilo chi ri tz'aj man sachinak taj, tz'aj, ri jasach takal u poroxic, pune' ri tz'aj man u jabum ta rib, xa benak chupam, we chupam c'o wi xukuje' we chrij c'o wi." 
Leviticus13:56 We c'u aretak cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cärilo chi ri tz'aj sachinak aretak ch'ajom chic, cukupij apam we ch'akap ri' che ri atz'iak, che ri tz'um o che ri quem." 
Leviticus13:57 We c'u cuc'ut chi rib jumul chrij ri atz'iak, o chrij ri quem o chrij apachique jasach re tz'um, cäporox we jasach ri' ri tz'ajtajinak." 
Leviticus13:58 Are c'u ri atz'iak, ri quem, o apachique jasach re tz'um, ri quel wi ri tz'aj aretak cäch'ajic, cäcamulix u ch'ajic cäcanaj c'u can ch'ajch'oj.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Aretak wa' ri pixab chquij ri tz'aj re chuwilaj ch'a'c chque tak ri atz'iak re rismal chij o re lino, o chque quem, o chque jastak re tz'um, rech cuya' quek'alajisaxic chi e ch'ajch'oj o e tz'il." 
Leviticus14:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus14:2 “E are tak pixab wa' che u josk'ixic jun winak ri c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij: ri yawab cäc'am bic chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob," 
Leviticus14:3 quel c'u bic che u nic'oxic chrij ri tinimit. We c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cärilo chi utzirinak ri chuwilaj ch'a'c ri c'o chrij ri yawab," 
Leviticus14:4 cutak na qui c'amic che ri cujosk'ij rib quieb alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri e c'asc'oj ri xukuje' e ch'ajch'oj, ch'akap chacalte', quiäk quem, xukuje' k'ayes re hisop." 
Leviticus14:5 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cätakan che u k'atic u kul jun chque ri alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' puwi' jun bo'j, ri c'o sakalak ja' chupam," 
Leviticus14:6 cuc'am c'ut ri alaj chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri c'aslic, ri ch'akap che' re chacalte', ri quiäk quem xukuje' ri k'ayes re hisop quebuch'akaba' we jastak ri' xukuje' ri alaj chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri c'aslic pa ri u quiq'uel ri alaj chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri cäminak, puwi' ri sakalaj ja'." 
Leviticus14:7 Wukub mul cuchicoj chrij ri winak ri quejosk'ix che ri ch'a'c, cuk'alajisaj c'ut chi ch'ajch'oj. Ri alaj chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri c'aslic cutzokopij bic." 
Leviticus14:8 Ri cäjosk'ixic rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak catinic, xukuje' cusocaj c'u ronojel ri rismal rech cäjosk'itajic. C'äte ri' cuya' coc pa ri kajebal, wukub k'ij c'ut cacanaj can cho ri räxk'ab." 
Leviticus14:9 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij, cusocaj ronojel ri u wi', cusocaj ri rismachi', ri rismal ri rij tak u bak'wäch xukuje' ronojel ri rismal quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus14:10 Aretak catz'akat wajxakib k'ij quebuc'am ulok quieb ama'ib tak chij ri man c'o ta qui yab, xukuje' jun ati't chij re jun u junab ri man c'o ta u yab; cajlajuj (14) libra utzalaj c'äj che sipanic re c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc', carachilaj jun u roxil jun litro aseit." 
Leviticus14:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäbanow ri josk'inic, cuya' ri winak ri cäjosk'ixic xukuje' ri e jastak rech chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus14:12 Cuc'am jun chque ri ama'ib tak chij cärachilaj jun u roxil jun litro aseit, cujach chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus14:13 Rajawaxic cupil ri ama' chij pa ri c'olbal ri tastalic ri cätok' wi ri qui kul ri awaj ri queya' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj xukuje' ri e tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic. Ri tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil cux rech ri cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob josk'ibal macaj, jun jasach c'u wa' ri sibalaj tastalic." 
Leviticus14:14 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri u quiq'uel ri awaj ri yo'm che tabal tok'ob ri cäjosk'in ri chak'maquil, cubil xe' ri u xiquin re ri riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic, che ri nim u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, xukuje' che ri nim u wi' rakan re ri riquiak'ab." 
Leviticus14:15 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri aseit, cuk'ij chupam ri u k'ab re ri u mox." 
Leviticus14:16 Cut'in ri u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab pa ri aseit ri c'o chupam ri u k'ab re ri u mox, ruc' we u wi' u k'ab ri' cuchicoj wukub mul ri aseit chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus14:17 Ri u tz'akatil ri aseit ri to'tajinak pa u k'ab, cuc'am jubik' ri cojol tabal tok'ob cubil xe' ri u xiquin re ri riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic, che ri nim u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, che ri nim u wi' rakan re ri riquiak'ab, puwi' ri u quiq'uel ri tabal tok'ob ri u mac rech ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus14:18 Ri aseit ri to'tajinak pa u k'ab, cubil pa u jolom ri cäjosk'ixic. Jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik rumal ri Ajawaxel ri cuyubal mac che u josk'ixic ri macaj." 
Leviticus14:19 Are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cupil ri sipanic ri quesan ri macaj, cuban c'u ri josk'inic che ri cujosk'ij rib che ri u tz'ilol; c'äte c'u ri' cupila' ri awaj ri cachi'x che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic." 
Leviticus14:20 Cuchi'j puwi' ri porobal cärachilaj ri sipanic que c'äj. Jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal u mac we winak ri' cäcanaj c'u can ch'ajch'oj. 
Leviticus14:21 We ri winak ri yawab meba' man c'o ta cuma' wi ri cätok'ix che, cuc'am na jun ama' chij jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal macaj cujach c'ut jacha' che sipanic ri nim u banic che qui rikic ri cuyubal tak u mac, cärachilaj quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj utzalaj c'äj, yok'om aseit ruc' jacha' che sipanic quech c'äj, cärachilaj jun u roxil jun litro aseit." 
Leviticus14:22 Xukuje' quieb tucumux we quieb palomax, jas ri cäcuin che qui lok'ic; jun che josk'ibal mac, ri jun chic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic." 
Leviticus14:23 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij quebuc'am bic ronojel wa' che ri cojol tabal tok'ob, che ri u josk'ixic rib, cujach chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus14:24 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am ri ama' chij ri cäya' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri chak'maquil, cärachilaj jun u roxil jun litro aseit, cujach c'ut chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jacha' sipanic ri nim u banic." 
Leviticus14:25 C'äte ri' cutok' u kul ri alaj ama' chij che tabal tok'ob che cuyubal mac cuc'am jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri ama' chij cubil xe' ri u xiquin re ri u riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic, che ri nim u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, xukuje' che ri nim u wi' rakan re ri riquiak'ab," 
Leviticus14:26 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri aseit cuya' chupam ri u k'ab re ri u mox," 
Leviticus14:27 ruc' c'u ri u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, cuchicoj ri aseit wukub mul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus14:28 Xukuje' cubil jubik' we aseit ri' xe' ri u xiquin re ri riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic, che ri nim u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab, che ri nim u wi' rakan re ri riquiak'ab, ri u bixic pa ri c'olbal ri xbil wi ri quic' re tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri chak'maquil." 
Leviticus14:29 Are c'u ri aseit ri to'tajinak can pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cubil pa u jolom ri cäjosk'ixic jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal mac." 
Leviticus14:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuya' jun chque ri tucumux o jun chque ri palomax, jas ri cuininak ri winak che u ya'ic che u josk'ixic rib." 
Leviticus14:31 Jun chque ri tucumux we ri palomax cäya' che tabal tok'ob re sachbal macaj, ri jun chic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, rachilam ri sipanic re c'äj, jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal u mac ri winak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus14:32 E are tak pixab wa' chque ri cäc'oji' chuwilaj ch'a'c chquij, ri man quecuin taj cäquiya' nimalaj tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic quib." 
Leviticus14:33 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Leviticus14:34 “Aretak ix c'o chic pa ri ulew Canaan ri quinjach na pa i k'ab, quintak c'u bic jun yabil re chuwilaj ch'a'c puwi' jun chque ri ja ri c'o pa ri iwulew," 
Leviticus14:35 ri ajchak'e ja, cuya' u bixic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cubij che: In quinwilo chi c'o jun yabil re chuwilaj ch'a'c pa ri wachoch." 
Leviticus14:36 C'ä majok coc ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri ja, cutak u jamic ri ja rech man quetz'ilob taj conojel ri jastak ri e c'o chupam, c'äte ri' cuchaplej u nic'oxic ri yabil." 
Leviticus14:37 We aretak cunic'oj ri yabil, cärilo chi mecmobinak bic ri u wäch ri tapia ri c'o wi ri yabil ri räxroj we ne e quiäkcoj, ri e mecmobinak bic chupam ri tapia," 
Leviticus14:38 ri cojol tabal tok'ob quel ulok pa ri ja, catakan che u tz'apixic ri ja wukub k'ij." 
Leviticus14:39 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cunic'oj chi jumul; we c'u u jabum rib ri yabil cho tak ri u tapia ri ja," 
Leviticus14:40 cutak qui c'oquic ri abaj ri c'o wi ri yabil, quebeq'uiak can pa jun tz'ilalaj c'olbal chrij ri tinimit;" 
Leviticus14:41 xukuje' cätakan che u josic ronojel ri u pam ri ja, xukuje' ri rij, ri ulew ri josom, quetix can pa jun tz'ilalaj c'olbal chrij ri tinimit." 
Leviticus14:42 Quec'am chi niq'uiaj abaj, quecoj che qui q'uexwäch ri xebesaxic, xukuje' cäban c'ac' xok'ol che u c'ojoxic ri ja." 
Leviticus14:43 We c'u cäpok' chi jumul ri yabil pa ri ja, aretak e cojom chi tak ri abaj, josom chi ri u tapia, xukuje' banom chic c'ac' u tz'akixic," 
Leviticus14:44 ri cojol tabal tok'ob coc chi che u nic'oxic. We c'u u jabum chi rib ri yabil pa ri ja, chuwilaj ch'a'c wa', xukuje' c'o yabil che ri ja." 
Leviticus14:45 Ri ja cäwilix na, ronojel ri xan, ri abaj, ri che' ri quel che, quebeq'uiak pa jun tz'ilalaj c'olbal chrij ri tinimit." 
Leviticus14:46 Apachin ta ne ri coc pa ri ja pa ronojel ri k'ijol ri xubij ri cojol tabal tok'ob chi catz'apixic, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus14:47 Apachin ta ne ri cäwa'ic o cäwar pa ri ja, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak che u josk'ixic rib." 
Leviticus14:48 We c'u aretak coc ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u nic'oxic u pam ri ja, crilo chi man u jabum ta rib ri yabil pa ri ja, aretak c'ac' chi u tz'akic ri u pam, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta yabil che ri ja, ri yabil xoc'owic." 
Leviticus14:49 Che u josk'ixic ri ja, quebuc'am na quieb alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic', ch'akap chacalte', quiäk quem xukuje' k'ayes re hisop." 
Leviticus14:50 Cuk'at u kul jun chque ri alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' puwi' jun bo'j ri c'o sakalaj ja' chupam. 
Leviticus14:51 Cuc'am ri ch'akap chacalte', ri k'ayes re hisop ri quiäk quem rachilam ri alaj chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri c'aslic, quebuch'akaba' pa ri u quiq'uel ri alaj chicop ri c'o u xic' ri cäminak, rachilam ri sakalaj ja', wukub mul cuchicoj pa ri ja." 
Leviticus14:52 Jewa' cuban che u josk'ixic ri ja ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj chicop ri c'o u xic' rachilam ri sakalaj ja' carachilaj ri alaj chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri c'aslic, ri ch'akap chacalte', ri k'ayes re hisop xukuje' ri quiäk quem." 
Leviticus14:53 Cutzokopij c'u bic ri alaj chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri c'aslic chrij ri tinimit pa ri juyub. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri u josk'ixic ri ja.” 
Leviticus14:54 E are tak pixab wa' che ronojel u wäch yabil re ch'a'c xukuje' re quiäkchi'n," 
Leviticus14:55 che ri chuwilaj ch'a'c che atz'iak, xukuje' che ri chuwilaj ch'a'c pa tak ri ja," 
Leviticus14:56 che ri sipoj, ri pok', xukuje' tak ri tz'aj," 
Leviticus14:57 rech cäch'obtajic jachique ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' jachique ri tz'il. C'ä waral cäq'uis wi u bixic ri cäban che u josk'ixic ri ch'a'c. 
Leviticus15:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Leviticus15:2 “Chibij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chiwe: Aretak jun achi cabelel ri u pam ri achi wi, tz'il wa' we achi ri'." 
Leviticus15:3 Ri tz'ilol u mac rech ri u belelem ri u pam achi wi we ri achi wi tz'apitajinak rumal ri u pam. Kas tz'il wi amak'el. 
Leviticus15:4 Apachique c'olbal ri cäk'oyi' wi ri achi ri', ri cäcanaj wi can ri u tz'ilol cäcanaj tz'il. Xukuje' apachique jasach ri cut'uyulej cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus15:5 Apachin ta ne ri cäc'oji' pa ri c'olbal ri xk'oyi' wi ri achi ri', rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak; xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:6 Apachin ta ne ri cät'uyi puwi' ri jasach ri xut'uyulej ri achi ri', rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:7 Apachin ta ne ri canakow ri achi ri c'o we yabil ri' che, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:8 We ri c'o we yabil ri' che cächuban chrij jun winak ri man tz'il taj, we winak ri' rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:9 Apachique quiejebal ri cuquijebej ri achi ri c'o we yabil ri' che, cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus15:10 Apachin ta ne ri cänakow ri xt'uyi wi ri c'o we yabil ri' che, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab; apachin ta ne ri cäc'amow bic, jun chque ri jastak ri', rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:11 Apachin ta ne ri cunak ri c'o we yabil ri' che, rajawaxic utzalaj u ch'ajic ri u k'ab cuban we winak ri' ri xnakic, quebuch'aj na ri ratz'iak xukuje' catin na, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:12 Ri bo'j ri cunak ri c'o we yabil ri' che, rajawaxic cäpaxixic, ri jastak ri e re che', rajawaxic quech'ajic." 
Leviticus15:13 We cäcunataj we achi ri' ri c'o we yabil ri' che, rajawaxic querajilaj wukub k'ij che ri u josk'itajic, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catin chupam jun sakalaj ja', cäcanaj c'u ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus15:14 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij, quebuc'am ulok quieb tucumux o quieb palomax, cäbe chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, quebujach pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel;" 
Leviticus15:15 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j jun chque jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, ri jun chic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic; jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri achi ri c'o we yabil ri' che, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus15:16 Aretak jun achi cabelel ri u pam ri achi wi, rajawaxic catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:17 Apachique atz'iak, o tz'um ri cabelel wi can jubik' ri u pam ri achi wi, rajawaxic cach'ajic cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:18 We jun achi cäwar ruc' jun ixok, e quieb rajawaxic quebatinic, quecanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab.”" 
Leviticus15:19 “Aretak cäyawaj jun ixok chi ic', wukub k'ij cäcanaj tz'il apachin ta ne ri cächapowic, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:20 Apachique jasach ri cuk'oylej aretak cäyawaj chi ic' cäcanaj tz'il, apachique jasach ri cut'uyulej, cäcanaj tz'il." 
Leviticus15:21 Apachin ta ne ri cächapow ri c'olbal ri k'oyolinak wi ri ixok, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:22 Apachin ta ne ri cunak jun chque ri jastak ri t'uyulinak wi ri ixok, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak; xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:23 We cuchap ri c'olbal ri t'uyulinak wi we k'oyolinak wi ri ixok, cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:24 We c'o jun achi cäwar ruc' ri ixok, cuc'am re ri u tz'ilol, cäcanaj tz'il wukub k'ij, xukuje' cäcanaj tz'il ri c'olbal ri cäk'oyi wi ri achi." 
Leviticus15:25 We c'u ne c'o jun ixok ri cätorotaj ri u yab chi ic', ri man je taj jas ri u nak'atisabal, cäbeytaj c'u q'ui k'ij ri u yabilal cäcanaj tz'il joropa' k'ij ri c'o ri u yabilal, je ta ne ri cätajin cäyabin chi ic'." 
Leviticus15:26 Apachique c'olbal ri cäwar wi ri ixok, xukuje' apachique jasach ri cut'uyulej aretak cätajin cäyabinic, cäcanaj tz'il jacha' ri cätajin cäyabin chi ic'." 
Leviticus15:27 Apachin ta ne ri cänakow we jastak ri', cäcanaj tz'il; rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab." 
Leviticus15:28 Aretak cätani' ri u yab, carajilaj na wukub k'ij, c'äte ri cäcanaj ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus15:29 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij, quebuc'am ulok quieb tucumux we ne quieb palomax, quebujach che ri cojol tabal tok'ob, chuchi' ri roquibal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus15:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j jun chque che tabal tok'ob che u mac rech ri macaj, ri jun chic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic; jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri u tz'ilol ri ixok, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus15:31 Jewa' caquiban ri aj israelib che u josk'ixic quib che ri qui tz'ilol, rech man quecäm taj aretak caquitz'iloj ri c'olbal ri in jekel wi chquixo'l rumal ri qui tz'ilol.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Are tak pixab wa' chque ri achijab ri c'o ri yabil chque re ri u belelem ri u pam ri achijab wi, ri xukuje' xa jutak mul cuc'ut rib we yabil ri' chque, quecanaj c'u can tz'il rumal wa';" 
Leviticus15:33 xukuje' chque ri ixokib ri queyabin chi ic', xukuje' chque ri ixokib ri cäjalc'at ri u kajic ri qui yab chi ic'. Conojel we pixab ri' quecoj chque ri achijab, ri ixokib ri c'o we yabil ri chque, xukuje' che ri achi ri cäwar ruc' jun ixok ri cätajin cayabin chi ic'." 
Leviticus16:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises aretak e cäminak chic ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Aaron ri xecämic aretak xekeb chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus16:2 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chabij che ri Aaron ri awachalal chi man xak ta apachique k'ijol coc chupam ri k'ijilabal ri c'o chrij ri ch'ukubal, mawi chuwäch ri tz'apibal ri c'o puwi' ri caxa', rech man cäcäm taj, quinc'ut c'u na wib pa jun sutz' puwi' ri tz'apibal." 
Leviticus16:3 Jewa' rajawaxic cuban ri Aaron aretak coc chupam ri k'ijilabal: cuc'am bic jun alaj ama' wacax jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj xukuje' jun ama' chij che u chi'xic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic. 
Leviticus16:4 Rajawaxic cucoj bic ri u pam ratz'iak re lino ri tastalic, quebuch'uk bic ri u pa tak ra' ruc' säcaw re lino cucoj bic ri pas xe' u pam, xukuje' cucoj bic ri pisbal jolomaj. Atz'iak wa' ri tastalic, catin c'u na c'äte ri' quebucojo." 
Leviticus16:5 Che ri tinimit aj israelib ri Aaron quebuc'am quieb ama'ib tak q'uisic' tabal tok'ob re josk'ibal mac, xukuje' jun ama' chij che u chi'xic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic." 
Leviticus16:6 Cuchi'j c'u na ri alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob rumal ri mac ri u banom, rech quecuyutaj ri u mac, xukuje' ri qui mac ri rachalaxic." 
Leviticus16:7 C'äte ri' quebuc'am ri quieb ama'ib tak q'uisic', quebuchi'j c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib;" 
Leviticus16:8 caq'uikaxtaj c'u na taklebenic paquiwi' ri quieb q'uisic': jun cux na che ri Ajawaxel, ri jun chic che ri Azazel." 
Leviticus16:9 Ri ama' q'uisic' ri cutaklebej ri Ajawaxel, cuchi'j na ri Aaron che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj." 
Leviticus16:10 Are c'u ri q'uisic' ri cäkaj wi ri taklebenic che u c'amic bic ri macaj, c'aslic cuchacaba' na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che qui rikic ri cuyubal tak macaj, cuq'uiak c'u na bic ri q'uisic' ri cäc'amow bic ri macaj chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Leviticus16:11 Ri Aaron cuchi'j na ri c'ojol ama' wacax jacha' che ri u tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, rech quesachtaj ri e u mac xukuje' ri e quech ri rachalal." 
Leviticus16:12 Cuc'am c'u jun bukibal nojinak che rachak k'ak' ri e c'amom puwi' ri porobal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' camuk' coc'alaj k'ol joc'om, cuc'am bic chrij ri ch'ukubal." 
Leviticus16:13 Cujopij ri k'ol puwi' ri k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, are c'u ri u sibal ri c'oc'alaj k'ol cuch'uk ri u wi' ri tz'apibal ri c'o puwi' ri caxa' ri c'olotal wi ri pixab, we jewa' cuban ri Aaron man cäcäm taj." 
Leviticus16:14 Cuc'am jubik' che ri u quiq'uel ri c'ojol ama' wacax, cuchicoj ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab pa ri u xcut ri tz'apibal ri cäca'y pa elebal k'ij Wukub mul cuchicoj ri quic' ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab chuwäch ri tz'apibal." 
Leviticus16:15 C'äte ri' cutok' u kul ri ama' q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che ri josk'ibal u mac ri tinimit, cuc'am bic ri quic' chupam ri c'olbal ri c'o chrij ri ch'ukubal, chila' cuchicoj wi ri quic' puwi' xukuje' chuwäch ri tz'apibal, jacha' ri xuban che ri u quiq'uel ri c'ojol ama' wacax." 
Leviticus16:16 Je u josk'ixic wa' ri k'ijilabal chque conojel ri tz'ilol ri walijisam tak ib xukuje' macaj ri xequiban ri aj israelib, junam rajawaxic u banic che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ri jekel chquixo'l xukuje' chquixo'l ri e qui tz'ilol." 
Leviticus16:17 Man c'o ta jun winak cäc'oji' ta pa ri k'ijilabal, aretak ri Aaron cätajin cuya' ri tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal mac, c'ä cäbantaj na ri cuyubal mac, xukuje' ri e quech ri e c'o pa rachoch, xukuje' ri quech conojel ri aj israelib," 
Leviticus16:18 quel c'u ulok, cäbe che u josk'ixic ri porobal ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Cuc'am jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri c'ojol ama' wacax, xukuje' ri u quiq'uel ri ama' q'uisic', cubil chquij ri ruc'a' ri porobal, xukuje' chrij ri porobal." 
Leviticus16:19 Wukub mul cuchicoj ri quic' puwi' ri porobal ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab, je u josk'ixic wa' cubano che quesaxic ri qui tz'ilol ri aj israelib, cutas c'ut." 
Leviticus16:20 Aretak ri Aaron u q'uisom chic u josk'ixic ri k'ijilabal, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib xukuje' ri porobal, cutak u c'amic ri ama' q'uisic' ri c'ä c'aslic." 
Leviticus16:21 Quebuya' ri u k'ab pa u jolom ri awaj, cuk'alajisaj ronojel ri etzelal, ri man e nimanic taj, xukuje' ronojel ri qui mac ri aj israelib. Je cuban wa' che qui ya'ic bic ri qui mac ri aj israelib pa u jolom ri ama' q'uisic', c'o c'u jun achi ri cac'amow bic, cutzokopij c'u can pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Leviticus16:22 Aretak ri ama' q'uisic' cäq'uis u sachic bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, quebuc'am na bic ronojel ri quetzelal ri aj israelib pa tak ri ulew ri man e c'o ta wi winak." 
Leviticus16:23 Coc c'ut ri Aaron chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, cäresaj c'ut ri ratz'iak re lino ri xucoj che ri oquem chupam ri k'ijilabal, cuya' c'u can chila'." 
Leviticus16:24 Cuch'aj c'u na ri u cuerp ruc' ja' pa tastalic c'olbal aretak c'u u cojom chic ri ratz'iak, quel ulok, che u cojic ri kas u tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic xukuje' ri rajawaxic u chi'xic rumal ri tinimit." 
Leviticus16:25 Ri u xepoyil ri tabal tok'ob re josk'ibal macaj, cuporoj puwi' ri porobal;" 
Leviticus16:26 are c'u ri xc'amow u bic ri q'uisic' ri c'amowinak bic ri macaj, quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic c'äte ri' cuya' coc pa ri kajebal." 
Leviticus16:27 Ri ama' wacax xukuje' ri ama' q'uisic' ri xepil che qui josk'ixic ri mac, ri xec'am bic ri qui quiq'uel pa ri k'ijilabal che u rikic ri cuyubal quech ri macaj, quebesax na bic chrij ri tinimit, queporox c'u ri qui tz'umal, ri qui ti'jal, xukuje' ri qui mes." 
Leviticus16:28 Ri winak ri queporon ri awaj, rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak, xukuje' catinic, c'äte ri' cuya' coc pa ri kajebal." 
Leviticus16:29 Jun pixab wa' chiwe ri quitakej u banic: pa ri lajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic', rajawaxic man quixwa' taj, xukuje' man c'o ta jun chac quibano, mawi ri man e i winakil taj ri e jekel chixo'l." 
Leviticus16:30 Are c'u k'ij wa' ri quirik ri cuyubal i mac, quixcanaj c'u ch'ajch'oj che ronojel ri i mac chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus16:31 K'ij wa' re uxlanem chiwe, rajawaxic man quixwa' taj, pixab wa' ri quitakej u banic." 
Leviticus16:32 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri chätajinak, yo'm takanic pa u k'ab chi cacanaj che u q'uexwäch ri u tat are' cäbanow ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri sachbal mac; quebucoj ri atz'iak re lino, ri e tastalic." 
Leviticus16:33 Cuban c'u na ri josk'inic re ri sibalaj tastalicalaj c'olbal, xukuje' ri rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, xukuje' ri rech ri porobal curik c'u na ri cuyubal tak macaj ri quech ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri rech ronojel ri tinimit." 
Leviticus16:34 Jun pixab wa' ri cäcanaj chiwe jumul pa ri jun junab quiban we nak'atisabal ri' che u rikic ri cuyubal quech ri mac ri qui banom ri aj israelib.” Je c'u xuban ri Moises jacha' ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus17:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus17:2 “Chabij che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' chque conojel ri aj israelib, chi ri Ajawaxel e u yo'm tak we takanic ri':" 
Leviticus17:3 Apachique aj israel ri cupil jun ama' wacax, o jun alaj ama' chij, o jun ati't q'uisic' chupam o chrij ri kajebal," 
Leviticus17:4 we man cuc'am ta c'u ulok chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u chi'xic jacha' che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri cäk'ijilax wi, cux na ajchak'mac che u jamixic ri quic', rumal ri' quesax na ri u bi' chquixo'l ri e u winakil." 
Leviticus17:5 Xya' we takanic ri' rech ri aj israelib quequichi'j na che ri Ajawaxel ri awaj ri quequipil pa apachique c'olbal, quequic'ama' ulok che ri cojol tabal tok'ob chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, rech quebuchi'j che qui q'uexwäch jacha' che tabal tok'ob che utzirisan ib." 
Leviticus17:6 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchicoj ri quic' puwi' ri porobal re ri Ajawaxel ri c'o chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, cuporoj c'u ri xepo che sipanic ri cäc'oc'atic ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus17:7 Mawi c'u jumul chquiya' ta chic tabal tak tok'ob chquiwäch tak ri itzelab, ri e qui k'ijila'm, ri qui mac quech e etzelatajinak. Jun pixab wa' ri cacanaj can chiwe, ri coc'ow cuc' ri tataxelab cak'ax c'u cuc' ri alc'ualaxelab." 
Leviticus17:8 Xukuje' chabij chque: apachique ta ne aj israel o jun ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l, ri cuya' ta jun tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic o apachique chi jun tabal tok'ob," 
Leviticus17:9 we man cuc'am ta ulok chuchi' ri oquibal re ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, che u chi'xic che ri Ajawaxel, quesax na ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil.”" 
Leviticus17:10 “In quinc'ulelaj na ronojel aj israel o ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l ri cutij, apachique ta ne quic'. In quinwesaj na chquixo'l ri e u tinimit." 
Leviticus17:11 Rumal rech chi ronojel c'aslic, c'asal rumal ri u quiq'uel, nu yo'm c'u in chiwe puwi' ri porobal rech rumal ri quic' quixcuinic quitoj ri u to'tajisaxic ri i c'aslemal, are' c'ut ri quic' cätojow ri u to'tajisaxic ri c'aslemal." 
Leviticus17:12 Rumal ri' nu yo'm u bixic chque ri aj israelib: Mawi jun chiwe, mawi jun ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l ri chutij ta quic'." 
Leviticus17:13 Apachique ta ne aj israel o apawije' ta ne cäpe wi, ri jekel chixo'l, ri cuchap jun awaj pa juyub o jun chicop ri c'o u xic' ri ya'tal u tijic, rajawaxic xa cumuk ri u quiq'uel ri awaj ri xuchapo." 
Leviticus17:14 Rumal rech chi ri quic' are' cayo'w c'aslemal che ronojel c'aslic. Rumal ri' nu bim chiwe chi man qui tij ta quic', are' c'ut cäyo'w c'aslemal che ronojel c'aslic." 
Leviticus17:15 Apachique ta ne aj israel o apawije' ta ne cäpe wi, ri cutij ri u ti'jal jun awaj ri xak c'ätetal xcämic, o ri xch'akatix rumal jun juyubal awaj, quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak xukuje' catinic, cäcanaj c'u can tz'il, c'ä coc na ri ak'ab, c'äte ri' cäcanaj ch'ajch'oj." 
Leviticus17:16 We c'u man quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak mawi catinic, cäkajbex rumal ri u mac.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus18:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios. 
Leviticus18:3 Miban iwe jacha' ri qui nak'atisabal ri aj ejiptib, ri xixc'oji' wi na; mawi mebitakej ri nak'atisabal aj Canaan, ulew ri quixinc'am wi bic, mawi mebitakej, ri qui pixab." 
Leviticus18:4 Chinimaj qui banic ri nu takomal, chixoc il che qui banic ri nu pixab, chitakej qui banic. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus18:5 Rumal ri' chi nimaj ri caquibij tak ri e nu takomal, xukuje' ri e nu pixab ri e tz'ibatalic. Ri winak ri quebutz'akatisaj, cäc'asi na. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus18:6 C'o jun achi makeb ruc' jun ixok ri kas rachalaxic che ruc'axic rib ruc'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus18:7 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri a tat, mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri a nan, are' c'u ne a nan, man caban taj." 
Leviticus18:8 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri a tat, mawuc'aj ri rixokil." 
Leviticus18:9 Mawuc'aj ri awana'b. We re a tat o re a nan; we alam cho ja o naj alam wi, mawuc'aj awib ruc'." 
Leviticus18:10 Mawesaj a q'uixbal chbil awib mawuc'aj ri u wi' a mam, we u mia'l ri a c'ojol, ral ri a mia'l. Mawuc'aj awib ruc'." 
Leviticus18:11 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri ali ri ral ri rixokil ri a tat. Alc'ualam c'u rumal ri a tat, awana'b c'ut. Mawuc'aj awib ruc'." 
Leviticus18:12 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rana'b ri a tat; xak c'u junam u quiq'uel ruc' ri a tat. 
Leviticus18:13 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rachalal ri a nan; xak c'u junam u quiq'uel ruc' ri a nan. 
Leviticus18:14 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri rachalal ri a tat; mawuc'aj ri rixokil; rixokil c'ut ri rachalal ri a tat. 
Leviticus18:15 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri awalib; rixokil c'ut ri a c'ojol; mawuc'aj awib ruc'. 
Leviticus18:16 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri awachalal; mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rixokil. 
Leviticus18:17 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' jun ixok xukuje' ri ral ali, mawi mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri u wi' a mam, we u mia'l ri a c'ojol o ral ri a mia'l. Jun c'aslemal wa' ri man utz taj, xak c'u junam qui quiq'uel." 
Leviticus18:18 Matc'uli' cuc' quieb ixokib ri cachalal quib, mawuc'aj aretak c'ä c'asal ri awixokil, rech man cäwinikar ta ch'o'j chquixo'l." 
Leviticus18:19 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' jun ixok aretak cätajin cäyabin chi ic'. 
Leviticus18:20 Matk'oyi ruc' ri rixokil ri awajil a tz'akat, mawuc'aj awib ruc' rech matz'iloj c'u awib rumal." 
Leviticus18:21 Majach jun chque ri a c'ojol che sipanic che ri dios Moloc; matz'iloj ri u bi' ri a Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus18:22 Matk'oyi ruc' jun a wäch achi, jacha' ta ne chi catk'oyi ruc' jun ixok. Jun tzijol wa' ri sibalaj itzel." 
Leviticus18:23 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' apachique awaj, rech matux tz'il rumal wa'. Mawi ri ixok maruc'aj rib ruc' jun awaj, jun itzel yok'bal wa'." 
Leviticus18:24 Mitz'iloj ba iwib cuc' jun chque we jastak ri'. Cuc' c'u we jastak ri' quitz'ilom wi quib ri tinimit ri quebenwesaj bic chiwäch ix. 
Leviticus18:25 Ri winak xquitz'iloj c'u ri culew; xinc'am c'u ulok ri c'äjisabal wächaj paquiwi'; u mac ri quetzelal, ri ulew xebuq'uiak bic ri e u winak tak pa re wi." 
Leviticus18:26 Are c'u ri ix ri ix aj israelib, xukuje' ri man e i winakil taj ri e c'o chixo'l, chebinimaj ri nu pixab xukuje' ri nu takomal, miban jun chque we jastak ri' ri quequic'am ulok yok'obal." 
Leviticus18:27 Conojel c'ut we etzelal ri' xequiban ri xec'oji' can chupam we ulew ri' c'ä majok chixopanok ix, rumal ri' ri ulew nojinak che tz'ilol." 
Leviticus18:28 ¡Mixuq'uiak c'u bic ri ulew pa re wi, u mac rech chi qui tz'iloj, jacha' xebuq'uiak c'u bic ri winak ri xejeki' can nabe chupam chiwäch ix!" 
Leviticus18:29 Apachin ta c'u ne ri cuban jun chque we jastak ri' ri e ya'l yok'obal, quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Leviticus18:30 Chebinimaj ba' tak ri nu takanic, mixkaj chupam ri qui banic tak ri jastak ri e ya'l tak yok'obal ri xeban nabe chiwäch ix, mawi mebitz'iloj tak iwib ix cuc'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus19:2 “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Chixux tastalic, ri in c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, in tastalic, man quinban ta etzelal." 
Leviticus19:3 Chijujunal nim chebiwila' wi ri i tat xukuje' ri i nan. Nim chebiwila' wi tak ri e nu k'ij re uxlanem. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios. 
Leviticus19:4 Mat cojon chque tak ri diosib, xukuje' mebiban i diosib re ch'ich' ri e suc'umam pa k'ak'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus19:5 Aretak quebiya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, je u banic wa' chibana' rech cuc'am ri Dios chiwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Ri awaj ri qui c'am ulok che tabal tok'ob rajawaxic chi kas pa ri k'ij catijic, xukuje' cuya' cätij chucab k'ij, are c'u ri cäto'taj can che ri urox k'ij rajawaxic caporoxic." 
Leviticus19:7 We cätij ri sipanic churox k'ij, cux na muluwibal c'uxaj, ri Dios man cuc'amowaj ta na;" 
Leviticus19:8 ri cätijowic cäkaj ri etzelal puwi' quesax c'u na pa ri u tinimit u mac rech chi xrawasij ri tastal che ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus19:9 Aretak cayac u wäch ri awulew, mamol ri cätzak canok, mawi mebamol ri e u jolom tak trico ri e canajinak canok." 
Leviticus19:10 Mamololej qui wäch ri juwi' tak uva, mawi mebasic' ri tzaknak chuxe'; chebaya' can chque ri mebayib, xukuje' chque ri man awinakil taj. In ri' ri Ajawaxel, ri i Dios." 
Leviticus19:11 Mixeläk'ic, miban banoj tak tzij, c'o jun musub ri rajil u tz'akat." 
Leviticus19:12 Mebaban tak chi'nic ri xak e cawäch pa ri nu bi', cawawasij c'u ri u bi' ri a Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:13 Macoj ri tokinic che ri awajil a tz'akat, mawi c'o mawelk'aj che. Mäcanaj na jun ak'ab awuc' ri tojbal re ri awajchac." 
Leviticus19:14 Mac'okoj ri man catantaj. Maya' jun tzakibal pa u be ri moy, chac'utu' chi nim cawil wi ri Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:15 Maban ri man suq'uilal taj aretak caban ri a k'atan tzij: mawi mato' u wi' ri tukar, mac'ayij a wib pa u k'ab ri c'o u cuinem. Are kas chabana' ri suq'uilal aretak caban ri k'atan tzij." 
Leviticus19:16 Mawalijisaj tzijtal chquixo'l ri awinakil. Matuxic jun che u cämisaxic ri awajil a tz'akat. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus19:17 Mac'u ri retzelaxic u wäch ri awachalal chupam ri awanima'. Chak'ila' ri awajil a tz'akat aretak rajawaxic u k'ilic. Mach'uk u wi' ri mac ri cubano. 
Leviticus19:18 Maya' rajil u q'uexel ri c'ax ri cuban ri awajil a tz'akat chawe, mawi c'ax mana' che. Lok' chawila' ri awajil a tz'akat jacha' ri at chbil awib. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:19 Chatoc il che qui banic ri cubij ri nu pixab. Mabano chi quebetz'en ri awawaj cuc' tak awaj ri e jule' chic quija'lil. Matic jalan tak ija' chupam ri awulew ri cuyuj ta rib. Macoj jun awatz'iak ri jalan tak bätz' e cojom che u quemic. 
Leviticus19:20 We c'o jun achi cäwar ruc' jun pataninel ali ri c'o chi jun achi ajchak'e ri maja' cälok'ic, mawi tzokopim cutoj na ri rajil, man c'u quecämisax taj rumal rech chi man tzokopim taj." 
Leviticus19:21 Ri achi cuchacaba' na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jun ama' chij jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil, ri rajawaxic cuc'am na bic c'ä chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Leviticus19:22 Ruc' we ama' chij ri' ri jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cutz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel chi cusach u mac we achi ri', casachtaj c'u na ri u mac," 
Leviticus19:23 aretak quixoc pa ri ulew, quebitic c'u ronojel qui wäch che' ri quewächinic; oxib junab man quebich'up ta na ri qui wäch mawi quebitij ri qui wäch." 
Leviticus19:24 Chucaj junab conojel ri e qui wächinic tak ri e i tico'n quetas che ri Ajawaxel pa jun nimak'ijanic. 
Leviticus19:25 Aretak cätz'akat job junab cuya' chic quitij ri qui wäch. Xa jeri' ri che' sibalaj quewächin na. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus19:26 Mitij jun ti'j ri c'o quic' che. Mitijoj iwib che ch'obonic. Miban subunic che u k'alajisaxic ri c'ä maja' cäc'ulmatajic. 
Leviticus19:27 Michetij ri i wi', mawi michetij ri u tza'm ri iwismachi'." 
Leviticus19:28 Misoc ri i cuerp rumal u bisoxic jun cäminak, mawi mebit'ik etal che ri i cuerp. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:29 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri a mia'l rumal c'u awech cutakej ri u chac jun nim ch'utin, mawetzelaj ri tinimit canojisaj c'u che etzelal." 
Leviticus19:30 Nim chebiwila' wi tak ri nu k'ij re uxlanem xukuje' nim chiwila' wi ri quink'ijilax wi. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. 
Leviticus19:31 Mixbe cuc' ri ajk'ijab, mawi cuc' ri ch'obonelab mitz'onoj i no'j chque, quitz'iloj c'u iwib ri' cuc'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:32 Chatwalij che u to'ic ri sak u jolom, nim chebawila' wi ri nimak tak winak, amak'el chana' awib chuwäch ri a Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus19:33 Maban c'ax che ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l pa ri iwulew. 
Leviticus19:34 Je chibana' che ri man i winakil taj jacha' ri quiban che ri i winakil; chilok'ok'ej, xäk c'u junam iwuc', je c'u ne xiban ix xa xiwokxanij na iwib pa Ejipt. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus19:35 Miban ri man suc' taj aretak quik'at tzij, xukuje' aretak quijach ri ulew, aretak quipaj ri i c'ay, o aretak quicoj apachique etabal." 
Leviticus19:36 Tz'akat tak pajbal, tz'akat tak pajanic, xukuje' tz'akat tak etabal quicojo. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt." 
Leviticus19:37 Chebinimaj ba' conojel tak ri nu pixab xukuje' conojel tak ri nu takanic, chibana' jas ri cäquibij. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus20:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Apachin ta ne ri aj israel, we ne jun chque ri man i winakil taj ri e jekel pa Israel, ri cujach jun chque ri u c'ojol che ri Moloc, rajawaxic cäcämisax na, ri aj tinimit e are' quecämisan na, ruc' abaj." 
Leviticus20:3 Quinkasaj ri woyowal puwi' ri achi ri', quinwesaj ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil u tz'ilom ri quink'ijilax wi rawasim ri tastalicalaj nu bi'. Rumal ri u ya'ic ri u c'ojol che ri Moloc." 
Leviticus20:4 We ri winak re ri ulew man caquik'at ta tzij puwi' we achi ri' ri xuya' jun chque ri u c'ojol che ri Moloc, man c'u cuc'okoj taj che cämical," 
Leviticus20:5 quinkasaj ri woyowal puwi' ri achi ri', xukuje' paquiwi' ri e c'o pa ri rachoch, quinwesaj c'u ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil, xukuje' je quinban chque ri xemacun junam ruc', xquik'ijilaj c'u ri Moloc." 
Leviticus20:6 We c'o c'u jachin jun que cuc' cacojon chque ri uxlabalib xukuje' tak ri ch'obonelab, cutz'iloj c'u rib rumal qui ternexic, quinkasaj na ri woyowal puwi' ri winak ri', xukuje' quinwesaj na ri u bi' chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Leviticus20:7 Kas ba' chitasa' iwib chwe, chixux ba tastalic, rumal rech chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus20:8 Chebinimaj tak ri nu pixab, chibana' jas ri cäquibij. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri quixintas chwe." 
Leviticus20:9 Apachin ta ne ri cuc'okoj ri u nan o ri u tat, kastzij cäcämisax na; u nan o u tat c'u ri' ri xuc'okoj, are ajchak'mac che ri u cämical." 
Leviticus20:10 We c'o jachin jun achi cäkaj pa mac ruc' ri rixokil ri rajil u tz'akat, ri achi xukuje' ri ixok qui cabichal quec'okox na che cämical." 
Leviticus20:11 We c'o jachin cäwar ruc' ri rixokil ri u tat, xresaj u q'uixbal ri u tat. Rumal ri' cäcämisax na ri achi xukuje' ri ixok, e are ajchak'mac che ri qui cämical." 
Leviticus20:12 We c'o jachin cäk'oyi ruc' ri rixokil ri u c'ojol, e quieb quecämisax na, nimalaj etzelal c'u ri' ri qui banom, e are ajchak'mac che ri qui cämical." 
Leviticus20:13 We c'o jun achi cäk'oyi ruc' jun achi jacha' ri cäk'oyi ruc' jun ixok, e quieb quecämisax na; q'uixbal c'u ri' ri qui banom e are ajchak'maquib che ri qui cämical." 
Leviticus20:14 We c'o jachin jun cuc'am jun ixok che rixokil xukuje' ri u nan we ixok ri', u banom jun il mac. Ri are' xukuje' ri ixokib e c'asc'oj queporox pa k'ak'. Jeri' ma ta cheban tak we il mac ri' chixo'l." 
Leviticus20:15 We c'o jun achi cäruc'aj rib ruc' jun awaj, cac'okox na che cämical. Xukuje' chcämisax ri awaj." 
Leviticus20:16 We c'o jun ixok cäruc'aj rib ruc' jun awaj, cäcämisax ri ixok xukuje' ri awaj; man c'o ta qui to'tajic, ya'talic chi quecämisaxic." 
Leviticus20:17 We c'o jachin jun cuc'am ri rana'b che rixokil, u mia'l ri u tat o ral ri u nan, cacuc'aj c'u quib, e quieb quecämisax na chquiwäch ri qui winakil; ri caruc'aj rib ruc' ri kas rana'b are jun banoj wa' ri sibalaj q'uixbal, ri cäbanowic cakaj ri u mac puwi'." 
Leviticus20:18 We c'o jun cak'oyi' ruc' jun ixok ri cätajin cäyabinic chi ic', caresaj c'u u q'uixbal, ri ixok xukuje' ri achi quesax ri qui bi' chquixo'l ri qui winakil." 
Leviticus20:19 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rachalal ri a nan, mawi ri rana'b ri a tat; uc'anic wa' ruc' jun achalaxic re nakaj, e quieb cäbe ri qui mac paquiwi'." 
Leviticus20:20 We c'o jun cak'oyi' ruc' ri rixokil ri rican cäresaj u q'uixbal ri rican; e quieb quekajebex na rumal ri qui mac, quicabichal quecäm na, man c'o ta calc'ual quequiya' canok." 
Leviticus20:21 We c'o jun ruc' chuk'ab cak'oyi' ruc' ri rixokil ri rachalal, caresaj u q'uixbal ri rachalal, nimalaj mac wa' ri qui banom, man cäch'ijtaj taj, quicabichal quecäm na, man c'o ta calc'ual quequiya' canok." 
Leviticus20:22 Chebibana' ri cäquibij ri nu pixab xukuje' tak ri nu takanic, chebitz'akatisaj conojel. We je quiban wa' man quixuq'uiak ta na ulok ri ulew ri quixinc'am wi na bic rech quixejekel chupam." 
Leviticus20:23 Miban iwe ri cäquiban tak ri winak ri quebenwesaj na bic chiwäch; ri e are xequiban conojel we itzel tak jastak ri', rumal ri' man xinch'ij ta qui coch'ic." 
Leviticus20:24 Quinchi'j chiwe: Chi ix quixechben na ri culew we winak ri'; quinjach na pa i k'ab rech cäcanaj che iwechbal, ulew wa' ri cabelel wi leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri in banowinak chiwe chi man ix junam ta cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic tinimit." 
Leviticus20:25 Rumal ri' xukuje' ri ix, rajawaxic quiwetamaj qui wäch ri awaj ri ya'tal quitijic xukuje' ri man ya'tal ta qui tijic, xukuje' ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri ya'tal qui tijic, xukuje' ri man ya'tal ta qui tijic; mitz'iloj ba' iwib cumal tak ri awaj, chicop ri e c'o qui xic' xukuje' tak ri caquijuruj quib ri e nu c'utum chi e awaj ri e tz'il." 
Leviticus20:26 Ri ix rajawaxic quixux tastalic chwe, in c'ut ri Ajawaxel, in tastalic, man quinban ta etzelal, in c'ut nu banom chiwe chi man ix ta junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic tinimit rech quixux wech." 
Leviticus20:27 Ri achi ri ixok ri c'o jun uxlabal ruc' ri cuban ch'obonic, cäcämisax na; abaj cacämisabex rech, are' ajchak'mac che ri u cämical.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chattzijon cuc' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, chabij chque: chi mäquitz'iloj quib rumal jun cächalaxic ri cäcämic." 
Leviticus21:2 Xuwi we are' jun achalaxic re nakaj, jacha' ri u nan, ri u tat, ri u c'ojol o ri u mia'l, ri rachalal" 
Leviticus21:3 o rana'b ri c'o pa rachoch ri man c'ulan taj, cumal wa' cuya' cutz'iloj rib." 
Leviticus21:4 Man cuya' ta c'ut cutz'iloj rib mawi cutz'aj rib rumal jun rachalaxic ri c'ulanic. 
Leviticus21:5 Mäquiban tol che ri qui jolom, mawi cäquijos ri quismachi', mawi cäquisoc ri qui cuerp," 
Leviticus21:6 xane' kas chi quitasa' quib che u patanixic ri qui Dios, maquiban c'u che ri u bi' chi man nim ta cäquil wi, rumal rech chi e are' quejachow ri sipanic ri cäporox che ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' e are' quejachow ri wa chuwäch ri Dios, amak'el c'ut checanaj tastalic che patanijic." 
Leviticus21:7 Mec'uli' ruc' jun ixok ri nim ch'utin, mawi ruc' jun ixok ri c'olinak chi achi ruc' o jachom can rumal ri rachajil; rumal rech chi ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e tastal che u k'ijilaxic ri qui Dios." 
Leviticus21:8 Chebatasa' che ronojel wa', rumal rech chi e are' ri quechi'n ri wa che ri a Dios. E tastal c'u chawe, rumal rech chi ri in, ri Ajawaxel, in tastalic, man quinban ta etzelal, in c'ut ri quinbanowic chi quetastaj chwe." 
Leviticus21:9 We ri u mia'l jun cojol tabal tok'ob caretzelaj rib cux c'u re nim ch'utin, caresaj u q'uixbal ri u tat, rajawaxic c'aslic cäporox pa k'ak'." 
Leviticus21:10 Ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob yo'm takanic che chi cucoj ri tastalicalaj atz'iak ri xtastaj rumal ri aseit ri catasanic xcoj puwi' ri u jolom. Rumal c'u ri' muquiyiba' ri u wi' mawi mujis ri ratz'iak che u c'utic bis. 
Leviticus21:11 Man ya'tal ta che coc pa jun ja ri lia'n wi jun cäminak; mawi rumal rech chi are' ta u tat, mawi rumal rech chi are ta u nan, cutz'iloj ta rib." 
Leviticus21:12 Mel chupam ri cak'ijilax wi ri u Dios, mawi marawasij ri k'ijilabal, rumal rech chi puwi' cojom wi ri aseit re ri u tastajic rumal ri u Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus21:13 Che rixokil cuc'am na jun k'apoj ali. 
Leviticus21:14 Mawi jubik' mac'uli' ruc' jun ixok malca'n, o jachom, nakom o jun nim ch'utin, rajawaxic k'apoj ri rixokil cuc'amo xukuje' u k'ab rächalaxic," 
Leviticus21:15 rech muyuj ri u quiq'uel cuc' apachique winak pa ri u tinimit; in c'ut ri Ajawaxel nu tasom che nu patanixic.” 
Leviticus21:16 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus21:17 “Chabij che ri Aaron chi kas camic cächaptaj bic, man c'o ta jun chque ri e rija'lil ri c'o jas jun yabil che ri u cuerp cäya' ta che chi cuchi'j ri wa chuwäch ri a Dios." 
Leviticus21:18 Kastzij ri quinbij, man c'o ta jun achi ri c'o ta jun u yab ri ya'tal ta che cakeb ta che u banic: we moy, we ch'oco'j, o jech' u tza'm o u xiquin," 
Leviticus21:19 cäkeb ta chuwäch ri Dios, o k'ajinak u ch'ec o u k'ab," 
Leviticus21:20 o wuk'uwic rij, o benebic, o c'o sak pa u bak'wäch, o c'o ta joxoc' chrij, o e c'o ta pok' chrij, o u rikom ta c'ax ri u cowil." 
Leviticus21:21 Man c'o ta jun rija'lil ri cojol tabal tok'ob Aaron ri c'o ta jun u yab ri chebucoj ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri sipanic tak ri queporoxic; c'o ta jun u yab, rumal ri' man cuya' taj cucoj ta ri sipanic re wa re ri u Dios." 
Leviticus21:22 Cuya' cutij rech we wa ri' xukuje' ri jastak ri e tastalic xukuje' ri sibalaj e tastalic. 
Leviticus21:23 Man cuya' ta c'ut cäk'ax ta chrij ri ch'ukubal, mawi cakeb ta ruc' ri porobal, rech man cärawasij ta ri k'ijilabal rumal ri u yab. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri ix nu tasom che nu patanixic.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Ri Moises xubij wa' che ri Aaron, xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' chque conojel ri aj israelib." 
Leviticus22:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus22:2 “Chabij che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil chi nim chequila' wi ri jastak ri e tastalic ri quequitas ri aj israelib chwe, rech man cäcawasij ta ri tastalicalaj nu bi'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:3 Chabij chque chi, camic xukuje' ri k'ij ri quepe na, apachin ta ne chque ri quija'lil we tz'il chuban ta ri quicojic ri tastalicalaj tak jastak ri quequitas ri aj israelib che ri Ajawaxel, quesax na bic chnuwäch. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:4 Man c'o ta jun chque ri e rija'lil ri Aaron ri c'o ta ch'a'c che o puj ri cabelelic, cutij ta rech chque ri jastak ri e tastalic c'ä cäjosk'itaj na. Ri cuchap jun jasach tz'il u mac rech jun cäminak, o cuchap jun ri cabelel ri u pam ri achi wi," 
Leviticus22:5 o ri cutz'iloj rib rumal ri u nakic jun chicop ri cujururej rib, o jun achi ri tz'ilotajinak cuban c'u tz'il che ri canakowic," 
Leviticus22:6 we winak ri' cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab, man cuya' taj cutij re chque ri jastak ri e tastalic we man nabe cuch'aj rib ruc' ja'." 
Leviticus22:7 Cäjosk'itaj c'ut aretak cäkaj ri k'ij; cuya' chic cutij rech chque ri jastak ri tastalic, are c'u tzukbal re wa'." 
Leviticus22:8 Mutij u ti'jal jun cäminak awaj mawi ri ch'akatim rumal jun juyubal awaj, rech man cutz'iloj ta rib rumal, In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:9 Chabij chque chi chquitz'akatisaj ri nu pixab ri tz'ibatalic rech man quekaj ta pa jun mac, rumal rech chi man queniman ta che, we je caquiban wa' man quecäm ta na. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri e nu tasom che nu patanixic." 
Leviticus22:10 Man c'o ta jun ri ma ta rachalaxic ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuya' cutij ta re ri tastalic. Mawi ri xa rokxanim rib pa rachoch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, mawi ri rajchac cuya' cutij ta re chque ri jastak ri e tasom." 
Leviticus22:11 We ri cojol tabal tok'ob culok' jun pataninel ruc' ri u rajil, ri u pataninel cuya' cutij re ri tastalic, xukuje' ri e alam pa rachoch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cuya' cäquitij quech ri cutijo." 
Leviticus22:12 We ri u mia'l ri cojol tabal tok'ob c'ulan ruc' jun apachique ala, man cuya' taj cutij re chque ri jastak ri e tastalic ri yo'm che sipanic chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus22:13 We c'u cämalcanir can ri u mia'l ri cojol tabal tok'ob o cäjach canok, man c'o ta c'u ral cätzelej c'u cho rachoch ri u tat jacha' aretak ri man c'ulan taj, cuya' cutij re ri cutij ri u tat; man c'o ta c'u jun ri man rachalaxic taj ri cojol tabal tok'ob cutij ta rech che." 
Leviticus22:14 We c'o jun winak man xuch'ob taj xutij re chque ri jastak ri e tastajinak, cutzelej na u q'uexel che ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri xutijo, cuya' chi c'u na jun u ro'il;" 
Leviticus22:15 ri e cojol tabal tok'ob mäquiya' be chque ri aj israelib chi cäcawasij ri jastak ri e tastajinak ri quechi'x che ri Ajawaxel; 
Leviticus22:16 maquikajbej c'ut ri etzelal re ri qui mac u mac rech ri qui tijic ri jastak ri e tastajinak. In ri' ri Ajawaxel, ri e nu tasom.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus22:18 “Chattzijon ruc' ri Aaron xukuje' cuc' ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' cuc' conojel ri aj israelib, chabij chque: We c'o jun aj israel, o jun ri man aj israel taj ri jekel chquixo'l, ri cuya' jun awaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, we che u tojic jun chi'nic o jacha' sipanic ri xak pa ech wi." 
Leviticus22:19 Rech cäc'amar ri u sipanic, rajawaxic cuya' jun ama' awaj ri man c'o ta u yab, cuya' jun ama' wacax, jun ama' chij, o jun q'uisic'." 
Leviticus22:20 Muchi'j jun awaj ri c'o u yab, man cäc'am ta c'u na." 
Leviticus22:21 Apachin ta ne ri cuya' jun tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, o che u tojic jun chi'nic o jacha' che jun sipanic ri xak pa ech wi, rajawaxic cuya' jun ama' wacax o ama' chij ri man c'o ta u yab rech cac'amar che." 
Leviticus22:22 Mebuya', awaj che tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri e moyab, o e socotajinak, o e k'ajinak, o e pixnac' quij, o e joxoc' quij, o e ch'a'c quij, mawi mebuya' rech caporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:23 Jacha' che sipanic ri xak pa ech wi cuya' cächi'j jun ama' wacax o jun ama' chij pune' cutucak cakan, we c'u che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic man cäc'amar ta na." 
Leviticus22:24 Mawi meya' awaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri socotajinak ri qui cowil, ri quirikom c'ax, o e t'okopitajinak o e k'atk'obinak. Mebinak'atisaj qui banic we jastak ri' pa ri i tinimit." 
Leviticus22:25 Mawi mebic'am we awaj tak ri' pa qui k'ab ri man e i winakil taj, che u chi'xic jacha' ta ne che k'obibal che ri i Dios, e awaj wa' ri c'o qui yab, man quec'amar ta wa' chque.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus22:27 “Aretak calax jun ama' wacax, o jun ama' chij, o jun ama' q'uisic' rajawaxic cäcanaj wukub k'ij ruc' ri u nan; aretak cuchap ri uwajxak k'ij cuya' chic cäya' che sipanic re tabal tok'ob ri cäporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:28 Xa pa jun k'ij mapil ri ati't chij o ati't wacax ruc' ri ral. 
Leviticus22:29 Aretak caya' tabal tok'ob re maltioxinic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, utz u ya'ic cabano rech cäc'amaric." 
Leviticus22:30 Xukuje' chatija' kas pa ri k'ij ri caya' ri sipanic, man c'o ta cätas can che re ri ucab k'ij. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:31 Chebinimaj ri e nu takomal, chibana' jas ri cäquibij. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus22:32 Miwawasij ri tastalicalaj nu bi', rech cäya' nu k'ij chquixo'l ri aj israelib. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri ix tasowinak che nu patanixic." 
Leviticus22:33 E wesam c'u ulok pa Ejipt, rech quinux qui Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij che:" 
Leviticus23:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib, ri quinbij chawe: E are tak k'ijol wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri quebiya' che ri Ajawaxel, ri quebicoj na tastalicalaj tak mulin ib che qui bi'." 
Leviticus23:3 Wakib k'ij catchacun, are c'u ri uwuk k'ij; man ya'tal taj jun chac, are jun k'ij ri nim u banic re uxlanem c'o c'u na jun mulin ib. We k'ij ri cux na k'ij re uxlanem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel."
