Leviticus23:4 E are' tak rajilabal k'ij wa' ri nimak qui k'ij che coc'owisaxic ri tastalicalaj tak mulin ib che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, e are c'u tak k'ij wa' ri rajawaxic qui mulij iwib:" 
Leviticus23:5 Pa ri nabe ic', pa ri ucajlajuj rajilabal ri ic', aretak cakaj ri k'ij, coc'owisax ri oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:6 Pa ri olajuj rajilabal we ic' ri' coc'owisax ri nimak'ij re ri qui tijic ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc', wukub k'ij quitij ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc'." 
Leviticus23:7 Pa ri nabe k'ij quiwoc'owisaj jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Miban jun chac re patanijic. 
Leviticus23:8 Pa ri wukub k'ij rajawaxic quebiporoj sipanic che ri Ajawaxel, pa ri uwuk k'ij quiwoc'owisaj jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus23:10 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak ix oquinak chic pa ri ulew ri quenya' chiwe, i k'atom chi c'ut ri trico, quic'am ulok chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri nabe ya'taj re ri u wächinic ri iwulew." 
Leviticus23:11 Chucab k'ij re ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cujach chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jacha' sipanic ri nim u banic, rech quec'amar chque." 
Leviticus23:12 Kas pa ri k'ij aretak quichi'j ri ya'taj, quichi'j xukuje' jun alaj ama' chij ri man c'o ta u yab re jun u junab che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:13 Quic'am na ulok xukuje' lajuj libra c'oc'alaj c'äj, yok'om aseit ruc', sipanic wa' ri cäc'oc'atic ri cäporox chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cärachilaj jun litro u wa'l uva ri cäjamix puwi'." 
Leviticus23:14 C'ä pa ri k'ij aretak ri qui c'am na bic ri i sipanic che ri Ajawaxel, mitij ta na caxlanwa mawi q'uilim trico o iq'uel. Jun pixab wa' ri coc'ow cuc' ri tataxelab cäk'ax c'u cuc' ri c'ojolaxelab apawije' ta ne ri quixjeki' wi." 
Leviticus23:15 Cachaptaj bic pa ri k'ij aretak quic'am ulok ri joyataj trico che sipanic ri nim u banic, ri u bixic, cachaptaj bic chucab k'ij che ri k'ij re uxlanem, rajawaxic quiwajilaj wukub wukutak k'ij tz'akat." 
Leviticus23:16 Ruc' c'ut ri ucab k'ij chque ri wukub k'ij, k'ij rech ri uxlanem, quetz'akat ri cawinak lajuj k'ij. Chi c'ut quic'am ulok ri i sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel re c'ac' trico." 
Leviticus23:17 Quic'am c'u na ulok cho tak iwachoch cacab caxlanwa re c'oc'alaj c'äj ri e chak'ajisam ri yo'm ch'am cuc' re belejeb libra c'äj chquijujunal, jacha' sipanic ri nim u banic quech ri nabe tak wächinic che ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:18 Aretak quichi'j ri caxlanwa xukuje' quichi'j wukub ama'ib alaj tak chij jujun qui junab ri man c'o ta qui yab, jun alaj ama' wacax, xukuje' quieb ama'ib tak chij ri quiya' che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, rachil ri sipanic xukuje' tak ri cäjam puwi', c'oc'alaj sipanic wa' ri cänicowisaxic ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:19 Quichi'j c'u na xukuje' jun ama' q'uisic' che u josk'ixic ri macaj, xukuje' quieb alaj tak chij ama'ib jujun qui junab che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib." 
Leviticus23:20 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob quebuchi'j ri awaj jacha' che sipanic ri nim u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cärachilaj ri caxlanwa que ri nabe tak wächinic xukuje' ri quieb alaj ama'ib tak chij. Quetas che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel, quecanaj c'u che ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus23:21 Quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib che roc'owisaxic we k'ij ri', man c'o ta jun chac re patanijic quibano. Jun pixab wa' ri caquitz'akatisaj ri tataxelab xukuje' ri c'ojolaxelab apawije' ta ne ri quixjeki' wi." 
Leviticus23:22 Aretak quiyac u wäch ri iwulew, nimol ri c'o pa ri q'uisbal u jutz'il, mipich'olij ri iwulew ri yactajinak chi u wäch; chiya' can che ri meba' xukuje' che ri man i winakil taj. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus23:24 “Chebach'abej ri aj israelib, chabij c'u chque: Ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk ic', nimalaj k'ij wa' chiwe re uxlanem, jun natabal wa' ri coc'owisax ruc' ri cok'ibal ri e trompet xukuje' ruc' jun tastalicalaj mulin ib." 
Leviticus23:25 Mawi jun chac re patanijic quibano, quichi'j c'u sipanic ri cänicowisax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Leviticus23:26 “Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus23:27 Kas pa ri lajuj rajilabal we uwuk ic' ri' are K'ij wa' re Sachbal Mac, quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib, quicoj c'ut we k'ij ri che ri man u tijic ta wa xukuje' quichi'j sipanic ri queporoxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:28 Mawi jun chac quiban pa we k'ij ri', rumal rech chi are K'ij wa' ri Casach ri Macaj, ri quirik wi na ri sachbal i mac chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus23:29 Jachin c'ut ri man cucoj taj we k'ij che ri man u tijic ta wa, quesax na bic chquixo'l ri u winakil apachin ta ne." 
Leviticus23:30 Are' c'ut ri cuban jun chac pa we k'ij ri', ri in quinsach na u wäch we winak ri' chquixo'l ri u winakil apachin ta ne." 
Leviticus23:31 Mawi jun chac quibano; pixab wa' ri caquitz'akatisaj ri tataxelab xukuje' ri c'ojolaxelab pa apachique c'olbal ri quixjeki' wi. 
Leviticus23:32 Cux na jun k'ij re uxlanem chiwe, ri quicoj na che man u tijic ta wa, quichaplej na pa ri benak k'ij re ri k'ij ubelej rajilabal ri ic', c'ä pa ri benak tak k'ij rech ri jun k'ij chic.”" 
Leviticus23:33 “Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus23:34 Chabij chque ri aj israelib, chi pa ri olajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic', cächapletaj roc'owisaxic ri nimak'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel quech ri cäbal, wukub k'ij cäbeytaj wa'." 
Leviticus23:35 Pa ri nabe k'ij cäban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib, mawi jun chac re patanijic quibano." 
Leviticus23:36 Wukub k'ij quichi'j sipanic ri cänicowisax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chuwajxak k'ij quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib, xukuje' quichi'j sipanic ri cänicowisax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; nimak'ij wa', miban jun chac re patanijic." 
Leviticus23:37 Are tak nimak'ij wa' ri quiwoc'owisaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri quiban tastalicalaj tak mulin ib che u chi'xic sipanic ri cänicowisax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, sipanic, quech tak c'äj, tabal tak tok'ob xukuje' tak sipanic re ri u wa'l uva, pa ri k'ij ri ya'tal qui cojic," 
Leviticus23:38 quebiwoc'owisaj wa' quebichajij tak ri k'ij re uxlanem chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, quebiya' sipanic, quebiban chi'nic xukuje' tak ri i sipanic ri cäpe pa ri iwanima' ri i nak'atisam u ya'ic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus23:39 Chuo'lajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic', aretak i yacom chi ri u wäch ri iwulew, quiban wukub k'ij nimak'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; ri nabe k'ij, k'ij re uxlanem wa', xukuje' ri uwajxak k'ij." 
Leviticus23:40 Chupam ri nabe k'ij quebic'am na ri utzalaj tak qui wächinic ri e utzalaj tak che', e qui xak tak tut xukuje' e qui k'ab ta che' ri e c'o q'ui qui xak xukuje' tak sak lemob ri e c'o chquichi' tak ri nima', wukub k'ij c'ut quixquicot chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus23:41 Chi junab quiban wukub k'ij nimak'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; jun pixab wa' ri cäjekic ri caquiban ri tataxelab xukuje' ri c'ojolaxelab. 
Leviticus23:42 Wukub k'ij quixc'oji' na pa tak cäbal; conojel ri aj tinimit aj israelib quec'oji' na pa tak cäbal," 
Leviticus23:43 rech conojel ri e awija'lil caquetamaj chi, aretak ri in xebenwesaj ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt, xinban chque chi xejeki' pa tak cäbal. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios." 
Leviticus23:44 Jewa' xuban ri Moises che qui tzijobexic ri aj israelib chrij ri coc'owisaxic ri nimak tak nimak'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.” 
Leviticus24:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus24:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi cäquic'am ulok utzalaj aseit re aseitun ri cha'om u wäch, rech man cächup ta ri chäj." 
Leviticus24:3 Ri Aaron are quekle'n ri qui suc'umaxic, rech quenicow ronojel ri jun ak'ab chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chrij ri ch'ukubal ri c'o chuxcut ri caxa' re ri c'ulwächinic. Are jun pixab wa' ri cajeki'c ri caquiban ri tataxelab xukuje' alc'ualaxelab." 
Leviticus24:4 Quebusuc'umaj c'u na ri chäj puwi' ri tzuc'ulibal ri re utzalaj k'an puak rech quenicow chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.” 
Leviticus24:5 “Chac'ama' utzalaj c'äj chebachak'ajisaj cablajuj caxlanwa, re lajuj libra chquijujunal." 
Leviticus24:6 Chebaya' puwi' ri mexa ri re utzalaj k'an puak ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, pa catunaj re wakitak caxlanwa chquijujunal." 
Leviticus24:7 Chaya' utzalaj c'oc' k'ol paquiwi' ri jutak nutaj, ri cajwataj che ri caxlanwa jacha' che sipanic re natabal porom che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus24:8 Pa tak ri k'ij re uxlanem quetunubax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, pa qui bi' ri e ralc'ual ri Israel, pixab wa' re chbe k'ij sak." 
Leviticus24:9 Are wa' ri ya'tal che ri Aaron amak'el xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil, ri rajawaxic caquitij chupam jun c'olbal, ri tastalic, sibalaj c'u e tastalic e qui tz'akatil ri sipanic ri quenicowisax che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, pixab wa' ri cajeki'c canok.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri ral jun ixok aj israel, u c'ojol jun aj ejipt, xel ulok chquixo'l ri aj israelib; ri ala ri' ri ral ri ixok aj israel rachil jun achi chic aj israel xech'ojin pa ri kajebal, ri ral ri ixok aj israel xuyok' ri u bi' ri Dios xuc'okoj; xc'am c'u bic chuwäch ri Moises, Selomit u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Dibri aj Dan." 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 Xcoj pa che, xqueyej na ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chque." 
Leviticus24:13 Ri Ajawaxel, xubij che ri Moises:" 
Leviticus24:14 “Chawesaj bic ri yok'onel chrij ri kajebal, conojel c'u ri xeto'wic chquiya' ri qui k'ab pa u jolom, conojel ri xquita' ri xubij chbuc' che abaj cumal conojel ri aj israelib." 
Leviticus24:15 Chabij c'u chque ri aj israelib: Apachin ri cuc'okoj ri u Dios, cäkajbex na rumal ri retzelal, apachin ri cuyok' ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, cäcämisax na, cäbuc' na chabaj cumal conojel. We man aj Israel taj, che i winakil, we cuyok' ri u bi' ri Dios, chc'okox che cämical." 
Leviticus24:16  
Leviticus24:17 Xukuje' ri cuch'ay apachique winak cucämisaj c'ut, chcämisax ri are'." 
Leviticus24:18 Ri cucämisaj jun awaj, cutoj na ri u q'uexel, awaj cuya' na che u q'uexel." 
Leviticus24:19 Ri cusoc jun rajil u tz'akat, jas ri xubano, je chban che ri are':" 
Leviticus24:20 K'ajic cätojbex u q'uexel ri k'ajic, bak'wächaj cätojbex u q'uexel ri bak'wächaj, wareyaj cätojbex u q'uexel ri wareyaj; jas ri socotajic ri xbanic are je u q'uexel cäya' na." 
Leviticus24:21 Ri cucämisaj jun awaj, cutoj na u q'uexel; are c'u ri cucämisaj jun winak cäcämisax na ri are'." 
Leviticus24:22 Xa jun pixab quicoj che ri man i winakil taj xukuje' che ri i winakil rumal rech chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.” 
Leviticus24:23 Ronojel wa' xubij ri Moises chque ri aj israelib, xquesaj c'u bic ri yok'onel chrij ri tinimit, xquibuc' che abaj. Je c'u xquiban ri aj israelib jas ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Leviticus25:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises puwi' ri juyub Sinai, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus25:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib, ri quinbij chawe: Aretak ix oquinak chic pa ri ulew ri quinya' na chiwe, ri ulew cuxlan na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus25:3 Wakib junab catic u wäch ri awulew, xukuje' wakib junab quebajosk'ij tak ri a uva, quebayac c'u ri qui wächinic." 
Leviticus25:4 Pa ri uwuk junab c'ut cuxlan na ri ulew, uxlanem wa' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; matic u wäch ri awulew mawi quebajosk'ij tak ri a uva." 
Leviticus25:5 Ri u tuquiel cäq'uiy ulok cho ri awulew ri a yacom chi u wäch, mawi mebamol tak ri uva che ri u c'amal ri man josk'im taj; junab wa' re uxlanem che ri awulew." 
Leviticus25:6 Are c'u ri ruxlanem ri ulew cuya' na ri tzukbal awe, ri tzukbal re ri pataninel awe chi achi chi ixok, ri awajchac xukuje' ri man awinakil taj ri jekel awuc';" 
Leviticus25:7 ri e awawaj, xukuje' ri e juyubal tak awaj ri e c'o pa ri awulew, ronojel ri u wäch ri ulew ya'tal chque cäquitijo." 
Leviticus25:8 Rajawaxic quiwajilaj wukub wukutak k'ij junab, ri u bixic wa' wukub mul wukutak junab, ri ajilabal ri quel chi nimalaj ronojel, cawinak belejeb (49) junab." 
Leviticus25:9 Caban c'u na chi cok' ri trompet pa ri lajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic', pa ri k'ij re sachbal macaj quiwok'isaj ri trompet pa ronojel ri iwulew." 
Leviticus25:10 Ri junab cawinak lajuj (50) quik'alajisaj na ix chi junab tastalic: are jun junab re toronem, chque conojel ri e jekel chupam ri ulew. Ronojel winak cätzelej na cuc' ri rachalaxic xukuje' chupam ri rulew ri rechbem can nabe." 
Leviticus25:11 Ri junab cawinak lajuj (50) cux na chiwe junab re tzokopitajem, chupam we junab ri' man cuya' taj quixticonijic, mawi quik'at ta ri trico ri xak caq'uiy ulok pa rech wi, mawi quebijosk'ij tak ri juwi' tak i uva mawi quebimol tak ri e qui uva." 
Leviticus25:12 Rumal rech chi are jun tastalic junab re tzokopitajem chiwe ix. Quitij na xuwi ri cuq'uiyisaj ri ulew pa rech wi. 
Leviticus25:13 Pa we junab ri', quixtzelej chijujunal pa tak ri iwechbal." 
Leviticus25:14 Aretak c'o jas quic'ayij che ri iwajil i tz'akat, o c'o jas quilok' che ri iwajil i tz'akat, c'o jun musub ri rachalal." 
Leviticus25:15 Joropa' junab craj na ri tzokopitajem, are junab wa' catlok'om che ri awajil a tz'akat, joropa' junab ri u wächinic ri ulew are wa' cuc'ayij wi chawe." 
Leviticus25:16 Joropa' ri u q'uial ri junab, je u q'uial ri rajil catoj na, we man q'ui ri junab cak'ip na ri rajil; joropa' c'u junab ri u wächinic ri ulew are wa' cuc'ayij wi chawe." 
Leviticus25:17 C'o c'u jun musub ri rajil u tz'akat, xane' china' iwib chuwäch ri Dios; in c'u ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus25:18 Chixoc ba che qui banic ri e nu pixab xukuje' chebinimaj ri nu takomal, chebibana' ri cäquibij, we je quiban wa' man c'o ta c'u jachin quixslaben cho ri ulew;" 
Leviticus25:19 ri ulew cuya' na ri u wächinic, quixwa' c'ut c'ä quixnoj na, man c'o ta jachin quixesan chuwäch." 
Leviticus25:20 We c'u ne quibij: ¿Jas cäkatij pa ri uwuk junab, we man cujticonijic mawi cäkamol qui wäch ri kulew?" 
Leviticus25:21 Ri in quintak na ulok ri nu tewichibal piwi' pa ri uwak junab, cuya' na ri u wächinic ri ulew re oxib junab;" 
Leviticus25:22 quixticonij na c'ä pa ri uwajxak junab, are quitij na ri chaki'j tak wächinic; c'ä chubelej junab, c'ä cäpe na ri c'ac' tak wächinic quitanaba' qui tijic ri chaki'j tak wächinic." 
Leviticus25:23 Ri ulew man cuya' taj chi kas ta cac'ayixic, rumal rech chi wech in ri ulew; ri ix c'ut, xa ix kajanelab, ix okxanel tak iwib ix c'o pa ri wulew." 
Leviticus25:24 Rumal ri' apachique ulew ri i banom iwech che, rajawaxic quiya' k'ijol chque ri e nabe tak ajchak'e chi cuya' caquitoro." 
Leviticus25:25 We cämebayir ri awachalal, cuc'ayij ta c'u jubik' ri rechbal, ri ratz o ri u chak' cuya' cutor ri u c'ayim." 
Leviticus25:26 We c'u ne c'o jachin jun ri man c'o ta jun rija'lil ri cacuin ta che u toric ri rechbal, we c'u cacuin ri kas are' che u mulixic ri rajawaxic che u toric," 
Leviticus25:27 crajilaj joropa' junab u c'ayim chi ri rulew, cutoj c'u ri u c'as ri c'ä c'o na pa u k'ab ri achi, carechbej chi c'u na jumul ri rulew." 
Leviticus25:28 We c'u man cäcuin che u molic ri puak rech catzelex che, ri u c'ayim cäcanaj na pa u k'ab ri lok'owinak c'ä copan na ri junab rech ri tzokopitajem, chupam c'ut we junab ri' catorotaj na ri echbal, are' c'u ri xc'ayinic cärechbej chi na jumul." 
Leviticus25:29 Apachin ri cuc'ayij rachoch ri c'o pa jun tinimit ri c'o tapia chrij, cäya' jun junab che u toric cajilax ri k'ij aretak xuc'ayij; jun junab caya' che rech cutoro." 
Leviticus25:30 We man cätor pa ri jun junab, ri ja ri c'o pa ri tinimit ri c'o tapia chrij, xa jumul cäcanaj can pa u k'ab ri xlok'owic, xukuje' chque ri rija'lil. Man cätorotaj ta pa ri junab re tzokopitajem." 
Leviticus25:31 E are c'u ri ja ri e c'o pa tak ri alaj tak tinimit ri man c'o ta tapia chquij, je cäban chque jacha' ri ulew pa tak ri juyub; cuya' quetoric, catzokopitaj na pa ri junab re tzokopitajem." 
Leviticus25:32 Ri aj levitib yo'm pa qui k'ab amak'el chi cuya' quequilok' chi jumul tak ri ja ri e c'o chupam tak ri qui tinimit. 
Leviticus25:33 We ri calok'ow chi jumul are' jun aj levi, rajawaxic cujam ri ja pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem cäbe c'ut chupam ri tinimit jawije' c'o wi ri rechbal, ri quechbal c'ut ri aj levitib ri c'o chquixo'l ri aj israelib are ri ja ri c'o chupam ri qui tinimit." 
Leviticus25:34 Are c'u ri rulewal ri qui tinimit tak ri aj levitib, mawi jubik' cuya' quec'ayixic, quechbal c'u wa' re chbe k'ij sak." 
Leviticus25:35 We ri awachalal cämebayiric, cuto' c'u rib awuc', chaya' rokxanibal; jacha' ri caban che jun ri man awinakil taj ri xa cärokxanila' rib, cäjeki' na awuc'." 
Leviticus25:36 Matok'ij ral puak che mawi maban ch'äcoj chrij, xane' chac'utu' chi cana' awib chuwäch ri Dios, cäjeki' c'u ri awachalal pa ri awachoch." 
Leviticus25:37 Matok'ij ral ri a rajil ri caya' che pa kajomal, mapakba' rajil ri wa ja' ri caya' che pa tijic." 
Leviticus25:38 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt, che u ya'ic ri ulew re Canaan chiwe xukuje' rech c'u quinux i Dios." 
Leviticus25:39 We cämebayir ri awachalal ri c'o awuc', cuc'ayij ta c'u rib chawe, maban che chi cäpatanijic jacha' jun lok'om pataninel." 
Leviticus25:40 Chabana' che jacha' jun ajchac, o jacha' ri xa rokxanim rib awuc'; c'ä pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem catupatanij na." 
Leviticus25:41 Cätzokopitaj c'u bic, quel bic pa ri awachoch e rachil ri ralc'ual, cätzelej cuc' ri rachalaxic, cätzelej pa ri culew ri u tat u nan, curik chi c'u na utzil." 
Leviticus25:42 E pataninel c'u tak wech xebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt; man cuya' taj quec'ayixic e jacha' ta ne lok'om pataninelab. 
Leviticus25:43 Mattakan puwi' ruc' c'anal, xane' chana' awib chuwäch ri Dios." 
Leviticus25:44 We cawaj quec'oji' a lok'om pataninelab, achijab o ixokib, chebalok'o chque ri jule' nimak tak tinimit chic ri e a c'ulja." 
Leviticus25:45 Xukuje' cuya' quebalok' ri e calc'ual ri man e a winakil taj ri xak e c'o chixo'l, xukuje' ri calc'ual ri quecalaj ri e c'o chupam ri iwulew; e are wa' cuya' quebilok'o rech quiban c'u iwech chque." 
Leviticus25:46 Cuya' quebiya' can che quechbal ri e i c'ojol aretak quixcämic; jacha' jun echbal re chbe k'ij sak; are c'u tak ri e iwachalal aj israelib, mixtakan paquiwi' ruc' c'anal." 
Leviticus25:47 We ri man awinakil taj ri jekel chupam ri awulew cux k'inom, are c'u ri awachalal ri c'o che u c'ulja cämebayiric, cuc'ayij ta c'u rib che ri man awinakil taj o che jun ta chic man awinakil taj;" 
Leviticus25:48 ya'tal che chi cälok' ri u tzokopitajic pune' u c'ayim chi rib. Cuya' cälok' rumal jun chque ri rachalal. 
Leviticus25:49 Xukuje' cuya' cätor rumal jun rican o ri u c'ojol ri rican, o rumal jun apachique rachalaxic, ri kas c'o cux che, o we cacuinic cuya' cutor rib u tuquiel." 
Leviticus25:50 Crajilaj ruc' ri xlok'owic joropa' junab u c'ayim chi rib pa u k'ab, majok churika' ri junab rech ri tzokopitajem; cäjilax c'u na ri puak ri u c'ayibem rib, junam c'u cätojic jacha' ri cuch'äc jun ajchac." 
Leviticus25:51 We c'u q'ui junab craj na, jewa' ri puak ri cutzelej na che ri torbal rib." 
Leviticus25:52 We c'u xa quieb oxib junab chic cäraj ri junab re tzokopitajem, carajilaj ruc' ri xlok'owic, cuya' c'u na ri puak jacha' ri junab ri craj na che ri u torotajic." 
Leviticus25:53 Je cäban che jacha' ri cäban che jun ajchac ri cätoj chi junab; xak mawilo chi cäban c'ax che chawäch. 
Leviticus25:54 We man cutor rib pa apachique junab, aretak copan ri junab re ri tzokopitajem, cätzokopitaj na pa ri k'ij rech ri torotajem, e rachil ri ralc'ual." 
Leviticus25:55 E pataninel tak wech c'ut ri aj israelib, e pataninel tak wech ri xebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios.”" 
Leviticus26:1 “Mebiban tak i diosib mawi tak wächbal; mebiwalajisaj tastalicalaj tak abaj ri quetzoq'uic; mebimej tak iwib chquiwäch, in c'u ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus26:2 Chebichajij tak ri nu k'ij re uxlanem, nim chiwila' wi ri quink'ijilax wi. In ri' ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus26:3 We quebitakej ri e nu pixab, we quebinimaj ri e nu takomal, quiban c'ut jas ri cäquibij," 
Leviticus26:4 ri in quinkasaj na ri jäb pa ri u k'ijol, ri ulew sibalaj cäwächin na, xukuje' ri che' pa tak ri juyub cäquiya' na ri qui wächinic;" 
Leviticus26:5 c'ä c'o na qui trico aretak cäyac ri qui wäch ri uva xukuje' qui uva c'ä cäpe na ri ticonijic; caquitij na qui wa c'ä quenoj na, man c'o ta c'u quixslabesan na chupam ri iwulew." 
Leviticus26:6 Quinya' na utzil cho ri uwächulew, quixwar c'u na pa utzil, man c'o ta jas quixxibin na, xukuje' quebenwesaj na ri itzel tak awaj pa tak ri iwulew, man c'o ta c'u ch'o'j cäpe na puwi' ri i tinimit." 
Leviticus26:7 Quebiwokotaj ri e i c'ulel, quekaj c'u na pa u chi' ch'ich' re ch'o'j chiwäch;" 
Leviticus26:8 e job chiwe quecokataj na jun sient, jun sient chiwe quecokataj na lajuj mil, quekaj c'u na ri i c'ulel pa i k'ab pa u chi' ch'ich' re ch'o'j." 
Leviticus26:9 Quinya' c'u na nu wäch chiwe, quinbano chi quixpok'colijic, quixq'uiyir c'u na, quinjekeba' na ri nu c'ulwächinic iwuc'." 
Leviticus26:10 Quitij na ri junabir tak wächinic, xa c'u quebiq'uiak chi apanok aretak quepe chic ri c'ac' tak wächinic." 
Leviticus26:11 Quinjekeba' na ri nu c'olbal chixo'l, mawi jubik' quinwetzelaj ta i wäch;" 
Leviticus26:12 amak'el quinbin na chixo'l, quinux na i Dios, xukuje' ri ix quixux na nu tinimit." 
Leviticus26:13 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri xixinwesaj ulok pa ri qui tinimit ri aj ejiptib rech man quitakej iwuxic qui lok'om pataninelab, in xinwesaj ri eka'bal ri cojom piwi', xinwalijisaj ri i jolom rech jicom chic quixbinic.”" 
Leviticus26:14 “We c'u man quinitatabej, mawi quebinimaj tak we nu takomal ri'," 
Leviticus26:15 we c'u quebijech'obisaj ri nu takanic, man nim ta quiwil wi ri nu pixab, mawi quitz'akatisaj qui banic ri cäquibij ri e nu takomal, man quebitz'akatisaj taj ri nu c'ulwächinic we je quiban wa'," 
Leviticus26:16 ri in xukuje' quinc'am na ulok we jastak ri piwi': Quinc'am ulok xe'n ib piwi', tukaril, yabil quechaki'jar ri i bak'wäch rumal, cuban na c'ax che ri iwanima'; xak lok' quixticonij na rumal rech chi are ri i c'ulel quetijow na ri quitico." 
Leviticus26:17 In quinoc na che i c'ulel, quixsoc c'u na cumal ri e i c'ulel; ri cäquetzelaj i wäch quetakan na piwi' quixanimaj c'u na pune man c'o ta quixokatanic." 
Leviticus26:18 We c'u man quixoc che nu nimaxic cumal we jastak ri', wukub mul quinc'äjisaj chi na i wäch u mac rech ri i mac." 
Leviticus26:19 Quinban na ch'akatak che ri nimal ri quixc'amowic; quinbano chi ri caj ri c'o piwi', man cajabin ta chic, xukuje' ri iwulew man cuya' ta chic ri u wächinic." 
Leviticus26:20 Xak c'u lok' quiq'uis ri i chuk'ab, man cäwächin ta chi c'u ri iwulew, xukuje' ri che' ri e tiquitoj man cäquiya' ta chi ri qui wäch." 
Leviticus26:21 We c'u quitakej nu c'ulelaxic, man quiwaj taj quitatabej ri nu tzij, quintik chi na wukub mul c'axc'ol piwi' jacha' ri u nimal ri i mac." 
Leviticus26:22 Xukuje' quebentak na ulok juyubal tak awaj chiwij ri quequic'am na bic ri iwalc'ual, xukuje' cäquiq'uis tzij paquiwi' ri e iwawaj, quinchaplej c'u u sachic i wäch, ri e i be xak quetz'inow chi canok." 
Leviticus26:23 We c'u man quiji'c' iwib che qui banic we jastak ri', xane' quitakej nu c'ulelaxic," 
Leviticus26:24 xukuje' ri in quinoc na che i c'ulelaxic, quinc'äjisaj chi na i wäch wukub mul u mac rech ri i mac." 
Leviticus26:25 Quinc'am na ulok cämical piwi', che u c'äjisaxic i wäch u mac rech chi man i tz'akatisam taj ri nu c'ulwächinic; we c'u quitzucuj u to'ic iwib pa tak ri i tinimit, ri in quintak na ulok yabil chixo'l, quixkaj c'u na pa u k'ab ri c'ulel." 
Leviticus26:26 Aretak quink'ip ri u c'u'x ri i caxlanwa, lajuj ixokib quechak'ajisan na ri i caxlanwa pa jun ja', xak c'u pajtal chic ri quitijo; quixwa'ic man c'u quixnoj taj." 
Leviticus26:27 We c'u man quixoc che nu nimaxic cumal we jastak ri', xane' quitakej nu c'ulelaxic," 
Leviticus26:28 ri in quintakej i c'ulelaxic ruc' oyowal, quinc'äjisaj chi na i wäch wukub mul u mac rech ri i mac." 
Leviticus26:29 Quitij na ri qui ti'jal ri e i c'ojol, quitij na ri qui ti'jal ri e i mia'l." 
Leviticus26:30 In quebenc'äjij tak ri e i k'ijilabal ri e quech winak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib, quinban na cacab chque ri e i porobal quech c'oc' tak k'ol; quebenmulij na ri e i cuerp ri man c'o ta qui c'aslemal paquiwi' ri qui cuerp ri e i diosib ri man c'o ta qui c'aslemal, quinc'ut c'u na ri woyowal chiwäch." 
Leviticus26:31 Quinban na chi quetz'inow can ri i tinimit tak, quinq'uis na tzij paquiwi' ri i k'ijilabal tak, man quebensik ta chic ri c'oc'alaj tak sipanic ri quichi'j tak chwe." 
Leviticus26:32 Quintolorisaj na u wäch ri ulew, cäpe c'u na canima' ri e i c'ulel ri quebel jekel chupam." 
Leviticus26:33 Are c'u ri ix quinxinjabuj na chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit, quintak c'u na bic ch'o'j chiwij; cujalwächij na can jun chaki'j uwo sak ri iwulew, quetz'ini can ri i tinimit tak." 
Leviticus26:34 Ri ulew cäquicot na, cuxlan na canok conojel tak ri k'ij ri camali canok, aretak ri ix ix c'o pa ri culew ri e i c'ulel; c'äte ri' ri ulew cuxlan na canok, cäquicot c'u na pa ri ruxlanem." 
Leviticus26:35 Ronojel ri k'ij ri camali canok, are k'ij ri' cuxlan na rumal rech chi man xuxlan taj pa tak ri k'ij re uxlanem aretak ix jekel chuwäch." 
Leviticus26:36 E Are' c'ut ri quecanaj can chiwe, quinya' na nimalaj tukaril pa canima' chquiwäch ri qui c'ulel, xa c'u rumal ri u wojojem jun u xak che' ri cäsalabic quebanimaj na, je ta ne ri quebanimaj chuwäch jun cämisanel, quejupujubic man c'o ta c'u queboktanic." 
Leviticus26:37 Cäquipuq'uila' tak na quib, je ta ne ri quebanimaj chquiwäch ajch'ojab, pune' man c'o jun quebokatanic; ¡man c'u quixcuin taj quito' ta iwib pa qui k'ab ri e i c'ulel!" 
Leviticus26:38 Cäsach na i wäch chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit, quixbik' na cumal ri culew ri e i c'ulel." 
Leviticus26:39 E are' c'ut ri quec'asi'c canok pa ri culew ri e i c'ulel quecäm na u mac rech ri quetzelal; ¡quecäm na junam cuc' ri qui tat u mac rech ri quetzelal! 
Leviticus26:40 Pune' ri ix quicoj na iwib chupam ri iwetzelal, xukuje' ri quetzelal ri e i mam, xukuje' ri man qui jiquil taj xukuje' ri qui c'ulelanic chwe," 
Leviticus26:41 xukuje' c'u ri in quixinc'ulelaj na quixinc'am c'u bic pa ri culew ri e i c'ulel; c'ä chi' c'ut cäquimach' na ri canima' ri quebuk'ijilaj tak diosib, caquitoj c'u na ri qui mac." 
Leviticus26:42 Cänataj c'u na ri nu c'ulwächinic chwe ri nu banom ruc' ri Jacob, ri Isaac, ri Abraham, cänataj na ri ulew chwe," 
Leviticus26:43 ri qui tzokopim canok cuxlan c'u na aretak ri ix man ix c'o ta chi chuwäch; quebitoj c'u na ix ri e i mac, rumal rech chi man nim ta xebiwil wi ri e nu takanic xebixutuj c'ut ri e nu pixab." 
Leviticus26:44 Pune' c'u je i c'ulmam wa', pune' c'u ri ix ix c'o chupam jun ulew c'ulel, man quinwetzelaj ta i wäch mawi quixinxutuj ta na; man quinsachisaj ta i wäch mawi ma ta chintz'akatisaj ri nu c'ulwächinic ri xinban cuc' ri e i mam, rumal rech chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios." 
Leviticus26:45 Quenataj c'u na chwe ri c'ulwächinic ri xinban cuc' aretak xebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt chquiwäch ri nimak tak tinimit rech quinux qui Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.” 
Leviticus26:46 Are tak wa' ri u takanic, ri pixab, ri pixbenic, ri xujekeba' ri Ajawaxel cuc' ri aj israelib puwi' ri juyub Sinai rumal ri Moises." 
Leviticus27:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Leviticus27:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib, ri quinbij chawe: Aretak c'o jun winak cutoj jun chi'nic ri nim u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri rajil jun winak," 
Leviticus27:3 che jun achi ri juwinak (20) u junab c'ä oxc'al (60), cäk'at cawinak lajuj (50) rakan sak puak che ri rajil, je jas ri pajbal ri cäcoj chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Leviticus27:4 We c'u ixok, juwinak lajuj (30) rakan sak puak cäk'at na chrij." 
Leviticus27:5 Ri job u junab c'ä juwinak, ri ala cäk'at na juwinak rakan sak puak chrij, are c'u ri ali lajuj rakan sak puak cäk'at chrij." 
Leviticus27:6 Ri jun riq'uil c'ä job u junab, ri ala cäk'at na job (5) rakan sak puak chrij, ri ali oxib (3) rakan sak puak cäk'at chrij." 
Leviticus27:7 Chque ri winak ri oc'owinak chic oxc'al (60) qui junab, we achijab olajuj (15) rakan sak puak ri qui cuchuj, we ixokib lajuj rakan sak puak ri qui cuchuj." 
Leviticus27:8 We c'u sibalaj meba' ri winak che u tojic ri cuchuj ri k'atom, cäc'am bic we jasach ri' chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, rech cuk'at jun c'ac' cuchuj ri cacuin che u ya'ic ri cäcuin che u tojic are je cuk'at na chrij." 
Leviticus27:9 We c'u e awaj ri quechi'x che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel, ronojel awaj ri cäjach che ri Ajawaxel, cacanaj tastalic," 
Leviticus27:10 man cuya' taj cäq'uex chi ruc' jun awaj, pune' utz na, o man utz taj. We c'u ne c'o q'uexenic, ri awaj ri chi'tajinak xukuje' ri awaj ri cäya' che u q'uexwäch qui cabichal quetastajic." 
Leviticus27:11 We c'u awaj ri man ya'tal taj queya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cäc'am bic ri awaj chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob," 
Leviticus27:12 rech cuk'at ri cuchuj ri takalic, jas ri u banic ri awaj. Ri cuchuj ri k'atom rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob rajawaxic canimaxic." 
Leviticus27:13 We c'u cajwaxic chi cätzelej chi jumul ri awaj cäya' na jun ro'il puwi' ri cuchuj ri k'atom. 
Leviticus27:14 We c'o jun cutas ri rachoch che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel, ri cojol tabal tok'ob are cäk'atow ri rajil jas ri u banic ri ja. Ri cuk'at ri cojol tabal tok'ob rajawaxic canimaxic." 
Leviticus27:15 We c'u ri xutas ri rachoch craj cätzelej chi jumul pa u k'ab cuya' na jun u ro'il puwi' ri rajil ri k'atom, ri ja cätzälij chi jumul pa u k'ab." 
Leviticus27:16 We c'o jachin jun cutas jubik' ri rulew che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel, ri rajil ri ulew cachomaxic jas kas ri cäcuin che u q'uiyisaxic, cawinak lajuj (50) rakan sak puak che oxib quintal ruc' oxib arob sebad." 
Leviticus27:17 We cutas ri rulew pa ri u chaplebal ri junab re tzokopitajem, je cäcanajic jas ri rajil." 
Leviticus27:18 We c'u cutas ri rulew aretak oc'owinak chic ri junab re tzokopitajem, ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'at ri sak puak ri cäya' na, crajilaj ri junab ri c'ä craj na che ri junab re tzokopitajem, cuk'ip c'u na jubik' che ri kas rajil." 
Leviticus27:19 We c'u ri xutas ri rulew craj chi cätzelej chi jumul pa u k'ab cuya' na jun ro'il puwi' ri rajil ri k'atom, ri ulew cätzelej chi jumul pa u k'ab." 
Leviticus27:20 We c'u man cutzelej ri rajil, cäc'ayix ri ulew pa u k'ab jun winak chic, man ya'tal ta chi che cutzelej ri rajil." 
Leviticus27:21 Aretak ri ulew cätorotaj pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem, kas cacanaj can che ri Ajawaxel, cäk'ax pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Leviticus27:22 We c'o jun winak cutas jun ulew che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel ri xa u lok'om, ri man u tz'akatil ta ri rechbal," 
Leviticus27:23 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchomaj na ruc' ri winak ri' ri rajil ri ulew c'ä curika' na ri junab re ri tzokopitajem, we winak ri' cutoj na kas pa ri k'ij ri' joropa' ri puak ri k'atom jacha' che rajil ri ulew, cutas c'u na che ri Ajawaxel che u patanixic." 
Leviticus27:24 Pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem ri ulew cätzelej chi na pa u k'ab ri xc'ayinic, ri cubij wa' chi pa u k'ab ri nabe ajchak'e." 
Leviticus27:25 Conojel ri alal rajawaxic e junam ruc' ri siclo re juwinak jera, are wa' ri alal ri cäcoj pa ri k'ijilabal." 
Leviticus27:26 Are c'u ri nabe tak cal ri awaj e rech ri Ajawaxel rumal rech chi e are wa' ri e nabeal, man c'o ta jun cutas ta che chbil rib. We jun alaj ama' wacax o jun alaj ama' chij, rech ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus27:27 We are jun awaj ri tz'il, cuya' cätoric jacha' ri rajil ri k'atom, cäya' c'u na jun ro'il puwi' ri rajil; we c'u man cätoric cuya' cäc'ayixic jas ri rajil ri k'atom." 
Leviticus27:28 We c'o jachin jun cutas che ri Ajawaxel jubik' chque ri jastak rech che jun sipanic we e winak, we e awaj, we e ulew ri rechbem chque ri rachalaxic; che ri tasom man cuya' taj c'o ta cac'ayix che mawi cäc'am ta chi jumul; ronojel ri tasom are jun jasach ri sibalaj tastalic ri jachom che ri Ajawaxel." 
Leviticus27:29 Xukuje' mawi c'o jun winak ri c'okom cuya' quesax chuxe' ri c'okonic man c'o ta u to'tajic kas cäcämisax na. 
Leviticus27:30 Ri u lajujil ri u wächinic ri ulew, jacha' xukuje' ri qui wächinic tak ri che', e rech ri Ajawaxel tastal c'u che." 
Leviticus27:31 We c'o jun craj culok' ri u tz'akatil ruc' che ri lajujil, cutoj na ri rajil cuya' chi c'u na jun u ro'il." 
Leviticus27:32 Jun chque ri qui lajujil awaj chque ri wacax o chque ri tzobaj cätas che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che lajujil. 
Leviticus27:33 Man quecha' taj ri e utz na mawi ri man e utz taj, mawi cäq'uex jun che u q'uexwäch jun chic, we c'u ne cäban jun q'uexenic, ri nabe awaj xukuje' ri awaj ri cäya' che u q'uexwäch, quecanaj tastalic man cuya' taj quetor ta chi jumul.”" 
Leviticus27:34 E Are tak takomal wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises chque ri aj israelib, puwi' ri juyub Sinai." 
Numbers1:1 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ucab ic' rech ri ucab junab, aretak nima jun junab chic e belinak ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt, ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' Dios, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers1:2 “Chebiwajilaj conojel ri aj israelib, pa tak achalaxic pa jujun ja winak, che retamaxic ri qui bi' xukuje' ri cajilabal ri achijab" 
Numbers1:3 ruc' tz'akatil ri juwinak chic qui junab cäpakic, ri e utz chic che u banic ch'o'j. Chebitz'ibaj ri qui bi' jas ri qui cholajil ri e banal tak ch'o'j, ruc' ri u to'banic ri Aaron" 
Numbers1:4 xukuje' ri re jun c'amal be re jun ja winak che jujun amak'. 
Numbers1:5 E are' tak qui bi' wa' ri c'amal tak be ri rajawaxic quixto' cumal: Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Ruben: ri Elisur (ri u tat ri Elisur are' ri Sedeur). 
Numbers1:6 Che ri rech ri Simeon: ri Selumiel (ri u tat ri Selumiel are' ri Zurisaday). 
Numbers1:7 Che ri rech ri Juda: ri Naason (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab). 
Numbers1:8 Che ri rech ri Isacar: ri Natanael (ri u tat ri Natanael are' ri Zuar). 
Numbers1:9 Che ri rech ri Zabulon: ri Eliab (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon). 
Numbers1:10 Che ri quech ri camak' ri e u c'ojol ri Jose: ri Elisam (ri u tat ri Elisam are' ri Amihud) che ri rech ri Eprain; xukuje' ri Gamaliel (ri u tat ri Gamaliel are' ri Pedasur) che ri rech ri Manases. 
Numbers1:11 Che ri rech ri Benjamin: ri Abidan (ri u tat ri Abidan are' ri Jedeoniy). 
Numbers1:12 Che ri rech ri Dan: ri Ahiezer (ri u tat ri Ahiezer are' ri Amisaday). 
Numbers1:13 Che ri rech ri Aser: ri Pajiel (ri u tat ri Pajiel are' ri Ocran). 
Numbers1:14 Che ri rech ri Gad: ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Reuel). 
Numbers1:15 Che ri rech ri Neptali: ri Ahir (ri u tat ri Ahir are' ri Enan).” 
Numbers1:16 E are' c'amal tak be wa' quech amak' ri xecha' chquixo'l conojel ri aj israelib ri quequiq'uexwächij ri kas quija'lil. 
Numbers1:17 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ucab ic' re ri junab, ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xebe qui mulij tak we achijab ri' ri e cha'tal rumal ri Dios, ri xukuje' rumal ronojel ri tinimit, xecajilaj c'ut conojel ri aj israelib, xequitz'ibaj pa ri u cholajil tak ri achalaxic xukuje' ri jujun tak ja winak ri qui bi' chquijujunal xukuje' ri cajilabal ri achijab chnimalaj conojel ri c'o chic juwinak qui junab capakic." 
Numbers1:18  
Numbers1:19 Je jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises. We ajilanic ri xban pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aj Sinai. 
Numbers1:20 Aretak c'u xq'uis u banic ri ajilanic pa tak amak' pa tak ija'lil pa jujun ja winak, tz'ibatal chi c'ut ri qui bi' chquijujunal xukuje' ri qui bi' ri achijab chnimalaj conojel ri e oc'owinak chic juwinak (20) qui junab, ri cajilabal ri xelic are wa':" 
Numbers1:21 Che ri ramak' ri Ruben, ri u nabeal ri Israel, xebajilax cawinak wakib mil ruc' job sient (46,500) achijab ri e utz chic che ri ch'o'j." 
Numbers1:22 Che ri ramak' ri Simeon xebajilax cawinak belejlajuj mil ruc' oxib sient (59,300)." 
Numbers1:23  
Numbers1:24 Che ri ramak' ri Gad xebajilax cawinak job mil ruc' wakib sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (45,650)." 
Numbers1:25  
Numbers1:26 Che ri ramak' ri Juda xebajilax oxc'al cajlajuj mil ruc' wakib sient (74,600)." 
Numbers1:27  
Numbers1:28 Che ri ramak' ri Isacar xebajilax cawinak cajlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (54,400)." 
Numbers1:29  
Numbers1:30 Che ri ramak' ri Zabulon xebajilax cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (57,400)." 
Numbers1:31  
Numbers1:32 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Jose xebajilax cawinak mil ruc' job sient (40,500) che ri ramak' ri Eprain xukuje' c'u juwinak cablajuj mil ruc' quieb sient (32,200) che ri ramak' ri Manases." 
Numbers1:33  
Numbers1:34  
Numbers1:35  
Numbers1:36 Che ri ramak' ri Benjamin xebajilax juwinak olajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (35,400)." 
Numbers1:37  
Numbers1:38 Che ri ramak' ri Dan xebajilax oxc'al quieb mil ruc' wukub sient (62,700)." 
Numbers1:39  
Numbers1:40 Che ri ramak' ri Aser xebajilax cawinak jun mil ruc' job sient (41,500)." 
Numbers1:41  
Numbers1:42 Che ri ramak' ri Neptali xebajilax cawinak oxlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (53,400)." 
Numbers1:43  
Numbers1:44 Are wa' ri xel wi ri ajilabal ri xuban ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' ri e cablajuj c'amal tak be aj israelib ri xequiq'uexwächij tak ri camak' xukuje' ri jujun tak ja winak:" 
Numbers1:45 Ri aj israelib ri juwinak chic qui junab capakic, ri e utz chic che ri ch'o'j," 
Numbers1:46 e wakib sient oxib mil ruc' job sient cawinak lajuj (603,550) chnimalaj conojel." 
Numbers1:47 Ri aj levitib man xebajilax ta chquixo'l ri camak' ri e qui mam," 
Numbers1:48 u bim chi c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: 
Numbers1:49 “Aretak chebawajilaj ri aj israelib, mawajilaj ri ramak' ri Levi." 
Numbers1:50 Ri aj levitib rajawaxic e are' quebacojo rech quepatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal rech ri c'ulwächinic, e are' ri quek'axen ri k'ijilabal e rachil tak ri e u chaconisan, xukuje' ronojel ri cajwataj che ri u patanixic. Xukuje' rajawaxic chi chrij ri k'ijilabal quekaj wi." 
Numbers1:51 Aretak c'u cajwataj u k'axexic, e are' queturuwic xukuje' e are' quewocowic aretak quekaj pa tak ri c'olbal. Ronojel winak ri man ya'tal ta chque quekeb che ri k'ijilabal, cac'okox na che cämical." 
Numbers1:52 Ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic quebekaj na caquicholajij na quib jas ri caquiban ri ajch'ojab, chquijujunal chupam ri kas qui c'olbal chuxe' c'ut ri kas retal." 
Numbers1:53 E are' c'u tak ri aj levitib, chrij ri k'ijilabal re ri c'ulwächinic quekaj wi, e are' c'u quechajinic, rech man cäpe ta royowal ri Ajawaxel chquij ri aj israelib.”" 
Numbers1:54 Ri aj israelib ronojel xquibano jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises. 
Numbers2:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Numbers2:2 “Ri aj israelib rajawaxic naj jubik' quebekaj wi chrij ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chquijujunal chquixe' ri kas quetal xukuje' ri quec'utuwic e jachin tak." 
Numbers2:3 Pa ri u elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Juda. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' Juda ri are' c'o ri Naason che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab)," 
Numbers2:4 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e oxc'al cajlajuj mil ruc' wakib sient (74,600) achijab." 
Numbers2:5 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quekaj wi ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Isacar, ri are' c'o ri Natanael che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Natanael are' ri Zuar)," 
Numbers2:6 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak cajlajuj mil quiejeb sient (54,400) achijab." 
Numbers2:7 Xukuje' quekaj ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Zabulon cuc' ri c'o ri Eliab che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon)," 
Numbers2:8 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (57,400) achijab." 
Numbers2:9 Jeri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Juda e ox k'at ajch'ojab, ri c'o jun cajilabal chnimalaj conojel re jun sient jumuch' wakib mil ruc' quiejeb sient (186,400) achijab, ri quenabej na chquiwäch ri aj israelib." 
Numbers2:10 Pa ri u mox elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Ruben. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Ruben ri c'o ri Elisur che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Elisur are' ri Sedeur)," 
Numbers2:11 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak wakib mil ruc' job sient (46,500) achijab." 
Numbers2:12 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quekaj wi na ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Simeon, ri c'o ri Selumiel che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Selumiel are' ri Zurisaday)," 
Numbers2:13 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak belejlajuj mil ruc' oxib sient (59,300) achijab." 
Numbers2:14 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Gad, ri c'o ri Eliasap che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Reuel)," 
Numbers2:15 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak job mil ruc' wakib sient cawinak lajuj (45,650) achijab." 
Numbers2:16 Je c'u ri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ruben e ox k'at ajch'ojab, ri c'o jun cajilabal chnimalaj conojel re jun sient cawinak julajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient cawinak lajuj (151,450) achijab, ri quetaken na pa ri ucab c'olbal." 
Numbers2:17 Ri aj levitib e are' ri quetaken na quecanaj c'u chquixo'l ri caj k'at kajebal, cacuc'aj c'u bic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re ri rikoj ib. Ri cajk'at mulaj caquitakela' na quib, pa ri qui cholajil ri qui kajic chuxe' c'ut ri kas quetal." 
Numbers2:18 Pa ri u kajebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Eprain. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Eprain are' c'amal qui be ri Elisam (ri u tat ri Elisam are' ri Amihud)," 
Numbers2:19 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak mil ruc' job sient (40,500) achijab." 
Numbers2:20 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quec'oji' wi na ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Manases, ri c'o ri Gamaliel che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Gamaliel are' ri Pedasur)," 
Numbers2:21 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e juwinak cablajuj mil ruc' quieb sient (32,200) achijab." 
Numbers2:22 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' ri e are' ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Benjamin, ri c'o ri Abidan che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Abidan are' ri Jedeoniy)," 
Numbers2:23 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e juwinak olajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (35,400) achijab." 
Numbers2:24 Je c'u ri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Eprain e ox k'at ajch'ojab, chnimalaj c'u conojel e jun sient wajxakib mil ruc' jun sient (108,100) achijab, ri quetaken na pa ri urox c'olbal." 
Numbers2:25 Pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Dan. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Dan c'o ri Ahiezer che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Ahiezer are' ri Amisaday)," 
Numbers2:26 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e oxc'al quieb mil ruc' wukub sient (62,700) achijab." 
Numbers2:27 Chquinakaj ri e are' quekaj wi ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Aser, ri c'o ri Pajiel che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Pajiel are' ri Ocran)," 
Numbers2:28 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak jun mil ruc' job sient (41,500) achijab." 
Numbers2:29 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' e are' ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Neptali, ri c'o ri Ahir che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Ahir are' ri Enan)," 
Numbers2:30 ri ajilabal ri xelic e cawinak oxlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (53,400) achijab." 
Numbers2:31 Jeri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Dan e ox k'at ajch'ojab ri e jun sient cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' wakib sient (157,600) achijab chnimalaj conojel, ri quetz'apin qui wi' ri e benak chquij ri quetal.”" 
Numbers2:32 Ri cajilabal ri jujun tak ja aj israelib ri xelic e wakib sient oxib mil ruc' job sient cawinak lajuj (603,550) achijab." 
Numbers2:33 Je c'ut jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, ri aj levitib man xebajilax ta pa ri ajilanic." 
Numbers2:34 Ri aj israelib xquiban ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: chquijujunal xekaj chuxe' ri kas quetal xutakej c'ut chrij ri kas rachalaxic xukuje' cuc' ri kas e rachalaxic. 
Numbers3:1 Pa ri k'ijol aretak ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises puwi' ri juyub Sinai, ri e rija'lil ri Aaron xukuje' ri e re ri Moises e are' tak wa':" 
Numbers3:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron: ri Nadab (ri nabeal), ri Abiu, ri Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar." 
Numbers3:3 Ri quiejeb xetasic xjach c'u ri chac re u cojic ri tabal tok'ob pa qui k'ab," 
Numbers3:4 are c'u ri Nadab rachil ri Abiu, xecäm chuwäch ri Ajawaxel rumal rech c'ut chi pa ri juyub Sinai xquichi'j jun chic k'ak' che. Ri e are' man xec'ojolan taj. Are c'u ri Eleazar rachil ri Itamar xepatanij che cojol tabal tok'ob chuxe' ri rilinic ri Aaron, ri qui tat." 
Numbers3:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers3:6 “Chebasiq'uij ri e aj ramak' ri Levi, chquijacha' c'u quib chuxe' ri u takanic ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Aaron chepatanin c'u che." 
Numbers3:7 Quec'oji' c'u che u patanixic ri Aaron xukuje' ronojel ri tinimit, chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, pa qui k'ab c'u cacanaj wi ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers3:8 Xukuje' quequichajij ri e u chaconisan ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, e c'o c'u che ri qui patanixic ri aj israelib pa conojel ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers3:9 Chebatasa' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, rech kas quecanaj che u patanixic ri Aaron xukuje' tak ri e rija'lil," 
Numbers3:10 chajacha' can ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e rija'lil. We c'o jachin jun cäpatanijic jacha' jun cojol tabal tok'ob ri man are ta u chac, cac'okox na che cämical.”" 
Numbers3:11 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers3:12 “Chquixo'l ri aj israelib xeben cha' wi ri aj levitib, che u q'uexwäch ri nabeal c'ojolaxel re jujun tak ja winak. Ri e are' e ya'tal chwe," 
Numbers3:13 rumal rech chi chwe in ya'tal wi ronojel ala nabeal. Aretak xinban chque ri nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj ejiptib, chi xecämic xeben to'tajisaj can chwe ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib xukuje' ri nabe tak cal ri cawaj. Rumal ri', e wech. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Numbers3:14 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aj Sinai, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers3:15 “Chabana' jun ajilanic chque ri aj levitib pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak xukuje' tak achalaxic, chebatz'ibaj ri qui bi' conojel tak ri achijab re jujun tak qui q'uil capakic.”" 
Numbers3:16 Ri Moises xuban ri ajilanic, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che." 
Numbers3:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Levi e are' ri Jerson, ri Coat xukuje' ri Merar." 
Numbers3:18 Ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, pa ri qui cholajil ri u k'ab rachalaxic, e are' ri Libni xukuje' ri Simeiy." 
Numbers3:19 Ri e rija'lil ri Coat pa ri u cholajil ri u k'ab rachalaxic, e are' ri Amram, Izar, ri Hebron xukuje' ri Uziel." 
Numbers3:20 Ri e rija'lil ri Merar, pa ri qui cholajil ri u k'ab rachalaxic, e are' ri Mali xukuje' ri Musi. Conojel wa' e u k'ab rachalaxic re ri Levi pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak." 
Numbers3:21 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Jerson e are' ri e re ri Libni xukuje' ri Simeiy. 
Numbers3:22 Ri cajilabal ri achijab chnimalaj conojel ri xebajilatajic re jujun qui q'uil cäpakic e wukub mil ruc' job sient (7,500)." 
Numbers3:23 Are wa' ri u k'ab tak achalaxic ri' quecanaj pa ri u kajebal k'ij, chrij ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers3:24 Ri e c'amal qui be ri jujun tak ja winak chque ri e rija'lil re ri Jerson are' ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Lael). 
Numbers3:25 Chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib e are' e ekleninak ri e rilixic ri k'ijilabal, re ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, ri ch'ukubal tak u wi' re tz'um, re ri k'atibal ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios," 
Numbers3:26 chque tak ri k'atibal re ri uwo ja, che ri ch'ukubal ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal re ri uwo ja ri cusutij rij ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xukuje' ri porobal, xukuje' tak ri tanibal ri quebajwatajic." 
Numbers3:27 Ri e u k'ab achalaxic tak rech ri Coat e are' ri aj Amram ri aj Izar ri aj Hebron xukuje' ri Uziel," 
Numbers3:28 are c'u ri cajilabal ri achijab chnimalaj conojel re jujun qui q'uil cäpakic, e wajxakib mil ruc' oxib sient (8,300) we ija'lil tak ri' e c'o che rilixic ri k'ijilabal" 
Numbers3:29 quekaj c'u pa ri u mox ri k'ijilabal. 
Numbers3:30 Ri c'amal qui be tak we u k'ab achalaxic ri' are ri Elizapan, (ri u tat ri Elizapan are' ri Uziel)." 
Numbers3:31 We u k'ab achalaxic tak ri' e are' ri queilin ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, ri mexa, ri tzuc'ulibal, ri e tak porobal, ri tastalicalaj tak jastak ri quebajwataj che ri patanijic re k'ijilanic, ri ch'ukubal xukuje' conojel ri chaconisan ri quebajwatajic." 
Numbers3:32 Ri c'amal qui be ri aj levitib ri nim na u k'ij are' ri Eleazar, pu k'ab c'u jachom wi ri quilixic ri quechajin ri k'ijilabal, (ri u tat ri Eleazar are' ri cojol tabal tok'ob Aaron)." 
Numbers3:33 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Merar e are' ri e aj Mali xukuje' ri e aj Musi. 
Numbers3:34 Ri cajilabal ri rachijab chnimalaj conojel ri xebajalitajic re jujun tak qui q'uil cäpakic, e wakib mil ruc' quieb sient (6,200)." 
Numbers3:35 Ri c'amal u be are' ri Zuriel, quekaj c'u pa ri riquiak'ab ri k'ijilabal, (ri u tat ri Zuriel are' ri Abihail)." 
Numbers3:36 Pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol ri Merar xecanaj wi ri quilixic tak ri tz'alam re ri k'ijilabal, xukuje' tak ri e u balul, ri e tak rakan ri e tak u tac'alibal xukuje' conojel tak ri e u chaconisan," 
Numbers3:37 xukuje' tak ri akan ri quesutin ri uwo ja, e cachil tak ri e u tac'alibal, ri e u ch'ic xukuje' tak ri e u tanibal." 
Numbers3:38 Pa ri elebal k'ij, chuwäch ri k'ijilabal churawäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, quekaj wi ri Moises ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron, e are' c'u quechajin ri k'ijilabal che qui q'uexwäch ri aj israelib. We c'o jachin jun cäpatanijic jacha' jun cojol tabal tok'ob ri man cojol ta tabal tok'ob, cäc'okox che cämical." 
Numbers3:39 Aretak ri Moises rachil ri Aaron xecajilaj ri aj levitib pa ri u cholajil achalaxic, je jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che, ri cajilabal ri achijab re jujun tak qui q'uil cäpakic e juwinak quieb mil (22,000) chi conojel." 
Numbers3:40 “Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: Chebawajilaj ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal, re jujun tak qui q'uil capakic chebatz'ibaj c'ut ri qui bi'." 
Numbers3:41 Che c'u qui q'uexwäch ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal, chebatasa' ri aj levitib chwe. In ri' ri Ajawaxel. Je chabana', che qui q'uexwäch ri nabe tak cal ri cäwaj ri aj israelib chebatasa' chwe ri cawaj ri aj levitib.”" 
Numbers3:42 Ri Moises xerajilaj ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che," 
Numbers3:43 conojel c'ut ri achijab ri xebajilaxic re jujun tak qui q'uil capakic e cawinak quieb mil ruc' quieb sient oxc'al oxlajuj (22,273)." 
Numbers3:44 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers3:45 “Chebac'ama' ri aj levitib che qui q'uexwäch ri e qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri e nabeal, xukuje' ri cäwaj ri aj levitib che qui q'uexwäch ri cäwaj ri aj israelib, e are' tak c'ut ri aj levitib e wech. In ri' ri Ajawaxel Dios." 
Numbers3:46 Are' tak c'ut ri e qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri e nabeal are e q'ui na chquiwäch ri aj levitib; jeri', chi che ri qui toric ri quieb sient oxc'al oxlajuj (273) nabeal tak c'ojolaxelab ri e to'tajinak." 
Numbers3:47 Chatz'onoj jun cuchuj re job rakan sak puak che qui q'uexwäch jujun winak, jas ri pajbalil ri cacoj chupam ri k'ijilabal, are c'u puak wa' re sak puak ri capajan jun niq'uiaj onz," 
Numbers3:48 chajacha' c'ut we puak ri pa u k'ab ri Aaron. Xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol jacha' che qui q'uexwäch ri man c'o ta xeq'uex wächinic.” 
Numbers3:49 Ri Moises xuc'am ri puak ri xya' che qui q'uexwäch ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri xeto'taj canok. 
Numbers3:50 Ri puak ri xuc'amo jun mil ruc' oxib sient oxc'al job (1,365) rakan sak puak, jas ri pajbalil ri cacoj chupam ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers3:51 Xujach c'ut we puak ri' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che." 
Numbers4:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Numbers4:2 “Chabana' jun ajilanic, pa ri qui cholajil tak ri u k'ab achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil jujun tak ja winak, chque ri aj levitib ri e rija'lil ri Coat" 
Numbers4:3 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab, ri xukuje' e utz tak che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers4:4 Ri qui chac ri e rija'lil ri Coat sibalaj tastalic, are ri catakex u bixic:" 
Numbers4:5 Aretak ri tinimit cäwalij che u takexic ri u be, ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol caquesaj na ri ch'ukubal ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri k'ijilabal are c'u cuch'ukubej re ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic." 
Numbers4:6 Queya' c'u na ri je'licalaj tak tz'um puwi' che u ch'ukic, puwi' c'u wa' calic' na jun quem morato re xa jun u wäch, quicoj c'u na ri quieb balul che u telexic bic." 
Numbers4:7 Xukuje' cälic' jun quem morato puwi' ri mexa re ri wächbal, puwi' c'u wa' queya' wi tak ri liq'uilak tak lak, ri paq'uebal, ri kumubal tak ri xaru' tak ri quebajwataj chque tak ri sipanic re ri u wa'l uva, xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri quechi'x amak'el." 
Numbers4:8 Puwi' ronojel wa' cälic' na jun quiäk quem, cach'uk c'u na ruc' jun ch'ukubal que je'lalaj tak tz'um, quebicoj c'u tak ri balul che u telexic bic." 
Numbers4:9 Quic'am c'u jun quem morato quich'uk c'u na ri tzuc'ulibal ruc' wa', ri quetzij wi ri k'ak' e je tak, ri chapbal e je tak, ri e alaj liq'uilak tak weyebal xukuje' e je tak conojel ri chaconisan ri quebajwataj che ri aseit." 
Numbers4:10 Ronojel wa' quebipis chupam jun ch'ukubal que je'lic tak tz'um quiya' c'u puwi' jun ch'atum che' che u telexic bic. 
Numbers4:11 Xukuje' quilic' na jun quem morato puwi' ri porobal re k'an puak, quipis c'u na pa jun ch'ukubal que je'lalaj tak tz'um quebicoj c'u balul che u telexic bic." 
Numbers4:12 Quebimulij c'ut ri chaconisan ri quecoj che ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal quebiya' c'u chupam jun quem morato, quebipis c'u chupam jun ch'ukubal que utzalaj tak tz'um quebic'am c'u na bic puwi' jun ch'atum che'." 
Numbers4:13 Rajawaxic quijosk'ij ri xepo xukuje' ri chaj ri c'o che ri porobal, quich'uk rij ruc' jun quem re morato." 
Numbers4:14 Puwi' quebiya' wi ronojel ri cacoj pa ri patanijic re ri k'ijilanic puwi' ri porobal: ri queya' wi rachak tak k'ak', ri e ch'ipibal tak ti'j, ri e paq'uebal, ri nimak tak lak; conojel c'u ne ri e u chaconisan ri porobal. Che c'u ronojel wa' qui coj na jun ch'ukubal que je'licalaj tak tz'um xukuje' tak ri balul che u telexic bic." 
Numbers4:15 Aretak ri Aaron e rachil tak ri e u c'ojol qui q'uisom chic qui pisic conojel ri tastalicalaj tak jastak, e suc'umatal chi c'ut che u takexic ri qui be, cuya' quepe ri e rija'lil ri Coat che qui telexic bic tak we jastak ri'. Mäquinak c'u jun tastalicalaj jasach ruc' ri qui k'ab, rech man quecäm taj. Conojel c'ut we jastak ri' ri e rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib e are' tak wa' ri rajawaxic quequitelej bic ri e rija'lil ri Coat." 
Numbers4:16 Ri Eleazar (ri u c'ojol ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri Aaron) are carilij ri aseit ri cäya' chquipam tak ri catzij wi ri k'ak', ri k'ol ri c'oc'arisam, ri c'äj tak chque tak ri sipanic ri amak'el che chi'x ta chwe, xukuje' ri aseit. Xukuje' cuchajij na ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chupam, junam xukuje' conojel tak ri e tastalicalaj tak u chaconisan.”" 
Numbers4:17 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Numbers4:18 “Miya' c'olbal chi ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Coat cäsach ta qui wäch chquixo'l ri aj levitib. 
Numbers4:19 Rech man cäc'äjisax ta qui wäch ruc' ri cämical rumal ri qui chapic ri tastalicalaj tak jastak, quibana' ba' ri quinbij: Ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol e are' quebin na chque chquijujunal ri caquiban na xukuje' ri c'utum chuwäch chi cutelej bic." 
Numbers4:20 Jeri' ri e are' man c'o ta jok'otaj queboc ta che qui ca'yexic ri tastalicalaj tak jastak mawi c'u ne quecäm ta na.” 
Numbers4:21 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers4:22 “Chabana' jun ajilanic pa ri qui cholajil tak ri e u k'ab achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak, chque ri rija'lil ri Jerson" 
Numbers4:23 ri e c'o chic juwinak lajuj c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab, ri xukuje' e utz tak che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers4:24 Ri qui chac ri rija'lil ri Jerson are ri cätakex u bixic: 
Numbers4:25 Rajawaxic quequitelej tak bic ri k'atibal re ri k'ijilabal, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, ri ch'ukubal que utzalaj tak tz'um ri queya' puwi', ri k'atibal ri cäcoj che ri u chi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers4:26 ri e k'atibal re ri uwo ja, ri k'atibal re ri oquibal chupam ri uwo ja ri u sutim rij ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri porobal, ri e u colob tak ri quebajwatajic xukuje' ronojel tak ri chaconisan ri quebajwataj che ri qui patanijic xukuje' che ri qui chac." 
Numbers4:27 Ri Aaron e rachil tak ri e u c'ojol e are' quec'amow na qui be ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson pa tak ri chac ri quequiban na xukuje' ri jastak ri quequitelej tak bic. Ix quixjachow pa qui k'ab ri quequibana' na. 
Numbers4:28 Are patanijic wa' ri caquiban na ri e rija'lil ri Jerson ri caquiban na chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chuxe' ri u takanic ri Itamar (ri u tat ri Itamar are' ri Aaron, ri cojol tabal tok'ob)." 
Numbers4:29 Xukuje' chabana' jun ajilanic chque ri e rija'lil ri Merar, pa ri qui cholajil tak ri achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak." 
Numbers4:30 Chebatz'ibaj ri qui bi' conojel ri e c'o chic juwinak lajuj xukuje' c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab, ri u bixic, ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers4:31 Ri qui chac che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib are' ri qui telexic bic tak ri e u tz'alamil ri k'ijilabal, ri e tak balul, ri e tak akan, ri e tak tac'alibal," 
Numbers4:32 ri e akan tak re ri uwo ja ri quesutin rij ri k'ijilabal, e rachil tak ri e u tac'alibal, ch'ic tak xukuje' tak ri tanibal xukuje' ronojel ri cäpatanij che ri chac. At catbin na chque chquijujunal ruc' tz'akatil jachique tak ri jastak ri quequik'axej na." 
Numbers4:33 Are' chac wa', ri cäban pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, ri cacanaj pa qui k'ab ri e achalaxic ri e ija'lil ri Merar ri cabantaj c'ut chuxe' ri u takanic ri Itamar (ri u tat ri Itamar are' ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Aaron).”" 
Numbers4:34 Ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' ri e c'amal tak u be ri tinimit xquiban jun ajilanic, pa ri qui cholajil ri achalaxic xukuje' ri jujun tak ja winak ri e elinak chque ri e rija'lil ri Coat" 
Numbers4:35 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab, ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers4:36 e are tak c'ut ri achijab ri ajilatajinak e quieb mil ruc' wukub sient cawinak lajuj (2,750) chnimalaj conojel." 
Numbers4:37 Are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Coat ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, je jas ri u cholajil ri ajilanic ri xuban ri Moises rachil ri Aaron je jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers4:38 Ri e rija'lil ri Jerson pa ri u cholajil ri u k'ab tak achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak," 
Numbers4:39 ri e c'o chic chupam juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers4:40 e quieb mil ruc' wakib sient juwinak lajuj (2,630)." 
Numbers4:41 E are wa' ri xebajilaxic ri e elinak chque ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, jas ri u cholajil ri ajilanic ri xuban ri Moises rachil ri Aaron rumal ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers4:42 Ri e rija'lil ri Merar, pa ri qui cholajil ri achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak," 
Numbers4:43 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers4:44 e oxib mil ruc' quieb sient (3,200)." 
Numbers4:45 Are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Merar ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, je jas ri ajilanic ri xuban ri Moises rachil ri Aaron je jas ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers4:46 Ri cajilabal ri aj levitib chnimalaj conojel ri xebajilax rumal ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri aj israelib, pa ri qui cholajil tak ri achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil tak ri jujun tak ja winak," 
Numbers4:47 ri e c'o chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz c'u che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers4:48 e wajxakib mil ruc' job sient jumuch' (8,580)." 
Numbers4:49 We ajilanic ri' xbanic jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, xbix c'u chque chquijujunal jachique ri caquiban na xukuje' ri quequitelej tak na bic, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers5:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers5:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi chequesaj bic chquixo'l apachique winak ri c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chque, o ri capujin ri e achijab wi, o e canajinak tz'il u mac u chapic jun cäminak." 
Numbers5:3 Chebesax bic chupam ri kajebal, we e achijab o ixokib. Jeri' man catz'iloj ta ri kajebal, jawije' ri in jekel wi chixo'l.”" 
Numbers5:4 Ri aj israelib xquinimaj ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises xeresaj c'u bic we winak ri' chupam ri tinimit. 
Numbers5:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers5:6 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: Aretak jun achi o jun ixok man jic ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel cuban c'ut jun banoj c'ax che jun winak chic, cuban jun macunic" 
Numbers5:7 rajawaxic c'ut cucoj rib chupam. Cuya' c'u na che ri winak ri rajil u q'uexel ri banoj c'ax, cutoj c'u na ri banoj c'ax, ri rajil ri c'ax ri u banom cuya' c'u na jun u ro'il puwi'." 
Numbers5:8 We c'u ri winak ri cäban wi ri banoj c'ax cäminak chic man c'o ta c'u jun rachalaxic ri' nakaj ta che ri caya' ta wi ri rajil u q'uexel, cacanaj na can wa' che ri Ajawaxel che u to'ic ri cojol tabal tok'ob, c'o chi c'u na ri' ri ama' chij ri rajawaxic cuchi'j na ri cojol tabal tok'ob, che u rikic ri sachbal mac che u josk'ixic ri u mac we winak ri'." 
Numbers5:9 Ronojel c'u cuchuj xukuje' sipanic ri caquitas ri aj israelib che ri Ajawaxel, ri cac'am c'u bic chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cacanaj che ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Numbers5:10 Ronojel c'u ri cätas che ri Ajawaxel cac'am u bic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cäcanaj che ri cojol tabal tok'ob.”" 
Numbers5:11 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers5:12 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: We c'u ne cac'ulmatajic chi c'o jun ixok ri man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil 
Numbers5:13 cunim ta c'u rib ruc' chic jun achi ri ma ta c'u c'o cunabej ri rachajil, pune' ta c'u ne we ixok ri' cuban ri banoj ri cäbanow ta tz'il che, ma ta c'u quel we c'ulmatajic ri' chi sak cac'utaj ta c'u ri c'ulmatajic rumal rech chi man kas ta rikom chupam ri kas u mac." 
Numbers5:14 We c'u ne cuna' achixomanic ri achi, jeri' chi cärachixomaj ri rixokil, chak'om c'ut o cuna' achixomanic ri achi, jeri' chi cärachixomaj ri rixokil, pune' c'u man chak'om." 
Numbers5:15 Pa qui cabichal we quieb c'ulmatajic ri' ri achajilaxel cuc'am c'u bic ri rixokil chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cuya' c'u na jacha' che sipanic che u q'uexwäch ri ixok quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj u c'äjil sebad. Man cuk'ij ta c'u aseit mawi c'oc' k'ol puwi' ri c'äj, jun sipanic c'u wa' u mac rech ri achixomanic, jun sipanic che u ya'ic jun macaj chisak." 
Numbers5:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuban che ri ixok chi cakebic, cutac'aba' c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers5:17 Cuc'am c'u jubik' ri tastalic ja' pa jun lak re t'ac cuyuj c'u ruc' jubik' puc'uc' ulew ri c'o chupam ri k'ijilabal. 
Numbers5:18 Cuban c'u na chi ri ixok cutac'aba' rib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cuquiyiba' ri u wi, cuya' c'u na pa u k'ab ri sipanic ri u mac rech ri achixomanic che u ya'ic jun macaj chisak; ri cojol tabal tok'ob, cäruc'aj c'u ri c'ayilaj ja' pa u k'ab ri cuc'am ulok c'okonic." 
Numbers5:19 Cubij c'u na che ri ixok chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chatchokok, cubij c'u na che: ‘We man a nimon awib ruc' jun achi chic mawi ma ta at uxinak jic ruc' ri awachajil, man a nimon ta c'u awib ruc' achi, jun achi ri cuban ta tz'il chawe, ma ta c'u c'o chac'ulmaj aretak cawuq'uiaj we c'ayilaj ja' ri' ri cuc'am ulok c'okonic." 
Numbers5:20 We c'u man at uxinak ta ma ta jic ruc' ri awachajil, we c'u a nimon awib ruc' jun achi chic a banom ta c'u jun banoj ri cuban ta tz'il chawe," 
Numbers5:21 chubana' ri Ajawaxel chawe chi catux jun c'utbal re c'okotajic chuwäch ri tinimit, chubana' c'ut chi chsipoj ri a pam xukuje' chi xa chattzakanok." 
Numbers5:22 We c'äjisabal wächaj ri' cäpe na pawi' aretak cawuq'uiaj we ja' ri' ri cuc'am ulok c'okonic.’ Are c'u ri ixok cutzelej na u bixic: ‘Je chc'ulmatajok.’ 
Numbers5:23 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cutz'ibaj c'u we c'okonic ri' cuchupisaj c'ut ruc' ri c'ayilaj ja'. 
Numbers5:24 Cuban c'u na chi ri ixok cukumuj re we ja' ri', rech cuyac c'ayil chupam." 
Numbers5:25 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na pa u k'ab ri ixok ri sipanic qui mac quech ri achixomanic rech cuya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cucoj c'ut ri sipanic puwi' ri porobal, c'äte ri'" 
Numbers5:26 cuc'am c'u jumuk' che ri sipanic quech c'äj cuporoj c'u puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic che natanic. Aretak c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob bantajinak chi rumal chi ri ixok uq'uiatajinak chi ri c'ayilaj ja' rumal," 
Numbers5:27 we ri ixok uxinak man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil, we ja' ri' ri cuc'am ulok c'okonic cuyac na c'ayil chupam ri ixok, cuban c'u na chi casipoj ri u pam xa c'u chi tzakanok, are c'u ri ixok cux na jun c'utbal re c'okonic chuwäch ri u tinimit." 
Numbers5:28 We c'u ri ixok man c'o ta u mac man c'o ta cuc'ulmaj na, quec'oji' c'u na ral." 
Numbers5:29 Are pixab wa' che jun ixok aretak man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil, cachixoman c'ut ri rachajil," 
Numbers5:30 o we ne xak cachixoman jun achi che ri rixokil. Ri achajilaxel rajawaxic cutac'aba' ri rixokil chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuban na che ri ixok ri cätakan wi we pixab ri'." 
Numbers5:31 Ri achajilaxel man c'o ta cutaklebej, we c'u c'o u mac ri ixok are' cäkajben na ri' ri c'äjisabal wächaj.”" 
Numbers6:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers6:2 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: We jun achi o jun ixok cuban ri chi'nic che u tasic rib che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel jacha' jun nazarey," 
Numbers6:3 man cuya' ta caruq'uiaj u wa'l uva mawi jun uq'uia' ri k'obisam, mawi ch'amalaj u wa'l uva o uq'uia' tak ri e ch'amarisam, mawi u wa'l uva; mawi cuya' cutij ta uva mawi tak pasa." 
Numbers6:4 Joropa' k'ij cäbeytaj ri u chi'nic man cuya' taj c'o ta jas cutij ta che ri cuya' ri u che'al uva, apachique ta ne." 
Numbers6:5 Mawi cuya' cukopij ta ri u wi', xane' cuya' be che chi caq'uiyic c'ä quetz'akat na ri k'ij ri u k'atom che ri u chi'nic, rajawaxic c'ut cutakej u tasic rib che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers6:6 Pa ri u beytajic we k'ijol ri' mawi cuya' cakeb ruc' jun cäminak," 
Numbers6:7 mawi ne aretak cäcäm ri u tat, ri u nan, jun rachalal achi o ixok, rech man cäcanaj ta tz'il, yo'm c'ut che chi cäcanaj tastalic che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers6:8 Ronojel ri k'ijol ri cäbeytaj ri u chi'nic cäcanaj tastalic che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel Dios. 
Numbers6:9 We c'o jachin jun xak c'ätetal cäcäm pa u xcut cux c'u tz'il ri u wi', ri u tasom che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel, rajawaxic cutolorisaj ri u jolom aretak quel wukub k'ij, ri u bixic, ri k'ij ri c'utum che ri u ch'ajch'ojisaxic rib." 
Numbers6:10 Aretak quebel wajxakib k'ij cuc'am bic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob quieb palomax o quieb tucumux, chuchi' ri oquibal rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers6:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na jun chque jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj ri jun chic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, cuban c'u na ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri sachbal macaj u mac ri macunic ri bantajinak aretak xuchap ri cäminak, pa ri k'ij ri' cutas chi na ri u wi' che ri Ajawaxel," 
Numbers6:12 cuchaplej chi c'u na jun c'ac' k'ijol re tastajem che ri Ajawaxel, ri k'ijol ri oc'owinak man coc ta pa ajilabal, rumal rech chi ri wi'aj ri u tasom xcanaj tz'il. Xukuje' rajawaxic cuc'am bic che ri Ajawaxel jun ama' chij ri c'o chic jun u junab jacha' che' tabal tok'ob u mac ri macunic." 
Numbers6:13 Aretak caq'uis ri k'ijol che ri u tasic rib, ri Nazarey rajawaxic cäbe chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib" 
Numbers6:14 cuchi'j c'u che ri Ajawaxel jun alaj chij re jun u junab ri man c'o ta jun u yab jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic, jun ati't chij re jun u junab ri ma ta c'o jun u yab jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, xukuje' jun ama' chij ri ma ta c'o jun u yab jacha' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib." 
Numbers6:15 Xukuje' rajawaxic cuchi'j jun alaj chicäch caxlanwa ri re utzalaj c'äj ri cojom che qui banic, man cäya' ta ch'am cuc' ri cäyok' aseit cuc'; watz'otz' ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc' chicom aseit, chque quecachilaj c'u tak ri e qui sipanic que c'äj xukuje' ri re u wa'l uva." 
Numbers6:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic," 
Numbers6:17 xukuje' cuchi'j na ri ama' chij jacha' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, cärachilaj ri alaj chicäch caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc', cuban c'ut ri sipanic que c'äj xukuje' ri re u wa'l uva." 
Numbers6:18 Ri aj nazarey cuban na to'l che ri u jolom chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, cuc'am c'u na ri wi'aj ri u tasom, cuq'uiak c'u na pa ri k'ak' ri canicow chuxe' ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib." 
Numbers6:19 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na ri uwo rachak ri ama' chij, ri chak' chic, jun caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc' ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch xukuje' jun watz'otz' ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc', ronojel c'ut cuya' pa u k'ab ri aj nazarey, aretak u banom chi tol che ri u jolom." 
Numbers6:20 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuban na ri nak'atisabal re yanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Ri uwo u c'u'x ri awaj ri cäbanbex ri nak'atisabal che ri yanic xukuje' ri u ch'o a'aj ri cäya' jacha' che cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel, e jastak ri e tastalic ri e rech ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Aretak c'u cabantaj wa', ri aj nazarey cuya' cäruq'uiaj u wa'l uva." 
Numbers6:21 Are' pixab wa' che ri cuban chi'nic che u tasic rib che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel jacha' che aj nazarey, e are tak c'u sipanic wa' ri rajawaxic quebel u ya', man coc ta c'u pa ajilabal apachique jun jasach chic ri cacuin ta che u chi'xic. Rajawaxic cutz'akatisaj ri chi'm, je c'u chubana' wa'.”" 
Numbers6:22 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers6:23 “Chabij che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol chi aretak que qui tewichi'j ri aj israelib je u banic wa' chquibana': 
Numbers6:24 ‘Are' ri Ajawaxel chatutewichi'j xukuje' chatuc'uxlaj," 
Numbers6:25 chatkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chuc'utu' c'ut ri rutzil chawäch;" 
Numbers6:26 chatuca'yej c'ut ri Ajawaxel ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj chuya' c'ut ri jamaril chawe.’ 
Numbers6:27 Jeri' ri e are' caquinataj na ri nu bi' paquiwi' ri aj israelib, quebentewichi'j c'u na.”" 
Numbers7:1 Pa ri k'ij aretak ri Moises xuq'uis u woquic ri k'ijilabal, xutaso ruc' aseit, e rachil conojel ri e u chaconisan ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri e rech ri porobal." 
Numbers7:2 Chanim ri e c'amal tak qui be ri amak', ri e to'baninak che u banic ri ajilanic, xebec." 
Numbers7:3 Xebel qui jacha' c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jacha' che sipanic wakib caret ri' ri ch'ukutal quij xukuje' cablajuj wacax, ri u bixic wa', jun caret cumal quieb c'amal tak be jun wacax c'ut cumal jujun. Ronojel wa' xquiya' chuwäch ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers7:4 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: 
Numbers7:5 “Chebac'ama' tak ri caret chque xukuje' tak ri wacax, chebaya' c'u chque ri aj levitib rech quebe qui coj pa tak ri chac re ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, je jas ri u cholajil ri chac ri caquiban chquijujunal.”" 
Numbers7:6 Ri Moises xebuc'am ri caret xukuje' tak ri wacax, xebujach c'u chquixo'l ri aj levitib." 
Numbers7:7 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Jerson xebuya' quieb caret xukuje' quiejeb wacax, are c'u wa' ri cajwataj chque tak ri qui chac." 
Numbers7:8 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Merar xebuya' quiejeb caret xukuje' wajxakib wacax e are wa' ri quebajwataj che u banic ri qui chac chuxe' ri u takanic ri Itamar (ri u tat ri Itamar are' ri Aaron cojol tabal tok'ob). 
Numbers7:9 Are c'u ri chque ri e rija'lil ri Coat man xebuya' ta caret chque mawi tak wacax, rumal rech chi ri tastalicalaj tak jastak ri quecuc'aj na, rajawaxic puwi' tak qui teleb quecuc'aj wi u bic." 
Numbers7:10 Aretak xtastaj ri porobal ri e c'amal tak qui be ri amak' xequic'am bic tak ri e qui sipanic xequiya' c'u chuwäch ri porobal. 
Numbers7:11 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “K'ij chk'ij jun c'amal u be jun amak' jalanic ri cuc'am ulok ri u sipanic che ri u tasic che ri porobal.” 
Numbers7:12 Pa ri nabe k'ij xuc'am ulok ri Naason (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab, aj ramak' ri Juda)." 
Numbers7:13 Ri u sipanic are jun liq'uilic lak re sak puak ri cäpajan oxib (3) libra ruc' wajxakib (8) onz xukuje' jun nimalaj lak re sak puak ri cäpajan cajlajuj (14) onz (je' jas ri pajbalil aj k'atbal tzij rech ri k'ijilabal), qui cabichal e nojinak che utzalaj c'äj, ri yok'om aseit ruc', che ri sipanic quech tak c'äj;" 
Numbers7:14 c'o chi c'u na jun paq'uebal re k'an puak ri cäpajan quiejeb (4) onz, ri nojisam bic k'ol chupam," 
Numbers7:15 jun alaj ama' wacax, jun ama' chij jun alaj ama' chij re jun u junab che u chi'xic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic," 
Numbers7:16 jun ama' q'uisic' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj," 
Numbers7:17 chuq'uisbalil c'ut, che ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, quieb ama'ib tak wacax, job ama'ib tak chij, job ama'ib tak q'uisic' job alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab. Are wa' ri u sipanic ri Naason (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab)." 
Numbers7:18 Pa ri ucab k'ij ri Natanael (u c'ojol ri Zuar, c'amal u be ri ramak' ri Isacar) xuc'am ulok ri u sipanic, xak c'u junam ri u sipanic ruc' ri xuya' ri Naason."

Numbers7:84 Je c'u ri', aretak xtastaj ri porobal, ri e c'amal tak qui be ri ramak' ri Israel xequichi'j cablajuj liq'uilak tak lak re sak puak, cablajuj nimak tak lak re sak puak xukuje' cablajuj paq'uebal re k'an puak." 
Numbers7:85 Chquijujunal ri liq'uilak tak lak re sak puak quepajan oxib libra ruc' wajxakib onz, chquijujunal c'ut ri nimak tak lak, cajlajuj (14) onz. Chnimalaj ronojel ri sak puak, chque conojel ri liq'uilak tak lak xukuje' chque conojel ri nimak tak lak quepajan oxc'al job (65) libra, je jas ri pajbal aj k'atbal tzij rech ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers7:86 E c'o xukuje' cablajuj paq'uebal re k'an puak ri e nojisam ulok k'ol chquipam, ri quepajan quiejeb (4) onz chquijujunal, je jas ri pajbal aj k'ijilabal. Ri k'an puak ri xcoj che qui banic ri paq'uebal chnimalaj ronojel oxib (3) libra quiejeb (4) onz." 
Numbers7:87 Ri awajib chnimalaj conojel ri quecoj che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic e cablajuj c'ojol ama'ib tak wacax, cablajuj ama'ib tak chij, cablajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, quecachilaj ri e cach tak sipanic re c'äj, cablajuj ama'ib tak q'uisic' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj." 
Numbers7:88 Ri awajib chnimalaj conojel ri quecoj che ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib chi conojel e juwinak quiejeb (24) c'ojol tak wacax, oxc'al ama'ib tak chij, oxc'al ama'ib tak q'uisic' xukuje' oxc'al alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab. E are tak sipanic wa' che ri u banic ri rawas ri porobal, aretak tastajinak chic." 
Numbers7:89 Aretak xoc ri Moises chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che tzijonem ruc' ri Ajawaxel, xuto chi ri Ajawaxel cäch'aw ulok ruc' kas puwi' ri tz'apibal ri c'o puwi' ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, ri c'o chquixo'l ri quieb aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'." 
Numbers8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises. Xubij c'u che: 
Numbers8:2 “Chabij che ri Aaron chi, aretak quebucolomaj tak ri cätzij wi ri kak', chubana' chi che tunun chuwäch ri tzuc'ulibal.”" 
Numbers8:3 Ri Aaron xutz'akatisaj u banic jachique ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, utz qui colonisaxic tak ri cätzij wi ri kak' xubano rech quetunun chuwäch ri tzuc'ulibal." 
Numbers8:4 Jewa' ri u banic ri tzuc'ulibal xbanic; re k'an puak bajibal xk'osibex rech, kas ruc' ri u tiq'uilibal c'ä paquiwi' ri e u cotz'ijal ri Moises xuban ri tzuc'ulibal je jas ri wächbalil ri xc'ut chuwäch rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers8:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises. Xubij c'u che: 
Numbers8:6 “Chebatasa' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj chic aj israelib, chebatasa' c'ut." 
Numbers8:7 Ri nak'atisabal che ri tastajem are' ri quintakej u bixic: At quebachicoj ruc' ri ja' re ch'ajch'obenic chuwi' chi c'u wa' ri e are' caquisocaj na ronojel ri qui ti'jal, cäquich'aj c'u na ri catz'iak; jeri' quecanaj ch'ajch'oj." 
Numbers8:8 Caquic'am c'ut jun c'ojol wacax, xukuje' jubik' che ri c'äj ri utz na, ri cayok' aseit ruc', che u banic ri sipanic re c'äj ri cärachilaj, c'o chi c'u wi na jun c'ojol wacax che ri tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj." 
Numbers8:9 At caban na chi ri aj levitib quenakajin che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib conojel c'ut ri aj israelib chquimulij quib. 
Numbers8:10 C'äte ri' caban c'ut chi ri aj levitib chebopan chnuwäch e are tak c'ut ri aj israelib che quiya' la' tak ri qui k'ab puwi' ri qui jolom. 
Numbers8:11 Ri Aaron cuban na ri nimak'ij chnuwäch in ri nak'atisabal che ri qui jachic ri aj levitib cumal ri aj israelib, jeri' ri aj levitib quetastaj can che ri nu patanixic." 
Numbers8:12 Chwi' chi c'ut ri aj levitib quebe quiya' na ri qui k'ab puwi' ri qui jolom ri c'ojolab tak wacax, jun c'ut chque ri c'ojol tak wacax cachi'x na jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, ri jun chic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che qui josk'ixic ri aj levitib." 
Numbers8:13 Quebacholajij c'u na chuwäch ri Aaron xukuje' chquiwäch ri e u c'ojol, caban c'u na ri nimak'ij ri nak'atisabal che ri qui jachic che qui tasic chwe;" 
Numbers8:14 jewa' ri qui tasic ri aj levitib caban na chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic rech quebux wech. 
Numbers8:15 Cäbantaj c'u na wa', c'äte ri' caquichap patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Rajawaxic quebach'ajch'ojirisaj quebel a jacha' c'u chnuwäch jacha' che jun sipanic ri nim u banic," 
Numbers8:16 rumal rech chi chquixo'l conojel ri aj israelib, ri e are' e tastajinak chwe. In e nu c'amom che qui q'uexwäch conojel ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib," 
Numbers8:17 rumal rech chi e wech conojel ri e qui nabeal ri aj israelib, je xukuje' ri e nabe tak cal ri e cawaj. Aretak xinbano chi xecäm conojel ri e qui nabeal conojel ri aj ejiptib, xebentas c'u can chwe ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib." 
Numbers8:18 Che c'u ri qui q'uexwäch ri e are' xebenc'am ri aj levitib. 
Numbers8:19 In xebencha' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, xebenjach che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol, rech pa ri qui bi' ri aj israelib queboc che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, quirika' c'ut ri sachbal macaj ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel chque ri aj israelib. Jeri' ri aj israelib man rajawaxic ta chque quenakajin che ri k'ijilabal, man c'o ta c'u caquic'ulmaj na.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' ronojel ri tinimit Israel xquitz'akatisaj ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises ri cuban chque ri aj levitib." 
Numbers8:21 Ri aj levitib xquich'ajch'ojirisaj quib xquich'aj c'u ri catz'iak, are c'u ri Aaron xebujach jacha' che sipanic ri nim u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, canimak'isax c'ut ri nak'atisabal che qui josk'ixic." 
Numbers8:22 Chwi c'u ronojel wa', ri aj levitib xebe che qui tz'akatisaxic ri e takom che u banic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chuxe' ri rilinic ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol. Je jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, je xban chque ri aj levitib." 
Numbers8:23 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers8:24 “Ri aj levitib rajawaxic caquichaplej ri qui patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib aretak c'o chic juwinak job qui junab," 
Numbers8:25 caquik'il c'u quib che ri patanijic aretak c'o chic catakwinak lajuj qui junab. 
Numbers8:26 Aretak e oc'owinak tak chic we qui junab ri' cuya' quetoban cuc' tak ri cachil pa tak ri qui patan chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, man c'u quepatanij ta chic jacha' ri qui banom ulok nabe. Je chabana' wa' che u colomaxic ri qui patanijic ri aj levitib.”"
