Numbers9:1 K'axenak chi jun junab e elinak ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt, pa ri nabe ic' re ri ucab junab, ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises pa ri juyub Sinai, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers9:2 “Ri aj israelib rajawaxic cäquiban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem pa ri ajilabal ri k'atom," 
Numbers9:3 ri u bixic, chupam ri cajlajuj rajilabal we ic' ri' aretak cäk'aj k'ij, qui takej c'u u banic je jas ri tz'ibatalic conojel tak ri e u cholajil ri e nu yo'm che u banic ri nimak'ij.”" 
Numbers9:4 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Moises chque ri aj israelib chi chquibana' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem," 
Numbers9:5 je c'u xquiban ri e are' pa ri cajlajuj rajilabal ri ic' ri', aretak xk'ekaric, pa ri chaki'j uwo sak pa ri Sinai, xquiban c'u ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers9:6 E c'o c'u jujun achijab ri e tz'ilobitajinak rumal rech chi xquichap jun cäminak, rumal ri' man xuya' ta xquiban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem pa ri k'ij ri'. Xebe c'u wa' che rilic ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron kas pa ri k'ij ri'," 
Numbers9:7 xquibij c'u che ri Moises: “Uj ka chapom jun cäminak, rumal c'u ri' uj uxinak tz'il. ¿La ma ta c'u lo cäyataj chke chi quel kaya' ri sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel pa ri k'ijol ri k'atom, junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic?”" 
Numbers9:8 Ri Moises xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chiweyej na quinta' na jas ri cubij na ri Ajawaxel chiwij ix.” 
Numbers9:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: 
Numbers9:10 Iwonojel ix xukuje' ri e iwachalaxic rajawaxic quiban na ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic nu k'ij. Ri e uxinak tz'il rumal rech chi qui chapom jun cäminak, o ri naj e benak wi," 
Numbers9:11 caquiban na ri nimak'ij pa ri ucajlajuj rajilabal ri ucab ic', aretak caxk'ekayiric. Rajawaxic quitij ri alaj ama' chij querachilaj c'ayilaj tak k'ayes carachilaj ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'," 
Numbers9:12 c'o c'u mito'tajisaj can che ri rech ri ucab k'ij mawi mak'ajisax jun u bakil. Chibana' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem quitakej c'u qui banic conojel ri e u cholajil ri e nu yo'm. 
Numbers9:13 Jachin c'ut ri cutanaba' u banic ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem ri ch'ajch'oj c'u ne man naj ta c'u benak wi, rajawaxic quesax chquixo'l ri e u winakil. Man xpe ta c'u che u ya'ic ri sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel pa ri k'ijol ri k'atom, cuc'am na ri c'äjisabal wächaj u mac rech ri u mac." 
Numbers9:14 Ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l rajawaxic cäquiban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic nu k'ij je jas ronojel ri cholajil ri nu yo'm. Ri kas e junam nak'atisabal quebajwataj che ri man i winakil ta jacha' xukuje' che ri aj tinimit.” 
Numbers9:15 Pa ri k'ij ri xwocotaj ri k'ijilabal, ri u bixic, ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re ri c'ulwächinic, ri sutz' xch'ukuwic. Xuwi c'u caxk'ekayiric cac'utun u wächbal jun kak' puwi' ri k'ijilabal c'ä cäsakar na." 
Numbers9:16 Je c'u cac'ulmataj wa' amak'el: pa k'ij, ri sutz' cuch'uk ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, are c'u ri chak'ab quilitaj u wächbal jun k'ak'." 
Numbers9:17 Aretak cawalij ri sutz' puwi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, ri aj israelib caquitakej qui be, pa ri c'olbal c'ut jawije' ri quetok'ola wi ri sutz' chila' quebekaj wi." 
Numbers9:18 Aretak cätakan ri Ajawaxel, ri aj israelib caquitakej qui be o quekajic, chila' c'u quecanaj wi joropa' k'ij cäbeytaj ri sutz' puwi' ri k'ijilabal." 
Numbers9:19 We ri sutz' naj cäcanaj puwi' ri k'ijilabal ri aj israelib caquibeytajisaj ri qui binem che u latz'obexic qui wäch pa ri patanijic che ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers9:20 We ri sutz' xa quieb oxib k'ij cacanaj puwi' ri k'ijilabal, rumal jun u takanic ri Ajawaxel caquitakej qui be, xukuje' rumal chi c'u jun takanic quek'ilk'ob na." 
Numbers9:21 C'o jun tak mul ri sutz' xuwi ri chak'ab cacanajic, chusakariquil cawalijic; caquitakej chi c'ut ri qui be. Xak junam pa k'ij ruc' ri chak'ab, aretak cawalij ri sutz', caquitakej ri qui be." 
Numbers9:22 We c'u ri sutz' cäbeytaj quieb k'ij quieb ic' o jun junab, ri aj israelib quecanaj pa ri qui c'olbal man caquitakej ta binem. Xuwi c'u cawalij ri sutz', ri e are' caquitakej qui be." 
Numbers9:23 Rumal c'ut jun u takanic ri Ajawaxel quekajic, rumal chi c'u jun u takanic caquitakej qui be. C'u caquilatz'obisaj na quib che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel jacha' ri takanic ri yo'm rumal ri Moises." 
Numbers10:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers10:2 “Chabana' quieb trompet e sak puak ri e colomam ruc' bajibal, ri quebajwataj chawe che qui mulixic ri winak xukuje' che u ya'ic ri etal che u takexic ri qui be." 
Numbers10:3 Aretak quebok'isax ri quieb trompet, ronojel ri tinimit rajawaxic cumulij na rib chawäch, chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' ri Dios." 
Numbers10:4 Aretak c'u xa jun cok'isaxic, xuwi caquimulij na quib ri e c'amal tak qui be ri amak' ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Numbers10:5 Aretak ri rok'ibal ri trompet quecachilaj cowilaj tak rakoj chi'aj, caquitakej na qui be ri e kajinak pa ri elebal k'ij," 
Numbers10:6 pa ri ucab ok'ibal caquitakej na qui be ri e kajinak pa ri u mox elebal k'ij. Ri cok'ibal tak ri trompet ri e achilatal cumal rakoj tak chi'aj are etal che ri benam. 
Numbers10:7 Ri xak ok'ebal re trompet are etal rech caquimulij quib ri winak. 
Numbers10:8 Ri quebok'isan tak ri trompet e are' ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri e rija'lil ri Aaron. Are jun pixab wa' ri cajeki' canok." 
Numbers10:9 Aretak cawalij ulok jun c'ulel che u banic ch'o'j iwuc' chupam ri kas iwulew quixel c'u na bic che u banic ch'o'j, chebiwok'isaj ri trompet chebirakakej tak i chi'. Jeri' ri in ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, quixnataj na chwe quixinto'tajisaj c'u na pa qui k'ab ri e i c'ulel." 
Numbers10:10 Chebiwok'isaj ri trompet pa tak ri k'ij re quicotemal, jacha' pa tak ri k'ij re nimak'ij o re c'ac' ic', aretak quebichi'j tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib. Jeri' ri in quixnataj na chwe. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.”" 
Numbers10:11 Pa ri juwinak rajilabal ri ucab ic' rech ri ucab junab, xwalij ri sutz' puwi' ri k'ijilabal re ri c'ulwächinic." 
Numbers10:12 Ri aj israelib xquitakej qui be xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai. Ri sutz' xetok'ol chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Moises," 
Numbers10:14 ri xec'amow be e are' ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o chuxe' ri retal ri Juda, ri are' c'o ri Naason che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab)." 
Numbers10:15 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Isacar are' ri Natanael (ri u tat ri Natanael are' ri Zuar). 
Numbers10:16 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Zabulon are' ri Eliab (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon). 
Numbers10:17 Xquitur c'ut ri k'ijilabal, e are' tak c'ut ri e rija'lil ri Jerson xukuje' ri Merar, ri are' quekle'n ri u c'amic bic xquitakej qui be." 
Numbers10:18 E benak chi c'ut ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Ruben, ri are' c'o ri Elisur che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Elisur are' ri Sedeur)." 
Numbers10:19 Ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Simeon are' ri Selumiel (ri u tat ri Selumiel are' ri Zurisaday). 
Numbers10:20 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Gad are' ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Reuel). 
Numbers10:21 E benak chi c'ut ri e rija'lil ri Coat, ri e uc'aninak tak ri tastalicalaj tak chaconisan. Aretak c'u quebopanic, quequirika' chi ri k'ijilabal woctajinak chi apanok." 
Numbers10:22 E are' chi c'u e benak ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Eprain, are' c'u quicojom ri Elisam che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Elisam are' ri Amihud)." 
Numbers10:23 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Manases are' ri Gamaliel (ri u tat ri Gamaliel are' ri Pedasur). 
Numbers10:24 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Benjamin are ri Abidan (Ri u tat ri Abidan are' ri Jedeoniy). 
Numbers10:25 Che ri q'uisbabalil, chquij ri niq'uiaj ajch'ojab chic, xetaken ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Dan, ri are' c'u c'o ri Ahiezer che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Ahiezer are' ri Amisaday)." 
Numbers10:26 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Aser are' c'o ri Pajiel (ri u tat ri Pajiel are' ri Ocran). 
Numbers10:27 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Neptali are' ri Ahir (ri u tat ri Ahir are' ri Enan). 
Numbers10:28 Are cholajil wa' ri caquitakej u banic ri ajch'ojab aj israelib aretak caquimajij ri qui be. 
Numbers10:29 Ri u tat ri Hobab are' ri Reuel aj Madian. C'o jun k'ij ri Moises xubij che ri baluc Hobab: “Ri uj cujbe pa ri ulew ri u chi'm ri Ajawaxel chi cuya' chke. Tasaj kuc' cakaban c'u na utzil chawe, ri Ajawaxel u chi'm chi cuban na utzil che ri Israel.”" 
Numbers10:30 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Hobab che: “Jayi' in are utz na chwe chi quintzelej pa ri wulew, jawije' e c'o wi tak ri e wachalaxic.”" 
Numbers10:31 “Man catbe taj,” xcha' ri Moises. “At kas e aweta'm tak ri c'olbal ri cuya' cäban wi kajem pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cuya' c'ut catajwataj che c'amal ka be." 
Numbers10:32 We catpe kuc', cakaya' na awe ri utzil ri cuya' na ri Ajawaxel chke.”" 
Numbers10:33 Je c'u ri' xebel bic chupam ri u juyub ri Ajawaxel oxib k'ij c'ut xebinic. Ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel re ri c'ulwächinic are ri benak nabe chquiwäch, cätajin cutzucuj jun c'olbal chque ri caban wi uxlanem." 
Numbers10:34 Pa k'ij, xak alicha' quebin jubik', ri u sutz' ri Ajawaxel benak paquiwi'." 
Numbers10:35 Aretak cuchaplej binem ri caxa, ri Moises je cubij wa: “¡Walij la Ajawaxel! ¡Chquijabuj ta quib ri caquiban qui c'ulel che la! ¡Aretak chäca'yex la cumal chebanimaj u bic tak ri itzel quil la cumal!”" 
Numbers10:36 Aretak c'u cätaq'ui' ri caxa je cubij wa' ri Moises: “¡Chatzelej la camic, Ajawaxel, cuc' ri rajch'ojab re Israel! Ri man e ajilatal taj.”" 
Numbers11:1 C'o jun k'ij ri aj israelib xech'ach'at chrij ri Ajawaxel qui mac quech tak ri c'axc'olil ri quequiriko. Aretak xetataj rumal, ri Ajawaxel sibalaj xoyowaric, xutak c'u ulok jun k'ak' ri xunicowisaj rij ri e jekel wi." 
Numbers11:2 Ri tinimit xurak u chi' xutz'onoj to'banic che ri Moises, ri Moises xubochi'j c'ut ri Ajawaxel che wa'. Xchup c'ut ri k'ak'." 
Numbers11:3 Rumal ri' xcoj Taber che u bi' we c'olbal ri', rumal chi chila' xnicow wi ri u k'ak' ri Ajawaxel che qui xibixic." 
Numbers11:4 Chquixo'l ri aj israelib e qui yujum quib ronojel qui wäch winak, ri xak xuwi' caquichomaj ri wa'im. Xquiban c'u quech ri aj israelib cuc', xeboc c'u che ok'ej je c'u xquibij wa': “¡C'o ta banom wi c'o ta ti'j chke che u tijic!" 
Numbers11:5 ¡Quenataj c'u ne ri car chke ri xak quekacochi'j ri quekatij pa Ejipt! Xukuje' quekatij c'ut pepin, melon, alaj seboy, xanacat xukuje' axux." 
Numbers11:6 Are c'u ri camic cätajin cujcäm che wija'l, man c'o ta chic jun jasach quilic xak xuwi ri jaswa'.”" 
Numbers11:7 (Ri jaswa' cäjunamataj ruc' ri u wäch culanto; k'ank'oj rilic jacha' ri cäpe k'ol," 
Numbers11:8 junam c'u u na'il ruc' ri caxlanwa ri cäya' aseit ruc'. Ri winak quebel bic che u molic, cäquiquiej c'ut o caquiwech' pa wech'ebal, caquiban che riquil o caquiban che caxlanwa." 
Numbers11:9 Chak'ab, aretak cakaj ri räxk'ab puwi' ri ulew, cakaj xukuje' ri jaswa'.)" 
Numbers11:10 Ri Moises xuta' u tzijol chi ri aj israelib xukuje' ri cachalaxic quebok' chuchi' tak ri qui cäbal ri lic'om. Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj oyowarinak. Xukuje' c'ut ri Moises xyojtajic," 
Numbers11:11 xubij c'u che ri Ajawaxel: “¿Jasche cäban la c'ax chwe in, in c'u ya' pataninel ech la? ¿Jas ri c'ax ri cäna' la chwij chi yo'm la we tinimit ri' che weklem?" 
Numbers11:12 ¿La xa ta pune' in ta u tat o u nan rech cätz'onoj la chwe chi queben k'alula' bic e jacha' ta ne ac'alab ri c'ä quetu'n cho u c'u'x ri qui nan, c'ä pa ri ulew ri xchi'j la chque ri e qui mam?" 
Numbers11:13 ¿Jawije' ta lo quebenc'ama' wi ti'j che u ya'ic qui ti' we winak ri'? Quebok'ic quepe che u bixic chwe: ‘Chaya' ti'j chke che u tijic.’ 
Numbers11:14 Ri in nu tuquiel man quincuin ta chic quintakej ta u c'amic bic ronojel we tinimit ri'; are jun eka'n ri sibalaj al na chwe in. 
Numbers11:15 We je cätakej la u banic wa' chwe, are utz na chi quesaj la ri nu c'aslemal, we kastzij chi nim quinil wi la. Jeri' quinel na chquixo'l e q'ui tak latz'.”" 
Numbers11:16 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic chwe: “Chebamulij oxc'al lajuj nimak tak tatayib aj israelib, ri e aweta'm qui wäch chi c'o qui takanic chquixo'l ri winak, chebac'ama' c'u ulok chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che eyem c'u chila' awuc'." 
Numbers11:17 In quinkaj na bic quinch'aw c'u na awuc' chila', quinc'am c'u na niq'uiaj ri uxlabal ri c'o awuc' quinya' c'u na chque rech catquito' che u c'amic bic we tinimit ri'. Jeri' man xak ta a tuquiel catc'ojic." 
Numbers11:18 Chataka' c'u ri tinimit chi chuch'ajch'ojisaj rib re chwek, caquitij c'u na ti'j. Xetataj wumal chi quebok'ic caquibij c'ut: ‘¡C'o ta banom wi c'o ta ti'j chke che u tijic! ¡Utz ka banom can nabe pa Ejipt!’ Quenya' c'u na ti'j chque rech caquitijo," 
Numbers11:19 man xa ta c'u jun k'ij o quieb, mawi job o lajuj o juwinak k'ij. Jayi'." 
Numbers11:20 Jun ic' cäbeytaj na u tijic ri ti'j cumal, c'ä quebel na ulok pa tak qui tza'm chuya' c'u muluj c'uxaj chque, rumal rech chi in qui xutum in, ri Ajawaxel, ri in c'o pa qui niq'uiajil, e ok'inak quibim c'ut chnuwäch in: ‘¿Jasche xujel ulok pa Ejipt?’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Xutzelej c'ut u bixic ri Moises: “Ri winak ri e petinak wuc' e wakib sient mil (600,000) achijab ri e tac'al puwi' ri cakan, ¿la cäbij c'u la chi cäya' la ti'j chke chi cakatij ti'j ronojel ri jun ic'?" 
Numbers11:22 ¿Jawije' ta lo e c'o wi chij ri man e ajilatal ta xukuje' wacax ri cuya' taj quepilic ri chubana' ta chque conojel? Pune' ta c'u ne quekaya' ta conojel ri car chque ri e c'o chupam ri plo, man cubana' ta wa' chque.”" 
Numbers11:23 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “¿La are' pa a c'u'x chi sibalaj ch'utin ri nu cuinem? Camic cawila' na we quetz'akatok o jayi' ri nu bim.” 
Numbers11:24 Ri Moises xel bic xbe che u bixic che ri tinimit ri u bim ri Ajawaxel che, xebumulij c'u oxc'al lajuj nimak tak tatayib aj israelib xebucholajij c'u chrij ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios." 
Numbers11:25 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel pa ri sutz' xch'aw c'u ruc' ri Moises; xuc'am c'u niq'uiaj ri uxlabal ri c'o ruc' ri Moises xuya' c'u chque ri oxc'al lajuj nimak tak tatayib. Xak xuwi c'u xjeki' ri uxlabal paquiwi' xquichaplej u k'axexic u tzij ri Dios; man xban ta chi c'u jumul wa'. 
Numbers11:26 Quieb achijab, ri jun Eldad u bi' ri jun chic Medad, ri e are' juch'ob chque ri oxc'al lajuj (70), ri man xebe ta chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xane' xecanaj can chupam ri kajebal. Xukuje' c'u ne ri e are' xkaj ri uxlabal paquiwi' xquichaplej c'u tzijonem e jacha' e k'axal tzij chupam ri kajebal." 
Numbers11:27 Caxiq'uin c'u jun ala xbe che u bixic che ri Moises: “¡Ri Eldad xukuje' ri Medad cätajin caquik'axej tzij chupam ri kajebal!” 
Numbers11:28 Are' c'u ri Josue (u c'ojol ri Nun) ri pa ri u c'ojolal are' to'l rech ri Moises, xubij: “¡Wajaw, Moises, chek'ila' la maquitakej u banic!”" 
Numbers11:29 Are c'u ri Moises xutzelej u bixic che: “¿La catachixoman chwe? ¡C'o ta banom wi chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' ta ri ruxlabal che ronojel ri u tinimit, conojel ta c'ut e k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios!”" 
Numbers11:30 Ri Moises xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib xetzelej chupam ri kajebal. 
Numbers11:31 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi xwalij ulok jun quiakik' puwi' ri plo ri xebuc'am ulok jumulaj sakco'r, ri xebetzak chupam ri kajebal xukuje' tak chrij, ri xquilatz'obej jun k'ij be chrij ri kajebal, ri cäliq'uiq'uic' craj niq'uiaj xc'ab u pimal." 
Numbers11:32 Ronojel ri jun k'ij ri' xukuje' ronojel ri jun ak'ab xukuje' ronojel ri ucab k'ij ri winak xebe qui mulij sakco'r. Ri man nim ta xumulij, xumulij lajuj mulaj sakco'r, ri xequichaki'jarisaj chrij ri kajebal." 
Numbers11:33 C'ä cätajin c'u ne caquiba' ri aj israelib ri qui ti'jal ri sakco'r, aretak xpe ri royowal ri Ajawaxel paquiwi' xuc'äjisaj c'u qui wäch, xuban c'ut chixecäm q'uialaj winak." 
Numbers11:34 Rumal ri' xcoj Kibrot-hataab che u bi' we c'olbal ri', chila' c'u xemuk wi ri xak xuwi caquichomaj wa'im." 
Numbers11:35 Pa Kibrot-hataab xutakej wi bic ri u be ri tinimit c'ä xopan na pa Hazerot, chila' c'u xcanaj wi." 
Numbers12:1 Ri Mariy xukuje' ri Aaron xquichaplej u yok'ic ri Moises, rumal rech chi xc'uli' wa' ruc' jun ixok k'ek'." 
Numbers12:2 Xquibij chi c'ut xukuje': “Ri Ajawaxel man xuwi ta ruc' ri Moises tzijoninak wi, xukuje' tzijoninak kuc'.” Xuta' c'ut ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers12:3 Kas c'u ne kastzij, ri Moises are' ri achi ri sibalaj mach'al na cho ri uwächulew." 
Numbers12:4 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' ri Mariy: “Jix ix iwoxichal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.” Coxichal xebe chla'." 
Numbers12:5 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel chupam jun tzatzalaj sutz' xuya' c'u rib chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios; xusiq'uij c'ut ri Aaron xukuje' ri Mariy, aretak c'ut xequitac'aba' quib," 
Numbers12:6 ri Ajawaxel xubij chque: “Chitatabej wa' ri quinbij chiwe: Aretak c'o jun k'axal tzij chixo'l wumal in, in quink'alajisaj wib chuwäch pa tak c'utwächinic xukuje' quinch'abej pa tak ichic';" 
Numbers12:7 ruc' c'ut ri pataninel wech ri Moises man je ta quiban wa'. Are' ri sibalaj jic na chquiwäch conojel ri e nu pataninelab," 
Numbers12:8 ruc' c'ut ri are' quinch'aw chwinakil xukuje' pa jun ch'abal ri q'uiakalic. We c'u ri are' quinuca'yej chi winakil, ¿jasche qui chajij anima' quixyok'on che?”" 
Numbers12:9 Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj xoyowar cuc', xbe c'ut." 
Numbers12:10 Xuwi c'u xnajtin ri sutz' che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, ri Mariy xnoj che chuwilaj ch'a'c, xsakniquinob ri u tz'umal. Aretak ri Aaron xutzalc'atij rib che rilic ri Mariy, xril c'ut chi nojinak che chuwilaj ch'a'c," 
Numbers12:11 xubij che ri Moises: “Bana' la tok'ob, wajaw, mäc'äjisaj la ka wäch u mac we macaj ri' ri kas ka banom." 
Numbers12:12 Mäya' la c'olbal chi ri are' cäcanaj jacha' jun cäminak ac'al ri maja' quil u wäch, ri quel ulok ruc' jun u tz'umal ri chukchubinak.”" 
Numbers12:13 Are c'u ri Moises xtz'onon che ri Ajawaxel: “Bana' la tok'ob, oh Dios quinbochi'n che la chi chcunaj la.”" 
Numbers12:14 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “We ta ri u tat xuchubej ta chupalaj, quesax na u q'uixbal wukub k'ij. Chiwesaj ba na bic wukub k'ij chrij ri kajebal, c'äte c'u ri' cuya' cätzelej ulok.”" 
Numbers12:15 Rumal c'u ri' ri Mariy xesax na bic wukub k'ij chrij ri kajebal. Man slab ta c'u na ri tinimit chila'. 
Numbers12:16 Xuwi c'u xurik chi rib ri Mariy cuc', xquitakej qui be xebel bic kas pa Hazerot, xebekaj c'ut chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak pa Paran." 
Numbers13:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che': 
Numbers13:2 “Chebataka' bic jujun achijab che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew re Canaan, ri quenya' chque ri aj israelib. Chataka' bic jun achi re jujun amak' ri c'o u takanic.”" 
Numbers13:3 Jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che, ri Moises xebutak bic kas aretak e c'o chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak ri c'o pa Paran. Conojel e achijab ri c'o qui takanic chquixo'l ri aj israelib," 
Numbers13:4 e are' tak c'u wa': ri Samu re ri ramak' ri Ruben (ri u tat ri Samu are' ri Zacur); 
Numbers13:5 ri Sapat re ri ramak' ri Simeon (ri u tat ri Sapat are' ri Hori); 
Numbers13:6 ri Caleb re ri ramak' ri Juda (ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon); 
Numbers13:7 ri Igal re ri ramak' ri Isacar (ri u tat ri Igal are ri Jose); 
Numbers13:8 ri Osey re ri ramak' ri Eprain (ri u tat ri Osey are' ri Nun); 
Numbers13:9 ri Palt re ri ramak' ri Benjamin (ri u tat ri Palt are' ri Rapu); 
Numbers13:10 ri Gadiel re ri ramak' ri Zabulon (ri u tat ri Gadiel are' ri Sod); 
Numbers13:11 ri Gadi, re ri ramak' ri Jose, ri u bixic wa', ri ramak' ri Manases (ri u tat ri Gadi are' ri Susi);" 
Numbers13:12 ri Amiel re ri ramak' ri Dan (ri u tat ri Amiel are' ri Jemal); 
Numbers13:13 ri Setur re ri ramak' ri Aser (ri u tat ri Setur are' ri Micael); 
Numbers13:14 ri Nabi re ri ramak' ri Neptali (ri u tat ri Nabi are' ri Bapsi); 
Numbers13:15 ri Jeuel re ri ramak' ri Gad (ri u tat ri Jeuel are' ri Maqui). 
Numbers13:16 E are' qui bi' wa' ri achijab ri xebutak bic ri Moises che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew. Ri Osey (u c'ojol ri Nun) xuq'uex ri u bi' xucoj c'u Josue che u bi'. 
Numbers13:17 Xebutak c'u bic ri Moises che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew re Canaan, xubij c'u bic chque: “Jix pa ri Negueb chixpakal bic pa ri ulew ri c'o wi c'ächelaj." 
Numbers13:18 Chica'yej c'ut jas u bantajic ri ulew, we e co ri winak ri e jekel chupam o e tukarib we xa e quieb oxib o e q'ui." 
Numbers13:19 Chebiwila' we tak ri qui tinimit xa e cäbal ri lic'om o e co e tiq'uibam, xukuje' we utz ri ulew ri e jekel wi o man utz taj," 
Numbers13:20 awächinel o man wächinel taj, xukuje' we e c'o che' chuwäch o jayi'. Mixe'j iwib; chebic'ama' ulok jun tak qui wächinic ri ulew.” Xc'ulmataj c'u wa' pa ri k'ijol aretak queyac ri nabe tak uva." 
Numbers13:21 Ri achijab xebe che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew xchaptaj bic kas pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin, pa ri u mox k'ab ri relebal k'ij, c'ä pa Rehob, pa ri riquiak'ab ri relebal k'ij, chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Hamat." 
Numbers13:22 Xebocbic pa ri Negueb xebopan c'u pa Hebron. Chila' e jekel wi ri Ahiman, ri Sesay xukuje' ri Talmay, e rija'lil ri Anac. Wukub junab yacom chic ri Hebron aretak xyac ri Zoan pa Ejipt." 
Numbers13:23 Xebopan c'ä pa ri alaj nima' ri c'o pa Escol, xquik'up jun u k'ab juwi' uva ri e c'o tak uva che, e quieb c'u xec'amow ulok xquitzayiba' ulok chrij jun che'. Xukuje' xequich'up crabaj xukuje' higo." 
Numbers13:24 We alaj nima' ri' xquicoj Escol che u bi', rumal ri tzayaj ri xquich'up ri aj israelib chi'." 
Numbers13:25 Aretak etamatajinak chic u wäch ri ulew cumal pa cawinak k'ij," 
Numbers13:26 xetzelej pa Cades, chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Paran. Chila' c'o wi ri Moises, ri Aaron xukuje' conojel ri aj israelib. Xquitzijoj c'u chque ri xequila' ri xequita' xequic'ut c'ut ri u wächinic ri ulew chquiwäch." 
Numbers13:27 Xquibij che ri Moises: “Xujbe pa ri ulew ri xujatak wi bic. Kastzij are jun ulew jawije' ri cäbelel wi ri leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja', e are tak wächinic wa' ri cuya'." 
Numbers13:28 Are c'u ri winak ri e jekel chila' sibalaj e cowilaj tak winak, ri tak tinimit sibalaj e nimak xukuje' sibalaj co qui banic e banom. Man xuwi ta c'u wa', xekil c'u ne ri e rija'lil ri Anac ri jutac'ajalaj achi." 
Numbers13:29 Chupam ri ulew Negueb e jekel wi ri aj amalesib, chupam ri c'ache'laj ulew e jekel wi ri aj hititib, ri aj jebuseyib xukuje' ri aj amoreyib, pa u xcut c'ut ri plo chunakaj ri nima' Jordan e jekel wi ri aj cananeyib.”" 
Numbers13:30 Are c'u ri Caleb xquitz'apij u pa qui chi' ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch ri Moises, xubij c'ut: “¡Cujbe ba' che u ch'äquic we ulew ri'! ¡Uj cujcuin na che u ch'äquic!”" 
Numbers13:31 E are' tak c'ut ri xebe can ruc' xquitzelej u bixic: “¡Jayi', man cujcuinta che qui ch'äquic tak we winak ri'! Ri e are' sibalaj c'o na qui chuk'ab chkawäch uj.”" 
Numbers13:32 Xquichaplej c'u u bixic chque ri aj israelib chi ri ulew ri xebe che retamaxic u wäch sibalaj lawalo. Xecha': “Ri ulew ri xujbe che retamaxic u wäch quebucämisaj tak ri winak ri e jekel chila', conojel c'ut ri achijab ri xekil chila' sibalaj e nimak." 
Numbers13:33 Xekil xukuje' e nimak achijab ri sibalaj nimak cak'an, ri e rija'lil ri Anac. Pa qui xcut c'ut ri e are' cäkana' kib chi uj je ta ne xa sac' je c'u cujquil ri e are' xukuje'.”" 
Numbers14:1 Xquichaplej c'ut u rakic qui chi' ri aj israelib, xebok' c'ut pa ri chak'ab ri'." 
Numbers14:2 Conojel e are' xquichaplej qui bixic lawaloyil chrij ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron. Je xquibij wa': “¡C'o ta banom wi xujcäm ta can pa Ejipt, o waral chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak!" 
Numbers14:3 ¿Jasche xujuc'am ulok ri Ajawaxel chupam we ulew ri'? ¿Rech cujcäm chupam ri ch'o'j, e are' c'u ri kixokil xukuje' tak ri kalc'ual quekaj pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel? ¡Are utz na chke chi chujtzelej pa Ejipt!”" 
Numbers14:4 Xquichaplej u bixic chquixo'l: “¡Kacojo' jun che c'amal ka be chujtzelej c'u pa Ejipt!” 
Numbers14:5 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xquimej quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit," 
Numbers14:6 are c'u ri Josue xukuje' ri Caleb, ri xepe can che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew, xquijis ri catz'iak che u c'utic ri k'oxomal" 
Numbers14:7 xquibij c'u chque conojel ri aj israelib: “¡Ri ulew ri xujbe che retamaxic u wäch man c'o ta c'o wi! 
Numbers14:8 We ri Ajawaxel cutok'obisaj ka wäch, cujuto' na che oquem chupam we ulew ri' cuya' c'u na chke. Are jun ulew ri cäbelel wi ri leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'." 
Numbers14:9 Mixc'ulelan c'u che ri Ajawaxel, mawi mixe'j iwib chquiwäch ri winak re ri ulew ri', rumal rech chi we winak ri' quebux na ka wa; we winak ri' man c'o ta jachin ta queto'wic, are c'u ri uj c'o ri Ajawaxel kuc'. ¡Mixe'j iwib!”" 
Numbers14:10 Pune' c'u xquitatabej wa', ri winak are ta xcaj xequiban ta che abaj. Are c'ut ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chquiwäch ri aj israelib," 
Numbers14:11 xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “¿C'ä jampa' lo cutakej na retzelaxic nu wäch we tinimit ri'? ¿C'ä jampa' lo caquitakej na u queblaxic qui c'u'x chwij, pune' ta c'u ne e nu banom mayibal chquixo'l?" 
Numbers14:12 Quintak na ulok jun cämisanel yabil paquiwi' che qui k'atixic rech man queboc ta che rechbexic we ulew ri'; chawe c'u at quinban c'u na jun tinimit ri nim na xukuje' c'o na u chuk'ab chquiwäch e are'.” 
Numbers14:13 Ri Moises xutzelej u bixic che ri Ajawaxel: “Lal ruc' ri cuinem la, xesaj la ulok pa Ejipt we tinimit ri'. Aretak ri aj Ejipt chquetamaj ri quebana' la," 
Numbers14:14 quequitzijoj na chque ri winak ri e c'o pa Canaan. Xukuje' ri e are' quitom u bixic chi ri lal, Ajawaxel, lal c'o pa u niq'uiajil we tinimit ri', cac'ut c'u ib la chwinakil chquiwäch are c'u ri sutz' la c'o paquiwi', are c'u ri pa k'ij canabej la chquiwäch pa jutac'aj sutz' xukuje' ri chak'ab pa jutac'aj k'ak'." 
Numbers14:15 We quecämisaj la we tinimit jacha' ri u cämisaxic xa jun winak, ri nimak tak tinimit ri queta'm chi nim u k'ij ri tzijol la quequibij na:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘Ri Ajawaxel man xcuin ta che u banic chi we tinimit ri' xoc ta chupam ri ulew ri u banom ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chi cuya' na chque, rumal c'u ri' xebucämisaj chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak.’" 
Numbers14:17 Rumal c'u ri', Ajawaxel, c'utu' la camic ri nimalaj cuinem la, je jas ri chi'nic" 
Numbers14:18 ri banom la. Lal bim la chi man chanim ta coyowar la, chi sibalaj nim ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la chi cäsach la macaj che ri etzelal xukuje' ri man nimanic taj, pune' c'u ne man cäya' ta la can ri ajchak'mac chi ma ta cäc'äjisaj la u wäch, xane' cäc'äjisaj la u wäch ri quetzelal ri tataxelab paquiwi' ri alc'ualaxelab, ri i' takmam, ri xiquin tak mam xukuje' ri e calc'ual ri xiquin tak mam." 
Numbers14:19 Rumal c'u rech chi ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la sibalaj nim, sacha' la u mac we tinimit ri' che ri retzelal ri u banom, e coch'om c'u ya' la ulok kas pa Ejipt c'ä pa we c'olbal ri'.”" 
Numbers14:20 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic: “Utz ri', in quinsach qui mac, je jacha' ri a tz'onon chwe." 
Numbers14:21 Je c'u wa', chi sibalaj kastzij jacha' ri in in c'aslic xukuje' chi ri nu juluwem u nojisam ronojel ri uwächulew," 
Numbers14:22 man c'o ta jun chque ri quilom ri nu juluwem xukuje' tak ri mayibal ri xebenban pa Ejipt xukuje' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, in qui c'ambejem c'u ne q'ui mul pa ri chaki'j uwo sak man quiyo'm ta c'u qui tzij che qui nimaxic tak ri takanic ri e nu yo'm," 
Numbers14:23 man c'o ta jun chque querila' ta na u wäch ri ulew ri xinchi'j chque ri e qui mam. Man c'o ta jun chque ri man nim ta in quilom cäquil ta na u wäch. 
Numbers14:24 Xuwi ri pataninel wech Caleb c'o jun ruxlabal ri jalanic nimaninak c'u chwe ruc' jiquil. Rumal c'u rech wa' ri are' quinya' che chi coc chupam ri ulew ri xbe che retamaxic u wäch, xukuje' ri e rija'lil quejeki' na chila'." 
Numbers14:25 (Ri aj amalesib xukuje' ri aj cananeyib e jekel pa ri lianic.) Are c'u ri ix, chixtzelej pa iwakan chwek chitakej i be pa ri chaki'j uwo sak chusuq'uil ri Quiäk Plo.”" 
Numbers14:26 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Numbers14:27 “¿C'ä jampa' lo ri quintakej na qui coch'ic ri qui ch'ach'atem we itzel tak aj israelib ri'? Xetataj wumal chi itzel quech'aw chwij. 
Numbers14:28 Jät jabij chque chi jewa' quinbij: “In, ri Ajawaxel quinban ri kas chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri nu c'aslemal chi quinbana' na chi chic'ulmaj ix je jas ri nu tom ri i bim." 
Numbers14:29 Conojel ri c'o chic juwinak qui junab ri xtz'ibax qui bi' pa ri ajilanic ri lawalo e ch'awinak chwij, quecäm na, queroki' c'u can chupam we chaki'j uwo sak ri'." 
Numbers14:30 Xuwi coc ri Caleb rachil ri Josue, man c'o ta jun chiwe coc ta na pa ri ulew ri ruc' ronojel wanima' xinchi'j chiwe chi quixinjekeba' wi na." 
Numbers14:31 E are' tak c'ut ri e iwalc'ual, ri xebibij chi quekaj na pa qui k'ab ri e i c'ulel, quebenc'am na u bic pa ri ulew ri iwetzelam u wäch, e are' c'u querikow na ri utzil ri c'o chupam." 
Numbers14:32 Are tak quixcämic quixroki' na canok chupam tak we chaki'j uwo sak ri'," 
Numbers14:33 ri chupam quejeki' wi na ri e calc'ual jacha' aj yuk'ab cawinak junab. Jewa' caquiban na ri e are' che u tojic ri man i jiquil taj, c'ä quixcäm na ri ix iwonojel waral chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Numbers14:34 Ri ix cawinak k'ij xixbeytaj che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew; xukuje' quixbeytaj na cawinak junab che u tojic ri c'äjisabal i wäch: jun junab che jun k'ij. Jeri' quiwetamaj na ri cac'ulmatajic rumal ri nu c'ulelaxic'. 
Numbers14:35 In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic: jewa' ri takalic ri quenbana' che we itzel tinimit ri' ri u walijisam rib chwij. Chupam we chaki'j uwo sak ri' curik wi na ri u sachisaxic u wäch; waral quecäm wi na.”" 
Numbers14:36 E are' tak c'ut ri achijab ri xebutak bic ri Moises che retamaxic u wäch ri ulew ri aretak c'u xetzelej ulok xel quiya' itzel tzijol, xquiban c'ut chi ri winak xec'ulelanic, ri Ajawaxel xuban chque chi xak c'ätetal xecämic." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Chque conojel wa', xuwi ri Josue rachil ri Caleb xec'asi' canok." 
Numbers14:39 Aretak ri Moises xuya' u bixic chque ri aj israelib ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel, conojel sibalaj xebisonic." 
Numbers14:40 Chusakaribal ri ucab k'ij ak'ab xewalijic, xepaki' puwi' ri ulew ri naj elinak ri nojinak che c'ache'laj xquibij c'ut: “¡Uj c'o chic waral! Jo' pa ri c'olbal ri u chi'm ri Ajawaxel chke, kastzij uj macuninak.”" 
Numbers14:41 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “¿Jasche man quebinimaj ta ri e u takanic ri Ajawaxel? ¡Ri qui chomaj u banic xa tzakmajic quel wi na! 
Numbers14:42 Mi takej i be, man c'o ta c'ut ri Ajawaxel iwuc'. Quixch'äctaj na cumal ri e i c'ulel." 
Numbers14:43 Je la' apanok chiwe quixqueyej ri aj amalesib xukuje' ri aj cananeyib, che u banic ch'o'j iwuc' quixquicämisaj c'u na. Rumal c'u rech chi i xutum can ri Ajawaxel, ri are' man c'o ta chic iwuc'.”" 
Numbers14:44 Ri e are', xquicoj c'u na qui chuk'ab, xepaki' puwi' ri ulew ri nojinak che c'ache'laj; mawi c'u ne ri caxa re ri u c'ulwächinic ri Ajawaxel mawi ri Moises xeslabetaj pa ri kajebal." 
Numbers14:45 Xebel c'u ulok ri aj amalesib xukuje' ri aj cananeyib ri e jekel chupam ri ulew ri', xecokataj c'ut ri aj israelib c'ä pa Horm, xech'äcataj c'u cumal." 
Numbers15:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers15:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak chixoc ri ix chupam ri ulew ri quenya' chiwe rech quixjeki' chupam," 
Numbers15:3 qui chi'j c'u jun ama' wacax o jun chij che u poroxic che u ya'ic nu k'ij jacha' che tabal tok'ob o tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri sibalaj cäc'oc'atic, we che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic o jacha' sipanic ri pa ech wi, o rumal jun nimak'ij," 
Numbers15:4 ri cäc'amow ulok ri sipanic rajawaxic cutik quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj coc'alaj c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit ruc'. 
Numbers15:5 Xukuje' chque c'u ri tabal a tok'ob ri e yo'm qui bixic rajawaxic cätik jun litro u wa'l uva che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. 
Numbers15:6 We ri tabal tok'ob are jun ama' chij quetik chi na belejeb libra c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit ruc' jubik'. 
Numbers15:7 Xukuje' jun litro u wa'l uva ruc' jubik', jacha' che sipanic ri sibalaj cäc'oc'at ruxlab chwe in." 
Numbers15:8 We ri tabal tok'ob are jun c'ojol ama' wacax, che u chi'xic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic o jacha' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib, o che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic," 
Numbers15:9 quetik na oxlajuj (13) libra c'äj ri cäyok' quieb litro aseit ruc'," 
Numbers15:10 xukuje' c'u quieb litro u wa'l uva, jacha' che sipanic porom ri sibalaj cäc'oc'at ruxlab chwe in." 
Numbers15:11 Are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic chque jujun ama'ib tak wacax, chque jujun ama'ib tak chij chque jujun alaj mayib tak chij o chque jujun alaj ama'ib tak q'uisic' ri quechi'xic." 
Numbers15:12 Chquijujunal tak ri awaj ri quechi'xic queya' tak ri sipanic ri rajawaxic, je joropa' ri cajilabal ri awaj." 
Numbers15:13 Ronojel aj Israel rajawaxic quebutz'akatisaj conojel tak we cholajil ri' aretak caquiban jun sipanic ri porom ri cac'oc'at ruxlab. 
Numbers15:14 We c'o jun man i winakil taj, pune' xak oc'owel o kas jekel chixo'l, cäraj c'ut cuya' jun sipanic chnuwäch ri porom ri cac'oc'at ruxlab, rajawaxic quebutz'akatisaj tak ri junam cholajil je jas ri qui ban ix." 
Numbers15:15 Xak junam cholajil cajwataj chiwe ix xukuje' chque ri man e i winakil taj; are jun pixab ri cajeki'c, ri caquiban ri tataxelab xukuje' alc'ualaxelab." 
Numbers15:16 Junam pixab xukuje' junam cholajil c'o chiwe ix xukuje' chque ri man i winakil taj.” 
Numbers15:17 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers15:18 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak ix oquinak chic chupam ri ulew jawije' ri quixinc'am wi bic," 
Numbers15:19 qui chaplej c'u u tijic ri trico ri cäwalij chuwäch, rajawaxic quitas jubik' che u chi'xic chwe." 
Numbers15:20 Je c'ut jacha' ri u chi'xic ri nabe jubik' re ri trico ri yak'tajinak, jeri' xukuje' quiban ruc' ri nabe k'or ri qui suc'umaj quiban na jun sipanic chwe re wa." 
Numbers15:21 We sipanic ri' rajawaxic qui ban amak'el. 
Numbers15:22 Aretak rumal man nabenic ta ri ix i yo'm can u banic apachique chque ri jastak ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises. 
Numbers15:23 Kas pa ri nabe k'ij ri cächaptaj bic, rech ri ix xukuje' ri e iwija'lil quebitz'akatisaj, rajawaxic quiban ri cätakex u bixic:" 
Numbers15:24 We ri sachinakil man xnabex ta are' c'u banowinak ronojel ri tinimit, ronojel ri tinimit cuchi'j na jun c'ojol ama' wacax chwe jacha' tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cac'oc'at ruxlab, cärachilaj ri rach tak sipanic que c'äj xukuje' ri re u wa'l uva, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios; qui chi'j chi c'u na jun ama' quisic' chwe jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj." 
Numbers15:25 Ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob cuban ri nimak'ij ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri sachbal macaj che utzil che ronojel ri tinimit Israel, quinsach c'u na qui mac are c'u jun macaj ri man xquinabej ta xquibano xquijäch c'ut ri qui sipanic chnuwäch xukuje' ri qui tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj." 
Numbers15:26 In quinsach na u mac ronojel ri tinimit Israel xukuje' ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l, we ri u mac ri tinimit man xunabej taj." 
Numbers15:27 We ri macaj ri man canabex ta u banic xa jun winak cabanowic cuchi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob che resaxic we macaj ri' jun alaj ati't q'uisic' re jun u junab. 
Numbers15:28 Ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob cuban ri nimak'ij ri nak'atisabal chnuwäch che u rikic ri sachbal mac che u josk'ixic ri macaj ri bantajinak ri man xunabej ta we winak ri', in quinsach c'u na ri u mac." 
Numbers15:29 Xak junam cholajil cajwataj chque ri e i winakil xukuje' chque ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l, we ri macaj ri bantajinak man xnabex ta u banic." 
Numbers15:30 We c'u ne c'o jun winak cunabej aretak camacunic, we aj israel o man aj israel taj, cuyac woyowal. Rumal ri', we winak ri' quesax na chquixo'l ri u winakil." 
Numbers15:31 Xretzelaj c'u u wäch ri nu tzij man xebutz'akatisaj ta c'ut ri e nu takanic; kas xa jumul quesaxic cukajbej c'u na ri retzelal.” 
Numbers15:32 Aretak ri aj israelib e c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xquirik jun achi cätajin cumol si' pa ri k'ij re uxlanibal." 
Numbers15:33 Ri xerikowic xquic'am bic chuwäch ri Moises xukuje' chuwäch ri Aaron, xukuje' chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit," 
Numbers15:34 ri e are' xquichajij c'ut, man chomam ta c'ut jas ri cäban che." 
Numbers15:35 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “We achi ri' rajawaxic cac'okox che cämical, chbuc' che abaj cumal conojel ri aj israelib chrij ri kajebal.”" 
Numbers15:36 Xepe c'ut ri aj israelib xquesaj bic chrij ri kajebal xquibuc' c'u che abaj c'ä xcäm na, je jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers15:37 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers15:38 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: Ri ix xukuje' ri e iwija'lil rajawaxic quequic'am bic t'orot'ak cuc' tak qui chiyichic che ri u chi' ri catz'iak. Ri t'orot'ak rajawaxic e re bätz' morato. 
Numbers15:39 Jeri' aretak ri ix quebiwil ri t'orot'ak, quenataj na chiwe conojel tak ri takomal ri e nu yo'm chiwe quebitz'akatisaj c'u na, man quixc'am ta c'u na bic cumal tak ri kas e i chomanic xukuje' tak i rayinic, ri qui mac quech tak wa' ix jech'obinak chnuwäch." 
Numbers15:40 Jeri' quenataj na conojel tak ri e nu takomal chiwe quebitz'akatisaj c'ut, quixtastaj c'u chwe, ri in qui Dios." 
Numbers15:41 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios ix, ri xixesan ulok pa Ejipt rech quinux i Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.”" 
Numbers16:1 Jun aj levi rija'lil ri Coat, ri Core u bi' (ri u tat ri Core are' ri Izar), e rachil oxib achijab chic e aj ramak' ri Ruben, ri qui bi' Datan xukuje' Abiram (ri qui tat ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram are' ri Eliab), xukuje' ri On (ri u tat ri On are' ri Pelet)," 
Numbers16:2 xquiwalijisaj quib chrij Moises. Chque wa' xequitik chi quib quieb sient cawinak lajuj (250) aj israelib, achijab ri e c'o qui tij pa ri tinimit, ri e are' juch'ob cuc' ri e ya'l tak no'j ri utz qui tzijol." 
Numbers16:3 Conojel c'ut e are' xquimulij quib, xquic'ulelaj ri Moises rachil ri Aaron, xquibij c'u chque: “¡Chubana' wa' ri nimal ri quixc'amowic! Ronojel ri tinimit tastajinak rumal ri Dios, c'o c'ut ri Ajawaxel kuc' konojel. ¿Jasche qui walijisaj iwib ix jacha' k'atal tzij ri nim u banic puwi' ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ri Moises, aretak xuta' wa' xumej rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew," 
Numbers16:5 xubij c'u che ri Core xukuje' chque ri e teren chrij: “Chwek ak'abil ri Ajawaxel cuk'alajisaj na jachin ri rech xukuje' jachin ri u tasom rib che, cacuin c'ut quebujach tak ri sipanic chuwäch. Xuwi cacuinic quebujach tak ri sipanic chuwäch jachin ri cacha' rumal." 
Numbers16:6 Chibana' ri quinbij chiwe: chebic'ama' ulok ri u bukibal ri Core xukuje' tak ri quech ri e rachil," 
Numbers16:7 chebiya' rachak k'ak' chquipam xukuje' c'oc' k'ol chebicholoba' c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chwek. Ri achi ri cacha' rumal ri Ajawaxel, are wa' ri tastajinak che. ¡Chubana' wa' chiwe aj levitib!”" 
Numbers16:8 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Core: “Chinitatabej aj levitib: 
Numbers16:9 ¿La xa man nim ta qui wilo chi ri u Dios ri Israel ix u cha'om ix chuxo'l ri tinimit Israel, chi quixc'oji' c'u chunakaj quixpatanij c'u che qui cojic ri tabal tak tok'ob chupam ri u k'ijilabal ri Ajawaxel chibana' c'ut we patanijic ri' che ri tinimit?" 
Numbers16:10 Ri Ajawaxel rajwam chi ri at xukuje' ri e niq'uiaj chic e u tz'akatil ri awamak', ri aj levitib quec'oji' chunakaj ri are', ¿La c'ä caquirayij c'ut camic ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob?" 
Numbers16:11 Kastzij ri Aaron man c'o ta u banic rech cäban yok'onic chrij; chrij ri Ajawaxel wa' ri at xukuje' ri e awachil qui walijisam wi quib.” 
Numbers16:12 Ri Moises xutak qui siq'uixic ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram (e u c'ojol ri Eliab), ri e are' xquitzelej ulok u bixic: “Man cäkajtaj cujbec." 
Numbers16:13 ¿La xa man nim ta cawilo chi xujawesaj ulok chupam jun ulew ri cabelel wi ri leche xukuje' ri juyubal räx cab jacha' ta ne ri ja', rech caban chke chi cujcäm chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, ri are c'u cawaj catux nimalaj c'amal ka be?" 
Numbers16:14 At man uj a c'amom ta bic chupam jun ulew jawije' cabelel ta wi ri leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja', mawi e a yo'm ta kulew mawi ticbal tak uva chke. ¿La are c'u cawaj chi conojel caquiya' ta quib quec'am bic e jacha' ta ne moyab? Jayi' man cujbe ta che awilic.”" 
Numbers16:15 Sibalaj c'u xoyowar ri Moises xubij c'u che ri Ajawaxel: “¡Mec'amowaj la ri qui sipanic! Ri in man nu tokim ta chque mawi ta ne xa jun bur, mawi c'u ne nu banom ta jun lawaloyil che jun chque.”" 
Numbers16:16 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Core: “Chixpe ta chwek at xukuje' tak ri e awachil, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Ri Aaron xukuje' cac'oji' na chi'." 
Numbers16:17 Chi chquijujunal c'ut chicuc'aj ri qui bukibal chuya' c'u ulok c'oc' k'ol chupam. Ri at xukuje' ri Aaron chiwuc'aj ri i bukibal quebiya' c'u na cuc' ri quieb sient cawinak lajuj, bukibal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Numbers16:18 Chquijujunal c'ut xquic'am ri qui bukibal, xquiya' c'u rachak k'ak' chupam xukuje' c'oc' k'ol xquicholajij c'u quib ruc' ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron, chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers16:19 Ri Core u mulin chi ronojel ri tinimit chquij chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut c'u rib chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit," 
Numbers16:20 are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises rachil ri Aaron: 
Numbers16:21 “¡Chixel chuxo'l we tinimit ri', quebensachisaj c'u u wäch pa jok'otaj!”" 
Numbers16:22 Are c'u ri e are', xquimej quib xquiya' ri qui palaj c'ä cho ri ulew, je xquibij wa': “Oh Dios, lal ri caya' la ri qui c'aslemal conojel ri winak, ¿la cäpe oyowal la che ronojel ri tinimit u mac rech ri u mac xa jun winak?”" 
Numbers16:23 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che ri Moises: 
Numbers16:24 “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib chi chquitasa' quib che ri cäbal ri lic'om jawije' e c'o wi ri Core, ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram.”" 
Numbers16:25 Ri Moises xwalijic, terenetal cumal ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel, xbe c'ut jawije' ri e c'o wi ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram." 
Numbers16:26 Xubij c'u che ri tinimit: “Chitasa' iwib chque tak ri qui cäbal ri lic'om we itzel tak winak ri', c'o jun jasach minak chque ri jastak quech, mac'ulmataj c'u ne chi xukuje' ri ix quixecäm qui mac ri qui mac e are'.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ri tinimit xelic xuya' can ri c'olbal ri c'o wi ri Core, ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram. Ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram e c'o chuchi' ri qui cäbal ri lic'om, e cachil ri quixokil xukuje' tak ri calc'ual." 
Numbers16:28 Ri Moises xutakej u bixic: “Ruc' wa' quinc'ut chiwäch chi are' ri Ajawaxel Dios ri in takowinak che qui banic we jastak tak ri', chi man xak ta c'u pa we wi quebenbano." 
Numbers16:29 We, c'u we winak ri' quebe e cämok jacha' ri qui camic conojel ri achijab, xa man in takom ta ri' rumal ri Ajawaxel;" 
Numbers16:30 we c'u ri Ajawaxel cuban jun jasach ri mawi jumul ilom, cujak ta c'u rib ri ulew e c'asal ta c'ut quebubik' bic ruc' ronojel ri c'o cuc', e c'asal c'ut quekaj chupam ri ulew, qui wetamaj c'u na ix chi e are wa' ri achijab ri quetzelam u wäch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Numbers16:31 Xuwi c'u xutanaba' tzijonem ri Moises, ri ulew xujak rib chquixe'" 
Numbers16:32 xebubik' c'u bic conojel ri achijab ri qui junam quib ruc' ri Core, junam cuc' ri calc'ual xukuje' ronojel ri c'o cuc'." 
Numbers16:33 E c'aslic xetzak bic chupam ri ulew, cuc' conojel tak ri jastak quech, xutz'apij c'u rib ri ulew. Je u sachisaxic qui wäch wa' xban chquixo'l ri aj israelib." 
Numbers16:34 Aretak xetatajic chi caquirak qui chi', conojel ri aj israelib ri xeriktaj chquinakaj xexiq'uinic xebanimajic je xquibij wa': “¡Mujubik' ne bic ri ulew uj xukuje'!”" 
Numbers16:35 Xutak c'u ne bic xukuje' ri Ajawaxel jun k'ak' ri xebucämisaj ri quieb sient cawinak lajuj achijab ri qui chi'm c'oc' k'ol. 
Numbers16:36 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers16:37 “Chataka' ri Eleazar (u c'ojol ri Aaron) chi cheresaj ri bukibal chquixo'l ri jastak ri xec'atic, naj c'u chebuq'uika' wi ri rachak k'ak' ri c'ä e c'o tak chquipam." 
Numbers16:38 Ri e qui bukibal tak we achijab ri e cäminak rumal rech ri mac ri qui banom, e tastajinak canok rumal rech chi xecoj che u ya'ic c'oc' k'ol chnuwäch. Chibana' ba' ripirak tak ch'ich' che we ch'ich' ri', che u ch'ukic rij ri porobal, c'utbal c'u wa' ri chcanaj chque ri aj israelib.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob Elea xebumulij tak ri bukibal re k'an ch'ich' ri xequic'am ulok ri achijab ri xecäm chupam ri c'atic, xuya' takanic chi cheban liq'uilak tak ch'ich' chque che u camulixic u ch'ukic rij ri porobal." 
Numbers16:40 Jun c'utbal wa' chque ri aj israelib chi man c'o ta jun, ri ma ta e are' ri e rija'lil ri Aaron, cuya' cakeb ta ruc' ri porobal che u chi'xic c'oc' k'ol che ri Ajawaxel; we c'u man jewa' cubano, je cuc'ulmaj na jas ri xuc'ulmaj ri Core xukuje' tak ri xerachilaj. Ronojel c'ut xbanic je jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Eleazar rumal ri Moises." 
Numbers16:41 Chucab c'u k'ij, ronojel ri tinimit xuchaplej u yok'ic ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron je c'u xquibij wa': “¡Ix cätajin qui cämisaj ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel Dios!”" 
Numbers16:42 Conojel c'ut caquimululej quib chrij ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron; e are c'ut ri e are' xquiya' ri qui wäch che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri sutz' xuch'uku xuc'ut c'u rib ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers16:43 Are' c'ut ri Moises rachil ri Aaron xebec'ol chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib," 
Numbers16:44 are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: 
Numbers16:45 “¡Chixel chquixo'l we winak ri', xa c'u pa jok'otaj quinsachisaj na qui wäch!” Ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xquimej quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew," 
Numbers16:46 xubij c'ut ri Moises che ri Aaron: “Chac'ama' ulok ri a bukibal, chaya' ri rachak k'ak' chupam ri c'o puwi' ri porobal chaya' c'u c'oc' k'ol chupam; jät c'u chanim jawije' c'o wi ri tinimit chatz'onoj c'u sachbal macaj che ri Dios paquiwi', nicowinak c'ut ri royowal ri Ajawaxel, ri cämisanel yabil chaptajinak.”" 
Numbers16:47 Ri Aaron xubano jachique ri xubij ri Moises che caxiq'uin c'ut xbec jawije' ri u mulin wi rib ri tinimit. Ri cämisanel yabil ri xtak ulok rumal ri Dios cätajin quebucämisaj chic ri winak. Ri Aaron xucoj k'ol xutz'onoj c'u sachbal u mac ri tinimit. 
Numbers16:48 Xuya' c'u rib chquixo'l ri e cäminak chic cuc' ri c'ä e c'aslic, xk'ilk'ob c'u ri cämisanelalaj yabil," 
Numbers16:49 e cäminak chi c'ut cajlajuj mil ruc' wukub sient (14,700) winak, man xeboc ta c'u pa ajilabal ri e cäminak nabe, aretak xuwalijisaj rib ri Core." 
Numbers16:50 Aretak xk'ilk'ob ri cämisanelalaj yabil, ri Aaron xtzelej chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u rikic rib ruc' ri Moises." 
Numbers17:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers17:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi chquijujunal ri c'amal tak be re amak' chequic'ama' ulok jun ch'amiy, o cablajuj ch'amiy chi conojel. At catz'ibaj ri qui bi' chquijujunal che ri qui ch'amiy," 
Numbers17:3 che ri ch'amiy ri rech ri ramak' ri Levi catz'ibaj wi ri u bi' ri Aaron, rajawaxic c'o jun ch'amiy che jun c'amal be re amak'." 
Numbers17:4 Quebaya' chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chuwäch ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic, chila' c'ut ri quinrik wi wib iwuc'." 
Numbers17:5 Quinbana' chi cätux ri u ch'amiy ri nu cha'om, je c'u ri' ri aj israelib man cäquitakej ta chi na i yok'ic chnuwäch in.”" 
Numbers17:6 Ri Moises xubij wa' ri xbix che chque ri aj israelib, chquijujunal c'ut ri c'amal tak be re amak' xquijach jun ch'amiy che, xemulitaj c'u cablajuj ch'amiy chi conojel. Chquixo'l wa' c'o xukuje' ri u ch'amiy ri Aaron." 
Numbers17:7 Ri Moises xebucholajij ri ch'amiy chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re ri c'ulwächinic," 
Numbers17:8 chucab c'u k'ij, aretak xbe pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, xrilo chi ri u ch'amiy ri Aaron, ri rech ri ramak' ri Levi, tuxirinak: e q'uiyinak tak ri u tux, cotz'ijaninak, e c'o c'u tak almendr chuwäch ri e chak'." 
Numbers17:9 Are c'u ri Moises xeresaj ulok conojel ri ch'amiy chuwäch ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut c'u chquiwäch ri aj israelib, aretak e qui nic'om chic, chquijujunal xequimajila' ri qui ch'amiy." 
Numbers17:10 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chatzelej ri u ch'amiy ri Aaron chuwäch ri caxa rech ri c'ulwächinic, chac'olo' c'u chi' jacha' che jun c'utbal che we tinimit ri' ri man cacaj ta ch'abexic. Jeri' caban na chi caquitanaba' na nu yok'ic chawäch, man c'u quecäm ta na.”" 
Numbers17:11 Ri Moises ronojel xubano je jacha' ri xtak wi rumal ri Ajawaxel," 
Numbers17:12 e are' c'u ri aj israelib xquibij che ri Moises: “¡Uj c'o chupam sachinakil! ¡Konojel cujecämok! 
Numbers17:13 Conojel ri quenakajin che ri u k'ijilabal ri Ajawaxel quecämic. ¿La cujecäm ta na lo konojel?” 
Numbers18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “At xukuje' ri e a c'ojol, junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj chi e u tz'akatil ri ramak' ri Levi, ri c'o catux chque, ix quixeklen tak na ri sachinakil ri queban che ri k'ijilabal; xuwi c'u ri at xukuje' ri e a c'ojol quixeklen tak na ri sachinakil ri quebiban ix chquipam tak ri e i patanijic aretak quebicoj ri tabal tok'ob." 
Numbers18:2 Rajawaxic cabano chi ri niq'uiaj e u tz'akatil chic ri ramak' ri Levi, ri c'o catux chque, chatquito' ri at xukuje' ri e a c'ojol che u banic ri patanijic chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re ri c'ulwächinic." 
Numbers18:3 Ri e are' e c'o che ri a patanixic xukuje' che u patanixic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, man c'u quenakajin ta chque tak ri chaconisan rech ri k'ijilabal mawi che ri porobal; we c'u man je caquibano, quecäm na ri e are' xukuje' c'u ri ix." 
Numbers18:4 Rajawaxic catcachilaj che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib xukuje' conojel ri patanijic ri cachil tak quib. Man c'o ta c'u jun apachique winak cäkeb ta iwuc'; 
Numbers18:5 ix ri' ri ix ajekomal che ri u patanixic ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri porobal. Jeri' man cäpe ta chi na woyowal cuc' ri aj israelib. 
Numbers18:6 In xebentas ri e awachalal ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj chi aj israelib che qui ya'ic chiwe, rech quepatanij che qui banic tak ri patan ri queban chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib;" 
Numbers18:7 xak xuwi c'u ri at xukuje' tak ri e a c'ojol cuya' cäquiban ri chac re ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob jas ri rajawaxic u banic puwi' ri porobal o ri queban chrij ri ch'ukubal. We patanijic ri' rajawaxic are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic iwumal, in c'ut in jachowinak ri chac pa i k'ab re ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob we c'o jachin jun capatanijic jacha' cojol tabal tok'ob, ri man cojol tabal tok'ob taj, cac'okox na che cämical.”" 
Numbers18:8 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “Ri sipanic ri queban tak chwe in e nu jachom pa a k'ab. Conojel ri tastalic tak sipanic ri quequiban ri aj israelib chwe, quebenya' chawe xukuje' chque tak ri a c'ojol e are tak c'u wa' ri e ya'tal chiwe; jun nak'atisabal wa' re amak'el." 
Numbers18:9 Chque ri tabal tok'ob ri queporoxic, quecanaj conojel tak ri sipanic quech c'äj chawe, xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob ri rumal macunic o rumal chak'maquil quequichi'j ri aj israelib chwe; conojel we tastalicalaj tak sipanic ri' quecanaj chawe xukuje' chque ri e a c'ojol." 
Numbers18:10 Ronojel achi ri c'o chixo'l cuya' cutij rech chque tak we sipanic ri' pa jun tastalicalaj c'olbal, e tastalic c'ut." 
Numbers18:11 Quebenya' c'u chawe xukuje' chque tak ri a c'ojol ri a mia'l ri c'ä e c'o pa ri awachoch, ri sipanic tak ri nimak qui k'ij ri quequic'am ulok ri aj israelib chwe. Jun pixab wa' ri cäjeki' canok amak'el. Apachique winak re ri aj u pa wachoch ri u ch'ajch'ojirisam rib, cuya' quebutijo." 
Numbers18:12 Xukuje' quebenya' ri nabe tak wächinic ri quequic'am ulok ri aj israelib chwe chujunab: ri aseit ri utz na ri u wa'l uva, xukuje' ri re ri trico." 
Numbers18:13 Junam xukuje' ri nabe tak wächinic ri cuya' ri ulew ri quequichi'j chwe, quecanaj chawe. Apachique winak re ri aj u pa wachoch ri u ch'ajch'ojirisam rib cuya' quebutijo." 
Numbers18:14 Ronojel sipanic ri quequitas ri aj israelib chwe, quecanaj chawe." 
Numbers18:15 Conojel ri nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib o ri nabe tak cal ri awaj, ri chiquichi'j chwe, quebux awech. E are' tak c'ut ri e qui nabeal ri winak xukuje' ri nabe tak cal ri awaj ri e tz'il, catz'onoj jun torobal che qui q'uexwäch." 
Numbers18:16 Ri torobal rajawaxic cätojic jun ic' bantajinak chic ri alanic, job rakan sak puak cätojic je jas ri puak ri cäcoj chupam ri k'ijilabal, ri capajan niq'uiaj onz." 
Numbers18:17 Man caya' ta c'u c'olbal chi quetor ri nabe tak cal ri ati'tab tak wacax, ri e chij tak o q'uisic' tak. Wa' e tastal chwe in, rajawaxic c'ut quebapil na; ri u quiq'uel cajamij na puwi' ri porobal, ri u xepoyil caporoj na jacha' che sipanic ri cac'oc'at ruxlab chwe." 
Numbers18:18 At cuya' catcanaj ruc' ri ti'j, junam xukuje' ri uwo u c'u'x ri awaj, ri are sipanic ri nim u banic, xukuje' ruc' ri uwo rachak aj iquiak'ab." 
Numbers18:19 Ronojel ri cuchuj ri quequitas ri aj israelib chwe, quebenya' chawe, xukuje' chque ri e a c'ojol ri e a mia'l ri c'ä e c'o pa ri awachoch. Jun pixab wa' ri cäjeki' canok amak'el. Jun c'ulwächinic ri man c'o ta u q'uextajic, junalic, ri quinban awuc' xukuje' cuc' tak ri e awija'lil.”" 
Numbers18:20 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “At man cac'oji' ta awulew mawi tak e wechbal pa Israel, jacha' ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic. In ri in awechbal xukuje' quinux awech pa Israel." 
Numbers18:21 Chque ri aj levitib quinya' wi jacha' che quechbal ri lajujil ri rajawaxic caquic'am ulok ri aj israelib ri caquesaj che ri qui ch'äcoj, che u tojic ri patanijic ri caquiban pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers18:22 Ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic man ya'tal ta chque chi quenakajin ta che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, caquiban c'u na jun macaj ri' ri cuc'am na ulok ri cämical paquiwi'." 
Numbers18:23 Ri aj levitib xak xuwi ri e are' ri quepatanij na chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, e are' c'u quekajaben na ri etzelal ri chequibana'. Are jun pixab wa' ri cajeki' na canok. Ri caquiban ri tataxelab xukuje' ri c'ojolaxelab. Ri aj levitib man cac'oji' ta kas culew pa Israel." 
Numbers18:24 Chque e are' e nu yo'm che quechbal ri jun lajujil ri rajawaxic quequichi'j ri aj israelib chwe ri caquesaj che ri u wächinic ri culew. Rumal ri' nu bim chque chi kas man c'o ta culew cac'oji' pa Israel.” 
Numbers18:25 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers18:26 “Chabij chque ri aj levitib chi aretak chequic'am chque ri aj israelib ri u lajujil ri quesan che ri u wächinic ri culew ri e nu yo'm chque che quechbal, rajawaxic cäquesaj jun lajujil che u chi'xic chwe in." 
Numbers18:27 Are wa' ri qui cuchuj, junam ruc' ri cuchuj ri caquiban ri aj israelib aretak caquiya' jubik' re ri qui trico xukuje' ri re ri u wa'l qui uva." 
Numbers18:28 Jeri', che we lajujil ri' ri quequiya' ri aj israelib chque, ri aj levitib caquitas ri qui cuchuj ri caquiya' che ri Ajawaxel caquiya' c'u na che ri cojol tabal tok'ob Aaron." 
Numbers18:29 Che ronojel ri chya' chiwe, rajawaxic quitas jubik' jacha' che cuchuj chwe in; are c'u ri quitas chwe rajawaxic are' ri utz na." 
Numbers18:30 Xukuje' chabij chque: ‘Aretak c'ut tastajinak chic iwumal ri quiya' na chwe, ri niq'uiaj chic cuya' qui chomaj chi jacha' i trico xukuje' u wa'l i uva," 
Numbers18:31 cuya' c'ut quitijo ix xukuje' ri e iwachalal pa apachique c'olbal. Are ri tojbal iwech wa' che ri patanijic ri quiban chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. 
Numbers18:32 Aretak c'ut tastajinak chic iwumal ri utz na ri quiya' na chwe, cuya' qui tij ri niq'uiaj chic man c'o ta mac qui kajbej; we je qui ban wa' man quebiwawasij ta ri e qui sipanic tak ri aj israelib, man c'u quixc'okox ta che cämical.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron, xubij c'u chque:" 
Numbers19:2 “In, ri Ajawaxel, quinya' we takanic ri': Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi chiquic'ama' ulok chawe jun ati't wacax ri quiäkcoj rismal, ri ma ta c'o jun u yab ri xukuje' mawi jumul cojom ta eka'bal chrij u wi'." 
Numbers19:3 Ri ix quijach na pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob Eleazar, are c'u ri are' cäresaj na bic chrij ri kajebal cuya' c'u na takanic chi cäpil chuwäch." 
Numbers19:4 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob Elea cuc'am na ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab jubik' quic', cuchicoj c'u na ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab wukub mul che ri u suq'uil ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers19:5 Cäporoxtax c'ut ri ati't wacax chuwäch, caporox c'u xukuje' ri tz'um, ri ti'j, ri quic' xukuje' ri mes." 
Numbers19:6 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am che' re chacalte', jun alaj u k'ab k'ayes re hisop xukuje' quiäk quem, cuq'uiak c'u ronojel chupam ri k'ak' ri caporox wi ri ati't wacax;" 
Numbers19:7 cuch'aj c'u ri ratz'iak cuch'aj c'u rib xukuje' ruc' ja', c'äte ri' cuya' coc chupam ri kajebal, pune' c'u cäcanaj tz'il c'ä benak k'ij jas ri nak'atisabal." 
Numbers19:8 Are' xukuje' c'u ri achi ri xporon ri ati't wacax, cuch'aj ri ratz'iak cuch'aj c'u rib xukuje' ruc' ja', cacanaj c'u na tz'il c'ä benak k'ij jas ri nak'atisabal." 
Numbers19:9 Jun achi chic, ri ch'ajch'oj jas ri nak'atisabal, cujoc ri u chajil ri ati't wacax cuya' c'u pa jun c'olbal ch'ajch'oj chrij ri kajebal. We chaj ri' cajwataj na che ri tinimit Israel che u suc'umaxic ri ja' re ri ch'ajch'ojirisanic. Ronojel wa' jun tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj." 
Numbers19:10 Ri xjocow ri chaj, cuch'aj na ri ratz'iak, cacanaj c'u na can tz'il c'ä benak k'ij jas ri nak'atisabal. Jun pixab wa' ri man cayubquentaj, ri cäjeki' amak'el iwuc' ix ri sibalaj c'o u patan chiwe ix xukuje' chque ri aj israelib jacha' chque ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l." 
Numbers19:11 Ri cänakow apachique winak ri cäminak cacanoj tz'il wukub k'ij. 
Numbers19:12 Churox k'ij xukuje' chuwuk k'ij rajawaxic cuch'ajch'ojirisaj rib ruc' ri ja' re ch'ajch'ojirisabal cäcano c'u na can ch'ajch'oj. 
Numbers19:13 We c'o jachin jun cuchap jun winak cäminak man c'u cuch'ajch'ojirisaj ta rib, cärawasij ri u k'ijilabal ri Ajawaxel, rumal c'u ri', rajawaxic quesax chquixo'l ri aj israelib. Man c'u chicom ta ruc' ri ja' re ch'ajch'ojirisanic, cäriktajic chi c'o pa ri tz'ilol." 
Numbers19:14 Ri cac'ulmatajic aretak c'o jachin cäcäm chupam jun cäbal ri lic'om, e are tak wa': conojel ri queriktaj chupam ri cäbal xukuje' conojel ri queboc chupam, quecanaj tz'il wukub k'ij." 
Numbers19:15 Conojel ri bo'j ri tek'etoj qui wi', o ri man kas ta utz qui tz'apixic banom, xukuje' quecanaj tz'il." 
Numbers19:16 Pa apachique c'olbal, apachin ta ne ri cuchap jun cäminak winak ri xa xcämisaxic o xak xcämic, o e u bakil cäminak, o ri mukutal wi cäminak, cäcanaj wukub k'ij tz'il." 
Numbers19:17 Aretak e c'o we tz'ilol ri', cac'am jubik' ri u chajil ri ati't wacax ri cäpil u mac rech ri macaj, cäya' c'u chupam jun lak rech cäya' sakalaj ja' puwi'." 
Numbers19:18 Jun achi c'ut ri ch'ajch'oj, cuc'am na jun alaj u k'ab k'ayes re hisop, curub na chupam ri ja' cuchicoj c'u na puwi' ri cäbal ri lic'om paquiwi' ri jastak xukuje' paquiwi' ri winak ri e c'o chila', xukuje' ri xebuchap ri bak o ri winak ri xcämisaxic o xak xcämic, o ri mukutal wi cäminak." 
Numbers19:19 Ri achi ri josk'im jas ri nak'atisabal are' chchicom ri tz'ilotajinak pa tak ri urox k'ij xukuje' pa ri uwuk. Pa ri uwuk k'ij u ch'ajch'ojisam chic. Are c'u ri winak ri tz'il canok cuch'aj ri ratz'iak xukuje' cuch'aj na rib ruc' ja', cäcanaj c'u na can tz'il c'ä benak k'ij." 
Numbers19:20 We jun winak ri kas tz'ilobinak ri man cujosk'ij ta rib rajawaxic quesax chuxo'l ri u tinimit, cärawasij c'ut ri u k'ijilabal ri Ajawaxel. Man chicom ta c'ut ruc' ri ja' re josk'ibal ib, u takem jekelem chupam ri tz'ilol." 
Numbers19:21 Are jun pixab wa' ri man cayubquen taj. Jachin ri cuchicoj jun chic ruc' ri ja' re ch'ajch'ojirisanic, rajawaxic cuch'aj ri ratz'iak. Ri cächapow ri ja' re ri ch'ajch'ojirisanic, cacanoj can tz'il c'ä benak k'ij." 
Numbers19:22 Ronojel ri cächap rumal jun winak tz'il, cäcanaj can tz'il; jachin c'ut ri cächapow jun winak tz'il, xukuje' cäcanaj can tz'il c'ä benak k'ij.”" 
Numbers20:1 Pa ri nabe ic' re ri junab, ri aj israelib xebopan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin, naj c'u xebeytaj na pa Cades. Chila' xcäm wi ri Mariy, chila' c'u xmuk wi." 
Numbers20:2 Rumal c'u rech chi man c'o ta qui ja', ri winak, conojel xquimulij quib che u c'ulelaxic ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron," 
Numbers20:3 xquibij che ri Moises: “¡C'o ta banom wi xujcäm ta junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic ri xuban ri Ajawaxel chi xecämic! 
Numbers20:4 ¿Jasche xic'am ulok ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel chupam we chaki'j uwo sak ri'? ¿La are ta lo quiwaj chi cujcäm ta uj xukuje' tak ri kawaj? 
Numbers20:5 ¿Jasche xujiwesaj ulok pa Ejipt xujic'am c'u ulok chupam we c'olbal ri' ri xibibal? ¡Waral man cuya' taj c'o ta catiquic; man e c'o ta qui che'al higo, mawi qui c'amal tak uva, mawi tak crabaj; mawi ta ne ja' ri cakuq'uiaj taj!”" 
Numbers20:6 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xenajtin che ri tinimit xebe chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib, chila' c'u xquimej wi quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew. Are c'u ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chquiwäch," 
Numbers20:7 xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: 
Numbers20:8 “Chac'ama' ri ch'amiy, ruc' c'ut ri u to'banic ri Aaron ri awachalal, chebamulij ri winak. Aninak, chquiwäch conojel, chataka' ri nimalaj abaj chi chuya' i ja', cawil c'u na chi che ri nimalaj abaj capichc'on wi na ulok ri ja', rech cacuq'uiaj ri winak xukuje' tak ri cawaj.”" 
Numbers20:9 Ri Moises xuc'am ri ch'amiy ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, je jas ri takanic ri xya' che rumal;" 
Numbers20:10 ri Moises rachil ri Aaron xequimulix taj ri winak chuwäch ri nimalaj abaj, xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Chixtabenok, ri man ch'abexic ta quiwaj: ¿La cäkesaj ta na lo ja' chupam we nimalaj abaj ri' che u ya'ic chiwe ri qui wuq'uiaj?”" 
Numbers20:11 Cätajin cubij wa', ri Moises xuwalijisaj ri u k'ab camul c'ut xuk'osij ri ch'amiy che ri nimalaj abaj xtixtob c'u ulok ri ja'. Jeri' ri winak xukuje' tak ri awaj xeboc che uq'uianic." 
Numbers20:12 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Aaron: “Rumal c'u rech chi man xijiquiba' ta i c'u'x chwij mawi xiya' ta nu k'ij chquiwäch ri aj israelib, man quixoc ta na cuc' tak we winak ri' chupam ri ulew ri nu yo'm chque.”" 
Numbers20:13 Are bulbux ja' wa' re ch'ach'atem, jawije' ri xech'ach'at wi ri aj israelib chrij ri Ajawaxel ri are' c'ut xuc'ut ri u tastajic chquiwäch." 
Numbers20:14 Kas pa Cades, ri Moises xebutak bic jujun tako'n che ri ajawinel re Edom, che u bixic che: “Ri e awachalal aj israelib caquitak u bixic chawe: ‘At kas awetamam tak ri e u q'ueyowal tak ri uj oc'owinak wi." 
Numbers20:15 Ri e ka mam xebe pa Ejipt sibalaj c'u naj xebeytaj chila', e are' c'ut ri aj ejiptib xquiban c'ax chke uj, xukuje' chque ri e ka mam;" 
Numbers20:16 xkata' c'ut to'banic che ri Ajawaxel, ri are' xutatabej c'ut ri ka rakoj tak chi'aj xutak c'ut jun tako'n ri xujresaj ulok pa Ejipt. Uj c'o c'u camic chupam ri tinimit re Cades, uj c'o c'ut chunakaj ri u c'ulbatil ri awulew." 
Numbers20:17 Cäkatz'onoj chawe chi chaya' c'olbal chke chi cujoc'ow chupam ri awulew. Man cujoc'ow ta paquiwi' tak ri e a tico'n mawi paquiwi' tak ri e a uva, mawi quekakumuj ri ja' ri c'o chquipam tak ri e a c'ua'. Are' cäkatakej na ri nim be, man c'u cujel ta na chupam c'ä cujoc'ow na chupam ri awulew.’ ”" 
Numbers20:18 Are c'u ri ajawinel re Edom xutzelej u bixic chque: “¡Man quixoc'ow ta chupam ri wulew, we c'u man quibano jas ri quinbij chiwe quinel na bic che i c'ulaxic e wachil ri wajch'ojab!”" 
Numbers20:19 Ri aj israelib xquibij ri u cholajil che: “Are cakatakej na ri nim be, we c'u ne ri uj o ri e kawaj quekatija' ta kech ri ja' ri e c'o chupam ri i c'ua' cakatoj na pa a k'ab. Xuwi c'u ri cäkaj chi cujbinic cojoc'ow chupam ri awulew.”" 
Numbers20:20 Are' c'u ri ajawinel re Edom xutzelej u bixic chque: “¡Man c'u quixoc'ow ta na!” Xel c'u ulok che qui c'ulaxic ri aj israelib achilatal rumal jumulaj cowilaj tak ajch'ojab ri e cuc'am utzalaj tak qui ch'ojibal," 
Numbers20:21 xquicoj c'u qui chuk'ab che qui k'atixic rech man queboc'ow ta chupam ri culew. E are' c'ut ri aj israelib xquitzucuj chic jun qui be. 
Numbers20:22 Ronojel ri tinimit Israel xel bic pa Cades xbe che u suq'uil ri juyub Hor. 
Numbers20:23 Chila' chunakaj ri u c'ulbatil ri Edom, ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Aaron:" 
Numbers20:24 “Ri Aaron quecämok, man coc ta c'u na chupam ri ulew ri nu yo'm chque ri aj israelib, chunakaj c'ut ri bulbux ja' re ch'ach'atem ri ix man xebinimaj ta ri e nu takanic." 
Numbers20:25 At, Moises, chac'ama' bic ri Aaron xukuje' ri Eleazar (ri u c'ojol) puwi' ri juyub Hor;" 
Numbers20:26 chila' cawesaj wi na ri atz'iak re ri cojol tabal tok'ob chrij ri Aaron cacoj c'u na chrij ri Eleazar. Ri Aaron cäcäm na chila'.” 
Numbers20:27 Ri Moises xubano jachique ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che. Chquiwäch conojel ri aj israelib, xepaki' puwi' ri juyub Hor," 
Numbers20:28 ri Moises chla' c'u xeresaj wi ri ratz'iak ri Aaron xucoj c'u chrij ri Eleazar. Kas chila' puwi' ri juyub, xcäm wi ri Aaron; ri Moises rachil ri Eleazar xekaj ulok puwi' ri juyub." 
Numbers20:29 Aretak xoc pa qui jolom ri aj israelib chi xcäm ri Aaron juwinak lajuj k'ij xcok'ej. 
Numbers21:1 Aretak ri ajawinel aj cananey re ri tinimit Arad ri jekel pa ri Negueb, xoc pa u jolom chi ri aj israelib e petinak pa ri be re Atarim, xel bic che u banic ch'o'j cuc' xcuin c'u che qui chapic jujun chque." 
Numbers21:2 E are' c'ut ri aj israelib xquichi'j che ri Ajawaxel chi, we ri are' quebuto' che u ch'äquic we ulew ri', ri e are' kas caquichupisaj na qui wäch conojel tak ri qui tinimit." 
Numbers21:3 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' chque ri aj israelib jachique ri qui tz'onon che, xebuto' che qui ch'äquic ri aj cananeyib, e are' c'ut ri aj israelib kas xequisachisaj qui wäch conojel ri aj cananeyib chnimalaj conojel, xukuje' c'u xquiban chque tak q'ui tinimit, rumal c'u rech wa' xquicoj Horm che u bi' we c'olbal ri'." 
Numbers21:4 Ri aj israelib xebel bic chupam ri juyub Hor ri c'o chusuq'uil ri Quiäk Cho, caquiya' jucot rech man quebe oc'ow ta chupam ri rulew ri Edom. Pa ri be, ri winak xech'ibatajic" 
Numbers21:5 xquichaplej c'u u c'ulelaxic ri Dios xukuje' ri Moises. Je c'u xquibij wa': “¿Jasche xujiwesaj ulok pa Ejipt, rech quiban chke chi cujcäm chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak? Mawi ta ne ka ja' c'olic mawi ka wa. ¡Q'uistajinak chic ka c'u'x che we wa ri' ri xak capatzowic!”" 
Numbers21:6 Ri Ajawaxel xebutak ulok cumätz chquij ri quecämisanic rech quecatz cumal, e q'ui c'ut ri aj israelib xecämic." 
Numbers21:7 Xebe c'ut jawije' c'o wi ri Moises xquibij c'u che: “¡Uj macuninak aretak xkac'ulelaj ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri at! ¡Chatz'onoj che ri Ajawaxel chi chebunajtajisaj tak ri cumätz chke!” Ri Moises xutz'onoj che ri Ajawaxel chi chusacha' qui mac ri aj israelib," 
Numbers21:8 xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che: “Chabana' jun cumätz ri junam cuc' wa', chaya' c'u puwi' jun rakan etal. Aretak c'o jachin cäcatz rumal jun cumätz, chca'y che ri cumätz ri c'o puwi' ri rakan etal, cäto'taj c'u na.”" 
Numbers21:9 Ri Moises xuban jun cumätz re k'an ch'ich' xuya' c'u puwi' ri rakan etal, aretak c'u c'o jachin cäcatz rumal jun cumätz, caca'y c'u che ri cumätz re k'an ch'ich' cäto'taj c'ut." 
Numbers21:10 Ri aj israelib xquitakej ri qui be xebekaj c'u pa Obot. 
Numbers21:11 Xebel bic pa Obot xebekaj c'u pa Ije-abarim, chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri rulew ri Moab." 
Numbers21:12 Xebel bic chila' xetakenic xebekaj chuchi' ri alaj nima' Zered. 
Numbers21:13 Xetakextan chi c'ut xebekaj ch'käp che ri nima' Arnon. We nima' ri' cärik taj chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak ri culic' ulok rib che ri culew ri aj amoreyib, cajwataj c'u che c'ulbat che ri rulew ri Moab xukuje' ri quech ri aj amoreyib." 
Numbers21:14 Are wa' ri cubij ri wuj quech ri e u ch'o'j ri Ajawaxel: “Chujk'ax chupam ri Baheb, chupam ri ulew re Sup, pa tak ri alaj tak nima' xukuje' chupam ri Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 xukuje' chquichi' ri alaj tak nima' ri caquilic' quib c'ä pa ri ulew re Ar copan c'u c'ä ruc' ri u c'ulbatil ri Moab.” 
Numbers21:16 Xquiya' can ri nima' Arnon xetaken c'ä pa Beer. Chila' c'o wi ri c'ua' ri xubij wi ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Chamulij ri tinimit quinya' c'u na qui ja'.” 
Numbers21:17 Pa we k'ijol ri' aretak ri aj israelib xebixonic: “¡Cätixix ulok ri ja' pa ri c'ua'! ¡Chixbixon che ri c'ua'! 
Numbers21:18 ¡Ri e c'amal tak be xquicoj ri qui che' re takanic che u c'otic, ri nimak qui k'ij pa ri tinimit xquicoj ri qui ch'amiy che u c'otic!” Xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak xetaken ri aj israelib c'ä pa Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 xebel pa Matana xebopan pa Nahaliel, xebel pa Nahaliel xebopan pa Bamot," 
Numbers21:20 xubel pa Bamot xujekaj chupam ri beya' ri c'o pa ri rulew ri Moab, chusuq'uil ri e u chicajil ri Pisga, ri quilitaj wi ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Numbers21:21 Ri aj israelib xequitak bic jujun tako'n ruc' ri Sehon, cajawinel ri aj amoreyib, chi chequibij che:" 
Numbers21:22 “Are ta ne cakaj cujoc'ow ta chupam ri awulew. Man cujoc ta chupam ri ulew ri ticom tak qui wäch mawi pa tak ri ulew ri e ticom wi tak uva, mawi quekakumuj tak ri ja' ri e c'o chquipam tak ri e a c'ua'. Are c'u cäkatakej na ri nim be aretak chujoc'ow chupam ri awulew.”" 
Numbers21:23 Are c'u ri Sehon man xuya' ta c'olbal chi xeboc'ow ta ri aj israelib chupam ri rulew, xane' xebumulij conojel ri e u winak xel c'u ulok che qui c'ulaxic ri aj israelib chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, aretak c'u xopan pa Jahaz xch'ojin cuc' ri aj israelib." 
Numbers21:24 Xquito' c'u quib ri aj israelib xquich'äc c'ut, xeboc c'u che rechbexic ri rulew xchaptaj bic kas chuchi' ri nima' Arnon xetakal c'ä chuchi' ri nim' Jaboc, ri u bixic, c'ä ruc' ri qui c'ulbat ri aj amonib, ri e c'o nimak tak tapia chrij." 
Numbers21:25 Je ba ri', ri Israel xebumajij conojel tak ri qui tinimit ri amoreyib, ri u bixic, ri Hesbon xukuje' ri e rach tak u tinimit, xejeki' c'u can chquipam." 
Numbers21:26 Ri Hesbon are' ri tinimit ri xjeki' wi ri Sehon, ri cajawinel ri aj amoreyib. Ri Sehon xch'ojin can nabe ruc' ri jun ajawinel canok re Moab xutokij c'u ronojel we ulew ri' che c'ä chuchi' ri nim' Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Rumal ri' caquibij ri e banal tak bix: “¡Chixpet pa Hesbon, ri u chuch u tinimit ri ajawinel Sehon! ¡Chibana' u yaquic co chiban che!" 
Numbers21:28 Kas pa Hesbon, ri u tinimit ri Sehon, xewalij wi ulok ri rak' jun c'atic, ri xesachow u wäch ri Ar re Moab xukuje' tak ri chicajil ri cätakan puwi' ri Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 ¡Tok'ob a wäch, Moab! ¡At tzakinak, u tinimit ri dios Quemos! Are' yowinak be chi ri e awachijab quebel bic quebanimajic, chi ri e awixokil quekaj pa u k'ab ri ajawinel Sehon." 
Numbers21:30 Xsachisax u wäch ri u cuinem ri Hesbon; kas pa Dibon c'ä pa Nop ronojel xyojyobic, e are c'u ri k'ak' xopan c'ä pa Medeb.”" 
Numbers21:31 Je c'u ri', ri Israel xumajij ronojel ri culew ri aj amoreyib." 
Numbers21:32 Ri Moises, xebutak c'u na bic jujun achijab che u nic'oxic ri tinimit Jazer, e are' c'u ri aj israelib xeboc che qui ch'äquic ri c'ulja tak tinimit xequesaj c'u bic ri aj amoreyib ri e jekel chila'." 
Numbers21:33 Xetzelej c'ut xebe chi che u suq'uil ri Basan, are' c'u ri Og, ajawinel re Basan, xel ulok e rachil ri rajch'ojab che u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj israelib pa Edrey." 
Numbers21:34 Ri Ajawaxel xubij c'u che ri Moises: “Maxe'j awib, ri in quinjach pa a k'ab, junam cuc' conojel ri rajch'ojab xukuje' ri rulew, ri at caban c'u na che junam jas ri xaban che ri Sehon, ri cajawinel ri aj amoreyib ri xjeki' can pa Hesbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Je c'u ri' ri aj israelib xquicämisaj ri Og xukuje' tak ri e u c'ojol, xukuje' conojel ri rajch'ojab. Man c'o ta jachin ri xquic'asba' ta canok, xk'ax c'ut ri rulew pa qui k'ab." 
Numbers22:1 Ri aj israelib xquitakej ri qui be xebekaj pa tak ri lianic re Moab, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri nima' Jordan, chuwäch ri Jerico." 
Numbers22:2 Ri Balac (u c'ojol ri Zipor) xoc il che rilic ri xquiban ri aj israelib chque ri aj amoreyib. 
Numbers22:3 Xukuje' ri winak aj Moab xenoj che xe'n ib aretak xquilo chi ri aj israelib sibalaj man quebajilataj taj. 
Numbers22:4 Xquibij c'ut ri aj Moab chque ri nimak tak tatayib aj madianib: “Conojel we winak ri' culquiq'uisa' tzij puwi' ri kulew, jacha' jun wacax ri cuq'uis ronojel ri echa' ri c'o chupam ri juyub.” Chupam ri k'ijol ri' ri Balac are' ajawinel re Moab," 
Numbers22:5 xutak c'u u siq'uixic ri Balaam (u c'ojol ri Beor) ri c'o apan pa Petor, chuchi' ri nima' Euprats, chupam ri rulew ri Amab. Ri Balac xuya' takanic chque ri e u tako'n chi chiquibij che ri Balaam: “Pa Ejipt elinak wi ulok jun tinimit ri quiliq'uiq'uem quib pa ronojel ri ulew, are c'u ri camic quijekebam quib chnuwäch." 
Numbers22:6 Tasaj ba' chanim chel a c'okoj we tinimit ri' che nu to'ic, sibalaj c'u c'o na u chuk'ab chkawäch uj. Craj ne ruc' wa' quincuin in che qui ch'äquic quebenwesaj ta c'u bic chupam ri ulew. In weta'm chi ri e a tewichi'nic xukuje' ri e a c'okonic amak'el je quebelic.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ri e qui nimak tak tatayib ri aj moabib xukuje' ri quech ri aj madianib xebec xquic'am bic puak pa qui k'ab che qui tojic tak ri c'okonic, aretak c'u xebopanic jawije' c'o wi ri Balaam xquiya' u bixic ri takquil che ri xutak u bixic ri Balac che." 
Numbers22:8 Ri Balaam xubij chque: “Chixcanaj can waral pa we ak'ab ri', quintzelej c'u na u bixic chiwe jachique ri quinutak wi ri Ajawaxel.” Xecanaj c'u can ri nimak tak tatayib aj moabib ruc'." 
Numbers22:9 Xuc'ut c'u rib ri Dios chuwäch ri Balaam, xuc'ot c'u u chi' rumal: “¿E jachin tak wa' we achijab ri' ri e c'o awuc'?”" 
Numbers22:10 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic: “Ri Balac (rajawinel ri Moab, u c'ojol ri Zipor) xebutak ulok rech quel quibij chwe" 
Numbers22:11 chi jun tinimit elinak ulok pa Ejipt u liq'uiq'uem c'u rib pa ronojel ri ulew. Ri Balac are craj chi quinbextax che qui c'okoxic, rech carilo we cacuin che qui ch'äquic queresaj ta c'u bic chupam ri rulew.”" 
Numbers22:12 Ri Dios xubij che ri Balaam: “Man catbe ta cuc' mawi mac'okoj we tinimit ri', we tinimit ri' nu tewichi'm.”" 
Numbers22:13 Chucab k'ij xwalij ri Balaam xubij chque ri c'amal tak be ri xebutak ulok ri Balac: “Chixtzelej pa ri iwulew. Ri Ajawaxel man cuya' ta chwe chi quinbe ta iwuc'.” 
Numbers22:14 Ri e c'amal tak u be ri Moab xetzelejic jawije' c'o wi ri Balac xquibij c'u che: “Ri Balaam man xraj ta xpe kuc'.” 
Numbers22:15 Ri Balac xutij u k'ij xebutak chi bic jumul niq'uiaj chi c'amal tak be ri e q'ui na ri xukuje' nimak tak na qui k'ij chquiwäch tak ri e nabe. 
Numbers22:16 Xebe c'u wa' che rilic ri Balaam xquibij c'u che: “Ri Balac (ri u c'ojol ri Zipor) cutak u bixic chawe: ‘Chabana' jun tok'ob mak'il awib che a petic. 
Numbers22:17 In quinya' na ri sibalaj nimarisabal a k'ij, quinban c'u na ronojel ri chatz'onoj ta chwe; chatpet ba' chabana' ri tok'ob chwe che u c'okoxic we tinimit ri'.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Are c'u ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic chque: “Ri Balac pune' ta ne cuya' ta ronojel ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak ri cuch'ij ri nimalaj rachoch, in man cuya' ta c'o ta jas quinbano, mawi nim mawi ch'utin, ri quebuc'ulelaj taj ri e u takanic ri Ajawaxel ri nu Dios." 
Numbers22:19 Chixcanaj c'u ne na ix xukuje' che we junak'ab ri' waral, quinwil c'u na jas ri cubij chic ri Ajawaxel che we jumul chic ri'.”" 
Numbers22:20 Chak'ab, xuc'ut rib ri Dios chuwäch ri Balaam xubij c'u che: “We e petinak we achijab ri' che a c'amic bic, chatwalijok jät c'u cuc', are c'u caban na xak xuwi ri quinbij chawe.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ri Balaam xwalij che ri ucab k'ij, xutas rij ri ati't u bur xbe c'u cuc' ri c'amal tak be aj moabib." 
Numbers22:22 Ri Balaam benak quiejeninak chrij ri ati't u bur, achilatal c'u cumal quieb pataninelab. Are c'u ri Dios xpe royowal che rumal rech chi xbec, are c'u ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xuya' rib pa ri u be che u tz'apixic ri u be." 
Numbers22:23 Aretak ri ati't bur xrilo chi ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri be ruc'am jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j pa u k'ab, xujalach'uj ri u be xbe pa tak ri k'ayes; xch'ay c'u rumal ri Balaam che u tzelexic pa ri be." 
Numbers22:24 Xutac'aba' chi c'u rib ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel pa jun c'olbal ri latz', ri coc'ow ri be chquixo'l tak ri uva ri e tico'n e c'o c'u nutum tak abaj pa tak u xcut." 
Numbers22:25 Aretak ri ati't bur xril ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel, xukarij rib chuwäch jun chque ri nutum tak abaj xujuk c'u ri rakan ri Balaam. Are c'u ri Balaam xuch'ay chi jumul." 
Numbers22:26 Are c'u ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xnabejic xuya' rib pa jun c'olbal ri sibalaj latz' na, ri man cuya' ta c'olbal ri c'o ta cäjaluch'ux ta wi ri be." 
Numbers22:27 Aretak ri ati't bur xril ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel, xujupuba' rib cho ri ulew. Xyactaj c'u royowal ri Balaam xuchaplej c'u u ch'ayic ruc' jun che'." 
Numbers22:28 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri Ajawaxel xubano chi xch'aw ri ati't bur, chi chubij c'u che ri Balaam: “¿Jas ri nu banom chawe? Chi ruc' wa' oxmul chic in a ch'ayom.”" 
Numbers22:29 “Cätajin cawetz'bej nu wäch,” xcha' ri Balaam che, “we ta c'o jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j pa nu k'ab, kas camic ta ri' catincämisaj.”" 
Numbers22:30 Are' c'u ri ati't bur xubij: “In ri' ri ati't bur ri in a quiejem ronojel ri a c'aslemal, kas c'u aweta'm chi mawi ta jumul nu banom ta ri ma ta utz chawe.” “Kastzij,” xcha' ri Balaam." 
Numbers22:31 Xuban c'ut ri Ajawaxel chi ri Balaam xcuinic xril ri u tako'n, ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri be ruc'am jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j pu k'ab. Ri Balaam xumej rib c'ä xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew," 
Numbers22:32 are c'u ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “¿Jasche xach'ay oxmul ri ati't a bur? In ri in petinak che u tz'apixic ri be rumal rech chi ri a binem cuyac woyowal. 
Numbers22:33 Ri ati't bur xinrilo, xujalach'uj c'u rib chwe oxmul. We ta c'u ma ta xujalach'uj rib, xcatcämisataj ta wumal, are c'u ri are' xinc'asba ta canok.”" 
Numbers22:34 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic che ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel: “In macuninak, man weta'm ta c'ut chi lal c'o chi', che u tz'apixic ri be. We quil la chi itzel ri nu bic, quintzelej na.”" 
Numbers22:35 Are c'u ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “Cuya' catbe cuc' we achijab ri', xuwi c'u cabij na ri quinbij chawe.”" 
Numbers22:36 Ri Balaam xbe cuc' ri c'amal tak be ri e u takom ulok ri Balac, aretak c'u ri Balac xoc pa u jolom chi petinak ri Balaam, xel ulok che u c'ulaxic chupam jun tinimit aj Moab ri c'o chuchi' ri nima' Arnon, chuchi' ri u c'ulbatil ri ulew," 
Numbers22:37 xubij c'u che: “Xintak a siq'uixic ruc' chuk'ab; ¿jasche man cawaj taj catpetic? ¿La are' pa a c'u'x chi ma ta in ticarel che qui banic q'ui nimarisabal tak a k'ij?” 
Numbers22:38 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic che: “In c'o ba' ri', in ulinak che awilic. Man c'o ta c'u nu cuinem che u bixic ri quinwaj pa we ta wi; ri in xak xuwi quinbij ri cubij ri Dios chwe.”" 
Numbers22:39 Xbextax c'ut ri Balaam ruc' ri Balac pa Quiriat-huzot," 
Numbers22:40 jawije' ri xtakan wi ri Balac che qui pilic ati'tab tak wacax xukuje' ati'tab tak chij checoj c'u chuwäch ri Balaam xukuje' chquiwäch ri c'amal tak be ri e achilaninak. 
Numbers22:41 Ak'ab chucab k'ij, ri Balac xutzucuj ri Balaam xuban c'u che chi capaki' puwi' ri Bamot-baal, kas chila' c'ut xcuin wi che rilic ri u setelibal ri qui kajebal ri aj israelib." 
Numbers23:1 Xubij c'ut ri Balaam che: “Chebawoco' wukub porobal waral, chebacha' wukub c'ojol tak wacax xukuje' wukub ama'ib tak chij.”" 
Numbers23:2 Ri Balac xubano jachique ri xubij ri Balaam che, quicabichal c'ut xequipil jun c'ojol wacax xukuje' jun ama' chij paquiwi' jujun porobal." 
Numbers23:3 Xubij c'u ri Balaam che ri Balac: “Chatcanaj can ruc' ri tabal tok'ob, quinbe c'u na che rilic we cäpe ri Ajawaxel che u rikic rib wuc'. Quinbij c'u chawe jachique ri cuya' retamaxic chwe.”" 
Numbers23:4 Ri Balaam xbe tza'm jun juyub ri to'l, ri xuc'ut wi rib ri Dios chuwäch. Ri Balaam xubij che: “E nu wocom wukub porobal, paquiwi' c'ut chquijujunal nu chi'm jun c'ojol wacax xukuje' jun ama' chij.”" 
Numbers23:5 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' c'ut chuchi' ri Balaam ri rajawaxic cubij na, xubij c'u che: “Chattzelejok jawije' c'o wi ri Balac junam u bixic chabij che ri nu bim chawe.”" 
Numbers23:6 Xtzelej ri Balaam xurika' c'ut ri Balac tac'al chuxcut ri tabal tok'ob, achilatal cumal ri c'amal tak be aj moabib."
