Numbers23:7 Are c'u ri Balaam xuya' u bixic ri cac'ulmataj na: “Kas pa tak ri c'ache'laj ri c'o kas pa ri elebal k'ij, kas pa Aram, xuban ri Balac chwe chi xinpetic, ajawinel re Moab ‘Tasaj,’ xcha' chwe, ‘chac'okoj ri Israel chwe, charayij ri etzelal che ri u tinimit ri Jacob.’" 
Numbers23:8 ¿Jas ta c'u, cäban che u c'okoxic ri man cuc'okoj ta ri Dios? ¿Jas cäban che u rayixic ri etzelal we ri Ajawaxel man cuban taj?" 
Numbers23:9 Kas paquiwi' we nimalaj tak abaj ri' quincuinic quinwilo, kas paquiwi' we u tza'm tak juyub ri' quinwil wi: are jun tinimit ri man u yujum ta rib, ri man cäjunamataj ta cuc' ri jule' tak tinimit chic." 
Numbers23:10 E jacha' ri u puc'uq'uil ri ulew; ¿jachin ta ri cacuin ta che cajilaxic? ¿Jachin ta ri cacuin ta che retamaxic ri cajilabal? ¡C'o ta banom wi chi je ta nu cämic jacha' we suc'alaj tak achijab ri', ri e q'uisbal tak nu k'ij e je taj jacha' ri e quech tak are'!”" 
Numbers23:11 Are' c'u ri Balac xuch'a' che ri Balaam: “¿Jas ri cätajin cabano? In xatinc'am ulok rech quebac'okoj tak ri e nu c'ulel, are c'u ri at xatoc che qui tewichi'xic.”" 
Numbers23:12 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic: “Uj canajinak chi ri in xuwi quinbij na ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel chi nu chi'.” 
Numbers23:13 Xucoj c'u u chuk'ab ri Balac: “Tasaj wuc' pa jun c'olbal chic, kas jawije' xak xuwi catcuinic cawil wi ri u chi' ri u setelibal ri tinimit, man cawil ta c'u ri tinimit tz'akat chebac'okoj apan kas chila' quincha' chawe.”" 
Numbers23:14 Ri Balac xuc'am bic ri Balaam pa ri ulew re Zopim, puwi' ri juyub Pisga, jawije' ri xuwoc wi wukub porobal xebupil c'u paquiwi' chquijujunal jun c'ojol ama' wacax xukuje' jun ama' chij." 
Numbers23:15 Chila' xubij wi ri Balaam che ri Balac: “Chatcanaj can waral, chuxcut ri tabal tok'ob, quinrika' c'u na wib ruc' ri Dios.”" 
Numbers23:16 Ri Ajawaxel xel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri Balaam xuya' c'u chuchi' ri rajawaxic cubij na Xubij chi c'u che: “Chattzelejok jawije' c'o wi ri Balac junam u bixic chabij che ri nu bim chawe.” 
Numbers23:17 Ri Balaam xtzelejic xurika' c'ut ri Balac tac'al chuxcut ri tabal tok'ob, achilatal cumal ri c'amal tak be aj moabib. Ri Balac xuc'ot u chi'. “¿Jas ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chawe?”" 
Numbers23:18 Are c'u ri Balaam xuya' u bixic ri cac'ulmataj na: “Balac, ri at u c'ojol ri Zipor, chatoc il che nu tatabexic." 
Numbers23:19 Ri Dios man junam ta cuc' ri e cämel: man cuban ta tzij mawi cuq'uex ri u chomam u banic. Aretak ri are' cubij jun jasach, cutz'akatisaj u banic. Aretak cuban jun chi'nic, cutz'akatisaj." 
Numbers23:20 In c'o takanic wuc' che u tewichi'xic; we ri Dios cätewichinic, in man quincuin taj quinc'ulelaj." 
Numbers23:21 Man c'o ta jachin jun rilom ta subunic mawi etzelal pa Israel, ri u tinimit ri Jacob. Ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios c'o cuc', ri e are' caquiya' u k'ij jacha' jun ajawinel." 
Numbers23:22 Ri Dios, ri xebesan ulok pa Ejipt, are c'o chque e are' ri cux che ri juyubal wacax ri e ruc'a'." 
Numbers23:23 Man cätakan ta ri itzinic che ri Jacob; man cäk'ijin ta ri caquiban ri ajk'ijab che ri Israel: ‘¡Joropa' ri mayibal ri e u banom ri Dios awuc'!’ 
Numbers23:24 We tinimit ri' cawalijic jacha' jun coj, ri cucoj xe'n ib, man cuxlan ta na c'ä cutij na ri u ti' xukuje' cukumuj na ri qui quiq'uel ri quebucämisaj na.”" 
Numbers23:25 Ri Balac xubij c'u che ri Balaam: “¡Man catcuin ta ya' cac'okoj we tinimit ri', matewichi'j c'ut!”" 
Numbers23:26 Ri xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Balaam che wa': “¿La ma ta nu bim chic chawe, chi ri in xuwi cuya' quinbano ri quinutak wi ri Ajawaxel?”" 
Numbers23:27 Xubij c'ut ri Balac che: “Tasaj, catinc'am chi c'u bic pa jun c'olbal chic. Craj ne man cäpe ta royowal ri Dios chi cac'okoj ri Israel kas chila'.”" 
Numbers23:28 Je c'u ri' ri Balac xuc'am bic ri Balaam puwi' ri juyub Peor, jawije' ri quilitaj wi ronojel ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Numbers23:29 Chila' xubij wi ri Balaam che ri Balac: “Chebawoco' wukub porobal waral chwe chebacha' wukub c'ojol tak wacax xukuje' wukub ama'ib tak chij.” 
Numbers23:30 Ri Balac xubano jachique ri xubij ri Balaam che, pa jujun porobal xupil jujun c'ojol wacax xukuje' jujun ama'ib tak chij." 
Numbers24:1 Rumal c'u rech chi xril ri Balaam chi ri Ajawaxel utz che chi cätewichi'x ri Israel, man xbe ta chic che u c'amic ri cäc'ulmataj na ri cubij ta na ri Dios che, jacha' ri u banom quieb oxib mul, xane' xuya' u wäch che ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Numbers24:2 Aretak c'u xril ri Balaam chi ri Israel quicholajim quib pa tak amak', xmajix rumal ri ruxlabal ri Dios;" 
Numbers24:3 are c'u ri Balaam xuya' u bixic we c'ulmatajic ri': “Tzijol ri cuya' ri Balaam (u c'ojol ri Beor) achi ri cäca'y pa che' pa abaj," 
Numbers24:4 chi aretak cämajitajic sibalaj cäca'y na chi sak, ri quebuc'am tak tzijol xukuje' queril c'utwächinic ri cuc'ut ri Dios chuwäch ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Numbers24:5 ¡Jacob, sibal e je'l tak ri a cäbal ri lic'om! ¡Sibalaj je'lic, Israel, ri tak a kajebal!" 
Numbers24:6 ¡Ri e je ta ne ri e c'o tut ri quechololic, ticonijibal chuchi' jun nima', c'oc'al ri e ticom rumal ri Ajawaxel, tak chacalte' chuchi' ri ja'!" 
Numbers24:7 Ri Israel cäc'oji' na u ja' cätixixic che u kumuxic xukuje' che qui ja'xic tak ri qui tico'n. Ri rajawinel cätakan na puwi' ri Agag; ri u cuinem re ajawinic sibalaj cux na nim. 
Numbers24:8 Ri Dios, ri xebesan ulok pa Ejipt, are je chque e are' ri cux che ri juyubal wacax ri e ruc'a'. Ri Israel quebubik' na tak ri e nimak tak tinimit c'ulel; quebuk'ajisaj tak na ri e u bakil, quebusoc c'u na cuc' tak ri e u ch'ab." 
Numbers24:9 Aretak cacoti' che uxlanem, jeri' cäbantaj jun coj: man c'o ta jachin jun cuchajij ta anima' cuc'asuj. ¡Chtewichitaj ri cattewichinic, xukuje' chc'okotaj ri catc'okonic!”" 
Numbers24:10 Ri Balac aretak xuta' wa', sibalaj xpe royowal che ri Balaam, xupak' c'ut ri u k'ab xubij che: “In xatin siq'uij rech quebac'okoj tak ri e nu c'ulel, xc'ulmataj c'ut chi oxib mul chi wa' quebatewichi'j." 
Numbers24:11 ¡Are utz na chawe chi cattzelej cho awachoch! In nu chi'm chi quebenban na nimak tak nimarisabal a k'ij, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel k'atininak.”" 
Numbers24:12 Are' c'u ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic che: “Nu yo'm chic u bixic chque ri e a tako'n chi," 
Numbers24:13 pune' ta ne caya' ronojel ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak ri cuch'ij ri nimalaj awachoch, ri in man quincuin ta chi ma ta chebinimaj tak ri e u takanic ri Ajawaxel mawi quinban jun jasach utz mawi lawalo ri xak ta pa wech wi, chi xuwi c'u quinbij na jachique ri quinutak ri Ajawaxel che u bixic." 
Numbers24:14 Utz ba ri', quintzelej chupam ri wulew; quinbij c'u na canok chawe ri cuban na we tinimit ri' pa tak ri k'ij ri quepe na ruc' ri a tinimit.”" 
Numbers24:15 Are c'u ri Balaam xuya' na u bixic ri cäpe na: “Tzijol ri cuya' ri Balaam (ri u c'ojol ri Beor), achi ri caca'y pa ri che' pa ri abaj," 
Numbers24:16 chi aretak camajitajic sibalaj cäca'y na chi sak, ri cuc'am ri retamanic ri cuya' ri Dios aj caj, ri quebuc'am tak tzijol xukuje' queril c'utwächinic ri cuc'ut ri Dios chuwäch ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Numbers24:17 Quinwil apan ri petinak, c'o ri quinwil apanok ri c'o chinaj: jun ch'imil ri quebel che ri Jacob, jun ajawinel ri cäwalij pa Israel. Cuxak'alej na ri u jolom ri Moab, quebuxak'alej na ri e rija'lil ri Set." 
Numbers24:18 Cuch'äc na ri Edom, coc na ri Seir pa u k'ab, ri are' u c'ulel. Ri Israel quebuchacuj na nimak tak mayibalil." 
Numbers24:19 Jun ch'äcanel quel na ulok che ri Jacob cusachisaj c'u na qui wäch ri quecanoj canok chupam ri tinimit.” 
Numbers24:20 Xril c'u apanok ri Balaam ri Amalec, xuya' c'u u bixic ri cac'ulmataj na: “Ri Amalec are jun nim tinimit ri nim u banic, xa c'u kas casachisax na u wäch.”" 
Numbers24:21 Xeril c'u apan xukuje' ri aj quenitab, xuya' c'ut u bixic we c'ulmatajic ri': “Ri ix rija'lil ri Cain: pune' co e c'o ri to'bal iwib, pune' i cojom ri i soc chquixo'l ri nimalaj tak abaj, we socaj ri' cäsachisax na u wäch rumal ri k'ak' aretak queyut bic rumal ri Asiriy.”" 
Numbers24:22  
Numbers24:23 Chwi chi c'ut xuya' u bixic we c'ulmatajic ri': “¡Tok'ob u wäch! ¿Jachin lo ri c'ä c'aslic aretak ri Dios chebubana' we jastak ri'? 
Numbers24:24 Quepe jucub pa ri tak'aj re Chipr, caquiyojij c'u na canok ri Asiriy xukuje' c'u ri Jeber.”" 
Numbers24:25 Chwi' chi c'u wa' ri Balaam xutakej ri u be xtzelej c'u cho rachoch. Ri Balac xukuje' xutakej u be. 
Numbers25:1 Aretak ri aj israelib xquijekeba' quib pa Sitim, ri cachijab xquichaplej u tz'iloxic quib cuc' tak ri ixokib aj moabib," 
Numbers25:2 ri quecula'j aretak caquiya' tabal tak tok'ob chque tak ri e qui diosib. Ri aj israelib e are' juch'ob che u tijic tak we wa ri' xek'ijilan chque ri e qui diosib ri aj moabib," 
Numbers25:3 je c'u ri' xquiya' quib xejurux che u k'ijilaxic ri Baal-peor. Xoyowar c'ut ri Ajawaxel chrij ri Israel," 
Numbers25:4 xubij c'u che ri Moises: “Chebamulij conojel ri e c'amal tak u be ri tinimit, chebacämisaj chnuwäch pa k'ij chi sakil. Jeri' coc'ow na ri woyowal che ri Israel.”" 
Numbers25:5 Ri Moises xuya' takanic chque ri qui k'atal tak tzij ri aj israelib: “Chijujunal ix rajawaxic quebicämisaj tak ri achijab re ri iwamak' ri xquiya' quib xejurux bic che u k'ijilaxic ri Baal-peor.” 
Numbers25:6 Jun c'u aj israel xuc'am bic jun ixok aj Madian cho rachoch, chuwäch ri Moises xukuje' chquiwäch conojel ri aj israelib ri qui mulin quib, cätajin c'u ne quebok' ri e are' chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib." 
Numbers25:7 Aretak xril wa' ri Pinees (u c'ojol ri Eleazar, ri' u mam c'ut ri Aaron cojol tabal tok'ob) xutas rib chque ri aj israelib ri quimulin quib, xuc'am bic ri u tz'imaj ch'ich' pu k'ab" 
Numbers25:8 xuterenej c'u bic ri aj israel c'ä pa ri warabal, chila' c'u xebuk'ok'ej wi ri aj israel chupam xukuje' ri ixok. Jeri' xtani' ri cämibal ri cätajin quebucämisaj ri aj israelib," 
Numbers25:9 e cäminak chi c'u ne juwinak quiejeb mil (24,000) chque." 
Numbers25:10 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers25:11 “Ri Pinees banowinak chi coc'ow ri woyowal chquij ri aj israelib, rumal rech chi ri are' c'o junam achixomanic ruc' je jas ri c'o wuc' in chque. Rumal ri' man nu na yo'm ta wib chi in u c'amom ta bic ri achixomanic man xinq'uis ta c'u u sachixic qui wäch." 
Numbers25:12 Chabij che, chi, ri in quinban jun c'ulwächinic ruc' re jamaril," 
Numbers25:13 rumal c'u rech wa' quinjächo, che are' xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e rija'lil, chi quebux cojol tak tabal tok'ob re amak'el, rumal rech chi xachixom chwe je c'u ri' xurik ri sachbal macaj chque ri aj israelib.”" 
Numbers25:14 Ri aj israel ri xk'ok'exic junam ruc' ri ixok aj Madian, Zimri u bi', c'amal u be jun ja winak aj ramak' ri Simeon (ri u tat ri Zimri are' c'ut ri Sal)." 
Numbers25:15 Ri ixok aj Madian, Cozbi u bi', u mia'l c'ut ri Zur, c'amal qui be e jumulaj tak ja winak pa Madian." 
Numbers25:16 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers25:17 “Chibana' c'ax chque ri aj madianib chebich'äc'a," 
Numbers25:18 je jacha' ri e are' xquiban c'ax chiwe cumal ri itzel tak qui banoj xquiban c'u chiwe chi xixoc che u k'ijilaxic ri Baal-peor, xukuje' ri xuban ri Cozbi, u mia'l ri c'amal be aj Madian, ri xcoj tz'imaj ch'ich' che u cämisaxic aretak xintak ulok jun cämisanelalaj yabil chiwe rumal rech chi xik'ijilaj ri Baal-peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 Aretak oc'owinak chic we cämisanel cämibal ri', ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises xukuje' che ri Eleazar (u c'ojol ri Aaron):" 
Numbers26:2 “Chibana' jun ajilanic, pa jujun tak ja winak, chque conojel ri aj israelib ri juwinak chic qui junab cäpakic, ri e utz chi che u banic ch'o'j.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar xequiya' c'u takanic chque ri aj israelib pa tak ri lianic re Moab, chuxcut ri nima' Jordan, chuwäch ri Jerico," 
Numbers26:4 chi chequitz'ibaj qui bi' ri e c'o chi juwinak qui junab capakic, je jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises. E are' tak wa' ri aj israelib ri e elinak ulok pa Ejipt:" 
Numbers26:5 Ri e rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Ruben, nabe u c'ojol ri Israel, ri e rech ri Enoc, Palu," 
Numbers26:6 Hezron xukuje' ri Carmi; 
Numbers26:7 je jas ri ajilanic ri e u k'ab tak rachalaxic ri Ruben e cawinak oxib mil ruc' wukub sient juwinak lajuj (43,730) achijab." 
Numbers26:8 Che ri Palu xalax wi ri Eliab," 
Numbers26:9 che c'u ri Eliab xebalax wi ri Nemuel, ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram. Ri Datan rachil ri Abiram e qui tz'akatil ri jumulaj ya'l tak no'j ri', junam ruc' ri Core, xquiwalijisaj quib che u c'ulelaxic ri Ajawaxel xukuje' je xquiban che ri Moises rachil ri Aaron," 
Numbers26:10 xujak c'u rib ri ulew xebubik' c'u bic e are' qui cabichal xukuje' ri Core, ronojel c'ut ri jumulaj xcämic, e quieb sient c'ut ruc' cawinak lajuj (250) achijab xecäm pa ri k'ak'. Xajwataj c'u wa' che c'utbal chque ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Numbers26:11 Man xecäm ta c'u ne ri e u c'ojol ri Core. 
Numbers26:12 Ri e rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Simeon e are' ri e rech ri Nemuel, Jamin, Jaquin," 
Numbers26:13 Zera xukuje' ri Saul; 
Numbers26:14 je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Simeon ri cajilabal e juwinak quieb mil ruc' quieb sient (22,200) achijab." 
Numbers26:15 Ri e rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Gad e are' ri e rech ri Zepon, Hagui, Sun," 
Numbers26:16 Ozni, Er," 
Numbers26:17 Arod xukuje' ri Arel; 
Numbers26:18 je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Gad ri cajilabal e cawinak mil ruc' job sient (40,500) achijab." 
Numbers26:19 Chque ri e u c'ojol ri Juda, xecämic ri Er xukuje' ri Onan pa ri ulew re Canaan," 
Numbers26:20 jeri' ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Juda e are' ri e rech ri Sel, Pares xukuje' ri Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Ri e rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Pares e are' ri e rech ri Hezron xukuje' ri Hamul; 
Numbers26:22 je jas ri e ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Juda ri cajilabal e oxc'al waklajuj mil ruc' job sient (76,500) achijab." 
Numbers26:23 Ri e rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Isacar e are' ri e rech ri Tol, Pu," 
Numbers26:24 Jasub xukuje' ri Simron; 
Numbers26:25 je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Isacar ri cajilabal e oxc'al quiejeb mil ruc' oxib sient (64,300) achijab." 
Numbers26:26 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Zabulon e are' ri e rech ri Sered, Elon xukuje' ri Jaleel;" 
Numbers26:27 je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Zabulon ri cajilabal e oxc'al mil ruc' job sient (60,500) achijab." 
Numbers26:28 Chque ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Jose e are' ri e quech ri cämak' ri Manases xukuje' ri Eprain. 
Numbers26:29 Che ri Manases, ri e u k'ab rachalaxic re Maquir; re Maquir, ri rachalaxic re Galaad;" 
Numbers26:30 re Galaad, ri e u k'ab rachalaxic re Jezer, re Helec," 
Numbers26:31 re Asriel, re Siquem," 
Numbers26:32 re Semid xukuje' re Heper. 
Numbers26:33 Ri Zelopehad (u c'ojol ri Heper) man xec'oji' ta u c'ojol xane' e tak u mia'l, e are' c'u tak qui bi' wa' Maal, Noa, Hogla, Milca xukuje' Tirs." 
Numbers26:34 Je jas ri ajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Manases ri cajilabal e cawinak cablajuj mil ruc' wukub sient (52,700) achijab." 
Numbers26:35 Ri e rachalaxic ri e u k'ab tak rija'lil ri Eprain e are' ri e rech ri Sutel, ri Bequer xukuje' ri Tahan." 
Numbers26:36 Ri e rija'lil ri Sutel, e are' ri rachalaxic re Eran." 
Numbers26:37 Je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Eprain ri cajilabal e juwinak cablajuj mil ruc' job sient (32,500) achijab. E are' tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Jose, pa ri qui cholajil ri rachalaxic." 
Numbers26:38 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Benjamin e are' ri Bela, ri Asbel, ri Ahiram," 
Numbers26:39 ri Sepupam xukuje' ri Hupam. 
Numbers26:40 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Bela e are' ri e rech ri Ard xukuje' ri Naaman, e u c'ojol ri Bela." 
Numbers26:41 Je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Benjamin ri cajilabal e cawinak job mil ruc' wakib sient (45,600) achijab." 
Numbers26:42 Ri e rija'lil ri Dan e are' tak ri e rech ri rachalaxic ri Suham. 
Numbers26:43 Je jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Suham ri cajilabal e oxc'al cajlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (64,400) achijab." 
Numbers26:44 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Aser e are' ri e rech ri Imna, ri Isu xukuje' ri Beriy." 
Numbers26:45 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Beriy e are' ri e rech ri Jeber xukuje' ri Malquiel. 
Numbers26:46 Ri Aser xalax jun u mia'l ri xbinax Ser. 
Numbers26:47 Je jas ri ajilabal, ri e rija'lil ri Aser ri cajilabal e cawinak oxlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (53,400) achijab." 
Numbers26:48 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Neptali e are ri e rech ri Jazeel, ri Gun," 
Numbers26:49 ri Jezer xukuje' ri Silem. 
Numbers26:50 Jas ri ajilanic, ri e rija'lil ri Neptali ri cajilabal e cawinak job mil ruc' quiejeb sient (45,400) achijab." 
Numbers26:51 Ri aj israelib ri xebajilaxic aretak xban ri ajilanic ri cajilabal e wakib sient jun mil ruc' wukub sient juwinak lajuj (601,730) achijab." 
Numbers26:52 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers26:53 “Chquixo'l tak we winak ri' cäjach wi na ri ulew, je jas ri u cholajil ri cajilabal ri xelic." 
Numbers26:54 Chque ri jun tak mulaj ri e q'ui na caya' na jun nim ch'akap ulew chque c'ut ri jun tak mulaj ri man e kas ta q'ui jun ch'akap ulew ri man kas ta nim. Chquijujunal ri jun tak mulaj caya' na jun ch'akap ulew chque je jas ri ajilanic ri xbanic. 
Numbers26:55 Ri u jachic ri ulew caban na rumal taklebenic. Chquijujunal caquic'am na ri quech je jas ri ramak' ri qui tat. 
Numbers26:56 Ri jachanic caban na rumal taklebenic, je chquixo'l ri e jun tak mulaj ri e q'ui na xukuje' chquixo'l ri man e q'ui taj.”" 
Numbers26:57 Ri e rachalaxic rech ri ramak' ri Levi ri xebajilax pa ri ajilanic e are' ri e rech ri Jerson, ri Coat xukuje' ri Merar." 
Numbers26:58 Ri e cachalaxic ri aj libnitab, ri aj hebronib, ri aj malitib, ri aj musitab xukuje' ri aj coretib, e ija'lil aj levitib. Ri u tat ri Amram are' ri Coat." 
Numbers26:59 Ri Amram xc'uli' ruc' jun u mia'l ri Levi, Jocabed u bi', xil c'u u wäch aretak c'ä c'o ri Levi pa Ejipt. Ri Amram ri Jocabed e are' u tat u nan ri Aaron, ri Moises xukuje' ri Mariy." 
Numbers26:60 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron e are' ri Nadab, ri Abiu, ri Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Ri Nadab xukuje' ri Abiu xecämic aretak xquichi'j jun k'ak' chic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers26:62 Ri achijab chnimalaj conojel ri e rija'lil ri Levi, ri jujun tak qui q'uil cäpakic, e juwinak oxib mil (23,000). Ri e are' man e ajilam ta cuc' ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, rumal rech chi ri e are' man yo'm ta jun quechbal." 
Numbers26:63 Are wa' ri xel wi ri cajilabal ri aj israelib ri xban rumal ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob, pa tak ri lianic re Moab, chunakaj ri Jordan chuwäch ri Jerico." 
Numbers26:64 Chquixo'l ri e are' mawi ta ne xa ta jun c'o ta chque aretak ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron xquiban ri ajilanic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai," 
Numbers26:65 are c'u ri Ajawaxel xyo'w u bixic chque chi quecäm na canok chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak. Xak xuwi c'u ri Caleb rachil ri Josue xeto'taj canok, mawi ta ne jun xcanaj ta can chque. (Ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon, ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Nun.)" 
Numbers27:1 E c'o c'u job alitomab cachalal tak quib, ri je qui bi' wa' Maal, Noa, Hogla, Milca xukuje' Tirs. E u mia'l c'ut ri Zelopehad, kas e rija'lil ri Heper, ri Galaad, ri Maquir, ri Manases xukuje' ri Jose." 
Numbers27:2 We job alitomab ri' cachalal tak quib xebe chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u tzijobexic ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri e c'amal tak be re ri tinimit, xquibij c'u chque:" 
Numbers27:3 “Ri ka tat xcäm chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak ri are' man are ta jun cuc' ri xquimulij quib ruc' ri Core ri xuwalijisaj rib che u c'ulelaxic ri Ajawaxel. Xcäm rumal ri kas u mac man c'o ta c'u e u c'ojol ri xebuya' ta canok. 
Numbers27:4 Man c'u suc' ta chi ri ka tat casach ta u wäch chuxo'l ri rija'lil xa rumal rech chi man c'o ta jun u c'ojol xc'ojic. Chaya' jun chak'ap kulew chquixo'l ri e rachalal ri ka tat.” 
Numbers27:5 Ri Moises xuya' wa' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri qui c'ulmam tak we alitomab ri'," 
Numbers27:6 ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: 
Numbers27:7 “Ri e u mia'l ri Zelopehad takal ri caquibij. Chaya' jubik' culew chquixo'l ri e rachalal ri qui tat, are c'u ri rechbal ri qui tat chk'ax pa qui k'ab." 
Numbers27:8 Chabij c'u xukuje' chque ri aj israelib we c'o jachin jun cäcämic ri man c'o ta u c'ojol cuya' canok, ri rechbal cäcanaj can che ri u mia'l;" 
Numbers27:9 we c'u ne man c'o ta jun u mia'l, cuya' can ri rechbal chque ri rachalal;" 
Numbers27:10 we c'u ne man c'o ta rachalal cuya' can ri rechbal chque ri e rachalal ri u tat. 
Numbers27:11 We c'une' ri u tat man e c'o ta can rachalal, cuya' can ri rechbal che ri rachalaxic ri nakaj c'o wi na che. Jun c'u pixab wa' chque ri aj israelib, je jacha' ri takanic ri nu yo'm chawe.”" 
Numbers27:12 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chatpakal puwi' we juyub ri' re Abarim, chawila' a pam ri ulew ri nu yo'm chque ri aj israelib." 
Numbers27:13 Aretak c'u ilitajinak chic awumal, catcäm na cärika c'u na awib cuc' ri e a mam, jacha' ri xuban ri awachalal Aaron," 
Numbers27:14 i cabichal c'u ya' man xixniman ta chque ri e nu takanic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin aretak ri tinimit xch'ach'at chwe, man c'u xiya' ta nu k'ij chquiwäch we winak ri' aretak xquitz'onoj ja'.” (Wa are' cunataj ri bulbux ja' re ch'ach'atem, pa Cades chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Ajawaxel: 
Numbers27:16 “Dios xukuje' Ajawaxel, lal ri caya' la ri c'aslemal chque conojel ri achijab, cojo la jun c'amal be ri canabej chuwäch ri tinimit la chuc'ama' c'u u be pa ronojel c'olbal ri cäbe wi, rech ma ta xak cabinicatic jacha' ta ne jun tzobaj ri ma ta c'o rajyuk'.”" 
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej c'u u bixic che ri Moises: “Ri Josue (u c'ojol ri Nun) are jun achi re uxlabal. Chamajij chebaya' ri ak'ab puwi' ri u jolom. 
Numbers27:19 Chaya' c'u chuwäch ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob chuwäch c'u ronojel ri tinimit, chaya' c'ut ri ekle'n che chquiwäch conojel;" 
Numbers27:20 chaya' jubik' ri a takanic pa u k'ab, rech ronojel ri tinimit Israel cäniman che." 
Numbers27:21 Ri Josue cutac'aba' c'u na rib chuwäch ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob, are c'u ri Eleazar cätz'onon na chwe pa ri u bi' rumal ri Urim. Ri Josue are' ri cäyo'w na ri takanic chque ri aj israelib, che ronojel ri caquiban na.”" 
Numbers27:22 Ri Moises je xubano jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che. Xumajij ri Josue xutac'aba' c'u chuwäch ri Eleazar xukuje' chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit. 
Numbers27:23 Ri Moises xebuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom xuya' c'u ri ekle'n che, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che." 
Numbers28:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers28:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi maquitanaba' qui chi'xic chwe ri wa' xukuje' tak ri e sipanic ri queporoxic pa ri qui k'ijol pa ri nimak tak ri nimak'ij ri nimak qui banic, e jacha' sipanic ri quec'oc'at ruxlab chwe." 
Numbers28:3 Chabij chque xukuje' chi e are' tak sipanic wa' ri takal qui poroxic cumal che u ya'ic nu k'ij: k'ij chk'ij mel i k'ij che u banic quieb alaj ama'ib tak chij re jun qui junab ri ma ta c'o jun qui yab. 
Numbers28:4 Jun capil ak'abibal ri jun chic cäbe k'ij. 
Numbers28:5 Ri sipanic que c'äj quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj utzalaj c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit re aseitun ruc'.” 
Numbers28:6 (Are tabal tok'ob wa' ri man xtanabax ta can u poroxic pa ri juyub Sinai, jacha' sipanic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel.)" 
Numbers28:7 “Ri sipanic re ri u wa'l uva jun litro che jujun alaj tak ama'ib tak chij. We u wa'l uva ri' rajawaxic u jamic chupam ri k'ijilabal che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers28:8 Ri ucab alaj ama' chij cäpil na aretak que k'ij, cätik c'u na jun sipanic che re c'äj xukuje' jun sipanic re u wa'l uva junam cuc' tak ri sipanic ri queya' ak'abibal. Are jun sipanic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab, ri caporox che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Numbers28:9 “Chupam tak ri k'ij re uxlanibal rajawaxic quebichi'j quieb alaj tak ama'ib chij re jun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab, xukuje' belejeb libra utzalaj c'äj ri cayok' aseit ruc' jacha' che sipanic que tak c'äj, carachilaj ri u wa'l uva." 
Numbers28:10 We tabal tok'ob ri' ri cächajirisaxic cächi'x chupam tak ri k'ij re uxlanem, cärachilaj ri rach sipanic re u wa'l uva, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri caya' k'ij chk'ij.”" 
Numbers28:11 “Chupam ri nabe k'ij re jujun tak ic' qui chi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che ri Ajawaxel quieb c'ojol tak wacax, jun ama' chij xukuje' wukub alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri man c'o ta qui yab." 
Numbers28:12 Che jujun c'ojol wacax quechi'x na oxlajuj (13) libra utzalaj c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc'; che jujun nimak tak chij, belejeb (9) libra c'äj ri yo'm aseit ruc';" 
Numbers28:13 che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij, quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc'. Are jun tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cac'oc'at ruxlab ri caporox che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers28:14 Ri sipanic re u wa'l uva ri cärachilaj are cacab litro che jujun c'ojol wacax, jun litro ruc' niq'uiaj che jujun ama'ib tak chij, jun litro c'ut che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. E are tak tabal tok'ob wa' ri quechajirisaxic ri rajawaxic quequichi'j ic' chi ic' re ri junab." 
Numbers28:15 C'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij, rajawaxic qui chi'j che ri Ajawaxel jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, cärachilaj ri rach sipanic re u wa'l uva.”" 
Numbers28:16 “Chupam ri cajlajuj k'ij re ri nabe ic' re ri junab caban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel," 
Numbers28:17 pa ri k'ij olajuj are k'ij re nimak'ij. Wukub k'ij cätij ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'. 
Numbers28:18 Chupam ri nabe k'ij re ri wukub k'ij cäban jun nimak'ij tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' ri ix man c'o ta jun u wäch jun chac qui bano. 
Numbers28:19 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic, qui chi'j na che ri Ajawaxel quieb c'ojol tak wacax, jun ama' chij wukub alaj tak ama'ib chij re jujun qui junab ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers28:20 Junam cuc' tak we tabal tak tok'ob ri' querachilaj tak ri sipanic que c'äj ri cäyok' aseit cuc', je u banic wa' cäya'ic: oxlajuj (13) libra c'äj che jujun c'ojol wacax;" 
Numbers28:21 belejeb (9) libra c'äj che jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. 
Numbers28:22 Caquichi'j c'u na xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri sachbal macaj. 
Numbers28:23 Ronojel wa' cäquichi'j na c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cächi'x ronojel k'ij ak'abibal. 
Numbers28:24 Je caquiban wa' pa ri wukub k'ij nimak'ij chquijujunal, jacha' che sipanic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab ri caporox che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Wa' rajawaxic cärachilaj c'u na ri rach sipanic re u wa'l uva, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij." 
Numbers28:25 Chupam ri uwuk k'ij xukuje' quiban tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch jun chac quibano.” 
Numbers28:26 “Chupam ri nimak'ij quech ri nabe tak wächinic, aretak quechi'x tak che ri Ajawaxel ri c'äj tak re jun c'ac' wächinic, ri u bixic, pa ri nimak'ij quech ri wukutak tak k'ij, quiban xukuje' jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch jun chac qui bano." 
Numbers28:27 Quichi'j na che ri Ajawaxel, jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab, quieb c'ojol wacax, jun ama' chij xukuje' wukub alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab." 
Numbers28:28 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri carachilaj ri yok'om aseit ruc' oxlajuj (13) libra c'äj quecachilaj jujun c'ojol tak wacax; 
Numbers28:29 belejeb (9) libra quecachilaj jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut quecachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. 
Numbers28:30 Xukuje' caquichi'j na jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal qui mac. 
Numbers28:31 We tabal tok'ob ri' ri cächajirisaxic xukuje' tak ri sipanic quech c'äj ri querachilaj xukuje' ri u wa'l uva caquiya' na c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij. Ri awaj ma ta c'o qui yab.” 
Numbers29:1 “Chupam ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk ic' ri ix quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam we k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano, quiya' na u bixic ri k'ij ruc' rok'ibal trompet." 
Numbers29:2 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel, qui chi'j na jun c'ojol wacax, jun ama' chij xukuje' wukub alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:3 Ri rach sipanic re c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc' re oxlajuj (13) libra cärachilaj jun c'ojol wacax; 
Numbers29:4 belejeb (9) libra che jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj cäcachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. 
Numbers29:5 Caquichi'j c'u na xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal qui mac," 
Numbers29:6 c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic re chi ic' xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisax k'ij chk'ij, querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri rech ri u wa'l uva, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios. Wa' cux na jun sipanic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab porom che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Numbers29:7 “Chupam ri ulajuj k'ij re ri kas uwuk ic', xukuje' ix quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Man quixwa' ta pa we k'ij ri', man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano." 
Numbers29:8 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel, quichi'j na jun c'ojol wacax, jun ama' chij xukuje' wukub alaj mayib tak chij re jujun qui junab ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:9 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc' ri cärachilaj jun c'ojol wacax, oxlajuj (13) libra;" 
Numbers29:10 belejeb (9) libra che jun ama' chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj che jujun alaj ama' chij. 
Numbers29:11 Xukuje' qui chi'j jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj ri cächi'x chupam ri k'ij re cuyubal macaj, xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij, querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech tak c'äj xukuje' ri u wa'l uva.”" 
Numbers29:12 “Chupam ri olajuj k'ij rech ri uwuk' ic' ri ix quiban na jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano. Wukub k'ij cäbeytaj ri nimak'ij che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers29:13 Chupam ri nabe k'ij quichi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel, oxlajuj c'ojol tak wacax, quiejeb ama'ib chij. Xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:14 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri cayok' aseit ruc' oxlajuj (13) libra cäcachilaj jujun c'ojol wacax; 
Numbers29:15 belejeb (9) libra cäcachilaj jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut cacachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij. 
Numbers29:16 Caquichi'j xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:17 Che ri ucab k'ij quechi'x na cablajuj c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:18 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri e quech u wa'l uva cäjunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:19 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:20 Chupam ri urox k'ij quechi'x na julajuj c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib tak chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:21 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri e quech ri u wa'l uva cajunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:22 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:23 Chupam ri ucaj k'ij quechi'x na lajuj c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib tak chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:24 Queban c'u na xukuje' ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva cäjunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:25 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:26 Chupam ri uro' k'ij quechi'x na belejeb c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib tak chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:27 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:28 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:29 Chupam ri uwak k'ij quechi'x na wajxakib c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib tak chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:30 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva ri cajunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:31 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chki'j querachilaj ri e rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:32 Chupam ri uwak k'ij quechi'x na wajxakib c'ojol tak wacax, quieb ama'ib tak chij xukuje' cajlajuj alaj ama'ib tak chij jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:33 Queban chi c'u wi na tak ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva cajunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:34 Xukuje' cächi'x c'u jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tz'onobal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:35 Chupam ri uwajxak k'ij quiban na nimak'ij ruc' jun mulin ib nim u banic, miban c'u jun u wäch chac chupam we k'ij ri'." 
Numbers29:36 Quichi'j c'u na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel Dios jun c'ojol wacax, jun ama' chij wukub alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab, ri ma ta c'o qui yab." 
Numbers29:37 Queban c'u wi na tak ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva ri cärachilaj ri jun c'ojol wacax ri ama' chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Dios." 
Numbers29:38 Cachi'x c'u jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj, c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tz'onobal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij querachilaj ri rach tak sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva." 
Numbers29:39 E are tak tabal tok'ob wa' ri rajawaxic quebiban che ri Ajawaxel pa tak ri k'ij ri e ch'icom, e c'o c'u wi na ri' tak ri qui sipanic che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic o jacha' ne jun sipanic pa ech wi, we e tz'onobal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic o sipanic que c'äj rachil u wa'l uva, o tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ri Moises xuya' u bixic chque ri aj israelib ronojel ri takaninak wi ri Ajawaxel. 
Numbers30:1 Ri Moises xubij chque ri e c'amal tak qui be ri camak' ri aj israelib: 
Numbers30:2 “Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm takanic chi aretak c'o jun winak cuban jun chi'nic che o cuya' u tzij che u banic jun jasach chi'nic ri kas cäban na, rajawaxic cutz'akatisaj ri u tzij chubana' c'u ronojel ri u chi'm u banic." 
Numbers30:3 Aretak jun ac'al ixok, c'ä c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri u tat, cuban jun chi'nic che ri Ajawaxel o cuya' u tzij che u banic jun jasach," 
Numbers30:4 we ri u tat, aretak coc pa u jolom chi u banom jun chi'nic o u yo'm u tzij che u banic jun jasach, man cuk'il ta c'u che u banic, ya'tal che chi cutz'akatisaj ri xuchi'j o u yo'm u tzij che u banic." 
Numbers30:5 We ri u tat, aretak coc pa u jolom, cuk'il c'u che u banic, man ya'tal ta che chi cutz'akatisaj ri xuchi'j o ri xuya' u tzij che u banic. Xk'il c'ut rumal ri u tat, ri Ajawaxel man cucoj ta u chuk'ab che chi cutz'akatisaj u banic." 
Numbers30:6 We c'u are' jun ixok ri u banom chi'nic che ri Ajawaxel o u yo'm u tzij che u banic jun jasach ri man xuchomaj ta na," 
Numbers30:7 cac'ulextax c'ut, aretak c'u coc pa u jolom ri rachajil, man cuk'il ta c'u che u banic, ya'tal che chi cutz'akatisaj u banic ri xuchi'j o ri u yo'm u tzij che u banic." 
Numbers30:8 We c'u ri rachajil, aretak coc pa u jolom, cuk'il che qui banic, man ya'tal ta chi c'u ri' che chi cutz'akatisaj qui banic ri xebuchi'j xukuje' ri u yo'm u tzij che qui banic ri man xebuchomaj ta na. Ri Ajawaxel man cucoj ta na u chuk'ab che chi quebutz'atisaj qui banic." 
Numbers30:9 We ri cabanow jun chi'nic are jun malca'n o jachom, ya'tal che chi quebutz'akatisaj conojel ri u yo'm u tzij che qui banic." 
Numbers30:10 Aretak jun c'ulanic ixok cuban jun chi'nic o cuya' u tzij che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na c'o c'u ne cho rachoch ri rachajil," 
Numbers30:11 we ri rachajil, aretak coc pa u jolom, man cuk'il ta che u banic mawi ma ta cakaj pa u jolom ri cubano, ri are' ya'tal che chi quebutz'akatisaj tak ri xebuchi'j qui banic xukuje' ri xebuya' u tzij che qui banic." 
Numbers30:12 We c'u ri rachajil, aretak coc pa u jolom, cubij chi man queban taj, man ya'tal ta chi che chi quebutz'akatisaj are' c'ut ri rachajil xbin che chi man quebuban taj. Ri Ajawaxel man cucoj ta u chuk'ab che chi quebutz'akatisaj." 
Numbers30:13 Ri achajilaxel ya'tal che cujiquiba' u banic o cuk'il u banic apachique chi'nic o ri kas chi'nic ri cäban na ri chokinak wi ri rixokil xukuje' cätakchi'xic che man cäwa' taj. 
Numbers30:14 We ri are' man c'o ta jas cuban che u k'ilic, we c'u coc'ow jun xukuje' jun k'ij chic, rumal rech chi man c'o ta jas cubij quebujiquiba' conojel tak ri chi'nic o ri e u yo'm wi tak u tzij chi quebubano." 
Numbers30:15 We c'u c'äte cak'ilonic aretak oquinak chi pa u jolom, are' ba' queklenic chi ri ixok man catz'akatisan taj.”" 
Numbers30:16 E are' tak pixab wa' ri xebuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises ri rajawaxic cuban ri achajilaxel ruc' ri ixokilaxel, xukuje' ri tataxel ruc' ri mialaxel, aretak c'ä k'apoj, c'ä c'o c'u ne chuxe' ri u takanic ri u tat." 
Numbers31:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers31:2 “Chatz'alk'omij awib chquij ri aj madianib, pa qui bi' ri aj israelib, chwi chi c'u wa' catecämok.”" 
Numbers31:3 Xubij c'ut ri Moises che ri tinimit: “Jujun tak chiwe chebiwika' iwib che u banic ri ch'o'j, chbicämisaj c'ut ri aj madianib che u ya'ic rajil q'uexel chque pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers31:4 Chquijujunal tak ri amak' rajawaxic quebutak u bic jun mil achijab che u banic ch'o'j.” 
Numbers31:5 Je c'u ri', xecha' jujun mil achijab, chquixo'l ri cajch'ojab jujun amak' cablajuj mil chi conojel, e wiktal che u banic ri ch'o'j." 
Numbers31:6 Ri Moises xebutak u bic che u banic ch'o'j xcachilaj bic ri Pinees ri e ruc'am bic jastak ri e tastalic xukuje' tak ri trompet che u ya'ic ri takanic che u banic ri ch'o'j. (Ri u tat ri Pinees are' ri Eleazar cojol tabal tok'ob.) 
Numbers31:7 Xech'ojin c'u cuc' ri aj madianib xequicämisaj c'u conojel, je jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
Numbers31:8 Xquicämisaj ri Ebi, ri Requem, ri Zur, ri Hur xukuje' ri Reb, ri u bixic, ri job ajawinelab aj madianib, xukuje' ri Balaam (ri u tat ri Balaam are' ri Beor)." 
Numbers31:9 Ri aj israelib xecalabij bic ri ixokib aj madianib xukuje' ri alaj tak cal, xequitokij tak ri cawaj, ri e qui wacax xukuje' ri jastak ri pakal cajil;" 
Numbers31:10 man xuwi ta c'u wa' xane' xequiporoj conojel tak ri qui tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak qui kajebal. 
Numbers31:11 Conojel c'ut ri xequitokij chque, chi winak chi awaj," 
Numbers31:12 xequic'am u bic chuwäch ri Moises, xukuje' chuwäch ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' chquiwäch ri aj israelib, ri e kajinak chupam ri lianic re Moab, chunakaj ri Jordan ri c'o chuwäch ri Jerico." 
Numbers31:13 Ri Moises, ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri e c'amal tak u be ri tinimit xebel ulok chrij ri kajebal che qui c'ulaxic." 
Numbers31:14 Are' c'u ri Moises xpe royowal chque ri e c'amal tak qui be jun mil xukuje' jun sient e banal tak ch'o'j, ri xetzelej ulok che u banic ch'o'j," 
Numbers31:15 xubij c'u chque: “¿Jasche xebic'asba' can ri ixokib? 
Numbers31:16 E are' c'u ne xebux ajchak'mac rumal ri u yoj no'j ri Balaam, xequic'am bic ri aj israelib che u c'ulelaxic ri Ajawaxel xquik'ijilaj c'ut ri Baal-peor. Rumal rech wa' ri Ajawaxel xuc'äjisaj u wäch ri u tinimit rumal jun cämisanic." 
Numbers31:17 Kas camic chebicämisaj ri alaj tak alabom xukuje' conojel ri ixokib ri man e k'apojib taj. 
Numbers31:18 Ri k'apojib chebic'asba' canok checanaj c'u can iwuc'. 
Numbers31:19 Conojel c'ut ri c'o qui cämisam o qui nakom jun cäminak, checanaj can wukub k'ij chrij ri kajebal. Ri ix xukuje' ri e i c'amom bic pa che' rajawaxic quequich'ajch'ojirisaj tak quib churox k'ij xukuje' chuwuk k'ij." 
Numbers31:20 Chich'ajch'ojirisaj xukuje' ri atz'iak xukuje' conojel ri jastak re tz'um, re rismal q'uisic' o re che'.”" 
Numbers31:21 Ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob xubij chque conojel ri ajch'ojab ri xec'oji' chupam ri ch'o'j: “Are jun pixab wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: 
Numbers31:22 Ri jastak re k'an puak, re sak puak, re k'an ch'ich', re räx ch'ich', re woc ch'ich' o räxmamaj ch'ich'" 
Numbers31:23 (ronojel ri cuch'ij ri k'ak'), rajawaxic quebich'ajch'ojirisaj quebiya' chupam ri k'ak' quebich'aj c'ut ruc' ja' re ch'ajch'ojirisabal. Ri jastak ri man quequich'ij ta ri k'ak', quebich'ajch'ojirisaj xak xuwi ruc' ja'." 
Numbers31:24 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij rajawaxic caquich'aj ri catz'iak, quecanaj can ch'ajch'oj. C'äte c'u ri' cuya' queboc chupam ri kajebal.”" 
Numbers31:25 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: 
Numbers31:26 “Ruc' ri u to'banic ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri jujun tak ja winak re ri tinimit, chebawajilaj tak ri winak xukuje' tak ri awaj ri xetokix chque ri aj madianib," 
Numbers31:27 chabana' quieb chque, chajacha' ri jun pa niq'uiaj chquiwäch ri xepe pa ri ch'o'j ri jun pa niq'uiaj chic chquiwäch ri man xebe ta pa ri ch'o'j." 
Numbers31:28 Chac'ama' can jubik' chwe in: chque ri cäya' chque ri ajch'ojab, ri winak xukuje' tak ri wacax, ri e bur tak xukuje' tak ri chij, camajij na jun chque jujun jo' tak sient (500)" 
Numbers31:29 quebaya' c'u che ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob che cuchuj chwe in. 
Numbers31:30 Ri pa niq'uiaj ri xya' chque ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, ri winak, ri wacax tak, xukuje' tak ri chij, o chque conojel ri awaj, cawesaj jun chque ri cawinak lajuj (50) quebaya' c'u chque ri aj levitib ri quebanow ri patanijic chupam ri quink'ijilax wi.”" 
Numbers31:31 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar je xquibano jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises. 
Numbers31:32 Ronojel ri xtokix che ri c'ulel, man xebajilax ta c'ut ri xequic'am ri banal tak ch'o'j pa quech wi, e wakib sient oxc'al olajuj mil (675,000) chij," 
Numbers31:33 oxc'al cablajuj mil (72,000) wacax," 
Numbers31:34 oxc'al jun mil (61,000) ama'ib tak bur," 
Numbers31:35 juwinak cablajuj mil (32,000) alitomab k'apojib." 
Numbers31:36 Rumal c'u ri', ri pa niq'uiaj ri xya'taj chque ri ajch'ojab e oxib sient juwinak wuklajuj mil ruc' job sient (337,500) chij." 
Numbers31:37 Chque wa' xeya' wakib sient oxc'al olajuj (675) jacha' cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel Dios; 
Numbers31:38 chque ri juwinak waklajuj mil (36,000) wacax xeya' oxc'al cablajuj (72) jacha' cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel;" 
Numbers31:39 chque ri juwinak lajuj mil ruc' job sient (30,500) ama'ib tak bur xeya' oxc'al jun (61) jacha' cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel;" 
Numbers31:40 chque c'ut ri waklajuj mil (16,000) alitomab xeya' juwinak cablajuj (32) jacha' cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers31:41 Ri Moises xujach ri cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel che ri Eleazar, ri cojol tabal tok'ob, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che." 
Numbers31:42 Ri pa niq'uiaj chic che ri xya'taj chque ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic ri xutas ri Moises che ri xya'taj chque ri ajch'ojab," 
Numbers31:43 xak junam ruc' wa', o e: oxib sient juwinak wuklajuj mil ruc' job sient (337,500) chij." 
Numbers31:44 Juwinak waklajuj mil (36,000) wacax," 
Numbers31:45 juwinak lajuj mil ruc' job sient (30,500) ama'ib tak bur" 
Numbers31:46 xukuje' waklajuj mil (16,000) alitomab." 
Numbers31:47 Che we pa niq'uiaj ri', ri Moises xresaj jun che catak winak lajuj (50), jas ri xuban chque ri winak xukuje' xuban chque ri awaj, xebuya' chque ri aj levitib ri quepatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal che ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm che." 
Numbers31:48 E are' c'ut ri c'amal tak be ri xenabej chquiwäch jun mil (1,000) xukuje' jun sient (100) ajch'ojab, xebe che rilic ri Moises" 
Numbers31:49 xquibij c'u che: “Uj ri uj pataninel awech e kajilam ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o chquixe' ri ka takanic, man c'o ta c'u jun ri ma ta c'olic." 
Numbers31:50 E ka c'amom c'u ulok ri jastak ri' e re k'an puak ri xekarik chi ka jujunal: wikbal tak k'abaj, wikbal u kul tak k'abaj, mul k'ab tak u witak xquinaj xukuje' jule' tak wikbal chic, che u chi'xic che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che ka q'uexwäch chi man c'o ta xkataklebej.”" 
Numbers31:51 Ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar xequic'am conojel ri jastak re k'an puak chque. 
Numbers31:52 Ri k'an puak ri xquichi'j jacha' che cuchuj ri c'amal tak be ri xetakan puwi' jun mil xukuje' jun sient ajch'ojab, ri xpajanic c'o na chuwäch quiejeb quintal ruc' job libra," 
Numbers31:53 chquijujunal ri ajch'ojab c'o xequic'am ulok che ri xtokix che ri c'ulel. 
Numbers31:54 Je c'u ri', ri Moises xukuje' ri Eleazar xequic'am chque ri c'amal tak be ri k'an puak ri e qui c'amom ulok, xquic'am c'u bic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib are' che ri Ajawaxel rech quenataj c'u na ri aj israelib che." 
Numbers32:1 Ri e amak', ri re ri Ruben xukuje' ri re ri Gad sibalaj e q'ui ri qui wacax e c'olic. Aretak xquilo chi ri e rulew ri Jazer xukuje' ri re Galaad sibalaj e utz che qui pok'isaxic wacax," 
Numbers32:2 xebe che rilic ri Moises, ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e c'amal tak u be ri tinimit, xequibij c'u chque:" 
Numbers32:3 “Chiwilampe': ri ulew tak re Atarot, re Dibon, re Jazer, re Nimra, re Hesbon, re Eleal, re Sebam, re Neb xukuje' ri re Beon," 
Numbers32:4 ri u ch'äcom ri Ajawaxel che ri tinimit re Israel, e ulew ri e yuk'bal tak wacax, e c'o c'ut qui wacax ri e pataninel tak awech." 
Numbers32:5 We utz cawilo, chaya' we ulew ri' chke, mujak'axej c'ut ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Moises chque: “¿La are' ta quiwaj ix quixcanaj ta can waral e are' ta c'ut ri e iwachalal quebe ta che u banic ch'o'j? 
Numbers32:7 ¿Jasche qui ban chque ri aj israelib chi caqueblaj qui c'u'x rech man quek'ax ta chupam ri ulew ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chque? 
Numbers32:8 Are jewa' ri xquiban ri e i tat aretak xebantak bic pa Cades-barney che rilic we ulew ri'. 
Numbers32:9 Xebopan c'ä ruc' ri alaj nima' re Escol xquinic'oj c'ut ri ulew, xquiban c'ut chi xqueblaj qui c'u'x ri aj israelib rech man queboc ta chupam ri ulew ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chque." 
Numbers32:10 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xpe royowal pa ri k'ij ri', xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na" 
Numbers32:11 chi ri winak ri ebelinak ulok pa Ejipt ri e c'o chic juwinak qui junab cäpakic man quequila' ta na u wäch ri ulew ri xinchi'j chque chi quinya' che ri Abraham ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob, rumal rech chi man xetaken ta che ruc' jicomal." 
Numbers32:12 Xuwi' ri Caleb xukuje' ri Josue jic u takexic ri Ajawaxel xquibano. (Ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon ri aj senezeyib, ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Nun.)" 
Numbers32:13 Ri Ajawaxel xpe royowal chque ri aj israelib xuban c'u chque chi xebinicat chi na cawinak junab chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, c'ä man c'o ta jun xc'asi' ta can chque ri xquiyac royowal cumal ri itzel tak qui banoj." 
Numbers32:14 Are c'u ri ix camic ri ix qui c'ojolaxelab ri tataxelab aj maquib, quiwaj u banic ri xquiban ri e i tat, che u walijisaxic chi jumul ri royowal ri Ajawaxel chrij ri Israel." 
Numbers32:15 We ri ix man quiwaj ta quitakej ri Ajawaxel, ri are' cuban na chi ri aj israelib quecanaj chi na can q'ui k'ijol chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, ix c'u ri' ri quixmacubenic chi cäsachisax na qui wäch.”" 
Numbers32:16 Xekeb c'u ruc' ri Moises xquibij c'u che: “Ri cäkaj uj chi quekaban tak qui warabal tak ri e ka chij xukuje' tak ri e ka wacax, xukuje' tak tinimit chque tak ri kachalaxic." 
Numbers32:17 C'äte c'u ri' kas uj cakawik na kib ruc' aninakil cuj nabej c'u chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, c'ä quekac'am na bic chupam ri culew. E are' tak c'ut, ri e kachalaxic quecanaj can chquipam ri tak tinimit, ri co quecanajic rech man c'o ta caquic'ulmaj pa qui k'ab ri winak ri e jekel chupam we ulew ri'." 
Numbers32:18 Man cujtzelej ta na cho tak kachoch we ta ma ta conojel ri aj israelib e qui majim chi tak ri kas culew. 
Numbers32:19 Rumal c'u rech chi ri kulew canajinak jewa', pa ri elebal k'ij che ri nima' Jordan, man quekatokij ta chic ulew ch'käp che ri Jordan, mawi c'äjela'.”" 
Numbers32:20 Ri Moises xutzelej c'u u bixic chque: “We quebitz'akatisaj tak ri i tzij quebiwik c'u iwib che u banic ri ch'o'j chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel," 
Numbers32:21 we iwonojel ix i wikom tak iwib qui ramij ri nima' Jordan chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel, quixcanaj c'u can chila' c'ä ri Ajawaxel quebuq'uiak na bic conojel tak ri e u c'ulel" 
Numbers32:22 u ch'äcom ta c'u ri ulew, c'äte c'u ri' cuya' quixtzelejic, man c'o ta chi c'u i c'as cacanaj ta can ruc' ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ruc' ri Israel. Cacanaj c'ut we u ulew ri' che iwechbal je jas c'u u bim ri Ajawaxel." 
Numbers32:23 We c'u man jewa' qui bano, chiwetamaj chi quiban jun macaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel copan c'u na ri c'äjisabal i wäch rumal we macaj ri'." 
Numbers32:24 Chebiyaca' ba' ri tinimit tak chque tak ri e iwachalal xukuje' tak warabal chque tak ri e i chij, chi tz'akatisaj c'ut ri i tzij.”" 
Numbers32:25 Ri e rija'lil ri Gad xukuje' ri e rech ri Ruben xquitzelej u bixic che: “We pataninel tak awech ri' caquiban na ri e a takom che qui banic. 
Numbers32:26 Ri e kixokil xukuje' ri ch'utik tak ka c'ojol, quecachilaj ri wacax xukuje' conojel tak ri kawaj, quecanaj na canok waral chquipam tak ri tinimit re Galaad," 
Numbers32:27 are c'u ri uj, ri uj pataninel tak awech, cakawik tak kib cujbe c'u che u banic ri ch'o'j chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ri uj a takom che u banic.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ri Moises xebuya' c'u tak we takanic ri' che ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob, che ri Josue xukuje' chque ri c'amal tak be quech jujun tak ja winak ri e quech ri jalan tak amak' re Israel:" 
Numbers32:29 “We conojel ri achijab quech ri ramak' ri Gad xukuje' ri Ruben queboc'ow junam iwuc' chupam ri Jordan qui wikom tak quib che u banic ri ch'o'j chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel cäquich'äc ta c'u na ri ulew, c'äte c'u ri' ri ix quijach na ri ulew re Galaad pa qui k'ab jacha' kas che culew." 
Numbers32:30 We c'u man quek'axic quiwikom quib, caquitaklebej c'u na jun ulew chixo'l ix chupam ri ulew Canaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 Ri e rachalaxic ri Gad xukuje' ri rech ri Ruben xquitzelej u bixic: “Cakaban na ri u takom u banic ri Ajawaxel chque we e pataninel tak awech ri'. 
Numbers32:32 Cujk'ax na ka wikom kib cujoc chupam ri ulew Canaan cakanimaj ri Ajawaxel, cacanaj c'u na ri ulew pa ka k'ab ri c'o pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan jacha' che kechbal.”" 
Numbers32:33 Jeri' chque ri amak' tak re Gad re Ruben, xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases, ri Moises xebuya' chque ri ulew re Sehon, ajawinel aj amoreyib, xukuje' ri rech ri Og, ajawinel re Basan, xerachilaj ri tinimit tak ri e u tz'akatil xukuje' tak ri ulew ri e c'o chrij." 
Numbers32:34 Ri e aj ramak' ri Gad xequiban qui banic tak ri tinimit ri e rech ri Dibon, ri Atarot, ri Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 ri Atarot-sopan, ri Jazer, ri Jogbe," 
Numbers32:36 ri Bet-nimra xukuje' ri Bet-aran, co c'u xquiban chque xukuje' xequiban tak qui warabal ri qui chij." 
Numbers32:37 Ri e aj ramak' ri Ruben xequiban qui banic tak ri tinimit ri rech ri Hesbon, ri Eleal, ri Quiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 ri Neb, ri Baal-meon xukuje' ri Sibma, xeq'uex c'u tak ri qui bi' jujun chque xequicoj c'u ri qui bi' chquij ri xebanow qui banic." 
Numbers32:39 Ri e rachalaxic ri Maquir (u c'ojol ri Manases) xquimajij ri ulew re Galaad xquiban c'u quech che, xequiq'uiak bic ri aj amoreyib ri e jekel chila'." 
Numbers32:40 Are c'u ri Moises xujach ri ulew re Galaad pa qui k'ab ri e rachalaxic ri Maquir, xejeki' c'u wa' chila'." 
Numbers32:41 Ri Jair, rachalaxic ri Manases, xuban rech che jujun tak qui tinimit ri aj amoreyib xucoj c'ut Habot-jair che qui bi'." 
Numbers32:42 Ri jumulaj aj Noba xquimajij ri Kenat xukuje' tak ri tinimit ri e c'o pa u k'ab, xucoj c'ut ri kas u bi' chrij, Noba." 
Numbers33:1 E are tak c'olbal wa' ri xejeki' wi tak ri aj israelib aretak xebel ulok pa Ejipt ri qui cholajim wi quib e jacha' e banal tak ch'o'j, c'amom qui be rumal ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron." 
Numbers33:2 Ri Moises xebutz'ibaj tak ri qui bi' ri c'olbal ri quebel wi tak u bic, jun c'olbal jun c'olbal chic, je jas ri takanic cuya' ri Ajawaxel che, e are' tak c'olbal wa' jawije' ri xebel wi bic." 
Numbers33:3 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses chupam ri olajuj rajilabal ri nabe ic' re ri junab, che ri ucab k'ij che rokowisaxic ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem. Xebel bic ruc' jun nimalaj cuinem chquiwäch c'u conojel ri aj ejiptib," 
Numbers33:4 ri aj ejiptib cätajin quequimukla' tak conojel ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol, are c'u xbanow ri Ajawaxel chi xecämic, rumal c'u wa' u k'atom tzij paquiwi' tak ri e qui diosib." 
Numbers33:5 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses xebekaj pa Sucot. 
Numbers33:6 Xebel bic pa Sucot xebekaj pa Etam, pa ri u c'ulbatil ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Numbers33:7 Xebel bic pa Etam, xecotinic xebe che u suq'uil ri Pi-hahirot, ri c'o pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Baal-zepon, xekaj c'u chuwäch ri Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Xebel c'u bic Pa-hahirot, xquiramij ri plo xebopan c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak. Oxib k'ij xebin chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Etam xebekaj c'u pa Mar." 
Numbers33:9 Xebel bic pa Mar xebopan pa Elim, jawije' e c'o wi cablajuj bulbux ja' xukuje' oxc'al lajuj juwi' tak tut xebekaj c'u chila'." 
Numbers33:10 Xebel bic pa Elim xebekaj c'u chunakaj ri Quiäk Plo. 
Numbers33:11 Xebel bic chunakaj ri Quiäk Plo xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin. 
Numbers33:12 Xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin xebekaj c'u pa Dopca. 
Numbers33:13 Xebel bic pa Dopca xebakaj c'u pa Alus. 
Numbers33:14 Xebel chi bic pa Alus xebekaj c'u pa Repidim, jawije' ri man c'o ta wi qui ja' ri winak ri xcuq'uiaj taj." 
Numbers33:15 Xebel bic pa Repidim xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai. 
Numbers33:16 Xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai xebekaj c'u pa Kibrot-hataab. 
Numbers33:17 Xebel bic pa Kibrot-hataab xebekaj c'u pa Hazerot. 
Numbers33:18 Xebel bic pa Hazerot xebekaj c'u pa Ritma. 
Numbers33:19 Xebel bic pa Ritma xebekaj pa Rimon-peres. 
Numbers33:20 Xebel bic pa Rimon-peres xebekaj c'u pa Libna. 
Numbers33:21 Xebel bic pa Libna xebekaj c'u pa Ris. 
Numbers33:22 Xebel bic pa Ris xebekaj c'u pa Seelat. 
Numbers33:23 Xebel bic pa Seelat xebekaj chupam ri juyub Seper. 
Numbers33:24 Xebel bic chupam ri juyub Seper xebekaj c'u pa Harad. 
Numbers33:25 Xebel bic pa Harad xebekaj c'u pa Maselot. 
Numbers33:26 Xebel bic pa Maselot xebekaj c'u pa Tahat. 
Numbers33:27 Xebel bic pa Tahat xebekaj pa Tar. 
Numbers33:28 Xebel bic pa Tar xebekaj c'u pa Mitca. 
Numbers33:29 Xebel bic pa Mitca xebekaj c'u pa Hasmon. 
Numbers33:30 Xebel bic pa Hasmon xebekaj c'u pa Moserot. 
Numbers33:31 Xebel bic pa Moserot xebekaj c'u pa Bene-jaacan. 
Numbers33:32 Xebel bic pa Bene-jaacan xebekaj c'u pa Hor re Jidgad. 
Numbers33:33 Xebel bic pa Hor re Jidgad xebekaj pa Jotbat. 
Numbers33:34 Xebel bic pa Jotbat xebekaj c'u pa Abron. 
Numbers33:35 Xebel bic pa Abron xebekaj c'u pa Ezion-jeber. 
Numbers33:36 Xebel bic pa Ezion-jeber xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin, ri u bixic wa' pa Cades." 
Numbers33:37 Xebel bic pa Cades xebekaj c'u chunakaj ri juyub Hor, chupam ri u c'ulbatil ri Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Rumal ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel, ri Aaron ri cojol tabal tok'ob xpaki' puwi' ri juyub Hor, chila' c'u xecäm wi chupam ri nabe k'ij rech ri ro' ic' re ri junab cawinak, chapom ulok rajilaxic pa ri k'ij ri xebel bic ri aj israelib pa Ejipt." 
Numbers33:39 Aretak xecäm ri Aaron puwi' ri juyub Hor, jun sient juwinak oxib (123) u junab." 
Numbers33:40 Ri ajawinel aj cananeyib re Arad ri jekel pa ri Negueb re Canaan, xoc pa u jolom ri copanem ri aj israelib." 
Numbers33:41 Xebel bic chupam ri juyub Hor xebekaj c'u pa Zalmon. 
Numbers33:42 Xebel bic pa Zalmon xebekaj c'u pa Punon. 
Numbers33:43 Xebel bic pa Punon xebekaj c'u pa Obot. 
Numbers33:44 Xebe bic pa Obot xekaj c'u pa Ije-abarim, chupam ri u c'ulbatil ri Moab." 
Numbers33:45 Xebel bic pa Ije-abarim xebekaj c'u pa Dibon-gad. 
Numbers33:46 Xebel bic pa Dibon-gad xebekaj c'u pa Almon-diblataim. 
Numbers33:47 Xebel bic pa Almon-diblataim xebekaj c'ut chquipam tak ri juyub re Abarim, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Neb." 
Numbers33:48 Xebel bic chquipam tak ri juyub re Abarim xebekaj c'ut chquipam tak ri lianic re Moab, chunakaj ri nima' Jordan, ri c'o chuwäch ri Jerico." 
Numbers33:49 Ri tinimit xkaj chunakaj ri Jordan e latz'ebeninak bic kas pa Bet-jesimot c'ä pa Abel-sitim pa tak ri lianic re Moab. 
Numbers33:50 Pa tak ri lianic re Moab chunakaj ri nima' Jordan, ri c'o chuwäch ri Jerico, ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers33:51 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: aretak ri ix quixoc'ow chupam ri Jordan quixoc c'u pa ri ulew Canaan," 
Numbers33:52 chebiwesaj bic conojel ri winak ri e c'o chupam ri ulew, chebipaxij conojel tak ri wächbal ri e c'o cuc' re abaj re porom ch'ich', chebikasaj conojel tak ri e qui k'ijilabal ri e c'o paquiwi' tak ri juyub." 
Numbers33:53 Chich'äca' ri ulew chixjekel c'u chupam, rumal rech chi ri in quinjach pa i k'ab rech quixc'oji' chupam." 
Numbers33:54 Rajawaxic c'ut quijach pa taklebenic chquixo'l tak ri ija'lil que conojel ri amak'; chque ri ija'lil ri sibalaj e q'ui caya' na jun ulew chque ri nim na, chque ri man kas ta e q'ui jun ulew ri man kas ta nim; chquijujunal ri ija'lil cäquic'am na ri cuc'ut ri taklebenic chque." 
Numbers33:55 We c'u ri ix man quebiq'uiak ta bic ri winak ri e c'o pa ri ulew, ri quecanaj can chila' quequiban na c'ax chiwe jacha' jun u xer che' pa ri bak'wächaj o jacha' q'uix chupam ri cuerp, aretak ri ix quixjeki' pa ri ulew;" 
Numbers33:56 quinban c'u na chiwe jachique ri nu chomam u banic chque.” 
Numbers34:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers34:2 “Chaya' quibixic we jastak ri' chque ri aj israelib: Chanim quixoc na pa ri ulew re Canaan. Are c'u ulew wa' ri cux na iwech, e are c'u tak u c'ulbatil wa':" 
Numbers34:3 Ri c'ulbatil pa ri mox k'ab cäc'ulbatin na ruc' ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin xukuje' ruc' ri rulew ri Edom. Cätakenic cäbe pa ri elebal k'ij, ri c'ulbat cächaptaj na chu chi' ri u mox ri Cäminak Cho," 
Numbers34:4 catakenic cäbe pa ri mox k'ab quetakal c'ä pa ri pakapic re Acrabim, coc'ow na pa Zin copan c'u na c'ä pa Cades-barney. Cätekextan c'u pa Hasar-adar quetakal c'ä pa Asmon," 
Numbers34:5 quel pa Asmon cätaken c'ä ruc' ri alaj nima' ri cac'ulbatin ruc' ri Ejipt, queq'uis u tza'm c'ä chuchi' ri plo ri Mediteran." 
Numbers34:6 Ri c'ulbat pa ri kajebal k'ij cac'ulbatin ruc' ri u tak'aj ri plo ri Mediteran. 
Numbers34:7 Che ri c'ulbat pa ri iquiak'ab, chicojo' jun c'ulbat cachaptaj bic ruc' ri plo ri Mediteran quetakal c'ä pa ri juyub Hor," 
Numbers34:8 cachaptaj chubic ruc' ri juyub Hor quetakal c'ä chuchi' ri oquibal re Hamat, cätakextan c'u c'ä pa Zedad." 
Numbers34:9 Kas pa Zedad, we c'ulbat ri' re iquiak'ab catakenic copan c'ä pa Zipron queq'uis c'ä pa Hazar-enan." 
Numbers34:10 Che ri c'ulbat pa elebal k'ij, chicojo' jun c'ulbat kas pa Hazar-enan c'ä pa Sepam," 
Numbers34:11 quel pa Sepam copan pa Ribla, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Ain; chila' cächaptaj bic ri c'ulbat cakaj bic pa ri xcutaj che ri elebal k'ij che ri cho Sineret," 
Numbers34:12 cätaken c'u pa ri nima' Jordan quetakal c'ä chupam ri Cäminak Cho. We c'ulbat tak ri' e are' ri u q'uisbalil ri iwulew.” 
Numbers34:13 Ri Moises xebuya' tak we takanic ri chque ri aj israelib: “Are ulew wa' ri qui jacha' chiwäch cumal taklebenic; are ri ulew ri u yo'm wi takanic ri Ajawaxel chi cäya' chque ri belejeb amak' ruc' pa niq'uiaj ri c'ä maja' caya' culew," 
Numbers34:14 e quieb amak' c'ut ruc' pa niq'uiaj, ri u bixic, ri ramak' ri Ruben xukuje' ri ramak' ri Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj rech ri Manases, xc'amtaj ri culew ri ya'tal chque ri jujun tak ja winak, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan, ri c'o chuwäch ri Jerico.”" 
Numbers34:15  
Numbers34:16 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers34:17 “Ri quebejachow ri ulew chiwäch are' ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob cärachilaj ri Josue (ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Nun). 
Numbers34:18 Chisiq'uij xukuje' jun c'amal be re jujun amak', che u jachic ri ulew." 
Numbers34:19 Ri achijab ri rajawaxic quebisiq'uij e are' tak wa': Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Juda: ri Caleb (ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon). 
Numbers34:20 Che ri rech ri Simeon: ri Semuel (ri u tat ri Semuel are' ri Amihud). 
Numbers34:21 Che ri rech ri Benjamin: ri Elidad (ri u tat ri Elidad are' ri Quixlon). 
Numbers34:22 Che ri rech ri Dan: ri c'amal be Buqui (ri u tat ri Buqui are' ri Jogli). 
Numbers34:23 Chque ri camak' ri e u c'ojol ri Jose: ri c'amal be Haniel (ri u tat ri Haniel are' ri Epod) che ri rech ri Manases; 
Numbers34:24 are' c'u ri c'amal be Kemuel (ri u tat ri Kemuel are' ri Siptan) che ri rech ri Eprain. 
Numbers34:25 Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Zabulon: ri c'amal be Elizapan (ri u tat ri Elizapan are' ri Parnac). 
Numbers34:26 Che ri rech ri Isacar: ri c'amal be Paltiel (ri u tat ri Paltiel are' ri Azan). 
Numbers34:27 Che ri rech ri Aser: ri c'amal be Ahiud (ri u tat ri Ahiud are' ri Selom). 
Numbers34:28 Che ri rech ri Neptali: ri c'amal be Pedael (ri u tat ri Pedael are' ri Amihud).” 
Numbers34:29 E are' tak wa' ri xebutak ri Ajawaxel che u jachic ri ulew Canaan chquiwäch ri aj israelib. 
Numbers35:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises chupam tak ri lianic re Moab, chunakaj ri Jordan, chuwäch ri Jerico, xubij c'u che:" 
Numbers35:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi, che ri ulew ri cäyataj chque, chequiya' chque ri aj levitib tak tinimit ri quejeki' wi na, cheyok xukuje' chque ri juyub tak re yuk'bal ri e c'o chquij tak ri tinimit." 
Numbers35:3 Ri aj levitib quejeki' na pa tak ri tinimit ri', pa tak ri juyub quequiya' wi na ri qui wacax xukuje' ri jule' tak cäwaj chic." 
Numbers35:4 Ri juyub tak re yuk'bal ri rajawaxic queya' chque caquilic' na quib chrij ri tinimit, juwinak quieb c'am quetan chrij ri nimalaj tapia." 
Numbers35:5 Ronojel ri ulew cux na cajtzalaj re cawinak quiejeb (44) c'am pa jujun u xcut, ri u bixic, xak junam quetan pa ri elebal k'ij xukuje' pa ri u kajebal k'ij, pa ri iquiak'ab xukuje' pa ri mox k'ab. Ri tinimit cacanaj can pa niq'uiajil, chque tak ri juyub re yuk'bal ri e c'o chrij." 
Numbers35:6 Chque ri tak tinimit ri quebiya' chque ri aj levitib, wakib (6) quebux na to'tajisabal ib jawije' cuya' cutzucuj wi to'bal rib ri winak ri u cämisam jachin jun. Chque we tak tinimit ri' quebitik chi na cawinak quieb (42);" 
Numbers35:7 chnimalaj ronojel, rajawaxic quebiya' chque ri aj levitib cawinak wajxakib tak tinimit quecachilaj tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
Numbers35:8 Ri tak tinimit ri quebiya' chque ri aj levitib ri quebiwesaj chque ri niq'uiaj chi aj israelib, chquijujunal tak ri amak' rajawaxic je caquiya' jas ri u q'uiyal ri xquitaklebej: chque tak ri ulew ri e nimak na, e q'ui tak ri tinimit ri quec'am na chque; chque tak ri ulew ri man kas ta e nimak, man e q'ui ta ri tinimit tak ri quec'am chque.”" 
Numbers35:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: 
Numbers35:10 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: aretak ri ix qui ramij ri nima' Jordan che ri oquem pa Canaan," 
Numbers35:11 rajawaxic quebicha' jujun tak tinimit che to'tajisabal ib, ri cuya' cutzucuj wi to'bal rib ri winak ri man are ta u chomanic xucämisaj ta jun winak." 
Numbers35:12 Chila' cäto'taj wi pa u k'ab ri rachalal ri cäminak ri cäraj cuya' rajil c'axelal che, man cäcäm ta c'u na c'ä cutac'aba' na rib chuwäch ri tinimit rech cäk'at tzij puwi'." 
Numbers35:13 Chque tak ri tinimit, wakib quecanaj che to'tajisabal ib:" 
Numbers35:14 Oxib quecanaj pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan oxib c'ut quecanaj pa Canaan. 
Numbers35:15 We wakib tinimit tak ri' e tinimit re to'tajisabal ib, chque ri aj israelib jacha' xukuje' chque ri man e qui winakil ta ri e jekelic o xak e solinelab e c'o a pam chixo'l. Chila' cuya' cato'tajisaj wi rib ronojel ri man xuchomaj ta xucämisaj jun winak." 
Numbers35:16 We c'o jachin jun cusoc jun winak ruc' jun ch'ich', cäcäm c'ut ri xsoquic, jun cämisanic wa', ri cämisanel cäc'okox na che cämical:" 
Numbers35:17 We c'o jachin jun cuch'ay jun winak ruc' jun abaj ri cuc'am ulok cämical, cacäm c'ut ri xch'ay che abaj, jun cämisanic wa', ri cämisanel cac'okox na che cämical." 
Numbers35:18 We c'o jachin cuch'ay jun winak ruc' jun che' ri cuc'am ulok ri u cämical, cäcäm c'ut ri xch'ayic, jun cämisanic wa', ri cämisanel cac'okox na che cämical." 
Numbers35:19 Ri rachalal ri cäminak ri nakaj na che are' cäcämisan na ri cämisanel aretak curiko. 
Numbers35:20 We c'o jachin jun cuch'iquimij jun winak rumal oyowal, o we cuq'uiak jun jasach chrij cuc' itzel tak chomanic," 
Numbers35:21 o rumal c'ulelam ib cuch'ay cuc' tak ri e u k'ab, cäcäm c'ut ri winak, ri ajchak'mac cäc'okox na che cämical cämisanel c'u wa'. Ri rachalal ri cäminak ri nakaj na che are' cacämisan na ri cämisanel aretak curiko." 
Numbers35:22 We c'u ne c'o jachin jun xak c'ätetal cuch'iquimij jun winak, man rumal ta c'ulelanic, o we cuq'uiak jun jasach chrij ri man ruc' ta itzel chomanic," 
Numbers35:23 o man xril ta xuq'uiak jun abaj ri cäcämisanic, cakaj c'ut ri abaj puwi' cäcämisax c'u rumal man qui c'ulel ta c'u quib mawi u choman ta u banic jun c'ax che." 
Numbers35:24 Are c'u ri tinimit cux na k'atal tzij chquixo'l, ri xbanow ri cämic ruc' ri rachalal ri cäminak ri cäraj cutoj rajil q'uexelal ri cämical ri xbanic, je jastak we cholajil ri'." 
Numbers35:25 Ri tinimit rajawaxic cuto' na u wi' ri xbanow ri cämic rech man catoj ta rajil c'axelal che rumal ri rachalal ri xcäm rumal, cuban c'u na chi catzelej pa ri tinimit re to'bal ib jawije' ri u tzucum wi to'bal rib. Ri xcämisanic rajawaxic cäcanaj chila' c'ä cacäm na ri quinimal ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob ri kas tastalic." 
Numbers35:26 We c'u quel bic chrij ri rulewal ri tinimit re to'tajisabal ib," 
Numbers35:27 ri rachalal ri xcämisaxic man c'o ta jun il cäkaj ta puwi' we curik chrij cucämisaj ta c'ut. 
Numbers35:28 Ri xcämisanic rajawaxic cäcanaj chupam ri tinimit re to'tajisabal ib c'ä cäcäm na ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob. C'äte ri' cuya' cätzelej pa ri rulew. 
Numbers35:29 We e chomanic tak ri' e jun pixab wa' chiwe ri quek'ax cuc' ri tataxelab quebopan c'u cuc' ri c'ojolaxelab, apawije' ta ne ri quixjeki' wi.”" 
Numbers35:30 “Xuwi rumal ri qui k'alajisanic quieb oxib cuya' cac'okox jun cämisanel che cämical. Xa jun k'alajisanel man cubana' ta che u c'okoxic ta jun winak che cämical. 
Numbers35:31 Man cuya' ta cac'am puak che u q'uexwäch ri u c'aslemal jun cämisanel ri c'okotajinak che cämical; we winak ri' rajawaxic cäcämic. 
Numbers35:32 Man cuya' taj cac'am puak rech cäya' ta che ri cämisanel ri xutzucuj u to'tajisaxic rib chupam jun chque tak ri tinimit ri e c'utum rech cätzelej ta chupam ri rulew c'ä mojok chcäm ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob. 
Numbers35:33 Miwawasij ri ulew ri quixxejekel wi na cuc' tak cämisanic, ri cämisanic cärawasij ri ulew man c'o ta c'u jas caya' ta che u q'uexwäch ri cämisanel we ta ma ta are ri u cämisaxic ri xbanow ri cämisanic." 
Numbers35:34 Miwawasij ri ulew ri quixxejekel wi na ri xukuje' quinejekel wi na, in c'ut ri Ajawaxel, in jekel chquixo'l ri aj israelib.”" 
Numbers36:1 Ri e c'amal tak be que jujun ja tak winak chque ri e rachalaxic ri Galaad, kas e rija'lil ri Maquir, ri Manases xukuje' ri Jose, xebe che u bixic che ri Moises xukuje' chque ri e c'amal tak qui be jujun tak ja winak aj israelib, xebechok c'u chque:" 
Numbers36:2 “Ri Ajawaxel xuya' takanic chi at, Moises, cajach na ri ulew rumal taklebenic chquiwäch ri aj israelib ri caquitakej na chquijujunal, xukuje' xatutako chi ri ulew ri ya'tal che ri Zelopehad, ri xukuje' kachalal, chi chaya' chque ri e u mia'l." 
Numbers36:3 We c'u ri e are' quec'ule cuc' alabom ri e rech jun amak' chic aj israel, ri ulew ri cäyataj chque man u tz'akatil ta chic ri ka amak' cak'ax na pa u k'ab ri qui amak' ri quec'ule wi. Jeri' cächapletaj na resaxic jubik' che ri xya'taj chke rumal taklebenic." 
Numbers36:4 Aretak c'u queltakal ri junab re torobal pa Israel, ri culew wa' kas xa jumul cäk'ax na pa u k'ab ri jun amak' chic man c'u u tz'akatil ta chic ri kech.”" 
Numbers36:5 Are c'u ri Moises, je jastak ri pixbenic ri xebuya' ri Ajawaxel che, xuya' we takanic ri' chque ri aj israelib: “Ri achijab ri e rech ri ramak' ri Jose c'o rumal ri cäquibij." 
Numbers36:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' na c'olbal chi ri e u mia'l ri Zelopehad quec'ule ruc' jachin ri cäcaj wi, xuwi ta ne we e rachalaxic ri amak' ri quebel wi, are' ri amak' ri tataxel." 
Numbers36:7 Ri ulew ri xquitaklebej chquijujunal pa Israel man cuya' taj quesax pa jun amak' cak'ax ta chi c'u pa jun; ronojel aj Israel rajawaxic cucanajisaj ri rechbal chupam ri kas ramak'. 
Numbers36:8 We jun ixok re apachique amak' querechbej tak ulew rajawaxic cac'uli' ruc' jun achi ri xukuje' rija'lil ri kas ramak'. Jeri' chquijujunal ri aj israelib rajawaxic cucanajisaj ri echbal ri e u c'amom chque tak ri e u mam. 
Numbers36:9 Man c'o ta jun echbal ri quel ta pa jun amak' cak'ax ta chi c'u chupam jun amak'. Chquijujunal tak ri amak' re Israel rajawaxic chucanajisaj ri ulew ri xutaklebej.” 
Numbers36:10 Ri Maal, ri Tirs, ri Hogla, ri Milca xukuje' ri Noa, e u mia'l tak ri Zelopehad, xquibano jachique ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises, xec'ule' c'ut cuc' tak ri e qui c'ojol tak ri qui can e rachalal ri qui tat," 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 ri e rija'lil ri Manases (ri u tat ri Manases are' ri Jose). Jeri' ri quechbal xcanaj chupam ri amak' ri quel wi ri qui tat. 
Numbers36:13 E are tak takanic wa' xukuje' tak pixab ri xebuya' ri Ajawaxel chque ri aj israelib rumal ri Moises chupam tak ri lianic re Moab chunakaj ri Jordan, ri c'o chuwäch ri Jerico." 
Deuteronomy1:1 E are tak tzij wa' ri xubij ri Moises chque conojel ri aj israelib, aretak e c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri nima' Jordan, ri u bixic pa ri Araba, chuwäch ri Sup xo'l tak ri ulew Paran, Topel, Laban, Hazerot xukuje' Dizahab." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Cächapletaj ulok pa ri juyub Horeb queq'uis c'ä pa Cades-barney c'o julajuj k'ij be, we are cätakex ri be ri cäk'ax pa tak ri juyub Seir." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ujulajuj ic' pa ri junab cawinak; aretak ri Moises u ch'äcom chic ri Sehon ri cajawinel ri aj amoreyib ri jekel pa Hesbon, xukuje' ri Og ajawinel re Basan, ri jekel pa Astarot, pa ri ulew Edrey, ri Moises xuya' u bixic chque ri aj israelib conojel ri jastak ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chi quebanic." 
Deuteronomy1:4  
Deuteronomy1:5 Aretak e c'o pa ri elebal k'ij che ri nima' Jordan pa ri ulew re Moab, ri Moises xuchaplej qui ya'ic tak we pixbenic ri':" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios xubij tak we tzij ri' chke pa Horeb: ‘Ri ix sibalaj naj xixc'oji' pa we juyub ri'. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Chebimolo ba ri jastak iwech, jix pa tak ri qui juyub ri aj amoreyib xukuje' pa conojel tak ri ulew ri e c'o chquinakaj: ri Araba, ri ulew ri nojinak che c'ache'laj, ri lianic, ri Negueb, ri tak'aj, ri culew ri aj cananeyib xukuje' ri Libano, c'ä chuchi' ri nimalaj nima' Euprats." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ri in nu jachom we ulew ri' pa i k'ab; chic'ama' xukuje' chiwechbej ri ulew, ri in, ri Ajawaxel xinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na che u ya'ic chque ri e i mam, e are wa' ri Abraham, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob, xukuje' chque ri e quija'lil.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Chupam c'ut we k'ijol ri' in xinbij chiwe: ‘Ri in nu tuquiel man quincuin ta che iwuc'axic iwonojel. 
Deuteronomy1:10 Sibalaj e q'ui chi c'ut ri e iwalc'ual ri e u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chiwe, camic ix, ix jun nimalaj tinimit chic jacha' ri ch'imil ri e c'o chicaj." 
Deuteronomy1:11 ¡Chi ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri e i mam chixuq'uiyirisaj ta na jun mil mul china' jas ri i q'uial camic, chixutewichi'j ta na jas ri chi'nic ri xuban chiwe!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ri in nu tuquiel man quincuin ta quinwuc'aj ri alalaj eka'n ri quilixic tak ri e u q'ueyowal ri e c'o chixo'l xukuje' tak ri ch'o'j. 
Deuteronomy1:13 Rumal ri', chebicha' chque jujun tak amak' achijab ri e ajno'jab, ri c'o quetamanic, ri quesan nimak tak qui no'j rech quebencoj jacha' che c'amal tak i be.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ri ix c'ut xibij chwe: ‘Utz cäkato ri cabij chke.’ 
Deuteronomy1:15 Xebenwesaj c'u pa jujun tak amak' achijab ri c'o na qui no'j, xukuje' elinak chic qui no'j, xinya' c'u takanic pa qui k'ab rech quetakan piwi'; jujun xebencoj puwi' jun mil (1000) achijab, niq'uiaj chic xebencoj puwi' jun sient (100), niq'uiaj chic puwi' cawinak lajuj (50), niq'uiaj chic puwi' lajuj (10) jujun chi c'ut xinya' takanic pa qui k'ab rech quetakan paquiwi' jujun tak amak'." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Xukuje' xinya' we takanic ri' chque ri e i k'atal tak tzij: ‘Chebiwilij conojel xukuje' chibana' ri suq'uil chque conojel, chque ri i winakil xukuje' chque ri man i winakil taj;" 
Deuteronomy1:17 aretak quik'at tzij, rajawaxic junam ri u k'atic tzij quiban paquiwi' ri winak: Chibana' ri suc'alaj k'atan tzij paquiwi' ri man nimak ta qui k'ij xukuje' paquiwi' ri nimak qui k'ij, mixe'j iwib chuwäch jachin jun, rech c'u ri Dios ri k'atoj tzij. Are c'u we c'o jun jasach ri man quixcuin ta che u k'atic tzij puwi', chic'ama' ulok chnuwäch rech quink'at tzij in puwi'.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Chupam c'ut ri k'ijol ri', utzalaj u k'alajisaxic xinya' chiwe ronojel ri rajawaxic u banic iwumal.”" 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Aretak xujel ulok pa Horeb, xujbe chusuq'uil ri qui juyub ri aj amoreyib, are xkanimaj ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios chke. Xkabinibej ri nim xukuje' ri xibibalalaj chaki'j uwo sak ri xiwilo, c'ä xujopan na pa Cades-barney." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Chila' c'u xinbij wi chiwe: ‘Uj ulinak pa tak ri qui juyub ri aj amoreyib ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios chke. 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ri Ajawaxel, ri i Dios ix, cujach we ulew ri' chiwe. Chixpakal ba, chixoc che rechbexic jacha' ri u bim ri Ajawaxel, ri qui Dios ri e i mam. Mixe'j iwib, mawi muban quieb i c'u'x.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Xixopan c'u wuc' che u bixic chwe: ‘Utz na we quenabej jujun chke, che rilic ri ulew ri', quetzelej c'u ulok chanim che u bixic chke jachin chque be cäkatakej xukuje' jachique tak tinimit cuya' cujoc wi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Utz c'u xinto ri xibij chwe, xebencha' c'u cablajuj chixo'l, jun pa jujun amak'." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Xebe c'ut xquitakej ri be ri cäk'ax pa tak ri c'ache'laj, xebopan c'u pa ri beya' re Escol, xquisolij c'u ronojel ri ulew." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Xequic'am c'ut ri e qui wächinic we ulew ri', xequic'am c'u ulok chke, je c'u xquibij wa' chke: ‘Ri ulew ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios chke sibalaj utz.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Man xiwaj ta c'ut xixbec, man xinimaj ta ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios chiwe," 
Deuteronomy1:27 xa c'u xichaplej yok'onic pa tak ri iwachoch, xibij c'ut: ‘Ri Ajawaxel man cujraj taj; xujresaj ulok pa Ejipt che ka jachic pa qui k'ab ri aj amoreyib che u q'uisic tzij pakawi'." 
Deuteronomy1:28 ¿Jawije' c'u cujbe wi camic? Ri xetak bic che u solixic ri ulew xquibij chi ri achijab ri e c'o chila' sibalaj e cowilaj tak achijab na chkawäch uj, xukuje' sibalaj nimak tak cakan, xukuje' e c'o tinimit ri e nimak, ri sutim quij cuc' nimak tak tapia xukuje' xequil qui wäch ri e rija'lil ri tac'atic Anac, ronojel wa' u yo'm nimalaj xe'n ib chke.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Xintzelej c'u u bixic chiwe: ‘Mixoc il. Mixe'j iwib chquiwäch. 
Deuteronomy1:30 Ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios are cänabej chiwäch, are cäch'ojin na che i q'uexwäch jas ri xiwilo ri xuban pa Ejipt," 
Deuteronomy1:31 xukuje' ri xuban pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. Ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios ix u c'amom ulok pa u k'ab pa ronojel ri be ri i binibem ulok c'ä ix ulinak waral, jacha' ri cuban jun tataxel cutelej ri u c'ojol cuc' tak ri u k'ab.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Are c'u ri ix man xicu'ba' ta i c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios," 
Deuteronomy1:33 ri canabej chiwäch che u ch'aic ri c'olbal ri quixekaj wi. Chak'ab ruc' k'ak' cuc'ut ri i be ri rajawaxic quiterenej, pa k'ij ruc' jun sutz' cuc'am ri i be.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Aretak ri Ajawaxel xuta' ri e i yok'onic ri xibano, sibalaj xpe royowal, xuban c'ut we chi'nic ri' ri kas cäban na:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Mawi jun chque we itzel tak winak ri' cäquil na u wäch ri utzalaj ulew ri xinbij chi quinya' chque ri e qui mam. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Xuwi c'u ri Caleb (u c'ojol ri Jepon) man je ta quinban che, ri are' caril c'u na che c'u ri are' xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil quinya' wi na ri ulew jawije' ri cäquiya' wi ri cakan, rumal rech chi xuterenej ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel jiquil.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 U mac c'u iwech ix, ri Ajawaxel xpe royowal chwe in, xubij c'u chwe: ‘Xukuje' ri at man catoc ta pa ri ulew." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Are c'u coc na ri Josue ri to'l awech, che a q'uexwäch. (Ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Nun.) Chaya' chajin anima' che, are c'u cäjachow na ri ulew chque ri aj israelib." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Pune' c'u ri ix xibij can nabe chi ri e i c'ulel quequitokij na ri iwixokil xukuje' ri alaj tak alabom e are' c'ut we alaj tak alabom ri' ri c'ä maja' cäquich'obo jas ri cäquibano, e are wa' ri queboc na pa ri ulew: quinya' c'u na che quechbal." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Are c'u ri ix, ¡chixtzelej pa ri chaki'j uwo sak!, ¡jix chi jumul chuchi' ri Quiäk Plo!’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Xitzelej c'u u bixic: ‘Uj macuninak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, cujbe ba na che u banic ri ch'o'j jas ri takanic u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chke.’ Ri ix xic'am bic ri i ch'ojibal are pa i c'u'x chi man c'ax ta ri pakalem puwi' ri juyub." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe chi quinbij chiwe: ‘Mixbe che u banic ch'o'j, mijacha' iwib pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel, man in c'o ta c'u iwuc'.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ri in xinbij wa' chiwe, man xinimaj ta c'ut ri xinbij chiwe, xic'ulelaj ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel. Ruc' c'u nimal xixpaki' puwi' ri juyub." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ri aj amoreyib ri e jekel pa tak ri juyub ri', xebel ulok chiwij jacha' sita'l, xixcokataj, xixquich'äc c'u pa Seir c'ä pa Horm." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Aretak c'ut xixtzelej ulok, xixok' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, are c'u ri are' man xoc ta il che ri iwok'ej." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Rumal c'u ri' ri ix, naj xixjeki' na pa ri ulew Cades.”" 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Xujbe c'u pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, pa ri be ri c'o chuchi' ri Quiäk Plo, jas ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chwe. Naj xujbin na chquij tak ri c'ache'laj re Seir." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel chwe: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Sibalaj q'ui k'ij chic cätajin quixbin chquij tak we juyub ri', jix ba camic pa ri riquiak'ab ri relebal k'ij."
