2Kings17:26 Xebe c'u che u bixic che ri ajawinel re Asiriy: “Ri winak ri xebac'am bic pa ri tinimit Samar rech quejeki' chila', man queta'm taj ri tastalic cojonic che ri u dios we ulew ri', rumal c'u rech chi man queta'm taj, ri are' xebutak ulok coj, ri cätajin quecämisanic.”" 
2Kings17:27 Xuya' c'u takanic ri ajawinel re Asiriy: “Chitaka' bic jun chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri xic'am ulok che patanijic, rech quejekel chila' chebutijoj c'u che ri cojonic che ri u dios ri ulew.”" 
2Kings17:28 Jun c'ut chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri esam ulok pa Samar xbec xejekel pa Betel, xebutijoj c'u che u ya'ic k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel." 
2Kings17:29 Chquijujunal c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit xuban ri u dios pa ri tinimit ri e jekel wi, xquiya' c'u pa ri k'ijilabal ri naj e belinak chicaj ri e qui yacom tak ri aj samarib." 
2Kings17:30 Ri e aj Babilon xquiban jun u wächbal ri Sucot-benot; ri e aj Cut xquiban jun re Nergal; ri e aj Hamat xquiban jun Asim. 
2Kings17:31 Ri e aj Aba xquiban jun Nibaz xukuje' jun Tartac; ri e aj Separbaim quequiporoj tak ri e qui c'ojol pa ri k'ak' jacha' tabal tok'ob che ri Adramelec, xukuje' che ri Anamelec, e are' tak qui diosib wa'." 
2Kings17:32 Caquiya' c'u k'ijilanic xukuje' che ri Ajawaxel, xequicoj c'u tak qui winakil che cojol tabal tok'ob chquixo'l rech quepatanij chquipam tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi ri diosib." 
2Kings17:33 Je c'u ri' pune' quequiya' k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' qui takem qui k'ijilaxic tak ri e qui diosib, je jas ri qui nak'atisabal tak ri winak ri xebesax wi ulok." 
2Kings17:34 C'ä je c'u cäquiban camic jas ri xquiban nabe, man caquiya' ta c'u k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel mawi xequinimaj tak ri e u pixab mawi tak ri e u takanic, mawi xequinimaj tak ri tijonic xukuje' tak ri takomal ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chi quequitz'akatisaj ri e rija'lil ri Jacob, ri xucoj Israel che u bi'." 
2Kings17:35 Aretak ri Ajawaxel xuban jun c'ulwächinic cuc', xuya' takanic chque: “Mebiya' k'ijilanic chque tak diosib, mawi mimej iwib chquiwäch che qui patanixic." 
2Kings17:36 Chiya' k'ijilanic chwe in, chwe in ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, ri xixesan ulok pa Ejipt ruc' ri u cojic ri nimalaj u cuinem. Xuwi chwe in rajawaxic quiya' wi k'ijilanic, xukuje' chimeja' wi iwib xukuje' chebichi'j wi tabal tak tok'ob." 
2Kings17:37 Kas c'u utz qui tz'akatisaxic tak ri pixab ri takanic ri tijonic xukuje' tak ri takomal ri e tz'ibatalic ri e nu yo'm chiwe, mebiya' c'u k'ijilanic chque tak diosib." 
2Kings17:38 Masach ri c'ulwächinic pa i jolom ri nu banom iwuc', mawi mebiya' k'ijilanic chque tak diosib," 
2Kings17:39 xane' xuwi chwe in, ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios, quixinwesaj c'u na pa qui k'ab tak ri e i c'ulel.”" 
2Kings17:40 E are c'u we nimak tak tinimit ri', man xquiya' ta qui xiquin che ri xbix chque, xane' are xquitakej qui banic ri e qui nak'atisabal nabe; xukuje' caquiya' c'u k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' qui takem qui k'ijilaxic tak ri e qui diosib. Xukuje' tak ri e quija'lil xquitakej qui banic quech ri xequiban ri e qui mam, c'ä je c'u cäquiban camic." 
2Kings17:41  
2Kings18:1 Pa ri urox junab re ri rajawinic ri Osey, u c'ojol ri Ela, ajawinel re Israel, ri Ezequiy, u c'ojol ri Acaz, ajawinel re Juda, xuchaplej ajawinic." 
2Kings18:2 Juwinak job (25) junab c'ut ri u junab, juwinak belejeb (29) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Abi u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Zacariy." 
2Kings18:3 Ri e u banoj tak ri Ezequiy e suc' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, e jacha' ronojel ri xebuban ri David ri u mam." 
2Kings18:4 Are' ri xebensan tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib, xebuc'äjij ri tastalic tak abaj, xebupaxij tak ri e u wächbal tak ri Asera xukuje' xumuch ri cumätz re k'an ch'ich' ri xuban ri Moises ri c'ä quitakem u poroxic c'oc' k'ol chuwäch Nehustan quecha' c'u che." 
2Kings18:5 Ri Ezequiy xujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel. Chquixo'l conojel tak ri ajawinelab re Juda ri xebajawin can nabe o ri c'äte' xebajawin, man c'o ta jun jacha' ri are'." 
2Kings18:6 Jic xbin chuwäch ri Ajawaxel mawi jumul xutas ta rib chrij, xane' xebutz'akatisaj tak ri takomal ri xebuya' qui bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises." 
2Kings18:7 Rumal ri' xtok'obisax u wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel cuban c'u che chi ronojel ri chuchaplej u banic utz quel chuwäch. Ri Ezequiy xuwalijisaj rib chrij ri ajawinel re Asiriy man xraj ta chic xupatanij. 
2Kings18:8 Xch'äcan c'u paquiwi' ri aj pilisteyib c'ä pa Gaz xukuje' tak ri u c'ulbatil, kas cuc' tak ri tac'atak tak ja quech chajibal c'ä cuc' tak ri tinimit ri e c'o pa nimak tak tapia." 
2Kings18:9 Pa ri ucaj junab ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy, are c'u ri uwuk junab re ri rajawinic ri Osey. U c'ojol ri Ela, ajawinel re Israel, ri Salmanasar, ajawinel re Asiriy, xusutij rij ri tinimit Samar, xch'ojin c'u ruc'," 
2Kings18:10 c'ä choxib junab c'ut xcuin che u ch'äquic. Are' ri uwak junab re ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy belejeb c'ut re ri rajawinic ri Osey pa Israel aretak xch'äc ri Samar. 
2Kings18:11 Ri ajawinel re Asiriy xeresaj bic ri aj israelib xebutak pa Asiriy xebujekeba' c'u pa Halah, pa ri ulew re Habor, nima' re Gozan, xukuje' chquipam tak ri tinimit aj medib." 
2Kings18:12 Xc'ulmataj c'u wa' rumal rech chi man xeniman ta che ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios, man nim ta xquil wi ri u c'ulwächinic xukuje' man xquiya' ta qui xiquin che ronojel ri xetak che qui banic rumal ri Moises, ri pataninel rech ri Ajawaxel, man xquinimaj ta c'ut u banic." 
2Kings18:13 Pa ri ucajlajuj (14) junab re ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy, ri Senaquerib, ajawinel re Asiriy xch'ojin cuc' conojel tak ri tinimit aj Juda ri e kasan pa nimak tak tapia, xek'ax c'u pa u k'ab." 
2Kings18:14 Ri Ezequiy ajawinel re Juda, xutak bic jun wuj ruc' ri ajawinel re Asiriy, ri c'o pa Lacs, ri je cubij wa': “Xa man xinch'ob ta ri xinbano. Chel la bic pa ri wulew quintoj c'u na ri puak ri catok'ij la chwe.” Rumal ri' ri ajawinel re Asiriy xubij che ri Ezequiy, ajawinel re Juda, chi chutojo' quieb sient ruc' wajxaklajuj (218) quintal sak puak xukuje' juwinak quieb (22) quintal k'an puak." 
2Kings18:15 Ri Ezequiy xujach ronojel ri sak puak ri xurik chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri e c'o chupam ri u k'inomal ri rachoch are'. 
2Kings18:16 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri Ezequiy xeresaj tak ri e u chi ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' tak ri rapalil, ri kas are' xch'ukuw che k'an puak, xebuya' c'u che ri ajawinel re Asiriy." 
2Kings18:17 Ri ajawinel re Asiriy c'äte' chi c'u xutak chi ulok ruc' ri ajawinel Ezequiy jun qui nimal ajch'ojab ri nim rekle'n, jun rach k'atal tzij ri u cuban u c'u'x chrij xukuje' jun qui nimal ajch'ojab ri nim rekle'n, ri xc'amow qui be juk'at cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, xebel c'u ulok wa' pa Lacs xebe pa Jerusalen, che u banic ch'o'j ruc'. Aretak xebopan pa Jerusalen, xquiya' quib chuxcut ri cäbin wi ri ja' ri cäbe chupam ri c'olbal ja' ri c'o ajsic, chupam ri be ri cabe pa ri rulew ri Ch'ajal Atz'iak." 
2Kings18:18 Xquisiq'uij c'ut ri ajawinel, xukuje' ri Eliaquim, u c'ojol ri Hilsiy, ri are' quinimal ri chajil re ri rachoch ri ajawinel, ri Sebna, ri tz'ibal tzijol, xukuje' ri Joa, u c'ojol ri Asap, ri rajtz'ib ri ajawinel, xebel bic che qui c'ulaxic." 
2Kings18:19 Chila' ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj asiriyab xubij chque chila': “Chiya' u bixic che ri Ezequiy ri cubij ri ajawinel ri nim u banic, ri ajawinel re Asiriy: ‘¿Jas ri banowinak chawe chi cana' awib chi sibalaj co at c'olic?" 
2Kings18:20 ¿La xa' pu cachomaj chi ri je'lalaj tak tzij xak junam qui k'ij cuc' ri nawinic xukuje' ri chuk'ab che u banic ch'o'j? ¿Jachin chrij a jiquibam wi a c'u'x chi xawalijisaj awib chwij? 
2Kings18:21 Quinwilo chi a jiquibam a c'u'x chrij ri to'banic ri cuya' ri Ejipt chawe. Utz ri', ri Ejipt xa' jun aj ri wak'arinak, we c'u ne cutok'ej rib jun puwi', cäjutjub che cut'is rib chupam ri u k'ab. Are je u banic wa' ri paraon, ajawinel re Ejipt, chque conojel ri caquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chrij." 
2Kings18:22 We c'u ri ix quibij chwe: ri uj ka jiquibam ka c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios, ri Ezequiy ¿La ma ta pa u xebuchupisaj qui wäch ri c'olbal quech tak k'ijilanic xukuje' tak ri porobal che we Dios ri', xuya' c'u takanic chi conojel ri winak ri e c'o pa Juda xukuje' ri e c'o pa Jerusalen chquiya' k'ijilanic che xuwi puwi' ri porobal ri c'o pa Jerusalen?" 
2Kings18:23 Chac'ulaj u wäch ri tzij ri cubij ri wajaw chawe, ri ajawinel re Asiriy: in quebenya' quieb mil quiej chawe, we quebarik aj quiejab chque." 
2Kings18:24 Ri at man at ta ticarel che u banic chi jun chque ri e qui nimal ri wajch'ojab ri sibalaj man nim ta u k'ij chquixo'l ri aj asiriyab rech canimajic, ¿La are ta c'u pa a c'u'x chi catcuinic quebarik quiej xukuje' ajquiejab pa Ejipt?" 
2Kings18:25 Xak c'u u wi' chic, ¿La are pa a c'u'x chi in petinak che u banic ch'o'j xukuje' che u sachisaxic u wäch we ulew ri' ri ma ta c'u are' ri Ajawaxel in takowinak ulok? ¡Are' xintakow che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Ezequiy xukuje' che u sachisaxic u wäch!’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Ri Eliaquim, ri Sebna xukuje' ri Joa xquitzelej u bixic che ri qui nimal ajch'ojab aj Asiriy: “Bana' la tok'ob chujch'abej la pa aramey, ri uj cäkach'obo. Man cujch'abej ta la pa hebrey, caquita' c'u conojel ri winak ri e c'o puwi' ri nimalaj tapia cätajin caquitatabej.”" 
2Kings18:27 Are c'ut ri qui nimal ri aj Asiriy xubij: “Man che ta ri awajaw, mawi chiwe ta ix ri xinutak wi ulok ri ajawinel re Asiriy ri quebenbij ta wi tak we tzij ri'; xane' kas chque tak ri winak ri e c'o puwi' ri nimalaj tapia, ri e are', xukuje' ri ix, quitij na ri kas nim i chul xukuje' quikumuj na ri kas alaj i chul.”" 
2Kings18:28 Are c'u ri qui nimal ajch'ojab, tac'alic sibalaj co xurak u chi' xch'aw pa hebrey: “Chitatabej ri cubij ri ajawinel ri nim u k'ij, ri ajawinel re Asiriy:" 
2Kings18:29 ‘Miya' iwib pa subic rumal ri Ezequiy; ri are' man cäcuin taj quixuto' pa nu k'ab.’ 
2Kings18:30 We ri Ezequiy cucoj u chuk'ab chiwe chi chijiquiba' i c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, cubij c'u chiwe: ‘Ri Ajawaxel kas quixuto' na; ri are' man cuya' ta na c'olbal chi cakaj ta we tinimit ri' pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy’," 
2Kings18:31 miya' i xiquin che ri cubij chiwe. Ri ajawinel re Asiriy xinutak ulok che u bixic chiwe chi mixch'ojin ruc', chi'x k'ax pa u k'ab, we je quiban wa' chijujunal quixcuinic quitij na ri u wächinic ri i uva ri u wächinic ri i higo xukuje' quikumuj na ri kas i ja' ri i c'olom." 
2Kings18:32 C'äte c'u quixinc'am na bic pa jun ulew ri cajunamataj ruc' ri iwech ix, jun ulew ri cäwächin wi trico xukuje' tak uva, che u banic caxlanwa xukuje' u wa'l uva, jun ulew ri caq'uiy wi ri aseitun ri cuya' aseit ri xukuje' c'o wi u juyubal räx cab. Quiwoc'owisaj c'u na jun utzalaj c'aslemal man c'u quixcäm ta na. Miya' c'u i xiquin che ri cubij ri Ezequiy chiwe, xa' c'u subunic ri cubano aretak cubij chiwe chi are' ri Ajawaxel cäyo'w na ri ch'äcanic chiwe." 
2Kings18:33 ¿La c'o pa u jun chque ri qui diosib ri jule' tak tinimit chic ri xcuin ta che u to'ic ri rulew pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy? 
2Kings18:34 ¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri e u diosib ri Hamat xukuje' ri Arpad? ¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri e u diosib ri Separbaim, ri Ena xukuje' ri Ib? ¿La xa' pa u xecuinic xquito' ri Samar pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy?" 
2Kings18:35 ¿Jachin chque jun chque conojel ri qui diosib tak we ulew ri' ri xcuintaj xuto'tajisaj taj ri u winak ri ma ta xkaj pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy? ¿Jas c'u che qui chomaj chi ri Ajawaxel cacuinic cuto'tajisaj ri Jerusalen?” 
2Kings18:36 Ri winak man xech'awtaj man c'o ta c'u jun tzij ri xquitzelej ta u bixic che, u bim c'ut ri ajawinel chque chi c'o jas maquitzelej u bixic che." 
2Kings18:37 Are c'u ri Eliaquim, qui nimal ri chajil re ri rachoch ri ajawinel, ri Sebna, ri cätz'iban ri tzijol, xukuje' ri Joa, rajtz'ib ri ajawinel, xeboc il xquijis ri catz'iak chquij xebe c'u che rilic ri Ezequiy rech quequibij che ri xubij ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj Asiriy." 
2Kings19:1 Aretak ri ajawinel Ezequiy xuta' ri xbixic, xujis ri ratz'iak chrij, xebucoj wakwoj tak atz'iak chrij che u c'utic chi c'axc'obinak ri ranima' xbe c'ut pa ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel," 
2Kings19:2 xutak c'u bic ri Eliaquim, qui nimal ri chajil re ri rachoch, ri Sebna ri cätz'iban ri tzijol xukuje' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri sibalaj e nimak tak winak chic, e qui cojom wakwoj tak catz'iak che u c'utic chi c'axc'obinak ri canima', che rilic ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij, u c'ojol ri Amoz," 
2Kings19:3 che c'u u bixic che ri bim ulok rumal ri ajawinel: “Camic uj c'o chupam jun nimalaj c'ax, c'äjisabal wächaj xukuje' mach'irisan ib, jacha' jun ixok ri, xopan u k'ij che alc'ualanic, ri catuktubic." 
2Kings19:4 C'o ta banom wi chi ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios u tom ta we tzij ri' ri xebubij ri qui nimal ajch'ojab ri takom ulok rumal ri rajaw, ri ajawinel re Asiriy, che u yok'ic ri c'aslic Dios, c'o ta banom wi chc'äjisax ta u wäch rumal ri jastak ri xebuta' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios. Chabana' ba' jun ch'awem ruc' paquiwi' ri c'ä e to'tajinak canok.”" 
2Kings19:5 Ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri ajawinel Ezequiy xebe che rilic ri Isaiy," 
2Kings19:6 ri Isaiy xubij chque chi chiquibij che ri cajaw: “Ri Ajawaxel cubij: ‘Man caxe'j ta awib chque tak we yok'obal ri' ri xquibij ri e u tako'n ri ajawinel re Asiriy che nu yok'ic. 
2Kings19:7 In quenbana' chi copan jun xibin ib ri cäbanow che chi cätzelej pa ri rulew, quinban c'u na che chi xa' cacämisax chila'.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj asiriyab xretamaj chi ri ajawinel re Asiriy u yo'm can ri tinimit Lacs. Xuya' c'u can ri Jerusalen, xurika' c'u ri ajawinel re Asiriy cätajin cach'ojin ruc' ri Libna." 
2Kings19:9 Chila' xuta' wi u bixic ri ajawinel re Asiriy chi ri ajawinel Tirac re Etiopiy u chaplem u banic ch'o'j ruc'. Jumul chi c'ut ri ajawinel re Asiriy xebutak ulok tako'n ruc' ri ajawinel Ezequiy re Juda," 
2Kings19:10 che u bixic che: “Ri a Dios, ri a jiquibam wi a c'u'x, u jiquibam u bixic chawe chi ri Jerusalen man cakaj ta na pa nu k'ab; maya' c'u awib pa subic che." 
2Kings19:11 At a tom u tzijol ri qui banom tak ri ajawinelab re Asiriy cuc' conojel tak ri ulew ri xequisachisaj c'u qui wäch. ¿La catto'taj ta c'u na can at? 
2Kings19:12 Ri diosib, ¿La xa' pu xequito' ri jule' tak tinimit chic ri xsachisax qui wäch cumal ri xetakan can nabe chnuwäch: ri Gozan, ri Aran, ri Resep, xukuje' ri winak re Bel-eden ri xejeki' pa Telasar?" 
2Kings19:13 ¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri ajawinelab re Hamat, Arpad, re Separbaim, re Ena xukuje' re Ib?”" 
2Kings19:14 Ri Ezequiy xuc'am ri wuj ri xjach pa u k'ab cumal ri tako'n, xusiq'uij c'ut u wäch. Xbextax c'u chupam ri rachoch Dios, xulic'a c'ut ri wuj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel," 
2Kings19:15 je ch'awem wa' xuban ruc' ri Dios: “Ajawaxel, u Dios ri Israel, ri c'o ri u tem re ajawibal paquiwi' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic': xuwi ri lal lal Dios ri lal c'o paquiwi' conojel ri ajawibal ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew; lal xbanow la ri caj xukuje' ri ulew." 
2Kings19:16 Kas choc la il, Ajawaxel, chatatabej c'u la. Chejaka' la ri bak'wäch la, Ajawaxel, chca'y c'u la. Chetatabej la ri tzij ri xebutak ulok qui bixic ri Senaquerib chwe, tzij tak ri conojel queyok'on che la, ri lal c'aslic Dios." 
2Kings19:17 Kastzij, Ajawaxel, chi ri ajawinelab tak re Asiriy quisachisam qui wäch ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri e culew," 
2Kings19:18 e qui q'uiakom tak c'ut ri e qui diosib chupam ri k'ak', kas c'u tzij chi man e diosib taj, xa' e jastak e re che' o re abaj ri xa' e banom cumal achijab. Rumal ri' xequisachisaj qui wäch." 
2Kings19:19 Are c'u ri camic, Ajawaxel xukuje' ka Dios, maya' ba' la c'olbal chi cujkaj pa u k'ab, rech conojel ri winak re ri uwächulew chquetamaj chi ri lal, Ajawaxel, chi xuwi ri lal lal Dios.”" 
2Kings19:20 Are' c'u ri Isaiy xutak u bixic che ri Ezequiy: “Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel, Dios re Israel: ‘In xintatabej ri bochi'nic ri xaban chwe che ri cubij ri Senaquerib, ajawinel re Asiriy.’ ”" 
2Kings19:21 E are tak tzij wa' ri e u bim ri Ajawaxel ri cuc'ulmaj na ri ajawinel re Asiriy: “Ri tinimit Sion, jacha' jun ali, cutze'j a wäch, Senaquerib. Ri Jerusalen cusutusa' ri u jolom che retz'bexic a wäch aretak cattzelej chawij." 
2Kings19:22 ¿Jachin ri a c'axc'obisam xukuje' a yok'om? ¿Jachin chrij xajak wi ri ach'abebal xukuje' xebasolcopij tak ri a bak'wäch che ruc' nimal? ¡Chrij ri tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel! 
2Kings19:23 Cumal tak ri e a tako'n xayok' ri Ajawaxel Dios. Xabij: ‘Cuc' ri q'uialaj nu carwaj quech ch'o'j xinpaki' paquiwi' tak ri juyub, c'ä puwi' ri Libano ri sibalaj naj elinak chicaj. Xebenkasaj tak ri e u chacalte' ri sibalaj naj e elinak na chicaj, ri e u chäj ri sibalaj e je'l tak na. Xinopan paquiwi' ri e u juyub ri sibalaj naj e elinak chicaj, pa tak ri e u c'ächelaj, ri e je ta ne qui banic ticbal cotz'i'j." 
2Kings19:24 Pa tak ulew ri man weta'm ta qui wäch xebenc'ot tak c'ua' xebenwuq'uiaj c'u tak we ja' ri', cumal c'u tak ri wakan xebenchaki'jarisaj conojel tak ri nima' ri e c'o pa Ejipt.’" 
2Kings19:25 ¿La ma ta pa u aweta'm chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel, ri e u chomam qui banic tak we jastak ri'? Kas ojer ulok nu chomam qui banic ulok, camic c'ut nu banom ri nu chomam ulok; rumal ri' ri at casachisaj qui wäch tak ri tinimit ri e kasan pa nimak tak tapia xaban c'u chque chi xebux jumulaj tak abaj." 
2Kings19:26 Ri e qui winakil, man c'o ta qui cuinem, e nojinak che xe'n ib xukuje' q'uixbal, e uxinak jacha' k'ayes rech ri juyub, e jacha' räx echa', e jacha' ri k'ayes ri queq'uiy paquiwi' tak ri ja ri quec'atisax rumal ri quiakik' ri cäpe pa ri elebal k'ij." 
2Kings19:27 In e weta'm conojel tak ri e a banoj xukuje' conojel tak ri e a chac; in weta'm chi at oyowarinak chwij. 
2Kings19:28 In weta'm ri a ch'ujilal xukuje' ri a c'anal, quencojo' jun quetequic ch'ich' che ri a tza'm, jun jiq'uibal rij wi'aj pa a chi', quinban c'u chawe chi cattzelej chi pa ri be ri xatpe wi.”" 
2Kings19:29 Xubij c'ut ri Isaiy che ri Ezequiy: “Are' jun etal wa' che ri quec'ulmataj na: che we junab ri' xukuje' ri cäpe na ri ix quiwe'j na ri trico ri xak caq'uiy ulok pa rech wi, pa ri urox junab cuya' quixticonijic xukuje' quixk'atowic, quebitic tak uva quebitij tak c'ut ri qui wächinic." 
2Kings19:30 Ri quec'asi' can pa Juda quebux na e jacha' ri tico'n: cäbe na ri qui c'amal chupam ri ulew quewächin c'u na. 
2Kings19:31 Quecanaj c'u na can quieb oxib pa Jerusalen; chupam ri juyub re Sion c'o ri quec'asi' na canok. Wa' are c'u cäbanow na ri nicowemalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. 
2Kings19:32 Ri cutaklebej na ri ajawinel re Asiriy cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Man coc ta na pa Jerusalen, man c'o ta jun ch'ab cutzokopij ta na che, man cucoj ta na tak quetecak ch'ich' che u banic ch'o'j ruc' mawi cuyac na jun ak'anibal chrij." 
2Kings19:33 Kas pa ri be ri xpe wi, catzelej chi wi na; man coc ta na chupam we tinimit ri'. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinya' ri nu tzij." 
2Kings19:34 In quinto' na u wi' we tinimit ri' quinto'tajisaj c'u na, xa' che u tok'obisaxic u wäch ri pataninel wech ri David xukuje' c'u ri in chbil wib.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Kas pa ri chak'ab ri' ri tako'n aj caj rech ri Ajawaxel xopanic xebucämisaj jun sient jumuch' ruc' job mil (185,000) achijab aj asiriyab ri e c'o pa ri kajebal, chucab c'u k'ij aretak xsakarisanic conojel e cäminak chic." 
2Kings19:36 Are' c'u ri Senaquerib ajawinel re Asiriy, xebuc'am bic ri jastak rech xtzelej c'u pa Ninibe." 
2Kings19:37 C'o c'u jun k'ij, aretak cätajin cäk'ijilan chupam ri rachoch ri Nisroc, ri u dios, ri Adramelec xukuje' ri Sarezer ri e u c'ojol xebopan ruc' xquicämisaj c'ut, xebanimaj c'u bic xebe pa ri ulew ri Ararat. Ri xajawin c'u na chupam ri u c'olbal are' ri u c'ojol, ri Esaradon u bi'." 
2Kings20:1 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri Ezequiy xkasax rumal jun c'axalaj yabil, ri Isaiy, ri k'axal tzij u c'ojol ri Amoz, xbe che rilic xubij c'u che: “Ri Ajawaxel cubij: ‘Chebaya' can ri q'uisbal tak a pixbenic chque ri e awachalaxic, catecäm c'ut; man cät cunataj taj.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Ri Ezequiy xbe u wäch cho ri xan je c'u ch'awem wa' xuban ruc' ri Ajawaxel: 
2Kings20:3 “In quinbochi'n che la, Ajawaxel, chi chnataj che la jas ri jicalaj patanixic la nu banom man c'u ruc' ta cawächibal, are c'u nu banom ri cakaj chwäch la.” Xok' c'ut ruc' c'ayil." 
2Kings20:4 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi c'ä maja' quel ulok ri Isaiy chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja re ri rachoch ri Ajawinel, ri Ajawaxel xuch'abej ri Isaiy xubij c'u che:" 
2Kings20:5 “Chattzelejok chabij che ri Ezequiy, ri c'amal u be ri nu tinimit: ‘Ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri a mam David, cubij: In xintatabej ri a bochi'nic xukuje' xebenwil ri e u wa'l tak a wäch. Catinwutzirisaj na, pa oxib k'ij c'ut catcuinic catbe chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel." 
2Kings20:6 Quenya' chi na olajuj (15) junab a c'aslemal. Ri at xukuje' ri Jerusalen quixinto' na man quixkaj ta na pa u k'ab ri ajawinel Asiriy. In quinto' na u wi' we tinimit ri', xa' che u tok'obisaxic u wäch ri pataninel wech ri David xukuje' c'u ri in chbil wib.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Ri Isaiy xutak quipuk'ic higo, xban c'ut xcoj c'u che ri ajawinel jawije' c'o wi ri yabil che, xcunataj c'ut ri ajawinel." 
2Kings20:8 Ri Ezequiy xuc'ot c'ut u chi' ri Isaiy: “¿Rumal jachique etal quinwetamaj chi ri Ajawaxel quinrutzirisaj, xukuje' chi pa oxib k'ij quincuinic quinbe chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel?”" 
2Kings20:9 Ri Isaiy xutzelej u bixic che: “Are etal wa' ri cuya' na ri Ajawaxel chawe che u c'utic chi cutz'akatisaj na ri xuchi'j chawe: ¿La cäwaj chi ri mumu'j cänabej lajuj juch', o chi catzelej chrij?”" 
2Kings20:10 Ri Ezequiy xutzelej u bixic che: “Chi cänabej ri mumu'j man c'ax taj. Ri c'ax na chi catzelej chrij.” 
2Kings20:11 Ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij xtz'onon che ri Ajawaxel, ri Ajawaxel xubano chi ri mumu'j xtzelej ri lajuj juch' ri u binibem ri u reloj ri Acaz re k'ij." 
2Kings20:12 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri ajawinel Merodac-Baladan, u c'ojol ri Baladan, xuta' u tzijol chi yawab ri Ezequiy, xebutak c'u wuj che xukuje' jun sipanic ri xeyoka che cumal jujun tako'n." 
2Kings20:13 Ri Ezequiy utz qui c'ulaxic xubano xuc'ut c'ut ri u k'inomal chquiwäch, ri sak puak ri k'an puak ri e c'oc'al, ri c'oc'alaj aseit xukuje' ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi ri e u ch'ojibal, xukuje' ronojel ri e c'o chquipam ri e u c'olbal. Man c'o ta jun jasach ri c'o chupam ri rachoch mawi ri c'o chupam ronojel ri rajawinic ri ma ta xuc'ut chquiwäch." 
2Kings20:14 Xopan c'ut ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij che rilic ri ajawinel, ri Ezequiy xuc'ot c'u u chi': “¿Jawije' quepe wi we achijab ri', jas ri xquibij che la?” Ri Ezequiy xutzelej u bixic che: “E petinak pa jun najalaj ulew; e petinak pa Babilon.”" 
2Kings20:15 Ri Isaiy xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jas c'ut ri xquil chupam ri achoch la?” Ri Ezequiy xutzelej u bixic: “Xquil ronojel ri c'o chupam. Man c'o ta jun jasach ri c'o chupam ri nu c'olbal ri ma ta xinc'ut chquiwäch.” 
2Kings20:16 Xubij c'ut ri Isaiy che ri Ezequiy: “Chatatabej la ri cubij ri Ajawaxel: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Quepe na k'ij chi ronojel ri c'o chupam ri achoch la xukuje' ronojel ri qui mulin ri e mam la c'ä pa ri k'ij camic, cac'am na bic pa Babilon. Man c'o ta jas cäcanaj can waral." 
2Kings20:18 Xukuje' ne jujun chque ri e ija'lil la quec'am na bic pa Babilon, quesax na ri qui cowil quecoj na che pataninelab pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Ri Ezequiy, xuchomaj chi pune' ta bane' xak xuwi ta c'u ne we c'o na jamaril xukuje' jicomal pa tak ri k'ij ri cac'asi' na, xcha' che ri Isaiy: “Ri c'ulmatajic ri xelya' la u bixic chwe ri u bim ri Ajawaxel che la, utz quinto.”" 
2Kings20:20 Ri u tz'akatil ri u q'uisbalil ri u tzijobelil ri Ezequiy xukuje' tak ri e u mayibalil, xukuje' ri c'olbal ja' ri xubano, xukuje' ri u be ja' ri xc'amow ulok ri ja' pa ri tinimit, tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri qui tzijobelil tak ri ajawinelab pa Juda." 
2Kings20:21 Aretak cäminak chic ri Ezequiy are' xajawin ri u c'ojol chupam ri u c'olbal, ri Manases u bi'." 
2Kings21:1 Cablajuj (12) u junab ri Manases aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, cawinak olajuj (55) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Hepsib u bi' ri u nan." 
2Kings21:2 Ri e u banoj man e utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel, are xebuban ri itzel tak qui nak'atisabal ri winak ri xeburokij bic ri Ajawaxel chquiwäch ri aj israelib:" 
2Kings21:3 xuban qui banic tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi ri diosib ri xebuc'äjij can ri Ezequiy, ri u tat; xebuyac tak porobal che ri Baal xukuje' xuban jun u wächbal ri Asera, jacha' ri xuban ri Acab, ajawinel pa Israel; xak c'u u wi' chic xk'ijilanic xukuje' xebuya' tak k'ijilanic chque tak ri ch'imil ri e c'o cho ri caj," 
2Kings21:4 xukuje' xebuyac tak porobal chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, ri u bim wi ri Ajawaxel chi are' u jekelibal ri u bi' pa Jerusalen." 
2Kings21:5 Xebuyac chi niq'uiaj porobal chquiwäch ri quieb uwo ja ri e c'o chuwäch ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, chila' c'u quek'ijilax wi conojel tak ri ch'imil ri e c'o cho ri caj." 
2Kings21:6 Xak c'u u wi' chic xebuporoj ri u c'ojol che tabal tak tok'ob, xebusiq'uij tak ri uxlabal xebuban c'u ch'obonic, xujekeba' ri u ya'ic qui k'ij tak ri uxlabal xukuje' ri itzinic. Ri e u banoj ri xebubano man utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel, xuq'uis c'u retzelaxic rib chuwäch." 
2Kings21:7 Xucoj c'u jun u wächbal ri Asera chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, ri xubij wi ri Ajawaxel che ri David xukuje' che ri Salomon ri u c'ojol: “We wachoch ri' ri c'o pa Jerusalen, ri nu cha'om chquixo'l conojel ri ramak' ri Israel, cux na u jekelibal ri nu bi' amak'el." 
2Kings21:8 Man quebenwesaj ta chi c'u na bic ri aj israelib chupam ri ulew ri xinya' chque ri e qui mam, xuwi ta ne we quequitz'akatisaj xukuje' quequiban ronojel ri e nu takom che u banic, xukuje' ronojel ri tijonic ri xuya' ri pataninel wech ri Moises.”" 
2Kings21:9 Man xquiya' ta c'u qui xiquin che ri xinbij chque. Xane', xec'am bic rumal ri Manases che roc'owisaxic u wi' ri u banic ri etzelal ri xequiban ri winak ri xsachisax qui wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel chquiwäch ri aj israelib." 
2Kings21:10 Rumal c'u ri', ri Ajawaxel xch'aw cumal tak ri e pataninel tak rech ri e k'axal tzij, xubij c'ut:" 
2Kings21:11 “Rumal c'u quech ri nimak tak etzelal ri e u banom ri Manases, rumal c'u rech chi nim na ri retzelal chquiwäch ri quech ri aj amoreyib ri xec'oji' na can waral nabe chuwäch ri are', u banom c'ut chi macuninak ri Juda cumal tak ri e banom tak diosib," 
2Kings21:12 in, ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel, quink'alajisaj: Quinc'am na ulok u q'ueyowal puwi' ri Jerusalen xukuje' ri Juda, quek'oxow c'u ne na ri e u xiquin jachin ri cätatabenic." 
2Kings21:13 Quinwetaj na ri Jerusalen ruc' ri kas etabal ri xincoj che ri Samar xukuje' ri xincoj che ri rija'lil ri Acab; quinjosk'ij canok jacha' ri u josk'ixic jun liq'uilic' lak cäjupubax c'ut. 
2Kings21:14 Are c'u ri u tz'akatil ri nu tinimit, quinwonoba' na canok quinjach c'u na pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ulel, rech quetolobax canok cäjoc c'u bic ronojel ri c'o cuc' cumal ri qui c'ulel." 
2Kings21:15 Rumal rech chi man e utz taj ri qui banoj ri quequiban chnuwäch, quiyacom c'u ulok woyomal kas pa ri k'ij ri xebel ulok ri e qui mam pa Ejipt c'ä camic.”" 
2Kings21:16 Xak c'u qui wi' chic ri macaj ri xuban wi ri Manases chi xmacun ri Juda xukuje' ri itzel tak u banoj ri xebuban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, sibalaj nim ri quic' ri xutix pa Jerusalen, ri man c'o ta u mac, chi xunojisaj ronojel ri Jerusalen che." 
2Kings21:17 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Manases xukuje' ronojel ri xubano, xukuje' tak ri macaj ri xebubano, tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri qui tzijobelil tak ri ajawinelab re Juda." 
2Kings21:18 Aretak xcämic, xmuk chupam ri ticbal cotz'i'j ri c'o nakaj che ri rachoch chupam ri ticbal u cotz'i'j ri Uza. Are chi c'u xajawin ri u c'ojol chupam ri u c'olbal, ri Amon u bi'." 
2Kings21:19 Juwinak quieb u junab ri Amon aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, quieb junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Mesulemet u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l c'ut ri Azur, aj Jotba." 
2Kings21:20 Ri e u banoj man utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel, xak xejunamataj ruc' ri e rech ri Manases ri u tat," 
2Kings21:21 are c'u xutakej qui banic ri e itzel tak u banoj xuya' k'ijilanic xukuje' xebuk'ijilaj ri junam tak diosib ri xebuk'ijilaj can ri u tat. 
2Kings21:22 Jewa' ri xuban che u xutuxic ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri e u mam, man are ta c'u xuban ri u cholajil ri u rayibal." 
2Kings21:23 Ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri Amon xquiwalijisaj quib chrij, xquicämisaj c'u chupam ri rachoch." 
2Kings21:24 Are c'u ri winak re ri tinimit xequicämisaj ri xecämisan ri ajawinel Amon, xquiban c'ut chi are' xajawin ri u c'ojol chupam ri u c'olbal, ri Josiy u bi'." 
2Kings21:25 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Amon xukuje' ri xubano, tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri qui tzijobelil tak ri ajawinelab re Juda." 
2Kings21:26 Xmuk chupam ri u mukubal ri c'o chupam ri u ticbal u cotz'i'j ri Uza. Are c'u xajawin na ri Josiy ri u c'ojol chupam ri u c'olbal ri Josiy u bi'. 
2Kings22:1 Wajxakib u junab c'ut ri Josiy aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, juwinak julajuj (31) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Ri u nan Jedid u bi', u mia'l ri Adaiy, aj Boscat c'ut." 
2Kings22:2 Ri e u banoj ri Josiy e suc' xeril ri Ajawaxel, are c'u xutakej u banic ronojel ri xuban ri David, ri u mam, man c'o ta xujech'ba ta wi rib." 
2Kings22:3 Pa ri wajxaklajuj (18) junab ri rajawinic ri Josiy, ri ajawinel xutak bic chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri Sapan ri catz'iban ri cac'ulmatajic, u c'ojol ri Azaliy ri' u mam c'ut ri Mesulam. Xubij che:" 
2Kings22:4 “Jät che rilic ri Hilsiy, ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, chabij c'u che chi chumulij ri puak ri c'amom bic chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri qui mulin ri e chajil tak ri oquibal ri queyok chque cumal ri winak," 
2Kings22:5 quijacha' c'u chque ri quetakan paquiwi' ri ajchaquib ri quebanow tak ri chac chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, rech ri e are' quequitoj tak ri ajchaquib ri quebanow u banic ri rachoch Dios," 
2Kings22:6 ri u bixic: ri ajanelab, ri quetakan paquiwi' tak ri chac, ri yacal tak ja, rech xukuje' quequilok' tak ri che' ri tzoc'om tak abaj ri quebajwataj che u banic ri rachoch Dios." 
2Kings22:7 Chabij che xukuje' chi muta' chque joropa' ri caquisach che ri puak, caquitz'akatisaj c'u ya' u cojic.”" 
2Kings22:8 Ri Hilsiy, ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob xutzijoj che ri Sapan, ri catz'iban ri cac'ulmatajic chi u rikom ri wuj re ri pixab chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel; xujach c'u ri wuj pa u k'ab, ri Sapan xusiq'uij u wäch." 
2Kings22:9 Xbe c'u na ri Sapan che u bixic che ri ajawinel, xubij c'u che: “Ri e pataninel tak ech la xquimulij ri puak ri c'o pa ri rachoch Dios, xquijach c'u pa qui k'ab ri quetakan paquiwi' ri quebanow u banic ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel.”" 
2Kings22:10 Xukuje' xuya' u bixic ri Sapan che ri ajawinel chi ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Hilsiy xujach jun wuj pa u k'ab, xusiq'uij c'ut ri cubij ri wuj chuwäch ri ajawinel." 
2Kings22:11 Aretak xuta' ri ajawinel ri cubij ri wuj re ri pixab, xujis ri ratz'iak chrij," 
2Kings22:12 xuya' c'u takanic che ri Hilsiy, ri Ahicam, u c'ojol ri Sapan, ri Acbor, u c'ojol ri Micaiy, ri Sapan ri catz'iban ri cac'ulmatajic, xukuje' ri Asaiy rach k'atal tzij ri ajawinel:" 
2Kings22:13 “Jix jitz'onoj che ri Ajawaxel che nu q'uexwäch xukuje' che u q'uexwäch ri tinimit xukuje' che u q'uexwäch ronojel ri Juda, ri cakaban che ri cubij we wuj ri' ri rikom; sibalaj ba' yactajinak royowal ri' ri Ajawaxel chkij uj, rumal rech chi ri e ka mam man xquiya' ta qui xiquin che ri cubij we wuj ri' mawi xquiban ta ronojel ri tz'ibatal chupam.”" 
2Kings22:14 Ri Hilsiy, ri Ahicam, ri Acbor, ri Sapan xukuje' ri Asaiy, xebe che rilic ri Huld k'axal tzij, rixokil ri Salum, u c'ojol ri Ticba ri' u mam c'ut ri Haras, ri chajil ri c'olbal atz'iak ri c'o chupam ri rachoch Dios, ri Huld jekel chupam ri u cätas ri Jerusalen, are tak c'u xquich'abej," 
2Kings22:15 ri ixok xutzelej u bixic chque: “Are wa' ri cutzelej u bixic ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel: ‘Chibij che ri winak ri ix takowinak ulok che u tz'onoxic chwe," 
2Kings22:16 chi ri in, ri Ajawaxel, quinbij: Quinwerej na ulok jun u q'ueyowal puwi' we c'olbal ri' xukuje' paquiwi' ri winak ri e c'o chupam, je jas ri cubij ri wuj ri xusiq'uij u wäch ri ajawinel re Juda." 
2Kings22:17 Kas in quixutum canok qui porom c'u c'oc' k'ol chquiwäch jule' tak diosib, xa' c'u woyowal caquiyac rumal ronojel ri cäquibano; rumal ri' nicowinak ri woyowal chrij we c'olbal ri', man c'u cächup ta na." 
2Kings22:18 Chibij ba' che ri ajawinel re Juda, ri xixutak ulok che u tz'onoxic che ri Ajawaxel, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel, cubij xukuje': Rumal c'u rech chi a yo'm a xiquin che ri a tom," 
2Kings22:19 rumal c'u rech chi slabetajinak ri awanima' xatkeb c'u wuc' aretak xatatabej ri k'alajisanic ri nu yo'm chrij we c'olbal ri' xukuje' ri winak ri e c'o chupam, chi quejocoq'uex na bic e c'okotajinak c'ut, rumal rech chi xajis ri awatz'iak chawij xukuje' chi xatok' chnuwäch, ri in xatintatabej. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinbij chawe." 
2Kings22:20 Rumal c'u ri', quinya' na chawe chi catcäm pa jamaril, carika' c'u na awib cuc' ri e a mam, man cawil ta c'u na ri u q'ueyowal ri quinwerej na ulok puwi' we c'olbal ri'.’ ” Ri e u tako'n ri ajawinel xetzelejic rech caquic'am bic che ri xtzelex u bixic." 
2Kings23:1 Are' c'u ri ajawinel xutak qui siq'uixic conojel ri nimak tak tatayib ri e c'o pa Juda xukuje' ri e c'o pa Jerusalen, rech caquimulij quib ruc'." 
2Kings23:2 Ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri achijab aj Juda, conojel ri aj Jerusalen, ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri e k'axal tzij xukuje' ri winak chnimalaj conojel, kas ruc' ri sibalaj ch'utin c'ä ruc' ri sibalaj nim na, xebe chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Chila' ri ajawinel co xurak u chi' che u siq'uixic ronojel ri cubij ri wuj re ri c'ulwächinic ri xrik chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel." 
2Kings23:3 Xutac'aba' c'u rib ri ajawinel chuxcut ri rakan ja, xuya' c'u u tzij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chi caniman che, cuban c'ut ri cubij ruc' tz'akatil, man ruc' ta quieb u c'u'x cutakej qui banic ri e u takomal, ri e u takanic xukuje' tak ri pixab, xukuje' ri qui tz'akatisaxic ri u cholajil ri c'ulwächinic ri e tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj. Ronojel c'ut ri tinimit xuya' u tzij che u banic." 
2Kings23:4 Are' c'u ri ajawinel xutak ri Hilsiy, qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri ucab cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e chajil tak oquibal, chi chequesaj ulok chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel conojel ri jastak ri xecoj che u ya'ic k'ijilanic che ri Baal xukuje' che ri Asera xukuje' ri xecoj che u ya'ic k'ijilanic chque ri ch'imil ri e c'o cho ri caj, xebuporoj c'u chrij ri Jerusalen, pa tak ri ulew re ri Sedron, xebuc'am c'u bic ri qui chajil pa Betel." 
2Kings23:5 Xeresaj ri e cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri qui chac ri e cojom can cumal tak ri ajawinelab re Juda che qui poroxic c'oc' tak k'ol pa tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi ri diosib ri e c'o pa tak ri tinimit pa Juda xukuje' tak ri e c'o chrij ri Jerusalen, xukuje' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri quequiporoj coc' tak k'ol chuwäch ri Baal, chuwäch ri k'ij, chuwäch ri ic', chquiwäch ri nimak tak ch'imil xukuje' chquiwäch ri alaj tak ch'imil ri e c'o cho ri caj." 
2Kings23:6 Xresaj bic chrij ri Jerusalen ri u wächbal ri Asera ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, xuporoj chuchi' ri nima' Sedron c'ä xchajir na xujopij c'ut chupam ri siwan ri tixbal u mes ri tinimit." 
2Kings23:7 Xukuje' xebutuquij tak ri ja ri queban macun wi ri achijab cuc' cach achijab jacha ri cuban ri quech ri nim ch'utin, ri cäquiban che u ya'ic jun k'ijilanic chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, ri quequiquemej wi tak ri atz'iak ri ixokib ri quecoj chrij ri ixok dios Asera." 
2Kings23:8 Xutak c'u qui siq'uixic conojel ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e c'o pa tak ri tinimit pa Juda, xebuc'äjij c'ut conojel tak ri e k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib, kas pa Jeb c'ä pa Beerseb, ri qui porom wi c'oc' tak k'ol we e cojol tabal tok'ob ri', xebut'akij tak ri porobal ri quech tak ri itzel tak uxlabal ri e c'o chuchi' ri roquibal ri Josue, ri k'atal tzij puwi' ri nimalaj tinimit, ri e c'o chuchi' ri oquibal pa ri tinimit, pa ri mox k'ab." 
2Kings23:9 E are tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri quepatanij pa tak ri k'ijilabal ri que k'ijilax wi diosib man quebopan ta ruc' ri porobal ri rech ri Ajawaxel ri c'o pa Jerusalen, caquitij c'u ri caxlanwa ri man yo'm ta ch'am ruc' cuc' ri cach tak e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
2Kings23:10 Ri Josiy xukuje' xuc'äjij ri porobal ri c'o pa ri beya' re Ben-inom, rech man c'o ta jachin jun cuporoj ta ri u c'ojol mawi ri u mia'l jacha' che tabal tok'ob che ri Moloc." 
2Kings23:11 Xeresaj tak ri quiej ri xequicoj tak ri ajawinelab re Juda che u ya'ic u k'ij ri k'ij, ri e c'o chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, qui rikom quib ruc' ri rachoch ri Natan-melec, ri cätakan paquiwi' tak ri ja ri ulew, xukuje' xuporoj ri u carwaj ri k'ij." 
2Kings23:12 Xebutuquij c'u xukuje' tak ri porobal ri xequiyac tak ri ajawinelab re Juda puwi' ri nimalaj rachoch ri Acaz, xukuje' tak ri e u porobal ri Manases ri xebuyac cho tak ri uwo ja re ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel; xebumuchu xebuq'uiaka' c'ut ri qui ch'akatil chupam ri nima' Sedron." 
2Kings23:13 Ri ajawinel xukuje' xebuc'äjij tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib ri e c'o pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jerusalen, pa ri u mox ri elebal k'ij che ri u Juyubal u Che'al Aseitun, ri e u yacom can ri Salomon, ajawinel re Israel, che ri Astarte, ixok dios ri quetzelax u wäch quech ri aj sidonib; che ri Quemos, dios ri quetzelex u wäch quech ri aj Moab, xukuje' che ri Milcom, ri dios ri quetzelex u wäch quech ri aj amonib." 
2Kings23:14 Xukuje' xebumuch tak ri abaj xukuje' tak ri tastalic tak cuta'm, xebubalij c'u qui bakil cäminakib chquipam tak ri c'olbal ri e c'olinak wi canok." 
2Kings23:15 Are c'u ri porobal xukuje' ri k'ijilabal ri c'o pa Betel ri quek'ijilax wi diosib, ri xebuyac can ri Jeroboam, u c'ojol ri Nabat, ri xbanowic chi xemacun ri aj israelib, ri Josiy xebumuchu c'ä xebuc'äjij na, xut'ik c'u k'ak' chque xukuje' xut'ik c'u k'ak' che ri u wächbal ri Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Aretak xtzelej ulok ri Josiy xtake c'u u wäch chque tak ri mukbal ri e c'o kas puwi' we juyub ri', xtakanic chi chebesax ulok ri bak ri e c'o chquipam, xebuporoj c'ut puwi' ri porobal, je quitz'ilobexic wa' xubano. Jewa' xban che u tz'akatisaxic ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel ri xuya' u bixic ri k'axal tzij." 
2Kings23:17 Ri ajawinel xubij: “¿Jas wa' chi tac'atic mukbal ri quinwil apan jela'?” Ri achijab aj tinimit xquitzelej u bixic che: “Chi' mukutal wi ri k'axal tzij ri u petic pa Juda ri xuya' c'u u bixic ri banom la che ri porobal ri c'o pa Betel.” 
2Kings23:18 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Josiy: “Chiya' canok jas u banom. C'o jun machapow ri u bakil.” Jeri' nim xil wi ri e u bakil ri k'axal tzij ri xpe pa Juda xukuje' ri e rech ri k'axal tzij ri xjeki' pa Samar. 
2Kings23:19 E are tak c'ut conojel ri ja ri quek'ijilax wi tak ri diosib ri e c'o pa Samar, ri e yacom tak cumal ri ajawinelab re Israel ri xequiyacbej royowal ri Ajawaxel, xchupisax qui wäch rumal ri Josiy junam xuban chque jas ri xuban pa Betel." 
2Kings23:20 Xebucämisaj c'u ne na paquiwi' ri porobal conojel ri quecojow tabal tok'ob paquiwi' ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi ri diosib, xebuporoj c'u ri qui bakil ri cäminakib paquiwi'. Xtzelej c'ut ri ajawinel pa Jerusalen." 
2Kings23:21 Ri ajawinel xuya' takanic chi ronojel ri tinimit chroc'owisaj ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios, je jas ri tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri c'ulwächinic." 
2Kings23:22 Mawi jumul oc'owisam ta jun Oc'owem ri junam ta ruc' wa' kas pa ri qui k'ijol ri c'amal tak be ri xetakan puwi' ri Israel, mawi pa ronojel ri qui k'ijol ri ajawinelab re Israel xukuje' ri e rech ri Juda." 
2Kings23:23 Pa ri uwajxaklajuj (18) junab re ri rajawinic ri Josiy aretak xoc'owisax we Oc'owem ri' pa Jerusalen che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. 
2Kings23:24 Ri Josiy xukuje' xusachisaj qui wäch ri ajk'ijab xukuje' ri ch'obonelab, ri e diosib ri e c'o pa tak ri cachoch ri winak xukuje' niq'uiaj e diosib chic, xukuje' conojel ri xojibalalaj tak jastak ri xecoj che k'ijilanic ri quilitaj cuc' ri winak pa Juda xukuje' pa Jerusalen. Xuban wa' che u tz'akatisaxic ri cubij ri pixab ri tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj ri u rikom ri Hilsiy ri cojol tabal tok'ob chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel." 
2Kings23:25 Man c'o ta jun ajawinel ri xc'oji' ta nabe chuwäch mawi c'ä te' ta xpe chrij are', ri jacha' ta ri are' ri xtzelej ta ruc' ri Ajawaxel ri ruc' ta ronojel ri ranima' xukuje' ruc' ta ronojel ri u c'aslibal xukuje' cuc' ta conojel ri u chuk'ab, je jas ta ri u cholajil ri u pixab ri Moises." 
2Kings23:26 Pune' c'u ruc' ronojel wa', ri Ajawaxel xutakej oyowaric, c'ä c'o na ri royowal chrij ri Juda cumal conojel ri etzelal ri xyacbex royowal rumal ri Manases." 
2Kings23:27 Rumal ri' xubij ri Ajawaxel chi curesaj ri Juda chuwäch, jacha' ri xuban che resaxic ri Israel, cuxutuj c'u can ri Jerusalen ri u cha'om, xukuje' ri rachoch ri u bim wi chi chila' cajeki' wi ri u bi'." 
2Kings23:28 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Josiy xukuje' ronojel ri xubano, tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri qui tzijobelil tak ri ajawinelab pa Juda." 
2Kings23:29 Pa ri u k'ijol, ri paraon Necao, ajawinel re Ejipt, xutakej u be xbe che u suq'uil ri Euprats che u to'ic ri ajawinel re Asiriy. Ri ajawinel Josiy xel bic che u c'ulaxic; pa Meguid c'ut, xuwi c'u xilitaj rumal ri Necao, xucämisaj." 
2Kings23:30 Xyac bic cumal ri rach k'atal tak tzij xya' bic chupam jun carwaj xquic'am bic kas pa Meguid c'ä pa Jerusalen, xmuk c'u chila' chupam ri u mukubal. Ri e aj tinimit xquic'am c'ut ri Joacaz, u c'ojol ri Josiy, xquitaso jacha' che ajawinel xquicoj c'u che u q'uexwäch ri u tat." 
2Kings23:31 Juwinak oxib u junab ri Joacaz aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, oxib ic' c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Hamutal u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Jeremiy, aj Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Ri e u banoj man e utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel, xak junam cuc' ri e u mam." 
2Kings23:33 Ri ajawinel Necao xutz'apij pa che' pa Ribla, chupam ri ulew re ri Hamat, rech ma ta cajawin pa Jerusalen xucoj c'u chuk'ab che ri winak pa Juda chi rajawaxic cutoj oxc'al oxlajuj (73) quintal sak puak xukuje' oxib arob k'an puak." 
2Kings23:34 Ri ajawinel Necao are' xucoj na ri Eliaquim che ajawinel u c'ojol ri Josiy, che u q'uexwäch ri u tat, xuq'uex c'ut ri u bi' xucoj Joasim chrij, xumajij c'ut ri Joacaz xuc'am bic pa Ejipt, chila' c'u xcäm wi." 
2Kings23:35 Ri Joasim xujach che ri Necao ri sak puak xukuje' ri k'an puak ri cutok'ij wa', che c'u u tojic xutok'ij na jun cuchuj chque conojel ri winak ri e c'o pa ri ulew. Chquijujunal c'ut xquitoj ri alcabal ri xtok'ix chque ruc' ri sak puak xukuje' ruc' k'an puak ri alcabal ri xk'at chquij, rech cäjach che ri paraon Necao." 
2Kings23:36 Juwinak job (25) u junab ri Joasim aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, julajuj (11) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Zebud u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Pedaiy, aj Rum c'ut." 
2Kings23:37 Ri e u banoj itzel xeril ri Ajawaxel, junam jas ri xquiban ri e u mam." 
2Kings24:1 Aretak cätajin cajawin ri Joasim, ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, xumajij ri ulew, oxib junab c'ut xc'oji' ri Joasim chuxe' ri u takanic. Xuq'uex c'ut u chomanic xuwalijisaj c'u rib chrij." 
2Kings24:2 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xebutak ulok chrij ri Joasim jumulaj eläk'omab aj caldeyib, aj siriyab, aj moabib xukuje' aj amonib. Xebutak ulok chrij ri Juda, rech caquisachisaj u wäch, je jas ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel cumal ri e pataninel tak rech ri e k'axal tzij." 
2Kings24:3 Xuc'ulmaj c'ut ri Juda wa' rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel je xuchomaj u banic, che resaxic ri Juda chuwäch qui mac quech tak ri macaj ri xebuban ri Manases," 
2Kings24:4 xukuje' rumal ri quic' ri xutixo ri man c'o ta u mac ri xunojasibej rech ri Jerusalen. Rumal rech wa' ri Ajawaxel man xraj ta chic xusach ta chic u mac. 
2Kings24:5 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Joasim xukuje' ronojel ri xubano tz'ibatal chupam ri wuj rech ri qui tzijobelil tak ri ajawinelab pa Juda. 
2Kings24:6 Aretak cäminak chic, are' xajawin ri u c'ojol chupam ri u c'olbal ri Joaquin u bi'." 
2Kings24:7 Kas chi' c'ut ri ajawinel re Ejipt man xel ta chi bic chupam ri rulew, rumal rech chi ri ajawinel re Babilon u ch'äcom ronojel ri ulew ri e c'o can pa u k'ab nabe, kas ruc' ri nima' re Ejipt c'ä ruc' ri nima' Euprats." 
2Kings24:8 Wajxaklajuj (18) u junab ri Joaquin aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, oxib ic' c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Nehusta u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Elnatan, aj Jerusalen." 
2Kings24:9 Ri e u banoj man e utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel, xak junam ruc' ri xebuban ri u tat." 
2Kings24:10 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri e rajch'ojab ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon xepe che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Jerusalen xquisutij c'u rij che u banic ch'o'j ruc'." 
2Kings24:11 Aretak c'u cätajin u banic ri ch'o'j ruc' xopan ri Nabucodonosor. 
2Kings24:12 Are' c'u ri Joaquin, ajawinel re Juda, rachil ri u nan, xukuje' ri e rach k'atal tak tzij, ri e c'amal tak be xukuje' ri achijab ri junam qui wäch ruc', xquijach quib pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Babilon, ri xebuyutu. Xc'ulmataj wa' chupam ri wajxakib junab ri rajawinic ri Nabucodonosor." 
2Kings24:13 Xuchaplej c'ut ri Nabucodonosor quesaxic conojel ri k'inomal ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel je, jacha' ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel, xebupaxij conojel ri jastak re k'an puak ri xebuban can ri Salomon ri ajawinel re Israel che ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel." 
2Kings24:14 Xebuyut c'u bic conojel ri aj Jerusalen, conojel ri e c'amal tak be xukuje' conojel ri cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, xukuje' conojel ri queta'm u banic jun chac xukuje' ri e ch'ayal tak ch'ich', c'ä xetz'akat na lajuj mil (10,000) ajpache'. Xuwi c'u xecanaj can ri mebayib tak winak chupam ri ulew." 
2Kings24:15 Ri Nabucodonosor xebuc'am bic ri Joaquin rachil ri u nan, xukuje' tak ri rixokil, ri e rach k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' tak ri winak ri e nimak na qui k'ij ri e c'o pa ri ulew. Xeresaj bic pa Jerusalen xebuc'am bic pa Babilon." 
2Kings24:16 Chinimalaj conojel ri nimak qui k'ij ri xeyut rumal ri ajawinel re Babilon ri xebec'am bic, e wukub mil (7,000); e jun mil (1,000) c'ut ri queta'm u banic jun chac xukuje' e ch'ayal tak ch'ich', e c'o chi c'u wi ri' ri cowilaj tak achijab ri e utz che u banic ch'o'j." 
2Kings24:17 Ri ajawinel re Babilon xucoj can ri Mataniy che ajawinel, che u q'uexwäch ri Joaquin ri u c'ojol ri ratz ri Joaquin, xuq'uex c'ut ri u bi' xucoj c'u Sedequiy chrij." 
2Kings24:18 Juwinak jun (21) u junab ri Sedequiy aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, julajuj (11) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Hamutal c'ut u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Jeremiy, aj Libna c'ut." 
2Kings24:19 Ri e u banoj itzel xeril ri Ajawaxel, e junam ruc' ri xebuban ri Joasim." 
2Kings24:20 Rumal ri' xoyowar ri Ajawaxel chrij ri Jerusalen xukuje' chrij ri Juda, xebuq'uiak bic chuwäch. Xuwalijisaj c'u rib ri Sedequiy chrij ri ajawinel re Babilon." 
2Kings25:1 Chupam ri lajuj rajilabal ri lajuj ic' re ri ubelejeb junab ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy, ri ajawinel Nabucodonosor xopan che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Jerusalen e rachil conojel ri rajch'ojab, xusutij c'u rij. Xaya' rib chuwäch, xebuwalijisaj c'u tak ak'anisabal chrij che u banic ch'o'j ruc'." 
2Kings25:2 Ri tinimit xsutix rij c'ä pa ri julajuj (11) junab re ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy. 
2Kings25:3 Pa ri belejeb rajilabal ri ucaj ic' re we junab ri' xnimataj ri wi'jal chupam ri tinimit, man c'o ta chi c'u jas caquitij ri winak." 
2Kings25:4 Xquic'ot c'u jun jul chuxe' ri nimalaj u tapia ri tinimit, pune' c'u sutital rij cumal ri aj caldeyib are' c'u ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri ajch'ojab xebanimaj bic chak'ab xquiya' can ri tinimit. Xebel bic pa ri oquibal ri c'o chquixo'l ri quieb nimak tak tapia, chupam ri be ri c'o chquipam tak ri u tiquibal tak u cotz'i'j ri ajawinel, are' c'u xquimajij ri be ri cäbe pa ri beya' re ri Jordan." 
2Kings25:5 E are' tak c'ut ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib xquiterenej ri ajawinel Sedequiy pa rakan, xequik'i' c'ut pa ri lianic re Jerico. Conojel ri rajch'ojab xquiya' can u tuquiel xquijabuj c'u quib." 
2Kings25:6 Ri aj caldeyib xquichap ri ajawinel xquic'am c'u bic chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon, ri c'o pa Ribla, chupam ri ulew re ri Hamat. Chila' c'ut xuk'at wi tzij ri Nabucodonosor puwi' ri Sedequiy," 
2Kings25:7 chuwäch c'u wa' xtakan che u k'atic qui kul ri e u c'ojol. Are c'u ri che ri Sedequiy xuya' takanic chi chec'otix ri u bak'wäch chcoj c'u pa tikom ch'ich' che u c'amic bic pa Babilon. 
2Kings25:8 Pa ri uwuk rajilabal ri ro' ic' re ri ubelejlajuj (19) u junab ri rajawinic ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, ri Nabuzaradan, rach k'atal tzij ri ajawinel xukuje' takanel paquiwi' ri chajil tak rech ri ajawinel, xopan pa Jerusalen" 
2Kings25:9 xuporoj c'ut ri rachoch Dios, ri rachoch ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri ja ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit, kas c'u e are xenabejisax conojel ri cachoch tak ri nimak tak qui k'ij," 
2Kings25:10 ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib ri e achilaninak xequit'akij tak ri e nimak tak tapia ri e u sutim rij ri Jerusalen. 
2Kings25:11 Ri Nabuzaradan xeresaj bic xebuc'am bic pa Babilon ri e canajinak chupam ri tinimit xukuje' ri qui junamam qui wäch ruc' ri ajawinel re Babilon, xukuje' ri queta'm u banic jun chac." 
2Kings25:12 Xuwi xebuya' can jujun ri sibalaj e meba' na ri e c'o chquixo'l ri winak, rech quequilij ri ticbal tak uva xukuje' tak ri ulew." 
2Kings25:13 Ri aj caldeyib xequimuch tak ri jastak ri e re k'an ch'ich' ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch Dios: ri rakan tak ja, ri e tiq'uilibal xukuje' ri nimalaj c'olbal ja', xquic'am c'u bic ronojel ri k'an ch'ich' pa Babilon," 
2Kings25:14 xukuje' xequic'am bic ri e yabal chaj, ri e paq'uebal, ri e kopibal tak u wi chaj, ri nimak tak paq'uebal xukuje' conojel tak ri chaconisan re k'an ch'ich' ri quebajwataj che ri k'ijilanic." 
2Kings25:15 Ri qui nimal ajch'ojab xebuc'am bic conojel ri jastak re k'an puak xukuje' re sak puak: ri e yabal rachak k'ak' xukuje' ri e nimak tak lak. 
2Kings25:16 Ri quieb rakan ja, ri nimalaj c'olbal ja' ri e tiq'uilibal ri xtak qui banic rumal ri Salomon chupam ri rachoch Dios, ri capajanic man cäban ta cuinic che retamaxic." 
2Kings25:17 Chquijujunal ri rakan ja coc'ow na belejeb bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj u taq'ui'c, c'o chi c'u na jun retz'balil puwi' ri quetan quieb bara' ruc' quieb k'abaj u taq'ui'c c'o c'u jun c'at re k'an ch'ic' chrij, ri wiktal che crabaj. Ri quieb rakan ja xak e junam." 
2Kings25:18 Ri qui nimal ajch'ojab xuyut xukuje' ri Seraiy, qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri Soponiy ri ucab cojol tabal tok'ob ri cajunamataj ruc', xukuje' ri e oxib chajil rech ri u chi' ri rachoch Dios." 
2Kings25:19 Chquixo'l ri winak ri e aj tinimit xuyut ri qui nimal ajch'ojab ri cätakan paquiwi' ri ajch'ojab, job achijab ri quepatanij che ri ajawinel ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit, ri nim u banic ri quemolow tak ri achijab rech queboc che ajch'ojab xukuje' oxc'al (60) achijab ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit ri nimak tak qui k'ij." 
2Kings25:20 Ri Nabuzaradan xebuc'am bic conojel wa' chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon ri c'o pa Ribla, chupam ri rulew ri Hamat. Xtakan ri ajawinel re Babilon che qui cämisaxic chila'. Jera' xban che resaxic bic ri aj Juda pa ri culew." 
2Kings25:21  
2Kings25:22 Ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, xucoj can ri Jedaliy che k'atal tzij, u c'ojol ri Ahicam ri' u mam c'ut ri Sapan, rech cätakan paquiwi' ri winak ri xebuya' can pa Juda." 
2Kings25:23 Aretak c'ut ri e qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj Juda xukuje' ri cajch'ojab xquetamaj wa', xebe pa Mizpa che u tzijobexic ri Jedaliy. E are' tak wa', ri Ismael u c'ojol ri Netaniy; ri Joanan, u c'ojol ri Carey; ri Seraiy, u c'ojol ri Tanumet, aj Netop; xukuje' ri Jaazaniy, u c'ojol jun achi aj Maac. Xebachilax tak bic cumal ri cajch'ojab." 
2Kings25:24 Ri Jedaliy xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xcha' chque xukuje' chque ri cajch'ojab, xubij c'u chque chi maquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri e qui nimal tak ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib, xan' chixjekel can chupam ri ulew chipatanij c'ut ri ajawinel re Babilon, utz c'u quixel na." 
2Kings25:25 Pa ri uwuk ic', ri Ismael u c'ojol ri Netaniy ri' u mam c'ut ri Elisam, rija'lil ri ajawinel re Juda, xopanic e rachilam bic lajuj achijab, conojel c'ut xeboc che u cämisaxic ri Jedaliy xukuje' ri aj Juda xukuje' ri aj caldeyib ri e c'o apan ruc' pa Mizpa." 
2Kings25:26 Conojel c'ut ri winak rumal ri qui xe'n ib chquiwäch ri aj caldeyib, xewalijic, xebe pa Ejipt, chinimak chi ch'utik xukuje' chi e qui nimal tak ajch'ojab." 
2Kings25:27 Chupam ri juwinak wukub (27) rajilabal ri ucablajuj (12) ic' re ri juwinak wuklajuj (37) junab che ri resaxic bic ri Joaquin pa Juda, xuchaplej ajawinic pa Babilon ri ajawinel Ebil-merodac, ri xel u c'u'x che ri Joaquin xresaj c'u pa che'," 
2Kings25:28 xuban utzil che are', xuya' na u k'ij chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic ri junam ri e c'o ruc' pa Babilon." 
2Kings25:29 Je c'u ri' xcuinic xresaj ri atz'iak chrij ri xucoj pa che' xuchap c'u wa'im ruc' ri ajawinel pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal. 
2Kings25:30 Pa ronojel c'u na ri u c'aslemal, ri Joaquin xtoj ri u k'ij rumal ri ajawinel re Babilon." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adan, Set, Enos," 
1Chronicles1:2 Cainan, Mahalaleel, Jared," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoc, Matusalen, Lamec, Noe." 
1Chronicles1:4 Ri e u c'ojol ri Noe: Sem, Cam xukuje' ri Japet." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ri e u c'ojol ri Japet: Gomer, Magog, Maday, Jaban, Tubal, Mesec xukuje' ri Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 Ri e u c'ojol chic ri Gomer: Askenaz, Ripat xukuje' ri Togarm." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ri e u c'ojol chic ri Jaban: Elis, Tarsis, Quitim xukuje' Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ri e u c'ojol ri Cam: Cus, Mizraim, Pot xukuje' ri Canaan." 
1Chronicles1:9 E e u c'ojol ri Cus: Seba, Habil, Sabta, Raam xukuje' ri Sabtec. Ri e u c'ojol chic ri Raam: Seba xukuje' ri Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ri Cus are' u tat ri Nimrod, ri nabe cowilaj achi chuwäch ri uwächulew." 
1Chronicles1:11 Che ri Mizraim xebel wi ri aj ludeyib, ri aj anameyib, ri aj lehabitab, ri aj naptuhitab," 
1Chronicles1:12 ri aj patruseab, ri aj casluhitab xukuje' ri e aj captoritab, chque c'u wa' xebel wi ri aj pilisteyib." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ri Canaan are' u tat ri Sidon, ri nabe u c'ojol xukuje' re ri Het." 
1Chronicles1:14 Che ri Canaan xebel wi ri aj jebuseyib, aj amoreyib, aj jerjeseyib," 
1Chronicles1:15 aj hebeyib, aj araseyib, aj sineyib," 
1Chronicles1:16 ri aj arbadeyib, ri aj zemareyib xukuje' ri aj hamateyib." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Sem: Elam, Asur, Arpaxad, Lud xukuje' ri Aram. Ri e u c'ojol ri Aram e are' ri Uz, Hul, Jeter xukuje' ri Mas." 
1Chronicles1:18 Ri u c'ojol ri Arpaxad are' ri Sala, ri u c'ojol ri Sala are' ri Heber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ri Heber rumal rech chi xebalax quieb u c'ojol: ri nabeal Peleg u bi', pa tak c'ut ri u k'ijol xquitasala' quib ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch ri uwächulew. Ri rachalal ri Peleg, Joctan u bi'." 
1Chronicles1:20 Ri Joctan are' u tat ri Almodad, Selep, Hazar-mabet, Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Adoram, Uzal, Dicla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obal, Abimael, Seba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Habil xukuje' ri Jobab. Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri Joctan." 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Habil xukuje' ri Jobab. Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri Joctan." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sem, Arpaxad, Sala," 
1Chronicles1:25 Heber, Peleg, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nacor, Tare" 
1Chronicles1:27 xukuje' Abram, ri are' Abraham." 
1Chronicles1:28 Ri e u c'ojol ri Abraham: Isaac xukuje' ri Ismael. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ri e rija'lil e are tak wa': Nebaiot, u nabeal ri Ismael, Sedar, Abdeel, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma, Dum, Masa, Hadad, Tem," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Napis xukuje' Sedem. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Ismael." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ri e ral ri Setura, ri man kas ta rixokil ri Abraham: Zimram, Jocsan, Medan, Madian, Isbac xukuje' ri Sua. Ri e u c'ojol chic ri Jocsan: Seba xukuje' Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ri e u c'ojol chic ri Madian: Epa, Eper, Hanoc, Abid xukuje' Eld. Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Setura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ri Abraham are' u tat ri Isaac. Ri e u c'ojol ri Isaac: Esau xukuje' ri Israel. 
1Chronicles1:35 Ri e u c'ojol ri Esau: Elipaz, Reuel, Jeus, Jaalam xukuje' ri Core." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ri e u c'ojol ri Elipaz: Teman, Omar, Zep, Gatam xukuje' ri Senaz; xukuje' are' u tat ri Amalec ruc' ri Timna." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ri e u c'ojol ri Reuel: Nahat, Zera, Sam xukuje' ri Miz." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ri e u c'ojol ri Seir: Lotan, Sobal, Zibeon, Ana, Dison, Ezer xukuje' ri Disan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ri e u c'ojol ri Lotan: Hori xukuje' ri Hemam. Timna rana'b ri Lotan. 
1Chronicles1:40 Ri e u c'ojol ri Sobal: Alban, Manahat, Ebal, Sep xukuje' ri Onam. Ri e u c'ojol ri Zibeon: Aja xukuje' ri Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ri u c'ojol ri Ana are' ri Dison. Ri e u c'ojol ri Dison: Hemdan, Esban, Itran xukuje' ri Queran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ezer: Bilan, Zaaban xukuje' ri Jaacan. Ri e u c'ojol ri Disan: Uz xukuje' ri Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 E are' tak ajawinelab wa' ri xetakan pa Edom c'ä majok chc'ol cajawinel ri aj israelib: Bela, u c'ojol ri Beor; ri u bi' ri u tinimit Dinab." 
1Chronicles1:44 Aretak xcäm ri Bela, are' xtakan ri Jobab pa ri u c'olbal, u c'ojol ri Zera, are c'u u tinimit ri Bosra." 
1Chronicles1:44 Aretak xcäm ri Bela, are' xtakan ri Jobab pa ri u c'olbal, u c'ojol ri Zera, are c'u u tinimit ri Bosra." 
1Chronicles1:45 Aretak xcäm ri Jobab xtakan ri Husam pa ri u c'olbal, ri aj Teman." 
1Chronicles1:45 Aretak xcäm ri Jobab xtakan ri Husam pa ri u c'olbal, ri aj Teman." 
1Chronicles1:46 Aretak xcäm ri Husam, xtakan ri Hadad u c'ojol ri Bedad, pa ri u c'olbal, ri xch'äcan puwi' ri Madian pa ri juyub Moab; Abit c'ut u bi' ri u tinimit." 
1Chronicles1:47 Aretak xcäm ri Hadad, xtakan ri Samla, pa ri u c'olbal ri quel pa ri tinimit Masrec." 
1Chronicles1:48 Aretak xcäm ri Samla, xajawin ri Saul pa ri u c'olbal, ri aj Rehobot, ri tinimit ri c'o chunakaj ri nima'." 
1Chronicles1:49 Aretak xcäm ri Saul, xtakan ri Baal-hanan u c'ojol ri Acbor." 
1Chronicles1:50 Aretak xcäm ri Baal-hanan xtakan ri Hadad pa ri u c'olbal; Pau c'ut u bi' ri u tinimit. Ri rixokil ri Hadad Mehetabel u bi' u mia'l c'ut ri Matred xukuje' ri' u mam ri Mezaab. 
1Chronicles1:51 Aretak cäminak chic ri Hadad ri e c'amal tak be chic pa Edom e are': ri Timna, Alba, Jetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 Aholibam, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Senaz, Teman, Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel xukuje' ri Iram. E are' tak c'amal be wa' pa Edom. 
1Chronicles2:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Israel e are ri Ruben, Simion, Levi, Juda, Isacar, Zabulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Jose, Benjamin, Neptali, Gad xukuje' ri Aser." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ri e u c'ojol tak ri Juda: Er, Onan xukuje' ri Sel. Ri qui nan we oxib ri' are' ri u mia'l Sua, aj cananey. Are' c'u ri Er, u nabeal ri Juda, sibalaj itzel winak rumal ri' xesax ri u c'aslemal rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ri Tamar ralib ri Juda, xeralaj quieb ral che wa', ri Pares xukuje' ri Zera. E job c'ut ri e u c'ojol ri Juda chi conojel." 
1Chronicles2:5 Ri e u c'ojol ri Pares e are' wa' Hezron xukuje' ri Hamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ri e u c'ojol ri Zera e are' wa' Zimri, Etan, Heman, Calcol xukuje' ri Dard, e job chi conojel." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ri u c'ojol ri Carmi are' ri Acar, ri xuc'am ulok quiäksakil puwi' ri Israel aretak xumajij ri takaninak wi ri Dios chi kas cäsachisax u wäch." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ri u c'ojol ri Etan are' ri Azariy. 
1Chronicles2:9 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hezron e are' wa' Jerameel, Ram xukuje' ri Quelubay." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ri Ram are' u tat ri Aminadab, ri Aminadab are' u tat ri Naason, c'amal qui be ri e rija'lil ri Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Ri Naason are' u tat ri Salm, ri Salm are' u tat ri Booz," 
1Chronicles2:12 ri Booz are' u tat ri Obed, ri Obed are' u tat ri Isayi," 
1Chronicles2:13 ri Isayi are' u tat ri Eliab, ri nabe u c'ojol; ri Abinadab, ri ucab; ri Simey, ri urox;" 
1Chronicles2:14 ri Natanael, ri ucaj; ri Raday, ri uro';" 
1Chronicles2:15 ri Ozem, ri uwak; are' c'u ri David, ri uwuk." 
1Chronicles2:16 Ri e canab tak we achijab ri' e are' wa' ri Sarb xukuje' ri Abigail. Ri e ral ri Sarb e oxib: Abisay, Joab xukuje' ri Asael." 
1Chronicles2:17 Ri Abigail xc'oji' jun ral ala, Amas, u bi', u c'ojol ri Jeter aj ismael." 
1Chronicles2:18 Ri Caleb, ri u c'ojol ri Hezron, xc'oji' jun u c'ojol ruc' ri Azub, ri rixokil: Jeriot u bi'. Ri niq'uiaj u c'ojol chic e are' wa' Jezer, Sobab xukuje' ri Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Aretak xcäm ri Azub, ri Caleb xc'uli' ruc' ri Eprat, xc'oji' c'ut jun u c'ojol ruc': Hur u bi'." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ri Hur are' u tat ri Uri, ri Uri are' u tat ri Bezaleel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Aretak c'o chic oxc'al (60) u junab ri Hezron, xc'uli' ruc' ri u mia'l ri Maquir, ri u tat ri Galaad, xc'oji' c'ut jun u c'ojol ruc': Segub u bi'." 
1Chronicles2:22 Ri Segub are' u tat ri Jair, ri xeboc juwinak oxib (23) tinimit aj Galaad pa u k'ab." 
1Chronicles2:23 Are' c'u ri Jesur xukuje' ri Aram xequitokij tak ri ulew ri e c'o pa u k'ab ri Jair, xukuje' ri e rech ri Kenat e rachil ri alaj tak u tinimit, e oxc'al (60) tinimit chi conojel. Conojel tak wa' e are' ri e rija'lil ri Maquir, ri u tat ri Galaad." 
1Chronicles2:24 Cäminak chic Hezron ri Caleb xc'uli' ruc' ri Eprat, ri rixokil ri Hezron, ri u tat, xc'oji' c'ut jun u c'ojol ruc' ri Asur ri are' u tat ri Teco." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jerameel, nabeal u c'ojol ri Hezron, e are' ri Ram, ri nabeal, Bun, Oren, Ozem xukuje' ri Ahiy." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ri Jerameel xc'oji' chic jun rixokil, Atar, u bi', are' c'ut u nan ri Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ri nabeal u c'ojol ri Jerameel are' ri Ram. Ri e u c'ojol ri Ram e are' ri Maaz, ri Jamin xukuje' ri Equer." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ri e u c'ojol ri Onam e are' wa' ri Samay xukuje' ri Jad. Ri e u c'ojol ri Samay e are' ri Nadab xukuje' ri Abisur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Ri rixokil ri Abisur Abihail u bi' are' c'ut u nan ri Ahban xukuje' ri Molid. 
1Chronicles2:30 Ri e u c'ojol ri Nadab e are' ri Seled xukuje' ri Apaim. Ri Seled xcämic man xebalax ta u c'ojol. 
1Chronicles2:31 Ri Apaim are' u tat ri Isi. Ri Isi are' u tat ri Sesan. Ri Sesan are' u tat ri Alay. 
1Chronicles2:32 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jad, rachalal ri Samay, e are' ri Jeter xukuje' ri Jonatan. Ri Jeter xcämic man xebalax ta u c'ojol." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jonatan e are' ri Pelet xukuje' ri Zas. E are' tak wa' ri rija'lil ri Jerameel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Ri Sesan man xebalax ta u c'ojol: xuwi tak u mia'l. C'o c'u jun lok'om u pataninel rech aj Ejipt Jarha u bi' 
1Chronicles2:35 che wa' xuya' wi jun chque ri u mia'l che rixokil, ri xc'oji' jun ral ala: Atay u bi'." 
1Chronicles2:36 Ri Atay are' u tat ri Natan, ri Natan are' u tat ri Zabad," 
1Chronicles2:37 ri Zabad are' u tat ri Eplal, ri Eplal are' u tat ri Obed," 
1Chronicles2:38 ri Obed are' u tat ri Jehu, ri Jehu are' u tat ri Azariy," 
1Chronicles2:39 ri Azariy are' u tat ri Heles, ri Heles are' u tat ri Elas," 
1Chronicles2:40 ri Elas are' u tat ri Sismay, ri Sismay are' u tat ri Salum," 
1Chronicles2:41 ri Salum are' u tat ri Jecamiy, ri Jecamiy are' u tat ri Elisam." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ri e u c'ojol ri Caleb, rachalal ri Jerameel, e are' ri Mesa, ri nabeal, ri are' u tat ri Zip, xukuje' ri Mares, ri ucab, are' c'u u tat ri Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hebron e are' ri Core, Tapu, Requem xukuje' ri Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Ri u c'ojol ri Sema are' ri Raham, ri u c'ojol ri Raham are' Jorcoam; ri u c'ojol ri Requem are' ri Samay." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ri u c'ojol ri Samay are' ri Maon, ri u c'ojol ri Maon are' ri Bet-sur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Ri Epa, ri man kas ta rixokil ri Caleb, are' u nan ri Haran, Mos xukuje' ri Gazez. Ri u c'ojol ri Haran are' ri Gazez." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jaday e are' ri Rejem, Jotam, Jesan, Pelet, Epa xukuje' ri Saap." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ri Maac, u man kas ta rixokil ri Caleb, are' qui nan ri Seber xukuje' ri Tirhan." 
1Chronicles2:49 Xukuje' are' u nan ri Saap, u tat ri Madman, xukuje' re ri Seb, u tat ri Macben xukuje' re ri Jibey. Ri Caleb xukuje' xc'oji' jun u mia'l Acsa u bi'." 
1Chronicles2:50 E are' tak wa' ri e rija'lil ri Caleb. Ri e u c'ojol ri Hur (u nabeal ri Eprat): e are' ri Sobal (ri u c'ojol ri Sobal are' ri Quiriat-jearim); 
1Chronicles2:51 ri Salm (ri u c'ojol ri Salm are' ri Belen); xukuje' Harep (ri u c'ojol ri Harep are' ri Bet-gader). 
1Chronicles2:52 Ri e u c'ojol ri Sobal (u tat ri Quiriat-jearim) e are' ri Reaiy, pa niq'uiaj chque ri manahetitab," 
1Chronicles2:53 xukuje' ri u k'ab cachalaxic ri Quiriat-jearim: ri e aj itritab, ri aj potitab, ri aj sumatitab xukuje' ri aj misraitab, ri xepe wi ri aj zoratitab xukuje' ri e aj estaolitab." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ri e u c'ojol ri Salm e are' ri Belen, ri e aj netopatitab, ri Atrot-bet-joab, ri jun pa niq'uiaj chic chque ri aj manahetitab, ri e aj zoratib" 
1Chronicles2:55 xukuje' ri u k'ab cachalaxic ri aj soperitab ri xejeki' can pa Jabes, che u bixic, ri e aj tirateyab, ri e aj simeatab xukuje' ri aj sucateyib. E are' tak wa' ri aj quenitab ri e petinak che ri Hamat, u tat ri Bet-recab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri David ri xebalax pa Hebron e are wa': ri nabeal, Amnon, ral ri Ahinoam, aj Jezreel; ri ucab, Daniel, ral ri Abigail, aj Carmel;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri David ri xebalax pa Hebron e are wa': ri nabeal, Amnon, ral ri Ahinoam, aj Jezreel; ri ucab, Daniel, ral ri Abigail, aj Carmel;" 
1Chronicles3:2 ri urox, Absalon, ral ri Maac, ri u mia'l ri Talmay, ajawinel re Jesur; ri ucaj, Adoniy, ral ri Haguit;" 
1Chronicles3:3 ri ro', Sepatiy, ral ri Abital; ri uwak, Itream, ral ri Egla, jun rixokil chic ri David." 
1Chronicles3:4 We wakib u c'ojol ri David ri' xil qui wäch pa Hebron, ri xajawin wi wukub junab ruc' wakib ic'. Juwinak oxlajuj (33) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen," 
1Chronicles3:5 ri xil chi wi qui wäch quiejeb u c'ojol; ri Simey, Sobab, Natan xukuje' ri Salomon, conojel wa' e ral ri Betsabe, u mia'l ri Amiel." 
1Chronicles3:6 Xec'oji' chi c'u xukuje' belejeb u c'ojol: Ibar, Elisam, Elipelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nog, Nepeg, Japiy," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisam, Eliad xukuje' ri Elipelet." 
1Chronicles3:9 Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri David, man c'u quebajilax taj ri e u c'ojol cuc' tak ri man kas ta e rixokil. Ri Tamar are' canab." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ri e rija'lil ri Salomon pa ri quicholajil, e are wa' Roboam, Abiy, As, Josapat, Joram, Ocoziy, Joas, Amasiy, Azariy, Jotam, Acaz, Ezequiy, Manases, Amon xukuje' ri Josiy." 
1Chronicles3:11  
1Chronicles3:12  
1Chronicles3:13  
1Chronicles3:14  
1Chronicles3:15 Ri e u c'ojol ri Josiy e are' wa': ri nabeal, Johanan; ri ucab, Joasim; ri urox, Sedequiy; ri ucaj Salum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ri e u c'ojol ri Joasim e are' ri Jeconiy xukuje' ri Sedequiy. 
1Chronicles3:17 Ri e rija'lil ri Jeconiy, ri xyut bic, e are' wa' Salatiel, nabeal u c'ojol," 
1Chronicles3:18 xukuje' ri Malquiram, Pedaiy, Senazar, Jecamiy, Hosam xukuje' ri Nedabiy." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ri e u c'ojol ri Pedaiy e are' wa' Zorobabel xukuje' ri Simeiy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Zorobabel e are' wa' Mesulam xukuje' ri Hananiy, xukuje' ri Selomit, canab wa'," 
1Chronicles3:20 e c'o chic job u c'ojol: Hasuba, Ohel, Berequiy, Hasadiy xukuje' ri Jusab-hesed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hananiy e are' wa' ri Pelatiy xukuje' ri Jesaiy. Ri e rija'lil ri Jesaiy quiterebelam tak quib, e are' wa' Repaiy, Arnan, Abdiy xukuje' ri Secaniy." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ri e u c'ojol ri Secaniy e are' ri Semaiy, Hatus, Igal, Bariy, Neariy xukuje' ri Sapat e wakib chi conojel." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ri e u c'ojol ri Neariy e oxib: Elioenay, Ezequiy xukuje' ri Azricam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ri e u c'ojol ri Elioenay e wukub: Hodabiy, Eliasib, Pelaiy, Acub, Johanan, Dalaiy xukuje' ri Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Juda e are' ri Pares, ri Hezron, Carmi, Hur xukuje' ri Sobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Ri u c'ojol ri Sobal are' ri Reaiy, ri u c'ojol ri Reaiy are' ri Jahat, ri e u c'ojol ri Jahat e are' ri Ahumay xukuje' ri Lahad. E are' tak wa' ri u k'ab cachalaxic ri e aj zoratitab." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hur e are' ri Etam, Jezreel, Isma, Idbas, Penuel (ri u c'ojol ri Penuel are' ri Jedor), xukuje' ri Ezer (ri u c'ojol ri Ezer are' ri Hus). Wa' c'o jun canab Haze-lelpon u bi'. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Hur, u nabeal ri Eprat, e u mam ri Belen." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ri u tat ri Teco are' ri Asur. Ri Asur xec'oji' quieb rixokil: Hel xukuje' Naar. 
1Chronicles4:6 Ri Naar are' u nan ri Ahuzam, Heper, Temen xukuje' ri Ahastar. E are' tak wa' ri e ral ri Naar." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ri e ral ri Hel e are' ri Zeret, Jezoar xukuje' ri Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Ri e u c'ojol ri Cos are' ri Anub xukuje' ri Zobeb; ri Cos e u mam ri u k'ab rachalaxic ri e aj Aharel, u c'ojol ri Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ri Jabes are' xux na nim u k'ij chquiwäch ri rachalal, ri u nan xucoj Jabes che u bi', xubij c'ut: “Kastzij ruc' c'ax xinwalaj.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Ri Jabes xuban ch'awem ruc' ri u Dios ri Israel, je xubij wa': “Quinbochi'n che la chi caya' la ri tewichibal la panuwi' chya' c'u la jun wulew ri sibalaj nim, chinto' la chinesaj c'u la chquiwäch ri etzelal, rech man quinrik ta c'ax.” Xuya' c'u ri Dios che ri xutz'onoj che." 
1Chronicles4:11 Ri Quelub, rachalal ri Sua, are' u tat ri Mehir; ri Mehir are' u tat ri Eston." 
1Chronicles4:12 Ri Eston are' u tat ri Bet-rap, ri Pasey xukuje' ri Tehin, are' ri xticow ri tinimit Nahas. E are' tak winak wa' ri xejeki' pa Rec." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ri e u c'ojol ri Senaz e are' ri Otoniel xukuje' ri Seraiy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Otoniel e are' ri Hatat 
1Chronicles4:14 xukuje' ri Meonotay. Ri u tat ri Opra are' ri Meonotay. Ri u tat ri Joab are' ri Seraiy, ri e qui mam ri xejeki' pa ri qui beya' ri aj Carisim, ri e nawinelab che qui banic tak chac." 
1Chronicles4:15 Ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon, ri e u c'ojol ri Caleb e are' ri Iru, Ela xukuje' ri Naam. Ri u c'ojol ri Ela are' ri Senaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jahaleel e are' ri Zip, Zipa, Tiriy xukuje' ri Asareel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Esdras e are ri Jeter, Mered, Eper xukuje' ri Jalon. Ri Mered xc'uli' ruc' ri Bitiy, u mia'l ri paraon, ri e ral tak e are' ri Mariy, Samay xukuje' ri Isba, u tat ri Estemo. Ri Mered xukuje' xc'oji' jun ixok ruc' aj ramak' ri Juda, are' c'ut u nan ri Jered, u tat ri Jedor, ri Heber, u tat ri Soc, xukuje' re ri Jecutiel, u tat ri Zano." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Ri e ral ri rixokil ri Hodiy, rana'b ri Naham, ri u tat ri Keil, e are' ri Daliy ri aj garmit xukuje' ri Estemo ri aj maacatib." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ri e u c'ojol ri Simon e are wa' Amnon, Rin, Ben-hanan xukuje' ri Tilon. Ri e u c'ojol ri Isi e are ri Zohet xukuje' Benzohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ri e rija'lil ri Sel, u c'ojol ri Juda, e are' ri Er, u tat ri Lec, Laad, u tat ri Mers, ri u k'ab rachalaxic ri' quechacun ri lino pa Bet-asbe," 
1Chronicles4:22 ri Joasim, ri e aj Cozeb, ri Joas xukuje' ri Sarap, ri xebec'ulan cuc' tak ixokib aj moabib xetzelej c'u pa Belen, je caquitzijoj ri ojer tak tzijobelil." 
1Chronicles4:23 E c'u banal tak lak wa'; e jekel pa Netaim xukuje' pa Jeder e c'o c'u che u patanixic ri ajawinel. 
1Chronicles4:24 Ri e u c'ojol ri Simion e are' wa' Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zera xukuje' ri Saul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Ri u c'ojol ri Saul are' ri Salum; ri u c'ojol ri Salum are' ri Mibsam; ri u c'ojol ri Mibsam are' ri Misma. 
1Chronicles4:26 Ri u c'ojol ri Misma are' ri Hamuel; ri u c'ojol ri Hamuel are' ri Zacur, ri u c'ojol ri Zacur are' ri Simeiy." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ri Simeiy xebalax wuklajuj u c'ojol xukuje' wakib u mia'l; ri e tak rachalal c'ut man xebalax ta q'ui qui c'ojol, jeri' chi ri u k'ab cachalaxic chquixo'l man sibalaj ta xeq'uiyiric e jacha' ta ri e rija'lil ri Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Xejeki' can pa Beerseb, Molad, Hazar-sual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bil, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuel, Horm, Siclag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-marcabot, Hazar-susim, Bet-biray xukuje' ri Saaraim. E are' tak qui tinimit wa' c'ä xajawin na ri David." 
1Chronicles4:32 E c'o xukuje' e job qui tinimit: Etam, Ain, Rimon, Toquen xukuje' ri Asan," 
1Chronicles4:33 e cachil conojel ri alaj tak tinimit ri e c'o chquij tak we tinimit ri' c'ä copan na pa Baalat. E are' tak c'olbal wa' ri xejeki' wi xukuje' ri xetz'ibax wi tak ri qui bi' calaxic. 
1Chronicles4:34 Ri Mesobab, ri Jamlec, ri Josiy (ri u tat ri Josiy are' ri Amasiy)," 
1Chronicles4:35 ri Joel, ri Jehu (ri u tat ri Jehu are' ri Josibiy), wa' u c'ojol ri Seraiy, xukuje' wa' u c'ojol ri Asiel;" 
1Chronicles4:35 ri Joel, ri Jehu (ri u tat ri Jehu are' ri Josibiy), wa' u c'ojol ri Seraiy, xukuje' wa' u c'ojol ri Asiel;" 
1Chronicles4:36 ri Elioenay, ri Jaacob, ri Jesohaiy, ri Asaiy, ri Adiel, ri Jesimiel, ri Benaiy," 
1Chronicles4:37 ri Ziz (ri u tat ri Ziz are' ri Sipi), wa' u c'ojol ri Alon, wa' u c'ojol ri Jedaiy, wa' u c'ojol ri Simri, wa' u c'ojol ri Semaiy." 
1Chronicles4:38 We winak ri' ri natam tak ri qui bi' xebux c'amal tak qui be ri u k'ab cachalaxic ri e c'o chquixo'l. Rumal c'u rech chi sibalaj xeq'uiyir ri calaxic," 
1Chronicles4:39 xebopan che u tzucuxic tak quecha' ri cawaj chuchi' ri oquibal pa Jerar, pa ri elebal k'ij che ri beya'," 
1Chronicles4:40 chila' c'u xquirik wi utzalaj echa' cätojtatic xukuje' sibalaj q'ui, xukuje' jun nimalaj ulew ri man c'o ta cäch'owic mawi c'o cuyac ta u ch'o'j chrij. Chila' xejeki' wi can ri e rija'lil ri Cam nabe," 
1Chronicles4:41 pa tak c'ut ri u k'ijol ri Ezequiy ajawinel re Juda, xepe wa' ri e kayo'm can u bixic tak ri qui bi' xequisachisaj tak qui wäch ri e c'o chila' conojel, junam cuc' tak ri e kajebal xukuje' tak ri jekelibal ri xequirik chila' xejeki' c'u can chila' che qui q'uexwäch, c'o c'u echa' chque tak ri cawaj." 
1Chronicles4:42 E c'o chi c'u na, job sient (500) achijab e qui tz'akat, e rija'lil ri Simion, xebe chupam ri c'ache'laj re Seir ri xc'am qui be rumal ri Pelatiy, Neariy, Repaiy xukuje' ri Uziel, e u c'ojol ri Isi," 
1Chronicles4:43 xequisachisaj c'ut qui wäch ri e aj amalesib. Kas chi' c'ut e jekelinak can chila' c'ä camic. 
1Chronicles5:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ruben, ri u nabeal ri Israel, e are' ri Hanoc, Palu, Hezron xukuje' ri Carmi. Ri Ruben are' ri kas nabeal c'ojolaxel, xutzak c'ut ri ya'tal che ri nabealil rumal rech chi xunak ri rixokil ri u tat, ri ya'tal che ri u nabealil xek'axex chque ri e u c'ojol ri Jose, jun chic u c'ojol ri Israel. Are' c'u xux na nim u cuinem ri Juda chquiwäch ri rachalal, che c'ut xel wi na jun c'amal be; are c'u ri ya'tal che ri nabeal c'ojolaxel xya'taj che ri Jose." 
1Chronicles5:2  
1Chronicles5:3  
1Chronicles5:4 Ri e rija'lil ri Joel pa ri qui cholajil tak quib, e are' ri Semaiy, Gog, Simeiy, Micaiy, Reaiy, Baal xukuje' ri Beera, c'amal qui be ri aj rubenib, ri xc'am bic jacha' lok'om pataninel rumal ri Tiglat-pileser, ajawinel re Asiriy." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ri e rija'lil ri Joel pa ri qui cholajil tak quib, e are' ri Semaiy, Gog, Simeiy, Micaiy, Reaiy, Baal xukuje' ri Beera, c'amal qui be ri aj rubenib, ri xc'am bic jacha' lok'om pataninel rumal ri Tiglat-pileser, ajawinel re Asiriy." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Ri e rachalal ri Beer, je jas ri qui cholajil ri u k'ab achalaxic xetz'ibaxic, e are' ri Jeiel, ri nim na u k'ij, ri Zacariy" 
1Chronicles5:8 xukuje' ri Bela, u c'ojol ri Asaz, ri' u mam ri Sema, ri u c'ojol ri Joel. Ri Bela xjeki' pa Aroer ri u c'ulbatil ri rulew copan c'ä pa Neb xukuje' pa Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:8 xukuje' ri Bela, u c'ojol ri Asaz, ri' u mam ri Sema, ri u c'ojol ri Joel. Ri Bela xjeki' pa Aroer ri u c'ulbatil ri rulew copan c'ä pa Neb xukuje' pa Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Pa ri elebal k'ij xopan c'ä chuchi' ri chaki'j uwo sak ri copan c'ä ruc' ri nima' Euprats, sibalaj c'u xepok'ataj ri rawaj pa ri ulew Galaad." 
1Chronicles5:10 Pa tak ri k'ijol ri xajawin ri Saul, ri aj rubenib xec'oji' pa ch'o'j cuc' ri aj agareyib, xecuin c'u che qui ch'äquic xquijekeba' c'u quib pa ri elebal k'ij che ri ulew Galaad." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ri e rija'lil ri Gad ri xejeki' chquiwäch ri aj rubenib, pa ri rulew ri Basan, copan c'ä ruc' ri tinimit Salca, e are' ri" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, ri nim u k'ij, are' jun ri Sapan, are' chic jun ri Jaanay, xukuje' ri Sapat." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, ri nim u k'ij, are' jun ri Sapan, are' chic jun ri Jaanay, xukuje' ri Sapat." 
1Chronicles5:13 Ri e rija'lil, pa ri qui cholajil ri cachalaxic, e are' wa' Micael, Mesulam, Seba, Joray, Jacan, Ziy xukuje' ri Heber, e wukub chi conojel." 
1Chronicles5:14 E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Abihail, ri u c'ojol ri Huri, wa' u c'ojol ri Jar, wa' u c'ojol ri Galaad, wa' u c'ojol ri Micael, wa' u c'ojol ri Jesisay, wa' u c'ojol ri Jado, wa' u c'ojol ri Buz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ri Ahi, u c'ojol ri Abdiel, ri' u mam ri Gun, xux c'amal qui be ri rachalal." 
1Chronicles5:16 Conojel xejeki' pa Galaad, pa Basan xukuje' pa tak ri alaj tak qui tinimit, xukuje' pa tak ri juyub re Saron ri queyuk'un wi, c'ä pa tak ri qui c'ulbatil." 
1Chronicles5:17 Conojel e are' xtz'ibax ri qui bi' chquixo'l ri cachalal pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Jotam, ajawinel re Juda, xukuje' pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Jeroboam, ajawinel re Israel." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ri e rija'lil ri Ruben xukuje' ri rech ri Gad, xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases, e cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, ri e c'o qui quetecak tak ch'ich', xukuje' qui ch'ich' tak re ch'o'j xukuje' qui q'uiakbal ch'ab, ri sibalaj utz qui tijoxic banom che u banic ch'o'j. E cawinak quiejeb mil wukub sient oxc'al (44,760) achijab ri e ya'tal che u banic ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles5:19 Xech'ojin c'u cuc' ri aj agareyib, xukuje' ruc' ri Jetur, ri Napis xukuje' ri Nodab;" 
1Chronicles5:20 xeto' c'ut rumal ri Dios, xekaj c'ut ri aj agareyib pa qui k'ab xukuje' ri quinimom quib che qui to'ic, pa u niq'uiajil c'ut ri ch'o'j ri cätajin cäquibano xquitz'onoj che ri Dios chi chebuto'. Ri Dios xebuto' rumal rech chi xquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij." 
1Chronicles5:21 Xequic'am c'u bic ri cawaj ri e qui c'ulel, ri e cawinak lajuj mil (50,000) cameyib, quieb sient cawinak lajuj mil (250,000) chij cächil quieb mil (2,000) ama'ib tak bur. Xekaj xukuje' jun sient mil (100,000) winak pa qui k'ab." 
1Chronicles5:22 Sibalaj e q'ui ri c'ulel ri xecämic, rumal rech chi ri ch'o'j are' xbanow ri Dios. Xejeki' c'u can pa tak we c'olbal ri' c'ä xopan na ri k'ijol aretak xebesax bic." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ri e quija'lil ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases xejeki' pa ri ulew ri cächaptaj pa Basan copan c'ä pa Baal-hermon, pa Senir xukuje' pa ri juyub Hermon, sibalaj c'u e q'ui." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ri c'amal tak qui be ri calaxic e are' ri Eper, Isi, Eliel, Asriel, Jeremiy, Hodabiy xukuje' ri Jadiel, conojel e are' e cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, achijab ri nimak qui k'ij xukuje' e c'amal tak qui be ri cachalaxic." 
1Chronicles5:25 Xquic'ulelaj c'ut ri u Dios ri e qui mam man c'u ruc' ta jiquil xebin chuwäch xequik'ijilaj tak ri e qui diosib tak ri tinimit ri xsachisax qui wäch rumal ri Dios xebesax c'u bic chquiwäch. 
1Chronicles5:26 Rumal c'u rech wa', ri u Dios ri Israel xutakchi'j ri Pul, ajawinel re Asiriy, ri u bixic, ri Tiglat-pileser, ri xeyutuw bic ri e aj rubenib xukuje' ri aj gadib xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases; xebuc'am c'u bic pa Halah, Habor, Har xukuje' chuchi' ri nima' Gozan, ri c'ä e c'o wi camic." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Levi e are' ri Jerson, Coat xukuje' ri Merar." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Coat e are' wa' Amram, Izar, Hebron xukuje' ri Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ri e ralc'ual ri Amram e are' ri Aaron, ri Moises xukuje' ri Mariy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron e are' ri Nadab, Abiu, Eleazar xukuje' ri Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ri u c'ojol ri Eleazar are' ri Pinees, ri u c'ojol ri Pinees are' ri Abisu," 
1Chronicles6:5 ri u c'ojol ri Abisu are' ri Buqui, ri u c'ojol ri Buqui are' ri Uz," 
1Chronicles6:6 ri u c'ojol ri Uz are' ri Zeraiy, ri u c'ojol ri Zeraiy are' ri Meraiot," 
1Chronicles6:7 ri u c'ojol ri Meraiot are' ri Amariy, ri u c'ojol ri Amariy are' ri Ahitob," 
1Chronicles6:8 ri u c'ojol ri Ahitob are' ri Sadoc, ri u c'ojol ri Sadoc are' ri Ahimaas," 
1Chronicles6:9 ri u c'ojol ri Ahimaas are' ri Azariy, ri u c'ojol ri Azariy are' ri Johanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 ri u c'ojol ri Johanan are' ri Azariy ri xux cojol tabal tok'ob chupam ri rachoch Dios ri xuyac ri Salomon pa Jerusalen. 
1Chronicles6:11 Ri u c'ojol ri Azariy are' ri Amariy, ri u c'ojol ri Amariy are' ri Ahitob," 
1Chronicles6:12 ri u c'ojol ri Ahitob are' ri Sadoc, ri u c'ojol ri Sadoc are' ri Salum," 
1Chronicles6:13 ri u c'ojol ri Salum are' ri Hilsiy, ri u c'ojol ri Hilsiy are' ri Azariy," 
1Chronicles6:14 ri u c'ojol ri Azariy are' ri Seraiy, ri u c'ojol Seraiy are' ri Josadac." 
1Chronicles6:15 Ri Josadac xc'am bic chupam jun ulew chic aretak ri Ajawaxel xubano chi xc'am bic ri Juda pa jun ulew chic xukuje' ri Jerusalen rumal ri Nabucodonosor.
