1Chronicles6:16 Ri e u c'ojol ri Levi e are' ri Jerson, Coat xukuje' ri Merar." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson e are' wa' Libni xukuje' ri Simeiy. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ri e u c'ojol ri Coat e are' ri Amram, Izar, Hebron xukuje' ri Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ri e u c'ojol ri Merar e are' wa' Mali xukuje' ri Musi. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Levi. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Libni, Jahat, Zim, Joa, Id, Zar xukuje' ri Jeatray." 
1Chronicles6:21  
1Chronicles6:22 Ri e rija'lil ri Coat quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Aminadab, Core, Asir, Elcan, Ebiasap, Asir, Tahat, Uriel, Uziy xukuje' ri Saul." 
1Chronicles6:23  
1Chronicles6:24  
1Chronicles6:25 Ri e u c'ojol ri Elcan e are' wa' Amasay xukuje' ri Ahimot, e are' tak c'ut ri e rija'lil ri Ahimot, quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Elcan, Zopay, Nahat, Eliab, Jeroham xukuje' ri Elcan." 
1Chronicles6:26  
1Chronicles6:27  
1Chronicles6:28 Ri e u c'ojol ri Samuel e are' ri Basni, nabe u c'ojol xukuje' ri Abiy." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ri e rija'lil ri Merar, quiterebelam tak quib, e are' wa' Mali, Libni, Simeiy, Uza, Simey, Haguiy xukuje' ri Asaiy." 
1Chronicles6:30  
1Chronicles6:31 E are' tak bixonelab wa' ri xebucoj can ri David rech e are' quebanow ri trompet chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel kas aretak xcoj ri caxa chi'. 
1Chronicles6:32 Xebixon wa' chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' ri Dios c'ä xuyac na ri Salomon ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel pa Jerusalen, xquitakej c'ut u banic ri qui patanijic jas ri qui nak'atisabal ri qui banom ulok." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ri e c'o chila' e cachil tak ri e qui c'ojol e are': ri rija'lil ri Coat ri ajbix Heman, u c'ojol ri Joel u c'ojol ri Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:33 Ri e c'o chila' e cachil tak ri e qui c'ojol e are': ri rija'lil ri Coat ri ajbix Heman, u c'ojol ri Joel u c'ojol ri Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:34 are' c'u u c'ojol ri Elcan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Jeroham, u c'ojol c'ut ri Eliel, u c'ojol ri Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 u c'ojol ri Zup, u c'ojol ri Elcan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Mahat, u c'ojol c'ut ri Amasay," 
1Chronicles6:36 u c'ojol c'ut ri Elcan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Joel, u c'ojol c'ut ri Azariy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Soponiy," 
1Chronicles6:36 u c'ojol c'ut ri Elcan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Joel, u c'ojol c'ut ri Azariy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Soponiy," 
1Chronicles6:37 u c'ojol c'ut ri Tahat, u c'ojol c'ut ri Asir, u c'ojol c'ut ri Ebiasap, u c'ojol c'ut ri Core," 
1Chronicles6:38 u c'ojol c'ut ri Izar, u c'ojol c'ut ri Coat, u c'ojol c'ut ri Levi, u c'ojol c'ut ri Israel." 
1Chronicles6:39 Pa ri riquiak'ab ri Heman cuya' wi rib ri Asap ri rachalaxic, u c'ojol c'ut ri Berequiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Simey," 
1Chronicles6:40 u c'ojol c'ut ri Micael, u c'ojol c'ut ri Baasiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Malquiy," 
1Chronicles6:41 u c'ojol c'ut ri Etni, u c'ojol c'ut ri Zera, u c'ojol c'ut ri Adaiy," 
1Chronicles6:42 u c'ojol c'ut ri Etan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Zim, u c'ojol c'ut ri Simeiy," 
1Chronicles6:43 u c'ojol c'ut ri Jahat, u c'ojol c'ut ri Jerson, u c'ojol c'ut ri Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Pa ri u mox ri Heman cuya' wi rib ri rachalaxic ri petinak che ri rija'lil ri Merar: ri Etan, u c'ojol c'ut ri Quix, u c'ojol c'ut ri Abdi, u c'ojol c'ut ri Maluc," 
1Chronicles6:45 u c'ojol c'ut ri Hasabiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Amasiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Hilsiy," 
1Chronicles6:46 u c'ojol c'ut ri Amsi, u c'ojol c'ut ri Bani, u c'ojol c'ut ri Semer," 
1Chronicles6:47 u c'ojol c'ut ri Mali, u c'ojol c'ut ri Musi, u c'ojol c'ut ri Merar, u c'ojol c'ut ri Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ri niq'uiaj chi rachalaxic ri e rija'lil ri Levi xecanaj can che ronojel ri patanijic chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. 
1Chronicles6:49 Ri Aaron xukuje' tak ri e rija'lil e are' ri queporon tak ri sipanic puwi' ri c'olbal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic xukuje' puwi' ri c'olbal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol. Xukuje' e are' xebanow ronojel ri patanijic chupam ri C'olbal ri Sibalaj Tastalic xukuje' ri u rikic ri sachbal u mac ri Israel, je jas u cholajil ronojel ri takanic u yo'm ri Moises ri pataninel rech ri Dios." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ri e rija'lil ri Aaron, quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Eleazar, Pinees, Abisu, Buqui, Uz, Zeraiy, Meraiot, Amariy, Ahitob, Sadoc xukuje' ri Ahimaas." 
1Chronicles6:51  
1Chronicles6:52  
1Chronicles6:53  
1Chronicles6:54 E are' tak c'olbal wa' re jekelibal xukuje' tak ri e qui c'ulbatil tak ri culew ri e rija'lil ri Aaron. Chque ri e u k'ab tak cachalaxic ri aj coatib are xquitaklebej 
1Chronicles6:55 ri Hebron, ri c'o pa ri rulew ri Juda, e rachil tak ri e u juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:56 Che ri Caleb ri u c'ojol ri Jepon xya' wi ri juyub re ri tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak u tinimit. 
1Chronicles6:57 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Aaron xjach wi ri Hebron, tinimit to'bal ib, e c'o chi c'u wi na ri alaj tak u tinimit ri Libna, Jatir, Estemo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hilen, Debir, Asan xukuje' ri Bet-sems, conojel wa' e cachil tak ri e qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Xukuje' xeya' tak tinimit chque ri c'o pa ri ramak' ri Benjamin, e are' tak c'u wa', ri Jeb, ri Alemet xukuje' ri Anatot, conojel tak wa' cachil tak ri qui juyub yuk'bal. Jeri' tak ri tinimit ri xequitaklebej ri e qui nimal ri e aj Aaron e oxlajuj." 
1Chronicles6:61 Chque chic ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Coat xequitaklebej lajuj tak tinimit ri e c'o chupam ri pa niq'uiaj ramak' ri Manases," 
1Chronicles6:62 chque chi c'ut ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, je jas ri cajilabal ri e u k'ab cachalaxic, xeya' oxlajuj tak tinimit chque ri e c'o chquipam ri ramak' ri Isacar, Aser xukuje' ri Neptali, xukuje' ri ramak' ri Manases ri qui jekebam quib pa Basan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Chque tak ri e rija'lil ri Merar, je jas ri cajilabal ri e u k'ab cachalaxic, xequitaklebej cablajuj (12) tak tinimit chque ri e c'o chquipam ri ramak' ri Ruben, Gad xukuje' ri Zabulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ri aj israelib xequiya' we tak tinimit ri' e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal chque ri e rija'lil ri Levi. 
1Chronicles6:65 Pa ri ramak' ri Juda, ri Simion xukuje' ri Benjamin xeya' tak ri tinimit chque ri e natam chic ri qui bi', jas ri xquitaklebej." 
1Chronicles6:66 Jujun chque ri e qui nimal ri aj coatib xequitaklebej tak tinimit ri e c'o pa ri ramak' ri Eprain. 
1Chronicles6:67 Xukuje' xya' ri Siquem chque, ri tinimit re to'bal ib, ri c'o pa ri u juyub ri Eprain, e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal, xukuje' c'ut ri Jezer," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jocmeam, Bet-horon, Ajalon xukuje' ri Gat-rimon, conojel wa' e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:69  
1Chronicles6:70 Chque ri e niq'uiaj chic e u k'ab cachalaxic ri aj coatib chic xeya' tak ri tinimit chque ri Aner xukuje' ri Bileam, ri e u tz'akatil ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases, e cachil tak ri e qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:71 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, je jas ri cajilabal ri e u k'ab cachalaxic, xeya' tak ri tinimit chque ri Golan, ri c'o pa Basan, xukuje' ri tinimit Astarot, ri rech can ri pa niq'uiaj ramak' ri Manases, e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:72 Xukuje' xeya' chque che ri ramak' ri Isacar, ri Seds, Daberat, Ramot xukuje' ri Anem, chquijujunal e cachil tak ri e qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:73  
1Chronicles6:74 Che ri ramak' ri Aser xeya' chque ri Masal, ri Abdon, ri Hucoc xukuje' ri Rehob, chquijujunal e cachil tak ri e qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:75  
1Chronicles6:76 Che ri u tz'akatil ri ramak' ri Neptali xeya' chque ri Seds ri c'o pa Galiley, ri Hamon xukuje' ri Quiriataim, chquijujunal cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:77 Chque ri e qui tz'akatil ri e rija'lil ri Merar xeya' chque: ri u tz'akatil ri ramak' ri Zabulon, ri Rimon xukuje' ri Tabor, chquijujunal e cachil tak ri e qui juyub re yuk'bal;" 
1Chronicles6:78 che ri ramak' ri Ruben pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan, chuwäch ri Jerico, ri Beser, ri c'o chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, ri Jaz, ri Cademot xukuje' ri Mepaat, chquijujunal e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:79  
1Chronicles6:80 Che ri ramak' ri Gad, ri Ramot re Galaad, ri Mahanaim, ri Hesbon xukuje' ri Hazer, chquijujunal e cachil tak ri qui juyub re yuk'bal." 
1Chronicles6:81  
1Chronicles7:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Isacar e quiejeb: Tola, Poa, Jasub xukuje' ri Simron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Tola e are' ri Uz, Repaiy, Jeriel, Jamay, Jibsam xukuje' ri Semuel, e c'amal tak qui be ri rachalal ri Tola xukuje' e cowilaj tak banal ch'o'j kas e are' e quesan ulok ri e qui mam. Pa tak ri e u k'ijol ri David, ri cajilabal xopan juwinak quieb mil wakib sient (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ri u c'ojol ri Uz are' ri Israhiy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Israhiy e are' wa' Micael, Obadiy, Joel xukuje' ri Isiy. E job c'amal tak be, chi conojel." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ri u c'ojol ri Uz are' ri Israhiy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Israhiy e are' wa' Micael, Obadiy, Joel xukuje' ri Isiy. E job c'amal tak be, chi conojel." 
1Chronicles7:4 Rumal c'u rech chi e c'o q'ui quixokil xukuje' tak qui c'ojol, ri e quech jalan tak ija'lil, ri cachalal ri xebux jutak k'at achijab ri e takal che u banic ch'o'j, ri xopan juwinak waklajuj mil ri (36,000) ri cajilabal." 
1Chronicles7:5 Xebajilax c'u conojel ri e nimak qui k'ij ri e aj Isacar, jas ri cajilabal ri cachalaxic, xebopan chi jumuch' wukub mil (87,000) achijab, conojel e cowilaj tak banal ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ri e u c'ojol ri Benjamin e oxib: Bela, Bequer xukuje' ri Jediael." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ri e u c'ojol ri Bela e job: Esbon, Uz, Uziel, Jerimot xukuje' ri Ir, conojel e c'amal tak qui be ri cachalal xukuje' e cowilaj tak ajch'ojab. Je c'ut jas ri cubij ri cajilabal ri quija'lil, xebopan pa juwinak quieb mil juwinak cajlajuj (22,034) winak." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ri e u c'ojol ri Bequer e are' wa' ri Zemir, ri Joas, ri Eliezer, ri Elioenay, ri Omri, ri Jerimot, ri Abiy, ri Anatot xukuje' ri Alamet. Conojel wa' e u c'ojol ri Bequer," 
1Chronicles7:9 je c'ut jas ri cajilabal ri calaxic ri quija'lil xukuje' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri e jujun tak ja winak, e juwinak mil quieb sient juwinak (20,220) cowilaj tak achijab." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ri u c'ojol ri Jediael are' ri Bilan. Ri e u c'ojol ri Bilan e are' ri Jeus, ri Benjamin, ri Aod, ri Quenaan, ri Zetan, ri Tarsis xukuje' ri Ahisahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Jediael, c'amal tak qui be ri cachalal xukuje' e cowilaj tak banal ch'o'j ri quena'w che u banic ch'o'j. Ri cajilabal xopan wuklajuj mil quieb sient (17,200) achijab." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hir e are' wa' Supam xukuje' Hupam. Ri u c'ojol ri Aher are' ri Husim. 
1Chronicles7:13 Ri e u c'ojol ri Neptali e are' ri Jazeel, ri Gun, ri Jezer xukuje' ri Salum. E are' ri e rija'lil ri Bil." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ri e u c'ojol ri Manases ri xebalax ruc' ri u man kas ta rixokil aj siriy e are' wa' Asriel xukuje' ri Maquir, u tat ri Galaad." 
1Chronicles7:15 Ri Maquir xc'uli' ruc' ri Maac, canab ri Hupam xukuje' ri Supam. Ri ucab u c'ojol ri Maquir Zelopehad u bi', ri xak xuwi e u mia'l xec'ojic." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ri Maac ri rixokil ri Maquir, xc'oji' jun ral ala xucoj Peres che u bi'. Ri rachalal ri Peres, Sers u bi', ri e u c'ojol Ulam xukuje' Requem qui bi'." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ri Bedan are' u tat ri Ulam. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Galaad, u c'ojol ri Maquir, u c'ojol ri Manases." 
1Chronicles7:18 Ri rana'b ri Maquir, Hamolequet, are' ri u nan ri Isod, Abiezer xukuje' ri Mahal." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ri e u c'ojol ri Semid e are' wa' Ahian, Siquem, Liki xukuje' ri Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ri e rija'lil ri Eprain, quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Sutel, ri Bered, ri Tahat, ri Elada, ri Tahat, ri Zabad, ri Sutel. Ri Ezer xukuje' ri Elad ri e niq'uiaj chic u c'ojol ri Eprain, xecämisax wa' cumal ri aj Gat, rumal rech chi xekaj bic che qui tokixic tak ri cawaj." 
1Chronicles7:21  
1Chronicles7:22 Ri Eprain ri qui tat q'ui k'ij xucoj ratz'iak re bis, xepe c'ut ri rachalaxic che u cu'bisaxic u c'u'x." 
1Chronicles7:23 Chuwichi c'u wa' xurik rib ruc' ri rixokil, xcanaj c'u yawab winak xralaj c'ut jun ral ala ri xucoj Beriy che u bi', rumal rech chi c'o u q'ueyowal chupam ri rachoch." 
1Chronicles7:24 Are c'u ri Seer u mia'l ri Beriy, are' xyacow ri Bet-horon ri c'o iquim xukuje' ri Bet-horon ri c'o ajsic, xukuje' ri Uzen-seer." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ri e rija'lil ri Beriy, ri quiterebelam tak quib, e are' ri Rep, ri Resep, ri Tel, ri Tahan, ri Laadan, ri Amihud, ri Elisam, ri Nun xukuje' ri Josue." 
1Chronicles7:26  
1Chronicles7:27  
1Chronicles7:28 Ri culew xukuje' tak ri c'olbal ri xejeki' wi e are ri Betel; Naaran, pa ri elebal k'ij; ri Jezer, pa ri u kajebal k'ij; xukuje' ri Siquem, copan c'ä pa Ayah; conojel we ri tak tinimit ri' e cachil tak ri alaj tak qui tinimit." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ri e rija'lil ri Manases c'o ri Taanac, pa qui k'ab, ri Meguid xukuje' ri Dor, e cachil tak ri alaj tak qui tinimit. Chupam tak we c'olbal ri' xejeki' wi ri e rija'lil ri Jose, u c'ojol ri Israel." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aser e are' wa': ri Imna, Isu, Isuy, Beriy xukuje' ri Ser, ri canab." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ri e u c'ojol ri Beriy e are' wa': ri Heber xukuje' ri Malquiel, u tat ri Birzabit." 
1Chronicles7:32 Ri e u c'ojol ri Heber e are' wa': ri Japlet, Semer, Hotam xukuje' ri Sua, canab wa'." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ri e u c'ojol ri Japlet e are' wa': ri Pasac, Bimal xukuje' ri Asbat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ri e u c'ojol ri Semer, ri rachalal, e are' wa': ri Roga, Jehub xukuje' ri Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hotam, ri rachalal, e are' wa': ri Zop, Imna, Sels xukuje' ri Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ri e u c'ojol ri Zop e are' wa': ri Sua, Herneper, Sual, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Beser, Hod, Sam, Sils, Itran xukuje' ri Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jeter e are' wa': ri Jepon, Pispa xukuje' ri Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ul e are' wa': ri Ara, Haniel xukuje' ri Reziy." 
1Chronicles7:40 Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Aser. E c'amal tak qui be ri cachalaxic, e are' wa' ri cowilaj tak ajch'ojab ri c'o na qui chuk'ab, xukuje' e achijab ri nimak na qui k'ij. Jas cubij ri cajilabal ri cachalaxic e juwinak wakib mil (26,000) achijab, ri quena'w che ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ri u c'ojol ri Benjamin are ri Bela, ri u nabeal; Asbel, ri ucab; Ahar, ri urox;" 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha, ri ucaj, Rap, ri ro'." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ri e u c'ojol ri Bela e are' wa' Adar, Jer, Abiud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisu, Naaman, Aho," 
1Chronicles8:5 Jer, Sepupan xukuje' ri Hiram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aod, e c'amal tak qui be ri cachalal xejeki' pa Jeb ri xebesax c'u wi bic xec'am bic pa Manahat," 
1Chronicles8:7 e are' ri Naaman, Ahiy xukuje' ri Jer, qui tat ri Uza xukuje' ri Ahiud, are' c'u wa' ri xec'amow bic." 
1Chronicles8:8 Ri Saharaim xec'oji' chi niq'uiaj e u c'ojol pa ri ulew Moab, aretak e u jachom chic ri rixokil Husim xukuje' ri Baar." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ri e u c'ojol ri xebalax ruc' ri c'ac' rixokil, ri Hods u bi', e are' wa' Jobab, Sibiy, Mesa, Malcam," 
1Chronicles8:9 Ri e u c'ojol ri xebalax ruc' ri c'ac' rixokil, ri Hods u bi', e are' wa' Jobab, Sibiy, Mesa, Malcam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuz, Saquiy xukuje' ri Mirm. E are' tak u c'ojol wa', c'amal tak qui be ri cachalal." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ruc' Husim ri rixokil xec'oji' quieb u c'ojol Abitob xukuje' ri Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ri e u c'ojol ri Elpaal e are' wa' Heber, Misam xukuje' ri Semed, ri xebuyac tak ri tinimit Ono xukuje' ri Lod, e cachil ri e alaj tak qui tinimit;" 
1Chronicles8:13 ri Beriy xukuje' ri Sema, e c'amal tak qui be ri cachalaxic ri xejeki' can pa Ajalon, ri xequesaj tak bic ri winak ri e jekel can ojer pa Gat;" 
1Chronicles8:14 xukuje' tak ri cachalal Sasac xukuje' ri Jeroham. 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiy, Arad, Ader," 
1Chronicles8:16 Micael, Ispa xukuje' ri Joha e u c'ojol ri Beriy." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebediy, Mesulam, Hizqui, Heber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismeray, Jezliy xukuje' ri Jobab e are' wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismeray, Jezliy xukuje' ri Jobab e are' wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jaquim, Zicr, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienay, Ziletay, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaiy, Beraiy xukuje' ri Simrat e u c'ojol ri Simeiy." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ispan, Heber, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zicr, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiy, Elam, Anatotiy," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ipdaiy xukuje' ri Peniel e u c'ojol ri Sasac. 
1Chronicles8:26 Samseray, Sehariy, Ataliy," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaresiy, Eliy xukuje' ri Zicr e are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Jeroham." 
1Chronicles8:28 E are' tak c'amal be wa' ri nimak qui k'ij ri xec'amow tak qui be ri cachalaxic pa tak ri quija'lil, ri xejeki' pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles8:29 Pa ri tinimit Gabaon jekel wi ri Jehiel, u tat ri Gabaon. Ri rixokil Maac u bi'." 
1Chronicles8:30 Ri e u c'ojol e are' ri Abdon, ri nabeal, Zur, Sis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Jedor, Ahi, Zequer" 
1Chronicles8:32 xukuje' ri Miclot, u tat ri Simey. E xukuje' c'u wa', xquitakej u banic quech ri xequiban ri cachalal, xejeki' chquiwäch pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ri u c'ojol ri Ner are' ri Sis, ri u c'ojol ri Sis are' ri Saul, ri e u c'ojol ri Saul are' ri Jonatan, Malquixu, Abinadab xukuje' ri Es-baal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ri u c'ojol ri Jonatan are' ri Merib-baal, ri u c'ojol ri Merib-baal are' ri Micaiy." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ri e u c'ojol ri Micaiy e are' ri Piton, Melec, Tarey xukuje' ri Acaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ri u c'ojol ri Acaz are' ri Joad, ri e u c'ojol ri Joad are' ri Alemet, Azmabet xukuje' ri Zimri; ri u c'ojol ri Zimri are' ri Mos," 
1Chronicles8:37 ri u c'ojol ri Mos are' ri Bin, ri u c'ojol ri Bin are' ri Rap, ri u c'ojol ri Rap are' ri Elas, ri u c'ojol ri Elas are' ri Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Ri e u c'ojol ri Azel e wakib, je c'u qui bi' wa': Azricam, Bocru, Ismael, Seariy, Obadiy xukuje' ri Hanan. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Azel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ri e u c'ojol ri rachalal Esec e are' ri Ulam, ri nabeal; Jeus, ri ucab, Elipelet c'ut, ri urox." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ri e u c'ojol ri Ulam e are' wa' e cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, e nawinelab che u cojic ri q'uiakbal ch'ab. E q'ui ri qui c'ojol xec'ojic xukuje' ri e qui' tak qui mam, e jun sient cawinak lajuj (150) chi conojel, conojel we winak ri' e rija'lil ri Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Jewa' ri xbanic, ronojel Israel xtz'ibataj ri u bi' chupam ri qui wuj tak ri ajawinelab re Israel. E are c'u ri winak ri e c'o pa Juda xecharchatex bic, pa Babilon u mac rech ri quetzelal." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ri nabe tak winak ri xetzelej pa tak ri culew xukuje' pa tak ri e qui tinimit ri aj israelib, e cojol tabal tok'ob, e aj levitib quepatanij c'ut pa ri rachoch Dios." 
1Chronicles9:3 Pa Jerusalen xequijekeba' wi quib tak ri e rija'lil tak ri Juda, Benjamin, Eprain xukuje' ri Manases." 
1Chronicles9:4 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Juda: Utay, u c'ojol ri Amihud, u c'ojol c'ut ri Omri, u c'ojol c'ut ri Imri, u c'ojol c'ut ri Bani, e rija'lil ri Pares wa', u c'ojol ri Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Chque ri e aj Silonitab: Asaiy, ri nabeal chque ri e u c'ojol." 
1Chronicles9:6 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Zera: Jeuel xukuje' ri e rachalaxic, e wakib sient jumuch' lajuj (690) winak." 
1Chronicles9:7 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Benjamin: Salu, u c'ojol ri Mesulam, u c'ojol c'ut ri Hodabiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Asenu;" 
1Chronicles9:8 ri Ibneiy, u c'ojol ri Jeroham; Ela, u c'ojol ri Uz, u c'ojol c'ut ri Micri; ri Mesulam, u c'ojol ri Sepatiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Reuel, u c'ojol c'ut ri Ibniy." 
1Chronicles9:9 Ri e cachalaxic, e je jas ri u cholajil ri quija'lil, e belejeb sient cawinak waklajuj (956), conojel e c'amal tak qui be jujun ja winak." 
1Chronicles9:10 Chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob: Jedaiy, Joiarib, Jaquin," 
1Chronicles9:11 Azariy, u c'ojol ri Hilsiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Mesulam, u c'ojol c'ut ri Sadoc, u c'ojol c'ut ri Meraiot, u c'ojol c'ut ri Ahitob, takanel nim u k'ij chupam ri rachoch ri Dios;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaiy, u c'ojol ri Jeroham, u c'ojol c'ut ri Pasur, u c'ojol c'ut ri Malquiy; Masay, u c'ojol ri Adiel, u c'ojol c'ut ri Jazer, u c'ojol c'ut ri Mesulam, u c'ojol c'ut ri Mesilemit, u c'ojol c'ut ri Imer;" 
1Chronicles9:13 xukuje' ri e rachalaxic, e jun mil wukub sient oxc'al (1760) e c'amal tak qui be jujun ja winak, achijab ri sibalaj quena'w che ri patanijic chupam ri rachoch ri Dios." 
1Chronicles9:14 Chque ri e aj levitib: ri Semaiy, u c'ojol ri Hasub, u c'ojol c'ut ri Azricam, u c'ojol c'ut ri Hasabiy, chque ri ralaxic ri Merar;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bacbacar, Hers, Galal xukuje' ri Mataniy, u c'ojol ri Micaiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Zicr, u c'ojol c'ut ri Asap;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadiy, u c'ojol ri Semaiy, u c'ojol c'ut ri Galal, u c'ojol c'ut ri Jedutun; Berequiy, u c'ojol ri As, u c'ojol c'ut ri Elcan, ri xjeki' chquipam ri alaj tak qui tinimit ri e aj netopatitab." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ri e chajil tak oquibal: ri Salum, ri Acub, ri Talmon, ri Ahiman. Ri Salum, ri cachalal wa', are' c'amal qui be," 
1Chronicles9:18 c'ä je c'ut camic, chajil rech ri roquibal ri ajawinel, ri c'o pa ri elebal k'ij. E are' tak chajil tak oquibal wa' ri e c'o chquixo'l tak ri aj levitib." 
1Chronicles9:19 Ri Salum, u c'ojol ri Core, u c'ojol ri Ebiasap, u c'ojol ri Core, xukuje' tak ri rachalaxic ri e aj coretib, e are' tak wa' ri e cojom che u chajixic ri oquibal chupam ri k'ijilabal, jacha' ri e qui banom ulok ri e qui mam xquichajij canok ri oquibal pa ri u kajebal ri Ajawaxel." 
1Chronicles9:20 Nabe canok, ri Pinees, u c'ojol ri Eleazar, are c'amal can qui be nabe. ¡Chc'ol ba' ri Ajawaxel ruc'!" 
1Chronicles9:21 Ri Zacariy, u c'ojol ri Meselemiy, are' chajil oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib ruc' ri Dios." 
1Chronicles9:22 Ri cajilabal ri e chajil tak oquibal ri xecha'ic e quieb sient cablajuj (212) jas ri u cholajil ri cajilabal ri jujun ja, winak ri e c'o pa tak ri tinimit ri xejeki' wi. Ri David xukuje' ri Samuel, ri k'axal tzij, e are' ri xecojow che we ekle'n ri', cacu'bisax c'u c'uxaj chquij." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ri e are' e jacha' ri e qui c'ojol caquiq'uexela' tak quib che u chajixic ri oquibal chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel, ri u bixic wa' ri k'ijilabal." 
1Chronicles9:24 E c'o chajil tak oquibal pa ri quiejeb xcutaj: pa ri elebal k'ij pa ri u kajebal k'ij pa ri u mox ri elebal k'ij xukuje' pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij. 
1Chronicles9:25 Ri e cachalaxic ri e jekel pa tak ri qui tinimit, quepe che qui to'ic quebel qui jala' c'u wukutak k'ij." 
1Chronicles9:26 E are' c'ut ri quiejeb chajil tak oquibal ri nimak na quekle'n, ri e aj levitib, amak'el e c'o che chajinic, quequichajij ri oquibal xukuje' tak ri k'inomal ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Dios." 
1Chronicles9:27 Junak'ab quesolin chrij tak ri rachoch Dios, e cojom c'u che u chajixic xukuje' che qui jakic tak ri roquibal ronojel ak'abibal." 
1Chronicles9:28 Jujun chque e jachom tak ri chaconisan pa qui k'ab ri quebajwataj che ri k'ijilanic, quecajilaj c'ut quequesaj ulok xukuje' aretak quequiyaco." 
1Chronicles9:29 Niq'uiaj chic e jachom ri jule' tak chaconisan chic pa qui k'ab xukuje' ri e tastalic tak jastak, xukuje' ri c'äj, ri u wa'l uva, ri aseit, ri c'oc' k'ol, xukuje' tak ri c'oc'al." 
1Chronicles9:30 Jujun chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e are' ri quesuc'uman tak ri c'oc'al; 
1Chronicles9:31 jun c'u aj levi ri Matatiy u bi', nabeal, u c'ojol ri Salum ri aj coretib, are' quebanow tak ri lej amak'el ri quebajwataj che sipanic." 
1Chronicles9:32 Jujun chque ri quija'lil ri e aj coatib yo'm qui takquil che qui suc'umaxic ri caxlanwa ri e tastalic ri quenutubax tak conojel tak ri k'ij re uxlanem. 
1Chronicles9:33 E c'o xukuje' bixonelab, c'amal tak qui be ri jujun tak ja winak aj levi ri e jekel pa tak ri ja ri e c'o pa tak u xcut ri rachoch Dios, man cuya' taj cäquiban jule' tak chac chic, rumal rech chipak'ij chi chak'ab latz' qui wäch e c'o chupam ri qui patanijic." 
1Chronicles9:34 E are' tak wa' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri jujun tak ja winak aj levi, pa ri qui cholajil ri quija'lil ri e jekel pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles9:35 Chupam ri tinimit Gabaon jekel wi ri Jehiel, u tat ri Gabaon. Ri rixokil Maac u bi'." 
1Chronicles9:36 Ri e u c'ojol c'ut e are' tak ri Abdon, ri nabeal: Zur, Sis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Jedor, Ahio, Zacariy xukuje' ri Miclot," 
1Chronicles9:38 are' c'u u tat ri Simeam. Xukuje' c'ut we winak ri', xquitakej u banic quech ri xequiban ri cachalal, xejeki' cuc' pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ri u c'ojol ri Ner are' ri Sis, ri u c'ojol ri Sis are' ri Saul, are c'ut ri e u c'ojol ri Saul are' ri Jonatan, Malquixu, Abinadab xukuje' ri Es-baal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ri u c'ojol ri Jonatan are' ri Merib-baal, ri u c'ojol ri Merib-baal are' ri Micaiy." 
1Chronicles9:41 Ri e u c'ojol ri Micaiy e are' wa' Piton, Melec, Tare xukuje' ri Acaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ri u c'ojol ri Acaz are' ri Jar, ri e u c'ojol ri Jar are' ri Alemet, Azmabet xukuje' ri Zimri; ri u c'ojol ri Zimri are' ri Mos," 
1Chronicles9:43 are c'u ri u c'ojol ri Mos are' ri Bin, ri u c'ojol ri Bin are' ri Repaiy, ri u c'ojol ri Repaiy are' ri Elas, ri u c'ojol ri Elas are' ri Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Ri e u c'ojol ri Azel e wakib, ri je qui bi' wa': Azricam, Bocru, Ismael, Seariy, Obadiy xukuje' ri Hanan. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Azel." 
1Chronicles10:1 Ri aj pilisteyib xech'ojin ruc' ri Israel, xebanimaj c'ut ri aj israelib chquiwäch, sibalaj c'u e q'ui ri xecäm pa ri juyub Jilbo." 
1Chronicles10:2 Xterenex c'ut ri Saul xukuje' ri e u c'ojol cumal ri pilisteyib, xquicämisaj c'ut ri Jonatan, ri Abinadab xukuje' ri Malquixu." 
1Chronicles10:3 Xquiterenej c'u rokataxic ri Saul, xecuin c'ut ri aj q'uiakbal ch'ab che u soquic cuc' tak qui ch'ab." 
1Chronicles10:4 Rumal ri' xubij che ri u c'al tak u ch'ab: “Chawesaj ri a ch'ich' re ch'o'j chak'okej chnupam, rech man quepetaj we e k'ijilal tak diosib ri' caquetz'bej ta c'u nu wäch.” Man xraj ta c'ut ri to'l rech xubano rumal rech chi sibalaj nim ri u xibriquil c'olic. Xuc'am c'ut ri Saul ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j xuq'uiak rib puwi'." 
1Chronicles10:5 Aretak c'u xril ri to'l rech chi xcäm ri Saul, xukuje' ri are' xuq'uiak rib puwi' ri kas u ch'ich' re ch'o'j xcäm c'ut." 
1Chronicles10:6 Jewa' ri u cämic ri Saul pa ri k'ij ri' xukuje' ri e oxib u c'ojol xukuje' conojel ri rachalaxic. 
1Chronicles10:7 Aretak c'u xquil conojel ri aj israelib ri e jekel pa ri beya' chi e animajinak ri aj israelib, xukuje' chi xcäm ri Saul xukuje' ri e u c'ojol, xequitzak can ri qui tinimit tak xukuje' ri e are' xebanimajic. Xebopan c'ut ri aj pilisteyib xejeki' can pa tak ri tinimit." 
1Chronicles10:8 Chucab k'ij aretak ri aj pilisteyib xebe che u k'olixic ri jastak quech ri cäminakib, xequirika' ri Saul xukuje' ri e u c'ojol e liq'uil pa ri juyub Jilbo." 
1Chronicles10:9 Xquik'olij bic ri ratz'iak xquic'am c'u bic ri u jolom xukuje' tak ri e u ch'ojibal, xequitak c'u bic tako'n pa conojel ri qui tinimit ri pilisteyib rech caquiya' u bixic chque ri winak xukuje' chque tak ri e qui diosib." 
1Chronicles10:10 Xequiya' c'ut ri e u ch'ojibal ri Saul chupam ri cachoch ri e qui diosib xukuje' xquitzayiba' ri u jolom chupam ri rachoch ri Dagon. 
1Chronicles10:11 Aretak xoc pa qui jolom conojel ri aj Jabes re Galaad ri xquiban ri pilisteyib che ri Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 xquijunamaj qui tzij conojel ri cowilaj tak achijab xebe che u c'amic ulok ri u cuerp ri Saul xukuje' ri quech ri e u c'ojol xequic'am c'u bic pa Jabes. Chila' xequimuk wi ri qui cuerp chuxe' jun nimalaj räx che'. Man xewa' ta c'u na wukub k'ij. 
1Chronicles10:13 Are' je cämical wa' xutaklebej ri Saul u mac rech ri retzelal, xmacun c'ut aretak man xunimaj taj ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel xukuje' aretak xbe che u tz'onoxic u no'j ruc' jun ixok ch'obonel" 
1Chronicles10:14 ri are' ta xutz'onoj u no'j che ri Dios. Rumal ri' xelesax ri u c'aslemal rumal ri Ajawaxel, xuya' c'ut ri ajawibal che ri David, u c'ojol ri Isayi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Conojel ri aj israelib xquimulij quib xebetzijon ruc' ri David pa Hebron. Chila' xquibij wi che chi: “Ri uj xa' junam ka quiq'uel uc' la," 
1Chronicles11:2 kas c'u tzij pune' ri Saul are' ajawinel, lal c'ut ri xc'amow la qui be ri aj Israel che qui banic tak ri ch'o'j. Che chi c'ut u tz'akat, ri Ajawaxel ri Dios la u chi'm che la chi lal cac'amow na la u be xukuje' cätakan na la puwi' ri u tinimit Israel.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Je c'u wa' xbanic, conojel ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel xebetzijon ruc' ri ajawinel David pa Hebron, xuban c'u jun c'ulwächinic cuc', are xucoj ri Ajawaxel che k'alajisanel chquixo'l. Xquitas c'ut ri David jacha' ajawinel re Israel, je jas ri xuchi'j ri Dios rumal ri Samuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Ri David xukuje' conojel ri aj israelib xquitakej qui bic pa Jerusalen, ri cäbix Jebus che. Ri aj jebuseyib e c'o pa ri ulew ri'," 
1Chronicles11:5 xquibij c'u che ri David: “Ri at man catcuin taj catoc waral.” Xcuin c'ut ri David che u ch'äquic ri Sion ri sibalaj co c'olic, are wa' ri cäbix u tinimit ri David che." 
1Chronicles11:6 U bim c'ut ri David: “Are' ri nabe ri cuchap u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj jebuseyib quincoj na che c'amal be ri nim u k'ij.” Ri nabe ri xuchaplej ch'ojinic are' ri Joab, ral ri Sarb, xcoj c'u che c'amal be." 
1Chronicles11:7 Xujekeba' c'u na rib ri David chupam ri tinimit ri cowirisabalib; rumal ri' xbinax u Tinimit ri David che. 
1Chronicles11:8 Xusutij c'ut u colomaxic ri David ri tinimit kas ruc' ri lianisam. Ri Joab are' xq'uisow u colomisaxic ri tinimit," 
1Chronicles11:9 xuchaplej c'ut u q'uiyic ri u cuinem ri David, c'o c'ut ri Ajawaxel ruc' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
1Chronicles11:10 E are' tak rajch'ojab ri David wa' ri nimak na qui k'ij, ri xetoban ruc' pa ri rajawibal xecachilaj c'u conojel ri aj israelib xquiban ajawinel che je jas u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Israel." 
1Chronicles11:11 E are cajilabal wa' ri e rajch'ojab ri David ri sibalaj nimak na qui k'ij: Jasobeam, u c'ojol ri Hacmon, c'amal qui be ri oxib ri sibalaj nimak na qui chuk'ab, ri c'o jun k'ijol xebucämisaj oxib sient achijab ruc' ri u tz'imaj ch'ich'." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ri xtaken chi c'u chrij ri are' ri Eleazar, u c'ojol ri Dod, aj ahohit, ri are' jun chque ri oxib ri c'o na qui chuk'ab." 
1Chronicles11:13 Xc'oji' ruc' ri David pa Pas-damim, aretak ri aj pilisteyib xquimulij quib chila' che u banic ch'o'j. C'o jun ulew chila' ri ticom u wäch che sebad aretak c'u xebanimaj ri ajch'ojab aj israelib chquiwäch ri pilisteyib," 
1Chronicles11:14 ri are' xutac'aba' rib pa u niq'uiajil ri ulew xuto' c'ut, xebuch'äc c'ut ri aj pilisteyib. Je c'u ri' ri Ajawaxel xuya' jun nimalaj ch'äcanic chque." 
1Chronicles11:15 C'o jumul, oxib chque ri juwinak lajuj cowilaj tak achijab xebe che u rikic ri David jawije' c'o wi ri cowilaj nim abaj, chupam ri pec re Adulam. Ri aj pilisteyib qui mulin quib che u banic ch'o'j pa ri beya' aj Repaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ri David c'o chupam ri pec, e c'o c'ut jumulaj ajch'ojab aj pilisteyib pa Belen." 
1Chronicles11:17 Ri David xuk'alajisaj ri u rayinic: “¡C'o ta banom wi chi c'o ta jachin cäyo'w chwe chi quinwuq'uiaj ta wech ri ja' ri c'o chupam ri c'ua' ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal pa Belen!” 
1Chronicles11:18 Are c'u ri oxib cowilaj tak achijab xeboc chupam ri qui kajebal ri aj pilisteyib xquesaj c'ut ri ja' chupam ri c'ua' ri c'o chuchi' ri oquibal pa Belen, xquic'am c'u bic che ri David. Man xraj ta c'ut ri David xruq'uiaj, xane' xujamij jacha' sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel," 
1Chronicles11:19 je xubij wa': “¡Muya' ri Dios chwe chi quinwuq'uiaj! ¡Xak junam cubana' ri' chi quinwuq'uiaj ri qui quiq'uel we achijab ri', xquijach c'ut ri qui c'aslemal pa ri cämical xebe c'u che u c'amic ulok!” Man xraj ta c'ut xruq'uiaj. We mayibal ri' are' xebanow ri e oxib cowilaj tak achijab." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ri Abisay, rachalal ri Joab, are' c'amal qui be ri juwinak lajuj cowilaj tak achijab. C'o jutij xch'ojin cuc' oxib sient achijab ruc' ri u tz'imaj ch'ich', xebucämisaj c'ut. Xa' jeri' xnimar u k'ij chquixo'l ri juwinak lajuj," 
1Chronicles11:21 xnimarisax c'u na u k'ij chquiwäch conojel wa', xux c'u c'amal qui be. Man c'u xjunamataj ta cuc' ri nabe e oxib." 
1Chronicles11:22 Ri Benaiy, ri u c'ojol ri Joiad, ri quel chupam ri tinimit Cabseel, are' jun cowilaj achi ri xebuban mayibalalaj tak jastak. Are' ri xecämisan ri quieb u c'ojol ri Ariel aj Moab. C'o jun k'ij cätajin cäkaj pimalaj sak tew xoc chupam jun jul, xucämisaj c'u jun coj chupam." 
1Chronicles11:23 Xukuje' xucämisaj jun aj Ejipt ri jutac'aj rakan, ri xa' co'l man oxib bara' u taq'ui'c ri ruc'am bic jun u tz'imaj ch'ich' ri cäjunamataj ruc' jun tz'imaj ch'ich' re quemabal. Ri Benaiy xbe chrij ruc' jun che', xutokij c'ut ri tz'imaj ch'ich' pa u k'ab xucämisaj c'ut ruc' ri kas u tz'imaj ch'ich'." 
1Chronicles11:24 We cämisanic ri' ri xuban ri Benaiy, u c'ojol ri Joiad, are' xbanow che chi xnimar u k'ij chquixo'l ri juwinak lajuj cowilaj tak achijab," 
1Chronicles11:25 xnimar c'u na u k'ij chquiwäch wa', man c'u xjunamataj ta cuc' ri e nabe oxib. Xucoj c'u ri David che takanel paquiwi' ri e chajil rech." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ri e cowilaj tak achijab e are' wa': Asael, rachalal ri Joab; Elanan, u c'ojol ri Dod, aj Belen;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Samot aj Harod, Heles aj paltit," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira, u c'ojol ri Iques, aj Teco; Abiezer, aj Anatot;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibecay, aj Hus; Ilay aj ahohit;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharay, aj Netop; Heled, u c'ojol ri Baan, xukuje' aj Netop;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itay, u c'ojol ri Ribay, aj Gabaa, ri jekel chupam ri ramak' ri Benjamin; Benaiy, aj Piraton;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hiday, ri quel chuchi' ri alaj nima' re Gaas; Abiel, aj arbat;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Azmabet, aj Bahurim; Eliaba, aj saalbonit;" 
1Chronicles11:34 ri e u c'ojol ri Jasen, aj jizon; Jonatan, u c'ojol ri Saje aj arar;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiam, u c'ojol ri Sacar, xukuje' aj arar; Elipal, u c'ojol ri Ur;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Heper, aj mequerat; Ahiy, aj pelon;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezray, aj Carmel; Naaray, u c'ojol ri Esbay;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel, rachalal ri Natan; Mibar, u c'ojol ri Hagray;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel, rachalal ri Natan; Mibar, u c'ojol ri Hagray;" 
1Chronicles11:39 Selec, aj amon; Naharay, aj Berot, u c'al tak u ch'ojibal ri Joab, ral ri Sarb;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira, aj Jatir; Gareb, xukuje' aj Jatir;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriy, aj hitit; Zabad, u c'ojol ri Alay;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adin, u c'ojol ri Siz, aj ruben, c'amal qui be ri aj ruben, xukuje' juwinak lajuj achijab ri xerachilaj;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanan, u c'ojol ri Maac; Josapat, aj mitnit;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziy, aj Astarot; Sam xukuje' ri Jehiel, e u c'ojol ri Hotam, aj Aroer;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael, u c'ojol ri Simri, xukuje' ri Joha ri rachalal, aj tizit;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel, aj Mahanaim, Jerebay xukuje' ri Josabiy, e u c'ojol ri Elnaam; Itma, aj moab;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel, Obed xukuje' ri Jaasiel, aj Soba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aretak c'ä animajinak bic ri David chuwäch ri Saul, u c'ojol ri Sis, jumulaj cowilaj tak ajch'ojab ri junam qui wäch che u banic ri ch'o'j xequimulij quib ruc' pa Siclag." 
1Chronicles12:2 We ajch'ojab ri' e cuc'am tak qui q'uiakbal ch'ab, quecuin c'ut quequiq'uiak abaj ruc' iquiak' xukuje' ch'ab ruc' ri qui wiquiak'ab xukuje' ruc' ri qui mox. E are' tak wa': E rachalaxic ri Saul, e aj ramak' ri Benjamin:" 
1Chronicles12:3 ri Ahiezer, ri c'amal qui be, xukuje' ri Joas, e u c'ojol ri Sema, aj tinimit Gabaa; Jeziel xukuje' ri Pelet, e u c'ojol ri Azmabet; Berac xukuje' ri Jehu, ri aj tinimit Anatot;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Ismaiy, aj gabaon, jun chque ri juwinak lajuj cowilaj tak achijab xukuje' c'amal qui be; Jeremiy, Jahaziel, Johanan, Jozabad aj Jeder," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzay, Jerimot, Bealiy, Semariy; Sepatiy, ri aj arupit;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elcan, Isiy, Azareel, Joezer xukuje' ri Jasobeam, aj coretib;" 
1Chronicles12:7 xukuje' ri Joela xukuje' ri Zebadiy, e u c'ojol tak ri Jeroham, aj Jedor." 
1Chronicles12:7 xukuje' ri Joela xukuje' ri Zebadiy, e u c'ojol tak ri Jeroham, aj Jedor." 
1Chronicles12:8 Xukuje' ri e aj ramak' ri Gad xek'ax jujun ruc' ri David aretak c'u c'o chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak. E cowilaj tak ajch'ojab ri e ch'ojaninak chic e cuc'am tak qui quetecak ch'ich' xukuje' tak qui tz'imaj ch'ich'. E jacha' ta ne coj quexiq'uinilob pa tak ri juyub e jacha' ta ne masat aj lianic. 
1Chronicles12:9 E are' tak wa': Ezer, ri nabe; Obadiy, ri ucab; Eliab, ri urox;" 
1Chronicles12:10 Misman, ri ucaj; Jeremiy ri uro';" 
1Chronicles12:11 Atay, ri uwak; Eliel, ri uwuk;" 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanan, ri uwajxak; Elzabad, ri ubelej;" 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremiy, ri ulajuj, xukuje' ri Macbanay, ri ujulajuj." 
1Chronicles12:14 Wa' we e rija'l tak aj Gad e c'amal tak qui be ri ajch'ojab jun chque ri man nim ta u k'ij cojom paquiwi' jun sient rajch'ojab are c'u ri nim na u k'ij cojom paquiwi' jun mil. 
1Chronicles12:15 E are' tak wa' ri xeboc'ow chupam ri Jordan pa ri nabe ic' aretak sibalaj pulininak ri nima' c'ä chuchi', xquiban c'u chque ri e jekejoj pa tak ri beya' chi xebanimaj chquiwäch, pa ri elebal k'ij xukuje' pa ri u kajebal k'ij." 
1Chronicles12:16 E c'o chi c'u jujun achijab ri e aj ramak' ri Benjamin xukuje' e aj Juda xebe qui mulij quib ruc' ri David chupam ri cowilaj to'bal ib. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ri David xel ulok che qui c'ulaxic xubij c'u chque: “We ix petinak che nu to'ic pa jamaril, ruc' ronojel wanima' quixinc'amo rech cäkaban xa' jun iwuc'; we c'u ix petinak che nu subic xa' rech quinijach pa qui k'ab ri e nu c'ulel, man c'o ta c'u ne jun il nu banom, ¡are' ba' ri qui Dios ri e ka mam chilowak chuc'äjisaj c'u i wäch!”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Are c'u ri Amasay, c'amal qui be ri juwinak lajuj, majim rumal ri uxlabal, co xurak u chi' xubij: “¡Jamaril chawe, David, u c'ojol ri Isayi! ¡Chc'ol ba' ri jamaril awuc'! ¡Jamaril awuc', xukuje' chque ri catquito, at u to'm c'ut ri a Dios!” Ri David xebuc'amo xuya' c'u qui c'olbal chquixo'l ri e c'amal tak qui be ri ajch'ojab." 
1Chronicles12:19 Xukuje' jujun chque ri e ramak' ri Manases xek'ax ruc' ri David aretak xec'ol quieb oxib k'ij cuc' ri aj pilisteyib che u tijic u chuk'ab ruc' ri Saul. Man je ta c'u xc'ulmatajic ri David man xya'taj ta che chi xebuto' taj ri aj pilisteyib, rumal rech chi ri e qui k'atal tak tzij aretak qui mulin chi quib, xquichomaj u k'ilic, xquibij c'ut: “¡Cumal tak ri ka jolom cäk'ax na ruc' ri Saul ri rajaw!”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ri achijab ri e aj ramak' ri Manases ri xek'ax ruc' ri David aretak xbe wa' pa Siclag e are' wa' Adnas, Jozabad, Jediael, Micael, Jozabad, Eliu xukuje' ri Ziletay, e qui nimal jujun tak mil e rajch'ojab ri Manases." 
1Chronicles12:21 E are' tak wa' ri xeto'ban ruc' ri David ri xenabej chquiwäch ri rajch'ojab, conojel c'ut e cowilaj tak ajch'ojab xebux c'u qui nimal ajch'ojab." 
1Chronicles12:22 K'ij chi k'ij xebopan chi niq'uiaj ajch'ojab ruc' ri David, c'ä xebux c'u juk'at rajch'o'j, ri kas c'o qui chuk'ab." 
1Chronicles12:23 E are' cajilabal rajch'o'j wa' chi conojel ri xequijacha' quib pa u k'ab ri David pa Hebron ri e wiktal che u banic ch'o'j, che u k'axexic ri rajawibal ri Saul pa u k'ab, je jas ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Che ri ramak' ri Juda, wakib mil wajxakib sient (6,800) achijab ri e cuc'am tak quetecak ch'ich' xukuje' tak tz'imaj ch'ich', e wiktal che u banic ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles12:25 Che ri ramak' ri Simion, wukub mil jun sient (7,100) cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, e wiktal che u banic ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles12:26 Che ri ramak' ri Levi quiejeb mil wakib sient (4,600)," 
1Chronicles12:27 e c'o chi c'u na oxib mil wukub sient (3,700) ri e rachalaxic ri Aaron, ri c'o ri Joiad, che c'amal qui be," 
1Chronicles12:28 xukuje' cachil ri Sadoc, c'ojol xukuje' cowilaj aj ch'o'j, e rachil juwinak quieb (22) c'amal tak qui be jujun ja winak." 
1Chronicles12:29 Che ri ramak' ri Benjamin, ri kas ramak' ri Saul, oxib mil (3,000) achijab, ri nabe canok xa' co'l man conojel e jic can ruc' ri Saul." 
1Chronicles12:30 Che ri ramak' ri Eprain, juwinak mil wajxakib sient (20,800) cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, nimak qui k'ij chquixo'l ri cachalaxic." 
1Chronicles12:31 Che ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases, wajxaklajuj mil (18,000) achijab xetak bic che u cojic ri David che ajawinel." 
1Chronicles12:32 Che ri ramak' ri Isacar, ri c'asal qui no'j che quetamaxic tak ri k'ijol che retamaxic ri rajawaxic u banic rumal ri Israel, quieb sient c'amal tak be e cachil conojel tak ri achijab ri e rech ri camak' ri e c'o chquixe' ri qui takanic." 
1Chronicles12:33 Che ri ramak' ri Zabulon, cawinak lajuj mil (50,000) rajch'ojab ri e suc'umatal che u banic ch'o'j cuc'am c'u ronojel qui wäch ch'ojibal, ri kas qui yo'm qui tzij quijachom quib che u to'ic ri David." 
1Chronicles12:34 Che ri ramak' ri Neptali, jun mil (1,000) c'amal tak be e cachil juwinak wuklajuj mil (37,000) achijab e cuc'am tak tz'imaj ch'ich' xukuje' tak quetecak ch'ich'." 
1Chronicles12:35 Che ri ramak' ri Dan, juwinak wajxakib mil wakib sient (28,600) ajch'ojab." 
1Chronicles12:36 Che ri ramak' ri Aser, cawinak mil (40,000) rajch'ojab ri xak e suc'umatal che u banic ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles12:37 E c'o chi c'u wi ri' ri xepe ch'käp che ri Jordan, jun sient juwinak mil (120,000) achijab chque ri ramak' Ruben xukuje' ri Gad xukuje' che ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases, e wiktal cuc' ronojel qui wäch tak ch'ojibal." 
1Chronicles12:38 Conojel we ajch'ojab ri', quisuc'umam tak quib che u banic ch'o'j, jic xebe pa Hebron che u cojic ri David che ajawinel re ronojel Israel; xukuje' conojel ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic, chnimalaj conojel, junam je xquibano." 
1Chronicles12:39 Oxib k'ij xec'oji' ruc' ri David, xewa'ic xebuq'uianic, rumal rech chi ri e qui winakil xequisuc'umaj tak ri wa ri catijic." 
1Chronicles12:40 Xukuje' tak c'ut ri e qui c'ulja, xukuje' ne ri e aj Isacar, Zabulon xukuje' ri Neptali, xequic'am bic qui wa chquij tak bur, camey, mulayib xukuje' wacax. Xequic'am bic ronojel u wäch ri cätijic chque: c'äj, lej que tak higo, pasa, u wa'l uva, aseit, ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' tak chij; ruc' tz'ebenic, rumal rech chi c'o nimalaj quicotemal pa Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ri David xutz'onoj u no'j chque ri e qui nimal jujun tak mil ajch'ojab, xukuje' chque ri takanelab, ri u bixic wa', chque conojel ri c'amal tak be," 
1Chronicles13:2 xubij c'u na che ronojel ri tinimit Israel: “We utz quiwil ix xukuje' we ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios cuya' ri k'ijol chke, ka taka' u bixic chque ri ka winakil ri e c'o pa tak ri jalan tak ulew pa Israel, xukuje' chque conojel tak ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' chque tak ri aj levitib ri e c'o pa tak ri qui tinimit xukuje' ri e c'o pa ri yuk'bal, che kula'j rech cäquiban xa' jun kuc'," 
1Chronicles13:3 che u c'amic ulok ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, kas pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Saul sachinak can pa ka jolom.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ronojel ri tinimit xuya' u tzij che u banic wa', conojel utz xquita' ri xbixic." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ri David xumulij ronojel ri Israel, kas pa Sihor pa ri u c'ulbatil ri Ejipt c'ä pa ri oquibal pa Hamat, che u c'amic ulok pa Quiriat-jearim ri u caxa ri Dios." 
1Chronicles13:6 Achilatal c'u rumal ronojel Israel xpaki' pa Quiriat-jearim, ri xukuje' cäbix Baala che, ri c'o pa Juda, che u c'amic bic ri u caxa ri Dios ri c'o chi', ri puwi' cänatax wi ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, ri c'o ri u tem re ajawibal paquiwi' tak ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'." 
1Chronicles13:7 Xquiya' ri caxa chupam jun c'ac' caret xquesaj c'u bic chupam ri rachoch ri Abinadab. Ri Uza xukuje' ri Ahio e are' c'amowinak u be ri caret. 
1Chronicles13:8 Benak c'u ri David xukuje' ronojel Israel chuwäch ri Dios quebixonic xukuje' quexojow ruc' ronojel ri qui chuk'ab, jacha' ri rok'ibal ri k'ojom re tak ri alaj arp, nimalaj arp, tzojtzoj, quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' xukuje' trompet." 
1Chronicles13:9 Aretak c'u xebopan pa ri c'olbal ri cäbix Yak'abal Trico che aj Quidon, ri Uza xuyuk ri u k'ab che u tok'exic ri caxa, quipak'im c'u quib ri wacax." 
1Chronicles13:10 Xpe c'u royowal ri Ajawaxel che ri Uza rumal rech chi xuyuk ri u k'ab che u tok'exic ri caxa, kas chila' c'u xresaj wi ri u c'aslemal chuwäch are'." 
1Chronicles13:11 Ri David sibalaj xpe royowal rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel xresaj ri u c'aslemal ri Uza, rumal c'u ri' xucoj Perez-us che u bi' we c'olbal ri', bi'aj ri c'ä cäbix che camic." 
1Chronicles13:12 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri David sibalaj xuxe'j rib chuwäch ri Dios, “¡Minchomaj u c'amic bic ri u caxa ri Dios!”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Man xc'am ta c'u bic ri u caxa ri Dios chupam ri u tinimit ri David, xtakan c'ut chi chc'am bic pa ri rachoch ri Obed-edom, jun achi aj Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ri u caxa ri Dios xcanaj oxib ic' chupam ri rachoch ri Obed-edom, ri Ajawaxel xebutewichi'j ri e rachalaxic ri Obed-edom xukuje' conojel ri jastak quech." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ri Hiram, ajawinel re Tir, xebutak ulok e u q'uexwäch ruc' ri David, xebutak c'u ne ulok banal tak tz'ak xukuje' ajanelab ri e cuc'am ulok tz'alam re chacalte' che u yaquic ri rachoch ri ajawinel." 
1Chronicles14:2 Xuch'ob c'ut ri David chi co tiquibam che ajawinel puwi' ri Israel rumal ri ajawaxel, u yo'm c'u u k'ij ri rajawinic puwi' ri tinimit Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ri David xebuc'am chi niq'uiaj rixokil pa Jerusalen, xec'oji' chi niq'uiaj e u c'ojol xukuje' u mia'l." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ri e u c'ojol ri xil qui wäch pa Jerusalen e are' qui bi' wa': Samu, Sobab, Natan, Salomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibar, Elisu, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nog, Nepeg, Japiy," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisam, Eliad xukuje' ri Elipelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Aretak xoc pa qui jolom ri aj pilisteyib, chi xtastaj ri David jacha' ajawinel re ronojel Israel, xewalij conojel che u tzucuxic; xoc c'u pa u jolom ri David xel c'u bic che qui c'ulaxic." 
1Chronicles14:9 Xquichuk'ubej c'ut ri aj pilisteyib xquimajij ri beya' re Repaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 Rumal ri', ri David xutz'onoj che ri Ajawaxel, xubij c'u che: “¿La quinch'ojin cuc' ri aj pilisteyib? ¿La cäya' la ri ch'äcanic chwe paquiwi'?” Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “Chatch'ojin cuc', quinya' na ri ch'äcanic chawe paquiwi'.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Ri David xpaki' pa Baal-perazim, chila' c'u xebuch'äc wi. Rumal ri' xubij: “Jacha' jun rekbala', ri Dios xujak nu be chquixo'l tak ri nu c'ulel.” Xbinax c'ut Baal-perazim che u bi' we c'olbal ri'." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ri aj pilisteyib xequitzak c'u ne can tak ri e qui diosib pa tak ri juyub, xtak c'u qui poroxic rumal ri David." 
1Chronicles14:13 E are' c'u ri aj pilisteyib xquichaplej chi u mulixic quib pa ri beya' re Repaim," 
1Chronicles14:14 jeri' ri David xutz'onoj chi jumul che ri Dios, xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Dios che: “Maya' awib chquiwäch che u banic ri ch'o'j cuc' xane' chaya' awib chquij aretak c'u catopanic jawije' e c'o wi ri c'oc'alaj tak che'." 
1Chronicles14:15 Aretak c'u cata' ri u pa rakan winak paquiwi' tak ri che', chachapa' u banic ch'o'j cuc', ri quel cubij wa' chi in quinnabej chawäch che qui soquic ri ajch'ojab aj pilisteyib che cämical.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Ri David je xubano jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Dios che, xequich'äc c'ut ri cajch'ojab ri aj pilisteyib kas pa Gabaon c'ä pa Jezer," 
1Chronicles14:17 rumal c'u wa' xel u tzijol pa conojel tak ri tinimit xuban c'ut ri Ajawaxel chi conojel ri nimak tak tinimit chiquixe'j quib chuwäch. 
1Chronicles15:1 Ri David xtakanic chi cheyac rachoch chupam ri u tinimit ri David, xusuc'umaj c'ut jun c'olbal ri cäya' wi ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, chupam jun lic'om rachoch re be." 
1Chronicles15:2 Xuya' c'u takanic: “Mawi jun, we man aj Levi, catelen ta bic ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, are c'ut ri Ajawaxel e chowinak rech e are' quetelen ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel xukuje' rech amak'el e c'o chuwäch che ri u patanixic.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Xumulij c'ut ronojel Israel pa Jerusalen che u k'axexic ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel chupam ri c'olbal ri xusuc'umaj che. 
1Chronicles15:4 Xukuje' xebumulij ri rija'lil ri Aaron xukuje' tak ri aj levi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Chque ri rija'lil ri Coat jun sient ruc' juwinak xquimulij quib (120): Uriel, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:6 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Merar, quieb sient ruc' juwinak (220): Asaiy, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:7 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, jun sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (130): Joel, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:7 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Jerson, jun sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (130): Joel, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:8 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Elizapan, quieb sient (200): Semaiy, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:9 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Hebron, jumuch' (80): Eliel, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:10 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Uziel, jun sient ruc' cablajuj (112): Aminadab, ri c'amal qui be ri e rachalaxic." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ri David xusiq'uij ri Sadoc xukuje' ri Abiatar, e cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri aj levi Uriel, Asaiy, Joel, Eliel xukuje' ri Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:11 Ri David xusiq'uij ri Sadoc xukuje' ri Abiatar, e cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri aj levi Uriel, Asaiy, Joel, Eliel xukuje' ri Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 xubij c'u chque: “Ix, ri ix c'amal tak qui be ri jujun tak ja winak chque ri aj Levi, chi ch'ajch'ojirisaj iwib je jas rajawaxic u banic junam cuc' ri e iwachalaxic, rech quixcuinic quik'axej ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel, chupam ri c'olbal ri nu wocom che;" 
1Chronicles15:13 rumal c'u rech chi man ix ta xixbanow nabe mul, ri Ajawaxel xeresaj ri qui c'aslemal jujun chke, man xkatz'onoj ta c'u na jas ri rajawaxic u banic.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Xquich'ajch'ojirisaj c'u quib tak ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri e aj levitib jas ri rajawaxic u banic rech cuya' caquik'axej ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel." 
1Chronicles15:15 Je c'u xquiban wa' che u c'amic ulok xequicoj ba'lul che u telexic ulok, xquiya' paquiwi' tak ri qui teleb, je jas ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises rumal ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel." 
1Chronicles15:16 Ri David xukuje' xuya' takanic chque ri c'amal tak qui be ri e aj levitib chi, chquixo'l ri camak', che qui c'utu' tak ri bixonelab che qui c'ama' bic tak ri e qui chaconisan che u banic tak ri trompet, nimalaj arp, alaj arp xukuje' quetecak tak k'an ch'ich', chi co che ok'esaxok che u c'utic chi c'o quicotemal." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ri e aj levitib xquic'ut ri Heman, u c'ojol ri Joel, xukuje' ri Asap, u c'ojol ri Berequiy, cachalaxic ri Heman; ri e rija'lil ri Merar xukuje' cachalaxic ri e nabe, ri Etan, u c'ojol ri Cusaiy;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Ri e aj levitib xquic'ut ri Heman, u c'ojol ri Joel, xukuje' ri Asap, u c'ojol ri Berequiy, cachalaxic ri Heman; ri e rija'lil ri Merar xukuje' cachalaxic ri e nabe, ri Etan, u c'ojol ri Cusaiy;" 
1Chronicles15:18 xequic'ut chi c'ut niq'uiaj cachalaxic ri e nabe, ri e qui tz'akat ri e u cak'at pataninelab: Zacariy, Jaaziel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliab, Benaiy, Maasiy, Matatiy, Elipelehu, Micniy, xukuje' ri e chajil tak oquibal, ri e are' ri Obed-edom xukuje' ri Jeiel." 
1Chronicles15:19 Ri e bixonelab Heman, Asap xukuje' ri Etan e are' e cojom che cok'esaxic ri quetecak tak re k'an ch'ich'." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zacariy, Aziel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliab, Maasiy xukuje' ri Benaiy e c'o tak ri qui nimalaj arp che qui k'ojomaxic jas ri caquiban ri e aj elamib." 
1Chronicles15:21 Are' c'u ri Matatiy, Elipelehu, Micniy, Obed-edom, Jeiel xukuje' ri Azaziy e c'o tak qui arp che rok'isaxic jas cäquiban ri e aj siminitab." 
1Chronicles15:22 Quenaniy, c'amal qui be ri aj levitib ri yo'm rekle'n che rilic chi quec'am bic ri jastak, are' c'u c'amal be, sibalaj c'u c'o u no'j." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ri Berequiy xukuje' ri Elcan e are' ri c'amal u be ri caxa. 
1Chronicles15:24 E are' tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob Sebaniy, Josapat, Natanael, Amasay, Zacariy, Benaiy xukuje' ri Eliezer e are' tak ri quebok'esan tak ri trompet chuwäch ri u caxa ri Dios. Ri Ebed-edom xukuje' ri Jehiy xukuje' e c'amal u be ri caxa." 
1Chronicles15:25 Are c'u ri David, ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel xukuje' ri e qui nimal tak ri jujun tak mil ajch'ojab xebe ruc' quicotemal che u k'axexic ulok ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel re ri c'ulwächinic ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Obed-edom." 
1Chronicles15:26 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Dios e u to'm ri e aj levitib ri e teleninak ri caxa, xequipil wukub alaj tak ama'ib wacax xukuje' wukub ama'ib tak chij." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ri David u cojom jun u k'u' re ch'uch'ujalaj lino jacha', xukuje' conojel ri e aj levitib ri e teleninak ri caxa; ri e ajbixab xukuje' ri Quenaniy, ri c'amowinak u be ri k'axenic; ri David u cojom c'u ne bic jun ratz'iak nim u k'ij re lino." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ronojel Israel je u c'amic bic wa' ri caxa re ri u c'ulwächinic ri Ajawaxel xequibano cuc' rakoj chi'aj, re quicotemal xukuje' ruc' rok'ibal tak ruc'a' chij, trompet, quetecak tak k'an ch'ich', tak ri nimalaj arp xukuje' alaj tak arp." 
1Chronicles15:29 Aretak ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel xopan pa ri u Tinimit ri David, ri Mical, ri u mia'l ri Saul, xca'y c'u ulok pa ri wenta'n; aretak xril ri ajawinel David chi cätajin caxojow ruc' quicotemal, xtiow xuna' che." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ri u caxa ri Dios xc'am bic xeyok chupam ri lic'om rachoch re be ri are' u patan wa' xuwoc ri David. Xechi'x c'u tak tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' tak tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib chuwäch ri Dios," 
1Chronicles16:2 aretak c'u xto'taj ri David che qui chi'xic xebutewichi'j ri tinimit pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel," 
1Chronicles16:3 chque c'u conojel ri aj israelib xuya' jun wa, jun lej re u wäch tut xukuje' jun chic re pasa." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ri David xebuc'ut chquixo'l ri aj levi jachin tak ri quepatanij chuwäch ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel, rech cacanaj pa qui k'ab ri u nimak'isaxic u ya'ic ri maltioxinic xukuje' ri u ya'ic u ri k'ij ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel." 
1Chronicles16:5 Ri c'amal be are' ri Asap, are chi c'u cätaken ri Zacariy; benak chi c'ut ri Jeiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Matatiy, Eliab, Benaiy, Obed-edom xukuje' ri Jeiel, ri e c'o tak ri qui chaconisan che u banic ri k'ojom, tak qui nimalaj arp xukuje' tak ri qui alaj arp. Ri Asap are cok'isan ri quetecak tak k'an ch'ich'," 
1Chronicles16:6 e are' c'u ri e cojol tabal tok'ob Benaiy xukuje' ri Jahaziel e are' quecok'esaj tak ri trompet chuwäch ri caxa rech ri u c'ulwächinic ri Dios. 
1Chronicles16:7 Kas c'u pa ri k'ij ri' ri David xuya' takanic nabe mul chi ri Asap xukuje' tak ri e rachil chiquichaplej u ya'ic we k'ijilanic ri' re maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel: 
1Chronicles16:8 “¡Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chnataj ri u bi'! Chebitzijoj chque tak ri tinimit ri e u banoj. 
1Chronicles16:9 Chebibixoj tak bix che u ya'ic u k'ij. ¡Chebitzijoj ri nimak tak jastak ri e u banom! 
1Chronicles16:10 China' iwib chi nimak i banic rumal ri tastalicalaj u bi'. ¡Chquicot ri canima' ri caquitzucuj ri Ajawaxel! 
1Chronicles16:11 Chichapa' iwib che ri Ajawaxel, chichapa' iwib che ri u cuinem; chichapa' wib che ri Ajawaxel ronojel k'ij." 
1Chronicles16:12 Chenataj tak ri nimak tak u chac chiwe ri xukuje' e mayibal, xukuje' tak ri u colomibal ri e u yo'm tak u bixic:" 
1Chronicles16:13 Ix ri ix, rija'lil ri Israel ri pataninel rech, ix, u c'ojol ri Jacob, ri ix chatajinak rumal," 
1Chronicles16:14 are' ri Ajawaxel, ri ka Dios; ¡are' ri catakan puwi' ronojel ri uwächulew!" 
1Chronicles16:15 Pune' ta c'u ne queboc'ow jun mil ija'lil, man quesach ta pa u jolom ri e chi'nic re ri c'ulwächinic." 
1Chronicles16:16 Che ri c'ulwächinic ri xuban ruc' ri Abraham, che ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na xcha' che ri Isaac" 
1Chronicles16:17 xujiquiba' c'ut jacha' pixab che ri Jacob, jacha' jun junalic c'ulwächinic che ri Israel," 
1Chronicles16:18 aretak xubij: ‘Quenya' ri ulew re Canaan chawe jacha' ri echbal ri cayataj chawe.’ 
1Chronicles16:19 Pune' ri e are' man e q'ui taj, xa' e quieb oxib man e aj chila' taj e c'o pa ri ulew." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ri quebe pa jun nim tinimit, quebe chi c'u pa jun nim tinimit; quebel pa jun ajawibal, quebe chi c'u pa jun ajawibal," 
1Chronicles16:21 man xuya' ta ri Dios chi c'o ta jachin xbanow c'ax chque; xebupixbej c'u ne tak ri e ajawinelab: 
1Chronicles16:22 ‘Mebinak tak ri e chatajinak wumal, mawi mebic'äxc'obisaj tak ri e nu k'axal tzij.’" 
1Chronicles16:23 Chixbixon che ri Ajawaxel, iwonojel ri ix jekel chuwäch ronojel ri uwächulew; chiwesaj u tzijol ri u colonic k'ij chi k'ij." 
1Chronicles16:24 Chitzijoj ri u juluwem xukuje' tak ri mayibal ri e u banom chquiwäch conojel tak ri winak xukuje' ri nimak tak tinimit," 
1Chronicles16:25 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel nim u k'ij xukuje' ya'tal u k'ijilaxic, xukuje' xibibal na chquiwäch conojel tak ri diosib." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ri e qui diosib ri e jule' tak tinimit chic man c'o ta qui banic, are c'u ri Ajawaxel are' xebanow tak ri caj." 
1Chronicles16:27 ¡C'o nimalaj nimak'ijanic chuwäch! ¡C'o cuinem xukuje' quicotemal chupam ri u k'ijilabal! 
1Chronicles16:28 Chixyan che ri Ajawaxel, jujun tak ja winak quech tak ri tinimit, chiya' che ri Ajawaxel ri cuinem xukuje' ri juluwem;" 
1Chronicles16:29 chiya' ri nim ilic che ri Ajawaxel ri takal che, cuc' tak sipanic chixopan ruc'; chik'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel chupam ri k'ijilabal ri je'lic." 
1Chronicles16:30 ¡Chi ronojel ri uwächulew chebirbob chuwäch! Are' c'u xtiq'uiban ri ulew rech man casalab taj. 
1Chronicles16:31 ¡Chejajat tak ri caj xukuje' ri uwächulew! Chbix pa nimak tak tinimit: ‘¡Ri Ajawaxel are ajawinel!’ 
1Chronicles16:32 ¡Chjinin ri plo xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chupam! ¡Chejajat tak ri ulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chupam! 
1Chronicles16:33 ¡Ri che' ri e c'o pa tak ri c'ache'laj qui raka' tak qui chi' rumal quicotemal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri cäpe che ajawinic cho ri uwächulew!" 
1Chronicles16:34 Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel, rumal rech chi utz ri are', rumal rech chi junalic ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x." 
1Chronicles16:35 Chibij che: ‘¡Chujcolo' la, ka Dios ka Colonel! ¡Chujmolo' la chujto'tajisaj la rech man cujkaj ta pa qui k'ab ri nimak tak tinimit, rech cujk'ijilan che ri suc'alaj bi' la, rech cujjajatic cujk'ijilan che la!’" 
1Chronicles16:36 ¡Tewichital ba' ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel, pa ronojel ri junaliquil!” Ronojel c'u ri tinimit xutzelej u bixic: “¡je' chbanok!,” xuk'ijilaj c'ut ri Ajawaxel." 
1Chronicles16:37 Je c'u ri' ri David xebuya' can chuwäch ri caxa re ri u c'ulwächinic ri Ajawaxel ri Asap xukuje' tak ri e rachil rech quepatanij amak'el jas ri quebajwataj wi k'ij chi k'ij. 
1Chronicles16:38 Xukuje' xebuya' can ri Obed-edom xukuje' tak ri e rachil, e oxc'al wajxakib (68) winak, cachil ri Obed-edom, u c'ojol ri Jedutun, xukuje' ri Hos, che chajil oquibal." 
1Chronicles16:39 Ri Sadoc xukuje' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e rachil xebuya' can chuwäch ri u Lic'om Rachoch ri Ajawaxel, ri c'o chupam ri k'ijilabal ri c'o pa Gabaon," 
1Chronicles16:40 rech amak'el quequichi'j tak tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel puwi' ri porobal ri quechajirisax wi, ak'abibal xukuje' benak k'ij, kas ruc' tz'akatil jacha' ri tz'ibatal chupam ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel, ri xuya' canok jacha' jun takanic che ri Israel." 
1Chronicles16:41 Xukuje' xebuya' can cuc' ri Heman, ri Jedutun xukuje' ri qui tz'akatil ri xecha'ic ri xek'alajisax rumal tak ri qui bi' che u banic ri bixonic: “Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel, rumal ri u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj junalic.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Wa' quecok'esaj trompet, ri quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' xukuje' niq'uiaj chaconisan chic che u banic ri k'ojom, ri que cachilaj tak ri bix ri quebixox che ri Dios. Ri e u c'ojol ri Jedutun are quekle'n ri quilixic ri e oquibal." 
1Chronicles16:43 Aretak c'u xq'uis u banic ronojel, conojel ri winak xebe cho tak cachoch, xukuje' c'u ri David xbe cho rachoch che qui tewichi'xic ri e aj uwo rachoch." 
1Chronicles17:1 Aretak ri David jekel chic chupam ri rachoch, xubij che ri Natan, ri k'axal tzij: “Ampe', ri in in c'o chupam jun ja re chacalte', are c'u ri u caxa ri Ajawaxel xa' chuxe' jun lic'om rachoch c'o wi.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Ri Natan xutzelej u bixic che: “Bana' ba' la ronojel ri chomam la u banic, c'o c'ut ri Dios uc' la che to'ic la.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Kas c'u pa ri ak'ab ri', ri Dios xuch'abej ri Natan xubij c'u che:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Jät jatech'aw ruc' ri David, ri pataninel wech, jaya' u bixic che chi ri in, ri Ajawaxel, nu bim: ‘Man at taj ri catyacow ta na jun ja chwe rech quinjeki' chupam." 
1Chronicles17:5 Kas pa ri k'ij aretak xinwesaj ulok ri Israel, c'ä camic, man in c'olinak ta pa nimak tak ja, xane' xak in c'olinak chupam jun lic'om ja re binem chupam jun c'olbal xukuje' pa jun chic." 
1Chronicles17:6 Pa ronojel ri k'ijol ri xinbin cuc', mawi jumul xintz'onoj ta che jun chque ri c'amal qui be, ri xebencojo rech quetakan puwi' ri nu tinimit, chi chuyaca' ta jun ja re chacalte' chwe.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Rumal c'u ri' chabij che ri David ri pataninel wech chi ri in ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quincha': che: ‘In xatinwesaj chrij ri qui warabal ri chij, xatinwesaj rech man catbin ta chic chquij ri chij, rech catux c'amal u be ri nu tinimit Israel;" 
1Chronicles17:8 at wachilam apawije' ta ne ri at benak wi, nu q'uisom tzij paquiwi' conojel tak ri e a c'ulel ri xquiwalijisaj quib chawij, nu yo'm c'u nimarisan k'ij chawe jas ri c'o cuc' ri achijab ri nimak qui k'ij re we uwächulew ri'." 
1Chronicles17:9 Nu suc'umam c'ut jun c'olbal che ri nu tinimit Israel, chi c'u e nu jekebam wi rech quejeki' chupam jun qui c'olbal ri quech, ri man c'o ta jachin cäyo'w ta latz' chque mawi ta ne caquiban ta c'ax ri banal tak etzelal chque jacha' pa ri chaplebal," 
1Chronicles17:10 je c'u quec'ulmatajok aretak xebencoj k'atal tak tzij puwi' ri nu tinimit Israel. Quebencoj na ri qui banom qui c'ulel chawe chuxe' ri a takanic. Quinya' u bixic chawe chi quebenya' na e awija'lil," 
1Chronicles17:11 aretak c'ut che q'uis ri a c'aslemal catcäm c'ut, in quinjekeba' na jun chque ri awija'lil quintiquiba' c'u chupam ri ajawibal." 
1Chronicles17:12 Are' cäyacow na jun wachoch, are c'u ri in co quintiquiba' na ri u tem re ajawibal chbe k'ij sak." 
1Chronicles17:13 In quinux na u tat, are c'u ri are' cux na jun nu c'ojol. Man quink'il ta na ri wutzil che jas ri xinban ruc' ri xajalo," 
1Chronicles17:14 xane' c'o quintiquiba' na amak'el chupam ri wachoch xukuje' chupam ri wajawibal. Cajeki' c'u can ri u tem re ajawibal amak'el.’” 
1Chronicles17:15 Ri Natan xutzijoj ronojel wa' che ri David, sibalaj tz'akat jacha' ri xrilo xukuje' ri xuto." 
1Chronicles17:16 Are c'u ri ajawinel David xoc chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che u tzijobexic, xubij c'ut: “Ajawaxel xukuje' Dios, ¿in jachinok in xukuje' jas qui banic ri wachalaxic chi banom la chwe chi in opaninak c'ä pa we c'olbal ri'?" 
1Chronicles17:17 ¡Man nim ta c'u ne wa' chwäch la, Ajawaxel xukuje' Dios, yo'm c'u la u bixic chi quebajawin na ri e rija'lil ri pataninel ech la yo'm c'u la wäch la chwe chi in je ta ne jun achi ri nim u banic!" 
1Chronicles17:18 ¿Jas ta chic ri quincuin ta chic che u bixic che ri nimarisabal k'ij ri banom la che ri pataninel ech la, xa' c'u ne ri lal eta'm la u wäch we pataninel ech la ri'?" 
1Chronicles17:19 Ajawaxel e banom la conojel tak we mayibal ri' che u tok'obisax u wäch ri pataninel ech la jas ri chomam la u banic, che qui c'utic conojel ri jastak ri cäcuin la che qui banic." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ajawaxel, man c'o ta chi jachin jun jacha' ta ri lal, mawi c'o ta chic jun Dios we ta ma ta xak xuwi ri lal, jacha' ronojel ri kas uj ka tom u bixic." 
1Chronicles17:21 Are c'u ri Israel, ri winakil la ¡Man c'o ta chi jun jacha' ta ri are', man c'o ta chi jun nim tinimit ri cajunamataj ta ruc' cho ri uwächulew! Lal, Dios, xto'tajisaj la rech cux tinimit la, xnimarisax c'u k'ij la cumal ri qui banic nimak tak jastak xukuje' e mayibal. Lal xerokij la bic chuwäch ri tinimit la ri xto'tajisaj la ulok pa Ejipt, ri jule' ri nimak tak tinimit chic," 
1Chronicles17:22 rumal rech chi majim la ri Israel jacha' ri tinimit la re chbe k'ij sak, are c'u ri lal, Ajawaxel, cux na la u Dios." 
1Chronicles17:23 Je ba' ri', Ajawaxel, co tiquiba' la chbe k'ij sak ri chi'nic ri banom la che ri pataninel ech la xukuje' che ri rija'lil ri ajawinel, ¡tz'akatisaj c'u la ri bim la!" 
1Chronicles17:24 ¡Kas jic chtz'akatisaj la ri xchi'j la chyok c'ut u k'ij ri bi' la amak'el, chbix c'ut chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem are' ri u Dios ri Israel, chi ri are' are' ri kas u Dios ri Israel! ¡Chi ri rija'lil ri pataninel ech la ri David chutakej ajawinic co chtiquilok rumal ri to'banic la!" 
1Chronicles17:25 Lal, nu Dios, yo'm la retamaxic chwe chi cajekeba' la ri wija'lil; rumal ri' in, pune' in pataninel ech la quintz'onoj jun tok'ob che la." 
1Chronicles17:26 Lal, Ajawaxel, lal Dios chi'm c'u la q'ui utzil che ri pataninel ech la;" 
1Chronicles17:27 are c'u ri camic petinak pa anima' la ri u tewichi'xic ri rija'lil ri pataninel ech la rech cajeki' chbe k'ij sak chuxe' ri to'banic la. Lal Ajawaxel, tewichi'm la, tewichital c'ut chbe k'ij sak.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi ri David xebuch'äc ri aj pilisteyib, xekaj c'u pa u k'ab xutokij c'ut ri tinimit Gat chque xukuje' ri alaj tak u tinimit." 
1Chronicles18:2 Xukuje' xebuch'äc ri aj moabib, xecanaj c'u chuxe' ri u takanic ri David xetojon c'u na pa u k'ab." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ri David xukuje' xuch'äc ri Hadad-ezer, ajawinel re Soba, ri c'o chusuq'uil ri Hamat, aretak are ta xraj xbe che u majixic ri ulew ri c'o chuchi' ri nima' Euprats." 
1Chronicles18:4 Jumil carwaj re ch'o'j xutokij ri David chque wa', wukub mil ajch'ojab aj quiejab xekaj pa u k'ab xukuje' juwinak mil ajch'ojab ri xak quebin chcakan; xebuk'ajisaj c'ut ri cakan conojel tak ri quiej ri quejurun tak ri carwaj re ch'o'j, xuwi xebuto' can ri quiej ri quejurun jun sient carwaj." 
1Chronicles18:5 Xebopan tak c'ut ri aj siriyab aj Damasc che u to'ic ri Hadad-ezer, ri ajawinel re Soba, xebuch'äc c'ut ri David ri aj siriyab, xebucämisaj c'u juwinak quieb mil chque wa'." 
1Chronicles18:6 Xebucojo c'u chajinelab ri David pa Siriy aj Damasc xecanaj c'u can ri aj siriyab chuxe' ri u takanic xquichap c'u tojonic pa u k'ab ri David. Je c'u ri' ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri ch'äcanic che ri David apawije' ta ne ri cabe wi che u banic ch'o'j. 
1Chronicles18:7 Ri David xuban rech chque tak ri quetecak ch'ich' re k'an puak ri xequicoj ri quinimal tak rajch'ojab ri Hadad-ezer, xebuc'am c'u bic pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles18:8 Xukuje' xuban rech che jumulaj k'an ch'ich' ri petinak pa Tibat xukuje' pa Cun, e tak tinimit wa' ri e c'o pa u k'ab ri Hadad-ezer. Ruc' we k'an ch'ich' ri' xuban ri Salomon ri nimalaj pila, xukuje' tak ri rakan ja xukuje' tak ri chaconisan re k'an ch'ich' ri xebajwataj chupam ri rachoch Dios." 
1Chronicles18:9 Aretak ri Toy, ajawinel re Hamat, xoc pa u jolom chi ri David xebuch'äc conojel ri rajch'ojab ri Hadad-ezer, ajawinel re Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 xutak ulok ri Adoram ri u c'ojol e ruc'am ulok ronojel qui wäch jastak re k'an puak, re sak puak xukuje' re k'an ch'ich', rech cuya' rutzil u wäch xukuje' che u ya'ic u k'ij ri ajawinel David rumal rech chi xutij u chuk'ab ruc' ri Hadad-ezer xcuin c'u che u ch'äquic, ri Toy xukuje' c'olinak pa ch'o'j ruc'." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ri David xebujach conojel we jastak ri' che ri Ajawaxel, junam ruc' ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak ri xutokij chque conojel ri nimak tak tinimit, che ri Edom, che ri Moab, chque ri aj amonib, chque ri aj pilisteyib xukuje' chque ri aj amalesib." 
1Chronicles18:12 Are chi c'u ri Abisay, ral ri Sarb, xebuch'äc wajxaklajuj mil (18,000) aj edomib chupam ri beya' re atz'am." 
1Chronicles18:13 Xebucojo c'u chajinelab ri David pa Edom, conojel c'ut ri aj edomib xecanaj can chuxe' ri u takanic; are c'u ri Ajawaxel cäyo'w ri ch'äcanic che apawije' ta ne ri cabe wi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Ri David xajawin puwi' ronojel Israel, xuban c'ut ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri colomal cuc' conojel ri e u winakil." 
1Chronicles18:15 Ri takanel paquiwi' ri ajch'ojab are' ri Joab, ral ri Sarb; xukuje' ri Josapat, u c'ojol ri Ahilud, are' ri rajtz'ib ri ajawinel." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ri Sadoc, u c'ojol ri Ahitob, xukuje' ri Abimelec, u c'ojol ri Abiatar, e cojol tabal tok'ob; ri Sabs are' ri tz'ibal tzijol," 
1Chronicles18:17 xukuje' ri Benaiy, u c'ojol ri Joiad, c'o che qui nimal ri chajinelab aj sereteyib xukuje' peleteyib. Ri e u c'ojol ri David e are' ri e nimak tak to'l rech." 
1Chronicles19:1 Oc'owinak chi c'u jun k'ijol xcäm ri Nahas, cajawinel ri aj amonib, are' c'u xajawin ri u c'ojol pa ri u c'olbal." 
1Chronicles19:2 Xuchomaj c'u ri David chi cuban utzil che ri Hanun, u c'ojol ri Nahas, rumal rech chi ri u tat xuban utzil che, xebutak c'u bic jujun tak u q'uexwäch che u cu'bisaxic u c'u'x ri Hanun rumal chi xcäm ri u tat. Aretak c'u xebopan ri e u tako'n ri David chuchi' ri culew ri aj amonib," 
1Chronicles19:3 ri e qui nimal tak ri c'amal tak be aj amonib xequiya' u bixic che ri Hanun: “¿La are c'u pa c'u'x la chi ri David e u takom ulok achijab che u cu'bisaxic c'u'x la, xa' ta che u ya'ic u k'ij ri tat la, ajaw? ¡Wa' e petinak xa' che u ya'ic qui wäch, che u nic'oxic xukuje' che rilic ri uwächulew!”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Hanun chi checoj ri e u nimakil tak ri e rajch'ojab ri David pa che', chajos c'u bic ri quismachi' xukuje' chi chejistak bic ri catz'iak pa niq'uiajil c'ä pa tak cächak. C'ä te' c'u ri' xebutzokopij bic." 
1Chronicles19:5 Aretak xebix che ri David ri xquic'ulmaj tak we achijab ri', xtakanic chi chebec'ulaxok, sibalaj c'u e nojinak ri' che q'uixbal, chbix c'u chque chi checanaj can pa Jerico c'ä chq'uiy na ri quismachi', c'ä te' c'u ri cuya' quetzelejic." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ri aj Amon xquich'obo chi xquetzelaj quib chuwäch ri David, rumal c'u rech wa' ri Hanun xukuje' ri aj Amon xquitak bic wakib sient ruc' oxc'al (660) quintal sak puak che qui tojic tak carwaj quech ch'o'j xukuje' ajch'ojab aj quiejab pa Mesopotam, pa Siriy, pa Maac xukuje' pa Soba," 
1Chronicles19:7 xequitoj c'u juwinak cablajuj mil (32,000) carwaj que ch'o'j, xukuje' c'u ri ajawinel re Maac e rachil ri e rajch'ojab. Xebopan wa' xquicholajij tak quib chuwäch ri Medeb. Xebel chi c'u ulok ri aj amonib pa tak ri qui tinimit xquimulij quib rech queboc' che u banic ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles19:8 Xoc c'u pa u jolom ri David, xutak c'u bic ri Joab xebuc'am bic conojel ri ajch'ojab ri e banal ch'o'j." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ri aj Amon xebel c'u ulok xquisuc'umaj c'u quib che u banic ri ch'o'j kas chuchi' ri tinimit. E are' tak c'ut ri ajawinelab ri e petinak che qui to'ic xecanaj can pa tak ri juyub. 
1Chronicles19:10 Aretak c'u xril ri Joab chi e petinak ri c'ulel chuwäch xukuje' chrij, xebucha' ri ajch'ojab aj israelib ri e utz na xusuc'umaj c'u rib che u banic ri ch'o'j cuc' ri aj siriyab." 
1Chronicles19:11 Che c'ut ri u k'atixic qui wäch ri aj amonib, xucoj ri Abisay ri u chak'," 
1Chronicles19:12 xubij c'u che: “We c'u quinquich'äc ri aj siriyab catpe na che nu to'ic, we c'u e are' catquich'äc ri aj amonib, in quinbe na che a to'ic." 
1Chronicles19:13 Chachajij anima', ruc' c'u chuk'ab ka ch'ojij ri nim ka tinimit xukuje' ri e u tinimit ri ka Dios. ¡Chubana' ba' ri Ajawaxel ri utz carilo!”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Xkeb c'u ri Joab e rachil ri e rajch'ojab che u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj siriyab, xebanimaj c'u wa' chuwäch." 
1Chronicles19:15 Aretak c'ut ri aj amonib xquilo chi xebanimaj ri aj siriyab, xukuje' ri e are' xebanimaj chuwäch ri Abisay, u chak' ri Joab, xeboc chupam ri tinimit. Xtzelej c'ut ri Joab pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles19:16 Aretak xquinabej ri aj siriyab chi xech'äcataj cumal ri aj Israel, xequitak bic tako'n rech quepe ri aj siriyab ri e c'o ch'käp che ri nima' Euprats. Are' c'u e u c'aninak ri Sopac qui nimal rajch'ojab ri Hadad-ezer." 
1Chronicles19:17 Xya' c'u u bixic wa' che ri David, ri, xebumulij bic conojel ri aj israelib, xek'ax c'ut chupam ri nima' Jordan, xranej c'ut quimajixic qui c'olbal che qui c'ulelaxic. Ri David xebucholajij ri e rajch'ojab che u k'atixic qui wäch ri aj siriyab, xquitij c'u qui chuk'ab wa' ruc'," 
1Chronicles19:18 xebanimaj c'u na chquiwäch ri aj Israel, ri rajch'ojab ri xecämisax rumal ri David e cawinak mil (40,000) ri xak quebin chcakan xukuje' wukub mil (7,000) chque ri carwaj ri e re ch'o'j; ri David, xukuje' xucämisaj ri Sopac, ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj siriyab." 
1Chronicles19:19 Aretak xquil ri e to'l tak rech ri Hadad-ezer chi xech'äcataj cumal ri aj israelib, xquiban jamaril ruc' ri David xecanaj c'u chuxe' ri u takanic. Ri aj siriyab kas chi' xc'äj qui wäch, man c'o ta chi jumul ri xcaj ta chic xequito' ta chic ri aj amonib." 
1Chronicles20:1 Xc'ulmataj c'ut pa jun k'ijol, pa ri chaplebal rech ri junab, chi c'ut qui nak'atisam quib ri ajawinelab quebel bic che u banic ch'o'j, ri Joab xusuc'umaj jun ch'ojinic xusachisaj c'u qui wäch conojel ri aj amonib. Xbe chi c'ut, xusutij c'u rij ri Raba xch'ojin c'u ruc' c'ä xuyojij na canok. Are' c'u ri David, xcanaj can pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles20:2 Xumajij c'u na ri David che ri u jolom ri rajawinel ri u corona re k'an puak, ri e c'o je'licalaj tak abaj che, ri xpajan oxc'al oxlajuj (73) libra; xcoj c'u che ri u jolom ri David. Xukuje' xebutokij bic q'ui jastak ri sibalaj pakal cajil," 
1Chronicles20:3 e are' tak c'ut ri winak ri xeto'taj can chupam ri tinimit xeresaj bic chila' xebucoj pa chac cuc' tak ramibal xukuje' tak icäj. Junam xuban ri David chque cuc' conojel tak ri nimak tak qui tinimit ri aj amonib, xtzelej c'ut pa Jerusalen e rachil conojel tak ri e rajch'ojab." 
1Chronicles20:4 Xwalij c'u jun ch'o'j pa Jezer chquij ri pilisteyib. Chi' c'ut ri Sibecay ri aj Hus xumach'irisaj xukuje' xucämisaj ri Sipay, quija'lil ri achijab ri tac'atak cakan." 
1Chronicles20:5 Pa jun ch'o'j chi c'ut ri xban cuc' ri pilisteyib, ri Elanan, u c'ojol ri Jair, xucämisaj ri Lami, rachalal ri Goliat ri aj Gat, ri c'o jun u tz'imaj ch'ich' ri c'o jun u wi' sibalaj nim ri junam ruc' jun tz'imaj re quemabal." 
1Chronicles20:6 Pa Gat xban chi jun ch'o'j. C'o jun achi chi' ri sibalaj jutac'aj rakan, ri e c'o wakitak u wi' tak u k'ab xukuje' wakitak u wi' tak rakan. Xukuje' wa' quija'lil tak ri e tac'atak tak achijab," 
1Chronicles20:7 xutzur c'u ri Israel xcämisax c'u rumal ri Jonatan, u c'ojol ri Simey, rätz ri David." 
1Chronicles20:8 We tac'atak cakan tak achijab ri' e rija'lil ri Rep, ri aj Gat, xekaj c'u pa u k'ab ri David xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e qui nimal tak ri rajch'ojab ri David." 
1Chronicles21:1 Ri tako'n tzujunel xuwalijisaj rib chquij ri aj Israel xucoj c'u u c'u'x ri David chi che rajilaj ri aj israelib. 
1Chronicles21:2 Xuya' c'u takanic ri David che ri Joab xukuje' ri quetakan paquiwi' tak ri tinimit: “Jix chebiwajilaj ri aj Israel kas pa Beerseb c'ä pa Dan, chi c'ama' c'u ulok ri cajilabal chwe rech quinwetamaj e joropa' chi conojel.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Xutzelej c'ut u bixic ri Joab: “Are' ba' ri Ajawaxel chupok'colij ta chi jun sient mul ri u tinimit jas ri c'o camic; ¿La xa' ta ma ta conojel e pataninel ech la? ¿Jasche cärayij la u banic wa'? ¿Jas ta che cux ta ajchak'mac ri Israel?” 
1Chronicles21:4 Are c'u xban na ri u takanic ri ajawinel chuwäch ri xubij ri Joab, xbe c'u wa', che u binibexic ronojel ri Israel xtzelej c'u ulok pa Jerusalen." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ri Joab xujach ri cajilabal ri winak pa u k'ab ri David, ri cajilabal ri aj Israel ri xmolotajic e jun miyon jun sient mil (1,100,000) achijab ri e takal che u banic ch'o'j, xukuje' quiejeb sient oxc'al lajuj mil (470,000) pa Juda." 
1Chronicles21:6 Man xebajilax ta c'ut ri amak' re Levi xukuje' ri e aj Benjamin, u banom c'u royowal ri Joab che ri takanic ri xuya' ri ajawinel." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ri Dios itzel xril ronojel wa', xutak c'u jun c'äjisabal wächaj puwi' ri Israel." 
1Chronicles21:8 Ri David xuk'alajisaj ri u mac chuwäch ri Dios: “Nu banom jun c'axalaj macaj aretak xinban wa'. Quinbochi'n c'u che la chi sacha' la ri u mac we pataninel ech la ri', in uxinak jacha' jun ri man c'o ta u no'j.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Gad, ri cutz'onoj wi u no'j ri David:" 
1Chronicles21:10 “Jät che rilic ri David, chabij che chi jewa' quinbij chi quebenya' oxib jastak chuwäch, chucha' c'ut jachique ri cäraj quenbana'.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Ri Gad xbe che rilic ri David, xubij c'u che: “Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel:" 
1Chronicles21:12 ‘chacha' chquixo'l, oxib junab wi'jal, oxib ic' catkaj pa qui k'ab ri a c'ulel catcokataj c'ut ri a c'ulel chi ch'ich', o oxib k'ij cämisanel yabil chupam ri ulew chuxe' ri u ch'ich' ri Ajawaxel, are c'u ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel cac'amow ulok ri cämical chupam ronojel ri ramak' ri Israel. Chachomaj ba' camic ri quentzelej na u bixic che ri xintakow ulok.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Ri David xutzelej u bixic che ri Gad: “In c'o chupam jun c'axalaj latz' man quinriktaj jas ri quinbano. Ri utz na chwe chi chinkaj pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel, sibalaj c'u nim na ri rutzil ranima', ma ta c'u pa qui k'ab ri achijab.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Xutak c'ut ri Ajawaxel jun cämisanelalaj yabilal puwi' ri Israel, oxc'al lajuj mil (70,000) aj israelib xkaj ri cämical paquiwi'." 
1Chronicles21:15 Xutak c'ut ri Dios jun tako'n che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Jerusalen. Aretak c'u cätajin cusachisaj u wäch, xril c'ut ri Ajawaxel, c'ax xbe pa ranima' ri cätajin u banic xuya' c'u takanic che ri tako'n ri cätajin cacämisanic: “¡Ruc' la', mat takenic!” Pa ri jok'otaj ri', ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel c'o chunakaj ri c'olbal jawije' ri cätajin cuyak' wi ri trico ri Ornan ri aj jebusey." 
1Chronicles21:16 Xca'y c'u apan ri David, xril apan ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel chi c'o chuxo'l ri caj ruc' ri ulew, ruc'am jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j ch'anal pa u k'ab, ri are' cätajin cuc'ut ri Jerusalen. Are' c'u ri David xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib, e qui cojom wakwoj tak atz'iak, xquimejela' quib cho ri ulew c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew," 
1Chronicles21:17 xubij c'ut ri David che ri Dios: “¡In ri xinyo'w ri takanic chi chebajilax tak ri achijab ri e c'o pa tak ri tinimit! ¡In ri in macuninak nu banom c'ut etzelal! ¿Jas ta c'ut ri qui banom wa' we man c'o ta qui mac ri'? Ajawaxel xukuje' nu Dios, in quinbochi'n che la chi chc'äjisaj la nu wäch xukuje' ri e wachalaxic, chtanaba' la u banic c'ax che ri tinimit la.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Are c'u ri tako'n rech ri Ajawaxel xuya' takanic che ri Gad chi chubij che ri David chi chuwoco' jun porobal che ri Ajawaxel chupam ri c'olbal ri cätajin cuyak' wi ri trico ri Ornan aj jebusey. 
1Chronicles21:19 Xbe c'ut ri David che u banic ri u bim ri Gad che pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ri Ornan, ri cätajin cuyak' ri trico, aretak xca'y apanok xril ri tako'n, e are' tak c'ut ri quiejeb u c'ojol, ri e c'o apan ruc', xebe che u c'u'ic quib." 
1Chronicles21:21 Aretak xkeb ri David jawije' ri c'o wi ri Ornan, xca'y wa', aretak c'u xril ri David xel ulok pa ri c'olbal ri cätajin cuyak' wi ri trico xumej c'u rib chuwäch ri David." 
1Chronicles21:22 Xubij c'u ri David che ri Ornan: “Chaya' we c'olbal chwe ri cätajin cayak' wi ri trico, rech quinwoc jun porobal chila' che ri Ajawaxel. Chac'ayij chwe che ri kas tz'akatalaj rajil, rech canajtin ri cämisanelalaj yabil che ri tinimit.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Ri Ornan xutzelej u bixic che: “Majij la chbana' la jachique ri utz quil la. In quebenya' ri ama'ib tak wacax che ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic, ri e jopibal tak che ri si' ri trico che ri sipanic. ¡Ronojel wa' quinya' che la!”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri ajawinel David: “Quinmaltioxij chawe, quinlok' c'u na ronojel quintoj na ri tz'akatalaj rajil, man quinwesaj ta c'ut ri awech che u ya'ic che ri Ajawaxel, man quinchi'j ta c'u jun tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic che, ri xak ta chincochij.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Rumal c'u ri', ri David xulok' we c'olbal ri' che ri Ornan chwakib sient rakan k'an puak," 
1Chronicles21:26 chila' c'u xuwoc wi jun c'olbal ri quechi'x wi tabal tak tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel xebuchi'j c'u tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib. Xunataj c'ut ri Ajawaxel, ri are' xutak ulok k'ak' chicaj puwi' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic che tzelebal u wäch ri u tzij." 
1Chronicles21:27 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Ajawaxel che ri tako'n chi chuc'olo' ri u ch'ich'. 
1Chronicles21:28 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' aretak ri David xrilo chi ri Ajawaxel xtatabex rumal pa ri c'olbal ri c'o wi ri Ornan ri aj jebusey ri cätajin cuyak' wi' ri trico, xebuchi'j tabal tak tok'ob." 
1Chronicles21:29 Pune' c'u ne ri lic'om rachoch ri u wocom ulok ri Moises che ri Ajawaxel chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak xukuje' ri c'olbal ri caporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic cäriktaj pa tak ri k'ij ri' chupam ri k'ijilabal ri c'o pa Gabaon," 
1Chronicles21:30 ri David man xcuintaj xbe ta chila' che u tz'onoxic u no'j che ri Dios, rumal rech chi xnoj che xe'n ib aretak xril ri u ch'ich' ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel."
