Psalms147:2 Ri Ajawaxel cuban u banic ri Jerusalen, quebumulij conojel ri aj israelib ri e jubuninak." 
Psalms147:3 Ri are' quebucunaj ri pak'pobinak canima', quebubotz' c'u ri qui socotajic." 
Psalms147:4 Ri are' reta'm ri cajilabal ri ch'imil, chquijujunal c'ut xucoj ri qui bi'." 
Psalms147:5 Nim u banic ri ka Dios xukuje' nim ri u cuinem; ri retamanic man c'o ta u q'uistajic. 
Psalms147:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' qui k'ij ri e mach'amoj, quebuxucule'j c'ut ri e banal tak etzelal cho ri ulew." 
Psalms147:7 Chixbixon che ri Ajawaxel ruc' maltioxinic; chibixoj bix che ri ka Dios, ruc' rok'ibal arp." 
Psalms147:8 Ri are' cuch'uk ri caj ruc' ri sutz', cucolomaj ri jäb che ri ulew, quebuq'uiyisaj ri k'ayes pa tak ri juyub," 
Psalms147:9 quebutzuk ri awaj xukuje' ri alaj tak cal ri joj aretak quebok'ic. 
Psalms147:10 Man are ta ri u chuk'ab ri quiej mawi ri e u ch'ec ri winak ri sibalaj quekaj ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; 
Psalms147:11 are nim queril wi ri queyo'w u k'ij; ri caquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chrij ri u lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x. 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalen, chak'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel; Sion, chaya' u k'ij ri a Dios." 
Psalms147:13 Xebucowirisaj c'u ri e u laweyil tak ri awoquibal, xebutewichi'j c'ut ri e a c'ojol chupam ri tinimit." 
Psalms147:14 Ri are' cuc'am ulok ri jamaril chupam ri awulew, xukuje' catutzuk ruc' ri trico ri sibalaj utz na." 
Psalms147:15 Ri are' cutak ulok ri u tzij cho ri uwächulew, ruc' c'u aninakil cäjubun ronojel ri u tzij." 
Psalms147:16 Cuq'uiyisaj ri tew jacha' ta ne rismal chij, ri cujabuj ri sakalaj tew ri jacha' ta ne puc'uc' ulew." 
Psalms147:17 Ri cutak ulok ri sakbach ri u tewerisam; ruc' ri tew ri cutak ulok, ¿jachin ta ri cacuinic cataq'ui ta canok?" 
Psalms147:18 Cutak c'u ulok ri u tzij cujarisaj c'ut; cubano chi cajich'ich' ri quiakik' cäbin c'u ri ja'. 
Psalms147:19 Ri are' xuya' retamaxic che ri Jacob, che ri Israel, ri u tzij, ri e u pixab xukuje' ri e u colomibal." 
Psalms147:20 Man junam ta xuban cuc' jule' nimak tak tinimit chic ri mawi jubik' xquetamaj ri e u colomibal. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! 
Psalms148:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chk'ijilax ri Ajawaxel kas pa ri caj! ¡Chk'ijilax ri Ajawaxel kas pa ri chicajil! 
Psalms148:2 ¡Chik'ijilaj ix iwonojel ri ix u tako'n aj caj! ¡Chik'ijilaj ix, ri ix ajch'ojab aj chicaj!" 
Psalms148:3 ¡Chik'ijilaj ix, k'ij xukuje' ic'! ¡Chik'ijilaj ix, juluwemalaj tak ya'l sakilal!" 
Psalms148:4 ¡Chak'ijilaj at aj chicajalaj caj, xukuje' at ja' ri at c'o puwi' ri caj!" 
Psalms148:5 Chiya' u k'ij ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, are c'u ri are' xuya' jun takanic, ronojel c'ut xebantajic;" 
Psalms148:6 ronojel xujekeba' ri are' rech cäcanaj amak'el, xuya' jun pixab ri mawi jubik' cäyojixic." 
Psalms148:7 ¡Chk'ijilax ri Ajawaxel kas cho ri ulew, jilijak tak awaj aj plo, xukuje' ri u choil ri plo!" 
Psalms148:8 ¡Ri cakulja, ri sakbach, ri sakalaj tew xukuje' ri mayul! ¡Ri quiakik' ri cäjich'ich'ic ri cunimaj ri u takanic!" 
Psalms148:9 ¡Ri e juyub xukuje' ri e u tza'm tak juyub! ¡Conojel ri chacalte' xukuje' tak ri che' ri quequiya' tak qui wäch! 
Psalms148:10 ¡Ri awaj e aj uwo tak ja xukuje' ri e juyubal tak awaj! ¡Ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' xukuje' ri caquijuruj tak quib! 
Psalms148:11 ¡Ri ajawinelab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xukuje' conojel tak ri tinimit! ¡Conojel ri c'amal tak be xukuje' ri k'atal tak tzij ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew! 
Psalms148:12 ¡Achijab, ixokib, ac'alab xukuje' ri'jab!" 
Psalms148:13 ¡Iwonojel chiya' u k'ij ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, xuwi c'ut ri u bi' sibalaj aj chicaj! ¡Ri u juluwem c'o puwi' ri caj xukuje' puwi' ri ulew!" 
Psalms148:14 Ri are' u yo'm cuinem pa u k'ab ri u tinimit. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij cumal conojel ri jic quebin chuwäch, cumal ri aj israelib, ri u tinimit ri c'o nakaj! ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!" 
Psalms149:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! Chibixoj jun c'ac' bix che ri Ajawaxel; Chyo'k u k'ij cumal ri jic quebin chuwäch. 
Psalms149:2 Chequicot ri aj israelib, ri tinimit aj Sion, ri Dios are c'ut i winakirisanel xukuje' iwajawinel." 
Psalms149:3 Chibixoj ri u bi' cuc' xojowem, chebibixoj bix che cuc' cok'ebal arp xukuje' tak tzojtzoj." 
Psalms149:4 Cäquicot c'ut ri Ajawaxel pa ri u tinimit; cuya' c'u chque ri e mach'amoj ri ch'äcanic che u nimarisaxic qui k'ij. 
Psalms149:5 Chequicot ri e jic rumal ri ch'äcanic, c'ä e warinak c'u ne' chebixon rumal ri quicotemal." 
Psalms149:6 Chc'ol u k'ijilaxic ri Dios chquichi', xukuje' jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j pa qui k'ab quieb u pa u chi'" 
Psalms149:7 Che u ya'ic rajil q'uexel chque ri quequik'ijilaj tak diosib, che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri nimak tak tinimit," 
Psalms149:8 che qui yutic tak ri ajawinelab xukuje' winak ri c'o qui cuinem, cuc' alalaj tak tikom ch'ich'," 
Psalms149:9 rech cätz'akat ri c'äjisabal qui wäch ri bim ulok. ¡Jun c'u nimarisabal qui k'ij wa' ri e jic! ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! 
Psalms150:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chiya' u k'ij ri Dios chupam ri cak'ijilax wi'! ¡Chiya' u k'ij chupam ri je'lic wocowicalaj räxalaj caj! 
Psalms150:2 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cumal ri e cuinelalaj tak u banoj! ¡Chiya' u k'ij rumal ri u nimalil ri man c'o ta u q'uisic! 
Psalms150:3 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' rok'ibal trompet! ¡Chiya' u k'ij ruc' arp xukuje' ruc' cok'ibal tak arp! 
Psalms150:4 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' tak xojowem cuc' tak tzojtzoj! ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' su' xukuje' k'ojom ri c'o qui c'amal! 
Psalms150:5 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' ri quetzinowic! ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' ri quek'uyuyic! 
Psalms150:6 Ronojel ri cuxlabic chuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! 
Proverbs1:1 U tzij tak ri Salomon, u c'ojol ri David, ajawinel re Israel," 
Proverbs1:2 ri qui patan wa': are ri qui k'axexic no'j xukuje' tijonic, ri quetoban che qui ch'obic tak ri tzij ri quieb oxib quebel cäquibij," 
Proverbs1:3 che u rikic etamanic, utzalaj no'jinic, suq'uilal, colomal xukuje' co tiquilem;" 
Proverbs1:4 che u ya'ic qui nawinic ri c'ojolab ri man c'o ta queta'm, che c'u u ya'ic quetamanic xukuje' jic'oj ib." 
Proverbs1:5 Ri c'o u no'j xukuje' u c'oxomanic quebutatabej, we c'u je cuban wa' cäq'uiy c'u na u wi' ri u no'j xukuje' ri esbal u no'j" 
Proverbs1:6 che qui ch'obic ri cäquibij ri ajno'jab, xukuje' tak ri qui tzij, ri e c'utbal ri cäquiya' xukuje' tak ri caquibij chi rajawaxic qui ch'obic." 
Proverbs1:7 Ri no'j cachaptajic rumal u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ri man c'o ta qui no'j cäquetzelaj u wäch ri no'j xukuje' ri tijonic. 
Proverbs1:8 Nu c'ojol, chaya' a xiquin che u tatabexic ri u pixbenic ri a tat xukuje' maxutuj ri u tijonic ri a nan," 
Proverbs1:9 e je'licalaj tak wikbal awib wa': jacha' jun a chachal o jun a corona. 
Proverbs1:10 We ri ajmaquib cäcaj catquisubu, ¡maya' a tzij chi caban awe ri cäquibano, nu c'ojol!" 
Proverbs1:11 Craj ne, cäquibij chawe: “Tasaj kuc'; xak chubanic ka cojo jun c'amibal, che u cämisaxic jun winak ri man c'o ta u mac aretak coc'owic." 
Proverbs1:12 E c'asal ri winak ri e tz'akat pa ronojel quekabik'o, jacha' ri cuban ri cämical che qui bik'ic ri quekaj pa ri u julil cäminak." 
Proverbs1:13 Quec'oji' na ronojel qui wäch k'inomal kuc', ¡quekanojisaj na ri kachoch cuc' conojel ri queläk'axic!" 
Proverbs1:14 Tasaj chatk'ax kuc' chabana' awe ri cäkabano, xa c'u jun c'olbal ka rajil chc'olok.”" 
Proverbs1:15 ¡Matbe cuc' we winak ri', nu c'ojol! Naj chaya' wi awib chque ri itzel tak qui be," 
Proverbs1:16 aninak c'u e c'o che u banic ri lawaloyil; ¡aninak e c'o che u tixic quic'! 
Proverbs1:17 Pune' c'u man c'o ta c'u ne cupatanij jun c'amibal cätanixic we quecuin ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' che rilic," 
Proverbs1:18 we winak ri' e are' quekajben ri c'amibal ri xquitanij, cäquiya' c'u ri qui c'aslemal pa cämical." 
Proverbs1:19 Are wa' ri cäquitaklebej na ri sibalaj quequiäk rayinic: ri quiäk rayinic ri c'o cuc' are' quecämisanic. 
Proverbs1:20 Ri no'j cubano chi cätataj ri u ch'abal xo'l tak ri ja; xukuje' pa tak ri be. 
Proverbs1:21 Quebuya' qui bixic tak ri u tzij chi' tak ri cachoch ri winak, pa tak ri c'olbal ri sibalaj cäquimulij wi quib ri winak pa ri tinimit:" 
Proverbs1:22 “C'ojolab ri man c'o ta iwetamanic, ri quiwetz'bej u wäch ronojel, ri man c'o ta i no'j, ¿c'ä jampa' lo quitanaba' u lok'ok'exic ri conil ri c'o iwuc', quirik c'u na quicotemal pa ri etz'ben wächaj, quiwetzelaj c'u u wäch ri etamanic?" 
Proverbs1:23 Chebitatabej ri e nu pixbenic quixinnojisaj c'u na ruc' no'jinic; quebenya' c'u na quetamaxic tak ri e nu chomanic chiwe. 
Proverbs1:24 Ix nu siq'uim, ix wulam rech quixpetic, are c'u ri ix man i yo'm ta i xiquin chwe." 
Proverbs1:25 Xane' e i xutum tak ri e nu yo'w no'j; man ch'awinak ta i c'u'x che u c'amic ri nu pixbenic. 
Proverbs1:26 ¡Quintze'j c'u na i wäch aretak ix c'o chi chupam ri quiäkasakil! ¡Quinwetz'bej c'u na i wäch aretak ix cäminak chic che xe'n ib," 
Proverbs1:27 aretak quepe tak ri xe'n ib xukuje' tak ri c'ax piwi', q'uistajibal c'uxaj xukuje' elemch'u'j, jacha' jun salc'um ri ronojel cusach u wäch!" 
Proverbs1:28 Pa ri k'ij ri' caquitz'onoj na tok'ob, man c'u quintzelej ta u wäch ri qui tzij; quinitzucuj na, man c'u quinirik ta chic;" 
Proverbs1:29 quiwetzelaj c'u u wäch ri no'j, man quiwaj ta c'ut quiya' ta u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs1:30 Man quebirayij taj qui c'amic ri e nu yo'w tak no'j; quiwetzelaj qui wäch ri e nu pixbenic. 
Proverbs1:31 ¡Quixukajbej c'u na ri e ratz'amil ri e i c'aslemal! ¡Cäq'uistaj na i c'u'x chque ri itzel tak i chomanic! 
Proverbs1:32 Ri man c'o ta quetamabal, quebe pa ri cämical, e are' tak c'ut ri man c'o ta qui no'j cäsachisax na qui wäch rumal ri man qui oquem ta il;" 
Proverbs1:33 are' c'ut ri cutatabej ri quinbij che, cäjeki' na pa jamaril, man cuxe'j ta rib chi c'o ta jun u q'ueyowal cutaklebej.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Nu c'ojol, chabana' awech chque tak ri e nu tzij; chebac'olo' tak ri nu takomal pa ri a chomabal." 
Proverbs2:2 Chaya' a xiquin che u tatabexic ri no'j; chajacha' ri a chomabal che ri etamanic. 
Proverbs2:3 Chatz'onoj ri etamanic cuc' conojel ri e a chuk'ab xukuje' ri utzalaj chomanic; 
Proverbs2:4 kas chajacha' awib che qui tzucuxic, je ta ne ri cätajin catzucuj sak puak o jun k'inomal ri c'utalic." 
Proverbs2:5 C'äte ri' cawetamaj c'u na ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ¡cach'ob na ri retamaxic u wäch ri Dios! 
Proverbs2:6 Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel cäyo'w ri no'j; ri ch'obonic ri etamanic chuchi' quebel wi ulok. 
Proverbs2:7 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri u to'banic xukuje' querilij ri cuc'am jun suc'alaj c'aslemal, ri man c'o ta wi bach'uyal." 
Proverbs2:8 Quebuchajij ri quebin pa suq'uilal, cuya' c'u to'banic chque ri jic quebin chuwäch." 
Proverbs2:9 Xukuje' cawetamaj na jachique ri colom, xukuje' ri suc', cach'ob c'u na ronojel ri utz," 
Proverbs2:10 ri a chomanic curik na no'j cana' c'u na ri u qui'al ri etamanic. 
Proverbs2:11 Ri utzalaj chomanic xukuje' ri etamanic e are' wa' ri e chajil awech amak'el; 
Proverbs2:12 ri e are' catquik'ilo rech man catbe ta chquipam ri lawalolaj tak qui be ri itzel tak achijab," 
Proverbs2:13 ri quiyo'm can ri utzalaj be quebe c'u pa k'ekumalaj tak be ri latz'. 
Proverbs2:14 Quequiquicot che u banic ri etzelal, quequinimak'ijisaj c'ut ri itzel tak qui banoj." 
Proverbs2:15 Quebin c'u pa jech'alaj tak be quijaluch'um c'u quib chrij ri suc'alaj be. 
Proverbs2:16 Catresaj c'u na xukuje' pa u k'ab ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe ri jalan catzijonic ri que ch'äcanic," 
Proverbs2:17 ri cutzak can ri rachajil re ri ralc'alal xsach c'u pa u jolom ri xuchi'j chuwäch ri Dios chi cuban na. 
Proverbs2:18 Ri u takexic ri be ri cäbe cho rachoch we ixok ri', are wa' ri u c'amic bic ri be ri cäc'aman bic pa ri cämical;" 
Proverbs2:19 ri queboc pa ri rachoch man quetzelej ta chic, mawi jubik' quebin chic pa ri be re ri c'aslemal." 
Proverbs2:20 Chatbin ba' pa ri utzalaj be, are chabana' awe jas ri cäquiban ri suc'alaj tak winak." 
Proverbs2:21 E are' c'ut ri e colom ri qui c'aslemal ri man c'o ta qui bach'uyal quejeki' na amak'el cho ri ulew; 
Proverbs2:22 e are' c'u ri e itzel tak winak ri man e jic taj quebok na bic, naj c'u quebeq'uiak wi na che ri uwächulew." 
Proverbs3:1 Mebasach ri e nu tijonic, nu c'ojol; chebac'olo' ri e nu takomal pa ri a chomabal," 
Proverbs3:2 naj c'u catc'asi' na nojinak che utzil. 
Proverbs3:3 Mawi jubik' matzak can ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, xukuje ri kastzij; chebac'ama' bic awuc' jacha' cäban che jun chachal. Chebatz'ibaj pa ri a chomabal," 
Proverbs3:4 cärik c'u na ri tok'ob xukuje' ri nimarisabal a k'ij rumal ri Dios xukuje' cumal ri winak. 
Proverbs3:5 Ruc' ronojel awanima' chacu'ba' a c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel man chrij ta c'ut ri awetamanic pa awech wi. 
Proverbs3:6 Chaya' u k'ij ri u c'olem ri Ajawaxel pa ronojel ri cabano, chnataj ri Ajawaxel chawe, are' c'u catc'amow na bic pa ri suc'alaj be." 
Proverbs3:7 Maban awib chi sibalaj ta c'o a no'j; chaya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel chatasa' awib mat be chupam ri lawalolaj be: 
Proverbs3:8 ¡are' c'u utzalaj cunabal wa' che u ya'ic u chuk'ab ri a cuerp! 
Proverbs3:9 Chebacojo' ri a k'inomal che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri nabe tak qui wächinic ri awulew; 
Proverbs3:10 we je caban wa' quepulin na c'ä quepak'apop na ri e a c'uja xukuje' ri quebac'ol wi ri e u wa'l a uva. 
Proverbs3:11 Nu c'ojol, mawetzelaj u wäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel, mawi mäpe awoyowal aretak catuyajo;" 
Proverbs3:12 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel cupixbej jachin ri culok'ok'ej, jacha' ri cuban ri tataxel cupixbej ri u c'ojol ri benak ranima' ruc'." 
Proverbs3:13 Sibalaj utz re ri winak ri curik ri no'j, ri curik ri etamanic;" 
Proverbs3:14 are c'u c'o na quechbex chque chuwäch ri sak puak, xukuje' nim ri quechbex na chque chuwäch ri k'an puak." 
Proverbs3:15 Ri no'j c'o na rajil chquiwäch tak ri perl; ¡mawi ne ri jastak ri sibalaj querayixic cajunamataj ta ruc'! 
Proverbs3:16 Ruc' ri iquiak'ab cuchi'j ri nimalaj c'aslemal ri cäbeytajic, ruc' c'u ri mox k'ab cuchi'j k'inomal xukuje' yabal k'ij." 
Proverbs3:17 Ri qui takexic ri e u xo'l tak rakan sibalaj man e c'o ta c'o wi; ri binem pa alaj tak u be c'olem wa' pa jamaril. 
Proverbs3:18 Ri no'j c'aslemal wa' che ri cärikowic; ¡sibalaj utz quech ri queta'm u canajisaxic cuc'! 
Proverbs3:19 Ruc' no'j xukuje' etamanic, ri Ajawaxel co xutiq'uiba' ri caj xukuje' ri uwächulew;" 
Proverbs3:20 ruc' no'j xubano chi xuban quieb ri plo xukuje' chque tak ri sutz' quetz'utuw wi ulok ri räxk'ab. 
Proverbs3:21 Chäc'olo' amak'el ri utzalaj chomanic, nu c'ojol, mel ri colomal chawäch," 
Proverbs3:22 quebux na u q'uiyibal c'aslemal chawe catquiwik c'u na jacha' jun chachal. 
Proverbs3:23 Cuya' catbin ruc' jiquibam c'uxaj pa ri be mawi c'u jumul cachak'ij ta na awib. 
Proverbs3:24 Aretak catuxlanic man c'o ta jas caxe'j ta wi awib; aretak catk'oyic catwar na pa utzil. 
Proverbs3:25 Maxe'j awib chque ri jastak ri xak c'ätetal quec'ulmatajic, mawi che ri u q'ueyowal ri cäpe paquiwi' ri banal tak etzelal," 
Proverbs3:26 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' na jiquibam c'uxaj chawe, man cuya' ta c'u na c'olbal chi catkaj ta na pa jun apachique c'amibal." 
Proverbs3:27 Mawi jumul mak'il awib che u banic jun tok'ob che jachin ri c'o cutz'onoj chawe, aretak c'o pa a k'ab ri u banic che." 
Proverbs3:28 Maya' can che re chwek ri to'banic ri catcuin che u banic camic. 
Proverbs3:29 Machomaj u banic c'ax che ri winak ri u jiquibam u c'u'x chawij. 
Proverbs3:30 C'o matzucuj wi u banic ch'o'j, we man c'o jachin u banom c'ax chawe." 
Proverbs3:31 Matititej ri abaj ranima' mawi matijtobej u banic awe ri cubano; 
Proverbs3:32 ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj c'u qui wäch ri e banal tak etzelal, cäpe c'u che jekelem cuc' ri e suc'." 
Proverbs3:33 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'okoj ri rachoch ri itzel winak, cutewichi'j c'ut ri u jekelibal ri winak ri cuban suq'uilal." 
Proverbs3:34 Ri Ajawaxel cutze'j qui wäch ri quetze'n wächaj cuban c'u utzil chque ri e mach'amoj. 
Proverbs3:35 Ri nimarisabal k'ij are ri caquich'äc ri ajno'jab, ri man c'o ta qui no'j are caquich'äc ri qui q'uixbal." 
Proverbs4:1 Walc'ual, chixoc il che u tatabexic ri pixbenic ri cuya' ri i tat chiwe; kas chitatabej ri cubij chiwe, rech quirik utzalaj chomanic." 
Proverbs4:2 Nu yo'm jun utzalaj tijonic chiwe, jeri' chi ma ta mixoc il chque tak ri e nu tijonic." 
Proverbs4:3 In xukuje' in uxinak alc'ualaxel: sibalaj nim ri nu lok'al chuwäch ri nu nan," 
Proverbs4:4 ri nu tat je nu pixbexic wa' xubano: “Chebatz'ibaj pa ri a chomabal ri e nu tzij; chanimaj ri takanic ri quinya' chawe, catc'asi' c'u na." 
Proverbs4:5 Charika' ri no'j xukuje' utzalaj chomanic; mebasach ri nu tzij. 
Proverbs4:6 Lok' chawila' wi ri no'j maya' apan jela' cuya' c'u na ri u to'banic chawe. 
Proverbs4:7 Chuwäch apachique jun jasach chic charika' ri no'j xukuje' utzalaj chomanic. 
Proverbs4:8 Chalok'ok'ej cunimarisaj c'u na a k'ij: chalak'apuj, nim c'u catril wi na;" 
Proverbs4:9 ¡cusipaj na jun je'lalaj wikbal a jolom are' c'u a corona wa' cucoj chajolom!” 
Proverbs4:10 Chebatatabej tak ri e nu tzij, nu c'ojol, chabana' awech chque, catcasi' c'u na q'ui junab." 
Proverbs4:11 Ri in catinc'am na bic pa ri be re ri no'j: quinban na chawe chi catbin pa ri utzalaj be," 
Proverbs4:12 chupam ri utzalaj be man e c'o ta k'atibal cärik na, pune' ta ne catxiq'uinic man cachak'ij ta na awib." 
Proverbs4:13 Co chachapa' awib che ri tijonic matzokopij c'ut; chabana' jas ri cubij, c'aslemal c'u wa' chawe." 
Proverbs4:14 Matbe pa ri qui be ri e banal tak etzelal. Matakej u banic awe ri itzel qui c'aslemal. 
Proverbs4:15 Chak'ila' awib che ri awoc'owic pa ri qui be; chatasa' awib chquij, chatakej at ri a be," 
Proverbs4:16 man c'u quec'oji' ta pa jamaril we man caquiban ri lawaloyil; caquitzak ri qui waram we man caquibano chi c'o jachin cäkaj pa qui k'ab. 
Proverbs4:17 ¡Ri qui wa xukuje' ri cuq'uia' are ri u banic ri etzelal xukuje' ri tokinic! 
Proverbs4:18 Ri qui be ri suc'alaj tak winak junam ruc' ri u sakaribal jun c'ac' k'ij: ri cäbe u q'uiyic c'ä cäjuluw na pa ronojel ri u juluwem. 
Proverbs4:19 Are' c'u ri qui be ri banal tak etzelal xa k'ekumalil; ¡Mawi ne queta'm jas ruc' cäquipak'ij wi quib! 
Proverbs4:20 Chatoc il chque ri nu tzij, nu c'ojol; chebaya' a xiquin che qui tatabexic." 
Proverbs4:21 Mawi jubik' mebel chawäch, ¡chebatz'ibaj pa ri a chomabal!" 
Proverbs4:22 E are' queyo'w c'aslemal xukuje' rutzil wächaj che ronojel ri cärikowic. 
Proverbs4:23 Chachajij ri a chomabal chuwäch apachique jasach ri c'o cho ri uwächulew, che c'ut caq'uiy wi ri c'aslemal." 
Proverbs4:24 Chak'ila' awib che qui bixic jastak ri xa quesubunic; chanajtajisaj awib che u banic banoj tzij. 
Proverbs4:25 Amak'el chawäch chatca'y wi apanok, chatca'y amak'el chawäch." 
Proverbs4:26 Kas chawila' na jawije' quebe a ya' wi ri awakan, amak'el c'ut catac'alej na cowilaj ulew." 
Proverbs4:27 Majuluch'ij ri a be; chak'ila' awib che qui ya'ic ri itzel tak u xo'l awakan. 
Proverbs5:1 Chatoc il che ri nu no'j, nu c'ojol; chatatabej ri nu c'oxomanic." 
Proverbs5:2 Jeri' cawetamaj na catch'obonic, catcuin c'u na cattzijon ruc' etamanic." 
Proverbs5:3 Ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe sibalaj qui' ri cätzijonic, ri u ch'abal sibalaj cäbelel na chuwäch ri aseit;" 
Proverbs5:4 c'o c'u na ri u c'ayil ri u q'uisbalil chuwäch ri sibalaj c'a na, casocon c'u na chuwäch jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri quieb u pa u chi'." 
Proverbs5:5 Ri binem ruc' we ixok ri' cac'aman bic pa ri cämical; ri u xo'l tak rakan cäc'aman bic pa ri mukbal. 
Proverbs5:6 Che we ixok ri' man c'o ta cupatanij ri be re c'aslemal, man coc ta il che u ch'obic chi man utz taj ri be ri u takem." 
Proverbs5:7 Rumal ri' nu c'ojol chatoc il che ri quinbij chawe, matas awib chquij ri e nu tijonic." 
Proverbs5:8 Chanajtajisaj awib che ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe mawi ne matkeb chuchi' ri rachoch," 
Proverbs5:9 rech man caya' ta ri a k'inomal chque chic jule', mawi a ch'äcoj chque ri man aweta'm ta qui wäch;" 
Proverbs5:10 rech man quenoj taj ri winak ri man aweta'm ta qui wäch ruc' ri u wächinic ri a chuk'ab xukuje' ri a chac. 
Proverbs5:11 We c'u man canimaj ri quinbij chawe, catij na ok'ej chuq'uisbalil, nojimal c'ut cäbe u tzajic ri a cuerp." 
Proverbs5:12 Cabij c'u na: “¡Jas ri xinc'ulmaj chi xinwetzelaj u wäch ri pixbenic! ¡Jas ri xinc'ulmaj chi man nim ta xebenwil wi ri k'iloj tak ib! 
Proverbs5:13 Man xinwaj taj xebentatabej ri wajtijab, man xinoc ta il che qui tatabexic ri xeyo'w tak tijonic chwe," 
Proverbs5:14 xa c'u jubik' xraj man xinkaj pa ri quiäkasakil chquiwäch conojel ri winak.” 
Proverbs5:15 Chawesaj ri a chaki'j chi' ruc' ri ja' ri cäq'uiy chupam ri a c'ua'. 
Proverbs5:16 Matix ri ja' ri c'o chupam ri q'uiyibal a ja'; xak matixo, cajamij c'u can pa be." 
Proverbs5:17 C'ua' xukuje' ja' e awech, man c'o ta chi jun ajchak'e; ¡maya' quech ri winak ri man aweta'm ta qui wäch!" 
Proverbs5:18 ¡Tewichital ri caq'uiy wi ri a ja'! ¡chatquicot ruc' ri a c'ulaj pa ri awac'alal," 
Proverbs5:19 bitibic, masat calok'ok'enic! ¡Ri mawi jumul ma ta catraj! ¡Ri amak'el catupis pa ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x!" 
Proverbs5:20 ¿Jasche caputzcuyij awib ruc' ri ixok ri man awech taj?, nu c'ojol, ¿jasche caq'uiak awib pa u k'ab ri man aweta'm taj jachinok?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ri Ajawaxel il u wäch che ri cuban ri winak; man c'o ta jun u xo'l rakan cuyao ri ma ta cärilo. 
Proverbs5:22 Ri banal etzelal cäkajbex na rumal ri etzelal ri cubano, ri kas u mac are' cäximow na jacha' jun colob." 
Proverbs5:23 Cäbe na pa ri cämical rumal rech chi man cuc'am ta ri pixbenic; rumal chi man c'o ta u no'j cac'am na bic pa ri sachbal wächaj. 
Proverbs6:1 Nu c'ojol, we catch'aw puwi' ri awachil awib ruc', o cattaq'ui' puwi' jun ri man aweta'm taj jachinok," 
Proverbs6:2 xak a tuquiel ri' cacoj ri c'amibal pa ri a be: catximitaj c'u can cumal ri kas e a tzij. 
Proverbs6:3 Rech catquiritajic, nu c'ojol, at c'o chi c'u ne pa u k'ab jun chic, chabana' ri quinbij chawe: chamach'a' awib chacojo a chuk'ab che u tok'ixic ri awachil awib ruc'," 
Proverbs6:4 chawesaj ri a waram, maya' jubik' uxlanem chawe;" 
Proverbs6:5 chatanimajok, jacha' jun masat ri canimaj chuwäch ri q'uiakanel; chatanimajok, jacha' jun chicop ri c'o u xic' ri canimaj chuwäch ri c'amibal." 
Proverbs6:6 Sak'or, jät, jaca'yej ri sanic; chawila' ri cubano, chawetamaj c'ut ri tijonic:" 
Proverbs6:7 pune' man c'o cätakowic mawi c'o jachin cäbin che ri rajawaxic u banic rumal," 
Proverbs6:8 pa ri k'alaj cutanij can ri cutijo, cuchap u c'olic aretak cätajin cäyac ri u wächinic ri ulew." 
Proverbs6:9 ¡Chak'ila' ri a waram sak'or! ¡Chak'ila' ri a k'oyolem! 
Proverbs6:10 Aretak cätajin catachiq'uic, catyuxc'at che waram, quebak'aluj c'ut ri quieb a k'ab rech cuya' caban jun utzalaj waram," 
Proverbs6:11 cäpe c'u na ri mebayil catuch'äc na jacha' jun wacatel ri e ruc'am ri u ch'ojibal. 
Proverbs6:12 Ri cuban etzelal xukuje' itzel winak xuwi banoj tak tzij cutzijoj amak'el. 
Proverbs6:13 Quebuyupuchij ri e u bak'wäch, quebuban etal cuc' ri rakan, quebuban etal cuc' ri u wi' tak u k'ab;" 
Proverbs6:14 ri u chomanic nojinak che etzelal, amak'el are cuchomaj u banic ri lawaloyil, xukuje' cätzurun che qui banic tak ch'o'j." 
Proverbs6:15 Rumal ri' man c'o ta cunabej aretak cäpe ri c'axc'olil puwi'; pa jun u jakic xukuje' pa jun u tz'apixic bak'wächaj cäkaj chuxe' ri c'axc'ol man c'o ta u to'tajic. 
Proverbs6:16 E c'o wakib jastak, c'ä e wukub c'u ne ri quetzelax qui wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel:" 
Proverbs6:17 ri bak'wächaj ri quequiban nimal, ri ak'aj ri banal tzij, ri k'abaj ri quebucämisaj winak ri man c'o ta qui mac," 
Proverbs6:18 ri chomanic ri quebuchomaj qui banic itzelalaj tak jastak, ri akanaj ri quexiq'uin ruc' rayinic che u banic ri etzelal," 
Proverbs6:19 ri subunelalaj k'alajisanel xukuje' banal tzij, xukuje' ri cuyac ch'o'j chquixo'l achalaxic." 
Proverbs6:20 Nu c'ojol, chebac'olo' amak'el pa jolom ri qui takomal xukuje' tak ri qui tijonic ri a tat a nan." 
Proverbs6:21 Chebac'ama' bic amak'el cho a c'u'x, chebaxequeba' chakul;" 
Proverbs6:22 cäquic'am na a be aretak at benak pa binem, catquichajij na aretak cätajin catwaric, quetzijon na awuc' aretak catc'astajic." 
Proverbs6:23 Kastzij, ri takomal tak xukuje' tak ri tijonic e jun chäj ri e tzijtalic; ri pixbenic xukuje' ri yo'w tak no'j e are' be wa' re ri c'aslemal." 
Proverbs6:24 Catquichajij na rech man catuch'äc ta ri itzel ixok, rech man catquich'äc ta ri je'licalaj tak u tzij ri ixok ri man awech taj." 
Proverbs6:25 Maya' c'olbal chi ri u je'lical cunicowisaj bic ri a c'u'x che; ¡maya' awib chi catch'äctaj cumal tak ri e u ca'yebal! 
Proverbs6:26 Ri ixok re nim ch'utin cäbe chrij juba' caxlanwa, are' c'u ri ixok ri cäkaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic are cuya' u wäch che ri achi ri c'o cäc'am che." 
Proverbs6:27 Ri cuya' k'ak' cho u c'u'x, cäc'at na ri ratz'iak." 
Proverbs6:28 Ri cäbin paquiwi' rachak k'ak', quec'at ri rakan." 
Proverbs6:29 Ri cuputzcuyij rib ruc' ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux che, man c'o ta u to'tajic." 
Proverbs6:30 Man c'o ta jun winak ri ma ta c'o jas cubij che jun eläk'om ri queläk' rumal u numic; 
Proverbs6:31 we c'u ne cäriktajic aretak cätajin cuban ri eläk', wukub mul cutoj na u q'uexel ri eläk'am, cuya' c'u ne na ronojel ri c'o ruc'." 
Proverbs6:32 ¡Sibalaj con ri achi ri cäbin ruc' jun ixok ri man c'o ta cux che! ¡Ri je cuban wa' xa u tuquiel cäretzelaj rib! 
Proverbs6:33 Cak'osix na xukuje' quepe tak il patan puwi', man c'o ta jun jasach casuw ta na ri q'uixbal ri resam." 
Proverbs6:34 Rumal rech chi ri achi ri achixomanel xak junam ruc' jun k'ak', man cäcuyun ta pa ri jok'otaj re ri yo'w q'uexel;" 
Proverbs6:35 man cuc'amowaj ta apachique esbal oyowal, mawi coc'ow ri royowal pune' ta queya' q'ui sipanic che." 
Proverbs7:1 Nu c'ojol, chebanimaj ri nu tzij; chebac'olo' ri e nu takomal chupam ri a chomabal." 
Proverbs7:2 Chebanimaj ri e nu takomal xukuje' tak ri e nu tijonic; chebachajij jacha' ri qui chajixic ri qui c'u'x ri a bak'wäch, catc'asi' c'u na." 
Proverbs7:3 Chebaxima' chque ri u wi' tak a k'ab, chebatz'ibaj pa ri a chomabal." 
Proverbs7:4 Chabana' awana'b che ri no'j chawachilaj awib ruc' ri c'oxomanic. 
Proverbs7:5 E are' c'u catesan na pa u k'ab ri ixok ri cäkaj pa mac ruc' achi, ri quebubij jalan tak tzij ch'äcanel." 
Proverbs7:6 C'o jun k'ij cätajin quinca'y apan xo'l tak ri u julujakil ri nu wenta'n 
Proverbs7:7 jujun c'ojolab ri man c'o ta quesan wi qui no'j, xbe c'u nu wäch che u ca'yexic ri nimalaj con na ri c'o chquixo'l." 
Proverbs7:8 Aretak xopan pa ri xquina xuxalk'atij ri be ri cäbe che u suq'uil ri rachoch we ixok ri'. 
Proverbs7:9 Kajem cuban ri k'ij, oquem c'u cuban ri ak'ab." 
Proverbs7:10 Chanim c'ut xel ulok ri ixok che u c'ulaxic, u wikikem rib jas ri u nak'atisabal jun ixok ri re nim ch'utin," 
Proverbs7:11 jun ixok xq'uiakat ri man k'ilic ta craj ri man cäcuin taj cäjeki' cho rachoch 
Proverbs7:12 Ri xak cäwacatic pa tak be, cho tak c'ayibal, pa tak xquina reyem jachin ri nabe coc'owic rech cäkaj pa u k'ab." 
Proverbs7:13 Ri ixok xulak'apuj xutz'umaj ri c'ojol, man c'o ta c'u jubik' u q'uixbal chupalaj xubij che:" 
Proverbs7:14 “In nu chi'm ulok tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib camic c'ut xintz'akatisaj ri xinchi'j u ya'ic. 
Proverbs7:15 Rumal ri' xinel ulok che a c'ulaxic; ¡nu rayim rilic a wäch at nu rikom c'ut! 
Proverbs7:16 Nu lic'om jun je'lalaj c'ul re lino puwi' ri nu ch'at ri lok'om pa Ejipt," 
Proverbs7:17 nu c'oc'arisam ruc' ruxlab mir, ruxlab k'ol aloe xukuje' cane'l." 
Proverbs7:18 Tasaj ka jamij ri ka lok'al ri c'o c'a chuxe' ri kumubal; ka quicotej ri u lok'ok'exic kib c'ä cäsakar na," 
Proverbs7:19 ri wachajil man c'o ta cho ja; benak che jun najalaj binem; 
Proverbs7:20 xuc'am bic jut'oyaj puak c'äte c'u cätzelej ulok aretak nojinak chic ri ic'.” 
Proverbs7:21 Ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak u tzij xukuje' ri cojow chuk'ab ri xubano, xcuin c'u che u ch'äquic ri ala," 
Proverbs7:22 man c'o ta chi xutobej ta rib xteri' bic chrij ri ixok: jacha' jun wacax ri pilic rij ri c'amom bic pa ri cämical, jacha' jun masat ri cäkaj pa ri pilibal;" 
Proverbs7:23 ri capak'ijtax ri ranima' rumal jun ch'ab jacha' jun chicop ri c'o u xic' ri cuq'uiak rib pa ri c'at, man cuch'ob ta c'ut chi ri cubano cutoj na ruc' ri u c'aslemal." 
Proverbs7:24 Je ba' ri', nu c'ojol, chinatatabej; chatoc il che qui tatabexic ri nu tzij." 
Proverbs7:25 Mabajech'obisaj ri a chomabal che u ternexic we ixok ri'; masachisaj awib rumal ri u ternexic," 
Proverbs7:26 sibalaj c'u e q'ui ri e u socom che cämical; ¡e q'ui ri e kajinak pa u k'ab! 
Proverbs7:27 Ri u takexic ri be ri cäbe cho rachoch are' wa' ri u takexic ri u be ri cämical. 
Proverbs8:1 Ri no'j cujak ri u kul co cäch'awic; ri etamanic cubano chi cätataj ri u ch'abal. 
Proverbs8:2 Cutac'aba' rib chicaj tza'm tak ri juyub, cubey rib jawije' cäquijach wi quib tak ri be," 
Proverbs8:3 cubano chi cätatabex chquichi' tak ri oquibal, ri caban wi oquem chupam ri tinimit." 
Proverbs8:4 “Chiwe ix winak cäbe wi tak we nu tzij ri'. 
Proverbs8:5 Alabom ri man c'o ta jas iweta'm ri man c'o ta i no'j, chitijoj iwib rech cux utz i chomabal xukuje' cäc'oji' i ch'obonic." 
Proverbs8:6 Chixoc il quebenbij c'u na jastak chiwe ri man e c'o ta c'o wi ri man c'o ta qui c'ulelaxic. 
Proverbs8:7 Ri quenya' u bixic are' ri kastzij; man cäkaj ta chnuwäch quinbij ta banoj tzij. 
Proverbs8:8 Conojel ri nu tzij e suc'; man e c'o ta jubik' subunic chquipam. 
Proverbs8:9 Che ri cac'oxomanic xukuje' cäch'obonic, ri e nu tzij e k'alaj man quexutux taj." 
Proverbs8:10 Che u q'uexwäch sak puak xukuje' coc'alaj k'an puak, are' chatzucuj tijonic xukuje' ri etamanic.”" 
Proverbs8:11 Are' c'u utz na ri no'j chquiwäch tak ri abaj ri pakal cajil; ¡mawi cajunamataj ta ruc' ri sibalaj carayixic! 
Proverbs8:12 “In, ri no'j, in jekel ruc' ri c'oxomanic, weta'm c'u qui rikic ri e yo'w tak no'j ri sibalaj e utz na." 
Proverbs8:13 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel are' ri retzelaxic u wäch ri lawaloyil. In quinwetzelaj u wäch ri banoj nimal xukuje' ri nimarisan ib, ri itzel be xukuje' ri banoj tzij." 
Proverbs8:14 Wuc' in e c'o wi ri chomanic xukuje' ri u tz'akatisaxic in ri utzalaj chomanic xukuje' ri chuk'ab. 
Proverbs8:15 Wumal in, quebajawin tak ri ajawinelab quequik'at c'u tzij tak ri k'atal tak tzij." 
Proverbs8:16 Wumal in, quebajawin wi ri e c'amal tak u be ri tinimit quequik'at c'u tzij tak ri k'atal tak tzij." 
Proverbs8:17 In quebenlok'ok'ej ri quinquilok'ok'ej, xukuje' ri quetzucun chwe quinquiriko." 
Proverbs8:18 In quebenya' k'inomal xukuje' nimarisan k'ij, nimak tak ekle'n xukuje' pok'colijic." 
Proverbs8:19 Ri quinya' in are' utz na chuwäch coc'alaj k'an puak; ri quinchi'j in are' utz na chuwäch ri sak puak ri sibalaj ch'ajch'oj na. 
Proverbs8:20 In in benak pa ri suc'alaj be, pa ri alaj latz' be re suq'uilal." 
Proverbs8:21 Ri quinquilok'ok'ej quinya' na ri quechbal: quinnojisaj ri cachoch che k'inomal. 
Proverbs8:22 Ri Ajawaxel xinuwinakirisaj pa ri u tiquiritajic ri u chac, c'ä majok ri uwächulew." 
Proverbs8:23 Xinunuc' pa ri u chaplebal ri k'ijol, c'ä majok ri ulew." 
Proverbs8:24 Xinuq'uiyisaj c'ä majok chec'ol ri nimak tak plo, c'ä majok chepok' ulok tak ri nima' xukuje' ri qui bulbux." 
Proverbs8:25 C'ä majok chetiqui taj ri juyub xukuje' tak ri alaj tak juyub, in u q'uiyisan chic ri Ajawaxel;" 
Proverbs8:26 c'ä majok c'u ne chuban ri ulew xukuje' tak ri e u juyubal, mawi ne ri puc'uc' ulew ri banbem ri uwächulew." 
Proverbs8:27 Aretak xujekeba' ri niq'uiajsak paquiwi' ri u ja'il ri nimalaj plo chila' in c'o wi in. 
Proverbs8:28 Aretak xebuliq'uiba' tak ri sutz' pa ri caj, xebucoj c'u k'atibal che qui k'atixic tak ri u chi' ri cholaj plo," 
Proverbs8:29 aretak xuya' tak takanic chque ri e u ja'il tak ri plo chi mäquixalk'atij ri qui c'ulbatil, aretak xucoj ri u tac'alibal ri ulew," 
Proverbs8:30 chila' in c'o wi in, sibalaj jic pa u xcut. In u quicotisabal k'ij chi k'ij, quinetz'en c'u chuwäch conojel k'ijol;" 
Proverbs8:31 quinetz'en c'u chuwäch ri uwächulew, ¡sibalaj quinjajat cumal ri winak!" 
Proverbs8:32 Are' c'u ri camic, ix nu c'ojol, chinitatabej; chitakej u banic iwech ri quinbano sibalaj c'u utz na iwech." 
Proverbs8:33 Chixoc il che ri tijonic; miwetzelaj u wäch ri no'j. 
Proverbs8:34 Sibalaj utz re ri winak ri quinutatabej, cac'asc'at c'ut cächajin chquichi' ri wachoch." 
Proverbs8:35 Rumal rech chi ri nu rikic in are ri u rikic ri c'aslemal u ch'äcom c'ut ri utzalaj u rayibal ri Ajawaxel; 
Proverbs8:36 are c'u ri u tasic ib chwij, are ri u ya'ic ri c'aslemal pa sayowem; ¡retzelaxic nu wäch are ri u lok'ok'exic ri cämical!”" 
Proverbs9:1 Ri no'j cuyac ri rachoch, cuwik ruc' wukub rakan ja;" 
Proverbs9:2 xebupil awaj che u banic ri nimak'ij, xuban jun je'licalaj u wa'l uva, ri xucoj puwi' ri mexa." 
Proverbs9:3 Xebutak c'u bic ri u pataninelab ixokib che u rakic qui chi' puwi' ri u tanatail ri tinimit: 
Proverbs9:4 “¡Chixpetok waral, c'ojolab ri man c'o ta iwetamabal!” Xutak u bixic chque ri man c'o ta qui no'j:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Chixpetok che u tijic iwe ri nu wa, xukuje' che ruq'uiaxic iwe ri u wa'l nu uva ri nu k'obisam." 
Proverbs9:6 Chebiya' can tak ri e i conil, quixc'asi' c'u na; chixbinok jacha' ri winak ri quec'oxomanic.”" 
Proverbs9:7 We cäpixbej ri man cäraj ta ri no'j xukuje' ri banal etzelal, xuwi c'u cach'äc na chi catutzuru xukuje' cayok'on c'ut." 
Proverbs9:8 We cäpixbej ri man cäraj ta ri no'j, cach'äc c'u na ri royowarem; chapixbej ri c'o u no'j, cach'äc c'u na ri u ya'ic a k'ij rumal." 
Proverbs9:9 Chatyan che ri ajno'j cux c'u na sibalaj ajno'j; chatijoj ri utzalaj winak cac'uxan c'u na ri retamanic. 
Proverbs9:10 Ri no'j cachapletajic rumal ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ri retamaxic u wäch ri sibalaj tastalic are wa' ri c'o c'oxomanic. 
Proverbs9:11 Rumal ri no'j, q'ui' junab catc'asi' na, queq'uiyir na ri junab rech ri a c'aslemal." 
Proverbs9:12 We at ajno'j cawechbej na ri echbenic; we at banal nimal at catkajbenic. 
Proverbs9:13 Ri man c'o ta u no'j xak e junam ruc' jun ixok ri banal tzijtal, con xukuje' man c'o ta jas reta'm." 
Proverbs9:14 Cät'uyi puwi' jun tem, chuchi' tak ri rachoch, puwi' jun tanatic chupam ri tinimit," 
Proverbs9:15 quebusiq'uij c'ut ri queboc'owic ri e benak pa ri utzalaj be: 
Proverbs9:16 “¡Tisaj waral, c'ojolab ri c'ä maja' quiwesaj i no'j!” Cutak u bixic chque ri e conab:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Ri eläk'am ja' are sibalaj qui' na; ri wa ri cätijow chic'uyal c'o na ri u qui'al.” 
Proverbs9:18 Ri e are' man queta'm ta c'ut chi ri e ula'm wi e u mujal cämical chic, camic chupam ri rajawibal ri cämical." 
Proverbs10:1 Ri e u tzij tak ri Salomon: Ri c'ojolaxel ri c'o u no'j quebuquicotisaj ri u tat u nan; ri c'ojolaxel man c'o ta u no'j cuban chque chi caquirik c'ax. 
Proverbs10:2 Ri k'inomal tak ri xa quet'orixic man c'o ta quechbex na chque, are' c'u ri tz'akatinic pa ronojel cäto'tajisan chuwäch ri cämical." 
Proverbs10:3 Ri Ajawaxel man cuya' ta can ri utzalaj winak pa numic, man cuya' ta c'u che ri banal etzelal chi canojic ri u munil." 
Proverbs10:4 Jubik' chac, mebayil; q'ui chac, k'inomal." 
Proverbs10:5 U yaquic u wäch ri ulew pa sak'ij quech ajno'jab; ri u banic waram aretak cäyac u wäch ri ulew quech wa' ri man c'o ta qui q'uixbal. 
Proverbs10:6 Puwi' ri utzalaj winak quejäbin tewichibal, are' c'u ri banal etzelal cäjik'isaxic rumal u banic tokinic." 
Proverbs10:7 Ri utzalaj winak cänatax cuc' tak tewichibal; ri banal etzelal chanim cäsach u nataxic. 
Proverbs10:8 Ri c'o u no'j quebuc'amowaj takanic; ri quebubij chi man c'o ta no'j cäsach u wäch pa etzeletajic. 
Proverbs10:9 Ri man c'o ta jubik' subunic cubano, man c'o ta jas cuxe'j wi rib; ri quieb u wäch u be, etzelal cuq'uisa' wi na u wäch." 
Proverbs10:10 Ri cäyup wächinic quebuc'am ulok nimak tak etzelal ri xuwi quebubij chi man c'o ta no'j cäsach u wäch pa etzeletajic. 
Proverbs10:11 Ri e u tzij ri suc' e u q'uiyibal c'aslemal, are' c'u ri banal etzelal cäjik'isaxic rumal u banic tokinic." 
Proverbs10:12 Ri etzelen wächaj quebuyac ch'o'j, are c'u ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj quebucuy conojel tak ri macunic." 
Proverbs10:13 Chque ri u chi' ri ajno'j e c'o no'jinic; che ri man c'o ta u no'j jun k'ebut cho rachak. 
Proverbs10:14 Ri c'o qui no'j man cäquesaj ta u tzijol ri quetamanic, aretak c'ut quech'aw ri man c'o ta qui no'j, xak quieb cubij." 
Proverbs10:15 Ri to'bal rib ri k'inom are' ri u k'inomal; ri u quiäkasakil ri meba' are' ri u tzubukil. 
Proverbs10:16 Ri tojbal re ri suc' are' ri c'aslemal; ri wächinic ri cuyac ri banal etzelal are' ri macaj. 
Proverbs10:17 Ri cuya' u xiquin che u tatabexic ri pixbenic benak pa ri be re c'aslemal; ri man coc ta il che, benak pa ri be re sachbal wächaj." 
Proverbs10:18 Quech ri banal tak tzij ri man u k'alajisaxic taj ri oyowaric, xukuje' quech man c'o ta qui no'j ri qui jabuxic tzijtal." 
Proverbs10:19 Ri sibalaj cäk'ijij che tzij q'ui sachinakil quebubano; ri u jiq'uixtajic ri ak'aj quech ajno'jab. 
Proverbs10:20 Coc'alaj sak puak are' ri rak' ri suc'; ri u chomabal ri lawalo man c'o ta u patan. 
Proverbs10:21 Ri e u chi' ri suc' quebutijoj q'uialaj winak, are' c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j cäcämic rumal rech ri u conil." 
Proverbs10:22 Ri u tewichibal ri Ajawaxel k'inomal wa' man c'o ta c'u k'oxomal quebuc'am ulok pa re wi. 
Proverbs10:23 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cäquicot che quesaxic q'uixbal; ri ajno'j cäquicot ruc' ri no'j. 
Proverbs10:24 Ri sibalaj cuxe'j wi rib ri banal etzelal are' wa' cuc'ulmaj na, are' c'u ri suc' queya'taj ri jastak che ri queburayij." 
Proverbs10:25 Coc'ow ri quiakik' jäb cäsach c'u u wäch ri banal etzelal, are' c'u ri suc' cäjeki' amak'el." 
Proverbs10:26 Ri sak'or, che ri cätakow bic, jacha' ri ch'amalaj u wa'l uva che ri wareaj o ri sib chque ri bak'wächaj." 
Proverbs10:27 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cuyukupej ri c'aslemal, chque c'ut ri e banal tak etzelal quek'ip chque." 
Proverbs10:28 Chque ri suc', ri petinak chquiwäch quicotemal; chque ri banal tak etzelal, etzelatajic." 
Proverbs10:29 Ri Ajawaxel quebuch'uk ri cäquiban utzil, cusach c'u qui wäch ri cäquiban lawaloyil." 
Proverbs10:30 Ri suc' mawi jubik' cätzakmajic, are' c'u ri banal etzelal man cäjeki' ta canok chuwäch ri uwächulew." 
Proverbs10:31 Che u chi' ri suc' quel wi ulok no'j, are' c'u ri itzel winak caramix na ri rak'." 
Proverbs10:32 Ri suc' quebubij utzalaj tak jastak; ri banal etzelal xuwi e itzel tak jastak. 
Proverbs11:1 Ri Ajawaxel quebuc'ulelaj ri pajbal ri man e tz'akat taj, are c'u sibalaj quekaj ri pajbal chuwäch ri e tz'akat." 
Proverbs11:2 Ri nimarisan ib cuc'am ulok esbal q'uixbal; ri no'j cäc'oji' cuc' ri e mach'amoj. 
Proverbs11:3 Ri e colomalaj tak winak cäc'am qui be rumal ri qui colomal; ri winak ri xak e u cawäch cäsach na qui wäch rumal ri qui cawächil. 
Proverbs11:4 Man c'o ta cäquipatanij na ri k'inomal pa ri k'ij re ri k'atan tzij, are c'u ri suq'uilal cuto'tajisaj ri winak pa u k'ab ri cämical." 
Proverbs11:5 Ri suq'uilal cucolomaj ri u be ri suc', are' c'u ri banal etzelal cätzak rumal ri kas retzelal." 
Proverbs11:6 Ri suq'uilal quebutor ri winak ri e colom, are c'u ri quiäk rayinic quebuxim ri jachinelab ri quieb qui wäch." 
Proverbs11:7 Aretak cäcäm ri banal etzelal, quecäm ri eyebal tak u c'u'x ruc' xukuje' tak ri e u chomam qui banic." 
Proverbs11:8 Ri Dios cäresaj ri suc' pa ri rikoj c'ax, are c'u cuya' can ri banal etzelal pa ri u c'olbal." 
Proverbs11:9 Ri e u tzij ri banal etzelal cusachisaj qui wäch ri rajil u tz'akat, are c'u ri u c'oxomanic ri suc' queto'tajisanic." 
Proverbs11:10 Aretak ri e suc' quebel puwi' ri cäquibano ri tinimit cäjajatic; aretak quecäm ri banal tak etzelal, quech'oplin che quicotemal." 
Proverbs11:11 Rumal ri tewichi'nic ri suc' cayactaj jun nimalaj tinimit; rumal c'ut ri cak' ri e banal tak etzelal cayojitajic. 
Proverbs11:12 Ri man utz ta u chomabal cubij lawaloyil chrij ri rachil; ri utz u chomabal man c'o ta jas cubij. 
Proverbs11:13 Ri biltzijtal ronojel cutzijoj, ri cuk'il rib man cach'aw taj." 
Proverbs11:14 We man c'o utzalaj k'atan tzij cätzak na ri tinimit; ri u to'tajic cäriktaj cumal ri e q'ui ya'l tak no'j. 
Proverbs11:15 Man utz ta quelic aretak cäch'aw jun puwi' jun winak ri man reta'm ta u wäch; ri man cäch'aw ta puwi' jun chic man c'o ta latz' curiko. 
Proverbs11:16 Ri ixok ri sibalaj je'l ri u c'aslemal cäya' u k'ij, ri winak ri chajil anima' curik k'inomal." 
Proverbs11:17 Ri quel u c'u'x che jun chic cuban utzil chbil rib, are c'u ri man cätok'obisan ta wächaj cuc'am ulok etzelal puwi' chbil rib." 
Proverbs11:18 Ri banal etzelal cuc'am jun tojbal ri xa subunel; ri cuban suq'uil amak'el, jic ri tojbal rech cäya'ic." 
Proverbs11:19 Ri benam chrij ri suq'uilal cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal, are c'u ri benam chrij ri etzelal cäc'aman bic pa ri cämical." 
Proverbs11:20 Ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj qui wäch ri winak ri itzel quechomanic, e are c'ut ri cuc'am jun c'aslemal ri man c'o ta jas cak'abax chrij e are' wa' ri quekaj chuwäch." 
Proverbs11:21 Ri banal etzelal cukajbej wi ri c'äjisabal u wäch, e are tak c'ut ri e suc' man c'o ta cäquikajbej." 
Proverbs11:22 Mulk'ab re k'an puak chutza'm ak ri je'lalaj ixok ri man utz ta cächomanic. 
Proverbs11:23 Ri qui rayinic ri suc' amak'el utz quelic; ri caquirayij ri e banal tak etzelal are' ri c'ananem. 
Proverbs11:24 C'o winak ri man cäq'ueq'uen taj ri nim na ri cuc'am chuwäch ri cuyao, winak c'ut ri xu'y ri u q'uisic pa ri mebayil." 
Proverbs11:25 Ri yanel cäpax u wäch ri jastak rech; ri cäyanic, xukuje' cäc'amanic." 
Proverbs11:26 Ri cuc'ol ri trico cäc'okox cumal ri winak; ri cuya' pa c'ayixic, cätewichi'x cumal." 
Proverbs11:27 Ri amak'el cuban utzil, utz cailic; ri cutakej u banic ri etzelal itzel quel na." 
Proverbs11:28 Ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri u k'inomal, je cux na jacha' ri chaki'j u xak che' are' c'u ri e suc' queraxar na jacha' ri e u k'ab tak che'." 
Proverbs11:29 Ri man cärilij taj ri rachoch, man c'o ta jas ri cäcanaj ta ruc'; ri man c'o ta u no'j amak'el cux u lok'om pataninel ri c'o u no'j." 
Proverbs11:30 Ri suq'uilal cuya' c'aslemal, ri tokinic cäresaj." 
Proverbs11:31 We ri suc' cuc'am ri tojbal rech waral cho ri uwächulew, ¡e ta c'u na lo ri banal etzelal xukuje' ri ajmac!" 
Proverbs12:1 U lok'ok'exic ri c'äjisabal wächaj are u lok'ok'exic ri etamanic; ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri pixbenic xa man c'o ta retamanic. 
Proverbs12:2 Ri utzalaj winak, cäc'amar rumal ri Ajawaxel, are' c'u ri e itzel cächomanic cuc'okoj." 
Proverbs12:3 Ri etzelal man cowilaj tac'alibal taj che jachin jun; ri e suc' jekel ri qui rab. 
Proverbs12:4 Ri ixok ri caruc'aj utzalaj c'aslemal cuban ajawinel che ri rachajil, are' c'u ri itzelalaj ixok kas cusachisaj u wäch." 
Proverbs12:5 Ri winak ri e suc' cäquichomaj ri suq'uilal; ri e banal tak etzelal xuwi ri subunic. 
Proverbs12:6 Ri e u tzij ri banal etzelal e jun c'amibal re cämical; ri e u tzij ri suc', colonic." 
Proverbs12:7 Ri e banal tak etzelal quetzakic are c'u q'uisbal u sachic qui wäch wa', are c'u ri cachoch ri e suc' man quetzak taj." 
Proverbs12:8 Ri winak cäya' u k'ij jas ri u cholajil ri u c'oxomanic, are' c'u ri con xuwi takal ri etzelam wächaj che." 
Proverbs12:9 Are utz na rech ri man cäya' ta u k'ij capatanixic c'ut, chuwäch ri cäya' u k'ij man cätz'akat ta c'u u pam." 
Proverbs12:10 Ri suc' reta'm querilij ri rawaj, are c'u ri ranima' ri itzel winak man catok'basan ta wächaj." 
Proverbs12:11 Ri cuchacuj ri rulew tz'ebem ri cutijo; ri con quebuban jastak ri man c'o ta quechbex chque. 
Proverbs12:12 Ri e itzel tak rayinic are ri qui c'at ri e banal tak etzelal; ri qui rab ri suc' jekel amak'el. 
Proverbs12:13 Ri banal etzelal cuputzcuyij rib pa tak ri kas e u banoj tzij, are c'u ri suc'alaj winak utz quel pa ri latz' ri c'o wi." 
Proverbs12:14 Chquijujunal caquiyac na ri u wächinic ri caquibij xukuje' cuc'am ri tojbal rech ri cubano. 
Proverbs12:15 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cuchomaj chi utz ronojel ri cubano, are' c'u ri c'o u no'j cuc'amowaj ri yo'w no'j." 
Proverbs12:16 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc'utuxtaj ri royowal; ri utz cächomanic man coc ta il aretak cäyok'ic. 
Proverbs12:17 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel cuk'alajisaj ri kastzij; ri u cawäch k'alajisanel quebujiquiba' banoj tak tzij. 
Proverbs12:18 E c'o jachin tak quesocon cumal ri qui tzij, quech'aw c'u ri c'o qui no'j cäquiya' c'u utzil." 
Proverbs12:19 Ri kastzij ri cach'awic cäjeki' na amak'el, are' c'u ri banal tzij xa jubik' cäjekic." 
Proverbs12:20 Chupam ri qui chomanic ri banal tak etzelel c'o banoj tzij; pa tak ri u yo'w no'j ri winak aj jamaril c'o quicotemal. 
Proverbs12:21 Ri suc'alaj winak mawi jubik' cucoch' na jun lawaloyil, are' c'u ri banal etzelal quebuc'amowaj na conojel ri lawaloyil junam." 
Proverbs12:22 Ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj qui wäch ri banal tak tzij, are' c'u utz queril wi ri cäquibij ri kastzij." 
Proverbs12:23 Ri c'o u c'oxomanic man cäresaj ta u tzijol ri retamanic, are c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j cuya' u k'ij ri u taquil." 
Proverbs12:24 Ri cächacunic, cätakan na; ri sak'or cäc'oji' na chuxe' takanic." 
Proverbs12:25 Ri elen ch'u'j cuc'äxc'obisaj ri winak; ri tzij re lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj cuquicotisaj. 
Proverbs12:26 Ri suc' cux c'amal u be ri rajil u tz'akat, are' c'u ri e banal tak etzelal cäquisach ri be." 
Proverbs12:27 Ri sak'oralaj tzucunel man c'o ta jun awaj curiko; are' c'u ri cäsac'satic queburik na nimak tak k'inomal. 
Proverbs12:28 Ri be re ri suq'uilal cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal; ri re ri conil cäc'aman bic pa ri cämical. 
Proverbs13:1 Ri c'ojolaxel ri ajno'j cuc'amowaj ri u pixbenic ri u tat; ri banal nimal man cuya' ta u xiquin che ri k'ilonic. 
Proverbs13:2 Chquijujunal caquiyac na ri u wächinic ri caquibij, e are' tak c'ut ri jachinelab ri quieb qui wäch quenum che u banic ri tokinic." 
Proverbs13:3 Ri qui chajixic tak ri tzij are wa' ri u chajixic kib chi kib; ri sibalaj cätzijtzotic xa u tuquiel cäretzelaj rib. 
Proverbs13:4 Ri sak'or cärayinic man cärikon ta c'ut; ri cächacunic, queq'uiy ri jastak rech." 
Proverbs13:5 Ri suc'alaj winak itzel caril ri banoj tzij; ri banal etzelal ya'l q'uixbal xukuje' yok'obal. 
Proverbs13:6 Ri colomal cuto' ri winak ri man c'o ta u bach'uyal; ri jech'balil cusachisaj u wäch ri ajmac. 
Proverbs13:7 E c'o jachin tak ri man c'o ta cäc'am chque cäquiban c'u quib chi e k'inomab, e c'o c'u jachin tak c'o ronojel cuc' cäquiban c'u quib chi e mebayib." 
Proverbs13:8 Ri cäto'tajisan ri u c'aslemal ri k'inom are' ri u k'inomal; ri meba' mawi jumul quebuta' xibin tak ib. 
Proverbs13:9 Ri e suc' xak e junam ruc' ri chäj ri cänicowic; ri e banal tak etzelal, xak e junam ruc' ri chäj ri cachupic." 
Proverbs13:10 Ri banoj nimal xuwi cuc'am ulok ch'o'j; ri no'j c'o cuc' ri caquimach' quib. 
Proverbs13:11 Ri k'inomal ri xak c'ätetal xq'uiyic cäbe pa rij; are c'u ri xak nojimal camulixic, cuq'uiyirisaj." 
Proverbs13:12 Eyebal c'uxaj man je ta quelic, anima'aj c'axc'obinak, are c'u ri rayinic ri tz'akatinak xak junam ruc' juwi' che' re c'aslemal." 
Proverbs13:13 Ri man nim ta cäril wi jun takanic, cubisoj na; ri nim cäril wi ri takanic, cäya' na tojbal rech." 
Proverbs13:14 Ri u tijonic ri ajno'j bulbux wa' re c'aslemal, man caban ta kajem chupam ri e u colob ri cämical," 
Proverbs13:15 Ri utzalaj no'jinic cuch'äc ri u ya'ic u k'ij, ri e jachinelab ri quieb qui wäch benam que pa ri sachbal qui wäch." 
Proverbs13:16 Ri utz cachomanic ronojel cuban ruc' c'oxomanic, are' c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j cuya' u k'ij chi man c'o ta u no'j." 
Proverbs13:17 Ri itzel tako'n quebuc'am ulok u q'ueyowal, are' c'u ri jicalaj tako'n cutzirisanic." 
Proverbs13:18 Mebayil, q'uixbalil ri man nim ta caril wi ri yo'w no'j; sibalaj cäya' u k'ij ri nim cäril wi ri pixbenic." 
Proverbs13:19 Ri rayibal ri cätz'akatic cuya' quicotemal. Ri man c'o ta qui no'j man caquik'i' taj we caquinajtajisaj quib che ri lawaloyil. 
Proverbs13:20 Chawuc'aj awib cuc' ri ajno'jab cärik c'u na a no'j chawuc'aj awib cuc' ri man c'o ta qui no'j caquisachisaj c'u na a wäch. 
Proverbs13:21 Ri ajmaquib man quetzokopix ta rumal ri lawaloyil; ri e suc', utzil ri tojbal que cäya'ic." 
Proverbs13:22 Ri utzalaj winak cuya' can quechbal ri e ri' tak u mam; ri ajmac quebumulij utzalaj tak jastak ri cux na rech ri suc'. 
Proverbs13:23 Pa ri rulew ri meba' tz'ebem ri cätijic, sibalaj c'u q'ui ri cäsach u wäch jawije' ri man c'o ta wi suq'uilal." 
Proverbs13:24 Ri man cujic' taj ri u c'ojol xa man u lok' taj; jachin c'ut ri lok'caril ri u c'ojol cujic'o. 
Proverbs13:25 Ri suc', cäwa'ic c'ä quil na ri u numic, are' c'u ri banal etzelal cäcanaj ruc' numic." 
Proverbs14:1 Ri ixok ri c'o u no'j cuyac ri rachoch; ri ixok ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc' tak ri u k'ab cuyojij. 
Proverbs14:2 Ri colom ri u c'aslemal cuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ri jech' ri u c'aslemal cäretzelaj u wäch. 
Proverbs14:3 Chuchi' ri man c'o ta u no'j quel wi ulok ri nimal; chuchi' ri ajno'j quel wi ulok ri to'bal rib. 
Proverbs14:4 Aretak man e c'o ta wacax, caq'uec'ob ri trico; rumal ri u chuk'ab ri wacax cäq'uiyir ri u wächinic ri ulew." 
Proverbs14:5 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel man cuban ta tzij; ri u cawäch k'alajisanel quebubij banoj tzij. 
Proverbs14:6 Ri yacal ch'o'j cutzucuj no'j man curik ta c'ut; che ri c'oxomanel, ri etamanic man c'ax ta u rikic." 
Proverbs14:7 Chanajtajisaj awib che ri man c'o ta u no'j, chque c'ut ri u chi' man cärik ta na etamanic." 
Proverbs14:8 Ri no'j cuban che ri ajno'j chi cuch'ob ri cubano, are' c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j cäsub rumal chi man c'o ta u no'j." 
Proverbs14:9 Ri man c'o ta qui no'j caquitze'j u wäch ri qui chak'maquil, chquixo'l c'ut ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel c'o utzalaj rayibal." 
Proverbs14:10 Ri anima'aj quebuch'ob ri kas e u c'ayilal, man cujach ta qui wäch ri man reta'm ta u wäch man cunim ta na rib chupam ri u quicotemal." 
Proverbs14:11 Ri cachoch ri e banal tak etzelal cäyojix na; ri cachoch ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel queq'uiyiric: 
Proverbs14:12 E c'o be ri je ta ne e suc', che c'ut ri qui q'uisbalil c'o wi ri cämical." 
Proverbs14:13 Cak'oxow ne ri anima'aj rumal ri tze', chuq'uisbalil c'ut ri jajatem cäq'uis pa ok'ej." 
Proverbs14:14 Ri man c'o ta u no'j u cuban u c'u'x chrij ri u c'aslemal ri utzalaj winak cucu'ba' u c'u'x chquij tak ri e u banoj. 
Proverbs14:15 Ri con cucoj ronojel ri cäbix che; ri utz cächomanic cäril na jawije' ri cäbin wi. 
Proverbs14:16 Ri ajno'j cuna' rib chuwäch ri etzelal quel c'u chuwäch, are' c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j banal nimal xukuje' jiquil u c'u'x." 
Proverbs14:17 Ri chanim coyowaric man cuchomaj taj ri cubano; are c'u ri cujic' rib cac'oji' pa jamaril. 
Proverbs14:18 Ri e con quebechbex cumal ri man c'o ta qui no'j; ri utz quenojinic quenoj che etamanic. 
Proverbs14:19 Ri e banal tak etzelal caquipachba' na quib chquiwäch ri utzalaj tak winak; ri e lawalo cäquita' na tok'ob chi tak cachoch ri e suc'. 
Proverbs14:20 Ri meba', xukuje' ne ri rachil ri junam u wäch ruc' quetzelax na u wäch rumal; ri k'inom man quebajilataj taj ri junam qui wäch ruc'." 
Proverbs14:21 Ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri rachil cuban jun macaj, ¡are' c'u sibalaj utz re ri quel u c'u'x che ri meba'!" 
Proverbs14:22 Ri cäquitzucuj u banic ri lawaloyil, cäquisach ri be; ri cäquitzucuj u banic ri utz takal qui lok'ok'exic xukuje' u jiquibaxic c'uxaj chquij." 
Proverbs14:23 Che ronojel tijoj chuk'ab c'o quechbex che; ri tzijtzotem xuwi tzubukil cuc'am ulok. 
Proverbs14:24 Ri u corona ri ajno'j are' ri u c'oxomanic; ri quech ri man c'o ta qui no'j are' chi man c'o ta qui no'j. 
Proverbs14:25 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel cuto'tajisaj ri qui c'aslemal jule' chic; ri u cawächil k'alajisanel are' ajchak'mac che ri cämical. 
Proverbs14:26 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cuya' jun jicalaj eyebal c'uxaj chque ri alc'ualaxelab rech man c'o ta caquic'ulmaj. 
Proverbs14:27 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel are' u q'uiyibal ri c'aslemal, ri queresaj c'ut pa ri colob aj cämical." 
Proverbs14:28 Takanic paquiwi' tinimit winak jun nimarisabal k'ij wa' che ri ajawinel; takanic paquiwi' quieb oxib tzakmajic che. 
Proverbs14:29 Ri uxic coch'onel cuc'ut ri c'oxomanic; uxic man coch'onel taj are' wa ri cac'utu ri nimalaj conil. 
Proverbs14:30 Ri chomabal ri man quel ta ch'u'j c'aslemal wa' che ri cuerp, are c'u ri quiäk rayinic copan wa' c'ä cho tak ri bak." 
Proverbs14:31 Cuc'axc'obisaj ri u winakirisanel jachin ri cuban c'ax che ri meba', cuya' c'u u k'ij jachin ri quel u c'u'x che." 
Proverbs14:32 Ri banal etzelal quetzeletaj rumal ri retzelal; ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel pa ronojel cäto' rumal ri tz'akatil ri c'o ruc'. 
Proverbs14:33 Ri no'j cäc'oji' pa tak chomabal ri utz quechomanic, chquixo'l c'u ri man c'o ta qui no'j man etamatal ta u wäch." 
Proverbs14:34 Ri suq'uilal are nimarisabal u k'ij jun nim tinimit; ri macaj are ri u q'uixbal. 
Proverbs14:35 Ri pataninel ri nawinel cuch'äc ri rutzil ranima' ri ajawinel, are c'u ri man nawinel taj cuch'äc ri royowal." 
Proverbs15:1 Ri ch'uch'ujalaj tzelebal u wäch ri tzij cukasaj u wäch ri oyowal; ri c'axalaj tzelebal u wäch ri tzij xa cunimatajisaj ri oyowal. 
Proverbs15:2 Che ri cak' ri ajno'jab cäpe wi ri no'j; che ri qui chi' ri man c'o ta qui no'j, ri man c'o ta no'jibal." 
Proverbs15:3 Ri Ajawaxel c'o pa ronojel c'olbal, coc il che quilic ri e utz xukuje' ri e itzel." 
Proverbs15:4 Ri ak'aj ri cälok'inic juwi' che' wa' re c'aslemal; ri itzelalaj ak'aj cuban c'ax che ri uxlabal. 
Proverbs15:5 Ri man c'o ta u no'j man nim ta caril wi ri u pixbenic ri u tat; ri coc il che, cuc'ut c'oxomanic." 
Proverbs15:6 Nim c'o pa ri rachoch ri achi ri tz'akat pa ronojel, are' c'u ri banal etzelal man c'o ta cärechbej che ri cuch'äco." 
Proverbs15:7 Ri ajno'jab caquijabuj no'j cuc' ri qui chi'; ri man c'o ta qui no'j, caquicoj ri qui chomabal, che u jech'obisaxic ronojel." 
Proverbs15:8 Ri Ajawaxel man quebucoch'taj ri qui sipanic ri e banal tak etzelal, cuc'amowaj c'ut ri qui bochi'nic ri e suc' ruc' quicotemal." 
Proverbs15:9 Ri Ajawaxel man cucoch'taj ri qui c'aslemal ri e banal tak etzelal, culok'ok'ej c'ut jachin ri cäruc'aj jun colomalaj c'aslemal." 
Proverbs15:10 Ri cuya' can ri utzalaj be co ri u c'äjisaxic u wäch cäbanic; ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri k'ilonic cäcäm na. 
Proverbs15:11 We c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri cämical xukuje' ri camuk wi ri cäminak, ¡kas c'u e are na ri qui chomanic ri winak!" 
Proverbs15:12 Ri yacal ch'o'j man lok' ta cäril wi ri cäk'ilon che, mawi cutzucuj ta cachilaxic ri ajno'jab." 
Proverbs15:13 Ri anima'aj cäquicotic, cujelisaj ri palajaj; ri anima'aj yawab, ri wächbal cäbisonic." 
Proverbs15:14 Ri chomabal ri cac'oxomanic cutzucuj ri etamanic, e are' c'u ri man c'o ta qui no'j man no'jibal ta cäquitzukubej quib." 
Proverbs15:15 Che ri ch'ibatajinak, conojel ri k'ij man e utz taj; che ri cäquicotic e jun nimak'ij ri man c'o ta u q'uisic." 
Proverbs15:16 Are' utz na uxinak meba' cuya' c'u u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, chuwäch ri uxinak k'inom c'o c'ut pa ri c'ayil." 
Proverbs15:17 Utz na u tijic ichaj ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, che u q'uexwäch u tijic ti'j wacax ruc' oyowarem." 
Proverbs15:18 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cuyac ch'o'j; ri c'o u coch'onic quejamarisanic. 
Proverbs15:19 Che ri sak'or, ri be nojinak che q'uix; che ri winak ri colom ri be nim u wäch cäpaspatic." 
Proverbs15:20 Ri c'ojolaxel ri ajno'j quebuquicotisaj ri u nan u tat; ri c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j man nim ta queril wi u nan u tat. 
Proverbs15:21 Ri con cäquicotic chi man c'o ta u no'j; ri c'o retamanic quebujic' ri e u xo'l tak rakan. 
Proverbs15:22 Aretak man c'o ta tow no'j, ri cächomax qui banic man utz ta quebelic; ri utz quelic e are' quebanow ri q'ui ya'l tak no'j." 
Proverbs15:23 ¡Sibalaj utz u rikic ri tzelebal wächaj ri takalic, are sibalaj utz na we kas pa ri u k'ijol!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ri be re ri c'aslemal chicaj cäpaki' wi, cuto'tajisaj c'u ri ajno'j rech man cäkaj ta pa ri mukubal." 
Proverbs15:25 Ri Ajawaxel cuyojij ri rachoch ri cuban nimal, quebuchajij c'ut ri jastak rech ri malca'n." 
Proverbs15:26 Ri Ajawaxel man cucoch' taj ri e itzel tak chomanic, quekaj c'u ri tzij chuwäch ri man quieb ta u pam." 
Proverbs15:27 Ri cujach rib pa u k'ab ri quiäk rayinic cuban nimalaj c'ax che ri rachoch, are' c'u ri man cuc'ulaj taj ri banoj u pa k'abaj cäc'asi na." 
Proverbs15:28 Ri suc'alaj winak cuchomaj na ri cutzelej u bixic, are' c'u ri banal etzelal itzel tak tzij quebel ulok pu chi'." 
Proverbs15:29 Ri Ajawaxel naj cäc'oji' wi chque ri e banal tak etzelal, coc c'u il che ri qui ch'awem ri e suc' ruc' Dios." 
Proverbs15:30 Ri bak'wächaj ri quejuluwic cäquiquicotisaj ri anima'aj; ri e utzalaj tak tzijol cäquiya' c'ac' tak chuk'ab. 
Proverbs15:31 Ri nim cäril wi ri pixbenic ri cuya' c'aslemal, c'o jun u c'olbal chquixo'l ri c'o ajno'jab." 
Proverbs15:32 Ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri pixbenic, man lok' ta cäril rib chbil rib; are' c'u ri coc il che ri pixbenic curik ch'obonic." 
Proverbs15:33 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cätijon che u ya'ic no'j; che u c'amowaxic nimarisabal k'ij, nabe rajawaxic u mach'ic ib." 
Proverbs16:1 Ri e chomanic e rech ri winak; ri q'uisbal u tza'm tzij ruc' ri Ajawaxel c'o wi. 
Proverbs16:2 Che ri winak utz cäril ronojel ri cubano, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel are' cak'atow tzij paquiwi' tak ri chomanic." 
Proverbs16:3 Chebajacha' tak ri a chac pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel, utz c'u quebel na ri cachomaj qui banic." 
Proverbs16:4 Ri Ajawaxel u winakirisam ronojel che jun patanijic; xukuje' ne ri itzel winak che ri k'ij re ri c'äjisabal wächaj. 
Proverbs16:5 Ri Ajawaxel man quebucoch' taj ri cäquiban nimal; matam o chanim cäquirik na ri c'äjisabal qui wäch. 
Proverbs16:6 Ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, xukuje' kastzij, cäcuy ri macaj; we cäkaya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel canajtin jun ri' che ri etzelal." 
Proverbs16:7 Aretak ri Ajawaxel cäkaj ri u c'aslemal jun winak chuwäch, xukuje' ne cuc' ri qui banom qui c'ulel che quebucoj pa jamaril ruc'." 
Proverbs16:8 Nim na u k'ij ri jubik' ri ch'äcom ruc' ch'ajch'ojil, chuwäch ri nimalaj ch'äcoj ri ch'äcom ruc' subunic." 
Proverbs16:9 Che ri winak caya' wi ri qui banic ri chomanic, ri Ajawaxel are' cäc'amow u be ri e u xo'l tak rakan." 
Proverbs16:10 Ri ajawinel are cubij ri cäbix che rumal ri Dios, man cuban ta jun k'atan tzij ri ma ta suc'." 
Proverbs16:11 Ri e pajbal xukuje' ri e etabal quekaj chuxe' ri u k'atan tzij ri Ajawaxel; conojel ri pajbal e banom rumal are'. 
Proverbs16:12 Ri ajawinelab man quequic'amowaj taj ri itzel tak banoj, rumal rech chi ri tem re ajawibal are' u tac'alibal ri suq'uilal." 
Proverbs16:13 Ri ajawinelab are' cäquilok'ok'ej xukuje' are' cäkaj chquiwäch ri cätzijon ruc' tz'akatil ri man ruc' ta cawächil. 
Proverbs16:14 Ri royowal ri ajawinel are' tako'n re cämical, quech c'ut ri ajno'jab ri u tzucuxic u jamarisaxic." 
Proverbs16:15 Ri u quicotemal ri ajawinel chi'nic rech c'aslemal, are c'u ri utzalaj u rayibal xak junam ruc' ri sutz' ri ruc'am jäb." 
Proverbs16:16 Are utz na u rikic no'j che u q'uexwäch k'an puak; are utz na ri utzalaj chomanic chuwäch ri sak puak. 
Proverbs16:17 Ri qui be ri e suc' are ri u najtajisaxic quib che ri etzelal; ri u chajixic ri ka c'aslemal are wa' ri u chajixic kib pa kech wi. 
Proverbs16:18 Chrij ri nimal, cäpe ri tzakmajic; chrij ri nimarisan ib, ri tzakic." 
Proverbs16:19 Are utz na u mach'irisaxic ib cuc' ri mebayib, che u banic ib k'inom cuc' ri e banal tak nimal." 
Proverbs16:20 Ri utz cuban che cuc'axic ri jastak utz quelic; ¡sibalaj utz re ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel! 
Proverbs16:21 Ri cächoman ruc' no'jinic cabinax c'oxomanel che; ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij cäch'äcanic. 
Proverbs16:22 We c'o utzalaj chomanic c'o jun u q'uiyibal c'aslemal ri'. Ri qui tijoxic ri man c'o ta qui no'j xukuje' man no'j taj. 
Proverbs16:23 Ri cächoman ruc' no'j, utz u bixic ri cubij, e are' c'ut ri e u tzij utzalaj ch'äcanic cubano." 
Proverbs16:24 Ri tzij ri e qui' e jun rakaj juyubal räx cab: cuqui'yarisaj ri chajin anima' quequiya' c'u c'ac' tak chuk'ab. 
Proverbs16:25 E c'o be ri je ta ne e suc' quebilitajic, pa ri qui q'uisbal c'ut c'o wi ri cämical." 
Proverbs16:26 Ri u wi'jinic ri cachacunic cätakchi'n che chac; ri numic ri cuna' are' cätakchi'n che u banic. 
Proverbs16:27 Ri banal etzelal are' jun jorno re etzelal, ¡xukuje' ne ri e u tzij quejunamataj ruc' ri rak' k'ak'!" 
Proverbs16:28 Ri itzel winak quebuyac ch'o'j; ri yacal tzijtal are' cäyacow c'ulelam tak ib. 
Proverbs16:29 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cusub ri rachil cujech'obisaj bic pa jun itzel be. 
Proverbs16:30 Quebuyupuchij ri e u bak'wäch ri cuchomaj u banic lawaloyil; quebutia' ri u chi' ri bantajinak lawaloyil rumal. 
Proverbs16:31 Ri e sak tak wi'aj e jun corona ri takalic, ri ch'äcom rumal jun c'aslemal ri tz'akat pa ronojel." 
Proverbs16:32 Are c'o na u k'ij ri coch'onic chuwäch ri chuk'ab; are c'o na u k'ij ri u ch'äquic rib jun pa re wi che u q'uexwäch ri qui ch'äquic tak tinimit. 
Proverbs16:33 Ri winak quebuq'uiak taklebenic, are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel are cajiquibanic ronojel." 
Proverbs17:1 Are utz na u tijic ri chaki'j caxlanwa pa jamaril, che qui q'uexwäch coc'owisaxic tak nimak'ij c'o c'u ch'o'j amak'el." 
Proverbs17:2 Ri pataninel ri utz u chomabal cux na ajaw puwi' ri c'ojolaxel ri esal q'uixbal, cuc'am c'u na rech ri echbal jacha' ri niq'uiaj achalaxic chic." 
Proverbs17:3 Ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak, ri k'ak' quetijtobenic; ri e chomanic tak quebutijtobej ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs17:4 Ri banal etzelal xukuje' ri banal tzij caquiya' qui xiquin che ri etzelalaj ak'aj. 
Proverbs17:5 Ri cäretz'bej u wäch ri meba' cuc'axc'obisaj ri u winakirisanel; ri cäjajat che ri u quiäkasakil man cacanaj ta canok we ta ma ta cäc'äjisax u wäch. 
Proverbs17:6 Ri e qui corona ri nimak tak winak e are' ri e u wi' tak qui mam; ri cäquibanbej nimal ri alc'ualaxelab e are' ri qui tat qui nan. 
Proverbs17:7 Mawi catake ta che ri con quebe u bij ta je'lalaj tak tzij, mawi cätaki' ta che ri winak ri nim u k'ij quebubij ta subunic." 
Proverbs17:8 Ri u nak'atisam rib che u c'amic u pa k'abaj are' pa u c'u'x chi c'o ta mayibalalaj u cuinem, utz c'u quel pa ronojel ri cubano." 
Proverbs17:9 Ri man quebuya' ta u xiquin che ri c'ax ri cäban che quebuq'uiyisaj colob aj lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj; jachin ri cutakej u nataxic ri c'ax cunajtajisaj ri rachil. 
Proverbs17:10 C'o na cupatanij jun yajanic che ri c'o u ch'obobal, chuwäch jun sient (100) rapunic che ri man c'o ta u no'j." 
Proverbs17:11 Ri tzelel tzij xa ch'o'j cutzucuj, cätak c'u na bic jun tako'n ruc' ri man catok'obisan ta wächaj." 
Proverbs17:12 Are cätakan na ri u rikic ib ruc' jun c'analaj ati't os che u q'uexwäch ri u rikic ib ruc' jun man c'o ta u no'j ri cucoj u chuk'ab che u rikic jun jasach. 
Proverbs17:13 Mawi jubik' quel ta ri etzelal pa ri rachoch ri winak ri cutoj etzelal che u q'uexwäch utzil. 
Proverbs17:14 Nima' tixtobinak ri ch'o'j ri cächaplexic, are utz na ri u najtajisaxic ib che u q'uexwäch ri u nimic ib chupam." 
Proverbs17:15 U cuyic u mac ri ajchak'mac xukuje' ri u c'okoxic ri man c'o ta u mac e quieb jastak wa' ri man quebucoch' taj ri Ajawaxel. 
Proverbs17:16 ¿Jasche cäpe ri man c'o ta u no'j ruc'am puak pa u k'ab, che u lok'ic no'j we man c'o retamanic?" 
Proverbs17:17 Jun achil amak'el quel u c'u'x, pa tak c'u ri k'ijol re rikoj c'ax jacha' jun achalalaxic." 
Proverbs17:18 Ri con ri xch'aw puwi' ri rachil xukuje' are' c'u cätaq'ui' can puwi'. 
Proverbs17:19 Ri cäkaj ri yok'onic chuwäch, cäkaj ri ch'o'j chuwäch; ri cuban rib chi nim u k'ij cunimatajisaj ri retzeletajic." 
Proverbs17:20 Mawi jubik' ri itzel chomabal cuc'ulajij ta rib ruc' ri utz; ri ak'aj ri man c'o ta chi jun jacha' ta ri are' cäkaj na pa ri u quiäkasakil. 
Proverbs17:21 Ri ruxic tataxel che ri man c'o ta u no'j xuwi c'axc'ol cuc'am ulok; ri ruxic tataxel che jun con man jun quicotemal taj. 
Proverbs17:22 Utzalaj cunabal ri anima'aj ri cäquicotic, are c'u ri anima'aj ri cäbisonic cuk'ip chuk'ab." 
Proverbs17:23 Ri banal etzelal cuc'am u pa k'abaj cheläk'ax, che u jech'obisaxic ri u be ri suq'uilal." 
Proverbs17:24 Ri no'j are ri u chomabal ri cac'oxomanic, ri man c'o ta u no'j man c'o ta jun jasach cutzucuj." 
Proverbs17:25 Ri c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j ya'l oyowal xukuje' c'ayil chque ri u nan u tat. 
Proverbs17:26 Man ya'tal taj cätok'ix torobal rib ri man c'o ta u mac mawi u rapuxic ri winak rumal ri suq'uilal ri cubano. 
Proverbs17:27 Quech ri ajno'jab ri u bixic xa quieb oxib tzij, xukuje' quech ri c'o quetamanic ri jamaril." 
Proverbs17:28 Xukuje' ne ri man c'o ta u no'j cächomaxic chi c'o u no'j xukuje' c'oxomanel, aretak man c'o ta jas cubij xak c'u cäyenic." 
Proverbs18:1 Ri tititel xuwi cuchomaj ri ya'tal che, cuk'atij c'u u wäch ronojel utzalaj yo'w no'j." 
Proverbs18:2 Ri man c'o ta u no'j man c'o ta u rayinic che etamanic; xuwi utz che chi caquiya' qui wäch ri winak che. 
Proverbs18:3 Ruc' ri etzelal cäpe wi ri q'uixbal; ruc' ri u banic nimal cäpe wi ri yok'obal. 
Proverbs18:4 Ri e u tzij ri winak e ja' naj qui pam, nima' ri cäbinic, c'ua' re no'j." 
Proverbs18:5 Man utz taj chi ri k'atal tak tzij cäquito' u wi' ri c'o u mac, man cäquiban ta c'u suc'alaj k'atan tzij puwi' ri man c'o ta u mac." 
Proverbs18:6 Cumal tak ri e u chi' ri man c'o ta u no'j cunim rib pa tak u q'ueyowal; cumal tak ri e u tzij quebutzucuj utzalaj tak rapunic. 
Proverbs18:7 Ri e u tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j e are' ri etzelebal rib; cumal c'ut ri e u tzij, cucoj ri jitz'abal chukul." 
Proverbs18:8 Ri tzijtal tak xak e junam cuc' tak ri munibal quebopan c'ä chquipam tak ri bak. 
Proverbs18:9 Ri sak'orib xukuje' ri yojinelab ¡quebux c'u ne na cachalal tak kib! 
Proverbs18:10 Ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel are' jun tac'atic ja ri sibalaj nim u cuinem, ruc' c'u quebopan wi ri e suc'ab che u tzucuxic to'bal ib." 
Proverbs18:11 Ri k'inom cuchomaj chi ri e u k'inomal e junam ruc' jun tinimit ri sutim rij rumal nimalaj tapia ri naj elinak chicaj. 
Proverbs18:12 Chrij ri banoj nimal cäpe ri tzakmajic; chrij ri mach'ibalil ri pok'otajic. 
Proverbs18:13 Jun conil xukuje' jun q'uixbal u tzelexic u wäch ri tzij c'amajok chtatabexok. 
Proverbs18:14 Ri yawab cäwalijisax rumal ri u chajin anima', are c'u ri chajin anima' ri tukarinak, ¿jachin ta lo ri cäcuin che u walijisaxic?" 
Proverbs18:15 Ri ajno'jab xukuje' ri e c'oxomanelab cäquirik ri etamanic ri cäquitzucuj. 
Proverbs18:16 Ruc' jun sipanic quejak conojel tak ri oquibal cäban c'u opanem chuwäch ri winak ri nim u banic. 
Proverbs18:17 Ri cuto' rib nabe je ta ne ri kastzij ri cubij, c'ä copan na ri cac'ulelanic ri cubij na chi man je taj." 
Proverbs18:18 Ri k'atan tzij aj Dios cusach u tza'm ri ch'o'j, cujach c'u qui wäch tak ri quech'ojinic." 
Proverbs18:19 Xa sibalaj cuban u tz'apixic rib ri achalaxel ri c'axc'obisam chuwäch ri jun tinimit ri sutim rij cumal nimak tak tapia. Ri ch'o'j quetasanic jacha' ri tasbal u pam jun rachoch ajawinel. 
Proverbs18:20 Chquijujunal caquitij na c'ä xukuje' ne ri cosic rech ri e u wächinic tak ri qui tzij. 
Proverbs18:21 Ri c'aslemal xukuje' ri cämical quewet'et'ic jas ri cubij ri ak'aj; ri sibalaj quewet'et'ic cäquicoch' na ri cuc'am ulok ri quiwet'et'em. 
Proverbs18:22 U rikic ixokilaxel are ri u rikic ri utz na: are ri u c'amic jun c'utbal ri u tok'ob ri Dios. 
Proverbs18:23 Ri meba' cäch'aw cuc' tok'lenic; ri k'inom cutzelej u bixic ri cäbix che ruc' nimal. 
Proverbs18:24 E c'o jujun ri uj utz cuc' chanim c'ut cäsach u wäch ri cutzil kuc', e c'o c'ut jujun kachil ri e jic na chuwäch jun kachalal." 
Proverbs19:1 Are utz na ri uxic meba' tz'akatisanel c'ut pa ronojel, che u q'uexwäch ri man c'o ta u no'j ri banal tzij tal." 
Proverbs19:2 Man utz ta ri elem ch'u'j we man c'o ch'obonic; ri sibalaj e aninakil quequic'am ulok q'ui tak sachinakil. 
Proverbs19:3 Ri u conil ri winak cuban che chi cusach ri be, cuyaxtaj c'ut ri winak ri chak'maquil chrij ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs19:4 Ri k'inomal quebuc'am ulok q'uialaj tak achil, are' c'u ri meba' quebutzak c'u ne na tak ri rachil." 
Proverbs19:5 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel kas curik wi na ri c'äjisabal u wäch; ri banal tzij man quel ta puwi' ri cubano. 
Proverbs19:6 Ri sipanel man co ta c'u ranima', catzucux cumal conojel ri winak cux c'u cachil." 
Proverbs19:7 We ri meba' xukuje' ne tak ri e rachalal caquetzelaj u wäch, c'o ba ne rumal ri' quenajtin ri e rachil che." 
Proverbs19:8 Ri curik etamanic cuchaplej c'u u banic ri retamam, cuya' u k'ij chbil rib capok'colij c'ut." 
Proverbs19:9 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel kas curik wi na ri c'äjisabal u wäch; ri banal tzij queyex rumal ri cämical. 
Proverbs19:10 Man ya'tal ta che ri man c'o ta u no'j chi cäc'oji' pa k'inomal, mawi ya'tal ta che ri lok'om pataninel cuk'at ta tzij paquiwi' ajawib ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Proverbs19:11 Ri utzalaj no'jinic are ri u k'ilic ri oyowal, are c'u ri u ya'ic k'ij, man c'o ta cubij u c'u'x che ri il patan." 
Proverbs19:12 Ri royowal ri ajawinel xak junam ruc' ri u wunic ri coj, are c'u ri utzalaj u rayibal jacha' ri räxk'ab puwi' ri k'ayes." 
Proverbs19:13 Jun c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc'axc'obisaj ri u tat. Ri ixok ri xak cäch'ojinic xak junam ruc' ri tz'uj ri man cätani' taj. 
Proverbs19:14 Chque ri nan tat quec'am wi tak ja xukuje' tak k'inomal; ri ixokilaxel c'oxomanel cäc'am che ri Ajawaxel. 
Proverbs19:15 Ri sak'oril cuya' nimalaj waram, are' c'u ri sak'or cucoch' na numic." 
Proverbs19:16 Ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri takomal cuto' u wi' ri u c'aslemal; ri man nim ta cäril wi ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel, cäcämic." 
Proverbs19:17 Jun jalomal che ri meba' jun jalomal wa' che ri Ajawaxel, kas are c'u ri Ajawaxel cätojow na ri c'asaj." 
Proverbs19:18 Chajic'a' ri a c'ojol utz c'ä cuya' cäjiq'uic, macämisaj c'u rumal ri u c'äjisaxic u wäch." 
Proverbs19:19 Ri sibalaj coyowaric cuc'am na ri takal che; we quesax chuwäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj xa canimatajisax ri jasach. 
Proverbs19:20 Chaya' a xiquin che ri no'j ri cäya' chawe chac'amowaj c'ut ri pixbenic we je caban wa' catux na ajno'j. 
Proverbs19:21 Ri winak quebuban q'ui tak chomanic, are c'u ri u chomam u banic ri Ajawaxel are cabantajic." 
Proverbs19:22 Ri sibalaj cucämisaj wi rib ri winak che u rayixic cux u quiäkasakil; are' utz na ri meba' chuwäch ri banal tzij. 
Proverbs19:23 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal; cac'oji' jun pa quicotemal man c'o ta c'u jun lawaloyil cäpe puwi'. 
Proverbs19:24 Ri sak'or cunim ri u k'ab pa ri liq'uilic lak, mawi c'u ne cäticaric cuc'am bic cuya' pa u chi'." 
Proverbs19:25 Che ri u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri banal nimal, ri con quetamanic; ri ajno'j quetamam xak xuwi ruc' ri pixbenic." 
Proverbs19:26 Ri u banic c'ax che ri tataxel xukuje' ri resaxic bic ri nanaxel pa ri ja, esbal tak q'uixbal wa' xukuje' e u q'ueyowal che jun alc'ualaxel." 
Proverbs19:27 Nu c'ojol, we man catoc il che ri k'iloj ib catas na awib chquij ri utzalaj tak yo'w no'j." 
Proverbs19:28 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel cäretz'bej u wäch ri suq'uilal; ri banal etzelal quebutzak ulok etzelal pa u chi'. 
Proverbs19:29 Xak e c'o ri xic'ay chque ri e banal tak nimal; ri utzalaj tak rapubal che ri uwo rachak ri man c'o ta u no'j. 
Proverbs20:1 Ri u wa'l uva cuban che ri winak chi cuban nimal; ri e uq'uia' tak ri utz qui k'obisaxic banom cuyojtajisaj; apachin ta ne ri cakaj chupam man c'o ta jun utz ta u cojic ri u no'j cubano. 
Proverbs20:2 Jun c'analaj ajawinel xak junam ruc' jun coj ri cawunic; ri cätzuruwic, xak quieb cubij puwi' ri u c'aslemal." 
Proverbs20:3 Nim u k'ij ri winak ri quebuk'il ri c'ulelam tak ib, apachique c'u man c'o ta u no'j cäcuinic cuchaplej." 
Proverbs20:4 Aretak u k'ijol ri taji'n, ri sak'or man cätajin taj; aretak c'u copan ri k'ijol che u yaquic ri u wächinic, ri xtiquic cätzucunic man c'o ta c'u curik na." 
Proverbs20:5 Ri e chomanic ri e c'o chc'uyal quejunamataj cuc' ri choalaj tak ja, are' c'u ri cac'oxomanic cäcuin che qui rikic." 
Proverbs20:6 Sibalaj e q'ui ri caquiban quib chi sibalaj e jic pa ronojel, man cärik ta c'u jachin jun ri cäjiquibax ta c'uxaj chrij." 
Proverbs20:7 ¡Sibalaj utz quech ri c'ojolaxelab ri quebuya' can ri bininak pa colomal tz'akat c'u pa ronojel! 
Proverbs20:8 Aretak ri ajawinel cät'uyi pa ri k'atbal tzij, cubana' jun u ca'yexic, che u mesic bic ri etzelal." 
Proverbs20:9 Man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cubij: “Josok' ri wanima', in ch'ajch'oj man c'o ta mac pa ri nu c'aslemal.”" 
Proverbs20:10 Pajbal tak xukuje' etabal tak k'ipom, e quieb jastak wa' ri quetzelax qui wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs20:11 Cumal tak ri e u banoj quetamatajic we ri c'ojol cabin ruc' colomal. 
Proverbs20:12 Ri xiquinaj che tatabenic xukuje' ri bak'wächaj che cäyanic xeban rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Proverbs20:13 Majach awib che ri waram, o catcanaj can meba'; chatc'asc'atok cäto'taj c'o c'u na ri wa." 
Proverbs20:14 “¡Man utz taj ri c'ayij!” cächa' ri lok'omanel, aretak c'u lok'tajinak chic cuquicotisaj rib chbil rib." 
Proverbs20:15 Are' c'o na rajil ri cätzijon ruc' no'j, chuwäch ronojel ri k'an puak xukuje' tak ri k'inomal ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Proverbs20:16 Ri cäch'aw puwi' jun winak ri man etamatal ta u wäch, chawesaj ri ratz'iak chac'ama' che tojbal." 
Proverbs20:17 Ri winak cäkaj chuwäch cutzuk rib cumal banoj tak tzij, pune' c'u chuq'uisbalil cux jacha' ta ne juba' ulew che." 
Proverbs20:18 Ri chomanic quejiquibax rumal jun utzalaj yo'w no'j: ri ch'o'j caban ruc' jun utzalaj nawinic. 
Proverbs20:19 Ri ajtzijtal man reta'm ta u c'u'ic jun awatalic, majunaj ba' awib ruc' winak ri ajtzijtal." 
Proverbs20:20 Ri cuc'okoj ri u tat o ri u nan, cäcäm na pa ri xibibalalaj k'ekumalil." 
Proverbs20:21 Ri k'inomal ri cärik rumal subunic, chuq'uisbalil man cuya' ta quicotemal." 
Proverbs20:22 Mawi jubik' mabij chi caya' na rajil c'axelal; chajiquiba' a c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, cuban c'u na chawe chi catch'äcanic." 
Proverbs20:23 Ri Ajawaxel man utz ta caril ri u cojic ri alal ri k'ipom; ri pajbal ri e c'o qui jech' man e c'amel taj. 
Proverbs20:24 Ri Ajawaxel cac'amow u be ri winak; man c'o ta jun reta'm taj ri kas cutaklebej na. 
Proverbs20:25 Xak quieb cubij puwi' ri winak ri cuchi'j jun jasach che ri Dios ri c'äte c'u cuchomaj chi canok chi man utz taj ri xubano. 
Proverbs20:26 Ri ajawinel ri c'o u no'j quebunajtajisaj ri e banal tak etzelal ri e c'o chunakaj, quebuxak'alej c'u chuxe' jun quetet." 
Proverbs20:27 Ri uxlabal ri u yo'm ri Dios che ri winak chäj wa' ri cuc'ut ronojel ri c'o chupam ri winak. 
Proverbs20:28 Ri ajawinel man c'o ta caslaben chupam ri u tem re ajawibal aretak cucoj ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' ri kastzij. 
Proverbs20:29 Ri caquibanbej nimal ri alabom c'o chupam tak ri qui chuk'ab; ri nimarisabal qui k'ij ri nimak tak winak chupam tak ri qui wi' ri sak c'o wi. 
Proverbs20:30 Ri etzelal cäcunataj cumal ch'ayiquil xukuje' socotajic; ri ch'ayiquil cucunaj ri etamabal c'uxaj. 
Proverbs21:1 Ri u chomabal ri ajawinel pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel. Cätakenic e jacha' tak ri nima', ri be ri craj ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs21:2 Ri winak utz cäril ronojel ri cubano, are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel are' quenic'on tak ri chomanic." 
Proverbs21:3 Chatakej u banic ri colomal xukuje' ri suq'uilal, are c'u cäkaj wa' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che qui q'uexwäch ri tabal tak tok'ob." 
Proverbs21:4 Bak'wächaj ri cunimarisaj rib, chomanic ri cuban nimal; ri qui chäj ri e banal tak etzelal, macaj." 
Proverbs21:5 Ri chomanic tak ri utz qui chomaxic utz quebel na; ri xak aninak qui banic cäquic'am ulok etzelatajic. 
Proverbs21:6 Ri k'inomal ri querik cumal qui banic banoj tak tzij, xa e c'atibal ri coc'owic chque ri caquitzucuj ri cämical." 
Proverbs21:7 Ri e banal tak etzelal cäsachisax na qui wäch rumal ri qui tokinic, rumal rech chi man xcaj taj xquiban ri suq'uilal." 
Proverbs21:8 Ri u c'aslemal ri banal etzelal jech' xukuje' man co ta c'olic; ri jastak ri cuban ri winak ri tz'akat pa ronojel e ch'ajch'oj. 
Proverbs21:9 Are utz na ri c'olem chuchi' ri u wi' ri ja, che u q'uexwäch ri c'olem pa jun nimalaj ja ruc' jun ixok ri xuwi ch'o'j cäraj." 
Proverbs21:10 Ri banal etzelal xuwi cuchomaj u banic ri man utz taj; mawi jubik' cuchomaj ta u banic utzil che ri rajil u tz'akat. 
Proverbs21:11 Che ri u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri nimol rib, ri con quetamanic; ri ajno'j che ri pixbenic caresaj wi etamanic." 
Proverbs21:12 Ri suc'alaj Dios ralwächin ri rachoch ri banal etzelal; xukuje' quebujach ri banal tak etzelal pa ri sachbal wächaj. 
Proverbs21:13 Ri man coc ta il che ri u bochi'nic ri meba', xukuje' ri are' man c'o ta cätzelex u bixic che aretak cutz'onoj to'banic." 
Proverbs21:14 Ri sipanic ri man quesax ta u tzijol cukasaj u wäch ri oyowal ri sibalaj nim na. 
Proverbs21:15 Aretak cäban suq'uil, ri suc' cäquicotic, chque c'ut ri cäquiban etzelal copan na ri etzeletajic." 
Proverbs21:16 Ri man cutakej ta jun c'aslemal ri utz u chomaxic, quetac'al na chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
Proverbs21:17 Ri cujach rib che ri u quicotisaxic rib, ri u wa'l uva xukuje' tak ri c'oc'al, queq'uis na pa ri mebayil." 
Proverbs21:18 Ri winak ri subunel xukuje' banal etzelal curik na c'ax che u q'uexwäch ri suc' tz'akat c'ut pa ronojel. 
Proverbs21:19 Are utz na ri c'olem chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak chuq'uexwäch ri c'olem ruc' jun ixok ri xak coyowaric ri xuwi ch'o'j cupatanij. 
Proverbs21:20 Pa ri rachoch ri ajno'j e c'o k'inomal xukuje' tak c'oc'al, are' c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j cusach ronojel ri c'o ruc'." 
Proverbs21:21 Ri cutzucuj chi cux colom, xukuje' aj lok'ok'ebal c'u'x, curik c'aslemal xukuje' nimarisabal k'ij." 
Proverbs21:22 Ri ajno'j cäbe che ch'o'j chrij jun tinimit ri utz u chajixic banom, cuq'uis c'u tzij puwi' ri cuinem ri u jiquibam wi u c'u'x." 
Proverbs21:23 Ri cuch'ob na jas ri cubij, mawi jubik' cunim rib pa u q'ueyowal." 
Proverbs21:24 Nimarisal rib, banal nimal xukuje' yacal ch'o'j cuchi'x ri sibalaj cunimarisaj rib." 
Proverbs21:25 Cumal tak rayinic cäcäm ri sak'or, rumal rech chi ri e u k'ab man cäcajtaj quechacunic;" 
Proverbs21:26 ronojel ri jun k'ij xak rayinic cubano. Are' c'u ri suc', man ruc ta q'ueq'uenic cayanic." 
Proverbs21:27 Ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj qui wäch ri qui sipanic ri e banal tak etzelal, rumal rech chi quequichi'j cuc' itzel tak chomanic." 
Proverbs21:28 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel cäsachisax na u wäch; jachin c'ut ri reta'm cätatabenic, amak'el cäcuin che u tzelexic wächaj." 
Proverbs21:29 Ri banal etzelal cuban rib chi jicom; are' c'u ri tz'akat pa ronojel jicom c'olic. 
Proverbs21:30 Chuwäch ri Ajawaxel man c'o ta no'j ri nim ta na u k'ij, mawi e c'oxomanic mawi e utzalaj tak chomanic." 
Proverbs21:31 Ri winak cucolomaj ri quiej rech coc pa ri ch'o'j, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel, are' ri cäyo'w ri ch'äcanic." 
Proverbs22:1 Are c'o quechbex na we c'o utzalaj tzijol, ri man c'u ta wi yok'bal, chuwäch ri q'uialaj k'an puak xukuje' sak puak." 
Proverbs22:2 Ri k'inom xukuje' ri meba' c'o ri quejunamataj wi: quicabichal e winakirisam rumal ri Ajawaxel. 
Proverbs22:3 Ri utz cachomanic cäril ri sayowem quel c'u chuwäch; ri man utz ta cächomanic catakenic cucoch' c'u ri c'ax. 
Proverbs22:4 Ri u mach'ic ib xukuje' ri u ya'ic ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel quequic'am ulok jacha' che tojbal, k'inomal tak, nimarisabal k'ij, xukuje' c'aslemal." 
Proverbs22:5 Ri u be ri banal etzelal nojinak chque tak c'amibal; are c'u ri coc il che ri u c'aslemal, man cuya ta c'olbal chque." 
Proverbs22:6 Chaya' utzalaj tijonic che ri ac'al re camic, aretak c'u ri ri'j re chwek mawi jumul cutzak ta canok." 
Proverbs22:7 Chquixo'l ri mebayib, ri k'inom are ajawinel; chquixo'l ri ajc'asib, ri ya'l jalomal." 
Proverbs22:8 Ri cutic etzelal, cuyac na qui wächinic u q'ueyowal; ¡ri Ajawaxel cusachisaj na u wäch ruc' ri bara' re ri royowal!" 
Proverbs22:9 Ri quel u c'u'x chque jule' chic, cätewichitaj na rumal ri u ya'ic que ri mebayib ri u wa." 
Proverbs22:10 Aretak quesax bic ri banal nimal, queq'uis c'u ri yojcorem xukuje' ri yajoj tak ib." 
Proverbs22:11 Ri ajawinel nim cäril wi ri animaaj ri ch'ajch'oj, cuya' c'u ri rutzil ranima' che ri utz catzijonic." 
Proverbs22:12 Ri Ajawaxel coc il che u chajixic ri ajno'j quebuya' c'u chisak ri cujiquiba' qui bixic ri cubij ri banal tzij. 
Proverbs22:13 Rech man cachacun taj, ri sak'or cucoj pa u tzij cubij: “c'o jun coj pa ri be ri are craj quinucämisaj.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Ri u chi' ri ixok ri cäkaj pa mac ruc' achi e jun c'ua' ri sibalaj naj u pam, ri quebetzak wi ri quec'okox rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs22:15 Ri conil are u tz'akatil ri qui chomanic ri c'ä e ac'alab, quel c'ut aretak cäc'äjisax u wäch ruc' ch'ayiquil." 
Proverbs22:16 Jachin ri cut'orij ri meba' che u k'inomarisaxic rib o cuya' che ri k'inom, coc na pa ri mebayil." 
Proverbs22:17 Chaya' a xiquin che qui tatabexic ri qui tijonic ri ajno'jab; chatoc il che u chomaxic ri catintijoj wi. 
Proverbs22:18 Cakaj c'u na chawäch qui c'olic pa ri a chomabal, catcuin ta c'u che qui bilaxic conojel junam." 
Proverbs22:19 Camic quebenya' retamaxic chawe rech cajiquiba' a c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel.
