Proverbs22:20 In e nu tz'ibam juwinak lajuj (30) tijonic chawe e c'o yo'w tak no'j chquipam, xukuje' tak etamanic," 
Proverbs22:21 che a tijoxic retamaxic ri kastzij, rech catcuinic che u ya'ic jun jicalaj k'alajisanic che ri cuc'ot a chi'." 
Proverbs22:22 Mawoc'owisaj u wi' ri caban che ri meba' rumal rech chi meba', mawi mac'axc'obisaj ri man cäcuin taj cuto' rib, chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij." 
Proverbs22:23 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel cäch'aw na puwi' quebuc'axc'obisaj c'u na jachin tak ri quec'axc'obisanic. 
Proverbs22:24 Majunaj awib mawi machilaj winak ri ch'u'j u jolom xak c'u cac'anc'atic. 
Proverbs22:25 Mawetamaj ne u banic awe ri itzel tak qui nak'atisabal cacoj ta c'u ne ri colob chakul. 
Proverbs22:26 Mawi jubik' mac'am u k'abal ri qui tojic qui c'as tak winak," 
Proverbs22:27 we c'u ne man c'o catojbej rech, cämaj c'u ne na ri a ch'at." 
Proverbs22:28 Maq'uex qui c'olbal ri c'ulbat ri qui cojom can tak ri e a mam. 
Proverbs22:29 Jachin ri utz u banic ri u chac cubano, c'o ri che qui patanixic tak ri ajawinelab man c'u chque ta apachique winak." 
Proverbs23:1 Aretak catrulaj jun tata' nim u k'ij che wa'im, kas chach'obo' jachin chuwäch at c'o wi." 
Proverbs23:2 Pune' sibalaj catnumic, chak'ila' ri a wi'jinic." 
Proverbs23:3 Mäbe awanima' che qui tijic ri je'licalaj tak jastak, we c'u ne xa cätajin catusubu." 
Proverbs23:4 Macoj a chuk'ab rech catux k'inom matoc il che u rikic wa'. 
Proverbs23:5 We kas utz rilic cabano cawil c'u na chi man e c'o ta k'inomal; ruc' aninakil querapinic quebec, e jacha' ri cot, je ta ne ri xa queq'uiy qui xic'." 
Proverbs23:6 Mat t'uyi' pa ri u mexa jun xu'y, o marayij ri je'licalaj tak jastak ri cutijo," 
Proverbs23:7 quejunamataj c'u ruc' jun wi'aj pa ri a kul: ri are' catrulaj che wa'im xukuje' che uq'uianic, man c'u ruc' ta ronojel ranima' cubij;" 
Proverbs23:8 c'äte c'u caxawaj na ri xatijo man c'o ta c'u xequipatanij chawe ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak a tzij. 
Proverbs23:9 Mat ch'aw pa u xiquin ri man c'o ta u no'j, xa c'u cutze'j na qui wäch ri e aj no'jalaj tak a tzij." 
Proverbs23:10 Maq'uex qui c'olbal ri ojer tak c'ulbat, mawi matoc pa ri culew ri minorib," 
Proverbs23:11 rumal rech chi c'o jun cuinelalaj to'l quech ri quel ulok chawij che qui to'ic. 
Proverbs23:12 Chacojo' ri a chomanic xukuje' ri e a xiquin che ri tijonic xukuje' chque tak ri etamanic. 
Proverbs23:13 Mak'il awib che u pixbexic ri c'ojol, quieb oxib rapubal man cäcämisax ta cumal;" 
Proverbs23:14 we c'u capixbej cawesaj na pa u k'ab ri cämical. 
Proverbs23:15 Aretak charik ri no'j, nu c'ojol, man c'o ta chi c'u na jun ri sibalaj ta utz ta na rech chnuwäch in," 
Proverbs23:16 quinna' na jun nimalaj quicotemal aretak quinto chi cattzijonic jacha' ri takalic. 
Proverbs23:17 Mebaquiäk rayij ri ajmaquib; xane, are amak'el nim chawila' wi ri Ajawaxel." 
Proverbs23:18 Utz c'u catel na are c'u ri eyebal a c'u'x mawi jubik' cäsachisax na u wäch. 
Proverbs23:19 Kas chatoc il, nu c'ojol, chatetaman c'ut; chatzucuj u takexic ri utzalaj be." 
Proverbs23:20 Mebawächilaj ri k'abarelab mawi ri sibalaj e ajwi'lab. 
Proverbs23:21 Ri k'abarelab xukuje' ri e ajwi'lab cäsach qui wäch pa ri mebayil, e are' c'ut ri sak'orib k'e'l tak atz'iak caquicojo'." 
Proverbs23:22 Chatoc il che ri a tat ri xatalc'ualanic mawetzelaj u wäch ri a nan aretak nim winak chic. 
Proverbs23:23 Chalok'o' ri kastzij, ri no'j, ri tijonic xukuje' ri ch'obonic, ¡mebac'ayij c'ut!" 
Proverbs23:24 Ri u tat ri utzalaj c'ojolaxel ajno'j c'ut c'o rumal sibalaj cäquicotic xukuje' cunimarisaj u k'ij; 
Proverbs23:25 ¡chabana' ba', chi ri a tat xukuje' ri a nan, sibalaj utz chquina' quib xukuje' nimak c'u qui k'ij!" 
Proverbs23:26 Chaya' ri awanima' chwe, nu c'ojol, kas chebawila' c'ut cuc' utzalaj tak a bak'wäch ri quinbano;" 
Proverbs23:27 are' c'u ri ixok ri man aweta'm ta u wäch, ri re nim ch'utin, xak junam ruc' jun c'ua' naj u pam titz' cut;" 
Proverbs23:28 cäc'ac'alebenic, jacha' cuban jun eläk'om, cuban c'ut chi e q'ui ri achijab cäsach qui wäch rumal." 
Proverbs23:29 ¿Jachin ri curik c'ax? ¿Jachin ri cäch'ach'atic? ¿Jachin ri xak cäch'ojinic xukuje' xak cok'ic? ¿Jachin ri xak cäsoc chi jeri'? ¿Jachin ri man kas ta caca'y chic? 
Proverbs23:30 Ri man cutanaba' ta jubik' u tijic ri u wa'l uva cutakej c'u qui banic c'ac' tak k'abaribal. 
Proverbs23:31 Maya' a wäch che ri u wa'l uva. ¡Ri cäquiäkaric ri sibalaj c'u cäjuluw chupam ri kumubal! ¡Xak c'u cacalalic cäkaj bic! 
Proverbs23:32 Are c'u ri u q'uisbalil xak junam ruc' jun cumätz ri cacatzanic cuya' c'u k'oxomal. 
Proverbs23:33 Cuban c'u chawe chi quebawil jalan tak jastak, quepaki' c'u chomanic pa a jolom, quebatzijoj c'ut ch'ujilal;" 
Proverbs23:34 cuban na chawe chi cana' awib chi at c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri plo, chi at k'oyol puwi' ri nimalaj che'." 
Proverbs23:35 Cabij c'u na: “Xinch'ayic, man xinna' ta c'ut; xinrapuxic, man xinnabej ta c'ut; xuwi ta c'u ne chinc'astajic quinbe na che u tzucuxic chic niq'uiaj u wa'l uva.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Matitat mana' chquij ri banal tak etzelal mawi marayij cachilaxic," 
Proverbs24:2 xuwi c'u cäquichomaj u banic tokinic, man c'o ta chi c'u jas cäquitzijoj xuwi ri u banic etzelal." 
Proverbs24:3 Ruc' no'j cäwoc ri ja, ruc' c'u c'oxomanic quecoj ri e u tac'alibal;" 
Proverbs24:4 ruc' c'ut etamanic quenoj tak ri ja chque jastak ri pakal cajil xukuje' rayibal qui wäch. 
Proverbs24:5 Are c'o na quechebex che jun winak ajno'j chuwäch jun winak ri c'o u chuk'ab; are c'o na u patan ri etamanic chuwäch ri cuinem," 
Proverbs24:6 ri ch'o'j utz u chomaxic cäbanic are c'u ri ch'äcanic cumal ri e q'ui ya'l tak no'j. 
Proverbs24:7 Ri man c'o ta u no'j man reta'm taj jas cubij chuwäch ri k'atal tzij, are c'u ri no'j naj c'o wi che." 
Proverbs24:8 Jachin ri xuwi cuchomaj u banic pewinakchi' cuch'äc ri cäbix che chi xak quieb u pam. 
Proverbs24:9 Ri u chomanic ri banal etzelal are' ri macunic; ¡man c'o ta jachin cäcoch'ow ri banal nimal! 
Proverbs24:10 We cäqueblaj a c'u'x aretak at c'o pa tak latz' man e q'ui taj ri a chuk'ab e c'olic. 
Proverbs24:11 Cheto'tajisaj la ri e c'okotajinak che cämical; chebesaj la pa ri c'ax ri cämisaxic quij. 
Proverbs24:12 Pune' cäjiquiba' u bixic chi man awetamam taj, ri quenic'on ri c'ulmatajic are' kas quetamam na; kas c'u reta'm na ri catyuxlenic, ri quetojow chquijujunal jas kas ri qui chac." 
Proverbs24:13 Chatija'; nu c'ojol, ri qui'alaj juyubal räx cab ri c'o chupam ri akaj; chana' ri u je'lical." 
Proverbs24:14 Je qui qui'al wa' cana' na ri no'j xukuje' ri etamanic; we quebariko, cärik na jun utzalaj q'uisbal tak a k'ij, xukuje' c'u ri aweyebal c'u'x mawi jubik' cäsach na u wäch." 
Proverbs24:15 Mebaban itzel tak chomanic che jun winak tz'akatisanel pa ronojel mawi matijtobej u yojixic ri ja ri c'o wi," 
Proverbs24:16 pune' c'u wukub mul catzakic, wukub mul cawalij chi na; are' c'u ri e banal tak etzelal quebik'taj na pa ri quiäkasakil." 
Proverbs24:17 Matquicotic mawi mebaban nimak'ij qui mac ri chak'inic xukuje' tak ri u tzakic ri u banom u c'ulel chawe," 
Proverbs24:18 ri Ajawaxel man cäkaj ta c'u wa' chuwäch ri rilic, cutas c'u na rib ri royowal chrij." 
Proverbs24:19 Mäpe awoyowal qui mac quech ri banal tak etzelal mawi matitat mana' chquij ri itzel tak winak," 
Proverbs24:20 rumal rech chi ri banal etzelal man utz ta cutaklebej na: ri banal etzelal cayubquen na jacha' jun chäj. 
Proverbs24:21 Nim ba' chawila' wi ri Dios, xukuje' ri ajawinel nu c'ojol; mebawachilaj tak ri e c'ulel," 
Proverbs24:22 rumal rech chi man c'o ta cäquinabej aretak cäpe ri yojyobic paquiwi', man c'o ta c'u jun reta'm ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri cacuin ri Dios che u ya'ic xukuje' ri ajawinel." 
Proverbs24:23 Xukuje' wa' e qui tijonic ri ajno'jab: Man utz taj chi pa ri k'atbal tzij c'o jachin quesax u q'uixbal. 
Proverbs24:24 Jachin ri cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta u mac ri ajchak'mac. Cac'okox cumal tak ri tinimit xukuje' quetzelax u wäch cumal tak ri nimak tak tinimit; 
Proverbs24:25 e jachin tak c'ut ri quec'äjisan u wäch utz caquitaklebej na, e are' c'u ri winak caquich'uk cuc' tak tewichibal." 
Proverbs24:26 Ri quebuya' jicomalaj tak u tzelexic qui wäch ri tzij, je ta ne ri cuya' jun tz'umanic chque ri chi'aj." 
Proverbs24:27 Chebacolomaj ri e a c'ay ri e a ch'äcoj pa ri be chebatz'akatisaj qui banic tak ri e a chac pa ri juyub c'äte ri' cuya' cayac ri awachoch. 
Proverbs24:28 We man c'o rumal, maya' k'alajisanic chrij ri awajil a tz'akat mawi majiquiba' qui bixic ri man e kas ta tzij." 
Proverbs24:29 Mawi jubik' machomaj u ya'ic rajil c'axelal, caban ta c'u che ri jun chic junam jas ri xuban chawe." 
Proverbs24:30 Xinoc'ow chupam ri rulew ri sak'or xukuje' xinoc'ow chupam ri u ticbal uva ri man c'o ta u tzantzak'or: 
Proverbs24:31 are c'u ri xinwilo, jun ulew nojinak chque q'uix, yojyobinak ri u tapia re abaj." 
Proverbs24:32 Aretak xinwil wa' xintz'ibaj chupam ri nu chomabal; xinwilo xinwetamaj c'ut we tijonic ri'. 
Proverbs24:33 Catwar jubik', catyuxc'at chi jubik', quebak'aluj ri quieb a k'ab che waram," 
Proverbs24:34 ri mebayil cäpe na catkaj c'u na pa u k'ab jacha' cuban jun wacatel ruc'am ri u ch'ojibal. 
Proverbs25:1 Xukuje' wa' e u tijonic tak ri Salomon ri xek'axex cumal winak ri e c'o che u patanixic ri Ezequiy rajawinel ri Juda: 
Proverbs25:2 U juluwem ri Dios wa' chi e c'o rawatalic, yabal c'u qui k'ij ri ajawinelab qui ch'obic wa' aretak quecuin che qui ch'obic." 
Proverbs25:3 Ri u chicajil ri caj, ri u najil u pam ri ulew xukuje' ri qui chomanic tak ri ajawinelab man e ya'tal ta qui ch'obic wa'." 
Proverbs25:4 Chebatasa' ri tz'ilol che ri sak puak, ri ch'ayal sak puak cuban c'u na jun kumubal;" 
Proverbs25:5 chatasa' chquixo'l ri pataninel tak rech ri ajawinel ri banal etzelal, cäjeki' c'u na ri u tem re ajawibal pa ri suq'uil." 
Proverbs25:6 Maban awib chi nim a banic chuwäch ri ajawinel, mawi mamajij ri qui c'olbal ri winak ri nimak qui banic;" 
Proverbs25:7 are' nim na u banic chi catulax che pakalem chi' catmach'irisax chquiwäch ri nimak tak tatayib. Ri cawil cuc' ri e a bak'wäch: 
Proverbs25:8 mebac'am bic pa tak ri k'atbal tzij, we ne c'o chic jun k'alajisanel ri cäcuinic cubij chi man kastzij taj ri cabij chuq'uisbalil c'ut man cach'ob ta chic jas cabano." 
Proverbs25:9 Chato' awib pa u k'ab ri cattzujunic mawesaj c'u u tzijol ri awatal rumal ri a jil a tz'akat. 
Proverbs25:10 We c'u ne c'o jachin cattowic catuya' c'u pa q'uixbal, are c'u ri yok'bal ri cacanaj chawij man c'o ta a to'tajic chupam." 
Proverbs25:11 Jun tzij pa ri jok'otaj ri rajawaxic xak junam ruc' jun mansa'n re k'an puak ri nac'om chupam sak puak. 
Proverbs25:12 Jacha' jun mulk'ab xukuje' jun chachal re k'an puak ri coc' na, are je cuban wa' ri aj no'jalaj k'iloj ib che ri reta'm u c'amowaxic." 
Proverbs25:13 Ri jicalaj tako'n che ri cätakow bic xak junam ruc' ri tew ri cajorjobisan pa ri k'ij aretak c'o k'ak', cuya' c'u chajin anima' che ri rajaw." 
Proverbs25:14 E sutz' xukuje' ri quiakik' man c'o ta c'u jäb, jewa' ri ri winak ri cubij rib chi yanel man c'o ta c'u ri ya'tal ta rumal." 
Proverbs25:15 Ri coch'onic cukasaj ri oyowal; ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij cäquipaxij ri c'ulelanic. 
Proverbs25:16 We cärik juyubal räx cab, chatija' ri takalic ri catijo'; we c'u ne rumal roc'owisaxic u wi' ri catijo catxawic." 
Proverbs25:17 We casolij ri awachil, xak amak'el mabano, mäq'uistaj c'u ne u c'u'x chawe itzel ta chi c'u ne catrilo." 
Proverbs25:18 Wi't, ch'ich' re ch'o'j, ch'ab ri tz'imaj u wi', ¡are jewa' ri cuya' jalum k'alajisanic chrij ri rachil ri junam u wäch ruc'!" 
Proverbs25:19 U jiquibaxic c'uxaj chrij jun jachanel quieb u wäch pa tak ri jok'otaj re c'axc'olil xak junam ri' ruc' ri binem ruc' jun a'aj k'ajinak, o wa'im ruc' jun wareaj ri snoc'." 
Proverbs25:20 Qui bixoxic bix che jun anima'aj ri ch'ibatajinak xak junam ri' ruc' ri u q'uiakic ch'am chuwäch ri ch'a'c, o ri u k'olixic ri atz'iak pa ri k'ijol rech tew." 
Proverbs25:21 We ri a c'ulel canumic, chaya' ri cutijo; we c'u ne cachak'ij u chi' chaya' ri caruq'uiaj;" 
Proverbs25:22 jeri' caban na chi cäk'ak'an ri u palaj che q'uixbal, ri Ajawaxel c'ut cätojow na chawe." 
Proverbs25:23 Rumal ri quiakik' aj riquiak'ab elebal k'ij cäpe ri jäb, cumal c'ut ri itzel tak ak'aj ri itzel tak palaj." 
Proverbs25:24 Are utz na ri c'olem chuchi' ri u wi' ri ja, che u q'uexwäch ri c'olem pa jun nimalaj ja ruc' jun ixok ri xuwi ch'o'j cupatanij." 
Proverbs25:25 Jacha' ri ja' ri cäjororic chupam ri chaki'j kulaj ri cachaki'j u chi' jewa' cuban ri qui kajic utzalaj tak tzijol ri petinak pa naj tak ulew. 
Proverbs25:26 U q'uiyibal ja' xk'olatajinak xukuje' puk'talic are jeri' man c'o ta u mac ri cäbirbitic chuwäch ri ajchak'mac. 
Proverbs25:27 Man utz ta cubano we coc'ow u wi' u tijic juyubal räx cab, xukuje man utz taj cunimarisaj rib jun." 
Proverbs25:28 Jacha' jun tinimit ri man kasan ta pa nimalaj tapia ri xak tek'elic jeri' ri man reta'm taj catakan taj paquiwi' ri e u rayibal. 
Proverbs26:1 Man cätaki' ta ri tew che ri k'alaj mawi ri jäb che ri u yaquic ri u wäch ri ulew. Mawi ri e u ya'ic k'ij che ri man c'o ta u no'j. 
Proverbs26:2 Jacha' ri tz'unun sachinak o ri xipicar ri man c'o ta u soc, jeri' ri c'okonic ri man c'o ta rumal mawi jubik' copanic." 
Proverbs26:3 Ri quiej rajawaxic u nak'atisaxic, ri bur rajawaxic u jiq'uic, are c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j rajawaxic u rapuxic." 
Proverbs26:4 Ri man cutzelej taj u wäch ri u tzij, ri man c'o ta u no'j, man cäbixtaj chi ri at man c'o ta ri a no'j." 
Proverbs26:5 Ri reta'm u tzelexic u wäch ri u tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j, jacha' ri rilic cärilo." 
Proverbs26:6 U jiquibaxic jun takquil che ri man c'o ta u no'j are qui k'atic wa' ri akanaj qui tzucuxic c'u tak u q'ueyowal. 
Proverbs26:7 Man naj ta cäbe wi ri ch'oco'j cuc' tak ri u ch'ec mawi ri c'ambal no'j ri bim rumal ri man c'o ta u no'j. 
Proverbs26:8 Sibalaj nimalaj conil ri u ximic ri abaj chupam ri iquiak' xak junam ruc' ri u ya'ic qui k'ij ri man c'o ta qui no'j. 
Proverbs26:9 Ri k'abarel mawi cuna' ri q'uix, ri man c'o ta u no'j mawi cuch'ob ri c'ambal tak tzij." 
Proverbs26:10 Ri q'uiakal ch'ab quebuq'uiak conojel queboc'owic, ri cuya' chac che ri man c'o ta u no'j cho rachoch." 
Proverbs26:11 Ri tz'i' cätzelej ruc' ri u xo'j ri man c'o ta u no'j ruc' ri man c'o ta u no'jibal. 
Proverbs26:12 Are c'o na quechbex che ri man c'o ta u no'j chuwäch ri cuban rib chi sibalaj c'o u no'j. 
Proverbs26:13 Rech man cächacun ta ri sak'or cucoj pa u tzij cubij chi c'o jun coj pa ri u be ri quel ulok chrij. 
Proverbs26:14 Ri uchi'ja cutzalc'atila' rib puwi' ri u wikob are' c'u ri sak'or cutzalc'atila' rib puwi' ri u ch'at. 
Proverbs26:15 Ri sak'or cunim ri u k'ab chupam ri liq'uilic lak, man cäticar ta c'ut cuya' chu chi'." 
Proverbs26:16 Ri sak'or cuchomaj rib chi c'o na u no'j chquiwäch wukub winak ri queta'm qui tzelexic qui wäch tak ri tzij. 
Proverbs26:17 U cojic ib pa ri qui ch'o'j jule' tak winak chic are u chapic jun tz'i' che ri quieb u xiquin. 
Proverbs26:18 Jacha' jun ch'u'j ri quebutzokopij cämisanelalaj tak ch'ab re k'ak'," 
Proverbs26:19 are jewa' ri cusub ri rachil, cubij c'ut chi xa alachi' ri cubano." 
Proverbs26:20 We man c'o si' cächup ri k'ak', we c'u man c'o tzijtal cäq'uis ri ch'o'j." 
Proverbs26:21 Che u banic rachak k'ak', ri ak'al; che u banic k'ak', ri si'; che c'u qui jekic ri ch'o'j, ri yacal ch'o'j." 
Proverbs26:22 Ri e tzijtal tak xak e junam cuc' tak ri munibal, quebopan c'ä chquipam tak ri bak." 
Proverbs26:23 Sak puak bilom chrij t'uy re t'ac e je tak wa' ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij ri xak quieb caquibij. 
Proverbs26:24 Ri caq'uiäkwächinic man cuc'ut taj aretak cätzijonic, cätajin c'u quebuchomaj itzel tak chomanic pa ri ranima'." 
Proverbs26:25 Matcojo we catuch'abej ruc' ch'uch'ujil, nojinak c'ut ri u chomabal che etzelal;" 
Proverbs26:26 pune' cutzucuj u c'u'ic ri u quiäkwächinic, ri retzelal quel na chi sak chquiwäch conojel." 
Proverbs26:27 Ri cuc'ot jun jul, chupam cätzak wi; ri cuwolkotij jun nimalaj abaj, caxak'alex rumal ri nimalaj abaj." 
Proverbs26:28 Ri banal tzij cuquiäkwächij ri kastzij, ri ch'uch'uj cätzijonic cuyac wojcorem." 
Proverbs27:1 Maban nimal che ri k'ij re chwek, man aweta'm ta c'ut ri cuc'am ulok ri chwek." 
Proverbs27:2 Chaya' c'olbal chi e jule' tak chi wi ri cheyo'w a k'ij; man ya'tal taj chi at caya' a k'ij chbil awib. 
Proverbs27:3 Ri abaj xukuje' ri sanyeb e al, are c'u sibalaj al na ri royowal ri man c'o ta u no'j." 
Proverbs27:4 Ri c'anal man cätok'obisan ta wächaj, are c'u ri oyowarem cusachisaj wächaj, e are tak c'ut ri achixomanic man e k'atatijel taj." 
Proverbs27:5 Are utz na ri yajanic chisakil chuq'uexwäch ri ajawinic chic'uyal. 
Proverbs27:6 Are cuya' na cäjiquibax c'uxaj chrij ri achil ri casoconic chuq'uexwäch ri c'ulel ri cätz'umanic. 
Proverbs27:7 Ri nojinak, cäretzelaj c'u ne na ri u wäch ri juyubal räx cab; ri c'o u numic, xukuje' ne ri c'a qui' cuna' na." 
Proverbs27:8 Jacha' ri chicop ri c'o u xic' ri naj cäwacat wi che ri u soc are jeri' naj cabin wi che ri c'olbal ri xalax wi. 
Proverbs27:9 Che u quicotisaxic ri anima'aj, utzalaj tak c'oc'al; che u qui'yirisaxic ri c'aslibal, jun no'j cumal tak ri achilab." 
Proverbs27:10 Mawi jubik' mebawonoba' ri e awachil mawi ri e rachil ri a tat. Mawi jubik' mebac'am bic ri u q'ueyowal ri c'o awuc' pa rachoch ri awachalal. Are' utz na ri c'ulja nakaj chuq'uexwäch ri achalaxel ri c'o naj. 
Proverbs27:11 Chatux ajno'j, nu c'ojol, cäban c'u na chwe chi sibalaj utz wech; jeri' quincuinic c'o quintzelej na u bixic chque ri caquiban il patan chwe." 
Proverbs27:12 Ri utz cächomanic cäril ri sayowem quel c'u na chuwäch; ri man utz ta cächomanic cutakej ri u be cäkajbex c'u rumal ri winakchi'. 
Proverbs27:13 Ri cach'aw puwi' jun winak ri man etamatal ta u wäch chawesaj ri ratz'iak chac'ama' che tojbal rech ri ch'awinak puwi'. 
Proverbs27:14 Ri u ya'ic rutzil u wäch ri achil cuc' tak rakojchi'aj sibalaj ta c'u ak'ab, xak junam ri' che chi xa cätzuric." 
Proverbs27:15 Xak junam ri ixok ri xak cach'ojinic ruc' jun tz'uj ri man cätani' taj pa ri u k'ijol ri jäb. 
Proverbs27:16 We cajwax u k'atixic xak junam ri' we ta cajwax u k'atixic ri quiakik' o ri u muk'exic ri aseit pa ri k'abaj. 
Proverbs27:17 Ri cuchilo cajux ruc' ch'ich' are c'u ri winak ruc' jun winak chic. 
Proverbs27:18 Ri cächajin ri u che'al higo quebutij rech ri higo; ri cuchajij ri rajaw cuc'am nimarisabal u k'ij. 
Proverbs27:19 E je jacha' ri palajaj ri quec'utun chupam ri ja', e jeri' xukuje' ri winak quec'utun chupam ri qui chomanic." 
Proverbs27:20 Ri cämical, ri u jul cäminak xukuje' ri u quiäk rayinic ri winak mawi jubik' quenojic." 
Proverbs27:21 Ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak, ri k'ak' quetijtojebenic, are' c'u ri achi cätijtobex cumal ri e u ya'ic u k'ij." 
Proverbs27:22 Che ri man c'o ta u no'j man quel ta ri no'j che pune' ta ne cäque'xic cätakex ta c'u u que'xic. 
Proverbs27:23 Man catel ta chquij ri a chij, chebawilij tak ri e a jumulaj," 
Proverbs27:24 mawi c'u ne tak k'inomal mawi c'u ne tak ri corona quebeytaj ta chbe k'ij sak. 
Proverbs27:25 Aretak cäc'utun ri echa', cäpok' c'u ri räxal, quemol c'u pa tak ri juyub," 
Proverbs27:26 chque tak ri alaj tak a chij cawesaj wi ri quismal chij ri cacoj che awatz'iak, chque ri alaj tak a q'uisic' puak che qui lok'ic tak ulew." 
Proverbs27:27 Chque ri ati'tab tak a q'uisic' q'uialaj leche ri catij at xukuje' tak ri e awalc'ual xukuje' conojel ri catpataninic. 
Proverbs28:1 Ri banal etzelal canimajic pune' man c'o jachin tereninak, e are' tak c'ut ri e suc' quejeki' ruc' cu'bisan c'uxaj jacha' ri coj." 
Proverbs28:2 Aretak man utz ta benak ri ulew, queq'uiyir ri k'atal tak tzij, are' c'u ri utzalaj c'amal be reta'm ruc'axic ri cholajil." 
Proverbs28:3 Ri banal etzelal ri cuban c'ax chque ri mebayib xak junam ruc' ri nimalaj jäb ri cusach qui wäch ri tico'n. 
Proverbs28:4 Ri cäquitas quib caquiya' can ri pixab cäquiya' u k'ij ri banal etzelal; ri caquitz'akatisaj cäquic'ulelaj. 
Proverbs28:5 Ri e banal tak etzelal man c'o ta jas cäquich'ob che ri suq'uilal, jachin tak c'ut ri quenakajin che ri Ajawaxel cäquich'ob ronojel." 
Proverbs28:6 Are utz na uxic meba' tz'akatisanel c'ut pa ronojel che uxic k'inom ri xak quieb u pam. 
Proverbs28:7 Ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri u pixab ri Dios jun c'ojolaxel wa' ri c'oxomanel, are' c'u ri cäbin cuc' tak ri ajwi'lab q'uixbal wa' che ri u tat." 
Proverbs28:8 Ri quebumulij tak k'inomal rumal ri ral puak ri cutok'ij, quebumulij che ri quel u c'u'x chque ri mebayib." 
Proverbs28:9 We c'o jun man craj taj coc il che ri u pixab ri Dios, mawi ri Dios man quebuc'och' ta ri e u ch'awem ruc'." 
Proverbs28:10 Ri quebuc'am bic ri e utz pa itzel be cäkaj na pa ri u c'amibal; e are' c'u ri winak ri man c'o ta etzelal caquibano cäquic'am na ri sibalaj utz na. 
Proverbs28:11 Ri k'inom cuna' rib chi sibalaj ajno'j, are' c'u ri meba' ri cac'oxomanic cuya' cuc'ambejej." 
Proverbs28:12 Aretak quech'äcan ri suc', cäban nimalaj nimak'ij; aretak quech'äcan ri banal tak etzelal, ri winak cäquic'u' quib." 
Proverbs28:13 Jachin ri quebusach u tza'm ri macaj man utz ta quel na; are' c'u ri quebuk'alajisaj cutanaba' c'u qui banic, cäsach na u mac." 
Proverbs28:14 Utz re ri winak ri amak'el cuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; are' c'u ri cuban co che ri ranima' cäkaj na pa ri quiäkasakil. 
Proverbs28:15 Cajunamataj ruc' jun coj ri cawunic o jun os ri bik'onel ri banal etzelal ri cajawin puwi' jun meba'laj tinimit. 
Proverbs28:16 Ri k'atal tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j cunimatajisaj ri u banic c'ax; are' c'u ri man quiäk rayinel taj naj cäc'asi na. 
Proverbs28:17 Jachin ri u banom jun cämic man cätaq'ui' ta na c'ä cätzak na pa ri mukbal: ¡C'o jun mutijtobej u k'atixic! 
Proverbs28:18 Ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel man c'o ta cuc'ulmaj, are' c'u ri itzel winak cätzak na pa ri etzelal." 
Proverbs28:19 Jachin ri cutajij ri rulew, cäto'taj na ri cutijo; ri cäbin cuc' sak'orib, ri cäto'taj ruc' are ri mebayil." 
Proverbs28:20 Jachin ri ya'tal u jiquibaxic c'uxaj caya' na u k'ij; jachin sibalaj curayij ri k'inomal man cäcanaj ta canok chi ma ta cac'äjisax u wäch. 
Proverbs28:21 Man ya'tal ta u yok'ic jachin jun; c'ä xa ne xa rumal jun ch'akap caxlanwa cuya' cäban macunic. 
Proverbs28:22 Ri quiäk rayinel cäsac'satic rumal rech chi k'inom, man reta'm ta c'ut chi cäpe na ri mebayil puwi'." 
Proverbs28:23 Ri cäbin che jun winak chi chuk'ila' rib, chuq'uisbalil sibalaj curik' na tok'ob, chuwäch ri cuya' u k'ij." 
Proverbs28:24 Cachil banal tak c'ax jachin ri queläk' chquij ri u nan u tat cucoj c'u pa ch'o'j che u bixic chi man c'o ta jas u banom. 
Proverbs28:25 Ri sibalaj caquiäk rayinic quebuyac tak ch'o'j; are c'u ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel cäpax u wäch ri cubano. 
Proverbs28:26 Xuwi jun man c'o ta u no'j cujiquiba' u c'u'x chquij ri e u chomanic; ri cäpatanij ruc' no'j man c'o ta jas cuc'ulmaj. 
Proverbs28:27 Jachin ri cuban tok'ob che ri meba' man c'o ta cäq'uetet wi, are c'u ri cuk'il ri u to'banic che sibalaj cäc'okox na." 
Proverbs28:28 Aretak quech'äcan ri banal tak etzelal ri winak cäquic'u' quib; aretak copan ri q'uisbal qui k'ij, quetakan tak ri suc'." 
Proverbs29:1 Ri cuban rib chi tacaticalaj con aretak cäk'ilic, chanim cäsachisax na u wäch man c'o ta u to'tajic." 
Proverbs29:2 Aretak are quetakan tak ri suc', ri winak quequicotic; aretak ri banal tak etzelal are' e quek'atow tzij, ri winak cäquirik c'ax." 
Proverbs29:3 Ri c'ojolaxel ajno'j cuban che ri u tat chi sibalaj utz rech; ri cäbin cuc' tak ixokib re nim ch'utin cusachala' ri puak. 
Proverbs29:4 Ri ajawinel ri cuban suq'uilal cujekeba' ri rulew; ri xuwi tok'im cuchuj cubano cuyojyobisaj. 
Proverbs29:5 Ri amak'el cuya' u k'ij ri rachil, kastzij cätajin culic' jun c'amibal chuwäch." 
Proverbs29:6 Ri e u c'amibal ri banal etzelal e are' tak ri e u mac; are' c'u ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel cäquicotic utz c'u rech. 
Proverbs29:7 Ri suc' coc il che u to'ic ri meba', are' c'u ri banal etzelal man c'o ta cubij u c'u'x che." 
Proverbs29:8 Ri tuquinelab cäquesaj ch'u'j jun tinimit; ri ajno'jab queta'm qui jamarisaxic ri winak. 
Proverbs29:9 Ri ajno'j ri cutakej ch'o'j ruc' ri man c'o ta u no'j, cuyac royowal, cätze'x u wäch man c'o ta c'u jas ri cacuin che u banic." 
Proverbs29:10 Ri cämisanelab ri man c'o ta canima' cäquetzelaj u wäch ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel c'ä cäquicämisaj na. 
Proverbs29:11 Ri man c'o ta u no'j xak cuya' be chque tak ri e itzel tak u rayibal, are' c'u ri ajno'j cucoj u chuk'ab che qui k'atixic." 
Proverbs29:12 Ri k'atal tzij ri quebuc'ulaj ri banoj tzij quebuchuwirisaj conojel ri pataninel tak rech. 
Proverbs29:13 Ri c'axc'obisam xukuje' ri c'axc'obisanel c'o ri quejunamataj wi, ri Ajawaxel u yo'm ri qui bak'wäch qui cabichal." 
Proverbs29:14 Ri ajawinel ri cuban suc'alaj k'atan tzij chque ri mebayib, cujekeba' ri u tem re ajawibal re k'ij junab." 
Proverbs29:15 Cumal ch'ayic xukuje' k'ilonic cäban etamanic, are' c'u ri c'ojolaxel ri xak cämalamaxic cäresaj u q'uixbal ri u nan." 
Proverbs29:16 We quebuchuw ri e banal tak etzelal, quebuchuw ri macaj; e are' c'u ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel quequil na chi quetzakmajic." 
Proverbs29:17 Chapixbej ri a c'ojol man c'o ta c'u latz' cuya' na chawe, quebuya' c'u na q'ui cu'bisabal c'uxaj chawe." 
Proverbs29:18 Jawije' ri man c'o ta wi ri u tzij ri Dios man c'o ta utzalaj cholajil; ¡Sibalaj utz rech ri tinimit ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri u pixab ri Dios! 
Proverbs29:19 Cuc' tzij man cäsuc'umataj taj ri lok'om pataninel, cuch'obonic, man caniman ta c'ut." 
Proverbs29:20 Are' c'o quechbex na che jun ri man c'o ta u no'j chuwäch ri winak ri man cuchomaj taj ri cubij. 
Proverbs29:21 Ri cupuquej ri u lok'om pataninel pa ri u ch'utinal, chuq'uisbalil cäril na rib pa u k'ab." 
Proverbs29:22 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cätakchinic chi queyac tak ch'o'j quebuban c'u q'ui sachinakil. 
Proverbs29:23 Ri cuban nimal cämach'irisaxic, are' c'u ri u mach'om rib cänimarisax u k'ij." 
Proverbs29:24 Ri cuto' u wi' ri eläk'om u c'ulel rib chbil rib, pune' quebuta' tak ri c'okonic man cak'alajisan taj." 
Proverbs29:25 Ri xe'n ib chquiwäch ri winak are jun c'amibal, are' c'u ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel chajitalic." 
Proverbs29:26 Sibalaj e q'ui ri cäquitzucuj ri u tok'ob ri k'atal tzij, xuwi c'u ri Ajawaxel cuban suq'uil." 
Proverbs29:27 Ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel man quequicoch' taj ri e banal tak etzelal, e are' tak c'ut ri e banal tak etzelal man quequicoch' taj ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel." 
Proverbs30:1 U tijonic tak ri Agur, u c'ojol ri Jaque re Masa. Ri Agur xuch'abej ri Itiel xukuje' ri Ucal je xubij wa' chque:" 
Proverbs30:2 In ri in awaj na chquixo'l ri achijab, man c'o ta chomanic aj winak wuc'." 
Proverbs30:3 Man nu rikom ta no'j, mawi c'o weta'm chrij ri Jun ri Sibalaj Tastalic." 
Proverbs30:4 ¿Jachin ri pakalinak kajinak c'u ulok chicaj? ¿Jachin ri cäcuinic cumuk'ej ri quiakik' chupam u k'ab? ¿Jachin ri capisow ri plo chupam ri u ku'? ¿Jachin xejekeban tak ri u c'ulbatil ri ulew? ¡Mabij chwe chi aweta'm ri u bi', xukuje' ne ri u bi' ri u c'ojol!" 
Proverbs30:5 Ri Ajawaxel quebuto' ri cäquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chrij; conojel tak ri e u chi'nic takal c'u quijiquibaxic c'uxaj chquij. 
Proverbs30:6 C'o jas matik che ri cubij na are' we man je cabano cacuinic catuyajo, cuk'alajisaj chi catcanaj banal tzij." 
Proverbs30:7 Xa quieb jastak nu tz'onon che la nu Dios; cheya' ba' la chwe c'ä majok chincämok: 
Proverbs30:8 chnajtajisaj la ri cawächil xukuje' ri banoj tzij chwe, maban la k'inom chwe mawi meba'; xuwi ya' la ri nu wa ri cajwatajic," 
Proverbs30:9 we c'u ne c'o u wi' cäto'tajic wuc'; cuya' ri' cäsach la pa nu jolom, quinbij ta c'ut chi man weta'm ta wäch la; we c'u man cubana' chwe cuya' ri' quineläk'ic, quinya' c'u ri tastalicalaj bi' la pa yok'ic." 
Proverbs30:10 Mayok' ri lok'om pataninel chuwäch ri rajaw, matuc'okoj c'u ne wa' cakajbej c'u na ri c'äjisabal wächaj." 
Proverbs30:11 E c'o jachin tak quequic'okoj ri qui tat man quequitewichi'j ta c'ut ri qui nan. 
Proverbs30:12 E c'o jachin tak cäquichomaj quib chi sibalaj e ch'ajch'oj man qui ch'ajch'ojirisam ta c'u quib che ri qui tz'ilol. 
Proverbs30:13 E c'o jachin tak cäquichomaj quib chi sibalaj nim qui banic, cäquiban c'u nimal paquiwi' ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Proverbs30:14 E c'o jachin tak e c'o ch'ich' re ch'o'j cuc' che u q'uexwäch qui ware, xukuje' cuchilo che qui q'uexwäch tak qui ca', che kas u sachisaxic qui wäch ri mebayib ri e c'o pa ri ulew." 
Proverbs30:15 E quieb ral ri nimalaj q'uiak e c'olic ri xak xuwi queta'm quetz'onon che u ta'ic quic'. E c'o oxib jastak, c'a e quiejeb c'u ne na ri mawi jubik' cänojic:" 
Proverbs30:16 ri u jul cäminak, ri ixok ri man calam taj, ri ulew ri man u rikom ta ja', xukuje' ri k'ak' ri mawi jubik' cächupic." 
Proverbs30:17 Ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri u tat cäretz'bej c'u u wäch ri u nan ri nim winak chic, ya'tal che chi quec'otix ri e u bak'wäch cumal ri joj xukuje' chi cätij cumal ri cot." 
Proverbs30:18 E c'o oxib jastak, c'ä e quiejeb c'u ne na ri quebenmayij, ri xukuje' man quinrik ta ri qui ch'obic:" 
Proverbs30:19 ri u be ri cot cho ri caj, ri u be ri sachoj cho ri abaj, ri u be ri jucub puwi' ri nimalaj plo, ri u be ri achi che ri ixok." 
Proverbs30:20 Ri ixok ri man jic taj je cuban wa' cäwa'ic, cusu' ri u chi' cujiquiba' c'u u bixic chi man c'o ta lawaloyil u banom." 
Proverbs30:21 E c'o oxib qui wäch winak, c'ä e quiejeb c'u ne na, ri man e ch'ijtajel taj cäquiyokopisaj c'ut jun ulew:" 
Proverbs30:22 ri lok'om pataninel ri cäcuinic cux ajawinel, ri con ri cäto'taj ri cutijo." 
Proverbs30:23 Ri ixok ri etzelam u wäch ri curik rachajil, ri lok'om pataninel ri cumajij ri u c'olbal ri rixokil ri rajaw." 
Proverbs30:24 E c'o quiejeb ch'utik tak awaj cho ri uwächulew ri e ajno'jab na chquiwäch ri ajno'jab: 
Proverbs30:25 ri sanicab, nimalaj juk'at ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab, cäquic'ol can ri qui wa pa ri sak'ij;" 
Proverbs30:26 ri imulib, ri man kas ta quebuchuwic ri e jekel xo'l tak ri abaj;" 
Proverbs30:27 ri saq'uib, ri pune' man c'o ta cajawinel pa tz'akatalaj cholajil querapinic;" 
Proverbs30:28 ri xpa'chib, ri cuya' quemuk'exic quebopan c'ä chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel." 
Proverbs30:29 E c'o oxib c'o qui chuk'ab c'ä e quiejeb c'u ne na, ri c'o jun qui binem xibibal:" 
Proverbs30:30 ri coj, are' awaj wa' ri sibalaj xibibal, ri man canimaj ta chuwäch jun jasach mawi chuwäch jachin jun;" 
Proverbs30:31 ri ama' ec' ri banal nimal, ri ama' q'uisic' xukuje' ri ajawinel ri cänabej chquiwäch ri rajch'ojab." 
Proverbs30:32 We xak ruc' conil a nimarisam a k'ij e a banom c'u itzel tak chomanic, chatchomanok." 
Proverbs30:33 We c'u cabak ri leche, cärik na mantequiy che, we c'u co cajisq'uej ri a tza'm, quel na u quiq'uel, we c'u catzur jun chic caq'uis na u tza'm pa jun ch'ojinic." 
Proverbs31:1 E u tzij ri ajawinel Lemuel aj Mas, ri xtijobex rech rumal ri u nan." 
Proverbs31:2 Wal, qui wächinic ri nu c'u'x, tzelebal qui wäch tak ri nu bochi'nic ri xuya' ri Dios, ¿jas ta chic ri quincuin ta chi che u bixic chawe?" 
Proverbs31:3 Chi maq'uis ri a chuk'ab cuc' tak ri ixokib, u mac c'u quech ri ixokib quebetzeletaj tak ri ajawinelab." 
Proverbs31:4 Man utz ta c'ut, Lemuel, chi ri ajawinel xukuje' tak ri e k'atal tak tzij cacuq'uiaj u wa'l uva xukuje' ri c'a tak uq'uia'," 
Proverbs31:5 cuya' c'u ri' cäsach ri pixab pa qui jolom cäquijech'obisaj c'u u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri man nimak ta qui k'ij. 
Proverbs31:6 Chaya' can ri u wa'l uva xukuje' ri c'a tak uq'uia' chque ri quebisonic chque ri man cäquirik ta chic jas cäquibano; 
Proverbs31:7 ¡chcuq'uiaj u wa'l uva manataj chic chque ri qui mebayil xukuje' ri qui rikoj tak c'ax! 
Proverbs31:8 Co chatch'aw che qui q'uexwäch ri man co ta quech'awic; ¡chebato' ri man quecuin taj cäquito' quib! 
Proverbs31:9 Co chatch'awok, chabana' c'u suq'uil chque; ¡chebato' ri mebayib xukuje' ri man nimak ta qui k'ij!" 
Proverbs31:10 Mayibalalaj ixok, ¿la ma ta c'ax u rikic? ¡C'o na rajil chquiwäch tak ri je'lalaj abaj ri perl!" 
Proverbs31:11 Ri rachajil kas cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij, man c'o ta jun k'ij ri ma ta c'o u ch'äcoj." 
Proverbs31:12 Quebuya' nimak tak utzil che ri rachajil conojel ri k'ij re ri u c'aslemal. 
Proverbs31:13 Cäbe che u tzucuxic rismal chij xukuje' lino ruc' c'ut quicotemal quebuchacuj tak chac cuc' tak ri e u k'ab. 
Proverbs31:14 Ri je ta ne jun jucub quech ajc'ayib ri naj quebuc'ama' wi ulok ri jastak ri quebajwataj che. 
Proverbs31:15 C'ä maja' casakaric cäwalij che qui tzukic ri ral xukuje' ri e u pataninelab. 
Proverbs31:16 Cäbe che rilic jun ulew culok' c'ut, cuc' tak ri u ch'äcoj quebutic tak uva." 
Proverbs31:17 Cuxim ri u xe' u pam che u cojic u chuk'ab ruc' c'u chajin anima' coc che u banic ri chac. 
Proverbs31:18 Coc il cärilij ri c'ayij rech utz quelic, cächacun chak'ab c'ä canajtin na ri ak'ab." 
Proverbs31:19 Quebucoj ri u k'ab che bätz'inic xukuje' cäquemenic. 
Proverbs31:20 Amak'el c'o cuya' chque ri mebayib xukuje' chque ri c'o qui rajawaxic. 
Proverbs31:21 Man c'o ta cubij u c'u'x chque ri ral aretak cäkaj ri tew, conojel c'u ri ral qui cojom pimak tak qui k'u'." 
Proverbs31:22 Kas are' quequemow tak catz'iak, are' c'u quebucoj ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak che ratz'iak." 
Proverbs31:23 Ri rachajil sibalaj etamatal u wäch chupam ri tinimit, are jun chquixo'l ri tatayib ri nimak qui k'ij pa ri ulew." 
Proverbs31:24 We ixok ri' quebuban tak u pam atz'iak xukuje' tak pas ri quebuc'ayij chque tak ri ajc'ayib. 
Proverbs31:25 Cuc'ac'arisaj ri u chuk'ab xukuje' nim ilic, man coc ta il che ri k'ij re chwek." 
Proverbs31:26 Amak'el catzijon ruc' no'j, ruc' c'u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj quebuya' tak ri e u tijonic." 
Proverbs31:27 Coc il rech ronojel utz cabin pa ri rachoch, mawi jumul cutij ri man u ch'äcom taj." 
Proverbs31:28 Ri e ral xukuje' ri rachajil cäquiya' u k'ij cäquibij c'u che: 
Proverbs31:29 “Utzalaj tak ixokib sibalaj e q'ui e c'olic, are' c'u ri at at ri sibalaj at utz na chquiwäch conojel.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Ri wikbal tak ib xak e jun banoj tzij, ri je'lical xak oc'owel, are' c'u ri ixok ri nim cäril wi ri Ajawaxel ya'tal u ya'ic u k'ij." 
Proverbs31:31 ¡Chiya' u k'ij chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit! ¡Chiya' u k'ij rumal ronojel ri u banom! 
Ecclesiastes1:1 E are tak wa' ri u tzij ri k'alajisanel, u c'ojol ri David, ri xajawin pa Jerusalen." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 ¡Man c'o ta cubej, man c'o ta u beya'l! ¡Ronojel man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 ¿Jas ri cärechbej ri winak che ri sibalaj chac ri cuban cho we uwächulew ri'? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Jujun quebalaxic jujun chic quecämic, are c'u ri uwächulew mawi jubik' cäq'uextajic." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Quel ulok ri k'ij, cuc'u' rib ri k'ij, chanim c'ut catzelej pa ri u c'olbal rech quel chi ulok jumul." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Cajich'ich' ri quiakik' pa ri u mox elebal k'ij, cujalc'atij c'u rib cäbe pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij. ¡Cujalc'atij rib cujalc'atij c'u rib ri quiakik'! ¡Cujalc'atij rib cujalc'atij chi c'u rib!" 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Conojel tak ri nima' quebe chupam ri plo, mawi c'u ne jubik' canoj ta ri plo; quetzelej c'u ri nima' jawije' ri e petinak wi rech caquibinibej chi jumul ri qui be." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Man c'o ta jun cäcuin ta che u k'alajisaxic joropa' ri q'uistajisabal c'uxaj caquiya' conojel ri jastak; man c'o ta jun cubana' ta che ri cutatabej xukuje' ri carilo rech ma ta c'o chi jas cäraj. 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Man c'o ta jas cac'oji' na ri ma ta c'olinak nabe; man c'o ta jas caban na ri ma ta banom canok nabe. ¡Man c'o ta c'olic ri c'ac' ta cho we uwächulew ri'! 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kas c'o c'u wi ri' ri cäbinic: “¡Wa' we ri' are jun c'ac' jasach!” C'olinak c'u ne ulok wa' nabe ojer c'ä majok chujc'olok uj. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ri jastak ri e oc'owinak man quenatax ta chic, xukuje' man c'u quenatax ta chi na ri jastak ri quepe na chquixo'l ri c'äte quepe na." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 In, ri k'alajisanel, xinux ajawinel re Israel pa Jerusalen," 
Ecclesiastes1:13 xinjach c'u ronojel ri nu c'aslemal che u ch'obic xukuje' che retamaxic ruc' no'jibal ronojel ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri'. ¡Alalaj eka'n ri u yo'm ri Dios paquiwi' ri winak che qui mach'irisaxic ruc' wa'! 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Xincuin c'u che u ch'obic chi ronojel ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri' man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', cajwax u chapic ri quiakik'." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 ¡Mawi cuya' casuc'ubax ri jech'obinak, mawi ri man c'o taj man cuya' taj cajilaxic!" 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Xinbij c'u chbil wib: “Waral, banom chwe chi in jun nimalaj nu banic, c'o na nu no'j chquiwäch conojel ri e ajawininak can nabe chnuwäch pa Jerusalen;" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 xinjachachej c'u wib che kas retamaxic ri no'j, ri etamanic, xukuje' ri man cäch'obon taj, ri man no'j taj; xa c'u rech quinch'obo chi xukuje' wa' xa cajwax u chapic ri quiakik'.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Kas c'u ne tzij, we c'o nimalaj no'j, e c'o na nimalaj latz'; we nim na ri etamanic, nim na ri c'ax." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Xukuje' xinbij chbil wib: “Camic quenbana' ri tijtobenic quenquicotisaj wib; quenya' jun je'licalaj c'aslemal chwe.” ¡Xukuje' c'u ne wa' man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Xinch'ob c'ut chi ri tze' xukuje' ri cäkaj chwächaj man c'o ta cupatanij. 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ruc' ri nu chomanic ri c'o chuxe' ri no'j, xinwaj xintijtobej jas cuban ri u wa'l uva chwe, xinjach c'u wib che ruq'uiaxic rech quinwetamaj we are wa' ri sibalaj takal na che ri winak pa ri ajilatal tak k'ij ri cac'oji' cho we uwächulew ri'," 
Ecclesiastes2:4 xebentak qui banic nimak tak chac; xebentak qui yaquic nimak tak ja; xec'oji' nu ticbal tak uva pa wech wi. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Xintak qui tajixic ticbal tak wichaj pa wech wi xukuje' tak nu ticbal cotz'i'j, xebentic c'u ronojel qui wäch tak che' ri quequiya' qui wäch." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Xebenban c'olbal ja' che qui nojisaxic che ja' che qui ja'xic tak ri che ri e ticom; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 xebenlok' lok'om pataninelab achijab xukuje' lok'om pataninelab ixokib, xec'oji' c'u ne nu pataninelab ri xebalax cho ja; xukuje' e q'ui na ri ati'tab tak nu wacax xukuje' tak nu chij chuwäch apachique jun chic ri xc'oji' can nabe chnuwäch pa Jerusalen." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Xeben mulij jutak mulaj k'an puak xukuje' sak puak k'inomal ri e quech can jule' tak ajawinelab chic xukuje' e quech can jule' tak u k'ab tinimit chic. Xec'oji' nu bixonelab ixokib xukuje' achijab, quicotemal wa' aj winak, xukuje' xquiterebela' tak quib e q'uialaj tak ixokib ri man e kas ta e wixokilal ri xec'oji' wuc'." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Xinux jun winak ri sibalaj nim u banic, nim na ri nu k'inomal ri xc'oji' chquiwäch ri xec'oji' can nabe chnuwäch pa Jerusalen. Pune' c'u ruc' ronojel wa', ri no'j man quinuwonoba' taj." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Mawi jumul xink'il ta wib che jun jasach ri xinrayij; mawi jumul xink'il ta wib che jun quicotisabal chwe. Xinquicotisaj ri wanima' cuc' conojel tak ri nu chac, are c'u we quicotemal ri' are tojbal wech." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Xinoc c'u che u chomaxic tak ri kas e nu chac, xukuje' ri c'ax ri xinrik che qui banic, xinch'ob c'ut chi ronojel man c'o ta cubej, xak lok', jun u k'atixic u chapic ri quiakik', ri man c'o ta quechbex che cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Xinoc chi c'u che chomanic puwi' ri no'j, ri man no'jil taj xukuje' ri man cäch'obom taj: ¿Jas ta chi c'u lo ri cacuin ta chi che u banic ri cajawin na pa nu q'uexwäch, we ta mat are ri banom chic nabe?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Xinrik c'ut chi are c'o quechbex na che ri no'j chuwäch ri man no'jinic taj, jacha' chi are c'o quechbex na che ri sakilal chuwäch ri k'ekumalil." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ri c'o u no'j utz qui cojic ri e u bak'wäch quebucojo, are c'u ri man aj no'j ta cäbin pa k'ekumalil. Xinch'ob c'ut chi xak junam quebeyem conojel," 
Ecclesiastes2:15 xinbij c'u chbil wib: “Ri queyem ri man ajno'j ta xukuje' quineyem in, je c'u ri' man c'o ta cupatanij q'uialaj no'j chwe. ¡Xukuje' ne wa' xa cawächibal ri xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mawi ri c'o u no'j mawi man c'o ta u no'j c'o ta quinataxic amak'el; pa tak c'u ri k'ij ri quepetic ronojel sachinak chic, cäcäm c'u na ri c'o u no'j jacha' xukuje' ri man c'o ta u no'j.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Xinban woyowal che ri c'aslemal, ronojel c'ut ri caban cho we uwächulew ri' cac'ulelan chwe. Kastzij, ronojel xa cawächibal xak lok', ¡Xa' cajwax u chapic ri quiakik'!" 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Xinban woyowal xukuje' che ronojel ri chac ri xinban cho we uwächulew ri', ronojel quinya' na cänok che ri quinjalowic." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Jun jasach c'ut kas jic: chi jun we are' ri ajno'j, we man ajno'j taj, cubana' na rech che ronojel ri ruc' sibalaj chac xukuje' no'j xinticar che u rikic cho we uwächulew ri'. ¡Xukuje' c'u wa' xa cawächibal xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Aretak xinca'yej ri nu banom cho we uwächulew ri', xinbisoj chi sibalaj in chacuninak," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 c'o c'u jachin cucoj no'j, etamanic xukuje' esbal no'j chupam ri u chac, xa c'u che u ya'ic can ronojel che ri man xchacun ta che u rikic. ¡Xukuje' wa' xa cawächibal xak lok' xukuje' jun nimalaj man suq'uil taj!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Chuq'uisbalil, ¿jas ri cuch'äc ri winak che ri sibalaj chac ri cubano xukuje' che ri sibalaj roquic il cho we uwächulew ri'?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ronojel ri u c'aslemal re rikoj c'ax, jun eka'n wa' ri cuya' latz'; mawi c'u ne cuxlan ri u chomanic chak'ab. ¡Xukuje' c'u wa' xa' cawächibal xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ri utz na ri cuya' cuban ri winak chwok xukuje' chuq'uianok, chutija' chucojo' ri u wächinic ri u chac, nu rikom c'ut chi xukuje' wa' cäpe ruc' ri Dios." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 ¿Jachin ta c'ut ri cacuinic cäwa'ic, o cäquicotic, we ta mat rumal are'?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Je c'u wa' ri cac'ulmatajic, ri Dios cuya' no'j, etamanic xukuje' quicotemal jachin ri carilo chi takal che; are' c'ut ri cämacunic cuya' ri eka'n che chi chpok'colijok chebumulij c'u tak k'inomal rech cuya' che jachin ri caril ri Dios chi cakaj chuwäch. ¡Xukuje' wa' xa cawächibal xak lok' xa cajwax u chapic ri quiakik'!" 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Pa we uwächulew ri' ronojel c'o u k'ijol; c'o jun jok'otaj che ronojel ri cac'ulmatajic: 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Jun jok'otaj che alanic, jun jok'otaj chic che cämic. Jun jok'otaj che ticonijic jun jok'otaj chic che u bokic ri ticom." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Jun jok'otaj che cämisanic, jun jok'otaj chic che cunanic. Jun jok'otaj che yojinic, jun jok'otaj chic che yacanic." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Jun jok'otaj che ok'enic, jun jok'otaj chic che tze'nic. Jun jok'otaj che c'olem pa bis, jun jok'otaj chic che c'olem pa nimak'ij." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Jun jok'otaj che qui jabuxic abaj, jun jok'otaj chic che qui molic. Jun jok'otaj che u lak'apuxic ib, jun jok'otaj chic che tzokopim ib." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Jun jok'otaj che tijtobenic, jun jok'otaj chic che u k'iloj ib. Jun jok'otaj che c'olonic, jun jok'otaj chic che q'uiakanic." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Jun jok'otaj che jisonic, jun jok'otaj chic che t'isomanic. Jun jok'otaj che yinelem, jun jok'otaj chic che tzijtzotem." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Jun jok'otaj che lok'ok'enic, jun jok'otaj chic che xutunic. Jun jok'otaj che ch'o'j, jun jok'otaj chic che jamaril." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 ¿Jas ri cuch'äc ri winak che ri sibalaj chac ri cubano? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Quinwil c'ut ri eka'n ri u cojom ri Dios paquiwi' ri winak che qui mach'irisax ruc'. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Are', pa ri jok'otaj ri rajawaxic, ronojel je'lic u banic xubano; xucoj c'ut chupam ri u chomanic ri winak ri ch'obonic re ri man q'uistajel taj pune' c'u ne ri winak man curik ta u ch'obic pa ronojel ri u nimalil ri u banom ri Dios xukuje' ri cubana' na." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 In weta'm chi ri utz na ri cuya' cuban ri winak are ri u quicotisaxic rib, chubana' c'u ri utzil pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal," 
Ecclesiastes3:13 we c'u cujwa'ic cujuq'uianic xukuje' cakil u wäch ri cuya' ri ka chac chke, rumal c'u rech chi are' ri Dios yowinak chke." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Weta'm c'ut chi ronojel ri u banom ri Dios cajeki' amak'el. Man c'o ta jas ri cätik ta chi che mawi c'o jas ri quesax ta chi che; je u banic wa' u banom ri Dios, rech nim quilic." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Man c'o ta jun jasach c'olic ri ma ta c'olinak ulok nabe, man c'o ta chi c'u jas cac'oji' na ri ma ta c'o chic. Ri Dios cubano chi cätzelej ri oc'owinak." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 In cuininak che rilic xukuje' chi pa we uwächulew ri' c'o chuwil xukuje' etzelal ri jawije' rajawaxic c'o ta wi suq'uilal xukuje' colomal. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Quinbij c'ut chi ri Dios cuk'at na tzij puwi' ri winak ri tz'akatisanel xukuje' ri banal etzelal, c'o c'ut jun jok'otaj che ronojel ri cac'ulmatajic xukuje' che ronojel ri cäbanic." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Xukuje' quinbij, chrij ri qui c'aslemal ri winak, chi ri Dios cätajin quebutijtobej ri winak rech caquich'obo chi xukuje' ri e are' e junam cuc' tak ri awaj." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Kas c'u ne tzij, winak xukuje' tak ri awaj xak junam ri caquitaklebej: ri jule' xukuje' ri jule' chic xak e junam, quecämic, ri uxlabic re c'aslemal xak junam chque conojel. Man c'o ta u jalbem ta wi rib ri winak chuwäch ri awaj: ronojel c'ut xa cawächibal ri xak lok'," 
Ecclesiastes3:20 conojel quebetakal xa' chupam ri junam c'olbal; puc'uc' ulew xbanbex quech conojel quetzelej chi c'u na conojel chupam ri puc'uc' ulew. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 ¿Jachin ta ri cacuinic cujiquiba' chi ri ruxlabal ri winak capaki' pa tak ri chicajil que ri caj, xukuje' ta c'ut chi ri ruxlabal ri awaj cakaj ta c'ä chuxe' ri ulew?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Xinch'obo chi man c'o ta chi jun jasach ri utz ta na che ri winak chi chutija' chucojo' ri cuya' ri u chac che, are c'u wa' ri u taklebem, man c'o ta c'u ya' ri cac'amow ta ulok rech cariltaj ri cac'ulmatajic aretak cäminak chic." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Xinya' c'u nu wäch chque ri c'axc'olil ri quec'ulmataj cho we uwächulew ri'. Xinwil c'ut chi ri banom c'ax chque quebok'ic, man c'o ta c'u jachin jun cacu'bisan ta qui c'u'x; ri e banal tak c'ax quequicoj tak chuk'ab chque, man c'o ta c'u jachin jun cacu'bisan ta qui cux." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Rumal c'u ri' are' xinya' na qui k'ij ri k'e'tz' tak cäminakib chi are utz na quech chquiwäch ri c'ä e c'asc'oj; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 pune' c'u are utz na quech ri c'ä maja' quebil qui wäch chquiwäch we cak'at ri', c'ä maja' c'u ne caquil ri etzelal ri caban cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Xinwilo xukuje' chi ri sibalaj u q'uisic ib che u banic ri chac xukuje' aretak utz quel jun comon chac cuwalijisala' quiäk rayinic, xukuje' c'u wa' man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', xukuje' xa cajwax u chapic ri quiakik'." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ri winak cubij: “Ri man c'o ta u no'j quebuk'aluj ri quieb u k'ab cusachisaj c'u u wäch chbil rib.” 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Are c'u ri in quinbij: “Chi are utz na jubik' uxlanem chuwäch ri casowem che u chapic ri quiakik'.” 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Aretak c'u xinca'y chi apan jela', xinwil chic jun jasach ri man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', pa we uwächulew ri':" 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Jun winak ri c'o xak u tuquiel, ri man e c'o ta rachil, mawi tak ralc'ual, mawi tak rachalal, ri mawi cuxlan ta jubik, ri kas man cäcos ta che u ca'yexic ri u k'inomal, mawi c'u ne cuc'ot ta u chi' chbil rib: “¿Jachin c'u lo che cätajin quinchacun wi? ¿Jasche quink'il ri utzil chwe?” Xukuje' ba' wa' xak cawächibal, xak jun alalaj eka'n." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Are c'o na qui patan quieb chuwäch xa jun, are c'o na ri caquechbej che ri qui chac." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 We jun chque cätzakic ri jun chic cuyaco. ¡Tok'ob c'u u wäch ri cätzakic ri xak u tuquiel c'olic, man c'o ta ba' jachin ta cäwalijisanic!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 We c'u ne c'o quieb junam quek'oyic, caquimik'isala' tak quib ri' qui cabichal; jun c'ut ri xa u tuquiel, ¿Jas ta ri cubano cumik'isaj ta rib?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Jun xa u tuquiel cäban cuinem che u ch'äquic, we c'u e quieb quecuinic caquito' quib. Xukuje' c'ut we oxib u wäch cäban che jun colob man xak ta u t'okopixic ri'." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Are c'u ne c'o na cajwataj wi ri ac'al ala ri meba' ri c'o u no'j chuwäch ri ri'jalaj ajawinel ri man c'o ta u no'j, wa' man cuc'amowaj ta chic ri pixbenic." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Pune' ri ac'al ala ri cajawin na pa ri u c'olbal we ajawinel ri' c'äte' relic ulok pa che', cäk'ax c'u pa ri tem re ajawibal, craj ne c'äte relic pa ri mebayil cak'ax pa ri ajawinic, e wilom ri winak re we uwächulew ri' caquiya' qui tzij che u to'ic." 
Ecclesiastes4:15  
Ecclesiastes4:16 Pune' c'u man e ajilatal ri winak ri cajawin na paquiwi', mawi ri e are' mawi ri e rachalaxic quequicot ta na rumal. Xukuje' wa' man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', xa cajwax c'ut u chapic ri quiakik'." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Aretak catbe pa ri rachoch Dios, chachajij ri a c'aslemal: Che u q'uexwäch ri qui chi'xic tabal tak tok'ob jacha' ri cuchi'j ri winak ri man c'o ta u no'j ri e are' man caquich'ob taj chi cätajin caquiban lawaloyil, chatkebok a yo'm a tzij che nimanic." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Maban chi'nic ruc' aninakil che ri Dios, mawi ruc' ri a chi', mawi ruc' ri a chomanic, c'o c'ut ri Dios pa ri caj are c'u ri at at c'o cho ri uwächulew. Rumal ri', chak'ila' awib che qui bixic q'ui tak tzij," 
Ecclesiastes5:3 rumal c'u rech ri q'ui chomanic quepe c'axalaj tak ichic', xukuje' rumal c'ut ri e q'uialaj tak tzij quebix tak ch'ujilal." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Aretak caban jun chi'nic che ri Dios, mabey ri u tz'akatisaxic, rumal rech chi ri are' man utz ta queril ri man c'o ta qui no'j. Chatz'akatisaj ri cachi'j," 
Ecclesiastes5:5 are utz na chi man c'o ta jas cächi'xic che u q'uexwäch ri c'o cächi'xic ri man catz'akatisax ta c'ut. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Maya' c'olbal chi ri e achi' catquikasaj pa ri macunic, cabij ta c'u chuwäch ri takom rumal ri Dios chi xa rumal sachinakil xabano. ¿Jasche cabano chi cayac royowal ri Dios rumal ri cabij cusach c'u u wäch ri a banom?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Rumal c'u ri', chquixo'l ri c'axalaj tak ichic' xukuje' e q'ui tak tzij xukuje' jastak ri man c'o ta quel caquibij, ri at rajawaxic cac'utu chi nim cawil wi ri Dios." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Mamayo chi we pa jun ulew chic cawilo chi cäban c'ax che ri meba' catokix c'ut ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri takal u banic, jun c'u nim rekle'n xch'uk u wi' rumal jun chic ri nim na rekle'n, niq'uiaj chi c'ut ri nimak chi na quekle'n quequich'uk qui wi' chic we quieb ri'." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 ¡U q'uiyem ri ulew cuchi'x c'u wa' are c'u wa' ri u c'olem ri ajawinel che u patanixic ri ulew! 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ri culok'ok'ej ri puak, amak'el cäraj chi niq'uiaj; ri culok'ok'ej ri k'inomal mawi jubik' cucojo chi q'ui chic ri c'o ruc'. Xukuje' c'u wa' xak cawächibal, xak lok'," 
Ecclesiastes5:11 we c'u e q'ui chic ri jastak e c'olic nim na ri cäsachic. ¿Jas c'ut ri cäch'ac che ri k'inomal ri c'olic, xuwi ri u ca'yexic ri c'olic rumal ri winak?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ri ajchac we catz'akat u pam o man cätz'ak taj, amak'el cawar pa jun nimalaj utzil; ri k'inom man je ta cubano, ri e u k'inomal man caquiya' ta che chi cawaric." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Jun jasach kastzij ri sibalaj bisobal wilom cho we uwächulew ri': chi ri u mulixic k'inomal cabe che u banic c'ax che ri ajchak'e," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 jun c'u itzel ajc'ay cacuinic cuq'uistzij puwi' ronojel we k'inomal ri', we c'u ne c'o jun u c'ojol, man c'o ta chi jas c'o ruc' ri cuya' ta chi can che." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Je c'ut jacha' ri u petic cho we uwächulew ri', jeri' ri u bic: sibalaj ch'analic jacha' aretak xil u wäch, man c'o ta c'u jas cuc'am bic che ri u wächinic ri u chac." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kastzij chi sibalaj bisobal: chi jacha' ri u petic cho ri uwächulew, jeri' xukuje' ri u bic. ¿Jas c'ut ri xresaj che ri sibalaj chac ri xuq'uis rib che u banic ri man c'o ta cupatanij?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Xak c'u che u tz'akatil, ronojel ri u c'aslemal xroc'owisaj pa k'ekumalil, xukuje' ruc' sibalaj latz', k'oxomal tak xukuje' nimak tak bis." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nu rikom c'ut chi ri utz na xukuje' sibalaj je'l na are ri wa'im, xukuje' ri uq'uianic, xukuje' ri u quicotisaxic ib che u wächinic ri sibalaj chacunic cho we uwächulew ri' pa ri quieb oxib k'ij c'aslemal ri cuya' ri Dios chke, are c'u wa' ri ka taklebem." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Xukuje' che apachin ta ne ri cuya' wi q'ui k'inomal ri Dios, cuya' c'u che chi cäcuin che u tijic re chque xukuje' ri u c'amic ri ya'tal che, are c'ut ri u cojic ri u wächinic ri sibalaj chac cäpe ruc' ri Dios." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Canojisax c'ut ri ranima' che quicotemal rumal ri Dios, man kas ta coc chi il che ri u beya'l ri u c'aslemal." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Cho we uwächulew ri' c'o chic jun etzelal ri xak junam caculmataj chquixo'l conojel ri winak, je c'u ri' in cuininak che rilic:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Ri Dios cuya' chque jujun q'uialaj tak k'inomal xukuje' je'lical, mawi c'u jubik' c'o ta ri cajwataj ta chque che ri cäquirayij; man cuya' ta c'u chque chi quequicot ta rumal ronojel wa', xane e jule' chi wi ri quetijowic ri quecojowic. ¡Xukuje' ba' wa' xak jun cawächibal, man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', kastzij bisobal!" 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Jun achi pune' ta ne quebuc'ojolaj jun sient u c'ojol cac'asi' ta c'u q'ui junab, we man cutij bic, we man cucoj bic ri utz, we c'u ne man cämuk ta bic, in quinjiquiba' u bixic chi jun ac'al ri maja' copan u k'ij ri xa tzakom, are utz na re wa' chuwäch we achi ri'." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Pune' c'u cäsach we ac'al pa ri man c'o taj, chupam ri k'ekumal, ri cäsach wi can ri u bi'," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 pune' c'u ne man cäril ta u wäch ri k'ij mawi c'o jas cäretamaj, uxlaninak c'u na wa' chuwäch we achi ri'," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 pune' ta ba' ne xc'asi' ta quieb mil (2,000) junab we winak ri', mawi xutij bic mawi xucoj bic ri u k'inomal. Chuq'uisbalil c'ut che ronojel. ¡Conojel quebe chupam ri xa junam c'olbal!" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ri winak cächacunic cächacun c'ut rech cawa'ic, mawi c'u ne jubik' cänojic." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 ¿Jas c'o ruc' ri ajno'j ri ma ta c'o ruc' ri man c'o ta u no'j, we ma ta e are' ri retamanic che u to'ic rib chuwäch ri c'aslemal?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Are c'o quechbex na che ri c'o chuwäch jun chuwäch ri xa cächomaxic chi c'olic. Xukuje' c'u wa' xa cawächibal xak lok' cajwax c'ut u chapic ri quiakik'. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ri c'o cämic, sibalaj ojer chi ri' xuc'am ri u bi', etamatal c'ut jachique. Man c'o ta jachin jun cacuinic cutij ta u chuk'ab ruc' ri c'o na u chuk'ab chuwäch." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Jun jasach kastzij: jawije' e c'o wi ri q'ui tzij, e c'o q'ui yojcorem; man c'o ta c'u cach'äc che wa'." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Kas c'u tzij, man c'o ta jachin jun reta'm jachique ri utz na che ri winak pa ri ajilatal tak k'ij man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok', ri are ri u c'aslemal. Ri e u k'ij queboc'ow na jacha' jun mumu'j, ¿jachin ta c'u lo ri cäcuin ta che u bixic che jas ri quec'ulmataj na pa we uwächulew ri' aretak cäminak chic?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Are utz na ri utzalaj tzijol chuwäch ri utzalaj c'oc'al. Are utz na ri k'ij re cämical chuwäch ri k'ij re alanic. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Are utz na ri benam ruc' ri cäminak chuwäch ri benam pa nimak'ij; ri cämical are q'uisbal u c'aslemal ronojel winak, e are' c'ut ri e c'aslic rajawaxic ta ri' u nataxic cumal." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Are utz na ri ok'enic chuwäch ri t, cäraj ne caretzelaj ri palajaj utz c'u cuban na che ri anima'aj." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ri c'o u no'j cuchomaj rij ri cämical are c'u ri man c'o ta u no'j, are ri u bic che u quicotisaxic rib." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Are utz na qui tatabexic ri qui pixbenic ri ajno'jab che u q'uexwäch ri qui tatabexic ri qui bixonic ri man c'o ta qui no'j. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ri e u tze' ri man c'o ta u no'j quejunamataj cuc' ri qui kuch'uch'ic ri xic'ay q'uix pa ri k'ak', xukuje' wa' man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok'." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ri tokinic cuconorisaj ri ajno'j, xukuje' ri banoj u pa k'abaj cuchuwirisaj ri u chomabal." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Are utz na ri u q'uistajic u banic jun jasach chuwäch ri u chaplexic. Are utz na ri u cojic ri coch'onic che u q'uexwäch ri cucoj ri chuk'ab. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Maya' awib chi catumajij ri oyowaric, rumal rech chi ri oyowaric are wa' ri kas c'o ruc' ri winak ri man c'o ta u no'j." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Mawi jumul chac'oto' ta a chi' jasche ronojel ri k'ijol ri oc'owinak are utz na, jun c'otoj chi'aj c'u wa' ri man cac'oxoman taj." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Utz xukuje' c'o quechbex che ri no'j cumal ri quejeki' cho we uwächulew ri', we c'u ne achilatal na rumal jun echbal." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Rumal rech chi ri no'j are jun to'bal ib junam ruc' ri puak, are c'u ri no'j c'o na ri u jalbem rib che u ya'ic u c'aslemal ri ajno'j." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Kas chatoc il che rilic ri u banom ri Dios: ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäcuin ta che u colomaxic ri u jech'obisam ri are'? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Aretak c'u utz at benak, chatquicot chupam we utzil ri'; aretak c'u man utz ta catelic chachomaj chi ri jun xukuje' ri jun chic pa u k'ab ri Dios e c'o wi, ri winak mawi jubik' reta'm ri petinak puwi'." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ronojel wa' wilom chupam ri man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok' are' c'u nu c'aslemal wa': utzalaj tak achijab ri quecämic pune' c'o sibalaj cutzil, xukuje' itzel tak winak ri e banal tak etzelal q'ui junab quec'asi'c." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Matux sibalaj at utz, mawi ta sibalaj at ta nawinel. ¿Jas ta che xak ta cäretzelaj rib jun pa rech wi?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Matux sibalaj itzel winak, mawi matux sibalaj at con. ¿Jas ta che catcäm chanim c'amajok copan ri a k'ijol?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ri utz na are ri utzalaj u chapic wa' matzokopij c'u bic ri c'o pa k'ab. Jachin ri man caresaj taj u q'uixbal ri Dios utz quel na pa conojel we jastak ri'. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 C'o na ri chuk'ab ri cuya' ri no'j che ri c'o u no'j che u q'uexwäch ri caquiya' lajuj k'atal tak tzij che jun tinimit. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Man c'o ta c'u jun cho ri uwächulew ri sibalaj ta tz'akat ri cuban ta amak'el ri utz ri mawi ta jumul ma ta cämacunic. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Maya' a xiquin che ronojel ri cabixic, je c'u ri' man coc ta pa a xiquin aretak ri pataninel awech catuyok'o." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Pune' c'u ne aweta'm at xukuje', chi q'ui mul a yok'om chi jule'." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ronojel wa' xinnic'oj ruc' no'j, nu cojom c'u pa nu jolom chi quinux ajno'j; man c'u ya'tal ta u rikic wumal." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 ¡Man ya'tal ta u rikic wumal ronojel ri c'olic! ¡Sibalaj c'u naj u pam man c'o ta c'u jun cacuin ta che u ch'obic! 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Xinjach c'u wib che u rikic etamanic, che u ch'obic xukuje' quitzucuxic jujun aj no'jalaj tak q'uisbalil. Xincuin c'u che u ch'obic chi man utz ta ri man c'o ta u no'j, jun ch'ujilal c'ut ri cuban rib chi sachinak." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nu rikom jun jasach ri c'o na chuwäch ri cämical: ri ixok ri cucoj ri ranima' che qui cojic c'amibal ri caximan ruc' tak ri e u k'ab. Ri utz u binibal chuwäch ri Dios canimaj na chuwäch, are c'u ri cäbin pa ri mac cäkaj na pa tak ri e u c'amibal." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Chupam ri nu tijow chuk'ab che u rikic jasche quec'ulmataj ri jastak, in ri tzijonel nu rikom wa':" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ¡Chi c'ä maja' quinrik ri kas quintzucuj! ¡Nu rikom jun achi chuxo'l jun mil, mawi c'u ne xa ta jun ixok nu rikom ta chquixo'l conojel ri ixokib!" 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Xuwi c'u nu rikom ri quinya' u bixic: chi ri Dios tz'akat u banic ri winak xubano, are c'u ri winak u yojim ri u c'aslemal." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 ¿Jachin ta ri cacuinic cujunamaj ta rib ruc' ri ajno'j? ¿Jachin ta ri reta'm ri quel quequibij ri jastak? Ri no'j cutunuj ri u palaj ri winak; cuban che chi cuq'uex ri cowilaj u palaj. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Chebatz'akatisaj ri e u takanic ri ajawinel, je c'u chi'nic wa' ri kas cäban na, wa' a bim chuwäch ri Dios." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Nojimal catel ulok chuwäch, manim awib che qui banic itzel tak jastak, rumal rech chi ri are' cacuinic cubano jachique ri cäraj." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ri xubij ri ajawinel man c'o ta caq'uexowic, man c'o ta c'u jachin jun cacuinic cubij ta che chi chubij che jas ri cätajin cubano." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Che ri cutz'akatisaj u banic jun takanic man c'o ta jun etzelal cuc'ulmaj na, are' c'u ri c'o u no'j cuch'obo jampa' xukuje' jas cuban che u tz'akatisaxic." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kastzij, c'o jun jok'otaj xukuje' jun u banic ronojel ri cäbanic, are c'u ri nimalaj latz' che ri winak" 
Ecclesiastes8:7 chi ri are' mawi jubik' reta'm ri quec'ulmatajok, mawi c'o ta jachin jun ri cacuin ta che u bixic che." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Man c'o ta jachin jun ri c'o ta u cuinem puwi' ri c'aslemal, jacha' ri cacuin ta che u k'ilic, mawi c'o xukuje' jachin ta c'o u cuinem puwi' ri cämical. Man c'o ta c'u jachin jun ri ma ta coc chupam we tijoj chuk'ab ri'. Ri banal etzelal man cäto' taj rumal ri retzelal." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ronojel wa' wilom aretak kas xinjach wib che retamaxic ri caban cho we uwächulew ri' xukuje' ri cuinem ri c'o ruc' ri winak che u banic c'ax che ri rajil u tz'akat. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Xukuje' wilom chi ri winak ri itzel ri xunajtajisaj rib che ri tastalicalaj c'olbal, cäya' u k'ij pa ri k'ij aretak cämukic; chupam c'ut ri tinimit jawije' ri xuban wi ri etzelal, man c'o ta chi jun cänatan ta chi na. Wa' man c'o ta u beya'l," 
Ecclesiastes8:11 we c'u man cäc'äjisax taj u wäch ri etzelal, cäya' be che ri winak xuwi cuchomaj u banic ri lawaloyil." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 ¡Ri quel wi wa' chi ri cämacunic cutakej c'u macunic sibalaj q'ui junab cac'asi' na! (Ri weta'm cänok in chi ri nim cäquil wi ri Dios xukuje' caquina' quib chuwäch, utz caquitaklebej;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 e are' c'ut, ri e banal tak etzelal itzel caquitaklebej coc'ow c'ut ri qui c'aslemal jacha' jun mumu'j rumal rech chi man caquina' ta quib chuwäch ri Dios.)" 
Ecclesiastes8:14 We jewa' ri cac'ulmataj cho we uwächulew ri' chi man c'o ta u beya'l chi ri utzalaj tak winak caquirik c'ax e jacha' ta ne e itzel tak winak, xukuje' ri itzel tak winak ri quequicotic e jacha' ta ne e utzalaj tak winak. ¡In quinbij chi xukuje' wa' man c'o ta u beya'l!" 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Rumal ri' quinbij chi are utz na ri jajatem. Are c'u ri utz na ri cäcuin ri winak che u banic cho we uwächulew ri' are ri wa'im, ri uq'uianic xukuje' chuquicotisaj rib, xuwi c'u wa' cäcanaj ruc' che ri u chac pa tak ri k'ij re ri u c'aslemal ri cuya' ri Dios che cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Aretak sibalaj xinjach na wib che retamaxic che u ch'obic xukuje' che u ca'yexic ronojel ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri'. Copan ri jok'otaj aretak jun man cacuintaj cäwar ta jubik'. 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Sibalaj c'u xincuin che u ch'obic chi ri winak man cacuin ta che u ch'obic ri cuban ri Dios mawi ri cac'ulmataj cho we uwächulew ri'. Pune' ta sibalaj cucoj u chuk'ab cutzucuj taj ri tzelebal u wäch, man curik ta wi pune' ta ne cubij ri ajno'j chi reta'm u wäch kastzij man cuininak ta che u rikic." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Che ronojel wa' nu jachom wib, xa che u ya'ic chisak chi ri e qui chac ri e utz xukuje' ri quech tak ri ajno'jab e c'o pa u k'ab ri Dios. Man c'o ta reta'm ri winak che ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj ma wi che ri etzelam wächaj, e c'o c'u ne chquiwäch ri e u bak'wäch." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Che ri q'uisbal xukuje' che ri q'uisbalil, conojel xak junam jasach quebeyenic: che ri suc' xukuje' che ri man suc' taj, che ri utz xukuje' che ri lawalo, che ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' che ri man ch'ajch'oj taj, che ri quebuchi'j tabal tok'ob xukuje' che ri man quebuchi'j taj; xak junam che ri utz xukuje' che ajmac, che ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na xukuje' che ri man cuban ta ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Are c'axc'olil wa' pa ronojel ri cäc'ulmataj cho we uwächulew ri': chi conojel xa junam jasach quebeyem conojel. Nojinak c'u ne ri u chomanic ri winak che ri etzelal; ri conil are catakan puwi' ri u chomanic ronojel ri u c'aslemal; ¡chuq'uisbalil c'ut quemukok! 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Are c'o na reyebal c'u'x ri cäya' che chi cutakej c'aslem, are c'u c'o na u patan ri c'aslic tz'i' che u q'uexwäch ri cäminak coj." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Rumal rech chi ri e c'aslic queta'm chi quebecämok, are c'u ri cäminakib mawi c'o queta'm mawi c'o jas caquich'äco, man c'u quenatax ta chic." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Chila' caq'uis wi ri u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, ri retzelam wächaj xukuje' tak ri relemch'uj, mawi c'u jumul cuban chi rech ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 ¡Jo' ba'! chatakej u tijic ri wa ri catijo; chatquicot che ruq'uiaxic ri u wa'l uva, ri cawuq'uiaj e kajinak c'u chuwäch ri Dios ri e a banoj." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Amak'el chebacojo' tak awatz'iak sak; amak'el chacojo' c'oc'al pa a jolom. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Utz roc'owisaxic ri c'aslemal chabana' ruc' ri ixok ri calok'ok'ej, k'ij chi k'ij re we c'aslemal ri' ri man c'o ta u beya'l ri u yo'm ri Dios chawe pa we uwächulew ri'; xuwi c'u wa' cawechbej na che ri sibalaj chac ri a banom cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ronojel c'ut ri c'o pa a k'ab che u banic, chabana' ruc' ronojel chuk'ab, rumal rech chi pa ri mukubal, ri catetac'al wi na, ma c'o ta jas cabanic mawi c'o jas cächomax chic, mawi c'o chic etamanic mawi no'j." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Cho we uwächulew ri' wilom chic jun jasach: chi man e are' taj ri aninak na quexiq'uinic ri quech'äcow ri xiq'uinem, mawi ri c'o qui chuk'ab ri quech'äcow ta ri ch'o'j; mawi e are' ta amak'el ri ajno'jab ri c'o qui wa, mawi e are' ta ri quec'oxomanic ri e k'inomab, mawi e are' ta ri quitijom quib ri utz ta qui c'ulaxic quebanic; conojel wa' xak c'äte tal caquitaklebej." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Rumal rech chi man c'o ta jun reta'm jampa' copan ri u k'ij: e jacha' ri cär ri quechaptaj pa ri c'at xukuje' tak ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri quekaj pa ri c'amibal, jewa' xukuje' ri winak, aretak man c'o ta cunabej, c'äte cuna' kajinak chic chupam jun lawalolaj jok'otaj." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Xukuje' wilom pa we uwächulew ri' jun jasach ri quinwilo chi c'o jun nimalaj tijonic chupam: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Jun tinimit ri colic, ri man e q'ui ta ri e u winakil e c'olic, ri cäch'ojin jun ajawinel ruc' ri sibalaj nim u cuinem ri cuwoc jun nimalaj ak'anibal chrij." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Chupam c'ut ri tinimit c'o wi jun meba'alaj achi, ajno'j c'ut, ri ruc' ri u no'j cacuin ri' che u to'tajisaxic ri tinimit, ¡man c'o ta c'u' jun canatantaj!" 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Are c'u ri in, quinjiquiba' u bixic chi are nim na u banic ri uxic ajno'j che u q'uexwäch ri c'o u chuk'ab, pune' c'u ne man cäya' ta u k'ij ri u no'j ri meba'alaj achi mawi cäya' xquinaj che ri cubij." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 E are kas quetataj na ri qui tzij ri ajno'jab ri nojimal quech'awic chuwäch ri u rakoj chi'aj ri cajawinel ri man c'o ta qui no'j. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Are c'o na u patan ri no'j chquiwäch tak ri ch'ojibal ri cäcoj pa ch'o'j. Jun ajmac c'ut cäsachow u wäch q'ui utzil. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Jun cäminak amalo cächuchutic caretzelaj ri utzalaj c'oc'al. Are q'ui na ri cutzijoj ri conil ri kas cawerer na chuwäch ri no'j ri nim na u banic. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ri u chomabal ri ajno'j are cuya' u tzij che u banic utzilal, are c'ut ri rech ri man c'o ta u no'j are cuya' u tzij che u banic ri etzelal." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ri man c'o ta u no'j, pa ronojel ri cubano, cuc'ut ri u mebayil ri e u chomanic pune' c'u cätajin cubij chi ri man c'o ta qui no'j e are' ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 We ri k'atal tzij coyowar awuc', masach ri a jolom; ri cunabal chque ri nimak tak sachinakil are ri quimajixic ri jastak chi nojimal." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Wilom jun sachinakil ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri', ri caq'uiy ulok cuc' tak ri e k'atal tak tzij:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Chi cäya' jun ekle'n nim u banic che ri man c'o ta u no'j, are c'u ri winak ri nim u k'ij c'o chupam jun ekle'n ri man nim ta u banic." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 E wilom tak lok'om pataninelab ri quebin chquij tak quiej, xukuje' ri e qui c'ojol tak ajawinelab ri quebin chcakan ri e jacha' ta ne lok'om tak pataninelab." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ri cäc'otow ri jul, chupam cätzak wi. Che ri cac'apow ri pimalaj tapia, ri cumätz cacatzowic." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ri cutzoc' abaj, cusoc rib che u banic. Ri cupak' si', xak quieb cubij cuwech' rib." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 We quel u pa u chi' ri icäj we c'u ne man cäban chic u pa u chi', rajawaxic ri' cacoj na chuk'ab che u cojic. Are utz na utz qui banic ri jastak quebanic xukuje' ruc' no'j." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Man c'o ta cubej ri ch'äcanel we nabe cacatzan ri cumätz. 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ri e u tzij tak ri ajno'j quebuc'am ulok utzil che, e are tak c'ut ri e rech ri man c'o ta u no'j e are quec'amow ulok ri kas e retzeletajic:" 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Cuchaplej quebubij xuwi tak conil, cutakej c'u na qui bixic sachinakil." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 ¡Ri man c'o ta u no'j man queq'uis ta ri u tzij! ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuin che u bixic ri quec'ulmatajok, man c'o ta c'u jun c'o reta'm che ri petinak?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ri man c'o ta u no'j sibalaj cucämisaj rib che u banic ri chac, man reta'm ta c'u ne ri be ri cäbe pa ri tinimit." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri ulew ri c'o jun rajawinel ri xa' je u banic jun ac'al ri quesakarisan c'u ne tak ri e u c'ojol chupam tak ri nimak'ij! 
Ecclesiastes10:17 ¡Utz rech ri ulew ri c'o jun rajawinel ri nim u banic, ri quewa' ri e u k'atal tak tzij pa ri u k'ijol, che u to'ic u wi' ri qui chuk'ab man che ta c'u k'abaric!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ri sak'or cayojyob ri u wi' ri ja puwi'; ri man c'o ta jas cubano catz'uj c'u ronojel ri ja. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ri wa che u tijic, ri u wa'l uva che u quicotisaxic ri c'aslemal; cajwataj c'u puak che wa'." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Matyok'on che ri ajawinel mawi ta ne ruc' ri a chomabal. Mabij itzel tzij chrij ri k'inom, pune' xa' a tuquiel at c'olic' querapap c'ut ri chicop ri c'o ri qui xic' cuya' c'ut quequitzijoj che." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Chaq'uiaka' ri a wa chupam ri ja', oc'owinak chi c'u jun k'ijol cärik na." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Chajachaja' ri c'o awuc' joropa ri catcuin che u ya'ic, man aweta'm ta c'ut we ne cäpe etzelal puwi' ri ulew." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 We e k'ekarinak ri sutz', cäkaj na ri jäb puwi' ri ulew. Cäkaj ri che' pa u wiquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij o cäkaj ri che' pa ri u mox elebal k'ij, pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri cakaj wi chi' cäcanaj wi na." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ri coc che u ca'yexic ri quiakik' man caticonij taj, jachin c'ut ri are cuca'yej ri sutz', man c'o ta wächinic cuyaco." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Je c'ut jacha' chi man aweta'm taj jawije' ri cabe wi ri quiakik', mawi aweta'm ri u winakirisaxic ri ac'al pa ri u c'u'x ri nanaxel, mawi c'u ne c'o aweta'm che ri cuban ri Dios, che conojel ri jastak." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Chajopij ri awija' ak'abil, xukuje' chajopij benak k'ij, mawi c'u jubik' etamatalic jas ri utz quel na, we are ri nabe o are' ri ucab." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Sibalaj je'lic ri sakilal, utz c'ut chi ri bak'wächaj queril ri k'ij;" 
Ecclesiastes11:8 pune' c'u cac'asi' jun q'ui junab caquicot ta c'u cumal conojel wa', rajawaxic chretamaj chi ri k'ij tak re ri k'ekumalil sibalaj e q'ui na, chi ronojel c'ut ri oc'owem cubano, man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok'." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Chaquicotisaj awib, ala o ali, camic ri at nojinak che c'aslemal; chatija' chacojo' ri utz camic ri c'ä catcuinic. Chanimaj ri cubij ri awanima' chawe xukuje' che ronojel ri cawilo, chnataj c'u chawe chi ronojel wa' ri Dios cutok'ij na chawe chi cacholajij na chuwäch." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Chebanajtajisaj che ri a chomabal ri oquem tak il, chebaq'uiaka' c'u bic tak ri c'axc'olil jela', xukuje' c'u ne tak ri e utzalaj tak k'ij rech ri awalc'alal xa' e cawächibal xak lok'." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Chnataj chawe ri a winakirisanel camic ri c'ä at ac'al c'ä maja' c'u ne quepe tak ri k'ijol ri e rech c'axc'olil, quepe c'u na tak ri junab aretak cabij na: “Man quinna' ta chi quicotemal che coc'owisaxic c'aslemal.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Chabana' camic, aretak c'ä maja' cachup ri chaj re ri k'ij, ri rech ri ic' xukuje' ri quech tak ri ch'imil, ri aretak c'ä e c'o sutz' aretak oc'owinak chic ri jäb." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Copan c'u na jun k'ij aretak caquichap birbitem ri chajinelab rech ri awachoch quebusbub c'ut ri sibalaj c'o qui chuk'ab; xa' c'u e quieb oxib chic ri e banal tak quie'm quecanajic, quequitanaba' c'ut qui banic quie'm; ri queca'y pa tak ri wenta'n, caquichaplej moyiric." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Aretak copan we k'ij ri' quetz'apitaj na ri e oquibal ri quebe pa ri be; ri u juc'uq'uem ri ca'; nojimal man cätataj ta chic; xukuje' ri qui bixonic tak ri chicop ri c'o ri qui xic', man quetataj ta chic cumal ri ri'jab, aretak cätzartzob qui wäch nim ak'ab, man c'u quetataj ta chic ri bixonic;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 ri pakalem cuya' na xe'n ib, xak c'u quieb cubij chic pa ri be. Ri almendr cuchaplej cotz'ijanic, ri sac' cux jun eka'n ri alcapar man c'o ta chic u patan. Cäbe c'ut ri winak chupam ri u jekelibal ri junalic, pa ri be quetataj chic ri cacok'ej ri qui cäminak." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Chnataj chawe ri a winakirisanel utz c'ä maja' cat'okopitaj ri c'am re sak puak mawi u banom ch'akatak ri t'uy re k'an puak; utz c'ä maja' cac'äjin ri k'ebal chuchi' ri c'ua' mawi muchmubinak ri quetet re ri c'ua'. 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Chuwi' chi c'u wa' ri puc'uc' ulew cätzelej chi na pa ri ulew, jacha' ri u banom can nabe, are' c'u ri uxlabal cätzelej na ruc' ri Dios ri yowinak." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 In, ri k'alajisanel, quintzelej u bixic: ¡Man c'o ta cubej, man c'o ta u beya'l, man c'o ta u beya'l, xak lok'! ¡Ronojel man c'o ta cubej, xak lok'!" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Jacha' c'ut ri u nimal ri u no'j ri k'alajisanel, je xukuje' ri u jabuxic ri xuban chquixo'l tak ri winak. Xukuje' xujach rib che qui no'jixic q'uialaj tak c'ambal no'j, quebucoj c'ut pa ri qui cholajil." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Xucoj c'u u chuk'ab che qui rikic tak ri tzij ri sibalaj takal na qui cojic, che qui tz'ibaxic jicalaj tak tzij." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ri e qui tzij tak ri ajno'jab e jacha' ta ne q'uix tak che', aretak c'u e mulitajinak chic quirikom chi c'u tak quib e junam cuc' tak ri ch'ich' ri co e ch'ictalic, ri e cojom xa' rumal jun ajyuk'." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ri no'j ri cäresaj jun chque wa' e nimak tak pixbenic. Ri qui banic q'uialaj tak wuj man c'o ta u q'uisic, are c'u ri sibalaj u tijoxic ib cuya' cosic." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Xq'uis u tza'm ri chomanic. Ronojel bitajinak chic. Nim ba' chawila' wi ri Dios chebatz'akatisaj tak qui banic ri e u takomal, are c'u wa' ri rajawaxic u banic rumal ronojel winak." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ri Dios cutz'onoj na chke ri cajilabal conojel tak ri e ka banoj, we e utz, we man e utz taj, pune' e ka banom chi c'uyal." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ri sibalaj je'l na chquiwäch tak ri e u bix ri Salomon. 
SongOfSongs1:2 “¡Chaya' nu chi' cumal ri e a chi'! E qui' na chuwäch ri u wa'l uva ri e awajwanic," 
SongOfSongs1:3 Ri e a c'oc'al sibalaj e je'l na che ri nu sikbal, ri a bi' c'oc'al ri jamin. ¡Rumal c'u ri', catcaj ri ixokib!" 
SongOfSongs1:4 ¡Ruc' aninakil chinac'ama' bic awuc'! ¡Chinac'ama' bic o ajawinel, pa tak ri e a jekelibal!” “Awuc' cujejajat wi na; e c'o na ri e u rayixic tak ri e awajwanic chke chuwäch ri u wa'l uva. ¡Jacha' ba' catcaj ri ixokib!”" 
SongOfSongs1:5 “Ixokib aj Jerusalen, in räxbak'alic in c'u ne je'lic; räxbak'alic jacha' tak ri e qui cäbal tak ri e aj ri Sedar, je'lic e jacha' ri e u k'atibal ri Salomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Mixoc il chwe chi in räxbak'alic, mawi chi c'atisam ri nu tz'umal rumal ri k'ij. Ri e nu xibal xeboyowar wuc', xinquicoj c'u che qui chajixic ri ticbal tak uva, ¡Are c'u ri kas nu ticbal uva man xinwilij ta chic!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Chabij chwe, u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri nu c'aslemal, ¿Jawije' quebayuk'uj wi tak ri a jumulaj? ¿Jawije' quebac'am wi bic che uxlanem aretak curik ri tiq'uil k'ij? ¿Jas ta che xak quinbinic jacha' jun wacatel, Chquinakaj tak ri e qui jumulaj tak ri e awachil?”" 
SongOfSongs1:8 “We man aweta'm at, je'lic chquixo'l tak ri je'lic, Chatakej ri cakan ri jumulaj chebayuk'uj c'ut ri alaj tak a q'uisic' chquinakaj tak ri qui cäbal ri ajyuk'ab.”" 
SongOfSongs1:9 “Ri at chwe in, nu lok', catjunamataj ruc' ri je'licalaj ati't quiej re ri u carwaj ri ajawinel paraon." 
SongOfSongs1:10 ¡Sibalaj e je'lic ri jutak peraj a palaj chquixo'l ri u wi'tak xquinaj! ¡Sibalaj je'lic ri a kul chquixo'l tak ri chachal! 
SongOfSongs1:11 ¡Quekaban u wi' tak a xiquin re k'an puak quekach'ap tak sak puak chupam!” 
SongOfSongs1:12 “Joropa' ri cäbeytaj ri ajawinel pa ri mexa, ri nu nard cäc'oc'at ri ruxlab." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ri nu lok' chwe in jacha' ri alaj juyat'aj mir ri c'o amak'el chquixo'l ri e uwo nu c'u'x. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ri quinlok'ok'ej jacha' ri cotz'i'j pok' ri c'o chquixo'l ri juwi' tak uva pa En-gad.” 
SongOfSongs1:15 “¡Sibalaj at je'lic nu lok', sibalaj at je'lic! ¡Ri e a bak'wäch e quieb palomax!”" 
SongOfSongs1:16 “¡Sibalaj at je'lic nu lok', sibalaj at je'lic!” “¡Ri k'ayes ri cätojtatic are ka soc!" 
SongOfSongs1:17 Ri e chacalte' tak e are' ri e u temal ri kachoch, ri q'uisis tak, e are' ri e u wi' ri kachoch.”" 
SongOfSongs2:1 “In jun cotz'i'j re ri beya' re Saron, jun roxox que tak ri lianic.”" 
SongOfSongs2:2 “Ri quinlok'ok'ej uxinak, chquixo'l ri ixokib, jacha' jun roxox chquixo'l tak ri q'uix.”" 
SongOfSongs2:3 “Ri quinlok'ok'ej uxinak, chquixo'l tak ri achijab, jacha' ri u che'al mansa'n chquixo'l tak ri che' ri e c'o pa ri c'ache'laj. ¡Man c'o ta c'o wi aretak xint'uyi' chuxe' ri u mujal! ¡Sibalaj qui' xinna' ri u wächinic!" 
SongOfSongs2:4 Xinuc'am bic pa ri ja ri cätajin wi ri ula'nic ri e nu ca'yexic tak rumal chwe in e re lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj. 
SongOfSongs2:5 ¡Chiya' chajin anima' chwe cumal tak lej que pasa, chinitzuktzubej cuc' tak mansa'n, camic c'u quinban che lok'ok'enic!" 
SongOfSongs2:6 ¡Chucojo' ri u mox k'ab chuxe' ri nu jolom, chi nu matze'j c'ut ruc' ri riquiak'ab!”" 
SongOfSongs2:7 “Chichi'j chwe, ixokib aj Jerusalen, cumal tak ri masat aj lianic xukuje' cumal tak ri ati'tab tak masat ri e c'o pa ri c'ache'laj, quiya' la latz' che ri u waram ri nu lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj. ¡Chiya' che chi warok c'ä jampa' chraj chc'astajok!”" 
SongOfSongs2:8 “¡Ulem cuban ri quinlok'ok'ej! ¡Quinta' chi apanok ri u ch'abal! Cach'opinic petinak paquiwi' nimak tak juyub, cach'opinic petinak chquixo'l ri alaj tak juyub." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ri nu lok' jacha' jun masat aj c'ache'laj: jacha' jun cojol masat. ¡C'o chic, chrij ri oquibal, cäca'y pa ri wenta'n, cätzun chrij ri k'atibal!" 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ri quinlok'ok'ej xubij chwe: ‘Chatwalijok, nu lok'; aninak, nu lok', jo'." 
SongOfSongs2:11 ¡Chawila' xoc'ow ri tew xukuje' ri jäb xbe junam ruc'! 
SongOfSongs2:12 E pak'inak chic ri cotz'i'j pa ri juyub, opaninak ri k'ijol re bixonic, cätataj chic ri cok'ebal tak tucumux." 
SongOfSongs2:13 E wächininak chic ri higo puwi' ri u che'al, xukuje' ri ticbal tak uva caquijabuj ri qui c'oc'al. Chatwalijok, nu lok', aninak nu lok', jo'." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Nu palomax ri quebac'u' awib xo'l tak ri abaj, pa tak chicajil xukuje' c'axalaj tak c'ubal ib chaya' chwe chi quinwil ri a palaj, chaya' chwe chi quinta' ri a ch'abal. ¡Man c'o ta c'o wi ri awilic! ¡Sibalaj qui' ri a tatabexic!’ ”" 
SongOfSongs2:15 “Chebichapa' tak ri yac, ri alaj tak yac ri caquiban c'ax chque tak ri ka uva ri e ka ticom, ri e ka ticom tak uva ri e cotz'i'jinak.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 “Ri nu lok' xukuje' c'u ri in in rech. Ri are' quebuyuk'uj ri u jumulaj chquixo'l tak ri roxox. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Pa ri ropanem ri k'ij quebanimaj tak c'ut ri mumu'j, chattzelejok nu lok'; je chabana' jacha' jun masat aj lianic, jacha' jun alaj masat pa tak ri juyub ri quiquemalam wi tak quib ri q'uix.”" 
SongOfSongs3:1 Chupam ri nu ch'at, pa tak chak'ab xintzucuj ri cälok'ok'ex rumal ri nu c'aslemal. Xintzucuj man c'u xinrik taj." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Xinwalij c'ut xinbinibej ri tinimit che u tzucuxic ri cälok'ok'ex rumal ri nu c'aslemal xo'l tak ri ja xukuje' pa tak ri c'ayibal. Xintzucuj man c'u xinrik taj. 
SongOfSongs3:3 Xinc'ot qui chi' ri chajinelab ri quesolin ri tinimit: “¿La man iwilom ix ri cälok'ok'ex rumal ri nu c'aslemal?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Xa jubik' e nu yo'm canok, aretak xinrik apan ri cälok'ok'ex rumal ri nu c'aslemal. Xinchapapej che ri u k'ab, man xintzokopij taj xinc'am bic chupam ri rachoch ri nu nan." 
SongOfSongs3:5 “Chiya' i tzij chibij chwe, ixokib aj Jerusalen, cumal tak ri masat aj lianic xukuje' cumal tak ri ati'tab tak masat ri e co pa ri c'ache'laj, chi man qui wesaj taj ri u waram ri lok' chnuwäch. ¡Chiya' che chi warok c'ä jampa' chraj chc'astajok!”" 
SongOfSongs3:6 “¿Jas wa' ri petinak pa ri chaki'j uwo sak cätajin c'u cabin chquixo'l tac'atak tak sib, chupam u sibal mir xukuje' re c'oc' k'ol xukuje' re ronojel u wäch c'oc'al?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 ¡Are ri u telew ri Salomon! Chajital cumal oxc'al ajch'ojab ri sibalaj c'o na qui chuk'ab pa Israel; 
SongOfSongs3:8 conojel queta'm caquicoj ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j e ajch'ojab c'ut ri quesan chic qui no'j; chquijujunal tzayal ri qui ch'ich' re ch'o'j xe'quipam che u to'ic quib we ne c'o u q'ueyowal caquitaklebej chak'ab. 
SongOfSongs3:9 Ri ajawinel Salomon u banom jun u telew cuc' che' ri pakal cajil re ri Libano. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Ri e rakan e re sak puak; ri u k'elibal chrij re k'an puak; ri t'uyulibal azul cojom puwi': ri u pam wiktal ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj cumal ri ixokib aj Jerusalen.
