SongOfSongs3:11 Ixokib re Sion, ¡Chixel ulok che u ca'yexic ri ajawinel Salomon! U cojom bic ri u corona ri xuban ri u nan che che ri k'ij re ri u c'ulanem, che ri k'ij ri sibalaj utz na che ri u c'aslemal.”" 
SongOfSongs4:1 “¡Sibalaj at je'lic nu lok'! ¡Sibalaj at je'lic! Ri e a bak'wäch e quieb ut e c'utal chrij ri a ch'ukubal; ri e a wi' e jacha' alaj tak quisic' ri quech'opilaj pa tak ri juyub re Galaad. 
SongOfSongs4:2 Ri e a ware conojel utz qui banom, e jacha' jumulaj tak chij ri c'äte' ri' quewalij ulok che atinem ri e suc'umatal chic che u kopixic ri quij." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Ri e a chi' e quiäk e jacha' quiäk bätz', e ch'äcanelab tak c'ut ri e a tzij. Ri e a palaj e caperaj crabaj e c'utal chrij ri a ch'ukubal." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ri a kul cabititic jacha' ri tac'atic u ja ri David, ri xyac che qui tanibal ch'ojibal. E xequel c'u jun mil e qui quetecak tak ch'ich' chupam, qui quetequic ch'ich' cowilaj tak ajch'ojab." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Ri e uwo a c'u'x e quieb masat ri aj lianic, quieb masat yo'xab ri quebe echa' xo'l tak ri roxox." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Pa ri u petic ri k'ij quebanimaj tak c'ut ri mumu'j. Quinbe na pa ri u juyubal ri mir, puwi' ri juyub ri c'o wi c'oc' k'ol." 
SongOfSongs4:7 ¡At je'lic, nu lok'; at je'lic cächaptaj chque ri awakan c'ä che ri a jolom! ¡Man c'o ta jun a yab c'olic!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Chatkaj ulok wuc', chaya' can ri Libano, at ri catec'ulan wuc'; chatkaj ulok wuc' chaya' can ri Libano. Chaca'yej ulok ri beya' kas puwi' ri Amana, kas puwi' ri Senir xukuje' ri Hermon; kas pa ri qui jul ulok tak ri coj, kas pa tak ri qui juyubal tak ri leopard." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Xaweläk'aj ri wanima', alaj wana'b, at ri catec'ulan wuc'; xaweläk'aj ri wanima' ruc' xa jun a cayenic ri xaya' chwe, ruc' jun chque ri jujun tak rabaj a chachal." 
SongOfSongs4:10 ¡Man e c'o ta c'o wi ri e a lok'ok'enic, alaj wana'b, at ri catec'ulan wuc'! ¡Sibalaj e qui' na ri e a lok'ok'enic chuwäch ri u wa'l uva, are c'o na ri qui je'lical tak ri e a c'oc'al chquiwäch conojel ri cäbanbex quech conojel ri c'oc'al!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 At ri catec'ulana wuc', chque ri e achi' queq'uiy ulok juyubal räx cab. ¡Juyubal räx cab xukuje' leche e c'o chuxe' ri awak'! ¡Jacha' ri u c'oc'al ri Libano jeri u c'oc'al ri awatz'iak!" 
SongOfSongs4:12 At, alaj wana'b, at ri catec'ulan wuc', at ticbal cotz'i'j tz'apitalic, tz'apim ja', t'ikom bulbux;" 
SongOfSongs4:13 ticbal cotz'i'j ri queq'uiy wi ulok e u che'al crabaj ri quequiya' je'licalaj tak qui wächinic; ticbal cotz'i'j ri e c'o wi cotz'i'j pok'," 
SongOfSongs4:14 e ajetak cotz'i'j nard xukuje' asapran, c'oc'alaj aj xukuje' cane'l, xukuje' ronojel qui wäch tak che' re c'oc' k'ol, re mir re aloe; ¡Ronojel qui wäch tak ri quebanbex c'oc'al!" 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ri u q'uiyibal ja' pa ri ticbal cotz'i'j are jun c'ua' ri caq'uiy wi ulok ri ja' ri cakaj ulok kas pa ri Libano. 
SongOfSongs4:16 Quiakik' re ri u wiquiak'ab elebal k'ij: ¡Chatc'astajok! Quiakik' re ri u mox k'ab elebal k'ij: ¡Tasaj waral! ¡Chixjich'ich' chupam ri nu ticbal cotz'i'j chijabuj c'ut ri u c'oc'al!” “Tasaj nu lok', chupam ri a ticbal cotz'i'j, chebatija' c'u awe ri e qui wächinic ri man c'o ta c'o wi ri u qui qui'al.”" 
SongOfSongs5:1 “In oquinak chic chupam ri nu ticbal cotz'i'j alaj wana'b, at ri catec'ulan wuc'. Nu majim chic ri nu mir xukuje' tak ri c'oc'al ri e ya'tal chwe, nu naom chic ri juyubal räx cab re ri wakaj, uq'uiatajinak chic ri u wa'l nu uva xukuje' ri nu leche.” “Lok'alaj tak wachil, chixwok xukuje' chixuq'uianok, ¡Chiwuq'uiaj ronojel ri qui waj!”" 
SongOfSongs5:2 “Ri in cätajin quinwaric c'asc'atinak c'ut ri wanima'. Xinto chi ri quinlok'ok'ej casiq'uin chuchi' ri uchi'ja: ‘¡Chajaka' chnuwäch, nu lok'; alaj wana'b, alaj nu ut ri k'apoj! ¡Ri nu jolom nebel rumal ri räxk'ab! ¡Ri räxk'ab re ri chak'ab cabelel pa nu jolom!’" 
SongOfSongs5:3 ‘Wesam chic ri watz'iak; ¡quebencoj chi c'u na ri' jumul! E nu ch'ajom chic ri wakan; ¡quenoj chi c'u ri' jumul che ri puc'uc' ulew!’ 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ri quinlok'ok'ej xunim ulok ri u k'ab chupam ri u julil ri uchi'ja. ¡Are wa' ri sibalaj xinslabesanic! 
SongOfSongs5:5 C'äte' c'u ri' xinwalij che u jakic chuwäch ri nu lok'. Chque ri nu k'ab xukuje' chque ri u wi' nu k'ab xekaj tak u tz'ujal mir puwi' ri c'opibal rech ri oquibal. ¡Aretak xinto xch'awic xinna' chi quincämic! Xinjak ri oquibal chuwäch ri nu lok', man c'o ta chi c'ut ri are' chi'. Xinsiq'uij man c'o ta xutzelej u bixic chwe." 
SongOfSongs5:6  
SongOfSongs5:7 Xinrik cumal ri chajinelab ri quebanow ri solinic chupam ri tinimit; xinquich'ayo, xinquisoco; ¡ri quechajin ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit ruc' chuk'ab xquijolij ri nu ch'ukubal!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ixokib aj Jerusalen, we quirik ri nu lok', chichi'j chwe chi quibij che chi cätajin quincäm rumal lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj.”" 
SongOfSongs5:9 “¿Jas ri u jalbem rib ri a lok', je'lic chquixo'l tak ri je'lic? ¿Jas ri u jalbem rib ri calok'ok'ej chi cujatakchi'j che u banic we chi'nic ri'?”" 
SongOfSongs5:10 “Ri nu lok' räxbak'alic sakpak'alic, man sachbal ta chquixo'l ri mil tak achijab." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ri u jolom re utzalaj k'an puak; ri u wi' u k'ajom tak rib k'ek k'ek jacha' jun joj; 
SongOfSongs5:12 ri e u bak'wäch e quieb ut ri e atinisam chupam leche, ri e kajinak chunakaj jun c'olbal ja';" 
SongOfSongs5:13 ri e jutak peraj u palaj e nimak tak ticbal cotz'i'j ri e c'o wi c'oc'alaj tak cotz'i'j. Ri e u chi' e roxox tak ri quebelel wi ulok jutak tz'uj mir; 
SongOfSongs5:14 ri e u k'ab e lak'apubal k'abaj re k'an puak ri ch'ukutal quij che ri je'lic abaj ri topas; ri u cuerp pilimalaj marpil ri u ware ri elepant ri e ch'epom tak je'lic abaj ri sapir che. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Ri e u ch'ec e tak rakan ja re marmol ri co e tac'al paquiwi' tak tac'alibal re utzalaj k'an puak; ri u bantajic man sachbal taj jacha' ri e chacalte' re ri Libano; 
SongOfSongs5:16 ri u pa u chi' man c'o ta c'o wi ri u qui'al. ¡Ronojel are' are jun ch'äcanel! Je u banic wa' ri nu lok', je u banic wa' ri lok' chwe, ixokib aj Jerusalen.”" 
SongOfSongs6:1 “¿Jawije' ri xbe wi ri lok' chawäch je'lic chquixo'l tak ri je'lic? ¿Jawije' ri xutakej wi u be? ¡Cujbe na awuc' che u tzucuxic!” 
SongOfSongs6:2 “Ri lok' chnuwäch benak pa ri ticbal u cotz'i'j, chupam ri ticbal u cotz'i'j ri c'oc'arinak, che u yuk'uxic ri u jumulaj xukuje' che qui ch'upic tak ri roxox." 
SongOfSongs6:3 In in rech ri lok' chnuwäch, xukuje' ri are' wech in. Ri are' cuyukuj ri u jumulaj xo'l tak ri roxox.”" 
SongOfSongs6:4 “At, at lok' chnuwäch, at je'lic xukuje' at ch'äcanel jacha' ri tinimit Tirs xukuje' Jerusalen; man cäk'atitaj taj jacha' juk'at ajch'ojab ri qui takem qui be." 
SongOfSongs6:5 ¡Chatanaba' nu ca'yexic, in ch'äctajinak c'u cumal ri a bak'wäch! Ri e a wi' quejunamataj cuc' ri alaj tak q'uisic' ri quech'opilaj pa tak ri juyub Galaad." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Ri e a ware, conojel e tz'akat, quejunamataj cuc' ri jumulaj tak chij ri c'äte qui walijic ulok che atinem ri e suc'umatal chic rech quesocax tak ri quij." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Ri e caperaj a palaj e caperaj crabaj ri e c'utal chrij ri ch'ukubal awib. 
SongOfSongs6:8 E oxc'al ri e ajawinelab ixokib e jumuch' ri man kas ta e ixokilab sibalaj c'u e q'ui ri k'apojib," 
SongOfSongs6:9 are c'u ri alaj nu ut ri k'apoj xa jun u tuquiel xa jun ri mialaxel ri sibalaj cajwaxic rech ri ixok ri xalanic. Aretak xca'yex cumal ri alitomab xequicot ruc'; xukuje' tak ajawinelab ixokib xukuje' ri man kas ta e ixokilab caquiya' u k'ij.” 
SongOfSongs6:10 “¿Jachin wa' ri cutac'abaxtaj rib jacha' ri k'ij re ri u sakaribal? Je'lic jacha' ri ic', cäjuluwic jacha' ri k'ij, ¡man c'o ta jun cacuin ta che u k'atixic jacha' juk'at ajch'ojab ri qui takem qui be!”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 “Xinbe pa ri qui juyubal ri nogal che u rayixic ri räx chuchi' ri nima'; are quinwaj quebenwil ri qui tux ri juwi' tak uva xukuje' ri qui cotz'ijal tak ri crabaj. 
SongOfSongs6:12 Man xinwetamaj ta chi c'ut jas ri xc'ulmatajic c'ä xinna' na wib in c'o chupam jun carwaj chuxcut ri u c'ojol ri wajawinel.” 
SongOfSongs6:13 “¡Chattzelej ulok, aj Sulamit! ¡Chattzelej ulok! ¡Chattzelej ulok, cäkaj catkilo!” “¿Jas c'ut ri qui waj quiwil che ri aj sulamit?” “¡Jun xojowem jacha' ri cäban pa tak ri kajebal!”" 
SongOfSongs7:1 “¡Sibalaj e je'l tak ri e awakan chquipam tak ri xajäb, u mia'l ajawinel! Ri e u mejic tak ri u xe' a pam e jacha' tak ri wikbal re utzalaj k'an puak ri e banom cumal nawinel tak k'abaj." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ri a muxux jun kumubal quetequic ri amak'el c'o utzalaj u wa'l uva chupam; ri apam jun pila trico sutim rij chque tak roxox. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Ri e uwo a c'u'x e quieb alaj tak masat aj lianic, quieb alaj tak masat yo'xab." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ri a kul jun tac'atic ja re marpil; ri e quieb a bak'wäch e quieb c'olbal tak ja' re ri tinimit Esbon, chunakaj ri oquibal re Bat-rabim; ri a tza'm junam ruc' ri tac'atic ja aj Libano ri caca'y apan che ri tinimit aj Damasc." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ri a jolom, puwi' ri a cuerp, xak junam ruc' ri juyub Carmel; bätz' aj azul ri e a wi': ¡jun ajawinel yututal chquipam tak ri e u c'olotil!" 
SongOfSongs7:6 Nu lok', ixok ch'äcanel, ¡man at c'o ta at c'o wi, sibalaj at je'lic!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ri a taq'ui'c jacha' ri u taq'ui'c juwi' tut; ri e uwo a c'u'x e jacha' jutak tzayaj u wäch tut. 
SongOfSongs7:8 In quinchomaj quinpaki' puwi' ri juwi' tut quebenwechbej tak c'ut ri e u wäch. Ri e uwo a c'u'x quebux c'u na jacha' jutak tzayaj uva; ri awuxlab, u c'oc'al tak mansa'n," 
SongOfSongs7:9 ri u pa a chi', jacha' ri utzalaj u wa'l uva ri sibalaj ch'uch'uj cakaj bic coc'ow pa ri chi'aj xukuje' pa ri wareaj.”" 
SongOfSongs7:10 “In in rech ri in lok' chuwäch: ri e u chuk'ab ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x quec'amow ulok wuc'. 
SongOfSongs7:11 ¡Tasaj, ri catinlok'ok'ej, jo' pa ri kulew! Cakoc'owisaj na ri ak'ab chquixo'l tak ri e u cotz'i'j pok'." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Nim a k'ab c'ut cujbe na jawije' e tiquil tak wi ri uva, che rilic we e tuxinak chic, we cätajin quepok' chic ri qui cotz'ijal, we e cotz'ijaninak chic ri e u che'al ri crabaj. ¡Chila' c'u quiya' wi ri nu lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj chawe!" 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ri e tak u xe' ri k'ayes ri cunabal caquijabuj ri qui c'oc'al. Chuchi' ri kachoch e c'o ronojel qui wäch che': chaki'j tak wächinic xukuje' wächinic ri c'äte' qui ch'upic, ri e nu tasom chawe, ri lok' chnuwäch.”" 
SongOfSongs8:1 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi at ta nu xibal, ri xatq'uiyisax ta cumal ri e uwo u c'u'x ri nu nan! Jeri', aretak ta catinrik pa ri be, cuya' ta c'u ri' quintz'umaj ta ri a palaj ma ta c'u c'o jachin jun qui nu yok'o;" 
SongOfSongs8:2 cuya' ta c'u ri' catinc'am bic pa rachoch ri nu nan, catin coj ta c'u bic chupam, at ta c'u ri' ri catux wajtij. In quinya' ta c'u ri' ri ruq'uiaxic ri u wa'l uva chawe ri sibaj ta utz na xukuje' ri qui wa'l tak ri nu crabaj." 
SongOfSongs8:3 ¡Chuya' ta c'ut ri u mox k'ab chuxe' ri nu jolom, qui nu lak'apuj ta c'ut ruc' ri riquiak'ab!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 “Chi chi'j chwe, ixokib aj Jerusalen, chi man quiwesaj taj ri u waram ri lok' chnuwäch ¡Chiya' che chi warok c'ä jampa' chraj chc'astajok!”" 
SongOfSongs8:5 “¿Jachin wa' ri cätajin capaki' ulok pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, tzalan puwi' ri u teleb ri lok' chuwäch?” “Chuxe' jun u che'al mansa'n xinya' wi latz' che ri a waram: chila' jawije' xebucoch' wi k'oxom ri a nan; chila' jawije' xatralaj wi ri a nan.”" 
SongOfSongs8:6 “Chinac'ama' bic chinat'ika' bic puwi' ri awanima', ¡chinac'ama' bic chinat'ika' bic che ri u kul ri ak'ab! Ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj sibalaj c'o u chuk'ab jacha' ri cämical; ri ajwanic, man casubun taj jacha' ri quemuk wi ri cäminakib. ¡Ri k'ak' ri canicowic aj lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj are' jun k'ak' aj Dios!" 
SongOfSongs8:7 Ri qui ja'il conojel tak ri plo man quecuin ta ri' che u chupic ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj; mawi ta ne tak ri nima' quecuin ta che u chupisaxic. We ta c'o jun quebuchi'j ta conojel ri u k'inomal che u q'uexwäch ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, xa etz'ben tak wächaj cuc'ulaj na.”" 
SongOfSongs8:8 “Ri alaj ka chak' man e c'o ta uwo tak u c'u'x. ¿Jas quekabana' na che aretak cheltokok? 
SongOfSongs8:9 We ta jun nimalaj tapia que ka yac ta wikbal ri' puwi' re sak puak; We ta jun uchi'ja, que ka ch'uk ta rij ri' cuc' tak tz'alam re chacalte'.”" 
SongOfSongs8:10 “In in junam ruc' jun nimalaj tapia, ri e uwo nu c'u'x e jacha' tac'atak tak ja. Rumal ri', chquiwäch ri e u bak'wäch are', nu rikom chic ri utzilal." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Ri Salomon xc'oji' jun u ticbal u uva pa Baal-amon. Xujach can pa qui k'ab chajinelab, aretak c'u cayactaj ri u wächinic caquijach jun mil sak puak che chquijujunal." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ri jun mil puak e awech Salomon, quieb sient c'ut chque ri chajinelab ¡in quinchajij ri kas nu ticbal uva!”" 
SongOfSongs8:13 “¡Chaya' chwe chi quintatabej ri a chabebal, ajawinel ixok' quech tak ri ticbal tak cotz'i'j! ¡Ri e kachil queyem u tatabexic!”" 
SongOfSongs8:14 “¡Chatxic'anok, nu lok', chatxic'anok jacha' jun masat aj lianic, jacha' ri ral jun ati't masat paquiwi' tak ri juyub nojinak chque tak c'oc'al!”" 
Isaiah1:1 E are' tak wa' ri xya' u bixic che ri Isaiy, u c'ojol ri Amoz, ri xuc'am rumal ri c'utwächinic ri cäril na ri Juda xukuje' ri Jerusalen: ri Uziy, Jotam, Acaz xukuje' ri Ezequiy pa Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Caj xukuje' ulew, chitampe' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel: “Xebenq'uiyisaj alc'ualxelab c'ä xenimar na, xa c'u xquiyac quib chwij." 
Isaiah1:3 Ri wacax reta'm u wäch ri rajaw, xukuje' ri bur ri cäya' wi ri recha' rumal ri rajaw; are c'u ri Israel ri kas nu tinimit, man cuch'ob ta mawi c'o retamanic.”" 
Isaiah1:4 ¡Tok'ob i wäch winak ajmaquib, tinimit nojinak che etzelal, calc'ual itzel tak winak, alc'ualxelab ri e etzelatajinak! Inajtajisam iwib che ri Ajawaxel, i yo'm can ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel, i xutum canok." 
Isaiah1:5 We c'u ri ix quicoj i chuk'ab rech man quixniman taj, man c'o ta chi c'u cac'äjisax wi i wäch che ri i cuerp. Socotajinak ronojel ri i jolom, e i tzakom ronojel ri i chuk'ab." 
Isaiah1:6 Cächapletaj puwi' ri akanaj copan c'ä puwi' jolomaj man c'o ta jubik' ri ma ta c'o u yab chwe; ronojel nojinak che socotajic, ch'ayiquil, ch'a'c ri cäpujanic; man c'o ta jun e cunaninak mawi e botz'owinak, mawi e to'm ri u k'oxom ruc' aseit." 
Isaiah1:7 Ri iwulew canajinak jacha' jun chaki'j uwo sak, quenicow c'ut ri tinimit pa k'ak'. Ri e i c'ulel quequitij ri quitico. Ronojel canajinak canok jacha' jun chaki'j uwo sak, jacha' ri xuc'ulmaj ri Sodom aretak xsachisax u wäch." 
Isaiah1:8 Xak u tuquel chic ri Sion tac'al canok, xak u tuquel chic jacha' jun cäbal pa u niq'uiajil jun ticbal uva, xak u tuquel chic jacha' jun cäbal pa u niq'uiajil jun ticbal melon, xak u tuquel junam ruc' jun tinimit ri sutim rij cumal ri c'ulel." 
Isaiah1:9 We ta ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ma ta xebuto'tajisaj can quieb oxib chke, je ta ka c'ulmam ri' jas ri xuc'ulmaj ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor." 
Isaiah1:10 Takanelab re Sodom, chitatabej ri cubij ri Ajawaxel; tinimit re Gomor kas chaya' a xiquin che ri cuc'ut na ri ka Dios chawäch." 
Isaiah1:11 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “¿Jasche quebic'am ulok jumulaj tabal tak tok'ob chnuwäch? Q'uistajinak chi nu c'u'x chque ri e tabal tok'ob que ama'ib tak chij ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' chque ri qui xepoyil ri alaj ama'ib tak wacax; man utz ta chi quinwil ri qui quiq'uel ri ama'ib tak wacax, ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' ri ama'ib tak q'uisic'." 
Isaiah1:12 Ri ix quixelc'ol chnuwäch, ¿jachin c'u xbin chiwe chi quixpe che u tac'alexic ri uwo wachoch?" 
Isaiah1:13 Mic'am chi ulok sipanic chnuwäch ri man c'o ta qui patan, man quinch'ij ta ri qui sibal. Ri ix quisiq'uij ri tinimit che u ya'ic u k'ij ri c'ac' ic' xukuje' ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri in man quincoch' ta ri qui nimak'ij ri winak quequiban c'u etzelal." 
Isaiah1:14 Man utz ta quinwil wi ri nimak'ij re ri c'ac' ic' xukuje' ri u mulixic iwib; ¡man cäkaj ta chi chnuwäch, man quinch'ij ta chic!" 
Isaiah1:15 Aretak quiyac ri i k'ab che u banic ch'awem, ri in man quixinca'yej taj; pune' quiban q'ui ch'awem, ri in man quixintatabej taj, rumal chi tz'ajtajinak ri i k'ab che quic'." 
Isaiah1:16 ¡Chich'aja' iwib, chijosk'ij iwib! ¡Chebinajtajisaj ri iwetzelal chnuwäch! ¡Chik'ila iwib che u banic ri man utz taj!" 
Isaiah1:17 ¡Chiwetamaj u banic ri utzil, chicojo' i chuk'ab che u banic ri suq'uil, chito' ri u rikom c'ax, chibana' utzil che ri minor, chito' u wi' ri malca'n ixok!”" 
Isaiah1:18 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Tisaj kachomaj we jasach ri'. Pune' ta ne sibalaj quiäk rokroj ri i mac, quinban na che jacha' ri sak tew; pune' ta junam ruc' jun atz'iak ri rubum pa corinto quinban na sak che jacha' ri sakalaj rismal chij." 
Isaiah1:19 We quiwaj quixnimanic, quitij na ri je'l tak wächinic ri cuya' ri ulew;" 
Isaiah1:20 we c'u quitakej ri man nimanic taj, man c'o ta i to'tajic kas quixcämisax wi pa ri ch'o'j.” Kas are ri Ajawaxel xbin wa'." 
Isaiah1:21 ¡Jicalaj tinimit, jasche xatux junam ruc' jun ixok re nim ch'utin! Nabe canok conojel ri awinakil cäquiban ri suc' xukuje' utz ri qui c'aslemal, are c'u ri camic xuwi cämisanelab chic e c'olic." 
Isaiah1:22 At sak puak nabe, xawetzelaj c'u awib xatux mes, at utzalaj u wa'l uva nabe, xawetzelaj c'u awib xatux ja'." 
Isaiah1:23 Ri e a takanelab man e tal ta tzij, e junam qui wäch cuc' ri eläk'omab. Conojel cäquic'ayij quib rumal puak xukuje' cäquitzucuj chi c'o cäsipax chque. Man cäquiban ta tok'ob che ri minor, mawi c'o cubij qui c'u'x che u to'ic ri malca'n ixok." 
Isaiah1:24 Rumal ri', ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel e u cuinem, ri c'o ronojel u cuinem pa Israel, cujiquiba' u bixic: “¡Ruc' la'! quinwesaj na ri woyowal paquiwi' ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe. Camic quinq'uis u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe. Cäquitoj na ri qui mac pa nu k'ab." 
Isaiah1:25 Quinwalijisaj chi jumul ri nu k'ab che u banic c'ax chawe, quinporoj ronojel ri mes ri at c'o wi, catinjosk'ij na, catinwesaj na chupam ri a tz'ilol." 
Isaiah1:26 Quinbano chi quec'oji' chi na a k'atal tak tzij jas ri nabe, xukuje' e ya'l tak a no'j jacha' ri xec'oji' pa ri chapletajic. Aretak bantajinak chi wumal cäbix chi na chawe: ‘Suc'alaj tinimit’, ‘Jicalaj tinimit’ catuchix chi na." 
Isaiah1:27 Ruc' ri nu suq'uil xukuje' ri nu chac ri cäcolonic quebentor na ri winak aj Sion, chetzelej chi wuc';" 
Isaiah1:28 quinban na ch'akatak chque ri man e tal ta tzij, xukuje' e ajmaquib. Ri quinquixutuj canok quecäm na." 
Isaiah1:29 Quixq'uix na ix chque tak we räx che' ri' xukuje' chque tak ri ticonijibal cotz'i'j ri sibalaj quekaj chiwäch, jawije' ri quebiya' wi k'ijlanic chque tak ri diosib." 
Isaiah1:30 Quixux na jacha' jun räx che' ri chaki'j u xak, quixjunamataj na ruc' jun ticonijibal cotz'i'j jawije' ri man c'o ta wi ja'." 
Isaiah1:31 Ri cowilaj achi cux na junam ruc' ri pajo, ri e u chac quebux na junam ruc' ri u pixk'ak' ri e quieb xa junam quenicow na, man c'o ta jachin quechupuwic.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Are wa' ri xuc'ut ri Dios chuwäch ri Isaiy, u c'ojol ri Amos, chrij ri cäril na ri Juda xukuje' ri Jerusalen:" 
Isaiah2:1 Are wa' ri xuc'ut ri Dios chuwäch ri Isaiy, u c'ojol ri Amos, chrij ri cäril na ri Juda xukuje' ri Jerusalen:" 
Isaiah2:2 Pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij junab, cäjiquibax na u bixic ri juyub ri cariktaj wi ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Are juyub wa' ri sibalaj naj quel na chicaj, ri sibalaj naj elinak chicaj chuwäch apachique jun juyub chic. Ronojel c'u qui wäch nimak tak tinimit quebopan na chila'," 
Isaiah2:3 e q'uia tinimit winak quebopanic, cäquibij na: “Tisaj, chujpakal cho ri u juyub ri Ajawaxel, ri rachoch ri u Dios ri Jacob, rech are' quec'utuw tak ri u be chkawäch, cujcuin c'u che binem pa ri alaj tak u be.” Pa Sion quel wi na ulok ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel, pa Jerusalen cäpe wi na ri u tzij." 
Isaiah2:4 Ri Ajawaxel cuk'at na tzij chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit, cujamarisaj na ri qui ch'o'j ri q'uialaj tak winak. Ri e qui ch'ich' re ch'o'j cäquiban na asaron chque, ri e qui tz'imaj ch'ich' cäquiban na jos chque. Man c'o ta jun tinimit quebumajij ta chic ri e u ch'ojibal chrij jun chic, mawi cätijox ta chi che u banic ch'o'j." 
Isaiah2:5 ¡Jo', u tinimit ri Jacob, chujbin pa ri sakilal ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel!" 
Isaiah2:6 Ajawaxel, yo'm la can ri tinimit la, ri u tinimit ri Jacob; ri culew nojinak chque ch'obonelab aj elebal k'ij, xukuje' ajk'ijab jacha' ri e c'o chquixo'l ri aj pilisteyib, cuc'ulaj c'u rib qui wäch cuc' ri man e qui winakil taj." 
Isaiah2:7 Pa ronojel c'olbal c'o wi k'an puak xukuje' sak puak, nojinak ri tinimit che nimalaj k'inomal pa ronojel c'olbal e c'o wi quiej xukuje' e c'o carwaj ri man quebajilataj taj." 
Isaiah2:8 ¡Xukuje' e nojinak chque tak ri e diosib! Ri winak quequik'ijilaj ri diosib ri e qui banom ruc' ri qui k'ab, ri e qui banom cuc' ri u wi' tak qui k'ab." 
Isaiah2:9 Qui mejom quib qui mach'om quib, masach la ri qui mac." 
Isaiah2:10 Ri winak cäquinim na quib xo'l tak ri nimak tak abaj chuxe' ri ulew cäquic'u' na quib chuwäch ri xibibalalaj u wächbal ri Ajawaxel, chuwäch ri nimalaj u juluwem." 
Isaiah2:11 Ri e banal tak nimal, queyuxi na ri cäquiban quib chi nimak qui k'ij quemach'irisax na. Xuwi ri Ajawaxel cuc'ut na ri u nimalil pa ri k'ij ri'," 
Isaiah2:12 pa ri k'ij aretak ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuyac rib chrij ronojel winak ri cuban nimal Xukuje' ri cunimarisaj rib, xukuje' chrij ronojel winak ri cuna' rib chi nim u banic, che u mach'irisaxic;" 
Isaiah2:13 chquij conojel winak ri cäquina' quib chi e chacalte' ri e c'o pa ri Libano, nimak tak che' ri naj e elinak chicaj, o e bakit re Basan;" 
Isaiah2:14 chquij conojel ri cäquina' quib chi e junam cuc' ri tac'atak tak juyub, o c'ache'laj ri naj e elinak chicaj," 
Isaiah2:15 chquij conojel ri cäquina' quib chi e junam cuc' ri e tac'atak tak ja o e pimak tak tapia," 
Isaiah2:16 chquij conojel ri cäquina' quib chi e junam cuc' ri jucub re Tarsis, o jucub ri sibalaj e rayibal." 
Isaiah2:17 Ri e banal tak nimal xukuje' ri cäquiban quib chi nimak qui k'ij, kas quemach'irisax na. Xuwi ri Ajawaxel cuc'ut na ri u nimalil pa ri k'ijol ri'," 
Isaiah2:18 cusach c'u na qui wäch conojel ri diosib. 
Isaiah2:19 Aretak cäwalij ri Ajawaxel, cunojisaj c'u ronojel ri uwächulew che xibriquil, ri winak cäquinim na quib pa tak ri pec xo'l tak ri abaj, pa tak ri jul xe' tak ri ulew cäquic'u' na quib chuwäch ri xibibalalaj u wächbal ri Ajawaxel xukuje' chuwäch ri nimalaj u juluwem." 
Isaiah2:20 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ri winak quebuq'uiaka' na ri e u diosib chquiwäch tak ri ch'o xukuje' chquiwäch tak ri sotz', ri diosib ri e re k'an puak xukuje' e re sak puak, are' xebanowic che rech quebuk'ijilaj." 
Isaiah2:21 Cäquinim na quib pa tak ri pec xe' tak ri tanatak, pa tak ri jul xe' tak ri nimak tak abaj, che u c'u'ic quib chuwäch ri xibibalalaj u wächbal ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' chuwäch ri nimalaj u juluwem, aretak cäwalijic cunojisaj ri uwächulew che xibriquil." 
Isaiah2:22 Chitanaba' u cu'bisaxic i c'u'x chrij ri winak, ri man nim ta u k'ij, ri u c'aslemal ri winak xa' jun uxlabic." 
Isaiah3:1 ¡Kas chixoc il! Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cäresaj na che ri Jerusalen xukuje' che ri Juda ronojel qui wäch yanelab, xukuje' ronojel wa ja' ri catzukunijic." 
Isaiah3:2 Cuban na chi cäsach u wäch ri cowilaj achi, ri banal ch'o'j, ri k'atal tzij, ri k'axal tzij, ri ch'obonel, ri ri'jab tak achijab," 
Isaiah3:3 ri qui nimal ajch'ojab, ri nim u banic, ri ya'l no'j, ri ajk'ij xukuje' ri ajitz," 
Isaiah3:4 jujun alabom cucoj na che c'amal qui be jujun tak ac'alab quebajawin na paquiwi'. 
Isaiah3:5 Ri c'ax ri cäpe paquiwi' ri winak, chi pune' ta ne canima' quib, cäquich'ayala' na quib. Ri c'ä e ac'alab quequich'ay na ri ri'jab tak winak, ri man nimak ta qui k'ij quewalij na chquij ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Isaiah3:6 Jun achalaxic c'ut cuc'am na jun rachalal ri c'o pa rachoch ri u tat, cubij na che: “Ri at c'ä e c'o na awatz'iak cacojo chatoc ba che c'amal ka be chattakan puwi' we jumulaj etzelatajic ri'.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Ri jun chic cubij na che: “Man quincuin ta in che u suc'umaxic we yojyobic ri', man c'o ta ne nu wa pa wachoch, mawi watz'iak ri quincojo. Minicoj che takanel puwi' ri tinimit.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Ri Jerusalen cätajin cäwulijic, ri Juda cäyojyob na, chila' c'u quebix wi xukuje' queban wi ri jastak ri quec'ulelan ri Ajawaxel, jastak ri quec'axc'obisan ri are'." 
Isaiah3:9 Chisakil quemacunic, man cäquic'u' ta ri cäquibano e junam ruc' ri Sodom, cäquiya' u bixic chque conojel ri winak. Tok'ob qui wäch, e are' quesuc'uman ri c'äjisabal qui wäch." 
Isaiah3:10 Utz re ri suc'alaj winak, utz c'u quel na, cäquicot na ruc' ri u wächinic ri u chac." 
Isaiah3:11 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri itzel winak, c'ax c'u quel na! jacha' ri chac ri u banom, jeri' tojbal ri cuya' na ri Dios che." 
Isaiah3:12 Jun alaj ac'al k'atal tzij cäbanow na c'ax che ri a tinimit pa qui k'ab ixokib cäc'oji' wi na ri k'atoj tzij. Nu tinimit, ri c'amal tak a be catquisubu, catquic'am bic pa jech'alaj be." 
Isaiah3:13 Ri Ajawaxel u suc'umam rib che u k'atic tzij, xak reye'm jampa' cuc'äjisaj u wäch ri u tinimit." 
Isaiah3:14 Ri Ajawaxel cäsiq'uin che u k'atic tzij, cubij c'u na chque ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' chque ri c'amal tak u be ri tinimit: “Ri ix cätajin quisach u wäch ri nu ticbal uva i banom eläk' chquij ri mebayib, ri quiweläk'aj quebic'ol cho tak iwachoch." 
Isaiah3:15 ¿Jachin ix takowinak chi quiban c'ax che ri nu tinimit, xukuje' chi quebich'ay ri mebayib?” Jewa' cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah3:16 Cubij ri Ajawaxel xukuje': “Ri ixokib aj Sion, ri e banal tak nimal, ri man cäquipachba' ta jubik' ri qui jolom quebinic, ri man c'o ta qui q'uixbal chquipalaj, ri xak cocoj u xo'l tak cäkan cäquibano aretak quebinic, cäquichinicha' ri wikbal cakan;" 
Isaiah3:17 che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch quinban na tol che ri qui jolom rumal ri quiäkchi'n, xukuje' quebench'anaba' na chquiwäch ri winak.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Pa ri k'ij ri', ri Ajawaxel cusach na qui wäch conojel ri wikbal tak ib: ri wikbal tak akanaj, ri wikbal jolomaj, ri wikbal tak bak'wächaj." 
Isaiah3:19 Ri u wi' tak xiquinaj, ri wikbal u kul k'abaj, ri ch'ukubal ib," 
Isaiah3:20 ri pisbal jolomaj, ri alaj tak tikom ch'ich' re akanaj, ri pas, ri alaj tak lime't c'olbal c'oc'al, ri e siq'uibal k'inomal," 
Isaiah3:21 ri mulk'ab, ri wikbal tak tza'maj," 
Isaiah3:22 ri je'lalaj tak atz'iak, ri atz'iak ri quek'uxic, ri chal, ri chim uc'abal jastak," 
Isaiah3:23 ri ilbal ib, ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak, ri pisbal tak jolomaj xukuje' ri pim tak su't." 
Isaiah3:24 Che u q'uexwäch c'oc'al, chuwil che u q'uexwäch pas, jun colob; che u q'uexwäch wi'aj ri xiyom, tolalaj jolomaj che u q'uexwäch ch'uch'ujalaj atz'iak, jun wakawoj atz'iak; che u q'uexwäch je'lal, jun etal ruc' ch'ich' ri quiäkarinak pa k'ak'." 
Isaiah3:25 Ri e a winak quekaj na pa ri ch'o'j, ri e awajch'ojab quecäm na pa ch'o'j." 
Isaiah3:26 Ri winak pa ri tinimit quebok' na, cäquicoj na atz'iak re bis, queya' na can qui tuquel." 
Isaiah4:1 Pa ri k'ij ri', xak e quieb oxib achijab quecanaj na canok, e wukub ixokib quech'ojin na puwi' jun achi, cäquibij na che: “Ri uj cäkatzuk kib ka tuquel, xukuje' uj cujlok'ow ri katz'iak, xuwi ta ne caya' chke chi cäbe ri a bi' chkij, cujawesaj c'u pa ri ka q'uixbal.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Pa ri k'ij ri, ri tuxaj ri cuq'uiyisaj na ri Ajawaxel, cux na wikbal xukuje' juluwem chque ri quec'asi' na can pa Israel ri e wächinic ri quiquiq'uiyisaj ri ulew, are nimarisabal quib, are nimarisabal qui k'ij." 
Isaiah4:3 Ri quec'asi' na can pa Sion, ri queto'taj na can pa Jerusalen, ri cäya' chque chi quecanaj chila', quebinax na: “E tastal che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Isaiah4:4 Aretak ri Ajawaxel chuk'ata' tzij, chuya' c'ut ri c'äjisabal wächaj, cujosk'ij na ri Jerusalen che ri qui quiq'uel ri e u cämisam, xukuje' quebuch'aj na ri aj Sion che ri e tz'ajtajinak wi." 
Isaiah4:5 Puwi' ronojel ri juyub Sion xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri winak ri qui mulin quib chila', ri Ajawaxel cuq'uiyisaj na jun k'ekalaj sutz' pa k'ij, are c'u ri chak'ab jun juluwem xukuje' jun k'ak' ri canicowic. Paquiwi' conojel cac'oji' wi na ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel," 
Isaiah4:6 che qui chajixic xukuje' che qui to'ic cux c'u na jun mu'jal ri cäk'atin ri u k'ak'al ri k'ij, xukuje' che to'bal quib chuwäch ri jäb xukuje' ri cakulja." 
Isaiah5:1 Quinebixon na pa ri u bi' ri wanima' wib ruc' ri utz na, ri bix ri quinbixoj che ri ticbal u uva. Ri wanima' wib ruc' c'o jun ticbal u uva pa jun ulew ri sibalaj cäwächinic." 
Isaiah5:2 Xutajij ri ulew, xeresaj ri abaj chupam, xutic c'u qui k'ab utzalaj tak uva. Pa u niq'uiajil ri tico'n xuyac wi jun nimalaj tac'atic ja', xukuje' xusuc'umaj jun c'olbal ri capitz' wi ri u wa'l uva. Ri wanima' wib ruc' reye'm chi ri uva ri xebentico quequiya' na qui'laj tak uva, e are c'u ri uva ri xebuya' xa c'aylaj tak uva." 
Isaiah5:3 Camic c'ut aj Jerusalen, winak aj Juda, chibij jachin ri ajchak'mac, we are ri ticbal nu uva o in." 
Isaiah5:4 ¿La c'o ta c'u lo ri rajawaxic xinban ta na che ri nu ticbal uva? ¿La c'o ta c'u lo jun jasach ri ma ta xinban che? In weye'm chi xuya' ta qui'laj tak uva, ¿jas c'u che c'aylaj tak uva xuya'?" 
Isaiah5:5 Quinbij c'u na chiwe ri xinchomaj u banic che ri nu ticbal uva: quinwesaj ri coral ri c'o chrij, rech cäsachisax u wäch; quinwor ri tapia ri c'o chrij, rech cätac'alexic;" 
Isaiah5:6 quinwonoba' na canok. Man cäjosk'ix ta chic mawi quebok ri k'ayes chupam, cänoj na che q'uix xukuje' che itzel tak k'ayes. Quinbij na chque ri sutz' chi man cäquitak ta chi ulok ri jäb puwi'." 
Isaiah5:7 Ri ticbal u uva ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri u tico'n ri sibalaj lok' chuwäch, are ri rulew ri Israel, u tinimit ri Juda. Ri Ajawaxel reye'm chi queniman che ri u pixab, xuwi c'u cämisanic curik cuc' reye'm suq'uilal, xuwi c'u cuta' rakoj tak chi'aj re k'oxom." 
Isaiah5:8 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri quebilok'ola' tak ja, ri quebilok'ola' tak ulew, man c'o ta jubik' c'olbal quiya' ta chi can che jun chic, quijekeba' iwib jacha' ta ne chi xak xuwi ri ix quixc'oji' chupam ri ulew!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chwe: “E q'ui ja queyojyob na; pune' ta ne e nimak xukuje' e je'lic, man c'o ta chi jun caraj cäc'oji' ta chquipam." 
Isaiah5:10 Cawinak lajuj c'am ulew ri ticom uva chuwäch, xa jun alaj bo'j u wa'l uva cuyao'. Lajuj coxtar ija' xa' jun coxtar trico cuya'.”" 
Isaiah5:11 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri sibalaj ak'ab quixwalij che k'abaric, rumal ri u chuk'ab ri u wa'l uva quixcanaj can pa ri i c'olbal c'ä coc na ri ak'ab!" 
Isaiah5:12 Xuwi k'ojom re arp, re nimalaj arp, re tum xukuje' re su' cätatajic, c'o sibalaj u wa'l uva pa ri i nimak'ij man quixoc ta c'u il che ri cuban ri Ajawaxel, mawi quicoj ri u chac pa ajilabal." 
Isaiah5:13 Rumal c'u rech chi man quiwaj taj quixch'obonic, ri nu tinimit quesax na bic pa ri rulew, conojel ri aj Israel xukuje' ri e c'amal tak qui be, quecäm na rumal wi'jal xukuje' chakij chi'." 
Isaiah5:14 Ri u jul cäminak cujakakej na ri u pa u chi' jacha' jun juyubal awaj, che qui bik'ic bic ri aj israelib xukuje' ri c'amal tak qui be we winak ri' ri e c'o pa jajatem xukuje' pa etzenem." 
Isaiah5:15 Conojel ri winak quemach'i na canok ri banal tak nimal xak queca'y chic. 
Isaiah5:16 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'ut na rib chi nim u banic, pa ri k'ij aretak cuk'at tzij ri Tastalicalaj Dios cuc'ut na ri u tastaliquil aretak cuban ri suq'uilal." 
Isaiah5:17 Conojel ri tinimit tak quewulix na, chquixo'l ri wulijinak tak ja queyuk'ux wi na ri chij xukuje' q'uisic'." 
Isaiah5:18 Tok'ob i wäch ix ri cuc' banoj tak tzij quijururej ri etzelal, quijururej ri mac jacha' ri cuban ri cujururej jun carwaj." 
Isaiah5:19 Ix ri quibij: “Chanim chubana' ri Dios ri jastak ri cubij, rech quekilo; chi ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel chutz'akatisaj chanim ri e u chomam qui banic rech cäketamaj qui wäch.”" 
Isaiah5:20 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri quibij utz che ri man utz taj, man utz ta quixcha' c'u che ri utz; quijalwächij ri sakilal pa k'ekumalil, are c'u ri k'eku'm quiban sakilal che, ri quijalwächij ri c'ayil pa qui'al, ri quiban c'a che ri qui', are c'u ri qui' pa c'ayil!" 
Isaiah5:21 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri quina' iwib chi c'o i no'j, xukuje' quina' iwib chi sibalaj c'o iwetamanic!" 
Isaiah5:22 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri man c'o ta quixch'äcow che u tijic u wa'l uva, man c'o ta jun quixch'äcow che u suc'umaxic ri tzam!" 
Isaiah5:23 Ix ri xa rumal puak ri cäya' chiwe, quibij chi man c'o ta u mac ri c'o u mac, man quel ta jubik' i c'u'x che ri man c'o ta u mac." 
Isaiah5:24 Rumal ri', jacha' ri k'ak' ri cuporoj ri pajo, xukuje' ri rak' k'ak' cuchajirisaj ri chaki'j tak u xak che', jewa' xukuje' ri u sachic i wäch, jacha' ri tico'n ri cäk'ay ri qui rab, cätuquin ri qui cotz'ijal jacha' ri puc'uc' ulew. Rumal rech chi man nim ta xiwil wi ri u tijonic xukuje' ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah5:25 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xpe royowal che ri u tinimit, xuyac ri u k'ab che u c'äjisaxic u wäch. Ri juyub xebirbobic, ri cäminakib xejiljoxin canok jacha' mes pa tak ri be. Man oc'owinak ta c'u ri royowal ri Ajawaxel ri are' c'ä u takem u cojic xib." 
Isaiah5:26 Ri Ajawaxel cuyac jun etal, cuc' xulk'abem cusiq'uij apan jun nim tinimit ri naj c'o wi; che ri sibalaj naj na che ri uwächulew Cuban na che chi capetic. Capextax c'ut, copan ruc' nimalaj aninakil;" 
Isaiah5:27 man c'o ta jun tukar mawi cosinak chquixo'l, man c'o ta jun ri ma ta sibalaj utz ri ma ta sibalaj utz u jakic ri u bak'wäch u banom, man c'o ta jun ri ma ta co u ximom ri u xe' u pam, mawi jun ri t'okopitajinak ri ximibal u xajäb." 
Isaiah5:28 Sibalaj t'ist'ak u wi' tak ri qui ch'ab, conojel ri qui q'uiakbal ch'ab sibalaj e utz qui tanixic qui banom. Ri quixq'uiak ri qui quiej sibalaj e co jacha' ri abaj, ri quetet rech ri qui carwaj e junam ruc' jun sulc'um:" 
Isaiah5:29 Ri qui wunem je jas ri u wunem jun coj, ri cäjininic aretak cuchap ri u ti', cuc'am c'u bic man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cumaj ta che." 
Isaiah5:30 We nim tinimit ri', aretak copan ri k'ij ri c'utum, quejinin na jacha' ri plo, chrij ri Israel; we c'u c'o jun cäca'y che ri uwächulew cäril na chi ronojel c'o pa k'eku'm, k'ekumarinak c'u ri sakil cumal ri sutz'." 
Isaiah6:1 Pa ri junab aretak xcäm ri ajawinel U, xinwil ri Ajawaxel, t'uyul pa jun tem re ajawinel ri sibalaj naj elinak chicaj, ri u chi' ri u k'u' u nojisam u pam ri rachoch Dios." 
Isaiah6:2 Jujun chajinelab aj caj ri quejuluwic e c'o puwi' ri are. Chquijujunal c'o wakitak qui xic'. Ruc' quieb qui xic' caquich'uk ri qui palaj, ruc' quieb chic caquich'uk quib, ruc' quieb chic querapapic." 
Isaiah6:3 Caquibij c'u chquibil tak quib: “Tastalic, tastalic, tastal ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ronojel ri uwächulew nojinak che ri u juluwem.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Aretak xxojlin we ch'abal ri', ri e oquibal tak chupam ri rachoch Dios xeyicopic xukuje' ri kas rachoch Dios xnoj che sib." 
Isaiah6:5 Xinchomaj c'ut: “¡Tok'ob nu wäch, quinecämok! Wilom ri Ajawinel cuc' ri nu bak'wäch, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem; in, ri in jun winak ri e tz'il ri u chi', in c'o chquixo'l ri winak ri e tz'il ri e qui chi'.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xpe jun chque ri chajinelab aj caj ri quejuluwic xrapapic xopan wuc'. Ri ruc'am ulok jun chapbal ri u cayem ulok jun rachak k'ak' ri u c'amom puwi' ri porobal," 
Isaiah6:7 xunak ri nu chi' ruc' ri k'ak' xubij c'u chwe: “Chawilampe', we rachak k'ak' ri' e u nakom ri a chi'. Ri awetzelal estajinak chic chawe, ri a mac e sachtajinak chic.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Xinta' c'u ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel ri je cubij wa: “¿Jachin ta ri quintak bic? ¿Jachin ta ri cux ka tako'n?” Ri in xinbij: “In c'olic ri'. Chinataka' la bic.” 
Isaiah6:9 Ri are' xubij chwe: “Jät, jabij che we tinimit ri' ri quinbij chawe: ‘Pune' sibalaj quetatabenic, man quenojin ta na; pune' queca'yic man quech'obon ta na'.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Chatacarisaj ri u chomabal we tinimit ri' chach'uku' ri e qui xiquin, chatz'apij ri e qui bak'wäch, rech man quecuin ta queca'yic, mawi quech'obonic, rech man quetzelej ta wuc' quecunataj ta c'u ne.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Ri in xinc'ot u chi': “¿Joropa' k'ijol cabeytaj wa', Ajawaxel?” Ri are' xubij chwe: “C'ä casach na qui wäch ri tinimit tak, man c'o ta jun u winakil cäcanajic, c'ä quecanaj na can ri ja qui tuquiel, ri ulew quejamajob canok," 
Isaiah6:12 ri Ajawaxel queresaj na bic ri winak ruc' okatanic, cätoli' c'u can ri ulew." 
Isaiah6:13 We c'u ne queto'taj can quieb oxib chque ri winak, cäsach na qui wäch xukuje' jacha' aretak cäram jun bakit, o jun räx che', xuwi c'u cäcanaj can ri u cuta'mil.” (Che c'u we cuta'm ri' quel wi na ulok jun tastalicalaj tuxaj)." 
Isaiah7:1 Ri Rezin ajawinel re Siriy, xukuje' ri Pek ajawinel re Israel, u c'ojol ri Remaliy, xech'ojin ruc' ri Jerusalen, are ta xcaj xquich'äco, man c'u xecuin taj. Xc'ulmataj wa' aretak pa tak ri k'ij aretak ri Acaz, u c'ojol ri Jotam, ri' u mam c'ut ri Uziy, are' ajawinel pa Juda." 
Isaiah7:2 Pa we k'ij ri' xeyok we tzijol ri' che ri Acaz xukuje' chque ri e ralaxic: “Ri e aj Siriy qui junamam qui wäch cuc' ri aj Eprain.” Ri ajawinel xukuje' ri winak xquichaplej birbitem jacha' ri cäquiban ri che' pa ri c'ache'laj aretak cäjich'ich' ri quiakik'. 
Isaiah7:3 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Isaiy: “Chac'ama' ri a c'ojol Sear-jasub, jät, jarika' ri ajawinel Acaz chuchi' ri u be ja' ri coc chupam ri nimalaj colobal ja' ri cäch'aj wi atz'iak," 
Isaiah7:4 chabij c'u che: ‘Chatoc il, maxe'j c'u awib; mawi muban quieb a c'u'x chque we quieb u tza'm tak si' ri' ri quebukuwic, ri Rezin e rachil ri aj Siriy xukuje' ri u c'ojol ri Remaliy, ri cätajin quenicow ruc' coyowal." 
Isaiah7:5 Ri aj Siriy cachil ri aj Eprain xukuje' ri u c'ojol ri Remaliy, qui chomam u banic c'ax chawe, quibim c'ut:" 
Isaiah7:6 Chujoc che u ch'äquic ri Juda, kacojo' xe'n ib che kabana' kech che, kacojo' ri u c'ojol ri Tabeel che rajawinel." 
Isaiah7:7 Cubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel: Mawi jubik' cäc'ulmataj wa'. 
Isaiah7:8 Ri Damasc are nim tinimit aj Siriy, xukuje' ri Rezin are rajawinel ri Damasc ri Samar are nim tinimit aj Eprain, are c'u ri u c'ojol ri Remaliy are rajawinel ri Samar pa oxc'al job junab (65) ri Eprain cutanaba' ruxic nim tinimit; we ri ix man c'o ta jun i cojonic ri co c'olic, xukuje' man co ta quixtaq'ui' canok.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:9  
Isaiah7:10 Ri Ajawaxel xukuje' xubij che ri Acaz: 
Isaiah7:11 “Chata' che ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios chi chubana' jun mayibal ri cajwataj chawe che jun etal, we sibalaj c'ä iquim o sibalaj c'ä chicaj.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Ri Acaz xubij: “Jayi', ri in man quinc'ambejej ta ri Ajawaxel, man quinta' ta jun etal che.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Xubij c'u ri Isaiy: “Chitatabej, ix ri ix aj ajawinelab ri ix aj uwo rachoch ri David. ¿La man nim ta quiwil wi chi quiya' latz' chque ri winak chi xukuje' quiwaj quiya' latz' che ri nu Dios?" 
Isaiah7:14 Kas c'u are' ri Ajawaxel cäyo'w na jun etal chiwäch: Ri k'apoj yawab winak chic cäc'oji' c'u na jun ral, ri cucoj na Emanuel che u bi'." 
Isaiah7:15 Pa ri nabe tak u junab re ri u c'aslemal ri ac'al, cutij na leche u tzacom rib xukuje' juyubal räx cab." 
Isaiah7:16 Aretak c'u ri ac'al c'ä maja' c'o ri u no'j, ri culew ri quieb ajawinel ri cäquiya' xe'n ib chawe quetz'ini na canok." 
Isaiah7:17 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'am na ulok pawi', puwi' ri a tinimit xukuje' puwi' ri rachoch ri ajawinel, k'ijol ri mawi jumul e c'ulmatajinak canok aretak ri Eprain xutas rib chrij ri Juda.” (Che ri ajawinel ri Asiriy cäbix wi wa'.)" 
Isaiah7:18 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ri Ajawaxel cuban na chi quepetic e jacha' ri amalo ri e jekel chuchi' ri najalaj nima' aj Ejipt, xukuje' cuban na chi quepetic jacha' usmacab ri e jekel pa Asiriy." 
Isaiah7:19 Conojel c'ut quekaj na puwi' tak ri k'ayes xukuje' pa tak ri jul xo'l tak ri abaj, pa conojel tak ri ulew ri e q'uiyinak wi q'uix xukuje' pa tak ri c'olbal jawije' cäquitij wi qui joron ri wacax." 
Isaiah7:20 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel cucoj na ri rajawinel ri Asiriy jacha' jun nawanxo kajom ulok c'ä jela' che ri nima' Euprats, cuban na tol che ri qui jolom xukuje' cujos na ri quismachi' conojel ri aj Israel xukuje' ri rismal ronojel ri qui cuerp." 
Isaiah7:21 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri winak cuq'uiyisaj jun wacax xukuje' quieb chij," 
Isaiah7:22 sibalaj q'ui ri u leche cac'oji' na ruc' chi cäcuinic cutij leche u tzacom rib. Conojel c'ut ri queto'taj canok aretak cäsachisax u wäch ri ulew, ri man quecäm ta aretak cäwulix ri tinimit, cäquitij na leche u tzacom rib xukuje' juyubal räx cab." 
Isaiah7:23 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri ulew ri cätic wi jun mil uva ri rajil jun mil sak puak, cux na u q'uiyibal q'uix xukuje' juyubal tak k'ayes." 
Isaiah7:24 Xuwi cuya' coc jun chila' ruc' q'uiakbal ch'ab che qui cämisaxic chicop cuc' ch'ab, ronojel c'u ri ulew cux na u q'uiyibal q'uix xukuje' juyubal tak k'ayes." 
Isaiah7:25 Ri u wi' tak juyub ri quetajix nabe ruc' asaron, cänoj na chque q'uix xukuje' juyubal tak k'ayes, man c'o ta chi jun craj copan ta chila'. Xuwi cajwataj na che yuk'bal wacax xukuje' chij." 
Isaiah8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Chac'ama' jun nim tz'alam chatz'ibaj we bi'aj ri' chuwäch ruc' tz'ib ri cäch'obtajic ri man c'ax ta u siq'uixic: ‘Maher-salal-hasbaz.’ 
Isaiah8:2 Chacojo ri cojol tabal tok'ob Uriy xukuje' ri Zacariy (u c'ojol ri Jeberequiy) che a k'alajisanel.” 
Isaiah8:3 Chumatam c'u na xinrik wib ruc' ri wixokil ri k'axal tzij, ri are' xcanaj yawab winak, xc'oji' c'u jun ral ala. Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel chwe: “Chacojo Maher-salal-hasbaz che u bi'." 
Isaiah8:4 C'ä maja' c'u cäcuin ri ac'al cubij ‘tat’, ‘nan’, ri Damasc xukuje' ri Samar quetolobax na canok, ri qui k'inomal cäc'am na bic che ri ajawinel re Asiriy.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Xubij chi c'u na ri Ajawaxel chwe: 
Isaiah8:6 “Rumal c'u ya' xe'n ib chuwäch ri Rezin xukuje' chuwäch ri u c'ojol ri Remaliy, we winak ri' man nim ta xquil wi ri ja' Siloe ri xak cälememic," 
Isaiah8:7 ri Ajawaxel cuban na chi coc'ow ri nimalaj u chuk'ab ri nima' Euprats paquiwi' (ri u bixic ri ajawinel re Asiriy ruc' ronojel ri u chuk'ab). Cäpulin na pa conojel tak ri e u be, quebuxalk'atij na conojel tak ri e u chi'," 
Isaiah8:8 copan na c'ä pa Juda cuch'uk c'u na cämuktaj na can chupam, copan na c'ä chukul. Cux c'u na jacha' jun chicop ri e u ripom ri u xic', ri cach'ukun na, Emanuel, ronojel ri ulew la.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Chimulij iwib, nimak tak tinimit, chixnoj c'u che xe'n ib; chitatabej wa', conojel tak ri winak pa ri ulew ri e c'o naj: Pune' ta ne quebimajij tak ri e i ch'ojibal, quixxibitaj na; je pune' ta ne quebimajij na ri e i ch'ojibal quixxibitaj na." 
Isaiah8:10 Chebibana' i chomanic, queyojix c'u na; chi chomaj u banic ri quiwaj, man cabantaj ta c'u na ri quiwaj, rumal c'u rech chi c'o ri Dios kuc'." 
Isaiah8:11 Ri Ajawaxel co xinuchap ruc' ri u k'ab, xubij c'u chwe chi man quintakej ta ri qui be we winak ri'. Jewa' ri xubij chwe:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Mibij yacoj ib che ronojel ri cubij ri winak chi yacoj ib. Mixe'j iwib che ri caquixe'j wi quib, mawi mina' iwib." 
Isaiah8:13 Are' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri ya'talic chi are tastalic; chuwäch wa' rajawaxic quixe'j wi iwib. 
Isaiah8:14 Ri are' cux na jacha' jun c'amibal chiwe, cux na jun abaj ri caquichak'ij wi na quib, ri quetzak wi na ri quieb ajawibal aj israelib; cux na jacha' jun c'amibal ri quetzak wi na ri aj Jerusalen." 
Isaiah8:15 E q'ui cäquichak'ij na quib, quetzak na, xukuje' quecäm na e q'ui quekaj na pa ri c'amibal quechaptaj c'u chupam.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Utz u c'olic chibana', chicojo' pa lawe, ri k'alajisanic, ri yabal no'j, xukuje' ri tijonic ri quinya' chiwe." 
Isaiah8:17 Pune' ri Ajawaxel cuc'u' rib chuwäch ri u tinimit ri Jacob, in cäcu'bi nu c'u'x chrij. Chrij ri are' nu yo'm wi ri eyebal nu c'u'x." 
Isaiah8:18 Ri in, xukuje' ri e nu c'ojol ri e u yo'm ri Ajawaxel uj mayibalalaj c'utbal chuwäch ri Israel. Uj cojom rumal ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri jekel puwi' ri juyub Sion." 
Isaiah8:19 Cäquibij c'u ne na ri winak chiwe: “Chita' i no'j chque ri cuxlabal ri cäminakib, xukuje' chque ri ch'obonelab ri quewululic, ri quelalatic. Jun tinimit ¿la ma ta pa cuta' u no'j chque ri e u diosib, xukuje' chque ri cäminakib che qui pixbexic ri e c'asc'oj," 
Isaiah8:20 che u c'amic jun tijonic o jun k'alajisanic?” Kas c'u jewa' cäquibij na, are c'u ri cäquibij xa jun conil." 
Isaiah8:21 Ri winak quexulic, quepakic, qui rikom c'ax xukuje' quenumic, rumal c'u ri numic cäpe na coyowal. Cäquic'okoj na ri qui ajawinel xukuje' tak ri e qui dios. Queca'y na chicaj" 
Isaiah8:22 xukuje' queca'y na cho ri ulew, xuwi c'u quiäkasakil xukuje' k'ekumal cäquiriko, k'ekumal xukuje' bis. Ronojel ch'ukutal rumal ri k'ekumal. Ri u rikom c'ax man cäcuin ta cäto'tajic." 
Isaiah9:1 Nabe canok ri Dios xumach'irisaj ri Galiley, ulew re Zabulon xukuje' Neptali, ulew ri c'o chquinakaj ri e k'ijilal tak diosib, ri qui kajbem ri ulew ch'akäp che ri Jordan copan c'ä chuchi' ri plo xunimarisaj c'u na qui k'ij." 
Isaiah9:2 Ri tinimit ri cäbin pa k'ekumal xril jun nimalaj sakil jun sakil xjuluwic chque ri e jekel pa k'ekumal. 
Isaiah9:3 Ajawaxel, c'amom la ulok jun nimalaj quicotemal; sibalaj nim ri quicotemal. Conojel quequicot chwäch la jacha' ri u k'ijol ri k'atoj, jacha' ri qui quicotemal ri cäquijach nimak tak k'inomal chquixo'l." 
Isaiah9:4 Yojim c'u la ri lok'om patanijic ri cäbanow c'ax che ri tinimit, ri c'axc'ol ri cuya' bis chque, ri yok'bal ri e jekel chupam. Jacha' ri xban la che u sachisaxic u wäch ri madian." 
Isaiah9:5 Ri xajäb ri capoc'naj che ri cakan ri ajch'ojab, xukuje' ri atz'iak ri tz'ajtajinak che quic', queporox na, quechajir na rumal ri k'ak'." 
Isaiah9:6 Rumal rech chi alam jun ac'al chke, ri Dios u yo'm jun c'ojolaxel chke, ri yo'm ronojel cuinem pa u k'ab che u k'atic tzij, are c'u tak u bi' wa' cäbix na: Mayibal pa tak ri cubano, Dios ri man ch'äcatajel taj, junalic tataxel, u c'ojol ajawinel ya'l jamaril." 
Isaiah9:7 Cät'uyi na chupam ri u tem re ajawibal ri David; culic' na ri u cuinem aj ajawinel pa ronojel c'olbal, ri jamaril man cäq'uis ta na; ri rajawinic co cajeki' na canok, ri e u tac'alibal are ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri ya'tal u banic kas camic c'ä chbe k'ij sak. Wa' cuban na ri nicowelalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah9:8 Ri Ajawaxel u takom ulok jun k'alajisanic che ri Israel, che ri u tinimit ri Jacob;" 
Isaiah9:9 ronojel ri u tinimit ri Eprain ri jekel pa Samar u ch'obom. Ri e are' cäquibij quib chi e nimak qui k'ij, ruc' nimal cäquibij:" 
Isaiah9:10 “E tzakinak ri porom xan, quekayaca' c'u na cuc' tak abaj. E qui ramin ri tem re sicomor, quebekacoj c'u na chacalte' che qui q'uexwäch.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Ri Ajawaxel u banom chi e petinak xibibalalaj tak c'ulel kas are' xetakow ulok che u banic ch'o'j. 
Isaiah9:12 Pa elebal k'ij ri aj Siriy, pa u kajebal k'ij ri aj pilisteyib. Xak juba' xquiban che u bik'ic ri Israel. Man oc'owinak ta c'u ne ri royowal ri Ajawaxel ri are' c'ä cätajin cucoj xib." 
Isaiah9:13 Man xtzelej ta c'u ri tinimit ruc' ri Dios, ri xc'äjisan u wäch man xutzucuj ta ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah9:14 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xuban che ri rajawibal ri Israel jacha' ri cäban che u t'oyic u je' jun awaj xukuje' ri u jolom, jacha' ri cuban jachin jun ri quebut'akij tut junam cuc' xic'ay xak junam cuban chque. ¡Ronojel wa' cäc'ulmataj xa pa jun k'ij!" 
Isaiah9:15 (Ri jolom are' cäquiq'uexwächij ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri e c'amal tak be, ri je' are' cäquiq'uexwächij ri e k'axal tak tzij. Ri cäquic'ut banoj tak tzij.)" 
Isaiah9:16 Ri e c'amal tak be qui quijalach'um we tinimit ri', e are' tak c'ut ri caquitzucuj jun c'amal qui be xesachic." 
Isaiah9:17 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel man xutok'obisaj ta qui wäch ri alabom, mawi xel u c'u'x chque ri minorib xukuje' ri malca'nib. Rumal rech chi ronojel ri tinimit man nimanel taj xukuje' banal etzelal, conojel cäquibij conalaj tak tzij. C'ä maja' c'u ne coc'ow ri royowal ri Ajawaxel ri are' c'ä u takem na u cojic xib." 
Isaiah9:18 Ri etzelal cuban nimak tak c'ax jacha' ri cuban jun k'ak' ri cusach u wäch ri q'uix xukuje' tak ri k'ayes, xukuje' man c'ax ta cuban che qui poroxic tak ri che' ri e c'o pa ri c'ache'laj, quebuq'uiak chicaj pa ri quiakik' pa ri u chuk'ab ri sutinel sib." 
Isaiah9:19 Rumal ri royowal ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri tinimit cätajin cänicowic, ri k'ak' cusach u wäch ri tinimit cäquitij ri qui ti'jal ri calc'ual, man quel ta qui c'u'x chque ri cachalal. Waral c'o jun ri cubik'ila' ri u wa, cäcanaj c'u ruc' numic, c'o chi apan jun jela' ri cäwa'ic man cänoj ta c'ut." 
Isaiah9:20  
Isaiah9:21 Ri Manases cusach u wäch ri Eprain, ri Eprain cusach u wäch ri Manases, qui cabichal quebe chrij ri Juda. Man c'u tanalinak taj ri royowal ri Ajawaxel, ri are' c'ä u takem na u cojic xib." 
Isaiah10:1 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri quebicoj tak pixab ri man e suc' taj, quebiya' takanic ri man ya'tal ta qui banic" 
Isaiah10:2 man quiban ta c'u ri suc' chque ri tukarib mawi quixoc il che u banic ri ya'tal chque ri mebayib re ri nu tinimit, quitokij ri jastak quech ri malca'nib, quiweläk'aj ri jastak quech ri minorib!" 
Isaiah10:3 ¿Jas lo ri quiban na aretak quiya' u bixic ri e i banom, aretak quiwilo chi petinak ri c'äjisabal wächaj chi naj?" 
Isaiah10:4 We man quixmach'irisaxic quixyut c'u na bic, quixcäm na junam cuc' ri xa' quecämisaxic. ¿Jachin che quitz'onoj wi na chi quixuto'? ¿Jawi je quebiya' wi can tak ri e i k'inomal? Man c'u oc'owinak taj ri royowal ri Ajawaxel, Ri are c'ä u takem na u cojic xib." 
Isaiah10:5 “¡Ri ajawinel re Asiriy, are ri che' ri c'o pa nu k'ab ri quincoj che u ya'ic c'äjisabal wächaj aretak c'o woyowal! are xic'ay wa' ri quincojo aretak cäpe woyowal." 
Isaiah10:6 Quintak c'u che u banic c'ax che jun tinimit ri man nimanel taj, che u banic c'ax che jun nim tinimit ri cuyac woyowal, rech cäreläk'aj xukuje' cäresaj ronojel ri u k'inomal, rech cuxak'alej jacha' ri t'ac pa tak ri be." 
Isaiah10:7 Are c'u ri ajawinel re Asiriy man je ta cuchomaj wa', mawi are wa' ri cuchomaj u banic. Xuwi cuchomaj u sachic qui wäch, u q'uisic tzij paquiwi' q'ui nimak tak tinimit." 
Isaiah10:8 Cubij: ‘Conojel tak ri ajawinelab e c'amal tak be wa' ri e c'o chuxe' ri nu takanic. 
Isaiah10:9 Chnuwäch in xak junam ri tinimit Calno ruc' ri tinimit Carquems, ri Hamat junam ruc' ri Arpad, ri Samar junam ruc' ri Damasc." 
Isaiah10:10 E nu rikom nimak tak tinimit ri e c'o q'ui qui diosib, e q'ui na ri e qui banom diosib e c'olic chuwäch ri Jerusalen xukuje' ri Samar." 
Isaiah10:11 Je c'u ri', ri xinban che ri Samar xukuje' chque ri e u dios, ¿la ma ta quincuinic je quinban che ri Jerusalen xukuje' chque ri e u banom tak diosib?’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Aretak ri Ajawaxel u banom chi ronojel ri rajawaxic cubano pa ri juyub Sion xukuje' pa Jerusalen, cuc'äjisaj na u wäch ri ajawinel re Asiriy rumal ri nimal ri u banom, xukuje' rumal chi cuban che rib chi nim u k'ij, chi man c'o ta jun ri junam ta ruc' are'." 
Isaiah10:13 Ri ajawinel aj Asiriy u bim: “In in banowinak wa' ruc' ri nu chuk'ab; in c'o nu no'j, e nu banom c'ut ri chomanic. Ri in e nu q'uexom ri qui c'ulbatil ri nimak tak tinimit, e nu tokim ronojel ri qui k'inomal, rumal ri nu chuk'ab e nu ch'äcom tak ri ajawinelab." 
Isaiah10:14 Oquinak ronojel ri qui k'inomal tak ri tinimit pa nu k'ab, oquinak ronojel ri culew pa nu k'ab, jacha' ri cuban jun winak quebuc'am ri sakmol ri e c'o can chupam jun socaj, man c'o ta jun xusalabej ri u xic', man c'o ta jachin xujak ta ri u tza'm xurak ta c'u u chi'.”" 
Isaiah10:15 ¿La cäcuin ta c'u lo ri icäj cuchomaj rib chi nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri cäcojowic? ¿Ri ramibal chuwäch ri casalabisanic? ¡Jacha' ri ch'ämiy ri xa' jun che' are ta cäsalabisan ri achi ri c'amowinak bic! 
Isaiah10:16 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel quebutuktubisaj na we winak ri' ri cätiltat cakan qui k'ab, cuban na chi cänicow ri qui cuerp rumal ri u k'ak'al ri nimalaj k'ak'." 
Isaiah10:17 Ri Tastalicalaj Dios u chäj ri Israel, cäjalwächitaj na pa rak' k'ak', xa c'u pa jun k'ij cusach na u wäch ronojel ri q'uix xukuje' ri k'ayes ri e q'uiyinak pa ri ulew." 
Isaiah10:18 Cusach na u wäch ronojel ri u je'lal ri qui c'ache'laj xukuje' ri qui ticonijibal. Quebuya' canok jacha' jun yawab ri man c'o ta chi u chuk'ab. 
Isaiah10:19 Xak c'u e quieb oxib chic ri che' ri quecanaj can pa ri c'ache'laj, chi cacuin jun ac'al che cajilaxic." 
Isaiah10:20 Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri e quieb oxib ri e to'tajinak can che ri Israel, ri e u tz'akatil ri u tinimit ri Jacob ri e to'tajinak canok, man cäquito, ta chi na quib ruc' ri xbanow c'ax chque xane' co cäquitok'ej na quib che ri Ajawaxel, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah10:21 Xak e quieb oxib chque ri e aj u tinimit ri Jacob quetzelej na ruc' ri Dios ri man c'o ta jun cäch'äcan ta puwi'. 
Isaiah10:22 Pune' ri a tinimit, Israel, sibalaj e q'ui jacha' ri sanyeb ri e c'o chuchi' ri plo, xak e quieb oxib quetzelej na ulok. Ri c'ax ri cäpe na paquiwi', chomatal chic, cäban c'u na ri tz'akatalaj k'atan tzij." 
Isaiah10:23 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem u chomam ri sachbal wächaj, kas c'u je cuban na pa ronojel ri ulew." 
Isaiah10:24 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem jewa' cubij: “Nu tinimit ri at jekel pa Sion, maxe'j awib chquiwäch ri aj asiriyab, pune' catquich'ay ruc' ri qui xic'ay, pune' cäquiyac ri qui ch'ämiy chawij jacha' ri xquiban ri aj Ejipt." 
Isaiah10:25 Xa pa quieb oxib k'ij cäpe na ri c'äjisabal wächaj paquiwi', ri woyowal cäsachow na qui wäch." 
Isaiah10:26 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch jacha' ri xuban che qui ch'äquic ri aj madianib chunakaj ri nimalaj abaj pa Oreb, cuc'ut c'u na ri u cuinem chrij ri Asiriy, jacha' ri xuban che u c'utic chquij ri aj ejiptib." 
Isaiah10:27 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quesax na ri eka'n ri yo'm cho awachak, cäk'ajisax na ri eka'bal ri qui cojom chrij a wi'.” Ri ch'äcanel aj Asiriy quel ulok pa Rimon," 
Isaiah10:28 copan pa Ajat, cäk'ax pa Migron, cuya' can ri reka'n pa Micmas," 
Isaiah10:29 cäk'ax pa ri u k'axbal ri nima' ri cäwolkotic, ri cäcanaj pa Jeb; ri Rama cuxe'j na rib, ri Gabaa ri u tinimit ri Saul canimaj bic." 
Isaiah10:30 ¡Curak u chi' ri Bat-galim! ¡Cätataj c'ä pa Lais! ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri Anatot! 
Isaiah10:31 Ri Madmena canimaj bic, ri aj Jebim cäquic'u' quib." 
Isaiah10:32 Camic copan ri ajawinel aj Asiriy pa Nob; cätakanic chi cäban ch'o'j ruc' ri juyub Sion, ri u juyub ri Jerusalen." 
Isaiah10:33 Chiwilampe' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quebut'akij tak ri che' ruc' xibibalalaj chuk'ab ri nimak tak che' quetzak na e ramin, ri sibalaj naj e elinak chicaj quetzak na qui tuquel cho ri ulew." 
Isaiah10:34 Ruc' icäj quebut'akij conojel tak ri che' pa ri c'ache'laj, ri je'lalaj tak che' re ri Libano quetzak na qui tuquel." 
Isaiah11:1 Che we cuta'mil ri' ri are' ri Isayi, cäq'uiy wi na jun tuxaj, jun tuxaj ri cäq'uiy che ri u rab." 
Isaiah11:2 Ri ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel cäjeki' na amak'el puwi', cuya' c'u na u no'j, c'oxomanic, utzalaj chomanic, chuk'ab, etamanic xukuje' u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah11:3 Ri are aretak cuk'at tzij man are ta cäril ri u wächbal ri winak, mawi cuk'at ta tzij jas ri cuto." 
Isaiah11:4 Cuk'at na tzij ruc' suq'uil paquiwi' ri tukarib, cuto' na qui wi' ri mebayib ri e c'o pa ri tinimit. Ri e u tzij are cäc'äjisan na u wäch ri man cuchomaj ta ri cubano, ruc' ri ruxlab cucämisaj na ri aj etzelal." 
Isaiah11:5 Amak'el u cojom atz'iak re suq'uil xukuje' re kastzij. 
Isaiah11:6 Cäc'oji' na jamaril chquixo'l ri utiw ruc' ri chij, ri balam xukuje' ri alaj q'uisic' quecoti' na junam, ri alaj wacax xukuje' ri coj junam queq'uiy na qui cabichal, cäquiya' c'u na quib cäc'am qui be rumal jun alaj ac'al." 
Isaiah11:7 Ri ati't wacax xukuje' ri ati't os cäcachilaj na quib, ri cal junam quecoti' na. Ri coj cutij na k'ayes jacha' ri wacax," 
Isaiah11:8 ri ac'al cuya' quetz'an pa ri u jul ri cumätz, cuya' cunim ri u k'ab pa ri u soc ri sachoj." 
Isaiah11:9 Pa ronojel ri tastalicalaj nu juyub man c'o ta jun ri cuban ta jun c'ax, je c'ut jacha' ri ja' cunojisaj ri plo, je cuban na ri etamanic ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel cunojisaj na ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah11:10 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri u tux we rab ri' ri are' ri Isayi, cäwalij na jacha' jun etal chque ri tinimit; ri nimak tak tinimit quepe na che u tzucuxic, ri c'olbal c'ut ri cac'oji' wi cux na juluwem." 
Isaiah11:11 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cuc'ut chi na jumul ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel, quebumol chi na ri e u tz'akatil ri u tinimit ri e to'tajinak canok, quebutzelej ulok caquiya' can ri Asiriy xukuje' ri Ejipt, ri Patros, ri Etiopiy, ri Elam, ri Sinar, ri Hamat xukuje' tak ri tinimit ri e c'o chu chi' ri plo." 
Isaiah11:12 Cuwalijisaj na jun etal chque tak ri nimak tak tinimit, quebumulij na ri aj israelib ri e c'amom bic naj quebumulij na conojel ri qui jabum quib cho ronojel ri uwächulew, conojel ri aj Juda ri qui tuquin quib." 
Isaiah11:13 Ri c'ax ri c'o pa ranima' ri Eprain cäq'uis na, ri c'ax ri c'o pa ranima' ri Juda coc'ow na; ri Eprain man c'ax ta chi cuna' chrij ri Juda, xukuje' ri Juda man c'o ta chi c'ax pa ranima' chrij ri Eprain." 
Isaiah11:14 E quieb quebe na pa ri u kajebal k'ij che u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj pilisteyib, man c'o ta cäquinabej quekaj paquiwi'. Junam cäquesaj na ri qui k'inomal tak ri tinimit aj elebal k'ij. Ri qui tzijol copan na c'ä pa Edom xukuje' pa Moab, quetakan na paquiwi' ri aj amon." 
Isaiah11:15 Ri Ajawaxel cujak na jun qui be pa ri Quiäk Plo, cuyuk na ri u k'ab puwi' ri nima' Euprats, cuc'am na ulok jun xibibalalaj quiakik' ri cujach na pa wukub u k'ab, quecuin c'ut quek'ax chupam man cäquesaj ta ri qui xajäb." 
Isaiah11:16 Aretak quetzelej ulok ri e u tz'akatil ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel pa Asiriy, cäquirik na jun be nim u wäch, jacha' ri be ri xurik ri Israel aretak xel ulok pa Ejipt." 
Isaiah12:1 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cabij na: “Quinmaltioxin che la Ajawaxel, pune' c'u xpe oyowal la chwij nabe, ri oyowal la oc'owinak chic, tzelem chi la ri jamaril la chwe." 
Isaiah12:2 Ri Dios are' quincolowic cu'l nu c'u'x, man quinxe'j ta wib. Ri Ajawaxel are' to'bal wib xukuje' are nu chuk'ab, are nu Colonel.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Xukuje' ri ix cuya' quixbec qui wuq'uiaj iwe ruc' quicotemal che ri u q'uiyibal ri colobal ib," 
Isaiah12:4 quibij c'u na: “Chiya' maltioxinic xukuje' chiya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, chitzijoj chque ri nimak tak tinimit ri jastak ri e u banom, chinataj chque chi are' c'o puwi' ronojel." 
Isaiah12:5 Chibixoj ri Ajawaxel, rumal chi e u banom mayibal tak jastak ri rajawaxic quetamax pa ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah12:6 Chebiya' rakoj tak chi'aj re quicotemal ri ix jekel pa Sion, rumal rech chi ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel c'o pa i niq'uiajil ruc' ronojel ri u nimalil.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Tzij tak ri caquiya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Babilon, ri xek'alajisax che ri Isaiy, u c'ojol ri Amoz:" 
Isaiah13:2 “¡Chiwalijisaj puwi' jun tol juyub ri retal ri u banic ch'o'j! ¡Chiya' takanic chque ri ajch'ojab che u banic ri ch'o'j! Chiyaca' ri i k'ab rech cäquitakej ch'äcanic chuchi' tak ri cachoch ri nimak qui k'ij. 
Isaiah13:3 E nu siq'uim chic ri cowilaj tak nu wachijab, nu yo'm takanic chque ri wajch'ojab ri qui jachom quib che u banic ch'o'j, chque ri quejajat rumal ri nu ch'äcanic, cäquiya' c'u ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri nu chomam u ya'ic.”" 
Isaiah13:4 Cätataj jun rakoj chi'aj pa tak ri juyub, jacha' ta ne qui rakoj chi'aj sibalaj winak. Cätataj wojcorem quech ri winak re ri nimak tak tinimit ri qui mulin quib. Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem quebusolij ri e rajch'ojab ri qui yo'm qui tzij quebe che ri ch'o'j." 
Isaiah13:5 Pa jun najalaj ulew e elinak wi ulok c'ä jela' che ri elebal k'ij. Are' ri Ajawaxel ri e uc'aninak ulok ri e u chaconisan ri royowal, ri petinak che u sachic u wäch ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah13:6 Chirakala' i chi', rumal rech chi ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel nakaj chic c'o wi, copan jacha' jun quek'enic ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah13:7 Conojel c'u ri winak cho ri uwächulew quechukchub na ri qui k'ab, conojel man c'o ta chic qui chuk'ab," 
Isaiah13:8 cäquichaplej na birbitem. C'axc'ol xukuje' k'oxowem cäkaj na paquiwi', cäquibak'atij na quib jacha' jun yawab ixok. E conorinak cäquica'yela' na quib, cäquiäkar na ri qui palaj rumal qui q'uixbal." 
Isaiah13:9 Xa co'l craj ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, jun xibibalalaj k'ij re oyowal xukuje' re k'ak'alaj c'anal, cuq'uex na ri uwächulew pa chaki'j uwo sak, cäq'uis na tzij paquiwi' conojel ri ajmaquib ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah13:10 Ri ch'imil xukuje' ronojel ri c'o cho ri caj man quetunun ta chic; ri k'ij c'äte jubik' quel ulok cäk'ekumaric, ri ic' man cäjuluw ta chic." 
Isaiah13:11 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Quinc'äjisaj qui wäch ri winak cho ri uwächulew rumal ri itzelalaj qui c'aslemal, ri e banal tak etzelal cumal tak ri e qui il patan. Quinq'uis tzij puwi' ri cäquinimarisabej wi qui k'ij ri e banal tak nimal, quinkasaj na qui k'ij ri man coc ta tzij pa qui jolom xukuje' ri man c'o ta qui q'uixbal." 
Isaiah13:12 Quenbana' na chi ri achijab man quequeney ta chi na chuwäch ri coc'alaj kan puak re Opir. 
Isaiah13:13 Cäyicop c'u na ri caj, xukuje' ri uwächulew quel na pa ri u c'olbal rumal ri woyowal pa ri k'ij ri', rumal ri u k'ak'al ri woyowal." 
Isaiah13:14 Ri winak jeri' quepe masat aj lianic ri e okatam, o jacha' jumulaj chij ri cäquijabuj quib ri man c'o ta jachin quemulinic. Chquijujunal quetzelej na pa tak ri qui tinimit, quebanimaj na, quetzelej na pa tak ri culew." 
Isaiah13:15 Apachin c'u ri carikic cäcämisax na chi chch'ich', apachin ta ne ri cuya' rib pa chapic, cäcämisax na." 
Isaiah13:16 Kas chquiwäch quejub na ri alaj tak calc'ual cho ri ulew, ri cachoch quetolobax na canok, cäban can c'ax chque ri quixokil." 
Isaiah13:17 Quebentak na ulok ri winak aj medib chquij, winak ri man queboc ta il che ri sak puak, xukuje' man c'o ta cubij qui c'u'x che ri k'an puak." 
Isaiah13:18 Ruc' ri qui k'ab quequikasaj na ri alabom. Man cäquitok'obisaj ta qui wäch ri c'äte xebalaxic, mawi quel qui c'u'x chque ri ac'alab." 
Isaiah13:19 Ri Babilon ri qui perl ri nimak tak tinimit, wikbal quib xukuje' nimarisabal qui k'ij ri aj caldeyab, cux na jacha' ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor aretak cäsachtaj u wäch wumal." 
Isaiah13:20 Mawi jumul quec'oji' chi winak chupam, mawi jun cäjeki' chi chupam. Ri aj arabib man quebec'ol ta chic chila', mawi ri ajyuk'ab cäquiyuk'uj ta chic ri qui chij chila'." 
Isaiah13:21 Chila' c'ut quec'oji' wi na ri u e u me's juyub, ri xoch' caquinojisaj na tak ri ja, ri abestrus quejeki' na chila', chila' quech'opin wi na ri juyubal tak q'uisic'." 
Isaiah13:22 Ri juyubal tak awaj quebawun na pa tak ri cachoch ri ajch'ojab, ri utiw quec'oji' na pa ri je'lalaj tak cachoch ajawinelab. Cänakajin chic ri u k'ijol ri Babilon man q'ui ta chi k'ij cäcanaj che.”" 
Isaiah14:1 Je, ri Ajawaxel quel na u c'u'x che ri Jacob. Cuc'am chi na ri Israel jumul jas ri nabe, cuban na chi ri aj israelib quetzelej chi na pa ri culew. Ri man aj israelib ta quepe na cuc', caquijunaj na quib ruc' ri u tinimit ri Jacob." 
Isaiah14:2 E q'ui nimak tak tinimit quec'amow na ri aj israelib, quecachilaj c'u bic c'ä pa ri qui tinimit, are c'u ri aj israelib quequic'am na ri e are' che pataninelab quech pa ri rulew ri Ajawaxel. Ri aj israelib quequiyut na bic ri xeyutuw ri e are' nabe, quetakan na paquiwi' ri xetakan paquiwi' ri e are' nabe." 
Isaiah14:3 Tinimit aj Israel, aretak ri Ajawaxel catresaj pa ri c'ax ri at c'o wi, pa tak ri a bis, xukuje' pa ri c'axalaj lok'om patanijic ri xatcoj wi," 
Isaiah14:4 cabixoj na we bix ri' che retz'bexic u wäch ri rajawinel ri Babilon: “¡Chiwilampe', jawije' xetac'al wi ri tokinel! ¡Chiwilampe', jawije' xetac'al wi ri nimal ri cac'amowic!" 
Isaiah14:5 Ri Ajawaxel u banom quieb che ri u cuinem ri banal etzelal, u banom ch'akatak che ri u ch'aybal ri banal c'ax" 
Isaiah14:6 Ri cuc'äjisaj qui wäch ri nimak tak tinimit ruc' oyowal, ri man cutanaba' ta qui t'oquic, ri quebuxak'alej ri tinimit ruc' c'anal, man cutok'obisaj ta qui wäch amak'el cuban c'ax chque." 
Isaiah14:7 Ronojel ri uwächulew c'o pa jamaril, ri winak xak jun e c'o wi, cäquirak c'u qui chi' rumal quicotemal." 
Isaiah14:8 Xukuje' ne tak ri chäj, ri chacalte' ri e c'o pa ri Libano quequicotic chi xatch'äctajic, cäquibij c'ut: ‘Kas aretak xatkajic man c'o ta jun uj t'akininak chic.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Iquim, chquixo'l tak ri cäminakib c'o nimalaj elem ch'u'j rumal awech, quebel c'u ulok che a c'ulaxic. Ri qui nutub ri cäminakib quewalijic, conojel ri c'amal tak be cho ri uwächulew quebel c'u ulok che a c'ulaxic conojel ri ajawinel que tak ri tinimit quewalij chupam tak ri qui tem re ajawibal." 
Isaiah14:10 Conojel quech'aw na, cäquibij c'u chawe: ‘Ri at xukuje' atzakom ri a chuk'ab, at uxinak junam kuc'." 
Isaiah14:11 C'ä waral xeltac'al wi ri nimarisabal awib, xukuje' ri rok'ibal ri a guita'r ri sibalaj q'ui ri qui c'amal. Ri a ch'at k'ayinakil, ri e a k'u' e xjutib.’" 
Isaiah14:12 ¡C'ax ri xac'ulmaj xattzak ulok chicaj ch'imil re ri u sakaric! Xatq'uiak ulok cho ri ulew, at ri quebach'äc ri nimak tak tinimit." 
Isaiah14:13 Xachomaj pa ri awanima': ‘Quinpaki' c'ä chicaj quinya' ri nu tem re ajawibal paquiwi' ri e u ch'imil ri Dios quinet'uyul jela' naj pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij, pa ri juyub ri cäquimulij wi quib ri diosib." 
Isaiah14:14 Quinpaki' c'ajela' chque ri sutz' ri sibalaj chicaj e c'o wi quinux na junam ruc' ri aj chicajil.’ 
Isaiah14:15 ¡Xa c'u kas at kajinak chquixo'l ri cäminakib, c'ä pa u c'u'x ri nimalaj siwan!" 
Isaiah14:16 Ri catquilo naj qui wi' chawe, co catquica'yej, cäquibij: ‘¿La are' achi wa' ri cubano chi cäsalab ri ulew, ri cusach qui wäch ri nimak tak tinimit," 
Isaiah14:17 ri xutz'iniba' can ri uwächulew jacha' jun chaki'j uwo sak, ri cusach qui wäch ri tinimit tak, man quebutor ta c'ut ri e c'o pa che'?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Conojel tak ri cajawinelab ri nimak tak tinimit cäya' qui k'ij, quebuxlan pa tak ri qui mukubal" 
Isaiah14:19 Are c'u ri at naj xatq'uiak wi apan che ri quemuk wi ri cäminakib jacha' ri mes ri cuya' muluw c'uxaj, jacha' ri cäminak ri xak'alem chic, chquixo'l ri winak ri xecämisaxic, ri xk'at qui kul, ri e q'uiakom pa ri siwan ri nojinak che abaj." 
Isaiah14:20 Man catmuk ta jacha' ri cäban chque ri niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic, rumal chi xasach u wäch ri a tinimit xebacämisaj ri e a winakil. Ri calc'ual ri itzel tak winak man naj ta quec'asi'c." 
Isaiah14:21 Chisuc'umaj iwib che qui cämisaxic ri alc'ualaxelab qui mac quech ri cämisanic ri xequiban ri qui tat, rech man cäquichomaj ta chic takanic cho ri uwächulew, mawi cäquinojisaj ri uwächulew chque tak tinimit.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, cujiquiba' u bixic wa': “Quinchaplej na u banic c'ax chque, quinsach na u wäch ri u bi' ri Babilon, xukuje' ri quecanaj can chque quecachilaj ri calc'ual xukuje' ri qui' tak qui mam." 
Isaiah14:23 Quinban na che chi cux jun suk, pa jun ulew ri nojinak chque xoch'. Quinmes na ruc' mesbal re sachbal wächaj.” Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cujiquiba' u bixic." 
Isaiah14:24 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, chokinak: “Jas ri nu chomam u banic je cäban na ri nu bim kas je quel wi na." 
Isaiah14:25 Quinsach na u wäch ri tinimit Asiriy pa ri wulew, quinxak'elej na pa tak ri nu juyub. Ri reka'bal cutanaba' na u banic c'ax che ri nu tinimit, man cäc'oji' ta chi ri c'axalaj u takanic puwi' ri u teleb ri nu tinimit." 
Isaiah14:26 Are wa' ri nu chomam u banic pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Ri nu k'ab cucoj qui xib conojel ri nimak tak tinimit.” 
Isaiah14:27 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem are chomaninak wa', man c'o ta jun cäk'atinic. Ri u k'ab cäxibinic, man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u q'uexic ri u chomam u banic." 
Isaiah14:28 Pa ri junab aretak xcäm ri ajawinel Acaz, ri Isaiy xutz'ibaj ri cäquic'ulmaj na ri aj pilisteyib:" 
Isaiah14:29 Matquicotic, nim tinimit pilistey, chi xk'ajisax ri che' ri cac'äjisabex a wäch, ri xel wi ulok jun cumätz chila' quel wi na ulok jun sachoj, xukuje' quel chi na ulok jun dragon ri cärapapic." 
Isaiah14:30 Pa ri nu juyub cäq'uiy na k'ayes che quecha' ri qui chij, ri mebayib, ri winak ri man c'o ta c'o cuc', quebuxlan na pa utzil. Are c'u ri in quinban na chi ri winak quecäm na rumal wi'jal, quincämisaj na conojel ri queto'taj canok." 
Isaiah14:31 ¡Chiq'uisa' iwib che ok'ej winak aj pilisteyib, chiraka' i chi' rumal k'oxom, chixbirbob rumal xe'n ib! chuwiquiak'ab elebal k'ij quepe wi na jun sibalaj ajch'ojab jacha' jun k'ekalaj sutz', mawi ta c'u ne xa' ta jun achi quel ta na chquixo'l." 
Isaiah14:32 ¿Jas ri cuya' cätzelex bic u bixic chque ri e qui takom we nim tinimit ri'? Chi ri Ajawaxel co u jekebam ri Sion e are' c'u ri e ch'ibatajinak che ri u tinimit caquito' na quib chila. 
Isaiah15:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Moab. Pa ri chak'ab aretak ri Ar xsach u wäch, are chi' xetzeletaj ri Moab pa ri chak'ab aretak xsach u wäch ri Kir, are chi' xetzeletaj ri Moab." 
Isaiah15:2 Ri winak aj Dibon quepaki' che u banic ok'ej chupam ri cachoch ri qui dios ri c'o puwi' ri juyub. Ri Moab xrok'ej ri Neb xukuje' ri Medeb aretak xsach qui wäch. Conojel qui banom tol che ri qui jolom xukuje' quikopim ri quismachi'. 
Isaiah15:3 Ri winak qui cojom wakwoj tak atz'iak quebin pa ri be e c'o cäquirak qui chi' puwi' tak ri cachoch rumal k'oxom. Conojel ri winak cäquirak qui chi' cho tak ri c'ayibal, cäquiq'uis quib che ok'ej." 
Isaiah15:4 Ri Esbon xukuje' ri Eleal cäquita' to'bal quib, cätataj ri qui rakoj chi'aj c'ä pa Jahaz. Rumal ri' quebarabir ri e banal tak ch'o'j re Moab, quenoj c'u che xe'n ib." 
Isaiah15:5 Ri wanima' cutz'onoj chi quet'oy ri aj Moab ri winak quebanimajic, quebe c'ä pa Zoar, c'ä pa Eglat-selisiy. Quebok'ic quepaki' cho ri tac'atic juyub re Luhit pa ri be re Horonaim cäquirak qui chi' rumal ri c'axc'ol ri cätajin cäquiriko." 
Isaiah15:6 Ri e u c'ua' ri Nimrim e chaki'jarinak, ri k'ayes yututurinak, xecäm tak ri che', man canajinak ta jun u xak che' räx." 
Isaiah15:7 Rumal ri' ri winak cäquimulij ri qui k'inomal, cäquic'am bic ch'käp che ri nima' ri e c'o wi Sak Lemob." 
Isaiah15:8 Pa ronojel ri ulew re Moab cätataj wi rakoj chi'aj ri ok'ej cätataj pa Eglaim xukuje' c'ä pa Beer-elim. 
Isaiah15:9 Pune' tak ri c'ua' e c'o pa Dimon e nojinak che quic', quintak chi c'u na ulok nimak tak c'ax paquiwi', jun coj quetijow na ri queto'taj can pa Moab, ri quec'asi' can cho ri ulew." 
Isaiah16:1 Kas pa Sel ri c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, ri c'amal tak be re ri ulew quequitak bic alaj tak chij c'ä pa ri juyub Sion." 
Isaiah16:2 Ri aj Moab e c'o pa ri k'axbal re Arnon jeri' quepe alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri e xibim, ri quebanimaj bic pa ri qui soc." 
Isaiah16:3 Cäquibij c'u che ri Sion: “Chachomaj jas caban che ka to'ic, chujato'. Chujamu'jaj pa tiq'uil k'ij, jacha' ta ne chak'ab uj c'olic chaya' c'ubal quib ri e okatatalic, maq'uis u banic c'ax chque ri e animajinak ulok." 
Isaiah16:4 Chebac'ulaj ri e animajinak ulok pa Moab. Chebato' pa qui k'ab ri banal tak c'ax.” Aretak cätani' ri c'axc'ol, oc'owinak c'u ri cämisanic, aretak ri banal c'ax quel bic pa ri ulew," 
Isaiah16:5 jun rija'lil ri David coc na che ajawinel, ri u tem re ajawibal co cäjeki' na che u banic tok'ob. Jun k'atal tzij wa' ri ch'ajch'oj ranima', cujekeba' na ri ya'tal u banic, cuban na ri suq'uil chque ri winak." 
Isaiah16:6 Keta'm ri nimalaj nimal ri cuban ri Moab, cuban rib chi man c'o ta chi jun jas ri are', cunimarisaj rib, man cäkaj ta jubik' ri rij u wi', xukuje' conojel tak ri tzij ri cubij man c'o ta qui patan." 
Isaiah16:7 Rumal ri' conojel ri aj Moab cäcok'ej na u wäch ri nim qui tinimit, sibalaj cäk'oxow na canima' chque ri achijab aj Kir-areset." 
Isaiah16:8 Ri e ticbal tak uva ri e c'o pa Esbon xukuje' ri e c'o pa Sibma xechaki'jaric, xek'ajisax can cumal ri winak que ri nimak tak tinimit. Ri e qui k'ab quebopan can c'ä pa Jazer, xquilic' quib c'ä pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xebetakal c'ä ch'käp che ri plo." 
Isaiah16:9 Rumal ri' quinwok'ej qui wäch ri uva ri e tiquitoj pa Sibma xukuje' ri e tiquitoj pa Jazer, cäturuw u wal nu wäch che rok'exic ri Hesbon xukuje' ri Eleal, rumal rech chi puwi' ri qui wächinic xukuje' puwi' ri u wächinic ri culew xtataj ri rakoj chi'aj re ch'o'j." 
Isaiah16:10 Ri quicotemal xukuje' ri wululem cäq'uis na qui tza'm pa tak ri juyub man c'o ta chi rakoj tak chi'aj re jajatem mawi bix quetataj chi xo'l tak ri uva ri e tiquitoj, mawi quepitz' chic uva che quesaxic ri qui wa'l. Cätani' na ri rakoj tak chi'aj." 
Isaiah16:11 Cayicopitaj ri wanima' jacha' jun arp che u bisoxic ri Moab xukuje' ri Quir-areset. 
Isaiah16:12 Pune' cäbe ri Moab c'ä tza'm tak ri juyub cuta' c'u tok'ob chila' c'ä cäcos na, pune' cäbe pa ri rachoch ri u dios che u ta'ic tok'ob, man c'o ta jas curik na chila'." 
Isaiah16:13 Are tak tzij wa' ri xubij ri Ajawaxel ojer ulok chrij ri Moab. 
Isaiah16:14 Cubij c'u ri Ajawaxel camic: “Je tak wa' pa oxib junab, je jacha' ri rajilaxic ri cuban jun ajchac ri are cutzukbej rib ri cuch'äc che ri jun k'ij, ri Moab ri nim u k'ij man c'o ta chi cupatanij na chquiwäch ri winak, pune' sibalaj quebuchuw ri e u winakil xak e quieb oxib chic quecanaj canok ri man c'o ta chi qui chuk'ab.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Damasc: Copan na ri k'ij aretak ri Damasc man tinimit ta chic xa jumulaj ch'akatak tak tz'ak chic cäcanajic," 
Isaiah17:2 kas xa jumul cäwonobax na canok, cux na yuk'bal, ri awaj queyuk'ux na chila' man c'o ta jachin quexibinic." 
Isaiah17:3 Ri Eprain ri cuban wi nimal ri Israel, man c'o ta chic u tinimit cäcanajic ri sutim rij che nimak tak tapia xukuje' je cuc'ulmaj na ri Damasc ri xuwi tinimit wa' canajinak pa Siriy, man ajawibal ta chic. Cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah17:4 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Samar ri nimarisabal rib ri Jacob, man c'o ta chi u chuk'ab cäcanaj na, ri u k'inomal cäsach na u wäch." 
Isaiah17:5 Je cäcanaj na jacha' aretak ri k'atal trico u k'atom chic ri trico quebusic' ri u jolom tak trico ruc' ri u k'ab, o jacha' aretak quesic' ri u jolom tak trico pa ri beya' re Repaim," 
Isaiah17:6 ri xuwi quecanaj can ri man xerik ta bic; o jacha' aretak cäyiquiyox juwi' aseitun ri xak xuwi quecanaj can quieb oxib aseitun che ri u tza'm jun u k'ab, o xa quiejeb o job pa ronojel ri che'. Cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah17:7 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ri winak cäril na ri u winakirisanel, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah17:8 Man queril ta chi na ri e porobal mawi ri jastak ri e banom cumal ri winak ruc' ri qui k'ab. Man coc ta chi na il che quilic tak ri cuta'm ri nimak qui k'ij mawi tak ri porobal jawije' queporox wi c'oc' tak k'ol chquiwäch tak ri diosib. 
Isaiah17:9 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri a tinimit ri e sutim quij cumal nimak tak tapia quewonobax na canok, jas ri qui tinimit tak ri aj hebeyib xukuje' ri aj amoreyib xewonobax can cumal ri winak rumal ri qui xe'n ib chquiwäch ri aj israelib. Quecanaj na canok jacha' ri chaki'j uwo sak," 
Isaiah17:10 rumal rech chi xsach ri Dios pa a jolom ri xatcolowic, man xnataj ta chawe chi are' a panibal. Ri at quebajosk'ij tak we e ticbal ri' ri sibalaj e je'lic, quebatic ri e a tico'n che u ya'ic u k'ij jun dios ri man aweta'm ta jachinok." 
Isaiah17:11 Pa ri k'ij aretak quebatico cachaplej quilixic, cabano chi cäq'uiy ulok ri ija' chucab k'ij. Aretak c'ut cäpe ri ul ri man c'o ta jas quesanic cäsach na u wäch ri u wächinic ri tico'n." 
Isaiah17:12 ¡Chitampe' ri qui jininem tak ri tinimit ri sibalaj quebuchuwic, jacha' ri u jininem ri plo! Are' ri wululem ri quequiya' ri nimak tak tinimit, jacha' ri qui chojojem nimak tak ja'." 
Isaiah17:13 Aretak c'ut quebokatax bic rumal ri Dios, naj quebetakal wi, jacha' ri pajo ri cäc'am bic rumal ri quiakik' pa tak ri juyub o jacha' ri quiäkwok' ri cäc'am bic rumal ri salc'um." 
Isaiah17:14 Pa ri u benabal k'ij sibalaj quexibinic, maja' c'u cäpe ri u sakaric aretak cäsach na qui wäch. Are wa' ri cäquitaklej na ri cujqueläk'aj, je qui q'uistajic wa' ri cäquisach ka wäch." 
Isaiah18:1 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri ulew ri cäxojlin wi cok'ebal alaj tak chicop, ri ulew ri c'o c'ä jela' chque tak ri nima' aj Etiopiy," 
Isaiah18:2 ri quebutak bic ri u tako'nib puwi' ri Nil, quebin puwi' ri ja' pa tak jucub re xic'ay! Jix, aninakalaj tak tako'nib, pa jun tinimit ri e c'o wi winak ri sibalaj nimak cäkan xukuje' cäjuluw ri qui tz'umal, pa jun nim tinimit ri sibalaj cäxex ib chuwäch pa conojel c'olbal, cowilaj tinimit ri banal nimal ri c'o pa jun ulew ri atinisam cumal tak nima'." 
Isaiah18:3 Iwonojel ix ri ix jekel cho ri uwächulew, quiwil na aretak cäyac ri etal puwi' ri juyub, xukuje' quita' na aretak cok' ri trompet." 
Isaiah18:4 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Xak jun in c'o wi pa ri nu c'olbal quinca'y apanok, jacha' ri k'ij ri cätununic aretak coc'ow ri jäb, jacha' jun sutz' ri cuya' räx k'ab aretak sibalaj k'ak' cätajin ri k'atoj." 
Isaiah18:5 Aretak cätzak ri qui cotz'ijanic ri uva, cux c'u chak' tak uva ri cotz'i'j, c'ä maja' c'u copan ri k'ij ri cäyac ri qui wäch ri uva, queramix na ri u k'ab ruc' ramibal quemuchic naj quebeq'uiak wi." 
Isaiah18:6 Ronojel cäya' na can pa tak ri c'ache'laj chquiwäch tak ri c'uch xukuje' chquiwäch ri juyubal tak awaj. Ri c'uch chila' cäcoc'owisaj wi ri k'alaj, xukuje' conojel ri juyubal tak awaj quec'oji' chila' pa ri sak'ij.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quec'am na ulok sipanic che ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cumal ri winak ri sibalaj nimak cäkan ri cäjuluw ri qui tz'umal, nim tinimit ri sibalaj cäxex ib chuwäch pa ronojel c'olbal, cowilaj tinimit ri cuban rib chi nim u banic ri je'lic pa jun ulew ri atinisam cumal tak nima'. Cäquic'am na ulok puwi' ri juyub Sion jawije' ri cäk'ijilax wi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah19:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Ejipt: Chiwilampe' ri Ajawaxel: copan pa Ejipt u c'atal rumal jun sutz' ri aninak cäbinic. Chuwäch ri are' quebirbob ri e u diosib ri Ejipt chuwäch, conojel ri aj Ejipt cäquixe'j quib." 
Isaiah19:2 “Quinban chque ri aj Ejipt chi cäquiban quieb, quech'ojin c'u chquixo'l: achil ruc' achil, tinimit ruc' tinimit, ajawinic ruc' ajawinic." 
Isaiah19:3 Quinbano chi cämoxir ri qui jolom, quinbano chi man je ta quel wi ri qui chomanic. Quebe c'u na che u tz'onoxic qui no'j chque tak ri diosib xukuje' chque tak ri ajk'ijab, chque tak ri cuxlabal ri cäminakib xukuje' chque tak ri ch'obonelab." 
Isaiah19:4 Ri in quinjach c'u na ri Ejipt pa u k'ab jun c'axalaj takanel jun ajawinel ri banal c'ax cätakan na puwi'.” Cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. 
Isaiah19:5 Ri ja' re ri Nil cätzaj na, ri nima' cächaki'jar na ronojel," 
Isaiah19:6 ri u be tak ja' quechuwin na. Ri binel tak ja' re Ejipt nojimal cäbe na qui tzajic c'ä quechaki'jar na, ri aj xukuje' ri xic'ay queyututar na;" 
Isaiah19:7 ri xic'ay ri e c'o chuchi' ri Nil, xukuje' conojel tak ri tico'n ri e c'o chuchi', quechaki'jar na cäsach na qui wäch." 
Isaiah19:8 Conojel ri quequichap tak cär chupam ri Nil cäpe na canima' quebok' na ri cäquiq'uiak ri qui c'at chupam ri ja' cäquichaplej na nimalaj bis. 
Isaiah19:9 Ri cäquiquem tak lino cuban na quieb qui c'u'x; ri quequixiy tak lino xukuje' ri quequemenic quesakmaqui na; 
Isaiah19:10 ri ajquemab quebel na ch'u'j, conojel ri cäquiban tak jastak ruc' ri qui k'ab man cäquirik ta chic jas cäquibano." 
Isaiah19:11 Sibalaj ix con ix, c'amal tak be aj Zoan, ri ya'l tak no'j ri c'o na quetamabal pa Ejipt, kastzij e c'analaj ya'l tak no'j. ¿Jasche xpe ak'an pa i jolom xibij che ri paraon: “Uj cachalaxic tak ajno'jab xukuje' tak ajawinelab re ojer?”" 
Isaiah19:12 ¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri e awajno'jab, paraon, rech cäquic'ut chawäch xukuje' cäquiya' u bixic chawe ri u chomam u banic ri Ajawaxel, ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, chrij ri Ejipt?" 
Isaiah19:13 Ri e c'amal tak u be ri Zoan e con, ri e c'amal tak u be ri Memps xquiya' quib pa subic, ri e c'amal tak qui be ri tinimit qui c'amom bic ri Ejipt pa jun jech'alaj be." 
Isaiah19:14 Ri Ajawaxel u cojom jun uxlabal re sachinakil pa canima' quequic'am c'u bic ri aj Ejipt pa jun jech'alaj be pa ronojel ri cubano, junam ruc' jun k'abarel ri cäxabic xukuje' xak cäbak'otlobic." 
Isaiah19:15 Man c'o ta c'u jun, cux jolomaj o je'aj, tut o xic'ay, cäcuin taj c'o jas cuban che u to'ic ri Ejipt." 
Isaiah19:16 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri aj ejiptib quejunamataj na cuc' ri ixokib cäquixe'j na quib quebirbob na aretak cäquito chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, cuwalijisaj ri u k'ab che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch." 
Isaiah19:17 Ri aj ejiptib cäquixe'j na quib chquiwäch ri aj Juda xuwi ne ruc' ri u nataxic ri u bi' cäquixe'j na quib rumal ri c'ax ri u chomam u banic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem puwi' ri Ejipt. 
Isaiah19:18 Pa ri k'ij ri', pa Ejipt e c'o job tinimit quech'aw na pa hebrey, quiban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, uj jic che che ri Ajawaxel, ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quecha' na. Jun chque cabinax na “U Tinimit ri K'ij” che."
