Isaiah19:19 Pa ri k'ij ri', cätas na jun porobal pa u niq'uiajil ri Ejipt, kas pa Ejipt chunakaj ri u c'ulbatil, cawalijisax na jun abaj che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah19:20 Cajwataj wa' che jun etal che u nataxic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem pa ronojel ri ulew re Ejipt. Aretak c'ut cäquita' ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel che qui to'ic pa qui k'ab ri quebanow c'ax chque, ri are' cutak na ulok jun torol quech, rech quebuto' xukuje' quebucolo." 
Isaiah19:21 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'ut na rib chquiwäch ri aj ejiptib, ri e are' c'ut cäquetamaj na u wäch ri Ajawaxel, cäquik'ijilaj na, quequiya' na tabal tok'ob chuwäch xukuje' sipanic. Kas cäquiban c'u na ri cäquichi'j che ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah19:22 Ri Ajawaxel cusoc na ri Ejipt, cucunaj c'u na. Ri e are' quetzelej na ruc' ri Ajawaxel, quel c'u na u c'u'x ri are' chque quebucunaj na." 
Isaiah19:23 Pa ri k'ij ri' cäc'oji' na jun be ri sibalaj nim u wäch quel bic pa Ejipt copan c'ä pa Asiriy. Ri aj asiriyab quecuin na quebopan pa Ejipt, xukuje' ri e aj ejiptib quebopan na pa Asiriy. Ri aj Ejipt xukuje' ri aj Asiriy junam quek'ijilan na che ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah19:24 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Israel cäjunamataj na ruc' ri Ejipt, xukuje' ruc' ri Asiriy, cux c'u na jun tewichibal cho ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah19:25 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem quebutewichi'j na, cubij c'u na: “Ri in quintewichi'j ri Ejipt, ri nu tinimit, ri Asiriy ri nu banom cuc' ri nu k'ab, xukuje' ri Israel ri wechbal.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Pa jun k'ijol ri Sargon, rajawinel ri Asiriy, xutak bic jun rach k'atal tzij pa ri tinimit Asdod, ri rach k'atal tzij xch'ojin ruc' ri tinimit xuch'äc c'ut." 
Isaiah20:2 Pa ri k'ijol ri' xch'aw ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Isaiy, ri u c'ojol ri Amoz, xubij c'u che: “Chawesaj we wakwoj atz'iak ri' ri a cojom chawij, xukuje' ri xajäb ri e a cojom chque ri e awakan.” Ri Isaiy je xubano, man c'o ta chi u xajäb xcanajic xukuje' xuwi chi u cojom ri u pam ratz'iak." 
Isaiah20:3 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel: “Ri Isaiy ri pataninel wech, oxib junab man c'o ta u xajäb u cojom xukuje' xuwi u pam ratz'iak u cojom, che jun etal xukuje' che u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Ejipt xukuje' ri Etiopiy." 
Isaiah20:4 Jewa' cuban na ri ajawinel re Asiriy che qui c'amic bic pa jun ulew chic ri aj ejiptib xukuje' ri aj etiopib, chi ri'jab chi alabom, man c'o ta qui xajäb, xuwi ri u pam catz'iak qui cojom, xak alicha' qui ch'ukum quib che qui q'uixbal." 
Isaiah20:5 Ri winak cäquixe'j na quib xukuje' queq'uix na che ri Etiopiy ri qui yo'm wi ri cu'lbal qui c'u'x, xukuje' queq'uix na che ri Ejipt ri nimarisabal qui k'ij." 
Isaiah20:6 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cäquibij na conojel ri e jekel pa we tak'aj ri': ‘Chiwilampe' ri xetac'al wi na ri ka yo'm wi ri cu'lbal ka c'u'x, ri cäkatzucuj wi u to'ic kib rech cujuto' pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy. ¿Jas ta c'u ri cäkaban na che ka to'tajisaxic camic?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri chaki'j uwo sak chunakaj ri plo: Jacha' ri sutinel quiakik' ri cäpe pa u mox elebal k'ij, petinak pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, ri xibibalalaj c'olbal." 
Isaiah21:2 Xibibal ri c'utwächinic ri u c'utum ri Ajawaxel chnuwäch: ri jachinel quieb u wäch cäjachinic, ri yojinel cayinic. ¡Chatwalijok, Elam! ¡Oh medib, chixtokinok! ¡In quinya' na uxlanem chque ri quech'ikow rumal!" 
Isaiah21:3 Cäbirbob ri nu cuerp, quinbak'tila' wib rumal k'oxom jacha' jun yawab ixok, ri c'axc'ol cutz'apij ri nu xiquin, man quinca'y ta chi rumal ri xibriquil." 
Isaiah21:4 Sachinak ri nu chomanic, quinbirbob rumal ri nimalaj xe'n ib. Ri u jororemal ri benabal k'ij ri sibalaj cäkaj chnuwäch nabe, uxinak jun xibibal chwe." 
Isaiah21:5 Cojtajinak chi ri mexa, lic'om chic ri pop, xchapletaj ri nimak'ij. ¡Chixtac'alok, qui nimakil tak ajch'ojab: chibana' chi cächuplin tak ri quetecak i ch'ich'!" 
Isaiah21:6 U bim c'u ri Ajawaxel chwe: “Jät, chacojo jun cäyuxlenel, chuya' c'u u bixic ronojel ri cärilo." 
Isaiah21:7 We queril carwaj ri e jururem cumal cacab quiej o winak ri e quiejeninak chquij bur o camey, sibalaj choc il che quilic.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Ri cäyuxlenic xurak u chi': “Chupam ri nu c'olbal, Ajawaxel, in c'o ronojel ri jun k'ij, conojel ri chak'ab cätajin quinyuxlenic." 
Isaiah21:9 Quinwil c'ut chi petinak jun carwaj jururem cumal quieb quiej.” C'o c'u jun je xubij wa': “¡Xkaj ri Babilon, xkaj ri Babilon! Conojel tak ri e qui wächbal ri e qui diosib xecanaj cho ri ulew xquiban ch'akatak.”" 
Isaiah21:10 At nu tinimit, at xak'alem jacha' ri trico, ri in quinya' u bixic chawe ri xubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah21:11 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Edom: C'o jun curak ulok u chi' chwe pa Seir: “Yuxlenel, ¿jas rajilabal u pam ri ak'ab uj c'olic? Yuxlenel, ¿jas rajilabal u pam ri ak'ab uj c'olic?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Ri yuxlenel cutzelej u bixic: “Petem cuban u sakaric, xukuje' c'u ri chak'ab. We quiwaj quixc'otow chi'aj, chixc'otow chi'aj, chixtzelej chi ulok jumul.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri chaki'j uwo sak: Binelab aj Dedan, ri quiwoc'owisaj ri ak'ab pa tak ri k'ayes re ri chaki'j uwo sak," 
Isaiah21:14 chixel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri cächaki'j u chi' chiya' c'u u ja'. Ri ix aj rulew ri Tem, chixel ulok che u to'ic ri cätajin canimajic chiya' cutijo," 
Isaiah21:15 rumal rech chi cätajin canimaj chuwäch ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j, ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri banom u pa u chi', chuwäch ri q'uiakbal ch'ab ri tanim che u q'uiakic ri ch'ab xukuje' chuwäch ri u chuk'ab ri ch'o'j." 
Isaiah21:16 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Je tak wa' pa jun junab, jas ri rajilaxic ri junab cuban jun ajchac ri are cutzukbej rib ri cuch'äc ronojel k'ij, sachinak chi u wäch ri Sedar ri nimalaj u banic." 
Isaiah21:17 Xak e quieb oxib chic' ri qui q'uiakbal ch'ab ri ajch'ojab aj Sedar quecanaj na.” Ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel bininak wa'." 
Isaiah22:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cäc'ulmataj na pa ri beya' re ri c'utwächinic: ¿Jas xc'ulmatajic chi conojel quepaki' puwi' tak ri cachoch? 
Isaiah22:2 Tinimit ri c'o wi tuquin ib xukuje' wojcorem, tinimit ri cäkaj ri ca'yem chuwäch, ri e a cäminak man ch'ich' re ch'o'j ta xecämisanic, man xecäm ta pa ri ch'o'j." 
Isaiah22:3 Ri c'amal tak a be conojel xebanimajic, aretak cätajin quebanimaj chquiwäch tak ri q'uiakbal ch'ab xekaj pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel. Ri cowilaj tak achijab re ri a tinimit naj xebanimaj wi bic, xekaj c'u pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel." 
Isaiah22:4 Rumal ri' xinbij: “Chitasa' iwib chwij, are quiwaj quinq'uis wib che ok'ej mitzucuj u cu'bisaxic nu c'u'x rumal ri cuc'ulmaj na ri nu tinimit." 
Isaiah22:5 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem u yo'm u bixic chi cäpe na jun k'ij re xibin ib, re sachbal wächaj xukuje' elem ch'u'j pa ri beya' re ri c'utwächinic. Cätajin quewilix ri e nimak tak tapia cätataj ri rakoj chi'aj c'ä pa tak ri juyub.”" 
Isaiah22:6 Ri aj elamib suc'umatal chic ri qui ch'ab, e c'o chi pa tak ri qui carwaj xukuje' e qui quiejem chi tak ri qui quiej ri aj Kir e quesan chi ulok ri qui quetecak ch'ich'." 
Isaiah22:7 Ri e je'lalaj tak a beya' e nojinak chi chque tak carwaj, ri ajquiejab cätajin cäquipaxij ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit." 
Isaiah22:8 Ri cuto' wi rib ri Juda cämalabax canok. Pa ri k'ij ri' quixoc na il che ri e tanim wi ri ch'ojibal ri e c'o pa ri Ja re ri C'ache'laj," 
Isaiah22:9 xebiwil ri qui' pak'pobinak ri e c'o chupam ri u tinimit ri David xquinojisaj c'ut ri c'olbal ja' che ja'," 
Isaiah22:10 xequinic'oj tak ri ja ri e c'o pa Jerusalen, xequiwulij c'u jujun che u c'ojoxic ri nimalaj tapia." 
Isaiah22:11 Chquixo'l ri quieb u tapia ri tinimit xquicoj na jun c'olbal ja' che ri ja' re ri k'el c'olbal ja'. Man xeboc ta c'u il che ri xbanow ronojel wa', ri xsuc'uman wa' ojer." 
Isaiah22:12 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, xixusiq'uij che ok'ej che juyuwem, che u banic tol che ri i jolom xukuje' che u cojic wakwoj tak atz'iak chiwij che u c'utic chi quixbisonic." 
Isaiah22:13 Xa c'u xiban nimak'ij xukuje' xixquicotic, xebipil wacax xukuje' chij, xixoc che u tijic ti'j xukuje' che ruq'uiaxic u wa'l uva. “Chujwok xukuje' chujuq'uianok chwek c'ut cujcämic”, quixcha'." 
Isaiah22:14 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xuc'ut rib chnuwäch xujiquiba' c'u u bixic chwe pa nu xiquin, xubij: “Man quincuy ta we mac ri' ri i banom c'ä mojok c'u cäc'ulmataj wa' quixcäm na ix.” U tzij ri Ajawaxel wa' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah22:15 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xubij chwe: “Jät ruc' ri Sebna ri chajil re ri rachoch ri ajawinel, chabij c'u che:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘¿Jas ri awech at c'o waral, o jachin xyo'w pa k'ab chi cayac jun ja ri catmuk wi, chi caban jun a mukubal pa ri chicajil, xukuje' chi cac'ot jun c'olbal pa ri abaj ri catuxlan ta wi?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ri Ajawaxel catuq'uiak na apan sibalaj naj, jacha' ri cuban jun cowilaj achi. Ruc' chuk'ab catumajij na," 
Isaiah22:18 catuwolkotij na jacha' jun c'oloq'uic catuq'uiak na bic pa jun ulew ri caribibic. Chila' catcäm wi na, chila' quebetac'al wi na tak ri carwaj ri canimarisabej wi awib nabe, cawesaj na u q'uixbal ri rachoch ri awajaw." 
Isaiah22:19 Ri in catinwesaj na pa ri awekle'n, catinwesaj na pa ri a chac." 
Isaiah22:20 Pa ri k'ij ri' quinsiq'uij na ri pataninel wech, are ri Eliaquim, u c'ojol ri Hilsiy;" 
Isaiah22:21 quincoj na ri awatz'iak chrij, quincoj na ri ximibal a pam che, ri nim u banic, quinya' c'u na ri takanic che. Cux c'u na qui tat ri aj Jerusalen xukuje' ri aj Juda." 
Isaiah22:22 Quinya' na puwi' u teleb ri u laweyil ri rachoch ri David man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cutz'apij ri cujak ri are', mawi c'o jun cäcuinic cujak ri cutz'apij ri are'." 
Isaiah22:23 Ri are' cux na jun nimarisabal k'ij chque ri rachalaxic ri u tat. Ri in quinban na chi co cäjeki' pa ri u c'olbal, jacha' ta ne jun clawux ri co bajitalic." 
Isaiah22:24 Chrij cäxequebex wi na ri pakal rajil ri c'o cuc' ri rachalaxic ri u tat, xukuje' ri e c'o cuc' ri e rija'lil, ronojel qui wäch lak ch'utik, kumubal xukuje' alaj tak xaru'." 
Isaiah22:25 Pa ri k'ij ri', cabusbub na ri clawux ri co bajim pa ri u c'olbal cäbok na quetzak c'u na conojel ri jastak ri e xequexoj chrij quepax c'u na.’ ” Cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Isaiah23:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Tir: Ri e jucub aj Tarsis quech'ikowic rumal rech chi ri oquibal ri quebopan wi sachinak chquiwäch. Ri oquibal ri cäban wi opanem pa Chipr yojim chic. 
Isaiah23:2 Ri winak aj Tir xukuje' ri ajc'ayib aj Sidon man quech'aw ta chic. Ri e qui ajc'ayib quek'ax ri plo 
Isaiah23:3 xukuje' pa ri e nimak tak u ja'il. Cäquesaj ri qui ch'äcoj che tak u wächinic ri Sihor, xukuje' che tak ri cuq'uiyisaj ri Nil, quec'ayinic, quelok'oman pa ronojel qui wäch nimak tak tinimit." 
Isaiah23:4 Sibalaj chatq'uixok, Sidon, u chuk'ab ri plo, cabij c'u na: “Man c'o ta chi k'oxom chwe re alanic, man quinwil ta chiquiwäch wal. Man e c'o ta chi wal alabom quebenq'uiyisaj, man c'o ta chi wal alitomab quebenchajij.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Aretak copan u tzijol cuc' ri aj Ejipt sibalaj quebison na rumal ri xuc'ulmaj ri Tir. 
Isaiah23:6 Cäquibij na: “Jix pa Tarsis, chiq'uisa' iwib che ok'ej, aj tak'ajalib.”" 
Isaiah23:7 ¿La are wa' ri tinimit re sibalaj ojer, ri sibalaj cäkaj ri ca'yem chuwäch? ¿La are wa' ri naj cabanic rech quejekel pa naj tak tinimit?" 
Isaiah23:8 ¿Jachin xtakow ulok wa' puwi' ri Tir ri qui nimal tinimit, ri e c'o wi ajc'ayib ri nimak qui k'ij, ri e c'o wi lok'omanelab ri nimak na qui banic cho ri uwächulew?" 
Isaiah23:9 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xyo'w u bixic che u kasexic u k'ij ronojel banoj nimal, queya' c'u can cho ri ulew conojel ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah23:10 Tinimit aj Tarsis, chixoc che u tajixic ri ulew, sachinak c'u qui wäch ri queban wi tak ri jucub." 
Isaiah23:11 Ri Ajawaxel xulic' ri u k'ab puwi' ri plo, xebuyicopisaj ri nimak tak tinimit xutak qui wulixic ri e u cowirisabal ri Canaan." 
Isaiah23:12 Xubij c'u che ri Sidon: “Chiya' can tak ri e i ca'yem alitomab ri ix ekle'n chic. Pune' catzucuj jas cabano rech catk'ax c'ä pa Chipr, mawi ne chila' cärik wi uxlanem.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Chiwilampe' we ulew ri', ulew ri ya'tal che qui c'olbal jucub. Ri aj caldeyib xequiyac tak tac'atak tak ja xequiwulij c'u tak ri nimak tak cachoch ri aj Sidon, xequiyojij conojel. E are' c'ut e ajchak'mac, man e are ta ri aj Asiriy." 
Isaiah23:14 Chiq'uisa' iwib che ok'ej, jucub aj Tarsis, rumal rech chi yojyobisam chi ri i chuk'ab." 
Isaiah23:15 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri Tir man c'o ta chi jun cänatan na pa oxc'al lajuj junab, are junab wa' ri cäc'asi jun ajawinel. Aretak c'u cätz'akat ri oxc'al lajuj (70) junab, cacoj na che ri Tir ri cubij ri u bix ri ixok quech nim ch'utin:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Ixok quech nim ch'utin ri man catnatax ta chic, chac'ama' ri a arp, chatwacat pa ri tinimit, utzalaj u k'ojomaxic ri a k'ojom chabana', chebabixoj tak ri q'ui bix, che rilic we catnataj chque.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Aretak cätz'akat ri oxc'al lajuj junab, ri Ajawaxel cucoj chi na ri Tir pa ajilabal. Ri are' cuya' chi na rib pa kajic chque ri nim ch'utin che u banic mac cuc' conojel ri winak re ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah23:18 E are tak c'ut ri u ch'äcoj ri cäresaj chrij ri u c'ay, cutas na che ri Ajawaxel; man quec'ol ta mawi quetanixic, xane' cäya' chque ri quepatanin che ri Ajawaxel, rech cäquilok' ronojel u wäch ri cäquitijo xukuje' je'lalaj tak catz'iak." 
Isaiah24:1 Chiwilampe' ri Ajawaxel cusach u wäch ronojel ri uwächulew, cuq'uis tzij puwi', cuyojij ronojel, quebujabuj na conojel ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch." 
Isaiah24:2 Je cäban na che ri cojol tabal tok'ob jas ri cäban chque ri winak re ri tinimit, jas ri cäban che ri ajaw je cäban che ri pataninel lok'om achi, jas ri cäban che ri ajawinel ixok je cäban che ri pataninel lok'om ali, jas ri cäban che ri lok'omanel je cäban che ri ajc'ay, jas ri cäban che ri ya'l c'asaj je cäban che ri c'o u c'as, jas ri caban che ri ya'l jalomal je cäban che ri kajanel." 
Isaiah24:3 Ri uwächulew kas cäsachisax na u wäch, kas cätolobax na canok ronojel. Are c'u wa' ri u bim ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah24:4 Ri ulew cächaki'jar na, cäbuyukar na, ri uwächulew cäwoc'oq'uir na, cäbach'uyar na, ri caj ulew quenoj na che bis." 
Isaiah24:5 Ri ulew awasim cumal ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch, rumal rech chi qui k'ilom quib che qui banic ri caquibij ri pixab, man e qui nimam ta ri takanic, quekle'n ri junalic c'ulwächinic." 
Isaiah24:6 U mac ri' jun c'okonic q'uisowinak tzij puwi' ri uwächulew, ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch caquicoch' ri c'äjisabal wächaj. Rumal ri' benak qui q'uisic ri winak re ri uwächulew, man e q'ui ta chic ri e canajinak." 
Isaiah24:7 Ri u wa'l uva man kas ta cäriktaj ta chic, ri uva ri e tiquitoj cäquirik ul, ri quequicot nabe, sibalaj quebison chic." 
Isaiah24:8 Xq'uis ri quicotemal ri cäquiya' ri tum xukuje' ri arp, xtani' ri wululem cumal ri winak ri aj nim k'ij." 
Isaiah24:9 Man cätijow ta chi u wa'l uva mawi c'o chi bix ri uq'uia' cux c'a pa qui chi' ri uq'uianelab. 
Isaiah24:10 Ri tinimit ri c'o wi tuquin ib etzeletajinak, man cuya' ta cäban oquem mawi pa jun ja." 
Isaiah24:11 Ri winak quebok' pa tak ri be che u tzucuxic u wa'l uva ronojel ri quicotemal chupinak, man quinrik ta jun c'olbal ri quinc'oji' ta wi cho ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah24:12 Ri tinimit yojyobinak, ri oquibal muchmubinak." 
Isaiah24:13 Je cäc'ulmataj na wa' pa conojel tak ri nimak tak tinimit re ri uwächulew: jas ri cäban chque ri aseitun ri quekasax chi che', o aretak quepich'olix ri uva aretak yactajinak chic ri tico'n." 
Isaiah24:14 Ri winak ri quec'asi' canok cäquirak na qui chi' e nojinak che quicotemal, caquiwalijisaj na ri qui ch'abal pa ri u kajebal k'ij aretak cäquil ri u nimalil ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah24:15 Xukuje' pa elebal k'ij, xukuje' pa tak ri ulew ri e c'o chupam ri plo cäquiya' na u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, ri u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah24:16 Kas chuq'uisbalil ri ulew ka tom cäbixoxic: “¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri suc'!” Are c'u ri in xinbij: Tok'ob nu wäch, c'o nimalaj c'ax, c'o nimalaj c'ax. Ri jachinelab ri quieb qui wäch cäquiban jun itzel jachanic." 
Isaiah24:17 Ri winak ri e c'o cho ri ulew je quebux na jacha' ri awaj ri queterenex cumal ri tzucunelab, ri xak quieb cubij paquiwi' quetzak pa jun jul o pa jun c'amibal." 
Isaiah24:18 Ri cäto'taj pa qui k'ab ri tzucunelab cäkaj na pa ri jul, are c'u ri quel ulok pa ri jul cäkaj na pa ri c'amibal. Cäpe na jun k'ekal jäb chicaj queyicop c'u na ri e u tac'alibal ri ulew." 
Isaiah24:19 Sibalaj cäbirbob na ri ulew, cäyicop na, cuban na ch'akatak." 
Isaiah24:20 Cäbak'otlob na jacha' jun k'abarel, cäyicop na jacha' jun k'e'l cäbal. Ri u mac cäquitzak calal puwi' cätzak c'u na man cäwalij ta chic." 
Isaiah24:21 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e c'o qui cuinem e aj chicaj xukuje' tak ri ajawinelab re ri uwächulew; 
Isaiah24:22 quebumulij na quebutz'apij na pa che', culawej na qui chi', coc'ow na q'ui junab c'äte ri' cuc'äjisaj qui wäch." 
Isaiah24:23 Aretak ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'ut rib chi are ajawinel pa ri juyub Sion xukuje' pa Jerusalen, ri k'ij xukuje' ri ic' cäk'ekumar na, ri e c'amal tak u be re ri u tinimit cäquil na ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah25:1 Ajawaxel, lal ri nu Dios in quinya' k'ij la xukuje' quintewichi'j ri bi' la, rumal rech chi esam la ri mayibalalaj tak chomanic la chi sak, e jic xukuje' co e jekelic kas e ojer ulok." 
Isaiah25:2 Banom la chi ri e tinimit tak uxinak jutak mulaj abaj, ri tinimit tak ri c'o nimak tak tapia chquij e wulijinak xeyojij la ri nimak tak cachoch ri e c'ulel, mawi jumul queyac chi na." 
Isaiah25:3 Rumal ri' cäya' na juluwem che la rumal jun cowilaj tinimit ri nimak tak qui tinimit ri winak man quebel ta qui c'u'x caquixe'j chawäch la. 
Isaiah25:4 Rumal rech chi ri lal lal uxinak u panibal ri meba', cux la ch'ukubal che ri c'o u rajawaxic pa ri u rikoj c'ax, to'bal ib pa ri quiakik' jäb, mu'jal ri cäk'atin ri k'ak'al. Ri cuxlab ri achijab ri man quel ta qui c'u'x e junam ruc' ri jun cakulja pa ri sak'ij," 
Isaiah25:5 o jacha' ri k'ak'al pa ri chaki'j ulew. Lal cätakan la paquiwi' ri jumulaj c'ulel jacha' ri cäban la che resaxic ri u k'ak'al ri k'ij ruc' ri u mu'jal jun sutz'. Lal cäcoj la chuk'ab chque ri winak ri man quel ta qui c'u'x, chi queyenelok." 
Isaiah25:6 Pa ri juyub Sion, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, cusuc'umaj na chque conojel ri nimak tak tinimit jun wa'im ri quetijow wi na je'lalaj tak jastak xukuje' u wa'l uva ri k'obisam, rachil je'licalaj tak riquil xukuje' ri kas utzalaj u wa'l uva." 
Isaiah25:7 Pa we juyub ri' cuyojij wi na ri Ajawaxel ri e ch'ukubal ri e ch'ukuwinak conojel ri winak, ri k'ubal ri e pisowinak conojel ri nimak tak tinimit." 
Isaiah25:8 Ri Ajawaxel xa jumul cusach na u wäch ri cämical, cutzajisaj na ri u wal qui wäch ri qui bak'wäch conojel, cuban na chi cusach na u wäch pa ronojel ri uwächulew ri u yok'ic ri u tinimit. Ri Ajawaxel bininak." 
Isaiah25:9 Pa ri k'ij ri' cäbix na: “Are wa' ri ka Dios, chrij ri are' cu'l wi ka c'u'x are c'u xujcolowic. Chujjajat che tze', chujquicotok, are' c'u uj colowinak.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Ri u k'ab ri Ajawaxel are cäto'w na ri juyub Sion, cuxak'alej c'u na ri Moab jacha' ri u xak'alexic ri pajo ri q'uiakom pa ri mes." 
Isaiah25:11 Ri Moab quebuyuk na ri e u k'ab jacha' ri cuban jun muxanel, aretak c'u cäslabic, xa cäbik'taj na ri u nimarisabal rib." 
Isaiah25:12 Ri Ajawaxel cut'akij na ri cowilaj tak u tapia ri sibalaj naj e elinak chicaj quebuwulij na, quebuq'uiak na cho ri ulew." 
Isaiah26:1 Pa ri k'ij ri' cäbixox na we bix ri' pa ri ulew Juda: “C'o jun cowilaj ka tinimit ri cäkato' wi kib, ri Ajawaxel xebuyac nimak tak tapia chrij xukuje' to'bal tak ib." 
Isaiah26:2 Chebijaka' ri oquibal rech coc'ow ri jun nim tinimit ri suc'. 
Isaiah26:3 Ajawaxel, ri lal quebe chajij la pa jamaril ri co e c'olic, rumal rech chi qui cuban qui c'u'x chi'j la." 
Isaiah26:4 Chicu'ba' i c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel amak'el are' c'u jun to'bal ib ri junalic. 
Isaiah26:5 Ri are' quebut'akij ri cäquiban nimal, cumach'irisaj ri tinimit ri man cäniman taj cukasaj c'ä cho ri ulew," 
Isaiah26:6 cäxak'alex c'u na pa ulew cumal ri mebayib xukuje' ri man nimak ta qui k'ij.” 
Isaiah26:7 Suc' ri qui be ri suc'alaj tak winak, lal, Ajawaxel cajicomaj la ri qui be." 
Isaiah26:8 Ri uj xukuje' cäkana' kib chi co uj c'olic pa ri be ri u c'utum ri pixab la, Ajawaxel. Ri u rayinic ri kanima' are ri chomaxic la." 
Isaiah26:9 Ruc' ronojel ri wanima' quinbik'bit che la chak'ab kas pa ri wanima' q'uiyinak wi ulok ri rayinic che tzucuxic la. Aretak cak'at la tzij puwi' ri uwächulew ri achijab cäquetamaj na jas ri suq'uil. 
Isaiah26:10 Pune' cätok'obisaj la qui wäch ri itzel tak winak, ri e are' man cäquetamaj taj quebux suc' e itzel tak winak wi chquixo'l ri utzalaj tak winak man cäquichomaj ta chi sibalaj nim u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah26:11 Ajawaxel, suc'umam chi la ri c'äjisabal wächaj, ri e are' c'ut man cäcaj ta cäquetamaj aretak c'ut cäquil ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la che ri tinimit la, man cäquirik ta chi na jas cäquibano. ¡C'o ta banom wi chi are' ta ri u k'ak'al ri oyowal la quebik'owic!" 
Isaiah26:12 Ajawaxel, lal cayo'w la ri utzalaj c'olem chke; kas c'u tzij lal ri' ri cäbanow la conojel ri e ka banoj." 
Isaiah26:13 Ajawaxel xukuje' ka Dios, e jule' takanelab e uxinak kajaw, xuwi c'u ri lal ka banom Kajaw che la." 
Isaiah26:14 Ri e are' e cäminak, man quec'asi' ta chic jumul; xa e nutub, man quewalij ta chi na c'äjisam c'u la qui wäch, sachom la qui wäch, q'uisom la tzij puwi' ronojel ri natabal quech." 
Isaiah26:15 Lal xbanow la chi xq'uiy ri nim tinimit, Ajawaxel; xban la chi cäq'uiy che ri juluwem la, xelic' la conojel ri e u c'ulbatil ri ulew." 
Isaiah26:16 Pa ri ka bis cujtzucun che la Ajawaxel, aretak cujpixbej la chinojimal." 
Isaiah26:17 Chwäch la uj c'o wi, Ajawaxel, jacha' jun yawab ixok ri xa co'l man cäc'oji' ri ral, curak u chi', cubak'atila' rib rumal ri k'oxom." 
Isaiah26:18 Cujalc'ualanic, cäkana' ri u k'oxomal ri alanic, xujalanic, xa c'u quiakik' ri xkalaj. Man ka c'amom ta ulok ri colobenic chque ri winak pa ri ulew mawi quebalax chi winak ri quenojisan ta ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah26:19 E are c'u ri cäminak la quec'asi' chi na, ri e qui bakil quec'astaj na. Ri quewar chupam ri ulew quec'asutaj na cäquirak na qui chi' ruc' quicotemal. Cätak c'u la ulok ri sakil la jacha' ri räx k'ab e are' tak c'ut ri cäminakib queq'uiy chi na chupam ri ulew." 
Isaiah26:20 Jät, nu tinimit, chatoc chupam ri awachoch chatz'apij c'u ri oquibal aretak at oquinak chi bic. Chac'u' na jubik' awib c'ä coc'ow na ri royowal ri Ajawaxel." 
Isaiah26:21 Quel c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel jekel chupam ri nimalaj rachoch che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch qui mac ri qui mac ri e cho ri uwächulew, ri ulew man quebuc'u' ta chi na ri e u cäminakib, xane' queresaj ulok chisak ri etzelal ri e banom chuwäch." 
Isaiah27:1 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel cuc'äjisaj na u wäch ruc' ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri xibibal, ri sibalaj nim ri xukuje' c'o u chuk'ab, ri Lebiatan, ri cumätz ri sotolic, ri Lebiatan, ri cumätz ri c'osq'uic rij, xukuje' cucämisaj na ri dragon ri c'o pa ri plo." 
Isaiah27:2 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel cubij na: “Chibixoj ri je'lalaj ticbal uva. 
Isaiah27:3 In, ri Ajawaxel, in ri quinchajinic amak'el c'ut quinja'j. Chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab quinchajij rech man c'o ta c'ax curiko." 
Isaiah27:4 Man woyowal ta che. We ta e q'uiyinak q'uix xukuje' itzel tak k'ayes chupam, quinch'ojin ta ri' ruc', quebenporoj ta ri' conojel ri k'ayes." 
Isaiah27:5 We caraj chi quinto' u wi', chjamar wuc', je, chjamar wuc'.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Pa ri k'ijol ri cäpe na ri u tinimit ri Jacob cäbe na ri u rab pa ri ulew, ri Israel cätuxan na xukuje' cäcotz'ijan na, cunojisaj na ri uwächulew cuc' tak ri u wächinic." 
Isaiah27:7 Ri Dios man je ta xuban che u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri Israel jas ri xuban che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri xebanow c'ax che, mawi u cämisam ri Israel jacha' ri xuban che qui cämisaxic ri xecämisan ri aj israelib." 
Isaiah27:8 Ri Dios xuc'äjisaj u wäch ri u tinimit xutak c'u bic pa jun tinimit chic, ruc' ri xibibalalaj ruxlab xupakchi'j bic jacha' ri cuban ri quiakik' ri cäpe pa elebal k'ij." 
Isaiah27:9 Cucuy c'u na ri u mac ri Jacob quebuchup na ri sachinak wi we je cubana' wa': we quebuc'äjij conojel tak ri e u porobal ri quebuk'ijilaj wi tak ri diosib jacha' ri cäban che u c'äjixic ri rabajil chun, mecanaj chi c'u tastalicalaj tak cuta'm, mawi e porobal c'oc' tak k'ol che u ya'ic qui k'ij ri diosib." 
Isaiah27:10 Ri tinimit ri sutim rij che tapia wulijinak, jacha' jun ja ri xwonobax canok, jacha' jun chaki'j uwo sak, ri man c'o ta winak chuwäch. Are jun c'olbal ri queyuk'ux wi wacax, ri quequitij wi u k'ab tak che' quecoti' c'u che uxlanem." 
Isaiah27:11 Ri e u k'ab jun che' quek'ajic aretak quechaki'jaric quepe c'u ri ixokib quequimol bic quequicoj pa k'ak'. Jun tinimit wa' ri man c'o ta u chomanic. Rumal ri' ri Dios ri xq'uiyisanic, man cutok'obisaj ta u wäch mawi quel ta u c'u'x che." 
Isaiah27:12 Pa ri k'ij ri' cuc'ut na rib ri Ajawaxel cächapletaj ulok chuchi' ri Euprats c'ä chuchi' ri nima' aj Ejipt, je cubano jacha' aretak cämulix ri trico, are c'u ri ix, aj israelib, quixmol na chijujunal." 
Isaiah27:13 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cok'isax na ri nimalaj trompet, che qui siq'uixic ri e sachinak pa Asiriy, xukuje' che qui siq'uixic ri e okatam bic pa Ejipt, quepe c'u na che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel pa Jerusalen, pa ri tastalicalaj juyub." 
Isaiah28:1 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri Samar, cubanbej nimal xukuje' u corona ri Eprain, we k'abarelalaj tinimit ri'; je'lalaj wikbal re cotz'i'j ri bach'uyirinak chic ri cäq'uiy ulok pa jun räxalaj beya', qui tinimit winak ri e ch'äctajinak rumal ri u wa'l uva!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ri Ajawaxel u tasom jun cowilaj winak ri c'o nimalaj u cuinem jacha' ri u chuk'ab jun xibibalalaj sakbach, jacha' jun cakulja ri cäcämisanic, jacha' jun nimalaj jäb, jacha' jun xibibalalaj ja' ri cäjik'isanic. Ruc' ri u k'ab carokin na pa ulew," 
Isaiah28:3 cuc' c'u ri rakan cuxak'alej na ri are' nimal, u corona c'ut we k'abarelalaj tinimit ri' aj Eprain." 
Isaiah28:4 Xukuje' we je'lalaj wikbal ri' re cotz'i'j ri bach'uyirinak, ri q'uiyinak ulok pa ri räxalaj beya', cux na jacha' ri nabe tak higo ri quewächin chanim: chi aretak c'u c'o jachin jun quilowic we c'u e c'o chi pa u k'ab, quebutijo." 
Isaiah28:5 Pa ri k'ij ri', ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cux na jun je'lalaj corona, jun wikbal ri man c'o ta je wi chque ri e u tinimit ri queto'taj canok," 
Isaiah28:6 cäruxlabaj na suq'uilal chque ri k'atal tak tzij che u banic suq'uil pa ri k'atbal tzij, xukuje' cuya' na u chuk'ab canima' ri ajch'ojab ri quechajin ri tinimit." 
Isaiah28:7 E c'o chi c'u niq'uiaj ri quebak'ot rumal ri u wa'l uva quepajlobic quebak'otilobic rumal ri k'obisam u wa'l uva: e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' e k'axal tzij quebak'otilobic cumal ri k'obisam u wa'l uva; queconir rumal ri u wa'l uva, quebak'otilobic cumal tak ri k'obisam u wa'l uva, quebak'otilobic aretak quequil c'utwächinic e k'abarelab aretak caquik'at tzij." 
Isaiah28:8 Conojel ri mexa e nojinak che xo'j xukuje' tz'ilol, man c'o ta xa' jun c'olbal ch'ajch'oj." 
Isaiah28:9 In quinquibij, cäquibij c'ut: “¡Cape ta c'u che u ya'ic tijonic chke uj, che u cutic chkawäch ri u k'alajisam ri Dios! ¡Jacha' ta ne ri c'ä uj ch'utikab tak ac'alab" 
Isaiah28:10 ri c'äte ta cätajin cäketamaj uwo wuj: ba be bi bo bu!” 
Isaiah28:11 Utz ba la', we ba man cäquinimaj, xa ba je ta ne ri pa jun tzij ri u putzcuyem rib, pa jun ch'abal ri jalan ta chi wi ri cuch'abebej ta wi ri Dios we tinimit ri'." 
Isaiah28:12 Ri are' u bim chi chque nabe: “Waral c'o wi ri jororemal, waral c'o wi ri uxlanem chuxlan ri tukarinak.” Man xeniman ta c'u che." 
Isaiah28:13 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel quebutzijobej na je ta ne ri e ch'utikab tak ac'alab ri c'äte' cätajin cäquetamaj uwo wuj. Je c'u ri', aretak quebinic quepac'aq'uic quebe na chquij, quesocotaj na, quechaptaj na chupam ri c'amibal, quechaptaj c'u na canok." 
Isaiah28:14 Chitatabej ba' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel achijab ri man c'o ta jubik' i q'uixbal ri quik'at tzij puwi' we tinimit ri' ri Jerusalen. 
Isaiah28:15 Ri ix quibij: “Ka banom jun c'ulwächinic ruc' ri cämical, ka banom ka tzij ruc' ri quebajawin wi ri cäminakib rech aretak cäpe ri nimalaj c'ax pakawi', man cujurik taj ka tzucum ka panibal chupam ri banoj tzij, ka tzucum to'bal kib chupam ri subunic.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Rumal ri', ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Quincoj na jun abaj pa Sion, jun abaj ri cha'om ri sibalaj pakal rajil, are c'u abaj wa' ri nim u patan, ri cajwataj na che tac'alibal. Ri c'o u jiquiban wi c'uxaj, man quebel ta na ch'u'j." 
Isaiah28:17 Che we yacanic ri' are quincoj na ri suq'uil che u q'uexwäch clomabal, che u q'uexwäch suq'uibal are quincoj ri jicomal.” Ri i panibal ri i tzucum chupam ri banoj tzij, cäsach na u wäch rumal ri sakbach, ri ja' cuch'elej na bic ri u c'olbal ri to'bal iwib." 
Isaiah28:18 Ri i c'ulwächinic ri i banom ruc' ri cämical man c'o ta chi cupatanij na, ri c'ulwächinic ri i banom ruc' ri quebajawin ri cäminakib, man c'o ta cupatanij na. Cäpe na ri nimalaj c'ax cäkaj c'u na piwi'." 
Isaiah28:19 Joropa' mul coc'owic quixucharchatej na bic. Cäpe na chwek cäbij pa k'ij xukuje' chak'ab. Xuwi ri u tatabexic u tzijol quixubirbobisaj na. 
Isaiah28:20 Je cäc'ulmataj na jacha' ri k'oyolem pa jun ch'utinalaj ch'at ri xa ch'akap ri u k'u' jun cuch'ukubej rib. 
Isaiah28:21 Ri Ajawaxel je cuban na jas ri xuban pa ri juyub Perazim, je cuban na jas ri xuban pa ri beya' re Gabaon, che u banic ri u chomam, pune' man je ta chque ri winak, che u banic ri u chac, ri u chac ri mayibal u banic." 
Isaiah28:22 Je c'u ri', ¡miban chi ba' ri q'uixbal u banic!, co ne mäjat'ix chi na ri tikom ch'ich' ri cojom chiwe nu tom c'u u tzijol chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cusach na u wäch ronojel ri ulew." 
Isaiah28:23 Chiya' ri i xiquin che u tatabexic ri quinbij, kas utz u tatbexic ri nu tzij chibana'." 
Isaiah28:24 Aretak jun ticonijel cutic u wäch ri rulew, man xak ta xuwi cäsachi che u c'upic o xak ta xuwi cäsachi che u tajixic o u lianisaxic." 
Isaiah28:25 ¿La ma ta kastzij chi aretak tajitajinak chic, cujopij ri u wäch ri eneld, o ri comin, c'äte ri' cujopij ri trico pa tak cholaj, cho tak c'u ri ch'ucuch'ak cutic wi sebad xukuje' senten?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ri Dios cäc'utuw chuwäch jas ri cuban che u banic. 
Isaiah28:27 Man c'u cäyak' ta ri eneld, mawi coc'owisax cäret puwi' ri comin xane' ri eneld cäk'osix che che', are c'u ri comin cäjabux chi xic'ay." 
Isaiah28:28 Ri trico, cäyak'ic, je, ma ta c'u ne cätanabax u yak'ic coc'owisax ri qui quetet ri cäret puwi', cätas ri trico, man cäwech' ta c'ut." 
Isaiah28:29 Je c'u cuban ri Ajawaxel wa' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem che u banic ri cuchomaj. Ri are' e c'o mayibalalaj tak u chomanic, quebuban c'u na ruc' nimalaj no'j." 
Isaiah29:1 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri Ariel, ri Ariel, ri tinimit ri xjeki' wi ri David! Cheboc'owampe na quieb oxib junab cuc' ri e u cholajil ri e u nimak'ij," 
Isaiah29:2 are c'u ri in quincoj na ri Ariel pa latz', e c'o c'u na juyuwem xukuje' ch'ikowem. Ri tinimit cux c'u na chwe in kas je jas ri Ariel." 
Isaiah29:3 Quebentak na bic ri e wajch'ojab rech cäquisutij awij, quincoj na jun cowilaj k'atibal chawij xukuje' quinban na jun c'otom chawij che a ch'äquic." 
Isaiah29:4 Catcanaj mach'alic cho ri ulew xak cäjasan chi na ri a kul jacha' jun xibinel man cäch'obtaj ta chi na jas ri cabij. 
Isaiah29:5 Xak c'u c'ätetal, xa pa jok'otaj, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e a c'ulel cuc' cakulja, nimak tak cabrakan, nimalaj jininem, c'axc'ol, quiakik' jäb, xukuje' c'atic ri cäsachan wächaj. Ri e a c'ulel ri sibalaj e q'ui, quec'äjir na jacha' ri puc'uc' ulew, conojel ri quebanow c'ax chawe, quetelex na bic jacha' ri pajo." 
Isaiah29:6  
Isaiah29:7 Conojel tak we tinimit ri' ri man quebajilataj ta ri quech'ojin ruc' ri Ariel, conojel ri quech'ojin ruc', ri cäcaj cäquikasaj ri nimak tak tapia ri c'o chrij, conojel ri quebanow c'ax che quebux na e jacha' jun achic' o jun c'utwächinic re chak'ab." 
Isaiah29:8 Je cäc'ulmatajic jacha' jun ri cämem cuban che wi'jal are pa u c'u'x chi cätajin cäwa'ic, aretak c'ut cäc'astajic tolon ri u pam o jacha' jun ri cämem cuban che chakij chi' are pa u c'u'x chi cätajin cutij ruq'uia', aretak c'ut cäc'astajic c'ä cächaki'j na u chi' chaki'j ri u pa u kul. Je cäquic'ulmaj na tak we tinimit ri' ri man quebajilataj ta ri quech'ojin ruc' ri juyub Sion." 
Isaiah29:9 ¡Chixtakenok ix ix taquib! ¡Chixtakenok ix moyab, man c'o ta jas quiwilo! ¡Chitakej na bak'otem jacha' k'abarelab, pune' man c'o tzam i tijom!" 
Isaiah29:10 U takom c'u bic ri Ajawaxel jun nimalaj waram piwi'. Ri e k'axal tzij e are' ri e u bak'wäch ri tinimit, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel u ch'ukum ruc' jun ch'ukubal." 
Isaiah29:11 Ronojel c'u c'utwächinic uxinak chiwe jacha' tzij ri tz'ibatal chupam jun botobic wuj, ri xukuje' t'ikom, we c'u c'o cayo'w che jun ri reta'm uwo wuj, cubij c'u che: “Chasiq'uij u wäch we wuj ri'”, cutzelej ta c'ut u bixic: “Man quincuin taj t'ikom c'ut.”" 
Isaiah29:12 We c'u cäya' che jun ri man reta'm ta uwo wuj cubij c'u che: “Chasiq'uij u wäch we wuj ri'”, cutzelej ta c'ut u bixic: “Man weta'm ta uwo wuj.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “We tinimit ri' xak caquitzijoj chi quinquipatanij cäquiya' c'u nu k'ij xak ruc' ri qui chi' naj c'u c'o wi ri canima' chwe, ri k'ijilanic ri cäquiya' chwe xak winak e chomaninak, quicojom c'u pa qui jolom." 
Isaiah29:14 Rumal ri', cuc' tak mayibal xukuje' cajmajibal tak quimayirisaj chi na jumul we tinimit ri'. Ri qui no'j ri cajno'jab ri qui c'oxomanic ri e qui c'oxomanelab cäsach na qui wäch.”" 
Isaiah29:15 ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri cäquic'u' quib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che u c'u'ic ri cäquichomaj u banic, cäquiban ri quetzelal pa ri k'ekumal cäquibij c'ut: “Man c'o ta jachin cujilowic, Man c'o ta jachin quetamanic!”" 
Isaiah29:16 ¡Jewa' cäban che qui q'uexic ri jastak! Je ta ne chi cajunamatajtaj ta ri t'ac ruc' ri cächacunic. Jun banoj re t'ac man cubij ta che ri xbanowic: “Ri at man xinaban taj,” mawi jun banoj re t'ac che ri cayo'w u wächbal: “Man aweta'm ta ri cätajin cabano.”" 
Isaiah29:17 Man cäbeytaj taj ri c'ache'laj cux na ulew ticonijibal, e are c'u ri ulew re ticonijibal jeri' quebantaj na c'ache'laj." 
Isaiah29:18 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri e t'oyab quecuin na quetanic aretak cäsiq'uix jun wuj chi qui xiquin, xukuje' ri moyab queca'y na, quebel na chupam ri k'ekumalil xukuje' ri räxcanacojil." 
Isaiah29:19 Ri man nimak ta qui k'ij quequicot chi na pa ri Ajawaxel, ri sibalaj e mebayib na quequicot chi na pa ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah29:20 Cäsach na qui wäch ri man c'o ta qui q'uixbal, man quilitaj ta chi na qui wäch ri cäquinimarisaj quib, cäq'uis na tzij paquiwi' ri xuwi cäquichomaj u banic etzelal," 
Isaiah29:21 ri quequik'abaj il patan chquij niq'uiaj winak chic, ri cäquicoj c'amibal pa ri u be ri k'atal tzij, ri ruc' subunic cäquik'il ri u banic suq'uilal che ri man c'o ta u mac." 
Isaiah29:22 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel, ri xesan ulok ri Abraham chquixo'l ri itzel tak winak, cubij: “Kas camic cächapletaj bic ri Jacob man quel ta chi na u q'uixbal, mawi cäquiäkar chi ri u palaj," 
Isaiah29:23 aretak c'u cäquil ri e rija'lil, ri nu banom pa ri qui tinimit, cäquiya' na u k'ij ri nu tastajic, cäquixe'j c'u na quib chnuwäch, in ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Isaiah29:24 Ri sachinak qui c'u'x cäquetamaj na cuxic ajno'jab a are' c'ut ri wixwitanelab quequic'amowaj na tak ri tijonic.” 
Isaiah30:1 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri alc'ualxelab ri man e tal ta tzij, ri cäquiban qui chomanic ri man cäquibij ta na chwe ri quequisuc'umaj jastak ri man je ta cubij ri Wuxlabal, jeri' cäquimulij mac puwi' niq'uiaj mac chic!”" 
Isaiah30:2 “Ruc' aninakil quebe pa Ejipt man cäquita' ta na qui no'j chwe cäquitzucuj u to'ic quib ruc' ri ajawinel, cäquito' quib chuxe' ri u mu'jal ri Ejipt." 
Isaiah30:3 Are c'u ri to'bal ib ri cuya' ri' ri paraon cät'orinic, ri qui panibal chuxe' ri u mu'jal ri Ejipt are' ri qui mach'irisaxic." 
Isaiah30:4 Pune' ta ne ri ix i takom bic i q'uexwäch c'ä pa ri tinimit Zoan xukuje' pa Hanes," 
Isaiah30:5 conojel quesubutaj na rumal we nim tinimit ri' ri man c'o ta u patan, ri man c'o ta jun to'banic cuya' chiwe mawi c'o quich'äc chrij, xane' xuwi q'uistajibal c'uxaj xukuje' u q'ueyowal.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Cäya' u bixic ri cäquic'ulmaj na ri awaj ri e c'o pa Negueb: Pa tak ulew ri nojinak chque tak awaj, ri e c'o wi coj ri quebawunic, ri e c'o wi sachoj xukuje' dragon ri quejusus chicaj, quequic'am bic ri jastak quech ri pakal cajil xukuje' ri qui k'inomal chquij tak bur xukuje' camey quebe pa Ejipt, tinimit ri man c'o ta u patan," 
Isaiah30:7 man c'o ta u chuk'ab, man cäcuin ta cätobanic. Rumal ri' je u bi' wa' nu cojom: “Jun jilijic awaj ri cawunic man c'o ta c'u jas cubano.”" 
Isaiah30:8 Tasajampe' camic chatz'ibaj cho jun tz'alam, chaya' can pa jun tz'ibabal bi'aj chcanaj chila' chque tak ri k'ij ri quepe na, che jun k'alajisanic re chbe k'ij sak." 
Isaiah30:9 We winak ri' are' jun tinimit ri man tal ta tzij man jic taj ri man craj ta cutatabej ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel. 
Isaiah30:10 Cäquibij chque ri queca'y pa che' pa abaj: “Mebiwil c'utwächinic”, are c'u ri chque ri e k'axal tzij, cäquibij: “Mebitzijoj k'alajisanic chke ri kas tzij; quec'ulmatajic chebibij ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij chke; miwesaj ri ka rayinic." 
Isaiah30:11 Chitasa' iwib che ri be, mitakej ri suc'alaj be, mujiya' chuwäch ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Rumal ri' ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel cubij: “Ri ix xa quixutuj we pixbenic ri', are quicu'ba' i c'u'x chrij ri tokinic xukuje' ri etzelal, are c'u quitobej iwib;" 
Isaiah30:13 rumal ri' ix ri c'o i mac. Ix junam ruc' jun nimalaj tapia ri pak'pobinak aretak man c'o ta cänabexic cäwulijic; 
Isaiah30:14 cäsach na i wäch jacha' jun k'ebal re ulew, ri cämuchmub ronojel man cäcanaj ta can jun ch'akap chquixo'l ri ch'akatak ri utz taj cäya' ta rachak k'ak' chupam o cäpac'abex ta ja' pa ri c'ua'.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Ri Ajawaxel, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel, cubij: “Chixtzelejok, mixel c'u ch'u'j, man c'o ta c'u qui c'ulmaj na. Pa ri jororemal, pa ri jiquiban c'uxaj c'o wi ri i chuk'ab.” Man c'u xiwaj taj," 
Isaiah30:16 xane' xibij: “Jayi', are utz na cujanimaj chquij quiej.” Utz ri', are je kanimajic wa'. Xukuje' xibij: “Cujbe na pa tak carwaj ri sibalaj aninak quebinic.” Utz ri', xukuje' aninak quebin na ri quixokatanic." 
Isaiah30:17 Jun mil quebanimaj na, xa jun achi cacojow i xib, iwonojel quixanimaj na, quixxibix na xa cumal job achijab, xa ix quieb oxib chic quixcanaj na jacha' ri u canajic can jun che' ri cätaq'ui can u tuquel puwi' jun juyub o jun etal ri walijisam puwi' jun juyub." 
Isaiah30:18 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel quixreyej, che u tok'obisaxic i wäch; ri are' sibalaj curayij cuc'ut ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x chiwe, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel are jun Dios aj suq'uil. ¡Utz quech conojel ri quebeyen che!" 
Isaiah30:19 Tinimit aj Sion ri at jekel pa Jerusalen: Matakej chi ok'ej. Ri Ajawaxel quel na u c'u'x chawe aretak cuto carak achi' che u ta'ic ri u to'banic, xuwi c'u catuto' cuya' na ri catz'onoj che." 
Isaiah30:20 Pune' ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri a wa re ri c'axc'ol xukuje' ri a ja' re rikoj c'ax, ri are', ri are' ri awajtij, man cuc'u' ta chi na rib, kas cawil na cuc' ri a bak'wäch." 
Isaiah30:21 We c'u cajal ri a be pa ri awiquiak'ab o pa ri a mox k'ab, cata' na jun ch'abal chawij ri cubij na chawe: “Jewa' c'o wi ri be, are chitakej wa'.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Cawetzelaj na qui wäch e jacha' jastak ri e tz'il ri e wächbal tak ri e re sak puak ri e a banom chawe, xukuje' tak ri e u wächbal ri diosib ri e a cojom k'an puak che qui ch'ukic quij ri e a banom chawe. Quebaq'uiak na apanok jacha' jun jasach ri tz'il, ri man c'o ta chi u patan, ri xa junam chic ruc' ri mes." 
Isaiah30:23 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' na ri jäb rech cäq'uiy ri ija' ri catic pa ri ulew, ri ulew cuya' na chomak tak trico ri utz che ija'. Pa ri k'ij ri' ri e a wacax quec'oji' na nimalaj qui yuk'bal." 
Isaiah30:24 Xukuje' ne tak ri wacax xukuje' ri bur ri quechacun ri awulew, utzalaj tak k'ayes cäquitij na." 
Isaiah30:25 Aretak copan ri k'ij re ri nimalaj cämisanic quetzak c'u ri pimak tak tapia, quebel na ulok nimak tak nima' paquiwi' ri tac'atak tak juyub xukuje' que tza'm tak ri juyub ri naj e elinak chicaj." 
Isaiah30:26 Ri Ajawaxel cucunaj na xukuje' cubotz' na ri u socotajic ri u tinimit. Ri ic' xak junam cätunun chic ruc' ri k'ij, ri u tun ri k'ij cux na wukub mul ri u chuk'ab, jacha' ri qui tun wukub k'ij ri junam quetununic." 
Isaiah30:27 Chiwilampe', ri Ajawaxel chwinakil petinak chi naj ri u c'anal cätajin canicowic ruc' tzatzalaj sibal, ri u chi' nojinak che oyowal, ri rak' junam ruc' ri k'ak' ri cuporoj ronojel," 
Isaiah30:28 ri ruxlabic junam ruc' jun nima' ri tixtobinak ri copan c'ä chukul ri winak ri are' cäpe che u cojic jun eka'bal chquij ri nimak tak tinimit che qui c'amic bic pa ri sachbal wächaj, cucoj na jun jiquibal rij qui wi' ri tinimit pa qui chi' che qui jech'obisaxic." 
Isaiah30:29 Are c'u ri ix e c'o tak na bix chiwe, ri cäban pa jun tastalicalaj nimak'ij chak'ab; ri iwanima' cäquicotic jacha' aretak cäbin jun ruc' ri rok'ibal su' benam re pa ri u juyub ri Ajawaxel, pa ri c'olbal ri cuto' wi rib ri Israel." 
Isaiah30:30 Ri Ajawaxel cuban na chi cätataj ri cowilaj u ch'abal, cuc'ut na ri u cuinem ri cucoj ruc' jun xibibalalaj oyowal, e rachil tak ri e rak' k'ak' ri quebik'onic, rachil cakulja' jäb xukuje' sakbach." 
Isaiah30:31 Aretak ri Asiriy cuta ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel xukuje' cuc'am ri c'äjisabal u wäch, sibalaj cuxe'j na rib," 
Isaiah30:32 aretak cutzokopij ri jujun rapubal ri Ajawaxel che, cäk'ojomax na tum xukuje' arp. Ri Ajawaxel cuban na jun xibibalalaj ch'o'j ruc'." 
Isaiah30:33 Sibalaj ojer suc'umam ulok che ri Asiriy xukuje' che ri rajawinel jun c'olbal re c'axc'ol ri nim u wäch xukuje' naj u pam, jun k'ak' nicowisam ri yo'm sibalaj si' chupam. Are ri ruxlab ri Ajawaxel cänicowisan na jacha' jun nima' re asubre." 
Isaiah31:1 ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri quebe pa Ejipt che u to'ic quib, ri cäquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chquij ri quiej, ri cäquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chi e c'o q'ui qui carwaj xukuje' chi sibalaj e q'ui ri cajquiejab e c'olic, man cäquiya' ta c'u ri qui wäch chrij ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel, man cäquitzucuj ta ri Ajawaxel!" 
Isaiah31:2 Xukuje' c'u ri are' nawinel che qui c'amic ulok quiäkasakil, aretak cubij jun jasach, man cuq'uex ta ri u chomanic. Cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e banal tak etzelal, xukuje' ri quetoban cuc' ri e banal tak etzelal." 
Isaiah31:3 Ri aj ejiptib e winak, man e are' ta ri Dios ri qui quiej xa e ti'j, man e uxlabal taj. Ri Ajawaxel cuyuk na ri u k'ab che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch, ri chajitalic xukuje' ri chajinel quetzak na xa' junam quecäm na conojel." 
Isaiah31:4 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Jacha' jun coj ri u cämisam jun chij man cuxe'j ta rib chquiwäch ri ajyuk'ab, pune' conojel cäquimulij quib chrij cäquixibij c'u ruc' rakoj tak chi'aj, jewa' ri u petic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuto' na u wi' ri u tinimit puwi' ri juyub Sion." 
Isaiah31:5 Jacha' ri cuban jun chicop che u chajixic ri u soc, cärapap puwi', je cuban ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem che u chajixic ri Jerusalen cuchajij na, cucol na, cuto' na u wi', cäresaj na pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Ralc'ual tak ri Israel, chixtzelej ruc' ri c'ax ix ch'awinak che." 
Isaiah31:7 Pa ri k'ijol c'ut aretak ri ix iwonojel quebiq'uiak apan ri e i diosib re k'an puak re sak puak ri e i banom cuc' ri i k'ab ri e ajchak'maquib. 
Isaiah31:8 Ri Asiriy cakaj na pa u chi' ch'ich' re ch'o'j, man rumal ta c'u jun u chuk'ab winak. Ri ch'o'j are cabanow na chi quebanimaj na ri e u winak, xukuje' are tak c'ut ri calabom ajch'ojab quec'ayix na pa patanijic;" 
Isaiah31:9 rumal c'u rech ri xe'n ib, ri ajawinel caxiq'uinic canimaj na e are tak c'ut ri cajch'ojab que animaj na cäquiya' can ri quetal. Are wa' cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel, chi pa Jerusalen u nicowisam jun k'ak' che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri e u c'ulel." 
Isaiah32:1 Coc na jun ajawinel ri cajawin na ruc' jicomal xukuje' k'atal tak tzij ri cäquiban na suc'alaj k'atan tzij. 
Isaiah32:2 Chquijujunal wa' quebux na jun to'bal ib chuwäch ri quiakik', xukuje' jun panibal chuwäch ri quiakik' jäb, jacha' u be tak ja' re jabal pa chaki'j ulew, jacha' ri u mu'jal jun nimalaj abaj pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Isaiah32:3 Sibalaj jaktal ri qui bak'wäch, sibalaj queboc na il che tatabenic;" 
Isaiah32:4 man cäquiban ta ri jastak ruc' aninakil xane' cäquichomaj na ri cäquibano, utz qui bixic ri jastak cäquibij na." 
Isaiah32:5 Ri winak man cäquibij ta na utzalaj winak che ri k'an u chi, mawi cäquiya' na u k'ij ri chi' c'o wi." 
Isaiah32:6 Rumal rech chi ri k'an u chi' cäch'aw na jacha' jun ri k'an u chi', cuchomaj c'u qui banic etzelal cutzucuj u banic ri il cuban tzij chrij ri Ajawaxel man c'o ta cuya' bic che ri cänumic, man cuya' ta bic ruq'uia' ri cächaki'j u chi'." 
Isaiah32:7 Ri chi' c'o wi are quebucoj ri subunic, cuchomaj qui banic xibibalalaj tak jastak cuban c'ax chque ri mebayib cuc' banoj tak tzij xukuje' che ri cutz'onoj suq'uilal." 
Isaiah32:8 Are c'u ri utzalaj winak, cuchomaj qui banic utzalaj tak jastak, pa tak c'u we chomanic ri' cäjeki' wi." 
Isaiah32:9 Are c'u ri ix, ixokib ri man c'o ta jas quixoc ta wi il, chitampe' ri quinbij chiwe. Ixokib ri man c'o ta jas quibisoj, chitampe' ri nu tzij." 
Isaiah32:10 Camic man c'o ta jas quibisoj, pa jun junab c'ut ruc' jubik' quixel na ch'u'j, rumal chi man cäwächin ta chi na ri ulew, man c'o ta chi uva quebiyaco." 
Isaiah32:11 Ix ri man c'o ta jas quixoc ta wi il, chixbirbitok ix ri quina' chi man c'o ta jas quibisoj, chixel ch'u'j, chebiwesaj tal we atz'iak ri', chebicojo' wakwoj tak atz'iak che u c'utic ri i bis." 
Isaiah32:12 Chic'utu' iwib chi cäk'oxow ri iwanima' chque ri je'lalaj tak ulew, xukuje' ri sibalaj quewächin wi tak ri uva." 
Isaiah32:13 Q'uix xukuje' juyubal tak k'ayes ri c'o qui q'uixo'l queq'uiy na chupam ri wulew, pa conojel tak ri ja ri c'o wi quicotemal chupam ri tinimit, ri cäkaj ri nimak'ij chquiwäch." 
Isaiah32:14 Ri ja re k'atbal tzij cäwoni na canok; ri tinimit, ri e c'o wi q'uialaj winak, cäcanaj na chaki'j uwo sak; ri pimak tak tapia, xa jumul quewonobax na canok; chila' quequicot wi na ri juyubal tak bur, xukuje' cuya' cäquitij na qui k'ayes ri wacax chila'." 
Isaiah32:15 Are c'u ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel ri winakirisanel c'ac' u petic cäpe chi na jumul pakawi', ri chaki'j uwo sak cäq'uextaj na pa utzalaj ulew re ticonijibal, ri ulew re ticonijibal sibalaj cäwächin chi na chuwäch ri nabe." 
Isaiah32:16 Ri jicomal xukuje' ri suq'uil cäjeki' na pa conojel c'olbal rech ri ulew. 
Isaiah32:17 Ri suq'uil cuya' na jamaril, jororemal xukuje' cu'lbal c'uxaj chbe k'ij sak." 
Isaiah32:18 Ri nu tinimit cäjeki' na pa jun c'olbal aj jamaril, pa tak ja ri co e jekelic, pa tak c'olbal ri man c'o ta wi elem ch'u'j," 
Isaiah32:19 pune' c'u cat'akix ri c'ache'laj camach'irisax c'u ri tinimit. 
Isaiah32:20 Ri ix quixjeki' na pa utzil, cäc'oji' na i ja' che u ja'xic ri i tico'n, xukuje' c'o q'ui k'ayes che ri bur xukuje' che ri wacax." 
Isaiah33:1 ¡Tok'ob a wäch, etzelanel ri maja' catetzelaxic jachinel quieb a wäch ri c'ä maja' catjachic! Aretak caq'uis etzelanic, catetzelax na, aretak cäq'uis jachinel catjach na." 
Isaiah33:2 Ajawaxel, chel c'u'x la chke, ri uj uj eyeninak che la. Chux la to'l kech conojel ak'abibal, lal ka colonel pa tak ri k'ijol re u q'ueyowal." 
Isaiah33:3 Aretak cätataj ri xe'n ib ri cäcoj la quebanimaj tak na ri tinimit, aretak cäc'ut ib la quejabuj conojel ri nimak tak tinimit;" 
Isaiah33:4 ri e qui c'ulel e jacha' jun sutz' sac', cäquiq'uiak quib chquij cäquimaj ri qui k'inomal." 
Isaiah33:5 Ri Ajawaxel c'o puwi' ronojel, jekel c'u pa ri caj ri are' u nojisam ri Sion che jicomal xukuje' suq'uilal," 
Isaiah33:6 amak'el c'ut cubij che chi man c'o ta cäslabisanic. Ri no'j xukuje' ri etamanic e jun k'inomal wa' ri queto'tajisanic ri u na'ic ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel are jun k'inomal. 
Isaiah33:7 ¡Chatampe' ri u rakic qui chi' ri c'o qui chuk'ab xo'l tak ri ja, xukuje' ri cok'ej ri e tzucul tak jamaril!" 
Isaiah33:8 E tz'inil tak ri be, man c'o ta jun cäbinebenic. Queyojix tak ri c'ulwächinic xukuje' ri chomanic ri e banom man c'o ta chi jun winak nim ta quil wi." 
Isaiah33:9 Ri ulew u cojom k'ek' atz'iak, cabison c'ut, ri Libano bach'uyirinak elinak u q'uixbal, ri beya' aj Saron uxinak jun chaki'j uwo sak, ri Basan xukuje' ri juyub Carmel e toltobinak." 
Isaiah33:10 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Camic quinyac wib; camic quinc'ut wib chi nim nu banic chi nim nu k'ij. 
Isaiah33:11 Ri e i chomanic ix xukuje' ri e i chac xa' e pajo xukuje' xa e mes; ri wuxlabic cäsachow na qui wäch jacha' jun c'atic. 
Isaiah33:12 Ri e tinimit tak quechajirisax na jacha' q'uix ri e choyom chic quec'at na pa ri k'ak'. 
Isaiah33:13 Ri e c'o naj quitatabej ri nu banom, ri e c'o nakaj nim quila' wi ri nu cuinem.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Quebirbob ri ajmaquib pa ri Sion, ri man e nimanelab taj quenoj na che xe'n ib cäquibij c'ut: “¿Jachin ta chke cäcuinic cäc'asi pa jun k'ak' jarisanel, pa jun k'ak' aj chbe k'ij sak?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ri cuban ri suq'uil pa ronojel xukuje' cubij ri kastzij, ri man cuk'inomarisaj ta rib rumal ri qui chuk'ab niq'uiaj chic mawi cuya' rib pa lok'ic rumal ri cäsipax che, ri man cuya' ta u xiquin che itzel tak cojbal c'uxaj, xukuje' cutz'apij ri u bak'wäch rech man cuca'yej ta ri man utz taj," 
Isaiah33:16 are wa' ri man c'o ta jachin cäslabisanic, curik na u panibal chupam tak ri cowilaj abaj, ronojel k'ij c'o cutijo xukuje' man cätzaj ta ri u ja'." 
Isaiah33:17 Cawil chi c'u na jumul ri ajawinel pa ri nimalaj u juluwem ri u c'ulbatil jun ulew ri naj quetakal wi na. 
Isaiah33:18 Aretak cänataj ri xe'n ib chawe ri xatc'oji' wi na, cabij na: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri cajilan tak ri alcabal? ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri quilow tak ri pajbal we e tz'akat? ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri cajilan tak ri tac'atak tak ja?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Man catjeki' ta chi pa jun tinimit ri man c'o ta u q'uixbal, ri c'ax u ch'obic ri u tzij, ri u putzcuyem rib ri u ch'abal ri man c'o ta cäch'obowic." 
Isaiah33:20 Chiwila' ri Sion, ri cäkoc'owisaj wi tak ri ka nimak'ij; chaca'yej apan ri Jerusalen, tinimit ri man c'o ta jachin ta cäslabisanic cux na jacha' jun kajebal ri co jekelic, ri man quebokbob ta tak ri e u ch'ic, mawi quet'okopin ri colob ri taninem rech." 
Isaiah33:21 Chi' cuc'ut wi na ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel chkaxo'l. Are jun c'olbal ri e c'o wi tak nima' ri quebinic ri sibalaj e nimak qui wäch, man c'u quequiramij ta ri c'ulel, pune' quequicoj ri qui jucub ri quequich'icmij xukuje' ri qui jucub ri e c'o qui chuk'ab." 
Isaiah33:22 Ri colob ri taninem quech ri che' ri c'o pa qui niq'uiajil ri jucub quet'okpinic, man culic' ta rib ri atz'iak ri cäc'amow qui be. Quekatokij na q'ui tak k'inomal chque ri c'ulel, xukuje' ne ri moy curik na re ri jastak, ri man tz'akat ta cakan qui k'ab cäquitokij na que. Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel are ka k'atal tzij, are cujpixbenic, xukuje' are' kajawinel, are' cujcolow na." 
Isaiah33:23  
Isaiah33:24 Man c'o ta jun aj tinimit cubij ta na: “In yawab.” Ri Dios cusach na qui mac conojel ri e c'o pa Sion. 
Isaiah34:1 Chixkeb ulok, tak tinimit, che tatabenic; nimak tak tinimit, chixoc il che tatabenic. Chutatabej ri ulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chuwäch, ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri cuq'uiyisaj." 
Isaiah34:2 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel yactajinak royowal cuc' ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' cuc' tak ri e cajch'ojab, u k'atom c'u tzij paquiwi' chi cäsachisax qui wäch, chi quecämisaxic." 
Isaiah34:3 Ri cäminakib man c'o ta quemukuw na, cäwalij c'u na ri qui chuwil. Nima' re quic' quebin na pa tak ri c'ächelaj." 
Isaiah34:4 Conojel ri ch'imil ri e c'o chicaj quetuquin na, ri caj cubot na rib jacha' jun wuj, conojel ri ch'imil quechup na, jacha' ri u chaki'jaric xukuje' ri u tzakic jun xakaj ri ch'upch'ubinak che ri juwi' uva o che ri juwi' higo." 
Isaiah34:5 Je, ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri Ajawaxel cäc'utun na chicaj, cäkaj c'u na puwi' ri Edom, tinimit ri k'atom chrij chi cäcämisaxic." 
Isaiah34:6 Ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri Ajawaxel cäch'ukutaj na rij che quic' xukuje' che xepo, jacha' aretak quepil chij xukuje' q'uisic' che tabal tok'ob. Ri Ajawaxel cäcämisan na pa Bosra, cuban na jun nimalaj cämisanic pa Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Quekaj c'u na e jacha' ta ne e juyubal tak wacax, c'ojol tak wacax, nimak tak wacax; ri culew canebnob na che quic', ri puc'uc' ulew cänoj na che xepo." 
Isaiah34:8 Je, are k'ij wa' re tojow q'uexel ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel, ri junab re u ya'ic rajil u c'äxel chque ri e ch'ojininak ruc' ri Sion." 
Isaiah34:9 Ri nima' ri e c'o pa Edom quebux na k'ol, ri puc'uc' ulew ri c'o chila' cux na asubre ri ulew cäc'at na jacha' k'ol." 
Isaiah34:10 Man cächup taj mawi pa k'ij mawi chak'ab ronojel k'ij cäbukuwic. Chbe k'ij sak junab cäwonobax na canok man c'o ta chi jun winak coc'ow ta chi chila'. 
Isaiah34:11 Chila' cäjeki' wi na ri tucur xukuje' ri xbuk, chila' cäquiban wi na qui soc ri joj xukuje' tak ri xoch'. Ri Ajawaxel cujalwächij na we nim tinimit ri' pa jun chaki'j uwo sak ri man c'o ta chi jun cäbin ta chupam." 
Isaiah34:12 Man cäc'oji ta chi na jun ajawinel ri cätakan ta puwi'; conojel ri c'amal tak be cäsach na qui wäch. 
Isaiah34:13 Chupam tak ri cachoch ri ajawinelab queq'uiy na tak q'uix xukuje' la, xukuje' quiäkwok' queq'uiy na pa tak ri cachoch ri ch'ojinelab Cux na jun c'olbal ri quejeki' wi na ri juyubal tak awaj, chila' c'ut quebopan wi na ri abestrus." 
Isaiah34:14 Ri e u me's tak juyub cäcachilaj na quib cuc' ri juyubal tak awaj, ri juyubal tak q'uisic' cäquisiq'uila' na quib. Chila' cäc'oji' wi na ri subunel ri cäxibin chak'ab, curik c'u c'olbal ri cuxlan wi." 
Isaiah34:15 Chila' cuban wi na u soc ri tucur, chila' cäsic'ow wi na, chila' quepok' wi na ri alaj tak ral, quebumulij c'u na che qui chajixic. Xukuje' chila' cäquimulij wi na quib ri xic, chquijujunal ri ama'ib cäcachilaj na ri qui c'ulaj." 
Isaiah34:16 Chitzucuj i no'j chupam ri u wuj ri Ajawaxel, chisiq'uij u wäch: man c'o ta jun chque we awaj ri' ri ma ta quec'oji' chila', man c'o ta jun chque ri ma ta cärachilaj ri u c'ulaj, are' c'u ri Ajawaxel chomaninak, ruc' c'u ri ruxlab quebumulij na." 
Isaiah34:17 Chqui jujunal u c'utum ri u c'olbal ri cac'oji' wi, ruc' ri u k'ab u c'utum ri u jekelibal, chila' c'u quec'oji' wi na amak'el chbe k'ij sak junab quejeki' na chila'." 
Isaiah35:1 Chquicot ri chaki'j uwo sak, chaki'j ulew; chnoj che jajatem, chcotz'ijanok," 
Isaiah35:2 chebuq'uiyisaj cotz'i'j jacha' ri xuxa'n chnoj che quicotemal xukuje' jajatem. Je'lic cuban na ri Dios che jacha' ri Libano, sibalaj cäwächin na jacha' ri Carmel xukuje' ri beya' aj Saron. Conojel cäquil na ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri u je'lical xukuje' ri nimalaj u nimalil ri ka Dios." 
Isaiah35:3 Chebicowirisaj ri tukarib, chiya' qui chuk'ab ri e cosinak," 
Isaiah35:4 chibij chque ri cäquixe'j quib: “¡Chichajij anima', mixe'j iwib! ¡Waral c'o wi ri i Dios che i to'ic, e are c'u ri e i c'ulel cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch jas ri takal chque!”" 
Isaiah35:5 Queca'y c'u na ri moyab, quetan c'u na ri t'oyab;" 
Isaiah35:6 ri man tz'akat ta cäkan qui k'ab quech'opin na jacha' ri masat, ri memab cäquirak na qui chi'. Chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, chaki'j ulew, quel wi na ulok ja' jacha' nima'." 
Isaiah35:7 Ri chaki'j uwo sak cux na jun cho, ri chaki'j ulew cänoj na che qui q'uiyibal tak ja'. Ri e c'o wi itzel tak chicop camic, queq'uiy na aj xukuje' tak xic'ay" 
Isaiah35:8 Cäc'oji' na jun be, ri cabinax na “ri be ri tastalic”. Ri man e ch'ajch'oj taj man cuya' ta caquibinibej; ri man c'o ta qui no'j man cuya' ta cäquibinibej." 
Isaiah35:9 Chila' man c'o ta coj e c'olic mawi quekeb ri juyubal tak awaj chila'. Pa ri be ri' quepe wi na ri quetorotaj ulok," 
Isaiah35:10 ri e torom rumal ri Ajawaxel queboc c'u na pa Sion cuc' tak bix re quicotemal, ronojel k'ij quequicot na. Cäquirik na utzil xukuje' utzalaj c'aslemal, cäsach na u wäch ri ok'ej xukuje' ri k'oxomal." 
Isaiah36:1 Cajlajuj junab chic c'o ri Ezequiy che ajawinel aretak ri Senaquerib, cajawinel ri aj Asiriy, xoc che qui ch'äquic conojel tak ri tinimit aj Juda ri sutim quij che nimak tak tapia, xebumajij c'ut." 
Isaiah36:2 Pa Lacs c'o wi aretak xutak bic jun c'amal be ri sibalaj nim u k'ij, xebuc'am bic juk'at cowilaj tak ajch'ojab, che u tzijobexic ri ajawinel Ezequiy pa Jerusalen, xquiya' quib chuxcut ri u be ri c'olbal ja', pa ri be ri cäbe pa ri c'olbal ri queban wi ch'ajom." 
Isaiah36:3 Chila' xec'ulax wi rumal ri Eliaquim, ri u c'ojol ri Hilsiy, ri cätakan puwi' ri rachoch ri ajawinel ri Sebna ri catz'iban ri cac'ulmatajic xukuje' ri Joa, ri u c'ojol ri Asap, ri rajtz'ib ri ajawinel." 
Isaiah36:4 Ri c'amal be aj Asiriy, xubij chque: “Chibij che ri Ezequiy we tzij ri' ri u takom ulok u bixic ri nimalaj ajawinel, ri rajawinel ri Asiriy: ‘¿Jas ri cäbanow chawe chi caban awib chi sibalaj co at c'olic?" 
Isaiah36:5 ¿La xa pa cachomaj chi ri je'lalaj tak tzij xak e junam qui k'ij ruc' ri nawinic xukuje' ri chuk'ab che u banic ri ch'o'j? ¿Jachin chrij cäcu'bi wi a c'u'x rech cayac awib chwij? 
Isaiah36:6 Quinwilo chi a cuban a c'u'x chrij ri to'banic ri cuya' ri Ejipt. Utz ri', ri Ejipt xa jun aj ri pak'ininak, we jun winak cuchap rib che, quet'ist'ob na bic ri ch'akatak tak aj pa u k'ab. Are jewa' u banic ri paraon ri rajawinel ri Ejipt, chque conojel ri cäquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij." 
Isaiah36:7 We c'u cabij chwe: Ri uj ka cuban ka c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios, ¿la ma ta pu xebuyojij ri Ezequiy ri c'olbal re tak k'ijilanic xukuje' tak ri porobal rech we Dios ri', xuya' c'u takanic chque ri winak aj Juda xukuje' ri aj Jerusalen chi xuwi puwi' jun porobal cäban wi ri k'ijilanic?" 
Isaiah36:8 Chabana' jun chomanic ruc' ri wajaw, ri rajawinel ri Asiriy: ri in quinya' quieb mil quiej chawe, we quebarik ajquiejab chque." 
Isaiah36:9 Mawi c'u ne catcuinic catac'aba' awib chuwäch jun chque ri qui nimal ajch'ojab aj Asiriy ri man nim ta rekle'n, ¿la a cuban c'u a c'u'x chi quebarik ajquiejab xukuje' quiej pa Ejipt?" 
Isaiah36:10 Xukuje' quinbij chawe, ¿a cachomaj chi xak pa we wi in petinak che u banic ch'o'j xukuje' che u sachic u wäch we ulew ri' ri ma ta are ri Ajawaxel in takowinak ulok? ¡Are' c'ut xintakow ulok che u banic ch'o'j ruc' xukuje' che u sachisaxic u wäch!’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Ri Eliaquim, ri Sebna xukuje' ri Joa xquibij che ri qui nimal ajch'ojab aj Asiriy: Bana la tok'ob, chujach'abej pa ch'abal aramey, ri uj cäkach'obo. Mujach'abej pa ch'abal hebrey, cäquita' c'u ri winak ri e c'o puwi' ri nimalaj u tapia ri tinimit." 
Isaiah36:12 Are c'u ri qui nimal ajch'o'j aj Asiriy xubij: “Man che ta ri awajaw, mawi chiwe ix, ri xinutak ta wi ulok ri ajawinel aj Asiriy che u bixic wa'. Xane' kas chque ri winak ri e c'o puwi' ri tapia, ri e are', xukuje' ri ix quitij na ri nim i chul xukuje' quiwuq'uiaj na ri alaj i chul.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Ri qui nimal ajch'ojab, xtaq'uic, co xurak u chi' pa ch'abal Hebrey, xubij: “Chitampe' ri cubij ri nimalaj ajawinel, ri ajawinel aj Asiriy:" 
Isaiah36:14 ‘Miya' iwib pa subic che ri Ezequiy, ri are' man cäcuin ta che i to'ic.’" 
Isaiah36:15 We ri Ezequiy craj cucoj i c'u'x rech quicu'ba' i c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, cubij c'u chiwe: ‘Ri Ajawaxel kas jic chi cujuto'tajisaj na ri are' man cuya' ta na c'olbal chi we tinimit ri' cakaj ta na pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy,’" 
Isaiah36:16 Minimaj ri cubij chiwe. Ri ajawinel aj Asiriy xinutak ulok che u bixic chiwe chi chixutzir ruc', chijacha iwib pa u k'ab jeri' chijujunal quixcuinic quitij ri u wächinic ri e i uva xukuje' ri u wächinic ri i e higo ri e i ticom, xukuje' quitij na ri ja' ri c'o pa tak ri i c'ua'." 
Isaiah36:17 Quixuc'am c'u na bic pa jun ulew ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri iwech, jun ulew ri cäwächin wi trico xukuje' uva, che u banic wa xukuje' u wa'l uva." 
Isaiah36:18 We ri Ezequiy cubij chiwe chi quixuto' na ri Ajawaxel, mixsubataj rumal. ¿La c'o ta pa jun chque ri qui diosib ri jule' tak tinimit chic xcuin ta che u to'ic ri rulew pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy?" 
Isaiah36:19 ¿Jawije' e c'o wi ri e u diosib ri Hamat xukuje' ri Arpad? ¿Jawije' e c'o wi ri e u diosib ri Separbaim? ¿La xecuin puch xquito' ri Samar pa u k'ab ri Asiriy? 
Isaiah36:20 ¿Jachin jun chque conojel ri qui diosib tak we ulew ri' ri xcuin ta che u to'ic ri i nim tinimit pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy? ¿Jasche quichomaj chi ri Ajawaxel cäcuinic cuto' ri Jerusalen?” 
Isaiah36:21 Ri e are' man xech'aw taj, mawi c'u ne c'o ta jun tzij xquitzelej ta u bixic che, u yo'm c'u takanic ri ajawinel chque chi man c'o ta jas cäquibij." 
Isaiah36:22 Sibalaj c'u xbison ri Eliaquim ri cätakan puwi' ri rachoch ri ajawinel; ri Sebna, ri yaltzijol; xukuje' ri Joa, ri rajtz'ib ri ajawinel, xquijis ri catz'iak chquij xetzelej ruc' ri Ezequiy che u bixic che ri xubij ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj Asiriy." 
Isaiah37:1 Aretak ri ajawinel Ezequiy xuta' ri tzij ri xbix che, xujis ri ratz'iak chrij, xebucoj wokwoj tak atz'iak che u c'utic ri c'ax ri c'o pa ranima', xbe c'u pa ri rachoch Dios." 
Isaiah37:2 Xutak c'u bic ri Eliaquim, ri cätan puwi' ri rachoch ri ajawinel, ri xquicoj bic wokwoj tak atz'iak che u c'utic ri qui bis, xebe che u tzijobexic ri Isaiy, k'axal tzij, u c'ojol ri Amoz," 
Isaiah37:3 che u bixic che ri cubij ri ajawinel: “Camic uj c'o pa jun nimalaj bis, c'äjisabal wächaj, xukuje' mach'irisan ib, jacha' jun ixok ri xa co'l man quec'ol taj ri ral, cäq'uis c'u na ri u chuk'ab." 
Isaiah37:4 C'o ta banom wi xuta' ta ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios ri tzij ri xubij ri qui nimal ajch'ojab ri xtak ulok rumal ri rajaw, ri ajawinel aj Asiriy, che u yok'ic ri c'aslic Dios. C'o ta banom wi cäc'äjisax u wäch rumal rech ri tzij ri kas xuta' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios. Chabana' ba jun ch'awem ruc' Dios paquiwi' ri c'ä e c'o canok.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Xebe c'u ri e u pataninelab ri ajawinel Ezequiy che u tzijobexic ri Isaiy," 
Isaiah37:6 ri Isaiy xubij chque: “Mal i k'ij je chibij wa' che ri iwajaw: ‘Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': Maxe'j awib chque ri c'axalaj tak tzij ri xquibij ri e u pataninelab ri ajawinel aj Asiriy. 
Isaiah37:7 Cawilampe' na, quinbano chi copan u bixic jun c'ax ri cape puwi' ri are', rumal c'u wa' cätzelej na pa ri rulew, chila' c'u quintak wi na u cämisaxic.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Ri qui nimal ajch'ojab xretamaj chi ri ajawinel aj Asiriy xel bic pa ri tinimit Lacs. Xel c'u bic pa Jerusalen, xbec, xurika' ri ajawinel re Asiriy cätajin cäch'ojin che u ch'äquic ri Libna." 
Isaiah37:9 Chila' c'u xuta' wi u tzijol ri ajawinel re Asiriy chi ri ajawinel Tirac re Etiopiy u chaplem ch'o'j chrij are'. Ri ajawinel re Asiriy xebutak chi bic jumul pataninelab rech quebe ruc' ri ajawinel Ezequiy re Juda, che u bixic che:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Ri a Dios ri a cuban wi a c'u'x, cujiquiba' u bixic chawe chi ri Jerusalen man cäkaj ta pa nu k'ab matsubtaj c'u rumal." 
Isaiah37:11 At a tom u tzijol ri qui banom tak ri ajawinelab re Asiriy cuc' conojel tak ri ulew ri xcaj xequisach qui wäch. ¿La catto'taj ta c'u lo at? 
Isaiah37:12 ¿La xecuin puch ri diosib xequito'tajisaj ri jule' tak tinimit chic, ri xsachisax qui wäch cumal ri e nu mam: ri Gozan, ri Haran, ri Resep, xukuje' ri winak aj Bet-eden ri e jekel pa Telasar?" 
Isaiah37:13 ¿Jawije' e c'o wi tak ri ajawinelab re Hamat, re Arpad, re Separbaim, re Ena xukuje' re Ib?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Ri Ezequiy xuc'am ri wuj ri xjach che cumal ri e u takom ri ajawinel aj Asiriy, xusiq'uij c'ut. Xbe c'ut pa ri rachoch Dios xulic' c'u ri wuj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel," 
Isaiah37:15 xch'aw ruc' Dios je xubij wa': 
Isaiah37:16 “Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel cuinem la, u Dios ri Israel, ri c'o ri tem la re ajawibal la paquiwi' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic', xuwi ri lal lal Dios paquiwi' conojel ri ajawibal rech ri uwächulew lal xbanow ri caj xukuje' ri ulew." 
Isaiah37:17 Kas tatabem la, Ajawaxel, chtatabej c'u la. Chjaka' ri bak'wäch la Ajawaxel chila' c'u la. Chtatabej la ri tzij ri xutak ulok u bixic ri Senaquerib chwe, c'axalaj tak tzij ri xubij ulok ronojel che yok'ic la ri c'aslic Dios." 
Isaiah37:18 Kastzij Ajawaxel chi ri ajawinelab re Asiriy e qui sachom qui wäch conojel ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri culew," 
Isaiah37:19 xukuje' e qui porom ri e qui diosib pa k'ak', rumal rech chi kastzij we e diosib ri', man c'o ta qui patan, xa e che' o e abaj ri e banom cumal ri winak. Rumal ri' xecuin che u sachixic qui wäch." 
Isaiah37:20 Camic c'ut Ajawaxel ka Dios, chujto' la pa u k'ab rech conojel ri nimak tak tinimit cho ri uwächulew cäquetamaj chi ri lal, Ajawaxel, xuwi ri lal lal Dios.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Xutak c'u u bixic ri Isaiy che ri Ezequiy: “Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel: ‘Ri in xinta' ri bochi'nic ri xabano, puwi' ri Senaquerib ri ajawinel aj Asiriy.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:22 E are tak tzij wa' ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chrij ri ajawinel aj Asiriy: “Ri tinimit Sion, jacha' jun ali, cutze'j a wäch Senaquerib. Ri Jerusalen cusutisa' ri u jolom ruc' etz'ben wächaj aretak cattzelej pa wakan.”" 
Isaiah37:23 ¿Jachin ri a yok'om xukuje' a yacom royowal? ¿Jachin che co a rakom wi a chi' xukuje' a yacom ri a bak'wäch chrij ruc' nimal? Chrij ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel. 
Isaiah37:24 Cumal ri a takom xayac royowal ri Ajawaxel. Xabij c'ut: “Xinpaki' paquiwi' tak ri juyub cuc' ri e nu carwaj re ch'o'j ri man quebajilataj taj, puwi' ri Libano ri sibalaj e nojinak che tak che'. Xebent'akij tak ri chacalte' ri e tiquitoj puwi', xukuje' tak ri chäj ri sibalaj e je'lic. Xincuinic xinpaki' kas c'ä puwi', xebenrika' tak ri c'ache'laj ri e je ta ne ticonijibal cotz'i'j." 
Isaiah37:25 Pa jule' tak ulew chic xebenc'ot c'ua', xintij c'u ri ja' ri', ruc' ri u pa tak wakan xebentzajisaj tak ri nima' pa Ejipt.”" 
Isaiah37:26 ¿La ma ta c'u aweta'm chi in ri Ajawaxel, ri u chomam qui banic we jastak ri'? Kas ojer ulok nu chomam ulok qui banic we jastak ri', camic c'ut nu banom ri nu chomam ulok rumal ri' ri at casach qui wäch ri tinimit tak ri sutim quij che nimak tak tapia caban can jutak mulaj ch'akatak tak xan chque." 
Isaiah37:27 Ri winak ri e c'o chquipam man c'o ta qui chuk'ab e xibirib man caquich'ob ta quib, e uxinak k'ayes re ri juyub, e jacha' räx tak echa', jacha' ri k'ayes ri queq'uiy paquiwi' tak ri u xotil ri ja ri quec'atisax rumal ri quiakik' ri cäpe pa elebal k'ij." 
Isaiah37:28 In weta'm ronojel ri cabano, xukuje' ronojel ri cachomaj qui banic in weta'm chi yactajinak awoyowal chwij." 
Isaiah37:29 Rumal c'u rech chi weta'm chi c'o nimalaj awoyowal, xukuje' chi caban nimal, quincoj na jun quetequic ch'ich' che ri a tza'm, xukuje' quincoj jun jiq'uibal rij a wi' pa chi', quinban c'ut chi cätzelej pa ri be ri at petinak wi." 
Isaiah37:30 Xubij c'u ri Isaiy che ri Ezequiy: “Are' jun etal wa' che ri quec'ulmatajok: Pa we junab ri' xukuje' pa ri junab ri cäpetic are quitij na ri trico ri cäq'uiy pa re wi, pa ri urox junab c'ut cuya' quixticonijic xukuje' quiyac u wäch ri i tico'n, quebitic uva xukuje' quebitij c'ut ri qui wäch." 
Isaiah37:31 Ri aj Juda ri quec'asi' canok quebux na jacha' tico'n: cäbe na ri qui rab pa ri ulew quewächin c'u na," 
Isaiah37:32 quecanaj c'u na can quieb oxib pa Jerusalen pa ri juyub Sion c'o ri quec'asi' na canok. Are cäbanow na ri nimalaj lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. 
Isaiah37:33 Are wa' ri cuc'ulmaj na ri ajawinel re Asiriy cächa ri Ajawaxel: ‘Man coc ta na pa Jerusalen, mawi jun ch'ab cuq'uiak na chrij ri Jerusalen, man cäch'ojin ta na ruc' quetequic ch'ich' mawi cuyac na jun ch'ojibal chrij ri tinimit." 
Isaiah37:34 Pa ri be ri xpe wi, chila' cätzelej chi wi na man coc ta na chupam we tinimit ri'. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinya' ri nu tzij." 
Isaiah37:35 In quinto' na u wi' we tinimit ri' quincol c'u na, xa rumal u tok'obisaxic u wäch ri David ri pataninel wech, xukuje' rumal wech in.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:36 Xkaj c'u ulok ri u takom ri Ajawaxel xebucämisaj jun sient jumuch' ruc' job mil (185,000) achijab ajch'ojab re Asiriy aretak xsakar chucab k'ij e cäminak chic conojel." 
Isaiah37:37 Ri Senaquerib, ri ajawinel aj Asiriy, xebuc'am bic ri rajch'ojab ri man xecäm taj, xtzelej pa Ninibe." 
Isaiah37:38 Pa jun k'ij c'ut aretak cätajin cak'ijilan chupam ri rachoch ri u dios Nisroc, ri quieb u c'ojol, ri Adramelec xukuje' ri Sarezer, xebopanic xquicämisaj c'ut, xebanimaj c'u bic xequic'u' quib pa tak ri ulew re Ararat. Are c'u xcanaj can ri Esaradon che ajawinel che u q'uexel." 
Isaiah38:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xkaj ri Ezequiy che jun nimalaj yabil, are c'u ri Isaiy ri u c'ojol ri Amoz, xbe che rilic, xubij c'u che: “Cubij ri Ajawaxel: ‘Chabij canok jas ri cawaj cabij can chque ri e c'o pa ri awachoch, catcäm c'ut, man catcunataj taj.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Ri Ezequiy xutzolk'omij ri u palaj cho ri xan, xch'aw ruc' ri Ajawaxel, jewa' xubij:" 
Isaiah38:3 “Quinta' tok'ob che la Ajawaxel, chi chnataj che la chi sibalaj jic nu banom che patanixic la xukuje' ruc' ronojel wanima', xinban c'u ri cäkaj chwäch la.” Xuq'uis c'u rib che ok'ej." 
Isaiah38:4 Ri Ajawaxel xutak ri Isaiy 
Isaiah38:5 chi cäbec cubij che ri Ezequiy: “Ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri a mam David, cubij: ‘Ri in xinta' ri a bochi'nic xukuje' xinwil ri u wa'l a wäch. Quinya' chi c'u na olajuj junab a c'aslemal." 
Isaiah38:6 “Ri at xukuje' ri Jerusalen quixinwesaj na pa u k'ab ri ajawinel re Asiriy. Ri in quinchajij na we tinimit ri'.’ ” 
Isaiah38:7 Ri Isaiy xubij che: “Are' etal wa' cuc'ut ri Ajawaxel chawäch che u c'utic chi kas cubano jas ri xubij: 
Isaiah38:8 Pa ri u retabal k'ij ri Acaz, quinban na chi cätzelej lajuj juch' ri u mu'jal ri k'ij chrij.” Xtzelej c'u ri u mu'jal ri k'ij chrij, c'ä pa ri lajuj juch' ri u yo'm chi canok." 
Isaiah38:9 Aretak ri Ezequiy ri ajawinel aj Juda xutzir che ri u yabilal, xusuc'umaj we bix ri':" 
Isaiah38:10 In xinchomaj chi aretak sibalaj utz u banom ri nu c'aslemal rajawaxic quinbe na; xya' takanic chwe chi quinbe jawije' e c'o wi ri cäminakib pune' c'ä c'o na ri nu c'aslemal. 
Isaiah38:11 In xinchomaj chi man quinwil ta chi u wäch ri Ajawaxel cho we uwächulew ri', man quinwil ta chi u wäch jachin jun chque ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Isaiah38:12 Cäyojix ri wachoch, quesax chwe, jacha' ri cäban chque ri qui lic'om cäbal ri ajyuk'ab. Ri nu c'aslemal canok junam ruc' ri u quem jun ajquem, ri cäkopix pa ri quemabal. Chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab banom la chwe chi quinrik c'ax." 
Isaiah38:13 Ronojel ri jun ak'ab quinrak nu chi' je ta ne chi jun coj cätajin quebuwak ri nu bakil. Chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab nu rikom c'ax umal la. 
Isaiah38:14 Xak alicha' quinjilowic jacha' ri cäquiban ri xipicar, quinch'ikowic jacha' ri caquiban ri palomax. Ri nu bak'wäch quecos che ri ca'yem chicaj. Ajawaxel, nu rikom c'ax, chux la to'l wech." 
Isaiah38:15 ¿Jas ta c'u ri quincuin ta che u bixic che we ri are' are xbanowic? Man coc ta chi ri nu waram rumal ri u c'axc'ol ri nu c'aslemal. 
Isaiah38:16 Ri quechajix rumal ri Ajawaxel quec'asi' na, quinc'asi' c'u na in cuc' conojel wa'. Ri lal yo'm la rutzil nu wäch, tzelej chi la jumul ri nu c'aslemal." 
Isaiah38:17 Chilampe' la, che u q'uexwäch ri c'axc'ol, camic c'o jamaril wuc'. Ri lal xto' la ri nu c'aslemal chuwäch ri jul re sachbal wächaj, rumal rech chi e cuyum c'u la conojel ri nu mac." 
Isaiah38:18 Ri e c'o pa ri mukubal, man quecuin ta quek'ijilan che la, ri cäminakib man quecuin ta cäquiya' juluwem chech la, ri quekaj pa ri jul man quecuin ta cäqueyej ri jiquil la." 
Isaiah38:19 Xuwi ri e c'asc'oj quecuinic quek'ijilan che la jacha' ri quinban in camic. Ri tataxelab cäquitzijoj na chque ri calc'ual ri jiquil la. 
Isaiah38:20 Ri Ajawaxel c'o waral che nu to'ic. Ka k'ojomaj ri ka arp chujbixon c'ut conojel ri k'ij re ri ka c'aslemal chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. 
Isaiah38:21 Ri Isaiy xtakanic chi cheyok' quieb oxib higo re cäcoj che ri c'ax ri c'o che ri ajawinel, xcunataj c'u ri ajawinel." 
Isaiah38:22 Ri Ezequiy xuc'ot c'ut u chi' ri Isaiy: “¿Rumal jachique etal quinwetamaj chi ri Ajawaxel qui nu cunaj, xukuje' chi pa oxib k'ij quincuinic quinbe chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri ajawinel Merodac-baladan, u c'ojol ri Baladan, ajawinel aj Babilon, xuta' u tzijol chi xyawaj ri Ezequiy xukuje' xuta' u tzijol chi utzirinak chic, xebutak c'u ulok wuj che cumal jujun tako'nib xukuje' jun sipanic." 
Isaiah39:2 Xquicot c'u ri Ezequiy che ri copanic, xuc'ut ronojel ri u k'inomal chquiwäch: ri sak puak, ri k'an puak, ri e tak c'oc'al, ri utzalaj aseit, xukuje' ri e tanim wi ri e u ch'ojibal, xukuje' conojel ri jastak ri e u c'olom. Man c'o ta jun jasach ri c'o pa ri rachoch mawi ri c'o pa ronojel ri cätakan wi ri ma ta xuc'ut chquiwäch." 
Isaiah39:3 Xbe c'u ri Isaiy, ri k'axal u tzij ri Dios, che rilic ri Ezequiy, xuc'ot u chi' xubij che: “¿Jawije' xepe wi ri achijab ri', jas c'u ri xulquibij chawe?” Ri Ezequiy xubij: “E petinak pa jun najalaj ulew, pa Babilon e petinak wi.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Ri Isaiy xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jas c'u ri xquil chupam ri awachoch?” Ri Ezequiy xubij: “Xquil ronojel ri c'o chupam, man c'o ta jun jasach ri c'o wuc' ri ma ta xinc'ut chquiwäch.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Xubij c'u ri Isaiy che ri Ezequiy: “Chatampe' we tzij ri' ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Quepe na ri k'ij aretak ronojel ri c'o pa ri awachoch, xukuje' ronojel ri qui mulin ri e a mam ojer c'ä pa we k'ij camic, cäc'am na bic pa Babilon. Man c'o ta jas cäcanaj canok." 
Isaiah39:7 Xukuje' ne jujun chque ri e awija'lil quec'am na bic pa Babilon, quesax na ri qui cowil quecoj na che pataninelab pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel.’ ”" 
Isaiah39:8 Ri Ezequiy, xuchomaj chi pune' ta ba ne xak xuwi cäc'oji' jamaril, xukuje' jicomal joropa' junab cäc'asi na, xcha' che ri Isaiy: “Ri a yo'm u bixic chwe ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chawe, utz quinto.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Ri i Dios ix cubij: “Chicu'bisaj u c'u'x, chicu'bisaj u c'u'x ri nu tinimit;" 
Isaiah40:2 chich'abej ri Jerusalen pa utzil, chibij che chi ri patanijic ri e c'o wi q'uisnak u tza'm, chi xetojtaj ri u mac ri u banom, chi u c'amom chi pa nu k'ab ri u camul c'äjisabal wächaj rumal rech ronojel ri u mac.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Jun cowilaj ch'abal xtatajic: “Chisuc'umaj jun be che ri Ajawaxel pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, chijuch'u' jun jicomalaj be ri quiya', che ri ka Dios, pa ri ulew ri man cäwächin taj." 
Isaiah40:4 Chebinojisaj tak ri c'olbal ri e q'uiyinak wi aj, chebilianisaj tak ri juyub xukuje' ri e u tza'm tak juyub, ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi c'ache'laj xukuje' tanatak, chebililobisaj." 
Isaiah40:5 C'äte ri' cuc'ut na ri Ajawaxel ri u juluwem, conojel c'u ri winak junam cäquil na. Kas are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel yowinak u bixic.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Jun ch'abal cubij: “Charaka' a chi'.” Ri in xinbij: “¿Jas quinbij aretak quinrak nu chi'?” “Chi ronojel winak xak junam ruc' ri k'ayes, sibalaj co c'olic jacha' jun cotz'i'j re juyub." 
Isaiah40:7 Ri k'ayes cächaki'jaric xukuje' ri cotz'i'j cäyututiric aretak coc'ow ri ruxlab ri Ajawaxel paquiwi'. Kastzij ri winak xak e junam ruc' ri k'ayes. 
Isaiah40:8 Ri k'ayes cächaki'jaric xukuje' ri cotz'i'j cäyututiric, are c'u ri u tzij ri ka Dios man cäq'uextaj ta xak je wi amak'el.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Sion, chatpakal puwi' jun juyub, co chatch'awok, chaya' u bixic ri utzalaj tzij. Charaka' a chi' maxe'j awib Jerusalen, chaya' u bixic chque ri tinimit tak aj Juda: “¡Waral c'o wi ri i Dios!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Copan ri Ajawaxel ruc' cuinem, cätakan c'u na puwi' ronojel ruc' ri chuk'ab ri c'o pa u k'ab. Cuc'am ulok ri u tinimit aretak torotajinak chi rumal." 
Isaiah40:11 Cäpetic jacha' jun ajyuk' ri quebuchajij ri u chij quebuyac ri alaj tak chij, quebuk'aluj, quebuc'am bic cho u c'u'x, sibalaj coc il che qui chajixic ri c'äte xebalaxic." 
Isaiah40:12 ¿Jachin etaninak ri nimalaj plo ruc' ri u k'ab, o rajilam ri retabalil ri caj cuc' ri u wi' tak u k'ab? ¿Jachin yowinak ronojel ri u puc'uq'uil ri ulew pa jun tzima, o e u pajom pa pajbal ri e u tza'm tak juyub xukuje' tak ri e u tza'm tak ri c'ache'laj?" 
Isaiah40:13 ¿Jachin bininak che ri Ajawaxel chi man utz ta ri cubano, o jachin yowinak tijonic che?" 
Isaiah40:14 ¿Jachin xeyo'w no'j che xukuje' ch'obonic? ¿Jachin xc'utuw chuwäch ri u banic suc'alaj k'atoj tzij? ¿Jachin xtijon che ri etamanic? ¿Jachin xeyo'w tijonic che re no'j? 
Isaiah40:15 Che are' ri nimak tak tinimit xak e junam ruc' jutz'ut ja', jacha' jun u bak'wäch ulew chupam ri pajbal ri tinimit tak ri e c'o chupam tak ri plo xak e junam ruc' jun u bak'wäch sanyeb." 
Isaiah40:16 Pa ronojel ri Libano man quebubana' ta ri awaj che u chi'xic tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic, mawi ri si' che ri k'ak'." 
Isaiah40:17 Conojel ri nimak tak tinimit man c'o ta qui banic chuwäch; che ri are' man c'o ta jubik' qui k'ij. 
Isaiah40:18 ¿Jachin ruc' qui junamaj wi ix ri Dios? ¿Ruc' jachique wächbal qui c'utbej re ri u banic? 
Isaiah40:19 Jun josol dios cutac'aba' jun wächbal, jun ch'ayal puak cuch'uk rij che k'an puak xukuje' cuban jun u chachal re sak puak." 
Isaiah40:20 Ri cäbanow jun wächbal cucha' jun che' ri man cäk'ay taj, cutzucuj jun utzalaj ajchac ri cäna'w che u tac'abaxic rech man catzak taj." 
Isaiah40:21 ¿La ma ta iwetamam? ¿La ma ta i tom u tzijol? ¿La ma ta xtzijox chiwe kas pa ri tictajic? ¿La ma ta i ch'obom ulok kas aretak xban ri uwächulew? 
Isaiah40:22 Ri Dios c'o ri u tem re ajawibal puwi' ri caj ri c'o puwi' ri uwächulew, queril ri winak jacha' alaj tak sac' ri quech'opinic. Ri are' culic' ri caj jacha' jun ch'ukubal, culic' u wäch jacha' jun lic'om cäbal." 
Isaiah40:23 Ri are' cubano chque ri achijab ri nimak qui banic chi man c'o ta qui patan cusachisaj c'u qui wäch ri e c'amal tak be aj uwächulew. 
Isaiah40:24 Xak e junam cuc' ri alibaj tak tico'n ri c'äte qui tiquic, ri c'äte jubik' benak ri qui rab pa ri ulew. We ri Dios cuxlab paquiwi' queyututiric, quec'am c'u bic rumal ri salc'um jacha' pajo." 
Isaiah40:25 Ri Tastalicalaj Dios cubij: “¿Jachin ta ruc' quinijunamaj wi ix? ¿Jachin ta ri cäjunamataj wuc'?” 
Isaiah40:26 Chixca'yampe' chicaj, chiwila' c'ut: ¿Jachin xbanow ronojel wa'? Ri cujach qui wäch chquijujunal, conojel c'ut quebusiq'uij ruc' ri qui bi'. Sibalaj nim ri u cuinem xukuje' ri u chuk'ab, chi man c'o ta jun chque ma ta copanic." 
Isaiah40:27 Israel u tinimit ri Jacob, ¿jasche catch'ach'atic?, ¿jasche cabij: “Ri Ajawaxel man cunabej taj ri cätajin quinc'ulmaj ri Dios man coc ta il chwe?”" 
Isaiah40:28 ¿La xa pa u ma ta aweta'm? ¿La ma ta a tom? Ri Ajawaxel, ri junalic Dios, ri xbanow ronojel ri uwächulew, man cächukchub ta mawi cäcosic ri retamanic man c'o ta u q'uisic." 
Isaiah40:29 Ri are' cuya' u chuk'ab ri cosinak, are c'u ri tukar cuya' u wi' ri u chuk'ab." 
Isaiah40:30 Ri alabom quecosic xukuje' quetukaric, xukuje' ne ri sibalaj e co na quetzakic," 
Isaiah40:31 are c'u ri cäquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel cäc'aq'uir na ri qui chuk'ab amak'el, quecuinic querapapic jacha' ri cot quecuinic quexiq'uinic man quecos taj, quebinic man quetukar taj." 
Isaiah41:1 “C'o jas mibij chnuwäch, ulew tak ri ix c'o chupam ri plo. Nimak tak tinimit chiwika' tak iwib chicojo' ronojel ri i chuk'ab. Tisaj, rech cujtzijon puwi' we jasach ri' kamulij kib che u chomaxic." 
Isaiah41:2 ¿Jachin xbanowic chi xc'utun pa elebal k'ij we ajawinel ri' ri amak'el quel ulok ruc' ch'äcanem? ¿Jachin quejachow ri nimak tak tinimit pa u k'ab cuban c'ut chi ri ajawinelab caquimach' quib chuwäch, rech ruc' ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j xukuje' ri u q'uiakbal ch'ab quebujabuj c'ut jacha' ri pajo?" 
Isaiah41:3 ¿Jachin cäbanowic chi querokataj man c'o ta c'u latz' curiko je ta ne ri ma ta cunak ri be cuc' ri rakan? 
Isaiah41:4 ¿Jachin banowinak we chac ri'? ¿Jachin ri kas pa ri tiquiritajic u cholajim ulok ri u be ri tzijobelil? In, ri Ajawaxel, ri xuwi ri in in Dios, ri nabe xukuje' ri q'uisbal." 
Isaiah41:5 Ri ulew tak ri e c'o chupam ri plo xquilo xenoj c'u che xe'n ib xyicop ronojel ri uwächulew. Quenakajinic, nakaj chic e c'o wi.”" 
Isaiah41:6 Chquijujunal ri ajchaquib cäquitolaquib, cuya' chajin anima' che ri cachil." 
Isaiah41:7 Ri kolol dios cuya' chajin anima' che ri ch'ayal puak; ri cäbajinic cuya' chajin anima' che ri ch'ayal ch'ich', cubij c'ut we utz ri c'ojbal, co chabajij ri wächbal cuc' clawux rech man cäbak'otalob taj." 
Isaiah41:8 “Chattatabenok, Israel, u tinimit ri Jacob, ri pataninel wech, ri cha'tal wumal, tinimit ri e u k'ab tak rachalaxic ri Abraham ri junam nu wäch ruc':" 
Isaiah41:9 In xatinwesaj ulok chutza'm ri uwächulew, xatinwesaj ulok pa ri ch'akap ulew ri naj c'o wi, xinbij c'u chawe: ‘At pataninel we.’ Xatincha'o man wetzelam ta c'u a wäch." 
Isaiah41:10 Man caxe'j ta awib, in c'o c'u ne awuc' maxibij awib, in c'ut in a Dios. In quinyo'w a chuk'ab, in catinto', catintok'ej ruc' ri colomalaj nu k'ab."
