Jeremiah44:13 Quinc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri quejeki' pa Ejipt jacha' ri xinban che u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri Jerusalen, ruc' ri ch'o'j, ri wi'jal xukuje' ri cämisanel yabil." 
Jeremiah44:14 Man c'o ta jun chque ri quieb oxib ri xeto'taj can pa Juda ri xepe che jekelem pa Ejipt, cäto'taj taj o cäc'asi' ta canok. Pune' ta ne are ta cacaj quetzelej ta chi pa Juda rech quebejekel ta chi chila' man quetzelej taj, xane' xuwi jujun ri xa' chi c'uyal queboquic.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:15 E are' tak c'ut, ri queta'm chi ri quixokilal quequichi'j c'oc' k'ol chque tak diosib, xukuje' tak ri ixokib ri e c'o apan chila', ri e nimalaj jumulaj wa' chi conojel, xukuje' c'u ri aj judeyib ri e jekel pa ri u mox ri Ejipt, xquitzelej u bixic che ri Jeremiy:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Man catkatatabej taj che ri cabij chke pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel. 
Jeremiah44:17 Je c'u ri', cäkatakej na u banic ri chomatajinak u banic kumal. Cäkatakej na u chi'xic c'oc' k'ol xukuje' tak sipanic re u wa'l uva che ri Ajawinel Ixok dios re ri Caj, jacha' ri ka takem ulok u banic c'ä camic xukuje' jacha' ri xequiban ri e ka mam xukuje' tak ri e ka ajawinelab xukuje' xquiban ri e c'amal tak be chquipam ri tinimit tak re Juda xukuje' pa tak ri u xo'l tak ri ja pa Jerusalen. Are c'u ri nabe canok tz'ebetal ri cäkatijo, utz c'u quel ronojel chkawäch man xpe ta c'u jun quiäkasakil pakawi';" 
Jeremiah44:18 kas aretak c'ut xkatanaba' u chi'xic c'oc' k'ol xukuje' tak sipanic re u wa'l uva che ri Ajawinel Ixok re ri Caj, man c'o ta chi ronojel ri cäkatijo, ri e ka winak quecäm rumal wi'jal o pa ri ch'o'j.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Ri ixokib xquitik u bixic: “Ri uj quekaban can lej nabe ri quequiq'uexwächij ri Ajawinel Ixok re ri Caj, quekachi'j c'u c'oc' k'ol che xukuje' tak sipanic re u wa'l uva, ronojel c'u wa' xquiya' c'u qui tzij tak ri kachajilal che u banic ronojel wa. Cakatakej c'u na u banic.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Are c'u ri Jeremiy xutzelej u bixic chque conojel ri achijab xukuje' conojel ri ixokib ri je xquitzelej u bixic wa' che: 
Jeremiah44:21 “¿La are c'u pa i c'u'x chi ri Ajawaxel man cäretamaj taj, o chi xsach pa u jolom, chi ri ix xukuje' ri e i mam, ri e iwajawinelab ri e c'amal tak i be xukuje' ri tinimit chnimalaj conojel, quequichi'j c'oc' k'ol chque tak diosib chquipam tak ri tinimit aj Juda xukuje' xo'l tak ri ja pa Jerusalen?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel man xcuin ta chi che qui coch'ic ri itzel tak banoj ri xebibano ri sibalaj itzel querilo. Rumal quech wa' ri iwulew c'o pa yojyobic camic ri man c'o ta c'u jun cäjeki' ta chupam; uxinak c'utbal re c'okotajic, pa jun jasach ri cuya' xibriquil." 
Jeremiah44:23 We quiäkasakil ri' ri quixriktaj tak wi camic petinak wa' piwi' rumal rech chi xebichi'j c'oc' k'ol chque jule' tak diosib, macunic c'u wa' xiban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' rumal rech chi man xebequinimaj taj ri e u pixbenic xukuje' tak ri pixab, mawi xebequitz'akatisaj tak ri e u takanic.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Xubij chi c'ut ri Jeremiy che ronojel ri tinimit, kas c'u ne are chque tak ri ixokib: “Chitatabej we tzijol ri' ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chiwe, winak aj Juda ri jekel pa Ejipt." 
Jeremiah44:25 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel, je cubij wa': ‘Ix ri ix ixokib quibij cuc' ri i chi' quiban c'ut ri quibij. Ix quixcha' chi i chi'm u chi'xic c'oc' k'ol xukuje' tak sipanic re u wa'l uva che ri Ajawinel Ixok re ri Caj, qui tz'akatisaj c'u na ri i chi'm. ¡Utz ba' ri', chi tz'akatisaj chibana' c'ut ri i chi'm u banic!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Chi tatabej ix iwonojel, winak re Juda ri ix jekel pa Ejipt, ri in, ri Ajawaxel Dios quinbij chiwe: Quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri nimalaj nu bi' chi mawi jun chque ri aj Juda quebel ta chi na ulok ri nu bi' pa u chi' pa ronojel Ejipt, cacha' ta c'ut: Rumal ri u c'aslemal ri Ajawaxel." 
Jeremiah44:27 Quinchajin c'u na rech are quebentak bic ri c'axc'ol piwi' man c'u e utzilal taj. Conojel ri aj Juda ri e jekel pa Ejipt cachupisax na qui wäch conojel rumal ri ch'o'j, o ri wi'jal." 
Jeremiah44:28 Xak e ajilatalic ri queto'tajic ri man quecäm ta pa ri ch'o'j ri caquiya' can ri Ejipt ri quetzelej pa Juda. Je c'u ri' conojel ri ecanajinak can pa Juda ri xepe c'u che jekelem pa Ejipt, cäquil na jachique tak tzij ri xetz'akatic we e are' ri wech in, o e are' ri quech e are'." 
Jeremiah44:29 In ri Ajawaxel, quenya' na we etal ri' chiwe che u c'utic chi ri e nu cojow tak xi'b quebantaj na, xukuje' chi quenc'äjisaj na i wäch chupam we ulew ri':" 
Jeremiah44:30 In quinjach na ri paraon Opra, ajawinel re Ejipt, pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ulel ri e cämel, je jacha' ri u jachic ri Sedequiy, ajawinel re Juda, pa u k'ab ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, ri cämelalaj u c'ulel.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Chupam ri ucaj junab ri rajawinic ri Joasim, u c'ojol ri Josiy, ajawinel re Juda, aretak ri Baruc ri u c'ojol ri Neriy, cutz'ibaj ri cätajin cubij ri Jeremiy, ri k'axal tzij, xubij ri Jeremiy che ri Baruc:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “At, Baruc, catcha': ‘¡Tok'ob nu wäch! ¡Ri Ajawaxel man c'o ta jas ri cuya' ta chwe xane' e oquem tak il c'o xukuje' tak k'oxomal! In ch'ibatajinak che ok'ej man quinrik ta c'u jubik' cu'lbal c'uxaj.’ Cubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri cac'ulmaj na," 
Jeremiah45:3  
Jeremiah45:4 quinutak c'ut chi quinbij chawe: ‘In quinyojij ri xinwoco, xukuje' quinbok ri xintiquiba'. Je c'u quenbana' che ronojel ri uwächulew." 
Jeremiah45:5 ¿La are cawaj catz'onoj jun jasach chawe ri jalanic? Matz'onoj c'ut, rumal rech chi quebentaka' c'u na ulok tak c'axc'olil paquiwi' conojel ri winak. Quinya' c'u na chawe chi man c'o ta cataklebej na apawije' ta ne ri catbe wi. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixixic.’”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' u bixic che ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij ri caquic'ulmaj na ri nimak tak tinimit. 
Jeremiah46:2 Are tzijol wa' ri xuya', che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Ejipt, are c'u kas are na che ri caquic'ulmaj na ri rajch'ojab ri paraon Necao, ajawinel re Ejipt, ri cariktaj pa Carquems, chuxcut ri nima' Euprats, ri xch'äc rumal ri Nabucodonosor ajawinel re Babilon chupam ri ucaj junab re ri rajawinic ri Joasim, u c'ojol ri Josiy, ajawinel re Juda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “¡Chebiwuc'aj tak ri e i quetecak ch'ich'! ¡Chiya' che ri ch'o'j! 
Jeremiah46:4 ¡Chebicojo' tak quiejebal chquij ri quiej! ¡Chequiejen tak ri ajquiejab! ¡Chebequicojo' ri to'bal tak qui jolom chequicholajij c'u tak quib! ¡Chequibana' tz'imaj che tak ri qui wi' ri tz'imaj ch'ich'! ¡Chebicojo' ri to'bal tak uwo c'u'x! 
Jeremiah46:5 ¿Jas c'ut ri cätajin quinwilo? Quetzelej chquij e nojinak che xibriquil. Ri e rajch'ojab caquijabula' tak quib e ch'äcatajinak; quexiq'uinic quebanimajic, man queca'y ta can chquij. ¡C'o xibriquil pa conojel tak ri c'olbal! In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah46:6 ¡Man quecuin taj quebanimaj ri sibalaj quebanic, mawi queto'taj ri sibalaj c'o qui chuk'ab! Pa ri iquiak'ab, chuxucut ri Euprats caquipuq'uila' tak quib quetzak c'ut." 
Jeremiah46:7 ¿Jachin wa' ri caq'uiyic jacha' ri Nil, jacha' jun nima' ri sibalaj cäwolkotic?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Are' ri Ejipt ri caq'uiyic jacha' ri Nil, jacha' jun nima' ri sibalaj cäwolkotic. Ri Ejipt je cubij wa': ‘Quineq'uiyok quenchemowisaj ri ulew, quebensachisaj qui wäch tak ri tinimit xukuje' tak ri winak ri e c'o chquipam.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 ¡Chenabej tak ri ajquiejab! ¡Chetaken tak ri carwaj! ¡Chiquitakej qui be ri ajch'ojab: ri ajch'ojab aj Etiopiy xukuje' ri e rech Libiy checuc'aj tak ri qui quetecak ch'ich'; ri ajch'ojab re Lidiy, ri quena'w che u cojic ri q'uiakbal ch'ab!" 
Jeremiah46:10 Are wa' ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri k'ij ri cuya' rajil u q'uexelal chque ri e u c'ulel. Ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j casocon na c'ä cak'abar na rumal ri quic'. Are c'u ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuban na jun cämisanic pa ri ulew re ri iquiak'ab, chunakaj ri Euprats." 
Jeremiah46:11 ¡Tinimit re Ejipt, Jät pa Galaad che u tzucuxic cunabal! ¡Pune' c'u caq'uis awib che qui cojic tak cunabal, man c'o ta quequipatanij na chawe, man e c'o ta c'u cunabal chawe!" 
Jeremiah46:12 Ri nimak tak tinimit queta'm chic chi at mach'irisam chic, pa ronojel c'ut ri uwächulew cätatajic chi carak a chi'; caquipuq'uila' tak quib ri ajch'ojab, junam c'ut queliq'ui' can cho tak ri ulew.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Jeremiy, k'axal tzij, aretak ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, chpe che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Ejipt:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Chiya' u bixic pa Ejipt, pa Migdol, pa Memps xukuje' pa Tapnes: ‘¡Chbanwalijem, xak chixeyenok! ¡Ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j cätajin cäcämisan chinakaj!’" 
Jeremiah46:15 ¿Jasche xanimaj ri Apis, ri ama' a wacax ri tastalic? ¿Jasche man xcuintaj co ta xtaq'ui'c? In c'ut, ri Ajawaxel, in xinch'iquimin bic." 
Jeremiah46:16 Ri e awajch'ojab cäquipuq'uila' tak quib, quetzak c'ut, caquibila' c'u chquibil tak quib: ‘¡Chujel bic waral, chujtzelej pa ri ka tinimit, chupam ri ulew ri xujalax wi! ¡Chujanimaj chuwäch ri cämisanelalaj ch'o'j!’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Chicojo' we yok'obal ri' chrij ri paraon, ri ajawinel re Ejipt: ‘Sibalaj cawojojic, xak xuya' c'u c'olbal xopan ri k'ijol.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 In, chi in ri ajawinel, Ajawaxel c'ut ri nu bi' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri nu c'aslemal: Jacha' ri Tabor ri walijinak chquixo'l tak ri juyub, xukuje' jacha' ri Carmel, walijinak puwi' ri plo, je u banic wa' ri c'ulel ri cäpe na." 
Jeremiah46:19 Chisuc'umaj iwib che ri i wesaxic bic pa ri iwulew, aj ejiptib, are c'u ri Memps caq'uextaj na cux na chaki'j uwo sak, pa etzeletajic ri mawi jun cajeki' ta na chupam." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ri Ejipt ri je ta ne jun je'licalaj ati't wacax, queletzop c'u rumal jun alaj amalo aj ri riquiak'ab ri relebal k'ij che u tzopic." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ri e rajch'ojab ri xa' e u mocom e jacha' alaj tak ama'ib wacax ri quek'onk'otic, xukuje' c'u ne ri e are' quebanimajic man quecuin ta c'ut co ta caquitac'aba' quib, opaninak c'ut ri k'ij re ri u sachisaxic qui wäch, ri k'ijol re ri u c'äjisaxic qui wäch." 
Jeremiah46:22 Ri Ejipt caxulk'ubic canimajic jacha' jun cumätz aretak chenakajin ri e banal tak ch'o'j, icäj c'ut quequicämisabej quech ri je ta ne quet'oy juwi tak che'." 
Jeremiah46:23 ¡Quequikasaj na ri k'ekumalaj tak qui c'ache'laj! In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic. C'o na ri cajilabal chquiwäch tak ri sac', man c'o ta jun cäcuin ta che cajilaxic." 
Jeremiah46:24 Ri Ejipt cämach'irisax na, cäkaj c'u na pa u k'ab ri tinimit re ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel, je cubij wa: “Quenc'äjisaj u wäch ri Amon, ri u dios ri Tebs, ri Ejipt e rachil tak ri e u diosib xukuje' tak ri e rajawinelab, xukuje' ri paraon xukuje' ri caquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij." 
Jeremiah46:26 Quinban na chi quekaj na pa qui k'ab ri e cämel tak qui c'ulel, pa u k'ab ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u winak. Coc'ow c'u na jun k'ijol, ri Ejipt canoj chi na cumal winak jacha' ri nabe canok. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Maxe'j awib u tinimit ri Jacob, pataninel wech; man caxe'j ta awib, Israel. Ri at xukuje' ri e awalc'ual quixinto'tajisaj na quixinwesaj na pa u k'ab we najalaj ulew ri' ri ix yo'm chupam. Catjeki' chi na pa jamaril, man c'o ta c'u jachin catslabenic, man c'o ta c'u jachin catxibinic." 
Jeremiah46:28 In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic: Maxe'j awib u tinimit ri Jacob, pataninel wech, rumal rech chi ri in in c'o awuc'. Quinsachisaj na qui wäch conojel ri nimak tak tinimit ri xatinjabuj chquixo'l. Are c'u ri at man quinsachisaj ta a wäch; xuwi catinjic' na jas ri rajawaxic chawe; man catinya' ta c'u can xak chi jeri' we ta mat quinc'äjisaj na a wäch.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Are tzijol wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Jeremiy, ri k'axal tzij che ri caquic'ulmaj na ri aj pilisteyib, c'ä majok chi ch'ojin ri paraon ruc' ri Gaz:" 
Jeremiah47:2 “In, ri Ajawaxel, quinbij: Pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij cäpe wi na jun bik'tajic jacha' jun nima' ri capulinic; cubik' na ri ulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chupam, ri tinimit tak xukuje' conojel ri e jekel chquipam. Conojel ri e u winakil ri ulew caquirak qui chi', ri winak quejuyuw na rumal ri k'oxom." 
Jeremiah47:3 Aretak quequita' ri e qui poc'opetem tak ri u pa cakan tak ri quiej, ri qui tininem tak ri carwaj xukuje' ri qui wojojem tak ri quetet, quetuktub ri tataxelab quequitzak c'u can tak ri calc'ual." 
Jeremiah47:4 Xopan c'u ri k'ij che u sachisaxic qui wäch ri aj pilisteyib, che quesaxic che ri Tir xukuje' ri Sidon ri to'l tak quech ri c'ä e canajinak. Je, ri Ajawaxel cusachisaj qui wäch ri aj pilisteyib, ri xebel ulok pa ri ulew ri c'o chupam ri plo re Cret." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ri winak re Gaz caquiban na tol che ri qui jolom, ri winak aj Ascalon quememer na. Q'uisbal qui tz'akatil tak ri ojer tac'atak tak achijab, ¿C'ä jampa' lo ri quebasoc ri a ti'jal che u c'utic ri k'oxomal?" 
Jeremiah47:6 ¡Ay u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri Ajawaxel! ¿Jampa' cak'il awib? ¡Chatoc chic chupam ri c'olbal awib, chatmatzalok xak jun chatc'ol wi!" 
Jeremiah47:7 ¿Jas ta c'ut ri cubano cacuinic cämatzic we are' ri Ajawaxel yowinak ri takanic che, we u yo'm u takquil chi cäch'ojin ruc' ri Ascalon xukuje' ronojel ri tak'aj?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Tzijol ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel, che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Moab: “¡Tok'ob a wäch tinimit Neb, yojyobinak chi c'ut! ¡Ri Quiriataim xmajixic xukuje' xmach'irisaxic! ¡Ri u chuk'ab xt'akix pa ulew!" 
Jeremiah48:2 Xq'uis ri nimarisabal u k'ij ri Moab. Pa Esbon ri c'ulel cätajin quequiban chomanic rech casach u wäch ri Moab, jacha' nim tinimit. Xukuje' at Madmen, cachupisax na a wäch, are c'u ri ch'o'j man cutanaba' ta u cojic a xib." 
Jeremiah48:3 Chupam ri Horonaim quebel ulok rakoj tak chi'aj: ‘¡Etzeletajic xukuje' nimalaj yojyobic!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 Ri Moab c'o pa etzeletajic; ri rakoj tak chi'aj re k'oxomal quebopan c'ä pa Zoar. 
Jeremiah48:5 Cuc' u wa'l tak wächaj chi' tak bak'wäch, quepaki' puwi' ri juyub re Luhit; caquirak qui chi' rumal re k'oxomal chuwäch ri c'ulmatajic ri quekaj bic pa Horonaim." 
Jeremiah48:6 ¡Chixanimajok! ¡Chuto'tajisaj rib ri cäcuinic! ¡Chebux jacha' ri quemom q'uix pa ri chaki'j uwo sak! 
Jeremiah48:7 Moab, at a cuban a c'u'x chrij ri a chuk'ab xukuje' chquij tak ri e a k'inomal, xukuje' c'u ri at catmajix na. Ri a dios Quemos cac'am na bic pa jun ulew chic, e rachil tak ri e u cojol tak tabal u tok'ob xukuje' ri winak ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ri yojyobic copan na pa conojel ri tinimit tak, mawi ta c'u ne jun cato'taj ta canok; ri beya' xukuje' ri u wi juyub quecanaj pa etzeletajic. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah48:9 Chitz'ibaj ri u bi' ri Moab chi cäminak chic quesachisax c'u na u wäch; ri u tinimit tak quecanaj can pa etzeletajic man c'o ta c'u jun winak cacanaj ta chupam.” 
Jeremiah48:10 (¡C'okom ri xak quieb ranima' cuban ri chac ri takom che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel Dios! ¡C'okom ri man cuya' u tzij che u banic ri cämisanic!) 
Jeremiah48:11 Ri Moab amak'el c'olinak pa jamaril, mawi jumul c'amom bic pa jun ulew chic. Xak junam ruc' ri u wa'l uva ri cäya' c'olbal che cäkaj u xe', ri man cäjamix taj pa jun c'olbal chic, rumal ri' mawi jubik' cutzak ta ri u na'il mawi ri u c'oc'al." 
Jeremiah48:12 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Copan na ri k'ij chi quebentak winak chi chquijamij ri u wa'l uva chquipam jule' tak c'olbal chic, e are tak c'ut ri c'olbal ri e jamajobinak canok chequimuchu'." 
Jeremiah48:13 Are c'u ri Moab cuch'ob na rib chi xa xäsub rumal ri u dios Quemos, jacha' ri xuban ri Israel chi xa xäsub rumal ri Betel, ri u jiquiban u c'u'x chrij." 
Jeremiah48:14 Mubij ri Moab: ‘sibalaj uj cowilaj tak winak, ajch'ojab ri sibalaj c'o qui chuk'ab.’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Opanem cuban ri yojil rech ri Moab xukuje' tak ri e u tinimit; ri e u c'ojolab ri kas e je'l na quec'am na. Cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawinel, ri are u bi', ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem." 
Jeremiah48:16 Ri c'ulmatajic che ri Moab canakajinic, ri quiäkasakil xa' jubik' man cäkaj puwi'." 
Jeremiah48:17 C'ulja tak re Moab, xukuje' conojel ri queta'm chi elinak u tzijol, chcok'ej u wäch quibij c'ut: ‘¡Chiwila' chi xyojyob ri u cuinem ri sibalaj co ri sibalaj yo'm u k'ij!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Chatkaj ulok, chaya' can ri a t'uyulibal ri nim u k'ij tinimit re Dibon, chatt'uyul chupam ri chaki'j ulew, rumal rech chi ri yojil rech ri Moab canakajin chawe, e u yojim c'ut ri to'bal tak awib." 
Jeremiah48:19 Tinimit re Aroer, chattac'al pa u xcut ri be chatca'y c'ut; chac'oto' qui chi' ri xec'asi' canok jas ri xc'ulmatajic." 
Jeremiah48:20 Mach'irisatajinak ri Moab, nojinak che xibriquil. ¡Chiwok'ej u wäch rumal ri k'oxomal! ¡Chiwesaj u tzijol pa ri nima' Arnon sachisam u wäch ri Moab!”" 
Jeremiah48:21 Xopan ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri yo'm u bixic chi caquic'ulmaj na ri tinimit tak ri e c'o paquiwi' tak ri juyub: ri Holon, ri Jahaz, ri Mepaat," 
Jeremiah48:22 ri Dibon, ri Neb, ri Bet-diblataim," 
Jeremiah48:23 ri Quiriataim, ri Bet-gamul, ri Bet-meon," 
Jeremiah48:24 ri Queriot, ri Bosra xukuje' conojel ri tinimit tak re Moab, ri e c'o nakaj xukuje' ri e c'o naj." 
Jeremiah48:25 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Ri u chuk'ab ri Moab paxtajinak, xukuje' ri u cuinem sachisam u wäch.”" 
Jeremiah48:26 Chi k'abarisaj ri Moab, rumal rech chi xuwalijisaj rib chrij ri Ajawaxel. Cuwolkotila' c'u na rib ri Moab chupam ri u xo'j xa' c'u cätzex chi u wäch cumal conojel." 
Jeremiah48:27 Moab, ¿La ma ta pu xatze'j u wäch ri Israel catyok'on c'u che ruc' etzelam wächaj, jacha' ta ne are' ta jun eläk'om?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Chebitzaka' can tak ri aj Moab ri ix jekel chquipam; Chixejekel paquiwi' tak ri abaj pa tak ri juyub ix jacha' ta ne palomax ri quequiban qui soc tza'm tak ri siwan. 
Jeremiah48:29 Keta'm ri nimalaj nimal ri cac'amow ri Moab: chi man c'o ta jun jacha' ri are man cakaj ta jubik. 
Jeremiah48:30 Xukuje' ri Ajawaxel reta'm ri yacoj oyowal ri cubano, ri u rok'ok'em xukuje' tak ri e u c'anal." 
Jeremiah48:31 Rumal ri' quinok' na xukuje' quinjuyuw na rumal ronojel ri tinimit Moab xukuje' cumal ri achijab re Kir-hars. 
Jeremiah48:32 Quinwok'ej na a wäch, ticbal uva re Sibma, c'o na chuwäch ri rok'exic ri Jazer ri xbanic. Ri e ak'ab tak quebe oc'ow c'ä jela' che ri plo quebopan c'u c'ä pa Jazer. Are c'u ri camic ri e a uva ri c'amaja' cayac qui wäch e etzeletajinak chic." 
Jeremiah48:33 Man quetataj ta chic ri rakoj tak chi'aj re jajatem chquipam tak ri ticbal cotz'i'j re Moab. Ri u wa'l uva q'uisnak pa tak ri c'olbal. Man c'o ta chi jachin quepitz'len tak ri uva, man e c'o ta chic bix re quicotemal." 
Jeremiah48:34 Ri winak re Esbon caquirak qui chi' rumal ri k'oxomal, ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj quebopan c'ä pa Eleal xukuje' pa Jahaz, kas c'u pa Zoar c'ä pa Horonaim xukuje' c'ä pa Eglat-selisiy, e tzajtzobinak c'u ne tak ri e u q'uiyibal tak ja' ri e c'o pa Nimrim." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “In quinsachisaj na qui wäch ri winak ri e c'o pa Moab ri quepaki' paquiwi' tak ri juyub, che qui k'ijilaxic diosib, che qui chi'xic tabal tak tok'ob xukuje' c'oc' k'ol chque tak ri e qui diosib.”" 
Jeremiah48:36 Rumal ri' cajuyuw ri wanima' che ri Moab xukuje' chque ri winak aj Kir-hars jacha' u juyuwem u k'ojom cäminak, ri k'inomal tak ri e u mulin sachinak qui wäch." 
Jeremiah48:37 Ronojel jolomaj banom tol che xukuje' ronojel ismachi'aj kopim; conojel e qui banom tak socotajic chque tak ri qui k'ab e quicojom c'u wakwoj tak atz'iak chquij. 
Jeremiah48:38 “Paquiwi' conojel tak ri ja re Moab xukuje' pa conojel ri e u xo'l tak ri ja xak xuwi juyuwem quetatajic, rumal rech chi xinmuch ri Moab jacha' jun lak ri man c'o ta cajwataj wi. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah48:39 ¡Chi juyuwej ri Moab! ¡Chi nojinak che xibriquil! ¡Are xuya' can ri rij xuresaj u q'uixbal! Xux jun xibibalalaj jasach ri quetzelex u wäch cumal conojel ri c'ulja. 
Jeremiah48:40 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “Ri u c'ulel ri Moab cuq'uiak rib chrij jacha' jun cot ri e u liq'uiq'uem ri e u xic'. 
Jeremiah48:41 Tinimit tak xukuje' to'bal tak ib quekaj na pa u k'ab ri c'ulel. Chupam ri k'ij ri' ri e banal tak u ch'o'j ri Moab quebirbit na jacha' jun yawab ixok. 
Jeremiah48:42 Ri Moab man cux ta chic nim tinimit, rumal rech chi xuwalijisaj rib chwij, chrij ri Ajawaxel." 
Jeremiah48:43 Rumal ri' in, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic: Ri e aj Moab quebux na e jacha' awaj ri quetzucux cumal ri tzucul tak quech o xak quieb cubij paquiwi' quebetzak chupam jun jul o quebekaj chupam jun c'amibal." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ri man cäkaj ta pa qui k'ab ri tzucunelab cätzak na chupam jun jul, are c'ut ri quel ulok chupam ri jul quekaj na chupam ri c'amibal, rumal rech chi ri in quinc'am na ulok puwi' ri Moab ri k'ijol re ri c'äjisabal u wäch. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah48:45 E c'o jujun quebanimajic rumal chi man c'o ta chi qui chuk'ab, quequitzucuj u to'ic quib pa ri u mujal ri Esbon; are c'u ri Esbon, ri u tinimit ri ajawinel Sehon, canicow pa k'ak' culic' c'u rib ri k'ak' quebukawisaj c'u tak ri e u juyub ri Moab, we tinimit ri' ri yojinel." 
Jeremiah48:46 ¡Tok'ob a wäch Moab! ¡U tinimit ri Quemos, a c'ulmam ri tzakmajic! ¡Ri e a c'ojol xukuje' ri e a mia'l quec'am na bic pa jun ulew chic!" 
Jeremiah48:47 Chuq'uisbalil c'ut quinq'uex na ri cutaklebej ri Moab; in, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic.” Are c'äjisabal wächaj wa' ri cuc'am ulok ri Ajawaxel puwi' ri Moab." 
Jeremiah49:1 Tzijol ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Amon: “¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri e ralc'ual ri Israel? ¿Jawije' tak e c'o wi ri e rechbenelab? ¿Jasche ri dios Milcom are' ajchak'e ri Gad camic? ¿Jasche e are' ri aj amonib e jekel chquipam ri qui tinimit tak? 
Jeremiah49:2 Je ba' ri', in, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic: Chi copan na ri k'ij chi quinban na chi ri tinimit Amon aj Raba cutatabej na rakoj chi'aj re ch'o'j; cux c'u na pa jun jumulaj yojyobic, e are tak c'ut ri e u tinimit quenicowisax na rumal k'ak'. Chi' c'ut ri Israel quebutokij chi na ri u tinimit tak. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:3 ¡Chatch'ikowok, Hesbon, are c'u ri Hai sachinak chic u wäch! ¡Chibana' juyuwem, ixokib tak re Raba! ¡Chebicojo' tak iwatz'iak re bisobal, chit'oco' ri uwo i c'u'x! ¡Chixxiq'uinok je ta ne ix ch'ujab, chisoco' ri i cuerp! Rumal rech chi ri dios Milcom cac'am bic queyok pa jun ulew chic, querachilaj ri e u cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' winak ri nimak qui banic." 
Jeremiah49:4 ¿Jasche caban nimal chi c'o a chuk'ab? Ri a chuk'ab queq'uisok, tinimit culelanel, a cuban a c'u'x chquij tak ri k'inomal ri a mulin cabij c'ut: ‘¿Jachin ta lo ri cäch'ojin wuc'?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Chaweyej na, pa ronojel c'olbal quintak ulok xibriquil pawi'. In, ri Ajawaxel, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem quinjiquiba' u bixic chi chijujunal ix quixanimaj na pa apachique c'olbal ri qui riko, man c'o ta c'u jachin jun ri quixmulin ta chic." 
Jeremiah49:6 Quinq'uex c'u na ri quequitaklebej ri aj amonib. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Tzijol ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Edom: “¿La man c'o ta chi no'j pa Teman? ¿La man queta'm ta chic jas caquiban ri c'o quetamanic? ¿La xetzeletaj ri qui no'j? 
Jeremiah49:8 ¡Aj Dedan, quixxiq'uinic chixel bic, je i c'u tak iwib! Rumal rech chi quinsachisaj u wäch ri u tinimit ri Esau; opaninak ri k'ij che u c'äjisaxic u wäch." 
Jeremiah49:9 Aretak quemac tak ri uva, queya' can jutak tzayaj; aretak quepe ri eläk'omab chak'ab xuwi caquic'am bic ri cajwataj chque." 
Jeremiah49:10 Are c'u ri in nu tolobam can ri u tinimit ri Esau, ri caquic'u' wi quib e nu yo'm chisak man quecuin ta chi c'ut caquic'u' ta chi quib. Ri e calc'ual, ri e cachalaxic xukuje' tak ri e qui c'ultakja, conojel xsachisax qui wäch; man c'o ta jachin jun xcanajic ri cubij taj:" 
Jeremiah49:11 ‘Chebaya' can ri e a minorib chwe rech quebenchajij. Qui cuba' qui c'u'x ri e a malca'nib chwij.’ ” 
Jeremiah49:12 Je c'u wa cubij ri Ajawaxel: “We ri winak ri man takal ta u c'äjisaxic qui wäch, cäcuq'uiaj c'u na ri c'äjisabal qui wäch, man cuya' ta c'ut chi catcanaj ta at chi ma ta chc'äjisax a wäch, xane' cawuq'uiaj na awech." 
Jeremiah49:13 In, ri Ajawaxel, quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, quincha' pa nu bil wib: Ri tinimit re Bosra cux na canok jun chaki'j uwo sak, pa etzeletajic, jun c'utbal re mach'irisanic xukuje' c'okotajic, are c'u ri niq'uiaj tak tinimit chic quecanaj pa etzeletajic chbe k'ij sak.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Opaninak jun tzijol wuc' rumal ri Ajawaxel; jun ya'l tzijol cätajin cuya' u bixic chque ri nimak tak tinimit: “¡Chimulij iwib jixech'ojin ruc' ri Edom! ¡Chisuc'umaj iwib che u banic ri ch'o'j! 
Jeremiah49:15 In quinban na chawe chi catux na sibalaj ch'utin chquixo'l tak ri tinimit, ri sibalaj etzelam u wäch chquixo'l tak ri winak." 
Jeremiah49:16 Xaya' awib pa subic rumal ri nimal ri catc'amowic, rumal rech chi caya' xibriquil. At jekel chquixo'l ri paxinak tak abaj, a chapom awib che tak ri qui wi' tak ri juyub. Pune' c'u sibalaj chicaj caya' wi ri a soc jacha' ri cot, chila' catinkasaj wi ulok. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ri u sachisaxic u wäch ri Edom sibalaj nim na chi cuya' na xe'n ib. Ronojel ri coc'ow chila' cuxibij na rib aretak cäril ri c'äjisabal wächaj," 
Jeremiah49:18 je c'u cäcanajic jacha' ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor xukuje' ri e c'ulja tak tinimit, aretak xsachisax qui wäch. Man c'o ta chi jun cätzelej ta chi che jekelem chila', mawi ta ne xa' ta che quieb oxib k'ij. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinyo'w u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:19 Xäk c'ätetal quinpe na, jacha' jun coj ri quel ulok chquipam tak ri patzapak tak k'ayes ri e c'o chuchi' ri Jordan cuq'uiak c'u rib pa tak ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi echa' ri amak'el quetojtatic, quinban c'u na chi quebanimaj ri aj Edom ri e c'o chi', quinban c'u na chi are cajawin na ri winak ri quincha' na. ¿Jachin ta c'ut ri cäcuinic ri cujunamaj ta rib wuc'? ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic quinuc'ulelaj taj? ¿Jachin ta ri yuk'unel ri cäcuin ta che u k'atixic nu wäch?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Chitatabej ri chomanic ri in, ri Ajawaxel, ri nu suc'umam ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Edom, ri quintakej na u banic chque ri e c'o pa Teman: xukuje' ne ri alaj tak ama'ib chij ri sibalaj c'ä e ch'utik na quequic'am na bic, kas e are tak c'ut ri yuk'bal queban can c'ax chque." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ri u tzakic ri Edom sibalaj co na ri ok'ibal ri cubano, chi caslab na ri ulew rumal; curak na u chi' cutz'onoj to'banic, ri e u rakoj tak chi'aj quetataj na c'ä pa ri Quiäk Plo." 
Jeremiah49:22 Ri c'ulel cuq'uiak na rib chrij ri Bosra jacha' jun cot ri e u liq'uiq'uem ri u xic', chupam c'ut ri k'ij ri' ri e banal tak u ch'o'j aj Edom quebirbit na jacha' jun yawab ixok.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Tzijol che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Damasc: “Ri tinimit tak re Hamat xukuje' re Arpad elinak qui q'uixbal, rumal rech chi opaninak c'ut itzel tak tzijol cuc'. Quenoj che xibriquil, man quecuin taj quec'oji' pa utzil." 
Jeremiah49:24 Ri Damasc, man c'o ta chic u chuk'ab, cuchomaj animajic. Cäch'ac rumal ri xibin ib ri elemch'u'j xukuje' ri k'oxomal, jacha' jun yawab ixok." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ri tinimit ri nim u k'ij, ri tinimit ri utz u banom, xwonobax canok." 
Jeremiah49:26 Pa ri k'ij ri' queliq'ui' can tak ri e u c'ojolab xo'l tak ri ja conojel c'ut ri e banal tak u ch'o'j quecäm na. In, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:27 Quent'ika' k'ak' chque tak ri u tapia ri Damasc, are c'ut we k'ak' ri' cusachisaj na qui wäch ri e rachoch ri ajawinel Ben-adad.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Tzijol ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri amak' re Sedar xukuje' ri e c'ämal tak u be ri Azor, ri xech'äc rumal ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon: “¡Chixwalijok, chixch'ojin ruc' ri Sedar! ¡Chisachisaj u wäch we amak' ri' ri aj elebal k'ij!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Chibana' iwech chque tak ri qui lic'om ja xukuje' tak ri e qui tzobaj, ri e u tz'akatil tak ri qui lic'om ja xukuje' conojel tak ri qui chaconisan. Chebitokij tak ri camey chibij c'u chque ruc' rakoj chi'aj: ‘¡C'o xibriquil pa conojel c'olbal!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 ¡Quixxiq'uinic chixel bic aj Azor! ¡Jix che u c'u'ic iwib! In, ri Ajawaxel, quinya' u bixic. Are' c'u ri Nabucodonosor, ri ajawinel re Babilon, u chomam chic ri cubana' chiwe." 
Jeremiah49:31 In, ri Ajawaxel quinya' takanic chque: ¡Chixwalijok, aj caldeyib chixch'ojin ruc' we tinimit ri' ri jekel pa utzil ri man c'o ta jas coc ta wi il, ri man e c'o ta tz'apibal u chi' mawi e u c'opibal xak c'u u tuquelam rib!" 
Jeremiah49:32 ¡Chebiweläk'aj tak ri e qui camey xukuje' conojel tak ri cawaj! Quebenjabuj na pa conojel tak c'olbal ri quequitolarisaj ri u pa qui ja'j; pa conojel c'olbal quebenc'am wi na ulok tak ri etzelal paquiwi'. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ri Azor cäcanaj can amak'el jun chaki'j uwo sak qui jekelibal xexalaj tak awaj. Man c'o ta chi jachin jun cajeki' ta chi na chila' mawi ta ne xa' ta re quieb oxib k'ij.” 
Jeremiah49:34 Aretak ri Sedequiy xuchaplej ajawinic pa Juda, ri Ajawaxel xuya' u bixic we tzijol ri' che ri Jeremiy che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Elam:" 
Jeremiah49:35 “In, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, quinjiquiba' u bixic: Quebenk'ajisaj tak ri q'uiakbal qui ch'ab aj Elam, e are tak qui ch'ojibal wa' ri nimak qui k'ij." 
Jeremiah49:36 Quinc'am na ulok tak quiakik' puwi' we tinimit ri' kas pa ri quiejeb xcutaj, rech quebuc'am bic pa conojel tak c'olbal, c'ä man c'o ta na ulew cäcanajic ri quebopan ta wi ri aj Elam ri quequito' ta wi quib." 
Jeremiah49:37 Quenbana' chi cäyicop na ri Elam chquiwäch ri e u c'ulel ri e cämel, quebentak na ulok nimalaj c'axc'ol puwi', quinquir na ri woyowal rech cäkaj puwi' quintak na ri ch'o'j puwi' c'ä quinsachisaj na u wäch ronojel. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:38 Quincoj na ri nu tem re ajawibal pa Elam, quinban na chi quecäm tak ri e rajawinelab xukuje' ri e c'ämal tak u be. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah49:39 Pa tak ri k'ij ri cäpe na quinq'uex na ri cutaklebej ri Elam. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Babilon, culew ri aj caldeyib, ri xuya' u bixic ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Jeremiy, ri k'axal tzij:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Chiya' retamaxic wa', chiya' retamaxic chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit. Chiwalijisaj ri etal re u ya'ic tzijol; c'o mic'u' canok. Chibij: ‘¡Ri Babilon xch'äcatajic! ¡Ri dios Bel xcanaj pa q'uixbal, ri dios Marduc xch'äcatajic! ¡Ri e u diosib ri xa' e subunelab tak diosib, xecanaj pa q'uixbal xech'äctajic!’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Rumal rech chi pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij petinak jun nim tinimit chrij che u banic c'ax che ri cuq'uex na ri rulew pa jun chaki'j uwo sak. Man c'o ta jun, cajeki' ta chi na chila' mawi winak mawi awaj, conojel c'ut quebanimaj tak bic.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri winak aj israelib xukuje' ri e aj Juda quebok'ic quepe na che nu tzucuxic in, ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios." 
Jeremiah50:5 Caquitatabela' na jachique ri be ri cäbe pa Sion, quebe c'u na che ri u suq'uil, je c'u cäquibij wa': ‘Jo' ba' ruc' ri Ajawaxel, ka junaj c'u kib ruc' pa jun junalic c'ulwächinic, ri mawi cäsach ta u tza'm.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 Ri nu tinimit e jacha' can tak ri chij ri e sachinak, ri jech'obisam ri qui be cumal tak ri e cajyuk'ab, ri xquiya' c'olbal chque xesach pa tak ri juyub. Quebel pa jun juyub quebe chi pa jun juyub, c'ä xsach na ri qui warabal pa qui jolom." 
Jeremiah50:7 Aretak queriktaj cumal ri qui banom qui c'ulel chque caquibij c'ut: ‘Man ka mac taj, rumal rech chi ri e are' xemacun chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri jicalaj tzukul quech, ri queyebal c'u'x ri e qui mam.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 ¡Chixanimajok chiya' can ri Babilon ri culew ri aj caldeyib! ¡Chixux jacha' c'amal tak be chixnabej chuwäch ri jumulaj! 
Jeremiah50:9 Quenbana' c'ut chi jumulaj tinimit ri sibalaj c'o qui chuk'ab aj riquiak'ab elebal k'ij junam queboc che u banic ch'o'j chrij ri Babilon. Caquicholajij quib caquich'äc c'u na. E banal tak ch'o'j ri sibalaj c'o qui nawinic, ri quequiq'uiakala' tak ri ch'ab quetaki c'u chque ri quequiq'uiak wi." 
Jeremiah50:10 Quequitoloba' na canok ri aj caldeyib caquitakej qui tolobaxic c'ä quenoj na. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 “Ix, aj caldeyib, ri xitoloba' ri nu tinimit, ¡chixjajatok xukuje' chi quicotisaj iwib! ¡Chixch'opinok jacha' jun alaj ati't wacax chupam ri k'ayes! ¡Chixjijetok jacha' ta ne ix quiej!" 
Jeremiah50:12 Are c'u ri iwulew xukuje' ri kas i tinimit canoj na canok che q'uixbal. Are q'uisbal wa' chque ri nimak tak tinimit, cux jun chaki'j uwo sak ri tolonic." 
Jeremiah50:13 Cäpe c'u na ri woyowal man c'o ta c'u winak quinya' ta can chupam, kas cux c'u na jun chaki'jalaj uwo sak. Ronojel ri coc'ow chila' cacanaj ruc' xibin ib aretak cäril ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri xkaj puwi'." 
Jeremiah50:14 ¡Chixk'ax pa tak ri i c'olbal, ajq'uiakal tak ch'ab, chi sutij rij ri Babilon! ¡Chebiq'uiaka' conojel tak ri e i ch'ab puwi', rumal rech chi xmacun chnuwäch, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel!" 
Jeremiah50:15 ¡Chebiya' rakoj tak chi'aj re ch'o'j pa ronojel c'olbal! ¡Ri Babilon cujach rib! ¡Xetzak tak ri e u tac'atak tak ja, xewilij tak ri nimak tak tapia! ¡Are rajil c'axelal quinya'o: chiya' rajil c'axelal che! ¡Chibana' che junam jas ri xuban ri are'!" 
Jeremiah50:16 Man c'o ta jun quiya' ta can pa Babilon ri caticonijic o cuyac ta u wäch ri cätiquic. Ri man e u winakil taj aretak caquil ri ch'o'j ri casachisan wächaj quetzelej tak na chupam ri qui tinimit, chquijujunal quebanimajic quebe pa ri culew.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 “Ri Israel xak junam ruc' jun chij ri sachinak, ri okatatal cumal coj. Nabe xtijow rumal ri ajawinel re Asiriy; are' chiwi chi c'u wa' ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, xebuwak' tak ri u bakil." 
Jeremiah50:18 Rumal ri' in, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel, quincha': Quinc'äjisaj na u wäch ri ajawinel re Babilon xukuje' ri rulew, jacha' ri xinban che ri ajawinel re Asiriy." 
Jeremiah50:19 Quinban c'u na chi ri Israel cätzelej chupam ri rulew, jacha' c'ut jun chij quec'oji' na q'ui recha' pa ri Carmel, pa Basan, chupam ri c'achelajalaj rulew ri Eprain xukuje' pa Galaad." 
Jeremiah50:20 In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic: Pa ri k'ijol ri', ri Israel xukuje' ri Juda man e c'o ta chic chak'maquil chquij, xukuje' macaj, rumal rech chi quinsach na qui mac ri quebenc'asba' canok.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 “¡Chixch'ojin ruc' ri rulew ri Merataim xukuje' ri e aj Pecod! ¡Chebiterenej, chebisachisaj qui wäch conojel! ¡Chebitz'akatisaj qui banic ri e nu takanic pa ronojel! In, ri Ajawaxel, quinya' takanic.”" 
Jeremiah50:22 Chupam ri ulew cätataj u tininem tijoj chuk'ab, re nimalaj yojinic." 
Jeremiah50:23 ¡Ri Babilon, ri bajibal che ronojel ri uwächulew, paxtajinak, u banom ch'akatak! ¡Nimalaj xibibal caquina' ri nimak tak tinimit aretak caquilo jas ri u c'ulmam ri Babilon!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ri at chabil awib, Babilon xalic' jun c'amibal chawäch, man c'u xanabej taj xatkaj chupam. Xatchaptajic xatkaj chupam, rumal rech chi xac'ulelaj ri Ajawaxel." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ri Ajawaxel xujak ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi tak ri e u ch'ojibal xeresaj c'u ulok tak ri e u ch'ojibal ri royowal, rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem c'o jun chac chuwäch ri cuq'uis na u banic chupam ri nim tinimit ri aj caldeyib." 
Jeremiah50:26 ¡Chixch'ojin ruc' pa conojel c'olbal! ¡Chebijaka' tak ri e u c'uja! ¡Chibana jumulaj etzeletajic chque tak ri winak chisachisaj c'u qui wäch! ¡C'o c'u jun mäc'asi canok! 
Jeremiah50:27 ¡Chebicämisaj conojel tak ri e rajch'ojab, chixtakan che qui c'amic bic pa ri cämisabal! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch! ¡Xopan ba' ri qui k'ij, ri k'ijol re ri u c'äjisaxic qui wäch!" 
Jeremiah50:28 (Winak ri xebanimaj ulok pa Babilon xebopan pa Sion caquitzijoj tak ri xuban ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios chi u yo'm ri rajil u q'uexelal che ri Babilon rumal ri xuban are' che retzelaxic ri rachoch Dios.) 
Jeremiah50:29 “¡Chebisiq'uij tak conojel ri e ajq'uiakal tak ch'ab rech quech'ojin ruc' ri Babilon! ¡Chisutij rij ri tinimit rech man c'o ta jun canimajic! ¡Chiya' rajil u q'uexel che jacha' ri takal che! ¡Junam chi bana' che jacha' ri xuban ri are'! Amak'el c'ut u walijisam rib chwij, chrij ri Ajawaxel, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Rumal rech wa' ri e qui c'ojolab quecäm na xo'l tak ri ja conojel c'ut ri cajch'ojab quecäm na pa tak ri k'ij ri'. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah50:31 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem je cubij wa: “Nim tinimit walijisal rib, in in c'o che a c'ulelaxic; opaninak ba' ri a k'ij ri k'ijol che u c'äjisaxic ri a wäch." 
Jeremiah50:32 Nim tinimit walijisal rib, capak'ij c'u na awib cattzak c'u na, man c'o ta chi c'u jachin ta ri catwalijisanic. Quebent'ika' k'ak' chque conojel tak ri a tinimit, are c'u we k'ak' ri' cusachisaj na qui wäch conojel ri e c'o chanakaj.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem je cubij wa: “Ri tinimit Israel xukuje' ri tinimit Juda cätajin caquicoch' ri c'axc'olil. E cojom pa che' cumal tak ri qui c'ulel man cacaj ta c'ut quequitzokopij. 
Jeremiah50:34 Are c'ut ri torol quech c'o u chuk'ab ri u bi' are' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. Are' cabanow na ri suq'uilal piwi'; cuc'am na ulok ri jamaril che ri ulew xibriquil c'ut chque ri winak ri e c'o pa Babilon.” 
Jeremiah50:35 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “¡Ch'o'j che ri Babilon xukuje' chque ri e u winak! ¡Chque ri c'amal tak qui be xukuje' chque ri cajno'jab! 
Jeremiah50:36 ¡Ch'o'j chque ri cajch'obonelab: chi chebux ch'ujab! 
Jeremiah50:37 ¡Ch'o'j chque tak ri cajch'ojab; ri quebirbit che xe'n ib! ¡Ch'o'j chque tak ri e qui quiej xukuje' chque tak ri e qui carwaj! ¡Ch'o'j chque tak ri e cajch'ojab ri xa' e qui mocom: chebux e jacha' ta ne xa' e ixokib! ¡Ch'o'j chque tak ri e qui k'inomal: chi chebeläk'axok! 
Jeremiah50:38 ¡Ch'o'j chque tak ri e qui nima': chi chetz'ajok! U mac rech chi ri Babilon are jun ulew ri e c'o wi xibal tak diosib, rumal c'u quech wa' xeconiric." 
Jeremiah50:39 Rumal ri' pa Babilon cäcan wi na qui soc ri juyubal tak me's xukuje' tak ri e utiw, chila' quejeki' wi na tak ri tucur. Mawi jumul pa tak ri k'ij junab ri quepe ta chi na winak quejeki' ta chi na chupam." 
Jeremiah50:40 Je cäcanajic jacha' ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor xukuje' ri e c'ulja tak tinimit, aretak xsachisax qui wäch. Man c'o ta chi jachin jun cajeki' ta chi na chila', mawi xa' ta ne re quieb oxib k'ij. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah50:41 Kas pa najatak ulew pa ri riquiak'ab relebal k'ij, jun nim tinimit ri sibalaj c'o u chuk'ab xukuje' tinimit ajawinelab caquisuc'umaj quib che qui petic." 
Jeremiah50:42 E cuc'am tak qui q'uiakbal ch'ab xukuje' tak qui tz'imaj tak ch'ich'; man c'o ta tok'obisam wächaj cuc' mawi elebal c'uxaj, ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj e jacha' ri u wululem ri plo, e quiejeninak chquij tak quiej. Xäk e c'o che u banic ri ch'o'j ruc' ri Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Ri ajawinel re Babilon, aretak xretamaj we tzijol ri', xetuktub ri rakan u k'ab rumal xe'n ib, cuna' c'u c'axc'obic xukuje' k'oxomal jacha' ri yawab ixok." 
Jeremiah50:44 Xak c'ätetal quinpetic jacha' jun coj ri quel ulok chquipam tak ri patzapak tak k'ayes ri c'o chuchi' ri Jordan cuq'uiak c'u rib chquipam tak ri c'olbal ri e c'o wi echa' ri amak'el quetojtatic, quinban c'u na chi quebanimaj bic ri aj Babilon chi' quinban c'u na chi cajawin ri winak ri quincha'. ¿Jachin ta lo ri cacuinic cujunamaj ta rib wuc'? ¿Jachin ta ri yuk'unel ri cäcuin ta che u k'atixic nu wäch?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Chitatabej ri nu chomanic ri in, ri Ajawaxel, ri nu suc'umam ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Babilon; ri quintakej na u banic, che u banic c'ax che ri culew ri aj caldeyib: Xukuje' ne ri alaj tak ama'ib chij ri c'ä e ch'utik na quequic'am na bic, kas e are tak c'ut ri yuk'bal queban can c'ax chque." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ri u tzakic ri Babilon sibalaj c'o na ri rok'ibal ri cubano, chi cäslab na ri ulew cumal, ri e u rakoj tak chi'aj quetataj na pa ri jule' nimak tak tinimit chic.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “Quintak na ulok jun quiakik' cämisanel che u banic c'ax che ri Babilon xukuje' chque ri aj caldeyib. 
Jeremiah51:2 Quinban na chi ri e qui c'ulel je chiquibana' che ri Babilon jacha' ri caban che trico ri cäq'uiak pa ri quiakik'; quinban c'u na chi man c'o ta qui winakil quecanaj ta can chupam ri culew. Aretak chopan ri k'ij re nimalaj c'axc'ol, pa ronojel c'olbal quebel wi na ulok winak chrij che u banic ch'o'j ruc'." 
Jeremiah51:3 ¡Ri e ajq'uiakal tak ch'ab chequisuc'umala' ri qui q'uiakbal tak qui ch'ab! ¡Che be quicojo' ri to'bal tak uwo c'uxaj! ¡Mebitok'obisaj tak qui wäch ri c'ojolab aj Babilon; chebisachisaj qui wäch conojel tak ri e cajch'ojab! 
Jeremiah51:4 Pa ronojel ri culew ri aj caldeyib ri winak queliq'ui' na can xo'l tak ri ja pa ri tinimit," 
Jeremiah51:5 pune' ba' ri Israel xukuje' ri Juda e macuninak chnuwäch qui nojisam c'u ri culew che macaj, in, ri Ajawaxel, ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel, c'ä maja' queben wonoba' ta canok." 
Jeremiah51:6 ¡Chixanimajok chixel bic pa Babilon! ¡Cato'tajisaj rib jachin ri cäcuinic! ¡Mixcäm rumal ri u mac ri are'! Are k'ijol wa' rech ri nu yo'w q'uexelal, quintoj c'u na che jacha' ri takal che." 
Jeremiah51:7 Ri Babilon are jun kumubal re k'an puak pa nu k'ab ri cuk'abarisaj ronojel ri uwächulew. Ri nimak tak tinimit cäcuq'uiaj quech we u wa'l uva ri' ri quesach c'u rumal. 
Jeremiah51:8 Xak c'ätetal c'ut xtzak ri Babilon xuban c'u ch'akatak. ¡Chiwok'ej c'u u wäch! Chebic'ama' ulok tak cunabal chque tak ri e u socotajic, che rilic we cacunatajic.”" 
Jeremiah51:9 E kacojom chi tak cunabal che ri Babilon, man c'u xcunataj taj. ¡Chiya' canok! Chujel bic waral, chijujunal jix pa ri i tinimit, ri il c'ut ri u banom copan c'ä chicaj, cawalijic copan c'ä pa tak ri sutz'." 
Jeremiah51:10 Ri Ajawaxel xuban suq'uilal pakawi'. Tisaj, jo' che u tzijoxic pa Sion ri u banom ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios." 
Jeremiah51:11 Ri Ajawaxel are caraj cusachisaj u wäch ri Babilon, u c'asum c'u pa qui jolom tak ri ajawinelab re Med we junam chomanic ri'. Are c'u rajil c'axelal wa' cuya' ri Ajawaxel u mac rech ri xquiban che ri rachoch. ¡Chebisuc'umaj tak ri ch'ab! ¡Chebiwuc'aj tak ri i quetecak tak i ch'ich'!" 
Jeremiah51:12 ¡Chiya' ri etal che qui t'akixic tak ri nimak tak u tapia ri Babilon! ¡Chebicojo' chi niq'uiaj to'l quech ri chajinelab! ¡Chebicojo' chi tak yuxlenelab! ¡Chebicojo' xukuje' ajch'ojab ri cäquic'u' quib! Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel xusuc'umaj xutz'akatisaj c'u qui banic tak ri chomanic ri u yo'm qui bixic che u banic c'ax chque ri aj Babilon. 
Jeremiah51:13 At, Babilon, ri at c'o chquichi' nimak tak nima' e c'o c'u nimak tak a k'inomal, ¡opaninak ba' ri q'uisbal u wäch a k'ij, ri u q'uisbalil ri a c'aslemal!" 
Jeremiah51:14 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri u c'aslemal: “¡Catinnojisaj chque tak a c'ulel, e jacha' ta ne sac', ri e are' caquibixoj na ch'äcanic pawi'!”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Ri Ajawaxel ruc' ri u cuinem, xuban ri ulew; ruc' ri u no'j xutiq'uiba' ri uwächulew ruc' ri retamanic xulic' ri caj." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ruc' ch'abal re cakulja cubano chi cayojoj ri ja' pa ri caj, cubano chi cäpaki' ri sutz' kas chutza'm ri ulew, cubano chi querepelaj ri caypa' pa u niq'uiajil ri jäb curesaj c'u ulok ri quiakik' jawije' ri u c'u'm wi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Man c'o ta u no'j xukuje' man c'o ta retamanic ronojel winak. Ri quebanow diosib quekaj na pa q'uixbal: e subunelab tak wächbalil ri man c'o ta qui c'aslemal; 
Jeremiah51:18 e jastak ri man c'o ta jubik' qui patan, tze'bal qui wäch, chi ri Ajawaxel Dios, pa ri k'atan tzij cuchupisaj na qui wäch." 
Jeremiah51:19 ¡Sibalaj ba' nim u jalbem rib ri u Dios ri Jacob, banal re ronojel ri c'olic! Ri are' xucha' ri Israel rech cacanaj pa u k'ab. Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: are u bi' wa'." 
Jeremiah51:20 “¡Babilon, at ri' ri nu wi't, ri catincoj che u banic ri ch'o'j! Catinwachilaj che qui c'äjixic ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' che qui yojixic tak ajawibal." 
Jeremiah51:21 Catinwachilaj che qui k'ajisaxic tak ri quiej xukuje' tak ri ajquiejab, carwaj xukuje' ri e u c'al tak quech." 
Jeremiah51:22 Catinwachilaj che qui c'äjixic tak achijab xukuje' ixokib, nimak tak winak xukuje' niq'uiaj tak winak, alabom xukuje' alitomab." 
Jeremiah51:23 Catinwachilaj che qui c'äjixic tak ajyuk'ab xukuje' tak ri jumulaj, tajinelab xukuje' tak ri wacax ri quetajinic, takanelab xukuje' ri k'atal tak tzij.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 “Chquiwäch c'ut ri kas e i bak'wäch ix, quinya' na ri rajil u q'uexelal che ri Babilon xukuje' chque conojel ri aj caldeyib jacha' ri takal chque, rumal ri c'ax ri xquiban che ri Sion. In, ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah51:25 In in c'o che u banic c'ax chawe, c'ächelaj yojinel, ri cayojij ronojel ri uwächulew. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic. Quinwalijisaj na ri nu k'ab che u c'äjisaxic a wäch, catinwolkotij na bic chquixo'l tak ri juyub quinban c'u na chawe chi catux jun c'atinak juyub." 
Jeremiah51:26 Mawi jun chque ri abaj quech ri awetzeletajic quebajwataj ta na che qui yaquic tak ja. Catux na jun chaki'j uwo sak amak'el. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah51:27 ¡Chyok pa ri ulew ri etal re ch'o'j! ¡Chiwok'esaj ri trompet chebisuc'umaj c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Babilon! ¡Chebiwalijisaj chrij are' ri e Ajawibal re Ararat che u banic c'ax che, ri Min xukuje' ri Askenaz! ¡Chiya' rekle'n jun qui nimal ajch'ojab rech cuc'am u be ri ch'o'j! ¡Chebinabejisaj ri ajquiejab ri e jacha' sac' ri e c'anarinak!" 
Jeremiah51:28 Chebisuc'umaj ri nimak tak tinimit che u banic ch'o'j ruc'; chebisuc'umaj tak ri ajawinelab re Med, xukuje' tak ri e u takanelab xukuje' ri k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' ronojel ri ulew ri quetakan wi.”" 
Jeremiah51:29 Cäyicop ri ulew xukuje' cabirbibic, rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel cätajin cutz'akatisaj ri u chomam u banic chi cujalwächij ri Babilon pa jun xibibalalaj chaki'j uwo sak." 
Jeremiah51:30 Ri ajch'ojab aj Babilon xek'itaj che u tijic qui chuk'ab, xecanaj chupam ri to'bal tak quib; xechukchub ri qui chuk'ab je ta chi c'u ne ri quepe ixokib. Ri qui tinimit tak xemajilaxic ri cachoch tak xeporoxic." 
Jeremiah51:31 Quexiq'uinilob tak ri ya'l tak tzijol che u ya'ic u bixic che ri ajawinel re Babilon chi ri u tinimit tak ch'äcatajinak ronojel. 
Jeremiah51:32 Ri c'ulel xebulatz'obej tak ri caban wi oc'owem pa tak ri nima', xebuporoj tak ri c'olbal re to'bal tak ib ri ajch'ojab xenoj che xibriquil." 
Jeremiah51:33 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, ri u Dios ri Israel, je cubij wa': “¡Ri Babilon jacha' jun yak'abal ri xak'alem pa ri k'ijol re ri yak'oj, sibalaj c'u chanim copan na ri k'ijol che, che u yaquic ri u wäch ri xutico!”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Jewa' cubij ri Jerusalen, ri tinimit re Sion: “Ri Nabucodonosor, ri ajawinel re Babilon, xuban xerexak chwe xinubik' c'ut; xinuya' canok jacha' jun lak ri tolonic. Jacha' jun jilijic awaj aj plo xinubik'o; xunojisaj rib ruc' ri sibalaj xkaj na chuwäch ri c'o wuc', are c'u ri xto'tajic xuq'uiak canok. ¡Chutojo' ri Babilon ri tokinic ri xuban chwe! ¡Chequitojo' ri aj caldeyib ri e nu winak ri xebucämisaj!”" 
Jeremiah51:35  
Jeremiah51:36 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “In quenbana' ri suq'uilal chawe, quenya' rajil u q'uexelal chque ri e a c'ulel. Kas quebentzajirisaj tak na ri nima' xukuje' ri e qui q'uiyibal tak ja' ri e c'o pa Babilon," 
Jeremiah51:37 cäjalwächitaj c'u na pa jumulaj etzeletajic, pa qui jekelibal ch'ich'alaj tak chicop, pa jun c'olbal ri man cuya' ta chic c'o ta jachin cajeki' chupam cuya' c'u na xe'n ib chque conojel xukuje' xibibal ib." 
Jeremiah51:38 Conojel e are' quewun na e jacha' ri coj quequijisila' c'u na tak quib e jacha' alaj tak coj. 
Jeremiah51:39 Aretak quek'ak'ar rumal ri k'ak', in quinya' na cuq'uia' uq'uia' tak ri quebuk'abarisaj cuban c'u chque chi quesach rumal. Are c'u qui kajic wa' che jun junalic waram ri man quec'astaj ta chi na rumal. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah51:40 Quebenc'am na bic pa ri pilibal, jacha' ri cäban chque ri alaj tak ama'ib tak chij, ama'ib tak q'uisic', xukuje' ama'ib tak chij.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 ¡Ri Babilon, ri tinimit ri nim na u k'ij pa ronojel ri uwächulew, tzakinak ch'äcatajinak! ¡Nimalaj c'u caquixibij quib ri nimak tak tinimit aretak cäquil u wäch!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Ri plo xubik' ri Babilon, xuch'uk cuc' ri nimak tak u rekbala'." 
Jeremiah51:43 Ri u tinimit tak quejalwächitaj na pa xibibalalaj tak chaki'j uwo sak pa chaki'j ulew ri tolobam, ri man c'o ta jachin jun cajeki' ta chi chila', ri man c'o ta jachin jun coc'ow ta chi chila'." 
Jeremiah51:44 “Quinc'äjisaj na u wäch ri dios Bel pa Babilon, quinban che chi cuxawaj ri u bik'om, man catzucux ta chi c'u na cumal ri nimak tak tinimit. ¡Xetzak tak ri e u nimak tak u tapia ri Babilon!" 
Jeremiah51:45 ¡Nu tinimit chixel ulok chila', chijujunal c'ut chito'tajisaj ri i c'aslemal rech man cäkaj ta ri woyowal piwi!" 
Jeremiah51:46 Mi xibij iwib, mixe'j iwib cumal ri tzijol ri caxiq'uin pa ri ulew. Chujunab quexiq'uin jalan tak tzijol, tzijol tak re tokinic pa ri ulew xukuje' re tijoj tak chuk'ab chquixo'l tak ri takanelab." 
Jeremiah51:47 Je c'u ri', cäpe na ri k'ij aretak chinc'äjisaj qui wäch tak ri diosib ri e c'o pa Babilon. Ronojel ri ulew cämach'irisax canok queliq'ue can conojel tak ri cäminakib." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ri caj ri ulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'olic quejajat na aretak cätzak ri Babilon, aretak chepe pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij ri e sachal tak u wäch. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic." 
Jeremiah51:49 Je, ri Babilon kas catzak wi na rumal rech ri cämisanic ri xuban che ri Israel xukuje' cumal quech ri cämisanic ri xeban pa ronojel ri uwächulew.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 Ix, ri xixto'tajic ri man xixcämisax taj, chixanimajok man quixtaq'ui' taj, pune' c'u ne naj ri ix c'o wi' mäsach ri Ajawaxel pa i jolom chnataj c'u ri Jerusalen chiwe." 
Jeremiah51:51 Ri ix quixcha': “Cakana' q'uixbal aretak cäkata' ri cäban che ka yok'ic. Ri ka q'uixbal ri elinak cuch'uk ri ka palaj, rumal rech chi winak ri naj quepe wi e oquinak chquipam tak ri c'olbal ri sibalaj e tastalic ri c'o chupam ri rachoch Dios.”" 
Jeremiah51:52 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Cäpe na ri k'ij aretak chinc'äjisaj qui wäch tak ri diosib ri e c'o pa Babilon, pa ronojel c'ut ri rulewal quech'ikow na ri e socotajinak." 
Jeremiah51:53 Ri Babilon pune' cäpaki' c'ä cho ri caj che u cojic ri to'bal rib sibalaj chicaj xukuje' chila' quebentak wi bic tak ri c'ulel che u sachisaxic u wäch. In, ri Ajawaxel, quinjiquiba' u bixic.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Kas pa Babilon quel wi ulok rakoj tak chi'aj re k'oxomal, kas pa ri culew ri aj caldeyib quebel wi ulok jun nimalaj tininem." 
Jeremiah51:55 Are' ri Ajawaxel, ri cusach u wäch ri Babilon cuq'uis c'u u tza'm ri yojcorem ri cubano. Ri e c'ulel tak, e jacha' rekbala' ri quewolkotic, quekaj na puwi' ruc' nimalaj pujujem." 
Jeremiah51:56 Xepe che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Babilon; xekaj tak ri cajch'ojab pa qui k'ab xequiban c'u ch'akatak chque tak ri e qui q'uiakbal tak qui ch'ab. Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel are' jun Dios ri cuya' chque chquijujunal ri takal chque. 
Jeremiah51:57 Ri Ajawinel, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cujiquiba' u bixic: “Quebenk'abarisaj na ri e c'amal tak u be ri Babilon, xukuje' ri e rajno'jab tak, ri e u takanelab, ri e u k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' tak ri rajch'ojab, quekaj na pa jun waram junalic ri man quec'astaj ta chi wi na." 
Jeremiah51:58 In, ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel nu cuinem, quincha': Ri e nimak tak u tapia ri Babilon ri nimak qui wäch quet'akix na c'ä chuxe', xukuje' ri e nimak tak uchi'ja queporox na. Xaklok' e chacuninak ri nimak tak tinimit, are c'ut ri e qui tijoj tak chuk'ab ri e qui banom cäsach na qui wäch chupam ri k'ak'.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Chupam ri ucaj junab ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy, ajawinel re Juda, ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij xuya' jun takquil che ri Seraiy, u c'ojol ri Neriy ri' u mam c'ut ri Maasiy. Ri Seraiy terenel rech ri ajawinel Sedequiy pa ri u bic pa Babilon, are c'u cäsuc'uman ri carokxanij wi rib ri ajawinel." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ri Jeremiy u tz'ibam pa jun wuj ronojel ri etzelal ri cäpe na puwi' ri Babilon ri u bixic, ronojel ri tz'ibatalic che ri cuc'ulmaj na," 
Jeremiah51:61 xubij c'u che ri Seraiy: “Aretak chatopan pa Babilon, chatoc il che u ya'ic u siq'uibal ronojel we tzijol ri'." 
Jeremiah51:62 Cabij c'ut: ‘Ajawaxel, lal yo'm la u bixic chi casachisaj na la u wäch we c'olbal ri', jeri' chi man c'o ta chi jun cajeki' ta chi na waral, mawi achijab mawi awaj, caq'uexwächitaj c'ut pa jun chaki'jalaj uwo sak amakel.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Aretak casiq'uitaj u wäch we wuj ri' awumal, chaxima' jun abaj che chaq'uiaka' c'u chupam ri nima' Euprats," 
Jeremiah51:64 chabij c'ut: ‘Je' wa' ri u bik'tajic ri Babilon, man cawalij ta chi c'u chupam ri etzelal ri cutak na ulok ri Ajawaxel puwi'.’ ” Waral queq'uiswi tak ri e u tzij ri Jeremiy." 
Jeremiah52:1 Ri Sedequiy juwinak jun u junab aretak xuchaplej ajawinic, julajuj junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Hamutal u bi' ri u nan, u mia'l ri Jeremiy, aj Libna c'ut." 
Jeremiah52:2 E itzel c'ut ri e u chac ri xebuban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xak junam ruc' ri xebuban ri Joasim." 
Jeremiah52:3 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xyactaj royowal ruc' ri Jerusalen xukuje' ruc' ri Juda, xebuq'uiak c'u bic chuwäch. Xuwalijisaj c'u na rib ri Sedequiy chrij ri ajawinel re Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:4 Chupam ri k'ij lajuj rajilabal ri ulajuj ic' re ri ubelejeb junab ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy, ri ajawinel Nabucodonosor xwalijic e rachil conojel ri e rajch'ojab xpe che u banic c'ax che ri Jerusalen, xusutij rij. Xuya' c'u rib chuwäch, xebuwalijisaj c'u tak ak'anisabal chrij che u banic ch'o'j ruc'." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ri tinimit xsutix rij c'ä pa ri julajuj junab re ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy. 
Jeremiah52:6 Chupam ri ubelejeb k'ij re ri ucaj ic' re we junab ri' xnimataj ri wi'jal chupam ri tinimit, man c'o ta chi c'u jas caquiwe'j ri winak." 
Jeremiah52:7 Xquiban c'u jun c'ob che ri nimalaj u tapia ri tinimit, pune' c'u sutital rij cumal ri aj caldeyib, ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri ajch'ojab xebanimajic xquiya' can ri tinimit pa ri chak'ab ri'. Xebel bic chupam ri oquibal ri c'o chquixo'l ri quieb nimak tak tapia, chupam ri be ri coc'ow chquipam tak ri e u ticonijibal cotz'i'j ri ajawinel, are c'u xquic'am ri be ri cäbe pa ri u beya' ri Jordan." 
Jeremiah52:8 E are' c'u ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib xcokataj ri ajawinel Sedequiy, xecuin c'u che u rikic chupam ri lianic re Jerico. Xwonobax c'u can cumal conojel ri rajch'ojab xquijabuj c'u quib." 
Jeremiah52:9 Ri aj caldeyib xquichap ri ajawinel xquic'am c'u bic chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon, ri c'o pa Ribla, chupam ri rulew ri Hamat. Ri Nabucodonosor chila' xuk'at wi tzij puwi' ri Sedequiy," 
Jeremiah52:10 chuwäch c'u wa' xutak u k'atic ri qui kul ri e u c'ojol xukuje' conojel ri aj Juda ri nimak qui k'ij. 
Jeremiah52:11 Xtakan c'u che resaxic ri quieb u bak'wäch xukuje' chi chcoj tza'm tikom ch'ich che u c'amic bic pa Babilon, ri xcoj wi pa che' c'ä xcäm na." 
Jeremiah52:12 Chupam ri lajuj rajilabal ri uro' ic' re ri ubelejlajuj u junab ri rajawinic ri Nabucodonosor, ajawinel re Babilon, ri Nabuzaradan, ri rach k'atal tzij ri ajawinel takanel c'ut paquiwi' ri quechajin ri ajawinel, xopan pa Jerusalen" 
Jeremiah52:13 xut'ik c'u k'ak' che ri rachoch ri Dios, ri rachoch ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri ja ri e c'o pa ri tinimit, kas c'u e are xeranej ri cachoch conojel ri nimak tak qui k'ij," 
Jeremiah52:14 e are' c'u ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib ri e achilaninak xequit'akij tak ri nimak tak tapia ri e k'atininak rij ri Jerusalen. 
Jeremiah52:15 Ri Nabuzaradan ri quinimal ri ajch'ojab xebuc'am bic ri mebayib xukuje' ri e canajinak canok pa ri Jerusalen xukuje' ri niq'uiaj chi aj chaquib, xukuje' ri xquiya' qui tzij chi quek'ax ruc' ri ajawinel aj Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:16 Xuwi xebuya' can jujun ri sibalaj e mebayib na, rech quequilij ri ticbal tak uva xukuje' tak ri ulew ri quetic tak qui wäch." 
Jeremiah52:17 Ri aj caldeyib xequiban ch'akatak chque ri jastak ri e re k'an ch'ich' ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch Dios, ri e rakan tak ja, ri e tac'alibal tak xukuje' ri nimalaj ri c'olbal ja', xquic'am c'u bic ronojel ri k'an ch'ich' pa Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Xukuje' xequic'am bic ri e yabal tak chaj, ri paq'uebal tak chaj, ri ramibal tak qui wi' ri chaj, ri nimak tak lak, ri nimak tak paq'uebal xukuje' conojel tak ri chaconisan re k'an ch'ich' ri quebajwataj che u ya'ic ri k'ijilanic." 
Jeremiah52:19 Junam xukuje' xuban, ri catakan paquiwi' ri chajinelab xebuc'am bic conojel ri jastak re k'an puak xukuje' ri e re sak puak: ri tzima' tak, ri yabal tak rachak k'ak', ri nimak tak lak ri c'ulbal tak chaj, ri tzuc'ulibal tak k'ak' ri nimak tak paq'uebal xukuje' tak ri kumubal ri quebajwataj che ri sipanic re u wa'l uva." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ri qui cholajil ri quieb rakan tak ja, ri nimalaj c'olbal ja' e rachil ri cablajuj ama'ib tak wacax ri e re k'an ch'ich' ri xetok'enic xukuje' tak ri tac'alibal ri xtak qui banic rumal ri ajawinel Salomon che ri rachoch Dios, man caban ta c'u cuinem che u ch'obic ri cäpajanic." 
Jeremiah52:21 Chquijujunal ri rakan tak ja coc'ow na chuwäch belejeb (9) bara' ri rak'anibal caraj ne wakib (6) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ri u chomal; tel tak ri qui pam, ri u pimal ri kan ch'ich' quiejeb u wi' k'abaj." 
Jeremiah52:22 Chquijujunal ri rakan tak ja c'o jun qui wikbal paquiwi' re kan ch'ich', ri c'o na quieb bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj ri rakanil, c'o c'u jun c'at chrij ri ronojel re kan ch'ich', ri wiktal cuc' crabaj. Ri quieb rakan tak ja xak e junam." 
Jeremiah52:23 E jun sient (100) crabaj e tzayatzoj che jun c'at re kan ch'ich' ri c'o chrij jun wikbal, e jumuch' waklajuj (96) ri quek'alajinic." 
Jeremiah52:24 Ri takanel paquiwi' ri chajinelab xuchap ri Seraiy, qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri Soponiy, ri xa' col man cäjunamataj u k'ij ruc', xukuje' ri e oxib chajil oquibal chupam ri rachoch Dios." 
Jeremiah52:25 Chque ri winak ri e c'o pa ri tinimit xuchap ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab ri cätakan paquiwi' ri ajch'ojab, wukub achijab ri quepatanin can che ri ajawinel ri e c'o apan pa ri tinimit, ri qui nimal ajch'ojab ri quebuchap achijab rech queboc che ajch'ojab xukuje' oxc'al aj tinimit ri c'o na qui banic chupam ri tinimit." 
Jeremiah52:26 Ri Nabuzaradan xebuc'am bic conojel wa' chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon, ri c'o pa Ribla, chupam ri rulew ri Hamat. Chila' ri ajawinel re Babilon xuya' wi takanic che qui cämisaxic. Je c'u ri' ri tinimit aj Juda xelesax bic chupam ri rulew." 
Jeremiah52:27  
Jeremiah52:28 Ri cajilabal ri winak ri xebesax bic rumal ri Nabucodonosor e are' tak wa': chupam ri uwuk junab ri rajawinic xeresaj bic juwinak oxib mil juwinak oxib (3023) winak pa Juda; 
Jeremiah52:29 chupam ri wajxaklajuj (18) junab xeresaj bic wajxakib sient juwinak cablajuj (832) winak xeresaj bic pa Jerusalen; 
Jeremiah52:30 chupam ri junab juwinak oxib (23), ri Nabuzaradan xeresaj bic wukub sient cawinak job (745) pa Juda, are c'u cajilabal winak wa' chi conojel ri xebesax bic, e quiejeb mil wakib sient (4600) ri xebesax bic." 
Jeremiah52:31 Pa ri k'ij juwinak job (25) re ri ucablajuj (12) ic' re ri junab juwinak wuklajuj (37) re ri resaxic bic ri Joaquin ajawinel re Juda, xuchaplej ajawinic pa Babilon ri ajawinel Ebil-merodac, ri xutok'obisaj u wäch ri Joaquin xresaj c'u pa ri che'," 
Jeremiah52:32 xuban utzil che are c'u nim xril na chquiwäch ri jule' tak ajawinelab chic ri e c'o ruc' pa Babilon. 
Jeremiah52:33 Je c'u ri', ri Joaquin xcuinic xresaj ri atz'iak ri u cojom pa ri che' xwa' c'ut junam ruc' ri ajawinel joropa' k'ij ri xc'asi' na." 
Jeremiah52:34 Joropa' c'u k'ij ri xc'asi' na, ri Joaquin xuc'am jun tojbal re ronojel k'ij rumal ri ajawinel re Babilon." 
Lamentations1:1 ¡Sibalaj xtolobax canok ri tinimit ri nojinak can chque winak nabe! ¡U wächbal malca'n canajinak wi ri nimalaj tinimit ri qui chuch tak ri tinimit! ¡Cojom chuk'ab che, che qui banic tak chac ri man carajtaj cubano: ri mialaxel que tak ajawibal!" 
Lamentations1:2 Cajik' pa ok'ej chak'abibal tak; ri e u wa'l tak wächaj quebelel tak cho ri u palaj. Chquixo'l tak conojel ri e rach ch'abem man c'o ta jun ri cacu'bisan ta u c'u'x. Conojel ri canima' quib ruc' e jachinelab quieb qui wäch; che qui banom qui c'ulel che. 
Lamentations1:3 Man xuwi ta c'ut ri rikoj tak c'ax xukuje' ri c'axalaj tak chac, ri Juda cätajin cucoch' camic ri qui c'aslemal ri lok'om tak pataninelab. Ri cajawin nabe chquixo'l tak ri tinimit camic man curik ta uxlanem. Ri qui tzucum tak u banic c'ax che, xkaj pa qui k'ab xquinim c'u pa tak jutz'." 
Lamentations1:4 ¡Sibalaj e bisobal tak ri be ri quebe pa Sion! ¡Man c'o ta jachin ta jun ri cäpe ta pa tak ri nimak'ij! Ri e oquibal tak pa ri tinimit e tolonic, ri e cojol tabal tok'ob quebok'ic, ri c'ojolab quech'ibatajic ri Jerusalen c'o pa tak c'ayil." 
Lamentations1:5 Ri e qui banom qui c'ulel chque quetakan paquiwi', ri quebetzelan qui wäch quek'inomaric. Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel u banom c'ax che qui mac quech tak ri macaj ri e u banom. Ri e qui c'ojol tak xec'am bic pa ri qui c'aslemal ri lok'om pataninelab xec'am bic rumal ri c'ulel." 
Lamentations1:6 Xsach u wäch ronojel ri u je'lical ri je'lalaj Sion; ri e c'amal tak u be e jacha' masat, ri quequitzucuj tak quecha'; xak c'u alicha' chic quebinic, quebanimaj chquiwäch ri e tzucul tak quech." 
Lamentations1:7 Ri Jerusalen quenataj ri ojer tak k'ij che aretak xcanaj u tuquiel cabisonic; quenataj tak che conojel tak ri k'inomal ri xec'oji' ruc' pa ri ojer tak u k'ijol; canataj che aretak xkaj pa u k'ab ri c'ulel man c'o ta c'u jachin ta jun ri xpe ta che u to'ic, aretak xilitaj cumal ri e u c'ulel xquitze'j c'u u wäch chi kajinak chupam ri c'ax." 
Lamentations1:8 Ri Jerusalen sibalaj nim ri macaj ri u banom u banom c'ut chi xyataj che chi etzelam u wäch. Ri xeyo'w tak u k'ij nabe, camic caquetzelaj u wäch rumal rech chi quilom ri u ch'analiquil. Rumal ri' cätajin cok'ic, elinak u q'uixbal are cuya' ri uwo rachak." 
Lamentations1:9 Nojinak ri ratz'iak che ch'uluch'ujil; man xuchomaj taj ri quepe na puwi'. Man cojel taj ri u tzakic ri u rikom; man c'o ta jachin cacu'bisan u c'u'x. ¡Chila la, Ajawaxel, ri nu mach'irisaxic xukuje' ri nimal ri cac'amow ri c'ulel!" 
Lamentations1:10 Ri c'ulel u banom rech chque tak ri e u k'inomal ri Jerusalen. Ri tinimit xeril ri e k'ijilal tak diosib quetininic xeboc chupam ri k'ijilabal, ¡Winak, ri yo'm wi la takanic Ajawaxel, chi man cuya' taj queboc chupam ri c'olbal la re mulin ib!" 
Lamentations1:11 Conojel tak ri e winak la quebok'ic, caquitzucuj tak qui wa cuq'uia'; xequiya' tak ri qui k'inomal che u q'uexwäch wa ja' rech cac'astaj qui wäch. ¡Ajawaxel, chila la, ri c'ax ri in c'o wi! ¡Choc la il che ri quiäkasakil ri nu rikom!" 
Lamentations1:12 ¡Ix, ri quixbin pa ri be, chixtac'al che u chomaxic we c'o k'oxomal jacha' ri wech in, ri sibalaj in c'axc'obinak rumal! ¡Ri Ajawaxel xtakow ulok we c'axc'obic ri' panuwi' aretak xnicow ri royowal!" 
Lamentations1:13 Ri Ajawaxel u q'uiakom ulok jun k'ak' chicaj ri opaninak c'ä cho ri nu bakil; xulic' jun c'amibal pa ri nu be xuban chwe chi xintzelej chwij; in u jachom chupam ri wonobanic, chupam ri rikoj c'ax jok'otaj chi jok'otaj." 
Lamentations1:14 Ri e nu mac e rilom ri Ajawaxel; kas are' e ximowinak tak chwij jacha' jun eka'bal ri u tzakom ralal panuwi': ¡Quebuq'uis tak ri e nu chuk'ab! Ri Ajawaxel in u jachom pa qui k'ab winak ri man quinch'ij ta qui coch'ic. 
Lamentations1:15 Ri Ajawaxel naj xebuq'uiak wi chwe conojel tak ri e c'o qui chuk'ab ri caquito' nu wi'. Xuq'uiak juk'at ajch'ojab panuwi', che u q'uisic tzij paquiwi' ri cowilaj tak wachijab. ¡Ri Ajawaxel u xak'alem ri k'apojalaj Juda jacha' ri cäban che qui xak'alexic tak ri uva che resaxic ri u wa'l!" 
Lamentations1:16 We jastak ri' quinquiya' pa ok'ej. Ri e nu bak'wäch quenoj che qui wal tak wächaj, man c'o ta c'u jachin jun ri c'o ta wuc' ri cacu'bisan ta nu c'u'x, man c'o ta jachin jun ri cuya' ta c'ac' chajin anima'aj chwe. Chquixo'l tak ri etzeletajic xecanaj wi can tak ri e walc'ual, are c'u xch'äcan na ri c'ulel chkawäch uj." 
Lamentations1:17 Ri Sion culic' ri u k'ab che u tz'onoxic tok'ob, man c'o ta c'u jachin cacu'bisan ta u c'u'x. Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm takanic chi cäsutix rij ri Jacob cumal tak ri e qui banom qui c'ulel che; ri Jerusalen chque e are' jun jasach ri quetzelex u wäch." 
Lamentations1:18 Ri Ajawaxel xuban ri takalic, rumal rech chi xebenc'ulelaj tak ri e u takanic. ¡Chinitatabej, tinimit iwonojel; chixoc il che rilic ri nu k'oxomal! ¡Ri e tak nu c'ojolab xukuje' tak ri e nu k'apojib e c'amom tak bic jacha lok'om patanijic!" 
Lamentations1:19 Xintz'onoj to'banic chque tak ri e wach ch'abem e are' tak c'ut ri e are' quieb qui wäch e jachinelab chwe. Ri e nu e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri e nu nimak tak tatayib xecäm chupam ri tinimit: ¡Quebinicat che u tzucuxic qui wa cuq'uia' rech cäc'astaj qui wäch! 
Lamentations1:20 ¡Ajawaxel, chila la, ri c'axcolil ri in c'o wi! ¡Quinna' chi carokopij ri uwo nu c'u'x! Ri c'axc'ol cuxuculej ri wanima' aretak quinchomaj chi man coc ta ri tzij pa ri nu jolom. Jela' pa ri be ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j quebucämisaj tak ri e walc'ual, are c'u ri in c'o wi xukuje' c'o cämical." 
Lamentations1:21 Ri winak quequitatabej tak ri e nu juyuwem, man c'o ta c'u jachin cacu'bisan ta nu c'u'x. Conojel tak ri qui banom tak qui c'ulel chwe queta'm ri etzelal ri in c'o wi, quequicot c'ut chi lal lal banowinak. ¡Bana' la chi chpet ri k'ij ri e yo'm la u bixic, je c'u chi qui c'ulmaj jacha' ri nu c'ulmam in!" 
Lamentations1:22 Bana' la chi chopan chwäch la ronojel ri etzelal ri qui banom; je chbana' la chque jacha' ri qui mac jacha' ri banom la chwe in, sibalaj c'u quinq'uis wib che ok'ej; ¡Oquinak u yab ri wanima'!" 
Lamentations2:1 ¡Sibalaj nim ri royowal ri Ajawaxel, chi u k'ekumarisam ri je'lalaj Sion! U t'akim ri u je'lical ri Israel pa ulew, jacha' ri u najil ri caj ruc' ri ulew; mawi c'u ne xnataj ta che, chupam ri royowal ri u tac'alibal ri rakan." 
Lamentations2:2 Ri Ajawaxel man xutac'aba' ta can mawi jun chque ri e rachoch ri Jacob; chupam jok'otaj royowal u yojim ri e to'bal rib ri je'lalaj Juda; e u t'akim pa ulew, e u mach'irisam, ri ajawibal xukuje' tak ri e u k'atal tak tzij." 
Lamentations2:3 Aretak xnicow ri royowal, xa' jut'oy xuya' che ronojel ri u cuinem ri Israel. Xuk'il ri u to'banic ri u cuinem chke aretak xujbe che u c'ulaxic kib ruc' ri c'ulel; ¡u t'ikom jun k'ak' pa Jacob jun k'ak' ri cujarisaj ronojel ri curiko!" 
Lamentations2:4 Ri Ajawaxel, jacha' ta ne jun c'ulel, xutanij ri q'uiakbal ch'ab, xucoj u chuk'ab ri u k'ab; junam ruc' jun c'ulelanel, xuc'äjij ri sibalaj je'l quilic; jacha' jun k'ak', xuq'uiak ri royowal paquiwi' ri winak ri e c'o chupam ri je'lalaj Sion." 
Lamentations2:5 Ri Ajawaxel je xubano jacha' cuban jun c'ulel: xuq'uistzij puwi' ri Israel; xebut'akij conojel tak ri nimak tak cachoch, xebut'akij tak ri e to'bal tak rib, xunojisaj ri je'lalaj Juda che c'axcolil chrij c'axc'olil." 
Lamentations2:6 Jacha' jun eläk'om, xutokij ri u k'ijilabal xuyojij ri c'olbal ri queban wi ri mulin tak ib. Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi pa Sion quesach pa qui jolom coc'owisaxic tak ri e nimak'ij xukuje' ri k'ij que uxlanem. Pa ri u k'ak'al ri royowal, xuxutuj ri ajawinel xukuje' ri cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Lamentations2:7 Ri Ajawaxel u xutum ri u porobal wi tabal tok'ob che, retzelam u wäch ri cäk'ijilax wi; e u jachom tak pa u k'ab ri c'ulel ri e nimak tapia ri e k'atibal rij ri tinimit. ¡E c'o jun rakoj tak chi'aj chupam ri Rachoch ri Ajawaxel, je ta ne jun k'ij re nimak'ij!" 
Lamentations2:8 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' u tzij chi quet'akix ri e u tapia ri je'licalaj Sion. Xusuc'uba' ri chomanic che ri yojyobisanic xutz'akatisaj c'u u banic man xuxlan taj. Tapia tak xukuje' nimak tak tapia xebuya' pa bis, xak c'ätel xewilijic." 
Lamentations2:9 Ri tinimit man e c'o ta chi tz'apibal u chi' mawi e c'opibal tak rech: ¡Xepak'ix tak canok xepobax can tak cho ri ulew! Ri rajawinel xukuje' ri e u k'atal tak tzij e c'o chquixo'l tak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib; man c'o ta chic ri u pixab ri Dios. ¡Mawi ta ne tak ri k'axal tak u tzij quequil ta chic c'utwächinic ri cuya' ta ri Ajawaxel chque! 
Lamentations2:10 Ri e u ri'jab tak tatayib ri je'lalaj Sion quet'uyi cho ri ulew man quech'aw taj, quequiq'uiakala' ulew pa qui jolom quequicoj wakwoj tak atz'iak chquij. Ri c'ojolab aj Jerusalen quequipachba' ri qui jolom c'a cho ri ulew." 
Lamentations2:11 Ri ok'ej quequitzajisaj ri nu bak'wäch, quinna' c'ut chi carokopij ri uwo nu c'u'x; ri chajin anima' ri c'o wuc' kajinak c'a cho ri ulew rumal ri rilic chi sachinak u wäch ri qui tinimit ri e nu winak, rumal ri rilic chi ri ac'alab ri c'ä quetunic quecäm che wi'jal xo'l tak ri ja pa ri tinimit." 
Lamentations2:12 Quecha' c'ut ri ac'alab chque ri qui nan: “¡Man c'o ta chic ka wa mawi u wa'l ka uva!” Quetzak c'ut je ta ne ri e socom che cämical xo'l tak ri ja re ri tinimit, cäq'uis c'u relic ri q'uisbal cuxlab pa qui k'ab ri qui nan." 
Lamentations2:13 ¿Jas ta ruc' catinjunamaj wi o catinjunamataj ta wi, je'licalaj Jerusalen? ¿Jas ta ri c'utbal ri quincuin ta che u ya'ic chawäch che u cu'bisaxic a c'u'x, ch'ajch'oj xukuje' je'licalaj tinimit re Sion? Sibalaj nim jacha' ri plo ri u sachisaxic a wäch; ¿jachin ta lo ri cäcuinic cuya' ta jubik' uxlanic chawe?" 
Lamentations2:14 Ri e c'utwächinic ri xequiya' tak qui bixic tak ri e k'axal tak tzij ri e c'o awuc' chawe xa' e jujun itzelalaj tak subunic. Man xquiya' ta ri a mac chisak chawäch rech xq'extaj taj ri cataklebej, xequiya' qui bixic subunelalaj tak c'utwächinic chawe, xquiban c'u chawe chi quebacojo." 
Lamentations2:15 Aretak catquil ri queboc'ow pa ri be caquipak'apa' qui k'ab che a yok'ic; quexulk'ubic caquislabaj c'ut ri qui jolom che retz'bexic a wäch, je c'u caquibij wa' che ri je'lalaj Jerusalen: “¿La are ta c'u tinimit wa' ri cabinaxic ri tz'akatalaj je'lical re ri uwächulew?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Ri caquiban qui c'ulel chawe xquijak ri qui chi' che a yok'ic. Quexulk'ubic caquibanala' qui palaj caquikuch'uch'ej qui ware, je caquibij wa': “Ketzelam ronojel. Are k'ij wa' ri sibalaj keyem; ¡Xujcuin c'u na che rilic!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Ri Ajawaxel xuq'uis qui banic tak ri e u chomanic, xutz'akatisaj ri u tzij ri kas u bim ulok ojer; xsachisan wächaj ma xcuyun ta c'ut; xuya' c'olbal chi ri c'ulel cutze'j a wäch xuya' u chuk'ab ri catc'ulelanic." 
Lamentations2:18 ¡Chatz'onoj che ri Ajawaxel chi chatuto', Sion, je'licalaj tinimit! ¡Chaya' che ri u wa'l a wäch chi chbelel chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab! ¡Matanaba' ok'ej, maya' chque ri e a bak'wäch chi chetanic!" 
Lamentations2:19 Chatwalijok charakakej a chi' pa tak ri chak'ab, chabeytajisaj ri u rakic a chi'; chajamij ri awanima' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, chaya' che chi belelok jacha' ri ja'; chebalic'a' ri a k'ab chusuq'uil chatz'onoj tok'ob chatbochi'n puwi' ri qui c'aslemal tak ri e awal, ri quec'am xo'l tak ri be re ri tinimit rumal wi'jal." 
Lamentations2:20 Chila la, Ajawaxel, choc la che u chomaxic chi mawi jumul c'o ta jun ri je ta banom la wa' che. Ri nanaxelab, ¿la quequitij ta na lo tak ri cal ri c'ä quetunic? Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri e k'axal tak tzij ¿la quecämisax ta na lo chupam ri k'ijilabal ri cak'ilax wi la?" 
Lamentations2:21 E liq'uiloj ri c'ojolab xukuje' ri nimak tak winak xo'l tak ri ja re ri tinimit; xecämisax rumal ch'ich' re ch'o'j. Chupam ri k'ij re ri oyowal la, xsocon la che cämical ¡Xcämisan la man ruc' ta tok'obisam wächaj!" 
Lamentations2:22 E banom la chi quepe u q'ueyowal pa ronojel c'olbal, e jacha' ta ne ri quepe pa jun nimak'ij; chupam ri k'ij re ri oyowal la, Ajawaxel, man c'o ta jachin ta jun ri cäto'taj ta na. Ri xebenwinakirisaj xukuje' xebenjic'o ri c'ulel xebucämisaj." 
Lamentations3:1 In ri in oc'owinak chupam ri rikoj c'ax chquixe' ri e u xuk'unic tak ri royowal ri Ajawaxel. 
Lamentations3:2 In u c'amom bic chquipam k'ekumalaj tak c'olbal, u banom chwe chi in bininak pa k'ekumalaj tak be;" 
Lamentations3:3 jumul camul pa apachique jok'otaj, cutak ulok ri c'ax panuwi'." 
Lamentations3:4 U banom chi ri'jobinak ri nu ti'jal xukuje' ri nu tz'umal, e u c'äjim tak ri nu bakil;" 
Lamentations3:5 u walijisam jun sutibal wij jun c'ayilaj k'atibal xukuje' rikoj tak c'ax 
Lamentations3:6 u banom chwe chi in jekelinak pa k'ekumalil, jacha' ri xecäm sibalaj ojer." 
Lamentations3:7 Xinutz'apij chupam jun k'atibal ri man c'o ta wi elebal ib; xinuxuculej cuc' alalaj tak tikom tak ch'ich'; 
Lamentations3:8 pune' xinrak nu chi' che u tz'onoxic to'banic, man c'o ta xubij u c'u'x chque tak ri e nu bochi'nic;" 
Lamentations3:9 xuk'atij ri nu be cumal nimak tak tapia re abaj, ¡xuq'uex ri u beya'l tak ri nu be!" 
Lamentations3:10 Ri are' uxinak jun coj chwe ri u c'u'm rib, jacha' jun os ri cuq'uiak' ta rib chwij." 
Lamentations3:11 In u jech'obisam che ri nu be, in u jisom, ¡in u nojisam che xibin ib!" 
Lamentations3:12 ¡Xutanij ri q'uiakbal ch'ab xinutac'aba' c'ut rech chwe in quebuq'uiak wi ri e u ch'ab! 
Lamentations3:13 Ri ch'ab c'ut ri e u q'uiakom ri Ajawaxel sibalaj naj e t'ist'obinak bic chwe. 
Lamentations3:14 Conojel ri e nu winakil quetz'en chwe; jok'otaj chi jok'otaj in u cach' ri etz'ben wächaj ri cäquiban chwe. 
Lamentations3:15 Ri Ajawaxel in u nojisam chque c'ayil; c'a ri uq'uia' ri u yo'm chwe. 
Lamentations3:16 Xebuc'äjij tak ri nu ware cho ri ulew; xuban chwe chi xinti' ri puc'uc' ulew. 
Lamentations3:17 Ri jamaril najtininak chwe sachinak chic pa nu jolom ri c'olem pa utzil. 
Lamentations3:18 Oquinak chi c'u ne pa nu jolom chi cäminak chic ri jicomalaj weyebal c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel. 
Lamentations3:19 Cänataj ri nu bis xukuje' ri nu tuquelal chwe, ri nu c'ayil xukuje' ri nu rikoj c'ax;" 
Lamentations3:20 quinoc che u chomaxic wa' cäpe c'u wanima'. 
Lamentations3:21 Jun jasach c'ut quinwaj chi ma ta cäsach pa nu jolom quinjiquiba' c'ut ri weyebal c'u'x chrij: 
Lamentations3:22 Ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri Ajawaxel man c'o ta u q'uisic, mawi quetzaj taj ri e rutzil." 
Lamentations3:23 Ak'abibal chi ak'abibal quec'ac'aric; ¡Sibalaj nim ri u jiquil! 
Lamentations3:24 Quinbij c'u chwe chbil wib: ¡Ri Ajawaxel are' ronojel chwe in; rumal ri' chrij are' quinjiquiba' wi nu c'u'x! 
Lamentations3:25 Ri Ajawaxel utz, cuc' ri caquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij, cuc' ri quenakajin che." 
Lamentations3:26 Are utz na cakeyej ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel man ruc' ta ch'ach'atem. 
Lamentations3:27 Are utz na che ri winak we cucoj rib chuxe' ri eka'bal pa ri u ch'utinal. 
Lamentations3:28 Ri winak rajawaxic cacanaj u tuquel mach'ach'at c'ut aretak cätak che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel; 
Lamentations3:29 rajawaxic che, cumach'irisaj rib cutz'umaj ri ulew, craj ne c'ä c'o eyebal c'uxaj che;" 
Lamentations3:30 rajawaxic chuchi'j ri u perajil ri u palaj chuwäch ri casocowic, chutakej c'u u c'ulaxic ri c'ax." 
Lamentations3:31 Ri Ajawaxel man xa' ta jumul ri' uj ta u tzakom ta canok. 
Lamentations3:32 Pune' ta cubano chi cäriktaj c'ax, quel c'u na u c'u'x xukuje', rumal rech chi man c'o ta je ri u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj." 
Lamentations3:33 Man c'u cakaj ta chuwäch u banic c'ax mawi ri u banic k'oxomal chque ri winak. 
Lamentations3:34 Ri quixak'alexic ri e c'o pa che' ri e aj tinimitib man ruc' ta tok'obisam wächaj. 
Lamentations3:35 Ri man u banic ta suq'uilal che jun winak jacha' ri ya'tal che kas chuwäch ri Aj Chicajil," 
Lamentations3:36 ri u jech'obisaxic ri u banic ri suq'uilal puwi' jun il e jastak wa' ri quebuc'okoj ri Ajawaxel. 
Lamentations3:37 Aretak c'o jas caya' u bixic, aretak c'o c'ulmatajinak are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel u takom u banic." 
Lamentations3:38 Ri e utzil tak xukuje' tak ri etzelal quepetic rumal rech chi je cubij ri Aj Chicajil. 
Lamentations3:39 Uxinak c'ut ri winak jun ajmac. ¿Jas ta ri cuch'ach'atej chupam we c'aslemal ri'? 
Lamentations3:40 Kas utz u nic'oxic ri ka c'aslemal ka bana', chujtzelej c'ut ruc' ri Ajawaxel." 
Lamentations3:41 Chekapakaba' chuwäch ri Dios ri c'o chicaj ri e ka chomanic xukuje' tak ri ka ch'awem ruc' Dios. 
Lamentations3:42 Ri e ka mac tak xukuje' tak ri e ka c'ulelanic, ¿la ma ta casach ka lo mac chque wa'?" 
Lamentations3:43 Xujsutij la ruc' ri oyowal la, xujterenej la pa kakan, ¡xesaj la ri ka c'aslemal man xcoj ta la tok'obisam wächaj!" 
Lamentations3:44 Xabolk'otij ib la chupam jun sutz' rech man quetatabej ta la ri e ka bochi'nic. 
Lamentations3:45 Uj yo'm la pa nimalaj yok'ical chquiwäch conojel ri winak. 
Lamentations3:46 Conojel ri qui banom qui c'ulel chke caquijak ri qui chi' che ka yok'ic; 
Lamentations3:47 xibin tak ib, c'amibal tak, yojinic xukuje' etzeletajic, ¡are wa' ri uj kajbeninak!" 
Lamentations3:48 Nima' re u wa'l tak wächaj quebel ulok chque ri e nu bak'wäch chuwäch ri u sachisaxic u wäch ri lok'alaj ka tinimit. 
Lamentations3:49 Quebok' ri nu bak'wäch man quebuxlan taj, man c'o ta c'u uxlanic." 
Lamentations3:50 C'ä ri Ajawaxel ri c'o pa ri caj caca'y na ulok chke chila' chicaj. 
Lamentations3:51 Quebopan ri e u k'oxomal ri nu bak'wäch c'ä ruc' ri wanima', rumal ri xquic'ulmaj ri e u mia'l ri nu tinimit." 
Lamentations3:52 Man c'o ta jas weklem, ri quinquic'ulelaj in kajinak pa qui k'ab jacha' ta ne jun chicop ri c'o ri u xic';" 
Lamentations3:53 in c'aslic xinquimuk chupam jun c'ua', xquichuk c'u ri u wi' ruc' jun abaj." 
Lamentations3:54 Ri ja' xinumuk ronojel, xinchomaj c'ut “Sachinak ba' nu wäch.”" 
Lamentations3:55 In, Ajawaxel, quinataj ri bi' la kas c'ä chupam ri c'ua':" 
Lamentations3:56 chtatabej la ri nu ch'abal; choc la il chque tak ri nu bochi'nic. 
Lamentations3:57 Pa ri k'ij ri chinsiq'uin che la saj la wuc', chbij c'u la chwe: “Maxe'j awib.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Chinto' la, Ajawaxel, chupam ri nu tijoj chuk'ab, ¡Chto'tajisaj la ri nu c'aslemal!" 
Lamentations3:59 Chila la Ajawaxel, ri man suq'uilal taj ri e nu coch'om, ¡chbana' ba' la ri suq'uilal chwe!" 
Lamentations3:60 Chila la tak ri qui rayinic che nu ch'äquic xukuje' tak conojel ri qui chomanic che u banic c'ax chwe. 
Lamentations3:61 Chetatabej la Ajawaxel, ri e qui il tzakoj xukuje' conojel tak ri qui chomanic che u banic c'ax chwe;" 
Lamentations3:62 ri e qui yok'onic tak ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe, ri xak amak'el quinquiyoko' che u banic c'ax chwe." 
Lamentations3:63 ¡Chila la chi pa conojel tak ri e qui banoj cäquetz'bej nu wäch! 
Lamentations3:64 Chya' ba' la chque, Ajawaxel, ri takal chque, chya' ba' la chque jachique tak ri e takal chque tak ri e qui banoj." 
Lamentations3:65 Chabajirisaj ri qui ch'obonic, chkasaj la ri c'okonic paquiwi'." 
Lamentations3:66 Chebeterenej la pa cakan ruc' oyowal, Ajawaxel, ¡bana' la chi chsach qui wäch cho we uwächulew ri'!" 
Lamentations4:1 ¡E k'ekarinak c'ut ri k'an puak! ¡U tzakom ri u ruc'upinic ri coc'alaj k'an puak! ¡E jabuninak pa conojel tak ri xquina ri abaj tak rech ri tastalic k'ijilabal! 
Lamentations4:2 Ri e aj Sion, sibalaj nimak qui k'ij, ri c'o na cajil chuwäch ri k'an puak camic e xa' je quebil chic e jacha' bo'j re t'ac ri banom rumal apachique banal bo'j." 
Lamentations4:3 Xukuje' ne ri catitab ri xexalaj tak awajib caquiya' ri qui tu' quequitubisaj c'u ne ri alaj tak cal, are c'u ri u chuch ri nu tinimit co ranima', c'o ranima' jacha' jun abestrus aj chaki'j uwo sak." 
Lamentations4:4 Sibalaj cachaki'j qui chi' ri ac'alab ri c'a quetunic canaq'ui c'ut ri cak' pa qui chi'. Ri ac'alab caquitz'onoj qui wa man c'o ta c'u jachin ri cayo'w ta chque. 
Lamentations4:5 Ri sibalaj je'l u tzukic quib caquiban nabe, camic quecäm rumal wi'jal xo'l tak ri ja pa ri tinimit. Ri xeq'uiy pa qui niq'uijil tak ri k'inomal, camic e jekel pa tixbal tak mes." 
Lamentations4:6 Ri retzelal ri u chuch ri nu u tinimit c'o na chuwäch ri macaj ri xuban ri Sodom, ri xa' pa jok'otaj xsachisax u wäch man c'o ta c'u jun ri xelch'ojin ta ruc'." 
Lamentations4:7 Ri rachijab ri e cha'talic c'o na ri qui sakil chuwäch ri tew, c'o na ri qui sakil chuwäch ri leche; ri qui cuerp c'o na qui quiäkal chuwäch ri quiäk abaj ri coral; ri e u je'lical ri cakan qui k'ab e jacha' ri räx abaj ri sapir." 
Lamentations4:8 Are c'u ri camic c'o na ri qui k'ekal chquiwäch ri k'ekumalil; man c'o ta jachin jun cach'obow ta chquiwäch xo'l tak ri ja re ri tinimit. Ri qui tz'umal quenaq'ui cho tak ri qui bakil, ¡e uxinak chaki'j jacha' ri si'!" 
Lamentations4:9 Are utz na quech ri xecäm chupam ri ch'o'j chquiwäch ri xecäm rumal wi'jal, rumal rech chi nojimal xecäm wa' aretak xeq'uis tak ri qui wächinic ri ulew."
